fact_summary: 被告人在羁押期间主动向看守所管教交代司法机关尚未掌握的其他犯罪事实 / While in pretrial detention, a defendant voluntarily disclosed to a detention officer additional criminal conduct not yet known to authorities.
cn_claim: 被采取强制措施的犯罪嫌疑人如实供述司法机关尚未掌握的其他罪行，以自首论（刑法第67条第二款）；主动交代可从轻或减轻处罚。
us_claim: Voluntary disclosure of criminal conduct not yet known to authorities may constitute cooperation supporting a downward departure under the U.S. Sentencing Guidelines Sec 5K1.1, though it does not constitute a formal guilty plea or self-surrender for purposes of a sentencing reduction under the acceptance-of-responsibility guideline Sec 3E1.1.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US reward post-arrest voluntary disclosure of unknown crimes with sentencing mitigation, though CN treats it as quasi-voluntary-surrender and US as cooperation-based downward departure.

fact_summary: 被告人在羁押期间主动向看守所管教交代司法机关尚未掌握的其他犯罪事实 / A detainee voluntarily disclosed additional crimes unknown to authorities.
cn_claim: 被采取强制措施的犯罪嫌疑人如实供述司法机关尚未掌握的其他罪行，以自首论（刑法第67条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A defendant who cooperates with authorities by disclosing additional criminal conduct may receive a sentencing discount; the degree of discount depends on the extent and value of the cooperation; HKSAR v. Chan Kai Shek [2005] 3 HKC 123.
notes: Both CN and HK provide sentencing mitigation for post-arrest disclosure of unknown crimes, with CN codifying it as deemed voluntary surrender and HK applying a cooperation-based sentencing discount.

fact_summary: 原告在诉讼中申请对被告财产进行诉前保全，但最终败诉，被告反诉要求原告赔偿因保全造成的损失 / A plaintiff obtained a pre-judgment asset freeze that was later dissolved when the plaintiff lost the case; the defendant sought damages for losses caused by the freeze.
cn_claim: 申请有错误的，申请人应赔偿被申请人因保全所遭受的损失（民事诉讼法第105条）。
us_claim: A party who obtains a preliminary injunction or prejudgment attachment that is later dissolved may be liable for damages under the injunction bond; Fed. R. Civ. P. 65(c) requires the moving party to give security for costs and damages; wrongful attachment or garnishment may give rise to a claim for abuse of process or malicious prosecution.
hk_claim: A party who obtains a Mareva injunction (asset-freezing order) is required to give an undertaking in damages; if the injunction is later discharged, the applicant will be liable on the undertaking for any loss caused to the respondent; the undertaking in damages is a standard condition of interim injunctive relief.
notes: All three jurisdictions require the applicant for pre-judgment asset-freezing relief to provide a security or undertaking, and hold the applicant liable for losses if the freeze is later found unjustified, though the procedural mechanisms differ (CN statutory damages, US injunction bond, HK undertaking in damages).

fact_summary: 原告在诉讼中申请对被告财产进行诉前保全，但最终败诉，被告反诉要求赔偿因保全造成的损失 / A plaintiff obtained a pre-judgment asset freeze that was dissolved after the plaintiff lost.
cn_claim: 申请有错误的，申请人应赔偿被申请人因保全所遭受的损失（民事诉讼法第105条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A party who obtains a Mareva injunction must give an undertaking in damages and will be liable on the undertaking for any loss caused to the respondent if the injunction is later discharged or found to have been improperly obtained.
notes: Both CN and HK impose liability on applicants for damages caused by wrongful pre-judgment asset freezes, with CN codifying a statutory compensation obligation and HK enforcing the undertaking in damages.

fact_summary: 目标公司董事会面对敌意收购，在未获股东会授权的情况下实施了毒丸计划 / A target company board adopted a poison pill without shareholder approval in response to a hostile takeover bid.
cn_claim: 上市公司收购中，目标公司董事会采取反收购措施应维护公司及股东合法权益，不得滥用职权损害股东利益（上市公司收购管理办法第8条、第33条）。
us_claim: A board may adopt a shareholder-rights plan (poison pill) without prior shareholder approval if it is a proportionate response to a reasonably perceived threat to corporate policy and effectiveness; such action is reviewed under the Unocal enhanced-scrutiny standard; Unocal Corp. v. Mesa Petroleum Co., 493 A.2d 946 (Del. 1985); Moran v. Household International, Inc., 500 A.2d 1346 (Del. 1985).
hk_claim: Directors may take defensive measures against a hostile bid if they act in good faith in what they believe to be the best interests of the company; the board's actions must be proportionate to the threat and not motivated by entrenchment; the Takeovers Code administered by the SFC also regulates defensive measures.
notes: All three jurisdictions permit board-adopted defensive measures against hostile bids, but with varying constraints: CN requires shareholder-court alignment, US applies Unocal proportionality review, and HK applies the Takeovers Code plus good-faith directors' duties.

fact_summary: 目标公司董事会面对敌意收购实施毒丸计划 / A target board adopted a poison pill against a hostile bid.
cn_claim: 反收购措施应维护公司及股东合法权益（上市公司收购管理办法第8条、第33条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Directors may take defensive measures if they act in good faith in the best interests of the company; the Takeovers Code regulates defensive measures, and the Panel may rule on their validity.
notes: Both CN and HK regulate board defensive measures through a combination of takeover-regulation codes and fiduciary duties, with CN codifying shareholder-protection requirements and HK combining the Takeovers Code with directors' duties.

fact_summary: 网购消费者购买的商品存在质量缺陷但与网页描述严重不符，要求退货退款并主张三倍价款惩罚性赔偿 / A consumer purchased goods online that were materially different from the product description; the consumer sought a refund plus punitive damages.
cn_claim: 经营者提供商品有欺诈行为的，应按消费者要求增加赔偿其受到的损失，增加赔偿金额为商品价款的三倍（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Consumer-protection statutes in many states allow treble damages for deceptive trade practices; for example, the Texas Deceptive Trade Practices Act (Bus. and Com. Code Sec 17.50) permits treble damages for knowing violations; the FTC Act Sec 5 also prohibits unfair or deceptive acts or practices affecting commerce, though it does not provide a private right of action for damages.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US authorize treble/multiple damages for consumer deception, with CN codifying a statutory three-times-damages remedy and US providing state-level treble-damages statutes plus FTC enforcement.

fact_summary: 网购消费者购买的商品与网页描述严重不符，要求退货退款并主张惩罚性赔偿 / A consumer purchased goods materially different from the online description, seeking a refund and enhanced damages.
cn_claim: 经营者有欺诈行为的，应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362) s.7, it is an offence to apply a false trade description to goods; a consumer who has purchased misdescribed goods may have a civil claim for breach of contract or misrepresentation, and the court may award damages for the loss suffered, though HK does not have a general statutory treble-damages remedy for consumer deception.
notes: CN provides statutory treble damages for consumer fraud while HK relies on general contract/misrepresentation remedies under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance without a statutory multiple-damages provision, creating a remedies asymmetry.

fact_summary: A buyer purchased a used car that the seller described as having a single previous owner; after purchase, the buyer discovered the car had been in a major collision and rebuilt / 买方购买了一辆据称只有一位前任车主的二手车，后发现该车曾发生严重碰撞并重建
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Misrepresentation of a vehicle's accident history is actionable as common-law fraud and may also violate state consumer-protection statutes; the Magnuson-Moss Warranty Act (15 U.S.C. Sec 2301 et seq.) may apply if the sale included a written warranty, and the FTC's Used Car Rule (16 C.F.R. Part 455) requires dealers to post a Buyers Guide disclosing warranty coverage.
hk_claim: A seller who makes a false representation about the history of a vehicle may be liable for misrepresentation under the Misrepresentation Ordinance (Cap. 284); the buyer may rescind the contract or claim damages in tort for deceit.
notes: Both US and HK provide remedies for vehicle-history misrepresentation, with US offering a suite of federal and state consumer-protection statutes and HK relying on the Misrepresentation Ordinance and common-law deceit.

fact_summary: 申请人向行政机关申请政府信息公开，行政机关以涉及国家秘密为由拒绝 / A citizen requested government information under open-records law, and the agency denied the request citing national security.
cn_claim: 行政机关不得公开涉及国家秘密的政府信息，但应对不予公开的理由进行说明（政府信息公开条例第16条、第17条）。
us_claim: The Freedom of Information Act (5 U.S.C. Sec 552) requires federal agencies to disclose records upon request unless the records fall within a statutory exemption, including Exemption 1 for properly classified national-security information; agencies must provide a Vaughn index describing withheld documents and justifying the exemption; Vaughn v. Rosen, 484 F.2d 820 (D.C. Cir. 1973).
hk_claim: The Code on Access to Information requires government bureaux and departments to make information available unless disclosure would harm national security, defense, or international relations; refusal must be justified by reference to the specific exemption.
notes: All three jurisdictions recognize a national-security exemption to government-information access, require the agency to justify non-disclosure, and provide for independent review of the exemption claim.

fact_summary: 申请人申请政府信息公开，行政机关以涉及国家秘密为由拒绝 / A citizen's open-records request was denied on national-security grounds.
cn_claim: 行政机关不得公开涉及国家秘密的信息（政府信息公开条例第16条、第17条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: The Code on Access to Information allows refusal where disclosure would harm national security, defense, or international relations; the agency must provide reasons.
notes: Both CN and HK provide a national-security exemption to government-information access while requiring the agency to justify the refusal.

fact_summary: A streaming service geoblocked content to prevent access from outside licensed territories; a user employed a VPN to circumvent the geoblock and access the content / 用户使用VPN绕过流媒体服务的地理封锁访问受限内容
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Circumventing a technological protection measure that controls access to a copyrighted work may violate the Digital Millennium Copyright Act anti-circumvention provision (17 U.S.C. Sec 1201(a)(1)(A)); however, whether geoblocking constitutes an effective TPM and whether VPN circumvention falls within the statute is unsettled; the Copyright Office has conducted rulemaking on exemptions under Sec 1201.
hk_claim: The Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528) s.273 prohibits circumvention of technological measures applied to copyright works; whether geoblocking constitutes a technological protection measure and whether VPN circumvention falls within the prohibition depends on whether the measure is an effective technological measure within the meaning of the Ordinance.
notes: Both US and HK have anti-circumvention legislation (DMCA Sec 1201 / Copyright Ordinance s.273) that could theoretically reach VPN geoblock circumvention, though the application remains legally unsettled in both jurisdictions.

fact_summary: 医疗美容机构为顾客实施抽脂手术，因操作不当导致顾客死亡 / A cosmetic surgery clinic performed liposuction on a patient who died from surgical complications caused by practitioner error.
cn_claim: 医务人员在诊疗活动中未尽到与当时医疗水平相应的诊疗义务造成患者损害的，医疗机构应承担赔偿责任（民法典第1221条）；医疗美容属于诊疗活动，适用医疗损害责任。
us_claim: Medical malpractice requires proof that the practitioner's conduct fell below the applicable standard of care, and cosmetic surgery is held to the same standard as other medical procedures; informed consent must include disclosure of material risks; wrongful death statutes in each state govern survival and wrongful-death claims; Canterbury v. Spence, 464 F.2d 772 (D.C. Cir. 1972).
hk_claim: Medical negligence is assessed under the Bolam/Bolitho standard: whether the practitioner acted in accordance with a practice accepted as proper by a responsible body of medical opinion, and whether that body of opinion withstands logical analysis; cosmetic surgery is held to the same duty of care as other medical procedures.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat cosmetic surgery as medical treatment subject to professional-negligence standards, though CN applies a statutory medical-level standard (Civil Code Art. 1221), US uses the reasonable-practitioner standard plus informed-consent doctrine, and HK applies Bolam/Bolitho.

fact_summary: 医疗美容机构为顾客实施抽脂手术，因操作不当导致顾客死亡 / A liposuction patient died from surgical error at a cosmetic clinic.
cn_claim: 医务人员未尽到与当时医疗水平相应的诊疗义务造成患者损害的，医疗机构应承担赔偿责任（民法典第1221条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Medical negligence is assessed under the Bolam/Bolitho standard; cosmetic surgery practitioners owe the same duty of care as other medical professionals.
notes: Both CN and HK treat cosmetic-surgery negligence as medical malpractice, with CN using a statutory medical-standard test and HK applying Bolam/Bolitho.

fact_summary: 有限责任公司两名股东对增资决议投反对票但未能阻止决议通过，反对股东要求公司以合理价格收购其股权 / Dissenting shareholders who voted against a capital increase resolution sought mandatory buyout of their shares at fair value.
cn_claim: 对股东会决议投反对票的股东可请求公司按合理价格收购其股权（公司法第74条第一款）；公司增资属于触发异议股东回购请求权的法定情形。
us_claim: Dissenting shareholders in a merger or fundamental change may exercise appraisal rights to demand fair value for their shares under state corporate law; Delaware GCL Sec 262 grants appraisal rights for mergers but generally not for ordinary capital increases; Weinberger v. UOP, Inc., 457 A.2d 701 (Del. 1983).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US offer dissenting-shareholder buyout remedies, but CN extends appraisal to capital-increase resolutions while US typically limits it to mergers and fundamental transactions.

fact_summary: 异议股东对增资决议投反对票后要求公司按合理价格回购股权 / Dissenting shareholders sought mandatory buyout after a capital increase resolution.
cn_claim: 异议股东可请求公司按合理价格收购其股权（公司法第74条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) s.724, a member may petition for relief on the ground of unfair prejudice; a compulsory share buyout may be ordered as a remedy where the company's affairs are conducted in a manner unfairly prejudicial to the petitioner, including dilution through capital increases.
notes: Both CN and HK provide minority-shareholder remedies for dilutive capital increases, with CN providing a statutory appraisal right and HK channeling through unfair-prejudice petitions.

fact_summary: 外国法院作出的离婚判决涉及位于中国境内的不动产分割 / A foreign divorce judgment included division of real property located in China.
cn_claim: 外国法院判决需要中国法院承认和执行的，可由当事人直接向中国有管辖权的中级人民法院申请承认和执行（民事诉讼法第288条）；外国判决不违反中国法律基本原则或国家主权的应予承认。
us_claim: Foreign-country money judgments are recognized and enforced under the Uniform Foreign-Country Money Judgments Recognition Act; judgments affecting title to real property in the forum state are generally not directly enforceable through recognition proceedings because courts lack subject-matter jurisdiction over foreign land; the judgment creditor must bring a new action on the judgment or the underlying claim.
hk_claim: A foreign judgment in personam may be enforced at common law by bringing an action on the judgment; a foreign judgment affecting title to immovable property situated in Hong Kong does not directly affect title, and a fresh action asserting property rights in Hong Kong is required.
notes: All three jurisdictions face the territoriality problem with foreign judgments affecting domestic real property: CN applies recognition-proceedings with public-policy screening, US uses the local-action rule, and HK requires a fresh action for domestic property rights.

fact_summary: 外国法院离婚判决涉及中国境内不动产分割 / A foreign divorce judgment included division of real property in China.
cn_claim: 外国法院判决需要中国法院承认和执行（民事诉讼法第288条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A foreign judgment in personam may be enforced by action at common law; a judgment affecting title to immovable property in Hong Kong does not directly affect title, and a fresh action is required to assert domestic property rights.
notes: Both CN and HK require domestic proceedings for the enforcement of foreign judgments affecting domestic real property, recognizing the territoriality limitation on judgment recognition.

fact_summary: A party sought to enforce a foreign arbitration award in the local jurisdiction, and the losing party argued it violated public policy / 一方申请执行外国仲裁裁决，被申请人以违反公共政策为由抗辩
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under the New York Convention (implemented through the FAA, 9 U.S.C. Sec 201 et seq.), enforcement of a foreign arbitral award may be refused if enforcement would be contrary to the public policy of the United States; the public-policy defense is construed narrowly and applies only where enforcement would violate the forum state's most basic notions of morality and justice; Parsons and Whittemore Overseas Co. v. Societe Generale de L'Industrie du Papier (RAKTA), 508 F.2d 969 (2d Cir. 1974).
hk_claim: Under the Arbitration Ordinance (Cap. 609) s.86 implementing the New York Convention, enforcement of a Convention award may be refused if enforcement would be contrary to the public policy of Hong Kong; the public-policy ground is construed narrowly and reserved for cases where enforcement would violate fundamental principles of justice or morality.
notes: Both US and HK implement the New York Convention public-policy defense narrowly, reserving it for enforcement that would violate fundamental principles of justice or morality.

fact_summary: 被告人在庭审中翻供，声称此前认罪供述系在刑讯逼供下作出 / A defendant recanted at trial, claiming the prior confession was coerced through torture.
cn_claim: 采用刑讯逼供等非法方法收集的犯罪嫌疑人供述应予以排除（刑事诉讼法第56条）；被告人在庭审中翻供的应结合全案证据综合审查判断。
us_claim: A confession is involuntary and inadmissible under the Due Process Clause if extracted through physical coercion, threats, or promises that overbear the defendant's will; the prosecution bears the burden of proving voluntariness by a preponderance of the evidence; Jackson v. Denno, 378 U.S. 368 (1964); Colorado v. Connelly, 479 U.S. 157 (1986).
hk_claim: A confession is admissible only if the prosecution proves beyond reasonable doubt that it was voluntary; a confession obtained through oppression, including torture, is involuntary and must be excluded; the trial judge must hold a voir dire to determine voluntariness before the confession reaches the jury.
notes: All three jurisdictions exclude coerced confessions and place the burden on the prosecution to prove voluntariness, though CN applies a statutory exclusionary rule, US uses the due-process voluntariness test, and HK requires proof beyond reasonable doubt.

fact_summary: 甲方委托乙方开发一款企业ERP系统，开发过程中需求频繁变更导致项目严重超期超预算 / A client commissioned custom software development; frequent mid-project requirement changes caused severe delays and cost overruns.
cn_claim: 技术开发合同履行中，因出现无法克服的技术困难导致开发失败的，风险由当事人合理分担；一方提出变更需求的应就变更部分另行协商费用和期限（民法典第858条、第859条）。
us_claim: Under the Uniform Computer Information Transactions Act (UCITA) and common-law contract principles, a client's requested changes outside the agreed scope constitute additional work entitling the developer to equitable adjustment; the changes clause in a fixed-price contract requires written authorization for scope changes and corresponding price and schedule adjustments.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide contractual mechanisms for scope-change adjustments in software-development contracts, with CN codifying risk-sharing and change-negotiation requirements and US applying changes-clause and equitable-adjustment principles.

fact_summary: A hospital lost a patient's medical records and the patient was unable to prove negligence in a subsequent malpractice claim / 医院遗失患者病历致患者在后续医疗过失诉讼中无法举证
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Spoliation of evidence, including loss of medical records, may give rise to an adverse inference that the missing evidence would have been unfavorable to the spoliating party; in some jurisdictions, intentional or negligent spoliation may also support an independent tort claim for spoliation of evidence or a sanction under the court's inherent authority.
hk_claim: The loss or destruction of medical records may give rise to an adverse inference against the hospital in a subsequent negligence claim; the court may draw an inference that the missing records would not have assisted the hospital's case, and in egregious cases may strike out the hospital's defense.
notes: Both US and HK allow adverse inferences from the loss of medical records, with US additionally recognizing spoliation as a potential independent tort and HK employing the adverse-inference approach within the negligence framework.

fact_summary: 知名餐饮企业发现另一城市有同名餐厅使用与其完全相同的店名和装潢 / A well-known restaurant chain discovered an identically named restaurant with identical decor operating in another city.
cn_claim: 擅自使用与他人有一定影响的商品名称、包装、装潢等相同或近似的标识，引人误认为是他人商品或与他人存在特定联系的，构成不正当竞争（反不正当竞争法第6条）。
us_claim: Trade dress protection under Section 43(a) of the Lanham Act (15 U.S.C. Sec 1125(a)) protects the overall appearance and image of a business where it is distinctive and non-functional; restaurant trade dress including decor, menu design, and color schemes may be protected if it has acquired secondary meaning; Two Pesos, Inc. v. Taco Cabana, Inc., 505 U.S. 763 (1992).
hk_claim: The common-law tort of passing off protects a trader's goodwill against misrepresentation that causes confusion among consumers; restaurant name and get-up may be protected under passing off if the plaintiff has established goodwill, the defendant made a misrepresentation, and damage resulted; Reckitt and Colman Products Ltd v. Borden Inc [1990] 1 WLR 491.
notes: All three jurisdictions protect restaurant trade dress against copying, with CN using anti-unfair-competition law, US applying Lanham Act Sec 43(a), and HK using the common-law tort of passing off.

fact_summary: 知名餐饮企业发现异地有同名餐厅使用完全相同的店名和装潢 / A restaurant chain found a copycat restaurant with identical name and decor in another city.
cn_claim: 擅自使用与他人有一定影响的商品名称、装潢等相同标识构成不正当竞争（反不正当竞争法第6条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: The common-law tort of passing off protects a trader's goodwill against misrepresentation causing consumer confusion about the source of goods or services; Reckitt and Colman Products Ltd v. Borden Inc [1990] 1 WLR 491.
notes: Both CN and HK protect restaurant trade dress, with CN using statutory unfair-competition law and HK applying the common-law tort of passing off.

fact_summary: 公司未经清算即办理注销登记，债权人起诉要求股东对公司债务承担清偿责任 / A company was dissolved without liquidation proceedings; a creditor sued the shareholders directly for the company's outstanding debts.
cn_claim: 公司未经清算即办理注销登记的，股东应对公司债务承担清偿责任（公司法解释二第20条）。
us_claim: Shareholders who receive corporate assets upon dissolution may be liable to creditors under state fraudulent-transfer laws and the trust-fund doctrine, which treats corporate assets as a trust fund for creditors at dissolution; successor liability may also attach where the business continues under new ownership; Del. GCL Sec 281-282.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US impose post-dissolution liability on shareholders where dissolution bypasses creditor protection, with CN codifying direct shareholder liability and US applying fraudulent-transfer and trust-fund doctrines.

fact_summary: 公司未经清算即注销，债权人起诉股东要求清偿债务 / A company dissolved without liquidation; a creditor sued shareholders for corporate debts.
cn_claim: 未经清算即注销的，股东应对公司债务承担清偿责任（公司法解释二第20条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) the court may order restoration of a dissolved company to the register for the purpose of pursuing claims; shareholders may be liable for debts to the extent of assets they received on dissolution.
notes: Both CN and HK provide creditor remedies against shareholders or the company after irregular dissolution, with CN imposing direct shareholder liability and HK allowing restoration-to-register proceedings plus asset-recovery from shareholders.

fact_summary: 女性求职者在面试中被问及婚育计划后未被录用，提起就业歧视诉讼 / A female job applicant was asked about her marriage and childbearing plans during an interview and was not hired.
cn_claim: 用人单位招用人员不得以性别为由拒绝录用妇女或提高录用标准（就业促进法第27条；妇女权益保障法第43条）；询问婚育计划并以此为由不予录用构成就业性别歧视。
us_claim: Inquiries about marital status and childbearing plans that are used to deny employment constitute sex discrimination under Title VII of the Civil Rights Act (42 U.S.C. Sec 2000e-2); such inquiries create an inference of discriminatory intent; Phillips v. Martin Marietta Corp., 400 U.S. 542 (1971).
hk_claim: An employer who asks questions about an applicant's marital status or family plans and denies employment on that basis may be liable for sex discrimination under the Sex Discrimination Ordinance (Cap. 480) s.9; such pre-employment inquiries may constitute evidence of discriminatory practice.
notes: All three jurisdictions prohibit sex-based hiring discrimination including adverse decisions based on marital or family-plan status, with CN codifying the prohibition in employment statutes and US and HK treating such inquiries as evidence of discriminatory intent.

fact_summary: 无人驾驶测试车辆在公共道路上发生交通事故致行人死亡 / A pedestrian was killed by an autonomous test vehicle on a public road.
cn_claim: 因道路交通事故造成人身伤亡的，由有过错的一方承担赔偿责任；机动车与非机动车驾驶人、行人之间发生交通事故，机动车一方不能证明行人有过错的应承担赔偿责任（道路交通安全法第76条）；无人驾驶车辆的事故责任还应结合车辆所有人、管理人、技术提供方的过错综合认定。
us_claim: Liability for autonomous-vehicle accidents is developing; theories include products liability against the manufacturer, negligence against the operator or remote monitor, and possibly strict liability under the Restatement (Third) of Torts: Products Liability Sec 2; many states have enacted autonomous-vehicle statutes defining the roles and responsibilities of operators and manufacturers.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US are developing autonomous-vehicle liability frameworks, with CN applying a combination of traffic-law presumptions and multi-party fault analysis and US exploring products-liability and operator-negligence theories under developing statutory and common-law frameworks.

fact_summary: 夫妻双方均为中国公民但在香港工作生活多年，一方在内地法院起诉离婚 / A married couple, both Chinese citizens, had lived and worked in Hong Kong for many years; one spouse filed for divorce in a mainland Chinese court.
cn_claim: 中国公民在境外未定居的，其离婚诉讼可由国内一方住所地或婚姻缔结地人民法院管辖（民诉法解释第13-16条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: The Hong Kong courts have jurisdiction over divorce proceedings if either party is domiciled in Hong Kong or has been habitually resident in Hong Kong for at least three years; the Matrimonial Causes Ordinance (Cap. 179) s.3 governs jurisdiction.
notes: Both CN and HK courts may exercise divorce jurisdiction over couples with cross-border connections, with CN using nationality-plus-residence tests and HK using domicile and habitual-residence tests.

fact_summary: An auditor issued a clean opinion on financial statements that contained material misstatements; investors who relied on the statements sued the auditor / 审计师对含有重大错报的财务报表出具无保留意见
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Auditors may be liable to third-party investors for negligent misrepresentation under Sec 10(b) of the Securities Exchange Act and Rule 10b-5, requiring proof of a material misstatement, scienter, reliance, and loss causation; additionally, auditors owe a duty of care to foreseeable users of their audit reports under state common law in jurisdictions following the Restatement (Second) of Torts Sec 552; Central Bank of Denver, N.A. v. First Interstate Bank of Denver, N.A., 511 U.S. 164 (1994).
hk_claim: Auditors owe a duty of care to those whom they know will rely on their audit opinions; liability for negligent misstatement to third parties follows the principles in Caparo Industries plc v. Dickman [1990] 2 AC 605, requiring proximity between auditor and plaintiff, foreseeability of reliance, and that it is fair, just and reasonable to impose a duty.
notes: Both US and HK impose auditor liability for negligent misstatements to foreseeable third-party users, with US applying Rule 10b-5 and the Restatement test and HK following the Caparo proximity-plus-fairness framework.

fact_summary: 买方在双十一购物节以标错价格的超低价购买了奢侈品，电商平台以重大误解为由拒绝发货 / A buyer purchased luxury goods at a mistakenly listed ultra-low price during an online shopping festival; the platform refused to deliver, citing mistake.
cn_claim: 基于重大误解实施的民事法律行为，行为人有权请求法院或仲裁机构予以撤销（民法典第147条）；标价错误构成重大误解的，商家可主张撤销合同，但需综合考量交易习惯和消费者信赖。
us_claim: Unilateral mistake may be grounds to rescind a contract if enforcement would be unconscionable and the non-mistaken party knew or should have known of the mistake; Restatement (Second) of Contracts Sec 153; a price that is so low as to be commercially absurd may put the buyer on constructive notice of the error.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide mistake-based rescission for commercially absurd pricing errors in e-commerce, though CN applies a statutory right of rescission for material mistake and US applies an equitable unconscionability-plus-notice test.

fact_summary: 被告人因受他人胁迫而参与抢劫，但在犯罪过程中仅负责望风 / A defendant participated in a robbery under duress, performing only a lookout role.
cn_claim: 胁从犯应按其犯罪情节减轻处罚或免除处罚（刑法第28条）；受胁迫参与犯罪且作用较小的，可从宽处理。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Duress is a complete defense to criminal liability if the defendant was forced to commit the offense by threats of death or serious bodily harm that a reasonable person would have been unable to resist; the defense is not available for murder; R v. Howe [1987] AC 417.
notes: CN treats duress as a mitigating factor rather than a complete defense, while HK follows English common law in recognizing duress as a complete defense (except for murder), creating a significant doctrinal asymmetry.

fact_summary: A defendant was convicted based largely on jailhouse-informant testimony; the informant later recanted / 被告人主要依据狱中线人证言被定罪，线人后来翻供
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: A conviction based on uncorroborated jailhouse-informant testimony, particularly where the informant has received benefits for cooperation, raises serious due-process concerns; prosecutors have a duty to disclose impeachment information regarding cooperating witnesses under Giglio v. United States, 405 U.S. 150 (1972); many states require corroboration of accomplice or informant testimony.
hk_claim: A trial judge must warn the jury of the dangers of convicting on uncorroborated evidence of an accomplice or informant who may have a motive to fabricate; the warning must be clear and the jury directed to scrutinize such evidence with great care; failure to give an adequate warning may render the conviction unsafe.
notes: Both US and HK require heightened scrutiny of jailhouse-informant testimony, with US focusing on disclosure obligations and corroboration requirements and HK employing mandatory judicial warnings to the jury.

fact_summary: 胜诉当事人在判决生效两年后发现对方在诉讼中隐瞒了关键财产，申请再审 / Two years after judgment, the winning party discovered the opposing party had concealed key assets during the litigation and petitioned to reopen.
cn_claim: 当事人发现新的证据足以推翻原判决的，可以申请再审（民事诉讼法第207条第一项）；诉讼中隐瞒财产导致判决错误的构成再审事由。
us_claim: A judgment may be set aside for fraud on the court under Fed. R. Civ. P. 60(d)(3); concealment of assets during litigation that materially affects the outcome constitutes intrinsic fraud, for which relief is available under Rule 60(b)(3) within one year, and ongoing fraud on the court may support relief beyond the one-year limit; Hazel-Atlas Glass Co. v. Hartford-Empire Co., 322 U.S. 238 (1944).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US allow reopening of judgments based on newly discovered or fraudulently concealed evidence, with CN providing a statutory retrial mechanism and US providing relief under Rule 60 for fraud.

fact_summary: 公司董事未经股东会批准将公司主要资产出售给其配偶控制的另一家公司 / A director sold the company's principal assets to another company controlled by his spouse without shareholder approval.
cn_claim: 董事未经股东会同意与本公司订立合同或进行交易的，所得收入归公司所有；给公司造成损失的应承担赔偿责任（公司法第148条第一款第四项）。
us_claim: A director's sale of corporate assets to a related party in which the director has an interest is a self-dealing transaction subject to the entire-fairness standard; the transaction must be entirely fair as to process and price, and the burden of proof is on the director to demonstrate fairness; Weinberger v. UOP, Inc., 457 A.2d 701 (Del. 1983).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US impose fiduciary-duty constraints on director self-dealing, with CN codifying a disgorgement-plus-damages remedy and US applying the entire-fairness standard under Delaware law.

fact_summary: 董事未经股东会批准将公司主要资产出售给其配偶控制的公司 / A director sold key assets to a spouse's company without shareholder approval.
cn_claim: 董事自我交易未经股东会同意的，所得收入归公司所有（公司法第148条第一款第四项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A director must avoid conflicts of interest; transactions in which a director has a material interest must be disclosed to and approved by the board, and the director must not vote on the matter; failure to disclose may render the transaction voidable and the director liable to account for any profit; Companies Ordinance (Cap.622) s.536.
notes: Both CN and HK require director disclosure and disinterested approval for conflicted transactions, with CN imposing disgorgement of profits and HK requiring disclosure and non-participation.

fact_summary: 犯罪嫌疑人在侦查阶段被连续讯问36小时未获休息，期间作出的认罪供述 / A suspect was interrogated continuously for 36 hours without rest, during which he made incriminating statements.
cn_claim: 采用刑讯逼供或其他非法方法收集的犯罪嫌疑人供述应予以排除（刑事诉讼法第56条）；连续超长时间讯问剥夺嫌疑人必要休息的，属于变相刑讯逼供。
us_claim: A confession obtained through prolonged interrogation without rest, food, or sleep is presumptively involuntary under the Due Process Clause; the totality-of-the-circumstances test considers the duration of interrogation, the accused's physical condition, and whether the defendant's will was overborne; Spano v. New York, 360 U.S. 315 (1959); Ashcraft v. Tennessee, 322 U.S. 143 (1944) (36-hour continuous interrogation held inherently coercive).
hk_claim: A confession obtained through prolonged interrogation that deprives the suspect of rest, food, or sleep may be involuntary and inadmissible; the prosecution must prove voluntariness beyond reasonable doubt, and the trial judge must consider the length and conditions of interrogation in the voir dire.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat prolonged sleep-deprivation interrogation as coercive and grounds for excluding confessions, with CN categorizing it as constructive torture, US applying the due-process voluntariness test, and HK requiring proof beyond reasonable doubt.

fact_summary: A party sought to use a foreign judgment as collateral estoppel in a domestic proceeding / 一方试图在国内诉讼中援引外国判决的既判力
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Foreign judgments may be given preclusive effect under principles of comity if the foreign court provided a full and fair opportunity to litigate and the foreign proceedings were fundamentally fair; the recognition standards under Hilton v. Guyot, 159 U.S. 113 (1895) and the Uniform Foreign-Country Money Judgments Recognition Act apply.
hk_claim: A foreign judgment may be recognized and given res judicata or issue-estoppel effect in Hong Kong if it was final and conclusive on the merits and the foreign court had jurisdiction over the parties; the judgment must not have been obtained by fraud and enforcement must not be contrary to public policy.
notes: Both US and HK recognize the preclusive effect of foreign judgments under comity principles, with US applying due-process and fairness screening and HK applying finality and public-policy screening.

fact_summary: 租户在租赁的商铺内经营餐饮业务，因物业未取得餐饮业所需的消防许可证导致租户无法办理营业执照 / A tenant leased commercial space for a restaurant but could not obtain a business license because the building lacked the required fire-safety permit for food service.
cn_claim: 出租人未告知租赁物存在权利瑕疵或使用限制的，承租人可请求减少租金或不支付租金，并有权要求出租人赔偿损失（民法典第723条）。
us_claim: A commercial landlord impliedly warrants that the leased premises are suitable for the tenant's intended use where the landlord knows of the tenant's purpose and the tenant relies on the landlord's expertise; the warranty of suitability may be breached where the premises cannot be lawfully used for the intended purpose due to permitting or zoning deficiencies; Restatement (Second) of Property: Landlord and Tenant Sec 5.1.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US recognize that a commercial landlord may be liable where the premises cannot be lawfully used for the tenant's intended purpose, with CN codifying a statutory warranty and US applying the implied warranty of suitability.

fact_summary: 租户经营餐饮因物业缺少消防许可证无法办照 / A restaurant tenant could not get a license because the building lacked fire-safety permits.
cn_claim: 出租人未告知使用限制的，承租人可请求减少租金或赔偿损失（民法典第723条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A landlord may be in breach of the implied covenant for quiet enjoyment or the covenant that the premises are fit for the purpose let if the tenant cannot lawfully carry on the intended business due to permit or licensing defects attributable to the landlord; the tenant may claim damages for breach of covenant.
notes: Both CN and HK provide tenant remedies where the landlord's failure to secure necessary permits prevents lawful use of the premises for the intended business purpose.

fact_summary: 短视频平台上用户上传了侵犯他人肖像权的鬼畜视频，被侵权人通知平台后平台拖延3天才删除 / A short-video platform user uploaded a manipulated parody video infringing someone's portrait rights; the platform took 3 days to remove it after the victim's notice.
cn_claim: 网络服务提供者接到被侵权人通知后未及时采取必要措施的，对损害的扩大部分与该网络用户承担连带责任（民法典第1195条第二款）；合理删除期限通常为接到通知后24-48小时。
us_claim: Under the DMCA safe-harbor provisions (17 U.S.C. Sec 512(c)), a service provider must expeditiously remove infringing material upon receiving a compliant takedown notice to maintain immunity; failure to act expeditiously, typically within 24-72 hours depending on circumstances, may expose the provider to liability; the notice-and-takedown system also applies under the CDA Sec 230 framework.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US impose expedited-takedown obligations on internet platforms receiving infringement notices, with CN codifying a statutory notice-and-takedown duty and US conditioning DMCA safe-harbor immunity on expeditious removal.

fact_summary: 短视频平台拖延迟删侵犯肖像权的视频 / A short-video platform delayed 3 days in removing a portrait-rights-infringing video after notice.
cn_claim: 平台接到通知后未及时采取必要措施的，对损害扩大部分承担连带责任（民法典第1195条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An internet intermediary that has actual knowledge of infringing content and fails to act expeditiously to remove it may lose the protection of the innocent-dissemination defense and become liable for the continued publication of the infringing material.
notes: Both CN and HK impose liability on platforms that fail to expeditiously remove infringing content after notice, with CN codifying a statutory duty and HK applying the common-law innocent-dissemination framework.

fact_summary: 怀孕女职工被公司以不胜任工作为由调岗降薪 / A pregnant employee was transferred to a lower-paying position on the ground of unsatisfactory performance.
cn_claim: 用人单位不得因女职工怀孕降低其工资或予以辞退（女职工劳动保护特别规定第5条；妇女权益保障法第48条）；以怀孕为由调岗降薪构成就业歧视。
us_claim: Adverse employment action taken against an employee because of pregnancy constitutes sex discrimination under the Pregnancy Discrimination Act (42 U.S.C. Sec 2000e(k)), which amended Title VII; an employer may not transfer a pregnant employee to a less desirable position based on pregnancy-related assumptions about her ability to perform; International Union, UAW v. Johnson Controls, Inc., 499 U.S. 187 (1991).
hk_claim: An employer who dismisses or adversely varies the terms of employment of a pregnant employee may be liable for pregnancy discrimination under the Sex Discrimination Ordinance (Cap.480) s.8; an employer must not treat a pregnant employee less favorably on the ground of her pregnancy.
notes: All three jurisdictions prohibit pregnancy-based adverse employment actions, with CN and HK codifying the prohibition in employment-discrimination statutes and US applying the Pregnancy Discrimination Act as an amendment to Title VII.

fact_summary: 怀孕女职工被以不胜任为由调岗降薪 / A pregnant employee was demoted on the ground of poor performance.
cn_claim: 不得因怀孕降低女职工工资（女职工劳动保护特别规定第5条；妇女权益保障法第48条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Pregnancy discrimination in employment is prohibited under the Sex Discrimination Ordinance (Cap.480) s.8; less favorable treatment of a pregnant employee, including adverse variation of terms, constitutes unlawful discrimination.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit pregnancy-based demotion and pay reduction through employment anti-discrimination legislation.

fact_summary: 夫妻一方在婚姻期间以个人名义对外大量举债用于赌博，离婚后债权人起诉要求双方共同偿还 / During marriage, one spouse incurred substantial gambling debts in his own name; after divorce, creditors sued both spouses for repayment.
cn_claim: 夫妻一方在婚姻关系存续期间以个人名义超出家庭日常生活需要所负的债务，不属于夫妻共同债务（民法典第1064条第二款）；赌博之债不属夫妻共同债务。
us_claim: Under the doctrine of necessaries, a spouse may be liable for debts incurred by the other spouse for family necessities, but gambling debts fall outside this category; community-property states generally do not make the non-debtor spouse liable for the other spouse's separate debts incurred for non-family purposes.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US limit spousal liability to debts incurred for family necessities, excluding gambling and other non-family-purpose debts from the scope of joint marital liability.

fact_summary: 夫妻一方婚内以个人名义大量举债用于赌博，离婚后债权人要求双方共同偿还 / During marriage, one spouse incurred gambling debts in his own name; creditors sought repayment from both spouses after divorce.
cn_claim: 超出家庭日常生活需要所负的债务不属于夫妻共同债务（民法典第1064条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, a spouse is generally not liable for the other spouse's separate debts unless the debt was incurred as an agent of the other spouse or for household necessaries; gambling debts would not qualify as necessaries and would not bind the non-debtor spouse.
notes: Both CN and HK exclude gambling debts from the scope of spousal liability, requiring debts to be incurred for family purposes or household necessaries.

fact_summary: 商场自动扶梯突发逆行致多名顾客摔伤 / A shopping mall escalator suddenly reversed direction, injuring multiple shoppers.
cn_claim: 公共场所的经营者未尽到安全保障义务造成他人损害的，应承担侵权责任（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A premises owner owes a duty of reasonable care to business invitees to maintain the premises in a reasonably safe condition; liability may be based on negligence for failure to inspect or maintain equipment, and res ipsa loquitur may apply where an escalator malfunction is of a type that ordinarily does not occur absent negligence; Restatement (Third) of Torts: Phys. & Emot. Harm § 51.
hk_claim: An occupier owes a common duty of care to visitors under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314) s.3 to take reasonable care to see that visitors are reasonably safe; an escalator malfunction causing injury is prima facie evidence of breach of the duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose a duty on commercial occupiers to maintain equipment in safe condition, with CN codifying a statutory safety obligation, US applying premises-liability principles, and HK using the Occupiers Liability Ordinance.

fact_summary: 被告人非法获取他人信用卡信息后在网上盗刷 / A defendant obtained others' credit card information and made unauthorized online purchases.
cn_claim: 窃取、收买或非法提供他人信用卡信息资料的，构成妨害信用卡管理罪（刑法第177条之一）；利用非法获取的信用卡信息进行网上消费的，同时构成信用卡诈骗罪（刑法第196条）。
us_claim: Obtaining and using another person's credit card information without authorization constitutes credit-card fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1029 (access-device fraud) and may also be charged as wire fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1343 where the internet is used to effectuate the scheme; identity theft under 18 U.S.C. § 1028 may also apply.
hk_claim: Obtaining and using another person's credit card information without authority constitutes obtaining property by deception contrary to s.17 of the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210) and may also constitute an offense under s.161 where a computer is used with dishonest intent.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unauthorized acquisition and use of credit card information, though CN uses specific credit-card-fraud statutes, US applies access-device and wire-fraud statutes, and HK uses the Theft Ordinance's deception and computer-crime provisions.

fact_summary: 网红与经纪公司签订独家直播协议后又私下在其他平台直播 / A social-media influencer signed an exclusive livestreaming agreement with a talent agency but later livestreamed on a competing platform.
cn_claim: 当事人一方不履行合同义务或履行不符合约定的，应承担继续履行、赔偿损失等违约责任（民法典第577条）；经纪公司可主张违约金（民法典第585条）。
us_claim: An exclusive-personal-services contract is enforceable through injunctive relief unless the injunction would constitute involuntary servitude under the Thirteenth Amendment; a negative covenant not to perform for competitors may be specifically enforced where the services are unique and the covenant is reasonable; Lumley v. Wagner, 42 Eng. Rep. 687 (1852) (accepted in US).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US enforce exclusive-services agreements, with CN relying on contractual damages and liquidated-damages clauses and US additionally permitting limited negative injunctions for unique personal services.

fact_summary: 网红签约独家直播后私自在其他平台直播 / An influencer breached an exclusive livestreaming agreement by performing on a rival platform.
cn_claim: 违约方应承担继续履行或赔偿损失等违约责任（民法典第577条；第585条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An exclusive-services agreement is enforceable by injunction where the services are of a special or unique character and damages would be an inadequate remedy; the court may enforce a negative covenant not to perform for competitors where the restraint is reasonable.
notes: Both CN and HK enforce exclusive-services agreements, with CN emphasizing contractual damages and HK employing the equitable remedy of injunction where services are unique.

fact_summary: A parent company directed its subsidiary to enter into transactions that benefitted the parent at the subsidiary's expense, rendering the subsidiary insolvent / 母公司指示子公司进行利于母公司但损害子公司的交易
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under the doctrine of piercing the corporate veil, a parent company may be held liable for a subsidiary's debts where the parent exercised complete domination and used that control to commit fraud or wrong that proximately caused injury; factors include undercapitalization, failure to observe corporate formalities, and siphoning of funds; United States v. Bestfoods, 524 U.S. 51 (1998).
hk_claim: The corporate veil of a subsidiary may be pierced where the subsidiary is a mere facade or alter ego of the parent and the separate legal personality is being used to evade legal obligations or perpetrate a fraud; the court will look at the substance of the arrangement.
notes: Both US and HK permit veil-piercing in parent-subsidiary relationships where the subsidiary is a mere instrumentality, though US applies a multi-factor control-plus-fraud test and HK applies the facade/alter-ego analysis.

fact_summary: 某手机APP在用户安装时未提示即默认开启通讯录和相册访问权限 / A mobile app defaulted to accessing users' contacts and photo albums upon installation without any permission prompt.
cn_claim: 处理个人信息应取得个人同意，且处理目的、方式和种类发生变更的应重新取得同意（个人信息保护法第14条）；APP默认开启敏感权限而未获授权的，违反最小必要原则（个人信息保护法第6条）。
us_claim: The FTC Act § 5 prohibits unfair or deceptive acts or practices, which the FTC has applied to apps that collect personal data without adequate notice or consent; state laws like the CCPA (Cal. Civ. Code § 1798.100) require disclosure of data collection and the right to opt out; the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (15 U.S.C. § 6501) additionally requires verifiable parental consent for collection of children's data.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require transparency and consent for mobile-app data collection, with CN codifying consent and necessity principles in the PIPL and US relying on FTC enforcement and state privacy statutes.

fact_summary: APP默认开启通讯录和相册权限而未获用户授权 / A mobile app defaulted to accessing contacts and photos without permission.
cn_claim: 处理个人信息应取得个人同意且遵循最小必要原则（个人信息保护法第14条、第6条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) Data Protection Principles 1 and 3, personal data must be collected by fair means with the data subject's prescribed consent, and must not be used for a new purpose without consent; default-access to contacts and photos without explicit consent would violate these principles.
notes: Both CN and HK require informed consent for mobile-app data collection, with CN applying the PIPL's consent-and-necessity framework and HK applying the PDPO's Data Protection Principles.

fact_summary: 某游戏公司开发了一款玩法与某知名游戏高度相似的手机游戏，但代码和美工均为独立创作 / A game company developed a mobile game with gameplay mechanics highly similar to a well-known game, but all code and artwork were independently created.
cn_claim: 游戏规则和方法本身不受著作权法保护，但足以引起混淆的整体仿冒可构成不正当竞争（反不正当竞争法第6条第四项）；独立创作的代码和美工不构成著作权侵权。
us_claim: Copyright does not protect ideas, procedures, or methods of operation, only the expression of those ideas; 17 U.S.C. § 102(b) codifies the idea-expression dichotomy; gameplay mechanics that are rules or systems are not copyrightable; only expressive elements like code, art, and audiovisual displays are protected; Tetris Holding, LLC v. Xio Interactive, Inc., 863 F. Supp. 2d 394 (D.N.J. 2012).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US apply the idea-expression dichotomy to exclude game rules from copyright protection, though CN may additionally apply unfair-competition law to total-concept-and-feel imitation.

fact_summary: 居民对房屋征收补偿方案不满，向法院提起行政诉讼 / A resident dissatisfied with a compulsory-acquisition compensation plan filed an administrative lawsuit.
cn_claim: 被征收人对征收补偿决定不服的可申请行政复议或提起行政诉讼（国有土地上房屋征收与补偿条例第26条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A person aggrieved by a compulsory-acquisition compensation determination under the Lands Resumption Ordinance (Cap. 124) may appeal to the Lands Tribunal for a determination of the amount of compensation; the Tribunal's decision is subject to appeal on a point of law to the Court of Appeal.
notes: Both CN and HK provide independent adjudication of compulsory-acquisition compensation disputes, with CN channeling through administrative litigation and HK through the Lands Tribunal.

fact_summary: 小区化粪池爆炸致多名路人受伤 / A neighborhood septic tank exploded, injuring multiple passersby.
cn_claim: 因所有人、管理人、使用人的过错造成他人损害的，应承担侵权责任；所有人不能证明自己无过错的应承担赔偿责任（民法典第1252条第一款；第1253条）。
us_claim: A person who maintains an abnormally dangerous condition on their property may be strictly liable for harm resulting from its explosion under the abnormally-dangerous-activity doctrine under Restatement (Third) of Torts: Phys. & Emot. Harm § 20; Rylands v. Fletcher, L.R. 3 H.L. 330 (1868).
hk_claim: The rule in Rylands v. Fletcher applies in Hong Kong: a person who brings onto their land something likely to do mischief if it escapes is strictly liable for damage caused by its escape; a septic-tank explosion would fall within the scope of this strict-liability rule.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose strict liability for damage caused by dangerous substances escaping from one's property, with CN codifying it in the Civil Code and US/HK applying Rylands v. Fletcher.

fact_summary: 老人立下遗嘱将全部财产留给保姆，子女以老人患老年痴呆为由主张遗嘱无效 / An elderly person left their entire estate to a caregiver by will; the children challenged the will, claiming the testator had dementia.
cn_claim: 遗嘱必须表示遗嘱人的真实意思，受胁迫、欺骗所立的遗嘱无效（民法典第1143条）；立遗嘱人是否具备完全民事行为能力应以立遗嘱时的精神状态为准。
us_claim: A will may be contested on grounds of lack of testamentary capacity; the testator must have understood the nature and extent of their property, the natural objects of their bounty, and the disposition they were making at the time of execution; undue influence is a separate ground requiring proof that the testator's free will was overborne by another person.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US allow will contests based on lack of testamentary capacity, requiring assessment of the testator's mental state at the time of execution, though CN codifies the grounds and US applies common-law capacity tests.

fact_summary: 老人立遗嘱将全部财产留给保姆，子女以痴呆为由主张无效 / An elderly person left everything to a caregiver; children claimed dementia invalidated the will.
cn_claim: 遗嘱须表示遗嘱人真实意思（民法典第1143条）；立遗嘱时是否具有完全民事行为能力为审查重点。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A will may be challenged on grounds of lack of testamentary capacity; the testator must have been of sound mind, memory, and understanding at the time of execution; the Wills Ordinance (Cap. 30) s.4 requires the will to be in writing and signed by the testator in the presence of two witnesses.
notes: Both CN and HK permit will contests on grounds of testamentary incapacity, requiring the testator to have been of sound mind at the time of execution.

fact_summary: 某通过发行虚拟货币进行融资的项目方在募集资金后项目停滞，投资者起诉要求返还投资款 / A cryptocurrency project raised funds through an initial coin offering but then ceased development; investors sued for return of their funds.
cn_claim: 任何组织和个人不得非法从事代币发行融资活动（人民银行等七部委关于防范代币发行融资风险的公告）；虚构项目募集资金的构成集资诈骗。
us_claim: An ICO that constitutes an offering of securities must be registered with the SEC under the Securities Act of 1933 unless an exemption applies; failure to register and material misrepresentations may give rise to liability under Sections 5, 12(a)(1), and 17(a) of the Securities Act and Section 10(b) of the Exchange Act and Rule 10b-5; SEC v. W.J. Howey Co., 328 U.S. 293 (1946).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US regulate ICO fundraising with CN imposing an outright ban and US applying securities-law registration and anti-fraud provisions under the Howey test.

fact_summary: 被告人在取保候审期间未经批准离开居住地前往外省 / A defendant on bail pending trial left the jurisdiction for another province without court approval.
cn_claim: 被取保候审的犯罪嫌疑人未经执行机关批准不得离开所居住的市、县；违反规定的没收部分或全部保证金并变更强制措施（刑事诉讼法第71条）。
us_claim: A defendant released on bail must comply with conditions of release, which typically include restrictions on travel outside the jurisdiction; violation of release conditions may result in revocation of bail and issuance of a bench warrant under the Bail Reform Act of 1984, 18 U.S.C. § 3148.
hk_claim: A defendant on bail must comply with the conditions of bail, which typically include a requirement to surrender travel documents and not to leave Hong Kong without permission; breach of bail conditions may result in forfeiture of recognizance and re-arrest.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose travel restrictions as standard bail conditions and sanction violations through forfeiture of security and revocation of bail status.

fact_summary: 当事人因疫情封控无法在法定上诉期内提交上诉状，申请顺延期限 / A party could not file a notice of appeal within the statutory deadline due to a pandemic lockdown and sought an extension.
cn_claim: 当事人因不可抗拒的事由耽误期限的，在障碍消除后十日内可申请顺延期限（民事诉讼法第85条）。
us_claim: A party may seek an extension of time under Fed. R. App. P. 4(a)(5) upon a showing of excusable neglect or good cause; unforeseen circumstances such as a pandemic lockdown that prevent timely filing may constitute excusable neglect; Pioneer Investment Services Co. v. Brunswick Associates Ltd. Partnership, 507 U.S. 380 (1993).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide mechanisms for extending court deadlines due to circumstances beyond the party's control, with CN applying force-majeure principles and US applying excusable-neglect standards.

fact_summary: 当事人因疫情封控无法在法定期限内上诉，申请顺延 / A party missed the appeal deadline due to pandemic lockdown and sought an extension.
cn_claim: 因不可抗拒事由耽误期限的可申请顺延（民事诉讼法第85条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: The court has discretion to extend time for filing an appeal where the delay was caused by circumstances beyond the appellant's control; the court will consider the reasons for the delay, the length of delay, and the merits of the proposed appeal.
notes: Both CN and HK provide for extensions of filing deadlines where compliance was prevented by circumstances beyond the party's control.

fact_summary: Police searched a suspect's smartphone without a warrant after a lawful arrest / 警方在合法逮捕后无令状搜查嫌疑人智能手机
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: The warrantless search of a cell phone incident to a lawful arrest violates the Fourth Amendment; police must obtain a warrant to search digital data on an arrestee's cell phone absent exigent circumstances; Riley v. California, 573 U.S. 373 (2014).
hk_claim: A warrantless search of a mobile phone incident to arrest must be reasonable and justified by the circumstances; the common-law power to search incident to arrest does not automatically extend to searching the digital contents of a mobile phone without specific justification; the search must be proportionate to the purpose of the arrest.
notes: Both US and HK restrict warrantless searches of mobile phones incident to arrest, with US applying a bright-line warrant requirement under Riley v. California and HK applying a reasonableness-and-proportionality test.

fact_summary: 员工因举报公司环境污染被开除 / An employee was terminated after reporting the company's environmental violations to authorities.
cn_claim: 用人单位不得因劳动者举报违法行为而解除劳动合同（劳动合同法第39条将举报排除于合法解除事由之外）；举报公益违法行为的受法律保护（环境保护法第57条第三款）。
us_claim: Termination of an employee for reporting violations of environmental law to authorities constitutes unlawful retaliation; whistleblower-protection provisions under the Clean Water Act (33 U.S.C. § 1367), the Clean Air Act (42 U.S.C. § 7622), and other environmental statutes prohibit adverse employment actions against employees who report violations; the Occupational Safety and Health Act (29 U.S.C. § 660(c)) also provides anti-retaliation protection.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US protect whistleblowers who report environmental violations, with CN codifying anti-retaliation provisions in the Environmental Protection Law and Labor Contract Law and US providing whistleblower protection under environmental and workplace-safety statutes.

fact_summary: 员工因举报公司环境污染被开除 / An employee was terminated after reporting the company's environmental violations.
cn_claim: 用人单位不得因举报而解除劳动合同（劳动合同法；环境保护法第57条第三款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An employee who reports environmental violations is protected from dismissal under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) s.32A, which prohibits termination for assisting enforcement authorities; additionally, the common-law principle against termination on grounds of public policy may provide protection.
notes: Both CN and HK protect environmental whistleblowers from retaliatory dismissal through statutory provisions protecting employees who report violations to authorities.

fact_summary: 快递员送货途中因赶时间闯红灯撞伤行人 / A courier ran a red light while rushing to deliver packages and struck a pedestrian.
cn_claim: 用人单位工作人员因执行工作任务造成他人损害的，由用人单位承担侵权责任（民法典第1191条第一款）。
us_claim: An employer is vicariously liable for the torts of an employee committed within the scope of employment under the doctrine of respondeat superior; a delivery driver making deliveries is acting within the scope of employment even if violating traffic laws; Restatement (Third) of Agency § 7.07.
hk_claim: A principal is vicariously liable for torts committed by its agent or employee acting in the course of employment; a courier making deliveries is within the course of employment even if driving negligently; the employer's liability is based on the principle that the employer should bear the risk of the enterprise.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose vicarious liability on employers for torts committed by employees within the scope of employment, including traffic accidents during delivery runs.

fact_summary: 私募基金管理人未按合同约定进行投资，将基金财产挪用于关联方借款 / A private equity fund manager diverted fund assets to an affiliated-party loan in violation of the fund agreement.
cn_claim: 私募基金管理人不得将基金财产用于资金拆借等非投资活动（私募投资基金监督管理条例第27条）；违反忠实义务的应对投资者承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: An investment adviser owes fiduciary duties of loyalty and care to its clients; diverting fund assets for unauthorized purposes, including loans to affiliates, constitutes a breach of fiduciary duty under the Investment Advisers Act of 1940 (15 U.S.C. § 80b-6); SEC v. Capital Gains Research Bureau, Inc., 375 U.S. 180 (1963).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US impose fiduciary duties on fund managers, prohibiting unauthorized diversion of fund assets and requiring loyalty to investors' interests.

fact_summary: 私募基金管理人将基金财产挪用于关联方借款 / A fund manager diverted fund assets to an affiliated-party loan.
cn_claim: 管理人不得将基金财产用于非投资活动（私募投资基金监督管理条例第27条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A fund manager owes fiduciary duties to the fund and its investors; diverting fund assets to unauthorized purposes, including lending to affiliates, constitutes a breach of fiduciary duty and may also be a breach of the fund's constitutional documents; the Securities and Futures Commission may take enforcement action under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571).
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit fund managers from diverting fund assets to unauthorized purposes, with CN codifying specific investment restrictions and HK enforcing fiduciary duties and SFC regulations.

fact_summary: 购房者与开发商签订商品房预售合同后，开发商擅自变更小区规划 / After signing a pre-sale contract for an off-plan apartment, the buyer discovered the developer had unilaterally changed the community plan.
cn_claim: 开发商擅自变更规划设计的，买受人有权解除合同并要求赔偿损失（商品房买卖合同司法解释第3条、第14条）。
us_claim: A material change to the planned development after a pre-construction purchase contract is signed may constitute a breach of the implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing and may entitle the buyer to rescission or damages; the Interstate Land Sales Full Disclosure Act (15 U.S.C. § 1701 et seq.) requires disclosure of material changes in large-scale developments.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for buyers when developers unilaterally change community plans after contract execution, with CN codifying specific purchaser remedies and US applying contract and disclosure-law principles.

fact_summary: 开发商签订预售后擅自变更小区规划 / A developer unilaterally changed the community plan after signing pre-sale contracts.
cn_claim: 开发商擅自变更规划的，买受人有权解除合同并索赔（商品房买卖合同司法解释第3条、第14条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A developer who makes a material change to the development plan after pre-sale contracts are signed may be in breach of the sale and purchase agreement; the buyer may be entitled to rescission or damages depending on whether the change goes to the root of the contract; the Consent Scheme administered by the Lands Department also regulates pre-sale of uncompleted developments.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for buyers where developers unilaterally change development plans after pre-sale contracts are signed, with CN codifying purchaser remedies and HK applying common-law contract principles plus administrative regulation.

fact_summary: 博物馆将馆藏古代书画的高清扫描件上传至网站供免费下载，出版社将部分作品用于商业画册 / A museum uploaded high-resolution scans of ancient paintings to its website for free download; a publisher used the scans in a commercial art book.
cn_claim: 博物馆对馆藏作品的数字化复制件是否享有著作权，取决于数字化过程是否构成独创性表达；单纯机械扫描不产生新的著作权；但出版社未经许可将扫描件用于商业出版的，博物馆可能依合同或不当得利主张权利。
us_claim: A faithful digital reproduction of a public-domain artwork lacks the originality required for copyright protection under Bridgeman Art Library, Ltd. v. Corel Corp., 36 F. Supp. 2d 191 (S.D.N.Y. 1999); the museum cannot claim copyright in the scan itself, though it may impose contractual restrictions on the use of the digital file through a browse-wrap or click-wrap agreement.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US deny copyright protection to purely mechanical scans, leaving museums reliant on contractual restrictions rather than copyright law to control downstream commercial use.

fact_summary: 被告人醉酒后与邻里发生冲突致人轻伤，辩称醉酒状态下无犯罪故意 / A defendant got drunk and injured a neighbor in a fight, arguing intoxication negated criminal intent.
cn_claim: 醉酒的人犯罪应负刑事责任（刑法第18条第四款）；醉酒本身不阻却刑事责任，但醉酒可影响特定犯罪的主观故意认定。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Voluntary intoxication is not a defense to crimes of basic intent but may be relevant to crimes of specific intent where the intoxication prevents the defendant from forming the necessary intent; the distinction between specific and basic intent is drawn following DPP v. Majewski [1977] AC 443.
notes: CN rejects intoxication as a defense outright, while HK follows the English common-law distinction between specific-intent and basic-intent crimes, creating a doctrinal asymmetry in the treatment of intoxicated offenders.

fact_summary: 外卖平台通过算法对外卖骑手进行实时路线规划和时间考核，骑手因超时被罚款起诉平台 / A delivery platform used algorithms to plan couriers' routes and set time targets; a courier fined for lateness sued the platform.
cn_claim: 平台企业通过算法对劳动者进行劳动过程管理，并以此作为考核依据的，应认定存在劳动关系（关于维护新就业形态劳动者劳动保障权益的指导意见）；算法设定的考核标准不合理导致劳动者权益受损的，劳动行政部门应予纠正。
us_claim: Algorithmic management of workers that exercises significant control over the manner and means of work is a factor weighing in favor of employee status under the economic-realities test; algorithmic penalties or deductions from pay may be challenged under state wage-and-hour laws.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US treat algorithmic worker control as a factor supporting employment status, with CN regulating it through platform-employment guidelines and US treating it as a factor in the economic-realities analysis.

fact_summary: 居民因垃圾焚烧厂选址决定影响其居住环境提起行政诉讼 / Residents sued over a government decision to site a waste incinerator near their community.
cn_claim: 行政机关作出涉及重大公共利益的规划许可前应组织听证（行政许可法第46条）；邻避设施的选址决定属于可诉的行政行为。
us_claim: An agency decision to approve the siting of a major polluting facility is subject to judicial review under the APA (5 U.S.C. § 706); agency failure to comply with the National Environmental Policy Act's environmental-impact-statement requirements (42 U.S.C. § 4332) is a ground for reversal; the decision must not be arbitrary and capricious; Citizens to Preserve Overton Park, Inc. v. Volpe, 401 U.S. 402 (1971).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US subject environmental-siting decisions to judicial review requiring procedural compliance and reasoned decision-making.

fact_summary: 居民因垃圾焚烧厂选址影响居住环境提起行政诉讼 / Residents sued over a waste-incinerator siting decision near their community.
cn_claim: 涉及重大公共利益的规划许可前应组织听证（行政许可法第46条）；选址决定属于可诉行政行为。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A government decision to approve the siting of a waste incinerator is amenable to judicial review on grounds of procedural impropriety or irrationality; environmental-impact-assessment requirements under the Environmental Impact Assessment Ordinance (Cap. 499) must be satisfied; failure to consider relevant environmental factors may render the decision unlawful.
notes: Both CN and HK subject environmental-siting decisions to review, with CN requiring administrative hearings and HK imposing environmental-impact-assessment obligations and judicial-review standards.

fact_summary: 被告人跨省运输大量假冒注册商标的化妆品被查获 / A defendant was caught transporting large quantities of counterfeit-brand cosmetics across provincial lines.
cn_claim: 销售明知是假冒注册商标的商品，销售金额数额较大的构成销售假冒注册商标的商品罪（刑法第214条）；跨省运输假冒商品属于犯罪行为的组成部分。
us_claim: Trafficking in counterfeit goods is prohibited under the Trademark Counterfeiting Act of 1984, 18 U.S.C. § 2320; transportation of counterfeit goods in interstate commerce is an element of the federal offense; the maximum penalties include imprisonment and fines up to $5,000,000 for organizations.
hk_claim: Importing or possessing for trade or sale goods bearing a forged trademark constitutes an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362) s.9(2); transportation of counterfeit goods across the boundary from mainland China is subject to customs enforcement under the Import and Export Ordinance (Cap. 60).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize trafficking in counterfeit goods, with CN and US specifically criminalizing trademark-counterfeit trafficking and HK using the Trade Descriptions Ordinance for goods with forged trademarks.

fact_summary: 广场舞噪音严重扰民，多次投诉后街道办和物业均未有效制止 / Square-dancing noise severely disturbed neighboring residents; the sub-district office and property management failed to stop it despite repeated complaints.
cn_claim: 因污染环境、破坏生态发生纠纷的，污染者应就法律规定的不承担责任或减轻责任的情形及其行为与损害之间不存在因果关系承担举证责任；噪音扰民构成环境污染侵权（民法典第1229条；噪声污染防治法第60条）。
us_claim: Noise that substantially interferes with the use and enjoyment of property may constitute a private nuisance; the fact that the activity occurs in a public space does not provide immunity; a municipality may face liability for failure to enforce its own noise ordinances where enforcement is not discretionary; Restatement (Second) of Torts § 822.
hk_claim: Noise that constitutes an unreasonable interference with a neighbor's use and enjoyment of their land is actionable in private nuisance; local authorities may be under a duty to abate statutory nuisances under the Noise Control Ordinance (Cap. 400).
notes: All three jurisdictions treat excessive noise as actionable nuisance, with CN additionally treating it as environmental-pollution tort, US applying private-nuisance principles, and HK using the Noise Control Ordinance plus common-law nuisance.

fact_summary: 租客在租房合同到期后拒不搬离，房东起诉要求返还房屋并支付逾期占用费 / A tenant refused to vacate after the lease expired; the landlord sued for repossession and holdover rent.
cn_claim: 租赁期限届满承租人继续使用租赁物且出租人未提出异议的，原租赁合同继续有效但为不定期租赁（民法典第734条）；承租人拒不返还的应支付占有使用费（民法典第733条）。
us_claim: A holdover tenant may be liable for double rent under state statutes or for use and occupancy at the fair rental value; the landlord may pursue summary eviction proceedings under state landlord-tenant law; the tenancy-at-sufferance doctrine treats the holdover as a trespasser subject to ejectment.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide landlords with possessory and monetary remedies against holdover tenants, with CN codifying the obligation to vacate and pay use-and-occupancy fees and US providing summary eviction and holdover-rent remedies.

fact_summary: 租客合同到期拒不搬离，房东起诉要求返还房屋并支付逾期占用费 / A tenant refused to vacate after lease expiration; the landlord sought repossession and holdover rent.
cn_claim: 承租人拒不返还的应支付占有使用费（民法典第733条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A landlord may recover possession of premises from a tenant holding over after the determination of the tenancy through proceedings under the Landlord and Tenant (Consolidation) Ordinance (Cap. 7); the landlord may also claim mesne profits (damages for use and occupation) at the market rate for the period of holding over.
notes: Both CN and HK provide possessory and monetary remedies for landlords against holdover tenants through statutory eviction proceedings and use-and-occupation damages.

fact_summary: A patient developed a severe infection after surgery because the surgeon failed to follow hand-hygiene protocols / 病人因外科医生未遵守手部消毒规范在术后发生严重感染
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Failure to follow established infection-control protocols such as hand-hygiene standards constitutes a breach of the standard of care in medical-malpractice actions; expert testimony is generally required to establish the standard of care, but a violation of hospital infection-control policies may constitute negligence per se in some jurisdictions.
hk_claim: A surgeon's failure to follow established hand-hygiene and infection-control protocols is a breach of the duty of care; the plaintiff must establish that the breach caused the infection and that the infection was a foreseeable consequence of the breach; expert evidence on the applicable standard of care is required.
notes: Both US and HK treat failure to follow established infection-control protocols as medical negligence requiring expert evidence on the standard of care and causation.

fact_summary: 招聘平台未经求职者同意将其简历信息出售给培训机构 / A job-search platform sold applicants' resume data to training companies without consent.
cn_claim: 个人信息处理者向其他个人信息处理者提供其处理的个人信息的，应取得个人的单独同意（个人信息保护法第23条）；未经同意出售求职者简历构成违法处理个人信息。
us_claim: Selling personal data collected for employment purposes to third parties without disclosure and consent may constitute an unfair or deceptive act or practice under the FTC Act § 5; the sale may also violate state privacy laws such as the CCPA (Cal. Civ. Code § 1798.120) which requires a 'Do Not Sell My Personal Information' mechanism.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US restrict the sale of personal data without consent, with CN requiring separate consent for data transfers under the PIPL and US regulating through consumer-protection and state privacy statutes.

fact_summary: 招聘平台未经同意将求职者简历出售给培训机构 / A job-search platform sold applicants' resumes to training companies without consent.
cn_claim: 向其他处理者提供个人信息应取得个人单独同意（个人信息保护法第23条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) Data Protection Principle 3, personal data shall not be used for a new purpose without the data subject's prescribed consent; selling job-applicant data to training companies for marketing purposes constitutes a new purpose requiring fresh consent.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit secondary use of personal data for purposes beyond those for which it was originally collected without obtaining fresh consent.

fact_summary: A party sought to adduce evidence obtained through a foreign letter of request / 一方试图援引通过外国司法协助请求获取的证据
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Evidence obtained through letters rogatory (letters of request) is generally admissible in US courts; the procedures for issuing letters rogatory are governed by 28 U.S.C. § 1781 and the Hague Evidence Convention; a party seeking foreign evidence may apply to the district court for issuance of a letter of request; admissibility is determined under the Federal Rules of Evidence.
hk_claim: Evidence obtained through a letter of request from a foreign court may be adduced in Hong Kong proceedings, provided the evidence was lawfully obtained under the foreign jurisdiction's procedures and its admission does not offend Hong Kong public policy; the Evidence Ordinance (Cap. 8) s.75 and 77B provide for the taking of evidence in Hong Kong pursuant to foreign requests.
notes: Both US and HK permit the admission of evidence obtained through foreign letters of request, subject to the evidence having been lawfully obtained and not contrary to forum public policy.

fact_summary: 原告在诉讼请求中主张了惩罚性赔偿但未在起诉状中明确计算依据 / A plaintiff claimed punitive damages but failed to specify the calculation basis in the complaint.
cn_claim: 原告主张惩罚性赔偿的应在起诉状中明确赔偿数额及计算依据；未明确的，法院可要求原告在举证期限届满前予以明确（民诉法解释第232条；惩罚性赔偿司法解释）。
us_claim: A claim for punitive damages must be pleaded with sufficient particularity to put the defendant on notice; some states require a specific amount of punitive damages to be pleaded, while others require only that the conduct supporting punitive damages be alleged; Fed. R. Civ. P. 9(g) requires special damages to be specifically stated but punitive damages are not categorized as special damages under the rule.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require punitive-damages claims to be adequately pleaded, with CN requiring calculation basis to be specified and US requiring sufficient factual allegations to support the claim.

fact_summary: 原告主张惩罚性赔偿但未在起诉状中明确计算依据 / Plaintiff claimed punitive damages without specifying the calculation basis in the complaint.
cn_claim: 应在起诉状中明确赔偿数额及计算依据（民诉法解释第232条；惩罚性赔偿司法解释）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Exemplary or punitive damages must be specifically pleaded in the statement of claim; the pleading must allege facts that would justify an award of exemplary damages, such as oppressive, arbitrary, or unconstitutional conduct by government officials or conduct calculated to make a profit exceeding the compensation payable to the plaintiff; Rookes v. Barnard [1964] AC 1129.
notes: Both CN and HK require punitive/exemplary damages to be specifically pleaded, with CN additionally requiring the calculation basis to be stated and HK requiring facts supporting the narrow categories of exemplary-damages claims under Rookes v. Barnard.

fact_summary: 被告人在公安机关尚未确定犯罪嫌疑人时主动到案如实交代 / A defendant voluntarily appeared at the police station and confessed before being identified as a suspect.
cn_claim: 犯罪后自动投案并如实供述自己罪行的，是自首；对于自首的犯罪分子可从轻或减轻处罚（刑法第67条第一款）。
us_claim: Voluntary surrender and acceptance of responsibility is a mitigating factor at sentencing under U.S. Sentencing Guidelines § 3E1.1; a defendant who clearly demonstrates acceptance of responsibility may receive a 2-3 level reduction; self-surrender before being charged is strong evidence of acceptance of responsibility.
hk_claim: A defendant who voluntarily surrenders to authorities and makes full admissions is entitled to a sentencing discount; the earlier the plea or admission, the greater the discount; HKSAR v. Ngo Van Nam [2004] 3 HKLRD 1.
notes: All three jurisdictions reward voluntary self-surrender and confession before detection with significant sentencing discounts.

fact_summary: 地方政府通过限制外地车辆通行的规定缓解交通拥堵，外地车主起诉主张侵犯平等权 / A city restricted out-of-town vehicles during peak hours to reduce congestion; an out-of-town driver challenged the restriction as discriminatory.
cn_claim: 行政行为应遵循合理原则和比例原则；基于缓解拥堵目的对外地车辆实施的限行措施如与目的相适应且不存在歧视性即具有合法性。
us_claim: A state or local regulation that discriminates against out-of-state residents or commerce is subject to strict scrutiny under the dormant Commerce Clause; a facially neutral traffic-regulation measure that has a disparate impact on out-of-state drivers must be justified by a legitimate local purpose that cannot be adequately served by reasonable nondiscriminatory alternatives; Pike v. Bruce Church, Inc., 397 U.S. 137 (1970).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US review locality-based traffic restrictions, with CN applying proportionality and reasonableness principles and US applying dormant-Commerce-Clause analysis.

fact_summary: 公司为逃废银行债务将核心资产无偿转让给新设关联公司后申请破产 / To evade bank debts, a company transferred its core assets to a newly-formed affiliate without consideration and then filed for bankruptcy.
cn_claim: 债务人无偿转让财产对债权人造成损害的，债权人可请求法院撤销债务人的行为（民法典第538条、第539条）；借破产逃废债务的，管理人有权追回财产（企业破产法第31条、第33条）。
us_claim: A fraudulent transfer made with actual intent to hinder, delay, or defraud creditors may be avoided under the Uniform Voidable Transactions Act § 4(a)(1) or 11 U.S.C. § 548(a)(1)(A); a transfer without reasonably equivalent value while the debtor was insolvent is also avoidable under 11 U.S.C. § 548(a)(1)(B); the bankruptcy trustee may recover the transferred property for the benefit of creditors.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US allow avoidance of fraudulent transfers made to evade creditors, with CN providing both Civil Code and Bankruptcy Law remedies and US applying fraudulent-transfer and bankruptcy-avoidance statutes.

fact_summary: 公司为逃债将核心资产无偿转让给关联公司 / A company transferred its core assets to an affiliate without consideration to evade creditors.
cn_claim: 债权人可请求法院撤销无偿转让行为（民法典第538条、第539条；企业破产法第31条、第33条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
