hk_claim: A disposition of property made with intent to defraud creditors may be set aside under the Conveyancing and Property Ordinance (Cap. 219) s.60; in a winding-up, a transfer at an undervalue made within five years of the onset of insolvency may be challenged under the Companies (Winding Up and Miscellaneous Provisions) Ordinance (Cap. 32) s.266B.
notes: Both CN and HK provide creditors with remedies to set aside fraudulent transfers made to evade debts, with CN using the Civil Code and HK using the Conveyancing and Property Ordinance and winding-up provisions.

fact_summary: 被告人在庭审中对被害人近亲属进行人身威胁 / During trial, the defendant threatened the victim's family members in open court.
cn_claim: 在法庭审理中威胁诉讼参与人的，法院可予以罚款、拘留；构成犯罪的追究刑事责任（刑事诉讼法第199条；法庭规则第19条）。
us_claim: Threatening a witness or victim during trial constitutes obstruction of justice under 18 U.S.C. § 1503 and may result in revocation of bail, additional criminal charges, and contempt sanctions; the court has inherent authority to maintain order and protect trial participants; Illinois v. Allen, 397 U.S. 337 (1970).
hk_claim: Threatening a witness during court proceedings constitutes criminal intimidation under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200) s.24 and may also constitute contempt of court for which the judge may impose summary punishment; perverting the course of justice is a common-law offense.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize threats against trial participants, with CN providing statutory contempt and criminal sanctions, US applying obstruction-of-justice and contempt powers, and HK using the Crimes Ordinance plus contempt.

fact_summary: 某公司通过爬虫技术抓取竞品平台公开的商品价格信息并用于自身定价 / A company scraped a competitor's publicly listed product prices using web crawlers and used them for its own pricing.
cn_claim: 利用技术手段妨碍、破坏其他经营者合法提供网络产品或服务正常运行的构成不正当竞争（反不正当竞争法第12条）；抓取公开价格信息不构成侵权但恶意高频抓取影响平台运营的除外。
us_claim: Scraping publicly accessible data from a website without circumventing technical barriers is generally lawful; the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act (18 U.S.C. § 1030) does not apply to data that is publicly accessible without requiring authorization; hiQ Labs, Inc. v. LinkedIn Corp., 938 F.3d 985 (9th Cir. 2019); however, scraping may breach the website's terms of service giving rise to a breach-of-contract claim.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US address web scraping within distinct frameworks: CN through anti-unfair-competition law and US through the CFAA and contract law as interpreted in hiQ v. LinkedIn.

fact_summary: 员工在微信朋友圈发表对公司不利言论被开除 / An employee was terminated for posting negative comments about the company on a personal social-media account.
cn_claim: 用人单位单方解除劳动合同应有法定事由；劳动者发表不实言论损害公司名誉的可构成严重违纪（劳动合同法第39条第二项），但言论自由受法律保护（宪法第35条），言论内容是否属实及影响程度应综合考量。
us_claim: An employee's social-media post about working conditions may be protected concerted activity under the National Labor Relations Act (29 U.S.C. § 157) if it relates to terms and conditions of employment; an employer may not retaliate against employees for engaging in protected speech about workplace conditions; NLRB v. Pier Sixty, LLC, 855 F.3d 115 (2d Cir. 2017).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US protect employee speech on social media to varying degrees, with CN balancing speech freedom against employer interests and discipline law, and US applying the NLRA's protected-concerted-activity doctrine to workplace-related social-media posts.

fact_summary: 健身房在收取数百名会员多年会费后突然停业且未退还会费 / A gym collected multi-year membership fees from hundreds of members and suddenly closed without refunding prepaid fees.
cn_claim: 经营者以预收款方式提供商品或服务而未按约定提供的，应退回预付款并承担预付款的利息及消费者必须支付的合理费用（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: Prepaid membership fees that are not refunded upon business closure may give rise to claims for breach of contract and unjust enrichment; in bankruptcy, consumer prepayments may be entitled to priority under 11 U.S.C. § 507(a)(7) up to a statutory cap; the FTC's Cooling-Off Rule (16 C.F.R. Part 429) provides cancellation rights for certain door-to-door sales but does not generally cover gym memberships.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide consumer remedies for prepaid services not rendered, with CN codifying a statutory refund obligation and US providing contract, unjust-enrichment, and bankruptcy-priority remedies.

fact_summary: 健身房收取多年会费后突然停业不退还会费 / A gym closed without refunding prepaid multi-year membership fees.
cn_claim: 经营者应退回预付款并承担利息及合理费用（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A consumer who has prepaid for services that are not rendered may bring a claim for breach of contract and seek restitution of the prepaid amount; if the gym company enters liquidation, the consumer is an unsecured creditor, though the consumer may seek relief under the Consumer Goods Safety Ordinance (Cap. 456) or through the Small Claims Tribunal where the amount falls within its jurisdiction.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for consumers when prepaid services are not delivered, with CN codifying a statutory refund obligation and HK providing contract and restitution remedies through the courts and Small Claims Tribunal.

fact_summary: A musician sampled three seconds of a copyrighted recording in a new song without a license / 音乐人在新歌中未经授权采样了他人版权录音的三秒钟片段
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: The de minimis defense does not apply to sound-recording sampling; any unauthorized sampling of a copyrighted sound recording, regardless of length, constitutes infringement unless the use is a fair use under 17 U.S.C. § 107; Bridgeport Music, Inc. v. Dimension Films, 410 F.3d 792 (6th Cir. 2005).
hk_claim: Sampling of a sound recording without license constitutes copyright infringement under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528); a fair-dealing defense under s.39 is available but requires the dealing to be fair and for specified purposes; the amount and substantiality of the portion taken is one factor in assessing fairness.
notes: Both US and HK treat unauthorized sampling as copyright infringement, but US rejects de minimis for sound recordings under Bridgeport Music, while HK assesses sampling under general fair-dealing principles considering the substantiality of the portion taken.

fact_summary: 夫妻一方在婚内继承的遗产尚未分割，离婚时另一方要求作为共同财产分配 / One spouse inherited assets during marriage that had not yet been distributed; in the divorce, the other spouse claimed a share as marital property.
cn_claim: 婚姻关系存续期间继承或受赠的财产属于夫妻共同财产，但遗嘱或赠与合同中确定只归一方的财产除外（民法典第1062条第一款第四项、第1063条第三项）。
us_claim: Inheritance received during marriage is generally separate property in most states; however, if the inheritance is commingled with marital funds or used for marital purposes, it may lose its separate character and become subject to equitable distribution; the burden is on the inheriting spouse to trace the separate character of inherited assets.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN treats inheritance during marriage as community property absent express designation otherwise, while US treats it as separate property unless commingled, creating a significant default-rule asymmetry.

fact_summary: 夫妻一方婚内继承遗产未分割，离婚时另一方要求作为共同财产分配 / One spouse inherited assets during marriage; the other sought a share in divorce.
cn_claim: 婚内继承的财产属夫妻共同财产，但遗嘱指定只归一方的除外（民法典第1062条第一款第四项、第1063条第三项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Inheritance received by one spouse during marriage is generally treated as that spouse's separate property unless the inheritance has been gifted to both spouses or commingled with matrimonial assets; the court has discretion to take inherited assets into account when determining ancillary relief.
notes: CN defaults inheritance to community property while HK treats it as separate property, though both systems allow departure from the default in specific circumstances.

fact_summary: 居民个人从境外公司取得股息收入未向中国税务机关申报 / A resident individual received dividend income from a foreign company and did not declare it to tax authorities.
cn_claim: 居民个人从中国境外取得的所得应依法申报缴纳个人所得税（个人所得税法第1条、第10条）；境外已缴税款可按规定抵免。
us_claim: U.S. citizens and resident aliens are taxed on worldwide income; foreign dividend income must be reported and is subject to federal income tax with a foreign tax credit available under I.R.C. § 901 to offset foreign taxes paid; failure to report foreign income may result in civil penalties and, if willful, criminal prosecution under I.R.C. § 7201.
hk_claim: Hong Kong adopts a territorial tax system; foreign-sourced dividends received by a Hong Kong resident are generally not subject to Hong Kong profits tax or salaries tax unless the dividend is from a Hong Kong source or is received in connection with a Hong Kong office or employment.
notes: CN and US tax residents on worldwide income including foreign dividends, while HK uses territorial taxation, creating a significant jurisdictional asymmetry in the treatment of foreign-source income.

fact_summary: A company transferred intellectual property to a subsidiary in a low-tax jurisdiction and paid royalties that reduced its taxable income / 公司将知识产权转让给低税率地区的子公司并通过支付特许权使用费减少应税收入
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Transfer-pricing rules under I.R.C. § 482 require that transactions between related parties be at arm's length; the IRS may reallocate income and deductions to reflect the true taxable income; the base-erosion and anti-abuse tax (BEAT) under I.R.C. § 59A imposes an additional tax on corporations that make deductible payments to related foreign persons.
hk_claim: The Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap. 112) s.20 provides for transfer-pricing adjustments where transactions between associated persons are not at arm's length and result in a tax advantage; Hong Kong follows the OECD Transfer Pricing Guidelines.
notes: Both US and HK apply the arm's-length principle to related-party transactions, with US using I.R.C. § 482 plus BEAT and HK applying the Inland Revenue Ordinance and OECD Guidelines.

fact_summary: 卖方交付的货物符合国家标准但仍造成买方特定用途的生产损失 / Goods that complied with national standards nevertheless caused production losses because they were unfit for the buyer's specific purpose.
cn_claim: 出卖人交付的标的物应符合质量要求；买受人有特殊质量要求且出卖人知道的，买卖合同应包含该特殊质量义务（民法典第615条、第616条）；符合国家标准不当然免责。
us_claim: A seller who knows of the buyer's particular purpose and that the buyer is relying on the seller's skill or judgment to select suitable goods may be liable under the implied warranty of fitness for a particular purpose under U.C.C. § 2-315; compliance with general standards does not defeat this warranty.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US recognize that goods fit for general commercial standards may still breach warranty if they are unfit for the buyer's particular purpose known to the seller.

fact_summary: 原告起诉时明确放弃部分诉讼请求，判决生效后又就该部分另行起诉 / A plaintiff expressly abandoned part of a claim during litigation and later filed a new suit on the abandoned portion after the judgment became final.
cn_claim: 当事人放弃诉讼请求后又起诉的，如构成重复起诉应裁定不予受理（民诉法解释第247条）；明示放弃的权利不得再行主张。
us_claim: Under the doctrine of claim preclusion (res judicata), a final judgment extinguishes all claims arising from the same transaction or occurrence that were or could have been raised; an express abandonment of part of a claim in prior litigation bars relitigation of that portion under the rule against claim-splitting; Restatement (Second) of Judgments § 24.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US bar relitigation of claims that were abandoned in prior proceedings, with CN applying the prohibition on repetitive suits and US applying res judicata and the rule against claim-splitting.

fact_summary: 外卖骑手在多个平台同时接单且自备交通工具，主张与其中一家平台存在劳动关系 / A delivery rider who accepted orders from multiple platforms using his own vehicle claimed an employment relationship with one platform.
cn_claim: 认定劳动关系应综合考量人格从属性、经济从属性和组织从属性；劳动者同时为多个平台提供服务且自主决定工作时间和方式的，不构成劳动关系（关于维护新就业形态劳动者劳动保障权益的指导意见）。
us_claim: The economic-realities test considers the degree of control, the worker's opportunity for profit or loss, investment in equipment, the skill required, and the permanency of the relationship; a worker who simultaneously works for multiple platforms and uses his own equipment is more likely to be classified as an independent contractor.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US treat multi-platform work with own equipment as a factor weighing against employment status, applying comparable multi-factor tests.

fact_summary: 外卖骑手在多平台接单且自备交通工具，主张与某平台存在劳动关系 / A multi-platform rider with own vehicle claimed employment with one platform.
cn_claim: 同时为多平台服务且自主决定工作时间的，不构成劳动关系（关于平台劳动保障权益的指导意见）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Whether a worker is an employee or independent contractor depends on the totality of the relationship, considering control, ownership of equipment, method of payment, and the degree of integration into the employer's business; a rider using his own equipment and working for multiple platforms is more likely to be an independent contractor under the common-law test.
notes: Both CN and HK treat multi-platform work with own equipment as an indicator of independent-contractor status, applying similar multi-factor tests to the employment-status determination.

fact_summary: 自然人在微信群里转发未经核实的疫情谣言引发社会恐慌 / An individual forwarded unverified pandemic rumors in a WeChat group, causing public panic.
cn_claim: 编造虚假疫情信息在网络传播或明知是虚假信息仍传播扰乱社会秩序的，应承担行政责任乃至刑事责任（突发事件应对法第65条；治安管理处罚法第25条；编造、故意传播虚假信息罪，刑法第291条之一）。
us_claim: False statements that cause public panic may be restricted if they present a clear and present danger of imminent harm, but content-based speech restrictions are subject to strict scrutiny under the First Amendment; Schenck v. United States, 249 U.S. 47 (1919); the government may regulate fraudulent or knowingly false commercial speech more readily under Central Hudson Gas & Electric Corp. v. Public Service Commission, 447 U.S. 557 (1980).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN imposes direct administrative and criminal liability for spreading pandemic misinformation, while US applies a higher First Amendment bar requiring proof of clear and present danger, creating a significant speech-regulation asymmetry.

fact_summary: 自然人在微信群里转发未核实疫情信息引发恐慌 / An individual forwarded unverified pandemic information causing public panic.
cn_claim: 编造或传播虚假疫情信息扰乱秩序的应承担法律责任（突发事件应对法第65条；治安管理处罚法第25条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Disseminating false information that causes public alarm may constitute an offense under the Public Order Ordinance (Cap. 245) or, in relation to epidemic-related misinformation, may be subject to restrictions under the Prevention and Control of Disease Ordinance (Cap. 599).
notes: Both CN and HK impose legal consequences for spreading false health-related information that causes public panic, though CN imposes broader criminal liability and HK uses public-order and disease-control ordinances.

fact_summary: 小区物业未能及时维修破损的健身器材导致居民使用时受伤 / A resident was injured using broken gym equipment in a residential compound that the property manager had failed to repair.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应按照约定和物业的使用性质妥善维修养护业主共有部分（民法典第942条）；未履行维修义务造成他人损害的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to maintain common-area equipment in a reasonably safe condition after having actual or constructive notice of a dangerous condition may be liable for negligence; Restatement (Third) of Torts: Phys. & Emot. Harm § 52.
hk_claim: An occupier or property manager owes a common duty of care to visitors under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314) s.3; failure to repair broken equipment in common areas after notice of the defect constitutes a breach of the duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose premises-liability duty on property managers to maintain common-area equipment in safe condition.

fact_summary: 某市政府在城市规划中未公布详细的环评报告即批准大型化工项目 / A city government approved a major chemical project without publishing a detailed environmental-impact assessment.
cn_claim: 对依法应编制环境影响报告书的建设项目，应在报批前举行听证会或采取其他形式征求公众意见（环境影响评价法第21条）；未公开环评报告即批准建设的，利害关系人可提起行政诉讼。
us_claim: The National Environmental Policy Act (42 U.S.C. § 4332) requires federal agencies to prepare a detailed environmental impact statement for major actions significantly affecting the environment and to make it available for public comment; failure to prepare an adequate EIS is a ground for judicial reversal under the APA (5 U.S.C. § 706).
hk_claim: A major development project requires an environmental-impact assessment under the Environmental Impact Assessment Ordinance (Cap. 499); the EIA report must be made available for public inspection and comment before approval; failure to comply renders the approval subject to judicial review.
notes: All three jurisdictions require public disclosure and participation in environmental review of major projects and provide judicial review for non-compliance with procedural requirements.

fact_summary: 实习生在实习期间因工作受伤，公司以双方不构成劳动关系为由拒绝承担工伤责任 / An intern injured during work was denied workers' compensation by the company, which argued no employment relationship existed.
cn_claim: 在校生在用人单位实习期间与用人单位不构成劳动关系，但用人单位应对实习生在实习工作中发生的伤害根据过错承担赔偿责任（民法典第1191条）；学校组织实习的学校也应承担相应责任。
us_claim: Unpaid interns are generally not employees for purposes of workers' compensation unless the intern provides significant benefit to the employer and the employer exercises substantial control over the intern's work; the primary-beneficiary test from Glatt v. Fox Searchlight Pictures, Inc., 811 F.3d 528 (2d Cir. 2016) applies; some states extend workers' compensation coverage to student interns through special provisions.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US distinguish interns from employees for workers' compensation, applying fault-based tort liability supplemented by institutional responsibility (school/state).

fact_summary: 实习生工作受伤，公司以不构成劳动关系为由拒赔 / An intern was injured at work and the company denied compensation, citing no employment relationship.
cn_claim: 实习期间不构成劳动关系，按过错承担责任（民法典第1191条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Whether an intern is an employee for the purposes of the Employees' Compensation Ordinance (Cap. 282) depends on the substance of the relationship; where the intern performs work for the benefit of the organization and is subject to its direction, an employment relationship may be found for compensation purposes.
notes: Both CN and HK address intern workplace injuries through distinct routes: CN denies employment status but allows tort recovery, while HK may find an employment relationship for ECO purposes depending on the factual substance of the arrangement.

fact_summary: 跨境电商平台卖家因汇率剧烈波动拒绝按合同约定价格发货 / A cross-border e-commerce seller refused to deliver goods at the contracted price due to severe exchange-rate fluctuation.
cn_claim: 合同成立后发生当事人在订立合同时无法预见的重大变化且继续履行显失公平的，受不利影响的一方可以与对方重新协商（民法典第533条情势变更）；协商不成的可请求法院变更或解除合同。
us_claim: Under the doctrine of impracticability and frustration of purpose (U.C.C. § 2-615), a seller may be excused from performance where an unforeseen contingency has made performance commercially impracticable; a mere increase in cost, including from currency fluctuation, is generally insufficient unless the increase is extreme and unreasonable.
hk_claim: A contract may be frustrated where an unforeseen event renders performance radically different from what the parties contemplated; a change in exchange rates is usually treated as a commercial risk and not a frustrating event unless the change is extreme and outside the ordinary risks assumed by the parties in international trade.
notes: All three jurisdictions allow relief for unforeseen supervening events, but apply high thresholds for currency fluctuations: CN uses statutory hardship renegotiation, US applies commercial-impracticability, and HK applies frustration with a narrower scope.

fact_summary: AI绘画工具通过抓取互联网上大量受版权保护的图像进行模型训练，部分输出图像与训练数据高度相似 / An AI art tool trained on copyrighted images scraped from the internet; some outputs closely resembled the training data.
cn_claim: 利用他人作品进行AI模型训练是否构成合理使用尚无明确规定；生成内容与他人作品构成实质性相似的，可能侵犯复制权、改编权（著作权法第10条、第24条）。
us_claim: Whether training AI models on copyrighted works constitutes fair use under 17 U.S.C. § 107 is unsettled; the four-factor test considers purpose (commercial vs. nonprofit educational), nature of the work, amount used, and market effect; the output may infringe the derivative-work right under § 106(2) if it is substantially similar to protected expression; Authors Guild v. Google, Inc., 804 F.3d 202 (2d Cir. 2015).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US are grappling with AI-training copyright issues, with CN analyzing under existing reproduction and adaptation rights and US applying fair-use analysis. The law remains unsettled in both jurisdictions.

fact_summary: 小区物业在电梯内安装人脸识别门禁系统但未告知业主信息处理规则 / A property manager installed facial-recognition access control in elevators without informing residents of the data-handling rules.
cn_claim: 在公共场所安装图像采集、个人身份识别设备应设置显著提示标识，且收集的个人信息不得用于其他目的（个人信息保护法第26条）；未告知处理规则的违反知情同意原则。
us_claim: Collection of biometric data without notice and consent may violate state biometric privacy laws such as the Illinois Biometric Information Privacy Act (BIPA) (740 ILCS 14/15), which requires informed written consent and a publicly available retention policy; Rosenbach v. Six Flags Entertainment Corp., 129 N.E.3d 1197 (Ill. 2019).
hk_claim: Collection of biometric data by a property manager constitutes collection of personal data under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486); the manager must provide a Personal Information Collection Statement informing residents of the purpose and the classes of persons to whom the data may be transferred, and must obtain prescribed consent.
notes: All three jurisdictions regulate biometric-data collection in semi-public spaces through notice-and-consent requirements, though the regulatory instruments differ (PIPL, BIPA, PDPO).

fact_summary: 企业员工利用职务便利将公司掌握的客户个人信息出售给第三方营销公司 / An employee used their position to sell customer personal data held by the company to a third-party marketing firm.
cn_claim: 违反国家有关规定向他人出售或提供公民个人信息情节严重的，构成侵犯公民个人信息罪（刑法第253条之一第一款）。
us_claim: An employee who accesses a company's computer to obtain customer data for sale to a third party may be prosecuted under the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act (18 U.S.C. § 1030(a)(2)) for exceeding authorized access and under federal identity-theft statutes (18 U.S.C. § 1028); the FTC may also bring an enforcement action under § 5 of the FTC Act for unfair data practices.
hk_claim: An employee who sells customer personal data obtained through employment without the customer's consent commits an offense under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) s.64 (offense of disclosing personal data without consent for gain).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the sale of personal data by insiders, with CN and HK providing specific data-protection offenses and US prosecuting under computer-fraud and identity-theft statutes.

fact_summary: 宗教团体申请在公共广场举办宗教活动被拒 / A religious group was denied a permit to hold a religious gathering in a public square.
cn_claim: 公民有宗教信仰自由（宪法第36条）；宗教活动应当在依法登记的宗教活动场所内进行，在公共场所举办宗教活动需经审批（宗教事务条例第40条）。
us_claim: Restrictions on religious gatherings in public forums are subject to strict scrutiny under the Free Exercise Clause and must be content-neutral under the Free Speech Clause; a permitting scheme that grants officials unbridled discretion to deny permits is unconstitutional; the Religious Land Use and Institutionalized Persons Act (42 U.S.C. § 2000cc) also provides protection against zoning and land-use regulations that substantially burden religious exercise.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US protect religious freedom while regulating religious activities in public spaces, but CN channels through an administrative-approval framework and US applies strict constitutional scrutiny.

fact_summary: 宗教团体申请在公共广场举办宗教活动被拒 / A religious group was denied a permit for a public-square religious gathering.
cn_claim: 公民有宗教信仰自由（宪法第36条）；公共场所宗教活动需经审批（宗教事务条例第40条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Freedom of religion is protected under the Basic Law (Art. 32) and the Hong Kong Bill of Rights Ordinance (Cap. 383) Art. 15; public religious gatherings may be subject to reasonable and lawful restrictions including the requirement to obtain police notification or approval under the Public Order Ordinance (Cap. 245) for public processions and meetings.
notes: Both CN and HK protect religious freedom subject to public-order regulation, with CN requiring administrative approval under the Religious Affairs Regulations and HK applying the Public Order Ordinance framework with Bill of Rights protections.

fact_summary: 被告人因恋爱纠纷将前女友裸照发布到色情网站 / A defendant posted nude photos of his ex-girlfriend to a pornography website following a relationship breakup.
cn_claim: 以暴力或其他方法公然侮辱他人或捏造事实诽谤他人情节严重的，构成侮辱罪、诽谤罪（刑法第246条）；以其他方法侵害他人隐私权的应承担民事责任（民法典第1032条、第1033条第五项）。
us_claim: Nonconsensual pornography (revenge porn) is criminalized in most states under specific revenge-porn statutes prohibiting the distribution of intimate images without consent; it may also support claims for intentional infliction of emotional distress and invasion of privacy (publication of private facts).
hk_claim: Publishing intimate images without consent may constitute criminal intimidation under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200) s.24 and may also constitute an offense under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) if the images constitute personal data disclosed without consent; the victim may also bring a civil claim for breach of confidence.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide criminal and civil remedies for nonconsensual pornography, with CN applying defamation and privacy torts, US using state revenge-porn statutes and privacy torts, and HK applying criminal intimidation, data-protection, and breach-of-confidence claims.

fact_summary: 酒店因承接政府防疫征用任务不能按约向婚宴客户提供场地 / A hotel could not host a booked wedding because the government requisitioned the venue for pandemic control.
cn_claim: 因不可抗力不能履行合同的，根据不可抗力的影响部分或全部免除责任（民法典第180条、第590条）；政府征用构成不可抗力事件。
us_claim: Government requisition that renders performance impossible may excuse performance under the doctrine of impossibility or frustration of purpose; a party whose performance is prevented by government order is discharged from contractual obligations under the Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 264 (prevention by governmental regulation or order).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US excuse contractual performance when made impossible by government requisition, with CN applying force majeure under the Civil Code and US applying impossibility and frustration doctrines.

fact_summary: 酒店因政府防疫征用不能按约提供婚宴场地 / A hotel could not host a wedding due to government requisition for pandemic control.
cn_claim: 因不可抗力不能履行的免除责任（民法典第180条、第590条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Government requisition that prevents contractual performance may discharge the contract under the doctrine of frustration; the Law Amendment and Reform (Consolidation) Ordinance (Cap. 23) s.16 provides for the adjustment of rights and liabilities where a contract has been frustrated.
notes: Both CN and HK allow discharge of contractual obligations where government requisition makes performance impossible, with CN applying force majeure and HK applying the doctrine of frustration.

fact_summary: 某视频博主在其影评视频中使用电影片段进行评论和讽刺 / A video blogger used movie clips in a review video for commentary and parody.
cn_claim: 为介绍评论某一作品或说明某一问题在作品中适当引用他人已发表作品的，可不经著作权人许可不支付报酬（著作权法第24条第二项）；合理引用限于实现评论目的所必要的范围。
us_claim: Use of copyrighted film clips for criticism and commentary is the quintessential fair use under 17 U.S.C. § 107; the four factors strongly favor fair use where the use is transformative, the amount taken is reasonable in relation to the purpose, and the use does not substitute for the original; Campbell v. Acuff-Rose Music, Inc., 510 U.S. 569 (1994).
hk_claim: Fair dealing for purposes of criticism or review of a copyright work does not infringe copyright under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528) s.39, provided a sufficient acknowledgment is given; the amount used must be no more than necessary for the purpose of the criticism or review.
notes: All three jurisdictions permit limited use of copyrighted works for criticism and commentary, with CN using a statutory fair-use list, US applying the four-factor fair-use test, and HK applying the fair-dealing-for-criticism defense.

fact_summary: 公司召开股东会时未按章程规定提前15天通知小股东 / A company gave less than the 15-day notice required by its articles to minority shareholders before a shareholder meeting.
cn_claim: 召开股东会会议应于会议召开15日前通知全体股东（公司法第41条第一款）；未依法通知的股东会决议可被撤销（公司法第22条第二款）。
us_claim: Failure to comply with statutory or bylaw notice requirements for shareholder meetings may invalidate the meeting and the resolutions passed; a shareholder who is not properly notified may bring a suit to enjoin the meeting or to set aside actions taken; Del. G.C.L. § 222 requires not less than 10 nor more than 60 days' notice.
hk_claim: A company must give notice of general meetings in accordance with its articles and the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622); failure to give proper notice to a member entitled to receive notice may render the meeting and resolutions voidable; a member who did not receive notice may apply to the court for relief.
notes: All three jurisdictions require compliance with notice requirements for shareholder meetings, with resolutions passed without proper notice being voidable.

fact_summary: 智能音箱在用户未唤醒的情况下持续录音并上传至云端 / A smart speaker continuously recorded and uploaded conversations to the cloud without the wake-word being spoken.
cn_claim: 处理个人信息应在事先确定的处理目的范围内并限于实现处理目的所必要的方式，不得过度收集（个人信息保护法第6条）；未唤醒状态下持续录音违反最小必要原则且未取得有效同意。
us_claim: Secret recording of private conversations may violate the federal Wiretap Act (18 U.S.C. § 2511) and state eavesdropping laws; the FTC has brought enforcement actions against smart-device manufacturers for collecting data without adequate notice or consent under § 5 of the FTC Act; the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (15 U.S.C. § 6501) additionally applies where children's voices are recorded.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US regulate surreptitious smart-device recording, with CN applying the PIPL's data-minimization and consent principles and US applying wiretap laws and FTC enforcement.

fact_summary: 智能音箱未唤醒状态下持续录音上传云端 / A smart speaker recorded and uploaded conversations without the wake word.
cn_claim: 过度收集违反最小必要原则（个人信息保护法第6条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Covert recording of private conversations may violate the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) Data Protection Principle 1 (collection must be fair) and Principle 2 (data must be adequate but not excessive for the purpose); secret interception of communications may also constitute an offense under the Telecommunications Ordinance (Cap. 106) s.25.
notes: Both CN and HK restrict covert smart-device recording, with CN applying PIPL data-minimization and HK applying PDPO collection principles and telecommunications-interception offenses.

fact_summary: A supplier declared force majeure under a supply contract due to a pandemic lockdown that did not legally prevent performance but made it more expensive / 供应商以防疫封锁为由宣布不可抗力但封锁并未在法律上阻止履约
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: A force-majeure clause is construed according to its terms; a pandemic lockdown that does not legally prohibit performance but increases costs generally does not excuse performance unless the contract specifically includes increased cost or economic hardship as a force-majeure event; mere economic inconvenience is insufficient; Kel Kim Corp. v. Central Markets, Inc., 70 N.Y.2d 900 (1987).
hk_claim: A force-majeure clause is construed by its terms; a party seeking to rely on force majeure must show that the event falls within the clause and that it was beyond the party's control and prevented performance; increased cost or economic hardship alone is generally insufficient unless the clause clearly covers such circumstances.
notes: Both US and HK construe force-majeure clauses narrowly, requiring a causal link between the event and the inability to perform, and rejecting purely economic-hardship claims.

fact_summary: 当事人在诉讼中提交了对方在调解过程中作出的让步陈述作为对其不利的证据 / A party introduced statements made by the opposing party during settlement negotiations as evidence against them.
cn_claim: 在诉讼调解过程中当事人为达成调解协议作出的让步或对案件事实的认可，不得在其后的诉讼中作为对其不利的证据（民诉法解释第107条）。
us_claim: Statements made during settlement negotiations are inadmissible under Federal Rule of Evidence 408 to prove the validity or amount of a disputed claim, and conduct or statements made during compromise negotiations are likewise inadmissible; the rule promotes the public policy of encouraging settlement.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit using settlement-negotiation statements as evidence in subsequent litigation to protect the settlement process and encourage compromise.

fact_summary: 当事人将调解中对方的让步陈述作为诉讼中对其不利的证据 / A party introduced the opponent's settlement-negotiation concessions as evidence.
cn_claim: 调解中的让步不得在其后诉讼中作为不利证据（民诉法解释第107条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Communications made in the course of without-prejudice negotiations are privileged and inadmissible in subsequent proceedings; the without-prejudice rule protects bona fide settlement discussions from being used against a party at trial; the rule is subject to limited exceptions such as where the communication constitutes an act of bankruptcy or fraud.
notes: Both CN and HK protect settlement communications from subsequent use in litigation, with CN applying a statutory rule and HK applying the common-law without-prejudice privilege.

fact_summary: 跨境电商卖家在境外平台销售商品取得收入后未向国内税务机关申报 / A cross-border e-commerce seller earned income on overseas platforms but did not declare it to domestic tax authorities.
cn_claim: 居民个人从中国境外取得的所得应依法申报缴纳个人所得税（个人所得税法第1条、第10条）；跨境电商收入属于来源于境外的经营所得应申报纳税。
us_claim: U.S. citizens and resident aliens are taxed on worldwide income; income from foreign e-commerce platforms must be reported on Schedule C or as foreign-earned income; failure to report is subject to civil penalties and may constitute tax evasion under I.R.C. § 7201 if willful.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US tax residents on worldwide income including cross-border e-commerce earnings, requiring declaration of income from foreign platforms.

fact_summary: 跨境电商卖家境外收入未向香港税务机关申报 / A cross-border e-commerce seller did not declare overseas income to Hong Kong tax authorities.
cn_claim: 居民个人境外所得应依法申报（个人所得税法第1条、第10条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Hong Kong adopts a territorial tax system; income sourced outside Hong Kong is generally not subject to Hong Kong profits tax or salaries tax; cross-border e-commerce income earned from sources outside Hong Kong may not be taxable unless the operations generating the income are substantially carried out in Hong Kong.
notes: CN taxes residents on worldwide income while HK uses territorial taxation, creating a fundamental asymmetry in the tax treatment of cross-border e-commerce earnings.

fact_summary: 某外资企业在华收集的用户数据被传输至境外总部服务器进行统一处理 / A foreign-invested enterprise in China transmitted user data collected domestically to its overseas headquarters server for centralized processing.
cn_claim: 关键信息基础设施运营者和处理大量个人信息的个人信息处理者确需向境外提供个人信息的，应通过国家网信部门组织的安全评估（个人信息保护法第38条、第40条）。
us_claim: Cross-border data transfers are regulated under sectoral laws and the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework; the CLOUD Act (18 U.S.C. § 2523) governs access to data stored overseas; there is no general cross-border data-transfer restriction comparable to China's PIPL, but sectoral regulations (e.g., HIPAA for health data) impose transfer restrictions.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN imposes comprehensive cross-border data-transfer restrictions through security assessments, while US relies on sectoral regulation and international frameworks, creating a regulatory asymmetry in data-localization requirements.

fact_summary: 夫妻在婚内签订了财产分别所有协议，离婚时一方主张该协议系受胁迫签订 / During marriage, spouses signed a separation-of-property agreement; on divorce, one party claimed the agreement was signed under duress.
cn_claim: 男女双方可以约定婚姻关系存续期间所得财产归各自所有（民法典第1065条）；一方在受胁迫情况下签订的协议可申请撤销（民法典第150条）。
us_claim: Premarital and postnuptial agreements are generally enforceable under the Uniform Premarital and Marital Agreements Act; a party challenging the agreement on grounds of duress must prove that the agreement was signed under coercion that deprived the party of free will; the burden is on the challenging party to prove involuntariness.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US permit marital property agreements and allow challenges based on duress, though CN applies a statutory duress standard and US uses the Uniform Act framework.

fact_summary: 夫妻婚内签订财产分别所有协议，离婚时一方主张受胁迫 / A spouse challenged a separation-of-property agreement signed during marriage as signed under duress.
cn_claim: 婚内财产约定可因受胁迫而撤销（民法典第1065条、第150条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Postnuptial agreements are generally enforceable in Hong Kong, but may be set aside if obtained by duress, undue influence, or fraud; the court may also depart from the agreement in ancillary relief proceedings if holding the parties to the agreement would lead to an unjust result.
notes: Both CN and HK permit marital property agreements and provide remedies where the agreement was obtained by duress, through CN's statutory rescission and HK's equitable doctrines plus the court's ancillary-relief discretion.

fact_summary: 地方政府为保护本地就业出台限制外地企业参与本地招投标的规定 / A local government restricted out-of-town enterprises from bidding on local government contracts to protect local employment.
cn_claim: 行政机关不得滥用行政权力排除、限制外地经营者参加本地招标投标活动（反垄断法第42条；公平竞争审查制度实施细则）。
us_claim: A local-preference law that discriminates against out-of-state economic actors is subject to strict scrutiny under the dormant Commerce Clause and is presumptively unconstitutional; a state must demonstrate that the discrimination serves a legitimate local purpose that cannot be served by nondiscriminatory alternatives; C & A Carbone, Inc. v. Town of Clarkstown, 511 U.S. 383 (1994).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit local-government discrimination against out-of-jurisdiction businesses, with CN applying anti-monopoly law and fair-competition review and US applying dormant-Commerce-Clause analysis.

fact_summary: 某跨国公司因美国法院要求提供存储在中国境内的用户邮件数据 / A U.S. court ordered a multinational company to produce user email data stored in China.
cn_claim: 任何组织和个人未经主管机关批准不得向外国司法或执法机构提供存储在中国境内的数据（数据安全法第36条；个人信息保护法第41条）。
us_claim: Under the CLOUD Act (18 U.S.C. § 2523), a U.S. service provider must comply with a U.S. warrant for data regardless of where the data is stored, unless the provider files a motion to quash on comity grounds; the comity analysis under § 2523(b) and United States v. Microsoft Corp., 138 S. Ct. 1186 (2018) (mooted) considers the conflict with foreign law.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN and US are in direct conflict on cross-border data-production orders: CN requires prior government approval for data transfers to foreign law enforcement, while the CLOUD Act compels production regardless of data location, subject to comity review.

fact_summary: 离婚后直接抚养子女的一方因再婚迁往异地，另一方申请变更子女抚养权 / The custodial parent remarried and relocated to a distant city after divorce; the non-custodial parent sought modification of custody.
cn_claim: 一方要求变更子女抚养关系应有正当理由；直接抚养方的居住环境发生重大变化可能影响子女健康成长的，可予变更（民法典第1084条第三款；最高人民法院关于子女抚养的司法解释第16条）。
us_claim: Relocation of the custodial parent constitutes a material change in circumstances warranting custody modification; courts apply the best-interests-of-the-child standard, weighing the benefits of relocation, the impact on the child's relationship with the non-custodial parent, and the child's adjustment; the relocating parent bears the burden of proving the move serves the child's best interests in most jurisdictions.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US allow custody modification upon the custodial parent's relocation, applying child-best-interests standards and requiring the relocating parent to justify the move.

fact_summary: 直接抚养方因再婚迁往异地，对方申请变更子女抚养权 / The custodial parent relocated after remarriage; the other parent sought custody modification.
cn_claim: 直接抚养方居住环境重大变化可能影响子女的可变更抚养关系（民法典第1084条；司法解释第16条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An application by a parent for variation of a custody order requires proof of a material change in circumstances; the court's paramount consideration is the welfare of the child; the custodial parent's relocation is a relevant factor and may justify a variation if the move significantly impairs the child's relationship with the non-custodial parent.
notes: Both CN and HK permit variation of custody orders upon custodial-parent relocation, with CN using statutory factors and HK applying the welfare-of-the-child test.

fact_summary: A minority shareholder alleged that the company's directors issued shares to themselves at a discount with the purpose of diluting the minority's stake / 小股东主张董事以折价向自己发行新股旨在稀释小股东持股
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: A board-issued share issuance primarily intended to dilute a particular shareholder's voting power or economic interest and entrench board control breaches fiduciary duties; the issuance is subject to enhanced scrutiny and will be enjoined if the primary purpose is entrenchment rather than a legitimate corporate purpose; Blasius Industries, Inc. v. Atlas Corp., 564 A.2d 651 (Del. Ch. 1988).
hk_claim: Directors must exercise their power to issue shares for a proper purpose; issuing shares at a discount to directors primarily to dilute a minority shareholder is an improper purpose and may be set aside; the proper-purpose doctrine under Howard Smith Ltd v. Ampol Petroleum Ltd [1974] AC 821 applies.
notes: Both US and HK prohibit share issuances for the improper purpose of diluting minority shareholders, with US applying Delaware's Blasius enhanced scrutiny and HK applying the English proper-purpose doctrine.

fact_summary: 被告人在庭审中突然变更辩护理由称系受他人胁迫犯罪 / During trial, the defendant suddenly changed his defense, claiming he committed the crime under duress from another person.
cn_claim: 对于胁迫参与犯罪的胁从犯，应按其犯罪情节减轻处罚或免除处罚（刑法第28条）；被告人在庭审中改变供述的应综合全案证据审查。
us_claim: Duress is an affirmative defense to most crimes, requiring proof that the defendant was under an imminent threat of death or serious bodily harm and had no reasonable opportunity to escape; the defendant bears the burden of production; United States v. Bailey, 444 U.S. 394 (1980); a last-minute change in defense strategy is permitted but may affect credibility assessments.
hk_claim: Duress is a complete defense if the defendant was threatened with death or serious bodily harm and a reasonable person would have been unable to resist; the defense must be raised in a timely manner; a change in defense during trial is permitted but the court will consider the circumstances in evaluating the defense's credibility.
notes: CN treats duress as mitigating, US/HK treat it as a complete defense (except murder). All three allow mid-trial defense changes but weigh the timing in credibility assessments.

fact_summary: 胜诉当事人在申请执行时发现被执行人已将名下唯一住房转移至亲属名下 / A judgment creditor discovered upon seeking enforcement that the debtor had transferred their sole residence to a relative.
cn_claim: 债务人无偿或以明显不合理的低价转让财产对债权人造成损害的，债权人可请求法院撤销债务人的行为（民法典第538条、第539条）；被执行人转移财产逃避执行的，法院可予以罚款拘留直至追究刑事责任。
us_claim: A transfer made with actual intent to hinder, delay, or defraud a creditor may be avoided under the Uniform Voidable Transactions Act; the judgment creditor may bring a fraudulent-transfer action to set aside the transfer and subject the property to execution; the transfer may also constitute contempt of court if made in violation of a court order.
hk_claim: A disposition of property made with intent to defraud creditors may be set aside under the Conveyancing and Property Ordinance (Cap. 219) s.60; a judgment creditor may apply to set aside the transfer and execute against the property as though it were still held by the debtor.
notes: All three jurisdictions allow creditors to set aside fraudulent transfers made to evade enforcement, with CN, US, and HK each providing statutory avoidance remedies for transferee-to-defraud conveyances.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播带货购买的商品与主播展示严重不符 / A consumer purchased goods promoted by a livestreaming host that materially differed from the host's demonstration.
cn_claim: 经营者提供商品有欺诈行为的应按消费者要求增加赔偿其受到的损失，增加赔偿金额为商品价款的三倍（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；直播带货主播属于经营者。
us_claim: A seller's material misrepresentation about goods through livestreaming constitutes fraud and may violate the FTC Act § 5 prohibition on deceptive acts; the consumer may seek rescission of the contract and damages for fraud or breach of warranty; the FTC's Endorsement Guides (16 C.F.R. Part 255) require disclosure of material connections between endorsers and sellers.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide consumer remedies for livestreaming misrepresentations, with CN applying statutory treble damages for fraud and US using FTC enforcement and common-law fraud/warranty remedies.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买的商品与展示严重不符 / Livestreamed goods materially differed from the host's demonstration.
cn_claim: 欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A consumer who purchases goods that do not conform to the seller's description may bring a claim for breach of contract and misrepresentation; the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362) s.7 makes it an offense to apply a false trade description to goods; the consumer may seek rescission of the contract and damages.
notes: Both CN and HK provide consumer remedies for misdescribed goods in livestreaming, with CN allowing treble damages for fraud and HK applying contract and misdescription remedies.

fact_summary: 被告人在卫生间安装针孔摄像头偷拍同事如厕画面 / A defendant installed a hidden camera in the office restroom and secretly recorded colleagues.
cn_claim: 非法使用窃照专用器材造成严重后果的构成非法使用窃照专用器材罪（刑法第284条）；偷拍他人私密部位的还应承担侵犯隐私权的民事责任（民法典第1032条、第1033条）。
us_claim: Secretly recording individuals in a restroom violates state video-voyeurism statutes and may constitute an invasion of privacy under the tort of intrusion upon seclusion; it may also be prosecuted under the federal Video Voyeurism Prevention Act of 2004 (18 U.S.C. § 1801) if the recording occurred in a federal enclave.
hk_claim: Surreptitious recording of individuals in a restroom constitutes an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200) s.161 (access to computer with dishonest intent if a computer was used) and may constitute criminal intimidation; it also constitutes an invasion of privacy and may breach the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize surreptitious recording in private spaces, with CN using specialized surveillance-device laws, US using video-voyeurism statutes, and HK using the Crimes Ordinance and data-protection law.

fact_summary: 买方收到货物后长期使用未提出异议，一年后以质量问题为由拒绝支付剩余货款 / A buyer used the goods for a year without complaint and then refused to pay the balance, citing quality defects.
cn_claim: 买受人收到标的物后应在合理期间内检验并将瑕疵通知出卖人；买受人怠于通知的视为标的物质量符合约定（民法典第621条第一款）。
us_claim: A buyer who accepts goods and fails to notify the seller of any defect within a reasonable time after discovery is deemed to have accepted the goods under U.C.C. § 2-606; rejection or revocation of acceptance must occur within a reasonable time after discovery of the nonconformity, and continued use of the goods may constitute acceptance.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US deem quality objections waived if the buyer fails to inspect and notify the seller of defects within a reasonable time after receipt or discovery.

fact_summary: 买方使用货物一年后以质量问题为由拒付余款 / A buyer used goods for a year and then refused to pay the balance on quality grounds.
cn_claim: 买受人怠于通知的视为质量合格（民法典第621条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under the Sale of Goods Ordinance (Cap. 26) s.37, the buyer is deemed to have accepted the goods when, after a reasonable time, the buyer retains the goods without intimating to the seller that the goods have been rejected; acceptance precludes rejection but does not necessarily bar a claim for damages for breach of warranty.
notes: Both CN and HK treat prolonged use without complaint as acceptance of goods, though CN deems quality accepted and HK bars rejection while preserving damages claims.

fact_summary: 执行程序中案外人对被查封房产主张所有权提出执行异议 / In enforcement proceedings, a third party claimed ownership of seized real property and filed an objection.
cn_claim: 案外人对执行标的主张所有权或有其他足以排除强制执行的权益的，可向执行法院提出书面异议（民事诉讼法第232条）；法院应在15日内审查并裁定。
us_claim: A third party claiming an interest in property subject to execution may intervene in the proceedings under Fed. R. Civ. P. 24 or file a motion to quash the writ of execution; state law governs the substantive property rights; the third party bears the burden of proving ownership or a superior interest in the property.
hk_claim: A third party who claims ownership of property seized under a writ of execution may apply to the court for an order releasing the property from seizure; the third party must establish a better right to possession than the judgment debtor.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide mechanisms for third-party claims against seized property in enforcement proceedings, with CN using statutory execution objections and US/HK using court intervention procedures.

fact_summary: 某作家发现其小说被改编为网剧但未获任何授权也未署名 / An author discovered their novel had been adapted into a web series without authorization or attribution.
cn_claim: 未经著作权人许可改编其作品的构成侵权，应停止侵害、消除影响、赔礼道歉、赔偿损失（著作权法第52条、第53条）；改编权、署名权均属著作权人专有权利。
us_claim: The exclusive right to prepare derivative works based upon the copyrighted work is protected under 17 U.S.C. § 106(2); unauthorized adaptation of a novel into a web series constitutes infringement of the derivative-work right; the author is entitled to actual damages and profits or statutory damages under § 504, and may seek injunctive relief under § 502.
hk_claim: Adaptation of a literary work without the copyright owner's license infringes the copyright in the work under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528) s.22; the author is entitled to damages, an account of profits, and additional damages under s.108; the author's moral right of attribution (right to be identified as author) is protected under Division IV of Part II.
notes: All three jurisdictions protect the adaptation and attribution rights of authors against unauthorized derivative works, with CN, US, and HK each providing injunction, damages, and attribution remedies.

fact_summary: 公司注册资本认缴期限届满后股东未按期缴纳出资 / A shareholder failed to contribute subscribed capital by the deadline specified in the company's articles.
cn_claim: 股东未按期足额缴纳出资的除应向公司足额缴纳外还应向已按期足额缴纳出资的股东承担违约责任（公司法第28条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A shareholder who fails to pay the amount due on shares in accordance with the company's articles is liable to pay the amount plus interest; the company may forfeit the shares if the articles so provide, and the shareholder remains liable for the unpaid amount.
notes: Both CN and HK enforce shareholders' capital-contribution obligations, with CN codifying statutory liability to the company and co-shareholders and HK applying the contractual obligation under the articles plus forfeiture remedies.

fact_summary: 小区遛狗未拴绳致老人受惊摔倒骨折 / An unleashed dog in a residential compound frightened an elderly person who fell and fractured a bone.
cn_claim: 饲养的动物造成他人损害的，动物饲养人或管理人应承担侵权责任（民法典第1245条）；违反管理规定未对动物采取安全措施的，动物饲养人不能以被侵权人故意为由抗辩（民法典第1246条）。
us_claim: A dog owner is strictly liable for injuries caused by the dog under state strict-liability dog-bite statutes; in negligence jurisdictions, violation of a leash ordinance constitutes negligence per se; the owner is liable for the foreseeable consequences of failing to restrain the animal.
hk_claim: The owner or keeper of an animal is liable for damage caused by the animal if the animal was not under effective control; under the common law, the owner may be liable in negligence for failing to take reasonable precautions to prevent foreseeable harm, and violation of leash regulations is evidence of negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose strict or negligence-based liability on dog owners for unleashed-dog injuries, with leash-law violations serving as evidence of breach.

fact_summary: 有限责任公司的执行董事未经股东会决议以公司名义对外提供巨额担保 / An executive director of an LLC provided a substantial corporate guarantee to an outsider without shareholder resolution.
cn_claim: 公司向其他企业投资或为他人提供担保的应依照公司章程由董事会或股东会决议（公司法第16条第一款）；未经决议的担保可能无效但不得对抗善意相对人。
us_claim: Corporate guarantees require board approval under state corporate law; a guarantee issued without proper authorization may be ultra vires and unenforceable if the counterparty had notice of the lack of authority; a director who exceeds authority may breach fiduciary duties and face personal liability.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require internal authorization for corporate guarantees, with CN codifying a statutory resolution requirement and US applying the doctrine of corporate authority and ultra vires.

fact_summary: 执行董事未经股东会决议以公司名义对外提供巨额担保 / An executive director provided a corporate guarantee without shareholder resolution.
cn_claim: 对外担保应由股东会决议（公司法第16条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A director must act in accordance with the company's articles; a guarantee given without proper board authority may be void or voidable, and the director may be personally liable for breach of duty; the counterparty may be affected if it had notice of the irregularity; Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) s.465.
notes: Both CN and HK require proper internal authorization for corporate guarantees, with CN imposing a statutory resolution requirement and HK applying directors' duties and the doctrine of corporate authority.

fact_summary: 员工在非工作时间通过微信、钉钉持续回复工作消息，离职后主张加班费 / An employee regularly responded to work messages on WeChat and DingTalk outside working hours and claimed overtime pay after resignation.
cn_claim: 用人单位安排劳动者延长工作时间的应支付加班费；劳动者通过社交媒体在非工作时间从事工作性事务的可认定为加班（劳动法第44条；最高人民法院关于审理劳动争议案件适用法律问题的解释一第42条）。
us_claim: Non-exempt employees must be compensated for all hours worked, including after-hours work performed through electronic devices; the Fair Labor Standards Act (29 U.S.C. § 201 et seq.) requires payment of overtime for hours exceeding 40 per week if the employer knows or has reason to believe work is being performed; off-the-clock work is compensable if the employer suffers or permits it.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US are developing frameworks for compensating after-hours digital work, with CN treating persistent work messaging as overtime and US requiring FLSA compensation for employer-suffered off-the-clock work.

fact_summary: 员工非工作时间通过社交媒体回复工作消息后主张加班费 / An employee claimed overtime for after-hours social-media work messaging.
cn_claim: 非工作时间从事工作性事务的可认定为加班（劳动法第44条；司法解释第42条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Whether an employee who responds to work messages outside of normal working hours is entitled to overtime depends on the terms of the employment contract and whether the employer required or expected the additional work; the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) does not prescribe a standard overtime rate, and overtime entitlements are governed by the employment contract.
notes: CN provides statutory overtime protection for after-hours digital work, while HK leaves overtime to contractual arrangements, creating a remedies asymmetry for off-the-clock digital labor.

fact_summary: 老旧小区外墙瓷砖脱落砸坏楼下停放车辆 / External-wall tiles fell from an aging apartment building, damaging a car parked below.
cn_claim: 建筑物、构筑物发生脱落造成他人损害的，所有人、管理人或使用人不能证明自己无过错的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1257条）。
us_claim: A building owner or manager has a duty to maintain the premises in a reasonably safe condition; failure to repair known deterioration of external-wall components resulting in damage to property constitutes negligence; the owner is vicariously liable under premises-liability principles.
hk_claim: An occupier or building owner owes a duty of care to those who may foreseeably be affected by defects in the building; falling tiles causing damage is prima facie evidence of breach of the duty to maintain the building in a safe condition.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose premises/structural liability on building owners for damage caused by falling building components, applying fault-presumption or negligence standards.

fact_summary: 居民因垃圾焚烧厂排放超标提起环境公益诉讼 / Residents filed a public-interest environmental lawsuit against a waste incinerator for excessive emissions.
cn_claim: 对污染环境、破坏生态损害社会公共利益的行为，法律规定的机关和有关组织可提起环境公益诉讼（民事诉讼法第58条；环境保护法第58条）。
us_claim: Private citizens may bring citizen suits under the Clean Air Act (42 U.S.C. § 7604) and other environmental statutes to enforce emission standards if the relevant agency fails to act; the plaintiff must provide 60-day notice to the EPA, the state, and the alleged violator before commencing suit.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US allow citizen-initiated environmental enforcement actions, with CN providing for public-interest litigation by qualified organizations and US allowing citizen suits under the Clean Air Act subject to notice requirements.

fact_summary: 居民因垃圾焚烧厂排放超标提起环境公益诉讼 / Residents filed an environmental action against an incinerator for excessive emissions.
cn_claim: 有关组织可提起环境公益诉讼（民事诉讼法第58条；环境保护法第58条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A person aggrieved by excessive emissions from a waste incinerator may complain to the Environmental Protection Department, which may take enforcement action under the Air Pollution Control Ordinance (Cap. 311); private prosecution is available for environmental offenses, but there is no general class-action mechanism for environmental damage under Hong Kong law.
notes: CN permits public-interest environmental litigation by qualified organizations, while HK relies primarily on administrative enforcement and private prosecution, creating a procedural asymmetry in environmental-citizen-suit mechanisms.

fact_summary: 公司以显著低于每股净资产的价格向控股股东定向增发新股 / A company issued new shares to its controlling shareholder at a price significantly below net asset value per share.
cn_claim: 同次发行的同种类股票每股发行条件和价格应相同（公司法第139条第一款）；向控股股东以低价发行稀释其他股东权益的构成不公平关联交易（公司法第21条）。
us_claim: A stock issuance to a controlling shareholder at a below-market price that dilutes minority shareholders constitutes a breach of the duty of loyalty and is subject to the entire-fairness standard; the controlling shareholder bears the burden of proving the transaction was entirely fair as to process and price; Kahn v. M & F Worldwide Corp., 88 A.3d 635 (Del. 2014).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit dilutive share issuances to controlling shareholders, with CN applying equal-treatment and unfair-related-transaction rules and US applying the entire-fairness standard.

fact_summary: 公司以低于净资产的价格向控股股东定向增发 / A company issued shares to its controlling shareholder below net asset value.
cn_claim: 同次发行价格应相同；不公平关联交易应承担赔偿责任（公司法第139条、第21条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Directors must exercise their powers for proper purposes and in the interests of the company as a whole; issuing shares to a controlling shareholder at an undervalue may constitute a breach of fiduciary duty and may be set aside as unfairly prejudicial conduct under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) s.724.
notes: Both CN and HK restrict dilutive share issuances to controlling shareholders, with CN applying equal-treatment and related-transaction rules and HK applying fiduciary-duty and unfair-prejudice remedies.

fact_summary: 某公司将竞争对手的专利技术方案拆解后重新组合申请新专利 / A company dissected a competitor's patented technical solution and reassembled the components into a new patent application.
cn_claim: 发明或实用新型专利权的保护范围以其权利要求的内容为准，说明书及附图可用于解释权利要求的内容（专利法第64条第一款）；对他人专利技术的简单拆分重组构成等同侵权或变劣发明。
us_claim: Patent protection extends to equivalents of the claimed invention under the doctrine of equivalents; a device that performs substantially the same function in substantially the same way to achieve substantially the same result may infringe under the function-way-result test of Graver Tank & Manufacturing Co. v. Linde Air Products Co., 339 U.S. 605 (1950).
hk_claim: A patent is infringed by making, using, or importing a product or process that falls within the scope of the patent claims as interpreted under the Patents Ordinance (Cap. 514); the doctrine of equivalents is applied more narrowly than in the US, with emphasis on purposive construction of the claims.
notes: All three jurisdictions protect against patent workarounds that are essentially equivalents, but the scope of the doctrine of equivalents varies: CN applies it broadly, US uses the function-way-result test, and HK emphasizes purposive claim construction with a narrower equivalents approach.

fact_summary: 医院未经患者同意将患者的病历资料提供给保险公司用于理赔审核 / A hospital provided a patient's medical records to an insurance company for claim review without the patient's consent.
cn_claim: 医疗机构应妥善保管患者病历资料；向保险公司提供病历资料用于理赔审核应取得患者明确同意或依据法律授权（个人信息保护法第13条、第28条；医疗机构病历管理规定第16条）。
us_claim: The Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) (45 C.F.R. § 164.502) permits covered entities to disclose protected health information to health insurers for payment activities without patient authorization; this is a permitted use and disclosure for treatment, payment, and health-care operations under § 164.506.
hk_claim: Disclosure of a patient's medical records to an insurer for claim assessment without the patient's consent may violate the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) Data Protection Principle 3 unless the disclosure falls within an exemption, such as where the disclosure is required or authorized by law or where the patient has given prescribed consent.
notes: All three jurisdictions regulate medical-record disclosures to insurers, with CN and HK requiring consent or legal authorization and US permitting such disclosures under HIPAA for payment purposes without patient authorization.

fact_summary: 移动支付APP在用户未知情的情况下开启了后台地理位置追踪 / A mobile-payment app enabled background location tracking without the user's knowledge.
cn_claim: 处理个人行踪轨迹等敏感个人信息应取得个人单独同意且应具有特定的目的和充分的必要性（个人信息保护法第28-29条）；未告知即开启后台位置追踪违反知情同意和最小必要原则。
us_claim: Collection of precise geolocation data without notice and consent may constitute an unfair or deceptive practice under the FTC Act § 5; the FTC has brought actions against apps that surreptitiously collect location data; state laws such as the CCPA (Cal. Civ. Code § 1798.100) require disclosure of the categories of personal information collected including geolocation data.
hk_claim: Collection of user-location data without the user's knowledge constitutes unfair collection of personal data under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) Data Protection Principle 1; the user must be informed of the purpose of the location-data collection and consent must be obtained.
notes: All three jurisdictions require notice and consent for background location tracking, with CN and HK applying data-protection consent frameworks and US using consumer-protection enforcement.

fact_summary: 快递柜内包裹被人盗取。物业监控故障未能提供有效录像 / A package was stolen from a delivery locker; the property's security cameras were broken and provided no useful footage.
cn_claim: 物业公司未尽到安全保障义务的应承担补充责任（民法典第1198条第二款）；监控设备故障影响安全防范的物业公司有过错。
us_claim: A property owner or manager may be liable for failing to maintain reasonable security measures where criminal acts by third parties are foreseeable; failure to maintain functioning security cameras may breach the duty of reasonable care where prior incidents put the property manager on notice of security risks; Kline v. 1500 Massachusetts Avenue Apartment Corp., 439 F.2d 477 (D.C. Cir. 1970).
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain reasonable security measures may be liable for negligence where harm from a third party's criminal act was foreseeable; non-functioning security cameras where prior thefts had occurred is a factor in establishing breach.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose premises-security duties on property managers, with non-functioning security cameras being a factor in establishing breach of the duty of care.

fact_summary: 网约车平台对乘客收取高价但未提前告知价格计算方式 / A ride-hailing platform charged a premium fare but did not disclose the pricing algorithm before the ride.
cn_claim: 经营者提供商品或服务应明码标价（价格法第13条）；利用虚假或使人误解的价格手段诱骗消费者的构成价格欺诈（价格法第14条第四项）。
us_claim: Failure to disclose the method of calculating surge pricing may violate the FTC Act § 5 prohibition on unfair or deceptive acts if the practice is likely to mislead reasonable consumers; state consumer-protection statutes also require transparency in pricing; dynamic-pricing disclosures should be clear and conspicuous.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require pricing transparency in consumer services, with CN applying the Price Law and US using FTC Act consumer-protection enforcement.

fact_summary: 网约车平台对乘客收高价未提前告知计价方式 / A ride-hailing platform charged a premium fare without disclosing the pricing method.
cn_claim: 经营者应明码标价（价格法第13条）；价格欺诈应承担法律责任（价格法第14条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A failure to disclose material price terms before the consumer commits to the transaction may constitute a misleading omission under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362) and may entitle the consumer to remedies for misrepresentation or breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK require pricing transparency in consumer transactions, with CN applying the Price Law and HK using the Trade Descriptions Ordinance and misrepresentation remedies.

fact_summary: 被告人组织多人通过网络直播进行淫秽表演牟利 / A defendant organized multiple performers to engage in obscene performances via livestreaming for profit.
cn_claim: 组织进行淫秽表演的构成组织淫秽表演罪（刑法第365条）；通过信息网络组织淫秽表演的同样构成本罪（最高人民法院关于办理传播淫秽电子信息刑事案件司法解释）。
us_claim: Transmission of obscene material via the internet for commercial purposes is prohibited under 18 U.S.C. § 1465 (transportation of obscene matters) and § 1470 (transfer of obscene material to minors); the Miller v. California, 413 U.S. 15 (1973) test determines whether material is obscene.
hk_claim: Publishing or possessing obscene articles for the purpose of publication is an offense under the Control of Obscene and Indecent Articles Ordinance (Cap. 390) s.21; livestreaming obscene performances constitutes publication of obscene articles.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize commercial obscene performances including via livestreaming, though the legal standards for obscenity and the specific statutes differ.

fact_summary: 村民申请宅基地建房但乡政府以指标用完为由拖延两年不审批 / A villager applied for a rural residential-land building permit, but the township government delayed for two years citing exhausted quotas.
cn_claim: 行政许可应在法定期限内作出决定；超过期限未作决定的视为默示批准或驳回，申请人可申请行政复议或提起行政诉讼（行政许可法第37条、第38条第一款）。
us_claim: A local-government permitting decision that is unreasonably delayed may be subject to mandamus under state law or judicial review under the APA (5 U.S.C. § 706(1)); a two-year delay without decision may constitute agency action unlawfully withheld or unreasonably delayed.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide judicial remedies for unreasonable administrative delay in permitting decisions, with CN applying statutory deemed-outcome rules and US using mandamus and APA delay-review.

fact_summary: 乡村民申请宅基地建房审批拖延两年 / A villager's building-permit application was delayed for two years by the township.
cn_claim: 行政许可应在法定期限内决定（行政许可法第37条、第38条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A government department that unreasonably delays a decision on a permit application may be subject to judicial review for unreasonable delay or failure to exercise a statutory power; the court may issue an order of mandamus compelling the authority to determine the application.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for unreasonable administrative delay, with CN applying statutory deemed-outcome rules and HK using judicial review and mandamus.

fact_summary: An online marketplace was sued for contributory trademark infringement because sellers on its platform sold counterfeit goods / 电商平台因卖家在其平台上销售假冒商品被诉帮助性商标侵权
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: An online marketplace may be liable for contributory trademark infringement if it continues to supply its services to a seller whom it knows or has reason to know is engaging in trademark infringement; Tiffany (NJ) Inc. v. eBay Inc., 600 F.3d 93 (2d Cir. 2010) held that generalized knowledge of counterfeiting on the platform is insufficient absent specific knowledge of particular infringing listings.
hk_claim: An online marketplace may be liable for facilitating the sale of counterfeit goods if it has actual knowledge of infringement and fails to take reasonable steps to prevent it; the platform's liability may arise under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362) or the common law of joint tortfeasance.
notes: Both US and HK impose contributory or facilitating liability on online marketplaces for counterfeit sales, requiring knowledge of specific infringing conduct rather than generalized awareness.

fact_summary: 中国居民个人通过在开曼群岛设立的家族信托持有境外公司股权取得分红但未申报 / A Chinese resident who held foreign company shares through a Cayman Islands family trust received dividends but did not declare them.
cn_claim: 居民个人从中国境外取得的所得应依法申报缴纳个人所得税（个人所得税法第1条、第10条）；通过境外信托架构持有的资产收益属于境外所得应予申报。
us_claim: U.S. persons are taxed on worldwide income including income from foreign trusts; the grantor-trust rules under I.R.C. §§ 671-679 may attribute foreign-trust income to the U.S. grantor; failure to report foreign-trust income and file FBARs (FinCEN Form 114) and Form 3520 may result in substantial penalties.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US tax residents on worldwide income including income channeled through foreign trusts, with robust anti-avoidance and reporting regimes.

fact_summary: 居民通过境外家族信托持有股权取得分红未申报 / A resident held foreign shares through an offshore family trust and did not declare dividends.
cn_claim: 境外信托持股收益属于境外所得应予申报（个人所得税法第1条、第10条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Hong Kong adopts territorial taxation; dividends from foreign companies received by a Hong Kong resident are generally not subject to Hong Kong tax unless the income arises in or is derived from Hong Kong; offshore trust structures holding foreign assets may not trigger Hong Kong tax liability if the income is foreign-sourced.
notes: CN taxes offshore-trust income on a worldwide basis while HK applies territorial taxation, creating a significant asymmetry in the treatment of foreign-trust income.

fact_summary: 公民因在网上批评政府官员被以寻衅滋事立案 / A citizen was charged with picking quarrels and provoking trouble for criticizing a government official online.
cn_claim: 公民有言论自由（宪法第35条）；批评建议权受宪法保护（第41条）；对公民批评政府官员的行为应区分正当批评与侮辱诽谤，不得以寻衅滋事为名压制合法批评。
us_claim: The First Amendment protects speech critical of government officials unless it constitutes true threats or incitement to imminent lawless action; New York Times Co. v. Sullivan, 376 U.S. 254 (1964) requires public officials to prove actual malice to recover for defamation; the government may not use criminal statutes to suppress protected political speech.
hk_claim: Freedom of expression is protected under the Basic Law (Art. 27) and the Hong Kong Bill of Rights (Cap. 383) Art. 16; restrictions on speech must be prescribed by law and necessary for respect of the rights or reputations of others or for the protection of public order.
notes: All three jurisdictions protect speech critical of government but with different boundaries: CN distinguishes criticism from insults, US applies strict scrutiny plus actual-malice rules, and HK applies proportionality analysis.

fact_summary: 中国境内企业因外国政府要求提供业务数据面临两难 / A China-based enterprise faced a dilemma when a foreign government demanded production of its business data.
cn_claim: 非经中国主管机关批准任何组织或个人不得向外国司法或执法机构提供存储在中国境内的数据（数据安全法第36条）；在此情形下企业应先向主管机关报告并依指示处理。
us_claim: The CLOUD Act (18 U.S.C. § 2523) allows U.S. law enforcement to compel U.S.-based companies to produce data stored overseas; a company facing a direct conflict between foreign blocking statutes and U.S. production orders may file a motion to quash on comity grounds; the court balances U.S. interests, foreign sovereign interests, and the hardship on the provider.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN and US are in direct regulatory conflict on cross-border data-production orders: CN imposes a blocking statute, while the CLOUD Act compels production subject to comity review.

fact_summary: 成年子女拒绝支付父母医疗费，父母诉至法院要求履行赡养义务 / An adult child refused to pay elderly parents' medical expenses; the parents sued for support.
cn_claim: 成年子女对父母负有赡养义务（民法典第26条第二款、第1067条第二款）；子女不履行赡养义务的，父母可要求给付赡养费。
us_claim: Filial-responsibility laws in many states require adult children to support indigent parents, though enforcement varies; parents may seek public assistance under Medicaid and other programs; there is no federal filial-support statute, but some states have actively enforced filial-responsibility statutes.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US recognize filial support obligations, with CN codifying a broad statutory duty and US relying on state-level filial-responsibility laws of varying enforceability.

fact_summary: 成年子女拒绝支付父母医疗费被诉至法院 / Adult children were sued by their elderly parents for refusing to pay medical expenses.
cn_claim: 子女对父母负有赡养义务（民法典第26条第二款、第1067条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: There is no general statutory obligation on adult children to support their parents under Hong Kong law; support for the elderly is primarily provided through the social-security system, including the Comprehensive Social Security Assistance Scheme, though a maintenance order may be sought in limited circumstances.
notes: CN imposes a statutory filial-support duty while HK primarily relies on social welfare, creating a fundamental asymmetry in the legal framework for elderly support obligations.

fact_summary: 共享单车因刹车失灵致使用者摔伤，使用者起诉平台 / A bike-share user was injured when the bicycle's brakes failed; the user sued the platform.
cn_claim: 因产品存在缺陷造成他人损害的，生产者应承担侵权责任；被侵权人可向产品生产者或销售者请求赔偿（民法典第1202条、第1203条第一款）。
us_claim: A bicycle-rental company that provides defective equipment may be liable under products-liability theories (Restatement (Third) of Torts: Products Liability § 2) and for negligence in failing to inspect and maintain equipment; a shared-mobility provider owes a duty of reasonable care to its users.
hk_claim: A bicycle-rental operator that provides a defective bicycle owes a duty of care to its users; failure to maintain equipment in safe condition constitutes negligence; the operator may also be liable under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314) if the injury occurred on premises it occupies.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose liability on equipment-rental operators for injuries caused by defective equipment, under products-liability or negligence theories.

fact_summary: 嫌疑人被刑事拘留后家属未收到任何通知 / After a suspect was taken into criminal detention, the family received no notification.
cn_claim: 拘留后除无法通知或涉嫌危害国家安全犯罪、恐怖活动犯罪通知可能有碍侦查的情形外应在拘留后24小时内通知被拘留人家属（刑事诉讼法第85条第二款）。
us_claim: An arrested person must be given the opportunity to contact family members or counsel promptly after arrest; state laws and police-department policies generally require notification within a reasonable time; failure to provide prompt notification may be a factor in assessing the voluntariness of any subsequent waiver of rights.
hk_claim: A person arrested must be informed of the reasons for arrest and must be permitted to inform a family member or friend of the detention; failure to permit notification may render continued detention unlawful; section 52(1) of the Police Force Ordinance (Cap. 232).
notes: All three jurisdictions require prompt post-arrest notification to family members, though CN provides broader exceptions for certain categories of cases.

fact_summary: 当事人在诉讼中申请法院委托鉴定机构对电子数据进行鉴定，对方对鉴定机构资质提出异议 / A party requested court-appointed forensic examination of electronic evidence; the opposing party challenged the examiner's qualifications.
cn_claim: 当事人可申请法院委托具备资质的鉴定机构进行鉴定（民事诉讼法第79条）；对鉴定机构资质有异议的可申请鉴定人回避或申请重新鉴定。
us_claim: Expert testimony, including digital-forensics testimony, must be reliable under the Daubert standard: the expert must be qualified, the methodology must be reliable, and the testimony must be relevant and fit the facts; Daubert v. Merrell Dow Pharmaceuticals, Inc., 509 U.S. 579 (1993); Fed. R. Evid. 702.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require court experts to be qualified and their methodology to be reliable, with CN using a statutory accreditation framework and US applying the Daubert reliability gatekeeping standard.

fact_summary: 当事人申请法院委托进行电子数据鉴定，对方对鉴定机构资质提出异议 / A party requested court-appointed digital-forensics examination; the opponent challenged the examiner's qualifications.
cn_claim: 当事人可申请法院委托鉴定并可对鉴定机构资质提出异议（民事诉讼法第79条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: The court has discretion to appoint an expert to examine electronic evidence; the expert must be appropriately qualified and impartial; a party may challenge the expert's qualifications and seek to call its own expert in rebuttal; the court will determine the weight to be given to the expert's evidence.
notes: Both CN and HK allow court-appointed digital-forensics experts and permit challenges to expert qualifications, with CN emphasizing statutory accreditation and HK emphasizing judicial discretion and expert impartiality.

fact_summary: 被告人在共同犯罪中仅提供了交通工具而未参与犯罪实行行为 / A defendant in a joint criminal enterprise only provided transportation and did not participate in the criminal act itself.
cn_claim: 在共同犯罪中起次要或辅助作用的是从犯；对于从犯应从轻、减轻处罚或免除处罚（刑法第27条）。
us_claim: An accomplice who aids or abets the commission of an offense is punishable as a principal under 18 U.S.C. § 2; mere presence or minor assistance may not be sufficient for accomplice liability unless the defendant had the specific intent to facilitate the offense; Rosemond v. United States, 572 U.S. 65 (2014).
hk_claim: A secondary party who aids, abets, counsels, or procures the commission of an offense is liable as a principal; mere presence without active assistance is insufficient; the aider must have intended to assist the principal and have knowledge of the essential matters of the principal's offense.
notes: All three jurisdictions differentiate between principals and accessories, with CN providing a statutory mitigation for secondary participants and US/HK treating aiders as principals subject to the full penalty.

fact_summary: 装修公司使用与合同约定不符的低价材料 / A renovation company substituted lower-cost materials that did not conform to the contract specifications.
cn_claim: 承揽人交付的工作成果不符合质量要求的，定作人可合理选择请求承揽人修理、重作、减少报酬或赔偿损失（民法典第781条）。
us_claim: A contractor that substitutes nonconforming materials breaches the construction contract and the implied warranty of workmanlike performance; the owner may recover the cost of replacement or the diminution in value, whichever is appropriate; Restatement (Third) of Torts: Products Liability may also apply if the substituted materials create a safety hazard.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
