notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for material substitution in construction contracts, with CN codifying statutory repair/reduction/damage remedies and US applying breach-of-contract and implied-warranty theories.

fact_summary: 装修公司使用与合同不符的低价材料 / A renovation company used substandard materials contrary to contract.
cn_claim: 承揽人交付工作不符合质量要求的定作人可请求修理、重作、减少报酬或赔偿（民法典第781条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A contractor who uses materials that do not conform to the contract specifications is in breach of contract; the owner may claim damages for the cost of bringing the work into conformity with the contract or for the diminution in value of the property.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for construction-material nonconformity, with CN codifying a range of statutory remedies and HK applying common-law breach-of-contract damages.

fact_summary: 小学组织春游时一名学生在水池边嬉戏落水，带队老师未及时发现 / An elementary-school student fell into a pond during a school-organized outing; the supervising teacher failed to notice in time.
cn_claim: 无民事行为能力人在教育机构学习生活期间受到人身损害的，教育机构应承担推定过错责任；未能证明尽到教育管理职责的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1199条）。
us_claim: A school owes a duty of reasonable supervision to students during school-sponsored activities; failure to adequately supervise students near a known hazard such as a pond constitutes negligence; the standard of care is that of a reasonably prudent person under similar circumstances.
hk_claim: A school owes a duty of care to students during school activities to take reasonable steps to prevent foreseeable harm; inadequate supervision near a water hazard is a breach of the duty of care; the standard is assessed under the common-law negligence framework.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose a supervisory duty of care on schools during off-campus activities, with CN applying a statutory fault-presumption standard and US/HK applying common-law negligence.

fact_summary: 企业以优化组织结构为由大规模裁员但未按法定程序操作 / A company conducted mass layoffs citing organizational restructuring without following the statutory procedure.
cn_claim: 裁减人员20人以上或占职工总数10%以上的用人单位应提前30日向工会或全体职工说明情况并听取意见，裁减方案应向劳动行政部门报告（劳动合同法第41条）。
us_claim: The Worker Adjustment and Retraining Notification (WARN) Act (29 U.S.C. § 2101 et seq.) requires employers with 100 or more employees to provide 60-day advance notice of plant closings and mass layoffs; failure to provide notice entitles affected employees to back pay and benefits.
hk_claim: Mass layoffs are governed by the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) which requires employers to make statutory severance or long-service payments to eligible employees laid off by reason of redundancy; there is no general statutory requirement for advance notice of collective redundancies comparable to the WARN Act.
notes: CN and US impose advance-notice and consultation requirements for mass layoffs, while HK requires severance payments but does not mandate advance notice of collective redundancies.

fact_summary: 某公司在域名中使用与知名商标近似的拼写以吸引流量 / A company used a domain name similar to a famous trademark with a common misspelling to attract web traffic.
cn_claim: 域名注册不得损害他人现有的在先权利（商标权），恶意注册与他人注册商标相同或近似的域名的构成侵权或不正当竞争（最高人民法院关于审理涉及计算机网络域名民事纠纷案件适用法律若干问题的解释第4条、第5条）。
us_claim: Typosquatting (registering domain names that are misspellings of famous trademarks) violates the Anticybersquatting Consumer Protection Act (15 U.S.C. § 1125(d)); the trademark owner may recover statutory damages of $1,000 to $100,000 per domain name.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit typosquatting, with CN applying domain-name dispute rules and anti-unfair-competition law and US using the ACPA with statutory damages.

fact_summary: 公司注册与知名商标近似拼写的域名吸引流量 / A company used a domain name similar to a famous trademark to attract traffic.
cn_claim: 恶意注册与商标近似的域名构成侵权或不正当竞争（域名司法解释第4条、第5条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Registering a domain name that is confusingly similar to a well-known trade mark with the intention of diverting business may constitute passing off and may be the subject of a complaint under the Uniform Domain-Name Dispute-Resolution Policy (UDRP); the Hong Kong International Arbitration Centre administers domain-name disputes.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies against domain-name cybersquatting through UDRP proceedings and unfair-competition/passing-off claims.

fact_summary: A party to a commercial contract sought to avoid liability by invoking economic duress because the counterparty threatened to breach another contract between them / 一方以对方威胁违反另一合同为由主张经济胁迫
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Economic duress may void a contract where a party is forced to agree by a wrongful threat that leaves no reasonable alternative; a threat to breach another contract may constitute economic duress where the threatened party had no adequate legal remedy; the doctrine requires proof of a wrongful act, absence of reasonable alternatives, and that the duress caused the agreement.
hk_claim: A contract may be set aside for economic duress where there is pressure amounting to coercion of the will that vitiates consent; a threat to breach another contract may constitute illegitimate pressure where the victim had no practical alternative but to submit; Pao On v. Lau Yiu Long [1980] AC 614.
notes: Both US and HK recognize economic duress and treat threats to breach another contract as potential illegitimate pressure, with both applying coercion-of-will standards.

fact_summary: 公司董事在离职后利用在原公司获得的技术秘密和客户名单创办竞争企业 / After resigning, a director used technical secrets and customer lists acquired at the former company to start a competing business.
cn_claim: 董事离职后仍负有保密义务；利用在原公司获取的商业秘密从事竞争业务构成侵犯商业秘密（反不正当竞争法第9条第一款第三项）。
us_claim: A former director owes a continuing duty of confidentiality regarding the company's trade secrets; use of trade secrets to compete constitutes misappropriation under the Defend Trade Secrets Act (18 U.S.C. § 1836) and state trade-secret law; customer lists that derive independent economic value from not being generally known are protected trade secrets.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US protect trade secrets against misappropriation by former directors, with CN applying anti-unfair-competition law and US applying the DTSA and state trade-secret statutes.

fact_summary: 董事离职后利用在原公司获得的技术秘密和客户名单创办竞争企业 / A former director used trade secrets and customer lists to start a competing business.
cn_claim: 董事离职后侵犯商业秘密的应承担法律责任（反不正当竞争法第9条第一款第三项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A former director owes a continuing duty of confidentiality regarding the company's trade secrets and confidential information; using such information to compete unfairly constitutes a breach of confidence and may be restrained by injunction, and the former director may be ordered to account for profits.
notes: Both CN and HK protect trade secrets against misuse by former directors through confidentiality duties and equitable remedies, with CN also applying statutory anti-unfair-competition law.

fact_summary: 餐厅卫生间地面未设防滑措施致顾客摔伤 / A restaurant patron slipped and fell on the restroom floor because the restaurant had not installed anti-slip measures.
cn_claim: 公共场所的经营者未尽到安全保障义务造成他人损害的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A restaurant owes a duty of reasonable care to its patrons and must maintain the premises in a reasonably safe condition; failure to provide anti-slip flooring in areas where water is foreseeably present constitutes negligence; the standard of care requires precautions commensurate with the foreseeable risk.
hk_claim: An occupier owes a common duty of care to visitors under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314) s.3; failure to provide anti-slip flooring in a restroom where wet floors are foreseeable is a breach of the duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose premises-liability duties on restaurants to maintain safe flooring in bathrooms.

fact_summary: 企业申请危险废物经营许可证被驳回，理由是口头告知的规划不符要求 / An enterprise was denied a hazardous-waste operating permit based on an orally-communicated planning non-compliance reason.
cn_claim: 行政机关作出不予行政许可的决定应说明理由并告知申请人享有申请行政复议或提起行政诉讼的权利（行政许可法第38条第二款）；仅口头告知不构成合法的行政决定。
us_claim: An agency's denial of a permit must be accompanied by a statement of the grounds for denial and must be supported by substantial evidence in the record; an oral-only denial violates the APA's requirement for a written decision under 5 U.S.C. § 555(e).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require administrative permit denials to be in writing with reasons, with CN codifying this in the Administrative Permit Law and US under the APA.

fact_summary: 企业申请危险废物许可证被口头驳回 / An enterprise's hazardous-waste permit was denied orally.
cn_claim: 不予行政许可应书面说明理由（行政许可法第38条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A government department refusing a permit application should normally give reasons in writing; a failure to give reasons may constitute procedural unfairness and be subject to judicial review; the applicant is entitled to know the basis for the refusal.
notes: Both CN and HK require administrative decisions denying permits to be accompanied by written reasons to ensure procedural fairness.

fact_summary: 上市公司大股东在减持前未按规定预先披露减持计划 / A listed-company major shareholder sold shares without the required pre-disclosure of the disposal plan.
cn_claim: 持股5%以上的大股东通过集中竞价交易减持股份的应在首次卖出前15个交易日披露减持计划（证券法第63条第二款；上市公司大股东减持股份若干规定第8条）。
us_claim: Insiders and large shareholders must comply with disclosure requirements under Sections 13(d) and 16(a) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 (15 U.S.C. §§ 78m(d), 78p(a)); Rule 10b5-1 trading plans must be established in good faith and not as a subterfuge for undisclosed trades.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require large shareholders to pre-disclose trading plans or report transactions, with CN mandating a 15-day advance notice and US requiring prompt filing of Schedules 13D/G and Form 4.

fact_summary: 上市公司大股东减持前未预先披露 / A major shareholder sold listed-company shares without pre-disclosing the disposal plan.
cn_claim: 大股东减持应提前15日披露（证券法第63条第二款；减持规定第8条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A substantial shareholder of a listed company must disclose dealings in the company's shares under Part XV of the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571); disposal of a notifiable interest must be disclosed within three business days; failure to disclose is an offense.
notes: Both CN and HK require major shareholders to disclose share dealings, with CN mandating advance notice and HK requiring prompt post-transaction disclosure.

fact_summary: 被告人在羁押期间主动供述了司法机关尚未掌握的同种罪行 / While in custody, a detainee voluntarily disclosed additional crimes of the same type not yet known to the authorities.
cn_claim: 被采取强制措施的犯罪嫌疑人如实供述司法机关尚未掌握的其他罪行的，以自首论（刑法第67条第二款）；供述同种罪行的可酌情从轻处罚但不构成自首。
us_claim: Voluntary disclosure of additional criminal conduct not known to authorities may support a downward departure for cooperation under the U.S. Sentencing Guidelines § 5K1.1; the prosecution may move for a reduction if the defendant provided substantial assistance in the investigation or prosecution of another person.
hk_claim: A defendant who voluntarily discloses additional offenses while in custody may receive a sentencing discount for cooperation, though the extent of the discount depends on the value and timeliness of the information provided; HKSAR v. Chan Kwok Wai [2008] 3 HKLRD 457.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide sentencing incentives for post-arrest disclosure of additional crimes, with CN distinguishing same-type from different-type crimes and US/HK treating cooperation as a general mitigating factor.

fact_summary: 买方在淘宝购买进口保健品后发现商品无中文标签 / A buyer purchased imported health supplements on an e-commerce platform and discovered the product lacked a Chinese-language label.
cn_claim: 进口食品应有中文标签（食品安全法第97条第一款）；销售无中文标签进口食品的消费者可主张价款十倍或损失三倍的赔偿金（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: Imported consumer products, including dietary supplements, must bear English labeling under the Fair Packaging and Labeling Act (15 U.S.C. § 1451 et seq.) and the Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act (21 U.S.C. § 301 et seq.); the FDA may detain imports lacking required labeling; consumers may have state-law claims for misrepresentation or breach of warranty.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require imported goods to bear labeling in the local language, with CN imposing strict statutory penalties and US using FDA enforcement plus state-law remedies.

fact_summary: 网购进口保健品无中文标签 / An e-commerce purchase of imported supplements lacked Chinese-language labeling.
cn_claim: 进口食品无中文标签的可主张惩罚性赔偿（食品安全法第97条、第148条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under the Consumer Goods Safety Ordinance (Cap. 456), consumer goods, including health supplements, must bear adequate labeling and usage instructions; the absence of required labeling may give rise to criminal liability and may also support a civil claim for breach of statutory duty or misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK require imported consumer goods to bear local-language labeling, with CN providing a statutory punitive-damages claim and HK imposing regulatory offenses and civil remedies.

fact_summary: A litigant sought to adduce evidence obtained through a foreign unlawful search that would have been illegal in the forum / 诉讼当事人试图援引在外国通过非法搜查取得但在法域内本属违法的证据
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Evidence obtained by foreign officials through a search that would violate the Fourth Amendment if conducted by U.S. agents is generally admissible unless U.S. agents participated in or directed the search, or the foreign search shocks the judicial conscience; United States v. Janis, 428 U.S. 433 (1976); the exclusionary rule does not generally apply to foreign searches.
hk_claim: Evidence obtained by foreign authorities through means that would be unlawful in Hong Kong is not automatically inadmissible; the court has discretion to exclude evidence if its admission would render the trial unfair; the test is whether the admission would compromise the fairness of the proceedings, not whether the foreign conduct would be illegal in Hong Kong.
notes: Both US and HK admit evidence obtained through foreign searches conducted by foreign officials, applying fairness screens rather than strict exclusionary rules.

fact_summary: 某快递公司通过快递面单上的手机号码向收件人推送精准广告 / A courier company used phone numbers printed on parcel waybills to push targeted advertisements to recipients.
cn_claim: 快递企业应保护用户信息安全，不得利用快递面单信息进行商业推广（快递暂行条例第34条）；未经同意利用寄递用户信息推送广告的应承担侵权及行政责任。
us_claim: Using customer data obtained in the course of providing a service for marketing purposes without consent may violate the FTC Act § 5 prohibition on unfair or deceptive practices and state privacy laws; companies must provide notice and an opportunity to opt out of secondary uses of personal data.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US restrict secondary marketing use of customer data obtained in the course of service provision without consent, with CN imposing sectoral regulations and US applying consumer-protection law.

fact_summary: 公司通过末位淘汰制度将绩效考核排名靠后的员工直接辞退 / A company dismissed employees ranked at the bottom of performance evaluations under a rank-and-yank system.
cn_claim: 用人单位单方解除劳动合同应有法定事由（劳动合同法第39条）；末位排名不当然等同于法定解除事由，以末位淘汰直接辞退的可能构成违法解除（最高人民法院第八次民商事审判会议纪要第47条）。
us_claim: At-will employment allows termination for any non-discriminatory reason; however, where the employer has adopted a progressive-discipline or just-cause policy, termination solely on the basis of a forced-ranking system that does not evaluate actual performance may breach the implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing in some jurisdictions.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN imposes statutory just-cause requirements that may conflict with rank-and-yank terminations, while US at-will defaults tolerate forced-ranking dismissals absent contractual or policy constraints.

fact_summary: 公司通过末位淘汰直接辞退员工 / A company dismissed employees under a rank-and-yank system.
cn_claim: 末位排名不等于法定解除事由（劳动合同法第39条；会议纪要第47条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An employer may dismiss an employee for poor performance only where the employee has been given reasonable opportunity to improve and the dismissal is not unreasonable under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57); dismissal solely on the basis of a forced-ranking system without individual-performance assessment may be unreasonable and expose the employer to a claim for wrongful dismissal.
notes: Both CN and HK require just-cause or reasonableness review for performance-based dismissals, limiting the permissibility of pure rank-and-yank termination systems.

fact_summary: 购房者支付购房定金后开发商将房屋另售他人 / After the buyer paid a deposit, the developer sold the same property to a third party.
cn_claim: 收受定金的一方不履行债务致使不能实现合同目的的应双倍返还定金（民法典第587条）；开发商一房二卖构成根本违约。
us_claim: A seller who accepts a deposit and then sells the property to a third party is in breach of contract; the buyer may recover the deposit plus expectation damages measured by the difference between the contract price and market value, or seek specific performance of the real-estate contract; specific performance is the preferred remedy in land-sale contracts because land is unique.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide strong remedies for seller breach in real-estate contracts, including specific performance and deposit/damages recovery.

fact_summary: 购房者付定金后开发商一房二卖 / After the buyer paid a deposit, the developer sold to a third party.
cn_claim: 收受定金一方违约的应双倍返还定金（民法典第587条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A vendor who contracts to sell land and then sells to a third party is in breach of contract; the purchaser may sue for specific performance and damages; land is treated as unique, and specific performance is the primary remedy.
notes: Both CN and HK provide specific performance and damages as remedies when a seller breaches a land-sale contract by selling to a third party.

fact_summary: 某教育APP在未经家长同意的情况下收集儿童的个人信息并用于定向广告 / An educational app collected children's personal information without parental consent and used it for targeted advertising.
cn_claim: 处理不满十四周岁未成年人的个人信息应取得其父母或监护人的同意（个人信息保护法第31条；未成年人保护法第72条第二款）。
us_claim: Online services directed to children under 13 must comply with the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA) (15 U.S.C. § 6501); the operator must obtain verifiable parental consent before collecting children's personal information and may not use children's data for behavioral advertising without separate consent.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require parental consent for collection and use of children's personal data, with CN protecting children under 14 and US protecting children under 13 under COPPA.

fact_summary: 教育APP未经家长同意收集儿童信息用于定向广告 / An educational app collected children's data for targeted ads without parental consent.
cn_claim: 处理未成年人个人信息应取得监护人同意（个人信息保护法第31条；未成年人保护法第72条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486), personal data must be collected by fair means; collection and use of children's personal data without parental consent would likely violate Data Protection Principle 1 (collection must be fair) and Principle 3 (use limited to original purpose); the Privacy Commissioner has issued guidance on the collection of children's data.
notes: Both CN and HK regulate collection of children's personal data, with CN imposing a statutory parental-consent requirement and HK applying general data-protection principles plus regulatory guidance.

fact_summary: A website embedded a photograph from another website using inline linking without copying the image file / 网站通过内链方式嵌入其他网站的图片而未复制图像文件
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Inline linking (hotlinking) that displays an image from another server does not create a copy on the linking server and therefore may not directly infringe the reproduction right; however, it may infringe the display right under 17 U.S.C. § 106(5) if the image is publicly displayed; Perfect 10, Inc. v. Amazon.com, Inc., 508 F.3d 1146 (9th Cir. 2007).
hk_claim: Deep-linking or inline-linking to copyrighted content on another server is not a direct reproduction and therefore may not infringe the reproduction right; however, depending on the circumstances, it may amount to an authorization of infringement or a communication of the work to the public under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528).
notes: Both US and HK treat inline linking as not directly infringing the reproduction right but potentially infringing other exclusive rights such as display or communication to the public.

fact_summary: 某地方人大通过的地方性法规与国务院行政法规相抵触 / A local people's congress enacted a regulation that conflicted with a State Council administrative regulation.
cn_claim: 地方性法规不得与宪法、法律、行政法规相抵触（立法法第88条第一款）；与行政法规相抵触的地方性法规可由全国人大常委会予以撤销（立法法第97条第二项）。
us_claim: Under the Supremacy Clause (Art. VI, Cl. 2), federal law preempts conflicting state law; a state statute that conflicts with a federal regulation with the force of law is preempted and void to the extent of the conflict; the courts have the power of judicial review to declare the state law unconstitutional.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US resolve conflicts between local/state law and national/federal law in favor of the superior norm, with CN using legislative supremacy and annulment mechanisms and US applying the Supremacy Clause and judicial review.

fact_summary: 地方性法规与行政法规相抵触 / A local regulation conflicted with central administrative regulations.
cn_claim: 地方性法规不得与行政法规相抵触（立法法第88条第一款；第97条第二项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Hong Kong ordinances that are inconsistent with national laws applying to Hong Kong under the Basic Law (Art. 18) are invalid to the extent of the inconsistency; the Hong Kong courts may adjudicate on the constitutionality of legislation under the Basic Law.
notes: Both CN and HK resolve conflicts between local and central legislation through hierarchical supremacy principles, with CN using legislative annulment and HK applying the Basic Law hierarchy.

fact_summary: 被告人在盗窃时因被邻居发现为逃脱抓捕使用暴力 / During a theft, the defendant used force against a neighbor who discovered the crime in order to escape.
cn_claim: 犯盗窃罪为抗拒抓捕而当场使用暴力的转化为抢劫罪（刑法第269条）。
us_claim: A theft that involves the use of force against a person to retain the stolen property or to escape constitutes robbery in most jurisdictions; under the Model Penal Code § 222.1, robbery is theft plus the infliction or threat of serious bodily injury or the use of force.
hk_claim: A person who steals and immediately before or at the time of doing so uses force on any person in order to steal is guilty of robbery under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210) s.10.
notes: All three jurisdictions upgrade theft to robbery when force is used, with CN applying a statutory conversion rule and US/HK defining robbery as theft accompanied by force.

fact_summary: 居民个人通过香港银行账户收取境外投资收益但未向内地税务机关申报 / A resident received foreign investment income through a Hong Kong bank account but did not declare it to mainland tax authorities.
cn_claim: 居民个人从中国境外取得的所得应依法申报缴纳个人所得税（个人所得税法第1条、第10条）；境外银行账户收入属境外所得应予申报。
us_claim: U.S. taxpayers must report foreign financial accounts on FinCEN Form 114 (FBAR) if aggregate foreign accounts exceed $10,000 and report foreign income on Form 1040; failure to report foreign income may result in substantial civil penalties and, if willful, criminal prosecution.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require residents to report foreign financial-account income, with robust reporting requirements and penalties for non-compliance.

fact_summary: 居民通过香港银行账户收取境外投资收益未申报 / A resident received foreign investment income through a Hong Kong bank account without declaring it.
cn_claim: 居民境外所得应依法申报（个人所得税法第1条、第10条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Hong Kong adopts territorial taxation; investment income from foreign sources received through a Hong Kong bank account is generally not subject to Hong Kong profits tax or salaries tax unless the income is sourced in Hong Kong; there is no general requirement to report foreign-sourced investment income.
notes: CN taxes worldwide income and requires reporting of foreign-source earnings, while HK applies territorial taxation, creating a fundamental asymmetry in the treatment of foreign investment income.

fact_summary: 外资企业计划将在中国运营期间收集的用户数据传输至境外母公司进行数据分析 / A foreign-invested enterprise planned to transfer user data collected during its China operations to its overseas parent company for data analysis.
cn_claim: 处理大量个人信息的个人信息处理者确需向境外提供个人信息的应通过国家网信部门组织的安全评估（个人信息保护法第40条）；安全评估通过后方可进行数据传输。
us_claim: The U.S. does not impose a general data-localization requirement; cross-border data transfers are regulated sectorally (e.g., HIPAA for health data, EAR/ITAR for defense-related technical data); the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework facilitates transatlantic data transfers, and the CLOUD Act governs law-enforcement access.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN imposes comprehensive cross-border data-transfer restrictions through security assessments, while US relies on sectoral regulation without a general data-localization requirement, creating a regulatory asymmetry.

fact_summary: 夫妻离婚时一方主张对方持有的比特币属于夫妻共同财产应予以分割 / In a divorce, one spouse claimed the other spouse's Bitcoin holdings were marital property subject to division.
cn_claim: 婚姻关系存续期间所得的财产为夫妻共同财产（民法典第1062条）；比特币等虚拟财产具有财产价值，婚内取得的属于夫妻共同财产，离婚时应予以分割。
us_claim: Cryptocurrency acquired during marriage is generally marital property subject to equitable distribution; the court may value the asset at the date of distribution or the date of divorce depending on state law; discovery of cryptocurrency holdings may require forensic accounting because of the pseudonymous nature of blockchain transactions.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US treat cryptocurrency acquired during marriage as divisible marital property, requiring forensic valuation and disclosure mechanisms.

fact_summary: 夫妻离婚时主张对方持有的比特币应作为夫妻共同财产分割 / A spouse claimed the other spouse's Bitcoin holdings were marital property to be divided in divorce.
cn_claim: 婚内取得的虚拟财产属于夫妻共同财产（民法典第1062条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Cryptocurrency holdings acquired during marriage may be treated as matrimonial assets available for distribution in ancillary relief proceedings; the court has broad discretion to determine the value and division of assets; cryptocurrency's volatility presents valuation challenges.
notes: Both CN and HK treat cryptocurrency acquired during marriage as divisible property in divorce proceedings, though both face valuation challenges due to cryptocurrency volatility.

fact_summary: 县政府以维稳为由拒绝批准民间环保组织的设立登记 / A county government refused to register an environmental NGO, citing the need to maintain social stability.
cn_claim: 宪法保护公民结社自由（宪法第35条）；社会组织设立登记应依法办理（慈善法第10条），以笼统的维稳理由拒绝登记可能构成滥用行政权力。
us_claim: The right of association is protected under the First Amendment; a government may not deny registration to an advocacy organization based on generalized concerns about social stability unless the organization poses an imminent threat of unlawful conduct; NAACP v. Alabama, 357 U.S. 449 (1958); blanket denial of registration violates associational freedom.
hk_claim: Freedom of association is protected under the Basic Law (Art. 27) and the Hong Kong Bill of Rights (Cap. 383) Art. 18; refusal to register a society may be challenged by judicial review if the decision is unreasonable or disproportionate.
notes: All three jurisdictions protect freedom of association but with significantly different boundaries: CN requires administrative registration, US applies strict scrutiny to registration denials, and HK applies reasonableness and proportionality review.

fact_summary: 游泳馆因消毒剂投放过量导致多名泳客出现呼吸道灼伤 / A swimming pool overdosed chlorine disinfectant, causing respiratory burns in multiple swimmers.
cn_claim: 公共场所的经营者未尽到安全保障义务造成他人损害的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1198条第一款）；游泳馆消毒操作不当致人损害的应赔偿医疗费及精神损害赔偿。
us_claim: An operator of a public swimming pool owes a duty of reasonable care to patrons; chemical mismanagement causing injury constitutes negligence and may also support a products-liability claim against the chemical manufacturer if the dosing equipment or instructions were defective.
hk_claim: An occupier of a swimming facility owes a common duty of care to visitors under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314); over-chlorination causing injury breaches the duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose premises-liability duties on swimming-pool operators for chemical-safety management.

fact_summary: 公司债权人在公司减资时未接到通知导致债权受损 / A company creditor was not notified of a capital reduction and suffered loss as a result.
cn_claim: 公司减少注册资本时应编制资产负债表及财产清单并自作出减资决议之日起10日内通知债权人（公司法第177条）；未通知债权人的减资对受损债权人不生效力。
us_claim: A corporate capital reduction that fails to provide notice to known creditors may constitute a fraudulent transfer under the Uniform Voidable Transactions Act; creditors may challenge the reduction and seek to hold shareholders liable for distributions received in violation of statutory capital-maintenance requirements.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US protect creditors against prejudicial capital reductions, with CN mandating specific notification procedures and US applying fraudulent-transfer principles and capital-maintenance rules.

fact_summary: 公司债权人因未接到减资通知导致债权受损 / A creditor suffered loss from a capital reduction without receiving notice.
cn_claim: 减资应通知债权人（公司法第177条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A company reducing capital must comply with the procedures under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622), which require court confirmation or a solvency statement by directors; creditors may object to a capital reduction and the court may impose conditions for the protection of creditors.
notes: Both CN and HK require creditor-protection procedures in capital reductions, with CN mandating direct notice and HK requiring court confirmation or a solvency statement.

fact_summary: A merchant's website stated prices in one currency, but the credit card processor charged in a different currency at an unfavorable exchange rate / 商家网站以一个币种标价但支付系统以另一个币种按不利汇率扣款
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: The Truth in Lending Act (15 U.S.C. § 1601 et seq.) and Regulation Z require clear disclosure of credit terms; dynamic currency conversion without adequate disclosure may violate the Electronic Fund Transfer Act (15 U.S.C. § 1693 et seq.) if not properly disclosed; the FTC may also pursue such practices as deceptive under § 5 of the FTC Act.
hk_claim: A merchant who fails to disclose that the transaction will be processed in a different currency and at an unfavorable exchange rate may be in breach of contract for misrepresentation; the consumer may be entitled to rescind the transaction or claim damages for the undisclosed conversion costs.
notes: Both US and HK require disclosure of currency-conversion terms in consumer transactions, with US applying TILA and EFTA statutory disclosure requirements and HK applying common-law misrepresentation remedies.

fact_summary: 被告人在羁押期间协助公安机关抓获其他犯罪嫌疑人 / While detained, the defendant assisted police in apprehending other criminal suspects.
cn_claim: 犯罪分子有揭发他人犯罪行为查证属实的或提供重要线索从而得以侦破其他案件等立功表现的，可从轻或减轻处罚；有重大立功表现的可减轻或免除处罚（刑法第68条）。
us_claim: Substantial assistance to law enforcement in the investigation or prosecution of another person may support a downward departure under the U.S. Sentencing Guidelines § 5K1.1 upon motion by the government; the reduction reflects the value of the assistance.
hk_claim: A defendant who provides substantial assistance to law enforcement in the investigation or prosecution of other offenders is entitled to a sentencing discount; the discount is greater where the assistance is significant and provided at an early stage; HKSAR v. Chan Kwok Wai [2008] 3 HKLRD 457.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide significant sentencing discounts for defendants who assist in apprehending other offenders.

fact_summary: 购房者购买期房后发现房屋实际层高比合同约定低0.5米 / After purchasing an off-plan apartment, the buyer discovered the ceiling height was 0.5 meters lower than the contract specified.
cn_claim: 商品房交付面积、层高与合同约定不符的买受人可要求开发商承担违约责任或解除合同（民法典第577条、第610条；商品房买卖合同司法解释第14条）。
us_claim: A material deviation from the contract specifications in a real-estate purchase constitutes a breach of contract; the buyer may seek specific performance with an abatement of the purchase price or rescission; the remedy depends on the materiality of the deviation and whether it substantially impairs the value of the property.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for material deviations from contract specifications in real-estate sales, with CN codifying specific buyer remedies and US applying material-breach analysis.

fact_summary: 购房者发现期房实际层高比合同约定低0.5米 / A buyer discovered the off-plan apartment had a 0.5-meter lower ceiling than specified in the contract.
cn_claim: 交付与合同不符的买受人可主张违约责任或解除合同（民法典第577条、第610条；司法解释第14条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A purchaser of uncompleted property who discovers a material variation from the contractual specifications may claim damages for breach of contract or, if the variation goes to the root of the contract, may be entitled to rescind the contract; the Sale and Purchase Agreement and the Consent Scheme may provide additional remedies.
notes: Both CN and HK provide contract-breach remedies for material deviations from building specifications, with CN codifying statutory remedies and HK applying common-law contract principles plus administrative regulation of pre-sale developments.

fact_summary: 村民养殖的蜜蜂因邻近农田喷洒高毒农药大量死亡 / A beekeeper's bees died en masse due to highly toxic pesticides sprayed on an adjacent farm.
cn_claim: 因污染环境造成损害的污染者应承担侵权责任（民法典第1229条）；因剧毒农药喷洒致蜜蜂死亡的构成环境侵权可主张经济损失和精神损害赔偿（民法典第1232条）。
us_claim: Pesticide drift that kills bees on neighboring property may give rise to claims for trespass, nuisance, and negligence; the Federal Insecticide, Fungicide, and Rodenticide Act (7 U.S.C. § 136 et seq.) requires pesticides to be used in accordance with their labels; violation of label instructions constitutes negligence per se in many jurisdictions.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for pesticide drift damage to neighboring property, with CN applying environmental-tort law and US applying trespass, nuisance, and FIFRA-based negligence.

fact_summary: 村民蜜蜂因邻田喷洒高毒农药大量死亡 / bees died from pesticide drift from an adjacent farm.
cn_claim: 环境污染侵权应承担赔偿责任（民法典第1229条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Pesticide drift causing damage to neighboring property may be actionable in negligence and private nuisance; the court will consider whether the farmer took reasonable precautions to prevent spray-drift; violation of relevant pesticide-control regulations is evidence of negligence.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for pesticide-drift damage, with CN applying statutory environmental tort and HK applying common-law negligence and nuisance.

fact_summary: 企业以员工不胜任工作为由单方调岗并降薪 / A company unilaterally transferred an employee to a lower-paying position on the ground of incompetence.
cn_claim: 用人单位单方变更劳动合同应协商一致（劳动合同法第35条）；以不胜任工作为由调岗降薪的应证明员工不胜任且调岗合理。
us_claim: An employer may demote or transfer an employee in an at-will employment relationship unless the action is based on a protected characteristic or violates an employment contract; however, if the demotion is constructive discharge—making working conditions so intolerable that a reasonable employee would resign—it may give rise to a claim for wrongful termination.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN requires mutual consent for contract changes including demotions, while US at-will default permits unilateral demotions absent contractual protections, creating significant worker-protection asymmetry.

fact_summary: 企业以不胜任为由单方调岗降薪 / A company unilaterally demoted an employee for incompetence.
cn_claim: 变更劳动合同应协商一致（劳动合同法第35条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An employer may not unilaterally vary the fundamental terms of an employment contract; a demotion with a pay reduction constitutes a variation of contract requiring the employee's consent; unilateral imposition may constitute constructive dismissal and entitle the employee to terminate the contract and claim remedies.
notes: Both CN and HK require employee consent for unilateral demotions, with CN codifying the consent requirement in the Labor Contract Law and HK treating unilateral demotion as constructive dismissal.

fact_summary: 执行程序中法院查封了被执行人与案外人的共有房产 / The court seized jointly-owned real property of the debtor and a third party during execution proceedings.
cn_claim: 法院可查封、扣押、冻结被执行人与其他人共有的财产（关于人民法院民事执行中查封、扣押、冻结财产的规定第12条）；共有人可协议分割或析产诉讼确定份额。
us_claim: A judgment creditor may execute against the debtor's interest in jointly-owned property; the third-party co-owner may intervene to protect their interest; some states require the creditor to first obtain a partition order or a charging order.
hk_claim: A judgment creditor may execute against the debtor's interest in jointly-owned property; the co-owner may apply to the court for relief; the court will balance the creditor's enforcement rights against the co-owner's property rights.
notes: All three jurisdictions permit execution against a debtor's interest in co-owned property while providing co-owner-protection mechanisms.

fact_summary: 鉴定人出具虚假鉴定意见导致无辜者被错误追诉 / An expert witness provided a false forensic opinion that led to the wrongful prosecution of an innocent person.
cn_claim: 鉴定人故意作虚假鉴定构成犯罪的追究刑事责任（刑法第305条伪证罪；第307条之一虚假诉讼罪）；因虚假鉴定遭受损失的被害人可主张国家赔偿。
us_claim: An expert witness who knowingly provides false testimony commits perjury under 18 U.S.C. § 1621; the conviction obtained through false evidence may be vacated through habeas corpus or post-conviction relief; the expert may also face civil liability for fraud.
hk_claim: An expert witness who knowingly gives false evidence commits perjury contrary to the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200) s.36; a conviction obtained through perjured evidence may be quashed on appeal.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize false expert testimony and provide mechanisms to vacate convictions based on perjured evidence.

fact_summary: 私募基金未按合同约定进行信息披露 / A private equity fund failed to disclose information as required by the fund agreement.
cn_claim: 私募基金管理人应按照合同约定如实向投资者披露基金投资、资产负债、收益分配等重大信息（私募投资基金监督管理条例第24条、第25条）。
us_claim: Investment advisers registered under the Investment Advisers Act of 1940 owe fiduciary duties of full and fair disclosure; failure to disclose material information to investors constitutes fraud under Section 206 of the Advisers Act (15 U.S.C. § 80b-6); SEC v. Capital Gains Research Bureau, Inc., 375 U.S. 180 (1963).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US impose disclosure obligations on fund managers, with CN codifying specific disclosure duties and US enforcing fiduciary disclosure through the Advisers Act.

fact_summary: 某公司使用竞争对手的商标作为搜索引擎竞价排名关键词 / A company used a competitor's trademark as a keyword for search-engine paid-ad placement.
cn_claim: 将他人注册商标作为搜索关键词使用导致相关公众混淆的构成商标侵权或不正当竞争（商标法第57条第七项；反不正当竞争法第6条）。
us_claim: Using a competitor's trademark as a search-engine keyword may constitute trademark infringement under the Lanham Act (15 U.S.C. § 1114) if it creates a likelihood of consumer confusion as to source or sponsorship; initial-interest confusion may support liability even if the confusion is dispelled before purchase; Multi Time Machine, Inc. v. Amazon.com, Inc., 804 F.3d 930 (9th Cir. 2015).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US analyze keyword-advertising cases under trademark-infringement and unfair-competition frameworks, with both applying likelihood-of-confusion standards that may include initial-interest confusion.

fact_summary: 公司使用竞争对手商标作为搜索竞价排名关键词 / A company used a competitor's trademark as a paid-search keyword.
cn_claim: 将他人商标作为搜索关键词造成混淆的构成商标侵权或不正当竞争（商标法第57条第七项；反不正当竞争法第6条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Using a competitor's trade mark as a keyword to trigger advertisements may constitute passing off if the use misleads consumers into believing the advertiser is connected with the trade-mark owner; the test is whether a substantial number of reasonably observant consumers would be confused.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies against keyword-advertising confusion, with CN applying statutory trademark and unfair-competition law and HK applying the common-law tort of passing off.

fact_summary: 消费者购买车险后保险公司以投保时未告知车辆曾改装为由拒赔 / After purchasing car insurance, a consumer's claim was denied because the insurer claimed the vehicle modification was not disclosed at the time of purchase.
cn_claim: 订立保险合同，保险人就保险标的或被保险人的有关情况提出询问的，投保人应如实告知；投保人故意或因重大过失未履行如实告知义务足以影响保险人决定是否承保或提高保险费率的，保险人有权解除合同（保险法第16条第一款、第二款）。
us_claim: Under the duty of utmost good faith (uberrimae fidei), an insured must disclose material facts to the insurer; a material misrepresentation or concealment of a vehicle modification that would affect the insurer's underwriting decision may void the policy under state insurance law.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US impose a duty of disclosure on insurance applicants, with material nondisclosure of vehicle modifications allowing the insurer to void the policy.

fact_summary: 消费者买保险后因未告知车辆改装被拒赔 / A consumer's auto insurance claim was denied for failure to disclose vehicle modifications.
cn_claim: 投保人因重大过失未告知的保险人有权解除合同（保险法第16条第一款、第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under the Marine Insurance Ordinance (Cap. 329) s.18 (applied by analogy to non-marine insurance), the insured must disclose every material circumstance known to the insured; failure to disclose a material fact such as a vehicle modification that would influence a prudent insurer allows the insurer to avoid the policy.
notes: Both CN and HK impose a duty of material disclosure on insurance applicants, with CN codifying the duty in the Insurance Law and HK applying the common-law duty of utmost good faith.

fact_summary: 河道清淤施工导致下游养殖鱼塘因水质恶化大量鱼死亡 / A river-dredging operation caused downstream fish-farm fish to die en masse from water-quality deterioration.
cn_claim: 因污染环境造成损害的污染者应承担侵权责任（民法典第1229条）；施工方对施工行为造成的环境损害应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: The discharge of pollutants or sediment into navigable waters that causes damage to downstream property may give rise to claims under the Clean Water Act (33 U.S.C. § 1251 et seq.) and common-law trespass and nuisance; the dredging operator may be liable in negligence for failing to implement sediment-control measures.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for downstream environmental damage from construction activities, with CN applying environmental-tort law and US applying the Clean Water Act plus common-law trespass and nuisance.

fact_summary: 河道清淤施工导致下游鱼塘鱼类死亡 / River dredging killed fish in downstream farm ponds.
cn_claim: 施工造成环境损害应承担赔偿责任（民法典第1229条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A person who carries out dredging operations that cause environmental damage to downstream property may be liable in negligence and nuisance; violation of conditions imposed under the Water Pollution Control Ordinance (Cap. 358) is evidence of negligence.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for downstream environmental damage from dredging, with CN applying environmental tort and HK applying negligence and nuisance plus pollution-control regulations.

fact_summary: 被告人冒充警察进行诈骗 / A defendant impersonated a police officer as part of a fraud scheme.
cn_claim: 冒充人民警察招摇撞骗的从重处罚（刑法第279条第一款、第二款）。
us_claim: Impersonating a federal officer or employee is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 912; using the impersonation to commit fraud constitutes an additional aggravating factor at sentencing under the U.S. Sentencing Guidelines.
hk_claim: Impersonating a police officer constitutes an offense under the Police Force Ordinance (Cap. 232) s.22; using the impersonation to commit further offenses is an aggravating factor at sentencing.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize impersonating police officers with enhanced penalties where the impersonation is used to commit fraud.

fact_summary: 企业不服反垄断执法机构的罚款决定提起行政诉讼 / An enterprise filed an administrative lawsuit challenging a fine imposed by the antitrust enforcement agency.
cn_claim: 被调查的经营者对反垄断执法机构作出的处罚决定不服的可申请行政复议或提起行政诉讼（反垄断法第53条）。
us_claim: A party subject to an FTC or DOJ Antitrust Division enforcement action may seek judicial review under the APA (5 U.S.C. § 702); the reviewing court will uphold the agency's factual findings if supported by substantial evidence and will review legal conclusions de novo.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide for judicial review of antitrust-enforcement actions, with CN providing a statutory right of appeal and US applying general APA judicial-review standards.

fact_summary: 企业不服反垄断罚款提起行政诉讼 / An enterprise challenged an antitrust fine through administrative litigation.
cn_claim: 对反垄断处罚不服的可提起行政诉讼（反垄断法第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A person aggrieved by a decision of the Competition Commission or the Competition Tribunal may appeal to the Competition Tribunal or the Court of Appeal, as applicable, under the Competition Ordinance (Cap. 619).
notes: Both CN and HK provide for judicial or tribunal review of antitrust/competition enforcement decisions, with CN applying general administrative-litigation procedures and HK using the Competition Tribunal and appellate review mechanisms.

fact_summary: 胜诉当事人在申请执行时发现被执行人已办理离婚并将财产全部转移至配偶名下 / Upon seeking enforcement, the judgment creditor discovered the debtor had divorced and transferred all property to the former spouse.
cn_claim: 债务人以明显不合理的低价转让财产或以离婚协议转移财产逃避债务的对债权人造成损害的，债权人可请求法院撤销债务人的行为（民法典第538条、第539条）。
us_claim: A transfer of assets incident to divorce that is made with actual intent to hinder, delay, or defraud a creditor may be avoided under the Uniform Voidable Transactions Act; the creditor may bring a fraudulent-transfer action to set aside the transfer and subject the property to execution; the transferee-spouse's knowledge of the debtor's intent is a relevant factor.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US allow creditors to challenge transfers made incident to divorce as fraudulent if made with intent to evade creditors.

fact_summary: 胜诉当事人发现被执行人将财产转移至前配偶名下 / The judgment creditor discovered the debtor had transferred all property to the former spouse.
cn_claim: 债权人可请求撤销逃避债务的离婚财产转移（民法典第538条、第539条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A transfer of property made with intent to defraud creditors may be set aside under the Conveyancing and Property Ordinance (Cap. 219) s.60; a divorce settlement that has the effect of defeating creditors may be challenged as a fraudulent conveyance.
notes: Both CN and HK allow creditors to set aside transfers made through divorce settlements that are intended to defeat creditors.

fact_summary: 航空公司将旅客个人信息提供给境外合作伙伴用于会员计划营销 / An airline provided passenger personal data to an overseas partner for loyalty-program marketing.
cn_claim: 个人信息处理者向境外提供个人信息的应取得个人单独同意并通过出境安全评估或订立标准合同（个人信息保护法第38条、第39条）。
us_claim: Airlines sharing passenger personal data with foreign partners for marketing must comply with the Department of Transportation privacy regulations (14 C.F.R. Part 259) and may be subject to FTC § 5 enforcement for deceptive practices if the data-sharing is not disclosed; the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework may apply.
hk_claim: An airline that transfers passenger personal data to an overseas marketing partner must comply with the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) and may need to obtain the passenger's prescribed consent unless the transfer falls within an exemption.
notes: All three jurisdictions regulate cross-border airline-passenger data transfers for marketing, with CN requiring specific consent and security assessment, US applying DOT and FTC rules, and HK applying the PDPO.

fact_summary: 航空公司将旅客信息提供给境外合作伙伴用于会员营销 / An airline provided passenger data to an overseas partner for loyalty marketing.
cn_claim: 向境外提供个人信息应取得单独同意并通过安全评估（个人信息保护法第38条、第39条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An airline that transfers passenger personal data to an overseas marketing partner must comply with Data Protection Principle 3 under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486); the passenger's prescribed consent is required for the new purpose of marketing.
notes: Both CN and HK require consent for cross-border transfer and secondary marketing use of personal data, with CN additionally requiring a security assessment.

fact_summary: A party sought to enforce a foreign default judgment where the defendant was served by publication and never appeared / 一方试图执行通过公告送达且被告从未出庭的外国缺席判决
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: A foreign default judgment where the defendant was served only by publication and never appeared may be denied recognition under the Uniform Foreign-Country Money Judgments Recognition Act if the foreign court lacked personal jurisdiction or the defendant did not receive notice of the proceedings in sufficient time to enable a defense; service by publication alone is generally insufficient for recognition.
hk_claim: A foreign default judgment where the defendant was not properly served and did not appear may not be enforceable at common law; for a foreign judgment to be recognized, the defendant must have been properly served in accordance with the law of the foreign jurisdiction and must have had a fair opportunity to defend.
notes: Both US and HK deny recognition to foreign default judgments where service was inadequate and the defendant had no fair opportunity to defend.

fact_summary: 某市出台地方规章要求市民在社交媒体实名注册 / A city enacted a local regulation requiring citizens to register their real names on social media.
cn_claim: 行政法规和地方性法规不得与法律相抵触（立法法第88条）；实名制要求应有上位法依据且符合比例原则。
us_claim: A law requiring real-name registration for social-media use is a content-neutral regulation of speech subject to intermediate scrutiny under the First Amendment; the government must demonstrate that the regulation serves an important governmental interest and does not burden substantially more speech than necessary; the right to speak anonymously is protected under McIntyre v. Ohio Elections Commission, 514 U.S. 334 (1995).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN's legal framework allows real-name requirements based on statutory authorization and proportionality, while US applies intermediate scrutiny under the First Amendment protecting anonymous speech.

fact_summary: 某市出台地方规章要求社交媒体实名注册 / A city required real-name registration on social media.
cn_claim: 实名制要求应有上位法依据且符合比例原则（立法法第88条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Any legislative restriction on anonymous speech must be prescribed by law and be necessary for respect of the rights of others, public order, or national security under the Hong Kong Bill of Rights (Cap. 383) Art. 16; a regulation requiring real-name registration on social media would be subject to proportionality analysis.
notes: Both CN and HK subject real-name registration requirements to proportionality and legal-authorization analysis, though the constitutional frameworks differ.

fact_summary: 被告人因长期遭受被害人家庭暴力而将被害人杀害 / A defendant killed a long-term domestic-abuser after years of abuse.
cn_claim: 对正在进行的不法侵害采取的制止行为属正当防卫不负刑事责任；对长期遭受家暴的被害人在特定条件下可成立正当防卫（刑法第20条；最高人民法院、最高人民检察院关于办理家庭暴力案件的意见）。
us_claim: Battered-woman syndrome is admissible in some jurisdictions to support a claim of self-defense where the defendant killed an abuser during a lull in violence if the defendant subjectively believed deadly force was necessary and the belief was objectively reasonable under the circumstances; the traditional imminence requirement may be relaxed where the pattern of abuse supports the reasonableness of the perceived threat.
hk_claim: A defendant who kills after prolonged domestic abuse may rely on the defense of self-defense; the court will consider the history of abuse in assessing whether the defendant honestly believed the use of force was necessary and whether the degree of force used was reasonable; expert evidence on the effects of prolonged abuse may be admitted.
notes: All three jurisdictions recognize that prolonged domestic abuse is relevant to self-defense claims, though the doctrinal mechanisms and the treatment of imminence vary: CN applies a statutory self-defense framework, US uses battered-woman-syndrome evidence, and HK considers the abuse history within the common-law defense framework.

fact_summary: 开源软件的二次开发者未遵守原开源许可证的传染条款 / A downstream developer incorporated open-source software into a proprietary product without complying with the original copyleft license terms.
cn_claim: 开源许可证是著作权许可合同，违反开源许可证的使用条件构成著作权侵权（著作权法第52条）并可构成违约；传染性许可证（GPL）要求衍生作品同样以GPL许可发布。
us_claim: Violation of the conditions of an open-source license constitutes copyright infringement because the licensee has exceeded the scope of the license; the GNU General Public License's copyleft provision requires derivative works to be licensed under the GPL; Jacobsen v. Katzer, 535 F.3d 1373 (Fed. Cir. 2008).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US enforce open-source licenses through copyright law, treating violations of copyleft conditions as copyright infringement.

fact_summary: 开源软件二次开发者未遵守原开源许可证的传染条款 / A downstream developer violated the copyleft terms of the original open-source license.
cn_claim: 违反开源许可证条件构成著作权侵权（著作权法第52条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An open-source license is a contractual license; use of open-source software outside the terms of the license constitutes copyright infringement under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528); the licensor may also bring a claim for breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK enforce open-source license terms through copyright infringement and breach-of-contract remedies.

fact_summary: 上市公司在董事会决议公告前数日内，董事配偶大量买入公司股票 / Shortly before the public announcement of a board resolution, a director's spouse purchased a large volume of company shares.
cn_claim: 上市公司董事、监事、高级管理人员及持有5%以上股份的股东，将其持有的股票在买入后6个月内卖出或卖出后6个月内买入的，所得收益归公司所有（证券法第44条）；利用未公开信息交易构成内幕交易（证券法第51条）。
us_claim: Trading on material nonpublic information by a director's spouse (a constructive insider) may violate Section 10(b) of the Securities Exchange Act and Rule 10b-5 under the misappropriation theory; the tipper-tippee liability under Dirks v. SEC, 463 U.S. 646 (1983) applies where the insider receives a personal benefit from the disclosure; United States v. O'Hagan, 521 U.S. 642 (1997).
hk_claim: A director's spouse trading on nonpublic information disclosed by the director may be liable for insider dealing under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) s.270; both the director (as tipper) and the spouse (as tippee) may be subject to civil and criminal liability.
notes: All three jurisdictions prohibit trading by insiders' family members on nonpublic information, with CN applying short-swing-profit and insider-trading rules, US using Rule 10b-5 and tipper-tippee liability, and HK using the SFO insider-dealing provisions.

fact_summary: 员工因患职业病被认定为工伤后公司以其长期无法工作为由解除劳动合同 / After an employee was certified with an occupational disease, the company terminated the employment contract citing long-term inability to work.
cn_claim: 患职业病或因工负伤被确认丧失或部分丧失劳动能力的劳动者用人单位不得解除劳动合同（劳动合同法第42条第二项）。
us_claim: Termination of an employee because of an occupational disease or disability may constitute disability discrimination under the Americans with Disabilities Act (42 U.S.C. § 12101 et seq.); an employer must provide reasonable accommodation unless it would cause undue hardship; the ADA prohibits discrimination against qualified individuals with a disability.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit termination of employees based on occupational disease or disability, with CN providing absolute protection and US applying the ADA reasonable-accommodation framework.

fact_summary: 居民个人通过在避税地设立的壳公司持有境外资产但未申报 / A resident individual held foreign assets through a shell company in a tax haven without reporting.
cn_claim: 居民个人从中国境外取得的所得应依法申报；通过境外壳公司持有资产未申报的税务机关可依法进行特别纳税调整（个人所得税法第8条反避税条款）。
us_claim: U.S. persons must report ownership of foreign corporations on Form 5471 and foreign financial assets on Form 8938; failure to report may result in substantial penalties under I.R.C. § 6038 and § 6038D; the Controlled Foreign Corporation (Subpart F) rules under I.R.C. §§ 951-965 may attribute the foreign corporation's income to the U.S. shareholder.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US have anti-avoidance rules targeting residents' use of offshore entities, with CN's GAAR and offshore-entity reporting rules and US's CFC and foreign-asset-reporting regimes.

fact_summary: 居民通过避税地壳公司持有境外资产未申报 / A resident held foreign assets through a tax-haven shell company without reporting.
cn_claim: 税务机关可进行反避税调整（个人所得税法第8条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Hong Kong does not tax foreign-sourced income and does not generally require reporting of foreign assets held through offshore entities; there is no CFC regime or general foreign-asset-reporting requirement under Hong Kong tax law.
notes: CN has comprehensive anti-avoidance rules targeting offshore structures, while HK does not tax foreign-sourced income or impose CFC rules, creating a significant asymmetry.

fact_summary: 跨国公司因合并需要将中国子公司的员工个人信息传输至境外人力资源管理系统 / A multinational corporation needed to transfer Chinese subsidiary employee data to an overseas HR system for a corporate merger.
cn_claim: 向境外提供个人信息的应通过出境安全评估或签订标准合同并取得个人单独同意（个人信息保护法第38条、第39条）。
us_claim: Cross-border transfer of employee data for corporate mergers is generally permitted subject to notice to employees; no comprehensive federal data-transfer restriction applies, though state laws and sectoral regulations (e.g., HIPAA) may impose additional requirements.
hk_claim: Transfer of employee personal data to an overseas HR system is governed by the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486); the data user should take reasonable steps to ensure the data is not kept or used in a manner inconsistent with the Ordinance.
notes: CN imposes comprehensive transfer restrictions for cross-border employee-data transfers, while US applies a lighter regulatory touch, and HK requires reasonable steps to protect transferred data.

fact_summary: 未与子女共同生活的父母一方因拒绝支付抚养费被强制执行 / The non-custodial parent who failed to pay child support was subject to enforcement proceedings.
cn_claim: 父母不履行抚养义务的未成年子女或不能独立生活的成年子女有要求父母给付抚养费的权利（民法典第1067条第一款）；拒不支付的法院可强制执行。
us_claim: Child-support orders are enforceable through income withholding, tax-refund interception, suspension of licenses, and contempt proceedings; the Uniform Interstate Family Support Act (UIFSA) facilitates enforcement across state lines; federal criminal penalties may apply under the Deadbeat Parents Punishment Act (18 U.S.C. § 228).
hk_claim: A parent who fails to comply with a child-maintenance order may be subject to enforcement proceedings including attachment of income, garnishment, and judgment summons; persistent default may result in committal.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide robust enforcement mechanisms for child-support orders, including income withholding, contempt, and criminal sanctions.

fact_summary: 县政府以维护公共利益为由未提前公告即征收农民承包地 / A county government expropriated farmers' contracted land without prior public notice, citing public interest.
cn_claim: 征收土地应经法定程序批准并公告征地补偿安置方案，充分听取被征地农民意见（土地管理法第46-48条）；未公告即征收程序违法。
us_claim: The Takings Clause of the Fifth Amendment requires just compensation for property taken for public use and procedural due process requires notice and an opportunity to be heard before a property deprivation; lack of pre-deprivation notice violates procedural due process; United States v. James Daniel Good Real Property, 510 U.S. 43 (1993).
hk_claim: Compulsory acquisition is governed by the Lands Resumption Ordinance (Cap. 124) and the Basic Law Art. 105, which require compensation and due process; resumption without proper notice and opportunity to object is subject to judicial review on grounds of procedural impropriety.
notes: All three jurisdictions require procedural due process including notice before land expropriation, with CN codifying statutory notice requirements and US/HK requiring constitutional and statutory due process.

fact_summary: 小区电梯因长期未检修突然坠落致多人受伤 / An elevator in a residential building plummeted due to long-neglected maintenance, injuring multiple occupants.
cn_claim: 物业公司应按照约定和物业性质妥善维修养护业主共有部分（民法典第942条第一款）；电梯未定期检修致人损害的物业公司应承担侵权责任（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A property manager or elevator-maintenance contractor that fails to conduct required inspections and maintenance resulting in an elevator accident is liable for negligence; violation of state elevator-safety codes constitutes negligence per se; res ipsa loquitur may apply because elevator malfunctions ordinarily do not occur absent negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier or building manager that fails to maintain an elevator in safe condition breaches the duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314) and the Lifts and Escalators Ordinance (Cap. 618); liability arises from the foreseeable risk of harm from neglected maintenance.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose strict maintenance duties on elevator operators and building managers, with violation of safety codes constituting evidence of breach.

fact_summary: 上市公司未及时披露重大对外担保信息导致投资者在信息不对称下交易受损 / A listed company failed to timely disclose a material external guarantee, causing investors to trade at uninformed prices.
cn_claim: 发生可能对上市公司股票交易价格产生较大影响的重大事件时上市公司应立即向证监会和证券交易所报送临时报告并予公告（证券法第80条第一款）；未及时披露的应承担赔偿责任（证券法第85条）。
us_claim: A public company must promptly disclose material events on Form 8-K under Section 13(a) of the Securities Exchange Act (15 U.S.C. § 78m(a)); failure to timely disclose material guarantees may give rise to Rule 10b-5 liability for investors who traded during the period of nondisclosure; the fraud-on-the-market theory supports a presumption of reliance in an efficient market.
hk_claim: A listed company is required to disclose inside information to the public as soon as reasonably practicable under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) Part XIVA; failure to disclose a material guarantee may give rise to civil liability and regulatory sanctions.
notes: All three jurisdictions require timely disclosure of material information by listed companies and provide investor remedies for nondisclosure.

fact_summary: 被告人因盗窃被判处缓刑，在缓刑考验期内又犯新罪 / A defendant sentenced to probation for theft committed a new offense during the probation period.
cn_claim: 被宣告缓刑的犯罪分子在缓刑考验期内犯新罪的应撤销缓刑，对前罪和后罪实行数罪并罚（刑法第77条第一款）。
us_claim: A defendant who commits a new offense while on probation is subject to probation-revocation proceedings and sentencing on the new offense; the original suspended sentence may be imposed in addition to the sentence for the new offense, and the sentences may run consecutively.
hk_claim: A person subject to a suspended sentence who commits an offense during the operational period is liable to have the suspended sentence activated and to be sentenced for the new offense, with the sentences typically running consecutively.
notes: All three jurisdictions revoke probation/suspended sentences upon commission of new offenses and impose cumulative punishment for both old and new crimes.

fact_summary: 业主委员会未经业主大会同意即与物业公司续签了大幅提价的物业服务合同 / The homeowners' association renewed a property-management contract with a significant price increase without the general meeting's approval.
cn_claim: 业主委员会代表业主与选聘的物业服务人签订物业服务合同；调整物业服务收费需经业主大会同意（民法典第278条、第939条；物业管理条例第11条第七项）。
us_claim: A homeowners' association (HOA) board must act within the scope of authority granted by the governing documents and state HOA statutes; entering into contracts that materially increase assessments without owner approval may exceed board authority and be voidable.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require homeowner consent for material changes to property-management contracts and assessments, with CN codifying the requirement and US applying HOA governance documents and state law.

fact_summary: 业主委员会未经业主大会同意续签大幅提价物业服务合同 / The HOA renewed a management contract with significant price increase without owner approval.
cn_claim: 调整物业服务收费需经业主大会同意（民法典第278条、第939条；物业管理条例第11条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An owners' committee (incorporated or unincorporated) that enters into a management contract exceeding the scope of its authority is acting ultra vires; major decisions, including significant changes to management fees, should be approved by the owners in general meeting.
notes: Both CN and HK require owner approval for material changes to management contracts and fees, with CN codifying the requirement and HK applying ultra-vires and owners'-consent principles.

fact_summary: 公司以经营困难为由单方决定全员降薪20% / A company unilaterally imposed a 20% across-the-board pay cut, citing business difficulties.
cn_claim: 用人单位变更劳动合同内容应与劳动者协商一致（劳动合同法第35条）；降薪属于变更劳动合同核心条款，未协商一致的降薪不生效。
us_claim: An employer may reduce wages prospectively for non-exempt employees only with advance notice; the Fair Labor Standards Act (29 U.S.C. § 206) requires payment of at least the minimum wage; reductions below the contractually agreed rate may constitute breach of contract if the rate was promised.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN requires mutual consent for pay reductions, while US allows unilateral prospective reductions subject to minimum-wage floors and contractual promises, creating a worker-protection asymmetry.

fact_summary: 公司以经营困难为由单方决定全员降薪20% / A company unilaterally imposed a 20% pay cut, citing business difficulties.
cn_claim: 降薪应协商一致（劳动合同法第35条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An employer may not unilaterally reduce an employee's wages; wage reduction constitutes a variation of the employment contract requiring the employee's consent; unilateral imposition may constitute constructive dismissal and entitle the employee to claim remedies under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57).
notes: Both CN and HK require employee consent for wage reductions, treating unilateral pay cuts as a variation of contract requiring agreement.

fact_summary: 游戏主播直播了未经授权的游戏全程画面 / A game streamer broadcast the complete gameplay of an unauthorized video game.
cn_claim: 游戏过程画面可能构成视听作品；未经授权直播游戏画面的构成对游戏开发者著作权中信息网络传播权或广播权的侵犯（著作权法第10条第十二项、第十一项）。
us_claim: Streaming of video-game gameplay without a license may infringe the copyright owner's public-performance right under 17 U.S.C. § 106(4) and display right under § 106(5); whether streaming constitutes fair use depends on the four-factor test, with the amount used and the effect on the market for the game being key factors.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US extend copyright protection to game audiovisual content and require a license for public streaming; the fair-use/dealing analysis may differ.

fact_summary: 游戏主播直播了未经授权的游戏全程画面 / A game streamer broadcast unauthorized complete gameplay.
cn_claim: 未经授权直播游戏画面可能侵犯信息网络传播权（著作权法第10条第十二项、第十一项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Streaming of a video game to the public without authorization may infringe the copyright in the audiovisual elements of the game under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528) as a communication of the work to the public; whether it qualifies as fair dealing depends on whether the use is for an permitted purpose and is fair.
notes: Both CN and HK protect game audiovisual content against unauthorized public streaming, with CN applying the information-network-transmission right and HK applying the communication-to-the-public right.

fact_summary: 儿童在充气城堡玩耍时被大风吹起受伤 / A child was injured when an inflatable bounce-house was lifted by strong wind.
cn_claim: 充气城堡经营者应对其设施安全负责；经营者未采取有效固定措施致儿童受伤的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: An inflatable-amusement operator owes a duty of reasonable care to child patrons; failure to properly anchor the structure against foreseeable weather conditions constitutes negligence; violation of ASTM safety standards for inflatable devices is evidence of breach.
hk_claim: An occupier or operator of recreational facilities owes a common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314); failure to adequately secure an inflatable structure against wind conditions is a breach of the duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose premises and operator-liability duties on inflatable-amusement operators to secure equipment against foreseeable wind hazards.

fact_summary: 被告人通过虚假宣传吸引数百名老年人投资养老项目后卷款跑路 / A defendant attracted hundreds of elderly investors to a fictitious senior-care project and absconded with the funds.
cn_claim: 以非法占有为目的使用诈骗方法非法集资数额较大的构成集资诈骗罪（刑法第192条）；针对老年人群体实施诈骗的酌情从重处罚。
us_claim: A scheme to defraud investors through false representations about a senior-care project constitutes securities fraud under Rule 10b-5 and may be prosecuted as wire fraud (18 U.S.C. § 1343) and mail fraud (18 U.S.C. § 1341); targeting elderly victims is a factor supporting enhanced sentencing under the U.S. Sentencing Guidelines § 3A1.1(b)(2).
hk_claim: A person who dishonestly induces others to invest in a fictitious project by deception and appropriates the funds commits fraud contrary to s.16A of the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210); theft and money-laundering offenses may also apply.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize investment-fraud schemes targeting vulnerable populations, with CN and US providing enhanced penalties and HK applying fraud and theft offenses.

fact_summary: 持股5%以上的大股东在6个月内频繁买卖公司股票 / A shareholder holding more than 5% of a listed company's shares bought and sold the stock within a six-month period.
cn_claim: 持股5%以上的股东将其持有的股票在买入后6个月内卖出或卖出后6个月内买入的所得收益归公司所有（证券法第44条第一款）。
us_claim: Section 16(b) of the Securities Exchange Act (15 U.S.C. § 78p(b)) requires insiders (officers, directors, and 10%+ shareholders) to disgorge any profit from short-swing transactions (purchase and sale within six months); the rule is mechanical and does not require proof of insider trading.
hk_claim: Hong Kong does not have a mechanical short-swing-profit disgorgement rule comparable to U.S. Section 16(b) or PRC Securities Law Art. 44; such trading may be subject to insider-dealing provisions of the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) if the shareholder traded on inside information.
notes: CN and US impose mechanical short-swing-profit disgorgement on large shareholders, while HK addresses such trading only when it constitutes insider dealing, creating a remedies asymmetry.

fact_summary: 某网盘服务商在用户注销账户后仍保留了用户已删除的文件副本 / A cloud-storage provider retained copies of user-deleted files after the user closed the account.
cn_claim: 个人信息处理者应在个人信息保存期限届满后删除个人信息；个人撤回同意或注销账户的，个人信息处理者应主动删除个人信息（个人信息保护法第47条）。
us_claim: Under the CCPA (Cal. Civ. Code § 1798.105), consumers have the right to request deletion of personal information; the controller must delete and direct its service providers to delete; certain exceptions apply (e.g., to comply with legal obligations, to detect security incidents).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US grant data subjects the right to deletion upon account closure, with CN imposing a mandatory deletion obligation and US providing deletion rights under state laws such as the CCPA.

fact_summary: 网盘服务商在用户注销后仍保留已删除的文件副本 / A cloud-storage provider retained copies of user-deleted files after account closure.
cn_claim: 注销账户后应主动删除个人信息（个人信息保护法第47条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) Data Protection Principle 2, personal data shall not be kept longer than is necessary for the purpose for which it is to be used; a cloud-storage provider that retains user data after account closure without legal justification may breach Data Protection Principle 2 and the Data Access Request provisions.
notes: Both CN and HK require deletion of personal data when no longer needed, with CN codifying specific deletion triggers and HK applying the data-retention principle.

fact_summary: 被执行人唯一住房被法院查封拍卖，被执行人主张该住房为其及家庭生活所必需的居住房屋 / A debtor's sole residence was seized and auctioned by the court; the debtor claimed it was the family's necessary dwelling.
cn_claim: 对被执行人及其所扶养家属生活所必需的居住房屋法院可查封但不得拍卖、变卖或抵债（最高人民法院关于人民法院民事执行中查封、扣押、冻结财产的规定第6条）；但可提供替代住房后予以执行。
us_claim: Homestead exemptions under state law protect a debtor's primary residence from forced sale up to a statutory value limit; the exemption allows the debtor to retain a basic dwelling while subjecting excess equity to creditors; the federal bankruptcy homestead exemption (11 U.S.C. § 522) also applies subject to a cap.
hk_claim: A judgment debtor's sole residence may be subject to execution; however, the court may stay the sale where it would cause exceptional hardship to the debtor and the debtor's family; the court balances the creditor's enforcement rights against the debtor's need for shelter.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide some protection for a debtor's primary residence against execution, though the mechanisms differ: CN restricts forced sale, US provides statutory homestead exemptions, and HK applies judicial hardship balancing.

fact_summary: 居民申请保障性住房因不符合收入标准被拒 / A resident's application for public housing was denied for exceeding the income threshold.
cn_claim: 保障性住房申请人应如实申报家庭收入；不符合条件的住房保障部门可不予批准；申请人有权就拒绝决定申请行政复议或提起行政诉讼（公共租赁住房管理办法第18条、第19条）。
us_claim: Public-housing eligibility determinations are subject to administrative review and due-process protections; an applicant denied housing based on income must be given notice and an opportunity for a hearing under HUD regulations; Goldberg v. Kelly, 397 U.S. 254 (1970) requires pre-termination hearings for welfare benefits.
hk_claim: The Housing Authority's decision on public-rental-housing eligibility is subject to judicial review; an applicant may challenge an adverse decision based on procedural unfairness or irrationality.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide for review of public-housing eligibility decisions, requiring procedural fairness and reasoned decision-making.

fact_summary: 被告人因不满法院判决在法庭外聚集多人围堵法官 / After an unfavorable verdict, the defendant gathered a crowd outside the courthouse and blocked the judge's exit.
cn_claim: 聚众哄闹、冲击法庭或侮辱、诽谤、威胁、殴打司法工作人员严重扰乱法庭秩序的构成扰乱法庭秩序罪（刑法第309条）。
us_claim: Obstructing, influencing, or impeding any official proceeding by threats or intimidation constitutes a violation of 18 U.S.C. § 1512 (obstruction of justice); disrupting court proceedings or intimidating judges is a serious offense warranting enhanced punishment under the U.S. Sentencing Guidelines.
hk_claim: Intimidating a judge or obstructing the course of justice constitutes criminal intimidation and perverting the course of justice at common law; such conduct is also contempt of court punishable by summary process.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose criminal sanctions for intimidation of judges and obstruction of judicial proceedings.

fact_summary: 股东要求查阅公司会计账簿被公司以无正当目的为由拒绝 / A shareholder was denied access to the company's accounting books on the ground of lacking proper purpose.
cn_claim: 股东有权查阅公司会计账簿但应向公司提出书面请求说明目的；公司有合理根据认为股东查阅有不正当目的可能损害公司合法利益的可以拒绝（公司法第33条第二款）。
us_claim: A shareholder's right to inspect corporate books and records is qualified; under Delaware GCL § 220, the shareholder must demonstrate a proper purpose reasonably related to the shareholder's interest, and inspection may be limited to those books and records necessary and essential to the stated purpose.
hk_claim: A member of a company may inspect the company's accounting records only if authorized by the directors or by an ordinary resolution of the members; the court may order inspection on application by a specified number of members under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) s.373.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide shareholder inspection rights qualified by proper-purpose requirements, with CN and US granting the right by statute and HK requiring board or court authorization.

fact_summary: 购房者购买精装修房屋后发现石材放射线超标 / After purchasing a fully-renovated apartment, the buyer discovered the stone materials exceeded radiation-safety standards.
cn_claim: 出卖人交付的标的物不符合质量要求的买受人可合理选择请求修理、重作、减少价款或赔偿损失（民法典第582条）；放射性超标属于根本违约可解除合同。
us_claim: A builder who uses materials that exceed radiation-safety standards breaches the implied warranty of habitability and the implied warranty of fitness for a particular purpose; the buyer may seek rescission, specific performance with repairs, or damages for diminution in value.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies when construction materials used in residential property fail to meet safety standards, with CN applying the Civil Code and US applying implied-warranty doctrines.

fact_summary: 购房者购买精装修房屋后发现石材放射线超标 / A buyer discovered the renovation stone exceeded radiation limits.
cn_claim: 出卖人交付标的物不符合质量要求的买受人可请求修理、减少价款或赔偿（民法典第582条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A developer who uses materials that do not comply with applicable safety standards is in breach of the sale and purchase agreement and the implied terms of quality and fitness; the buyer may claim damages and, if the defect is fundamental, may be entitled to rescind the contract.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for substandard construction materials in residential property, with CN codifying statutory remedies and HK applying contract and implied-term principles.

fact_summary: 极限运动营地未告知参与者活动风险也未要求签署免责声明 / An extreme-sports camp failed to inform participants of the risks and did not require liability waivers before activities.
cn_claim: 经营者对高风险运动应履行充分的告知警示义务；未尽到安全保障义务造成他人损害的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1198条第一款）；未告知风险不能以参与者自甘风险抗辩。
us_claim: An extreme-sports operator owes a duty to warn participants of inherent risks; while primary assumption of risk may bar recovery for injuries from inherent dangers, this defense is generally limited to risks that are obvious and necessary to the sport; failure to warn of non-obvious risks constitutes negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier or activity operator owes a duty of care to visitors; the court may consider the defence of volenti non fit injuria (voluntary assumption of risk), but an operator's failure to warn of material risks may preclude the defence.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose a duty on extreme-sports operators to warn of risks, though the availability and scope of assumption-of-risk defenses vary.

fact_summary: 保安公司要求保安员每天工作12小时但仅按8小时计算工资 / A security company required guards to work 12-hour shifts but calculated wages based on an 8-hour day.
cn_claim: 国家实行劳动者每日工作时间不超过8小时的工时制度（劳动法第36条）；超出法定工时的应按标准支付加班费（劳动法第44条）。
us_claim: Non-exempt employees must be compensated at one-and-a-half times the regular rate for hours worked in excess of 40 per week under the Fair Labor Standards Act (29 U.S.C. § 207); failing to pay overtime for hours worked beyond the standard workday violates the FLSA.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US mandate overtime compensation for work exceeding standard hours, with CN defining the standard as 8 hours daily and US as 40 hours weekly.

fact_summary: 保安公司只按8小时计算12小时轮班工资 / A security company paid guards for 8 hours despite working 12-hour shifts.
cn_claim: 超出法定工时的应支付加班费（劳动法第44条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: The Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) does not prescribe standard working hours or a statutory overtime rate; overtime compensation is governed by the employment contract; however, systematic underpayment may give rise to a claim for breach of contract or, in some circumstances, to a complaint to the Labour Department.
