notes: CN imposes statutory overtime requirements, while HK leaves overtime to contractual arrangements, creating a significant remedies asymmetry for long-hour workers in HK.

fact_summary: 外国仲裁裁决的被申请人以裁决违反公共政策为由申请不予承认和执行 / The respondent in a foreign arbitral award resisted recognition and enforcement, arguing the award violated public policy.
cn_claim: 人民法院认定承认和执行该外国仲裁裁决将违反我国公共政策的可裁定不予承认和执行（民事诉讼法第290条；纽约公约第V条第二款乙项）。
us_claim: Under the New York Convention (implemented through the FAA, 9 U.S.C. § 201 et seq.), recognition of a foreign arbitral award may be refused if enforcement would be contrary to the public policy of the forum; the defense is narrowly construed and requires violation of the most basic notions of morality and justice; Parsons and Whittemore Overseas Co. v. Societe Generale de L'Industrie du Papier, 508 F.2d 969 (2d Cir. 1974).
hk_claim: A Convention award may be refused enforcement if enforcement would be contrary to the public policy of Hong Kong under the Arbitration Ordinance (Cap. 609) s.86; the public-policy ground is narrowly interpreted.
notes: All three jurisdictions apply the New York Convention public-policy defense narrowly, reserving it for awards that offend fundamental principles of justice and morality.

fact_summary: 某招聘APP在用户不知情的情况下读取用户短信记录 / A job-search app read users' SMS messages without their knowledge.
cn_claim: 处理个人信息应限于实现处理目的所必要的最小范围（个人信息保护法第6条）；APP未经授权读取短信记录超出必要范围且未取得有效同意。
us_claim: Accessing SMS messages without the user's consent may violate the federal Wiretap Act (18 U.S.C. § 2511) and state privacy laws; the FTC has brought enforcement actions under § 5 of the FTC Act against apps that surreptitiously access device data.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US restrict apps from surreptitious access to private device data, with CN applying the PIPL's necessity and consent principles and US applying the Wiretap Act and FTC Act enforcement.

fact_summary: 某招聘APP在用户不知情的情况下读取用户短信记录 / A job-search app read users' SMS messages without their knowledge.
cn_claim: 超出必要范围未取得有效同意的属于过度收集（个人信息保护法第6条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A mobile app that surreptitiously accesses SMS messages without consent collects personal data unfairly in violation of the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) Data Protection Principle 1; it may also constitute unauthorized access to a computer under the Telecommunications Ordinance (Cap. 106).
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit surreptitious app access to device data, with CN applying the PIPL and HK applying the PDPO plus telecommunications legislation.

fact_summary: A website provided links to third-party sites hosting unauthorized copies of movies / 网站提供指向第三方网站的链接，该第三方网站托管了未经授权的电影副本
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: A website that knowingly provides links to infringing material may be liable for contributory copyright infringement if it materially contributes to the infringement and has knowledge of it; the Supreme Court in MGM Studios, Inc. v. Grokster, Ltd., 545 U.S. 913 (2005) held that one who distributes a device with the object of promoting its use to infringe copyright is liable for the resulting infringement; mere linking without knowledge may be protected.
hk_claim: Providing hyperlinks to websites hosting infringing content may constitute authorization of infringement where the linker knew or ought to have known that the linked content infringes copyright; the linker may also be liable for communicating the work to the public under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528).
notes: Both US and HK impose liability on linkers who knowingly facilitate access to infringing content, with US applying contributory-infringement and inducement theories and HK applying authorization and communication-to-the-public theories.

fact_summary: 买方购买二手车后发现该车曾发生严重事故且里程表被动过手脚 / A buyer of a used car discovered the vehicle had been in a major accident and the odometer had been tampered with.
cn_claim: 经营者提供商品有欺诈行为的应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；隐瞒事故史和调整里程表构成欺诈。
us_claim: Odometer tampering violates the federal Truth in Mileage Act (49 U.S.C. § 32701 et seq.) and may constitute fraud under state law; the buyer may recover damages including the difference in value and, in some states, treble damages or punitive damages.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide strong remedies for odometer tampering and nondisclosure of accident history in used-car sales, with CN applying statutory treble damages and US applying the Truth in Mileage Act plus state fraud remedies.

fact_summary: 买方购买二手车后发现车辆曾发生严重事故且里程表被动过 / A used-car buyer discovered the vehicle had a major accident and the odometer was tampered with.
cn_claim: 经营者有欺诈行为的应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A seller who conceals a vehicle's accident history and odometer tampering commits misrepresentation and may be liable for fraud; criminal sanctions may also apply under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362) for applying a false trade description to goods.
notes: Both CN and HK provide civil and criminal remedies for concealment of vehicle history and odometer tampering, with CN allowing treble damages and HK applying misrepresentation and Trade Descriptions Ordinance remedies.

fact_summary: 被告人因不满法院判决在网上发布大量侮辱、诽谤法官的言论 / After an adverse judgment, a defendant posted numerous insulting and defamatory remarks about the judge online.
cn_claim: 对司法工作人员进行侮辱、诽谤或以其他方法扰乱司法秩序的应承担法律责任（刑法第309条扰乱法庭秩序罪；治安管理处罚法第42条）；情节严重的可构成侮辱罪、诽谤罪。
us_claim: Online harassment or threats against a judge may be prosecuted under 18 U.S.C. § 875 (interstate communications with threat to injure) and 18 U.S.C. § 115 (influencing, impeding, or retaliating against a federal official); contempt of court also applies where the conduct interferes with the administration of justice.
hk_claim: Online harassment or vilification of a judge may constitute contempt of court and criminal intimidation under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200); if the conduct is intended to pervert the course of justice, the common-law offense of perverting the course of justice may apply.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize online harassment of judges, with CN applying court-order and defamation offenses, US applying threat and obstruction statutes, and HK applying contempt and common-law doctrines.

fact_summary: 上市公司的独立董事未出席董事会会议也未委托他人代为表决 / An independent director of a listed company neither attended board meetings nor appointed a proxy to vote.
cn_claim: 独立董事连续三次未亲自出席董事会会议的上市公司可提请股东大会予以撤换（关于在上市公司建立独立董事制度的指导意见第4条）。
us_claim: Directors must exercise reasonable diligence in attending board meetings; chronic non-attendance may constitute a breach of the duty of care under state corporate law; in Delaware, directors are expected to attend meetings and make informed decisions under the duty of care standard articulated in Smith v. Van Gorkom, 488 A.2d 858 (Del. 1985).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US impose attendance and diligence obligations on directors, with CN providing for removal after three absences and US treating persistent non-attendance as a breach of the duty of care.

fact_summary: 上市公司独立董事连续缺席董事会也未委托他人表决 / An independent director was absent from consecutive board meetings without appointing a proxy.
cn_claim: 连续三次未亲自出席的可提请撤换（独立董事指导意见第4条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Directors must exercise reasonable care, skill, and diligence under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) s.465; persistent failure to attend board meetings and participate in decision-making may constitute a breach of the duty of care and expose the director to liability.
notes: Both CN and HK impose board-attendance obligations on directors, with CN providing for removal after consecutive absences and HK treating chronic absenteeism as a breach of the duty of care.

fact_summary: 公民申请政府信息公开但被要求证明其与该信息有利害关系 / A citizen requesting government information was required to demonstrate a personal interest in the information.
cn_claim: 公民、法人或其他组织可根据自身生产、生活、科研等特殊需要申请获取政府信息（政府信息公开条例第27条）；行政机关不得设置额外障碍。
us_claim: Under the Freedom of Information Act (5 U.S.C. § 552), any person may request access to federal agency records without demonstrating a particular need or interest; the FOIA does not require the requester to show personal relevance; the purpose of FOIA is to ensure an informed citizenry.
hk_claim: The Code on Access to Information provides that any person may request information from government bureaux and departments; there is no general requirement to demonstrate a particular interest in the information requested.
notes: CN requires a showing of special need while US and HK permit any person to request information without demonstrating a particular interest, creating an access-standard asymmetry.

fact_summary: 老人在超市购物时被地面未清理的菜叶滑倒摔伤 / An elderly patron slipped on unremoved vegetable leaves on the floor of a supermarket and was injured.
cn_claim: 超市作为公共场所的经营者应尽到安全保障义务（民法典第1198条第一款）；未及时清理地面障碍物致人损害的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A supermarket owes a duty of reasonable care to its customers and must inspect and remedy hazardous conditions within a reasonable time; constructive notice of a hazard may be established where the hazard existed for a sufficient length of time that the store should have discovered it through reasonable inspection.
hk_claim: A supermarket is an occupier owing a common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314) s.3; failure to maintain the floor in a safe condition is a breach of the duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose a duty on supermarkets to maintain floors in safe condition, with the key issue being whether the hazard should have been discovered and remedied through reasonable inspection.

fact_summary: 企业向境外关联方支付巨额商标使用费以减少境内应税利润 / An enterprise paid substantial trademark royalties to an overseas affiliate to reduce domestic taxable profits.
cn_claim: 企业与关联方的业务往来不符合独立交易原则而减少企业或关联方应纳税收入或所得额的税务机关有权按照合理方法调整（企业所得税法第41条）；同时受特别纳税调整相关规定规制（第6章）。
us_claim: Transfer-pricing rules under I.R.C. § 482 authorize the IRS to allocate income and deductions between related parties to reflect arm's-length terms; royalty payments to affiliates in low-tax jurisdictions are subject to heightened scrutiny; the base-erosion and anti-abuse tax (BEAT) under I.R.C. § 59A may further apply.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US have robust transfer-pricing rules scrutinizing cross-border royalty payments to affiliates, with CN applying the arm's-length principle and special tax adjustments and US applying I.R.C. § 482 and BEAT.

fact_summary: 企业向境外关联方支付巨额商标使用费避税 / An enterprise paid large trademark royalties to an overseas affiliate to avoid tax.
cn_claim: 关联交易不符合独立交易原则的可纳税调整（企业所得税法第41条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Hong Kong has transfer-pricing rules under the Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap. 112) s.50AAK, requiring related-party transactions to be at arm's length; the Inland Revenue Department may adjust profits where the transaction results in a tax advantage.
notes: Both CN and HK apply the arm's-length principle to related-party royalty payments, with CN employing comprehensive special-tax-adjustment rules and HK applying the Inland Revenue Ordinance transfer-pricing provisions.

fact_summary: 境内企业因业务需要在境外设立数据中心并将客户数据存储在境外服务器 / A domestic enterprise established an overseas data center and stored customer data on offshore servers for business needs.
cn_claim: 关键信息基础设施运营者和处理大量个人信息的处理者确需向境外提供数据的应通过安全评估（数据安全法第36条；个人信息保护法第40条）。
us_claim: There is no general prohibition on storing customer data overseas; sectoral regulations (e.g., ITAR/EAR for defense-related technical data, FedRAMP for government cloud) require data to be stored domestically, but most commercial data may be stored abroad subject to contractual and consumer-protection considerations.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN imposes significant cross-border data-storage restrictions, while US permits offshore data storage for most commercial data, creating a regulatory asymmetry.

fact_summary: 离婚后抚养方需要为未成年子女做出重要医疗决定但找不到失联的另一方 / After divorce, the custodial parent needed to make a critical medical decision for the minor child but could not locate the other parent.
cn_claim: 父母对未成年子女负有抚养、教育和保护的权利义务（民法典第26条）；直接抚养方可就子女重大事项作出决定，但应尽可能征询另一方意见；另一方失联的可由直接抚养方独立决定。
us_claim: In joint-custody arrangements, major medical decisions require the consent of both parents; if one parent cannot be located, the custodial parent may petition the court for sole decision-making authority in emergency medical situations; some states provide for expedited procedures where a parent's whereabouts are unknown.
hk_claim: Where parents share parental responsibility, both parents should be consulted on major decisions; if one parent is unavailable or cannot be contacted in an emergency, the other parent may make the decision in the child's best interests and seek retrospective court approval if necessary.
notes: All three jurisdictions allow the custodial parent to make emergency medical decisions for the child when the other parent cannot be contacted, with the child's best interests as the paramount consideration.

fact_summary: 地方公安机关以维护稳定为由拒绝批准市民依法申请的游行 / Local police refused to approve a lawfully-applied-for public march, citing stability maintenance.
cn_claim: 公民有集会、游行、示威的自由（宪法第35条）；申请举行的集会游行示威符合法律规定的公安机关应予以许可（集会游行示威法第9条）。
us_claim: The First Amendment protects the right to peaceable assembly; government may impose time, place, and manner restrictions that are content-neutral, narrowly tailored, and leave open ample alternative channels; denial of a permit solely on generalized public-safety or stability concerns is presumptively unconstitutional; Hague v. CIO, 307 U.S. 496 (1939).
hk_claim: The right of peaceful assembly is protected under the Basic Law (Art. 27) and the Hong Kong Bill of Rights (Cap. 383) Art. 17; police may impose conditions on public processions and may object on public-order grounds under the Public Order Ordinance (Cap. 245), but decisions are subject to appeal to the Appeal Board and judicial review for proportionality.
notes: All three jurisdictions protect the right to peaceful assembly but apply significantly different standards for lawful restrictions: CN requires compliance with statutory criteria, US applies strict scrutiny, and HK reviews for proportionality.

fact_summary: 被告人在缓刑考验期内发现漏罪（判决前未处理的旧罪） / A probationer was discovered to have committed an earlier crime that had not been adjudicated at the time of the probation sentence.
cn_claim: 在缓刑考验期内发现判决宣告前还有其他罪没有判决的应撤销缓刑对新发现的罪作出判决并实行数罪并罚（刑法第77条第一款）。
us_claim: If a previously uncharged crime is discovered during probation, the probation may be revoked and the defendant may be sentenced on the new charge; the original sentence may be imposed in addition to the sentence for the previously undiscovered crime; the sentences may run consecutively if the original court so provides.
hk_claim: If a person subject to a suspended sentence is found to have committed an earlier offense that was not before the court at the time of the suspended sentence, the court may activate the suspended sentence and impose an additional sentence for the earlier offense.
notes: All three jurisdictions revoke probation/suspended sentences upon discovery of previously unadjudicated crimes and impose cumulative sentences for both old and new offenses.

fact_summary: 托运人委托快递公司运输价值10万元的手表未保价，手表在运输途中丢失 / A shipper sent a watch worth $100,000 through a courier without declaring its value; the watch was lost in transit.
cn_claim: 快递服务中未保价的快件丢失毁损的按民事法律的有关规定确定赔偿责任（快递暂行条例第27条）；快递公司通常按运费的3-7倍赔偿（民法典第832条）。
us_claim: Under the Carmack Amendment (49 U.S.C. § 14706), a carrier is liable for actual loss unless the shipper received a released rate in exchange for a lower shipping charge; if the shipper was offered and declined full-value coverage, the carrier's liability is capped at the released rate.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US cap carrier liability for undeclared-value shipments, with CN applying a freight-multiple formula and US applying the released-rate doctrine under the Carmack Amendment.

fact_summary: 托运人未保价的高价值手表在快递运输中丢失 / An undeclared high-value watch was lost in courier transit.
cn_claim: 未保价快件丢失按民事法律确定赔偿责任（快递暂行条例第27条；民法典第832条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Damages for loss of an undeclared-value shipment are governed by the contract of carriage and the common law; carriers typically limit their liability to a fixed sum unless the shipper declared a higher value and paid additional charges.
notes: Both CN and HK allow carriers to limit liability for undeclared-value shipments through contractual terms, with CN codifying a statutory formula and HK applying contractual limitation clauses.

fact_summary: 居民楼外墙因年久失修砖块脱落砸伤行人 / A pedestrian was injured by falling bricks from an aging apartment-building facade.
cn_claim: 建筑物发生脱落造成他人损害的，所有人、管理人或使用人不能证明自己无过错的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1257条）。
us_claim: A building owner has a duty to maintain the exterior in a safe condition; failure to inspect and repair deteriorating masonry constitutes negligence; the burden of proving reasonable inspection and maintenance may shift to the defendant in some jurisdictions.
hk_claim: An occupier or building owner owes a common duty of care to persons outside the building who may foreseeably be injured by falling masonry; failure to maintain exterior walls is a breach of that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose maintenance duties on building owners and apply fault-presumption or negligence standards for injuries caused by falling exterior components.

fact_summary: 公司未经合法程序通过了一项免除控股股东对公司所负债务的决议 / A company passed a resolution releasing the controlling shareholder from a debt owed to the company without following proper procedures.
cn_claim: 控股股东不得利用关联交易损害公司利益（公司法第21条）；免除控股股东对公司所负债务构成关联交易应由非关联股东表决通过。
us_claim: A board decision to forgive a controlling shareholder's debt to the corporation is a self-dealing transaction subject to the entire-fairness standard; the controlling shareholder bears the burden of proving the transaction was entirely fair to the corporation and its minority shareholders; Weinberger v. UOP, Inc., 457 A.2d 701 (Del. 1983).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US impose strict judicial review of controlling-shareholder self-dealing, with CN requiring disinterested-shareholder approval and US applying the entire-fairness standard.

fact_summary: 公司通过决议免除控股股东对公司所负债务 / A company released the controlling shareholder from a debt owed to the company.
cn_claim: 控股股东不得利用关联交易损害公司利益（公司法第21条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A transaction involving a release of a director's or controlling member's obligation to the company must be approved by disinterested members or sanctioned by the court; the transaction is subject to scrutiny under directors' duties and unfair-prejudice provisions of the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622).
notes: Both CN and HK require disinterested approval or court scrutiny for debt-forgiveness transactions benefiting controlling shareholders.

fact_summary: 某画师的作品被AI模型学习后该AI可生成与其风格高度相似的图像 / An artist's works were used to train an AI model that could then generate images highly similar to the artist's style.
cn_claim: 利用他人作品训练AI模型并生成与原作者风格实质性相似的图像可能侵犯改编权和保护作品完整权（著作权法第10条第十四项、第四项）；AI生成物是否构成侵权取决于与原作的实质性相似程度。
us_claim: Whether training AI on copyrighted works constitutes fair use is unsettled; the Supreme Court's decision in Andy Warhol Foundation for the Visual Arts, Inc. v. Goldsmith, 143 S. Ct. 1258 (2023) emphasized the first fair-use factor; an output that is substantially similar to a specific copyrighted work may infringe the derivative-work right under 17 U.S.C. § 106(2).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US are actively developing legal frameworks for AI-training copyright issues, with both analyzing whether AI outputs substantially similar to training data constitute infringement.

fact_summary: 画师的作品被AI学习后可生成与其风格高度相似的图像 / An AI trained on an artist's works generated images highly similar to the artist's style.
cn_claim: AI生成物与原作实质性相似的构成侵权（著作权法第10条第十四项、第四项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Copyright in a work is infringed by copying a substantial part of the work; whether an AI-generated output reproduces a substantial part of the training data depends on assessing the degree of similarity between the specific output and the training images; style alone is not protected by copyright, but copying of protected expression is.
notes: Both CN and HK distinguish between unprotected artistic style and protected expression, assessing AI outputs for substantial similarity to training works, though legal frameworks are evolving in both jurisdictions.

fact_summary: 被告人以试车为名骗取他人摩托车并出售 / A defendant obtained another person's motorcycle on the pretense of a test ride and then sold it.
cn_claim: 以非法占有为目的虚构事实骗取他人财物数额较大的构成诈骗罪（刑法第266条）。
us_claim: Obtaining property by false pretenses with the intent to defraud constitutes theft by deception or false pretenses under state law; transporting the stolen vehicle across state lines may add federal charges under the National Motor Vehicle Theft Act (18 U.S.C. § 2312).
hk_claim: Obtaining property by deception with the intention of permanently depriving the owner constitutes theft under s.18A of the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210) or, alternatively, obtaining property by deception under s.17.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize obtaining property through false pretenses, with CN applying fraud, US applying theft-by-deception plus federal interstate-transport statutes, and HK applying the Theft Ordinance.

fact_summary: 消费者通过自动续费方式被连续扣费但未收到到期提醒 / A consumer was continuously charged through auto-renewal without receiving an expiration reminder.
cn_claim: 电子商务经营者搭售商品或服务应以显著方式提醒消费者注意并不得将搭售选项设置为默认同意（电子商务法第19条）；自动续费应当提前显著提醒消费者。
us_claim: The Restore Online Shoppers' Confidence Act (ROSCA) (15 U.S.C. § 8401 et seq.) requires clear and conspicuous disclosure of material terms before obtaining billing information and express informed consent before charging consumers on a recurring basis; the FTC's Negative Option Rule (16 C.F.R. Part 425) also regulates auto-renewal programs.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US regulate auto-renewal practices, with CN requiring advance conspicuous notice and prohibiting default opt-ins and US requiring clear disclosure and express consent under ROSCA.

fact_summary: 消费者被自动续费连续扣费但未收到到期提醒 / A consumer was charged through auto-renewal without an expiration reminder.
cn_claim: 自动续费应提前显著提醒消费者（电子商务法第19条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A trader who charges consumers on a recurring basis without clear disclosure of the auto-renewal terms and without timely renewal reminders may be in breach of contract for failure to obtain informed consent; the consumer may be entitled to a refund of unauthorized charges.
notes: Both CN and HK regulate auto-renewal practices, with CN imposing a statutory disclosure duty and HK applying contract-consent principles.

fact_summary: 劳务派遣工与正式工从事相同工作但工资及福利显著较低 / A dispatched worker performing the same work as a regular employee received significantly lower wages and benefits.
cn_claim: 被派遣劳动者享有与用工单位的劳动者同工同酬的权利（劳动合同法第63条）。
us_claim: The Equal Pay Act (29 U.S.C. § 206(d)) requires equal pay for equal work regardless of sex or other protected categories; however, pay differentials between temporary and permanent workers performing the same work are generally not prohibited unless the differential is based on a protected characteristic; state equal-pay laws may provide broader protection, and the National Labor Relations Act may protect workers who protest unequal treatment.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN mandates equal pay for dispatched and regular workers, while US anti-discrimination law permits temporary/permanent pay differentials absent a protected characteristic, creating a worker-protection asymmetry.

fact_summary: 劳务派遣工与正式工同工不同酬 / A dispatched worker received less pay than regular employees doing the same work.
cn_claim: 被派遣劳动者享有同工同酬权利（劳动合同法第63条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: The Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) does not contain a general equal-pay or comparable-worth provision; wage discrimination between contract and permanent staff is generally not prohibited unless based on a protected characteristic such as sex under the Sex Discrimination Ordinance (Cap. 480).
notes: CN mandates equal pay for dispatched workers while HK does not have a comparable statutory equal-pay-for-equal-work provision, creating a significant asymmetry in worker protection for temporary staff.

fact_summary: 某网红因被网友持续网络暴力患上抑郁症 / An internet celebrity developed depression due to sustained online harassment by followers.
cn_claim: 网络用户利用信息网络实施侮辱、诽谤等侵害他人人格权的行为应承担民事责任（民法典第1024条、第1025条、第1194条）；网络暴力致精神损害的应赔偿精神损失。
us_claim: Online harassment that causes severe emotional distress may give rise to claims for intentional infliction of emotional distress (IIED); the conduct must be extreme and outrageous and cause severe emotional distress; some states have enacted specific cyber-harassment and cyber-stalking statutes that provide criminal and civil remedies.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for online harassment causing emotional distress, with CN applying defamation and personality-rights torts and US applying IIED and state cyber-harassment statutes.

fact_summary: 某网红因持续网络暴力患上抑郁症 / An internet celebrity developed depression from sustained online harassment.
cn_claim: 网络暴力致精神损害的应赔偿精神损失（民法典第1024条、第1025条、第1194条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Online harassment may give rise to claims for defamation, harassment under the common law, and criminal intimidation; a victim who suffers psychiatric injury may claim damages for personal injury, including for recognized psychiatric conditions.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for online harassment causing psychiatric harm through defamation, harassment, and personal-injury torts.

fact_summary: 某网站未经许可抓取新闻媒体的报道文章用于自身内容聚合 / A website scraped news articles from media outlets and republished them without a license.
cn_claim: 未经许可转载他人作品的构成著作权侵权（著作权法第10条第一款第六项、第53条）；新闻聚合对时事性文章的转载应符合合理使用（著作权法第24条第四项）。
us_claim: News aggregation that reproduces copyrighted articles without a license may infringe the reproduction and distribution rights under 17 U.S.C. § 106; whether it constitutes fair use under § 107 depends on the four-factor test, with the amount used and the effect on the market being crucial factors; Associated Press v. Meltwater U.S. Holdings, Inc., 931 F. Supp. 2d 537 (S.D.N.Y. 2013).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US analyze news aggregation under copyright-law frameworks, with CN applying a statutory exception for current-affairs reporting and US applying fair-use analysis.

fact_summary: 网站未经许可抓取新闻媒体报道用于内容聚合 / A website scraped news articles for aggregation without a license.
cn_claim: 新闻聚合转载应合理使用（著作权法第24条第四项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: News aggregation that reproduces substantial parts of articles may infringe copyright under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528); a fair-dealing defense may be available for reporting current events under s.39, but the dealing must be fair and not exceed what is necessary for the purpose.
notes: Both CN and HK allow limited news-aggregation use under fair-use/fair-dealing exceptions, provided the use is fair and proportionate to the reporting purpose.

fact_summary: 被告人因生活困难在超市盗窃少量食品被抓获 / A defendant stole a small amount of food from a supermarket due to financial hardship.
cn_claim: 盗窃公私财物数额较大或多次盗窃的构成盗窃罪（刑法第264条）；对于情节显著轻微危害不大的不认为是犯罪（刑法第13条）。
us_claim: Petty theft of food due to necessity is generally not a defense in most U.S. jurisdictions, though prosecutorial discretion may be exercised not to charge de minimis thefts; the necessity defense is rarely successful for theft offenses; many states have diversion programs for low-level theft.
hk_claim: Theft is an offense regardless of the value of the property stolen under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210); however, prosecutorial discretion may be exercised not to prosecute trivial cases, and the court has wide sentencing discretion including absolute or conditional discharge.
notes: CN provides a statutory de minimis exception for trivial theft, while US/HK rely primarily on prosecutorial and judicial discretion rather than a necessity defense, creating a doctrinal asymmetry for poverty-driven petty theft.

fact_summary: 萌宠乐园的羊驼咬伤儿童 / A child was bitten by an alpaca at a petting zoo.
cn_claim: 动物园的动物造成他人损害的动物园应承担侵权责任但能证明尽到管理职责的除外（民法典第1248条）。
us_claim: An animal exhibitor or petting zoo owes a duty of reasonable care to protect visitors from foreseeable harm by animals; liability may be based on negligence or strict liability, with the animal's known propensities being a key factor; the plaintiff may need to prove the defendant knew or should have known of the animal's dangerous tendencies.
hk_claim: The keeper of an animal owes a duty of care to visitors; where the animal has known dangerous propensities, the keeper must take reasonable precautions; liability arises from the foreseeable risk of harm.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose liability on animal exhibitors for injuries caused by their animals, with CN applying a statutory fault-presumption and US/HK applying negligence and strict-liability frameworks.

fact_summary: 公司召开股东会时未按章程规定提供完整的会议资料供股东查阅 / A company failed to provide complete meeting materials for shareholder inspection before a general meeting.
cn_claim: 召开股东会会议应提前通知全体股东并应提供会议议题和必要的会议资料（公司法第41条第二款）；未提供会议资料的股东会决议可被撤销（公司法第22条第二款）。
us_claim: A company must provide shareholders with adequate information about matters to be voted on at shareholder meetings; failure to provide material information may invalidate the meeting and the resolutions passed; Delaware law requires full and fair disclosure of all material facts under the duty of candor.
hk_claim: A company must give notice of general meetings together with information reasonably necessary for members to make informed decisions; failure to provide adequate information may render the meeting and resolutions voidable.
notes: All three jurisdictions require companies to provide shareholders with adequate pre-meeting information, with resolutions passed without proper disclosure being voidable.

fact_summary: 执行程序中法院拍卖被执行人房产但拍卖公告期过短导致成交价显著低于市场价 / The court auctioned a debtor's property with an unduly short notice period, resulting in a sale price significantly below market value.
cn_claim: 法院拍卖被执行人财产应依法确定拍卖底价并公告拍卖事项（关于人民法院民事执行中拍卖、变卖财产的规定第4条、第7条）；公告期过短影响竞价的当事人可提出异议。
us_claim: A judicial sale conducted without adequate notice to the public may be set aside where the inadequate notice caused a sale price that was grossly inadequate; the debtor or a creditor may move to set aside the sale and request a new auction.
hk_claim: A judicial sale may be set aside where there was a material irregularity in the conduct of the sale that caused substantial prejudice; inadequate notice is a material irregularity if it caused the sale to achieve an unreasonably low price.
notes: All three jurisdictions permit challenges to judicial sales conducted with inadequate notice that results in a significantly depressed sale price.

fact_summary: A judgment debtor sought to stay enforcement of a foreign judgment pending appeal in the foreign jurisdiction / 被执行人申请在外国上诉待决期间中止执行外国判决
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: A court may stay proceedings to enforce a foreign judgment if the judgment is subject to appeal in the foreign jurisdiction and the judgment debtor demonstrates a likelihood of success on appeal and that irreparable harm would result from immediate enforcement; the Uniform Foreign-Country Money Judgments Recognition Act provides for a stay under analogous circumstances.
hk_claim: The court has discretion to stay enforcement of a foreign judgment pending an appeal in the foreign jurisdiction where the defendant demonstrates that the appeal has reasonable prospects of success and that enforcement would cause injustice.
notes: Both US and HK allow courts to stay enforcement of foreign judgments pending appeal, balancing the likelihood of appellate success against the risk of prejudice.

fact_summary: 供应商因原材料价格暴涨要求重新协商合同价格否则停止供货 / A supplier demanded renegotiation of the contract price due to a sharp increase in raw-material costs, threatening to halt supply.
cn_claim: 合同成立后发生订立合同时无法预见的重大变化且继续履行显失公平的，受不利影响的当事人可与对方重新协商（民法典第533条情势变更）；协商不成的可请求法院变更或解除合同。
us_claim: A supplier that threatens to stop delivery to force a price renegotiation may breach the contract and the implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing; the Uniform Commercial Code § 2-209 requires an agreement modifying a contract to meet its own statute of frauds; a modification extracted under duress or threat of breach is unenforceable.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN provides a statutory hardship-renegotiation mechanism, while US treats the threat-to-stop-supply as a potential breach of contract and the duty of good faith, creating different remedies paths for supply-contract renegotiation.

fact_summary: 供应商因原材料价格暴涨要求重新协商合同价格否则停止供货 / A supplier demanded price renegotiation under threat of stopping supply due to raw-material cost spikes.
cn_claim: 情势变更时可重新协商或请求法院变更解除合同（民法典第533条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Hong Kong common law does not recognize a general doctrine of hardship or change of circumstances allowing renegotiation; a supplier who threatens to breach to force renegotiation may itself be in repudiatory breach, entitling the buyer to terminate and claim damages.
notes: CN provides a statutory hardship-renegotiation mechanism (Art. 533), while HK does not recognize a general hardship doctrine, treating threats to breach as repudiatory breach, creating a significant remedies asymmetry.

fact_summary: 企业年会抽奖中奖后公司以临时工不参与抽奖为由拒绝兑奖 / After winning a prize in the company's annual raffle, a temporary worker was denied the prize on the ground that temps were excluded from the draw.
cn_claim: 用人单位在组织员工福利活动时应公平对待全体员工，不得歧视劳务派遣员工或临时工（劳动合同法第63条同工同酬原则）；已公布抽奖规则未排除临时工的不予兑奖可能构成违约。
us_claim: An employer that offers a prize and then refuses to award it on the basis of employment status may be liable for breach of a unilateral contract; if the employee relied on the promise and performed the required act, the employer may be estopped from denying the prize.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies when employers renege on promised benefits based on worker classification, with CN applying equal-treatment principles and US applying unilateral-contract and promissory-estoppel doctrines.

fact_summary: 企业年会抽中奖后公司以临时工不参与抽奖为由拒绝兑奖 / After winning a company raffle, a temp worker was denied the prize.
cn_claim: 用人单位应公平对待全体员工（劳动合同法第63条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An employer who makes a representation of a prize and induces reliance may be estopped from denying the prize; the employee may also have a claim for breach of contract if the raffle terms did not exclude temporary workers.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for workers denied promised benefits, with CN applying equal-treatment principles and HK applying estoppel and breach-of-contract doctrines.

fact_summary: 某可穿戴设备公司在用户睡眠期间持续采集心率等健康数据但未告知完整用途 / A wearable-device company continuously collected health data including heart rate during users' sleep without fully disclosing the purposes.
cn_claim: 处理敏感个人信息应取得个人单独同意并告知处理目的、方式和范围（个人信息保护法第29条、第30条）。
us_claim: Collection of health and biometric data through wearables is regulated by the FTC Act § 5 for unfair or deceptive practices and by HIPAA if the data is collected by a covered entity; state biometric laws such as BIPA also impose notice-and-consent requirements.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require notice and consent for wearable-device health-data collection, with CN applying PIPL and US applying FTC and state biometric laws.

fact_summary: 某可穿戴设备公司在用户睡眠期间持续采集心率健康数据但未告知完整用途 / A wearable-device company continuously collected heart-rate health data during sleep without full disclosure of the purposes.
cn_claim: 处理敏感个人信息应取得单独同意并告知完整用途（个人信息保护法第29条、第30条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Continuous collection of health data through a wearable device without full disclosure of the purposes constitutes unfair collection of personal data under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) Data Protection Principle 1; the data user must provide a Personal Information Collection Statement and obtain prescribed consent.
notes: Both CN and HK require full disclosure and consent for continuous health-data collection, with CN applying PIPL and HK applying the PDPO.

fact_summary: 被告人在共同犯罪中负责策划但未亲临现场 / A defendant planned a criminal operation but did not attend the scene of the crime.
cn_claim: 组织、领导犯罪集团进行犯罪活动的或在共同犯罪中起主要作用的是主犯（刑法第26条）。
us_claim: A person who aids, abets, counsels, commands, induces, or procures the commission of an offense is punishable as a principal under 18 U.S.C. § 2; a planner who does not personally execute the crime may be liable as an accomplice or under conspiracy charges under 18 U.S.C. § 371.
hk_claim: A person who plans a crime and intends it to be carried out by others is a secondary party and may be liable for the full offense as an aider, abettor, counselor, or procurer.
notes: All three jurisdictions hold planners liable for crimes committed by others, with CN treating the planner as a principal where they played a leading role and US/HK treating the planner as an accomplice liable as a principal.

fact_summary: 某综艺节目未经许可使用了知名音乐作品作为背景音乐 / A variety show used a well-known musical composition as background music without permission.
cn_claim: 未经许可公开表演他人音乐作品的构成侵犯表演权（著作权法第10条第一款第九项）；广播电台、电视台播放他人已发表的作品可依法律规定不经许可但应支付报酬（著作权法第46条第二款但书）。
us_claim: Public performance of a copyrighted musical work without a license infringes the performance right under 17 U.S.C. § 106(4); a television broadcaster must obtain a synchronization license for using music in audiovisual works and a public-performance license from the performing-rights organization (ASCAP/BMI/SESAC).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require licenses for public performance of musical works, with CN providing a limited statutory-license exception for broadcasters and US requiring blanket licenses from PROs.

fact_summary: 综艺节目未经许可使用知名音乐作品作为背景音乐 / A variety show used a well-known song as background music without permission.
cn_claim: 未经许可公开表演音乐作品侵犯表演权（著作权法第10条第一款第九项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Public performance of a musical work without a license infringes the copyright in the musical work under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528) s.22; broadcasters must obtain a license from the copyright owner or the collecting society.
notes: Both CN and HK protect musical-performance rights and require broadcasters to obtain licenses, with CN providing limited statutory exceptions and HK requiring licenses through collecting societies.

fact_summary: 网购平台的海外代购商家被海关查扣后拒绝退款 / An overseas-purchasing agent on an e-commerce platform refused to refund consumers after the goods were detained by customs.
cn_claim: 代购合同属于委托合同；因代购方原因导致货物被海关查扣的消费者可要求代购方承担违约责任（民法典第577条、第919条）。
us_claim: A purchasing agent who fails to deliver goods due to customs seizure generally bears the risk of loss if the seizure resulted from the agent's failure to comply with customs regulations; the consumer may seek a refund and damages for breach of contract or restitution for unjust enrichment.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US allow consumers to recover from purchasing agents where goods are lost due to the agent's failure, with CN applying agency-contract principles and US applying breach-of-contract and unjust-enrichment remedies.

fact_summary: 网购海外代购被海关查扣后拒绝退款 / An e-commerce overseas-purchasing agent refused to refund after customs detained the goods.
cn_claim: 因代购方原因导致货物被扣押的可要求代购方承担违约责任（民法典第577条、第919条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A purchasing agent who fails to deliver goods bears the risk of loss unless the contract provides otherwise; the consumer may claim damages for breach of contract and a refund of the purchase price.
notes: Both CN and HK provide consumer remedies against purchasing agents for non-delivery of goods, with CN applying agency-contract law and HK applying breach-of-contract principles.

fact_summary: 露营基地未设置防野兽设施致露营者夜间被野猪攻击受伤 / A campsite operator failed to install wildlife barriers, resulting in a wild boar attacking a camper at night.
cn_claim: 露营地经营者应尽到安全保障义务（民法典第1198条第一款）；对已知存在野猪出没的地区未采取防护措施致人损害的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A campsite operator owes a duty of reasonable care to protect campers from foreseeable wildlife hazards; failure to warn of known animal dangers or to provide reasonable protective measures constitutes negligence; the operator's liability depends on the foreseeability of the animal attack.
hk_claim: An occupier of a campsite owes a common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314) to take reasonable steps to protect visitors from foreseeable wildlife dangers.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose safety duties on outdoor-recreation operators to protect visitors from foreseeable wildlife hazards.

fact_summary: 上市公司未在规定期限内披露年度报告 / A listed company failed to publish its annual report within the statutory deadline.
cn_claim: 上市公司应在每一会计年度结束之日起4个月内报送并公告年度报告（证券法第79条）；未按期披露的证监会可责令改正并处罚款（证券法第197条）。
us_claim: A public company must file its annual report on Form 10-K within the prescribed deadline under the Securities Exchange Act (15 U.S.C. § 78m(a)); failure to timely file may result in SEC enforcement action, delisting proceedings, and loss of eligibility to use short-form registration statements.
hk_claim: A listed company must publish its annual report within four months after the end of the financial year under the Listing Rules; failure to do so may result in trading suspension and enforcement action by the Stock Exchange and the Securities and Futures Commission.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose deadlines for annual-report publication and prescribe sanctions for non-compliance, including regulatory fines, trading suspensions, and delisting.

fact_summary: 某县教育局以资源整合为由关闭农村小学但未提供校车或住宿安排 / A county education bureau closed a rural elementary school citing resource consolidation but provided no school-bus or boarding arrangements.
cn_claim: 适龄儿童、少年有接受义务教育的权利（宪法第46条；义务教育法第4条）；撤并学校应保障学生就近入学的权利（义务教育法第12条）。
us_claim: The right to education is not a fundamental right under the federal Constitution, but state constitutions generally guarantee a right to public education; school-closure decisions are subject to state-law requirements and equal-protection review; San Antonio Independent School District v. Rodriguez, 411 U.S. 1 (1973).
hk_claim: The Basic Law (Art. 136-137) provides for the right to education; school-closure decisions must be reasonable and made with due regard to students' educational needs and accessibility.
notes: All three jurisdictions recognize a right to education, but the level of constitutional protection and the standard of review for school closures vary significantly.

fact_summary: 案外人因错误保全导致其财产被查封造成经营损失 / A third party's property was seized under a wrongful preservation order, causing business losses.
cn_claim: 因申请错误造成被申请人或案外人损失的申请人应承担赔偿责任（民事诉讼法第105条）。
us_claim: A party who wrongfully obtains a preliminary injunction or attachment may be liable for damages under the injunction bond required by Fed. R. Civ. P. 65(c); the damages are generally limited to the amount of the bond; malicious prosecution and abuse-of-process claims may also be available.
hk_claim: A party who obtains an interlocutory injunction (including a Mareva order) must give an undertaking in damages; if the injunction is later discharged, the applicant is liable on the undertaking for losses caused to the respondent and affected third parties.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose liability on applicants for losses caused by wrongful prejudgment asset freezes, protecting respondents and third parties.

fact_summary: 企业通过向避税地关联方支付高额服务费转移利润 / An enterprise shifted profits by paying excessive service fees to an affiliate in a tax haven.
cn_claim: 企业与关联方的业务往来不符合独立交易原则而减少企业或关联方应纳税收入或所得额的税务机关有权按照合理方法调整（企业所得税法第41条）。
us_claim: Transfer-pricing rules under I.R.C. § 482 authorize the IRS to adjust service-fee payments between related parties that are not at arm's length; the services must have actually been rendered and the charges must reflect arm's-length pricing.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US have robust transfer-pricing rules scrutinizing service-fee payments to offshore affiliates, requiring arm's-length terms and genuine service provision.

fact_summary: 企业通过向避税地关联方支付高额服务费转移利润 / An enterprise shifted profits through excessive service fees to a tax-haven affiliate.
cn_claim: 关联交易不符合独立交易原则的可纳税调整（企业所得税法第41条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Hong Kong's transfer-pricing rules under the Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap. 112) s.50AAK apply to service-fee transactions between associated persons; the arm's-length principle applies and the Inland Revenue Department may adjust profits accordingly.
notes: Both CN and HK apply the arm's-length principle to service-fee payments to offshore affiliates, with CN applying the Enterprise Income Tax Law and HK applying the Inland Revenue Ordinance.

fact_summary: 某外资银行将境内客户征信信息传输至境外征信机构用于全球风险评估 / A foreign bank transmitted domestic customer credit information to an overseas credit bureau for global risk assessment.
cn_claim: 向境外提供个人信息的应通过出境安全评估或订立标准合同并取得个人单独同意（个人信息保护法第38条、第39条）；金融客户信用信息属于敏感个人信息。
us_claim: Cross-border transfer of customer credit information is regulated under the Fair Credit Reporting Act (15 U.S.C. § 1681 et seq.) and the Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act (15 U.S.C. § 6801); financial institutions must disclose data-sharing practices and provide opt-out rights for certain information sharing with non-affiliated third parties.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN requires security assessment and individual consent for cross-border credit-information transfer, while US regulates under FCRA and GLBA with opt-out mechanisms, creating a regulatory asymmetry in cross-border financial-data controls.

fact_summary: 夫妻协议离婚约定一方放弃探视权五年后又申请恢复 / In a divorce agreement, one parent waived visitation rights; five years later, that parent applied to restore them.
cn_claim: 离婚后不直接抚养子女的父或母有探望子女的权利（民法典第1086条第一款）；探望权是法定权利不得协议永久放弃；因放弃后申请恢复的法院应根据有利于子女原则裁定。
us_claim: Visitation rights are not subject to permanent waiver because courts retain continuing jurisdiction to modify custody and visitation orders in the best interests of the child; a parent may petition for modification of visitation based on a material change in circumstances.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US treat visitation/parenting-time rights as modifiable based on the child's best interests, with neither permitting permanent waiver that would bar later restoration.

fact_summary: 夫妻协议离婚约定放弃探视权五年后申请恢复 / A parent who waived visitation rights in a divorce agreement applied to restore them five years later.
cn_claim: 探望权不得协议永久放弃；法院应依有利于子女原则裁定（民法典第1086条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: The court's paramount consideration in custody and access matters is the welfare of the child; a parent who previously agreed to forgo access may apply to the court for an access order, and the court will determine the application based on the child's best interests at the time of the application.
notes: Both CN and HK treat access/visitation as modifiable based on the child's welfare, with neither permitting permanent binding waiver.

fact_summary: 商业区内的商家因不满街道办组织的大型商业活动封路影响的正常经营起诉要求赔偿 / Businesses sued because a sub-district office closed roads for a large commercial event, disrupting normal operations.
cn_claim: 行政机关组织大型活动应合理规划并尽量减少对周边商户正常经营的影响；行政行为明显不当的对经营者造成的损失可请求行政补偿或赔偿。
us_claim: A business that suffers loss due to a government-ordered street closure that substantially interferes with access may have a claim for inverse condemnation or a temporary regulatory taking under the Fifth Amendment; the court balances the government's interest against the economic impact on the property owner; Arkansas Game and Fish Commission v. United States, 568 U.S. 23 (2012).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US may require compensation when government action substantially interferes with business operations, with CN applying administrative-compensation principles and US applying regulatory-takings analysis.

fact_summary: 园林工人在修剪树枝时树枝掉落砸坏停在下方的私家车 / A tree-trimmer's falling branch damaged a private car parked below.
cn_claim: 因林木折断造成他人损害的所有人或管理人不能证明自己无过错的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1255条）。
us_claim: A tree-trimmer who drops a branch onto a parked car is liable for negligence; the standard of care requires reasonable precautions to prevent damage to nearby property; failure to properly secure the work zone or warn vehicle owners constitutes breach.
hk_claim: The occupier or person carrying out tree-trimming operations owes a duty of care to avoid causing damage to neighboring property; failure to take reasonable precautions against falling debris constitutes negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose a duty of care on tree-trimming operators to protect nearby property from falling debris.

fact_summary: 挪用救灾款修建政府办公楼 / Relief funds designated for disaster victims were diverted to construct a government office building.
cn_claim: 挪用用于救灾救济的款物归个人使用或用于其他用途的从重处罚（刑法第273条挪用特定款物罪；第384条挪用公款罪）。
us_claim: Misapplication of federal disaster-relief funds may be prosecuted under the Fraud and False Statements statute (18 U.S.C. § 1001), the Theft of Government Property statute (18 U.S.C. § 641), and the Stafford Act (42 U.S.C. § 5121 et seq.), which imposes specific penalties for misuse of disaster funds.
hk_claim: Diversion of public funds designated for relief purposes may constitute misconduct in public office or theft under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210); specific statutory offenses may also apply under the relevant appropriation ordinances.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the diversion of disaster-relief funds from their intended purposes, with CN providing an aggravated specific-misappropriation offense, US applying federal fraud and theft statutes, and HK applying common-law and statutory offenses.

fact_summary: 游戏外挂开发者破解游戏客户端并销售自动瞄准软件 / A game-cheat developer reverse-engineered the game client and sold aimbot software.
cn_claim: 故意避开或破坏著作权人为保护其软件著作权而采取的技术措施的构成著作权侵权（著作权法第48条第六项）；销售外挂软件的还可能构成不正当竞争（反不正当竞争法第12条）。
us_claim: Circumventing technological protection measures in a video game to create cheating software violates the DMCA anti-circumvention provisions (17 U.S.C. § 1201(a)(1)(A)); creating and selling aimbot software that modifies the game's code may also infringe the copyright owner's exclusive right to prepare derivative works under § 106(2).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit circumvention of technological protection measures to create game-cheating software, with CN using the Copyright Law and anti-unfair-competition law and US using the DMCA.

fact_summary: 游戏外挂开发者破解游戏客户端并销售自动瞄准软件 / A game-cheat developer reverse-engineered the client and sold aimbot software.
cn_claim: 避开技术措施破解游戏软件并提供外挂构成著作权侵权及不正当竞争（著作权法第48条第六项；反不正当竞争法第12条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Circumventing effective technological protection measures applied to a computer program constitutes an offense under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528) s.273; distributing cheating software that circumvents TPMs is prohibited; additionally, the cheat software may infringe the copyright in the game's code.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit circumvention of technological protection measures in games and the distribution of cheating software through copyright and anti-circumvention laws.

fact_summary: 消费者通过微信向商家转账预付款后商家失联 / A consumer transferred a prepayment to a merchant via WeChat and the merchant subsequently disappeared.
cn_claim: 经营者以预收款方式提供商品或服务未按约定提供的应退回预付款并承担利息及合理费用（消费者权益保护法第53条）；商家失联的消费者可向公安机关报案或向平台主张权利。
us_claim: A merchant who accepts prepayment and then disappears has committed fraud; the consumer may seek a chargeback through the payment network, file a complaint with the FTC, and may pursue a civil fraud claim; platforms may have liability under state consumer-protection laws for facilitating fraudulent transactions.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for consumers who prepay and the merchant disappears, with CN imposing a statutory refund obligation and US providing chargeback and fraud remedies.

fact_summary: 消费者微信转账预付款后商家失联 / A consumer prepaid via WeChat and the merchant disappeared.
cn_claim: 预收款未按约定提供的应退回预付款并承担费用（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A merchant who accepts prepayment and thereafter disappears commits fraud; the consumer may report the matter to police and the Customs and Excise Department, and may pursue civil remedies for breach of contract and fraudulent misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for prepayment fraud, with CN imposing a statutory refund duty and HK applying criminal-fraud and civil-contract remedies.

fact_summary: 小区化粪池盖板破损致儿童坠入受伤 / A child fell into a septic tank through a broken cover plate in a residential compound.
cn_claim: 窨井等地下设施造成他人损害的，管理人不能证明尽到管理职责的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1258条第二款）。
us_claim: A property manager that fails to maintain safe covers on underground utility access points is liable for negligence; the duty extends to protecting children from foreseeable hazards under the attractive-nuisance doctrine where applicable.
hk_claim: An occupier or property manager owes a duty of care to maintain the premises in a safe condition; failure to repair a broken septic-tank cover is a breach of that duty, particularly where children are foreseeably at risk.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose a duty on property managers to maintain underground utility covers in safe condition, with heightened care where children are foreseeable visitors.

fact_summary: 被告人在法庭上公然辱骂公诉人 / A defendant openly insulted the prosecutor in court.
cn_claim: 在法庭审理中侮辱、诽谤公诉人的严重扰乱法庭秩序的构成扰乱法庭秩序罪（刑法第309条）。
us_claim: Contempt of court sanctions, including summary punishment, may be imposed for disrespectful conduct directed at court personnel including prosecutors during proceedings; Illinois v. Allen, 397 U.S. 337 (1970); the court may also revoke bail or impose additional restrictions.
hk_claim: Insulting or abusive conduct toward a prosecutor in open court constitutes contempt of court and is punishable summarily by the judge; it may also constitute criminal intimidation if threats are involved.
notes: All three jurisdictions sanction in-court insults toward prosecutors through contempt powers or specific criminal offenses to protect the dignity and order of court proceedings.

fact_summary: 公司未经股东会决议为控股股东的个人债务提供抵押担保 / A company provided a mortgage guarantee for the controlling shareholder's personal debts without a shareholder resolution.
cn_claim: 公司为股东提供担保的应由股东会决议且该股东不得参加表决（公司法第16条第二款、第三款）。
us_claim: A corporation's guarantee of a controlling shareholder's personal debt is a conflict-of-interest transaction subject to entire-fairness review; the transaction must be approved by disinterested directors or shareholders, or proven entirely fair; the controlling shareholder bears the burden of proof.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require independent approval for corporate guarantees of controlling-shareholder debts, with CN mandating non-interested-shareholder approval and US applying the entire-fairness standard.

fact_summary: 公司未经股东会决议为控股股东的个人债务提供抵押担保 / A company provided a mortgage guarantee for the controlling shareholder's personal debts without shareholder approval.
cn_claim: 为股东提供担保应由股东会决议且该股东不得参加表决（公司法第16条第二款、第三款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A company may provide a guarantee for a director or controlling shareholder only with the approval of disinterested members or with court sanction; the transaction must be fair to the company and the non-interested members.
notes: Both CN and HK require disinterested-shareholder approval for corporate guarantees of controlling-shareholder obligations, with CN mandating statutory non-participation and HK requiring disinterested approval or court sanction.

fact_summary: 外国法院判决的债权人申请执行债务人在中国境内的财产 / A creditor under a foreign judgment sought to enforce the judgment against the debtor's property located in China.
cn_claim: 外国法院的生效判决需要中国法院承认和执行的当事人可直接向有管辖权的中级人民法院申请承认和执行（民事诉讼法第288条、第289条）。
us_claim: Recognition and enforcement of foreign-country money judgments is governed by the Uniform Foreign-Country Money Judgments Recognition Act; the judgment must be final, conclusive, and enforceable where rendered; the court will not review the merits of the foreign judgment.
hk_claim: A foreign judgment may be enforced at common law by bringing an action on the judgment; the judgment must be final and conclusive on the merits and must be for a fixed sum of money; enforcement may also be sought under the Foreign Judgments (Reciprocal Enforcement) Ordinance (Cap. 319).
notes: All three jurisdictions provide mechanisms for recognition and enforcement of foreign-country money judgments, with CN applying the CPL, US applying the Uniform Act, and HK applying common law and the Reciprocal Enforcement Ordinance.

fact_summary: 租户在出租屋内从事非法传销活动被查处 / A tenant was investigated for operating an illegal pyramid scheme from the rented premises.
cn_claim: 承租人未按照约定的方法或租赁物的性质使用租赁物致使租赁物受到损失的出租人可解除合同并要求赔偿损失（民法典第711条）。
us_claim: A tenant who uses leased premises for illegal purposes breaches the lease agreement; most residential leases contain an illegal-use clause; the landlord may terminate the tenancy and evict the tenant through summary proceedings; the landlord may also face nuisance-abatement actions by local authorities.
hk_claim: A tenant who uses the premises for illegal purposes is in breach of the tenancy agreement; the landlord may forfeit the lease and recover possession; the landlord should take prompt action to terminate the tenancy to avoid potential criminal liability for knowingly permitting illegal use.
notes: All three jurisdictions allow landlords to terminate tenancies where the tenant uses the premises for illegal purposes.

fact_summary: 公司因员工在社交媒体上曝光公司违反劳动法行为将其开除 / A company terminated an employee for exposing the company's labor-law violations on social media.
cn_claim: 用人单位不得因劳动者举报违法行为而解除劳动合同（劳动合同法第39条将举报排除于解除事由之外）；劳动者举报用人单位违法行为的属受法律保护的正当行为。
us_claim: Termination of an employee for reporting violations of labor law constitutes unlawful retaliation; the employee may file a complaint with the Department of Labor under various whistleblower-protection provisions including the Occupational Safety and Health Act (29 U.S.C. § 660(c)); reporting labor-law violations on social media may constitute protected concerted activity under the National Labor Relations Act if it relates to terms and conditions of employment.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US protect employees from retaliation for reporting employer misconduct, with CN codifying the exclusion of whistleblowing from lawful termination grounds and US applying OSHA and NLRA anti-retaliation provisions.

fact_summary: 公司因员工在社交媒体曝光公司违反劳动法行为将其开除 / A company terminated an employee for exposing labor-law violations on social media.
cn_claim: 用人单位不得因举报违法行为而解除劳动合同。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An employee who is dismissed for reporting the employer's legal violations may claim wrongful dismissal and may seek remedies for breach of the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57); reporting misconduct is a protected activity and dismissal for whistleblowing may be unreasonable.
notes: Both CN and HK protect employees from retaliatory dismissal for whistleblowing, with CN codifying the protection and HK treating such dismissal as unreasonable under the Employment Ordinance.

fact_summary: 某银行未经客户同意将其信用卡消费数据提供给保险公司用于产品推荐 / A bank provided customer credit-card transaction data to an insurance company for product recommendation without consent.
cn_claim: 金融机构应严格保护客户信息，未经客户同意不得向第三方提供（个人信息保护法第23条；商业银行法第29条第一款）。
us_claim: The Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act (15 U.S.C. § 6801 et seq.) requires financial institutions to provide customers with a privacy notice and an opportunity to opt out before sharing nonpublic personal information with non-affiliated third parties for marketing purposes.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US restrict financial institutions from sharing customer transaction data with third parties for marketing without consent, with CN requiring affirmative consent and US requiring opt-out rights under GLBA.

fact_summary: 某银行未经客户同意将信用卡消费数据提供给保险公司用于产品推荐 / A bank provided credit-card transaction data to an insurer for product recommendation without consent.
cn_claim: 未经同意不得向第三方提供客户信息（个人信息保护法第23条；商业银行法第29条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A bank that discloses customer transaction data to an insurer for marketing without the customer's prescribed consent may breach the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) Data Protection Principle 3 and the Banking Ordinance (Cap. 155) and the Code of Banking Practice's customer-confidentiality requirements.
notes: Both CN and HK restrict banks from sharing customer financial data with third parties without consent, with CN applying the Commercial Banking Law and PIPL and HK applying the PDPO and the Banking Ordinance.

fact_summary: 某市供水管道因年久失修发生爆裂淹没居民地下室 / An aging municipal water main burst and flooded residents' basements.
cn_claim: 供水管道等公共设施的管护单位未尽到安全管理义务造成他人损害的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1258条第一款；民法典第1198条）。
us_claim: A municipality that fails to maintain its water infrastructure in a reasonably safe condition may be liable for negligence; the discretionary-function exception to governmental tort liability may not apply to routine maintenance failures; Indian Towing Co. v. United States, 350 U.S. 61 (1955).
hk_claim: A public authority that fails to maintain water mains may be liable in negligence for resulting property damage; the authority owes a duty of care to persons foreseeably affected by infrastructure failures.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose liability on public authorities for property damage caused by negligent infrastructure maintenance.

fact_summary: 公司董事利用职务便利挪用公司资金进行期货投机并造成巨额亏损 / A director misappropriated company funds for futures speculation, causing substantial losses.
cn_claim: 董事挪用公司资金构成犯罪的追究刑事责任（刑法第272条第一款挪用资金罪）；给公司造成损失的应承担赔偿责任（公司法第148条第一款第一项）。
us_claim: A director who misappropriates corporate funds for personal speculation breaches the duty of loyalty and may be liable for fraud, conversion, and breach of fiduciary duty; criminal prosecution may follow under state embezzlement statutes and federal wire-fraud or securities-fraud statutes.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US impose criminal and civil liability on directors who misappropriate corporate funds, with CN providing specific criminal statutes and US applying embezzlement and fraud statutes plus fiduciary-duty claims.

fact_summary: 公司董事利用职务便利挪用公司资金进行期货投机造成巨额亏损 / A director misappropriated company funds for futures speculation causing substantial losses.
cn_claim: 董事挪用公司资金构成犯罪的追究刑事责任（刑法第272条第一款；公司法第148条第一款第一项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A director who misappropriates company funds commits theft under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210) and breaches fiduciary duties owed to the company; the director must account for the misappropriated funds and is liable for resulting losses.
notes: Both CN and HK impose criminal and civil liability on directors who misappropriate corporate funds, with CN providing specific statutory offenses and HK applying the Theft Ordinance and fiduciary-duty claims.

fact_summary: 被告人在逃避追捕过程中驾车冲撞导致追捕民警受伤 / While fleeing arrest, a defendant rammed a police vehicle with his car, injuring pursuing officers.
cn_claim: 以暴力方法阻碍国家机关工作人员依法执行职务的构成妨害公务罪（刑法第277条第一款）；造成执法人员受伤的从重处罚。
us_claim: Assaulting a federal officer during the performance of official duties is prohibited under 18 U.S.C. § 111; using a vehicle as a deadly weapon against pursuing officers may be charged as aggravated assault and possibly attempted murder under state law.
hk_claim: Assaulting a police officer in the execution of duty constitutes an offense under the Police Force Ordinance (Cap. 232) s.63 and the Offences Against the Person Ordinance (Cap. 212).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize assaults on law enforcement during pursuit with enhanced penalties, applying specific statutory provisions for obstructing or assaulting officers.

fact_summary: 某食品公司在产品包装上模仿知名品牌的装潢设计 / A food company imitated the packaging design of a well-known brand on its product.
cn_claim: 擅自使用与他人有一定影响的商品包装、装潢等相同或近似的标识引人误认为是他人商品的构成不正当竞争（反不正当竞争法第6条第一项）。
us_claim: Trade-dress infringement under Section 43(a) of the Lanham Act (15 U.S.C. § 1125(a)) requires proof that the trade dress is distinctive and nonfunctional and that the defendant's use creates a likelihood of confusion; product-packaging trade dress may be protected without proof of secondary meaning if the design is inherently distinctive.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US protect product-packaging trade dress against imitation, with CN applying anti-unfair-competition law and US applying Lanham Act § 43(a).

fact_summary: 某食品公司在产品包装上模仿知名品牌的装潢设计 / A food company imitated a well-known brand's packaging design.
cn_claim: 擅自使用他人有一定影响的装潢构成不正当竞争（反不正当竞争法第6条第一项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A trader who uses packaging sufficiently similar to a competitor's get-up that causes consumer confusion may be liable for passing off; the plaintiff must establish goodwill, misrepresentation, and damage.
notes: Both CN and HK protect product packaging against imitation, with CN applying statutory unfair-competition law and HK applying the common-law tort of passing off.

fact_summary: 被执行人将银行存款从被冻结账户转移至新开账户 / The judgment debtor transferred bank deposits from a frozen account to a newly-opened account.
cn_claim: 被执行人转移已被冻结的财产的法院可根据情节轻重予以罚款、拘留；构成犯罪的追究刑事责任（民事诉讼法第114条第一款第六项）。
us_claim: A judgment debtor who transfers funds from a frozen account violates the court's restraining order and is in contempt of court; the transfer may also constitute fraudulent conveyance and the transferee bank may be liable if it knowingly facilitated the transfer.
hk_claim: A person who deals with assets in defiance of a freezing order (Mareva injunction) is in contempt of court and may be committed to prison; the transaction is voidable as against the party who obtained the freezing order.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat violation of asset-freezing orders through fund transfers as contempt of court with serious sanctions including fines and imprisonment.

fact_summary: 购房者购买商品房后发现面积严重缩水 / A homebuyer discovered the apartment's actual floor area was substantially less than the contract specified.
cn_claim: 交付使用房屋的套内建筑面积与合同约定不符的买受人可请求解除合同或要求出卖人返还已付购房款及利息并赔偿损失（商品房买卖合同司法解释第14条）。
us_claim: A material shortage in square footage in a real-estate sale constitutes a breach of contract; the buyer may seek rescission, specific performance with an abatement of the purchase price, or damages measured by the difference in value.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide strong remedies for significant shortfalls in apartment floor area, with CN codifying a right to rescission and damages and US applying material-breach analysis.

fact_summary: 购房者购买商品房后发现面积严重缩水 / A homebuyer discovered the apartment's floor area was substantially less than contracted.
cn_claim: 面积不符的可解除合同并索赔（商品房买卖合同司法解释第14条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A purchaser of residential property that is materially smaller than the contract specifies may claim damages for breach of contract and, where the shortage goes to the root of the contract, may be entitled to rescind.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for significant shortages in apartment size, with CN codifying specific remedies and HK applying contract-law principles.

fact_summary: 儿童在社区游乐场使用年久失修的滑梯时摔伤 / A child was injured using a deteriorated slide at a community playground.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应按照约定和物业的使用性质妥善维修养护业主共有部分（民法典第942条）；游乐设施未定期维护致人损害的物业公司应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A playground owner or manager has a duty to inspect and maintain playground equipment in a reasonably safe condition; failure to repair or replace deteriorated equipment constitutes negligence; the Consumer Product Safety Commission's playground-safety guidelines may be used as evidence of the standard of care.
hk_claim: An occupier who provides playground equipment owes a common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314) to maintain the equipment in safe condition; failure to repair deteriorated equipment is a breach of duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose a duty on playground operators to maintain equipment in safe condition and are liable for injuries caused by deteriorated equipment.

fact_summary: 被告人明知是犯罪所得的赃车仍低价购买后转售 / A defendant knowingly purchased a stolen car at a low price and resold it.
cn_claim: 明知是犯罪所得的赃物而予以收购或代为销售的构成掩饰、隐瞒犯罪所得罪（刑法第312条第一款）。
us_claim: Receiving stolen property with the knowledge that it is stolen is a crime under state law; transporting the stolen vehicle across state lines may be prosecuted under the National Motor Vehicle Theft Act (18 U.S.C. § 2313).
hk_claim: Handling stolen goods, including receiving or undertaking to assist in the retention of stolen goods, is an offense under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210) s.24.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the knowing purchase and resale of stolen goods, applying specific offenses for handling or concealing criminal proceeds.

fact_summary: 上市公司在年报中虚增利润被证监会查处后股价暴跌 / After a listed company was found to have inflated profits in its annual report, its stock price collapsed.
cn_claim: 上市公司虚假陈述给投资者造成损失的应承担赔偿责任（证券法第85条）；投资者在实施日至揭露日期间买入并在揭露日后卖出或继续持有遭受的损失应予赔偿。
us_claim: A public company that makes material misstatements in its financial reports violates Section 10(b) of the Securities Exchange Act and Rule 10b-5; investors who traded during the fraud period and suffered losses may recover under the fraud-on-the-market theory; loss causation must be established.
hk_claim: A listed company that publishes false or misleading information in its annual report is liable to compensate investors who relied on the information and suffered loss under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) s.277.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide civil remedies for investors harmed by false financial reporting, with CN, US, and HK each imposing statutory disclosure-fraud liability.

fact_summary: 销售人员经常在下班后通过微信回应客户咨询，主张加班费 / A salesperson frequently responded to client inquiries via WeChat after working hours and claimed overtime.
cn_claim: 在非工作时间内通过社交媒体从事工作性事务且具有周期性和固定性的可认定为加班（劳动法第44条；最高人民法院司法解释第42条）。
us_claim: Responding to work-related communications outside of scheduled hours is compensable work time under the FLSA if the employer knows or has reason to believe the work is being performed; de minimis time may be excluded, but regular after-hours work must be compensated.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US are developing frameworks for compensating after-hours digital work, with CN requiring periodic and fixed character for overtime and US applying FLSA compensable-work-time analysis.

fact_summary: 销售人员下班后通过微信回应客户咨询主张加班费 / A salesperson claimed overtime for after-hours WeChat client communications.
cn_claim: 周期性和固定性的非工作时间工作事务可认定为加班（劳动法第44条；司法解释第42条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Whether after-hours work communications constitute compensable overtime depends on the employment contract; if the employer required the employee to respond, the time may be compensable; however, the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) does not prescribe a statutory overtime rate.
notes: CN provides statutory overtime protection, while HK leaves overtime to contract, creating a remedies asymmetry for after-hours digital work.

fact_summary: 被告人因不满法院判决在执行阶段威胁执行法官 / A defendant threatened the enforcement judge after an unfavorable judgment.
cn_claim: 对司法工作人员进行威胁、侮辱、诽谤的应依法追究法律责任（刑法第309条扰乱法庭秩序罪；治安管理处罚法第42条）。
us_claim: Threatening a federal judge is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 115 (influencing, impeding, or retaliating against a federal official) and 18 U.S.C. § 876 (mailing threatening communications); enhanced penalties apply for threats against judicial officers.
hk_claim: Threatening a judge constitutes criminal intimidation and may be prosecuted under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200) and as contempt of court.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize threats against judges with enhanced penalties, protecting the independence and safety of the judiciary.

fact_summary: 主播与直播平台签订独家合作协议后又在其他平台直播 / A streamer signed an exclusive agreement with a livestreaming platform but later broadcast on a competing platform.
cn_claim: 合同当事人一方不履行合同义务的应承担违约责任（民法典第577条）；经纪公司可依据合同约定主张违约金赔偿（民法典第585条）。
us_claim: An exclusive-services agreement is enforceable through damages and, where services are unique, through injunctive relief without violating the Thirteenth Amendment; a negative covenant precluding performance for competitors may be enforced by injunction.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US enforce exclusive-services agreements, with CN emphasizing contractual damages and US providing the additional remedy of negative injunctions for unique services.

fact_summary: 主播签约独家直播协议后在其他平台直播 / A streamer breached an exclusive agreement by performing on another platform.
cn_claim: 违约方应承担违约责任（民法典第577条；第585条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A breach of an exclusive-services contract entitles the aggrieved party to damages and, where the services are unique, may support an injunction to restrain the breach of the negative covenant.
notes: Both CN and HK enforce exclusive-services agreements, with CN emphasizing contractual damages and HK also providing injunctive relief for unique services.

fact_summary: 居民个人通过在海外购买大额保单转移境内资产但未申报 / A resident individual purchased a large overseas insurance policy to move domestic assets abroad without reporting.
cn_claim: 居民个人应就其全球所得依法申报纳税；通过海外保单转移资产未申报的税务机关有权进行纳税调整（个人所得税法第8条反避税条款）。
us_claim: U.S. persons holding foreign insurance policies with cash value must report them on FinCEN Form 114 (FBAR) and Form 8938; the policy's income accrual may be taxable; failure to report subjects the taxpayer to significant penalties.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require reporting of foreign insurance assets and tax the income accruing on such policies, with robust anti-avoidance and reporting frameworks.

fact_summary: 居民通过海外购买大额保单转移境内资产未申报 / A resident purchased large overseas insurance policies to move assets abroad without reporting.
cn_claim: 税务机关可进行反避税调整（个人所得税法第8条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Hong Kong does not tax foreign-sourced investment income and does not generally require reporting of foreign insurance policies with cash value; there is no equivalent to the FBAR or foreign-asset-reporting regime.
notes: CN imposes broad reporting and taxation of foreign insurance assets, while HK's territorial tax system does not, creating a significant reporting and compliance asymmetry.

fact_summary: 境内企业参与境外科研项目合作需将基因数据传输出境 / A domestic enterprise participating in an international scientific research collaboration needed to transfer genetic data abroad.
cn_claim: 向境外提供重要数据的应通过国家网信部门组织的安全评估（数据安全法第37条）；人类遗传资源信息出境需经科技部审批（人类遗传资源管理条例第28条）。
us_claim: Export of human-genetic data for research is regulated under the Common Rule (45 C.F.R. Part 46) and NIH data-sharing policies; specific export controls may apply under EAR for certain biotechnology; there is no comprehensive genetic-data-export restriction comparable to China's human-genetic-resources regulations.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN imposes stringent genetic-data-export controls through security assessments and sectoral approvals, while US regulates through research-ethics frameworks and targeted export controls, creating a significant regulatory asymmetry.

fact_summary: 祖父母因父母双方均在外地务工要求获得孙子抚养权 / Grandparents sought custody of a grandchild because both parents worked in distant cities.
cn_claim: 有负担能力的祖父母对于父母已经死亡或父母无力抚养的未成年孙子女有抚养义务（民法典第1074条第一款）；父母外出务工不属于无抚养能力。
us_claim: Grandparents may petition for custody or visitation where the parents are unfit or where extraordinary circumstances exist; many states have grandparent-visitation statutes that permit grandparents to seek visitation or custody where the child's parents are absent or the child has resided with the grandparent for a significant period.
hk_claim: Grandparents may apply for custody or guardianship of a grandchild where the parents are unable or unwilling to care for the child; the court's paramount consideration is the welfare of the child.
notes: All three jurisdictions allow grandparents to seek custody where parents are unable to provide care, with the child's welfare as the paramount consideration.

fact_summary: 市民因街道办未依法公开社区公共收益账目提起行政诉讼 / Residents filed an administrative lawsuit because the sub-district office failed to legally disclose community public-revenue accounts.
cn_claim: 公民、法人或其他组织可依法申请获取政府信息（政府信息公开条例第27条）；行政机关不依法履行公开义务的申请人可提起行政诉讼（政府信息公开条例第51条）。
us_claim: The Freedom of Information Act (5 U.S.C. § 552) requires federal agencies to make records promptly available to any person upon request; failure to comply is subject to judicial review under the APA, and the court may order production of improperly withheld records.
hk_claim: A person may request information from a government bureau or department under the Code on Access to Information; a refusal to disclose may be subject to complaint to the Ombudsman and judicial review.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide a legal right to access government-held information and judicial review of improper nondisclosure.

fact_summary: KTV包厢内因电路老化引发火灾致顾客烧伤 / A fire caused by aging electrical wiring in a karaoke VIP room burned customers.
cn_claim: KTV经营者应确保其经营场所符合消防安全要求并保障消费者人身安全（民法典第1198条第一款；消防法第16条）；电路老化未及时更换致火灾的经营者应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A business operator that fails to maintain safe electrical systems and breaches fire-safety codes is liable for resulting injuries under premises-liability and negligence principles; violation of the National Electrical Code and local fire codes constitutes negligence per se.
hk_claim: A karaoke-lounge occupier owes a common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314); failure to maintain electrical systems in safe condition is a breach of that duty, and violation of fire-safety regulations is evidence of negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose fire-safety duties on entertainment-venue operators, with electrical-wiring maintenance being a core component of the duty.

fact_summary: 被告人因盗窃被判处拘役三个月，执行完毕后一年内又犯盗窃罪 / A defendant sentenced to three months' detention for theft committed another theft within one year after completing the sentence.
cn_claim: 刑罚执行完毕后五年内再犯应判处有期徒刑以上刑罚之罪的构成累犯应从重处罚（刑法第65条第一款）。
us_claim: A prior conviction for theft may enhance the sentence for a subsequent theft under habitual-offender or repeat-offender statutes in many states; under the U.S. Sentencing Guidelines § 4A1.1, prior sentences of less than 60 days receive one criminal-history point.
hk_claim: A previous conviction is an aggravating factor at sentencing; the court may impose a longer sentence to reflect the defendant's failure to reform; specific statutory provisions may enhance penalties for repeat offenders.
