notes: All three jurisdictions treat recidivism as an aggravating factor at sentencing, though the specific enhancement mechanisms differ statutory (CN), guideline-based (US), and judicial-discretion (HK).

fact_summary: 物流公司在未通知寄件人的情况下将保价快件交由无资质第三方转运后丢失 / A logistics company transferred an insured parcel to an unlicensed third-party carrier without notifying the sender; the parcel was lost in transit.
cn_claim: 快递企业应亲自将快件送至收件人；未经寄件人同意将快件转委托给无资质第三方导致丢失的快递企业应承担全部赔偿责任（民法典第923条；快递暂行条例第24条）。
us_claim: A carrier that subcontracts delivery without authorization and loses the shipment breaches the contract of carriage and the duty of care; the carrier remains liable as the contracting party and may not limit liability where the loss resulted from unauthorized delegation.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold the contracting carrier fully liable when it delegates carriage without authorization and the goods are lost, preventing the carrier from shifting liability to the unauthorized subcontractor.

fact_summary: 物流公司未经通知将保价快件交由无资质第三方转运后丢失 / A logistics company lost an insured parcel after unauthorized transfer to an unlicensed third-party carrier.
cn_claim: 未经同意转委托导致丢失的承运人应承担全部责任（民法典第923条；快递暂行条例第24条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A carrier who subcontracts performance without authorization remains fully liable for loss or damage to the goods; the carrier cannot limit liability where the loss resulted from unauthorized delegation.
notes: Both CN and HK hold the contracting carrier fully liable for losses caused by unauthorized subcontracting.

fact_summary: 某工厂未经许可将正品零件与仿制品混合组装后以正品名义销售 / A factory mixed genuine components with counterfeit parts, assembled the products, and sold them as authentic.
cn_claim: 未经许可在商品上使用与注册商标相同的商标并销售的构成假冒注册商标罪（刑法第213条）；混合真伪零件以正品名义销售的构成商标侵权及不正当竞争。
us_claim: Selling goods containing counterfeit components as authentic constitutes trademark infringement under the Lanham Act (15 U.S.C. § 1114) and may constitute counterfeiting under 18 U.S.C. § 2320; the use of a registered mark on mixed-source goods without authorization creates a likelihood of confusion.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US treat the sale of mixed-source goods as trademark infringement and counterfeiting, with CN also criminalizing the conduct under specific trademark-counterfeit provisions.

fact_summary: 某工厂将正品零件与仿制品混合组装后以正品名义销售 / A factory mixed genuine and counterfeit components and sold them as authentic.
cn_claim: 混合组装以正品名义销售构成假冒注册商标罪（刑法第213条）及商标侵权。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A person who sells goods bearing a forged trademark commits an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362) s.9(2); selling mixed-source goods as authentic where the trademark is used without authority constitutes trademark infringement.
notes: Both CN and HK criminalize the sale of mixed-source goods as authentic, with CN applying the Criminal Law and trademark statutes and HK applying the Trade Descriptions Ordinance.

fact_summary: 公司与全体职工签订集体合同但其条款低于法定标准 / A company signed a collective contract with all employees, but the terms fell below statutory minimum standards.
cn_claim: 集体合同中劳动报酬和劳动条件等标准不得低于当地人民政府规定的最低标准（劳动法第35条）。
us_claim: A collective-bargaining agreement that provides wages or working conditions below statutory minimums (FLSA minimum wage, OSHA safety standards) is unenforceable to the extent of the conflict; statutory rights generally cannot be waived through collective bargaining.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US treat statutory minimum employment standards as floors beneath which collective agreements cannot fall.

fact_summary: 公司签订的集体合同条款低于法定标准 / A collective contract fell below statutory minimums.
cn_claim: 集体合同标准不得低于法定最低标准（劳动法第35条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Terms of a collective agreement that fall below statutory requirements under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) are unenforceable; statutory minimums prevail over contractual terms.
notes: Both CN and HK ensure that statutory minimums override inferior contractual terms, whether in individual or collective agreements.

fact_summary: 因水管破裂楼道积水结冰致居民滑倒摔伤 / A burst water pipe flooded a hallway; the water froze overnight, and a resident slipped and fell.
cn_claim: 物业服务人未及时维修水管并清理积冰致人损害的应承担安全保障义务责任（民法典第1198条第一款；民法典第942条）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to repair a water leak and remove ice within a reasonable time after notice of the hazard is liable for negligence; the duty of care extends to common areas, and constructive notice of icy conditions may be established through weather conditions and passage of time.
hk_claim: An occupier or property manager who fails to remedy a water leak and resulting ice hazard within a reasonable time is in breach of the common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose a duty on property managers to promptly repair water leaks and remove ice hazards in common areas.

fact_summary: 公司未依法计提法定公积金即向股东分配利润 / A company distributed profits to shareholders without first making the statutory reserve allocation.
cn_claim: 公司分配当年税后利润时应提取利润的10%列入法定公积金（公司法第166条第一款）；未提取法定公积金即分配利润的应退还。
us_claim: Corporate distributions that impair capital are prohibited under state corporate-law capital-maintenance rules; directors who approve distributions that exceed the corporation's surplus may be personally liable to the corporation for the unlawful distribution.
hk_claim: A company may only make distributions out of distributable profits under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) s.297; distributions made without sufficient distributable reserves are unlawful and directors may be liable.
notes: All three jurisdictions restrict profit distributions to protect corporate capital, with CN requiring a specific statutory reserve, US applying surplus and capital-impairment tests, and HK requiring distributions from distributable profits only.

fact_summary: 被告人因长期吸毒被家人送至戒毒所强制戒毒 / A defendant was sent by family members to a compulsory drug-rehabilitation center due to long-term drug addiction.
cn_claim: 吸毒成瘾人员应接受戒毒治疗；拒绝接受社区戒毒的公安机关可作出强制隔离戒毒决定（禁毒法第38条第一款）。
us_claim: Involuntary civil commitment for drug treatment is available in many states where the individual poses a danger to self or others due to substance abuse; the commitment requires proof of dangerousness and due-process protections including a hearing.
hk_claim: Compulsory drug treatment is available under the Drug Addiction Treatment Centres Ordinance (Cap. 244); a person may be detained for treatment by court order or on the recommendation of the Commissioner of Police.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide for compulsory drug treatment with due-process protections, with CN using administrative-police authority, US employing civil-commitment procedures, and HK applying the Drug Addiction Treatment Centres Ordinance.

fact_summary: 消费者购买二手车后发现该车曾被水淹且存在重大安全隐患 / A used-car buyer discovered the vehicle had been flood-damaged and had significant safety defects.
cn_claim: 经营者提供商品有欺诈行为的应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；故意隐瞒水淹事故车构成欺诈。
us_claim: A seller who fails to disclose known flood damage and safety defects commits fraud and violates state consumer-protection and lemon laws; the buyer may seek rescission, damages, and in some states treble damages or punitive damages.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide strong consumer remedies for nondisclosure of flood damage in vehicle sales, with CN allowing treble damages and US applying fraud and lemon-law remedies.

fact_summary: 消费者购买二手车后发现该车曾被水淹且存在重大安全隐患 / A used-car buyer discovered the vehicle was flood-damaged with significant safety defects.
cn_claim: 故意隐瞒水淹车的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A seller who fails to disclose that a vehicle was flood-damaged commits misrepresentation; the buyer may rescind the contract and claim damages for fraud; criminal sanctions may also apply under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide civil and criminal remedies for nondisclosure of flood-damage history in vehicle sales, with CN allowing treble damages and HK applying misrepresentation and Trade Descriptions Ordinance remedies.

fact_summary: 被执行人以法院执行程序违法为由提出执行异议 / The judgment debtor objected to enforcement proceedings, alleging procedural irregularity.
cn_claim: 当事人、利害关系人认为执行行为违反法律规定的可向负责执行的人民法院提出书面异议（民事诉讼法第232条）。
us_claim: A party may object to an execution proceeding by filing a motion to quash the writ of execution or a motion for relief from the judgment under Fed. R. Civ. P. 60; the court will review whether the execution procedure complied with applicable rules.
hk_claim: A judgment debtor may apply to the court to set aside a writ of execution or for a stay of execution on the ground of material irregularity or that the judgment has been satisfied.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide mechanisms for judgment debtors to challenge procedural irregularities in execution, with CN providing a statutory objection mechanism, and US/HK using court motions to quash or set aside.

fact_summary: 高层住户阳台上放置的花盆被风吹落砸坏楼下车辆 / A flowerpot placed on a high-rise balcony was blown off by wind and damaged a car parked below.
cn_claim: 从建筑物上坠落的物品造成他人损害的所有人、管理人或使用人不能证明自己无过错的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1254条第一款）。
us_claim: A building occupant who places objects on a balcony or windowsill without adequate securing may be liable for negligence where the object falls and causes damage; res ipsa loquitur may apply, and violation of building safety codes is evidence of negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier who places objects on a balcony without adequate restraint is liable in negligence for damage caused by the object falling; the occupier's duty of care extends to those who may foreseeably be affected by falling objects.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose liability on high-rise occupants for damage caused by unsecured objects falling from balconies.

fact_summary: 被告人从网上购买了他人遗失的身份证办理银行卡出售获利 / A defendant purchased lost national ID cards online, used them to open bank accounts, and sold the accounts for profit.
cn_claim: 非法提供或使用他人居民身份证件情节严重的构成使用虚假身份证件、盗用身份证件罪（刑法第280条之一）。
us_claim: Knowingly using another person's means of identification to open financial accounts constitutes identity fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1028(a)(7); the offense carries severe penalties and may be prosecuted as part of a larger fraud scheme.
hk_claim: Using another person's identity document to open a bank account without authority constitutes an offense under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210) for obtaining services by deception and may constitute an offense under the Immigration Ordinance (Cap. 115) s.42 for possession of another's identity card.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the misuse of another person's identity documents to open financial accounts, with CN providing a specific identity-document offense and US/HK applying identity-fraud and deception statutes.

fact_summary: 有限责任公司的一名股东欲退出公司但其他股东均不同意收购其股权 / A member of a limited-liability company wanted to exit but all other members refused to purchase the member's interest.
cn_claim: 股东向股东以外的人转让股权应经其他股东过半数同意；不同意转让的股东应购买该股权，不购买的视为同意转让（公司法第71条第二款）。
us_claim: In a closely-held corporation or LLC, a member who wishes to exit may face illiquidity because there is no public market for the shares; the member may petition for judicial dissolution on grounds of deadlock or oppression, or may negotiate a buyout under the operating agreement or state LLC statute.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN provides statutory buyout mechanisms for LLC members seeking exit, while US relies primarily on contractual operating agreements and judicial dissolution, creating different liquidity-protection frameworks.

fact_summary: 有限责任公司股东欲退出但其他股东不同意收购其股权 / An LLC member wanted to exit but other members refused to purchase the interest.
cn_claim: 其他股东不购买股权的视为同意转让（公司法第71条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A member of a private company who wishes to exit may face difficulty because there is no ready market; the member may seek relief under the unfair-prejudice provisions of the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) s.724, and the court may order the company or other members to purchase the member's shares.
notes: Both CN and HK provide exit mechanisms for locked-in members, with CN codifying a statutory buyout-or-consent framework and HK applying the unfair-prejudice remedy.

fact_summary: 外贸合同中约定了仲裁条款但未明确仲裁机构 / A foreign-trade contract contained an arbitration clause that failed to specify the arbitral institution.
cn_claim: 仲裁协议应当明确选定的仲裁委员会（仲裁法第16条第二款第三项）；约定不明且不能达成补充协议的仲裁协议无效。
us_claim: An agreement to arbitrate is enforceable under the FAA (9 U.S.C. § 2) even if the arbitration institution is not specified, provided the parties' intent to arbitrate is clear; the court may appoint an arbitrator under FAA § 5 if the parties cannot agree.
hk_claim: An arbitration agreement must express the parties' intention to submit disputes to arbitration; failure to specify an institution does not necessarily invalidate the agreement if an appointing authority can be identified or the court can appoint an arbitrator under the Arbitration Ordinance (Cap. 609).
notes: CN requires specification of an arbitral institution for validity while US and HK will enforce arbitration agreements with incomplete institutional designations, creating an enforcement asymmetry.

fact_summary: 某培训机构将他人编写的试题集扫描成电子版在课堂上向学员展示 / A training institution scanned a test-question collection compiled by another and displayed it digitally to students in class.
cn_claim: 为课堂教学少量复制他人已发表作品供教学人员使用可不经许可不支付报酬但不得出版发行（著作权法第24条第六项）；扫描整本试题集并展示属于超过合理范围的复制。
us_claim: Educational use of copyrighted materials is subject to the fair-use analysis under 17 U.S.C. § 107; scanning and displaying an entire test-question collection without authorization weighs against fair use, particularly where the use substitutes for purchase of the original materials.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US restrict unauthorized reproduction of entire educational works for classroom use, requiring the use to be limited in scope and not market-substituting.

fact_summary: 某培训机构将他人编写的试题集扫描成电子版在课堂上向学员展示 / A training institution scanned and displayed a test-question collection in class.
cn_claim: 整本扫描展示超出课堂合理使用（著作权法第24条第六项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Reproducing a substantial part of a copyright work for educational purposes may qualify as fair dealing under s.41A of the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528), but reproducing the entirety of the work generally exceeds fair dealing.
notes: Both CN and HK limit educational reproduction of copyright works, with CN applying a statutory exception and HK applying fair dealing, both requiring the amount copied to be reasonable.

fact_summary: 儿童在温泉度假村玩水滑梯时因设施故障被抛出摔伤 / A child was thrown from a malfunctioning water slide at a hot-springs resort and injured.
cn_claim: 游乐设施经营者应确保设备安全并定期检修（民法典第1198条第一款；特种设备安全法第34条）；设备故障致人损害的经营者应承担侵权责任。
us_claim: A water-park operator owes a duty of reasonable care to maintain rides in safe condition and to conduct regular inspections; failure to detect and repair a malfunction constitutes negligence; the operator may be strictly liable if the ride is considered a common carrier or under products-liability theories for defective equipment.
hk_claim: A resort operator owes a common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314); failure to maintain water-slide equipment in safe condition is a breach of the duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose duties on amusement operators to maintain ride equipment in safe condition through regular inspection and repair.

fact_summary: 被告人在取保候审期间威胁证人不得出庭作证 / While released on bail pending trial, a defendant threatened a witness to prevent them from testifying.
cn_claim: 被取保候审的犯罪嫌疑人威胁证人的没收部分或全部保证金并变更强制措施（刑事诉讼法第71条）；构成妨害作证罪的追究刑事责任（刑法第307条第一款）。
us_claim: Witness tampering is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1512; a defendant who threatens a witness while on pretrial release will have bail revoked and faces additional criminal charges with enhanced penalties.
hk_claim: Intimidating a witness is an offense of perverting the course of justice and criminal intimidation under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200); a defendant on bail who threatens a witness will have bail revoked and may be detained pending trial.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat witness intimidation during pretrial release as a serious aggravating offense, mandating bail revocation and imposing additional criminal penalties.

fact_summary: 女性求职者在招聘环节因怀孕被拒绝录用 / A female job applicant was rejected because of her pregnancy.
cn_claim: 用人单位不得以性别为由拒绝录用妇女（就业促进法第27条；妇女权益保障法第43条第一款）；不得因女职工怀孕降低其工资或解除劳动合同。
us_claim: Pregnancy discrimination in hiring violates the Pregnancy Discrimination Act (42 U.S.C. § 2000e(k)), which amended Title VII; an employer may not refuse to hire a pregnant applicant based on her pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions.
hk_claim: An employer who refuses to hire a woman because of her pregnancy commits sex discrimination under the Sex Discrimination Ordinance (Cap. 480) s.9.
notes: All three jurisdictions prohibit pregnancy-based hiring discrimination through specific statutory provisions.

fact_summary: 消费者购买智能电视后发现其观看数据被回传至厂家用于广告推送 / A consumer discovered that their smart TV was transmitting viewing data to the manufacturer for targeted advertising.
cn_claim: 经营者收集消费者个人信息应明示收集、使用信息的目的、方式和范围并经消费者同意（消费者权益保护法第29条第一款；个人信息保护法第14条）。
us_claim: Collection of consumer-viewing data without adequate disclosure and consent may violate the FTC Act § 5; the Video Privacy Protection Act (18 U.S.C. § 2710) restricts disclosure of video-rental and viewing records; the FTC has brought enforcement actions against smart-TV manufacturers for undisclosed data collection.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US restrict undisclosed collection of consumer-viewing data through consent requirements and consumer-protection enforcement.

fact_summary: 消费者购买智能电视后发现其观看数据被回传至厂家用于广告 / A consumer discovered their smart TV was transmitting viewing data for ads.
cn_claim: 收集消费者个人信息应经消费者同意（消费者权益保护法第29条；个人信息保护法第14条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Collection of viewing data without the consumer's informed consent violates the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) Data Protection Principles 1 and 3; the data user must provide a Personal Information Collection Statement.
notes: Both CN and HK require informed consent for collection of consumer-viewing data, with CN applying the Consumer Protection Law and PIPL and HK applying the PDPO.

fact_summary: 上市公司在定期报告中未披露对外担保事项 / A listed company failed to disclose an external guarantee in its periodic report.
cn_claim: 发生可能对上市公司股票交易价格产生较大影响的重大事件时上市公司应立即向证监会和证券交易所报送临时报告并予公告（证券法第80条第一款）。
us_claim: A public company must disclose material off-balance-sheet arrangements including guarantees in its periodic filings under Item 303 of Regulation S-K and must file a current report on Form 8-K for material events; failure to disclose material guarantees may give rise to Rule 10b-5 liability.
hk_claim: A listed company must disclose inside information, including material guarantees, as soon as reasonably practicable under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) Part XIVA.
notes: All three jurisdictions require listed companies to disclose material guarantees, with CN requiring immediate disclosure, US using Form 8-K and Reg S-K, and HK requiring prompt inside-information disclosure.

fact_summary: 超市手推车因轮子脱落导致顾客脚部受伤 / A customer's foot was injured when a wheel detached from a supermarket shopping cart.
cn_claim: 超市作为经营者应确保其提供的购物设施安全（民法典第1198条第一款）；购物车车轮脱落致人损害的超市应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A supermarket owes a duty of reasonable care to maintain shopping carts in safe condition; failure to regularly inspect and maintain carts constitutes negligence; the store's constructive notice of a defect may be established by the age and condition of the equipment.
hk_claim: An occupier owes a common duty of care to visitors under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314); failure to maintain shopping carts in safe condition is a breach of that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose duties on retailers to maintain shopping equipment in safe condition through regular inspection and maintenance.

fact_summary: 被告人将毒品伪装成普通货物通过快递公司寄送至外地 / A defendant disguised drugs as ordinary goods and shipped them via courier to another city.
cn_claim: 走私、贩卖、运输毒品的无论数量多少均应追究刑事责任（刑法第347条第一款）。
us_claim: Shipping controlled substances through interstate commerce is a federal crime under the Controlled Substances Act (21 U.S.C. § 841(a)(1)); using a common carrier to transport drugs may result in enhanced penalties for drug trafficking.
hk_claim: Trafficking in dangerous drugs, including transporting by courier, is an offense under the Dangerous Drugs Ordinance (Cap. 134) s.4; the penalty varies with the quantity of the drug.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for drug trafficking through courier services, with CN, US, and HK each criminalizing the transportation of drugs regardless of quantity.

fact_summary: 某村村民委员会未依法公开村务财务信息 / A village committee failed to publicly disclose village affairs and financial information as required by law.
cn_claim: 村民委员会实行村务公开制度并应接受村民监督（村民委员会组织法第30条、第31条）。
us_claim: Local-government transparency is governed by state open-meeting and public-records laws; a local governing body that fails to disclose financial records may be compelled to do so through state public-records requests and judicial proceedings.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require transparency in local governance and provide mechanisms for citizens to compel disclosure of financial information.

fact_summary: 某村村民委员会未依法公开村务财务信息 / A village committee failed to disclose village affairs and financial information.
cn_claim: 村民委员会应实行村务公开并接受监督（村民委员会组织法第30条、第31条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: The Code on Access to Information applies to government bureaux and departments; local bodies that are subject to the Code must disclose information upon request, subject to exemptions.
notes: Both CN and HK provide legal mechanisms for access to local-government financial information, with CN codifying village-committee disclosure duties and HK applying the Code on Access to Information.

fact_summary: A cryptocurrency exchange froze a user's account and refused to permit withdrawal of funds / 加密货币交易所冻结用户账户并拒绝允许提取资金
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: A cryptocurrency exchange that freezes a user's account without contractual authority may be liable for conversion, breach of contract, and violation of state consumer-protection and money-transmitter laws; the user may seek an injunction requiring the exchange to release the funds.
hk_claim: A cryptocurrency exchange that refuses to allow withdrawal of a user's funds without lawful justification may be liable for breach of contract, conversion, or detinue; the court may grant an interlocutory mandatory injunction for the release of funds where the user's right is clear.
notes: Both US and HK provide remedies against exchanges that wrongfully freeze user accounts, with US applying contract, conversion, and consumer-protection law and HK applying contract, detinue, and interlocutory-injunction remedies.

fact_summary: 某外卖平台利用算法对外卖员进行实时轨迹监控并据此作出罚款决定 / A food-delivery platform used algorithms to monitor couriers' real-time trajectories and imposed fines based on the data.
cn_claim: 个人信息处理者利用个人信息进行自动化决策的应保证决策的透明度并不得对个人在交易条件上实行不合理的差别待遇（个人信息保护法第24条第一款）。
us_claim: Algorithmic worker-surveillance that results in adverse employment actions is subject to increasing regulatory scrutiny; the FTC has indicated that algorithmic decision-making without transparency may constitute an unfair practice under § 5, and state laws are emerging to regulate workplace AI monitoring.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US are developing regulatory frameworks for algorithmic worker monitoring, with CN codifying automated-decision transparency and anti-discrimination requirements and US relying on FTC enforcement and emerging state legislation.

fact_summary: 某外卖平台利用算法对外卖员进行实时轨迹监控并据此作出罚款决定 / A food-delivery platform used algorithms to monitor couriers' trajectories and imposed fines.
cn_claim: 自动化决策应保证透明度并不得差别对待（个人信息保护法第24条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Algorithmic worker-monitoring and automated decision-making must comply with the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486); collection of workers' real-time location data must be fair and the purposes must be disclosed.
notes: Both CN and HK regulate algorithmic worker monitoring through data-protection frameworks, with CN applying PIPL automated-decision provisions and HK applying PDPO data-collection principles.

fact_summary: 被告人因生活所迫盗窃少量食物后主动到公安机关坦白 / A defendant stole a small amount of food out of necessity and voluntarily surrendered to the police.
cn_claim: 犯罪后自动投案并如实供述自己罪行的应以自首论，可以从轻或减轻处罚；犯罪情节显著轻微的不认为是犯罪（刑法第67条第一款；第13条）。
us_claim: Voluntary surrender and acceptance of responsibility entitles a defendant to a reduction under the U.S. Sentencing Guidelines § 3E1.1; necessity may be considered as a mitigating factor at sentencing, though it is not a complete defense to theft.
hk_claim: A defendant who voluntarily surrenders and admits the offense is entitled to a sentencing discount; the court may take into account the circumstances of the offense, including financial hardship, in mitigation.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide sentencing mitigation for voluntary surrender and acknowledge financial hardship as a mitigating factor in petty theft cases.

fact_summary: 企业通过向境外关联方支付高额特许权使用费将利润转移至低税率地区 / An enterprise shifted profits to a low-tax jurisdiction by paying excessive royalties to an overseas affiliate.
cn_claim: 关联交易不符合独立交易原则的税务机关有权按照合理方法调整（企业所得税法第41条）；特许权使用费应反映独立企业间可比的交易价格。
us_claim: Royalty payments to foreign affiliates are subject to transfer-pricing scrutiny under I.R.C. § 482; the IRS may adjust the royalty to reflect arm's-length terms considering comparable uncontrolled transactions; the BEAT under I.R.C. § 59A may impose additional tax on large deductible payments to related foreign persons.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US scrutinize cross-border royalty payments under transfer-pricing rules requiring arm's-length terms, with US additionally applying the BEAT.

fact_summary: 企业通过向境外关联方支付高额特许权使用费转移利润 / An enterprise shifted profits through excessive royalties to an overseas affiliate.
cn_claim: 关联交易不符合独立交易原则的可纳税调整（企业所得税法第41条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Hong Kong's transfer-pricing rules under the Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap. 112) require related-party transactions to be at arm's length; the IRD may adjust profits where royalty payments are not commensurate with arm's-length terms.
notes: Both CN and HK apply the arm's-length principle to cross-border royalty payments, with CN employing the EITL and HK applying the IRO transfer-pricing provisions.

fact_summary: 境内金融机构因反洗钱合规需要将客户交易数据传输至境外总部 / A domestic financial institution needed to transmit customer transaction data to its overseas headquarters for anti-money-laundering compliance.
cn_claim: 向境外提供个人金融信息的应通过出境安全评估并取得个人单独同意（个人信息保护法第38条、第39条；反洗钱法第5条）。
us_claim: Cross-border transfer of financial transaction data for AML compliance is permitted under the Bank Secrecy Act (31 U.S.C. § 5311 et seq.) and the USA PATRIOT Act; financial institutions must have AML programs but may share information globally within the corporate group subject to privacy-law constraints.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN imposes significant restrictions on cross-border financial-data transfers for AML compliance, while US permits global information-sharing within financial groups subject to privacy safeguards, creating a regulatory asymmetry.

fact_summary: 夫妻一方在分居期间购买彩票中奖，离婚时另一方主张奖金为共同财产 / During separation, one spouse won the lottery; the other spouse claimed the winnings as marital property in the divorce.
cn_claim: 婚姻关系存续期间所得的财产为夫妻共同财产（民法典第1062条）；分居期间仍未离婚，所得财产仍属夫妻共同财产。
us_claim: Lottery winnings during marriage but after separation are treated as marital property in most community-property states because the marriage has not been legally terminated; in equitable-distribution states, the court may consider the separation as a factor in dividing the asset.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US treat lottery winnings during separation as marital property because the marriage has not been dissolved, subject to judicial discretion in equitable-distribution jurisdictions.

fact_summary: 夫妻分居期间一方彩票中奖，离婚时另一方主张奖金为共同财产 / During separation, one spouse won the lottery; the other claimed the winnings as marital property.
cn_claim: 分居期间所得财产仍属夫妻共同财产（民法典第1062条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Assets acquired during the marriage, including during a period of separation before divorce, are generally treated as matrimonial assets; the court has discretion to depart from equal division where the separation duration and the circumstances of the acquisition justify a different distribution.
notes: Both CN and HK treat assets acquired during separation as divisible marital property, though HK courts have greater discretion to depart from equal division.

fact_summary: 地方政府以历史风貌保护为由禁止居民对自有房屋进行必要修缮 / A local government prohibited a resident from making necessary repairs to their own home, citing historic-district protection.
cn_claim: 对公民私有财产的限制应有法律依据并符合比例原则（宪法第13条；民法典第113条）。
us_claim: Historic-preservation regulations that deprive a property owner of all economically beneficial use of their property constitute a regulatory taking requiring just compensation under the Fifth Amendment; Lucas v. South Carolina Coastal Council, 505 U.S. 1003 (1992); Penn Central Transportation Co. v. New York City, 438 U.S. 104 (1978).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require proportionality or compensation when land-use restrictions severely impair property rights, with CN applying constitutional protections and US applying the regulatory-takings doctrine.

fact_summary: 被告人组织他人以旅游名义出境后在境外从事电信诈骗 / A defendant organized others to travel abroad under the guise of tourism to engage in telecom fraud overseas.
cn_claim: 在境外实施电信网络诈骗犯罪的应依法追究刑事责任（刑法第7条、第266条；关于办理电信网络诈骗等刑事案件适用法律若干问题的意见）。
us_claim: Organizing a transnational fraud scheme is prosecutable under the wire-fraud statute (18 U.S.C. § 1343) and may involve charges under the Travel Act (18 U.S.C. § 1952) and money-laundering statutes (18 U.S.C. § 1956); extraterritorial jurisdiction applies where the scheme has effects within the United States.
hk_claim: A person who organizes a scheme to defraud persons outside Hong Kong by deception may be prosecuted under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210) if any part of the offense occurs within Hong Kong; conspiracy to defraud at common law also applies.
notes: All three jurisdictions assert jurisdiction over transnational fraud schemes, with CN applying active-personality jurisdiction, US applying effects-based extraterritoriality, and HK applying territorial plus conspiracy jurisdiction.

fact_summary: 美容院以免费体验为名诱导消费者签订高价长期美容服务合同 / A beauty salon induced consumers to sign expensive long-term service contracts under the pretense of a free trial.
cn_claim: 经营者提供商品或服务有欺诈行为的应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；利用虚假免费体验诱签高价合同构成欺诈。
us_claim: High-pressure sales tactics that mislead consumers about the true cost or nature of a service may constitute fraud and violate the FTC Act § 5 prohibition on unfair or deceptive practices; the FTC's Cooling-Off Rule (16 C.F.R. Part 429) gives consumers a three-day right to cancel certain door-to-door sales.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for high-pressure deceptive sales tactics, with CN allowing treble damages for fraud and US applying the FTC Act and Cooling-Off Rule.

fact_summary: 美容院以免费体验为名诱导消费者签订高价美容服务合同 / A beauty salon used a free trial to induce consumers to sign expensive contracts.
cn_claim: 欺诈可要求增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A trader who uses deceptive bait-and-switch or free-trial tactics to induce consumers to enter into expensive contracts engages in misleading conduct that may constitute misrepresentation and violate the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for deceptive sales inducements, with CN applying statutory treble damages and HK applying misrepresentation and the Trade Descriptions Ordinance.

fact_summary: 儿童在社区游泳池溺水因救生员擅离职守 / A child drowned in a community pool because the lifeguard had abandoned their post.
cn_claim: 游泳池经营者应配备合格救生员并确保其在岗（民法典第1198条第一款；体育场所开放条件与技术要求第7部分）；救生员擅离职守致人损害的经营者应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A pool operator owes a duty of reasonable care to provide adequate lifeguard supervision; failure to maintain required lifeguard coverage constitutes negligence and may subject the operator to liability for wrongful death; pool-safety regulations typically specify required lifeguard-to-swimmer ratios.
hk_claim: An occupier of a swimming facility owes a common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314) to provide reasonable supervision; failure to provide adequate lifeguard coverage is a breach of that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose a duty on swimming-pool operators to provide adequate lifeguard supervision and are liable for injuries resulting from lifeguard absence.

fact_summary: 公司董事在知晓公司即将破产的情况下仍批准向股东分红 / Directors approved a dividend to shareholders knowing the company was about to become insolvent.
cn_claim: 公司在弥补亏损和提取法定公积金前不得向股东分配利润（公司法第166条）；董事在公司资不抵债时批准分红的对公司和债权人承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: Directors who approve a dividend while the corporation is insolvent or that renders the corporation insolvent may be personally liable for unlawful distributions under state corporate law; the dividend may be avoided as a fraudulent transfer, and directors breach their fiduciary duties.
hk_claim: Directors who authorize a distribution when the company is insolvent or that renders the company insolvent may be liable for breach of duty under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) and may be ordered to repay the distribution.
notes: All three jurisdictions prohibit dividends that impair corporate solvency and impose personal liability on directors who approve such distributions.

fact_summary: 制药公司利用专利制度延长药品专利保护期，在基础专利即将到期时申请次要专利 / A pharmaceutical company extended its patent protection by filing secondary patents as the base patent neared expiration.
cn_claim: 专利申请人应遵守诚实信用原则；对已有药品的次要改进申请新专利是否属于专利常青化应根据该改进是否具备创造性进行实质审查（专利法第22条第三款）。
us_claim: Patent evergreening through the filing of secondary patents on minor modifications is subject to scrutiny under the doctrine of obviousness (35 U.S.C. § 103); the Hatch-Waxman Act (21 U.S.C. § 355) provides mechanisms for generic-drug manufacturers to challenge such patents through Paragraph IV certifications.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US scrutinize patent evergreening, with CN requiring inventive-step review and US applying obviousness analysis and Hatch-Waxman challenge mechanisms.

fact_summary: 制药公司利用专利制度延长药品专利保护期 / A pharmaceutical company extended patent protection through secondary patents.
cn_claim: 次要专利的创造性应实质审查（专利法第22条第三款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A patent requires an inventive step that is not obvious to a person skilled in the art under the Patents Ordinance (Cap. 514) s.9F; the standard patent system provides for substantive examination of inventive step.
notes: Both CN and HK examine secondary patents for inventive step, with CN and HK both requiring non-obviousness as a condition of patentability.

fact_summary: 广场上未经固定的临时舞台因强风倒塌砸伤观众 / A temporary stage erected in a public square collapsed in strong winds and injured spectators because it was not properly anchored.
cn_claim: 临时搭建物的管理人对因其倒塌造成他人损害的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1252条第二款；第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: The operator of a temporary structure owes a duty of reasonable care to ensure the structure is adequately anchored and secured against foreseeable weather conditions; failure to comply with engineering and safety standards constitutes negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier or person responsible for a temporary structure owes a common duty of care to visitors under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314); failure to properly secure a stage against wind conditions is a breach of that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose safety duties on operators of temporary structures to ensure adequate anchoring and weather-resistance.

fact_summary: 被告人帮助电信诈骗团伙收购银行卡用于接收赃款 / A defendant helped a telecom-fraud ring purchase bank cards for receiving illicit proceeds.
cn_claim: 明知他人利用信息网络实施犯罪仍为其提供支付结算帮助情节严重的构成帮助信息网络犯罪活动罪（刑法第287条之二）。
us_claim: Providing financial accounts to facilitate fraud constitutes aiding and abetting under 18 U.S.C. § 2 and may be charged as money-laundering under 18 U.S.C. § 1956 or as conspiracy under 18 U.S.C. § 371.
hk_claim: A person who provides bank accounts knowing they will be used to retain proceeds of crime commits money laundering under the Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 455) s.25.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize providing bank accounts to facilitate fraud, with CN applying a specific cyber-crime assistance offense and US/HK applying money-laundering and aiding-and-abetting statutes.

fact_summary: 旅行社在行程中擅自增加购物点并强制游客消费 / A travel agency added forced shopping stops to the itinerary without prior disclosure.
cn_claim: 旅行社不得以不合理的低价组织旅游活动诱骗旅游者并通过安排购物获取回扣（旅游法第35条第一款）。
us_claim: A tour operator that adds undisclosed mandatory shopping stops breaches the contract of carriage and may violate the FTC Act § 5; cruise-line and tour-operator regulations require disclosure of all mandatory charges and stops before booking.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require tour operators to disclose mandatory shopping stops and prohibit undisclosed forced-consumption arrangements.

fact_summary: 旅行社在行程中擅自增加购物点并强制游客消费 / A travel agency added forced shopping stops to the itinerary.
cn_claim: 旅行社不得安排购物获取回扣（旅游法第35条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A travel agent who adds undisclosed mandatory shopping stops and requires consumer spending breaches the contract and engages in misleading conduct; the Travel Industry Authority may take disciplinary action under the Travel Industry Ordinance (Cap. 634).
notes: Both CN and HK regulate tour operators' shopping-stop practices, with CN applying the Tourism Law and HK applying the Travel Industry Ordinance and contract principles.

fact_summary: 员工因不同意公司强制全员加班的要求被以不服从管理为由开除 / An employee was terminated for insubordination after refusing to comply with a company-wide mandatory overtime requirement.
cn_claim: 用人单位由于生产经营需要经与工会和劳动者协商后可延长工作时间一般每日不得超过1小时（劳动法第41条）。
us_claim: Non-exempt employees may refuse overtime without facing termination unless the refusal constitutes insubordination under a reasonable and consistently-applied workplace policy; mandatory overtime may be required if the employee agreed to such terms and the hours comply with FLSA maximum-hour and overtime-compensation requirements.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN caps mandatory overtime strictly by law, while US permits mandatory overtime subject to FLSA compensation requirements, creating different worker-protection standards for overtime refusal.

fact_summary: 员工因拒绝强制加班被以不服从管理为由开除 / An employee terminated for refusing mandatory overtime.
cn_claim: 延长工作时间应与工会和劳动者协商（劳动法第41条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: The Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) does not prescribe maximum working hours; whether an employee may refuse overtime depends on the employment contract; dismissal for refusing overtime where the contract does not require it may be unreasonable.
notes: CN provides statutory overtime limits, while HK relies on contractual terms, creating a remedies asymmetry for overtime-refusal protection.

fact_summary: 案外人主张执行标的物为其所有向执行法院提出异议被驳回后提起执行异议之诉 / After a third party's objection to seized property was denied, they filed a lawsuit to exclude the property from execution.
cn_claim: 案外人对执行标的主张所有权并提出书面异议被驳回的，可自裁定送达之日起15日内提起执行异议之诉（民事诉讼法第234条）。
us_claim: A third party claiming an interest in property subject to execution may file an interpleader action or intervene in the execution proceedings; if the third party's interest is denied, they may appeal the denial or bring a separate action to quiet title.
hk_claim: A third party whose claim to seized property is rejected may apply to the court for relief and may bring proceedings to establish their title to the property and have the execution set aside.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide judicial mechanisms for third parties to litigate their property claims against execution, with CN providing a specific statutory action and US/HK using interpleader and title proceedings.

fact_summary: 住宅小区消防栓因物业未定期巡检在火灾时无水可用 / A residential compound's fire hydrant was inoperable during a fire because the property manager had not conducted regular inspections.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应按照约定和物业性质妥善维修养护业主共有部分并应定期对消防设施进行维护（民法典第942条第一款；消防法第16条第一款第五项）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to maintain fire-safety equipment in working order is liable for the resulting damages under negligence and premises-liability theories; violation of local fire-code inspection requirements constitutes negligence per se.
hk_claim: An occupier or property manager who fails to maintain fire-hydrant equipment in operative condition breaches the common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314) and may be liable under the Fire Services Ordinance (Cap. 95).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose fire-safety equipment maintenance duties on property managers, with violations of inspection codes constituting evidence of breach.

fact_summary: 公司被市场监督管理部门吊销营业执照后仍继续经营 / A company continued to operate after its business license was revoked by the market-regulation authority.
cn_claim: 被吊销营业执照的企业应停止经营活动并成立清算组进行清算（公司法第183条）；吊销后继续经营的构成无照经营（无证无照经营查处办法第5条）。
us_claim: A corporation that continues to operate after administrative dissolution may be subject to additional penalties, and its directors and officers who conduct business in the name of the dissolved corporation may be personally liable for obligations incurred.
hk_claim: A company that continues to carry on business after being struck off the register or dissolved is operating unlawfully; persons who carry on business in the name of a dissolved company may be personally liable for debts incurred.
notes: All three jurisdictions prohibit post-dissolution business operations and impose personal liability on those who continue to operate after dissolution.

fact_summary: 被告人在重大自然灾害期间盗窃救灾物资 / A defendant stole disaster-relief supplies during a major natural disaster.
cn_claim: 在自然灾害期间实施盗窃犯罪的应从重处罚（刑法第264条盗窃罪；关于办理盗窃刑事案件适用法律若干问题的解释第2条）。
us_claim: Looting during a declared disaster or emergency is subject to enhanced penalties under state law; the federal government may also deploy law-enforcement resources and prosecution under federal disaster-fraud statutes (18 U.S.C. § 1040) where applicable.
hk_claim: Theft during a disaster or emergency is an aggravating factor at sentencing; the court may impose a sentence that reflects the heightened culpability of exploiting a public emergency.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat disaster-period theft as an aggravating factor warranting enhanced punishment.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播平台购买进口化妆品后发现为假冒产品 / A consumer purchased imported cosmetics through a livestreaming platform and discovered they were counterfeit.
cn_claim: 经营者提供商品有欺诈行为的应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；销售假冒进口化妆品构成欺诈。
us_claim: Selling counterfeit cosmetics violates the Lanham Act (15 U.S.C. § 1114) and may also constitute fraud; the consumer may seek rescission, damages, and in some cases treble damages or punitive damages under state consumer-protection laws.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide strong consumer remedies for counterfeit cosmetics sales, with CN allowing treble damages and US applying the Lanham Act plus state consumer-protection and fraud remedies.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播平台购买进口化妆品后发现为假冒产品 / A consumer bought counterfeit imported cosmetics through a livestreaming platform.
cn_claim: 销售假冒商品构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling counterfeit cosmetics constitutes an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362) and may give rise to civil claims for misrepresentation and breach of contract; the consumer is entitled to a refund and damages.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for counterfeit cosmetics sales, with CN allowing treble damages and HK applying the Trade Descriptions Ordinance and civil contract/misrepresentation claims.

fact_summary: 某科技公司对竞争对手的通信标准必要专利拒绝以FRAND条件许可 / A technology company refused to license a competitor its standard-essential patents on FRAND terms.
cn_claim: 标准必要专利权人应遵守其在标准制定过程中作出的公平合理无歧视许可承诺（专利法第20条；关于滥用知识产权的反垄断指南第24条）。
us_claim: A patent holder who has made a FRAND commitment may be required to license SEPs on FRAND terms; refusal to license on FRAND terms may constitute patent misuse and may violate antitrust laws, as established in Microsoft Corp. v. Motorola, Inc., 696 F.3d 872 (9th Cir. 2012).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US enforce FRAND commitments by SEP holders, with CN applying anti-monopoly and patent-law principles and US applying antitrust and contract-law frameworks.

fact_summary: 某科技公司对竞争对手的标准必要专利拒绝FRAND许可 / A technology company refused to license SEPs on FRAND terms.
cn_claim: 标准必要专利权人应遵守FRAND许可承诺（专利法第20条；反垄断指南第24条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A patent holder who has made a FRAND commitment may be compelled to license on FRAND terms; the court may determine the FRAND royalty and grant an injunction only where the implementer is unwilling to take a license on FRAND terms.
notes: Both CN and HK enforce FRAND commitments by SEP holders, with CN applying patent and anti-monopoly law and HK applying contract and competition-law principles.

fact_summary: 公司以业务调整为由解雇距离法定退休年龄不足五年的老员工 / A company dismissed an older employee within five years of the statutory retirement age, citing business restructuring.
cn_claim: 在本单位连续工作满15年且距法定退休年龄不足5年的劳动者用人单位不得依照劳动合同法第40条、第41条的规定解除劳动合同（劳动合同法第42条第五项）。
us_claim: Termination of an older employee may constitute age discrimination under the Age Discrimination in Employment Act (29 U.S.C. § 621 et seq.); an employer may not use business restructuring as a pretext for age discrimination; the employee must prove age was the but-for cause of the termination.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US protect older workers from termination, with CN providing absolute protection near retirement and US applying the ADEA's anti-discrimination framework.

fact_summary: 公司以业务调整为由解雇距离法定退休年龄不足五年的老员工 / A company dismissed an older employee near retirement age citing restructuring.
cn_claim: 距退休不足5年的不得随意解除劳动合同（劳动合同法第42条第五项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Dismissal of an older employee may constitute age discrimination under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) and, in certain circumstances, may be unreasonable; however, Hong Kong does not have a comprehensive age-discrimination statute comparable to the ADEA.
notes: CN provides statutory protection for near-retirement workers, while HK does not have comprehensive age-discrimination legislation, creating a significant asymmetry in older-worker protection.

fact_summary: 执行过程中被执行人去世，其继承人拒绝承担债务 / During enforcement, the judgment debtor passed away, and their heirs refused to assume the debt.
cn_claim: 作为被执行人的公民死亡后其继承人未放弃继承的应在遗产实际价值范围内承担清偿责任（民事诉讼法第242条；民法典第1159条）。
us_claim: A judgment against a decedent may be enforced against the decedent's estate; heirs are generally not personally liable for the decedent's debts beyond the value of the inherited assets; the creditor must file a claim in the probate proceedings.
hk_claim: A judgment debt survives the death of the debtor and may be enforced against the debtor's estate; the executor or administrator is obliged to pay the debt from the estate assets; heirs who have received distributions may be liable to the extent of the assets received.
notes: All three jurisdictions allow enforcement against the deceased debtor's estate, with heirs liable only to the extent of inherited assets.

fact_summary: 某网购平台利用用户浏览记录进行自动化定价 / An e-commerce platform used users' browsing history for automated personalized pricing.
cn_claim: 个人信息处理者利用个人信息进行自动化决策的应保证决策的透明度和结果公平公正，不得对个人在交易条件上实行不合理的差别待遇（个人信息保护法第24条第一款）。
us_claim: Algorithmic personalized pricing using consumer browsing data may be subject to FTC § 5 enforcement as an unfair or deceptive practice; state privacy laws such as the CCPA require disclosures about such practices. The practice is generally permissible provided it does not involve collusion or discrimination against protected classes.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US regulate algorithmic personalized pricing, with CN requiring outcome fairness and transparency and US applying FTC consumer-protection enforcement.

fact_summary: 某网购平台利用用户浏览记录进行自动化定价 / An e-commerce platform used browsing history for automated personalized pricing.
cn_claim: 自动化决策应保证透明度和结果公平公正（个人信息保护法第24条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Using personal data for automated pricing without the data subject's knowledge or consent may violate the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) Data Protection Principles 1 and 3; the data user must disclose the purposes for which the browsing data will be used.
notes: Both CN and HK require transparency for automated pricing decisions using personal data, with CN codifying specific automated-decision obligations and HK applying PDPO disclosure principles.

fact_summary: 被告人因涉嫌犯罪被监视居住期间毁灭证据 / While under residential surveillance pending trial, a defendant destroyed evidence.
cn_claim: 被监视居住的犯罪嫌疑人毁灭证据的应没收保证金并变更强制措施（刑事诉讼法第77条）；毁灭证据构成妨害作证罪的追究刑事责任（刑法第307条第二款）。
us_claim: Destruction of evidence by a person on pretrial release constitutes obstruction of justice under 18 U.S.C. § 1519 and may result in revocation of pretrial release and additional criminal charges.
hk_claim: A person on bail who destroys evidence commits the offense of perverting the course of justice and criminal damage; bail will be revoked and additional charges will be brought.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat evidence destruction during pretrial release as a serious offense, mandating revocation of release and imposing additional criminal sanctions.

fact_summary: 快递公司因暴力分拣导致寄件人电子产品损坏 / A courier company's rough handling during sorting damaged a sender's electronic product.
cn_claim: 快递企业应规范操作确保快件安全（快递暂行条例第25条）；因暴力分拣造成快件毁损的应承担赔偿责任（民法典第832条）。
us_claim: A carrier is liable for damage to goods caused by its negligence in handling; the Carmack Amendment (49 U.S.C. § 14706) imposes liability on motor carriers for actual loss or injury to property during transportation.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold carriers liable for damage caused by negligent handling of goods, with CN applying the Express Delivery Regulations and Civil Code and US applying the Carmack Amendment.

fact_summary: 快递公司因暴力分拣导致寄件人电子产品损坏 / A courier damaged electronic goods through rough handling during sorting.
cn_claim: 暴力分拣造成快件毁损的应赔偿（快递暂行条例第25条；民法典第832条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A courier or carrier that damages goods through negligent handling is liable for the loss under the contract of carriage and the common law of bailment; the carrier must exercise reasonable care in handling goods.
notes: Both CN and HK hold carriers liable for damage caused by negligent handling during sorting, with CN applying statutory regulations and HK applying contract and bailment principles.

fact_summary: 燃气公司检修后未拧紧接头导致用户家中燃气泄漏爆炸 / A gas company failed to tighten a connection after maintenance, causing a gas leak and explosion in a customer's home.
cn_claim: 燃气经营者应对其供应的燃气设施定期进行安全检查并保障安全（城镇燃气管理条例第19条第一款）；未拧紧接头致泄漏爆炸的应承担侵权责任。
us_claim: A gas utility that negligently performs maintenance and causes a gas leak is liable for the resulting injuries and property damage under negligence and products-liability theories; violation of pipeline-safety regulations constitutes negligence per se.
hk_claim: A gas supplier or its contractor that negligently performs maintenance and creates a dangerous condition owes a duty of care; a gas explosion caused by negligent work is actionable in negligence and may also constitute a breach of statutory duty under the Gas Safety Ordinance (Cap. 51).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose liability on gas utilities for explosions caused by negligent maintenance, with violation of safety regulations constituting evidence of breach.

fact_summary: 公司设立时股东以非货币财产出资但该财产实际价值显著低于章程所定价值 / A shareholder contributed non-cash assets upon incorporation that were significantly overvalued relative to their actual worth.
cn_claim: 有限责任公司成立后发现作为设立公司出资的非货币财产的实际价值显著低于公司章程所定价额的应由交付该出资的股东补足差额（公司法第30条第一款）。
us_claim: Shares issued for overvalued non-cash consideration are considered watered stock; the shareholder is liable to the corporation for the difference between the value of the consideration received and the par or stated value of the shares; Del. G.C.L. § 162.
hk_claim: A shareholder who contributes non-cash assets at an overvaluation may be liable to the company for the shortfall; the court may order the shareholder to pay the difference between the ascribed value and the actual value of the assets contributed.
notes: All three jurisdictions hold shareholders liable for overvaluation of non-cash capital contributions, requiring them to make up the shortfall.

fact_summary: 某直播平台主动推荐用户观看未经授权的影视作品 / A livestreaming platform actively recommended unauthorized films to users.
cn_claim: 网络服务提供者知道或应当知道网络用户利用其网络服务侵害他人合法权益未采取必要措施的与该网络用户承担连带责任（民法典第1195条第二款）；主动推荐的应认定为主观知道。
us_claim: A platform that actively recommends infringing content may lose safe-harbor protection under the DMCA (17 U.S.C. § 512(c)(1)(A)(ii)) because it has the right and ability to control the infringing activity and receives a financial benefit directly attributable to the infringement.
hk_claim: A platform that actively recommends infringing content may be liable for copyright infringement as it goes beyond mere passive hosting and takes an active role in promoting the infringing material.
notes: All three jurisdictions find platforms liable where they actively recommend infringing content, losing passive-host protections.

fact_summary: 女性员工在产假期间被公司移出工作群并取消工作系统权限 / A female employee on maternity leave was removed from company work groups and had her work-system access revoked.
cn_claim: 用人单位不得因女职工怀孕、生育、哺乳降低其工资、予以辞退或与其解除劳动合同（妇女权益保障法第48条第一款；女职工劳动保护特别规定第5条）。
us_claim: Excluding an employee on maternity leave from work communications and revoking her system access may constitute constructive discharge or discrimination under the Pregnancy Discrimination Act and the Family and Medical Leave Act (29 U.S.C. § 2601 et seq.), which requires restoration to the same or an equivalent position upon return from leave.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US protect employees on maternity leave from adverse actions and require restoration of employment status and access upon return.

fact_summary: 女性员工在产假期间被公司移出工作群并取消工作系统权限 / A female employee on maternity leave was removed from company work groups and had system access revoked.
cn_claim: 不得因女职工生育降低其工资或解除劳动合同（妇女权益保障法第48条；女职工劳动保护特别规定第5条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Dismissing a pregnant employee or an employee on maternity leave is unlawful under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) s.15; removing the employee from work systems during leave may constitute constructive dismissal or pregnancy discrimination under the Sex Discrimination Ordinance (Cap. 480).
notes: Both CN and HK protect employees on maternity leave from dismissal and require maintenance of employment status during the leave period.

fact_summary: 企业通过向避税地关联方支付虚高的咨询费转移利润 / An enterprise shifted profits by paying inflated consulting fees to an affiliate in a tax haven.
cn_claim: 关联交易不符合独立交易原则的税务机关有权按照合理方法调整（企业所得税法第41条）；虚高咨询费应按照独立交易原则核定真实费用。
us_claim: Transfer-pricing rules under I.R.C. § 482 authorize the IRS to adjust payments between related parties to arm's-length terms; consulting fees that are not commensurate with services actually rendered or that exceed arm's-length prices are subject to reallocation.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US scrutinize management and consulting fees paid to offshore affiliates under transfer-pricing rules requiring genuine services and arm's-length pricing.

fact_summary: 企业通过向避税地关联方支付虚高的咨询费转移利润 / An enterprise shifted profits through inflated consulting fees to a tax-haven affiliate.
cn_claim: 关联交易不符合独立交易原则的可纳税调整（企业所得税法第41条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Hong Kong's transfer-pricing rules require related-party consulting-fee transactions to be at arm's length; the IRD may disallow deductions for fees not commensurate with the value of services actually provided.
notes: Both CN and HK apply the arm's-length principle to consulting-fee payments to offshore affiliates, requiring genuine service provision.

fact_summary: 境内企业拟向境外传输其收集的公民个人位置信息用于海外市场分析 / A domestic enterprise planned to transfer citizen location data overseas for foreign-market analysis.
cn_claim: 向境外提供个人信息的应通过出境安全评估并取得个人单独同意（个人信息保护法第38条、第39条）。
us_claim: Cross-border transfer of location data for marketing purposes is generally permitted subject to notice and consent under the FTC Act and state laws; there is no general data-localization requirement for commercial location data.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN imposes significant transfer restrictions for cross-border location-data transfers, while US permits such transfers with consumer-protection safeguards, creating a regulatory asymmetry.

fact_summary: 夫妻一方在婚内未经对方同意以大额共同财产购买奢侈品 / One spouse purchased luxury goods with substantial marital funds without the other spouse's consent.
cn_claim: 夫妻对共同财产有平等的处理权；超出家庭日常生活需要的大额消费应经双方同意（民法典第1062条第二款）。
us_claim: In community-property states, both spouses generally have equal management powers over community property, though dissipation of marital assets (waste) by one spouse is a factor in property division at divorce; in equitable-distribution states, marital waste may reduce the dissipating spouse's share.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US regulate unilateral dissipation of marital assets by one spouse, applying waste and equal-management doctrines from different legal perspectives.

fact_summary: 夫妻一方婚内未经对方同意用大额共同财产购买奢侈品 / One spouse bought luxury goods with substantial marital funds without the other's consent.
cn_claim: 超出家庭日常生活需要的消费应经双方同意（民法典第1062条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A spouse who dissipates matrimonial assets through extravagant purchases may be subject to an adverse inference in ancillary-relief proceedings; the court may treat the dissipated sum as a notional asset and adjust the division of remaining assets accordingly.
notes: Both CN and HK discourage unilateral dissipation of marital assets, with CN requiring consent for large expenditures and HK allowing the court to notionally add back wasted assets.

fact_summary: 某地方出台政策要求市民安装指定的手机监控软件以防疫 / A local government required citizens to install a designated surveillance app on their phones for pandemic control.
cn_claim: 任何组织或个人收集个人信息应遵循合法、正当、必要原则并明示收集使用信息的目的、方式和范围（个人信息保护法第5条、第6条）；行政机关不得超越法定权限强制收集个人信息。
us_claim: Mandatory installation of government-surveillance software on personal devices implicates the Fourth Amendment's protection against unreasonable searches and the right to privacy; such a requirement would be subject to strict scrutiny and likely invalidated absent a compelling and narrowly-tailored governmental interest.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US impose constitutional and statutory limits on mandatory surveillance-software installation, though the applicable legal frameworks differ.

fact_summary: 被告人将盗窃所得赃款通过多个银行账户层层转移后兑换为虚拟货币 / A defendant laundered stolen money through multiple bank accounts and then converted it to cryptocurrency.
cn_claim: 明知是犯罪所得及其产生的收益而予以窝藏、转移、收购、代为销售或以其他方法掩饰、隐瞒的构成洗钱罪（刑法第191条）。
us_claim: Conducting financial transactions with the proceeds of criminal activity to conceal the source is money laundering under 18 U.S.C. § 1956; use of cryptocurrency as part of the laundering scheme may involve additional charges under the Bank Secrecy Act and FinCEN regulations.
hk_claim: Dealing with property known or believed to represent proceeds of an indictable offense is money laundering under the Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 455) s.25.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize money laundering through layered transactions and cryptocurrency conversion, with CN, US, and HK each providing specific money-laundering offenses.

fact_summary: 消费者购买原装进口奶粉后发现其不符合我国食品安全标准 / A consumer purchased imported infant formula and discovered it did not meet domestic food-safety standards.
cn_claim: 进口食品应符合我国食品安全国家标准（食品安全法第94条第一款）；销售不符合安全标准的食品的可主张价款十倍或损失三倍的赔偿金（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: Imported food products must comply with the Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act (21 U.S.C. § 301 et seq.) and FDA regulations; products that do not meet U.S. standards may be seized and the importer subject to penalties; consumers may bring state-law claims for breach of warranty and products liability.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require imported food to comply with domestic safety standards and provide consumer remedies for non-complying products, with CN providing statutory punitive damages and US applying FDA enforcement and state-law remedies.

fact_summary: 消费者购买原装进口奶粉后发现其不符合食品安全标准 / A consumer purchased imported infant formula that did not meet domestic food-safety standards.
cn_claim: 不符合安全标准的可主张惩罚性赔偿（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Imported food products are subject to the Food Safety Ordinance (Cap. 612) and must comply with food-safety standards; a consumer who purchases non-complying food may be entitled to a refund and damages for breach of contract and, in appropriate cases, may have remedies under the Sale of Goods Ordinance (Cap. 26) for goods not of merchantable quality.
notes: Both CN and HK require imported food to meet domestic safety standards and provide consumer remedies, with CN providing statutory punitive damages and HK applying the Food Safety Ordinance and contract remedies.

fact_summary: 游乐园过山车因制动系统故障导致车辆在终点撞击前方车辆致多人受伤 / A roller-coaster braking system failed, causing a collision at the terminal station that injured multiple riders.
cn_claim: 大型游乐设施运营使用单位应对设备进行经常性维护保养和定期自行检查（特种设备安全法第39条第一款）；制动系统故障致人损害的应承担侵权责任。
us_claim: An amusement-park operator owes the highest duty of care, approaching that of a common carrier in some jurisdictions; failure to maintain braking systems constitutes gross negligence; the operator is liable for all injuries proximately caused by the equipment failure.
hk_claim: An occupier and operator of amusement rides owes a common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314) and must maintain ride equipment in safe condition; failure of a braking system constitutes a breach of that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose the highest standards of care on amusement-ride operators, holding them strictly accountable for braking-system failures.

fact_summary: 上市公司未及时披露重大诉讼事项 / A listed company failed to timely disclose material litigation.
cn_claim: 发生可能对上市公司股票交易价格产生较大影响的重大事件时上市公司应立即报送临时报告并予公告（证券法第80条第一款）。
us_claim: A public company must disclose material pending legal proceedings in its periodic filings under Item 103 of Regulation S-K and must file a current report on Form 8-K for certain material events; failure to disclose material litigation may give rise to Rule 10b-5 liability.
hk_claim: A listed company must disclose inside information, including material litigation, as soon as reasonably practicable under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) Part XIVA.
notes: All three jurisdictions require listed companies to timely disclose material litigation, with CN requiring immediate disclosure, US using Form 8-K and Reg S-K, and HK requiring prompt inside-information disclosure.

fact_summary: 某技术公司拒绝将其标准必要专利向竞争对手许可 / A technology company refused to license its standard-essential patents to a competitor.
cn_claim: 标准必要专利权人应遵守其在标准制定过程中作出的公平合理无歧视许可承诺，不得拒绝许可（关于滥用知识产权的反垄断指南第24条）。
us_claim: A SEP holder that has committed to license on FRAND terms may be compelled to do so; refusal may constitute patent misuse and, where the refusal is part of an anticompetitive scheme, may violate antitrust laws; a SEP-based injunction may be denied by a court under eBay Inc. v. MercExchange, L.L.C., 547 U.S. 388 (2006) where the implementer is willing to license on FRAND terms.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US enforce FRAND commitments by SEP holders, with CN applying anti-monopoly law and US applying patent and antitrust principles.

fact_summary: 某技术公司拒绝将其标准必要专利向竞争对手许可 / A technology company refused to license its SEPs to a competitor.
cn_claim: 不得拒绝许可标准必要专利（反垄断指南第24条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A SEP holder that has made a FRAND commitment must license on FRAND terms; refusal may constitute an abuse of a dominant position under the Competition Ordinance (Cap. 619).
notes: Both CN and HK require SEP holders to comply with FRAND commitments, with CN applying anti-monopoly law and HK applying the Competition Ordinance.

fact_summary: 小区滑梯因螺丝松动导致儿童手指被夹伤 / A child's finger was pinched by a loose bolt on a playground slide in a residential compound.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应按照约定和物业使用性质妥善维修养护业主共有部分（民法典第942条第一款）；游乐设施未定期检修致人损害的物业公司应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A playground owner or manager owes a duty of reasonable care to inspect and maintain equipment; failure to detect and remedy loose bolts constitutes negligence; the duty extends to protecting children from foreseeable hazards under the attractive-nuisance doctrine.
hk_claim: An occupier providing playground equipment owes a common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314); failure to maintain equipment in safe condition breaches that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose equipment-maintenance duties on playground operators, with liability for injuries caused by loose or deteriorated components.

fact_summary: 被告人使用AI换脸技术伪造他人不雅视频并传播 / A defendant used deepfake technology to create fake intimate videos of another person and distributed them.
cn_claim: 利用信息技术手段伪造他人肖像制作淫秽物品传播的构成制作、传播淫秽物品罪（刑法第363条）并侵犯他人肖像权、名誉权（民法典第1019条、第1024条）。
us_claim: Creating and distributing nonconsensual deepfake pornography is criminalized under state deepfake and revenge-porn statutes; it may also give rise to federal prosecution under identity-theft statutes (18 U.S.C. § 1028) and civil claims for defamation, invasion of privacy, and intentional infliction of emotional distress.
hk_claim: Creating and distributing intimate images of another person without consent using deepfake technology may constitute criminal intimidation, publishing obscene articles, and an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200); civil claims for defamation and breach of confidence also apply.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize nonconsensual deepfake pornography through existing criminal statutes and provide civil remedies for the victim.

fact_summary: 买家在二手交易平台购买所谓的专柜正品后鉴定为假货 / A buyer purchased what was represented as an authentic designer item on a secondhand platform; expert appraisal determined it was counterfeit.
cn_claim: 经营者提供商品有欺诈行为的应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；二手平台卖家以假充真构成欺诈。
us_claim: Selling counterfeit goods as authentic on an online marketplace constitutes fraud and may violate the Lanham Act (15 U.S.C. § 1114); the buyer may seek rescission, damages, and under state law treble damages or punitive damages for fraudulent misrepresentation.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide strong consumer remedies for counterfeit goods sold as authentic, with CN allowing treble damages and US applying fraud and trademark remedies.

fact_summary: 买家在二手平台购买所谓的专柜正品后鉴定为假货 / A buyer purchased an item represented as authentic that proved counterfeit.
cn_claim: 以假充真构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling counterfeit goods as authentic constitutes fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362) for applying a false trade description; the buyer is entitled to a refund and damages for misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for counterfeit goods sold as authentic, with CN allowing treble damages and HK applying fraud and the Trade Descriptions Ordinance.

fact_summary: 企业与员工约定不缴纳社会保险而将社保费用以现金形式发放 / A company agreed with employees to pay the social-insurance contributions in cash rather than remitting them to the social-security agency.
cn_claim: 用人单位和劳动者必须依法参加社会保险并缴纳社会保险费（社会保险法第60条第一款）；约定不缴纳社保而发放现金的约定无效。
us_claim: An employer cannot contract out of its obligation to pay FICA taxes (Social Security and Medicare) under the Federal Insurance Contributions Act (26 U.S.C. § 3101 et seq.); an agreement to pay the employee in cash in lieu of remitting payroll taxes is void as against public policy.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US void agreements that purport to substitute cash payments for mandatory social-security contributions.

fact_summary: 企业与员工约定不缴纳社会保险而以现金形式发放 / A company agreed to pay social-insurance contributions in cash rather than remitting them.
cn_claim: 约定不缴纳社保的约定无效（社会保险法第60条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An employer must enroll employees in the Mandatory Provident Fund scheme under the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Ordinance (Cap. 485); an agreement to pay the MPF contributions in cash rather than to the MPF trustee is unlawful and may constitute an offense.
notes: Both CN and HK void agreements that substitute cash payments for mandatory retirement-contribution obligations.

fact_summary: 酒楼厨房烟道长期未清洗导致火灾蔓延至楼上住宅 / A restaurant kitchen's exhaust duct had not been cleaned for an extended period, causing a fire that spread to upstairs residences.
cn_claim: 餐饮经营者应定期清洗厨房烟道确保消防安全（消防法第16条第一款第五项；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A restaurant operator that fails to clean kitchen exhaust systems in accordance with fire-code requirements is liable for negligence and violation of fire-safety regulations; failure to clean constitutes negligence per se and the operator is liable for resulting fire damage to neighboring properties.
hk_claim: A restaurant occupier owes a common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314) and must comply with fire-safety requirements; failure to maintain kitchen exhaust ducts is a breach of duty and violation of fire-safety regulations.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose fire-safety maintenance duties on restaurant operators, with duct-cleaning obligations forming part of the standard of care.

fact_summary: 被告人组织他人偷越国境到境外从事网络赌博工作 / A defendant organized others to illegally cross the border to work in an overseas online-gambling operation.
cn_claim: 组织他人偷越国境的构成组织他人偷越国境罪（刑法第318条第一款）。
us_claim: Smuggling persons across an international border for commercial gain constitutes alien smuggling under 8 U.S.C. § 1324; organizing persons to travel for illegal gambling operations may also involve money-laundering and racketeering charges.
hk_claim: Organizing illegal border crossings for the purpose of employment constitutes an offense under the Immigration Ordinance (Cap. 115) and may involve trafficking-in-persons offenses.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize organized illegal border-crossing for commercial purposes.

fact_summary: 公司清算组未依法通知已知债权人导致债权人的债权未获清偿 / A company's liquidation committee failed to notify known creditors, resulting in their claims not being satisfied.
cn_claim: 清算组应自成立之日起10日内通知债权人并于60日内在报纸上公告（公司法第185条第一款）；未依法通知导致债权人损失的清算组成员应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A liquidating trustee or assignee must provide notice to known creditors; failure to provide adequate notice may result in the creditor's claim not being discharged and potential personal liability of the liquidating fiduciaries for breach of duty.
hk_claim: A liquidator must give notice to creditors and allow them to prove their claims; failure to notify known creditors may render the liquidator personally liable for losses caused to those creditors.
notes: All three jurisdictions require liquidators to notify known creditors and impose personal liability for failure to do so.

fact_summary: 顾客在餐厅用餐被收取未告知的服务费 / A restaurant charged diners an undisclosed service charge.
cn_claim: 经营者提供商品或服务应明码标价并不得收取任何未予标明的费用（价格法第13条第二款；消费者权益保护法第8条）。
us_claim: A restaurant that adds an undisclosed service charge to the bill may violate state consumer-protection laws and the FTC Act § 5 prohibition on unfair or deceptive practices; the charge must be conspicuously disclosed on the menu or otherwise before ordering.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require disclosure of service charges before the consumer commits to the transaction, with CN applying the Price Law and US applying FTC and state consumer-protection enforcement.

fact_summary: 顾客在餐厅用餐被收取未告知的服务费 / A restaurant charged an undisclosed service fee.
cn_claim: 不得收取未标明的费用（价格法第13条第二款；消费者权益保护法第8条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A restaurant that adds an undisclosed surcharge may be engaging in misleading conduct; the consumer may dispute the charge and the restaurant may be subject to enforcement action under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK require disclosure of surcharges in consumer transactions, with CN applying the Price Law and HK applying the Trade Descriptions Ordinance.

fact_summary: 某手机APP屏蔽了视频网站贴片广告 / A mobile app blocked pre-roll advertisements on a video-streaming website.
cn_claim: 未经许可破坏他人合法提供的网络产品或服务的正常运行包括屏蔽广告构成不正当竞争（反不正当竞争法第12条第二款第四项）。
us_claim: Ad-blocking software that interferes with the delivery of advertisements on a website may give rise to claims of tortious interference with contractual relations and, in some circuits, potential claims under the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act; however, ad-blocking has not been uniformly held to be unlawful in the U.S.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN has a more developed statutory prohibition on circumventing internet advertising models through unfair-competition law, while US legal treatment of ad-blocking remains unsettled.

fact_summary: 某手机APP屏蔽了视频网站贴片广告 / A mobile app blocked pre-roll advertisements on a video-streaming website.
cn_claim: 屏蔽广告破坏网络服务正常运行构成不正当竞争（反不正当竞争法第12条第二款第四项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An app that interferes with the normal delivery of web content by blocking advertisements may raise issues of copyright infringement and passing off, though there is no specific statutory prohibition on ad-blocking in Hong Kong.
notes: CN specifically prohibits ad-blocking as unfair competition, while HK does not have equivalent specific legislation, creating a regulatory asymmetry.

fact_summary: 酒店浴缸防滑垫失效致客人滑倒摔伤 / A hotel guest slipped and was injured in the bathtub because the non-slip mat was worn and ineffective.
cn_claim: 宾馆经营者应尽到安全保障义务（民法典第1198条第一款）；防滑设施失效致人损害的宾馆应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A hotel owes a duty of reasonable care to provide safe bathroom facilities; failure to maintain effective anti-slip measures constitutes negligence; the hotel may be strictly liable if the condition was known and not remedied within a reasonable time.
hk_claim: A hotel occupier owes a common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314); failure to provide safe non-slip surfaces in bathrooms is a breach of that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose premises-safety duties on hotels, requiring effective anti-slip measures in bathrooms.

fact_summary: 被告人组织网络水军刷单炒信 / A defendant organized internet fake-reviewers to inflate product ratings and sales figures.
cn_claim: 组织网络水军进行虚假交易的构成虚假宣传（反不正当竞争法第8条第一款）并可能构成非法经营罪（刑法第225条第四项）。
us_claim: Posting fake reviews and engaging in deceptive endorsement practices violates the FTC Act § 5 and the FTC's Endorsement Guides (16 C.F.R. Part 255); the FTC has brought enforcement actions against companies that purchase fake reviews and the practice may also constitute wire fraud (18 U.S.C. § 1343).
hk_claim: Engaging in fake-review schemes to mislead consumers may constitute an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362) for applying a false trade description to goods and may constitute the common-law offense of conspiracy to defraud.
notes: All three jurisdictions prohibit organized fake-review schemes, applying unfair-competition, consumer-protection, and fraud laws.

fact_summary: 被执行人将名下的股权无偿转让给其未成年子女以逃避执行 / A judgment debtor gratuitously transferred shares to their minor children to evade enforcement.
cn_claim: 债务人无偿转让财产对债权人造成损害的债权人可请求法院撤销（民法典第538条）。
us_claim: A gratuitous transfer made with actual intent to hinder, delay, or defraud a creditor may be avoided under the Uniform Voidable Transactions Act; the transfer is voidable and the creditor may execute against the transferred property.
hk_claim: A gratuitous transfer made with intent to defraud creditors may be set aside under the Conveyancing and Property Ordinance (Cap. 219) s.60.
notes: All three jurisdictions allow creditors to set aside gratuitous transfers made to evade enforcement, with CN, US, and HK each providing statutory avoidance remedies.

fact_summary: 公司股东在公司清算前将公司主要财产转移至自己名下导致公司无财产清偿债务 / A shareholder transferred the company's principal assets to themselves before liquidation, leaving the company with no assets to meet creditor claims.
cn_claim: 有限责任公司的股东在公司解散后恶意处置公司财产给债权人造成损失的应对公司债务承担相应赔偿责任（公司法解释二第18条）。
us_claim: A shareholder who strips corporate assets prior to dissolution may be liable for fraudulent transfer and may be held personally liable for corporate debts under the trust-fund doctrine or the doctrine of piercing the corporate veil.
hk_claim: A shareholder who transfers corporate assets to defeat creditors before winding-up may be liable for fraudulent trading under the Companies (Winding Up and Miscellaneous Provisions) Ordinance (Cap. 32) s.275, and the transfer may be set aside as a fraudulent conveyance.
notes: All three jurisdictions hold shareholders liable for asset-stripping before dissolution and allow the transfers to be set aside for the benefit of creditors.

fact_summary: 公司因疫情影响裁员但未按照劳动合同法规定的程序操作 / A company conducted pandemic-related layoffs without following the statutory procedures.
cn_claim: 裁减人员20人以上或占职工总数10%以上的用人单位应提前30日向工会或全体职工说明情况并听取意见后向劳动行政部门报告（劳动合同法第41条）。
us_claim: The WARN Act (29 U.S.C. § 2101 et seq.) requires employers with 100 or more employees to provide 60-day advance notice of plant closings and mass layoffs; an exception for unforeseeable business circumstances or natural disasters may apply to sudden pandemic-related closures.
hk_claim: Mass layoffs are governed by the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57); an employer dismissing employees by reason of redundancy must make statutory severance or long-service payments; there is no general statutory requirement for advance notice of collective redundancies.
notes: CN and US impose advance-notice and consultation requirements for mass layoffs, while HK requires severance payments but not advance notice, creating an asymmetry in procedural protections.

fact_summary: 消费者在加盟合同中约定的独家区域经营被品牌方违反 / A franchisee's exclusive territory under the franchise agreement was violated by the franchisor.
cn_claim: 特许人违反合同约定的应承担违约责任（民法典第577条）；在特许经营合同中约定独占区域经营的，特许人不得在该区域内再许可他人。
