us_claim: Blocking an accessibility pathway required under the Americans with Disabilities Act (42 U.S.C. § 12101 et seq.) may constitute a violation of accessibility standards and give rise to liability for resulting injuries; the person or entity that placed the obstruction is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier or person who obstructs an accessibility pathway may be liable in negligence for injuries caused to persons with disabilities; the Disability Discrimination Ordinance (Cap. 487) also applies.
notes: All three jurisdictions protect accessibility pathways and impose liability for injuries caused by obstructions.

fact_summary: 上市公司大股东通过大宗交易减持未提前披露 / A listed-company major shareholder reduced its holdings through block trades without prior disclosure.
cn_claim: 大股东减持股份应当提前披露减持计划（上市公司大股东减持股份若干规定第8条）。
us_claim: Major shareholders must comply with disclosure obligations under Section 13(d) and Section 16(a) of the Securities Exchange Act (15 U.S.C. §§ 78m(d), 78p(a)); sales must be reported on Form 4 within two business days.
hk_claim: A substantial shareholder must disclose dealings under Part XV of the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571); notification must be made within three business days.
notes: All three jurisdictions require major shareholders to disclose significant share disposals, with CN requiring advance notice and US/HK requiring prompt post-transaction disclosure.

fact_summary: 某AI生成的作品与某知名画家的多幅作品风格高度相似 / An AI-generated work was highly similar in style to multiple works by a well-known painter.
cn_claim: AI生成物是否构成对原作者作品的侵权取决于是否存在实质性相似（著作权法第10条）；单纯模仿风格的未复制具体表达的尚不构成侵权。
us_claim: Copyright protects expression, not style; under 17 U.S.C. § 102(b), ideas, procedures, and concepts are not copyrightable; an AI-generated work that mimics style but does not copy protected expression generally does not infringe.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US distinguish between unprotected artistic style and protected expression, with neither jurisdiction protecting style alone.

fact_summary: 某AI生成的作品与某知名画家的多幅作品风格高度相似 / An AI-generated work was highly similar in style to a well-known painter's works.
cn_claim: 单纯模仿风格的未复制具体表达的不构成侵权（著作权法第10条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Copyright protects the expression of ideas, not the ideas or style themselves; an AI-generated work that mimics style but does not reproduce a substantial part of a specific work does not infringe copyright.
notes: Both CN and HK distinguish between unprotected style and protected expression in copyright.

fact_summary: 被告人因与他人发生口角后将对方殴打致重伤 / A defendant severely beat another person following a verbal altercation, causing serious injury.
cn_claim: 故意伤害他人身体致人重伤的构成故意伤害罪，处三年以上十年以下有期徒刑（刑法第234条第二款）。
us_claim: Assault resulting in serious bodily injury constitutes aggravated assault under state law; if the injury meets the federal definition of serious bodily injury, federal charges may apply where jurisdiction exists.
hk_claim: A person who unlawfully and maliciously wounds or inflicts grievous bodily harm upon another commits an offense under the Offences Against the Person Ordinance (Cap. 212) s.19.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize serious assault with enhanced penalties, applying specific statutory provisions with gradations based on injury severity.

fact_summary: 消费者在美容院办理预付卡后美容院因经营不善倒闭 / A consumer purchased a prepaid beauty-salon card and the salon subsequently closed due to business failure.
cn_claim: 经营者以预收款方式提供商品或服务未按约定提供的应退回预付款并承担利息及合理费用（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: A consumer holding a prepaid card from a business that has closed may file a claim in bankruptcy proceedings as a general unsecured creditor; some states have consumer-protection laws requiring prepaid-card funds to be held in escrow or bonded.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for consumers when prepaid-service providers close, with CN imposing a statutory refund obligation and US using bankruptcy claims and state consumer-protection laws.

fact_summary: 消费者办理预付卡后美容院倒闭 / A consumer's prepaid beauty-salon card became worthless when the salon closed.
cn_claim: 预收款未按约定提供的应退回预付款并承担费用（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A consumer who holds a prepaid card from a business that has closed may file a proof of debt in the winding-up proceedings; the consumer is an unsecured creditor.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for consumers when prepaid-service providers close, with CN imposing a statutory refund duty and HK allowing proof of debt in winding-up.

fact_summary: 幼儿园食品采购人员采购变质食材导致多名幼儿食物中毒 / A kindergarten food purchaser procured spoiled ingredients, causing multiple children to suffer food poisoning.
cn_claim: 学校、幼儿园等教育机构应确保提供给学生的食品安全（食品安全法第57条第一款）；因食品安全问题造成学生损害的应承担侵权责任。
us_claim: A childcare facility that serves contaminated food is liable under negligence and products-liability theories for resulting injuries; violation of state and local health-code requirements constitutes negligence per se.
hk_claim: A kindergarten that provides unsafe food to children is liable under negligence and the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314); violation of food-safety regulations is evidence of breach.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose strict food-safety duties on childcare facilities and hold them liable for foodborne illness.

fact_summary: 被告人利用微信群组织他人进行线上赌博并抽头渔利 / A defendant organized an online gambling ring through WeChat groups and took a cut of the wagers.
cn_claim: 以营利为目的组织他人赌博的构成开设赌场罪（刑法第303条第二款）；利用网络组织赌博的同样构成本罪。
us_claim: Operating an illegal online gambling business violates the Unlawful Internet Gambling Enforcement Act (31 U.S.C. § 5361 et seq.) and the Wire Act (18 U.S.C. § 1084); racketeering charges may also apply under RICO (18 U.S.C. § 1961 et seq.).
hk_claim: Organizing gambling in a place other than an authorized gambling establishment is an offense under the Gambling Ordinance (Cap. 148) s.5; online-gambling operations are also subject to these provisions.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unauthorized online-gambling operations.

fact_summary: 公司对外提供担保未经董事会或股东会决议 / A company provided a third-party guarantee without a board or shareholder resolution.
cn_claim: 公司为他人提供担保的应依照公司章程由董事会或股东会决议（公司法第16条第一款）；未经决议的担保对公司不发生效力。
us_claim: A corporate guarantee issued without proper board authorization may be ultra vires and unenforceable; however, the corporation may be estopped from denying the guarantee if the third party relied on the corporation's representations of authority.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require proper internal authorization for corporate guarantees, with CN using a statutory resolution requirement and US applying ultra-vires and estoppel doctrines.

fact_summary: 公司对外提供担保未经董事会或股东会决议 / A company provided a guarantee without board or shareholder resolution.
cn_claim: 对外担保应由董事会或股东会决议（公司法第16条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A company may provide a guarantee if authorized by its articles; directors must act within their powers, and a guarantee given without proper authority may be void or voidable.
notes: Both CN and HK require proper authorization for corporate guarantees, with CN imposing a statutory resolution requirement and HK applying corporate-authority principles.

fact_summary: 消费者通过视频直播购买的大闸蟹收到后发现均已死亡 / A consumer who purchased hairy crabs through a livestream received a shipment of dead crabs.
cn_claim: 经营者提供的鲜活商品应保证交付时符合质量要求（消费者权益保护法第23条第一款）；收到死亡大闸蟹的消费者可要求退款并赔偿。
us_claim: Receiving dead perishable goods constitutes a breach of contract and the implied warranty of merchantability under the Uniform Commercial Code § 2-314; the buyer is entitled to a refund and consequential damages.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require sellers to deliver perishable goods in satisfactory condition and provide remedies for non-conforming delivery.

fact_summary: 消费者通过视频直播购买的大闸蟹收到后发现均已死亡 / A consumer received dead hairy crabs purchased through a livestream.
cn_claim: 交付鲜活商品不符合质量要求的可要求退款赔偿。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Goods must be of merchantable quality under the Sale of Goods Ordinance (Cap. 26); dead crabs are not of merchantable quality and the buyer is entitled to reject the goods and obtain a refund.
notes: Both CN and HK require perishable goods to be delivered in satisfactory condition and provide refund remedies.

fact_summary: 某网站提供大量未经授权的电子书下载 / A website offered large numbers of unauthorized e-book downloads.
cn_claim: 未经著作权人许可通过信息网络向公众提供其作品的构成侵犯信息网络传播权（著作权法第10条第一款第十二项、第53条）。
us_claim: Offering unauthorized e-book downloads infringes the exclusive right of distribution under 17 U.S.C. § 106(3); the website operator may be liable for direct, contributory, or vicarious copyright infringement.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit unauthorized e-book distribution on websites and hold operators liable for copyright infringement.

fact_summary: 某网站提供大量未经授权的电子书下载 / A website offered large numbers of unauthorized e-book downloads.
cn_claim: 未经许可提供电子书下载构成侵犯信息网络传播权（著作权法第10条、第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Making available unauthorized copies of copyrighted works for download infringes the copyright under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528).
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit unauthorized e-book distribution and hold website operators liable for copyright infringement.

fact_summary: 公司以员工违反公司着装规定为由将其开除但该规定未向员工公示 / An employee was terminated for violating a company dress code that had not been communicated to employees.
cn_claim: 用人单位的规章制度须经公示或告知劳动者（劳动合同法第4条）；未向员工公示的着装规定不得作为解除劳动合同的依据。
us_claim: An employer that terminates an employee for violating an uncommunicated policy may face a claim for wrongful termination; the employee must have had actual or constructive knowledge of the policy for the termination to be upheld.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require workplace rules to be communicated to employees before they can form the basis for adverse employment action.

fact_summary: 员工因违反未公示的着装规定被开除 / An employee was terminated for violating an uncommunicated dress code.
cn_claim: 规章制度须公示或告知劳动者（劳动合同法第4条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An employer must bring disciplinary rules to the attention of employees; termination for violating a rule the employee did not know about may be unreasonable.
notes: Both CN and HK require workplace rules to be communicated to employees before they can support disciplinary termination.

fact_summary: 某县出台文件限制记者在本地进行舆论监督报道 / A county issued a document restricting journalists from conducting public-interest reporting in the locality.
cn_claim: 公民有言论、出版自由（宪法第35条）；舆论监督是新闻媒体的合法权利受法律保护。
us_claim: A government restriction on press reporting is a prior restraint subject to the highest presumption of unconstitutionality under the First Amendment; the government bears a heavy burden to justify any restriction on newsgathering; Near v. Minnesota, 283 U.S. 697 (1931).
hk_claim: Freedom of the press is protected under the Basic Law (Art. 27) and the Hong Kong Bill of Rights (Cap. 383) Art. 16; restrictions on journalistic activity must be prescribed by law and necessary.
notes: All three jurisdictions protect press freedom but with different constitutional frameworks: CN protects speech and publication under the Constitution, US applies strict prior-restraint doctrine, and HK applies the Bill of Rights.

fact_summary: 境内互联网平台拟将在华经营期间收集的用户行为数据传输至境外进行大数据分析 / An internet platform planned to transmit user-behavior data collected during its China operations abroad for big-data analysis.
cn_claim: 处理大量个人信息的个人信息处理者确需向境外提供个人信息的应通过国家网信部门组织的安全评估（个人信息保护法第40条）。
us_claim: Cross-border transmission of user-behavior data for analysis is regulated under the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework for European data and general FTC § 5 consumer-protection principles for domestic data; there is no general federal data-localization requirement for commercial internet-platform data.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN imposes comprehensive data-localization and security-assessment requirements, while US lacks a general federal data-localization mandate, creating a significant regulatory asymmetry for internet platforms.

fact_summary: 被告人被判处有期徒刑后因患有严重疾病需要保外就医 / A defendant sentenced to fixed-term imprisonment required medical treatment outside prison due to a serious illness.
cn_claim: 有严重疾病需要保外就医的可暂予监外执行（刑事诉讼法第265条第一款第一项）。
us_claim: A federal prisoner who requires medical care that cannot be adequately provided within the Bureau of Prisons may be eligible for compassionate release under 18 U.S.C. § 3582(c)(1)(A); the defendant must exhaust administrative remedies or wait 30 days before petitioning the court.
hk_claim: A prisoner who is suffering from a terminal illness or is seriously incapacitated may be considered for early release on compassionate grounds under the Long-Term Prison Sentences Review Ordinance (Cap. 524).
notes: All three jurisdictions permit medical release for seriously ill inmates, through temporary medical parole (CN), compassionate release (US), or early release on health grounds (HK).

fact_summary: 外卖骑手在配送途中发生交通事故，顾客因长时间等待食物变质而要求赔偿 / A delivery rider had a traffic accident during delivery; the customer whose food spoiled from the prolonged wait demanded compensation.
cn_claim: 因第三人原因造成违约的债务人应向债权人承担违约责任（民法典第593条）；外卖平台应先行赔偿后再向交通事故责任方追偿。
us_claim: A food-delivery company is liable to the customer for non-delivery or spoiled delivery, and it may seek indemnification from the responsible third party (such as the at-fault driver in the accident).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold the delivery platform liable to the customer for non-delivery and allow the platform to seek recovery from the responsible third party.

fact_summary: 外卖骑手配送途中发生车祸导致顾客食物损失 / A delivery rider had an accident during delivery, and the customer's food was lost.
cn_claim: 债务人因第三人原因违约的应先行赔偿（民法典第593条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A delivery company that fails to deliver due to an accident during transit remains liable to the customer for breach of contract, and may seek indemnification from the responsible party.
notes: Both CN and HK hold the delivery platform liable for non-delivery and permit recovery from the responsible third party.

fact_summary: 某小区的电动自行车充电桩因线路老化引发火灾烧毁多辆车 / An electric-bike charging station in a residential compound caught fire due to aging wiring, destroying multiple vehicles.
cn_claim: 充电设施的管理人未能确保用电安全的应对火灾造成的损失承担侵权责任（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: The operator of an EV charging station that causes a fire due to negligent maintenance is liable for resulting property damage under negligence and products-liability theories; violation of the National Electrical Code constitutes negligence per se.
hk_claim: An occupier or operator of charging facilities who fails to maintain electrical equipment in safe condition is liable for fire damage under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314) and common-law negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose safety-maintenance duties on charging-station operators for fire prevention.

fact_summary: 公司股东在认缴期限届满前将未实缴的股权转让给明显无履行能力的第三人 / A shareholder transferred unpaid shares to a third party who was clearly incapable of meeting the capital-contribution obligation before the subscription deadline.
cn_claim: 股东未履行出资义务即转让股权且受让人对此知道或应当知道的，公司可请求该股东履行出资义务、受让人对此承担连带责任（公司法解释三第18条）。
us_claim: A shareholder who transfers shares to an insolvent transferee to avoid capital-call obligations may be liable for fraudulent transfer; the transferor remains liable for unpaid capital contributions where the transfer was made to evade liability.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold transferor shareholders liable for unpaid capital contributions where shares are transferred to an insolvent party to avoid the obligation.

fact_summary: 公司股东在认缴期限届满前将未实缴的股权转让给明显无履行能力的第三人 / A shareholder transferred unpaid shares to a clearly incapable third party.
cn_claim: 未履行出资义务即转让股权的股东及知情的受让人承担连带责任（公司法解释三第18条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A shareholder who transfers shares to avoid capital-contribution obligations may be liable for the unpaid amount; the court may look through the transfer to the substance of the arrangement.
notes: Both CN and HK hold shareholders liable for unpaid capital contributions where the transfer was made to evade the obligation.

fact_summary: 某数据平台未经许可收集并出售他人公开的学术论文 / A data platform collected and sold others' publicly-available academic papers without authorization.
cn_claim: 未经著作权人许可通过信息网络向公众提供其作品的构成侵犯信息网络传播权（著作权法第10条第一款第十二项）；学术论文受著作权保护。
us_claim: Compiling and selling copyrighted academic articles without a license infringes the reproduction and distribution rights under 17 U.S.C. § 106; the fair-use defense may apply for certain educational and research uses but generally not for commercial resale.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require a license for commercial compilation and resale of copyrighted academic articles.

fact_summary: 某数据平台未经许可收集并出售他人公开的学术论文 / A data platform collected and sold publicly-available academic papers without authorization.
cn_claim: 未经许可提供学术论文下载构成侵犯信息网络传播权（著作权法第10条第一款第十二项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Making available copyrighted academic articles for sale without a license infringes the copyright under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528).
notes: Both CN and HK require a license for commercial distribution of copyrighted academic articles.

fact_summary: 境内企业拟向境外云服务提供商上传包含客户个人信息的业务数据 / A domestic enterprise planned to upload business data containing customer personal information to an overseas cloud-service provider.
cn_claim: 向境外提供个人信息的应通过出境安全评估或订立标准合同并取得个人单独同意（个人信息保护法第38条、第39条）。
us_claim: Transfer of customer data to overseas cloud providers is generally permitted with contractual safeguards and notice to data subjects under the FTC Act; sectoral regulations (HIPAA, GLBA) impose additional requirements for health and financial data; the CLOUD Act addresses law-enforcement access but does not restrict commercial data transfer.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN imposes significant restrictions on cross-border transfer of personal data to cloud providers, while US relies primarily on contractual safeguards and sectoral regulation, creating a regulatory asymmetry.

fact_summary: 被告人非法制造枪支出售给他人用于抢劫 / A defendant illegally manufactured a firearm and sold it to another person for use in a robbery.
cn_claim: 非法制造、买卖枪支的构成非法制造、买卖枪支罪（刑法第125条第一款）；明知他人用于犯罪仍提供枪支的从重处罚。
us_claim: Unlicensed manufacture and sale of firearms is a federal crime under the Gun Control Act (18 U.S.C. § 922(a)(1)); providing a firearm knowing it will be used in a crime of violence carries enhanced penalties under 18 U.S.C. § 924(c).
hk_claim: Unlicensed possession, manufacture, or dealing in arms is an offense under the Firearms and Ammunition Ordinance (Cap. 238); providing a firearm for use in a criminal offense is a serious aggravating factor.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for illegal firearms manufacture and supply, with enhanced sanctions where the weapon is supplied for criminal use.

fact_summary: 快递公司员工私拆客户包裹盗取物品 / A courier-company employee opened a customer's parcel and stole the contents.
cn_claim: 快递企业应对快件安全负责（快递暂行条例第25条）；员工私拆包裹盗取物品的快递企业应先向客户赔偿再向员工追偿（民法典第1191条第一款）。
us_claim: A carrier is strictly liable for loss of goods in transit under the Carmack Amendment (49 U.S.C. § 14706); employee theft is not a defense, and the carrier must compensate the shipper.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold carriers vicariously liable for employee theft of shipped goods, requiring the carrier to compensate the customer.

fact_summary: 快递公司员工私拆客户包裹盗取物品 / A courier-company employee opened a parcel and stole the contents.
cn_claim: 快递企业应先向客户赔偿再向员工追偿（民法典第1191条第一款；快递暂行条例第25条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A courier company is liable for the theft of goods by its employees in the course of employment under the doctrine of vicarious liability; the customer is entitled to compensation for the loss.
notes: Both CN and HK hold courier companies vicariously liable for employee theft of customer parcels.

fact_summary: 某景区未在高风险区域设置警示标志致游客坠崖 / A scenic area failed to post warning signs in a high-risk zone, resulting in a tourist falling off a cliff.
cn_claim: 景区经营者应在危险区域设置明显的警示标志并采取必要的安全防护措施（民法典第1198条第一款；旅游法第80条）。
us_claim: A premises owner or operator of a recreational area owes a duty to warn of hidden dangers that are not obvious to visitors; failure to post warnings at known hazardous locations such as cliff edges constitutes negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier of a scenic area owes a common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314); failure to warn of cliff-edge dangers is a breach of that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions require scenic-area operators to warn of hidden natural hazards and provide safety measures at dangerous locations.

fact_summary: 公司实际控制人通过关联交易将公司利润转移至自己控制的境外公司 / A company's de facto controller diverted corporate profits to an overseas entity under their control through related-party transactions.
cn_claim: 公司的控股股东、实际控制人利用关联交易损害公司利益的应承担赔偿责任（公司法第21条）。
us_claim: A controlling shareholder who uses related-party transactions to siphon corporate profits breaches fiduciary duties; the transaction must satisfy the entire-fairness standard and the controller is liable for the diverted profits; Kahn v. M & F Worldwide Corp., 88 A.3d 635 (Del. 2014).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US impose strict fiduciary constraints on controlling-shareholder self-dealing, requiring independent approval or entire fairness.

fact_summary: 公司实际控制人通过关联交易将公司利润转移至自己控制的境外公司 / A de facto controller diverted corporate profits to an overseas entity through related-party transactions.
cn_claim: 利用关联交易损害公司利益的应承担赔偿责任（公司法第21条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A controller who diverts corporate profits through related-party transactions breaches fiduciary duties; the transaction may be challenged as unfairly prejudicial conduct.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit controlling-person self-dealing and provide damages and equitable remedies.

fact_summary: 某在线教育平台未经许可使用了他人的授课视频 / An online-education platform used another instructor's recorded lectures without permission.
cn_claim: 授课视频符合独创性要求的构成视听作品受著作权保护（著作权法第3条第六项）；未经许可使用他人授课视频的构成侵权。
us_claim: Unauthorized use of copyrighted lecture videos on an education platform infringes the reproduction and public-performance rights under 17 U.S.C. § 106; the educational-use exception under § 110(1) is limited to face-to-face teaching in nonprofit educational institutions.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require a license for use of copyrighted lecture videos on online platforms, with limited educational exceptions.

fact_summary: 某在线教育平台未经许可使用了他人的授课视频 / An online-education platform used another's lecture videos without permission.
cn_claim: 未经许可使用他人授课视频构成侵权（著作权法第3条第六项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Reproducing and communicating copyrighted lecture videos to the public without a license infringes the copyright under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528).
notes: Both CN and HK require a license for use of copyrighted lecture videos on online platforms.

fact_summary: 被告人为逃避债务与妻子办理离婚手续并将全部财产转移至妻子名下 / A defendant obtained a divorce and transferred all property to the spouse to evade creditors.
cn_claim: 以明显不合理的低价转让财产或以离婚方式转移财产逃避债务的债权人可请求法院撤销该行为（民法典第538条、第539条）。
us_claim: A transfer incident to divorce made with actual intent to defraud creditors is a fraudulent transfer that may be avoided under the Uniform Voidable Transactions Act.
hk_claim: A transfer of property under a divorce settlement made with intent to defraud creditors may be set aside under the Conveyancing and Property Ordinance (Cap. 219) s.60.
notes: All three jurisdictions permit avoidance of fraudulent transfers made through divorce settlements to evade creditors.

fact_summary: 租户在承租屋内从事无证食品加工被查处 / A tenant was investigated for operating an unlicensed food-processing business from the rented premises.
cn_claim: 承租人未按照约定使用租赁物的出租人可解除合同（民法典第711条）；非法经营的还可主张赔偿损失。
us_claim: A tenant who uses leased premises for illegal purposes breaches the lease; the landlord may terminate the tenancy and may face nuisance-abatement actions by local authorities.
hk_claim: A tenant who uses the premises for an illegal purpose is in breach of the tenancy agreement; the landlord may forfeit the lease and recover possession.
notes: All three jurisdictions permit landlords to terminate leases where the tenant uses the premises for illegal commercial activities.

fact_summary: 儿童在充气城堡玩时被突然卷起的大风连人带城堡吹翻受伤 / A child was injured when a sudden strong wind flipped the inflatable bounce-house with the child inside.
cn_claim: 充气城堡经营者未采取有效固定措施致人损害的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: An inflatable-amusement operator that fails to adequately secure the structure against foreseeable wind conditions is liable for negligence; violation of ASTM safety standards for inflatable devices is evidence of breach.
hk_claim: An occupier or operator of recreational facilities owes a common duty of care to secure equipment against foreseeable weather hazards; failure to anchor an inflatable structure breaches that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose safety duties on inflatable-amusement operators to secure equipment against wind hazards.

fact_summary: 被告人因邻里纠纷故意纵火烧毁他人住宅 / A defendant deliberately set fire to a neighbor's house following a dispute.
cn_claim: 放火危害公共安全尚未造成严重后果的处三年以上十年以下有期徒刑（刑法第114条）；烧毁他人住宅的从重处罚。
us_claim: Arson of a dwelling is a felony under state law; if the arson affects interstate commerce or is committed on federal property, federal arson charges under 18 U.S.C. § 844(i) apply.
hk_claim: Arson with intent to destroy or damage property is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200) s.60.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat arson as a serious felony with severe penalties, especially where dwellings are targeted.

fact_summary: 某地政府以疫情防控为由禁止外地务工人员进入本地 / A local government banned out-of-town workers from entering the jurisdiction, citing pandemic control.
cn_claim: 对公民行动自由的限制应有法律依据并符合比例原则；单纯的户籍身份不能作为禁止进入辖区的合法理由。
us_claim: A state law that discriminates against out-of-state residents by barring entry violates the right to travel under the Privileges and Immunities Clause and the dormant Commerce Clause; Saenz v. Roe, 526 U.S. 489 (1999).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US protect freedom of movement across internal jurisdictional boundaries, with CN applying constitutional proportionality and US applying the constitutional right to travel.

fact_summary: 某地政府以疫情防控为由禁止外地务工人员进入本地 / A local government banned out-of-town workers from entering during the pandemic.
cn_claim: 对公民行动自由的限制应有法律依据并符合比例原则。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Freedom of movement within Hong Kong is protected under the Basic Law (Art. 31); restrictions on movement must be prescribed by law and not arbitrary.
notes: Both CN and HK protect internal freedom of movement against arbitrary restrictions.

fact_summary: 境内企业因跨国并购尽职调查需将财务数据传输至境外审计团队 / A domestic enterprise needed to transmit financial data to an overseas audit team for cross-border M&A due diligence.
cn_claim: 向境外提供重要数据的应通过安全评估（数据安全法第36条）；企业并购尽职调查中的财务数据出境应依法进行安全评估。
us_claim: Cross-border transfer of financial data for M&A due diligence is generally permitted subject to confidentiality agreements and securities-law requirements; sectoral regulations such as the Sarbanes-Oxley Act impose audit-committee oversight requirements but do not restrict cross-border audit-data transfers.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN imposes significant restrictions on cross-border financial-data transfers for M&A due diligence, while US permits such transfers with contractual safeguards, creating a regulatory asymmetry.

fact_summary: 消费者购买盲盒后认为其概率设置不透明涉嫌欺诈 / A consumer who purchased mystery boxes believed the probability settings were opaque and potentially fraudulent.
cn_claim: 经营者采用盲盒等方式销售商品的应以显著方式公示商品抽取概率（上海市盲盒经营活动合规指引第6条）；概率不透明的可能构成欺诈。
us_claim: Sale of loot boxes or mystery boxes without disclosing the odds may violate the FTC Act § 5 prohibition on unfair or deceptive practices; the FTC has indicated that undisclosed odds in loot-box mechanisms are a consumer-protection concern.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require disclosure of odds in mystery-box and loot-box sales, with CN providing specific guidance and US applying consumer-protection law.

fact_summary: 消费者购买盲盒后认为概率设置不透明涉嫌欺诈 / A consumer believed mystery-box probability settings were opaque and possibly fraudulent.
cn_claim: 盲盒销售应公示抽取概率（上海市盲盒经营活动合规指引第6条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A trader who fails to disclose material information about the odds of obtaining particular items in a mystery-box sale may engage in misleading conduct under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK require disclosure of odds in mystery-box sales, with CN providing specific guidance and HK applying the Trade Descriptions Ordinance.

fact_summary: 被告人在监狱服刑期间因制止他人暴力行为而立功 / While serving a prison sentence, a defendant was credited with meritorious service for stopping another inmate's violent attack.
cn_claim: 犯罪分子在服刑期间有立功表现的可减刑（刑法第78条第一款）；制止他人犯罪活动的属于立功表现。
us_claim: An inmate who provides substantial assistance to prison authorities, including intervening to prevent violence, may receive a sentence reduction, and such conduct is a factor in parole consideration.
hk_claim: An inmate who intervenes to prevent violence or otherwise assists in maintaining prison discipline may receive a remission of sentence or other benefits.
notes: All three jurisdictions reward inmates for meritorious conduct during incarceration, including intervention to prevent violence.

fact_summary: 某网购平台上的商户未经授权使用知名动画形象制作玩偶销售 / A merchant on an e-commerce platform manufactured and sold dolls using a well-known animated character without authorization.
cn_claim: 未经许可使用他人享有著作权的动画形象制作商品销售构成著作权侵权（著作权法第10条第一款第六项、第53条）。
us_claim: Manufacturing and selling merchandise bearing copyrighted characters without a license infringes the reproduction and distribution rights under 17 U.S.C. § 106; the copyright owner may seek statutory damages and injunctive relief.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US protect character merchandising rights, requiring a license for goods bearing copyrighted characters.

fact_summary: 某网购平台上的商户未经授权使用知名动画形象制作玩偶销售 / A merchant sold dolls using a well-known animated character without authorization.
cn_claim: 未经许可使用动画形象制作商品销售构成著作权侵权（著作权法第10条第一款第六项、第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Manufacturing and selling goods bearing copyrighted characters without a license infringes the copyright under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528) and may also constitute passing off if the goods cause consumer confusion.
notes: Both CN and HK protect character merchandising rights and require a license for goods bearing copyrighted characters.

fact_summary: 理发店为顾客染发时使用了过期染发剂导致顾客头皮严重过敏 / A hair salon used expired hair dye on a customer, causing a severe allergic reaction on the scalp.
cn_claim: 美容美发经营者应使用符合质量标准的化妆品（化妆品监督管理条例第35条第一款）；使用过期染发剂致人损害的应承担侵权责任。
us_claim: A salon that uses expired or defective products on a client is liable under negligence and products-liability theories; violation of FDA cosmetic-labeling and safety regulations is evidence of breach.
hk_claim: A salon occupier who uses unsafe products on clients breaches the common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314) and may be liable under the Consumer Goods Safety Ordinance (Cap. 456).
notes: All three jurisdictions hold salons liable for injuries caused by expired or unsafe products applied to clients.

fact_summary: 被告人通过直播平台进行淫秽表演并收取观众打赏 / A defendant performed obscene acts on a livestreaming platform and received viewer gratuities.
cn_claim: 以牟利为目的传播淫秽物品的构成传播淫秽物品牟利罪（刑法第363条第一款）。
us_claim: Transmitting obscene material via the internet for commercial purposes is prohibited under 18 U.S.C. § 1465 and § 1470; the Miller v. California, 413 U.S. 15 (1973) test determines obscenity.
hk_claim: Publishing obscene articles, including by livestreaming, for gain is an offense under the Control of Obscene and Indecent Articles Ordinance (Cap. 390) s.21.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize commercial obscene performances via the internet.

fact_summary: 业主大会选聘新物业公司后原物业公司拒绝交接 / After the owners' general meeting selected a new property-management company, the original company refused to hand over.
cn_claim: 物业服务合同终止后原物业服务人应在约定期限或合理期限内退出并移交相关资料和费用（民法典第949条；物业管理条例第38条）。
us_claim: An outgoing HOA management company that refuses to turn over records and accounts breaches its contractual and fiduciary duties; the HOA may seek injunctive relief and damages for the transition delay.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require outgoing property managers to cooperate in transition and provide remedies for refusal to hand over.

fact_summary: 业主大会选聘新物业公司后原物业公司拒绝交接 / After the owners selected a new management company, the outgoing company refused to hand over.
cn_claim: 原物业服务人应在合理期限内退出并移交资料（民法典第949条；物业管理条例第38条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An outgoing management company that refuses to hand over records and accounts to the incoming manager breaches its contractual duties and may be compelled by court order to deliver up the necessary documents.
notes: Both CN and HK require outgoing property managers to cooperate in transition, with CN imposing statutory handover duties and HK providing injunctive relief.

fact_summary: 某跨国公司在并购整合中将中国子公司的员工个人信息传输至海外母公司HR系统 / A multinational corporation transferred its Chinese subsidiary's employee personal data to the overseas parent's HR system as part of a post-merger integration.
cn_claim: 向境外提供员工个人信息的应通过出境安全评估或订立标准合同并取得个人单独同意（个人信息保护法第38条、第39条）。
us_claim: Transfer of employee personal data to an overseas parent for HR integration purposes is generally permitted under notice and contractual-safeguard principles; sectoral regulations impose additional requirements for certain categories of employee data.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN imposes more stringent pre-approval and consent requirements for cross-border employee-data transfers than the US, creating a compliance asymmetry for post-merger integrations.

fact_summary: 公司因女员工休产假安排其他人替代其岗位，产假结束后拒绝其返回原岗位 / A company replaced a female employee during her maternity leave and refused to reinstate her to her original position upon her return.
cn_claim: 用人单位不得因女职工怀孕、生育、哺乳降低其工资、予以辞退或与其解除劳动合同（妇女权益保障法第48条第一款）。
us_claim: An employee returning from FMLA leave (29 U.S.C. § 2614(a)) is entitled to be restored to the same or an equivalent position; failure to reinstate is an FMLA violation and may also constitute pregnancy discrimination under the PDA.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require employers to reinstate employees returning from maternity leave to their original or equivalent positions.

fact_summary: 公司因女员工休产假安排他人替代其岗位，产假结束后拒绝其返回原岗位 / A company replaced a female employee during maternity leave and refused reinstatement.
cn_claim: 不得因女职工怀孕、生育降低其工资或解除劳动合同（妇女权益保障法第48条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An employee who returns from maternity leave is entitled to return to her original job or a suitable alternative position; failure to reinstate constitutes pregnancy discrimination under the Sex Discrimination Ordinance (Cap. 480).
notes: Both CN and HK protect employees' right to return to their position after maternity leave.

fact_summary: 某视频平台利用深度链接技术将其他视频网站的内容嵌入自己的网页中播放 / A video platform used deep-linking technology to embed content from other video sites in its own web pages for playback.
cn_claim: 未经许可通过深度链接提供他人作品的可能构成侵犯信息网络传播权（著作权法第10条第一款第十二项）；破坏他人技术措施的可能构成不正当竞争。
us_claim: Deep-linking to copyrighted content may infringe the public-display right under 17 U.S.C. § 106(5) and may constitute contributory infringement; Perfect 10, Inc. v. Amazon.com, Inc., 508 F.3d 1146 (9th Cir. 2007).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US treat deep-linking to copyrighted content as potentially infringing, with CN applying information-network-transmission and unfair-competition laws and US applying display-right and contributory-infringement analysis.

fact_summary: 某视频平台利用深度链接技术将其他视频网站的内容嵌入自己的网页中播放 / A video platform used deep-linking to embed content from other sites.
cn_claim: 未经许可通过深度链接提供他人作品的可能构成侵权（著作权法第10条第一款第十二项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Deep-linking to copyrighted content without authorization may constitute an infringement of the communication-to-the-public right under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528), depending on whether the work is made available to a new public.
notes: Both CN and HK treat deep-linking to copyrighted content as potentially infringing, applying the communication-to-the-public right.

fact_summary: 被告人将拾得的他人信用卡在ATM机上取款 / A defendant used a found credit card to withdraw cash from an ATM.
cn_claim: 冒用他人信用卡的构成信用卡诈骗罪（刑法第196条第一款第三项）。
us_claim: Using a credit card belonging to another person without authorization constitutes credit-card fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1029 and may also constitute identity theft under 18 U.S.C. § 1028.
hk_claim: Using a credit card belonging to another without authority to obtain cash is theft under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210) and may also constitute obtaining property by deception.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the unauthorized use of another's credit card to obtain money.

fact_summary: 被告人因盗窃被刑事拘留后主动供述了公安机关不掌握的其他盗窃事实 / While in criminal detention for theft, a defendant voluntarily disclosed other thefts unknown to the police.
cn_claim: 被采取强制措施的犯罪嫌疑人如实供述司法机关尚未掌握的其他罪行的以自首论可从轻或减轻处罚（刑法第67条第二款）。
us_claim: Voluntary disclosure of additional uncharged criminal conduct that is not yet known to authorities may support a downward departure for cooperation under the U.S. Sentencing Guidelines § 5K1.1.
hk_claim: A defendant who voluntarily discloses additional offenses while in custody is entitled to a sentencing discount for cooperation; the discount reflects the value of the information and the degree of assistance.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide sentencing benefits for detainees who voluntarily disclose additional unknown offenses.

fact_summary: 消费者在网店购买商品后商家在发货前以标错价为由单方取消订单 / A merchant unilaterally cancelled an online order before shipment, claiming the price was listed in error.
cn_claim: 商家以标错价为由取消订单的需证明构成重大误解（民法典第147条）；未能证明重大误解的消费者可要求继续履行或赔偿。
us_claim: An online merchant that cancels an order after acceptance is in breach of contract unless the pricing error was so obvious that the buyer could not reasonably have believed the price was correct; contract formation under U.C.C. § 2-204 and the doctrine of unilateral mistake.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US allow retailers to cancel orders for genuine pricing errors under mistake doctrines, but require the error to be clear and obvious.

fact_summary: 商家以标错价为由单方取消订单 / A merchant unilaterally cancelled an order claiming a pricing error.
cn_claim: 须证明构成重大误解方可撤销（民法典第147条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A merchant who cancels an accepted order based on a pricing error may be in breach of contract; the defense of mistake is available only in limited circumstances where the mistake was fundamental and the other party knew or ought to have known of it.
notes: Both CN and HK allow cancellation for genuine pricing mistakes under limited mistake doctrines.

fact_summary: 某酒店公共浴池水温调节故障致顾客烫伤 / A hotel guest was scalded by a malfunctioning temperature control in the public bath.
cn_claim: 酒店经营者应确保其设施安全（民法典第1198条第一款）；水温调节故障致客人烫伤的酒店应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A hotel that fails to maintain safe water-temperature controls breaches the duty of care owed to guests; the hotel is liable for negligence and may be strictly liable under the doctrine of res ipsa loquitur.
hk_claim: An occupier of a hotel owes a common duty of care to guests under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314); failure to maintain safe bath-temperature controls breaches that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose premises-safety duties on hotels for safe water-temperature control.

fact_summary: 被告人将公司交其保管的巨额现金私自挪用购买理财产品 / A defendant misappropriated a large sum of company cash entrusted to them and used it to purchase financial products.
cn_claim: 公司工作人员利用职务便利挪用本单位资金归个人使用数额较大超过三个月未还的构成挪用资金罪（刑法第272条第一款）。
us_claim: An employee who converts entrusted corporate funds for personal investment commits embezzlement under state law; if the funds were transferred electronically, federal wire-fraud charges under 18 U.S.C. § 1343 may also apply.
hk_claim: A person who dishonestly appropriates property belonging to another with the intention of permanently depriving the other of it commits theft under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize misappropriation of corporate funds by employees, with CN providing a specific statutory offense and US/HK applying embezzlement and theft statutes.

fact_summary: 公司被吊销营业执照后其法定代表人继续以公司名义对外签约 / After the company's business license was revoked, the legal representative continued to enter into contracts in the company's name.
cn_claim: 被吊销营业执照的企业不得从事经营活动（公司法第213条）；法定代表人以被吊销企业名义签约的应对由此产生的债务承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A person who enters into contracts in the name of a dissolved corporation may be personally liable under the doctrine of de facto corporation or as a promoter of a non-existent entity.
hk_claim: A person who carries on business in the name of a dissolved company is personally liable for obligations incurred, and may also be subject to criminal penalties.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose personal liability on persons who continue to operate under the name of a dissolved company.

fact_summary: 某浏览器通过广告拦截功能屏蔽了视频网站的前贴片广告并因此获得大量用户 / A browser blocked pre-roll ads on video-streaming sites through an ad-blocking feature and gained a large user base as a result.
cn_claim: 未经许可破坏他人合法提供的网络产品或服务的正常运行包括屏蔽广告构成不正当竞争（反不正当竞争法第12条第二款第四项）。
us_claim: Ad-blocking software that interferes with the delivery of advertisements may raise tortious-interference claims but has not been uniformly held to be unlawful; some courts have held that ad-blocking does not constitute tortious interference with contractual relations.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN has a more developed statutory prohibition on circumventing advertising models, while US treatment of ad-blocking remains legally unsettled.

fact_summary: 某浏览器通过广告拦截功能屏蔽了视频网站的前贴片广告 / A browser blocked pre-roll ads on video-streaming sites through an ad-blocking feature.
cn_claim: 屏蔽广告破坏网络服务正常运行构成不正当竞争（反不正当竞争法第12条第二款第四项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: There is no specific statutory prohibition on ad-blocking in Hong Kong; whether it constitutes passing off or copyright infringement depends on the specific technical mechanism used.
notes: CN specifically prohibits ad-blocking as unfair competition, while HK does not have equivalent legislation.

fact_summary: 儿童在幼儿园因老师疏于看管被同学用铅笔戳伤眼睛 / A child was poked in the eye with a pencil by a classmate due to the teacher's negligent supervision in a kindergarten.
cn_claim: 无民事行为能力人在教育机构学习生活期间受到人身损害的教育机构应承担推定过错责任（民法典第1199条）。
us_claim: A childcare facility owes a heightened duty of supervision to young children; failure to adequately supervise children during class activities constitutes negligence; the facility is liable for foreseeable injuries to children in its care.
hk_claim: A kindergarten owes a high duty of care to children in its charge; failure to adequately supervise young children to prevent foreseeable harm constitutes a breach of that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose a heightened duty of supervision on childcare facilities for the protection of children in their care.

fact_summary: 购房者与开发商签订的认购书中未约定房屋交付日期但已支付定金 / A homebuyer signed a reservation agreement with a developer that did not specify a delivery date but had already paid a deposit.
cn_claim: 认购书具备商品房买卖合同主要内容的可认定为商品房买卖合同（商品房买卖合同司法解释第5条）；未约定交付日期可补充协商或依法确定。
us_claim: A reservation agreement that contains the essential terms of a real-estate contract may be enforceable as a binding contract; the absence of a delivery date may be filled by a reasonable-time term.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US may enforce reservation agreements as binding contracts where essential terms are present, supplying missing terms through reasonable-time default rules.

fact_summary: 购房者签订认购书支付定金后合同未约定交付日期 / A buyer signed a reservation agreement and paid a deposit, but the contract lacked a delivery date.
cn_claim: 具备主要内容的认购书可认定为买卖合同（商品房买卖合同司法解释第5条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A provisional agreement for the sale of land may be specifically enforceable if it contains all essential terms; a missing delivery date may be supplied by a term requiring delivery within a reasonable time.
notes: Both CN and HK may enforce reservation agreements with missing terms by implying a reasonable-time term.

fact_summary: 被告人被羁押期间主动向公安机关提供了其他犯罪团伙的重要线索 / While in custody, a defendant voluntarily provided critical leads on another criminal group.
cn_claim: 犯罪分子提供重要线索从而得以侦破其他案件的构成立功可从轻或减轻处罚；有重大立功表现的可减轻或免除处罚（刑法第68条）。
us_claim: Providing substantial assistance in the investigation of other criminal activity entitles the defendant to a downward departure under U.S. Sentencing Guidelines § 5K1.1 upon motion by the government.
hk_claim: A defendant who provides valuable information leading to the investigation of other offenders is entitled to a substantial sentencing discount.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide significant sentencing benefits for defendants who assist in investigating other criminal activity.

fact_summary: 消费者在二手平台购买声称95新的手机后发现为翻新机 / A consumer purchased a phone advertised as 95% new on a secondhand platform and discovered it was refurbished.
cn_claim: 经营者将翻新机作为95新正品销售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；应增加赔偿三倍价款。
us_claim: Selling a refurbished phone represented as like-new constitutes fraud and violates the FTC Act § 5; the buyer may seek rescission, damages, and in some states treble damages or punitive damages under consumer-protection laws.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for misrepresented refurbished goods sold as like-new, with CN allowing treble damages and US applying fraud and consumer-protection remedies.

fact_summary: 消费者在二手平台购买声称95新的手机后发现为翻新机 / A consumer purchased a phone represented as 95% new that turned out to be refurbished.
cn_claim: 将翻新机作为95新销售的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A seller who misrepresents a refurbished product as like-new commits fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362) for applying a false trade description.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for refurbished goods misrepresented as like-new, with CN allowing treble damages and HK applying the Trade Descriptions Ordinance.

fact_summary: 地下停车场排气系统故障致一氧化碳积聚致车主中毒 / A car owner suffered carbon-monoxide poisoning in an underground parking garage because the exhaust-ventilation system had failed.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应确保共用设施设备正常运行（民法典第942条第一款）；排气系统故障致人损害的物业公司应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A property manager that fails to maintain ventilation systems in underground parking in safe working condition is liable for resulting injuries under negligence and premises-liability theories; violation of building-code ventilation requirements constitutes negligence per se.
hk_claim: An occupier or property manager who fails to maintain ventilation systems in safe condition breaches the common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose safety duties on property managers to maintain ventilation systems in underground parking.

fact_summary: 上市公司因财务造假被行政处罚后投资者提起证券虚假陈述民事赔偿诉讼 / After a listed company was sanctioned for financial fraud, investors filed a civil suit for securities misrepresentation.
cn_claim: 信息披露义务人虚假陈述给投资者造成损失的应承担赔偿责任（证券法第85条）。
us_claim: Investors who purchased or sold securities at prices affected by the fraud may recover under Section 10(b) of the Securities Exchange Act and Rule 10b-5; reliance is presumed under the fraud-on-the-market theory in an efficient market; Basic Inc. v. Levinson, 485 U.S. 224 (1988).
hk_claim: A listed company that makes false or misleading public statements is liable to compensate investors who relied on the statements and suffered loss under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) s.277.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide civil remedies for securities-fraud investors, with CN, US, and HK each imposing statutory liability.

fact_summary: 某网络文学平台未经海外作者许可将其作品翻译为中文并在平台发布 / A web-novel platform translated foreign authors' works into Chinese and published them on the platform without permission.
cn_claim: 未经许可翻译他人作品的构成侵犯翻译权（著作权法第10条第一款第十五项）；在平台发布翻译作品的构成侵犯信息网络传播权（著作权法第10条第一款第十二项）。
us_claim: Unauthorized translation and publication of copyrighted works infringes the exclusive right to prepare derivative works under 17 U.S.C. § 106(2) and the distribution right under § 106(3).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US protect the translation right and require a license for unauthorized translations and publication.

fact_summary: 某网络文学平台未经海外作者许可将其作品翻译为中文并在平台发布 / A web-novel platform translated foreign authors' works into Chinese and published them without permission.
cn_claim: 未经许可翻译并发布作品构成侵犯翻译权和信息网络传播权（著作权法第10条第一款第十五项、第十二项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Translating and publishing a copyright work without the owner's license infringes the copyright under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528).
notes: Both CN and HK require a license for unauthorized translations and publication of copyrighted works.

fact_summary: 被告人通过黑市购买他人身份信息批量注册公司用于虚开发票 / A defendant purchased others' identity information on the black market to register shell companies for issuing fraudulent invoices.
cn_claim: 非法购买他人身份信息注册空壳公司虚开发票的构成虚开发票罪（刑法第205条之一）并可能构成侵犯公民个人信息罪（刑法第253条之一）。
us_claim: Using stolen identities to register shell companies for fraudulent tax purposes constitutes identity fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1028 and tax fraud under 26 U.S.C. § 7206; it may also constitute racketeering under RICO.
hk_claim: Using another person's identity to register companies for fraudulent purposes constitutes offenses under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200) and may involve offenses under the Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap. 112).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the use of stolen identities to register companies for tax-fraud purposes.

fact_summary: 消费者通过社交媒体购买减肥产品后发现产品无生产批号 / A consumer purchased weight-loss products through social media and discovered they lacked a production batch number.
cn_claim: 销售无生产批号的产品违反食品安全法等相关规定（食品安全法第67条第一款）；销售三无产品的构成欺诈。
us_claim: Selling dietary supplements without required labeling information violates the Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act (21 U.S.C. § 301 et seq.) and FDA regulations; the consumer is entitled to a refund and may seek damages.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require dietary-supplement labeling and provide consumer remedies for unlabeled products.

fact_summary: 消费者通过社交媒体购买减肥产品后发现产品无生产批号 / A consumer purchased weight-loss products through social media that lacked a batch number.
cn_claim: 销售三无产品的构成欺诈（食品安全法第67条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling consumer goods without required labeling may constitute an offense under the Consumer Goods Safety Ordinance (Cap. 456) and the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK require product labeling and provide remedies for unlabeled consumer products.

fact_summary: 露营基地未清理的枯枝在雷击后引发山火烧毁周边果林 / A camp operator's uncleared dead branches ignited by lightning caused a wildfire that destroyed surrounding orchards.
cn_claim: 露营地经营者对营地范围内存在的火灾隐患负有清理和防范义务（民法典第1198条第一款）；未清理枯枝致山火的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A premises occupier who fails to remove known fire hazards may be liable in negligence for resulting fire damage; the duty of care extends to neighboring property where the fire risk is foreseeable.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to manage vegetation and known fire hazards may be liable for damage caused by fire spreading to neighboring property under common-law negligence and nuisance.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose fire-prevention duties on land occupiers and hold them liable for fire damage caused by neglected fire hazards.

fact_summary: 被告人未经许可在自家院内种植罂粟并制成鸦片出售 / A defendant cultivated opium poppies in their yard without authorization and processed them into opium for sale.
cn_claim: 非法种植罂粟五百株以上的构成非法种植毒品原植物罪（刑法第351条第一款）；制造贩卖毒品的从重处罚。
us_claim: Cultivating opium poppies and manufacturing opium without DEA registration is a felony under the Controlled Substances Act (21 U.S.C. § 841(a)(1)); distribution carries severe mandatory-minimum penalties.
hk_claim: Cultivating and manufacturing dangerous drugs without authorization are serious offenses under the Dangerous Drugs Ordinance (Cap. 134).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unauthorized cultivation and processing of opium poppies.

fact_summary: 租户在租房合同到期后继续居住但未续签合同 / A tenant continued to occupy the premises after the lease expired without signing a renewal.
cn_claim: 租赁期满后承租人继续使用租赁物且出租人未提出异议的原租赁合同继续有效但为不定期租赁（民法典第734条第一款）。
us_claim: A tenant who holds over after the lease term expires becomes a tenant at sufferance or a periodic tenant depending on the landlord's acceptance of rent; the tenancy continues on a month-to-month basis with the original terms.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US treat holdover tenancies as continuing on the original terms or as periodic tenancies.

fact_summary: 租房合同到期后继租但未续签合同 / A tenant continued to occupy after the lease expired without signing a renewal.
cn_claim: 未提出异议的转为不定期租赁（民法典第734条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A tenant who holds over after the lease expires and pays rent that is accepted by the landlord becomes a periodic tenant on the same terms as the original lease.
notes: Both CN and HK treat holdover tenancies as continuing on the original terms, with CN converting the lease to an indefinite term and HK creating a periodic tenancy.

fact_summary: 公司董事因怠于履行职责导致公司未及时发现财务人员挪用资金遭受重大损失 / A director's failure to exercise proper oversight allowed an accountant to embezzle company funds over a long period.
cn_claim: 董事对公司负有忠实义务和勤勉义务（公司法第147条第一款）；怠于履行职责造成公司损失的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: Directors owe a duty of care, including a duty to monitor corporate affairs and financial controls; failure to maintain oversight systems that would have detected embezzlement may constitute a breach of the duty of care under the Caremark standard; In re Caremark International Inc. Derivative Litigation, 698 A.2d 959 (Del. Ch. 1996).
hk_claim: Directors must exercise reasonable care, skill, and diligence; failure to supervise and monitor corporate financial affairs may constitute a breach of that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose oversight duties on directors and hold them liable for failure to supervise financial controls that results in embezzlement losses.

fact_summary: 某公司注册了与知名品牌发音相同的商标用于不同类别的商品 / A company registered a trademark phonetically identical to a well-known brand for a different category of goods.
cn_claim: 就不相同或不相类似商品申请注册的商标是复制、摹仿或翻译他人已在中国注册的驰名商标误导公众的应不予注册并禁止使用（商标法第13条第三款）。
us_claim: A famous mark may be protected against dilution by blurring or tarnishment under the Federal Trademark Dilution Act (15 U.S.C. § 1125(c)), even where the goods are not competing and there is no likelihood of confusion.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US protect well-known marks against dilution through registration of phonetically identical marks for different goods.

fact_summary: 某公司注册了与知名品牌发音相同的商标用于不同类别的商品 / A company registered a trademark phonetically identical to a well-known brand for different goods.
cn_claim: 复制驰名商标的应不予注册并禁止使用（商标法第13条第三款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Registration of a mark that takes unfair advantage of or is detrimental to the distinctive character or repute of a well-known trade mark may be refused or declared invalid under the Trade Marks Ordinance (Cap. 559).
notes: Both CN and HK protect well-known marks against dilution through phonetic imitation.

fact_summary: 被告人明知是他人犯罪所得的款项仍通过自己的银行账户代为转移 / A defendant knowingly transferred criminal proceeds through their own bank account on behalf of another.
cn_claim: 明知是犯罪所得及其产生的收益而予以窝藏、转移的构成洗钱罪（刑法第191条第一款）。
us_claim: Transferring the proceeds of criminal activity through one's own account constitutes money laundering under 18 U.S.C. § 1956(a)(1)(B)(i).
hk_claim: Dealing with property known or believed to represent proceeds of crime constitutes money laundering under the Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 455) s.25.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the transfer of criminal proceeds through personal bank accounts.

fact_summary: 公司以员工不胜任工作为由将其从管理岗位调整至保洁岗位 / A company transferred an employee from a management position to a cleaning position citing incompetence.
cn_claim: 调岗应具有合理性并与劳动者的工作能力和岗位要求相适应（劳动合同法第40条第二项）；从管理岗调至保洁岗显然不具备合理性。
us_claim: A demotion from management to janitorial work may constitute constructive discharge if the new position is so objectively intolerable that a reasonable employee would resign; the employee may claim wrongful termination or discrimination.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US treat severely disproportionate demotions as potentially unlawful, with CN applying reasonableness review and US applying constructive-discharge principles.

fact_summary: 公司以员工不胜任工作为由将其从管理岗位调整至保洁岗位 / A company transferred an employee from management to cleaning, citing incompetence.
cn_claim: 调岗应具有合理性（劳动合同法第40条第二项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A demotion from a management position to a cleaning position where there is no reasonable basis for such a change may constitute a constructive dismissal, entitling the employee to terminate and claim remedies.
notes: Both CN and HK treat severely disproportionate demotions as potentially unlawful under reasonableness and constructive-dismissal principles.

fact_summary: 医院因未按规定核对患者信息导致健康者被错误实施手术 / A hospital failed to verify a patient's identity and performed surgery on the wrong healthy person.
cn_claim: 医务人员未尽到与当时医疗水平相应的诊疗义务造成患者损害的医疗机构应承担赔偿责任（民法典第1221条）；手术对象错误构成重大医疗过错。
us_claim: Performing surgery on the wrong patient is a never-event constituting res ipsa loquitur and gross negligence; the hospital and surgeon are liable for medical battery and medical malpractice; the Joint Commission's Universal Protocol requires pre-procedure verification.
hk_claim: Surgery on the wrong patient is a gross breach of the duty of care; the hospital is liable in negligence and the patient is entitled to substantial damages.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat wrong-patient surgery as a clear and serious breach of the duty of care with significant liability.

fact_summary: 被告人因交通肇事致人死亡后驾车逃逸 / A defendant fled the scene of a traffic accident that caused a fatality.
cn_claim: 交通运输肇事后逃逸的处三年以上七年以下有期徒刑；因逃逸致人死亡的处七年以上有期徒刑（刑法第133条）。
us_claim: Leaving the scene of an accident involving death is a felony under state hit-and-run statutes, carrying enhanced penalties.
hk_claim: Failing to stop after a traffic accident causing death is an offense under the Road Traffic Ordinance (Cap. 374) s.36.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose enhanced penalties for fleeing the scene of a fatal traffic accident.

fact_summary: 网络订房平台显示房型与实际入住房型严重不符 / The room type shown on an online booking platform was materially different from the room actually provided.
cn_claim: 经营者提供服务有欺诈行为的应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；房型严重不符的构成欺诈。
us_claim: A hotel that provides a materially different room from the reservation is in breach of contract; the consumer is entitled to a refund and may seek consequential damages for the inconvenience.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for hotel-room mismatches, with CN allowing treble damages for fraud and US applying breach-of-contract remedies.

fact_summary: 网络订房平台显示房型与实际入住房型严重不符 / The room type shown online was materially different from the room provided.
cn_claim: 房型严重不符的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A hotel that provides a room that does not correspond to the description in the booking is in breach of contract and may be liable for misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for hotel-room mismatches, with CN allowing treble damages and HK applying contract and misrepresentation remedies.

fact_summary: 公司股东诉请要求查阅公司会计账簿 / A shareholder brought a lawsuit to compel inspection of the company's accounting books.
cn_claim: 股东有权查阅公司会计账簿但应向公司提出书面请求说明目的；公司拒绝的股东可请求法院要求公司提供查阅（公司法第33条第二款）。
us_claim: A shareholder may demand inspection of corporate books and records under state law; Delaware G.C.L. § 220 requires the shareholder to demonstrate a proper purpose and that the inspection is for documents necessary and essential to that purpose.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US grant shareholders the right to inspect corporate books upon demonstrating a proper purpose.

fact_summary: 公司股东起诉要求查阅公司会计账簿 / A shareholder sued to compel inspection of the company's accounting books.
cn_claim: 股东有权查阅公司会计账簿（公司法第33条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A member may inspect the accounting records only with the authorization of the directors or an ordinary resolution; the court may order inspection on application by members holding at least 2.5% of voting rights.
notes: Both CN and HK provide shareholder inspection rights, with CN granting a statutory right and HK requiring board authorization or a court order.

fact_summary: 某电商平台商户在商品标题和描述中使用了知名品牌名称但销售的是无关商品 / A merchant on an e-commerce platform used a famous brand name in the product title and description but sold an unrelated product.
cn_claim: 未经许可在商品标题中使用他人注册商标的构成商标侵权（商标法第57条第一项、第七项）。
us_claim: Using a famous mark in product titles or metadata to divert consumers constitutes initial-interest confusion and trademark infringement under the Lanham Act (15 U.S.C. § 1114); Multi Time Machine, Inc. v. Amazon.com, Inc., 804 F.3d 930 (9th Cir. 2015).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US treat unauthorized use of famous marks in e-commerce product listings as trademark infringement.

fact_summary: 某电商平台商户在商品标题和描述中使用了知名品牌名称但销售的是无关商品 / A merchant used a famous brand name in product titles but sold unrelated products.
cn_claim: 未经许可在商品标题中使用他人注册商标构成商标侵权（商标法第57条第一项、第七项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Using a well-known trade mark in product titles to attract consumers to unrelated goods constitutes passing off and may infringe the trade mark under the Trade Marks Ordinance (Cap. 559).
notes: Both CN and HK treat unauthorized use of well-known marks in e-commerce listings as trademark infringement or passing off.

fact_summary: 某KTV因消防通道锁闭导致火灾时顾客无法逃生多人伤亡 / A karaoke lounge's fire exits were locked, preventing customers from escaping during a fire and resulting in multiple casualties.
cn_claim: 娱乐场所经营者应确保疏散通道和安全出口畅通（消防法第16条第一款第四项；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A nightclub operator that fails to maintain unlocked fire exits breaches fire-safety codes and is liable under negligence and wrongful-death theories for injuries resulting from the blocked egress; the operator may face criminal charges for involuntary manslaughter.
hk_claim: An occupier of an entertainment venue who fails to maintain unobstructed fire exits breaches fire-safety obligations and the common duty of care; the operator is liable for resulting injuries and may face criminal charges.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose strict fire-exit safety duties on entertainment-venue operators.

fact_summary: 超市货架上未固定的货物掉落砸伤顾客 / A customer was injured when unsecured goods fell from a supermarket shelf.
cn_claim: 超市作为经营者应确保货架及摆放商品的安全（民法典第1198条第一款）；货架货物掉落致人损害的超市应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A supermarket owes a duty of reasonable care to maintain shelves and merchandise in a safe condition; a falling-object injury is compensable under premises-liability and res ipsa loquitur may apply.
hk_claim: An occupier of a supermarket owes a common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314); failure to safely secure merchandise is a breach of that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose premises-safety duties on supermarkets for merchandise-stacking safety.

fact_summary: 被告人醉酒驾车在高架上逆行并与正常行驶车辆相撞致人伤亡 / A drunk driver drove against the traffic flow on an elevated highway and collided with oncoming vehicles, causing casualties.
cn_claim: 醉酒驾驶机动车在高速公路上逆行的构成危险驾驶罪（刑法第133条之一）；造成严重后果的应以交通肇事罪从重处罚（刑法第133条）。
us_claim: Driving under the influence and causing death or serious injury constitutes vehicular manslaughter or vehicular homicide under state law; the conduct is an aggravating factor warranting enhanced punishment.
hk_claim: Causing death by dangerous driving while under the influence of alcohol is an offense under the Road Traffic Ordinance (Cap. 374) s.36A.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for drunk driving causing casualties, treating the conduct as an aggravated offense.

fact_summary: 消费者通过海外代购购买奢侈品包后被海关认定为侵权物品并扣押 / A consumer's luxury handbag purchased through an overseas purchasing agent was detained by customs as an infringing article.
cn_claim: 代购方应保证所代购商品为合法正品；因代购方原因导致商品被海关扣押的消费者可要求代购方承担违约责任（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: A purchasing agent who delivers counterfeit goods that are seized by customs is liable for breach of contract and fraud; the consumer is entitled to a refund of the purchase price and consequential damages.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold purchasing agents liable when goods are seized as counterfeit, requiring refund and damages.

fact_summary: 消费者通过海外代购购买奢侈品包后被海关认定为侵权物品并扣押 / A consumer's luxury handbag purchased through an overseas agent was detained by customs as infringing.
cn_claim: 因代购方原因导致商品被扣押的可要求代购方承担违约责任（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A purchasing agent who supplies goods that are detained as infringing is liable to the consumer for breach of contract and the return of the purchase price.
notes: Both CN and HK hold purchasing agents liable when goods are seized as infringing.

fact_summary: 某商业广场自动旋转门因感应器故障夹伤儿童 / A child was caught and injured by a malfunctioning sensor on a shopping-mall automatic revolving door.
cn_claim: 经营者应确保其场所内的设施安全（民法典第1198条第一款）；旋转门感应器故障致人损害的经营者应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A shopping-mall operator that fails to maintain automatic doors in safe working condition is liable for resulting injuries under premises-liability and negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier of a shopping mall owes a common duty of care to maintain automatic doors in safe condition; failure to do so breaches that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose safety duties on commercial occupiers to maintain automatic doors.

fact_summary: 被告人因仇视为报复社会在公交车上纵火 / A defendant set fire to a public bus in an act of social revenge.
cn_claim: 在公共交通工具上放火危害公共安全的从重处罚（刑法第114条、第115条第一款）。
us_claim: Arson on a common carrier is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 844(i) and carries severe penalties including life imprisonment; terrorism-enhancement provisions may apply.
hk_claim: Arson on a public-transport vehicle is a serious offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200); the public-safety aspect is an aggravating factor.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat arson on public transportation as an extremely serious offense with severe penalties.

fact_summary: 拼多多等平台上的团购商品因人数不足未成团但平台未及时退款 / A group-purchase on a platform did not reach the minimum participants, but the platform failed to refund promptly.
cn_claim: 商家应按照约定向消费者退款（消费者权益保护法第53条）；平台应承担先行赔付责任（电子商务法第58条）。
us_claim: A platform that fails to promptly refund consumers after a group-buy deal fails is liable for breach of contract and may violate the FTC Act § 5; the platform must process the refund within a reasonable time.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require prompt refunds when group-purchase deals fail to meet minimum thresholds.

fact_summary: 团购商品人数不足未成团但平台未及时退款 / A group-purchase failed to meet the minimum, but the platform delayed refund.
cn_claim: 平台应承担先行赔付责任（消费者权益保护法第53条；电子商务法第58条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A platform that fails to refund consumers promptly when a group-buy scheme is not completed is in breach of contract; the consumer is entitled to a refund.
notes: Both CN and HK require prompt refunds when group-purchase deals fail to meet minimum thresholds.

fact_summary: 某高楼外墙玻璃因安装不牢固在台风中脱落砸伤路人 / A high-rise building's exterior glass panel fell during a typhoon and injured a passerby because it was inadequately anchored.
cn_claim: 建筑物上的搁置物、悬挂物发生脱落造成他人损害的所有人与管理人不能证明自己无过错的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1253条）。
us_claim: A building owner that fails to ensure exterior panels are adequately secured against foreseeable weather events is liable in negligence for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier or building owner who fails to secure exterior panels against foreseeable wind conditions is liable under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314) and common-law negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose duties on building owners to secure exterior panels against foreseeable weather hazards.

fact_summary: 被告人在看守所内组织在押人员殴打新入所人员 / A defendant organized detainees in a detention center to beat newly admitted inmates.
cn_claim: 殴打监管人员的构成破坏监管秩序罪（刑法第315条）；组织他人殴打其他在押人员的从重处罚。
us_claim: Assaulting another inmate within a federal detention facility is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 113; organizing such an assault may constitute conspiracy.
hk_claim: Assaulting another inmate in a correctional facility is a criminal offense and an aggravating factor in sentencing and parole decisions.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize organized inmate-on-inmate violence within detention facilities.

fact_summary: 上市公司未在法定期限内披露年度报告被证券交易所实施退市风险警示 / A listed company failed to publish its annual report within the statutory deadline and was placed on delisting warning by the stock exchange.
cn_claim: 上市公司应在会计年度结束后4个月内披露年度报告（证券法第79条）；未按期披露的可由证券交易所实施退市风险警示。
us_claim: A public company that fails to timely file its annual report on Form 10-K may be subject to SEC enforcement action, trading suspension, and delisting proceedings under the Securities Exchange Act.
hk_claim: A listed company must publish its annual report within four months after the financial year-end under the Listing Rules; failure results in trading suspension and possible delisting.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose annual-report deadlines and sanction non-compliance with trading suspension and delisting.

fact_summary: 装修公司在装修过程中擅自使用合同约定外的低价劣质材料 / A renovation company substituted inferior materials not specified in the contract during renovation.
cn_claim: 承揽人交付的工作成果不符合质量要求的定作人可合理选择请求修理、重作、减少报酬或赔偿损失（民法典第781条）。
us_claim: A contractor who substitutes materials without the owner's approval breaches the construction contract and the duty of good faith; the owner may recover the cost of replacing the materials or the diminution in value.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies when contractors substitute inferior materials without approval.

fact_summary: 装修公司在装修过程中擅自使用合同约定外的低价劣质材料 / A renovation company substituted inferior materials not specified in the contract.
cn_claim: 交付不符合质量要求的定作人可请求修理、减少报酬或赔偿（民法典第781条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A contractor who substitutes materials without approval breaches the contract; the owner may claim damages for the cost of bringing the work into conformity.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies when contractors substitute inferior materials without approval.

fact_summary: 某商场因消防演习未提前通知导致老人受惊摔伤 / An elderly shopper was startled by an unannounced fire drill in a shopping mall and fell, suffering injury.
cn_claim: 商场组织消防演习应提前告知顾客（民法典第1198条第一款）；未提前通知致人损害的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A shopping-mall operator that conducts an unannounced fire drill without adequate warning may be liable for injuries caused by foreseeable startle responses, particularly among vulnerable patrons.
hk_claim: An occupier of a shopping mall owes a common duty of care to visitors; conducting a sudden drill without warning may breach that duty where injury is foreseeable.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose a duty on commercial occupiers to adequately warn of safety drills that may startle patrons.

fact_summary: 被告人将其个人名下银行卡出售给他人用于电信诈骗 / A defendant sold their personal bank card to another for use in a telecom-fraud scheme.
cn_claim: 明知他人利用信息网络实施犯罪仍为其提供支付结算帮助情节严重的构成帮助信息网络犯罪活动罪（刑法第287条之二）。
us_claim: Providing a bank account knowing it will be used for fraud constitutes aiding and abetting under 18 U.S.C. § 2 and may be charged as money-laundering under 18 U.S.C. § 1956 or conspiracy under 18 U.S.C. § 371.
hk_claim: Providing a bank account knowing it will be used to retain proceeds of crime is money laundering under the Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 455) s.25.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize providing bank accounts knowing they will be used for fraud.

fact_summary: 某KTV未经许可在其经营的包厢内提供音乐电视作品点播服务 / A karaoke lounge provided music-video on-demand services in its private rooms without a license.
cn_claim: 未经许可公开表演他人音乐作品的构成侵犯表演权（著作权法第10条第一款第九项）；KTV经营者应取得音像作品许可。
us_claim: Public performance of copyrighted music videos in a commercial establishment without a license infringes the performance right under 17 U.S.C. § 106(4); the KTV operator must obtain licenses from performing-rights organizations (ASCAP/BMI/SESAC).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require KTV operators to obtain licenses for public performance of music videos.

fact_summary: 某KTV未经许可在其经营的包厢内提供音乐电视作品点播服务 / A karaoke lounge provided unlicensed music-video on-demand services.
cn_claim: 未经许可公开表演音乐作品构成侵权（著作权法第10条第一款第九项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Public performance of copyrighted music videos without a license infringes the copyright under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528).
notes: Both CN and HK require KTV operators to obtain licenses for public performance of music videos.

fact_summary: 被告人在刑事诉讼中故意作出虚假证言意图陷害他人 / A defendant gave deliberately false testimony in criminal proceedings with the intent to incriminate another person.
cn_claim: 捏造事实诬告陷害他人意图使他人受刑事追究的构成诬告陷害罪（刑法第243条第一款）。
us_claim: Knowingly making a false material statement in a federal proceeding constitutes perjury under 18 U.S.C. § 1621; providing false testimony to incriminate another is an aggravating factor.
hk_claim: Knowingly giving false evidence in judicial proceedings constitutes perjury under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200) s.36.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize deliberately false testimony intended to incriminate another.

fact_summary: 商场在促销活动中宣称全场五折但多数商品实际为提价后再打折 / A shopping mall advertised a storewide 50% discount, but most items had their prices raised before the discount was applied.
cn_claim: 经营者不得利用虚假的价格手段诱骗消费者交易（价格法第14条第四项）；先提价后打折构成价格欺诈。
us_claim: Fictitious former-price comparisons constitute deceptive pricing under the FTC Act § 5 and the FTC's Guides Against Deceptive Pricing (16 C.F.R. Part 233); the seller must have offered the product at the former price for a reasonable period.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit fictitious former-price comparisons and require genuine discounting.

fact_summary: 商场在促销活动中宣称全场五折但多数商品为提价后再打折 / A shopping mall advertised a storewide 50% discount after raising prices first.
cn_claim: 先提价后打折构成价格欺诈（价格法第14条第四项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A trader who engages in fictitious former-price comparisons misleads consumers and may be in breach of the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit fictitious former-price comparisons.

fact_summary: 理发店在未做皮肤过敏测试的情况下直接为顾客染发致其头皮灼伤 / A hair salon applied hair dye without conducting a skin-allergy test, causing the customer's scalp to be burned.
cn_claim: 美容美发经营者应在使用化妆品前进行皮肤测试（化妆品监督管理条例第35条第二款）；未测试致人损害的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A hair salon that fails to perform a patch test before applying chemical treatments breaches the standard of care and is liable for negligence; the patch-test requirement is part of the professional duty of care.
hk_claim: A salon operator who fails to take reasonable precautions, including a patch test before applying chemical treatments, breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require salons to conduct allergy tests before applying chemical treatments.

fact_summary: 被告人因征地补偿纠纷将前来强制拆除的执法人员打伤 / A defendant injured demolition-enforcement officers who arrived to carry out a compulsory demolition in a land-acquisition dispute.
cn_claim: 以暴力方法阻碍国家机关工作人员依法执行职务的构成妨害公务罪（刑法第277条第一款）；造成执法人员受伤的从重处罚。
us_claim: Assaulting a federal officer during the performance of official duties is prohibited under 18 U.S.C. § 111; enhanced penalties apply for using a deadly or dangerous weapon or inflicting bodily injury.
hk_claim: Assaulting a public officer in the execution of duty is an offense under the Police Force Ordinance (Cap. 232) and may also constitute the common-law offense of assault.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize assault on enforcement officers with enhanced penalties.

fact_summary: 购房者按揭贷款申请被银行拒绝后开发商拒绝退还定金 / After a homebuyer's mortgage application was rejected by the bank, the developer refused to return the deposit.
cn_claim: 因不可归责于双方的事由导致合同未能订立的出卖人应将定金返还买受人（商品房买卖合同司法解释第4条第二款）。
us_claim: Where a real-estate contract is contingent on the buyer obtaining financing and the buyer makes a good-faith effort but is denied, the buyer is generally entitled to return of the earnest-money deposit under the doctrine of impossibility of condition.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require return of the deposit when the buyer fails to obtain financing through no fault of their own.

fact_summary: 购房者按揭贷款被拒后开发商拒绝退还定金 / After the buyer's mortgage was rejected, the developer refused to return the deposit.
cn_claim: 因不可归责于双方的事由导致合同未能订立的应返还定金（商品房买卖合同司法解释第4条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Where a property sale is subject to the buyer obtaining financing and the buyer is unable to do so despite reasonable efforts, the deposit is generally returnable unless the contract provides otherwise.
notes: Both CN and HK require return of the deposit when financing fails through no fault of the buyer.

fact_summary: 某快捷酒店未对客房进行消毒导致客人感染皮肤病 / A budget-hotel guest contracted a skin infection because the guest room had not been sanitized.
cn_claim: 宾馆经营者应确保客房卫生符合标准（公共场所卫生管理条例第3条第一款第一项）；未消毒致客人感染的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A hotel that fails to maintain sanitary guest rooms breaches the duty of care and the implied warranty of habitability; the hotel is liable for resulting injuries under negligence and premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: A hotel occupier who fails to maintain sanitary rooms breaches the common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose hygiene duties on hotels and hold them liable for unsanitary conditions causing illness.

fact_summary: 有限责任公司股东在认缴出资期限未届满时即转让股权后公司破产 / An LLC shareholder transferred their shares before the subscribed-capital deadline, and the company later entered bankruptcy.
cn_claim: 公司破产时管理人可以要求未届出资期限的股东缴纳所认缴的出资不受出资期限限制（企业破产法第35条）；转让股权的原股东仍应对未履行的出资义务承担责任。
us_claim: A shareholder who transfers shares before a capital call remains liable for unpaid capital contributions where the transfer was made to evade the obligation or the transferee is insolvent.
hk_claim: A shareholder who transfers shares before the capital-contribution deadline may remain liable if the transfer was made to avoid the capital obligation.
