notes: All three jurisdictions hold shareholders liable for unpaid capital contributions upon insolvency despite share transfers before the contribution deadline.

fact_summary: 某APP未经许可收集互联网上公开发表的文章制作成有声读物 / An app collected publicly-available articles from the internet and converted them into audiobooks without permission.
cn_claim: 未经许可将他人文字作品制作成有声读物构成对复制权、改编权的侵犯（著作权法第10条第一款第五项、第十四项）。
us_claim: Converting copyrighted articles into audiobooks without a license infringes the reproduction and derivative-work rights under 17 U.S.C. § 106(1) and (2); the fact that the articles were publicly available online does not constitute a license.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US treat unauthorized conversion of articles to audiobooks as copyright infringement.

fact_summary: 某APP未经许可收集互联网上公开发表的文章制作成有声读物 / An app converted publicly-available articles into audiobooks without permission.
cn_claim: 未经许可将文字作品制作成有声读物构成侵权（著作权法第10条第一款第五项、第十四项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Converting copyrighted articles into audiobooks without a license infringes the copyright under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528).
notes: Both CN and HK require a license for converting articles to audiobooks.

fact_summary: 被告人多次在超市盗窃商品被保安发现后使用随身携带的刀具威胁保安 / A defendant who had repeatedly shoplifted from a supermarket threatened a security guard with a knife when discovered.
cn_claim: 犯盗窃罪为抗拒抓捕而当场使用暴力的转化为抢劫罪（刑法第269条）。
us_claim: A shoplifting that escalates into a threat with a deadly weapon constitutes robbery under state law; the use of a weapon is an aggravating factor supporting enhanced sentencing.
hk_claim: A person who steals and immediately before or at the time of doing so uses force on any person in order to steal is guilty of robbery under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210) s.10.
notes: All three jurisdictions upgrade theft to robbery when force is used to avoid detection or apprehension.

fact_summary: 教育培训机构在合同中约定一经缴费概不退款 / An education-and-training institution's contract stipulated that fees were non-refundable once paid.
cn_claim: 经营者以格式条款限制消费者权利或减轻自身责任的该条款无效（民法典第497条第二项、第三项）；概不退款的格式条款属于不公平条款。
us_claim: A blanket no-refund clause may be unconscionable under the Uniform Commercial Code § 2-302 and state consumer-protection laws; such clauses are subject to heightened scrutiny and may be void as against public policy.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US limit overbroad no-refund clauses, with CN invalidating unfair terms and US applying unconscionability principles.

fact_summary: 教育培训机构合同中约定一经缴费概不退款
cn_claim: 概不退款的格式条款无效（民法典第497条第二项、第三项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A contract term that excludes all liability or right to refund may be unreasonable and unenforceable under the Control of Exemption Clauses Ordinance (Cap. 71).
notes: Both CN and HK restrict overbroad no-refund clauses.

fact_summary: 某中药房因抓错药材导致患者中毒 / A traditional Chinese pharmacy dispensed the wrong herbs causing patient poisoning.
cn_claim: 因药品缺陷造成患者损害的药品经营者应承担赔偿责任（民法典第1226条；药品管理法第144条第一款）。
us_claim: A pharmacy that dispenses the wrong medication causing injury is liable for negligence and may be strictly liable under products-liability theories; violation of state pharmacy-board dispensing standards constitutes negligence per se.
hk_claim: A pharmacy that dispenses the wrong medication breaching the duty of care is liable in negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose strict dispensing duties on pharmacies.

fact_summary: 被告人因盗窃被网上追逃期间使用假身份证住宿 / A fugitive wanted for theft used a false identity card.
cn_claim: 依照国家规定应当提供身份证明的活动中使用伪造、变造的居民身份证的构成使用虚假身份证件罪（刑法第280条之一第一款）。
us_claim: Using a false identification document to avoid detection as a fugitive constitutes identity fraud under 18 U.S.C. Sec 1028(a)(4) and obstruction of justice.
hk_claim: Using another person's identity document or a forged identity document is an offense under the Immigration Ordinance (Cap. 115) and the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the use of false identity documents to avoid detection.

fact_summary: 租客因房东未缴纳物业费导致小区物业拒绝提供服务 / A tenant was denied services because the landlord had not paid management fees.
cn_claim: 出租人应保证租赁物在租赁期间符合约定用途并承担租赁物的维修义务（民法典第708条、第712条）。
us_claim: A landlord's failure to pay HOA fees resulting in loss of services is a breach of the covenant of quiet enjoyment; the tenant may be entitled to a rent abatement or termination.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold landlords liable when their failure to pay property fees causes loss of services to the tenant.

fact_summary: 租客因房东未缴纳物业费导致小区物业拒绝提供服务 / A tenant was denied services because the landlord had not paid management fees.
cn_claim: 出租人应保证租赁物符合约定用途（民法典第708条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A landlord's failure to pay management charges causing loss of services is a breach of the covenant for quiet enjoyment.
notes: Both CN and HK hold landlords liable when failure to pay fees causes loss of services.

fact_summary: 某制药公司在与仿制药企业和解时约定反向支付 / A pharmaceutical company settled with a generic manufacturer through a reverse-payment agreement.
cn_claim: 以延迟仿制药进入市场为目的的药品专利反向支付协议可能构成垄断协议（反垄断法第17条第六项）。
us_claim: Reverse-payment settlements in pharmaceutical patent litigation are subject to antitrust scrutiny under the rule of reason; FTC v. Actavis, Inc., 570 U.S. 136 (2013).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US scrutinize reverse-payment settlements under antitrust law.

fact_summary: 某制药公司在与仿制药企业和解时约定反向支付 / A pharmaceutical company agreed to a reverse-payment settlement.
cn_claim: 反向支付协议可能构成垄断协议（反垄断法第17条第六项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A reverse-payment settlement may be scrutinized under the Competition Ordinance (Cap. 619).
notes: Both CN and HK scrutinize reverse-payment pharmaceutical settlements under competition law.

fact_summary: 被告人因与邻里争吵纵火烧毁他人车辆 / A defendant set fire to a neighbor's vehicle following an argument.
cn_claim: 故意毁坏财物数额较大或有其他严重情节的构成故意毁坏财物罪（刑法第275条）。
us_claim: Arson of a motor vehicle is a felony under state law; federal arson charges under 18 U.S.C. Sec 844(i) may apply if the vehicle was used in interstate commerce.
hk_claim: Arson with intent to damage property is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200) s.60.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize arson of motor vehicles.

fact_summary: 老人在银行营业厅因地面湿滑未放置警示牌而滑倒骨折 / An elderly customer slipped on a wet bank-lobby floor where no warning sign was placed.
cn_claim: 银行作为经营者应尽到安全保障义务（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A bank that fails to warn of a wet-floor hazard is liable for negligence under premises-liability principles.
hk_claim: An occupier of a bank owes a common duty of care to visitors; failure to warn of a wet-floor hazard is a breach of that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions require commercial occupiers to warn of known wet-floor hazards.

fact_summary: 公司因隐瞒重大债务被收购方以欺诈为由起诉 / A buyer sued the target company for fraud after the target concealed significant debts during the acquisition.
cn_claim: 受欺诈方可在知道撤销事由之日起一年内请求撤销股权转让协议（民法典第148条、第152条）。
us_claim: A seller who conceals material liabilities in an acquisition commits fraud; the buyer may seek rescission or damages.
hk_claim: A seller who fraudulently conceals material debts may be sued for fraudulent misrepresentation; the buyer may rescind and claim damages.
notes: All three jurisdictions allow buyers to rescind acquisitions obtained through fraudulent concealment.

fact_summary: 公司控股股东以公司资产为其个人债务提供担保未支付任何对价 / A controlling shareholder used corporate assets to secure their personal debts without providing any consideration to the company.
cn_claim: 控股股东不得利用关联交易损害公司利益（公司法第21条）；以公司资产为股东个人债务提供担保的构成关联交易需经非关联股东同意。
us_claim: A controlling shareholder who causes the corporation to guarantee their personal debt engages in self-dealing; the transaction must satisfy the entire-fairness standard or be approved by disinterested shareholders; Sinclair Oil Corp. v. Levien, 280 A.2d 717 (Del. 1971).
hk_claim: A director or controlling member who uses corporate assets to secure personal obligations without proper authorization or consideration breaches fiduciary duties.
notes: All three jurisdictions prohibit controlling shareholders from using corporate assets for personal guarantees without proper independent approval.

fact_summary: 被告人因涉嫌强奸被取保候审期间威胁被害人撤回指控 / While on bail pending trial for rape, a defendant threatened the victim to drop the charges.
cn_claim: 被取保候审的犯罪嫌疑人威胁被害人的应没收保证金并变更强制措施（刑事诉讼法第71条）；同时构成妨害作证罪的追究刑事责任（刑法第307条第一款）。
us_claim: Witness tampering or victim intimidation is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1512; a defendant who threatens a victim while on pretrial release will have bail revoked and face additional criminal charges.
hk_claim: Intimidating a victim to drop charges constitutes perverting the course of justice and criminal intimidation; bail will be revoked.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat victim intimidation during pretrial release as a serious aggravating offense.

fact_summary: 旅游平台在国庆期间单方取消已确认订单并拒绝赔偿 / A travel platform unilaterally cancelled confirmed bookings during a holiday period and refused to compensate.
cn_claim: 经营者以预收款方式提供服务未按约定提供的应退回预付款并承担利息及合理费用（消费者权益保护法第53条）；应赔偿消费者因此产生的额外费用。
us_claim: A travel platform that cancels confirmed bookings without justification is in breach of contract; the consumer may recover the cost of substitute arrangements and consequential damages for vacation disruption.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold travel platforms liable for unilateral cancellation of confirmed bookings, requiring refund and damages.

fact_summary: 旅游平台在国庆期间单方取消已确认订单并拒绝赔偿 / A travel platform unilaterally cancelled confirmed holiday bookings and refused compensation.
cn_claim: 预收款未按约定提供的应退回并承担费用（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A travel platform that cancels confirmed bookings without justification is in breach of contract and liable for the consumer's loss, including the additional cost of alternative arrangements.
notes: Both CN and HK hold travel platforms liable for unilateral cancellation of confirmed bookings.

fact_summary: 某商场儿童游乐区因未铺设安全地垫导致儿童摔伤 / A child was injured falling on a hard floor in a shopping-mall play area that lacked safety matting.
cn_claim: 儿童游乐设施的经营者应确保场地安全（民法典第1198条第一款）；未铺设安全地垫致儿童摔伤的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A shopping mall that provides a children's play area without adequate safety flooring breaches the duty of care; the attractive-nuisance doctrine and premises-liability principles apply to protect child visitors.
hk_claim: An occupier providing a children's play area must take reasonable care to ensure the safety of child visitors; failure to provide adequate safety flooring is a breach of that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose heightened safety duties on operators of children's play areas.

fact_summary: 公司两派股东均无法形成公司有效决议 / Two factions of shareholders were deadlocked and unable to pass any effective corporate resolutions.
cn_claim: 公司经营管理发生严重困难继续存续会使股东利益受到重大损失的持有公司全部股东表决权10%以上的股东可请求法院解散公司（公司法第182条）。
us_claim: A shareholder may petition for judicial dissolution of a corporation on grounds of deadlock under state corporate law; the court may order dissolution or alternative remedies such as a buyout.
hk_claim: A member may petition for relief on the ground of unfairly prejudicial conduct, and the court may order winding-up or a buyout as a remedy for deadlock.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide judicial remedies for corporate deadlock, including dissolution and buyout.

fact_summary: 某游戏公司将他人知名小说的世界观和人物关系复制到自己的游戏中 / A game company copied the world-building and character relationships from a famous novel into its own game.
cn_claim: 使用他人作品中的独创性表达包括角色、情节结构等可能构成侵犯改编权（著作权法第10条第一款第十四项）。
us_claim: Copyright protects the expression of ideas including sufficiently delineated characters and story elements; copying the plot structure and character relationships from a literary work into a game may infringe the derivative-work right under 17 U.S.C. § 106(2).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US extend copyright protection to sufficiently developed literary characters and story-world elements.

fact_summary: 某游戏公司将他人知名小说的世界观和人物关系复制到自己的游戏中 / A game company copied a novel's world-building and character relationships.
cn_claim: 使用他人作品独创性表达可能构成侵犯改编权（著作权法第10条第一款第十四项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Copying the plot, characters, and distinctive story elements from a literary work into a game may infringe the copyright under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528).
notes: Both CN and HK protect literary characters and story structures against unauthorized game adaptations.

fact_summary: 被告人因涉嫌贩卖毒品被抓获后主动供出了其毒品上线 / After being captured for drug trafficking, a defendant voluntarily identified their drug supplier.
cn_claim: 犯罪分子揭发他人犯罪行为查证属实的构成立功可从轻或减轻处罚；有重大立功表现的可减轻或免除处罚（刑法第68条）。
us_claim: Providing substantial assistance that leads to the identification and prosecution of drug suppliers supports a downward departure under U.S. Sentencing Guidelines § 5K1.1 and 18 U.S.C. § 3553(e).
hk_claim: A defendant who provides valuable information leading to the arrest of a drug supplier is entitled to a substantial sentencing discount.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide significant sentencing benefits for defendants who assist in identifying drug suppliers.

fact_summary: 购房者签订房屋买卖合同后发现房屋曾发生凶杀案 / A homebuyer discovered the property had been the scene of a murder after signing the purchase contract.
cn_claim: 出卖人对标的物存在的重大瑕疵负有告知义务；凶宅属于影响交易价值的重大瑕疵未告知的买受人可请求撤销合同（民法典第148条）。
us_claim: Whether a seller must disclose that a property was the site of a murder depends on state law; some states require disclosure of psychological defects (stigmatized properties), while others do not.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US address the duty to disclose stigmatizing events to varying degrees, with CN generally imposing a broader duty of disclosure.

fact_summary: 购房者签订房屋买卖合同后发现房屋曾发生凶杀案 / A homebuyer discovered the property had been the scene of a murder after signing.
cn_claim: 凶宅属于重大瑕疵未告知的买受人可请求撤销合同（民法典第148条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: The duty to disclose a stigmatizing event to a buyer depends on the circumstances; failure to disclose a material matter may constitute misrepresentation.
notes: CN imposes broader disclosure duties for stigmatized properties than HK.

fact_summary: 某小区保安因未有效核实外卖员身份致入室盗窃发生 / A residential-compound security guard failed to verify a disguised intruder posing as a delivery rider, resulting in a burglary.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应按照约定和物业性质妥善提供安保服务（民法典第942条）。
us_claim: A security company that fails to exercise reasonable care in access control may be liable for negligence where the failure is a proximate cause of the resulting crime.
hk_claim: A security guard who fails to exercise reasonable care in controlling access to a residential building may be liable in negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose access-control duties on residential security services.

fact_summary: 被告人通过技术手段篡改他人的高考志愿 / A defendant used technical means to alter another person's college-entrance-examination preference.
cn_claim: 违反国家规定对计算机信息系统中存储、处理或传输的数据进行删除、修改、增加的构成破坏计算机信息系统罪（刑法第286条第二款）。
us_claim: Unauthorized alteration of academic records in a computer system may be prosecuted under the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act (18 U.S.C. § 1030(a)(5)).
hk_claim: Unauthorized modification of data in a computer system is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200) s.161.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unauthorized computer-data alteration affecting academic records.

fact_summary: 健身房在未提前通知的情况下停业装修数月 / A gym closed for renovation for several months without prior notice to members.
cn_claim: 经营者以预收款方式提供服务的未按约定提供的应退回预付款并承担费用（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: A gym that closes for an extended period without notice breaches its membership contract; members are entitled to a refund or credit for the closure period.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require gym operators to refund or credit members for extended unannounced closures.

fact_summary: 健身房在未提前通知的情况下停业装修数月 / A gym closed for renovation for months without prior notice.
cn_claim: 预收款未按约定提供的应退回并承担费用（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A gym that suspends services for an extended period without notice breaches the membership contract; members are entitled to a refund or extension.
notes: Both CN and HK require gym operators to compensate members for extended unannounced closures.

fact_summary: 某市场管理方因未清理路面积水致路人滑倒摔伤 / A market operator failed to clear water from the pavement, causing a passerby to slip and be injured.
cn_claim: 市场管理方作为公共场所的经营者应尽到安全保障义务（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A market operator that fails to remove a known slip hazard within a reasonable time breaches the duty of care under premises-liability principles.
hk_claim: An occupier of a market area who fails to clear a known slip hazard breaches the common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose slip-hazard-removal duties on market operators.

fact_summary: 被告人非法从事资金支付结算业务为赌博网站提供转账服务 / A defendant illegally operated a payment-settlement business providing fund-transfer services to a gambling website.
cn_claim: 未经国家有关主管部门批准非法从事资金支付结算业务的构成非法经营罪（刑法第225条第三项）。
us_claim: Operating an unlicensed money-transmission business is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1960; providing payment services to an illegal gambling operation may also constitute money laundering.
hk_claim: Operating an unlicensed money-service business is an offense under the Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing Ordinance (Cap. 615).
notes: All three jurisdictions require licensing for money services and criminalize unlicensed payment operations.

fact_summary: 某智能手表制造商在未经许可的情况下使用了他人的心率监测算法专利 / A smartwatch manufacturer used another company's heart-rate-monitoring algorithm patent without authorization.
cn_claim: 未经许可实施他人专利的构成专利侵权（专利法第11条第一款）。
us_claim: Use of a patented algorithm without a license constitutes patent infringement under 35 U.S.C. § 271(a).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require a license to use patented algorithms in commercial products.

fact_summary: 某智能手表制造商在未经许可的情况下使用了他人的心率监测算法专利 / A smartwatch manufacturer used another's heart-rate algorithm patent without authorization.
cn_claim: 未经许可实施他人专利构成侵权（专利法第11条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Using a patented invention without the proprietor's consent infringes the patent under the Patents Ordinance (Cap. 514).
notes: Both CN and HK require a license to use patented algorithms in commercial products.

fact_summary: 消费者通过电商平台购买翡翠后发现鉴定证书为伪造 / A consumer purchased jadeite through an e-commerce platform and discovered the certificate of authenticity was forged.
cn_claim: 经营者提供的商品有欺诈行为的应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling items with a forged certificate of authenticity constitutes fraud; the buyer may rescind and recover damages, and the FTC may bring an enforcement action.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide strong remedies for sales with forged certificates of authenticity.

fact_summary: 消费者通过电商平台购买翡翠后发现鉴定证书为伪造 / A consumer purchased jadeite and found the authenticity certificate was forged.
cn_claim: 伪造证书的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling goods with a forged certificate of authenticity is fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide civil and criminal remedies for sales with forged certificates of authenticity.

fact_summary: 某商场扶梯因梳齿板缺损导致儿童手指被卷入受伤 / A child's finger was caught in an escalator because the comb-plate was damaged.
cn_claim: 经营者应确保其设施安全（民法典第1198条第一款）；电梯扶梯的梳齿板缺损致人损害的商场应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: An escalator owner that fails to maintain safety devices such as comb-plates is liable for resulting injuries under premises-liability and negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain escalator safety features breaches the common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose safety duties on escalator operators to maintain protective devices.

fact_summary: 被告人因不满征地补偿将村集体水泵破坏致大面积农田无法灌溉 / A defendant destroyed a village collective water pump out of frustration with land-acquisition compensation, crippling irrigation for large areas of farmland.
cn_claim: 故意毁坏机器设备破坏生产经营的构成破坏生产经营罪（刑法第276条）。
us_claim: Intentional destruction of irrigation equipment constituting criminal mischief or sabotage is a crime under state law.
hk_claim: Intentionally destroying irrigation infrastructure constitutes criminal damage under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize intentional destruction of agricultural infrastructure.

fact_summary: 家政公司派出的月嫂不具备宣称的资质导致新生儿感染 / A confinement nanny provided by a domestic-service agency lacked the claimed qualifications, resulting in a newborn infection.
cn_claim: 家政服务机构提供家政服务人员应保证服务人员具备相应资质（家政服务业管理条例草案相关条款）；服务机构应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A domestic-service agency that sends an unqualified caregiver may be liable for negligent hiring and negligent misrepresentation; the agency is vicariously liable for the nanny's negligence.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold domestic-service agencies liable for sending unqualified caregivers.

fact_summary: 家政公司派出的月嫂不具备宣称的资质导致新生儿感染 / A confinement nanny lacked claimed qualifications, causing newborn infection.
cn_claim: 家政服务机构对服务人员资质的虚假陈述应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An agency that provides a caregiver with misrepresented qualifications may be liable for misrepresentation and breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK hold agencies liable for caregiver-qualification misrepresentations.

fact_summary: 某公司实施竞争对手专利中的关键步骤但将其与自己的技术方案结合 / A company implemented the key steps of a competitor's patent but combined them with its own technical solution.
cn_claim: 专利侵权判定中的全面覆盖原则不因侵权人在专利技术方案中增加技术特征而免除侵权责任；实施专利全部必要技术特征的构成侵权（专利法第11条第一款）。
us_claim: Adding elements to a patented invention does not avoid infringement if the accused product practices every element of the asserted claim; the all-elements rule applies.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US apply the all-elements rule: adding features to a patented combination does not avoid infringement.

fact_summary: 某公司实施竞争对手专利中的关键步骤但将其与自己的技术方案结合 / A company implemented key steps of a competitor's patent combined with its own solution.
cn_claim: 实施专利全部必要技术特征的构成侵权（专利法第11条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A product that incorporates all essential elements of a patented invention infringes the patent, even if additional features are added.
notes: Both CN and HK apply the principle that adding features does not avoid patent infringement.

fact_summary: 被告人因不满交警处罚在网络上发布威胁交警及其家人人身安全的信息 / A defendant posted threats against a traffic officer and their family online following a traffic citation.
cn_claim: 威胁他人人身安全的可给予治安管理处罚（治安管理处罚法第42条第一项）；情节严重的可构成寻衅滋事罪（刑法第293条）。
us_claim: Threatening a law-enforcement officer with bodily harm is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 115(a)(1)(B), carrying severe penalties.
hk_claim: Threatening a police officer is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200) and may constitute criminal intimidation.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize threats against law-enforcement officers.

fact_summary: 长租公寓公司收取租客一年租金后因资金链断裂跑路 / A long-term-rental company collected a year's rent from tenants and then disappeared due to a cash-flow collapse.
cn_claim: 经营者以预收款方式提供服务未按约定提供的应退回预付款并承担费用（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: A rental company that collects prepaid rent and then ceases operations is liable for breach of contract and fraud; tenants may seek recovery through bankruptcy proceedings.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for tenants when prepaid-rent companies disappear.

fact_summary: 长租公寓公司收取租客一年租金后跑路 / A long-term-rental company collected a year's rent and disappeared.
cn_claim: 预收款未按约定提供的应退回并承担费用（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A company that takes prepaid rent and ceases operations is liable for breach of contract and may be pursued for fraud.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for tenants when prepaid-rent companies disappear.

fact_summary: 某室内滑雪场因制冷设备故障温度骤升导致积雪融化游客摔伤 / An indoor ski facility's cooling system failed, causing a sudden temperature rise and snow melt that led to patrons slipping and being injured.
cn_claim: 滑雪场经营者应确保场地和设备安全（民法典第1198条第一款）；制冷设备故障致场地条件恶化造成游客损害的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A ski-facility operator that fails to maintain snow conditions owed to patrons is liable for negligence; the operator has a duty to maintain safe skiing conditions.
hk_claim: An occupier of a recreational facility owes a common duty of care to maintain safe conditions; failure to maintain snow conditions breaches that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose safety duties on recreational-facility operators to maintain safe surface conditions.

fact_summary: 被告人因集资诈骗被判处死缓 / A defendant was sentenced to death with a two-year reprieve for fund-raising fraud.
cn_claim: 集资诈骗数额特别巨大或有其他特别严重情节的处十年以上有期徒或无期并可处死刑（刑法第192条第二款）。
us_claim: Large-scale securities or wire fraud may be punished by lengthy imprisonment; federal law does not provide for the death penalty for financial crimes.
hk_claim: Serious fraud offenses may attract long terms of imprisonment; the death penalty was abolished in Hong Kong.
notes: CN retains death penalty for certain extreme financial crimes, while US and HK do not, creating a maximum-penalty asymmetry.

fact_summary: 消费者在奶茶中喝出异物后店家以消费者无法证明异物来源为由拒绝赔偿 / A consumer found a foreign object in a milk-tea beverage; the shop refused to compensate, arguing the consumer could not prove the source of the object.
cn_claim: 经营者提供商品或服务有欺诈行为的应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；食品中发现异物的可主张价款十倍或损失三倍的赔偿金（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: A restaurant that serves contaminated food is strictly liable under products-liability and implied-warranty theories; the burden is on the defendant to disprove causation in many jurisdictions.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US shift the causation burden to the food seller once the consumer demonstrates a foreign object in the food.

fact_summary: 消费者在奶茶中喝出异物后店家以无法证明异物来源为由拒绝赔偿 / A shop refused to compensate after a consumer found a foreign object in a drink, disputing the source.
cn_claim: 食品中混有异物的可主张价款十倍赔偿金（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A restaurant that supplies food unfit for consumption is liable under the Sale of Goods Ordinance (Cap. 26) and the Food Safety Ordinance (Cap. 612).
notes: Both CN and HK impose strict liability on food sellers for foreign objects found in food.

fact_summary: 某桥梁因长期未检修发生局部坍塌导致车辆坠落 / A section of a bridge collapsed due to long-neglected inspection, causing vehicles to plunge.
cn_claim: 公路管理机构应对公路桥梁进行定期检查并及时维修（公路安全保护条例第48条）；未检修致坍塌的应承担侵权责任。
us_claim: A government authority that fails to inspect and maintain bridges may be liable for negligence, subject to the discretionary-function exception; where routine maintenance is involved, the exception may not apply.
hk_claim: A public authority that fails to inspect and maintain bridges may be liable in negligence for resulting injuries.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose bridge-inspection and maintenance duties and hold authorities liable for negligence.

fact_summary: 被告人非法获取他人信用卡信息资料后通过网络购买虚拟商品并转售套现 / A defendant illegally obtained others' credit-card data, purchased virtual goods online, and resold them for cash.
cn_claim: 窃取、收买或非法提供他人信用卡信息资料的构成妨害信用卡管理罪（刑法第177条之一）。
us_claim: Using unauthorized credit-card data to purchase goods constitutes access-device fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1029 and wire fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1343.
hk_claim: Using another person's credit-card information without authority is an offense under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unauthorized use of credit-card data for online purchases.

fact_summary: 装修公司因施工中使用不合格电线导致新房入住后发生火灾 / A newly-renovated home caught fire after move-in because the renovation company had used substandard electrical wiring.
cn_claim: 因施工方的过错造成建设工程质量不符合约定的发包人有权要求施工方无偿修理或返工（民法典第801条）；使用不合格材料导致损失的应赔偿。
us_claim: A contractor who uses substandard wiring that causes a fire is liable for negligence and breach of the implied warranty of workmanlike construction; the contractor may also face products-liability claims if the wiring was defective.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold renovation contractors strictly liable for fire damage caused by substandard materials.

fact_summary: 装修公司因施工中使用不合格电线导致新房入住后发生火灾 / A renovated home caught fire after move-in due to the renovation company's use of substandard wiring.
cn_claim: 使用不合格材料导致损失的应赔偿（民法典第801条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A contractor who uses substandard wiring that causes a fire is liable in negligence and for breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK hold renovation contractors liable for fire damage caused by substandard materials.

fact_summary: 某短视频平台用户未经许可大量上传影视剧片段 / Users of a short-video platform uploaded large numbers of film clips without authorization.
cn_claim: 网络服务提供者知道或应当知道网络用户利用其网络服务侵害他人权益未采取必要措施的与该网络用户承担连带责任（民法典第1195条第二款）。
us_claim: A platform may lose DMCA safe-harbor protection under 17 U.S.C. § 512(c)(1)(A) where it has actual knowledge of infringement or is aware of facts from which infringing activity is apparent.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US impose secondary liability on platforms that fail to act on known infringing user uploads.

fact_summary: 某短视频平台用户未经许可大量上传影视剧片段 / Users of a short-video platform uploaded large numbers of unauthorized film clips.
cn_claim: 平台知道侵权未采取必要措施的承担连带责任（民法典第1195条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A platform that has knowledge of infringing content and fails to take it down may be liable for copyright infringement.
notes: Both CN and HK impose liability on platforms that fail to remove known infringing content.

fact_summary: 某展览馆因展台玻璃碎裂导致参观儿童被划伤 / A child visitor was cut by shattered display-case glass at an exhibition hall.
cn_claim: 展览馆作为公共场所的管理人应尽到安全保障义务（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A museum or exhibition hall that fails to maintain safe display cases breaches the duty of care owed to visitors.
hk_claim: An occupier of an exhibition hall owes a common duty of care to visitors; failure to maintain safe display cases is a breach of that duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose safety duties on exhibition-hall operators.

fact_summary: 公司股东在认缴期限届满后未缴纳出资且公司已资不抵债 / A shareholder failed to contribute subscribed capital after the deadline, and the company had become insolvent.
cn_claim: 股东未履行出资义务的应继续履行并向已按期足额缴纳出资的股东承担违约责任；公司债权人可要求未履行出资义务的股东在未出资本息范围内对公司债务不能清偿的部分承担补充赔偿责任（公司法第28条第二款；公司法解释三第13条）。
us_claim: A shareholder who fails to meet a capital call is liable for the unpaid amount under state corporate law; in bankruptcy, the trustee may enforce the capital-call obligation for the benefit of creditors.
hk_claim: A shareholder who fails to pay the amount due on shares is liable to the company, and the liquidator may enforce the obligation upon winding-up.
notes: All three jurisdictions enforce shareholders' capital-contribution obligations for the benefit of creditors.

fact_summary: 被告人通过变造银行存单骗取他人信任后借款潜逃 / A defendant altered a bank deposit certificate to gain trust and then borrowed money and fled.
cn_claim: 变造金融票证的构成变造金融票证罪（刑法第177条第一款）；以变造的存单骗取借款后逃匿的还构成诈骗罪（刑法第266条）。
us_claim: Altering a certificate of deposit to obtain a loan is bank fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1344 and may also constitute wire fraud.
hk_claim: Using a forged or altered document to deceive another and obtain money constitutes fraud and may involve offenses under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the use of altered financial instruments to defraud lenders.

fact_summary: 租客因疫情被隔离无法返回出租屋，房东以欠租为由解除合同 / A tenant who was isolated due to a pandemic could not return to the rental unit, and the landlord terminated the lease for non-payment of rent.
cn_claim: 因不可抗力不能履行合同的可根据不可抗力的影响部分或全部免除责任（民法典第180条、第590条）；因疫情被隔离无法居住的租客可主张减免租金。
us_claim: A tenant who is prevented from occupying the premises due to a government quarantine order may have a defense of frustration of purpose or impossibility; the tenant may be entitled to a rent abatement.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US may excuse rent obligations or reduce rent where pandemic isolation prevents the tenant from using the premises.

fact_summary: 租客因疫情被隔离无法返回出租屋，房东以欠租为由解除合同 / A tenant isolated by a pandemic could not return, and the landlord terminated for non-payment.
cn_claim: 因不可抗力不能履行合同的可免除责任（民法典第180条、第590条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A tenant prevented from occupying the premises by government restriction may be entitled to relief from rent obligations under the doctrine of frustration.
notes: Both CN and HK may excuse or reduce rent where government restrictions prevent a tenant from occupying the premises.

fact_summary: 某中学因化学实验课未提供护目镜导致学生眼睛被化学品灼伤 / A high-school student suffered chemical burns to the eyes because the school failed to provide safety goggles during a chemistry lab.
cn_claim: 学校应对学生进行安全教育并提供必要的安全防护设备（未成年人保护法第37条；民法典第1199条）。
us_claim: A school that fails to provide required safety equipment for laboratory activities breaches the duty of care; violation of OSHA lab-safety standards constitutes negligence per se.
hk_claim: A school that fails to provide safety equipment for laboratory activities breaches the duty of care owed to students.
notes: All three jurisdictions require schools to provide safety equipment for laboratory activities.

fact_summary: 公司董事以公司名义为关联方提供担保但未在董事会决议中披露关联关系 / A director caused the company to guarantee an affiliate's debt without disclosing the conflict of interest in the board resolution.
cn_claim: 董事与董事会决议事项所涉及的企业有关联关系的不得对该项决议行使表决权（公司法第124条）；未披露关联关系的董事应对公司损失承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A director who has a material interest in a transaction must disclose the interest to the board; failure to disclose renders the transaction voidable and the director liable for breach of the duty of loyalty.
hk_claim: A director with a material interest in a transaction must disclose the interest to the board; non-disclosure is a breach of fiduciary duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions require directors to disclose conflicts of interest and impose liability for non-disclosure.

fact_summary: 某电商平台通过关键词订购获取竞争对手的商品数据并用于自身定价 / An e-commerce platform obtained competitors' product data through keyword subscriptions and used it for its own pricing.
cn_claim: 未经许可利用技术手段获取他人商业数据可能构成不正当竞争（反不正当竞争法第12条）。
us_claim: Scraping publicly available pricing data is generally lawful under the CFAA where the data is accessible without circumventing technical barriers; hiQ Labs, Inc. v. LinkedIn Corp., 938 F.3d 985 (9th Cir. 2019).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN restricts competitive data-scraping under unfair-competition law, while US permits scraping of publicly accessible data under the CFAA as construed in hiQ v. LinkedIn.

fact_summary: 某电商平台通过关键词订购获取竞争对手的商品数据并用于自身定价 / An e-commerce platform scraped competitors' product data for pricing.
cn_claim: 利用技术手段获取他人商业数据可能构成不正当竞争（反不正当竞争法第12条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Scraping publicly available pricing data is not specifically prohibited in Hong Kong, but may raise contractual or passing-off issues depending on the method.
notes: CN may restrict data-scraping under unfair-competition law, while HK does not have specific legislation.

fact_summary: 被告人因走私被查获后其同居女友帮助销毁账本和转移赃款 / After a defendant was caught for smuggling, their cohabiting partner helped destroy account books and transfer illicit proceeds.
cn_claim: 明知是犯罪的人而为其提供隐藏处所、财物帮助其逃匿或作假证明包庇的构成窝藏、包庇罪（刑法第310条第一款）；帮助毁灭证据的另构成帮助毁灭证据罪（刑法第307条第二款）。
us_claim: Helping a fugitive destroy evidence and transfer proceeds constitutes obstruction of justice under 18 U.S.C. § 1519 and accessory after the fact; money-laundering charges may also apply.
hk_claim: Assisting an offender by destroying evidence or concealing proceeds is an offense of perverting the course of justice and may involve money laundering.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize assisting an offender by destroying evidence and concealing criminal proceeds.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播间购买珍珠开蚌后收到的珍珠与直播展示时明显不同 / A consumer who purchased pearl-oyster opening through a livestream received pearls markedly different from those shown during the broadcast.
cn_claim: 经营者提供的商品与展示不符的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Sending different goods from those displayed in a livestream constitutes fraud and breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for bait-and-switch in livestream sales.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播间购买珍珠开蚌后收到的珍珠与直播展示时明显不同 / A consumer received pearls markedly different from those shown during a livestream pearl-opening.
cn_claim: 与展示不符的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A seller who delivers goods materially different from those shown commits fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for bait-and-switch in livestream sales.

fact_summary: 某水上乐园因造浪池排水口未安装防护网导致儿童手臂被吸住受伤 / A child's arm was trapped and injured by an unguarded drain intake in a wave pool at a water park.
cn_claim: 水上乐园经营者应确保游乐设施安全（民法典第1198条第一款）；排水口未安装防护网致人损害的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A water-park operator that fails to install drain covers complying with the Virginia Graeme Baker Pool and Spa Safety Act is liable for negligence and may be strictly liable.
hk_claim: An occupier of a water park who fails to install safety grilles on drain intakes breaches the common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314).
notes: All three jurisdictions require water-park operators to install drain-intake safety devices.

fact_summary: 被告人因利用微信群传播淫秽视频获利被查获 / A defendant was apprehended for distributing obscene videos through WeChat groups for profit.
cn_claim: 以牟利为目的传播淫秽物品的构成传播淫秽物品牟利罪（刑法第363条第一款）。
us_claim: Transmitting obscene material for profit using the internet violates 18 U.S.C. § 1465; the Miller test determines obscenity.
hk_claim: Publishing obscene articles for gain, including through social-media groups, is an offense under the Control of Obscene and Indecent Articles Ordinance (Cap. 390).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize profit-driven distribution of obscene media through social-media groups.

fact_summary: 加盟商在支付高额加盟费和装修费后发现品牌方未取得特许经营备案 / After paying substantial franchise and renovation fees, a franchisee discovered the franchisor had not registered its franchise system.
cn_claim: 特许人应自首次订立特许经营合同之日起15日内向商务主管部门备案（商业特许经营管理条例第8条）；未备案的特许人应承担行政责任并赔偿被特许人由此产生的损失。
us_claim: A franchisor that fails to comply with the FTC Franchise Rule (16 C.F.R. Part 436) by not providing a Franchise Disclosure Document is subject to FTC enforcement; the franchisee may seek rescission and damages for the failure to disclose.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require franchisors to register or file disclosure documents before offering franchises.

fact_summary: 加盟商支付高额费用后发现品牌方未取得特许经营备案 / A franchisee paid substantial fees only to discover the franchisor had not registered its franchise.
cn_claim: 未备案的特许人应承担行政责任并赔偿被特许人损失（商业特许经营管理条例第8条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: There is no specific franchise-registration or disclosure regime in Hong Kong; the franchisee may have remedies under general contract and misrepresentation law.
notes: CN imposes a franchise-registration requirement, while HK does not, creating a regulatory asymmetry.

fact_summary: 某洗浴中心因水温控制阀失灵致顾客烫伤 / A bathhouse customer was scalded because the water-temperature control valve malfunctioned.
cn_claim: 洗浴中心作为经营者应确保设施安全（民法典第1198条第一款）；水温控制阀失灵致人损害的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A spa or bathhouse operator that fails to maintain safe water-temperature controls is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier of a bathhouse who fails to maintain safe water controls breaches the common duty of care under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose safety duties on bathhouse operators.

fact_summary: 被告人因盗窃被抓获后自伤自残以逃避羁押 / After being apprehended for theft, a defendant deliberately self-injured to avoid detention.
cn_claim: 犯罪嫌疑人自伤自残的不能以此为由逃避刑事追究；自伤自残期间不计入羁押期限但应当给予必要的医疗救治（刑事诉讼法第67条第一款第三项）。
us_claim: A detainee who self-injures does not avoid prosecution; the court may order competency evaluations and protective measures, and self-injury may be considered in bail determinations.
hk_claim: A detainee who self-injures is entitled to medical treatment but the self-injury does not bar continued detention or prosecution.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat self-injury as not preventing continued detention or prosecution.

fact_summary: 消费者通过视频直播购买盲盒后发现实际奖品概率与宣传严重不符 / A consumer who purchased mystery boxes through a livestream discovered the actual prize probabilities were materially different from those advertised.
cn_claim: 经营者采用盲盒方式销售的应以显著方式公示抽取概率（上海市盲盒经营活动合规指引第6条）；概率与实际严重不符的构成欺诈。
us_claim: Loot-box or mystery-box sales with misrepresented odds violate the FTC Act § 5 and state consumer-protection laws.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit misrepresentation of prize probabilities in mystery-box sales.

fact_summary: 消费者通过视频直播购买盲盒后发现实际奖品概率与宣传严重不符 / A consumer found the actual prize odds in a mystery box were materially misrepresented.
cn_claim: 概率与实际严重不符的构成欺诈（上海市盲盒经营活动合规指引第6条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Misrepresenting the odds of obtaining items in a mystery-box sale constitutes misleading conduct under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit misrepresentation of prize probabilities in mystery-box sales.

fact_summary: 某小区因二次供水水箱未定期清洗导致居民集体腹泻 / A residential compound's secondary water-supply tank had not been cleaned regularly, causing a mass outbreak of diarrhea among residents.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应定期对二次供水设施进行清洗消毒（城市供水条例第21条及民法典第942条）。
us_claim: A property manager that fails to maintain water-supply tanks in sanitary condition is liable for injuries caused by contaminated water; violation of state health-code requirements constitutes negligence per se.
hk_claim: An occupier or property manager who fails to maintain water-tank cleanliness is liable for resulting illness under the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose water-tank sanitation duties on property managers.

fact_summary: 公司因关联交易价格不公允导致少数股东利益受损 / Minority shareholders suffered loss because the company entered into related-party transactions at unfair prices.
cn_claim: 公司的控股股东、实际控制人、董事、监事、高级管理人员不得利用关联关系损害公司利益（公司法第21条）。
us_claim: A controlling shareholder who engages in an unfairly-priced related-party transaction breaches fiduciary duties; the transaction is subject to the entire-fairness standard and the defendant bears the burden of proof; Sinclair Oil Corp. v. Levien, 280 A.2d 717 (Del. 1971).
hk_claim: A director or controlling member who causes the company to enter into an unfair related-party transaction may be liable for breach of fiduciary duty; the minority may seek relief for unfair prejudice.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide remedies for minority shareholders harmed by unfair related-party transactions.

fact_summary: 被告人在监狱服刑期间教唆同监室在押人员自杀 / While serving a prison sentence, a defendant encouraged a fellow inmate to commit suicide.
cn_claim: 教唆他人自杀的构成故意杀人罪（刑法第232条）；情节较轻的处三年以上十年以下有期徒刑。
us_claim: Encouraging or assisting another to commit suicide may constitute involuntary manslaughter or, in some states, the specific crime of assisted suicide.
hk_claim: Counseling, procuring, or aiding another person to commit suicide is an offense under the Offences Against the Person Ordinance (Cap. 212) s.33B.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize encouraging or assisting suicide.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播间购买促销商品后发现为临期产品且未告知 / A consumer purchased a discounted product through a livestream and discovered it was near its expiration date, which was not disclosed.
cn_claim: 经营者销售临期商品应明示商品临近保质期（食品安全法实施条例第29条）。
us_claim: Selling near-expiration products without disclosure may violate the FTC Act § 5 as a deceptive practice; food-sellers must disclose material facts about the product including imminent expiration.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require disclosure of near-expiration status for food products.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播间购买促销商品后发现为临期产品且未告知 / A consumer discovered a discounted product was near expiry without disclosure.
cn_claim: 销售临期商品应明示临近保质期（食品安全法实施条例第29条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling food products without disclosing imminent expiry may constitute misleading conduct under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK require disclosure of near-expiration status for food products.

fact_summary: 某地下车库因通风故障导致一氧化碳浓度超标致车主中毒昏迷 / A car owner was overcome by carbon monoxide in an underground garage because the ventilation system had failed.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应确保共用设施设备正常运行（民法典第942条第一款）；通风系统故障致人损害的物业公司应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A property manager that fails to maintain ventilation in an underground garage is liable for resulting injuries; violation of building-code ventilation requirements constitutes negligence per se.
hk_claim: An occupier or property manager who fails to maintain ventilation systems in enclosed parking breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose ventilation-maintenance duties on underground-parking operators.

fact_summary: 被告人因与他人发生经济纠纷将对方扣押在车内并索要欠款 / A defendant detained another person in a vehicle and demanded repayment of a debt in a financial dispute.
cn_claim: 为索取债务非法扣押、拘禁他人的构成非法拘禁罪（刑法第238条第三款）；使用暴力致人伤亡的从重处罚。
us_claim: Detaining a person to collect a debt constitutes kidnapping or unlawful imprisonment under state law; federal kidnapping charges under 18 U.S.C. § 1201 may apply if the victim is transported across state lines.
hk_claim: Unlawfully detaining a person to recover a debt constitutes false imprisonment and may also constitute criminal intimidation.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize debt-collection through unlawful detention.

fact_summary: 购房者签署认购书后发现开发商已将该房屋抵押给银行 / A homebuyer discovered the developer had mortgaged the property to a bank after signing the reservation agreement.
cn_claim: 出卖人未告知买受人房屋已抵押的买受人可请求撤销合同并主张赔偿（民法典第148条；商品房买卖合同司法解释第9条）。
us_claim: A developer who fails to disclose an existing mortgage on the property commits fraud; the buyer may rescind the contract and recover damages.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require developers to disclose existing mortgages on properties offered for sale.

fact_summary: 购房者签署认购书后发现开发商已将该房屋抵押给银行 / A homebuyer discovered the developer had mortgaged the property to a bank after signing.
cn_claim: 未告知房屋已抵押的买受人可请求撤销合同并主张赔偿（民法典第148条；商品房买卖合同司法解释第9条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A developer who sells property without disclosing a subsisting mortgage commits misrepresentation; the buyer may rescind the contract and claim damages.
notes: Both CN and HK require developers to disclose existing mortgages on properties offered for sale.

fact_summary: 某APP通过反向工程破解竞争对手软件并推出兼容替代产品 / An app reverse-engineered a competitor's software and launched a compatible substitute product.
cn_claim: 以不正当手段获取他人商业秘密的构成侵犯商业秘密（反不正当竞争法第9条第一款第一项）；通过反向工程获得技术信息的不视为侵犯商业秘密。
us_claim: Reverse engineering of software is generally lawful as a fair use for interoperability purposes under 17 U.S.C. § 107; the DMCA anti-circumvention provisions permit reverse engineering for interoperability; Sega Enterprises Ltd. v. Accolade, Inc., 977 F.2d 1510 (9th Cir. 1992).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US permit reverse engineering for interoperability, though CN adds an unfair-competition overlay absent in US law.

fact_summary: 某APP通过反向工程破解竞争对手软件并推出兼容替代产品 / An app reverse-engineered a competitor's software for compatibility.
cn_claim: 通过反向工程获得技术信息的不视为侵犯商业秘密（反不正当竞争法第9条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Reverse engineering of software for interoperability purposes may be permitted under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528) decompilation provisions.
notes: Both CN and HK permit reverse engineering for interoperability under specific statutory exceptions.

fact_summary: 某餐饮店因燃气软管老化未更换导致燃气爆炸 / A restaurant's gas hose aged and was not replaced, causing a gas explosion.
cn_claim: 餐饮经营者应确保燃气设施安全（城镇燃气管理条例第27条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A restaurant operator who fails to maintain gas equipment in safe condition is liable for negligence; violation of fire and gas-safety codes constitutes negligence per se.
hk_claim: A restaurant occupier who fails to maintain gas equipment in safe condition breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose gas-safety duties on restaurant operators.

fact_summary: 被告人组织境外人员偷渡入境务工 / A defendant organized the illegal border-crossing of foreign nationals for employment.
cn_claim: 组织他人偷越国境的构成组织他人偷越国境罪，且以营利为目的的从重处罚（刑法第318条第一款、第二款）。
us_claim: Smuggling persons into the United States for commercial advantage is alien smuggling under 8 U.S.C. § 1324(a)(2), carrying enhanced penalties where done for profit.
hk_claim: Arranging passage into Hong Kong illegally for employment purposes is an offense under the Immigration Ordinance (Cap. 115).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize organized illegal border-crossing for employment purposes.

fact_summary: 酒店在预订平台显示有房但顾客到店后告知无房 / A hotel showed rooms available on a booking platform but informed the customer on arrival that no rooms were available.
cn_claim: 酒店接受订单后应按照约定提供房间（民法典第577条）；无房提供的构成违约应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A hotel that accepts a reservation and then walks the guest is in breach of contract; the hotel is liable for the guest's additional costs in securing alternative accommodation.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold hotels liable for overbooking and walking confirmed guests.

fact_summary: 酒店在预订平台显示有房但顾客到店后告知无房 / A hotel showed availability online but had no rooms upon the guest's arrival.
cn_claim: 接受订单后应按约定提供房间（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A hotel that fails to honor a confirmed reservation is in breach of contract and liable for the guest's loss.
notes: Both CN and HK hold hotels liable for failing to honor confirmed reservations.

fact_summary: 某市因所属桥梁超期未检测导致桥面塌陷车辆坠落 / A city-owned bridge collapsed due to overdue inspection, causing vehicles to fall.
cn_claim: 公路管理机构应对公路桥梁进行定期检测（公路安全保护条例第48条）；未按期检测致塌陷的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A municipality that fails to inspect and maintain bridges may be liable for negligence; the discretionary-function exception does not generally shield routine inspection failures.
hk_claim: A public authority that fails to inspect and maintain infrastructure may be liable in negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose bridge-inspection duties and hold authorities liable for inspection failures.

fact_summary: 被告人在羁押期间协助公安机关侦破重大毒品犯罪案件 / While in custody, a defendant assisted the police in solving a major drug-trafficking case.
cn_claim: 犯罪分子有重大立功表现的可减轻或免除处罚（刑法第68条）。
us_claim: Providing substantial assistance to law enforcement in the prosecution of other offenders may support a downward departure under U.S. Sentencing Guidelines § 5K1.1 and a sentence below a statutory minimum under 18 U.S.C. § 3553(e).
hk_claim: A defendant who provides significant assistance to law enforcement is entitled to a substantial sentencing reduction.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide significant sentencing benefits for defendants who assist in solving major crimes.

fact_summary: 老年消费者被诱导购买高价保健品后发现产品无保健功效 / An elderly consumer was induced to purchase expensive health supplements that were later found to have no health benefits.
cn_claim: 经营者以虚假或引人误解的宣传方式销售商品的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；利用老年人认知能力下降诱导消费的从重处罚。
us_claim: Targeting elderly consumers with deceptive health claims violates the FTC Act § 5; the FTC has brought numerous enforcement actions against supplement companies making false health claims to seniors.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide enhanced protection for elderly consumers against deceptive supplement marketing.

fact_summary: 老年消费者被诱导购买高价保健品后发现产品无保健功效 / An elderly consumer was induced to purchase expensive supplements that had no health benefits.
cn_claim: 虚假宣传销售商品的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A trader who makes false health claims to induce purchases commits an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for deceptive health-product marketing targeting the elderly.

fact_summary: 某智能设备制造商使用了竞争对手的接口协议以实现产品兼容 / A smart-device manufacturer used a competitor's interface protocol to achieve product compatibility.
cn_claim: 为实现兼容性而使用他人接口协议的应遵守著作权法和反不正当竞争法的相关规定；以兼容为目的的有限使用一般不构成侵权（著作权法第24条第一款第三项；反不正当竞争法第2条）。
us_claim: Using an interface protocol to achieve interoperability may be protected as fair use under 17 U.S.C. § 107; the DMCA § 1201(f) also permits circumvention of access controls for interoperability purposes.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US permit the use of interface protocols for interoperability, grounding the permission in fair-use or statutory exceptions.

fact_summary: 某智能设备制造商使用了竞争对手的接口协议以实现产品兼容 / A smart-device manufacturer used a competitor's interface protocol for compatibility.
cn_claim: 以兼容为目的的有限使用一般不构成侵权（著作权法第24条第一款第三项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Decompilation of a computer program to achieve interoperability with an independently created program is permitted under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528).
notes: Both CN and HK permit limited use of interface protocols for interoperability.

fact_summary: 公司因未及时公告年度报告被实施ST后股价连续跌停 / A company was designated ST (special treatment) for failing to publish its annual report on time, and its stock price hit the downside limit for consecutive days.
cn_claim: 上市公司未按期披露年度报告的由证券交易所实施退市风险警示（证券法第197条）。
us_claim: A public company that fails to timely file reports may be subject to trading suspension and delisting proceedings by the SEC and the relevant exchange.
hk_claim: A listed company that fails to publish its annual report within the deadline will have its shares suspended from trading and may face delisting.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose trading sanctions on listed companies that fail to timely file annual reports.

fact_summary: 被告人携带打火机和汽油闯入前妻住所纵火 / A defendant broke into their ex-spouse's residence with a lighter and gasoline and set it on fire.
cn_claim: 放火危害公共安全的处三年以上十年以下有期徒刑（刑法第114条）；入户放火的从重处罚。
us_claim: Arson of a dwelling is a felony under state law; federal arson charges under 18 U.S.C. § 844(i) apply if the property affects interstate commerce.
hk_claim: Arson of a dwelling is a serious offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions treat arson of a dwelling as a very serious offense.

fact_summary: 消费者办理预付卡后因商家服务质量严重下降要求退卡 / A consumer demanded refund of a prepaid card after the merchant's service quality deteriorated significantly.
cn_claim: 经营者以预收款方式提供服务未按约定提供的应退回预付款（消费者权益保护法第53条）；服务质量显著下降且商家未及时改进的消费者可解除合同。
us_claim: A consumer may seek rescission and refund of a prepaid-services contract where the provider has materially breached by substantially failing to meet the promised service standards.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US allow consumers to cancel prepaid-service contracts and obtain refunds where the provider materially breaches quality standards.

fact_summary: 消费者办理预付卡后因商家服务质量严重下降要求退卡 / A consumer demanded a refund of a prepaid card due to seriously degraded service quality.
cn_claim: 服务质量显著下降的可解除合同（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A consumer may terminate a services contract and claim a refund where the provider has materially failed to perform to the contracted standard.
notes: Both CN and HK allow consumers to cancel and obtain refunds where service quality has materially declined.

fact_summary: 某培训机构因装修使用不合格材料致学员集体甲醛中毒 / A training institution's renovation used substandard materials, causing students to collectively suffer formaldehyde poisoning.
cn_claim: 经营者应确保其经营场所符合安全卫生标准（民法典第1198条第一款）；装修污染致人损害的应承担侵权责任。
us_claim: A business that exposes occupants to toxic levels of formaldehyde from renovations is liable for negligence and may be strictly liable under environmental tort principles.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to ensure the premises are free from toxic substances breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose duties on occupiers to ensure premises are free from toxic renovation materials.

fact_summary: 被告人在庭审中公然撕毁对方提交的证据材料 / During trial, a defendant openly tore up evidence materials submitted by the opposing party.
cn_claim: 在法庭审理中毁灭证据严重扰乱法庭秩序的构成扰乱法庭秩序罪（刑法第309条）。
us_claim: Destroying evidence in a judicial proceeding constitutes obstruction of justice under 18 U.S.C. § 1512(c)(1); the court may also hold the defendant in contempt.
hk_claim: Destroying evidence in court proceedings constitutes contempt of court and may also constitute the common-law offense of perverting the course of justice.
notes: All three jurisdictions severely sanction the destruction of evidence during judicial proceedings.

fact_summary: 代购商在代购过程中购买假冒奢侈品后被海关查扣并拒绝赔偿 / A purchasing agent bought counterfeit luxury goods that were seized by customs and refused to compensate the consumer.
cn_claim: 代购方应保证所代购商品为合法正品（民法典第577条）；因代购假货导致被查扣的消费者可要求代购方赔偿全部损失。
us_claim: A purchasing agent who supplies counterfeit goods is liable for fraud and breach of contract; the consumer is entitled to a full refund and consequential damages.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold purchasing agents liable for counterfeit goods seized by customs.

fact_summary: 代购商在代购过程中购买假冒奢侈品后被海关查扣并拒绝赔偿 / A purchasing agent bought counterfeit luxury goods that customs seized and refused compensation.
cn_claim: 因代购假货导致被查扣的可要求代购方赔偿全部损失（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A purchasing agent who supplies counterfeit goods is liable for breach of contract and misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK hold purchasing agents liable for counterfeit goods seized by customs.

fact_summary: 某小区外墙瓷砖大面积脱落砸坏停车位上的十余辆车 / A large section of exterior-wall tiles fell from a residential building, damaging more than ten cars in the parking lot below.
cn_claim: 建筑物发生脱落造成他人损害的所有人与管理人不能证明自己无过错的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1253条）。
us_claim: A building owner that fails to maintain exterior surfaces in safe condition is liable for resulting property damage under negligence and premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier or building owner who fails to maintain exterior walls breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose maintenance duties on building owners for exterior-wall safety.

fact_summary: 公司董事在竞业禁止期内加入竞争企业 / A director joined a competing business during the non-competition period.
cn_claim: 董事对公司负有忠实义务不得利用职务便利为自己或他人谋取属于公司的商业机会或自营与所任职公司同类的业务（公司法第148条第一款第五项）。
us_claim: A director who competes with the corporation during their tenure breaches the duty of loyalty; post-employment non-competes are enforceable only if reasonable in duration, scope, and geography.
hk_claim: A director must not place themselves in a position where their personal interests conflict with their duties to the company; competing with the company is a breach of fiduciary duty.
notes: All three jurisdictions restrict directors from competing with their companies during tenure.

fact_summary: 被告人因醉酒后在小区内连续划伤十余辆汽车 / A defendant, intoxicated, scratched more than ten vehicles in a residential compound.
cn_claim: 故意毁坏公私财物数额较大或有其他严重情节的构成故意毁坏财物罪（刑法第275条）。
us_claim: Intentionally damaging multiple vehicles constitutes criminal mischief or malicious destruction of property, a felony under state law where the damage exceeds the statutory threshold.
hk_claim: Intentionally damaging multiple vehicles is criminal damage under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the intentional destruction of multiple vehicles.

fact_summary: 购房合同约定房屋配有车位但收房时车位已被另售 / The purchase contract included a parking space, but at delivery the space had been sold to another buyer.
cn_claim: 出卖人交付的标的物不符合约定的买受人可请求承担违约责任（民法典第577条）；车位已被另售的开发商应承担根本违约责任。
us_claim: A developer who sells a parking space included in a purchase contract to a third party is in material breach; the buyer may seek specific performance or damages for the value of the missing parking space.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold developers liable when a parking space included in the purchase contract is sold to a third party.

fact_summary: 购房合同约定房屋配有车位但收房时车位已被另售 / A parking space included in the purchase contract was sold to a third party before delivery.
cn_claim: 开发商应承担根本违约责任（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A developer who sells a parking space that was part of the purchase contract to a third party is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK hold developers liable for selling included parking spaces to third parties.

fact_summary: 某社区公共健身器材因锈蚀断裂致锻炼老人摔伤 / An elderly resident was injured when corroded public-fitness equipment in the community snapped during use.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应按照约定和物业使用性质妥善维修养护业主共有部分（民法典第942条）。
us_claim: A property manager or local authority that fails to maintain public-exercise equipment in safe condition is liable for resulting injuries under negligence and premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain community-exercise equipment in safe condition breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose maintenance duties on those responsible for public-exercise equipment.

fact_summary: 被告人因购买非法枪支被抓获后供述了枪支来源及销售网络 / After being captured for purchasing an illegal firearm, a defendant disclosed the source and the sales network.
cn_claim: 犯罪分子揭发他人犯罪行为查证属实或提供重要线索从而得以侦破其他案件的构成立功可从轻或减轻处罚；有重大立功表现的可减轻或免除处罚（刑法第68条）。
us_claim: Providing assistance that leads to the disruption of a gun-trafficking network may support a substantial sentencing reduction under § 5K1.1 and a sentence below the mandatory minimum under 18 U.S.C. § 3553(e).
hk_claim: A defendant who provides information leading to the disruption of an arms-trafficking network is entitled to a substantial sentencing reduction.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide significant sentencing discounts for defendants who assist in disrupting weapons-trafficking networks.

fact_summary: 装修公司因设计师离职未通知业主且安排无资质人员接替导致工程质量不合格 / A renovation company failed to inform the homeowner of the designer's departure and assigned unqualified replacement staff, resulting in substandard work.
cn_claim: 承揽人将其承揽的主要工作交由第三人完成的应就该第三人完成的工作成果向定作人负责（民法典第772条第二款）；安排无资质人员施工的应承担违约责任。
us_claim: A contractor who substitutes unqualified personnel for the promised qualified professionals breaches the contract and the duty of good faith; the homeowner is entitled to repair costs or diminution-in-value damages.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold renovation contractors liable for assigning unqualified personnel without disclosure.

fact_summary: 装修公司安排无资质人员接替设计师导致工程质量不合格 / A renovation company assigned unqualified staff to replace the designer without notice.
cn_claim: 安排无资质人员施工的应承担违约责任（民法典第772条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A contractor who substitutes unqualified staff for the agreed personnel is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK hold renovation contractors liable for substituting unqualified personnel without disclosure.

fact_summary: 某仓库因电路老化引发火灾烧毁库存货物 / A warehouse fire caused by aging electrical circuits destroyed stored inventory.
cn_claim: 仓库管理人未能确保用电安全的应对火灾造成的损失承担侵权责任（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A warehouse operator who fails to maintain safe electrical systems is liable for resulting fire damage under negligence and premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier or warehouse operator who fails to maintain safe electrical systems breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose electrical-safety duties on warehouse operators.

fact_summary: 公司因股东未按期缴纳增资款导致扩建项目被迫终止 / A company's expansion project was forced to terminate because shareholders failed to contribute additional capital on time.
cn_claim: 股东未按照约定缴纳出资的除应向公司足额缴纳外还应向已按期足额缴纳出资的股东承担违约责任（公司法第28条第二款）。
us_claim: A shareholder who fails to meet a capital call is liable for the unpaid amount under the subscription agreement; the company may sue to enforce the obligation.
hk_claim: A shareholder who fails to pay the amount due on shares is liable to the company for the unpaid amount with interest.
notes: All three jurisdictions enforce shareholders' capital-contribution obligations for corporate projects.

fact_summary: 被告人因伪造公司印章签订合同并骗取货款 / A defendant forged a company seal, signed a contract, and fraudulently obtained payment for goods.
cn_claim: 伪造公司印章的构成伪造公司印章罪（刑法第280条第二款）；利用伪造印章骗取货款的还构成合同诈骗罪（刑法第224条）。
us_claim: Forging a corporate seal to execute a fraudulent contract constitutes forgery and wire fraud.
hk_claim: Forging a company seal and using it to obtain property by deception constitutes forgery and fraud.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the use of forged corporate seals to commit contract fraud.

fact_summary: 公司以董事违反竞业禁止义务为由请求行使归入权 / A company sought to exercise its disgorgement right against a director who breached the non-competition duty.
cn_claim: 董事违反竞业禁止义务的所得收入应归公司所有（公司法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: A director who breaches the duty of loyalty by competing with the corporation must disgorge profits obtained from the competing activity.
hk_claim: A director who competes with the company in breach of fiduciary duty must account for profits made from the competing business.
notes: All three jurisdictions hold directors liable to disgorge profits from competing activities.

fact_summary: 被告人因与室友发生争执将其从阳台推下致重伤 / A defendant pushed a roommate off a balcony during an argument, causing serious injury.
cn_claim: 故意伤害他人身体致人重伤的构成故意伤害罪处三年以上十年以下有期徒刑（刑法第234条第二款）。
us_claim: Pushing a person from a height causing serious injury constitutes aggravated assault or attempted murder under state law.
hk_claim: Causing grievous bodily harm with intent is an offense under the Offences Against the Person Ordinance (Cap. 212) s.17.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize causing serious injury by pushing from a height.

fact_summary: 消费者在酒店住宿期间行李在寄存处被盗，酒店以免费寄存为由拒绝赔偿 / A guest's luggage was stolen from the hotel baggage storage, and the hotel refused to compensate, claiming the storage was free of charge.
cn_claim: 宾馆对消费者寄存的物品应尽到妥善保管义务（民法典第890条）；免费保管不能当然免除保管人因重大过失造成损失的赔偿责任。
us_claim: A hotel that offers baggage storage, even gratuitously, owes a duty of reasonable care as a bailee; gross negligence is not excused by the gratuitous nature of the bailment.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US impose a duty of care on hotels for stored luggage, not excused merely because storage was free.

fact_summary: 消费者在酒店住宿期间行李在寄存处被盗，酒店以免费寄存为由拒绝赔偿 / A guest's luggage was stolen from hotel storage, and the hotel refused to compensate, citing free storage.
cn_claim: 免费保管不能当然免除重大过失责任（民法典第890条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A hotel that accepts luggage for storage, even gratuitously, owes a duty of care as a bailee.
notes: Both CN and HK impose a duty of care on hotels for stored luggage.

fact_summary: 某农贸市场因地面长期湿滑未铺防滑垫致顾客摔伤 / A customer slipped and was injured on a permanently wet market floor where no anti-slip mats had been placed.
cn_claim: 市场管理方作为经营者应尽到安全保障义务（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A market operator that fails to provide anti-slip measures in areas that are foreseeably and continuously wet is liable under premises-liability principles.
hk_claim: An occupier of a market who fails to address a known persistent slip hazard breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require market operators to address known persistent slip hazards.

fact_summary: 被告人因杀人碎尸后将尸块抛入江河 / A defendant dismembered a murder victim and disposed of the body parts in a river.
cn_claim: 故意杀人的处死刑、无期徒刑或十年以上有期徒刑（刑法第232条）；毁尸灭迹的酌情从重处罚。
us_claim: Murder followed by dismemberment and disposal of remains is first-degree murder with aggravating circumstances; the disposal of remains may constitute separate charges for abuse of a corpse.
hk_claim: Murder is the most serious offense; dismemberment and disposal of remains is an aggravating factor.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat murder with dismemberment and body disposal as extremely serious, with aggravated penalties.

fact_summary: 网课平台在支付年费后因经营困难停止服务 / An online-course platform ceased operations after collecting annual subscription fees, citing business difficulties.
cn_claim: 经营者以预收款方式提供服务未按约定提供的应退回预付款并承担费用（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: A subscription platform that ceases operations without providing a prorated refund is liable for breach of contract; consumers may seek recovery in bankruptcy proceedings.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require prepaid-service providers to refund consumers for unrendered services upon cessation of operations.

fact_summary: 网课平台在支付年费后因经营困难停止服务 / An online-course platform ceased operations after collecting annual fees.
cn_claim: 未按约定提供的应退回预付款（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A services platform that ceases operations without refunding prepaid fees is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK require refund of prepaid fees upon cessation of operations.

fact_summary: 某市因排水管道堵塞致使暴雨时城市内涝车辆被淹 / Urban flooding caused by a blocked municipal drainage pipe submerged vehicles during a rainstorm.
cn_claim: 市政排水设施的管护单位应定期对排水管道进行疏通维护（城镇排水与污水处理条例第38条）。
us_claim: A municipality that fails to maintain drainage systems may be liable for resulting property damage; the discretionary-function exception may not apply to routine maintenance failures.
hk_claim: A public authority that fails to maintain drainage systems may be liable in negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose drainage-maintenance duties on public authorities.

fact_summary: 公司以股东查阅会计账簿具有不正当目的为由拒绝其查阅 / A company denied a shareholder access to accounting books on the ground that the shareholder had an improper purpose.
cn_claim: 股东有权查阅公司会计账簿；公司有合理根据认为股东查阅有不正当目的可能损害公司合法利益的可以拒绝（公司法第33条第二款）。
us_claim: A corporation may refuse a shareholder's inspection demand if it can demonstrate the shareholder has an improper purpose; Delaware G.C.L. § 220 requires the shareholder to state a proper purpose.
hk_claim: A member may inspect accounting records only with board authorization or a court order.
notes: CN and US balance the shareholder's inspection right against improper-purpose objections, while HK requires board or court authorization.

fact_summary: 被告人因不满被辞退报复社会驾车冲撞人群 / A defendant drove a vehicle into a crowd in an act of social revenge after being terminated from employment.
cn_claim: 以危险方法危害公共安全致人伤亡的构成以危险方法危害公共安全罪（刑法第115条第一款）。
us_claim: Intentionally driving into a crowd constitutes murder, attempted murder, and aggravated assault; federal charges may apply if the act involved interstate travel or terrorism.
hk_claim: Intentionally driving a vehicle into a crowd causing death constitutes murder; causing serious injury is an offense under the Offences Against the Person Ordinance (Cap. 212).
notes: All three jurisdictions treat intentional vehicle attacks on crowds as the most serious criminal offenses.

fact_summary: 租客退租时房东以墙上有钉眼为由拒退押金 / A landlord refused to return the security deposit upon the tenant's departure, citing nail holes in the walls as damage.
cn_claim: 因正常使用导致的轻微磨损不应视为需要赔偿的损坏（民法典第710条）。
us_claim: A landlord may only deduct from the security deposit for damage beyond ordinary wear and tear; nail holes from hanging pictures are generally considered ordinary wear and tear.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US limit security-deposit deductions to damage beyond ordinary wear and tear.

fact_summary: 租客退租时房东以墙上有钉眼为由拒退押金 / A landlord refused to return the security deposit citing nail holes as damage.
cn_claim: 因正常使用导致的轻微磨损不应赔偿（民法典第710条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A landlord may only deduct from the deposit for damage beyond fair wear and tear.
notes: Both CN and HK limit security-deposit deductions to damage beyond ordinary wear and tear.

fact_summary: 某医院因未告知手术风险患者术后并发症索赔 / A patient claimed compensation for a post-operative complication because the hospital failed to disclose the surgical risk.
cn_claim: 医务人员未尽到说明义务造成患者损害的重大疾病治疗中的风险说明义务应当更加严格（民法典第1219条）。
us_claim: A physician who fails to obtain informed consent by disclosing material risks is liable for medical battery or negligence; the patient must show that a reasonable person would not have consented to the procedure had the risk been disclosed.
hk_claim: A doctor who fails to disclose material risks of a procedure breaches the duty of care; the patient must show that they would not have consented had the risk been disclosed.
notes: All three jurisdictions require informed consent including disclosure of material risks.

fact_summary: 被告人因在微信群中传播暴恐视频被刑事拘留 / A defendant was criminally detained for disseminating violent-terrorism videos in a WeChat group.
cn_claim: 宣扬恐怖主义、极端主义或煽动实施恐怖活动的构成宣扬恐怖主义、极端主义、煽动实施恐怖活动罪（刑法第120条之三）。
us_claim: Disseminating terrorist propaganda through social media may constitute providing material support to terrorism under 18 U.S.C. § 2339A and § 2339B.
hk_claim: Disseminating terrorist publications is an offense under the United Nations (Anti-Terrorism Measures) Ordinance (Cap. 575).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the dissemination of terrorist propaganda through social media.

fact_summary: 消费者购买宠物狗一周后发现宠物患有严重遗传病 / A consumer discovered the newly-purchased pet dog had a serious genetic disease one week after purchase.
cn_claim: 出卖人应对标的物承担瑕疵担保责任（民法典第617条）；经营者应提供健康保证期内的健康售后服务。
us_claim: A pet seller who fails to disclose known genetic defects may be liable for fraud and breach of warranty under state pet-lemon laws.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide consumer remedies for undisclosed genetic defects in pet sales.

fact_summary: 消费者购买宠物狗一周后发现宠物患有严重遗传病 / A consumer discovered the newly-purchased dog had a serious genetic disease.
cn_claim: 出卖人应对标的物承担瑕疵担保责任（民法典第617条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A seller who fails to disclose a known defect in an animal sold is liable for misrepresentation and breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for undisclosed defects in pet sales.

fact_summary: 某写字楼因消防通道被杂物堵塞致火灾时人员无法疏散 / A fire in an office building trapped occupants because the fire-escape route was blocked by stored debris.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应确保疏散通道和安全出口畅通（消防法第16条第一款第四项；民法典第942条第一款）。
us_claim: A building manager who allows fire exits to be obstructed violates fire-safety codes and is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to keep escape routes clear breaches fire-safety obligations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require building managers to keep fire-escape routes unobstructed.

fact_summary: 被告人在缓刑考验期内因吸毒被强制隔离戒毒 / While on probation, a defendant was sent to compulsory drug rehabilitation for drug use.
cn_claim: 缓刑考验期内违反法律、行政法规或国务院有关部门关于缓刑的监督管理规定的应撤销缓刑执行原判刑罚（刑法第77条第二款）。
us_claim: Drug use during probation violates probation conditions and subjects the probationer to revocation proceedings and imposition of the original sentence.
hk_claim: A person under a supervision order who uses drugs is in breach of the order and may be recalled to prison.
notes: All three jurisdictions revoke probation or conditional release upon drug-use violations.

fact_summary: 消费者在视频平台付费观看直播课程后发现课程内容为盗录 / A consumer paid to watch a livestream course on a video platform and discovered the content was an unauthorized recording.
cn_claim: 经营者提供服务有欺诈行为的应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling unauthorized copies of educational content constitutes fraud and copyright infringement.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for consumers sold unauthorized course recordings.

fact_summary: 消费者在视频平台付费观看直播课程后发现课程内容为盗录 / A consumer paid for a livestream course and discovered it was an unauthorized recording.
cn_claim: 未经许可传播他人授课的构成侵权。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling unauthorized copies of educational content constitutes fraud and copyright infringement.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for consumers sold unauthorized course recordings.

fact_summary: 某网约车因疲劳驾驶撞上护栏致乘客受伤 / A ride-hailing driver crashed into a guardrail due to fatigue driving, injuring the passenger.
cn_claim: 网约车平台对驾驶员疲劳驾驶负有监管责任；因驾驶员疲劳驾驶发生事故致乘客受伤的平台应承担承运人责任（民法典第823条；网络预约出租汽车经营服务管理暂行办法第18条）。
us_claim: A transportation-network company may be vicariously liable for a driver's negligence while the driver is logged into the platform; liability depends on the degree of control exercised by the company.
hk_claim: A transport-service operator may be vicariously liable for the negligence of its drivers.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose vicarious liability on ride-hailing platforms for driver negligence.

fact_summary: 被告人因走私毒品数量巨大被判处死刑缓期执行 / A defendant was sentenced to death with a two-year reprieve for smuggling an enormous quantity of drugs.
cn_claim: 走私毒品数量大的处死刑（刑法第347条第二款）。
us_claim: Large-scale drug trafficking may result in life imprisonment; the death penalty is not available for drug offenses under federal law.
hk_claim: Trafficking in a large quantity of dangerous drugs carries a maximum penalty of life imprisonment.
notes: CN retains the death penalty for large-scale drug trafficking, while US and HK do not, creating a maximum-penalty asymmetry.

fact_summary: 美容院为顾客进行医美项目时使用未取得批准文号的注射产品 / A beauty salon used injectable products without regulatory approval numbers for cosmetic procedures on a customer.
cn_claim: 美容医疗机构使用的药品和医疗器械应符合法定要求（医疗美容服务管理办法第16条）；使用未经批准的注射产品致人损害的美容院应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: Using unapproved injectable products in cosmetic procedures violates FDA regulations; the provider is liable for negligence and may face criminal sanctions.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit the use of unapproved injectable products in cosmetic procedures.

fact_summary: 美容院为顾客进行医美项目时使用未取得批准文号的注射产品 / A beauty salon used unapproved injectable products for cosmetic procedures.
cn_claim: 使用未经批准的注射产品致人损害的应承担赔偿责任（医疗美容服务管理办法第16条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A beauty-salon operator who uses unregulated injectable products may be liable for negligence and breach of the implied duty of care.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit the use of unapproved injectable products in cosmetic procedures.

fact_summary: 某公交车因未关好后门行驶致乘客被抛出车外摔伤 / A passenger was thrown from a city bus and injured because the rear door was not properly closed while in motion.
cn_claim: 公交公司作为承运人应确保乘客在运输过程中的安全（民法典第823条）。
us_claim: A common carrier owes the highest duty of care to its passengers; operating with an open door constitutes negligence per se.
hk_claim: A bus operator owes a high duty of care to passengers and must ensure doors are secured before moving.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose a high duty of care on common carriers for passenger safety.

fact_summary: 被告人因在考场使用高科技设备作弊被当场抓获 / A defendant was caught red-handed using high-tech devices to cheat during an examination.
cn_claim: 在法律规定的国家考试中组织作弊的构成组织考试作弊罪（刑法第284条之一第一款第二项）。
us_claim: Using technology to cheat on standardized tests may constitute wire fraud and conspiracy; specific state laws criminalize test-related fraud.
hk_claim: Cheating on public examinations by using electronic devices may constitute an offense under the Public Examinations (Prevention of Malpractice) Ordinance (Cap. 519).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize high-tech cheating in official examinations.
