fact_summary: 消费者购买二手名表后发现为组装表 / A consumer purchased a pre-owned luxury watch and later discovered it was assembled from parts.
cn_claim: 经营者将组装表作为原装正品销售的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling an assembled watch as an original authentic timepiece constitutes fraud; the buyer may rescind the contract and recover damages.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for the sale of assembled watches misrepresented as authentic.

fact_summary: 消费者购买二手名表后发现为组装表 / A consumer purchased a pre-owned luxury watch and discovered it was assembled from parts.
cn_claim: 将组装表作为原装正品销售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling an assembled watch misrepresented as original constitutes fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for the sale of assembled watches misrepresented as authentic.

fact_summary: 某小区因未设无障碍通道致残疾业主无法正常出入 / A disabled resident was unable to enter or exit normally because the residential compound lacked an accessibility ramp.
cn_claim: 新建、改建、扩建的居住建筑应符合无障碍设施工程建设标准（无障碍环境建设法第18条）。
us_claim: Failure to provide required accessibility features in residential buildings violates the Americans with Disabilities Act and the Fair Housing Act; the property owner may be liable for discrimination and required to retrofit.
hk_claim: Buildings must provide access for persons with disabilities under the Disability Discrimination Ordinance (Cap. 487).
notes: All three jurisdictions require accessibility features in residential buildings.

fact_summary: 被告人因在网上发布招募恐怖组织成员的言论被抓获 / A defendant was apprehended for posting messages online recruiting members for a terrorist organization.
cn_claim: 利用网络发布违法犯罪信息的可构成组织、领导、参加恐怖组织罪的预备行为或帮助行为（刑法第120条；网络安全法第12条第二款）。
us_claim: Providing material support or resources to a designated foreign terrorist organization is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 2339B; recruitment of members constitutes material support.
hk_claim: Providing support to a terrorist organization including recruitment is an offense under the United Nations (Anti-Terrorism Measures) Ordinance (Cap. 575).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize online recruitment for terrorist organizations.

fact_summary: 车主购买车险后发生交通事故，保险公司以事故发生时车辆未年检为由拒赔 / After a car accident, an insurer denied coverage on the ground that the vehicle had not undergone its annual inspection at the time of the accident.
cn_claim: 保险人对免责条款应尽到提示和明确说明义务（保险法第17条）；将未年检作为免责事由的应在合同中明确约定并提示投保人。
us_claim: An insurer may deny coverage based on a policy exclusion for failure to maintain the vehicle in a safe condition; however, the exclusion must be clearly stated and the failure must have caused or contributed to the accident in many jurisdictions.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US allow insurers to exclude coverage for uninspected vehicles, but require the exclusion to be clearly communicated.

fact_summary: 保险公司以车辆未年检为由拒赔 / An insurer denied coverage because the vehicle lacked an annual inspection at the time of the accident.
cn_claim: 免责条款应尽到提示说明义务（保险法第17条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An insurer may deny coverage if the policy clearly excludes liability for accidents occurring while the vehicle is in an unroadworthy condition.
notes: Both CN and HK allow insurers to exclude coverage based on vehicle condition, subject to disclosure requirements.

fact_summary: 某外卖员在送餐途中骑行时低头看手机撞倒老人 / A delivery rider knocked down an elderly pedestrian while looking at a mobile phone during a delivery trip.
cn_claim: 外卖骑手在配送途中因执行工作任务造成他人损害的由用人单位承担侵权责任（民法典第1191条第一款）。
us_claim: A delivery company is vicariously liable for the negligence of its riders committed within the scope of employment; distracted driving is clear evidence of negligence.
hk_claim: A delivery company is vicariously liable for torts committed by a rider in the course of employment.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose vicarious liability on delivery companies for their riders' negligence.

fact_summary: 被告人因帮助电信诈骗团伙开发钓鱼网站在明知网站用途的情况下获利 / A defendant profited from developing phishing websites for a telecom-fraud ring while knowing the websites' purpose.
cn_claim: 明知他人利用信息网络实施犯罪仍为其提供技术支持情节严重的构成帮助信息网络犯罪活动罪（刑法第287条之二）。
us_claim: Knowingly creating phishing websites for use in fraud schemes constitutes aiding and abetting wire fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1343 and may be charged as conspiracy.
hk_claim: Developing phishing websites knowing they will be used for fraud constitutes aiding and abetting fraud and may involve offenses under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the development of phishing tools for fraud schemes.

fact_summary: 消费者购买新手机后发现为展示机且电池循环次数高达数百次 / A consumer purchased a new phone and discovered it was a display model with a battery-cycle count in the hundreds.
cn_claim: 将展示机作为新机销售的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a used display model as a new phone constitutes fraud and breach of warranty; the consumer is entitled to a refund and may recover damages.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for the sale of display models misrepresented as new.

fact_summary: 消费者购买新手机后发现为展示机且电池循环次数高达数百次 / A consumer purchased a phone represented as new that turned out to be a display model.
cn_claim: 将展示机作为新机销售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling a used display model as a new phone is fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for the sale of display models misrepresented as new.

fact_summary: 某洗浴中心因更衣柜锁具故障致顾客财物被盗 / A bathhouse customer's valuables were stolen from a locker because the lock was defective.
cn_claim: 洗浴中心对顾客存放于更衣柜内的物品应尽到妥善保管义务（民法典第897条、第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A business that provides lockers for customer use owes a duty of reasonable care to maintain the lockers in functional condition; failure to do so resulting in theft may give rise to liability.
hk_claim: An occupier who provides lockers for customers' use must take reasonable care to maintain them in secure condition.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose duties on businesses to maintain secure lockers for customer valuables.

fact_summary: 被告人因故意伤害致人死亡但投案自首并积极赔偿取得被害人家属谅解 / A defendant who caused death through intentional injury voluntarily surrendered and actively compensated the victim's family, obtaining their forgiveness.
cn_claim: 犯罪后自动投案如实供述自己罪行的应以自首论可以从轻或减轻处罚；积极赔偿取得被害人近亲属谅解的酌情从宽（刑法第67条第一款）。
us_claim: Voluntary surrender and payment of restitution are strong evidence of acceptance of responsibility under the U.S. Sentencing Guidelines § 3E1.1, supporting a sentencing reduction.
hk_claim: A defendant who surrenders and makes full admissions and pays compensation to the victim's family is entitled to a substantial sentencing discount.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide significant sentencing mitigation for voluntary surrender combined with victim compensation.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播平台购买名酒后鉴定为假酒 / A consumer purchased premium liquor through a livestreaming platform, and authentication determined it was counterfeit.
cn_claim: 经营者销售假冒名酒的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；还构成食品安全法十倍赔偿的适用竞合。
us_claim: Selling counterfeit liquor as authentic constitutes fraud and violates the Lanham Act; the consumer may seek rescission and treble damages in some states.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide strong remedies for counterfeit liquor sales.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播平台购买名酒后鉴定为假酒 / A consumer purchased premium liquor through a livestream platform and it was authenticated as counterfeit.
cn_claim: 销售假冒名酒的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling counterfeit liquor as authentic constitutes fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for counterfeit liquor sales.

fact_summary: 某大型商场未按消防规定配备自动喷淋系统致火灾蔓延 / A fire in a large shopping mall spread extensively because the required automatic sprinkler system had not been installed.
cn_claim: 商场等公众聚集场所应按照消防技术标准配置消防设施（消防法第16条第一款第二项）。
us_claim: A commercial building owner who fails to install required fire-suppression systems violates fire codes and is liable for resulting fire damage under negligence and premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to install required fire-safety equipment breaches the common duty of care and fire-safety regulations.
notes: All three jurisdictions require shopping-mall operators to install fire-suppression systems.

fact_summary: 被告人因在互联网上发布针对特定种族群体的仇恨言论被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for posting hate speech targeting a specific racial group on the internet.
cn_claim: 煽动民族仇恨、民族歧视情节严重的构成煽动民族仇恨、民族歧视罪（刑法第249条）。
us_claim: Hate speech is generally protected by the First Amendment unless it constitutes a true threat, incitement to imminent lawless action, or harassment; there is no general federal hate-speech crime.
hk_claim: Inciting hatred against a racial group may constitute an offense under the Race Discrimination Ordinance (Cap. 602) and, where violence is incited, under the Public Order Ordinance (Cap. 245).
notes: All three jurisdictions address hate speech but with significantly different legal frameworks: CN criminalizes it directly, US provides broad constitutional protection, and HK uses anti-discrimination and public-order legislation.

fact_summary: 消费者在美容院接受服务过程中因工作人员操作失误致面部烫伤 / A consumer suffered facial burns during a beauty-salon treatment due to staff operational errors.
cn_claim: 美容院作为经营者应对其服务过程中造成的损害承担赔偿责任（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A beauty salon is liable for injuries caused by staff negligence during treatments under premises-liability and negligence theories.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold beauty salons liable for staff operational errors during treatments.

fact_summary: 消费者在美容院接受服务过程中因工作人员操作失误致面部烫伤 / A consumer suffered facial burns from staff operational errors during a beauty treatment.
cn_claim: 美容院应对其服务过程中造成的损害承担赔偿责任（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A beauty-salon operator is liable for injuries caused by staff negligence under the common duty of care.
notes: Both CN and HK hold beauty salons liable for staff operational errors during treatments.

fact_summary: 某厂房因未安装防爆灯致粉尘爆炸多人伤亡 / A factory workshop suffered a dust explosion causing multiple casualties because explosion-proof lighting had not been installed.
cn_claim: 存在粉尘爆炸危险的企业应按照国家标准安装防爆电气设备（安全生产法第36条第一款；粉尘防爆安全规程）。
us_claim: A factory operator who fails to install explosion-proof equipment in hazardous areas violates OSHA Process Safety Management standards (29 C.F.R. § 1910.119) and is strictly liable for resulting explosions.
hk_claim: A factory occupier who fails to take reasonable precautions against dust-explosion risks breaches the common duty of care and safety regulations.
notes: All three jurisdictions require factory operators to install explosion-proof equipment in hazardous environments.

fact_summary: 被告人因生产地沟油销售给餐馆被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for producing gutter oil and selling it to restaurants.
cn_claim: 将餐厨废弃油脂加工后作为食用油销售的依照刑法第144条生产、销售有毒、有害食品罪定罪处罚。
us_claim: Selling adulterated food products is a crime under the Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act (21 U.S.C. § 331(a)); knowing distribution of adulterated food may also constitute mail or wire fraud.
hk_claim: Selling food unfit for human consumption is an offense under the Food Safety Ordinance (Cap. 612).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the production and sale of adulterated food products including gutter oil.

fact_summary: 租房平台以租客养宠物为由单方解除合同并没收押金 / A rental platform unilaterally terminated the lease and forfeited the deposit because the tenant kept a pet.
cn_claim: 合同解除权应依法行使；合同中未禁止饲养宠物或饲养宠物未造成损害的出租人不得单方解除合同并没收押金。
us_claim: A landlord may terminate a lease and retain the security deposit for an unauthorized pet only if the lease expressly prohibits pets and the tenant violated the prohibition.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require a clear contractual prohibition before a landlord may terminate for pet ownership.

fact_summary: 租房平台以租客养宠物为由单方解除合同并没收押金 / A rental platform terminated the lease and forfeited the deposit for pet ownership.
cn_claim: 合同中未禁止养宠物的不得单方解除合同。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A landlord may only terminate a tenancy for pet ownership if the tenancy agreement clearly prohibits pets.
notes: Both CN and HK require a clear contractual prohibition before a landlord may terminate for pet ownership.

fact_summary: 某游船因超载在湖心翻覆致多名游客溺亡 / An overloaded tour boat capsized on a lake, causing multiple tourists to drown.
cn_claim: 船舶经营者应按照核定载客人数运营（内河交通安全管理条例第21条）；超载翻覆致人死亡的应承担侵权责任。
us_claim: A tour-boat operator that exceeds the passenger capacity is grossly negligent and liable for resulting deaths; the operator may face criminal charges for involuntary manslaughter.
hk_claim: A boat operator who exceeds the licensed passenger capacity and causes death is liable in negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose strict capacity limits on passenger vessels.

fact_summary: 被告人因在微信朋友圈发布涉恐信息被采取刑事强制措施 / A defendant was placed under criminal compulsory measures for posting terrorism-related content on WeChat Moments.
cn_claim: 宣扬恐怖主义、极端主义或煽动实施恐怖活动的构成宣扬恐怖主义、极端主义、煽动实施恐怖活动罪（刑法第120条之三）。
us_claim: Posting terrorist content on social media may constitute providing material support to terrorism under 18 U.S.C. § 2339A or § 2339B.
hk_claim: Publishing terrorist statements on social media is an offense under the United Nations (Anti-Terrorism Measures) Ordinance (Cap. 575).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize posting terrorism-related content on social media.

fact_summary: 消费者购买学习机后发现其内置课程全部需要额外付费 / A consumer purchased a learning device and discovered all built-in courses required additional payment.
cn_claim: 经营者对商品的功能和附带服务应进行真实全面的描述（消费者权益保护法第8条第一款）；未告知课程需额外付费的构成欺诈。
us_claim: Selling a device without disclosing that all advertised content requires additional payment is deceptive under the FTC Act § 5.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require disclosure of additional fees for advertised content in consumer-electronics sales.

fact_summary: 消费者购买学习机后发现其内置课程全部需要额外付费 / A consumer discovered all courses on a purchased learning device required extra payment.
cn_claim: 未告知额外付费的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第8条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling a device without disclosing that advertised features require additional payment constitutes misleading conduct.
notes: Both CN and HK require disclosure of additional fees for advertised features.

fact_summary: 某学校组织春游时因未配备足够数量的随行老师致学生走失 / A student went missing during a school-organized spring outing because an insufficient number of supervising teachers had been assigned.
cn_claim: 学校组织校外活动应配备足够数量的带队教师确保学生安全（未成年人保护法第37条；民法典第1199条）。
us_claim: A school that fails to provide adequate supervision during off-campus activities is liable for negligence; the standard of care requires sufficient adult-to-student ratios.
hk_claim: A school owes a duty of care to students during school activities and must provide adequate supervision.
notes: All three jurisdictions require schools to provide adequate supervision during off-campus activities.

fact_summary: 被告人因贩卖毒品在侦查阶段主动交代了尚未被发现的其他贩毒事实 / During investigation for drug trafficking, a defendant voluntarily disclosed additional trafficking offenses not yet discovered.
cn_claim: 被采取强制措施的犯罪嫌疑人如实供述司法机关尚未掌握的其他罪行的以自首论可从轻或减轻处罚（刑法第67条第二款）。
us_claim: Voluntary disclosure of additional uncharged offenses supports a downward departure for cooperation under § 5K1.1.
hk_claim: A defendant who voluntarily discloses additional offenses while in custody is entitled to a sentencing discount.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide sentencing benefits for voluntary disclosure of additional offenses during investigation.

fact_summary: 装修公司因装修质量不合格被业主要求返工且费用自担 / A homeowner demanded that a renovation company redo the substandard work at the company's own cost.
cn_claim: 因施工人的原因致使建设工程质量不符合约定的发包人有权要求施工人在合理期限内无偿修理或返工（民法典第801条）。
us_claim: A contractor who performs substandard work must cure the defects at its own expense under the implied warranty of workmanlike construction.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require renovation contractors to remedy substandard work at their own cost.

fact_summary: 装修公司因装修质量不合格被业主要求返工且费用自担 / A homeowner demanded the renovation company redo substandard work at its own cost.
cn_claim: 施工人应在合理期限内无偿修理或返工（民法典第801条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A contractor who performs defective work must remedy the defects at its own expense.
notes: Both CN and HK require renovation contractors to remedy substandard work at their own cost.

fact_summary: 某居民小区因未及时清理化粪池致沼气爆炸 / A residential compound's septic tank exploded from methane buildup because it had not been cleaned in a timely manner.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应对共用设施进行定期养护（民法典第942条第一款）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to arrange regular septic-tank pumping is liable for resulting explosions under negligence theories; violation of local health codes constitutes negligence per se.
hk_claim: An occupier or property manager who fails to maintain sewage systems in safe condition breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose maintenance duties on property managers for sewage-system safety.

fact_summary: 被告人因携带管制刀具进入法院被法警查获 / A defendant was intercepted by court bailiffs for carrying a prohibited knife into the courthouse.
cn_claim: 非法携带管制刀具进入公共场所危及公共安全情节严重的构成非法携带管制刀具危及公共安全罪（刑法第130条）。
us_claim: Carrying a weapon into a courthouse is a crime under state law and may violate federal law under 18 U.S.C. § 930 (possession of firearms and dangerous weapons in federal facilities).
hk_claim: Possessing an offensive weapon in a public place including a court building is an offense under the Public Order Ordinance (Cap. 245).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize carrying weapons into courthouses.

fact_summary: 消费者在房地产中介的虚假宣传下购买房屋后发现房屋实际状况与宣传严重不符 / A consumer purchased a property based on an agent's false advertising and discovered the actual condition was materially different.
cn_claim: 房地产经纪机构发布虚假房源信息的应承担法律责任（房地产经纪管理办法第25条第一款）。
us_claim: A real-estate agent who makes material misrepresentations about a property is liable for fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for real-estate-agent misrepresentations about property conditions.

fact_summary: 消费者在房地产中介的虚假宣传下购买房屋后发现房屋实际状况与宣传严重不符 / A consumer bought a property based on false advertising and discovered the actual condition was materially different.
cn_claim: 房地产中介虚假宣传的应承担法律责任（房地产经纪管理办法第25条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An estate agent who makes false representations about a property is liable for misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for real-estate-agent misrepresentations.

fact_summary: 被告人因拒不执行法院判决被司法拘留后仍不履行 / A defendant was placed in judicial detention for refusing to comply with a court judgment but still refused to perform.
cn_claim: 对人民法院的判决、裁定有能力执行而拒不执行情节严重的构成拒不执行判决、裁定罪（刑法第313条）。
us_claim: Willful disobedience of a court order constitutes contempt, punishable by fines and imprisonment until compliance is achieved.
hk_claim: Disobedience of a court order is contempt of court, subject to committal; persistent refusal may result in imprisonment.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat continued refusal to comply with court orders after sanctions as a very serious matter.

fact_summary: 旅游合同中约定行程中包含五星级酒店实际为三星级 / A tour contract promised five-star accommodations but the actual hotel was three-star.
cn_claim: 经营者提供服务有欺诈行为的应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；旅行社以低星级酒店冒充高星级的构成欺诈。
us_claim: A tour operator that substitutes materially inferior accommodations breaches the contract and may be liable for fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold tour operators liable for substituting materially inferior accommodations.

fact_summary: 旅游合同中约定五星级酒店实际为三星级 / A tour contract promised five-star hotel but provided three-star.
cn_claim: 以低星级冒充高星级的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A tour operator that provides materially inferior accommodation is in breach of contract and liable for misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK hold tour operators liable for substituting inferior accommodations.

fact_summary: 某游泳馆因未配备救生员致泳客溺亡 / A swimmer drowned in a public pool because no lifeguard was on duty.
cn_claim: 游泳场所应按规定配备救生员（体育场所开放条件与技术要求第7部分；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A swimming-pool operator that fails to provide required lifeguard coverage is liable for negligence; violation of state health-code lifeguard requirements constitutes negligence per se.
hk_claim: An occupier of a swimming facility who fails to provide adequate lifeguard supervision breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require swimming pools to provide lifeguard coverage.

fact_summary: 被告人因虐待被看护的老人致其轻伤 / A defendant caused minor injury to an elderly person under their care through abuse.
cn_claim: 对老年人负有监护、看护职责的人虐待被看护人情节严重的构成虐待被看护人罪（刑法第260条之一）。
us_claim: Abuse of an elder by a caregiver constitutes elder abuse, a crime under state law with enhanced penalties.
hk_claim: Ill-treatment or neglect of an elderly person by a caregiver is an offense under the Domestic and Cohabitation Relationships Violence Ordinance (Cap. 189).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize caregiver abuse of the elderly.

fact_summary: 消费者在餐厅被收取未明示的开瓶费 / A restaurant charged an undisclosed corkage fee to a diner.
cn_claim: 经营者应明码标价（价格法第13条）；未告知即收取开瓶费的构成价格违法行为。
us_claim: A restaurant that charges an undisclosed fee may violate state consumer-protection laws; the charge must be conspicuously disclosed.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require restaurants to disclose additional charges such as corkage fees.

fact_summary: 餐厅收取未明示的开瓶费 / A restaurant charged an undisclosed corkage fee.
cn_claim: 未告知的收费构成价格违法行为（价格法第13条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A restaurant that charges a fee without prior disclosure may be engaging in misleading conduct.
notes: Both CN and HK require restaurants to disclose additional charges.

fact_summary: 某酒店游泳池因水质不达标致多名泳客眼部感染 / Multiple swimmers at a hotel pool contracted eye infections because the water quality failed to meet standards.
cn_claim: 游泳池经营者应确保水质符合卫生标准（公共场所卫生管理条例第3条第一款第二项）；水质不达标致人感染的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A hotel that fails to maintain proper pool-water chemistry is liable for resulting injuries; violation of state health-code water-quality standards constitutes negligence per se.
hk_claim: A hotel occupier who fails to maintain safe pool-water quality breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose water-quality duties on swimming-pool operators.

fact_summary: 被告人因帮助信息网络犯罪活动被判处刑罚后五年内再犯同罪 / A defendant who was convicted of assisting cybercrime committed the same offense again within five years.
cn_claim: 被判处有期徒刑以上刑罚的犯罪分子在刑罚执行完毕后五年内再犯应判处有期徒刑以上刑罚之罪的构成累犯应从重处罚（刑法第65条第一款）。
us_claim: A repeat offender is subject to enhanced sentencing under habitual-offender statutes and the U.S. Sentencing Guidelines career-offender provisions.
hk_claim: A previous conviction is an aggravating factor at sentencing; the court may impose a longer sentence to reflect the defendant's failure to reform.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat recidivism as an aggravating factor with sentence enhancement.

fact_summary: 快递公司因暴力卸载致寄件人的液晶电视屏幕碎裂 / A courier company's rough unloading caused the sender's LCD television screen to shatter.
cn_claim: 快递企业应规范操作确保快件安全（快递暂行条例第25条；民法典第832条）。
us_claim: A carrier that damages goods through rough handling is liable under the Carmack Amendment (49 U.S.C. § 14706).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold carriers strictly liable for damage caused by rough handling.

fact_summary: 快递公司因暴力卸载致寄件人的液晶电视屏幕碎裂 / A courier company's rough unloading shattered a sender's LCD TV screen.
cn_claim: 快递企业应规范操作确保快件安全（快递暂行条例第25条；民法典第832条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A carrier is liable for damage to goods caused by its negligence in handling.
notes: Both CN and HK hold carriers liable for damage caused by rough handling.

fact_summary: 某小区电梯因维保公司未按合同约定频次进行保养导致故障频发致居民被困 / Residents were repeatedly trapped in a residential-compound elevator because the maintenance company failed to service it at the contracted frequency.
cn_claim: 电梯维保单位应按合同约定对电梯进行维护保养（特种设备安全法第45条）。
us_claim: An elevator-maintenance contractor that fails to perform contracted services is liable for resulting injuries under negligence and breach-of-contract theories.
hk_claim: An elevator-maintenance contractor who fails to service according to contractual obligations is liable for resulting harm.
notes: All three jurisdictions hold maintenance contractors liable for failing to perform agreed services.

fact_summary: 被告人因编造某地即将发生大地震的谣言并传播导致社会恐慌 / A defendant fabricated and spread a rumor that a major earthquake was about to strike a city, causing public panic.
cn_claim: 编造虚假险情、疫情、灾情、警情并在信息网络或其他媒体上传播或明知是上述虚假信息故意传播严重扰乱社会秩序的构成编造、故意传播虚假信息罪（刑法第291条之一第二款）。
us_claim: Communicating false information about a disaster causing public alarm may be prosecuted under state false-report statutes and, where federal interests are affected, under 18 U.S.C. § 1038 (false information and hoaxes).
hk_claim: Spreading false reports likely to cause public alarm is an offense under the Public Order Ordinance (Cap. 245).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the dissemination of false disaster warnings.

fact_summary: 二手车交易平台因未披露车辆曾为营运车辆致消费者以家用车价格购买 / A used-car trading platform failed to disclose that the vehicle had previously been a commercial-use vehicle, causing the consumer to purchase it at a private-use price.
cn_claim: 二手车经营者应如实告知车辆的使用性质等关键信息（二手车流通管理办法第14条）。
us_claim: A used-car dealer who fails to disclose that a vehicle was previously a rental or commercial vehicle commits fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require disclosure of prior commercial use in vehicle sales.

fact_summary: 二手车交易平台未告知车辆曾为营运车辆 / A used-car platform failed to disclose the vehicle had previously been a commercial vehicle.
cn_claim: 应如实告知车辆的关键信息（二手车流通管理办法第14条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A used-car seller who fails to disclose that a vehicle was a commercial-use vehicle commits misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK require disclosure of prior commercial use in vehicle sales.

fact_summary: 某写字楼因中央空调管道长期未清洗导致楼内多名白领患呼吸道疾病 / Multiple office workers in a commercial building contracted respiratory illnesses because the central air-conditioning ducts had not been cleaned for an extended period.
cn_claim: 公共场所经营者应保证室内空气质量符合国家卫生标准（公共场所卫生管理条例第3条第一款第一项）。
us_claim: A building manager who fails to maintain HVAC systems in sanitary condition is liable for resulting health issues under negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain ventilation systems in sanitary condition breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose HVAC-maintenance duties on commercial-building operators.

fact_summary: 被告人因携带HIV病毒故意不采取保护措施与他人发生性关系 / An HIV-positive defendant intentionally engaged in unprotected sexual relations with another without disclosing their status.
cn_claim: 明知自己患有艾滋病而故意不采取保护措施与他人发生性关系的以故意伤害罪定罪处罚（刑法第234条；关于办理组织、强迫、引诱、容留、介绍卖淫刑事案件适用法律若干问题的解释第12条）。
us_claim: Knowingly exposing another to HIV without disclosure is criminalized under state HIV-specific statutes or general assault statutes with enhanced penalties.
hk_claim: Intentionally exposing another to HIV without disclosure may constitute inflicting grievous bodily harm under the Offences Against the Person Ordinance (Cap. 212).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize intentional HIV exposure without disclosure.

fact_summary: 租客在租赁期间发现房屋甲醛超标影响居住 / A tenant discovered excessive formaldehyde levels in the rented unit during the lease term, affecting habitability.
cn_claim: 出租人应保证租赁物符合安全居住条件（民法典第712条）；甲醛超标的房屋不适于居住承租人可解除合同。
us_claim: A landlord that leases a dwelling with toxic levels of formaldehyde breaches the implied warranty of habitability; the tenant may terminate the lease and seek damages.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require landlords to provide habitable premises free from toxic contamination.

fact_summary: 租客在租赁期间发现房屋甲醛超标影响居住 / A tenant discovered excessive formaldehyde levels affecting habitability.
cn_claim: 租赁物不符合安全居住条件的承租人可解除合同（民法典第712条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A landlord who lets premises that are unfit for human habitation is in breach of the tenancy agreement.
notes: Both CN and HK require landlords to provide habitable premises.

fact_summary: 某养老院因未及时发现老人坠床导致死亡 / An elderly resident died in a nursing home after falling from bed because the staff failed to detect the fall in time.
cn_claim: 养老机构应对入住老年人尽到安全保障义务（民法典第1198条第一款；老年人权益保障法第48条）。
us_claim: A nursing home that fails to adequately monitor residents at risk of falling is liable for negligence; federal regulations require nursing homes to provide adequate supervision.
hk_claim: A care-home operator who fails to provide adequate supervision to prevent foreseeable falls breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose supervision duties on care facilities for fall prevention.

fact_summary: 被告人因伪造银行承兑汇票并贴现 / A defendant forged a bank acceptance draft and discounted it for cash.
cn_claim: 伪造汇票的构成伪造金融票证罪（刑法第177条第一款）；利用伪造的汇票贴现的还构成票据诈骗罪（刑法第194条第一款）。
us_claim: Forging a bank draft and presenting it for payment constitutes bank fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1344 and forgery under state law.
hk_claim: Forging a bill of exchange and using it to obtain money constitutes forgery and fraud.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the forgery and fraudulent use of bank drafts.

fact_summary: 购房者支付定金后因开发商原因房屋延迟交房超过一年 / After paying a deposit, a homebuyer experienced a delivery delay exceeding one year attributable to the developer.
cn_claim: 出卖人迟延交付房屋经催告后在三个月的合理期限内仍未履行的买受人可解除合同（商品房买卖合同司法解释第15条第一款）。
us_claim: A buyer may terminate a real-estate contract and recover the deposit where the developer's delay in delivery is material and unreasonable.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US allow homebuyers to terminate and recover deposits after substantial developer delays.

fact_summary: 购房者支付定金后因开发商原因房屋延迟交房超过一年 / After paying a deposit, delivery was delayed over a year due to the developer.
cn_claim: 出卖人迟延交付经催告后仍未履行的买受人可解除合同（商品房买卖合同司法解释第15条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A purchaser may terminate a sale-and-purchase agreement where the developer's delay is so substantial as to constitute a repudiatory breach.
notes: Both CN and HK allow homebuyers to terminate after substantial developer delays.

fact_summary: 某景区因山体滑坡未设警示致游客被落石砸伤 / A tourist was injured by a falling rock at a scenic area because no landslide warning sign had been posted.
cn_claim: 景区经营者应在危险区域设置警示标志并采取安全防护措施（民法典第1198条第一款；旅游法第80条）。
us_claim: A premises operator who fails to warn of known geological hazards is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier of a scenic area who fails to warn of known geological hazards breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require scenic-area operators to warn of known natural hazards.

fact_summary: 被告人因举报人作证后对其进行打击报复 / A defendant retaliated against a witness after they gave testimony.
cn_claim: 对证人进行打击报复的构成打击报复证人罪（刑法第308条）。
us_claim: Retaliating against a witness for providing testimony is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1513 (retaliating against a witness, victim, or informant).
hk_claim: Intimidating or retaliating against a witness is perverting the course of justice and criminal intimidation.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize retaliation against witnesses.

fact_summary: 网上购物平台以系统错误为由拒绝履行已付款订单 / An online shopping platform refused to fulfill a paid order, citing a system error.
cn_claim: 消费者下单并完成付款后买卖合同即告成立商家应按照约定履行（电子商务法第49条第二款）；单方取消订单的构成违约。
us_claim: An online merchant that accepts payment is generally bound by the contract; cancellation based on an alleged pricing error may be permitted only if the error was obvious and the buyer could not reasonably rely on the advertised price.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US generally bind online merchants to fulfilled payment orders, with limited mistake defenses.

fact_summary: 网购平台以系统错误为由拒绝履行已付款订单 / An online platform refused to fulfill a paid order citing a system error.
cn_claim: 商家应按约定履行不得单方取消（电子商务法第49条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An online merchant that accepts payment is bound by the contract and cannot unilaterally cancel without a valid legal basis.
notes: Both CN and HK bind online merchants to fulfilled payment orders.

fact_summary: 某快递柜因电路故障漏电致取件人触电受伤 / A person retrieving a parcel from a delivery locker suffered an electric shock because of an electrical fault.
cn_claim: 快递柜运营者应确保设备用电安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A delivery-locker operator that fails to maintain safe electrical systems is liable for resulting injuries under negligence and premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier providing delivery-locker services who fails to maintain safe electrical equipment is liable for resulting injuries.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose electrical-safety duties on delivery-locker operators.

fact_summary: 被告人因贩卖人体器官被判处重刑 / A defendant was sentenced to a heavy penalty for trafficking in human organs.
cn_claim: 组织他人出卖人体器官的构成组织出卖人体器官罪（刑法第234条之一第一款）。
us_claim: Trafficking in human organs is a federal crime under 42 U.S.C. § 274e (the National Organ Transplant Act).
hk_claim: Trafficking in human organs for commercial gain is an offense under the Human Organ Transplant Ordinance (Cap. 465).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize organ trafficking with severe penalties.

fact_summary: 理发店以特价卡不能退为由拒绝消费者退款 / A hair salon refused to refund a consumer's prepaid card, claiming special-offer cards are non-refundable.
cn_claim: 经营者以格式条款限制消费者权利的条款无效（民法典第497条第二项）；特价卡不能退的条款属于不公平条款。
us_claim: A blanket no-refund clause for prepaid services may be unconscionable under state consumer-protection laws.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US restrict overbroad no-refund clauses for prepaid services.

fact_summary: 理发店以特价卡不能退为由拒绝消费者退款 / A hair salon refused to refund a prepaid card claiming non-refundability.
cn_claim: 特价卡不能退的条款属于不公平条款（民法典第497条第二项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A blanket no-refund term may be unreasonable and unenforceable under the Control of Exemption Clauses Ordinance (Cap. 71).
notes: Both CN and HK restrict overbroad no-refund clauses for prepaid services.

fact_summary: 某工厂因未安装废气处理设备排放有毒气体致周边居民中毒 / A factory emitted toxic gases because it had not installed waste-gas treatment equipment, poisoning nearby residents.
cn_claim: 向大气排放污染物的单位应安装净化装置（大气污染防治法第45条；民法典第1229条）。
us_claim: A factory operator who fails to install required pollution-control equipment is liable under the Clean Air Act and common-law nuisance and trespass theories.
hk_claim: A factory occupier who fails to control toxic emissions is liable in negligence and nuisance.
notes: All three jurisdictions require factories to install pollution-control equipment.

fact_summary: 被告人因在互联网上非法倒卖公民个人信息数百万条 / A defendant illegally trafficked in millions of pieces of citizens' personal information on the internet.
cn_claim: 违反国家有关规定向他人出售或提供公民个人信息情节严重的构成侵犯公民个人信息罪（刑法第253条之一第一款）。
us_claim: Trafficking in personal data may constitute identity fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1028 and wire fraud, and may be prosecuted by the FTC.
hk_claim: Selling personal data without the data subject's consent is an offense under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize large-scale trafficking in personal information.

fact_summary: 消费者购买商品房后发现开发商擅自将一楼架空层改为商铺出售 / A homebuyer discovered the developer had converted the ground-floor open space into commercial shops and sold them without authorization.
cn_claim: 架空层等共有部分属于全体业主所有，开发商不得擅自处分（民法典第274条）。
us_claim: A developer who converts common areas into commercial units and sells them may be liable for fraud and breach of fiduciary duties to the homeowners' association.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US restrict developers from converting common areas into commercial spaces without proper authorization.

fact_summary: 开发商擅自将架空层改为商铺出售 / A developer converted the open-floor area into shops and sold them without authorization.
cn_claim: 架空层属于全体业主共有，开发商不得擅自处分（民法典第274条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A developer who appropriates common areas for commercial sale without the owners' consent acts in breach of the deed of mutual covenant and the Building Management Ordinance (Cap. 344).
notes: Both CN and HK restrict developers from converting common areas without owner consent.

fact_summary: 某医院因护士输液速度过快致患者心力衰竭死亡 / A patient died of heart failure because a nurse administered an IV infusion at an excessively rapid rate.
cn_claim: 医务人员未尽到与当时医疗水平相应的诊疗义务造成患者损害的医疗机构应承担赔偿责任（民法典第1221条）。
us_claim: A nurse who administers medication at an unsafe rate breaches the standard of care; the hospital is vicariously liable for the resulting death under medical-malpractice principles.
hk_claim: A hospital is vicariously liable for the negligence of its nursing staff in administering treatment.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose liability for nursing negligence including unsafe IV administration rates.

fact_summary: 被告人因以非法手段获取他人银行卡密码后在全国多地ATM机取款 / A defendant illegally obtained others' bank-card PINs and withdrew cash from ATMs across multiple cities.
cn_claim: 盗窃信用卡并使用的构成盗窃罪（刑法第196条第三款）；在多地取款的属于跨区域流窜作案从重处罚。
us_claim: Using stolen bank-card information to withdraw cash from ATMs is bank fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1344 and access-device fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1029.
hk_claim: Using another person's bank-card information to withdraw money without authority is theft under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize ATM cash withdrawals using fraudulently obtained card data.

fact_summary: 家政服务员在服务期间将雇主家中古董摔碎 / A domestic worker broke an antique in the employer's home during the service period.
cn_claim: 家政服务人员因过错造成雇主财产损失的应承担赔偿责任；家政服务机构有过错的应承担相应责任（民法典第1191条第一款）。
us_claim: A domestic-service agency may be vicariously liable for damage caused by workers within the scope of employment, depending on the employment relationship.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US may impose vicarious liability on domestic-service agencies for property damage caused by workers.

fact_summary: 家政服务员在服务期间将雇主家中古董摔碎 / A domestic worker broke an antique in the employer's home.
cn_claim: 家政服务人员因过错造成雇主财产损失的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A domestic worker who negligently damages the employer's property is liable for the loss; the agency may also bear liability depending on the contractual arrangements.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for property damage caused by domestic workers.

fact_summary: 被告人因拐卖多名儿童被判处重刑 / A defendant was sentenced to a heavy penalty for trafficking multiple children.
cn_claim: 拐卖儿童的处五年以上十年以下有期徒刑；情节严重的处十年以上有期徒刑或无期乃至死刑（刑法第240条）。
us_claim: Child trafficking is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1591 (sex trafficking of children) and § 1589 (forced labor), carrying severe penalties.
hk_claim: Trafficking in children for exploitation is a serious offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200) and the Protection of Children and Juveniles Ordinance (Cap. 213).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for child trafficking.

fact_summary: 消费者因航班超售被拒绝登机，航空公司仅提供少量补偿 / A consumer was denied boarding due to overbooking, and the airline offered only minimal compensation.
cn_claim: 因超售导致旅客被拒载的航空公司应提供经济补偿并安排后续航班（航班正常管理规定第31条）。
us_claim: Airlines must compensate passengers involuntarily denied boarding due to oversales under DOT regulations (14 C.F.R. Part 250).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require airlines to compensate passengers involuntarily bumped due to overbooking.

fact_summary: 消费者因航班超售被拒绝登机，航空公司仅提供少量补偿 / A consumer was denied boarding due to overbooking with minimal compensation.
cn_claim: 因超售被拒载的航空公司应提供补偿（航班正常管理规定第31条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Airlines are required to compensate passengers denied boarding due to overbooking under applicable regulations.
notes: Both CN and HK require airlines to compensate bumped passengers.

fact_summary: 某地下车库因防涝措施不足致暴雨时车辆被淹 / Vehicles in an underground garage were submerged during heavy rain because flood-prevention measures were inadequate.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应对共用设施进行维护管理并应制定防汛等应急预案（民法典第942条）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to implement reasonable flood-protection measures for underground parking may be liable for negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to take reasonable precautions against foreseeable flooding breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require property managers to take flood-prevention measures.

fact_summary: 被告人因组织残疾人、儿童进行乞讨牟利 / A defendant organized disabled persons and children to beg for profit.
cn_claim: 以暴力、胁迫手段组织残疾人或不满14周岁的未成年人乞讨的构成组织残疾人、儿童乞讨罪（刑法第262条之一）。
us_claim: Forcing another person to beg through coercion constitutes forced labor under 18 U.S.C. § 1589.
hk_claim: Organizing children or vulnerable persons to beg for profit is an offense under the Protection of Children and Juveniles Ordinance (Cap. 213) and the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the organization of vulnerable persons for begging.

fact_summary: 旅行社在合同行程中安排过多购物点且商品质量低劣 / A travel agency scheduled excessive shopping stops in the itinerary with low-quality merchandise.
cn_claim: 旅行社不得以不合理的低价组织旅游活动并通过安排购物获取不正当利益（旅游法第35条第一款）。
us_claim: A tour operator that schedules excessive forced-shopping stops may breach the contract and be liable for misrepresentation.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US restrict forced-shopping arrangements in tour packages.

fact_summary: 旅行社在合同行程中安排过多购物点且商品质量低劣 / A travel agency scheduled excessive forced-shopping stops.
cn_claim: 旅行社不得以安排购物获取不正当利益（旅游法第35条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A travel agent who arranges forced shopping stops without clear disclosure may be in breach of contract and engaging in misleading conduct.
notes: Both CN and HK restrict forced-shopping arrangements in tour packages.

fact_summary: 某托儿所因保育员给婴幼儿喂食过烫食物致其口腔烫伤 / An infant suffered mouth burns at a nursery because a childcare worker fed the child food that was too hot.
cn_claim: 托儿所等保育机构对婴幼儿负有高度的安全保障义务（民法典第1199条）。
us_claim: A childcare facility that serves food at scalding temperatures to infants is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: A childcare facility owes a high duty of care to infants and is liable for serving food at dangerous temperatures.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose heightened duties on childcare facilities.

fact_summary: 被告人因利用未公开信息进行股票交易（老鼠仓）被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for stock trading using nonpublic information (front-running).
cn_claim: 利用未公开信息进行证券交易的构成利用未公开信息交易罪（刑法第180条第四款）。
us_claim: Front-running using material nonpublic information violates Section 10(b) of the Securities Exchange Act and SEC Rule 10b-5; it may also constitute fraud under the Investment Advisers Act.
hk_claim: Front-running using nonpublic information is insider dealing under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) s.270.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize trading on nonpublic information.

fact_summary: 消费者购买二手手机后7天内出现性能故障，商家拒绝退货 / A consumer's used phone malfunctioned within 7 days of purchase, and the merchant refused a return.
cn_claim: 经营者采用网络、电视、电话、邮购等方式销售商品的消费者有权自收到商品之日起七日内退货（消费者权益保护法第25条第一款）。
us_claim: A merchant must honor a return policy if one was stated; state lemon laws and implied warranties may provide additional protection for defective used goods.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide consumer return rights for defective goods purchased online.

fact_summary: 消费者购买二手手机后7天内出现性能故障，商家拒绝退货 / A consumer's used phone malfunctioned within 7 days and the merchant refused return.
cn_claim: 七日内可无理由退货（消费者权益保护法第25条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A merchant who fails to honor a stated return policy or sells goods that are not of merchantable quality may be in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK provide consumer return rights for defective goods.

fact_summary: 某网红餐厅因厨房排烟系统故障致顾客集体一氧化碳中毒 / Diners at a popular restaurant suffered carbon-monoxide poisoning because the kitchen exhaust system had failed.
cn_claim: 餐饮经营者应确保经营场所符合卫生和安全标准（公共场所卫生管理条例第3条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A restaurant operator who fails to maintain exhaust systems is liable for injuries caused by toxic fumes under negligence theories.
hk_claim: A restaurant occupier who fails to maintain safe ventilation systems breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose ventilation-safety duties on restaurant operators.

fact_summary: 被告人因在互联网上建立赌博网站并接受投注 / A defendant established an online gambling website and accepted wagers.
cn_claim: 建立赌博网站并接受投注的构成开设赌场罪（刑法第303条第二款）。
us_claim: Operating an illegal online gambling business violates the Unlawful Internet Gambling Enforcement Act (31 U.S.C. § 5361 et seq.) and the Wire Act (18 U.S.C. § 1084).
hk_claim: Operating an unauthorized gambling establishment, including online, is an offense under the Gambling Ordinance (Cap. 148).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unauthorized online-gambling operations.

fact_summary: 健身房以内部装修为由停业半年但拒绝为会员办理退费 / A gym suspended operations for six months citing renovation but refused to refund members.
cn_claim: 经营者以预收款方式提供服务未按约定提供的应退回预付款（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: A gym that closes for an extended period without providing services is in material breach; members are entitled to a pro-rata refund.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require gym operators to refund members for extended closures.

fact_summary: 健身房以内部装修为由停业半年但拒绝为会员办理退费 / A gym suspended operations for six months and refused member refunds.
cn_claim: 未按约定提供服务的应退回预付款（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A gym that fails to provide services for an extended period is in breach of contract and must refund members.
notes: Both CN and HK require gym operators to refund members for extended closures.

fact_summary: 某高层住宅因外墙瓷砖脱落砸中行人头部致重伤 / A pedestrian suffered severe head injuries when an exterior-wall tile fell from a high-rise residential building.
cn_claim: 建筑物发生脱落造成他人损害的所有人、管理人或使用人不能证明自己无过错的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1253条）。
us_claim: A building owner is liable for injuries caused by falling exterior components under premises-liability and negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier or building owner who fails to maintain exterior walls breaches the common duty of care and is liable for resulting injuries.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose maintenance duties on building owners for exterior-wall safety.

fact_summary: 被告人因在某网络平台出售违禁药品被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for selling prohibited pharmaceuticals on an online platform.
cn_claim: 未经许可销售药品的构成非法经营罪（刑法第225条）；销售假药的构成销售假药罪（刑法第141条）。
us_claim: Selling unapproved or misbranded drugs online is a crime under the Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act (21 U.S.C. § 331(a) and § 333).
hk_claim: Selling unregistered or prohibited pharmaceutical products is an offense under the Pharmacy and Poisons Ordinance (Cap. 138).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize online sales of prohibited pharmaceuticals.

fact_summary: 预约的网约车迟迟不到且司机单方取消订单致乘客误机 / A booked ride-hailing car failed to arrive for an extended period, and the driver unilaterally cancelled the order, causing the passenger to miss a flight.
cn_claim: 网约车平台应对司机的取消行为承担责任并赔偿乘客由此产生的损失（民法典第823条、第584条）。
us_claim: A transportation-network company may be liable for a driver's last-minute cancellation that causes consequential damages if the cancellation was unreasonable.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US may hold ride-hailing platforms liable for driver cancellations causing consequential damages.

fact_summary: 网约车司机单方取消订单致乘客误机 / A ride-hailing driver unilaterally cancelled, causing the passenger to miss a flight.
cn_claim: 平台应对司机的取消行为承担责任并赔偿损失（民法典第823条、第584条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A transport-service operator may be liable for consequential loss caused by unreasonable last-minute cancellation by a driver.
notes: Both CN and HK may hold ride-hailing platforms liable for driver cancellations causing loss.

fact_summary: 某洗浴中心因未对热水管道进行保温处理致客人烫伤 / A bathhouse guest was scalded because the hot-water pipes lacked insulation.
cn_claim: 洗浴中心经营者应确保设施安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A bathhouse operator who fails to insulate hot-water pipes is liable for resulting scalding injuries under negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to insulate exposed hot-water pipes is liable for resulting injuries.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose safety duties on bathhouse operators for hot-water-pipe insulation.

fact_summary: 被告人因盗窃他人社保卡并刷卡消费 / A defendant stole another person's social-security card and used it for purchases.
cn_claim: 盗窃他人社保卡并使用的依照刑法第264条盗窃罪定罪处罚；数额较大的追究刑事责任。
us_claim: Using another person's government benefit card without authorization constitutes theft and may violate federal identity-fraud statutes.
hk_claim: Using another person's identity or benefit card to obtain money or goods is theft and fraud.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the unauthorized use of another's benefit cards.

fact_summary: 婚庆公司因未按合同约定提供主持人且临时换人致婚礼混乱 / A wedding company failed to provide the contracted emcee and substituted a replacement at the last minute, causing a chaotic wedding.
cn_claim: 庆典服务经营者未按照约定提供服务的应承担违约责任并赔偿消费者损失（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: A wedding-service provider who substitutes the agreed-upon key personnel without consent is in breach of contract and liable for consequential damages including emotional distress in some jurisdictions.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold wedding-service providers liable for unauthorized personnel substitutions.

fact_summary: 婚庆公司未按合同提供主持人且临时换人致婚礼混乱 / A wedding company substituted the contracted emcee at the last minute causing a chaotic wedding.
cn_claim: 未按约定提供服务的应承担违约责任（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A wedding-service provider who substitutes key personnel without notice is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK hold wedding-service providers liable for unauthorized personnel substitutions.

fact_summary: 某商场自动扶梯因未按时年检致踏板松动夹伤顾客 / A shopper was pinched by a loose step on a shopping-mall escalator that had not undergone its annual inspection on time.
cn_claim: 特种设备使用单位应对在用特种设备进行定期自行检查（特种设备安全法第39条第一款）。
us_claim: An escalator owner who fails to conduct required inspections is liable for resulting injuries under negligence and premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain escalators in safe condition and conduct required inspections breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require timely escalator inspections.

fact_summary: 被告人因篡改他人高考志愿被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for altering another person's college-entrance-examination preferences.
cn_claim: 违反国家规定对计算机信息系统中存储的数据进行修改的构成破坏计算机信息系统罪（刑法第286条第二款）。
us_claim: Unauthorized alteration of academic records in a computer system is a crime under the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act (18 U.S.C. § 1030).
hk_claim: Unauthorized modification of data in a computer system is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unauthorized computer-data alteration affecting academic records.

fact_summary: 物业公司在未通知业主的情况下将公共区域广告收入据为己有 / A property-management company kept advertising revenue from common areas without notifying the owners.
cn_claim: 利用物业共用部分进行经营的收益属于全体业主共有（民法典第282条、第943条）。
us_claim: A property manager who retains revenue from common-area advertising without the HOA's knowledge is in breach of fiduciary duty.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require property managers to account for and remit common-area revenue to the owners.

fact_summary: 物业公司在未通知业主的情况下将公共区域广告收入据为己有 / A property-management company kept common-area advertising revenue without notifying the owners.
cn_claim: 共用部分经营收益属于全体业主共有（民法典第282条、第943条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A property manager who retains revenue from common areas without the owners' consent is in breach of its duties under the deed of mutual covenant and the Building Management Ordinance (Cap. 344).
notes: Both CN and HK require property managers to account for common-area revenue to the owners.

fact_summary: 某公园因人工湖未设护栏致儿童落水溺亡 / A child drowned in a park's artificial lake because no safety railing had been installed.
cn_claim: 公园等公共场所的管理人应尽到安全保障义务（民法典第1198条第一款）；人工湖未设护栏致人损害的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A park operator who fails to provide barriers around known water hazards is liable for negligence under premises-liability and attractive-nuisance theories.
hk_claim: An occupier of a public park who fails to take reasonable precautions against foreseeable drowning risks breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require park operators to install safety barriers around water hazards.

fact_summary: 被告人因在河道内非法采砂造成河堤垮塌 / A defendant illegally extracted sand from a river, causing the embankment to collapse.
cn_claim: 未取得采矿许可证擅自采矿的构成非法采矿罪（刑法第343条第一款）；造成河堤垮塌的从重处罚。
us_claim: Unauthorized sand mining in navigable waters may violate the Clean Water Act and state environmental laws, with criminal penalties for significant environmental damage.
hk_claim: Unauthorized sand extraction is an offense under the Sand Ordinance (Cap. 147).
notes: All three jurisdictions require permits for sand extraction and criminalize unauthorized mining.

fact_summary: 培训机构在合同中约定消费者放弃投诉权利 / A training institution's contract contained a clause requiring consumers to waive their right to complain.
cn_claim: 通过格式条款排除或限制消费者权利的条款无效（民法典第497条第三项；消费者权益保护法第26条第二款）。
us_claim: A contractual provision that purports to waive a consumer's right to file complaints with regulatory agencies is void as against public policy.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US void contractual clauses that purport to waive consumer-complaint rights.

fact_summary: 培训机构在合同中约定消费者放弃投诉权利 / A training institution's contract required consumers to waive complaint rights.
cn_claim: 排除消费者权利的格式条款无效（民法典第497条第三项；消费者权益保护法第26条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A contractual term that purports to exclude a consumer's right to complain to authorities is likely unenforceable under the Control of Exemption Clauses Ordinance (Cap. 71).
notes: Both CN and HK void contractual waivers of consumer-complaint rights.

fact_summary: 某电影院因银幕前方台阶照明不足致观众散场时踩空摔伤 / A moviegoer tripped and fell on a dark step in front of the screen while exiting because the step lighting was inadequate.
cn_claim: 电影院经营者应确保场所安全（民法典第1198条第一款）；台阶照明不足致人损害的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A cinema operator who fails to provide adequate step lighting is liable for resulting injuries under premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to illuminate step hazards adequately breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require cinema operators to provide adequate step lighting.

fact_summary: 被告人因伪造机动车登记证书并出售获利 / A defendant forged motor-vehicle registration certificates and sold them for profit.
cn_claim: 伪造国家机关证件的构成伪造国家机关证件罪（刑法第280条第一款）。
us_claim: Forging vehicle-registration documents is a crime under state law and may constitute identity fraud under federal law.
hk_claim: Forging official documents, including vehicle-registration documents, is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the forgery of official vehicle documents.

fact_summary: 消费者购买进口零食后发现产品为全外文标签无法辨识成分 / A consumer purchased imported snacks and found the labeling was entirely in a foreign language, making the ingredients unreadable.
cn_claim: 进口食品应有中文标签（食品安全法第97条第一款）；无中文标签的食品消费者可主张赔偿。
us_claim: Imported food products must bear English labeling under FDA regulations (21 C.F.R. § 101.15).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require imported food products to bear local-language labeling.

fact_summary: 消费者购买进口零食后发现产品为全外文标签无法辨识成分 / A consumer purchased imported snacks with only foreign-language labeling.
cn_claim: 进口食品应有中文标签（食品安全法第97条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Imported prepackaged food must bear labeling in English or Chinese under the Food and Drugs (Composition and Labelling) Regulations (Cap. 132W).
notes: Both CN and HK require imported food products to bear local-language labeling.

fact_summary: 某液化气站因未定期检测储气罐致燃气泄漏爆炸 / A liquefied-gas station's storage tank exploded due to a gas leak because the tank had not undergone periodic inspection.
cn_claim: 燃气经营者应对燃气设施定期进行安全检查（城镇燃气管理条例第19条第一款；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A gas-storage facility operator who fails to conduct required tank inspections is liable for resulting explosions under strict-liability and negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier of a gas-storage facility who fails to conduct regular tank inspections breaches safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require periodic inspection of gas-storage tanks.

fact_summary: 被告人因在高铁上吸烟触发烟雾报警器导致列车降速 / A defendant triggered the smoke alarm by smoking on a high-speed train, causing the train to decelerate.
cn_claim: 在动车组列车上吸烟的由公安机关责令改正并处罚款；造成列车降速等严重后果的构成扰乱公共交通工具秩序可被追究刑事责任（治安管理处罚法第23条）。
us_claim: Smoking on an aircraft is a federal crime; smoking on a train in violation of regulations may result in fines and criminal penalties under state law.
hk_claim: Smoking on public transport in violation of the Smoking (Public Health) Ordinance (Cap. 371) is an offense.
notes: All three jurisdictions prohibit and penalize smoking on public transport.

fact_summary: 消费者购买家具后发现甲醛释放量超标 / A consumer discovered that purchased furniture exceeded formaldehyde-emission limits.
cn_claim: 经营者提供的商品应符合保障人身安全的要求（消费者权益保护法第19条第一款）；甲醛超标的消费者可要求退货并赔偿。
us_claim: Selling furniture that exceeds formaldehyde-emission standards breaches the implied warranty of merchantability and may violate the Consumer Product Safety Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for furniture with excessive formaldehyde emissions.

fact_summary: 消费者购买家具后发现甲醛释放量超标 / A consumer discovered purchased furniture exceeded formaldehyde limits.
cn_claim: 甲醛超标的消费者可要求退货并赔偿（消费者权益保护法第19条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A seller who supplies furniture that is not of merchantable quality or is unsafe is in breach of contract under the Sale of Goods Ordinance (Cap. 26).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for furniture with excessive formaldehyde emissions.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法获取计算机信息系统数据并出售 / A defendant illegally obtained computer-system data and sold it.
cn_claim: 侵入计算机信息系统获取数据的构成非法获取计算机信息系统数据罪（刑法第285条第二款）。
us_claim: Accessing a computer without authorization and obtaining information violates the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act (18 U.S.C. § 1030).
hk_claim: Unauthorized access to a computer and obtaining data is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unauthorized computer access and data theft.

fact_summary: 快递公司因暴力分拣致寄件人的手机损坏 / A courier company damaged a sender's phone through rough sorting.
cn_claim: 快递企业应规范操作确保快件安全（快递暂行条例第25条）；因暴力分拣造成快件毁损的应承担赔偿责任（民法典第832条）。
us_claim: A carrier that damages goods through rough handling is liable under the Carmack Amendment.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold carriers liable for damage caused by negligent handling.

fact_summary: 快递公司因暴力分拣致寄件人的手机损坏 / A courier company damaged a sender's phone through rough sorting.
cn_claim: 因暴力分拣造成快件毁损的应承担赔偿责任（快递暂行条例第25条；民法典第832条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A courier company that damages goods through negligent handling is liable under the contract of carriage.
notes: Both CN and HK hold carriers liable for damage caused by negligent handling.

fact_summary: 某学校因食堂卫生管理不到位致多名学生食物中毒 / Multiple students suffered food poisoning because the school canteen's hygiene management was inadequate.
cn_claim: 学校应确保提供给学生的食品安全（食品安全法第57条第一款）；未履行食品安全管理义务造成学生食物中毒的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A school that fails to maintain safe food-service operations is liable for resulting injuries under negligence theories.
hk_claim: A school that fails to ensure safe food for students is liable for resulting illness under the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose food-safety duties on school canteens.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法吸收公众存款后无法兑付 / A defendant was unable to honor redemption requests after illegally absorbing public deposits.
cn_claim: 非法吸收公众存款或变相吸收公众存款扰乱金融秩序的构成非法吸收公众存款罪（刑法第176条第一款）。
us_claim: Operating a Ponzi or unregistered investment scheme constitutes securities fraud under Rule 10b-5 and may be prosecuted as mail or wire fraud.
hk_claim: Operating an unauthorized deposit-taking business is an offense under the Banking Ordinance (Cap. 155).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unauthorized deposit-taking and fraudulent investment schemes.

fact_summary: 教育培训机构因未取得办学许可与消费者签订培训合同后无法履约 / An education-and-training institution signed a training contract with a consumer but could not perform because it lacked the required operating license.
cn_claim: 未取得办学许可的教育培训机构与消费者签订的合同可被认定为无效（民办教育促进法第12条、第19条）。
us_claim: A training provider that operates without a required license may be in violation of state law; the consumer may rescind the contract and recover payments.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US allow consumers to rescind contracts with unlicensed training providers.

fact_summary: 教育培训机构未取得办学许可签订培训合同后无法履约 / An unlicensed education institution could not perform a training contract.
cn_claim: 未取得办学许可签订的合同可被认定无效（民办教育促进法第12条、第19条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A consumer who contracts with an unlicensed education provider may be entitled to rescission and a refund.
notes: Both CN and HK allow consumers to rescind contracts with unlicensed training providers.

fact_summary: 某高层建筑因外墙广告牌安装不牢固脱落砸中行人 / A pedestrian was hit by an advertising sign that fell from a high-rise building because it was not securely mounted.
cn_claim: 建筑物上的搁置物、悬挂物发生脱落造成他人损害的所有人与管理人不能证明自己无过错的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1253条）。
us_claim: A building owner who fails to secure exterior signage is liable for resulting injuries under premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to secure exterior fixtures is liable for resulting injuries under the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require building owners to secure exterior signage.

fact_summary: 被告人因私自加工并出售象牙制品 / A defendant privately processed and sold ivory products.
cn_claim: 非法收购、运输、出售国家重点保护的珍贵、濒危野生动物及其制品的构成危害珍贵、濒危野生动物罪（刑法第341条第一款）。
us_claim: Commercial trade in ivory is prohibited under the Endangered Species Act and the African Elephant Conservation Act.
hk_claim: Trade in ivory without a license is an offense under the Protection of Endangered Species of Animals and Plants Ordinance (Cap. 586).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unauthorized ivory trade.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播间购买二手奢侈品后发现多处修复痕迹未被告知 / A consumer purchased pre-owned luxury goods through a livestream and discovered undisclosed repairs.
cn_claim: 经营者对商品的真实情况应作出全面真实的说明（消费者权益保护法第8条第一款）；未告知修复痕迹的构成欺诈。
us_claim: A seller who fails to disclose material repairs to luxury goods commits fraud and misrepresentation.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require disclosure of material repairs in luxury-goods sales.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播间购买二手奢侈品后发现多处修复痕迹未被告知 / A consumer purchased pre-owned luxury goods and discovered undisclosed repairs.
cn_claim: 未告知修复痕迹的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第8条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A seller who fails to disclose material repairs to luxury goods commits misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK require disclosure of material repairs in luxury-goods sales.

fact_summary: 某小区因化粪池管道破裂污水外溢致路面湿滑行人摔伤 / A pedestrian slipped and fell on a sidewalk slickened by sewage overflow from a ruptured septic-tank pipe in a residential compound.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应对共用设施进行维修养护并及时处理突发问题（民法典第942条第一款）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to promptly repair sewage leaks and clean resulting hazards is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to promptly remedy a sewage leak and the resulting hazard breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require property managers to promptly repair sewage leaks.

fact_summary: 被告人因偷越国境到境外参与电信诈骗活动 / A defendant illegally crossed the border to participate in overseas telecom-fraud activities.
cn_claim: 偷越国境情节严重的构成偷越国境罪（刑法第322条）；参与境外诈骗活动的另构成诈骗罪。
us_claim: Illegal entry into another country for criminal purposes may subject the person to prosecution both in the foreign jurisdiction and upon return for conspiracy.
hk_claim: Illegally departing or entering Hong Kong for criminal purposes is an immigration offense.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize border-crossing for criminal purposes.

fact_summary: 房屋买卖合同中卖方隐瞒了房屋被司法查封的事实 / A seller concealed that the property was under judicial attachment in a real-estate contract.
cn_claim: 因欺诈导致对方在违背真实意思情况下订立的合同受欺诈方有权请求撤销（民法典第148条）。
us_claim: A seller who conceals a lien or encumbrance on real property commits fraud; the buyer may rescind the contract and recover damages.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide rescission remedies for undisclosed judicial attachments on real property.

fact_summary: 卖方隐瞒了房屋被司法查封的事实 / A seller concealed that the property was under judicial attachment.
cn_claim: 因欺诈订立的合同受欺诈方有权请求撤销（民法典第148条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A seller who fails to disclose a subsisting judicial encumbrance on property commits misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide rescission remedies for undisclosed judicial attachments.

fact_summary: 某幼儿园因秋千绳索磨损断裂致儿童摔伤 / A child was injured when a swing's worn rope snapped at a kindergarten.
cn_claim: 幼儿园对园区内的游乐设施应定期检查维护（民法典第1199条；未成年人保护法第37条第一款）。
us_claim: A childcare facility that fails to inspect and maintain playground equipment is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: A kindergarten that fails to maintain play equipment in safe condition breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require childcare facilities to maintain play equipment.

fact_summary: 被告人因传播虚假证券信息操纵市场 / A defendant manipulated the market by disseminating false securities information.
cn_claim: 编造并传播证券交易虚假信息扰乱证券市场的构成编造并传播证券交易虚假信息罪（刑法第181条第一款）。
us_claim: Disseminating false information to manipulate securities prices violates Section 10(b) of the Securities Exchange Act and Rule 10b-5.
hk_claim: Disseminating false or misleading information to manipulate the market is market misconduct under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize market manipulation through false information.

fact_summary: 消费者在医美平台上预约了某医师但实际操作为无资质人员 / A consumer booked a specific physician on a cosmetic-surgery platform but the procedure was performed by an unqualified person.
cn_claim: 医美服务机构应保证提供服务的人员具备相应资质（医疗美容服务管理办法第13条）。
us_claim: A medical provider who substitutes an unqualified practitioner without disclosure commits fraud and medical battery.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit unqualified-practitioner substitution in medical procedures.

fact_summary: 消费者在医美平台上预约了某医师但实际操作为无资质人员 / A consumer booked a specific physician but an unqualified person performed the procedure.
cn_claim: 医美服务机构应保证服务人员具备相应资质（医疗美容服务管理办法第13条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A medical-practice operator who substitutes an unqualified person for the agreed practitioner is liable for misrepresentation and negligence.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit unqualified-practitioner substitution in medical procedures.

fact_summary: 某工厂因未对压力容器定期进行安全检测致爆炸 / A factory's pressure vessel exploded because it had not undergone regular safety inspections.
cn_claim: 特种设备使用单位应对在用特种设备进行定期检验（特种设备安全法第40条）。
us_claim: A factory operator who fails to conduct required pressure-vessel inspections is liable under OSHA Process Safety Management standards (29 C.F.R. § 1910.119).
hk_claim: A factory occupier who fails to inspect pressure equipment breaches safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require regular safety inspections of pressure vessels.

fact_summary: 被告人因组织、领导传销活动被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for organizing and leading a pyramid scheme.
cn_claim: 组织、领导以推销商品为名要求参加者缴纳费用获得加入资格并按照一定顺序组成层级直接或间接以发展人员的数量作为计酬依据引诱胁迫参加者继续发展他人骗取财物扰乱经济社会秩序的传销活动的构成组织、领导传销活动罪（刑法第224条之一）。
us_claim: Operating a pyramid scheme constitutes fraud and is prohibited under the FTC Act; it may also be prosecuted under the Securities Exchange Act if securities are involved.
hk_claim: Operating a pyramid-selling scheme is an offense under the Pyramid Schemes Prohibition Ordinance (Cap. 617).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize pyramid schemes.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买玉石后发现为染色处理 / A consumer discovered that jade purchased through a livestream had been artificially dyed.
cn_claim: 以染色玉石冒充天然玉石的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling artificially treated gemstones as natural constitutes fraud and misrepresentation.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit the sale of artificially treated gemstones as natural.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买玉石后发现为染色处理 / A consumer discovered jade purchased through a livestream was artificially dyed.
cn_claim: 以染色玉石冒充天然玉石的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling artificially treated gemstones as natural constitutes fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit the sale of artificially treated gemstones as natural.

fact_summary: 某宾馆因消防通道被锁致火灾时客人无法逃生 / A hotel guest was trapped during a fire because the fire-escape route was locked.
cn_claim: 宾馆经营者应确保疏散通道和安全出口畅通（消防法第16条第一款第四项；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A hotel that fails to maintain unlocked fire exits violates fire codes and is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who locks fire-escape routes breaches fire-safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require hotels to keep fire-escape routes unlocked.

fact_summary: 被告人因醉酒驾驶造成交通事故致人死亡 / A defendant caused a fatal traffic accident while driving intoxicated.
cn_claim: 醉酒驾驶机动车造成人员死亡的以交通肇事罪从重处罚（刑法第133条）。
us_claim: Vehicular homicide while driving under the influence is a felony under state law with severe penalties.
hk_claim: Causing death by dangerous driving while under the influence of alcohol is an offense under the Road Traffic Ordinance (Cap. 374).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for DUI-related fatalities.

fact_summary: 消费者通过网上贷款平台借款后发现实际年化利率远超平台宣传 / A consumer who borrowed through an online lending platform discovered the actual annualized interest rate far exceeded the advertised rate.
cn_claim: 贷款经营者应明示贷款年化利率（商业银行互联网贷款管理暂行办法第17条）。
us_claim: The Truth in Lending Act (15 U.S.C. § 1601 et seq.) requires clear disclosure of the annual percentage rate; misrepresentation of loan terms violates TILA.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require clear disclosure of annualized interest rates in consumer lending.

fact_summary: 消费者通过网上贷款平台借款后发现实际年化利率远超平台宣传 / A consumer discovered the actual interest rate far exceeded the advertised rate.
cn_claim: 贷款经营者应明示贷款年化利率。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A lender who misrepresents loan terms may be liable under the Money Lenders Ordinance (Cap. 163).
notes: Both CN and HK require clear disclosure of loan terms and interest rates.

fact_summary: 某超市因未清理洒落地面的食用油致顾客滑倒骨折 / A customer slipped on cooking oil spilled on a supermarket floor and fractured a bone because the spill was not promptly cleaned.
cn_claim: 经营者应确保其经营场所安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A supermarket that fails to clean a known spill within a reasonable time is liable under premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to promptly remove a slip hazard breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require supermarkets to promptly clean spill hazards.

fact_summary: 被告人因强奸未成年少女被判处重刑 / A defendant was sentenced to a severe penalty for raping a minor.
cn_claim: 奸淫不满十四周岁的幼女的以强奸论从重处罚（刑法第236条第二款、第三款）。
us_claim: Rape of a minor carries severe penalties under state law and may subject the offender to sex-offender registration requirements.
hk_claim: Unlawful sexual intercourse with a girl under 16 is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for sexual offenses against minors.

fact_summary: 代购商家以海关扣押为由拒绝向消费者交付代购商品或退款 / A purchasing agent refused to deliver the goods or provide a refund to the consumer, citing customs detention.
cn_claim: 代购方因自身原因导致货物被海关扣押的消费者可要求代购方承担违约责任并返还价款（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: A purchasing agent who fails to deliver goods bears the risk of loss; the agent is liable to refund the consumer.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold purchasing agents liable when goods cannot be delivered.

fact_summary: 代购商家以海关扣押为由拒绝向消费者交付代购商品或退款 / A purchasing agent refused delivery or refund citing customs detention.
cn_claim: 代购方因自身原因导致货物被扣押的应承担违约责任（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A purchasing agent who fails to deliver goods and refuses to refund is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK hold purchasing agents liable when goods cannot be delivered.

fact_summary: 某水上游乐园因滑道接缝开裂致游客被划伤 / A tourist was cut by a cracked seam on a water slide at a water park.
cn_claim: 水上游乐设施经营者应确保设备安全（民法典第1198条第一款；特种设备安全法第39条）。
us_claim: A water-park operator who fails to maintain slide seams in safe condition is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain water-slide equipment in safe condition breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require water-park operators to maintain slide safety.

fact_summary: 被告人因销售假冒注册商标的口罩被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for selling masks bearing a counterfeit registered trademark.
cn_claim: 未经许可在同一种商品上使用与他人注册商标相同的商标并销售的构成假冒注册商标罪（刑法第213条）。
us_claim: Trafficking in counterfeit goods under the Trademark Counterfeiting Act (18 U.S.C. § 2320) is a federal crime.
hk_claim: Selling goods bearing a forged trademark is an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the sale of counterfeit trademarked goods.

fact_summary: 消费者购买电动自行车后发现实际续航里程与宣传严重不符 / A consumer purchased an e-bike and discovered the actual range was significantly less than advertised.
cn_claim: 经营者不得对商品性能作虚假或引人误解的宣传（消费者权益保护法第8条第一款；广告法第4条）；续航里程严重不符的构成欺诈。
us_claim: A seller who materially misrepresents a product's performance specifications commits fraud and may violate the FTC Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit misrepresentation of product-performance specifications.

fact_summary: 消费者购买电动自行车后发现实际续航里程与宣传严重不符 / A consumer discovered the actual e-bike range was far less than advertised.
cn_claim: 续航里程严重不符的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第8条第一款；广告法第4条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A seller who misrepresents product performance is liable for misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit misrepresentation of product-performance specifications.

fact_summary: 某养老院因未及时发现老人噎食导致窒息死亡 / An elderly resident choked to death in a nursing home because the staff failed to detect the incident in time.
cn_claim: 养老机构应对入住老年人尽到安全保障义务并应配备必要的护理人员（老年人权益保障法第48条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A nursing home that fails to provide adequate supervision during meals is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: A care-home operator who fails to supervise residents during meals to prevent choking hazards breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require care facilities to supervise residents during meals.

fact_summary: 被告人因酒后家庭暴力致配偶重伤 / A defendant caused serious injury to their spouse through domestic violence while intoxicated.
cn_claim: 故意伤害他人身体致人重伤的构成故意伤害罪；因家庭矛盾引发并取得被害人谅解的酌情从宽处理（刑法第234条第二款）。
us_claim: Domestic assault resulting in serious bodily injury is a felony with enhanced penalties in many states.
hk_claim: Causing grievous bodily harm is an offense under the Offences Against the Person Ordinance (Cap. 212).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize domestic violence causing serious injury.

fact_summary: 旅游平台在消费者预订成功后以旺季调价为由要求补差价 / After a successful booking, a travel platform demanded an additional payment from the consumer, citing peak-season price adjustment.
cn_claim: 经营者不得在标价之外加价出售商品或提供服务（价格法第13条第二款）。
us_claim: A travel platform that demands additional payment after confirming a booking at a set price is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit post-booking price increases.

fact_summary: 旅游平台在消费者预订成功后以旺季调价为由要求补差价 / A travel platform demanded additional payment after booking citing peak-season pricing.
cn_claim: 不得在标价之外加价（价格法第13条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A travel platform that increases the price after accepting a booking is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit post-booking price increases.

fact_summary: 某商场因圣诞节装饰物未固定牢固坠落砸伤顾客 / A customer was injured by an unsecured Christmas decoration that fell in a shopping mall.
cn_claim: 经营者应确保场所内装饰物的安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A shopping-mall operator who fails to secure hanging decorations is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to secure decorations safely breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require commercial occupiers to secure hanging decorations.

fact_summary: 被告人因开设赌场并将赌资通过地下钱庄转移至境外 / A defendant operated a gambling establishment and transferred gambling proceeds abroad through an underground bank.
cn_claim: 开设赌场的构成开设赌场罪（刑法第303条第二款）；通过地下钱庄转移资金的还构成非法经营罪（刑法第225条）。
us_claim: Running an illegal gambling operation and laundering the proceeds violates the Unlawful Internet Gambling Enforcement Act and federal money-laundering statutes.
hk_claim: Operating an unauthorized gambling establishment and laundering the proceeds through unlicensed money services is an offense under the Gambling Ordinance (Cap. 148) and the Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 455).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize gambling operations and money laundering through unofficial channels.

fact_summary: 消费者在超市购买熟食后食用时发现食物中有活虫 / A consumer discovered live insects in ready-to-eat food purchased from a supermarket.
cn_claim: 生产经营污秽不洁食品的消费者可主张价款十倍或损失三倍的赔偿金（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: Selling contaminated food products violates the Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act and gives rise to strict products-liability claims.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold food sellers strictly liable for contaminated ready-to-eat foods.

fact_summary: 消费者在超市购买熟食后食用时发现食物中有活虫 / A consumer discovered live insects in ready-to-eat food purchased from a supermarket.
cn_claim: 生产经营污秽不洁食品的消费者可主张赔偿（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling food unfit for human consumption is an offense under the Food Safety Ordinance (Cap. 612).
notes: Both CN and HK hold food sellers liable for contaminated ready-to-eat foods.

fact_summary: 某地铁站因扶梯突然逆行致多名乘客摔倒受伤 / Multiple passengers fell and were injured when an escalator at a subway station suddenly reversed direction.
cn_claim: 地铁运营单位应确保其设施安全并定期维护（民法典第1198条第一款；特种设备安全法第39条）。
us_claim: A transit authority that fails to maintain escalators in safe condition is liable under common-carrier and premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier of a transit station who fails to maintain escalators in safe condition breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require transit-station operators to maintain escalator safety.
