fact_summary: 被告人因毁坏他人的祖坟被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for destroying another family's ancestral graves.
cn_claim: 故意毁坏他人财物数额较大或有其他严重情节的构成故意毁坏财物罪（刑法第275条）；毁坏坟墓的行为还可能涉及侮辱尸体罪。
us_claim: Desecration of burial sites is a crime under state law, with enhanced penalties in many jurisdictions.
hk_claim: Damaging or desecrating burial grounds is an offense under the Public Health and Municipal Services Ordinance (Cap. 132).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the desecration of burial sites.

fact_summary: 汽车4S店将试驾车作为新车出售给消费者 / A car dealership sold a test-drive vehicle as a new car to a consumer.
cn_claim: 将试驾车作为新车销售的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a demonstrator vehicle as a new car without disclosure constitutes fraud and violates state consumer-protection laws.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require dealers to disclose when a vehicle was used as a demonstrator.

fact_summary: 汽车4S店将试驾车作为新车出售给消费者 / A car dealership sold a test-drive vehicle as new.
cn_claim: 将试驾车作为新车销售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A car dealer who sells a demonstrator vehicle as new without disclosure commits misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK require dealers to disclose demonstrator-vehicle status.

fact_summary: 某化工厂因未按规定处理废弃物致周边河流污染、养殖户损失惨重 / A chemical plant failed to treat waste as required, polluting a nearby river and causing devastating losses to fish-farm operators.
cn_claim: 因污染环境造成损害的污染者应承担侵权责任（民法典第1229条）。
us_claim: A facility that discharges untreated waste into waterways is strictly liable under the Clean Water Act and CERCLA for cleanup costs and damages.
hk_claim: A person who causes water pollution is liable for damages under common-law nuisance and negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose liability for water pollution from industrial waste.

fact_summary: 被告人因采取暴力手段强拆他人房屋被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for forcibly demolishing another person's house using violence.
cn_claim: 故意毁坏公私财物数额较大或有其他严重情节的构成故意毁坏财物罪（刑法第275条）；暴力强拆的还可能构成寻衅滋事罪（刑法第293条）。
us_claim: Forcibly entering and demolishing another's dwelling constitutes burglary, criminal mischief, and possibly assault.
hk_claim: Forcibly demolishing another's dwelling is criminal damage and may constitute burglary.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the forcible demolition of another's dwelling.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播间购买燕窝后发现为糖水制品 / A consumer discovered that bird's nest purchased through a livestream was a sugar-water imitation.
cn_claim: 以糖水冒充燕窝的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；同时构成食品安全问题还可主张价款十倍赔偿（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: Selling imitation bird's nest as genuine constitutes fraud and violates the Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for counterfeit food products sold as genuine.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播间购买燕窝后发现为糖水制品 / A consumer discovered bird's nest purchased through a livestream was a sugar-water imitation.
cn_claim: 以糖水冒充燕窝的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款；食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling imitation food as genuine constitutes fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for counterfeit food products sold as genuine.

fact_summary: 某居民楼因燃气管道接口松动泄漏致爆炸 / A residential-building gas-pipe joint loosened and leaked, causing an explosion.
cn_claim: 燃气经营者应定期对燃气设施进行安全检查（城镇燃气管理条例第19条第一款）并承担由此产生的责任；物业服务人亦负协助义务。
us_claim: A gas utility or property manager that fails to maintain gas-line connections is liable for resulting explosions under negligence and strict-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier or gas supplier who fails to maintain gas fittings in safe condition breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose gas-pipe maintenance duties.

fact_summary: 被告人因利用网络平台组织卖淫被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for organizing prostitution through an online platform.
cn_claim: 组织他人卖淫的构成组织卖淫罪（刑法第358条第一款）。
us_claim: Promoting or facilitating prostitution through interstate commerce is a crime under the Mann Act (18 U.S.C. § 2421) and various state laws.
hk_claim: Organizing or controlling another person for prostitution is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the organization of prostitution.

fact_summary: 消费者购买房地产后发现开发商未缴清土地出让金导致无法办理房产证 / A homebuyer discovered the developer had not paid the land-transfer fee in full, preventing the issuance of a property-title certificate.
cn_claim: 因出卖人原因导致买受人无法办理不动产登记的出卖人应承担违约责任（民法典第577条；商品房买卖合同司法解释第18条）。
us_claim: A developer who fails to clear title encumbrances that prevent the buyer from obtaining clear title is in material breach of the purchase contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold developers liable for failing to clear title encumbrances.

fact_summary: 开发商未缴清土地出让金导致消费者无法办理房产证 / A developer's unpaid land-transfer fee prevented the buyer from obtaining a title certificate.
cn_claim: 因出卖人原因导致无法办理不动产登记的出卖人应承担违约责任（民法典第577条；商品房买卖合同司法解释第18条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A developer who fails to clear title encumbrances so that the buyer can obtain good title is in breach of the sale-and-purchase agreement.
notes: Both CN and HK hold developers liable for failing to clear title encumbrances.

fact_summary: 某写字楼因电梯维保记录造假致故障频发 / An office building experienced frequent elevator breakdowns because the maintenance records had been falsified.
cn_claim: 电梯维保单位应对维护保养质量负责并如实记录（特种设备安全法第45条第二款）。
us_claim: An elevator-maintenance contractor who falsifies inspection records is liable for negligence; falsification may constitute fraud.
hk_claim: An elevator-maintenance contractor who falsifies records and fails to maintain equipment properly breaches safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions hold maintenance contractors liable for falsified inspection records.

fact_summary: 被告人因在医院盗窃患者财物被抓获 / A defendant was apprehended for stealing patients' belongings in a hospital.
cn_claim: 盗窃公私财物数额较大的构成盗窃罪；在医院盗窃病人或其亲友财物的从重处罚（刑法第264条）。
us_claim: Theft from hospital patients is a crime under state law; the vulnerability of the victims is an aggravating sentencing factor.
hk_claim: Theft from hospital patients is an offense under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210) and is an aggravating factor.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat theft from hospital patients as particularly serious.

fact_summary: 消费者通过线上平台订房后发现酒店实际位置与平台标注位置相距甚远 / A consumer discovered the hotel's actual location was far from the location indicated on the online booking platform.
cn_claim: 经营者发布的信息应当真实、准确（电子商务法第17条；消费者权益保护法第8条第一款）。
us_claim: A booking platform that misrepresents a hotel's location may be liable for fraud or deceptive practices under the FTC Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require booking platforms to provide accurate location information.

fact_summary: 消费者通过线上平台订房后发现酒店实际位置与平台标注位置相距甚远 / A consumer discovered the hotel's actual location was far from the platform's indicated location.
cn_claim: 发布信息应真实准确（电子商务法第17条；消费者权益保护法第8条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A booking platform that provides materially inaccurate location information may be liable for misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK require booking platforms to provide accurate location information.

fact_summary: 某小区因未修剪枯枝致其坠落砸伤行人 / A pedestrian was injured by a dead tree branch that fell in a residential compound because the tree had not been pruned.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应对小区内植被进行养护管理（民法典第942条第一款）；林木折断造成他人损害的管理人不能证明自己无过错的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1255条）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to maintain trees in safe condition is liable for resulting injuries under negligence theory.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain trees safely breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require property managers to maintain tree safety.

fact_summary: 被告人因收买被拐卖的妇女被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for purchasing a trafficked woman.
cn_claim: 收买被拐卖的妇女的构成收买被拐卖的妇女罪（刑法第241条第一款）。
us_claim: Purchasing a trafficked person is a federal crime under the Trafficking Victims Protection Act (18 U.S.C. § 1591).
hk_claim: Buying trafficked persons is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the purchase of trafficked persons.

fact_summary: 装修公司擅自将合同约定的实木地板更换为复合地板 / A renovation company unilaterally replaced the contracted solid-wood flooring with laminate flooring.
cn_claim: 承揽人交付的工作成果不符合质量要求的定作人可合理选择请求修理、重作、减少报酬或赔偿损失（民法典第781条）。
us_claim: A contractor who substitutes inferior materials without the owner's approval is liable for breach of contract and the cost of replacement.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold contractors liable for unauthorized material substitution.

fact_summary: 装修公司擅自将合同约定的实木地板更换为复合地板 / A renovation company unilaterally replaced solid-wood flooring with laminate.
cn_claim: 交付不符合质量要求的定作人可请求修理、减少报酬或赔偿（民法典第781条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A contractor who substitutes materials without the client's consent is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK hold contractors liable for unauthorized material substitution.

fact_summary: 某停车场因未设置限高标志致货车撞击顶部消防管道喷水 / A truck struck a parking-garage overhead fire-sprinkler pipe because no height-limit sign had been posted, causing water discharge.
cn_claim: 停车场经营者应设置明显的限高和安全提示标志（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A parking-facility operator who fails to post adequate height warnings is liable for resulting damage.
hk_claim: An occupier of a parking facility who fails to warn of low-clearance hazards breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require parking operators to post height-warning signs.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法制造注册商标标识并销售被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for illegally manufacturing and selling registered-trademark labels.
cn_claim: 伪造、擅自制造他人注册商标标识并销售的构成非法制造、销售非法制造的注册商标标识罪（刑法第215条）。
us_claim: Counterfeiting registered trademarks is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 2320.
hk_claim: Forging a registered trademark is an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the counterfeiting of trademark labels.

fact_summary: 消费者在电商平台购买手机后商家迟迟不发货也不退款 / A consumer who purchased a phone on an e-commerce platform experienced prolonged delivery delay and no refund.
cn_claim: 经营者应按照约定履行交付义务（电子商务法第49条、第50条）；未发货也不退款的应承担违约责任。
us_claim: A merchant who fails to deliver and refuses to refund is in breach of contract; the consumer may seek a chargeback through the payment network.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for non-delivery and non-refund by online merchants.

fact_summary: 商家迟迟不发货也不退款 / A merchant failed to deliver and refused to refund.
cn_claim: 未发货也不退款的应承担违约责任（电子商务法第49条、第50条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A merchant who fails to deliver and refuses to refund is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for non-delivery and non-refund.

fact_summary: 某图书馆因书架未固定牢固倾倒砸伤读者 / A reader was injured when an unsecured bookshelf in a library toppled over.
cn_claim: 公共场所的管理人应确保设施安全（民法典第1198条第一款）；未固定的书架倾倒致人损害的管理人应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A library that fails to secure shelving units against tipping is liable for resulting injuries under premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to secure furniture safely breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require public-facility operators to secure shelving units.

fact_summary: 被告人因在微信群内组织团购毒品被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for organizing drug-purchasing groups through a WeChat group.
cn_claim: 贩卖毒品的无论数量多少均应追究刑事责任（刑法第347条第一款）；组织团购毒品的属于贩卖毒品。
us_claim: Coordinating drug purchases through social media constitutes drug trafficking and conspiracy under the Controlled Substances Act.
hk_claim: Organizing drug-purchasing groups is trafficking under the Dangerous Drugs Ordinance (Cap. 134).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize group-purchasing coordination of drugs through social media.

fact_summary: 租赁合同到期后租客继续居住一年且按时交租但未签新合同 / After the lease expired, the tenant continued to reside for one year and paid rent on time without signing a new contract.
cn_claim: 租赁期限届满承租人继续使用租赁物且出租人未提出异议的原租赁合同继续有效但为不定期租赁（民法典第734条第一款）。
us_claim: A tenant who holds over with the landlord's consent becomes a periodic tenant under the same terms as the original lease.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US treat holdover tenancies as continuing under the original terms.

fact_summary: 租赁合同到期后租客继续居住一年且按时交租但未签新合同 / After the lease expired, the tenant continued to reside for one year paying rent without signing a new contract.
cn_claim: 出租人未提出异议的原租赁合同继续有效但为不定期租赁（民法典第734条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A tenant who holds over with the landlord's knowledge and continues to pay rent becomes a periodic tenant.
notes: Both CN and HK treat holdover tenancies as continuing under the original terms.

fact_summary: 某健身房因器材摆放间距过窄致会员使用相邻器材时碰撞受伤 / A gym member was injured when colliding with an adjacent exerciser because the equipment was placed too close together.
cn_claim: 健身房经营者应确保运动器材的合理布局和足够的安全间距（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A fitness facility that fails to provide adequate spacing between exercise machines is liable for resulting injuries under negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier of a gym who fails to arrange equipment with safe clearance breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require fitness facilities to provide adequate equipment spacing.

fact_summary: 被告人因生产地沟油并销售给餐馆被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for producing gutter oil and selling it to restaurants.
cn_claim: 将餐厨废弃油脂加工后作为食用油销售的依照刑法第144条生产、销售有毒、有害食品罪定罪处罚。
us_claim: Selling adulterated oil for human consumption is a crime under the Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act.
hk_claim: Selling food unfit for human consumption is an offense under the Food Safety Ordinance (Cap. 612).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the production and sale of gutter oil.

fact_summary: 银行在信用卡合同中约定消费者逾期还款需支付高达年化36%的罚息 / A bank's credit-card contract required a consumer who defaulted on repayment to pay penalty interest at an annualized rate of 36%.
cn_claim: 借贷双方约定的利率未超过年利率24%的出借人请求借款人按约定利率支付利息的法院应予支持；超过年利率36%的部分无效（最高人民法院关于审理民间借贷案件适用法律若干问题的规定第26条）。
us_claim: State usury laws cap interest rates; excessive penalty rates may be void as unconscionable or in violation of state usury limits.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US regulate excessive penalty interest rates in consumer credit agreements.

fact_summary: 银行在信用卡合同中约定高达年化36%的罚息 / A bank's credit-card contract stipulated penalty interest at 36% annually.
cn_claim: 超过年利率36%的部分无效。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Excessive penalty rates may be void as a penalty under the Money Lenders Ordinance (Cap. 163).
notes: Both CN and HK regulate excessive penalty interest rates.

fact_summary: 某温泉因池底排水口未安装安全盖致游客被吸住溺水 / A tourist nearly drowned when sucked against an unguarded drain at the bottom of a hot-springs pool.
cn_claim: 温泉经营者应确保设施安全（民法典第1198条第一款；游泳场所卫生规范第16条）。
us_claim: A spa operator who fails to install compliant drain covers is liable under the Virginia Graeme Baker Pool and Spa Safety Act.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to install safety grilles on drain outlets breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require drain-intake safety devices in pools and spas.

fact_summary: 被告人因拐骗儿童被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for abducting a child.
cn_claim: 拐骗不满十四周岁的未成年人脱离家庭或监护人的构成拐骗儿童罪（刑法第262条）。
us_claim: Child abduction is a serious felony under state law, and the federal Kidnapping Act (18 U.S.C. § 1201) applies if the child is transported across state lines.
hk_claim: Abducting a child is an offense under the Protection of Children and Juveniles Ordinance (Cap. 213) and the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions treat child abduction with the utmost severity.

fact_summary: 网站以免费试用为由获取消费者信用卡信息后扣费 / A website obtained consumers' credit-card information under the pretense of a free trial and subsequently charged fees.
cn_claim: 经营者不得利用虚假的免费试用方式诱骗消费者（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；自动续费应在扣费前显著提醒消费者。
us_claim: The Restore Online Shoppers' Confidence Act (15 U.S.C. § 8401 et seq.) requires clear disclosure of the material terms of any negative-option feature before obtaining billing information.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit deceptive free-trial-to-paid-subscription schemes.

fact_summary: 网站以免费试用为由获取消费者信用卡信息后扣费 / A website obtained credit-card information for a free trial and then charged fees.
cn_claim: 虚假免费试用诱骗消费者构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A trader who charges a consumer without clear disclosure of payment terms engages in misleading conduct.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit deceptive free-trial-to-paid-subscription schemes.

fact_summary: 某网吧因通风不良致顾客集体头晕呕吐 / Multiple customers in an internet cafe suffered dizziness and vomiting due to poor ventilation.
cn_claim: 网吧等公共场所的经营者应保证室内空气质量符合国家卫生标准（公共场所卫生管理条例第3条第一款第一项）。
us_claim: A business operator who fails to provide adequate ventilation is liable for resulting health issues under negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to provide adequate ventilation breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require public-facility operators to provide adequate ventilation.

fact_summary: 被告人因抢劫金店被判处重刑 / A defendant was sentenced to a heavy penalty for robbing a gold shop.
cn_claim: 以暴力、胁迫或其他方法抢劫公私财物的处三年以上十年以下有期徒刑；入户抢劫、在公共交通工具上抢劫或抢劫银行等加重情节的处十年以上有期徒刑、无期徒刑或死刑（刑法第263条）。
us_claim: Armed robbery of a commercial establishment is a serious felony under state law, and the Hobbs Act (18 U.S.C. § 1951) may apply if the robbery affects interstate commerce.
hk_claim: Robbery is an offense under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210) s.10, carrying severe penalties.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for commercial robbery.

fact_summary: 共享汽车平台在用户用车结束后持续扣费 / A car-sharing platform continued to charge a user after the rental period had ended.
cn_claim: 经营者不得在约定费用之外收取未予标明的费用（价格法第13条第二款；消费者权益保护法第8条）。
us_claim: A car-sharing company that charges for time after the rental has ended is in breach of contract and may be liable under state consumer-protection laws.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for unauthorized post-rental charges.

fact_summary: 共享汽车平台在用户用车结束后持续扣费 / A car-sharing platform continued charging after the rental period ended.
cn_claim: 不得在约定费用之外收取未予标明的费用（价格法第13条第二款；消费者权益保护法第8条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A car-sharing company that charges for unauthorized periods is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for unauthorized post-rental charges.

fact_summary: 某居民楼因外墙水泥块脱落砸穿楼下遮阳棚 / A piece of concrete fell from a residential building's exterior wall and penetrated a sunshade below.
cn_claim: 建筑物发生脱落造成他人损害的所有人与管理人不能证明自己无过错的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1253条）。
us_claim: A building owner who fails to maintain exterior surfaces is liable for property damage under negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier or building owner who fails to maintain exterior walls is liable for resulting damage under the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose exterior-wall maintenance duties on building owners.

fact_summary: 被告人因利用网络爬虫技术抓取竞争对手商业秘密被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for using web-crawling technology to capture a competitor's trade secrets.
cn_claim: 以盗窃、利诱、胁迫或其他不正当手段获取权利人商业秘密的构成侵犯商业秘密罪（刑法第219条第一款第一项）。
us_claim: Misappropriation of trade secrets through unauthorized computer access violates the Economic Espionage Act (18 U.S.C. § 1832) and the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act.
hk_claim: Obtaining trade secrets through unauthorized computer access is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200) and may constitute a breach of confidence.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the electronic theft of trade secrets.

fact_summary: 消费者在线上预订了海景房但实际入住为城景房 / A consumer booked an ocean-view room online but was assigned a city-view room upon check-in.
cn_claim: 经营者提供服务有欺诈行为的应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；以城景房冒充海景房的构成欺诈。
us_claim: A hotel that provides a materially different room from the booking is in breach of contract and liable for misrepresentation.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold hotels liable for providing materially different rooms from those booked.

fact_summary: 消费者在线上预订了海景房但实际入住为城景房 / A consumer booked an ocean-view room but was given a city-view room.
cn_claim: 以城景房冒充海景房的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A hotel that provides a room materially different from the confirmed booking is in breach of contract and liable for misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK hold hotels liable for providing materially different rooms.

fact_summary: 某幼儿园因未安装监控导致无法查明幼儿受伤原因 / A kindergarten failed to install surveillance cameras, making it impossible to determine how a child was injured.
cn_claim: 幼儿园等教育机构应建立健全安全管理制度并配备必要的安全防护设施（未成年人保护法第37条第一款）。
us_claim: A childcare facility that fails to provide adequate monitoring may face an adverse inference in negligence actions where surveillance would have established the cause of the injury.
hk_claim: A kindergarten that fails to take reasonable precautions, including monitoring, may breach the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require childcare facilities to implement reasonable safety-monitoring measures.

fact_summary: 被告人因酒后驾车被查处后自报弟弟姓名企图逃避处罚 / After being caught for drunk driving, a defendant falsely identified themselves as their sibling to avoid punishment.
cn_claim: 冒用他人身份信息的行为可能构成使用虚假身份证件罪（刑法第280条之一第一款）；同时构成危险驾驶罪的从重处罚。
us_claim: Providing false identification to law enforcement is a crime under state law and may constitute obstruction of justice.
hk_claim: Giving false personal particulars to a police officer is an offense under the Police Force Ordinance (Cap. 232).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize providing false identity to law enforcement.

fact_summary: 消费者购买预售商品后商家在发货前涨价并要求补差价 / After a consumer purchased a pre-sale item, the merchant raised the price before shipping and demanded an additional payment.
cn_claim: 经营者应按照约定的价格履行合同（民法典第577条）；发货前单方涨价构成违约。
us_claim: A merchant who demands additional payment after the contract was formed at a set price is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit post-contract price increases.

fact_summary: 消费者购买预售商品后商家在发货前涨价并要求补差价 / After purchase, a merchant raised the price before shipping and demanded additional payment.
cn_claim: 发货前单方涨价构成违约（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A merchant who increases the price after a contract is formed is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit post-contract price increases.

fact_summary: 某养老院因护理人员配备不足致老人长期卧床发生褥疮 / An elderly resident developed pressure sores from prolonged bed rest in a nursing home because of inadequate staffing.
cn_claim: 养老机构应根据入住老年人数量配备相应数量的护理人员（养老机构管理办法第18条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A nursing home that fails to maintain adequate staffing levels to prevent pressure ulcers is liable for negligence under federal nursing-home regulations.
hk_claim: A care-home operator who fails to provide adequate staffing to prevent pressure sores breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require care facilities to maintain adequate staffing levels.

fact_summary: 被告人因接受境外敌对组织资助从事危害国家安全的活动 / A defendant accepted funding from a foreign hostile organization to engage in activities endangering national security.
cn_claim: 接受境外机构、组织、个人的资助从事危害国家安全活动的构成资助危害国家安全犯罪活动罪（刑法第107条）。
us_claim: Accepting funding from a designated foreign terrorist organization constitutes providing material support to terrorism under 18 U.S.C. § 2339B.
hk_claim: Accepting foreign funding for activities endangering national security may be an offense under the Hong Kong National Security Law.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize accepting foreign funding for activities threatening national security.

fact_summary: 租客在合同到期前提前退租且未按合同约定通知房东 / A tenant vacated before the lease expiration without notifying the landlord as required by the contract.
cn_claim: 承租人提前退租未按约定通知的构成违约应承担违约责任（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: A tenant who vacates before the lease term ends without proper notice is in breach and liable for unpaid rent through the lease term, mitigated by the landlord's duty to re-let.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold early-vacating tenants liable for breach of lease.

fact_summary: 租客在合同到期前提前退租且未按合同约定通知房东 / A tenant vacated early without the contractually-required notice.
cn_claim: 提前退租未按约定通知的构成违约（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A tenant who vacates before the end of the lease term without giving proper notice is in breach of the tenancy agreement.
notes: Both CN and HK hold early-vacating tenants liable for breach of lease.

fact_summary: 某商场因中央空调系统未进行军团菌检测致多名顾客感染 / Multiple shoppers contracted Legionnaires' disease because the shopping mall failed to test its central air-conditioning system for Legionella bacteria.
cn_claim: 公共场所经营者应保证集中空调通风系统符合卫生标准（公共场所集中空调通风系统卫生管理办法第9条）。
us_claim: A building operator who fails to test and maintain cooling towers for Legionella is liable under negligence theories; violation of ASHRAE standards is evidence of breach.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain ventilation systems to prevent Legionella growth breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require building operators to maintain HVAC systems against Legionella.

fact_summary: 被告人因贩卖毒品数量特别巨大被判处死刑 / A defendant was sentenced to death for trafficking an exceptionally large quantity of drugs.
cn_claim: 走私、贩卖、运输、制造毒品数量大的处死刑（刑法第347条第二款）。
us_claim: Large-scale drug trafficking may result in life imprisonment; the death penalty is not available for drug offenses under federal law.
hk_claim: Trafficking in a large quantity of dangerous drugs carries a maximum penalty of life imprisonment.
notes: CN retains the death penalty for extremely large-scale drug trafficking, while US and HK do not, creating a maximum-penalty asymmetry.

fact_summary: 房产中介在交易完成后向买卖双方同时收取全额佣金 / A real-estate agent charged both the buyer and seller the full commission after the transaction.
cn_claim: 房地产经纪机构未向委托人明示而收取双份佣金的属于价格违法行为（房地产经纪管理办法第17条）。
us_claim: A real-estate agent who charges undisclosed dual agency fees without the informed consent of both parties violates state real-estate licensing laws.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require disclosure of dual-agency fees in real-estate transactions.

fact_summary: 房产中介在交易完成后向买卖双方同时收取全额佣金 / A real-estate agent charged both buyer and seller full commission.
cn_claim: 未明示而收取双份佣金的属于价格违法行为（房地产经纪管理办法第17条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An estate agent who charges undisclosed dual-agency fees without informed consent of both parties is in breach of fiduciary duty.
notes: Both CN and HK require disclosure of dual-agency fees in real-estate transactions.

fact_summary: 某工厂因未安装粉尘浓度监测报警装置导致粉尘爆炸 / A factory's dust explosion occurred because it had not installed dust-concentration monitoring and alarm devices.
cn_claim: 存在粉尘爆炸危险的场所应设置粉尘浓度监测报警装置（粉尘防爆安全规程；安全生产法第36条第一款）。
us_claim: A factory operator who fails to install required dust-monitoring devices in hazardous areas violates OSHA Process Safety Management standards.
hk_claim: A factory occupier who fails to take reasonable precautions against dust-explosion risks breaches safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require dust-monitoring devices in explosive-dust environments.

fact_summary: 被告人因制作并传播计算机病毒致使大量计算机瘫痪被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for creating and distributing a computer virus that crippled a large number of computers.
cn_claim: 故意制作、传播计算机病毒等破坏性程序影响计算机系统正常运行的构成破坏计算机信息系统罪（刑法第286条第三款）。
us_claim: Knowingly transmitting a program that causes damage to protected computers is a crime under the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act (18 U.S.C. § 1030(a)(5)(A)).
hk_claim: Unauthorized access to a computer by means of a virus is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the creation and dissemination of computer viruses.

fact_summary: 美容院以消费者皮肤检测结果异常为由诱导购买高价美容套餐 / A beauty salon induced a consumer to purchase an expensive treatment package by falsely claiming their skin-test results were abnormal.
cn_claim: 利用虚假检测结果诱使消费者消费的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: A beauty salon that uses fabricated test results to sell unnecessary treatments commits fraud and violates the FTC Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit deceptive sales practices using fabricated diagnostic results.

fact_summary: 美容院以消费者皮肤检测结果异常为由诱导购买高价美容套餐 / A beauty salon used fabricated test results to induce purchase of expensive treatments.
cn_claim: 利用虚假检测结果诱使消费的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A beauty salon that uses false test results to sell treatments commits fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit deceptive sales practices using fabricated diagnostic results.

fact_summary: 某加油站因加油机计量器被篡改致消费者被少加油 / Consumers received less fuel than paid for at a gas station because the fuel-dispenser meter had been tampered with.
cn_claim: 经营者不得破坏计量器具的准确度损害消费者的利益（计量法第17条）；加油机计量器被篡改的经营者应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A gas station that alters fuel-dispenser meters to short customers commits fraud and violates state weights-and-measures laws.
hk_claim: A trader who tampers with measuring equipment to short-supply customers commits fraud and may be liable under the Weights and Measures Ordinance (Cap. 68).
notes: All three jurisdictions prohibit fuel-dispenser tampering.

fact_summary: 被告人因冒充医生非法行医致人死亡 / A defendant caused a patient's death by practicing medicine without a license while impersonating a physician.
cn_claim: 未取得医生执业资格非法行医造成就诊人死亡的构成非法行医罪（刑法第336条第一款）。
us_claim: Practicing medicine without a license resulting in death is a serious felony under state law.
hk_claim: Practicing medicine without registration is an offense under the Medical Registration Ordinance (Cap. 161).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unlicensed medical practice resulting in death.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买大闸蟹后发现实际重量与标明重量严重不符 / A consumer purchased hairy crabs through a livestream and discovered the actual weight was significantly less than the stated weight.
cn_claim: 经营者以短斤少两的方式销售商品的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Short-weighting consumer products constitutes fraud and violates state weights-and-measures laws.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit short-weighting of consumer goods.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买大闸蟹后发现实际重量与标明重量严重不符 / A consumer purchased crabs through a livestream and found the actual weight was significantly less.
cn_claim: 以短斤少两方式销售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A trader who short-weights goods commits fraud and an offense under the Weights and Measures Ordinance (Cap. 68).
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit short-weighting of consumer goods.

fact_summary: 某学校组织学生户外拓展训练时因教练无资质致学生骨折 / A student suffered a fracture during a school-organized outdoor-adventure training because the instructor was unqualified.
cn_claim: 学校组织校外活动应确保活动组织者和教练具备相应资质（未成年人保护法第37条）。
us_claim: A school that hires unqualified instructors for outdoor activities is liable for negligence in hiring and supervision.
hk_claim: A school that engages unqualified instructors for student activities breaches the duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require schools to ensure activity instructors are properly qualified.

fact_summary: 被告人因在禁渔期内使用电鱼方法捕捞水产品 / A defendant used electrofishing to catch aquatic products during the fishing moratorium.
cn_claim: 违反保护水产资源法规在禁渔区、禁渔期或使用禁用的工具、方法捕捞水产品情节严重的构成非法捕捞水产品罪（刑法第340条）。
us_claim: Using prohibited fishing methods such as electrofishing is a crime under the Magnuson-Stevens Fishery Conservation and Management Act.
hk_claim: Using destructive fishing methods including electrofishing is an offense under the Fisheries Protection Ordinance (Cap. 171).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize destructive fishing methods.

fact_summary: 装修公司以材料涨价为由要求业主加价否则停工 / A renovation company demanded a price increase from the homeowner citing material-cost increases, threatening to stop work.
cn_claim: 合同成立后因原材料价格波动导致的商业风险应由当事人合理分担（民法典第533条）；无正当理由停工构成违约。
us_claim: A contractor who demands a mid-project price increase and threatens to walk off the job is in breach of contract and may be liable for the cost of substitute completion.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US treat mid-project price-increase demands with work stoppage as breach of contract.

fact_summary: 装修公司以材料涨价为由要求业主加价否则停工 / A renovation company demanded a price increase citing material-cost increases or they would stop work.
cn_claim: 无正当理由停工构成违约（民法典第533条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A contractor who threatens to stop work to extract a higher price is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK treat mid-project work-stoppage demands for higher payment as breach of contract.

fact_summary: 某电影院因消防应急灯全部失效致火灾时观众无法找到出口 / Moviegoers were unable to locate exits during a fire because all emergency lights in the cinema had failed.
cn_claim: 人员密集场所应按照消防技术标准配置并维护消防应急照明（消防法第16条第一款第二项）。
us_claim: A cinema operator who fails to maintain emergency lighting is liable for resulting injuries under negligence and premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain emergency-exit lighting breaches fire-safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require cinemas to maintain functional emergency lighting.

fact_summary: 被告人因策划并实施银行金库盗窃被抓获 / A defendant was apprehended for planning and executing a bank-vault heist.
cn_claim: 盗窃金融机构数额特别巨大的处无期徒刑或死刑（刑法第264条第一款第三项、第二款）。
us_claim: Bank burglary or robbery is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 2113, carrying severe penalties.
hk_claim: Burglary of a bank is an offense under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose the most severe penalties for bank vault theft.

fact_summary: 航空公司因天气原因取消航班后仅提供住宿但拒绝赔偿 / After cancelling a flight due to weather, an airline provided accommodation but refused compensation.
cn_claim: 因天气等不可抗力造成航班延误或取消的航空公司应提供餐食和住宿但可免除赔偿责任（航班正常管理规定第29条）。
us_claim: Airlines are generally not required to compensate passengers for delays or cancellations caused by weather beyond their control, though they must provide care.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US excuse airlines from compensation for weather-related cancellations.

fact_summary: 航空公司因天气原因取消航班后仅提供住宿但拒绝赔偿 / An airline provided accommodation but refused compensation after a weather cancellation.
cn_claim: 因不可抗力造成航班取消的可免除赔偿责任（航班正常管理规定第29条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An airline may be excused from liability for weather-related cancellations, but should provide care for stranded passengers.
notes: Both CN and HK excuse airlines from compensation for weather-related cancellations.

fact_summary: 某药店因错误调配中药致患者过敏休克 / A patient suffered anaphylactic shock because a pharmacy dispensed the wrong herbal formula.
cn_claim: 因药品缺陷造成患者损害的药品经营者应承担赔偿责任（药品管理法第144条第一款）。
us_claim: A pharmacy that dispenses the wrong medication is strictly liable for the resulting injuries under products-liability and negligence theories.
hk_claim: A pharmacy that dispenses the wrong medication causing harm is liable for negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions hold pharmacies strictly liable for dispensing errors causing harm.

fact_summary: 被告人因走私普通货物偷逃应缴税额巨大 / A defendant evaded a huge amount of customs duties by smuggling ordinary goods.
cn_claim: 走私货物偷逃应缴税额巨大的构成走私普通货物、物品罪（刑法第153条第一款第二项）。
us_claim: Customs fraud involving large-scale duty evasion is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 541 and § 542.
hk_claim: Customs fraud and duty evasion are offenses under the Import and Export Ordinance (Cap. 60).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize large-scale customs-duty evasion.

fact_summary: 二手车交易平台承诺车辆无事故但消费者购买后发现该车曾发生重大事故 / A used-car platform promised the vehicle was accident-free, but the consumer later discovered it had been in a major accident.
cn_claim: 经营者以虚假承诺方式销售商品的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: A used-car dealer who represents a vehicle as accident-free when it has been in a major collision commits fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for misrepresentation of accident history in vehicle sales.

fact_summary: 二手车交易平台承诺车辆无事故但消费者购买后发现该车曾发生重大事故 / A used-car platform promised the vehicle was accident-free, but the buyer discovered a major accident history.
cn_claim: 以虚假承诺方式销售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A used-car dealer who misrepresents a vehicle's accident history commits fraud.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for misrepresentation of accident history in vehicle sales.

fact_summary: 某小区因二次供水水箱未加盖导致老鼠进入污染水质 / A residential compound's secondary water-supply tank was contaminated by a rodent because the tank lid was missing.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应确保二次供水设施处于安全和卫生状态（城市供水条例第21条；民法典第942条第一款）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to maintain sanitary water-storage facilities is liable for resulting illness under negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain water-tank hygiene breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require property managers to maintain water-tank hygiene.

fact_summary: 被告人因强迫多名妇女卖淫被判处重刑 / A defendant was sentenced to a heavy penalty for forcing multiple women into prostitution.
cn_claim: 强迫他人卖淫的构成强迫卖淫罪（刑法第358条第一款）。
us_claim: Forcing another person into prostitution through coercion is a federal crime under the Trafficking Victims Protection Act (18 U.S.C. § 1591).
hk_claim: Compelling another person into prostitution is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize forced prostitution with severe penalties.

fact_summary: 消费者在电商平台购买空调后安装工人强行收取高价铜管费 / After purchasing an air conditioner online, a consumer was forced to pay an exorbitant copper-pipe fee by the installer.
cn_claim: 经营者不得在约定费用之外收取未予标明的费用（价格法第13条第二款；消费者权益保护法第8条）。
us_claim: A contractor who demands undisclosed additional fees after the consumer has committed is liable for fraud and deceptive practices.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit undisclosed additional charges in appliance installation.

fact_summary: 安装工人强行收取高价铜管费 / An installer demanded an exorbitant copper-pipe fee.
cn_claim: 不得在约定费用之外收取未予标明的费用（价格法第13条第二款；消费者权益保护法第8条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Demanding undisclosed additional fees after the consumer has committed is misleading conduct.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit undisclosed additional charges in installation.

fact_summary: 某工厂因未对起重机械进行定期检验致吊钩脱落砸伤工人 / A worker was injured when a factory crane's hook detached because the crane had not undergone periodic inspection.
cn_claim: 特种设备使用单位应对在用特种设备进行定期检验（特种设备安全法第40条第一款）。
us_claim: A factory operator who fails to conduct required crane inspections violates OSHA standards and is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: A factory occupier who fails to inspect lifting equipment properly breaches safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require periodic crane inspections.

fact_summary: 被告人因伪造增值税专用发票并出售 / A defendant forged special VAT invoices and sold them.
cn_claim: 伪造并出售伪造的增值税专用发票的构成伪造、出售伪造的增值税专用发票罪（刑法第206条第一款）。
us_claim: Forging tax documents to facilitate tax evasion is a crime under 26 U.S.C. § 7206 and may also constitute mail or wire fraud.
hk_claim: Forging financial documents for tax fraud purposes is an offense under the Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap. 112) and the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the forgery of tax documents.

fact_summary: 消费者在平台购买培训课后因课程质量差要求退款但平台以超过退款期为由拒绝 / A consumer sought a refund for a poor-quality training course purchased on a platform, but the platform refused citing the refund period had passed.
cn_claim: 经营者提供的服务不符合质量要求的消费者可依照约定要求退货或要求履行更换、修理等义务（消费者权益保护法第24条第一款）。
us_claim: A platform that provides materially substandard services cannot rely on an expired return window to avoid liability for breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US allow consumers to seek remedies for substandard services despite expired return windows.

fact_summary: 平台以超过退款期为由拒绝为质量差的培训课退款 / A platform refused a refund for a poor-quality course citing an expired refund window.
cn_claim: 服务不符合质量要求的消费者可要求履行更换、修理等义务（消费者权益保护法第24条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A service provider who delivers materially substandard services cannot rely on a technical time-bar to defeat a legitimate claim.
notes: Both CN and HK allow consumers to seek remedies for substandard services despite expired return windows.

fact_summary: 某商铺因门口台阶缺损未修复致顾客绊倒摔伤 / A customer tripped and fell on a broken step at a shop entrance that had not been repaired.
cn_claim: 经营者应确保其经营场所安全（民法典第1198条第一款）；台阶缺损未修复致人损害的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A shop operator who fails to repair a known trip hazard is liable for resulting injuries under premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to repair a broken step at the entrance breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require shop operators to maintain safe entranceways.

fact_summary: 被告人因在家中私设电网致盗贼死亡 / A defendant installed a homemade electric fence at home that killed a burglar.
cn_claim: 私设电网致人死亡的构成过失致人死亡罪或间接故意杀人罪（刑法第233条、第232条）。
us_claim: Using deadly force to protect property is generally prohibited; setting a lethal trap that kills a trespasser may constitute murder or manslaughter, as the use of deadly force is disproportionate to property protection.
hk_claim: Setting a lethal trap that kills a trespasser constitutes an unlawful killing; the use of force must be reasonable and proportionate.
notes: All three jurisdictions restrict the use of lethal force for property defense, holding it disproportionate.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买的翡翠手镯在运输途中破损但商家拒绝承担责任 / A jade bracelet purchased through a livestream was broken during shipping, and the merchant refused to take responsibility.
cn_claim: 经营者应确保商品在交付消费者前的安全（民法典第604条）。
us_claim: Under the Uniform Commercial Code § 2-509, the risk of loss remains with the seller until the goods are delivered to the buyer in a consumer transaction.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US place the risk of loss during shipping on the seller in consumer transactions.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买的翡翠手镯在运输途中破损但商家拒绝承担责任 / A jade bracelet broke during shipping and the merchant refused to take responsibility.
cn_claim: 经营者应确保交付前商品安全（民法典第604条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: In a consumer sale, the risk of loss during transit generally remains with the seller until delivery.
notes: Both CN and HK place the risk of loss during shipping on the seller in consumer transactions.

fact_summary: 某小区因消防通道被私家车占用致救护车无法进入延误抢救 / An ambulance was blocked from entering a residential compound because private cars occupied the fire lane, delaying emergency treatment.
cn_claim: 任何单位和个人不得占用、堵塞、封闭疏散通道、安全出口或消防车通道（消防法第28条）。
us_claim: Blocking emergency-access lanes violates fire codes and may subject the person who blocked the access to civil liability for resulting harm.
hk_claim: Obstructing a fire-appliance access route is an offense under the Fire Services Ordinance (Cap. 95).
notes: All three jurisdictions prohibit the obstruction of emergency-access lanes.

fact_summary: 被告人因酒后在网络上发布威胁要炸毁某学校的言论被刑事拘留 / A defendant was criminally detained for posting threats online to bomb a school while intoxicated.
cn_claim: 编造并传播虚假恐怖信息的构成编造、故意传播虚假恐怖信息罪（刑法第291条之一第一款）。
us_claim: Making a threat to bomb a school is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 844(e) and may also be charged as transmitting a threat in interstate commerce under 18 U.S.C. § 875(c).
hk_claim: Making threats to bomb a school constitutes criminal intimidation and may also be an offense under the Public Order Ordinance (Cap. 245).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize bomb threats against schools.

fact_summary: 美容机构在合同中擅自将服务期限缩短 / A beauty institution unilaterally shortened the service period in the contract.
cn_claim: 变更合同内容应经双方当事人协商一致（民法典第543条）；单方缩短服务期限构成违约。
us_claim: A service provider who unilaterally shortens the contract term is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit unilateral shortening of service-contract terms.

fact_summary: 美容机构在合同中擅自将服务期限缩短 / A beauty institution unilaterally shortened the service period in the contract.
cn_claim: 单方缩短服务期限构成违约（民法典第543条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A service provider who unilaterally varies the contract terms is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit unilateral shortening of service-contract terms.

fact_summary: 某游乐园因摩天轮轿厢门未关好致游客被甩出坠亡 / A tourist fell to their death from a Ferris wheel when the cabin door opened mid-ride because it had not been properly closed.
cn_claim: 大型游乐设施运营使用单位应确保设备运行安全并对操作人员进行安全教育和培训（特种设备安全法第39条）。
us_claim: An amusement-park operator who fails to ensure ride restraints are properly secured is liable under the highest standard of care approaching that of a common carrier.
hk_claim: An occupier of an amusement park who fails to ensure ride-safety systems are properly engaged breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose the highest standard of care on amusement-ride operators.

fact_summary: 被告人因侵犯他人著作权复制发行盗版图书数量巨大被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for reproducing and distributing pirated books on a massive scale.
cn_claim: 以营利为目的未经著作权人许可复制发行其作品的违法所得数额巨大或有其他特别严重情节的构成侵犯著作权罪（刑法第217条第一款第一项）。
us_claim: Large-scale copyright piracy for commercial gain is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 2319 and the No Electronic Theft Act.
hk_claim: Commercial-scale copyright piracy is an offense under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize large-scale commercial copyright piracy.

fact_summary: 相亲网站以虚构的优质会员诱导消费者购买高价会员服务 / A matchmaking website used fictitious high-quality profiles to entice consumers into purchasing expensive membership services.
cn_claim: 经营者以虚假信息诱骗消费者消费的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: A dating platform that uses fabricated profiles to induce membership purchases commits fraud and violates the FTC Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit the use of fictitious profiles to induce service purchases.

fact_summary: 相亲网站以虚构的优质会员诱导消费者购买高价会员服务 / A matchmaking website used fictitious profiles to induce membership purchases.
cn_claim: 以虚假信息诱骗消费的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A dating platform that uses fake profiles to induce purchases commits fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit the use of fictitious profiles to induce service purchases.

fact_summary: 某超市因货架倒塌砸伤正在挑选商品的顾客 / A customer was injured by a collapsing shelf while selecting goods in a supermarket.
cn_claim: 经营者应确保营业场所设施安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A supermarket that fails to maintain shelving units in safe condition is liable for resulting injuries under premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain shelving safely breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require supermarkets to maintain shelf safety.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法持有毒品数量巨大被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for possessing an enormous quantity of illegal drugs.
cn_claim: 非法持有毒品数量大的构成非法持有毒品罪（刑法第348条）。
us_claim: Possession of a large quantity of controlled substances with intent to distribute is a felony under the Controlled Substances Act (21 U.S.C. § 841).
hk_claim: Possession of a large quantity of dangerous drugs with intent to traffic is a serious offense under the Dangerous Drugs Ordinance (Cap. 134).
notes: All three jurisdictions treat possession of large drug quantities as evidence of trafficking intent.

fact_summary: 洗车店在洗车过程中造成车辆划伤却以免责声明为由拒绝赔偿 / A car wash scratched a vehicle during service and refused to compensate, citing a liability disclaimer.
cn_claim: 经营者以格式条款免除自身责任的条款无效（民法典第497条第二项）。
us_claim: A car-wash operator's blanket disclaimer of liability for damage caused by its own negligence is generally void as against public policy.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US void blanket disclaimers that seek to exclude liability for a service provider's own negligence.

fact_summary: 洗车店造成车辆划伤却以免责声明为由拒绝赔偿 / A car wash scratched a vehicle and refused to compensate citing a disclaimer.
cn_claim: 以格式条款免除自身责任的条款无效（民法典第497条第二项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A blanket disclaimer of liability for a service provider's own negligence is generally unenforceable under the Control of Exemption Clauses Ordinance (Cap. 71).
notes: Both CN and HK void blanket disclaimers for a service provider's own negligence.

fact_summary: 某医院因输液瓶标签贴错致患者输入他人药物发生过敏性休克 / A patient suffered anaphylactic shock because the hospital mislabeled an IV bottle, administering another patient's medication.
cn_claim: 医务人员在诊疗活动中未尽到与当时医疗水平相应的诊疗义务造成患者损害的医疗机构应承担赔偿责任（民法典第1221条）。
us_claim: A hospital that administers the wrong medication due to labeling errors is liable for medical malpractice.
hk_claim: A hospital that dispenses the wrong medication due to labeling error breaches the duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions hold hospitals strictly liable for medication-labeling errors.

fact_summary: 被告人因伪造部队公文、证件并出售 / A defendant forged military documents and certificates and sold them.
cn_claim: 伪造、变造、买卖武装部队公文的构成伪造、变造、买卖武装部队公文、证件、印章罪（刑法第375条第一款）。
us_claim: Forging military identification or documents is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 499.
hk_claim: Forging official documents is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the forgery of military credentials.

fact_summary: 消费者购买新车后发现里程表被调过且实际行驶里程远超显示里程 / A consumer purchased a new car and discovered the odometer had been rolled back, with the actual mileage far exceeding the displayed reading.
cn_claim: 经营者将调表车作为准新车销售的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Odometer tampering violates the federal Truth in Mileage Act (49 U.S.C. § 32703) and constitutes fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide strong remedies for odometer tampering in vehicle sales.

fact_summary: 消费者购买新车后发现里程表被调过 / A consumer purchased a new car and discovered the odometer had been rolled back.
cn_claim: 将调表车作为准新车销售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A dealer who tampers with an odometer and sells the vehicle as low-mileage commits fraud and misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for odometer tampering in vehicle sales.

fact_summary: 某工厂因未按规定储存危险化学品导致泄漏污染周边农田 / A factory's improper storage of hazardous chemicals caused a leak that contaminated neighboring farmland.
cn_claim: 危险化学品的储存单位应按照国家标准储存危险化学品（危险化学品安全管理条例第24条第一款；民法典第1229条）。
us_claim: A facility that improperly stores hazardous substances and causes environmental contamination is strictly liable under CERCLA and the Resource Conservation and Recovery Act.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to store dangerous goods safely and causes environmental damage is liable in negligence and nuisance.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose strict storage requirements for hazardous chemicals.

fact_summary: 被告人因利用网络平台传播儿童色情视频 / A defendant distributed child-pornography videos through an online platform.
cn_claim: 利用网络传播淫秽物品的构成传播淫秽物品罪；涉及未成年人的从重处罚（刑法第363条、第364条）。
us_claim: Distribution of child pornography is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 2252A, carrying severe mandatory-minimum penalties.
hk_claim: Distribution of child pornography is a serious offense under the Prevention of Child Pornography Ordinance (Cap. 579).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose the most severe penalties for child-pornography distribution.

fact_summary: 贷款平台在消费者不知情的情况下为其购买了搭售保险 / A lending platform purchased bundled insurance for a consumer without their knowledge.
cn_claim: 经营者搭售商品或服务应以显著方式提醒消费者注意（电子商务法第19条）。
us_claim: A lender that adds insurance products without the consumer's informed consent violates the Truth in Lending Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require informed consent for bundled financial products.

fact_summary: 贷款平台在消费者不知情的情况下为其购买了搭售保险 / A lending platform purchased bundled insurance without the consumer's knowledge.
cn_claim: 搭售商品或服务应以显著方式提醒消费者（电子商务法第19条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A lender who adds insurance products without the consumer's informed consent may be engaged in misleading conduct.
notes: Both CN and HK require informed consent for bundled financial products.

fact_summary: 某驾校因教练车刹车失灵致学员在训练中撞伤路人 / A driving-school student hit a pedestrian during training because the training vehicle's brakes failed.
cn_claim: 驾校作为经营者应对学员在学习驾驶过程中造成的第三人损害承担赔偿责任（民法典第1191条第一款）。
us_claim: A driving school is vicariously liable for accidents caused by student drivers during instruction; the school also has an independent duty to maintain the training vehicle in safe condition.
hk_claim: A driving school is vicariously liable for negligence of student drivers and must maintain training vehicles in safe condition.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose vicarious liability and vehicle-maintenance duties on driving schools.

fact_summary: 被告人因买卖国家机关证件被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for buying and selling state-agency certificates.
cn_claim: 买卖国家机关证件的构成买卖国家机关证件罪（刑法第280条第一款）。
us_claim: Trafficking in government identification documents is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1028.
hk_claim: Trafficking in official documents is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the trafficking of official documents.

fact_summary: 消费者在二手平台上购买商品后发现商品描述与实际严重不符且平台拒绝担责 / A consumer purchased an item on a secondhand platform that was materially different from the description, and the platform refused to take responsibility.
cn_claim: 电子商务平台经营者知道或应当知道平台内经营者销售的商品不符合保障人身财产安全的要求或侵害消费者权益未采取必要措施的依法与该平台内经营者承担连带责任（电子商务法第38条第一款）。
us_claim: An online marketplace that fails to act on known misrepresentations by sellers may be liable for aiding and abetting fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US impose secondary liability on platforms that fail to act on known misrepresentations.

fact_summary: 消费者在二手平台上购买商品后发现商品描述与实际严重不符且平台拒绝担责 / A consumer purchased an item that was materially different from the description, and the platform refused to act.
cn_claim: 平台知道侵权未采取必要措施的承担连带责任（电子商务法第38条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A platform that fails to take down listings it knows are misleading may be liable.
notes: Both CN and HK impose liability on platforms that fail to act on known misrepresentations.

fact_summary: 某诊所因未按规范消毒口腔器械致多名患者感染乙肝 / Multiple patients contracted Hepatitis B at a dental clinic because dental instruments were not properly sterilized.
cn_claim: 医疗机构应严格执行消毒隔离制度（医院感染管理办法第13条）；未按规范消毒致患者感染的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: A dental clinic that fails to sterilize instruments in accordance with CDC guidelines is liable for resulting infections under medical-malpractice theories.
hk_claim: A dental clinic that fails to sterilize instruments properly is liable for resulting infections under negligence principles.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose strict sterilization duties on dental clinics.

fact_summary: 被告人因经营地下六合彩接受投注获利巨大 / A defendant profited enormously by operating an underground lottery and accepting wagers.
cn_claim: 未经国家批准擅自发行、销售彩票的构成非法经营罪（刑法第225条第四项）。
us_claim: Operating an illegal lottery is a crime under state law and may violate the federal Wire Act.
hk_claim: Operating an unauthorized lottery is an offense under the Gambling Ordinance (Cap. 148).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unauthorized lottery operations.

fact_summary: 长租公寓因经营不善倒闭但房东已将房屋收回，租客无处可住 / After a long-term-rental company went bankrupt, the landlord reclaimed the property and the tenant was left homeless.
cn_claim: 承租人有权对抗受让租赁物所有权的第三人（民法典第725条买卖不破租赁原则）。
us_claim: A tenant's lease survives the sale of the property or the bankruptcy of an intermediary leasing company; the tenant retains possessory rights under state landlord-tenant law.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US protect the tenant's possessory rights when an intermediary leasing company fails.

fact_summary: 长租公寓倒闭后房东收回房屋，租客无处可住 / After a rental company failed, the landlord reclaimed the property leaving the tenant homeless.
cn_claim: 承租人有权对抗受让租赁物所有权的第三人（民法典第725条买卖不破租赁原则）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A tenant's rights under a lease may be protected against a landlord who has permitted the tenant into possession even if the intermediary fails.
notes: Both CN and HK protect the tenant's possessory rights when an intermediary leasing company fails.

fact_summary: 某景区因缆车年久失修停运时致游客被困高空数小时 / Tourists were trapped in a cable car at high altitude for hours because the aged system had not been properly maintained and broke down.
cn_claim: 景区经营者应确保客运索道等特种设备安全运行并定期检验（特种设备安全法第39条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A ski-resort or scenic-area operator who fails to maintain cable-car systems in safe condition is liable for the distress and any injuries caused by entrapment.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain cable-car systems properly breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require cable-car operators to maintain systems in safe operating condition.

fact_summary: 被告人因盗掘古文化遗址被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for excavating an ancient cultural site.
cn_claim: 盗掘具有历史、艺术、科学价值的古文化遗址的构成盗掘古文化遗址罪（刑法第328条第一款第一项）。
us_claim: Unauthorized excavation of archaeological sites on federal or tribal lands is a crime under the Archaeological Resources Protection Act (16 U.S.C. § 470ee).
hk_claim: Unauthorized excavation of archaeological sites is an offense under the Antiquities and Monuments Ordinance (Cap. 53).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unauthorized excavation of cultural-heritage sites.

fact_summary: 消费者通过外卖平台购买食品后发现食品中有头发 / A consumer discovered a strand of hair in food purchased through a food-delivery platform.
cn_claim: 生产经营污秽不洁食品的消费者可主张价款十倍或损失三倍的赔偿金（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: A restaurant that serves food contaminated with foreign objects is strictly liable under products-liability and implied-warranty theories.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold food sellers strictly liable for contaminated food products.

fact_summary: 消费者通过外卖平台购买食品后发现食品中有头发 / A consumer discovered a hair in food purchased through a delivery platform.
cn_claim: 生产经营污秽不洁食品的消费者可主张价款十倍赔偿金（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling food containing foreign matter is an offense under the Food Safety Ordinance (Cap. 612).
notes: Both CN and HK hold food sellers liable for contaminated food products.

fact_summary: 某地下车库因排水泵故障暴雨时被淹致多辆车受损 / Multiple vehicles in an underground garage were damaged by flooding because the drainage pump had failed during a rainstorm.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应对共用设施设备进行维修养护（民法典第942条第一款）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to maintain stormwater-pump systems in working order is liable for flood damage.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain drainage systems for foreseeable flooding breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require property managers to maintain flood-protection systems.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法获取内幕信息并指使他人进行证券交易 / A defendant illegally obtained inside information and directed another person to trade securities based on it.
cn_claim: 非法获取证券交易内幕信息的人员在内幕信息敏感期内从事或明示、暗示他人从事相关证券交易的构成内幕交易罪（刑法第180条第一款）。
us_claim: Trading on material nonpublic information or tipping others violates Section 10(b) of the Securities Exchange Act and Rule 10b-5; Dirks v. SEC, 463 U.S. 646 (1983).
hk_claim: Insider dealing, including tipping, is an offense under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) s.270.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize insider trading and tipping.

fact_summary: 美容院在未告知消费者的情况下将其预付款会员资格转让给另一机构 / A beauty salon transferred a consumer's prepaid membership to another institution without the consumer's knowledge.
cn_claim: 债务人将债务的全部或部分转移给第三人的应当经债权人同意（民法典第551条第一款）。
us_claim: A service provider who assigns a membership contract to another entity without the consumer's consent is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require consumer consent for assignment of prepaid-service contracts.

fact_summary: 美容院在未告知消费者的情况下将其预付款会员资格转让给另一机构 / A beauty salon transferred a consumer's prepaid membership without the consumer's knowledge.
cn_claim: 债务转移应经债权人同意（民法典第551条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A service provider who assigns a consumer contract without consent is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK require consumer consent for assignment of prepaid-service contracts.

fact_summary: 某市区因道路施工后未及时回填致夜间骑车人坠坑受伤 / A cyclist was injured falling into an unmarked and unfilled road-construction trench at night.
cn_claim: 在公共场所或道路上挖掘、修缮安装地下设施等造成他人损害的施工单位不能证明已经设置明显标志和采取安全措施的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1258条第一款）。
us_claim: A construction contractor who fails to barricade and warn of an open excavation is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: A contractor who fails to safeguard an open excavation breaches the common duty of care and may be liable under the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314).
notes: All three jurisdictions require contractors to safeguard open excavations.

fact_summary: 被告人因购买假币并使用被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for purchasing counterfeit currency and using it.
cn_claim: 出售、购买伪造的货币或明知是伪造的货币而运输的构成出售、购买、运输假币罪（刑法第171条第一款）。
us_claim: Passing counterfeit currency is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 472.
hk_claim: Passing counterfeit currency is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the purchase and use of counterfeit currency.

fact_summary: 消费者邮寄价值5万元的物品未保价，快递丢失后快递公司仅愿赔付运费的7倍 / A consumer shipped an item worth $50,000 without declaring its value; after the courier lost it, the company offered only seven times the shipping fee.
cn_claim: 未保价快件丢失的快递公司应按照民事法律的有关规定确定赔偿责任（快递暂行条例第27条）；七倍运费明显过低的消费者可主张实际损失。
us_claim: Under the Carmack Amendment, a carrier's liability for undeclared-value shipments is capped at the released rate, provided the shipper was offered and declined full-value coverage.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US limit carrier liability for undeclared-value shipments but require the shipper to have been offered the option of full-value coverage.

fact_summary: 未保价的贵重物品丢失后快递公司仅愿赔付运费的7倍 / An undeclared valuable item was lost and the courier offered only seven times the shipping fee.
cn_claim: 七倍运费明显过低的消费者可主张实际损失（快递暂行条例第27条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A carrier's limitation of liability for an undeclared shipment may be effective only if the shipper was given the option to declare a higher value.
notes: Both CN and HK limit carrier liability for undeclared-value shipments subject to disclosure requirements.

fact_summary: 某游船因未配备足够救生衣致翻船时多名游客溺亡 / Multiple tourists drowned when a tour boat capsized because it did not carry enough life jackets.
cn_claim: 船舶经营者应按照核定载客人数配备足够数量的救生设备（内河交通安全管理条例第21条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A tour-boat operator who fails to carry required safety equipment is liable for resulting deaths under negligence and maritime-law theories.
hk_claim: A boat operator who fails to carry adequate safety equipment is liable for resulting casualties.
notes: All three jurisdictions require boat operators to carry adequate life-saving equipment.

fact_summary: 被告人因隐瞒境外存款被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for concealing overseas bank deposits.
cn_claim: 国家工作人员在境外的存款应当依照国家规定申报；数额较大、隐瞒不报的构成隐瞒境外存款罪（刑法第395条第二款）。
us_claim: Willful failure to report foreign financial accounts is a crime under the Bank Secrecy Act (31 U.S.C. § 5322).
hk_claim: Hong Kong does not impose a general requirement to report foreign accounts for tax purposes.
notes: CN and US criminalize concealment of foreign accounts, while HK does not, creating a reporting asymmetry.

fact_summary: 租客在租房期间因未按时交租金被房东断电 / A tenant had their electricity cut off by the landlord for late payment of rent.
cn_claim: 出租人以断水断电方式催缴租金的属于侵权行为承租人可请求赔偿损失（民法典第1165条）。
us_claim: A landlord who cuts off utilities to evict a tenant commits a constructive eviction, which is illegal in most jurisdictions.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit landlords from cutting off utilities as a means of eviction.

fact_summary: 租客因未按时交租金被房东断电 / A tenant had their electricity cut off by the landlord for late rent payment.
cn_claim: 以断水断电方式催缴租金的属于侵权行为（民法典第1165条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A landlord who cuts off utilities to force a tenant out commits a breach of the covenant for quiet enjoyment.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit landlords from cutting off utilities as a means of eviction.

fact_summary: 某学校因食堂未安装防蝇设施致多名学生腹泻 / Multiple students suffered diarrhea because the school canteen lacked fly-proof facilities.
cn_claim: 学校食堂应具有防蝇防鼠等设施（学校食品安全与营养健康管理规定第23条；食品安全法第57条第一款）。
us_claim: A school that fails to maintain adequate pest-control in food-service areas is liable for resulting illnesses.
hk_claim: A school that fails to maintain hygienic food-preparation facilities is liable for resulting illness.
notes: All three jurisdictions require school canteens to maintain pest-control measures.

fact_summary: 被告人因盗窃尸体被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for stealing a corpse.
cn_claim: 盗窃尸体的构成盗窃尸体罪（刑法第302条）。
us_claim: Stealing or desecrating human remains is a crime under state law.
hk_claim: Unlawful interference with human remains is an offense under the Public Health and Municipal Services Ordinance (Cap. 132).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the theft of human remains.

fact_summary: 消费者购买实木家具后发现为贴皮假冒 / A consumer purchased solid-wood furniture and later discovered it was a veneer-covered imitation.
cn_claim: 经营者将贴皮家具作为实木家具销售的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling veneered furniture as solid wood constitutes fraud and violates the FTC Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for misrepresentation of furniture materials.

fact_summary: 消费者购买实木家具后发现为贴皮假冒 / A consumer purchased solid-wood furniture and discovered it was veneer-covered.
cn_claim: 将贴皮家具作为实木家具销售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling imitation furniture as solid wood constitutes fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for misrepresentation of furniture materials.

fact_summary: 某商场因玻璃门无警示标识致顾客撞上受伤 / A customer walked into a clear glass door at a shopping mall and was injured because there was no warning marking.
cn_claim: 经营者应对场所内的透明玻璃门设置明显的警示标识（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A commercial occupier who fails to mark clear glass doors is liable for resulting injuries under premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to warn of transparent barriers breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require commercial occupiers to mark transparent glass doors.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法侵入他人住宅并安装窃听设备被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for illegally entering another's home and installing listening devices.
cn_claim: 非法侵入他人住宅的构成非法侵入住宅罪（刑法第245条第一款）；安装窃听设备的还构成非法使用窃听专用器材罪（刑法第284条）。
us_claim: Burglary combined with electronic surveillance is a serious offense under state law; federal wiretapping charges under 18 U.S.C. § 2511 may also apply.
hk_claim: Entering as a trespasser and installing a listening device constitutes burglary under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210) and an offense under the Telecommunications Ordinance (Cap. 106).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize home invasion combined with unauthorized surveillance.

fact_summary: 消费者购车后发现合格证被4S店抵押给银行无法上牌 / A consumer discovered the car's certificate of conformity had been pledged by the dealership to a bank, preventing vehicle registration.
cn_claim: 出卖人就交付的标的物负有保证第三人不对该标的物享有任何权利的义务（民法典第612条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a vehicle without providing clear title breaches the warranty of title under the Uniform Commercial Code § 2-312.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require car dealers to deliver clear title.

fact_summary: 消费者购车后发现合格证被4S店抵押给银行无法上牌 / A consumer could not register a car because the certificate had been pledged to a bank.
cn_claim: 出卖人应保证第三人不对标的物享有权利（民法典第612条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A dealer who sells a vehicle without delivering clear title is in breach of contract and the implied condition that the seller has the right to sell.
notes: Both CN and HK require car dealers to deliver clear title.

fact_summary: 某小区因井盖缺失未及时补装致儿童坠入受伤 / A child fell into an open manhole in a residential compound and was injured because the missing cover had not been replaced.
cn_claim: 窨井等地下设施造成他人损害的管理人不能证明尽到管理职责的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1258条第二款）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to promptly replace a missing manhole cover is liable for resulting injuries under negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to cover or guard an open manhole breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require property managers to promptly cover manhole hazards.

fact_summary: 被告人因伪造他人签名冒领他人存款被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for forging another's signature to fraudulently withdraw their bank deposit.
cn_claim: 伪造他人签名冒领存款的构成诈骗罪（刑法第266条）及伪造金融票证罪（刑法第177条）。
us_claim: Forging a signature to withdraw funds from another's account constitutes bank fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1344.
hk_claim: Forging a signature to withdraw another's money is theft and forgery.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize signature forgery to withdraw bank deposits.

fact_summary: 消费者在平台购买课程后发现实际授课老师与宣传不符 / A consumer purchased a course on a platform and discovered the actual instructor was different from the one advertised.
cn_claim: 教育培训机构以虚假师资宣传诱导消费者报名的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: An education platform that substitutes advertised instructors without disclosure commits fraud and misrepresentation.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for instructor-substitution in educational services.

fact_summary: 消费者购买课程后发现实际授课老师与宣传不符 / A consumer purchased a course and discovered the actual instructor was different.
cn_claim: 以虚假师资宣传诱导报名的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An education provider who advertises a specific instructor and substitutes another without disclosure commits misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for instructor-substitution in educational services.

fact_summary: 某加油站因加油过程中油枪未自动跳枪致汽油溢出引发火灾 / A gas-station fire erupted because the fuel nozzle failed to auto-shutoff, causing gasoline to overflow.
cn_claim: 加油站应确保加油设备安全运行（危险化学品安全管理条例第20条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A gas station that fails to maintain automatic-shutoff nozzles is liable for resulting fires under negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier of a filling station who fails to maintain fuel-dispenser safety devices breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require filling stations to maintain fuel-nozzle safety devices.

fact_summary: 被告人因大量伪造信用卡并使用 / A defendant forged credit cards in bulk and used them.
cn_claim: 伪造信用卡的构成伪造金融票证罪（刑法第177条第一款）；使用伪造信用卡的构成信用卡诈骗罪（刑法第196条第一款）。
us_claim: Counterfeiting credit cards and using them is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1029.
hk_claim: Forging credit cards and using them is theft and forgery under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210) and the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the counterfeiting and fraudulent use of credit cards.

fact_summary: 健身私教课因教练离职无法继续，健身房拒绝退费 / After a personal trainer left the gym, the gym refused to refund prepaid personal-training sessions.
cn_claim: 因经营者原因导致无法继续提供服务的消费者有权要求退回预付款（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: A gym that fails to provide contracted personal-training services because the trainer left is in breach and must refund prepaid sessions.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require gyms to refund prepaid training sessions when the trainer is no longer available.

fact_summary: 健身私教课因教练离职无法继续，健身房拒绝退费 / After a personal trainer left, the gym refused to refund prepaid sessions.
cn_claim: 经营者原因导致无法继续服务的消费者有权要求退回预付款（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A gym that fails to provide the contracted trainer is in breach of contract and must refund.
notes: Both CN and HK require gyms to refund prepaid training sessions when the trainer is no longer available.

fact_summary: 某商场因未设儿童扶手致幼童从扶梯坠落 / A toddler fell from an escalator in a shopping mall because no child-safety handrail had been installed.
cn_claim: 经营者应在自动扶梯设置必要的安全防护措施（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A shopping-mall operator who fails to provide child-safety features on escalators is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to provide adequate escalator safety features breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require commercial occupiers to maintain escalator child-safety features.

fact_summary: 被告人因犯集资诈骗罪涉案金额特别巨大被判处无期徒刑 / A defendant was sentenced to life imprisonment for fund-raising fraud involving an extraordinarily large sum.
cn_claim: 以非法占有为目的使用诈骗方法非法集资数额特别巨大或有其他特别严重情节的处十年以上有期徒刑或无期（刑法第192条第二款）。
us_claim: Large-scale securities or wire fraud may result in lengthy imprisonment; federal sentencing guidelines provide for substantial upward adjustments for high loss amounts.
hk_claim: Large-scale fraud may attract substantial terms of imprisonment.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for massive fund-raising fraud.

fact_summary: 共享单车企业因经营不善倒闭，用户无法退还押金 / A bike-sharing company went bankrupt, and users could not recover their deposits.
cn_claim: 经营者以预收款方式提供服务的未按约定提供的应退回预付款（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: Users who prepaid or paid deposits to a now-defunct bike-share company are general unsecured creditors in bankruptcy proceedings.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide limited remedies for consumers when prepaid-service companies fail.

fact_summary: 共享单车企业倒闭后用户无法退还押金 / A bike-sharing company went bankrupt and users could not recover deposits.
cn_claim: 未按约定提供服务的应退回预付款（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Consumers who paid deposits to a defunct company may file proofs of debt in winding-up proceedings.
notes: Both CN and HK provide limited remedies for consumers when prepaid-service companies fail.

fact_summary: 某医院因氧气管道接口老化漏气导致病房火灾 / A hospital-ward fire erupted because an aging oxygen-pipe connection leaked.
cn_claim: 医疗机构应对其设施设备进行定期维护（医疗机构管理条例实施细则第65条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A hospital that fails to maintain medical-gas systems is liable under negligence and premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier of a hospital who fails to maintain oxygen systems safely breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require hospitals to maintain medical-gas systems.

fact_summary: 被告人因绑架人质后杀害被绑架人 / A defendant killed the hostage after kidnapping them.
cn_claim: 杀害被绑架人的处无期徒刑或死刑（刑法第239条第二款）。
us_claim: Kidnapping resulting in death is first-degree murder under state law and carries the death penalty or life imprisonment in applicable states.
hk_claim: Murder committed in the course of kidnapping is a capital offense attracting a mandatory life sentence.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat kidnapping-murder with utmost severity.

fact_summary: 消费者在装修过程中被要求加收合同未约定的管理费 / A consumer was charged an unlisted management fee during a renovation project.
cn_claim: 经营者不得在约定费用之外收取未予标明的费用（价格法第13条第二款）。
us_claim: A contractor who demands undisclosed fees mid-project is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit undisclosed mid-project fees in renovation contracts.

fact_summary: 消费者在装修过程中被要求加收合同未约定的管理费 / A consumer was charged an unlisted management fee during renovation.
cn_claim: 不得在约定费用之外收取未予标明的费用（价格法第13条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A contractor who demands undisclosed additional fees is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit undisclosed mid-project fees in renovation contracts.

fact_summary: 某市因路灯配电箱漏电致路人触电身亡 / A passerby was electrocuted by a leaking streetlight distribution box in the city.
cn_claim: 城市照明设施的管护单位应对照明设施进行维护管理（城市照明管理规定第24条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A municipality that fails to maintain streetlight electrical systems is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: A public authority that fails to maintain street infrastructure safely is liable for negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose maintenance duties on streetlight operators.

fact_summary: 被告人因走私珍贵动物制品被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for smuggling products made from rare animals.
cn_claim: 走私国家禁止进出口的珍贵动物及其制品的构成走私珍贵动物、珍贵动物制品罪（刑法第151条第二款）。
us_claim: Smuggling products made from endangered species violates the Endangered Species Act and the Lacey Act.
hk_claim: Importing or exporting endangered-species products without a license is an offense under the Protection of Endangered Species of Animals and Plants Ordinance (Cap. 586).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the smuggling of endangered-species products.

fact_summary: 婚介平台以虚假的优质会员资料诱导消费者签订高价合同 / A matchmaking platform used fake high-quality member profiles to induce consumers to sign expensive contracts.
cn_claim: 经营者以虚假信息诱骗消费者签订合同的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: A matchmaking service that uses fabricated profiles to induce contract signing commits fraud and violates the FTC Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit the use of fabricated profiles to induce service contracts.

fact_summary: 婚介平台以虚假的优质会员资料诱导消费者签订高价合同 / A matchmaking platform used fake profiles to induce signing of expensive contracts.
cn_claim: 以虚假信息诱骗签订合同的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A matchmaking service that uses fake profiles to induce contract signing commits fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit the use of fabricated profiles to induce service contracts.

fact_summary: 某影城因放映厅内疏散指示灯损坏致散场时发生踩踏 / A stampede occurred during exit from a cinema screening room because the emergency-exit indicator lights were broken.
cn_claim: 电影院等人员密集场所应确保消防应急照明和疏散指示标志完好有效（消防法第16条第一款第二项）。
us_claim: A cinema operator who fails to maintain emergency-exit lighting is liable for resulting injuries under premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain emergency-exit signage and lighting breaches fire-safety obligations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require cinemas to maintain functional emergency-exit lighting.

fact_summary: 被告人因违反危险化学品管理规定发生重大事故被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for causing a major accident by violating hazardous-chemical management regulations.
cn_claim: 违反爆炸性、易燃性、放射性、毒害性、腐蚀性物品的管理规定在生产、储存、运输、使用中发生重大事故造成严重后果的构成危险物品肇事罪（刑法第136条）。
us_claim: A person who violates hazardous-material regulations causing a major accident may be prosecuted under the Hazardous Materials Transportation Act and state criminal laws.
hk_claim: Violating dangerous-goods regulations and causing a major accident is an offense under the Dangerous Goods Ordinance (Cap. 295).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize hazardous-material violations causing major accidents.

fact_summary: 消费者购买房屋后发现开发商擅自将公共绿地改为停车场 / A homebuyer discovered the developer had converted the public green space into a parking lot without authorization.
cn_claim: 开发商擅自改变规划用途的买受人可主张违约责任（民法典第577条；商品房买卖合同司法解释第3条）。
us_claim: A developer who converts promised green space into parking breaches the purchase contract and may violate local zoning laws.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
