notes: Both CN and US hold developers liable for unauthorized changes to community amenities.

fact_summary: 开发商擅自将公共绿地改为停车场 / A developer converted public green space into parking without authorization.
cn_claim: 擅自改变规划用途的买受人可主张违约责任（民法典第577条；商品房买卖合同司法解释第3条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A developer who converts promised amenities without consent is in breach of the sale-and-purchase agreement.
notes: Both CN and HK hold developers liable for unauthorized changes to community amenities.

fact_summary: 某工厂因除尘设备故障致粉尘泄漏引发爆炸多人工亡 / Multiple workers died in a dust explosion at a factory because the dust-collection system had failed.
cn_claim: 存在粉尘爆炸危险的企业应确保除尘系统安全运行（安全生产法第36条第一款；粉尘防爆安全规程）。
us_claim: A factory operator who fails to maintain dust-collection systems in explosive-dust environments violates OSHA standards and is strictly liable for resulting deaths.
hk_claim: A factory occupier who fails to maintain dust-control systems in hazardous areas breaches safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require factories to maintain dust-collection systems in explosive-dust environments.

fact_summary: 被告人因故意传播艾滋病被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for intentionally transmitting HIV.
cn_claim: 明知自己患有艾滋病而故意传播的以故意伤害罪或传播性病罪定罪处罚（刑法第234条、第360条；关于办理组织、强迫、引诱、容留、介绍卖淫刑事案件适用法律若干问题的解释第12条）。
us_claim: Intentionally transmitting HIV is a crime under state HIV-specific statutes or general assault statutes.
hk_claim: Intentionally transmitting HIV may constitute inflicting grievous bodily harm under the Offences Against the Person Ordinance (Cap. 212).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize intentional HIV transmission.

fact_summary: 消费者因航班延误超过8小时要求赔偿被航空公司以天气原因拒绝 / A consumer sought compensation for a flight delay exceeding eight hours, but the airline refused, citing weather conditions.
cn_claim: 航班延误超过4小时的航空公司应提供餐食和住宿；因不可抗力造成延误的可免除赔偿责任但应协助旅客安排后续事宜（航班正常管理规定第29条）。
us_claim: Airlines are not required to compensate passengers for weather-related delays under U.S. regulations, though they must provide care.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US do not require monetary compensation for weather-related delays but require care.

fact_summary: 航班延误超过8小时被航空公司以天气原因拒绝赔偿 / An airline refused compensation for an 8-hour delay citing weather.
cn_claim: 因不可抗力造成延误的可免除赔偿责任（航班正常管理规定第29条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Airlines may be excused from delay compensation for weather-related events.
notes: Both CN and HK do not require monetary compensation for weather-related delays.

fact_summary: 某小区因自来水管爆裂停水三天未修复致高层住户生活受严重影响 / Residents of upper floors in a residential compound suffered severe disruption because a burst water main went unrepaired for three days.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应及时维修共用设施设备（民法典第942条第一款）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to promptly repair a broken water main is liable for negligence and breach of the warranty of habitability.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to promptly repair water-supply systems breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require prompt repair of water-supply infrastructure.

fact_summary: 被告人因组织、利用会道门、邪教组织破坏法律实施被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for organizing and using a cult to undermine law enforcement.
cn_claim: 组织和利用会道门、邪教组织破坏国家法律实施的构成组织、利用会道门、邪教组织破坏法律实施罪（刑法第300条第一款）。
us_claim: Organizations that engage in criminal conduct may be prosecuted under RICO (18 U.S.C. § 1962) if they constitute an enterprise engaged in a pattern of racketeering activity.
hk_claim: Organizations that engage in criminal activity may be subject to prosecution under the Societies Ordinance (Cap. 151) and the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions provide mechanisms to prosecute organizations engaged in systematic criminal conduct, though the legal frameworks differ.

fact_summary: 消费者购买宠物猫后发现其患有猫瘟且在购买时已处于潜伏期 / A consumer purchased a kitten and discovered it had feline distemper that was already in the incubation period at the time of purchase.
cn_claim: 出卖人应对标的物承担瑕疵担保责任（民法典第617条）；出售患病宠物的消费者可要求退款并赔偿治疗费用。
us_claim: A pet seller who fails to disclose known illnesses in an animal commits fraud; many states have pet-lemon laws that provide specific consumer remedies.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide consumer remedies for the sale of diseased pets.

fact_summary: 消费者购买宠物猫后发现其患有猫瘟且在购买时已处于潜伏期 / A consumer purchased a kitten that had feline distemper in the incubation period at purchase.
cn_claim: 出售患病宠物的消费者可要求退款并赔偿（民法典第617条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A seller who supplies an animal with an undisclosed illness is liable for breach of contract and misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide consumer remedies for the sale of diseased pets.

fact_summary: 某健身房因未对跑步机进行定期检修致会员使用时摔倒骨折 / A gym member fell and fractured a bone when a treadmill malfunctioned because it had not been regularly serviced.
cn_claim: 健身服务经营者应确保健身器材安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A fitness facility that fails to maintain equipment in safe working order is liable under negligence and premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier of a gym who fails to maintain equipment safely breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require fitness facilities to maintain equipment safety.

fact_summary: 被告人因伪造、变造股票并出售 / A defendant forged and altered stock certificates and sold them.
cn_claim: 伪造、变造股票或公司、企业债券的构成伪造、变造股票、公司、企业债券罪（刑法第178条第二款）。
us_claim: Forging securities is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 513 (securities of the States and private entities) and § 514 (fictitious obligations).
hk_claim: Forging securities is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the forgery of stock certificates.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买黄金饰品后检测发现含金量远低于宣称 / A consumer tested gold jewelry purchased through a livestream and found the gold content was far below the advertised purity.
cn_claim: 经营者以低纯度黄金冒充高纯度销售的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling jewelry with misrepresented gold content constitutes fraud and violates the FTC Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for misrepresented gold purity.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买黄金饰品后检测发现含金量远低于宣称 / A consumer tested gold jewelry and found purity far below the advertised level.
cn_claim: 以低纯度黄金冒充高纯度销售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling jewelry with misrepresented gold purity constitutes fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for misrepresented gold purity.

fact_summary: 某公交车因未关好车门行驶致乘客被抛出车外摔伤 / A bus passenger was thrown from the vehicle and injured because the door was not properly closed while in motion.
cn_claim: 公交公司作为承运人应确保乘客在运输过程中的安全（民法典第823条）。
us_claim: A common carrier is liable for injuries to passengers resulting from its failure to maintain safe operating procedures including door safety.
hk_claim: A bus operator owes a high duty of care to passengers and must ensure doors are secured before moving.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose a high duty of care on bus operators for passenger safety.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法持有宣扬恐怖主义的物品被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for possessing materials that promote terrorism.
cn_claim: 非法持有宣扬恐怖主义、极端主义的物品情节严重的构成非法持有宣扬恐怖主义、极端主义物品罪（刑法第120条之六）。
us_claim: Possessing materials that promote terrorism may constitute providing material support to terrorism under 18 U.S.C. § 2339A or § 2339B.
hk_claim: Possession of terrorist publications is an offense under the United Nations (Anti-Terrorism Measures) Ordinance (Cap. 575).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize possession of terrorist-propaganda materials.

fact_summary: 中介公司在房屋租赁合同中约定租客提前退租需支付三个月租金作为违约金 / An agency's lease contract required a tenant who vacated early to pay liquidated damages equal to three months' rent.
cn_claim: 约定的违约金过分高于造成的损失的当事人可请求法院或仲裁机构适当减少（民法典第585条第二款）。
us_claim: A liquidated-damages clause that is punitive rather than a reasonable forecast of harm is unenforceable as a penalty under the Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 356.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US restrict excessive liquidated-damages clauses in residential leases.

fact_summary: 中介公司约定租客提前退租需支付三个月租金作为违约金 / An agency required three months' rent as liquidated damages for early move-out.
cn_claim: 约定的违约金过分高于损失的当事人可请求减少（民法典第585条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A liquidated-damages clause that is extravagant and unconscionable may be void as a penalty.
notes: Both CN and HK restrict excessive liquidated-damages clauses.

fact_summary: 某火锅店因排烟管道未清理积油引发火灾 / A fire erupted in a hot-pot restaurant because the exhaust duct had not been cleaned of accumulated grease.
cn_claim: 餐饮经营者应定期清理排油烟设施确保消防安全（消防法第16条第一款第五项）。
us_claim: A restaurant operator who fails to clean kitchen-exhaust ducts is liable for resulting fires under negligence and fire-code violation theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain kitchen exhaust systems safely breaches fire-safety obligations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require restaurants to clean kitchen exhaust ducts.

fact_summary: 被告人因剽窃他人学术成果并多次发表在核心期刊骗取科研经费 / A defendant plagiarized others' academic work and published repeatedly in core journals to fraudulently obtain research funding.
cn_claim: 以剽窃方式获取科研经费的构成诈骗罪（刑法第266条）并应承担侵犯著作权的民事责任（著作权法第52条）。
us_claim: Obtaining federal research grants through plagiarism constitutes fraud under the False Claims Act (31 U.S.C. § 3729).
hk_claim: Obtaining research funding through fraudulent means including plagiarism may constitute fraud and conspiracy to defraud.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat fraudulent research-funding acquisition through plagiarism as criminal conduct.

fact_summary: 长租公寓以低价诱导租客签一年合同后第三个月就大幅涨租 / A long-term-rental company induced a tenant to sign a one-year lease at a low price, then sharply increased the rent in the third month.
cn_claim: 出租人单方增加租金的承租人可拒绝支付并要求按原约定履行（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: A landlord who attempts to increase rent mid-lease in violation of the lease terms is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit mid-lease rent increases in violation of the lease terms.

fact_summary: 长租公寓以低价诱导签一年合同后第三个月就大幅涨租 / A rental company induced a one-year lease at a low price then sharply increased rent in the third month.
cn_claim: 单方增加租金的承租人可拒绝并按原约定履行（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A landlord who attempts to increase rent during a fixed term in violation of the lease is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit mid-lease rent increases in violation of the lease terms.

fact_summary: 某公园因湖上栈道木板腐朽未更换致游客踩空落水受伤 / A tourist was injured falling through a rotten board on a lakeside walkway at a park because the plank had not been replaced.
cn_claim: 公共场所的管理人应确保通道和设施安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A park operator who fails to maintain walkway surfaces in safe condition is liable under premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to repair deteriorated walkway surfaces breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require park operators to maintain walkway surfaces.

fact_summary: 被告人因拒服兵役并逃匿被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for refusing military service and going into hiding.
cn_claim: 公民拒绝、逃避服兵役情节严重的构成拒绝、逃避服兵役罪（兵役法第66条）。
us_claim: Willful failure to register for or report for military service is a crime under the Military Selective Service Act (50 U.S.C. § 3811).
hk_claim: Hong Kong does not have compulsory military service.
notes: CN and US criminalize draft evasion, while HK has no compulsory military service.

fact_summary: 消费者购买预售房后开发商擅自将阳台改为封闭式且额外收取封窗费 / After purchasing a pre-sale apartment, the consumer was charged an additional fee because the developer enclosed the balcony without authorization.
cn_claim: 开发商擅自变更规划设计的买受人可主张违约责任（民法典第577条；商品房买卖合同司法解释第3条）。
us_claim: A developer who makes unauthorized changes and demands additional payment is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold developers liable for unauthorized changes and additional charges.

fact_summary: 开发商擅自将阳台改为封闭式且额外收取封窗费 / A developer enclosed the balcony without authorization and charged an extra fee.
cn_claim: 擅自变更设计规划的买受人可主张违约责任（民法典第577条；商品房买卖合同司法解释第3条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A developer who varies the specifications without consent and demands additional payment is in breach of the sale-and-purchase agreement.
notes: Both CN and HK hold developers liable for unauthorized variations and additional charges.

fact_summary: 某地铁站因安检机故障致乘客行李被卡住后强行拉扯导致物品损坏 / A passenger's luggage was damaged when it became trapped in a malfunctioning security scanner at a subway station and was forcibly pulled out.
cn_claim: 地铁运营单位应确保安检设备正常运行并对因其故障造成的乘客财产损失承担赔偿责任（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A transit authority that fails to maintain security equipment is liable for resulting property damage under negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain equipment safely is liable for resulting damage.
notes: All three jurisdictions require transit operators to maintain security equipment.

fact_summary: 被告人因暴力袭警致民警重伤被判处重刑 / A defendant was sentenced to a heavy penalty for violently assaulting a police officer, causing serious injury.
cn_claim: 暴力袭击正在依法执行职务的人民警察的以妨害公务罪从重处罚；致人重伤的构成故意伤害罪从重处罚（刑法第277条第五款、第234条第二款）。
us_claim: Assaulting a federal officer resulting in serious bodily injury carries severe penalties under 18 U.S.C. § 111(b).
hk_claim: Assaulting a police officer causing grievous bodily harm is a serious offense under the Police Force Ordinance (Cap. 232) and the Offences Against the Person Ordinance (Cap. 212).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose extremely severe penalties for assaulting officers causing serious injury.

fact_summary: 共享充电宝企业用户归还充电宝后系统未识别仍持续计费 / A power-bank-sharing company continued to charge a user after the power bank had been returned because the system failed to register the return.
cn_claim: 经营者以系统错误为由持续扣费的消费者可要求退款并赔偿（消费者权益保护法第8条第一款）。
us_claim: A service that continues to charge after the device has been returned is in breach of contract and liable for unauthorized charges.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for post-return charges from equipment-sharing services.

fact_summary: 共享充电宝归还后系统未识别仍持续计费 / A power-bank-sharing company continued to charge after the device was returned.
cn_claim: 持续扣费的消费者可要求退款并赔偿（消费者权益保护法第8条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A service provider who continues to charge after the service has ended is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for post-return charges.

fact_summary: 某小区因配电房未设防鼠措施致老鼠咬坏电缆引发火灾 / A fire erupted in a residential compound's distribution room because rats chewed through cables where no rodent-proofing had been installed.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应确保共用设施设备安全运行并应设置必要的防护措施（民法典第942条第一款）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to rodent-proof electrical rooms is liable for resulting fires under negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to take reasonable precautions against foreseeable rodent damage breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require property managers to take rodent-proofing measures in electrical rooms.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法经营外汇构成非法经营罪 / A defendant was convicted of illegal business operations for conducting unauthorized foreign-exchange trading.
cn_claim: 在国家规定的交易场所以外非法买卖外汇扰乱市场秩序情节严重的构成非法经营罪（刑法第225条第四项）。
us_claim: Operating an unlicensed money-transmission business is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1960.
hk_claim: Operating an unlicensed money-service business is an offense under the Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing Ordinance (Cap. 615).
notes: All three jurisdictions require licensing for foreign-exchange services.

fact_summary: 大型连锁超市在促销活动中宣称低至五折但现场99%商品均为九五折 / A major supermarket chain advertised discounts of up to 50%, but 99% of items on site were only 5% off.
cn_claim: 经营者不得利用虚假的价格手段诱骗消费者交易（价格法第14条第四项）。
us_claim: Bait-and-switch discount advertising violates the FTC Act § 5.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit misleading discount advertising.

fact_summary: 超市在促销活动中宣称低至五折但现场99%商品均为九五折 / A supermarket advertised up to 50% off but 99% of items were only 5% off.
cn_claim: 利用虚假价格手段诱骗消费者构成价格欺诈（价格法第14条第四项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Advertising a misleading discount is misleading conduct under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit misleading discount advertising.

fact_summary: 某加油站因油车卸油时未接地线致静电引发爆炸 / A gas-station explosion occurred because the tanker truck was not grounded during fuel unloading, causing a static-electricity discharge.
cn_claim: 加油站卸油作业应严格遵守安全操作规程包括接地防护（危险化学品安全管理条例第20条）。
us_claim: A gas station that fails to follow grounding procedures during fuel transfer is liable for resulting explosions under negligence and strict-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to ensure safe fuel-transfer procedures including grounding breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require safe fuel-transfer procedures including grounding.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法向境外提供国家秘密被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for illegally providing state secrets to a foreign entity.
cn_claim: 为境外的机构、组织、人员窃取、刺探、收买、非法提供国家秘密或情报的构成为境外窃取、刺探、收买、非法提供国家秘密、情报罪（刑法第111条）。
us_claim: Transmitting classified national-defense information to a foreign government is espionage under the Espionage Act (18 U.S.C. § 794).
hk_claim: Disclosing official secrets to a foreign agent is an offense under the Official Secrets Ordinance (Cap. 521).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose the most severe penalties for espionage.

fact_summary: 消费者通过跨境电商购买化妆品后发现产品已过期一年 / A consumer purchased cosmetics through cross-border e-commerce and discovered the products had expired one year earlier.
cn_claim: 经营者销售过期化妆品的消费者可主张退还货款并赔偿损失（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款；化妆品监督管理条例第60条）。
us_claim: Selling expired cosmetic products violates the Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act and gives rise to strict products-liability claims.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold sellers strictly liable for expired cosmetic products.

fact_summary: 消费者通过跨境电商购买化妆品后发现产品已过期一年 / A consumer purchased cosmetics through cross-border e-commerce and found they were expired.
cn_claim: 销售过期化妆品的消费者可主张退还货款并赔偿（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款；化妆品监督管理条例第60条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling expired cosmetic products is an offense under the Consumer Goods Safety Ordinance (Cap. 456).
notes: Both CN and HK hold sellers liable for expired cosmetic products.

fact_summary: 某学校因长期未清洗饮用水设备致多名学生腹泻 / Multiple students suffered diarrhea because the school had not cleaned its drinking-water equipment for an extended period.
cn_claim: 学校应确保提供给学生的饮用水符合卫生标准（学校卫生工作条例第7条；民法典第1199条）。
us_claim: A school that fails to maintain safe drinking-water systems is liable for resulting illnesses under negligence theories.
hk_claim: A school that fails to provide safe drinking water to students breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require schools to maintain safe drinking-water systems.

fact_summary: 被告人因虐待被监管人被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for abusing a detainee under their supervision.
cn_claim: 监狱、拘留所、看守所等监管机构的监管人员对被监管人进行殴打或体罚虐待情节严重的构成虐待被监管人罪（刑法第248条第一款）。
us_claim: Assault or abuse of a detainee by a corrections officer is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 242 (deprivation of rights under color of law).
hk_claim: Ill-treatment of a detainee by a correctional officer is an offense under the Prison Rules (Cap. 234A).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the abuse of detainees by custodial officers.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买海参后发现为人工合成 / A consumer purchased sea cucumber through a livestream and later discovered it was artificially synthesized.
cn_claim: 以人工合成制品冒充天然海参的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling imitation seafood as genuine constitutes fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for imitation seafood sold as genuine.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买海参后发现为人工合成 / A consumer purchased sea cucumber and discovered it was artificially synthesized.
cn_claim: 以人工合成制品冒充天然海参的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling imitation food as genuine constitutes fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for imitation seafood sold as genuine.

fact_summary: 某居民楼因煤气管道泄漏引发爆炸致多人伤亡 / A gas-pipe leak in a residential building caused an explosion with multiple casualties.
cn_claim: 燃气经营者应定期对燃气设施进行安全检查并及时消除安全隐患（城镇燃气管理条例第19条第一款）。
us_claim: A gas utility that fails to detect and repair a gas leak is strictly liable for resulting explosions under negligence and products-liability theories.
hk_claim: A gas supplier who fails to maintain gas mains safely is liable for resulting explosions.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose strict gas-safety duties on suppliers.

fact_summary: 被告人因使用虚假身份证件乘机被查处 / A defendant was apprehended for using a false identity document to board an aircraft.
cn_claim: 在依照国家规定应当提供身份证明的活动中使用伪造、变造的居民身份证的构成使用虚假身份证件罪（刑法第280条之一第一款）。
us_claim: Using false identification to board an aircraft is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1028 and may involve TSA regulations.
hk_claim: Using a false identity document to travel is an offense under the Immigration Ordinance (Cap. 115).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize using false identity for air travel.

fact_summary: 消费者通过外卖平台订餐后收到变质食品 / A consumer received spoiled food after ordering through a food-delivery platform.
cn_claim: 食品经营者应确保所提供的食品安全（食品安全法第34条第六项）；提供变质食品的消费者可主张价款十倍或损失三倍的赔偿金（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: A restaurant that delivers spoiled food is strictly liable under products-liability and implied-warranty theories.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold food sellers strictly liable for spoiled-food delivery.

fact_summary: 消费者通过外卖平台订餐后收到变质食品 / A consumer received spoiled food after ordering through a food-delivery platform.
cn_claim: 提供变质食品的消费者可主张价款十倍赔偿金（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling food unfit for human consumption is an offense under the Food Safety Ordinance (Cap. 612).
notes: Both CN and HK hold food sellers liable for spoiled-food delivery.

fact_summary: 某酒店因干蒸房温控器故障致顾客中暑昏迷 / A hotel guest fainted from heatstroke because the thermostat in the steam room malfunctioned.
cn_claim: 酒店经营者应确保其设施安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A hotel that fails to maintain safe temperature controls in spa facilities is liable under negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain spa facilities safely breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require hotels to maintain safe spa facilities.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法行医致人重伤被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for practicing medicine without a license, causing a patient serious injury.
cn_claim: 未取得医生执业资格非法行医造成就诊人重伤的构成非法行医罪且从重处罚（刑法第336条第一款）。
us_claim: Practicing medicine without a license resulting in serious injury is a felony under state law.
hk_claim: Practicing medicine without registration causing serious injury is an offense under the Medical Registration Ordinance (Cap. 161).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unlicensed medical practice resulting in serious injury.

fact_summary: 在银行办理大额转账时被柜员诱导购买了高风险的理财产品 / A customer making a large bank transfer was induced by the teller to purchase a high-risk financial product.
cn_claim: 金融机构向客户推荐金融产品时应履行适当性义务并告知风险（商业银行理财业务监督管理办法第26条）。
us_claim: A financial institution that recommends unsuitable investments breaches its suitability obligations under FINRA rules and may violate the Securities Exchange Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require financial institutions to recommend suitable investment products.

fact_summary: 银行柜员诱导客户购买高风险的理财产品 / A bank teller induced a customer to purchase a high-risk financial product.
cn_claim: 金融机构应履行适当性义务并告知风险（商业银行理财业务监督管理办法第26条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A financial institution that recommends unsuitable products to a client may be liable for mis-selling under regulatory rules.
notes: Both CN and HK require financial institutions to recommend suitable investment products.

fact_summary: 某工厂因叉车操作员未经培训致撞伤工人 / A factory worker was struck and injured by a forklift because the operator had not been trained.
cn_claim: 生产经营单位应对从业人员进行安全生产教育和培训确保其具备必要的安全生产知识（安全生产法第28条第一款）。
us_claim: An employer who allows an untrained person to operate a forklift resulting in injury violates OSHA standards and is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: A factory occupier who fails to ensure forklift operators are properly trained breaches safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require forklift-operator training.

fact_summary: 被告人因绑架并勒索财物被判处重刑 / A defendant was sentenced to a heavy penalty for kidnapping and demanding ransom.
cn_claim: 以勒索财物为目的绑架他人的构成绑架罪（刑法第239条第一款）。
us_claim: Kidnapping for ransom is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1201 (the Lindbergh Law).
hk_claim: Kidnapping for ransom is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose the most severe penalties for kidnapping for ransom.

fact_summary: 补课机构在宣传中承诺提高分数否则退款，学生未达目标后拒绝退款 / A tutoring service promised a score improvement with a money-back guarantee but refused to refund when the student failed to meet the target.
cn_claim: 承诺未满足条件即退款而未履行的构成违约应承担违约责任（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: A tutoring service that fails to honor a money-back guarantee is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold tutoring services liable for breach of money-back guarantees.

fact_summary: 补课机构在宣传中承诺提高分数否则退款，学生未达目标后拒绝退款 / A tutoring service failed to honor a money-back guarantee.
cn_claim: 承诺未满足条件即退款而未履行的构成违约（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A tutoring service that fails to honor a money-back guarantee is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK hold tutoring services liable for breach of money-back guarantees.

fact_summary: 某景区因索道轿厢玻璃碎裂致游客被划伤 / A tourist was cut by shattered glass in a cable-car cabin at a scenic area because the glass had cracked.
cn_claim: 景区经营者应确保索道设备安全并定期检查（特种设备安全法第39条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A scenic-area operator who fails to maintain cable-car cabins in safe condition is liable under premises-liability and common-carrier theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain cable-car cabins safely breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require cable-car operators to maintain cabin safety.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法运输爆炸物导致途中爆炸多人伤亡 / A defendant illegally transported explosives that detonated en route, causing multiple casualties.
cn_claim: 非法运输爆炸物的构成非法运输爆炸物罪（刑法第125条第一款）；造成严重后果的从重处罚。
us_claim: Illegal transportation of explosives causing death is a serious federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 844(d) and § 842.
hk_claim: Illegal transportation of explosives is an offense under the Dangerous Goods Ordinance (Cap. 295).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for illegal explosives transport.

fact_summary: 消费者购买二手车后发现车辆识别代号被打磨篡改 / A consumer purchased a used car and discovered the VIN had been ground off and altered.
cn_claim: 经营者将篡改车架号的车辆出售的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a vehicle with an altered VIN is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 511.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US criminalize the sale of vehicles with altered VINs.

fact_summary: 消费者购买二手车后发现车辆识别代号被打磨篡改 / A consumer purchased a used car and discovered the VIN had been altered.
cn_claim: 将篡改车架号的车辆出售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling a vehicle with an altered VIN is fraud and may be an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: Both CN and HK criminalize the sale of vehicles with altered VINs.

fact_summary: 某写字楼因未安装应急广播致火灾时人员未及时撤离 / Occupants of an office building failed to evacuate in time during a fire because no emergency-broadcast system had been installed.
cn_claim: 高层建筑应按规定设置火灾自动报警系统和应急广播（消防法第16条第一款第二项；建筑设计防火规范第8.4条）。
us_claim: A building owner who fails to install required emergency-communication systems violates fire codes and is liable for resulting harm.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to provide adequate emergency-warning systems breaches fire-safety obligations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require office buildings to install emergency-broadcast systems.

fact_summary: 被告人因开设赌场并组织他人出境赌博 / A defendant operated a gambling establishment and organized overseas gambling trips.
cn_claim: 开设赌场的构成开设赌场罪；组织中国公民出境赌博的以开设赌场罪从重处罚（刑法第303条）。
us_claim: Operating an illegal gambling business is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1955 and various state laws.
hk_claim: Operating an unauthorized gambling establishment is an offense under the Gambling Ordinance (Cap. 148).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize illegal gambling operations.

fact_summary: 消费者通过跨境代购买到假包被海关认定为侵权物品并处罚 / A consumer purchased a counterfeit handbag through an overseas purchasing agent and was fined by customs for importing infringing goods.
cn_claim: 代购方应保证所代购商品为合法正品；因代购假货导致消费者被处罚的代购方应赔偿消费者全部损失。
us_claim: A purchasing agent who supplies counterfeit goods that result in the buyer being penalized is liable for fraud and all consequential damages.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold purchasing agents liable for all consequences when they supply counterfeit goods.

fact_summary: 消费者通过跨境代购买到假包被海关认定为侵权物品并处罚 / A consumer purchased a counterfeit handbag and was penalized by customs.
cn_claim: 因代购假货导致消费者被处罚的代购方应赔偿消费者全部损失。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A purchasing agent who supplies counterfeit goods that cause the buyer to suffer a penalty is liable for the resulting loss.
notes: Both CN and HK hold purchasing agents liable for consequences of supplying counterfeit goods.

fact_summary: 某小区因无消防栓或消防栓水压不足致火灾未能及时扑灭 / A fire in a residential compound could not be extinguished in time because hydrants were either absent or had insufficient water pressure.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应对共用消防设施进行维护管理确保其完好有效（消防法第16条第一款第二项、第三项）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to maintain fire-hydrant systems is liable for resulting fire damage under negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain fire-hydrant systems breaches fire-safety obligations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require property managers to maintain fire-hydrant systems.

fact_summary: 被告人因组织他人以劳务输出为名偷越国境 / A defendant organized others to illegally cross the border under the guise of labor export.
cn_claim: 组织他人偷越国境的构成组织他人偷越国境罪（刑法第318条第一款）。
us_claim: Organizing illegal border crossings for employment is alien smuggling under 8 U.S.C. § 1324.
hk_claim: Arranging illegal entry for employment purposes is an offense under the Immigration Ordinance (Cap. 115).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize organized illegal border crossing for employment.

fact_summary: 消费者购买净水器后在使用过程中发现滤芯未按宣传标准过滤 / A consumer purchased a water purifier and discovered the filter did not meet the advertised filtration standards.
cn_claim: 经营者以虚假数据宣传产品性能的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a product with misrepresented performance specifications constitutes fraud and violates the FTC Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for misrepresented product-performance claims.

fact_summary: 消费者购买净水器后发现滤芯未按宣传标准过滤 / A consumer purchased a water purifier and found the filter did not meet advertised standards.
cn_claim: 以虚假数据宣传产品性能的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A seller who misrepresents a product's performance is liable for misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for misrepresented product-performance claims.

fact_summary: 某餐厅因冷藏库故障未及时发现致食品变质致多名顾客食物中毒 / Multiple patrons suffered food poisoning because the restaurant failed to detect a cold-storage failure causing food spoilage.
cn_claim: 餐饮经营者应确保食品储存条件符合食品安全要求（食品安全法第33条第六项）。
us_claim: A restaurant that serves spoiled food due to equipment failure is strictly liable for resulting illnesses under products-liability and negligence theories.
hk_claim: A restaurant that fails to maintain safe food-storage conditions is liable for resulting illness.
notes: All three jurisdictions require restaurants to maintain safe food-storage conditions.

fact_summary: 被告人因贩卖毒品被抓获后主动提供其上线的线索并协助抓捕 / After being caught for drug trafficking, a defendant voluntarily provided leads on their supplier and assisted in the supplier's capture.
cn_claim: 犯罪分子有重大立功表现的可减轻或免除处罚（刑法第68条）。
us_claim: Providing substantial assistance that leads to the capture of a drug supplier supports a sentence below the statutory minimum under 18 U.S.C. § 3553(e) and a downward departure under § 5K1.1.
hk_claim: A defendant who provides assistance leading to the capture of a drug supplier is entitled to a very substantial sentencing discount.
notes: All three jurisdictions provide significant sentencing benefits for assistance in capturing drug suppliers.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播平台购买食品后发现生产许可证号为虚假 / A consumer purchased food through a livestreaming platform and discovered the production-license number was fake.
cn_claim: 使用虚假生产许可证号的食品不得销售（食品安全法第35条第一款）；消费者可主张惩罚性赔偿（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: Selling food with a misrepresented or fictitious production license constitutes fraud and violates the Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit the sale of food with misrepresented licensing information.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播平台购买食品后发现生产许可证号为虚假 / A consumer purchased food and found the production-license number was fake.
cn_claim: 使用虚假生产许可证号的食品不得销售（食品安全法第35条第一款）；消费者可主张惩罚性赔偿（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling food with a misrepresented license number is an offense under the Food Safety Ordinance (Cap. 612).
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit the sale of food with misrepresented licensing information.

fact_summary: 某市天桥因护栏锈蚀断裂致行人坠落受伤 / A pedestrian fell from an overpass and was injured because the guardrail had rusted through and snapped.
cn_claim: 市政管理部门应对城市桥梁进行养护维修确保其安全运行（城市桥梁检测和养护维修管理办法第18条）。
us_claim: A municipality that fails to maintain pedestrian-bridge railings is liable for negligence; the discretionary-function exception generally does not apply to routine maintenance.
hk_claim: A public authority that fails to maintain bridge railings is liable for negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions require public authorities to maintain bridge railings.

fact_summary: 被告人因盗伐国家保护珍贵树木被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for illegally felling protected rare trees.
cn_claim: 非法采伐珍贵树木的构成非法采伐国家重点保护植物罪（刑法第344条）。
us_claim: Illegal logging of protected tree species violates the Endangered Species Act and the Lacey Act.
hk_claim: Illegal felling of protected trees is an offense under the Forests and Countryside Ordinance (Cap. 96).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the illegal felling of protected trees.

fact_summary: 长租公寓暴雷后房东断水断电逼租客搬离 / After a long-term-rental company collapsed, the landlord cut off water and electricity to force the tenant to vacate.
cn_claim: 出租人以断水断电方式催缴租金或逼迫搬离的属于侵权行为承租人可请求赔偿损失（民法典第1165条）。
us_claim: A landlord who cuts off utilities to evict a tenant commits an illegal constructive eviction.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit landlords from cutting off utilities as a means of eviction.

fact_summary: 长租公寓暴雷后房东断水断电逼租客搬离 / After a rental company collapsed, the landlord cut off utilities to force the tenant out.
cn_claim: 以断水断电方式逼迫搬离的属于侵权行为（民法典第1165条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A landlord who cuts off utilities to evict a tenant commits a breach of the covenant for quiet enjoyment and may be liable for trespass.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit landlords from cutting off utilities as a means of eviction.

fact_summary: 某加油站因油罐车卸油时未设置警示隔离区域致摩托车驶入起火 / A motorcycle entered a tanker-unloading zone at a gas station where no warning barrier had been set, igniting a fire.
cn_claim: 加油站卸油作业应设置明显的警示标志并采取安全隔离措施（加油站作业安全规范AQ3010-2022第6.2条）。
us_claim: A gas station that fails to establish a safety perimeter during fuel transfer is liable for resulting accidents under negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to establish a safe unloading zone breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require gas stations to establish safety zones during fuel transfer.

fact_summary: 被告人因走私武器弹药被查获 / A defendant was apprehended for smuggling weapons and ammunition.
cn_claim: 走私武器弹药的构成走私武器、弹药罪（刑法第151条第一款）。
us_claim: Smuggling firearms into the United States is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 922 and the Arms Export Control Act.
hk_claim: Smuggling arms and ammunition is an offense under the Firearms and Ammunition Ordinance (Cap. 238).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for arms smuggling.

fact_summary: 消费者购买演唱会门票后因主办方擅自变更演出场地要求退票被拒 / After purchasing concert tickets, a consumer was refused a refund when the organizer unilaterally changed the venue.
cn_claim: 主办方单方变更演出场地的消费者有权解除合同并要求退票退款（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: A concert organizer who materially changes the event venue without offering refunds is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require event organizers to refund when making material changes to the event.

fact_summary: 消费者购买演唱会门票后因主办方擅自变更演出场地要求退票被拒 / A consumer was refused a refund after the organizer unilaterally changed the concert venue.
cn_claim: 主办方单方变更演出场地的消费者有权解除合同并退票退款（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An organizer who makes a material change to an event without offering refunds is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK require event organizers to refund when making material changes.

fact_summary: 某游泳馆因未设深水区警示标志致不擅游泳者误入溺水 / A non-swimmer drowned after straying into the deep end of a swimming pool because no depth-warning sign was posted.
cn_claim: 游泳场所应按规定设置深水区警示标志并配备救生员（体育场所开放条件与技术要求第7部分；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A pool operator who fails to post depth-warning signs and provide adequate supervision is liable under negligence and premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to warn of deep-water hazards breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require pool operators to post depth warnings.

fact_summary: 被告人因多次抢夺路人财物被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for repeatedly snatching property from pedestrians.
cn_claim: 多次抢夺公私财物的构成抢夺罪（刑法第267条第一款）。
us_claim: Repeated snatch-and-grab thefts constitute larceny or robbery under state law and may be charged as a pattern of criminal activity.
hk_claim: Repeated thefts from the person are offenses under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize repeated street snatching.

fact_summary: 消费者购买开发商宣传的湖景房交付后发现窗外为污水处理厂 / A homebuyer purchased a condominium marketed as having a lake view, but after delivery discovered the window faced a sewage-treatment plant.
cn_claim: 开发商以虚假环境宣传诱导消费者购房的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: A developer who materially misrepresents the surrounding environment commits fraud; the buyer may seek rescission or damages.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for developer misrepresentations about the surrounding environment.

fact_summary: 消费者购买开发商宣传的湖景房交付后发现窗外为污水处理厂 / A homebuyer purchased a lake-view apartment that faced a sewage-treatment plant.
cn_claim: 以虚假环境宣传诱导购房的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A developer who materially misrepresents the property's setting is liable for misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for developer misrepresentations about the property setting.

fact_summary: 某五金厂因未给冲床安装光电保护装置致工人手指被切断 / A worker's finger was severed in a metal-stamping factory because the punch press lacked an optical-safety guard.
cn_claim: 生产经营单位应在有较大危险因素的设备上设置明显的安全警示标志和安全防护装置（安全生产法第35条）。
us_claim: A factory operator who fails to install required machine guards violates OSHA Machine Guarding standards (29 C.F.R. § 1910.212) and is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: A factory occupier who fails to install machine guards breaches safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require factories to install machine-safety guards.

fact_summary: 被告人因组织未成年人进行违反治安管理活动被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for organizing minors to engage in activities violating public-order regulations.
cn_claim: 组织未成年人进行盗窃、诈骗、抢夺等违反治安管理活动的构成组织未成年人进行违反治安管理活动罪（刑法第262条之二）。
us_claim: Using minors to commit criminal acts may constitute contributing to the delinquency of a minor and various conspiracy or accomplice-liability charges.
hk_claim: Organizing minors to commit offenses is a serious aggravating factor and may constitute separate offenses.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the use of minors in organized criminal activity.

fact_summary: 在线教育平台在用户购买终身会员后半年内停止运营 / An online-education platform ceased operations six months after a consumer purchased a lifetime membership.
cn_claim: 经营者以预收款方式提供服务未按约定提供的应退回预付款（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: A platform that sells lifetime access and then ceases operations is in breach of contract; consumers are entitled to a prorated refund.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require prepaid-service providers to refund unused portions upon cessation.

fact_summary: 在线教育平台在用户购买终身会员后半年内停止运营 / An online-education platform ceased operations six months after a consumer purchased a lifetime membership.
cn_claim: 未按约定提供服务的应退回预付款（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A platform that sells lifetime access and then ceases operations is in breach of contract; consumers are entitled to a refund for the unexpired portion.
notes: Both CN and HK require refund for unused prepaid-service periods.

fact_summary: 某工地因塔吊超负荷吊装导致倒塌致工人死亡 / A construction worker died when a tower crane collapsed because it had been overloaded.
cn_claim: 起重机械应按照安全技术规范的要求进行使用（特种设备安全法第34条）。
us_claim: A construction company that overloads a crane causing a fatality is liable under OSHA standards and state wrongful-death laws.
hk_claim: A site occupier who overloads lifting equipment causing death breaches safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions prohibit crane overloading and impose strict liability for resulting deaths.

fact_summary: 被告人因编造虚假疫情信息在网上传播引发社会恐慌 / A defendant fabricated false epidemic information and spread it online, triggering public panic.
cn_claim: 编造虚假的疫情信息并在信息网络上传播严重扰乱社会秩序的构成编造、故意传播虚假信息罪（刑法第291条之一第二款）。
us_claim: Disseminating false health-related information causing public alarm may be prosecuted under 18 U.S.C. § 1038 (false information and hoaxes).
hk_claim: Spreading false reports likely to cause public alarm is an offense under the Public Order Ordinance (Cap. 245).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize false epidemic-information dissemination.

fact_summary: 消费者购买某品牌手机后发现手机系统无法使用谷歌服务与宣传不符 / A consumer purchased a branded phone and discovered it could not use Google services as advertised.
cn_claim: 经营者以虚假或引人误解的宣传方式误导消费者的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a phone that cannot access advertised features constitutes fraud and breach of warranty.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies when phones cannot access advertised features.

fact_summary: 消费者购买某品牌手机后发现手机系统无法使用谷歌服务与宣传不符 / A consumer bought a phone that could not use Google services as advertised.
cn_claim: 以虚假宣传方式误导消费者的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling a phone that does not support advertised features constitutes misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies when phones cannot access advertised features.

fact_summary: 某地铁站因排水系统故障致暴雨时站内被淹多名乘客摔伤 / Multiple passengers fell and were injured when a subway station flooded during a rainstorm because the drainage system had failed.
cn_claim: 地铁运营单位应对排水设施进行维护管理（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A transit authority that fails to maintain drainage systems is liable for resulting injuries under premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain drainage systems for foreseeable weather events breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require transit operators to maintain drainage systems.

fact_summary: 被告人因多次盗窃惯犯且以盗窃为生 / A defendant was a habitual thief who made a living from theft.
cn_claim: 多次盗窃且以盗窃为生的构成盗窃罪且应从重处罚（刑法第264条）。
us_claim: A habitual thief may be charged under state habitual-offender or career-criminal statutes and face enhanced sentencing.
hk_claim: A persistent thief is subject to enhanced sentencing for repeated offenses.
notes: All three jurisdictions enhance penalties for career criminals.

fact_summary: 消费者购买进口奶粉后发现罐体无中文标签且过期 / A consumer purchased imported infant formula and discovered the can had no Chinese label and was expired.
cn_claim: 进口食品无中文标签的消费者可主张赔偿；过期食品的消费者可主张价款十倍赔偿金（食品安全法第97条第一款、第148条第二款）。
us_claim: Selling expired food without proper labeling violates the Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit the sale of expired imported food without proper labeling.

fact_summary: 消费者购买进口奶粉后发现罐体无中文标签且过期 / A consumer purchased imported formula that had no local-language label and was expired.
cn_claim: 无中文标签且过期的消费者可主张赔偿（食品安全法第97条第一款、第148条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling expired food without proper labeling is an offense under the Food Safety Ordinance (Cap. 612).
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit the sale of expired food without proper labeling.

fact_summary: 某景区因未设置防雷设施致游客在山顶被雷击身亡 / A tourist was struck and killed by lightning at a scenic mountain peak where no lightning-protection system had been installed.
cn_claim: 景区经营者应在易遭雷击的区域设置防雷设施并采取安全措施（民法典第1198条第一款；气象法第31条）。
us_claim: A premises operator who fails to provide lightning protection in exposed areas where visitors are known to gather may be liable for negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to take reasonable precautions against foreseeable lightning risk breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require scenic-area operators to take lightning-safety measures.

fact_summary: 被告人因煽动民族仇恨在网络上发布极端言论 / A defendant posted extremist speech online to incite ethnic hatred.
cn_claim: 煽动民族仇恨、民族歧视情节严重的构成煽动民族仇恨、民族歧视罪（刑法第249条）。
us_claim: Hate speech is generally protected by the First Amendment unless it constitutes a true threat or incitement to imminent lawless action.
hk_claim: Inciting hatred against a racial group may be an offense.
notes: All three jurisdictions address hate speech with significantly different frameworks: CN criminalizes it, US provides broad protection, HK takes an intermediate approach.

fact_summary: 消费者购买房屋后发现实测面积比合同约定少5% / A homebuyer discovered the actual measured floor area was 5% less than the contract specified.
cn_claim: 面积误差比超出3%部分的房价款由出卖人双倍返还买受人（商品房买卖合同司法解释第14条第二项）。
us_claim: A material shortage in square footage in a real-estate sale constitutes a breach of contract; the buyer may seek a price abatement or rescission.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for material square-footage shortages in real-estate sales.

fact_summary: 消费者购买房屋后发现实测面积比合同约定少5% / A homebuyer discovered the actual area was 5% less than contracted.
cn_claim: 面积误差比超出3%部分的房价款由出卖人双倍返还（商品房买卖合同司法解释第14条第二项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A purchaser who receives property materially smaller than contracted is entitled to compensation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for material square-footage shortages in real-estate sales.

fact_summary: 某小区因电子门禁系统故障致无法正常出入居民被困 / Residents were trapped inside and outside a residential compound because the electronic-access-control system had failed.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应对共用设施设备进行维修养护确保其正常运行（民法典第942条第一款）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to repair an access-control system within a reasonable time is liable for inconvenience and any resulting harm.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain access-control systems breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require property managers to maintain access-control systems.

fact_summary: 被告人因盗取他人游戏账号并出售获利 / A defendant hacked others' gaming accounts and sold them for profit.
cn_claim: 非法获取计算机信息系统数据并出售的构成非法获取计算机信息系统数据罪（刑法第285条第二款）。
us_claim: Unauthorized access to protected computers to obtain account information and selling it is a crime under the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act (18 U.S.C. § 1030).
hk_claim: Obtaining another's account data without authority and selling it is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the hacking and sale of online accounts.

fact_summary: 消费者在二手车商购买的所谓女士一手车后发现为网约车营转非 / A consumer purchased a vehicle represented as a single-owner female-driven car and discovered it was a decommissioned ride-hailing vehicle.
cn_claim: 将网约车营转非车辆作为一手私家车销售的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a former commercial-use vehicle as a private-use car without disclosure constitutes fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require disclosure of prior commercial use in vehicle sales.

fact_summary: 二手车商将网约车营转非作为女士一手车销售 / A dealer sold a decommissioned ride-hailing vehicle as a single-owner private car.
cn_claim: 将营转非车辆作为一手私家车销售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A dealer who misrepresents a former commercial vehicle as a private-use car is liable for misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK require disclosure of prior commercial use in vehicle sales.

fact_summary: 某办公楼因外墙玻璃幕墙自爆碎片掉落砸伤路人 / A pedestrian was injured by falling glass fragments from a spontaneously shattered curtain-wall panel on an office building.
cn_claim: 建筑物上的搁置物、悬挂物发生脱落造成他人损害的所有人与管理人不能证明自己无过错的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1253条）。
us_claim: A building owner who fails to maintain curtain-wall glass against spontaneous breakage is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain building glass panels safely breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require building owners to maintain glass curtain walls safely.

fact_summary: 被告人因以合作投资为名非法集资被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for illegally raising funds under the guise of cooperative investment.
cn_claim: 以合作投资为名吸收公众资金的构成非法吸收公众存款罪或集资诈骗罪（刑法第176条、第192条）。
us_claim: Raising funds through fraudulent cooperative-investment schemes violates securities laws and may be prosecuted as wire fraud.
hk_claim: Raising funds through fraudulent investment schemes is a criminal offense.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize fraudulent cooperative-investment fundraising.

fact_summary: 消费者购买商品房后发现开发商未取得预售许可证 / A homebuyer discovered the developer had not obtained a pre-sale permit for the housing.
cn_claim: 出卖人未取得商品房预售许可证明与买受人订立的商品房预售合同应当认定无效（商品房买卖合同司法解释第2条）。
us_claim: A developer who sells unapproved subdivisions may be in violation of the Interstate Land Sales Full Disclosure Act and state law.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require developers to obtain permits before pre-selling housing.

fact_summary: 消费者购买商品房后发现开发商未取得预售许可证 / A homebuyer discovered the developer lacked a pre-sale permit.
cn_claim: 未取得预售许可证明签订的商品房预售合同应认定无效（商品房买卖合同司法解释第2条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A developer who sells uncompleted units without the required consent scheme approval is in breach of regulatory requirements.
notes: Both CN and HK require developers to obtain permits before pre-selling housing.

fact_summary: 某停车场因未设挡车杆致车辆滑入河道 / A vehicle rolled into a river at a parking lot because no wheel-stop barrier had been installed.
cn_claim: 停车场经营者应确保停车设施安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A parking-lot operator who fails to install safety barriers is liable for resulting damage.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to provide adequate safety barriers breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require parking operators to install safety barriers.

fact_summary: 被告人因传播他人隐私视频并在网络上公开被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for distributing another person's private video and posting it publicly online.
cn_claim: 未经许可公开传播他人私密视频的构成侵犯公民个人信息罪和传播淫秽物品罪（刑法第253条之一、第363条）。
us_claim: Distributing nonconsensual pornography is criminalized under state revenge-porn statutes and may constitute cyberstalking.
hk_claim: Publishing intimate images without consent is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the nonconsensual distribution of private intimate images.

fact_summary: 消费者在团购平台购买套餐后商家以节假日不能使用为由拒绝接待 / A merchant refused to honor a group-purchased meal voucher, citing that it could not be used on holidays.
cn_claim: 经营者以格式条款限制消费者权利的条款无效（民法典第497条第二项；消费者权益保护法第26条第二款）。
us_claim: A merchant who refuses to honor a voucher based on undisclosed restrictions is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require merchants to clearly disclose voucher restrictions.

fact_summary: 消费者在团购平台购买套餐后商家以节假日不能使用为由拒绝接待 / A merchant refused to honor a voucher claiming it could not be used on holidays.
cn_claim: 以格式条款限制消费者权利的条款无效（民法典第497条第二项；消费者权益保护法第26条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A merchant who imposes undisclosed restrictions on vouchers is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK require merchants to clearly disclose voucher restrictions.

fact_summary: 某滑雪场因未关闭已融化的高危雪道致游客误入摔伤 / A skier was injured after entering a high-risk run that had melting snow but had not been closed off.
cn_claim: 滑雪场经营者应对存在安全隐患的区域进行封闭管理（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A ski-resort operator who fails to close dangerous runs is liable for resulting injuries under premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to close hazardous areas breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require ski-resort operators to close unsafe runs.

fact_summary: 被告人因抢夺枪支被当场抓获 / A defendant was caught in the act of snatching a firearm.
cn_claim: 抢夺枪支的构成抢夺枪支罪（刑法第127条第二款）。
us_claim: Stealing a firearm is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 924(l).
hk_claim: Stealing a firearm is an offense under the Firearms and Ammunition Ordinance (Cap. 238).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for firearm theft.

fact_summary: 酒店预订后因同行游客确诊传染病被酒店拒绝入住且不退费 / After booking, a hotel refused to check in a guest and withheld the payment because a companion traveler had been diagnosed with a communicable disease.
cn_claim: 因不可抗力导致合同目的无法实现的当事人可解除合同（民法典第563条第一款第一项）；酒店应退还费用。
us_claim: A hotel that refuses to provide services due to a public-health concern should refund prepaid amounts under frustration-of-purpose or force-majeure principles.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require hotels to refund when services cannot be provided due to public-health concerns.

fact_summary: 酒店因同行游客确诊传染病拒绝入住且不退费 / A hotel refused check-in and withheld payment due to a companion's infectious disease.
cn_claim: 因不可抗力导致合同目的无法实现的当事人可解除合同（民法典第563条第一款第一项）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A hotel that cannot provide services due to a public-health concern should refund prepaid amounts.
notes: Both CN and HK require hotels to refund when services cannot be provided due to public-health concerns.

fact_summary: 某医院因精神科病房未锁致使病人出走跳楼 / A psychiatric patient walked out of an unlocked ward and jumped from a building.
cn_claim: 医疗机构应对精神障碍患者采取必要的安全防护措施（精神卫生法第38条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A hospital that fails to maintain adequate security in psychiatric wards is liable for negligence; the standard of care requires suicide precautions for at-risk patients.
hk_claim: A hospital that fails to take reasonable precautions to prevent foreseeable self-harm by psychiatric patients is liable for negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions require psychiatric facilities to maintain adequate security.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法获取国家秘密并提供给境外机构被判处重刑 / A defendant was sentenced to a heavy penalty for illegally obtaining state secrets and providing them to a foreign organization.
cn_claim: 为境外机构、组织、人员窃取、刺探、收买、非法提供国家秘密或情报的构成为境外窃取、刺探、收买、非法提供国家秘密、情报罪（刑法第111条）。
us_claim: Transmitting classified national-defense information to a foreign entity is espionage under the Espionage Act (18 U.S.C. § 794).
hk_claim: Communicating official secrets to a foreign agent is an offense under the Official Secrets Ordinance (Cap. 521).
notes: All three jurisdictions treat espionage with the utmost severity.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法经营兴奋剂被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for illegally trafficking in performance-enhancing drugs.
cn_claim: 未经许可经营兴奋剂目录所列物质的构成非法经营罪（刑法第225条；反兴奋剂条例第38条）。
us_claim: Trafficking in controlled substances including anabolic steroids is a crime under the Controlled Substances Act (21 U.S.C. § 841).
hk_claim: Trafficking in dangerous drugs including unauthorized pharmaceuticals is an offense under the Dangerous Drugs Ordinance (Cap. 134) and the Pharmacy and Poisons Ordinance (Cap. 138).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the trafficking of performance-enhancing drugs.

fact_summary: 消费者购买软卧车票后上车发现被安排到硬座且不予退款 / A consumer purchased a soft-sleeper train ticket but was seated in a hard seat with no refund.
cn_claim: 铁路运输企业应按照约定的等级提供服务（民法典第577条；铁路旅客运输规程第14条）。
us_claim: A common carrier that fails to provide the class of service paid for is in breach of contract and must refund the difference.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require carriers to provide the class of service purchased or refund the difference.

fact_summary: 消费者购买软卧车票后上车发现被安排到硬座且不予退款 / A consumer bought a soft-sleeper ticket but was given a hard seat with no refund.
cn_claim: 铁路运输企业应按照约定的等级提供服务（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A carrier that downgrades a passenger without compensation is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK require carriers to provide the class of service purchased or compensate.

fact_summary: 某小区因水泵房噪音超标致邻近住户长期失眠神经衰弱 / Residents living adjacent to a pump room in a residential compound suffered chronic insomnia and neurasthenia because the noise exceeded allowable limits.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应确保共用设施运行产生的噪声符合国家标准（民法典第294条；噪声污染防治法第34条）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to control excessive noise from building equipment is liable for nuisance and may be liable for resulting health effects.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to control noise from building services breaches the common duty of care and may be liable in nuisance.
notes: All three jurisdictions require property managers to control building-equipment noise.

fact_summary: 被告人因开设网络赌场并使用虚拟货币结算赌资被查处 / A defendant was investigated for operating an online casino using cryptocurrency to settle gambling funds.
cn_claim: 建立赌博网站并接受投注的构成开设赌场罪（刑法第303条第二款）；使用虚拟货币结算不影响本罪的认定。
us_claim: Operating an online gambling site using cryptocurrency is illegal under the Unlawful Internet Gambling Enforcement Act and may involve money-laundering charges.
hk_claim: Operating an unauthorized online gambling platform is an offense under the Gambling Ordinance (Cap. 148).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize online gambling operations using cryptocurrency.

fact_summary: 消费者通过拍卖平台竞得字画后发现为印刷复制品 / A consumer who won a calligraphy painting at an auction platform discovered it was a printed reproduction.
cn_claim: 拍卖人应当向竞买人说明拍卖标的的瑕疵（拍卖法第18条）；以印刷品冒充真迹的构成欺诈。
us_claim: An auction house that fails to disclose that artwork is a reproduction commits fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require auctioneers to disclose when artwork is a reproduction.

fact_summary: 消费者通过拍卖平台竞得字画后发现为印刷复制品 / A consumer won a calligraphy painting at auction and discovered it was a printed reproduction.
cn_claim: 拍卖人应说明拍卖标的瑕疵（拍卖法第18条）；以印刷品冒充真迹的构成欺诈。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An auction house that fails to disclose that a work is a reproduction commits misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK require auctioneers to disclose when artwork is a reproduction.

fact_summary: 某工地因未设防护网致高空坠物砸中行人 / A pedestrian was struck by a falling object from a construction site where no safety netting had been installed.
cn_claim: 施工单位应在施工现场设置安全防护设施（民法典第1258条第一款；建设工程安全生产管理条例第30条）。
us_claim: A construction contractor who fails to install overhead protection is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: A contractor who fails to provide safety netting at heights breaches safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require construction sites to install overhead-protection netting.

fact_summary: 被告人因冒充军官招摇撞骗被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for impersonating a military officer to defraud.
cn_claim: 冒充军人招摇撞骗的从重处罚（刑法第372条）。
us_claim: Impersonating a member of the armed forces is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 912.
hk_claim: Impersonating a public officer is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize impersonating military personnel.

fact_summary: 消费者通过海外直邮购买的商品被海关征税后要求商家承担税款被拒 / After paying customs duty on a direct-mail overseas purchase, a consumer sought reimbursement from the merchant, who refused.
cn_claim: 合同中未约定税费由谁承担的进口税费应由买方承担；但经营者应事先告知消费者可能产生的税费（电子商务法第18条）。
us_claim: In international consumer sales, customs duties are generally the buyer's responsibility unless the seller agreed to cover them.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US generally place customs-duty responsibility on the buyer in the absence of contrary agreement.

fact_summary: 消费者通过海外直邮购买的商品被海关征税后要求商家承担税款被拒 / After paying customs duty, a consumer sought reimbursement from the merchant, who refused.
cn_claim: 经营者应事先告知消费者可能产生的税费（电子商务法第18条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Customs duties in international consumer sales are generally the buyer's responsibility.
notes: Both CN and HK generally place customs-duty responsibility on the buyer.

fact_summary: 某KTV因包厢内电线私拉乱接引发火灾 / A fire erupted in a karaoke private room because of unauthorized electrical wiring.
cn_claim: 娱乐场所经营者不得私拉乱接电线并应确保用电安全（消防法第27条第二款、第16条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A nightclub operator who uses unauthorized electrical wiring causing a fire is liable under negligence and fire-code violation theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who uses unsafe electrical modifications breaching fire-safety regulations is liable for resulting damage.
notes: All three jurisdictions prohibit unauthorized electrical wiring in entertainment venues.

fact_summary: 被告人因协助境外人员非法入境务工被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for facilitating the illegal entry of foreign nationals for employment.
cn_claim: 组织他人偷越国境的构成组织他人偷越国境罪（刑法第318条第一款）。
us_claim: Smuggling aliens into the country for employment is alien smuggling under 8 U.S.C. § 1324.
hk_claim: Arranging illegal entry for employment is an offense under the Immigration Ordinance (Cap. 115).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize facilitating illegal entry for employment.

fact_summary: 消费者通过押金租赁模式租用摄影器材后商家以器材有划痕为由拒退押金 / After renting photography equipment through a deposit model, the merchant refused to return the deposit, claiming there were scratches.
cn_claim: 押金应于合同履行完毕后返还（民法典第577条）；以轻微划痕为由拒绝退还全额押金的不符合公平原则。
us_claim: A rental company may only deduct from the deposit for actual damage beyond normal wear and tear.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US limit security-deposit deductions to actual damage beyond normal wear and tear.

fact_summary: 商家以摄影器材有划痕为由拒退押金 / A merchant refused to return the deposit citing scratches on rental equipment.
cn_claim: 押金应于合同履行完毕后返还；轻微划痕不属于应扣款的实质性损坏。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A rental company may deduct only for actual damage, not for ordinary wear and tear.
notes: Both CN and HK limit security-deposit deductions to actual damage beyond normal wear.

fact_summary: 某小区因围墙年久失修倒塌砸伤行人 / A pedestrian was injured by a collapsed wall in a residential compound because it had deteriorated over time without repair.
cn_claim: 建筑物、构筑物发生倒塌造成他人损害的建设单位与施工单位承担连带责任（民法典第1252条第一款）。
us_claim: A property owner who fails to maintain walls in safe condition is liable for resulting injuries under negligence and premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain boundary walls in safe condition breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require property owners to maintain boundary walls.

fact_summary: 被告人因销售含有西布曲明的有毒减肥产品被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for selling toxic weight-loss products containing sibutramine.
cn_claim: 销售掺有有毒有害非食品原料的食品的构成销售有毒、有害食品罪（刑法第144条）。
us_claim: Selling dietary supplements containing banned substances is a crime under the Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act.
hk_claim: Selling products containing prohibited pharmaceutical substances without authorization is an offense under the Pharmacy and Poisons Ordinance (Cap. 138).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the sale of toxic weight-loss products.

fact_summary: 消费者购买精装房后发现装修材料品牌与合同约定不符 / A homebuyer discovered the finishing materials in the fully-renovated apartment were of a different brand than specified in the contract.
cn_claim: 出卖人交付的标的物不符合质量要求的买受人可请求修理、重作、减少价款或赔偿损失（民法典第582条）。
us_claim: A developer who substitutes finishing materials without the buyer's consent is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold developers liable for substituting contracted finishing materials.

fact_summary: 消费者购买精装房后发现装修材料品牌与合同约定不符 / A homebuyer discovered the finishing materials were different from the contracted brand.
cn_claim: 出卖人交付的标的物不符合质量要求的买受人可请求赔偿（民法典第582条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A developer who substitutes materials without the buyer's consent is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK hold developers liable for substituting contracted materials.

fact_summary: 某景区因玻璃栈道面板裂纹未更换致游客踩裂坠落 / A tourist fell through a cracked glass panel on a scenic-area glass walkway because the panel had not been replaced.
cn_claim: 景区经营者应对高风险项目进行经常性检查和维护（民法典第1198条第一款；特种设备安全法第39条）。
us_claim: A scenic-area operator who fails to replace cracked glass panels in walkways is liable under the highest standard of care.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain high-risk attractions in safe condition breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose the highest duty of care on operators of high-risk attractions.

fact_summary: 被告人因职务侵占公司巨额资金后潜逃境外被引渡回国受审 / A defendant embezzled huge company funds, fled abroad, and was extradited back for trial.
cn_claim: 公司工作人员利用职务便利将本单位财物非法占为己有的构成职务侵占罪（刑法第271条第一款）。
us_claim: Embezzlement of corporate funds is a crime under state law; cross-border flight and extradition may involve federal wire-fraud charges.
hk_claim: Embezzlement by an employee is theft under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize employee embezzlement, with extradition available for fugitives.

fact_summary: 消费者在直播间购买名牌包包后发现五金件为劣质替换品 / A consumer purchased a designer handbag through a livestream and discovered the hardware had been replaced with inferior components.
cn_claim: 以替换五金件的翻新包冒充原装正品的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a handbag with replaced hardware as all-original constitutes fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for the sale of handbags with undisclosed replaced components.

fact_summary: 消费者在直播间购买名牌包包后发现五金件为劣质替换品 / A consumer purchased a designer handbag and found the hardware was replaced with inferior parts.
cn_claim: 以替换五金件的翻新包冒充原装正品的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling a handbag with undisclosed replaced hardware as original is misrepresentation and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for undisclosed hardware replacement in luxury goods.

fact_summary: 某网吧因装修使用易燃材料且未配备足够灭火器致火灾蔓延 / A fire in an internet cafe spread rapidly because flammable materials had been used in the renovation and insufficient fire extinguishers were available.
cn_claim: 公共娱乐场所不得在装修中使用易燃材料并应按规定配置消防器材（消防法第26条、第16条第一款第二项）。
us_claim: A business operator who uses flammable materials without adequate fire suppression is liable under negligence and fire-code violation theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to use fire-safe materials and provide adequate firefighting equipment breaches fire-safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require businesses to use fire-safe materials and maintain firefighting equipment.

fact_summary: 被告人因破坏交通设施致火车脱轨被判处重刑 / A defendant was sentenced to a heavy penalty for sabotaging transportation facilities, causing a train derailment.
cn_claim: 破坏交通设施足以使火车发生倾覆危险尚未造成严重后果的处三年以上十年以下有期徒刑（刑法第117条）。
us_claim: Sabotaging railroad tracks is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1992 (terrorist attacks and other violence against railroad carriers).
hk_claim: Damaging railway infrastructure is a serious offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for railroad sabotage.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买手机后发现机身存储容量与宣传严重不符 / A consumer purchased a phone through a livestream and discovered the storage capacity was significantly less than advertised.
cn_claim: 经营者以虚假性能数据误导消费者的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a device with materially misrepresented specifications constitutes fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for misrepresented device specifications.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买手机后发现机身存储与宣传严重不符 / A consumer purchased a phone and found the storage was far less than advertised.
cn_claim: 以虚假性能数据误导消费者的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling a device with materially misrepresented specifications is misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for misrepresented device specifications.

fact_summary: 某公园因树枝修剪不及时在台风中折断砸坏车辆 / A vehicle was damaged by a broken tree branch during a typhoon because the park had not pruned the tree in time.
cn_claim: 林木的所有人或管理人应对树木进行合理管护（民法典第1255条）。
us_claim: A park operator who fails to maintain trees in safe condition is liable for storm-related damage under negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to manage trees to reduce storm risk breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require tree owners to maintain trees to mitigate storm damage.

fact_summary: 被告人因组织实施考试作弊被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for organizing and implementing examination cheating.
cn_claim: 在法律规定的国家考试中组织作弊的构成组织考试作弊罪（刑法第284条之一第一款）。
us_claim: Organizing cheating on standardized tests may constitute wire fraud and conspiracy; specific state laws also apply.
hk_claim: Organizing cheating in public examinations is an offense under the Public Examinations (Prevention of Malpractice) Ordinance (Cap. 519).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize organized cheating on official examinations.

fact_summary: 消费者在二手平台购买的所谓国行iPhone发现为美版改版机 / A consumer purchased an iPhone represented as a domestic-market model on a secondhand platform and discovered it was a modified US version.
cn_claim: 将美版改版机作为国行正品销售的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a modified foreign-model phone as a domestic-market device constitutes fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for misrepresented phone-model origins.

fact_summary: 消费者在二手平台购买所谓的国行iPhone发现为美版改版机 / A consumer purchased a phone represented as domestic-market and discovered it was a modified foreign version.
cn_claim: 将美版改版机作为国行正品销售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling a modified foreign-model phone as a local-market device is misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for misrepresented phone-model origins.

fact_summary: 某城市因暴雨时河道垃圾堵塞导致河水倒灌淹没街道 / A city's streets were flooded by river-water backup during a rainstorm because the river channel was clogged with debris.
cn_claim: 市政管理部门应对河道进行清淤疏浚确保行洪安全（防洪法第27条）。
us_claim: A municipality that fails to clear debris from waterways may be liable for flood damage if the failure was negligent.
hk_claim: A public authority that fails to maintain waterways for flood prevention may be liable for negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions require public authorities to maintain waterways for flood prevention.

fact_summary: 被告人因洗钱罪涉案金额特别巨大被判处重刑 / A defendant was sentenced to a heavy penalty for money laundering involving an extraordinarily large sum.
cn_claim: 明知是毒品犯罪、黑社会性质的组织犯罪、恐怖活动犯罪、走私犯罪、贪污贿赂犯罪、破坏金融管理秩序犯罪、金融诈骗犯罪的所得及其产生的收益为掩饰隐瞒其来源和性质而提供资金账户、协助将财产转换为现金、金融票据、有价证券、通过转账或其他结算方式协助资金转移、协助将资金汇往境外或以其他方法掩饰隐瞒犯罪所得及其收益的来源和性质的构成洗钱罪（刑法第191条）。
us_claim: Money laundering is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1956, with penalties increasing with the amount involved.
hk_claim: Money laundering is an offense under the Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 455).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for large-scale money laundering.

fact_summary: 消费者购买宠物后发现该宠物系被盗宠物且原主人要求返还 / A consumer purchased a pet and discovered it was stolen, with the original owner demanding its return.
cn_claim: 买受人从无权处分人处购得被盗宠物的原所有权人有权追回（民法典第312条）。
us_claim: A buyer of stolen goods, even a good-faith purchaser, generally does not acquire title superior to the true owner.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US protect the original owner's right to recover stolen property.

fact_summary: 消费者购买宠物后发现该宠物系被盗宠物且原主人要求返还 / A consumer purchased a pet and discovered it was stolen, with the original owner demanding return.
cn_claim: 原所有权人有权追回被盗宠物（民法典第312条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: The original owner of stolen property retains superior title against a subsequent purchaser.
notes: Both CN and HK protect the original owner's right to recover stolen property.

fact_summary: 某商业广场因未设防滑处理致雨天入口处多名顾客摔伤 / Multiple customers slipped and fell on a rainy day at a shopping plaza entrance where no anti-slip treatment had been applied.
cn_claim: 经营者应在雨天采取防滑措施确保场所安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A shopping-plaza operator who fails to address known wet-floor hazards is liable under premises-liability theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to take reasonable anti-slip measures in wet conditions breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require commercial occupiers to take anti-slip measures in wet weather.

fact_summary: 被告人因生产销售假药致人死亡被判处重刑 / A defendant was sentenced to a heavy penalty for producing and selling counterfeit drugs that caused a death.
cn_claim: 生产、销售假药致人死亡的构成生产、销售假药罪且从重处罚（刑法第141条第一款）。
us_claim: Distributing counterfeit drugs resulting in death is a serious crime under the Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act.
hk_claim: Selling counterfeit medicines causing death is a serious offense under the Pharmacy and Poisons Ordinance (Cap. 138).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose the most severe penalties for counterfeit drugs causing death.

fact_summary: 加盟商支付高额加盟费后发现品牌方未按约定提供培训和技术支持 / A franchisee paid substantial franchise fees and discovered the franchisor failed to provide the agreed training and technical support.
cn_claim: 特许人应按照合同约定向被特许人提供经营指导和技术支持（商业特许经营管理条例第7条）。
us_claim: A franchisor who fails to provide contracted support services is in breach of the franchise agreement.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold franchisors liable for failing to provide contracted support.

fact_summary: 加盟商支付高额加盟费后发现品牌方未按约定提供培训和技术支持 / A franchisee paid substantial fees but the franchisor failed to provide contracted training and support.
cn_claim: 特许人应按照合同约定提供经营指导和技术支持（商业特许经营管理条例第7条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A franchisor who fails to provide contracted support services is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK hold franchisors liable for failing to provide contracted support.

fact_summary: 某景区因缆车停电应急发电机未启动致游客被困高空 / Tourists were trapped in cable cars at altitude because the emergency generator failed to start during a power outage.
cn_claim: 客运索道运营使用单位应配备应急备用电源并确保其有效（特种设备安全法第39条）。
us_claim: A cable-car operator who fails to maintain emergency power systems is liable for distress and any resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain emergency systems for passenger lifts breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require cable-car operators to maintain emergency power systems.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法获取地理信息数据并提供给境外机构被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for illegally obtaining geographic-information data and providing it to an overseas organization.
cn_claim: 非法获取国家秘密并提供给境外机构的构成为境外窃取、刺探、收买、非法提供国家秘密、情报罪（刑法第111条）。
us_claim: Transmitting classified geospatial data to a foreign entity is espionage under the Espionage Act (18 U.S.C. § 794).
hk_claim: Communicating official secrets including geospatial data to a foreign agent is an offense under the Official Secrets Ordinance (Cap. 521).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the transfer of sensitive geospatial data to foreign entities.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买新疆棉花被后发现填充物为化纤 / A consumer purchased a Xinjiang-cotton comforter through a livestream and discovered the filling was polyester fiber.
cn_claim: 以化纤被冒充纯棉被的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a synthetic-filled product misrepresented as natural cotton constitutes fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for misrepresented filling materials.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买新疆棉花被后发现填充物为化纤 / A consumer purchased a cotton comforter and found the filling was synthetic.
cn_claim: 以化纤被冒充纯棉被的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling synthetic-filled products as natural cotton is fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for misrepresented filling materials.

fact_summary: 某酒店因中央空调系统未清洗致客人集体患上过敏性肺炎 / Multiple hotel guests contracted hypersensitivity pneumonitis because the central air-conditioning system had not been cleaned.
cn_claim: 酒店经营者应保证集中空调通风系统符合卫生标准（公共场所集中空调通风系统卫生管理办法第9条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A hotel that fails to maintain HVAC cleanliness is liable for resulting guest illnesses.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain ventilation systems in hygienic condition breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require hotels to maintain HVAC system hygiene.

fact_summary: 被告人因组织多名外籍女子入境卖淫被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for organizing the entry of multiple foreign women for prostitution.
cn_claim: 组织他人卖淫的构成组织卖淫罪（刑法第358条第一款）；涉及外国人入境的从重处罚。
us_claim: Organizing the entry of foreign nationals for prostitution is a crime under the Mann Act (18 U.S.C. § 2421) and human-trafficking statutes.
hk_claim: Organizing the entry of persons for prostitution is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200) and the Immigration Ordinance (Cap. 115).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize organizing cross-border prostitution.

fact_summary: 消费者在航空公司官网购买特价机票后被告知需额外支付行李托运费 / After purchasing a discounted ticket on an airline's official website, a consumer was told an additional baggage fee was required.
cn_claim: 经营者应明示商品或服务的价格（价格法第13条第一款）；未明示行李托运费即要求支付的构成价格违法行为。
us_claim: Airlines must clearly disclose all mandatory fees including baggage charges under DOT regulations (14 C.F.R. Part 399).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require airlines to disclose mandatory baggage fees.

fact_summary: 消费者购买特价机票后被告知需额外支付行李托运费 / After purchasing a discounted ticket, a consumer was told additional baggage fees were required.
cn_claim: 经营者应明示服务的价格不得收取未予标明的费用（价格法第13条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An airline that fails to disclose mandatory charges upfront may be engaged in misleading conduct.
notes: Both CN and HK require airlines to disclose mandatory fees upfront.

fact_summary: 某电厂因冷却塔结构老化局部坍塌致工人被砸伤 / A worker was injured when a section of a cooling tower at a power plant collapsed due to structural aging.
cn_claim: 生产经营单位应对建筑物进行定期检查维护（安全生产法第36条第一款）。
us_claim: A power-plant operator who fails to inspect and maintain structural integrity is liable for resulting injuries under OSHA standards.
hk_claim: A factory occupier who fails to maintain structural safety breaches safety regulations and the common duty of care.
