notes: All three jurisdictions require industrial-structure inspection and maintenance.

fact_summary: 被告人因在互联网上散布他人裸照并进行人身威胁被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for posting nude photos of another person online and making threats.
cn_claim: 散布他人隐私照片并进行人身威胁的可构成寻衅滋事罪（刑法第293条）、侵犯公民个人信息罪（刑法第253条之一）。
us_claim: Posting nonconsensual intimate images and making threats is a crime under state revenge-porn and cyberstalking statutes.
hk_claim: Publishing intimate images without consent and making threats is criminal intimidation and an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the publication of nonconsensual intimate images combined with threats.

fact_summary: 农民工工资被包工头恶意拖欠一年 / A subcontractor willfully withheld migrant workers' wages for one year.
cn_claim: 用人单位应按时足额支付劳动者工资；拖欠工资的劳动者可向劳动行政部门投诉或提起劳动仲裁（劳动法第50条）。
us_claim: Willful nonpayment of wages may constitute a violation of the Fair Labor Standards Act and state wage-payment laws.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require timely payment of wages and provide enforcement mechanisms for wage claims.

fact_summary: 包工头恶意拖欠农民工工资一年 / A subcontractor willfully withheld migrant workers' wages for one year.
cn_claim: 用人单位应按时足额支付劳动者工资（劳动法第50条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An employer who willfully fails to pay wages is in breach of the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) and may be prosecuted.
notes: Both CN and HK require timely wage payment and provide enforcement mechanisms.

fact_summary: 某商场因防火卷帘门故障未能降下致火势蔓延 / A fire spread through a shopping mall because a fire-shutter door malfunctioned and failed to descend.
cn_claim: 商场等人员密集场所应确保防火卷帘等消防设施完好有效（消防法第16条第一款第二项）。
us_claim: A shopping-mall operator who fails to maintain fire-shutter systems is liable for resulting fire damage under negligence and fire-code violation theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain fire-safety shutters breaches fire-safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require commercial occupiers to maintain fire-shutter systems.

fact_summary: 被告人因破坏军婚被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for disrupting a military marriage.
cn_claim: 明知是现役军人的配偶而与之同居或结婚的构成破坏军婚罪（刑法第259条第一款）。
us_claim: There is no separate federal crime for adultery with a service member's spouse, though it may be prosecuted under the Uniform Code of Military Justice for the service member.
hk_claim: There is no specific offense of disrupting a military marriage in Hong Kong.
notes: CN has a specific crime for disrupting military marriages, while US and HK do not, creating a legal asymmetry.

fact_summary: 消费者通过房屋中介租房后发现该房屋已被房主挂网出售 / After renting through an agency, a tenant discovered the property was listed for sale online by the owner.
cn_claim: 出租人应保证租赁期间租赁物符合约定用途且第三人不对租赁物主张权利（民法典第708条）。
us_claim: A tenant whose leased premises are sold during the lease term retains possessory rights under the lease.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US protect the tenant's possessory rights when the property is sold during the lease.

fact_summary: 消费者租房后发现该房屋已被房主挂网出售 / After renting, a tenant discovered the property was listed for sale.
cn_claim: 出租人应保证第三人不对租赁物主张权利（民法典第708条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A sale of the property does not disturb the tenant's possessory rights under the existing tenancy.
notes: Both CN and HK protect the tenant's possessory rights when the property is sold.

fact_summary: 某高速公路因路面坑槽未修补致车辆失控撞上护栏 / A vehicle crashed into a guardrail after losing control on an unrepaired pothole on a highway.
cn_claim: 公路管理机构应对公路进行巡查并修复损毁路面（公路安全保护条例第44条）。
us_claim: A highway authority that fails to repair known pavement defects within a reasonable time is liable for resulting accidents.
hk_claim: A public authority that fails to maintain highway surfaces in safe condition is liable for negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions require highway authorities to repair pavement defects.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法收购濒危野生动物制品被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for illegally purchasing endangered-wildlife products.
cn_claim: 非法收购国家重点保护的珍贵、濒危野生动物及其制品的构成危害珍贵、濒危野生动物罪（刑法第341条第一款）。
us_claim: Purchasing products from endangered species is a crime under the Endangered Species Act.
hk_claim: Purchasing endangered-species products without a license is an offense under the Protection of Endangered Species of Animals and Plants Ordinance (Cap. 586).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the purchase of endangered-species products.

fact_summary: 消费者购买保险后因同一事故遭遇两家保险公司互相推诿 / After purchasing insurance, a consumer faced two insurers each disclaiming responsibility for the same accident.
cn_claim: 重复保险的各保险人按照其保险金额与保险金额总和的比例承担赔偿保险金的责任（保险法第56条第二款）。
us_claim: Under other-insurance clauses, multiple insurers covering the same risk must contribute pro rata to the loss.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require multiple insurers to contribute pro rata to covered losses.

fact_summary: 消费者因同一事故遭遇两家保险公司互相推诿 / After an accident, two insurers each disclaimed responsibility.
cn_claim: 重复保险的各保险人按比例承担赔偿（保险法第56条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Where double insurance exists, insurers contribute rateably to the loss.
notes: Both CN and HK require multiple insurers to contribute pro rata to covered losses.

fact_summary: 某游乐场因跳楼机制动系统失效致座椅突然坠落多人受伤 / Multiple riders were injured when a drop-tower ride's braking system failed and the seat assembly plummeted.
cn_claim: 大型游乐设施运营使用单位应确保安全保护装置有效（特种设备安全法第39条第一款）。
us_claim: An amusement-park operator is liable under the highest standard of care for braking-system failures on thrill rides.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain ride-safety systems breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose the highest standard of care on operators of high-thrill rides.

fact_summary: 被告人因走私贵重金属被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for smuggling precious metals.
cn_claim: 走私国家禁止出口的贵重金属的构成走私贵重金属罪（刑法第151条第二款）。
us_claim: Smuggling precious metals in violation of export controls may be prosecuted under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act (50 U.S.C. § 1705).
hk_claim: Smuggling precious metals may be an offense under the Import and Export Ordinance (Cap. 60).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize precious-metal smuggling.

fact_summary: 消费者购买窗帘后发现实物颜色与网页展示严重色差且商家拒绝退货 / A consumer purchased curtains and found a severe color difference from the website display; the merchant refused to accept a return.
cn_claim: 经营者提供的商品与展示不符的构成欺诈应增加赔偿（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: A merchant who ships goods materially different from the displayed product is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies when goods are materially different from the advertised display.

fact_summary: 消费者购买窗帘后发现实物颜色与网页严重色差且商家拒绝退货 / A consumer found severe color difference and the merchant refused return.
cn_claim: 经营者提供的商品与展示不符的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A merchant who ships goods materially different from the display is liable for misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for materially different goods.

fact_summary: 某小区因未设电动车集中充电桩致居民飞线充电引发火灾 / A fire erupted in a residential compound because residents used improvised overhead wiring to charge e-bikes where no centralized charging station had been provided.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应在小区内设置符合安全要求的电动自行车充电设施并禁止飞线充电（民法典第942条第一款）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to provide safe EV-charging infrastructure may be liable for fires caused by residents' makeshift charging.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to provide safe charging facilities and permits hazardous wiring breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require property managers to provide safe e-bike charging facilities.

fact_summary: 被告人因多次寻衅滋事被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for repeatedly picking quarrels and provoking trouble.
cn_claim: 多次随意殴打他人、追逐拦截辱骂恐吓他人、强拿硬要任意损毁占用公私财物、在公共场所起哄闹事造成公共场所秩序严重混乱的构成寻衅滋事罪（刑法第293条）。
us_claim: Repeated disorderly conduct may constitute harassment, assault, or disorderly-conduct offenses under state law.
hk_claim: Repeated public-order offenses may be prosecuted under the Public Order Ordinance (Cap. 245).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize repeated disorderly conduct.

fact_summary: 消费者通过海外代购购买奶粉后发现包装与国内官方渠道完全不同 / A consumer purchased infant formula through an overseas purchasing agent and discovered the packaging was entirely different from the official domestic channel.
cn_claim: 海外代购商品不符合我国食品安全标准的消费者可主张价款十倍赔偿（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: Imported food products that do not comply with FDA labeling and safety requirements are subject to enforcement.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require imported food to comply with domestic safety standards.

fact_summary: 消费者通过海外代购购买奶粉后发现包装与国内官方渠道完全不同 / A consumer purchased formula and found the packaging entirely different from the official domestic version.
cn_claim: 不符合我国食品安全标准的消费者可主张价款十倍赔偿（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Imported infant formula must comply with applicable food-safety standards.
notes: Both CN and HK require imported formula to comply with domestic safety standards.

fact_summary: 某商场因中庭玻璃穹顶未定期检查致自爆玻璃碎片坠落伤人 / Falling glass shards from a spontaneously shattered skylight in a shopping-mall atrium injured shoppers because the glass had not been periodically inspected.
cn_claim: 商场管理人应定期检查并对存在安全隐患的建筑构件进行维修或更换（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A shopping-mall operator who fails to inspect overhead glass for deterioration is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain overhead glazing in safe condition breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require commercial occupiers to inspect overhead glass regularly.

fact_summary: 被告人因破坏计算机信息系统致证券交易所交易中断被判处重刑 / A defendant was sentenced to a heavy penalty for sabotaging a computer system, causing a stock-exchange trading outage.
cn_claim: 破坏计算机信息系统造成严重后果的构成破坏计算机信息系统罪（刑法第286条第一款、第二款）。
us_claim: Intentionally damaging a protected computer causing a major outage is a federal crime under the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act (18 U.S.C. § 1030(a)(5)).
hk_claim: Damaging a computer system causing a serious disruption is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for computer sabotage of critical systems.

fact_summary: 消费者购买净水器后发现滤芯寿命仅为宣传的一半 / A consumer purchased a water purifier and discovered the filter lifespan was only half of the advertised duration.
cn_claim: 经营者以虚假数据宣传产品性能的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a product with materially misrepresented performance specifications constitutes fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for misrepresented filter-lifespan claims.

fact_summary: 消费者购买净水器后发现滤芯寿命仅为宣传的一半 / A consumer purchased a water purifier and found the filter lifespan was half the advertised duration.
cn_claim: 以虚假数据宣传产品性能的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling a product with materially misrepresented performance is misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for misrepresented filter-lifespan claims.

fact_summary: 某游泳池因水质监测设备故障未发现余氯超标致多名泳客皮肤过敏 / Multiple swimmers suffered skin allergies because the pool's water-quality monitoring equipment had failed and excess chlorine was not detected.
cn_claim: 游泳场所经营者应确保水质监测设备正常运行并维持卫生标准（公共场所卫生管理条例第3条第一款第二项）。
us_claim: A pool operator who fails to maintain water-quality monitoring equipment is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to monitor pool-water chemistry breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require pool operators to maintain water-quality monitoring.

fact_summary: 被告人因贩卖淫秽物品牟利被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for selling obscene materials for profit.
cn_claim: 以牟利为目的贩卖淫秽物品的构成贩卖淫秽物品牟利罪（刑法第363条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling obscene materials for profit is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1465 and § 1466.
hk_claim: Publishing obscene articles for gain is an offense under the Control of Obscene and Indecent Articles Ordinance (Cap. 390).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the commercial distribution of obscene materials.

fact_summary: 消费者购买预售手机后商家以芯片短缺为由要求加价否则不发货 / After purchasing a pre-sale phone, the merchant demanded a price increase citing a chip shortage, threatening not to ship otherwise.
cn_claim: 经营者应按照约定的价格履行合同（民法典第577条）；单方要求加价构成违约。
us_claim: A merchant who demands a post-contract price increase threatening non-delivery is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit post-contract price-increase demands.

fact_summary: 商家以芯片短缺为由要求加价否则不发货 / A merchant demanded a price increase threatening not to ship, citing a chip shortage.
cn_claim: 单方要求加价构成违约（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A merchant who demands a price increase after the contract is formed is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit post-contract price-increase demands.

fact_summary: 某市因排水管网建设滞后致片区暴雨内涝市民财产受损 / Residents' properties were damaged by flooding in a district because the municipal drainage network had been inadequately developed.
cn_claim: 城市排水设施的建设和管理应满足城市排涝要求（城镇排水与污水处理条例第13条）。
us_claim: A municipality that fails to provide adequate stormwater infrastructure may be liable for resulting flood damage if the failure was unreasonable.
hk_claim: A public authority that fails to maintain adequate drainage may be liable for resulting flood damage.
notes: All three jurisdictions require municipalities to provide adequate drainage infrastructure.

fact_summary: 被告人因购买被盗车辆并拆解出售零部件 / A defendant purchased a stolen vehicle and sold its parts after dismantling it.
cn_claim: 明知是犯罪所得的赃物而予以收购并拆解销售的构成掩饰、隐瞒犯罪所得罪（刑法第312条第一款）。
us_claim: Buying a stolen vehicle and dismantling it for parts constitutes trafficking in stolen property and operating a chop shop under state law.
hk_claim: Handling stolen goods, including dismantling a stolen vehicle for parts, is an offense under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize dismantling stolen vehicles for parts.

fact_summary: 消费者购买油烟机后发现排烟效果远低于商家演示效果 / A consumer purchased a range hood and discovered its smoke-extraction performance was far below the merchant's demonstration.
cn_claim: 经营者以虚假演示误导消费者的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a product that performs materially below the demonstrated performance constitutes fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for products that materially underperform live demonstrations.

fact_summary: 消费者购买油烟机后发现排烟效果远低于商家演示效果 / A consumer found the range hood's performance was far below the merchant's demonstration.
cn_claim: 以虚假演示误导消费者的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A merchant who demonstrates a product that materially outperforms the actual product is liable for misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for products that underperform live demonstrations.

fact_summary: 某医院因手术室空气净化系统故障致患者术后感染 / A patient contracted a post-operative infection because the operating-room air-purification system had failed.
cn_claim: 医疗机构应确保手术室符合卫生标准（医院感染管理办法第13条）。
us_claim: A hospital that fails to maintain sterile-air systems in operating rooms is liable for resulting infections.
hk_claim: A hospital that fails to maintain operating-room hygiene is liable for resulting infections.
notes: All three jurisdictions require hospitals to maintain sterile operating-room environments.

fact_summary: 被告人因在饮用水源地投放危险物质致供水中断 / A defendant introduced hazardous substances into a drinking-water source, disrupting the water supply.
cn_claim: 投放毒害性、放射性、传染病病原体等物质危害公共安全的构成投放危险物质罪（刑法第114条）。
us_claim: Introducing a hazardous substance into a public water system is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1365 (tampering with consumer products).
hk_claim: Contaminating a water supply is a serious offense under the Waterworks Ordinance (Cap. 102).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the contamination of public water supplies.

fact_summary: 消费者委托留学中介申请学校后发现中介伪造申请材料 / A consumer discovered the study-abroad agency had fabricated application materials after entrusting them with a school application.
cn_claim: 中介服务机构提供虚假材料的应对消费者承担损害赔偿责任（民法典第577条；消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: An educational consultant who fabricates application materials commits fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies when educational agencies fabricate application materials.

fact_summary: 消费者委托留学中介申请学校后发现中介伪造申请材料 / A consumer discovered the study-abroad agency fabricated application materials.
cn_claim: 中介服务机构提供虚假材料应对消费者承担损害赔偿责任（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An educational agency that fabricates documents commits fraud and misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies when educational agencies fabricate application materials.

fact_summary: 某广场因音乐喷泉漏电致儿童触电受伤 / A child was electrocuted by a leaking current from a musical fountain in a public square.
cn_claim: 音乐喷泉的管理人应确保电气设备安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A fountain operator who fails to maintain safe electrical systems is liable for resulting injuries under negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain electrical safety in water features breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require fountain operators to maintain electrical safety.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法生产、销售间谍专用器材被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for illegally manufacturing and selling espionage devices.
cn_claim: 非法生产、销售专用间谍器材的构成非法生产、销售专用间谍器材罪（刑法第283条）。
us_claim: Manufacturing and selling devices primarily designed for surreptitious interception is a crime under the Wiretap Act (18 U.S.C. § 2512).
hk_claim: Manufacturing and selling interception devices is an offense under the Telecommunications Ordinance (Cap. 106).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the manufacture and sale of espionage devices.

fact_summary: 消费者在平台订购民宿后发现实际房源不存在且平台拒绝退款 / A consumer booked a vacation rental on a platform and discovered the listing was fictitious; the platform refused to refund.
cn_claim: 电子商务平台经营者知道平台内经营者销售的商品或提供的服务不符合保障消费者权益的要求未采取必要措施的依法与该平台内经营者承担连带责任（电子商务法第38条第一款）。
us_claim: A booking platform that fails to remove known fraudulent listings is liable for aiding and abetting fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US impose liability on platforms that fail to act on known fraudulent listings.

fact_summary: 消费者在平台订购民宿后发现实际房源不存在且平台拒绝退款 / A consumer booked a vacation rental and found the listing was fictitious; the platform refused to refund.
cn_claim: 平台知道经营者侵害消费者权益未采取必要措施的承担连带责任（电子商务法第38条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A booking platform that fails to act on known fraudulent listings may be liable.
notes: Both CN and HK impose liability on platforms for known fraudulent listings.

fact_summary: 某景区的摇摆桥绳索断裂致桥上多名游客落水受伤 / Multiple tourists fell from a rope bridge that snapped at a scenic area, suffering injuries.
cn_claim: 景区经营者应对游乐设施进行定期安全检查并及时更换老化部件（民法典第1198条第一款；特种设备安全法第39条）。
us_claim: A scenic-area operator who fails to inspect and replace aging rope-bridge components is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain rope bridges safely breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require scenic-area operators to maintain rope bridges.

fact_summary: 被告人因在高铁上霸座且拒不改正被行政拘留后又在列车上殴打劝阻旅客 / A defendant was administratively detained for seat-hogging on a high-speed train and refusing to move, then later assaulted a fellow passenger who tried to intervene.
cn_claim: 在公共交通工具上随意殴打他人的构成寻衅滋事罪（刑法第293条第一款第一项）。
us_claim: Assaulting another passenger on public transportation is a crime under state law.
hk_claim: Assaulting a person on public transport is an offense under the Offences Against the Person Ordinance (Cap. 212).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize assault on public transport.

fact_summary: 消费者购买保险后因患重大疾病申请理赔被以未如实告知为由拒赔 / After a consumer purchased insurance and filed a claim for a critical illness, the insurer denied coverage citing non-disclosure.
cn_claim: 投保人因重大过失未履行如实告知义务足以影响保险人决定是否承保或提高保险费率的保险人有权解除合同但保险人明知或因重大过失未在法定期限内行使解除权的不得拒绝赔付（保险法第16条第二款、第三款、第六款）。
us_claim: An insurer may rescind a policy for material misrepresentation, but must do so within the contestability period, typically two years.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US balance the insurer's right to rescind for non-disclosure against time limits and consumer protection.

fact_summary: 消费者因患重大疾病理赔被以未如实告知为由拒赔 / An insurer denied a critical-illness claim citing non-disclosure.
cn_claim: 保险人明知或因重大过失未在法定期限内行使解除权的不得拒绝赔付（保险法第16条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An insurer who seeks to avoid a policy for non-disclosure must do so within a reasonable time.
notes: Both CN and HK balance insurers' rescission rights against consumer protection.

fact_summary: 某老旧小区因外墙附着通信电缆过重致墙体开裂 / A wall in an aging residential compound cracked because the attached communication cables were too heavy.
cn_claim: 共用设施设备的管理人应确保建筑物安全（民法典第942条第一款）。
us_claim: A property manager and the utility company that installed heavy cabling without ensuring structural adequacy are liable for resulting damage.
hk_claim: An occupier and service provider who fail to ensure structural safety when attaching equipment are liable for resulting damage.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose duties on both property managers and utility companies for structural safety.

fact_summary: 被告人因在互联网上组织淫秽表演被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for organizing obscene performances on the internet.
cn_claim: 组织进行淫秽表演的构成组织淫秽表演罪（刑法第365条）。
us_claim: Transmitting obscene performances over the internet is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1465.
hk_claim: Organizing obscene performances for publication is an offense under the Control of Obscene and Indecent Articles Ordinance (Cap. 390).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize organizing online obscene performances.

fact_summary: 消费者在电商平台购买品牌运动鞋后发现为高仿货且平台拒绝担责 / A consumer purchased branded sneakers on an e-commerce platform and discovered they were high-quality counterfeits; the platform refused to take responsibility.
cn_claim: 平台经营者知道或应当知道平台内经营者销售的商品侵害消费者权益未采取必要措施的依法承担连带责任（电子商务法第38条第一款）。
us_claim: An online marketplace that fails to act on known counterfeit listings may be liable for contributory trademark infringement.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US impose liability on platforms that fail to address known counterfeit listings.

fact_summary: 消费者在电商平台购买品牌运动鞋后发现为高仿货且平台拒绝担责 / A consumer purchased branded sneakers that proved to be high-quality counterfeits and the platform refused responsibility.
cn_claim: 平台知道侵害消费者权益未采取必要措施的承担连带责任（电子商务法第38条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A platform that fails to remove known counterfeit listings may be liable.
notes: Both CN and HK impose liability on platforms for known counterfeit listings.

fact_summary: 某市因道路井盖被盗未及时补装致车辆坠入受损 / A vehicle was damaged when it fell into an open manhole on a city road because the stolen cover had not been replaced in time.
cn_claim: 市政设施管理部门应对井盖等设施进行巡查并及时修复缺损（城市道路管理条例第24条）。
us_claim: A municipality that fails to promptly replace a missing manhole cover is liable for resulting damage.
hk_claim: A public authority that fails to maintain road fixtures in safe condition is liable for negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions require municipalities to promptly replace missing manhole covers.

fact_summary: 被告人因违规出具金融票证被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for illegally issuing financial instruments.
cn_claim: 银行或其他金融机构的工作人员违反规定为他人出具信用证或其他保函、票据、存单、资信证明造成较大损失的构成违规出具金融票证罪（刑法第188条第一款）。
us_claim: A bank officer who issues false financial instruments is liable for bank fraud and may face criminal charges.
hk_claim: Issuing false financial instruments is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the issuance of false financial instruments.

fact_summary: 消费者购买手机后在保修期内出现故障被以人为损坏为由拒绝保修 / A consumer's phone malfunctioned within the warranty period, but the manufacturer refused warranty service claiming user damage.
cn_claim: 经营者应按照约定对保修期内的商品提供免费修理服务（消费者权益保护法第24条第一款）。
us_claim: Under the Magnuson-Moss Warranty Act, a warrantor must demonstrate that the defect was caused by the consumer to deny warranty coverage.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US place the burden on the warrantor to prove user damage when denying warranty claims.

fact_summary: 手机在保修期内出现故障被以人为损坏为由拒绝保修 / A manufacturer refused warranty service claiming user damage.
cn_claim: 经营者应按照约定对保修期内的商品提供免费修理（消费者权益保护法第24条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A warrantor who denies a claim must demonstrate that the defect was caused by the consumer.
notes: Both CN and HK place the burden on the warrantor to prove user damage.

fact_summary: 某游乐场因碰碰车防撞条老化脱落致儿童碰撞受伤 / A child was injured in a bumper-car collision at an amusement park because the aging rubber bumpers had fallen off.
cn_claim: 游乐设施经营者应对安全防护装置进行日常检查和维护（民法典第1198条第一款；特种设备安全法第39条第一款）。
us_claim: An amusement-park operator who fails to maintain bumper-car safety features is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain ride-safety equipment breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require amusement-park operators to maintain ride-safety features.

fact_summary: 被告人因组织残疾人进行恐怖活动被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for organizing disabled persons to carry out terrorist activities.
cn_claim: 组织、领导恐怖活动组织的构成组织、领导恐怖组织罪（刑法第120条第一款）。
us_claim: Providing material support to a terrorist organization is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 2339B.
hk_claim: Organizing terrorist activities is an offense under the United Nations (Anti-Terrorism Measures) Ordinance (Cap. 575).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose the most severe penalties for organizing terrorist activities.

fact_summary: 消费者通过跨境代购购买药品后发现药品未经我国批准上市 / A consumer purchased medication through a cross-border purchasing agent and discovered the drug was not approved for sale in China.
cn_claim: 未取得药品批准证明文件进口的药品按假药论处；代购未经批准药品的消费者可要求代购方承担赔偿责任（药品管理法第98条第四款）。
us_claim: Importing unapproved drugs into the U.S. is prohibited by the FDA; the agent who facilitated the import may be liable.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit the import of unapproved pharmaceutical products.

fact_summary: 消费者通过跨境代购购买药品后发现药品未经批准上市 / A consumer purchased medication and discovered it was not approved for sale.
cn_claim: 未取得药品批准证明文件进口的药品按假药论处（药品管理法第98条第四款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Importing unregistered pharmaceutical products is an offense under the Pharmacy and Poisons Ordinance (Cap. 138).
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit the import of unapproved pharmaceutical products.

fact_summary: 某工地因脚手架未按规范搭设致坍塌多人伤亡 / Multiple workers were killed or injured when scaffolding collapsed at a construction site because it was not erected to specifications.
cn_claim: 施工单位应按照国家标准搭设脚手架并进行验收（建设工程安全生产管理条例第28条）。
us_claim: A construction contractor who fails to erect scaffolding to OSHA standards is liable for resulting injuries and deaths.
hk_claim: A contractor who fails to erect scaffolding safely breaches safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require scaffolding to be erected to safety standards.

fact_summary: 被告人因冒充国家机关工作人员招摇撞骗被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for impersonating a state functionary to defraud.
cn_claim: 冒充国家机关工作人员招摇撞骗的构成招摇撞骗罪（刑法第279条第一款）。
us_claim: Impersonating a federal officer or employee is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 912.
hk_claim: Impersonating a public officer is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize impersonating government officials.

fact_summary: 消费者购买全屋定制家具后发现板材非合同约定的环保等级 / A consumer purchased custom whole-house furniture and discovered the panels were not the contracted environmental-grade material.
cn_claim: 承揽人交付的工作成果不符合质量要求的定作人可请求修理、重作、减少报酬或赔偿损失（民法典第781条）。
us_claim: A furniture contractor who substitutes non-conforming materials is in breach of contract and the implied warranty of fitness.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for non-conforming materials in custom furniture.

fact_summary: 消费者购买全屋定制家具后发现板材非合同约定的环保等级 / A consumer purchased custom furniture and found the panels were not the contracted environmental grade.
cn_claim: 承揽人交付的工作成果不符合质量要求的定作人可请求赔偿（民法典第781条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A furniture contractor who substitutes non-conforming materials is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for non-conforming materials in custom furniture.

fact_summary: 某小区因未定期清理外墙广告架致其锈蚀脱落砸伤快递员 / A delivery courier was injured by a rusty advertising-frame bracket that fell from a residential building because it had not been regularly maintained.
cn_claim: 建筑物上的搁置物发生脱落造成他人损害的所有人与管理人不能证明自己无过错的应承担侵权责任（民法典第1253条）。
us_claim: A building owner who fails to maintain exterior fixtures is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain exterior fixtures breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require building owners to maintain exterior fixtures.

fact_summary: 被告人因制作并传播计算机病毒致金融系统瘫痪 / A defendant created and spread a computer virus that paralyzed a financial system.
cn_claim: 故意制作、传播计算机病毒等破坏性程序影响计算机系统正常运行造成严重后果的构成破坏计算机信息系统罪（刑法第286条第一款、第三款）。
us_claim: Intentionally damaging a protected computer is a federal crime under the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act (18 U.S.C. § 1030(a)(5)).
hk_claim: Unauthorized modification of computer data causing a serious disruption is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for computer-virus attacks on financial systems.

fact_summary: 消费者购买盲盒后发现同一系列重复率异常高涉嫌概率造假 / A consumer purchased mystery boxes and discovered an abnormally high duplication rate, suspecting the probability had been manipulated.
cn_claim: 经营者以虚假的概率宣传诱骗消费者的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling loot boxes with misrepresented odds is deceptive under the FTC Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit misrepresented probability claims in mystery-box sales.

fact_summary: 消费者购买盲盒后发现同一系列重复率异常高涉嫌概率造假 / A consumer found an abnormally high duplication rate in mystery boxes, suspecting probability manipulation.
cn_claim: 以虚假概率宣传诱骗消费者的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A trader who misrepresents the odds of obtaining items in mystery boxes commits misleading conduct.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit misrepresented probability claims in mystery-box sales.

fact_summary: 某医院因检验科设备未校准致误诊延误患者治疗 / A patient's treatment was delayed because the hospital's laboratory equipment had not been calibrated, causing a misdiagnosis.
cn_claim: 医疗机构应确保医疗设备处于良好状态并定期校验（医疗器械监督管理条例第50条；民法典第1221条）。
us_claim: A hospital that fails to calibrate diagnostic equipment is liable for resulting misdiagnosis under medical-malpractice theories.
hk_claim: A hospital that fails to maintain and calibrate equipment is liable for resulting misdiagnosis.
notes: All three jurisdictions require hospitals to calibrate diagnostic equipment.

fact_summary: 被告人因在河湖管理范围内非法采砂造成生态环境严重破坏 / A defendant illegally extracted sand within a river-management zone, causing severe ecological damage.
cn_claim: 未取得采矿许可证擅自采矿造成生态环境严重破坏的构成非法采矿罪（刑法第343条第一款）。
us_claim: Unauthorized sand mining in navigable waters causing environmental damage violates the Clean Water Act.
hk_claim: Unauthorized sand extraction is an offense under the Sand Ordinance (Cap. 147).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unauthorized sand mining causing environmental harm.

fact_summary: 消费者通过按揭贷款购房后银行在放款前提高利率 / After a consumer secured a mortgage to buy a home, the bank raised the interest rate before disbursing the loan.
cn_claim: 贷款人应按合同约定的利率履行（民法典第577条）；单方提高利率构成违约。
us_claim: A lender who changes the interest rate after the loan commitment but before closing is in breach of contract unless the commitment allows for floating rates.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit lenders from unilaterally changing mortgage terms after commitment.

fact_summary: 银行在放款前提高利率 / A bank raised the interest rate before disbursing the loan.
cn_claim: 单方提高利率构成违约（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A lender who unilaterally changes the agreed terms is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit lenders from unilaterally changing mortgage terms.

fact_summary: 某市因桥梁伸缩缝破损未修复致车辆轮胎被刺破失控 / A vehicle lost control after its tire was punctured by a damaged bridge-expansion joint that had not been repaired.
cn_claim: 城市桥梁管理机构应对桥梁伸缩缝进行养护维修（城市桥梁检测和养护维修管理办法第14条）。
us_claim: A municipality that fails to repair damaged bridge joints is liable for resulting accidents.
hk_claim: A public authority that fails to maintain bridge components is liable for negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions require bridge-maintenance authorities to repair expansion joints.

fact_summary: 被告人因盗掘古墓葬被判处重刑 / A defendant was sentenced to a heavy penalty for excavating ancient tombs.
cn_claim: 盗掘具有历史、艺术、科学价值的古墓葬的构成盗掘古墓葬罪（刑法第328条第一款第一项）。
us_claim: Unauthorized excavation of archaeological sites on federal or tribal lands is a crime under the Archaeological Resources Protection Act.
hk_claim: Unauthorized excavation of antiquities is an offense under the Antiquities and Monuments Ordinance (Cap. 53).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unauthorized excavation of ancient burial sites.

fact_summary: 消费者委托拍卖公司拍卖藏品后拍卖公司以未成交为由拒绝退还藏品 / After entrusting collectibles to an auction house, the consumer was refused return of the items after they allegedly failed to sell.
cn_claim: 拍卖人应妥善保管委托人交付的拍卖标的（拍卖法第19条）；拍卖程序结束后应及时退还。
us_claim: An auction house that fails to return consigned property is liable for conversion.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require auction houses to return unsold consigned property.

fact_summary: 拍卖公司以未成交为由拒绝退还委托人藏品 / An auction house refused to return consigned collectibles after they allegedly failed to sell.
cn_claim: 拍卖人应妥善保管委托人交付的拍卖标的并应及时退还（拍卖法第19条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An auction house that fails to return consigned property upon demand is in breach of its duty as bailee.
notes: Both CN and HK require auction houses to return unsold consigned property.

fact_summary: 某市因地下管道施工后未回填密实致路面塌陷车辆坠入 / A vehicle plunged into a sinkhole on a city street because an underground-pipe trench had not been backfilled and compacted properly.
cn_claim: 施工单位应对施工造成的路面进行修复并确保其安全（民法典第1258条第一款）。
us_claim: A contractor who fails to properly backfill a trench is liable for resulting damage.
hk_claim: A contractor who fails to restore the road surface adequately is liable for resulting damage.
notes: All three jurisdictions require contractors to restore road surfaces after excavation.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法获取内幕信息并以此交易获利被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for trading on illegally obtained inside information for profit.
cn_claim: 非法获取证券交易内幕信息的人员在内幕信息敏感期内从事相关证券交易的构成内幕交易罪（刑法第180条第一款）。
us_claim: Trading on misappropriated inside information violates Rule 10b-5; United States v. O'Hagan, 521 U.S. 642 (1997).
hk_claim: Insider dealing, including trading on misappropriated information, is an offense under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize trading on misappropriated inside information.
