notes: All three jurisdictions require scenic-area operators to install safety barriers at cliff edges.

fact_summary: 被告人因多次盗窃惯犯被判处重刑 / A habitual thief was sentenced to a severe penalty for multiple thefts.
cn_claim: 多次盗窃的以盗窃罪从重处罚（刑法第264条）。
us_claim: Habitual offenders face enhanced penalties under state career-criminal or three-strikes laws.
hk_claim: Repeat offenders face enhanced sentencing.
notes: All three jurisdictions enhance penalties for career criminals.

fact_summary: 企业以末位淘汰为由辞退员工 / A company dismissed an employee under a rank-and-yank system.
cn_claim: 以末位淘汰为由直接辞退员工的属于违法解除劳动合同应支付赔偿金（劳动合同法第48条；第八次全国法院民商事审判工作会议纪要第47条）。
us_claim: At-will employment generally permits termination for any non-discriminatory reason; however, where the employer has adopted a just-cause policy, forced-ranking termination may breach the implied covenant of good faith.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: CN imposes statutory just-cause requirements limiting rank-and-yank terminations, while US at-will defaults provide less protection.

fact_summary: 企业以末位淘汰为由辞退员工 / A company dismissed an employee under a forced-ranking system.
cn_claim: 末位淘汰直接辞退员工属于违法解除（劳动合同法第48条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Dismissal solely on the basis of a forced-ranking system without individual performance assessment may be unreasonable.
notes: Both CN and HK limit rank-and-yank dismissal systems through just-cause and reasonableness requirements.

fact_summary: 某海鲜酒楼因鱼缸漏电致顾客触电昏迷 / A customer was rendered unconscious by an electric shock from a leaking current in a seafood restaurant's fish tank.
cn_claim: 餐饮经营者应确保经营场所用电安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A restaurant that fails to maintain safe electrical systems is liable for resulting injuries under negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain electrical safety in the premises breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require restaurants to maintain electrical safety.

fact_summary: 被告人因以慈善募捐为名骗取捐款 / A defendant solicited charitable donations under false pretenses.
cn_claim: 以非法占有为目的虚构慈善募捐骗取他人财物的构成诈骗罪（刑法第266条）。
us_claim: Charitable fraud is prosecutable under mail-fraud and wire-fraud statutes.
hk_claim: Obtaining money by false charitable pretenses is fraud and an offense under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize fraudulent charitable fundraising.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播间购买牛肉后发现为鸭肉冒充 / A consumer purchased beef through a livestream and discovered it was duck meat misrepresented as beef.
cn_claim: 以鸭肉冒充牛肉的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；同时构成食品安全问题还可主张价款十倍赔偿（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: Selling one type of meat misrepresented as another constitutes fraud and violates the Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for meat-type substitution fraud.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播间购买牛肉后发现为鸭肉冒充 / A consumer purchased beef through a livestream and discovered it was duck meat.
cn_claim: 以鸭肉冒充牛肉的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款；食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling one type of meat misrepresented as another is fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for meat-type substitution fraud.

fact_summary: 某酒店因游泳池瓷砖脱落未修复致泳客脚部被割伤 / A swimmer's foot was cut by missing pool tiles at a hotel that had not been repaired.
cn_claim: 酒店经营者应对游泳池进行定期维护确保安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A hotel that fails to repair hazardous pool surfaces is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain pool surfaces safely breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require hotels to maintain pool surfaces safely.

fact_summary: 被告人因贩卖、运输冰毒数量巨大被判处死刑 / A defendant was sentenced to death for trafficking and transporting a very large quantity of methamphetamine.
cn_claim: 贩卖、运输毒品数量大的处死刑（刑法第347条第二款）。
us_claim: Large-scale methamphetamine trafficking may result in life imprisonment; the death penalty is not available for drug offenses under federal law.
hk_claim: Trafficking in a large quantity of methamphetamine carries a maximum penalty of life imprisonment.
notes: CN retains the death penalty for large-scale drug trafficking, while US and HK do not, creating a maximum-penalty asymmetry.

fact_summary: 消费者购买期房后发现开发商擅自减少小区公共绿地面积 / A pre-sale homebuyer discovered the developer had reduced the communal green space without authorization.
cn_claim: 开发商擅自减少公共绿地面积构成违约买受人可请求赔偿（民法典第577条；商品房买卖合同司法解释第3条）。
us_claim: A developer who reduces promised common-area green space is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold developers liable for reducing promised common-area amenities.

fact_summary: 消费者购买期房后发现开发商擅自减少小区公共绿地面积 / A pre-sale homebuyer discovered the developer had reduced the green space.
cn_claim: 开发商擅自减少公共绿地面积构成违约（民法典第577条；商品房买卖合同司法解释第3条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A developer who reduces promised common-area amenities is in breach of the sale-and-purchase agreement.
notes: Both CN and HK hold developers liable for reducing promised common-area amenities.

fact_summary: 某儿童游乐区因秋千链条磨损断裂致儿童摔伤 / A child was injured when a swing's worn chain snapped at a children's play area.
cn_claim: 儿童游乐设施的经营者应定期检查并及时更换磨损部件（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A playground operator who fails to inspect and replace worn swing chains is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain play equipment safely breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require playground operators to maintain swing chains.

fact_summary: 被告人因收买被拐卖的儿童被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for purchasing a trafficked child.
cn_claim: 收买被拐卖的儿童的构成收买被拐卖的儿童罪（刑法第241条第一款）。
us_claim: Purchasing a trafficked child is a federal crime under the Trafficking Victims Protection Act.
hk_claim: Purchasing a trafficked child is a serious offense.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the purchase of trafficked children.

fact_summary: 消费者在直播间购买珍珠后发现为塑料仿制品 / A consumer purchased pearls through a livestream and discovered they were plastic imitations.
cn_claim: 以塑料仿制品冒充珍珠的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling imitation pearls as genuine constitutes fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for imitation pearls sold as genuine.

fact_summary: 消费者在直播间购买珍珠后发现为塑料仿制品 / A consumer purchased pearls and discovered they were plastic imitations.
cn_claim: 以塑料仿制品冒充珍珠的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling imitation pearls as genuine is fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for imitation pearls sold as genuine.

fact_summary: 某停车场因地面标线模糊致车辆剐蹭纠纷 / A vehicle-scraping dispute arose at a parking lot because the floor markings were faded and unclear.
cn_claim: 停车场经营者应确保标线清晰引导车辆安全通行（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A parking-lot operator who fails to maintain clear markings may be liable for resulting accidents.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain clear floor markings breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require parking operators to maintain clear markings.

fact_summary: 被告人因组织他人聚众冲击国家机关被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for organizing a mob to storm a government office.
cn_claim: 聚众冲击国家机关致使国家机关工作无法进行造成严重损失的构成聚众冲击国家机关罪（刑法第290条第二款）。
us_claim: Storming a government building is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 2101 (riots) and other statutes.
hk_claim: Storming a public office is an offense under the Public Order Ordinance (Cap. 245).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize organized attacks on government offices.

fact_summary: 消费者购买二手车后发现该车实为事故车已提前被保险公司推定全损 / A consumer purchased a used car and discovered it had been declared a total loss by an insurer after an accident.
cn_claim: 汽车销售商未告知车辆为全损事故车的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a salvage vehicle without disclosure is fraud and violates state title-branding laws.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require disclosure of total-loss salvage history.

fact_summary: 消费者购买二手车后发现该车为全损事故车 / A consumer purchased a used car and discovered it was a total-loss salvage.
cn_claim: 未告知车辆为全损事故车的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A dealer who sells a total-loss vehicle without disclosure commits misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK require disclosure of total-loss salvage history.

fact_summary: 某游泳馆因未设置浸脚消毒池致多名泳客足部真菌感染 / Multiple swimmers contracted foot fungus at a public pool because no disinfectant footbath had been installed.
cn_claim: 游泳场所应设置强制通过式浸脚消毒池（游泳场所卫生规范第7条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A pool operator who fails to provide required sanitation measures is liable for resulting infections.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain pool-hygiene measures breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require pool operators to provide sanitation measures.

fact_summary: 被告人因编造并传播影响证券交易的虚假信息被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for fabricating and disseminating false information affecting securities trading.
cn_claim: 编造并传播影响证券交易的虚假信息扰乱证券交易市场造成严重后果的构成编造并传播证券交易虚假信息罪（刑法第181条第一款）。
us_claim: Disseminating false information to manipulate securities prices violates Section 10(b) of the Securities Exchange Act and Rule 10b-5.
hk_claim: Disseminating false or misleading information to manipulate the market is an offense under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the dissemination of false securities information.

fact_summary: 老年消费者被会销诱导购买高价保健品后发现产品为普通食品 / An elderly consumer was induced through seminar marketing to purchase expensive health supplements that proved to be ordinary food products.
cn_claim: 以会销方式将普通食品作为保健品销售的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Seminar marketing of ordinary food as health supplements is deceptive under the FTC Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US prohibit deceptive seminar marketing of supplements.

fact_summary: 老年消费者被会销诱导购买高价保健品后发现产品为普通食品 / An elderly consumer was induced through seminar marketing to purchase expensive supplements that were ordinary food.
cn_claim: 以会销方式将普通食品作为保健品销售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Seminar-based deceptive marketing is misleading conduct.
notes: Both CN and HK prohibit deceptive seminar marketing of supplements.

fact_summary: 某食品厂因未对员工进行食品安全培训致产品被致病菌污染 / A food-processing plant's products were contaminated with pathogens because employees had not received food-safety training.
cn_claim: 食品生产经营者应对从业人员进行食品安全知识培训（食品安全法第44条第一款）。
us_claim: A food manufacturer that fails to train employees in food safety resulting in contamination is liable under the Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act.
hk_claim: A food-processor that fails to provide hygiene training is liable for resulting illness.
notes: All three jurisdictions require food-safety training for food handlers.

fact_summary: 被告人因使用虚假证明材料骗取银行贷款被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for using fake supporting documents to fraudulently obtain a bank loan.
cn_claim: 以虚假的证明文件骗取银行贷款的构成骗取贷款罪（刑法第175条之一第一款）。
us_claim: Obtaining a loan through false representations is bank fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1344.
hk_claim: Obtaining a loan by deception is fraud under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize fraudulent loan applications.

fact_summary: 消费者购买新房后发现房屋墙体大面积开裂 / A new-home buyer discovered extensive cracking in the walls.
cn_claim: 出卖人应对标的物承担瑕疵担保责任（民法典第617条）；墙体大面积开裂属于严重质量问题买受人可解除合同（民法典第610条）。
us_claim: A builder who delivers a home with serious structural defects is in material breach of contract and the implied warranty of habitability.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for serious structural defects in new homes.

fact_summary: 消费者购买新房后发现房屋墙体大面积开裂 / A new-home buyer discovered extensive wall cracking.
cn_claim: 墙体大面积开裂属于严重质量问题买受人可解除合同（民法典第610条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A developer who delivers a property with serious structural defects is in breach of the sale-and-purchase agreement.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for serious structural defects in new homes.

fact_summary: 某学校因未对实验室危险化学品进行专柜储存致学生误触灼伤 / A student suffered chemical burns after accidentally touching hazardous chemicals in a school laboratory because they had not been stored in a locked cabinet.
cn_claim: 学校对危险化学品应实行专柜储存双人双锁管理（危险化学品安全管理条例第24条；民法典第1199条）。
us_claim: A school that fails to properly secure hazardous chemicals is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: A school that fails to store dangerous chemicals securely breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require schools to secure hazardous chemicals in laboratories.

fact_summary: 被告人因贩卖大量冰毒被判处死刑缓期执行 / A defendant was sentenced to death with a two-year reprieve for trafficking a large quantity of methamphetamine.
cn_claim: 贩卖毒品数量大的处死刑（刑法第347条第二款）。
us_claim: Large-scale methamphetamine trafficking may result in life imprisonment.
hk_claim: Trafficking in a large quantity of dangerous drugs carries a maximum penalty of life imprisonment.
notes: CN retains capital punishment for large-scale drug trafficking, while US and HK do not.

fact_summary: 消费者在电商平台购买大闸蟹后发现死蟹过半且商家拒绝售后 / A consumer purchased hairy crabs on an e-commerce platform and found more than half were dead; the merchant refused after-sales service.
cn_claim: 鲜活商品不符合质量要求的消费者可要求退款并赔偿（消费者权益保护法第24条第一款）。
us_claim: A merchant who ships dead perishable goods is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require merchants to refund for dead-on-arrival perishable goods.

fact_summary: 消费者购买大闸蟹后发现死蟹过半且商家拒绝售后 / A consumer found more than half the crabs were dead and the merchant refused after-sales.
cn_claim: 鲜活商品不符合质量要求的消费者可要求退款赔偿（消费者权益保护法第24条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A merchant who ships dead perishable goods is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK require merchants to refund for dead-on-arrival perishable goods.

fact_summary: 某写字楼因自动喷淋系统被擅自关闭致火灾时未能启动 / A fire in an office building spread unchecked because the automatic sprinkler system had been turned off without authorization.
cn_claim: 任何单位和个人不得擅自关闭消防设施（消防法第28条）。
us_claim: A building manager who disables fire-suppression systems is liable for resulting damage under gross-negligence theories.
hk_claim: An occupier who disables fire-safety systems breaches fire regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions prohibit disabling fire-suppression systems.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法获取他人信用卡信息并境外盗刷 / A defendant illegally obtained others' credit-card data and made fraudulent purchases abroad.
cn_claim: 窃取、收买或非法提供他人信用卡信息资料的构成妨害信用卡管理罪（刑法第177条之一）；境外盗刷的另构成信用卡诈骗罪（刑法第196条）。
us_claim: Using unauthorized credit-card data for purchases overseas constitutes access-device fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1029 and wire fraud.
hk_claim: Using another person's credit-card information without authority is an offense under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the unauthorized use of credit-card data for overseas purchases.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播间购买进口手表后发现表带为非原装 / A consumer purchased an imported watch through a livestream and discovered the strap was not original.
cn_claim: 以非原装表带冒充原装整表的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a watch with a non-original strap without disclosure constitutes fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require disclosure of non-original components in watch sales.

fact_summary: 消费者购买进口手表后发现表带为非原装 / A consumer purchased an imported watch and discovered the strap was not original.
cn_claim: 以非原装表带冒充原装整表的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling a watch with a non-original strap without disclosure is misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK require disclosure of non-original components in watch sales.

fact_summary: 某市因高架桥伸缩缝破损致混凝土碎块坠落砸穿车顶 / A concrete fragment from a deteriorated expansion joint on a viaduct fell and penetrated a vehicle roof.
cn_claim: 城市桥梁管理机构应对桥梁进行定期检测并及时维修（城市桥梁检测和养护维修管理办法第14条）。
us_claim: A municipality that fails to repair bridge expansion joints is liable for resulting damage.
hk_claim: A public authority that fails to maintain bridge components is liable for negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions require bridge-expansion-joint maintenance.

fact_summary: 被告人因拒不支付劳动报酬被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for refusing to pay labour remuneration.
cn_claim: 以转移财产、逃匿等方法逃避支付劳动者的劳动报酬经政府有关部门责令支付仍不支付的构成拒不支付劳动报酬罪（刑法第276条之一第一款）。
us_claim: Willful nonpayment of wages may be prosecuted under the Fair Labor Standards Act.
hk_claim: An employer who willfully fails to pay wages commits an offense under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the willful nonpayment of wages.

fact_summary: 被告人因伪造货币并出售 / A defendant counterfeited currency and sold it.
cn_claim: 伪造货币的构成伪造货币罪（刑法第170条）；出售伪造货币的另构成出售假币罪（刑法第171条第一款）。
us_claim: Counterfeiting U.S. currency is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 471; selling counterfeit currency is prohibited under § 473.
hk_claim: Counterfeiting currency is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for currency counterfeiting.

fact_summary: 消费者在驾校报名后因个人原因退学被扣高额违约金 / After enrolling in a driving school, a consumer was charged an exorbitant penalty for withdrawing for personal reasons.
cn_claim: 约定的违约金过分高于造成的损失的当事人可请求法院或仲裁机构适当减少（民法典第585条第二款）。
us_claim: A liquidated-damages clause that is punitive rather than a reasonable forecast of harm is unenforceable as a penalty.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US restrict excessive liquidated-damages clauses in service contracts.

fact_summary: 消费者在驾校报名后因个人原因退学被扣高额违约金 / After enrolling in a driving school, a consumer was charged an exorbitant withdrawal penalty.
cn_claim: 约定的违约金过分高于造成的损失的当事人可请求减少（民法典第585条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An extravagant liquidated-damages clause may be void as a penalty.
notes: Both CN and HK restrict excessive liquidated-damages clauses in service contracts.

fact_summary: 某小区因配电房未设挡鼠板致老鼠进入导致短路起火 / A short-circuit fire occurred in a residential-compound distribution room because no rodent barrier had been installed and rats entered.
cn_claim: 物业服务人应对配电设施进行维护管理并应设置防鼠措施（民法典第942条第一款）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to rodent-proof electrical rooms is liable for resulting fires.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to prevent rodent access to electrical equipment breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require rodent-proofing of electrical rooms.

fact_summary: 被告人因强奸抢劫并故意杀人被判处死刑 / A defendant was sentenced to death for rape, robbery, and intentional homicide.
cn_claim: 犯强奸、抢劫罪且故意杀人的数罪并罚可判处死刑（刑法第232条、第236条、第263条）。
us_claim: Aggravated murder involving rape and robbery is a capital offense or life imprisonment without parole in applicable states.
hk_claim: Murder committed in the course of rape and robbery attracts a mandatory life sentence.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose the most severe penalties for murder during rape and robbery.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买钻石后发现为莫桑石仿制品 / A consumer purchased a diamond through a livestream and discovered it was a moissanite imitation.
cn_claim: 以莫桑石冒充钻石的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling moissanite as a diamond constitutes fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for imitation diamonds sold as genuine.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买钻石后发现为莫桑石仿制品 / A consumer purchased a diamond and discovered it was moissanite.
cn_claim: 以莫桑石冒充钻石的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling moissanite as a diamond is fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for imitation diamonds sold as genuine.

fact_summary: 某地铁站因电梯踏板梳齿缺失致乘客鞋子被卷入脚趾受伤 / A passenger's toe was injured when their shoe was caught in an escalator because several comb-plate teeth were missing.
cn_claim: 地铁运营单位应对电梯进行日常维护保养（特种设备安全法第39条第一款；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A transit authority that fails to maintain escalator comb-plates is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain escalator safety devices breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require escalators to have intact comb-plates.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法向境外提供国家秘密被判处无期徒刑 / A defendant was sentenced to life imprisonment for illegally providing state secrets to a foreign entity.
cn_claim: 为境外的机构、组织、人员窃取、刺探、收买、非法提供国家秘密或情报的构成犯罪（刑法第111条）。
us_claim: Transmitting classified information to a foreign government is espionage under the Espionage Act (18 U.S.C. § 794).
hk_claim: Disclosing official secrets to a foreign agent is an offense under the Official Secrets Ordinance (Cap. 521).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose the most extreme penalties for espionage.

fact_summary: 消费者购买商品后商家以赠品已发完为由拒绝提供 / A merchant refused to provide a gift that was part of a promotion, claiming the free items had been exhausted.
cn_claim: 经营者以有奖销售方式提供赠品的应按约定提供；未能提供的应承担违约责任（民法典第577条；规范促销行为暂行规定第13条）。
us_claim: A merchant who fails to provide advertised promotional items is in breach of contract and may be liable under the FTC Act.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require merchants to provide advertised promotional items.

fact_summary: 商家以赠品已发完为由拒绝提供 / A merchant refused to provide a promotional gift claiming they were exhausted.
cn_claim: 经营者应按约定提供赠品（民法典第577条；规范促销行为暂行规定第13条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A merchant who fails to provide advertised promotional items is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK require merchants to provide advertised promotional items.

fact_summary: 某水上游乐设施因高度限制标牌模糊致不符合身高要求的儿童进入受伤 / A child who did not meet the height requirement was injured on a water ride because the height-restriction sign was illegible.
cn_claim: 游乐设施经营者应在入口处设置明晰的安全须知和限制条件（民法典第1198条第一款；特种设备安全法第39条）。
us_claim: An amusement operator who fails to post clear height restrictions is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to clearly communicate ride restrictions breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require amusement operators to post clear height restrictions.

fact_summary: 被告人因以黑社会性质组织实施敲诈勒索被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for operating an organized-crime syndicate engaged in extortion.
cn_claim: 组织、领导黑社会性质组织的处七年以上有期徒刑；黑社会性质组织实施敲诈勒索的以敲诈勒索罪从重处罚并与组织、领导黑社会性质组织罪数罪并罚（刑法第294条第一款、第274条）。
us_claim: Operating a criminal enterprise engaged in extortion is prosecutable under RICO (18 U.S.C. § 1962).
hk_claim: Organized crime engaging in extortion is an offense under the Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 455).
notes: All three jurisdictions provide enhanced penalties for organized-crime extortion.

fact_summary: 消费者通过海外代购买到化妆品后发现产品无中文说明且明显为三无产品 / A consumer purchased cosmetics through overseas purchasing and found they had no Chinese labeling and were unbranded.
cn_claim: 进口化妆品应有中文标签并取得备案或注册（化妆品监督管理条例第16条、第35条）。
us_claim: Imported cosmetics must comply with FDA labeling requirements.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require imported cosmetics to bear proper labeling.

fact_summary: 消费者海外代购买到化妆品后发现为三无产品 / A consumer purchased cosmetics and discovered they were unbranded with no labeling.
cn_claim: 进口化妆品应有中文标签并取得备案或注册（化妆品监督管理条例第16条、第35条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Imported cosmetics must comply with applicable labeling and safety requirements.
notes: Both CN and HK require imported cosmetics to bear proper labeling.

fact_summary: 某商场因未在下雨天铺设防滑垫致顾客在入口处滑倒骨折 / A customer slipped and fractured a bone at a shopping-mall entrance on a rainy day because no anti-slip mat had been placed.
cn_claim: 商场经营者应在雨天采取防滑措施确保安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A shopping-mall operator who fails to address known wet-floor hazards is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to take reasonable steps to prevent slip hazards on wet days breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require commercial occupiers to take anti-slip measures on wet days.

fact_summary: 被告人因倒卖出土文物被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for reselling unearthed cultural relics.
cn_claim: 以牟利为目的倒卖国家禁止经营的文物情节严重的构成倒卖文物罪（刑法第326条第一款）。
us_claim: Trafficking in stolen archaeological artifacts is a crime under the Archaeological Resources Protection Act and the National Stolen Property Act.
hk_claim: Dealing in antiquities without a license is an offense under the Antiquities and Monuments Ordinance (Cap. 53).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the trafficking of cultural relics.

fact_summary: 消费者购买精装修房后发现橱柜五金件品牌非合同约定 / A homebuyer of a fully-renovated apartment discovered the kitchen-cabinet hardware was of a brand different from the contract.
cn_claim: 出卖人交付的标的物不符合质量要求的买受人可请求修理、减少价款或赔偿损失（民法典第582条）。
us_claim: A developer who substitutes contracted hardware without consent is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold developers liable for unauthorized hardware substitutions.

fact_summary: 消费者购买精装修房后发现橱柜五金件品牌非合同约定 / A homebuyer found the cabinet hardware was of a different brand than contracted.
cn_claim: 出卖人交付的标的物不符合质量要求的买受人可请求赔偿（民法典第582条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A developer who substitutes materials without consent is in breach of the sale-and-purchase agreement.
notes: Both CN and HK hold developers liable for unauthorized hardware substitutions.

fact_summary: 某工厂因焊接工人未佩戴防护面罩致双目受损 / A welder in a factory suffered eye damage because they had not been provided with a protective mask.
cn_claim: 生产经营单位应对从业人员提供符合国家标准的劳动防护用品（安全生产法第45条）。
us_claim: An employer who fails to provide required PPE is liable under OSHA standards.
hk_claim: A factory occupier who fails to provide protective equipment to workers breaches safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require employers to provide protective equipment.

fact_summary: 被告人因驾船至禁渔区使用电网捕鱼被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for using electrofishing in a prohibited fishing zone.
cn_claim: 在禁渔区使用禁用的方法捕捞水产品情节严重的构成非法捕捞水产品罪（刑法第340条）。
us_claim: Using electrofishing in prohibited waters is a crime under the Magnuson-Stevens Fishery Conservation and Management Act.
hk_claim: Using destructive fishing methods including electrofishing in prohibited waters is an offense under the Fisheries Protection Ordinance (Cap. 171).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize electrofishing in restricted waters.

fact_summary: 消费者在未成年人游戏充值后要求退款被拒 / A consumer was refused a refund for unauthorized in-game purchases made by a minor.
cn_claim: 八周岁以上的未成年人为限制民事行为能力人实施与其年龄、智力不相适应的民事法律行为未经其法定代理人同意或追认的该民事法律行为应属无效（民法典第19条、第145条第一款）。
us_claim: Unauthorized purchases by minors may be voidable under the infancy doctrine; the FTC has also brought actions against companies for facilitating unauthorized in-app purchases by minors.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for unauthorized in-game purchases by minors.

fact_summary: 消费者在未成年人游戏充值后要求退款被拒 / A consumer was refused a refund for unauthorized in-game purchases by a minor.
cn_claim: 限制民事行为能力人实施与其年龄智力不相适应的民事法律行为未经法定代理人追认的该行为无效（民法典第19条、第145条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Contracts entered into by minors may be voidable.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for unauthorized purchases by minors.

fact_summary: 某景区因未对漂流河道进行勘测致游客翻船溺亡 / A tourist drowned when a raft capsized on a scenic-area rafting route because the river channel had not been surveyed.
cn_claim: 漂流项目经营者应对河道进行安全勘测并设置警示标志（民法典第1198条第一款；旅游法第80条）。
us_claim: A whitewater-rafting operator who fails to survey the river for hazards is liable for resulting deaths.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to assess water-course hazards breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require rafting operators to survey river hazards.

fact_summary: 被告人因武装掩护走私被从重处罚 / A defendant received an enhanced penalty for smuggling under armed guard.
cn_claim: 武装掩护走私的依照本法第151条第一款的规定从重处罚（刑法第157条第一款）。
us_claim: Armed smuggling carries enhanced penalties under federal firearms and smuggling statutes.
hk_claim: Smuggling with a weapon is an aggravating factor under the Import and Export Ordinance (Cap. 60).
notes: All three jurisdictions enhance penalties for armed smuggling.

fact_summary: 消费者购买二手车后发现车辆铭牌被更换 / A consumer purchased a used car and discovered the vehicle identification plate had been replaced.
cn_claim: 汽车销售商将更换铭牌的车辆出售的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a vehicle with a replaced identification plate without disclosure constitutes fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require disclosure of vehicle-identification-plate replacement.

fact_summary: 消费者购买二手车后发现车辆铭牌被更换 / A consumer purchased a used car and found the identification plate had been replaced.
cn_claim: 将更换铭牌的车辆出售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A dealer who sells a vehicle with a replaced identification plate without disclosure commits misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK require disclosure of vehicle-identification-plate replacement.

fact_summary: 某居民楼因阳台栏杆锈蚀断裂致儿童坠楼 / A child fell from a residential balcony when the rusted railing gave way.
cn_claim: 建筑物上设施的维护管理责任人应确保阳台栏杆等安全可靠（民法典第1253条）。
us_claim: A building owner who fails to maintain balcony railings is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain balcony railings safely breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require property owners to maintain balcony railings.

fact_summary: 被告人因组织未成年人进行盗窃被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for organizing minors to commit theft.
cn_claim: 组织未成年人进行盗窃活动的构成组织未成年人进行违反治安管理活动罪（刑法第262条之二）。
us_claim: Using minors to commit crimes is a serious offense contributing to the delinquency of a minor.
hk_claim: Organizing minors to commit offenses is a serious aggravating factor.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the use of minors in organized crime.

fact_summary: 消费者通过跨境电商购买商品后发现包裹在海关被扣留并销毁 / A consumer discovered the cross-border-e-commerce parcel had been detained and destroyed by customs.
cn_claim: 因经营者原因导致商品被海关扣留的消费者可要求经营者承担违约责任（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: A seller bears the risk of customs seizure where the goods fail to comply with import regulations.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US place the risk of customs seizure on the seller for non-compliant goods.

fact_summary: 消费者跨境购买商品后包裹在海关被扣留并销毁 / A consumer discovered the cross-border parcel was detained and destroyed by customs.
cn_claim: 因经营者原因导致商品被海关扣留的消费者可要求承担违约责任（民法典第577条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A seller bears the risk of customs detention where the goods fail to meet import requirements.
notes: Both CN and HK place the risk of customs seizure on the seller for non-compliant goods.

fact_summary: 某城市因暴雨时排水泵站未开启致下立交严重积水车辆被淹 / Vehicles were submerged in a flooded underpass during a rainstorm because the drainage pumping station had not been activated.
cn_claim: 排水设施管理单位应在降雨时及时启动排水泵站（城镇排水与污水处理条例第36条）。
us_claim: A municipality that fails to activate drainage pumps during a storm may be liable for resulting flood damage.
hk_claim: A public authority that fails to operate drainage systems during flooding may be liable for negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions require drainage authorities to operate pumps during storms.

fact_summary: 被告人因容留他人吸毒被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for providing a venue for others to use drugs.
cn_claim: 容留他人吸食、注射毒品的构成容留他人吸毒罪（刑法第354条）。
us_claim: Maintaining a place for drug use is a federal crime under 21 U.S.C. § 856 (the Crack House Statute).
hk_claim: Permitting premises to be used for drug consumption is an offense under the Dangerous Drugs Ordinance (Cap. 134).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize providing premises for drug use.

fact_summary: 租房平台在未经租客同意的情况下将租客个人信息用于其他商业推广 / A rental platform used tenant personal information for other commercial promotions without the tenant's consent.
cn_claim: 个人信息处理者处理个人信息应取得个人同意（个人信息保护法第13条第一款）；未经同意使用租客信息进行推广的构成侵权。
us_claim: Using customer data collected for one purpose for another without consent may violate the FTC Act and state privacy laws.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US restrict the unauthorized secondary use of personal data for marketing.

fact_summary: 租房平台未经租客同意将个人信息用于商业推广 / A rental platform used tenant data for commercial promotions without consent.
cn_claim: 未经同意使用个人信息构成侵权（个人信息保护法第13条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A data user who uses personal data for a new purpose without consent breaches the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486).
notes: Both CN and HK restrict the unauthorized secondary use of personal data.

fact_summary: 某商场因中庭装饰吊顶未加固致坠落砸伤顾客 / A customer was struck by a falling decorative ceiling panel in a shopping-mall atrium because it had not been properly secured.
cn_claim: 经营者应对场所内的装饰装修进行定期检查确保安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A shopping-mall operator who fails to secure ceiling fixtures is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to secure hanging fixtures breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require commercial occupiers to secure ceiling fixtures.

fact_summary: 被告人因走私毒品数量特别巨大被判处死刑立即执行 / A defendant was sentenced to death with immediate execution for smuggling an extraordinarily large quantity of drugs.
cn_claim: 走私毒品数量大的处死刑（刑法第347条第二款）。
us_claim: The death penalty is not available for drug offenses under federal law; maximum penalty is life imprisonment.
hk_claim: The maximum penalty for drug trafficking is life imprisonment; the death penalty was abolished in Hong Kong.
notes: CN retains the death penalty for severe drug trafficking, while US and HK have abolished it, creating a fundamental maximum-penalty asymmetry.

fact_summary: 借款人在P2P平台借款后发现实际年化利率远超合同约定 / A borrower on a P2P lending platform discovered the actual annualized interest rate far exceeded the contract rate.
cn_claim: 贷款年化利率应以对借款人收取的所有贷款成本与其实际占用的贷款本金的比例计算（最高人民法院关于审理民间借贷案件适用法律若干问题的规定第24条）。
us_claim: The Truth in Lending Act requires clear disclosure of the annual percentage rate; misrepresentation of loan terms violates TILA.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require accurate disclosure of annualized interest rates.

fact_summary: P2P平台借款后发现实际年化利率远超合同约定 / A borrower on a P2P platform discovered the actual interest rate far exceeded the contract.
cn_claim: 贷款年化利率应按实际成本和占用本金计算。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A lender who misrepresents loan terms is liable under the Money Lenders Ordinance (Cap. 163).
notes: Both CN and HK require accurate disclosure of loan terms.

fact_summary: 某体育馆因篮球架未固定牢靠致其倾倒砸伤学生 / A student was crushed by a toppling basketball hoop in a gymnasium because the hoop had not been securely anchored.
cn_claim: 体育场馆经营者应对体育器材进行定期检查和牢固固定（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A gymnasium operator who fails to anchor heavy equipment is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to secure gym equipment safely breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require gymnasiums to anchor heavy equipment.

fact_summary: 被告人因在网络上传播儿童色情内容被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for distributing child-pornography content online.
cn_claim: 利用网络传播儿童色情内容的构成传播淫秽物品罪且涉及未成年人的从重处罚（刑法第363条、第364条）。
us_claim: Distribution of child pornography is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. § 2252A with severe mandatory-minimum penalties.
hk_claim: Distribution of child pornography is a serious offense under the Prevention of Child Pornography Ordinance (Cap. 579).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose extremely severe penalties for child-pornography distribution.

fact_summary: 被告人因对举报人实施打击报复致其重伤被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for retaliating against a whistleblower, causing serious injury.
cn_claim: 对控告人、举报人进行打击报复致人重伤的构成故意伤害罪从重处罚（刑法第234条、第254条）。
us_claim: Retaliating against a whistleblower with violence is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1513 and applicable assault statutes.
hk_claim: Retaliating against a witness or informant with violence is perverting the course of justice and criminal intimidation.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for violent retaliation against whistleblowers.

fact_summary: 消费者在电商平台下单后商家以选错尺码为由要求消费者承担退换货运费 / After placing an order, the merchant asked the consumer to pay return-shipping costs, claiming a sizing error.
cn_claim: 因经营者原因导致的退换货经营者应承担运输费用（消费者权益保护法第24条第二款）。
us_claim: A merchant who sends the wrong size must bear the cost of return shipping under the FTC's Mail Order Rule.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require merchants to bear return-shipping costs for their own errors.

fact_summary: 商家以选错尺码为由要求消费者承担退换货运费 / A merchant required the consumer to pay return shipping for a sizing error.
cn_claim: 因经营者原因导致的退换货经营者应承担运输费用（消费者权益保护法第24条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A merchant who makes an error should bear the cost of return shipping.
notes: Both CN and HK require merchants to bear return-shipping costs for their own errors.

fact_summary: 某景区因缆车年检过期未申报续检致发生故障停运 / A cable car at a scenic area broke down because the annual inspection had expired and no renewal had been applied for.
cn_claim: 特种设备使用单位应在检验合格有效期届满前一个月向特种设备检验机构提出定期检验要求（特种设备安全法第40条第一款）。
us_claim: A cable-car operator who fails to renew required inspections is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to ensure timely inspection of passenger-carrying equipment breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require timely renewal of equipment inspections.

fact_summary: 被告人因故意传播艾滋病致多人感染被判处重刑 / A defendant was sentenced to a heavy penalty for intentionally transmitting HIV to multiple persons.
cn_claim: 明知自己患有艾滋病而故意传播致多人感染的以危险方法危害公共安全罪或故意伤害罪从重处罚（刑法第115条第一款、第234条）。
us_claim: Intentionally transmitting HIV to multiple victims is a serious felony with enhanced penalties under state law.
hk_claim: Intentionally transmitting HIV to multiple persons constitutes inflicting grievous bodily harm with severe penalties.
notes: All three jurisdictions treat intentional HIV transmission to multiple victims as an extremely serious crime.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买白酒后发现为酒精勾兑却宣称为粮食酿造 / A consumer purchased baijiu through a livestream and discovered it was alcohol-blended but was advertised as grain-fermented.
cn_claim: 以酒精勾兑酒冒充纯粮酿造酒的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling blended spirits misrepresented as craft-distilled constitutes fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for misrepresented liquor production methods.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买白酒后发现为酒精勾兑却宣称为粮食酿造 / A consumer purchased baijiu and found it was alcohol-blended despite being advertised as grain-fermented.
cn_claim: 以酒精勾兑酒冒充纯粮酿造酒的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling blended spirits misrepresented as craft-distilled is fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for misrepresented liquor production methods.

fact_summary: 某学校因体育器材年久失修致单杠断裂学生摔伤 / A student fell and was injured when a horizontal bar snapped at a school because the sports equipment had deteriorated over time without repair.
cn_claim: 学校应对体育器材进行定期检查并及时维修或更换（未成年人保护法第37条；民法典第1199条）。
us_claim: A school that fails to inspect and maintain gym equipment is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: A school that fails to maintain sports equipment safely breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require schools to maintain sports equipment.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法经营伪劣化肥致农民大面积减产 / A defendant was prosecuted for illegally selling substandard fertilizer that caused farmers widespread crop losses.
cn_claim: 销售伪劣化肥使生产遭受重大损失的构成销售伪劣化肥罪（刑法第147条）。
us_claim: Selling adulterated or misbranded fertilizer is a crime under state agricultural laws.
hk_claim: Selling substandard agricultural inputs may be an offense.
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the sale of substandard agricultural inputs.

fact_summary: 消费者在美容院预付高额费用后美容院以内部调整为名拒绝提供服务 / After prepaying a large sum to a beauty salon, the consumer was refused service, with the salon citing internal restructuring.
cn_claim: 经营者以预收款方式提供服务未按约定提供的应退回预付款并承担费用（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: A prepaid-service provider who refuses to provide services is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require prepaid-service providers to refund when they refuse to provide services.

fact_summary: 美容院预付高额费用后以内部调整为由拒绝提供服务 / After prepaying a large sum, a beauty salon refused service citing internal restructuring.
cn_claim: 未按约定提供服务的应退回预付款并承担费用（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A prepaid-service provider who refuses to provide services is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK require prepaid-service providers to refund when they refuse to provide services.

fact_summary: 某商场因母婴室地面未铺设防滑垫致抱婴母亲摔伤 / A mother carrying a baby slipped and fell in a shopping-mall nursing room because no anti-slip matting had been installed.
cn_claim: 经营者应在母婴室等特殊区域采取必要的安全防护措施（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A shopping-mall operator who fails to provide safe flooring in nursing rooms is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to take reasonable precautions for the safety of visitors with special needs breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require commercial occupiers to maintain safe nursing-room floors.

fact_summary: 被告人因走私珍贵动物被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for smuggling rare animals.
cn_claim: 走私珍贵动物及其制品的构成走私珍贵动物、珍贵动物制品罪（刑法第151条第二款）。
us_claim: Smuggling endangered species is a crime under the Endangered Species Act and the Lacey Act.
hk_claim: Importing or exporting endangered species without a license is an offense under the Protection of Endangered Species of Animals and Plants Ordinance (Cap. 586).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the smuggling of rare animals.

fact_summary: 消费者通过直播购买手工红糖后发现为赤砂糖染色 / A consumer purchased handmade brown sugar through a livestream and discovered it was dyed refined sugar.
cn_claim: 以赤砂糖染色冒充手工红糖的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）；同时构成食品安全问题可主张价款十倍赔偿（食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: Selling dyed refined sugar as handmade brown sugar constitutes fraud and violates food-labeling laws.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for misrepresented food products.

fact_summary: 消费者购买手工红糖后发现为赤砂糖染色 / A consumer purchased handmade brown sugar and discovered it was dyed refined sugar.
cn_claim: 以赤砂糖染色冒充手工红糖的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款；食品安全法第148条第二款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling dyed sugar as handmade brown sugar is fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for misrepresented food products.

fact_summary: 某小区因化粪池溢流盖板未锁紧致儿童坠入受伤 / A child fell into an overflowing septic tank in a residential compound because the access cover had not been secured.
cn_claim: 窨井等地下设施的管理人应确保盖板牢固安全（民法典第1258条第二款）。
us_claim: A property manager who fails to secure septic-tank covers is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to secure underground-access covers breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require property managers to secure septic-tank covers.

fact_summary: 被告人因贩卖公民个人信息达到百万条被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for selling millions of pieces of citizens' personal information.
cn_claim: 违反国家有关规定向他人出售公民个人信息情节特别严重的构成侵犯公民个人信息罪（刑法第253条之一第一款）。
us_claim: Large-scale trafficking in personal data may be prosecuted under identity-fraud and wire-fraud statutes.
hk_claim: Selling personal data without consent on a large scale is an offense under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486).
notes: All three jurisdictions impose severe penalties for large-scale personal-data trafficking.

fact_summary: 消费者购买预售房后开发商逾期交房两年且未按合同支付违约金 / After purchasing a pre-sale home, the developer delayed delivery by two years and failed to pay the contracted penalty.
cn_claim: 出卖人迟延交付房屋的应按照合同约定支付违约金；未约定的按照逾期交付使用房屋期间有关主管部门公布的或有资格的房地产评估机构评定的同地段同类房屋租金标准确定（商品房买卖合同司法解释第17条）。
us_claim: A developer who delays delivery is liable for liquidated damages under the purchase contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold developers liable for late-delivery penalties.

fact_summary: 开发商逾期交房两年且未按合同支付违约金 / A developer delayed delivery by two years without paying the contracted penalty.
cn_claim: 出卖人迟延交付房屋的应按照合同约定支付违约金（商品房买卖合同司法解释第17条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A developer who delays delivery is liable for damages under the sale-and-purchase agreement.
notes: Both CN and HK hold developers liable for late-delivery penalties.

fact_summary: 某餐厅因燃气灶具未安装熄火保护装置致气体泄漏爆炸 / A gas-leak explosion occurred at a restaurant because the stove lacked a flameout-protection device.
cn_claim: 餐饮经营者应使用符合安全标准的燃气灶具并安装熄火保护装置（城镇燃气管理条例第27条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A restaurant that fails to use equipment with required safety devices is liable for resulting explosions.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to use gas appliances with appropriate safety features breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require restaurants to use gas equipment with safety devices.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法获取他人银行卡信息并盗刷被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for illegally obtaining others' bank-card information and making unauthorized withdrawals.
cn_claim: 窃取他人信用卡信息资料的构成妨害信用卡管理罪；盗刷的另构成信用卡诈骗罪（刑法第177条之一、第196条）。
us_claim: Using unauthorized bank-card data to withdraw funds is access-device fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1029 and bank fraud under § 1344.
hk_claim: Using another's bank-card information without authority is theft under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the unauthorized use of bank-card data.

fact_summary: 消费者办理健身卡后健身房在三个月内倒闭 / A gym ceased operations within three months of a consumer purchasing a membership card.
cn_claim: 经营者以预收款方式提供服务未按约定提供的应退回预付款（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: A gym that sells memberships and quickly closes is in breach of contract; members are entitled to a refund.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require gym operators to refund unused membership fees upon closure.

fact_summary: 消费者办理健身卡后健身房在三个月内倒闭 / A gym ceased operations three months after a consumer purchased a membership.
cn_claim: 未按约定提供服务的应退回预付款（消费者权益保护法第53条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A gym that sells memberships and quickly ceases operations is in breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK require gym operators to refund unused membership fees upon closure.

fact_summary: 某游泳馆因水质浑浊未及时处理致泳客眼部感染 / A swimmer contracted an eye infection at a public pool because cloudy water had not been treated promptly.
cn_claim: 游泳场所经营者应确保水质符合卫生标准并定期检测（公共场所卫生管理条例第3条第一款第二项）。
us_claim: A pool operator who fails to maintain water clarity and sanitation is liable for resulting infections.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain pool-water quality breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require pool operators to maintain water quality.

fact_summary: 被告人因绑架儿童并勒索赎金被判处死刑缓期执行 / A defendant was sentenced to death with a two-year reprieve for kidnapping a child and demanding ransom.
cn_claim: 以勒索财物为目的绑架他人的构成绑架罪（刑法第239条第一款）。
us_claim: Kidnapping a child for ransom is a federal crime under the Lindbergh Act (18 U.S.C. § 1201), carrying severe penalties.
hk_claim: Kidnapping for ransom is a serious offense.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose the most severe penalties for child kidnapping for ransom.

fact_summary: 拍卖行将委托人藏品以明显低于市场价的价格拍出 / An auction house sold a consignor's collectible at a price significantly below market value.
cn_claim: 拍卖人未尽到合理拍卖义务造成委托人损失的应承担赔偿责任（拍卖法第61条第一款）。
us_claim: An auction house that fails to exercise reasonable care in selling consigned property is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold auction houses liable for negligence in selling consigned property.

fact_summary: 拍卖行将委托人藏品以明显低于市场价拍出 / An auction house sold a consignor's collectible far below market value.
cn_claim: 拍卖人未尽到合理拍卖义务造成委托人损失的应承担赔偿责任（拍卖法第61条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: An auction house must exercise reasonable care in the sale of consigned property.
notes: Both CN and HK hold auction houses liable for negligence in selling consigned property.

fact_summary: 某市因道路窨井盖被重型车压碎后未及时更换致骑车人坠井受伤 / A cyclist was injured falling into a manhole on a city road because the cover had been crushed by a heavy vehicle and not replaced.
cn_claim: 市政设施管理部门应对道路窨井盖进行巡查并及时修复（城市道路管理条例第24条）。
us_claim: A municipality that fails to replace a broken manhole cover is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: A public authority that fails to maintain road fixtures is liable for negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions require municipalities to promptly replace broken manhole covers.

fact_summary: 被告人因网络盗窃虚拟财产被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for stealing virtual property online.
cn_claim: 盗窃他人虚拟财产的数额较大的构成盗窃罪（刑法第264条）。
us_claim: Stealing virtual property through unauthorized computer access is a crime under the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act.
hk_claim: Unauthorized access to a computer and theft of data is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the theft of virtual property.

fact_summary: 消费者购买房屋后发现开发商擅自将人车分流小区改为地面停车 / A homebuyer discovered the developer had converted a pedestrian-vehicle-separated community into one with surface parking.
cn_claim: 开发商擅自变更小区规划设计的买受人可主张违约责任（民法典第577条；商品房买卖合同司法解释第3条）。
us_claim: A developer who eliminates promised pedestrian-vehicle separation is in breach of contract.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold developers liable for unauthorized changes to community design.

fact_summary: 消费者购买房屋后发现开发商擅自将人车分流小区改为地面停车 / A homebuyer found the developer had eliminated pedestrian-vehicle separation.
cn_claim: 开发商擅自变更小区规划设计的买受人可主张违约责任（民法典第577条；商品房买卖合同司法解释第3条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A developer who unilaterally changes community design features is in breach of the sale-and-purchase agreement.
notes: Both CN and HK hold developers liable for unauthorized changes to community design.

fact_summary: 某景区因玻璃栈道未限制同时通行人数致超载面板开裂 / A glass walkway at a scenic area cracked because the number of simultaneous visitors had not been restricted.
cn_claim: 景区经营者应限制高风险项目的瞬时容量确保安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A scenic-area operator who fails to limit occupancy on glass walkways is liable for resulting injuries.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to manage visitor numbers on high-risk structures breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require operators to restrict occupancy on high-risk structures.

fact_summary: 被告人因窃取、收买、非法提供信用卡信息被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for stealing, purchasing, and illegally providing credit-card information.
cn_claim: 窃取、收买或非法提供他人信用卡信息资料的构成窃取、收买、非法提供信用卡信息罪（刑法第177条之一第一款）。
us_claim: Trafficking in credit-card information is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1029.
hk_claim: Obtaining and transferring another's financial information without authority is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize trafficking in credit-card information.

fact_summary: 消费者通过海外代购购买电子产品后发现为翻新机 / A consumer purchased electronics through an overseas agent and discovered they were refurbished units.
cn_claim: 代购方将翻新机作为全新机销售的构成欺诈应承担赔偿责任（民法典第577条；消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: A purchasing agent who sells refurbished goods as new commits fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for refurbished goods sold as new through agents.

fact_summary: 消费者通过海外代购购买电子产品后发现为翻新机 / A consumer purchased electronics through an overseas agent and discovered they were refurbished.
cn_claim: 以翻新机作为全新机销售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling refurbished electronics as new is fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for refurbished goods sold as new through agents.

fact_summary: 某医院因未对精神科病房窗户安装防护网致病人坠楼 / A psychiatric patient fell from a hospital window because no safety barrier had been installed on the ward window.
cn_claim: 精神卫生医疗机构应采取必要的安全防护措施防止患者发生意外（精神卫生法第38条）。
us_claim: A psychiatric hospital that fails to install window restraints is liable for patient injuries.
hk_claim: A hospital that fails to take reasonable precautions against foreseeable self-harm breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require psychiatric facilities to install window barriers.

fact_summary: 被告人因编造虚假恐怖信息并在网络上传播造成社会恐慌 / A defendant fabricated false terrorist threats and disseminated them online, causing public panic.
cn_claim: 编造虚假恐怖信息传播严重扰乱社会秩序的构成编造、故意传播虚假恐怖信息罪（刑法第291条之一第一款）。
us_claim: Communicating false terrorist threats causing public alarm is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 1038.
hk_claim: Communicating false information causing public alarm is an offense under the Public Order Ordinance (Cap. 245).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize false terrorist-threat dissemination.

fact_summary: 消费者购买家庭影院后发现功放功率与宣传严重不符 / A consumer purchased a home-theater system and discovered the amplifier power was significantly below the advertised specification.
cn_claim: 经营者以虚假性能指标误导消费者的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling audio equipment with materially misrepresented power output constitutes fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for misrepresented audio-equipment specifications.

fact_summary: 消费者购买家庭影院后发现功放功率与宣传严重不符 / A consumer purchased a home-theater system and found the amplifier power was far below advertised.
cn_claim: 以虚假性能指标误导消费者的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling equipment with materially misrepresented specifications is misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for misrepresented equipment specifications.

fact_summary: 某工厂因焊接作业未清理周边可燃物引发火灾 / A fire erupted at a factory when welding operations were conducted without first clearing nearby flammable materials.
cn_claim: 进行电焊等具有火灾危险作业的人员应遵守消防安全操作规程（消防法第21条）。
us_claim: A factory operator who fails to enforce hot-work safety procedures is liable for resulting fires under OSHA standards.
hk_claim: A factory occupier who fails to ensure safe hot-work practices breaches safety regulations and the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require hot-work fire-prevention measures.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法携带枪支进入公共场所被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for illegally carrying a firearm into a public place.
cn_claim: 非法携带枪支进入公共场所危及公共安全情节严重的构成非法携带枪支危及公共安全罪（刑法第130条）。
us_claim: Carrying a firearm into a sensitive public place is a crime under state and federal law.
hk_claim: Possessing a firearm in a public place without a license is an offense under the Firearms and Ammunition Ordinance (Cap. 238).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize carrying firearms into public places.

fact_summary: 被告人因违规运输民用爆炸物品被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for illegally transporting commercial explosives.
cn_claim: 非法运输爆炸物的构成非法运输爆炸物罪（刑法第125条第一款）。
us_claim: Transporting explosives without authorization is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 842.
hk_claim: Illegally transporting explosives is an offense under the Dangerous Goods Ordinance (Cap. 295).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize unauthorized explosives transport.

fact_summary: 消费者通过盲盒自动贩卖机购买后开出的商品与机器展示严重不符 / A consumer purchased from a mystery-box vending machine and received items materially different from those displayed.
cn_claim: 经营者以虚假内容误导消费者的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: A vending-machine operator that displays goods not representative of actual contents commits deceptive practices.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for vending-machine deception.

fact_summary: 消费者通过盲盒自动贩卖机购买后开出的商品与机器展示严重不符 / A consumer received items materially different from the vending-machine display.
cn_claim: 以虚假内容误导消费者的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A vending-machine operator who misrepresents the contents is liable for misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for vending-machine deception.

fact_summary: 某地铁站因自动扶梯急停按钮被遮挡致发生夹人事故时无法及时停机 / A passenger was caught in an escalator at a subway station because the emergency-stop button was obscured and could not be activated in time.
cn_claim: 特种设备使用单位应确保紧急停止装置标志明显且易于操作（特种设备安全法第35条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A transit authority that fails to keep emergency-stop controls accessible is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain accessible emergency controls breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require emergency-stop controls to be accessible.

fact_summary: 被告人因拒不执行判决裁定被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for refusing to comply with a court judgment.
cn_claim: 对人民法院的判决、裁定有能力执行而拒不执行情节严重的构成拒不执行判决、裁定罪（刑法第313条）。
us_claim: Willful disobedience of a court order is contempt of court and may be punished by fines and imprisonment.
hk_claim: Disobedience of a court order is contempt of court subject to committal.
notes: All three jurisdictions punish willful defiance of court orders.

fact_summary: 二手车行将水淹全损车修复后作为无事故精品车出售 / A used-car dealer sold a flood-damaged total-loss vehicle that had been repaired as an accident-free premium car.
cn_claim: 将事故全损车作为无事故精品车销售的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a flood-damaged vehicle without disclosure constitutes fraud and violates state title-branding laws.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require disclosure of flood-damage history in vehicle sales.

fact_summary: 二手车行将水淹全损车修复后作为无事故精品车出售 / A used-car dealer sold a repaired flood-total car as an accident-free premium vehicle.
cn_claim: 将事故全损车作为无事故精品车销售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling a flood-damaged vehicle without disclosure is fraud and misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK require disclosure of flood-damage history in vehicle sales.

fact_summary: 某宾馆因热水系统水温失控致客人淋浴时烫伤 / A hotel guest was scalded in the shower because the hot-water system's temperature was uncontrolled.
cn_claim: 宾馆经营者应确保客房设施安全（民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A hotel that fails to maintain safe hot-water temperatures is liable for negligence.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain safe water temperatures breaches the common duty of care.
notes: All three jurisdictions require hotels to maintain safe water temperatures.

fact_summary: 被告人因组织淫秽表演被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for organizing obscene live performances.
cn_claim: 组织进行淫秽表演的构成组织淫秽表演罪（刑法第365条）。
us_claim: Organizing obscene live performances may be prosecuted under state obscenity laws and municipal ordinances.
hk_claim: Organizing obscene performances is an offense under the Control of Obscene and Indecent Articles Ordinance (Cap. 390).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize organizing obscene live performances.

fact_summary: 消费者在直播间购买翡翠赌石后发现为染色石英岩 / A consumer purchased jadeite gambling stones through a livestream and discovered they were dyed quartzite.

fact_summary: 被告人因违规出具信用证造成银行重大损失被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for illegally issuing a letter of credit that caused the bank substantial losses.

hk_claim: Issuing false financial instruments causing loss is an offense under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize fraudulent issuance of financial instruments.

fact_summary: 消费者购买二手房后发现房屋存在严重渗漏但卖家未告知 / A consumer purchased a secondhand home and discovered severe water leakage the seller had not disclosed.
cn_claim: 出卖人未告知房屋存在渗漏等重大瑕疵的买受人可请求撤销合同或减少价款（民法典第148条、第582条）。
us_claim: A seller who fails to disclose known water damage commits fraud or misrepresentation.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require disclosure of known water-damage defects in property sales.

fact_summary: 消费者购买二手房后发现房屋存在严重渗漏但卖家未告知 / A consumer purchased a secondhand home and found severe undisclosed water leakage.
cn_claim: 未告知房屋存在渗漏等重大瑕疵的买受人可请求撤销合同或减少价款（民法典第148条、第582条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A seller who fails to disclose known latent defects such as water leakage is liable for misrepresentation.
notes: Both CN and HK require disclosure of known water-damage defects in property sales.

fact_summary: 某酒店因洗衣房蒸汽管道未保温致员工烫伤 / A hotel laundry-room worker was scalded by an uninsulated steam pipe.
cn_claim: 用人单位应提供符合安全标准的工作环境和防护措施（安全生产法第35条；民法典第1198条第一款）。
us_claim: A hotel that fails to insulate exposed steam pipes is liable for worker injuries under OSHA standards.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain safe workplace conditions breaches the common duty of care and safety regulations.
notes: All three jurisdictions require employers to insulate hazardous hot pipes.

fact_summary: 被告人因以危险方法危害公共安全驾驶冲撞人群 / A defendant was prosecuted for endangering public safety by driving a vehicle into a crowd.
cn_claim: 以危险方法危害公共安全致人重伤死亡或使公私财产遭受重大损失的构成以危险方法危害公共安全罪（刑法第115条第一款）。
us_claim: Intentionally driving into a crowd constitutes murder or attempted murder and aggravated assault.
hk_claim: Intentionally driving into a crowd causing death is murder.
notes: All three jurisdictions impose the most severe penalties for vehicular attacks on crowds.

fact_summary: 消费者在洗车店洗车后发现车身出现新划痕 / A consumer discovered new scratches on the vehicle body after a car wash.
cn_claim: 洗车服务经营者应对服务过程中造成的车辆损坏承担赔偿责任（民法典第1191条第一款）。
us_claim: A car-wash operator is liable for damage caused to vehicles during the wash process.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US hold car-wash operators liable for damage caused during service.

fact_summary: 消费者在洗车店洗车后发现车身出现新划痕 / A consumer discovered new scratches after a car wash.
cn_claim: 洗车服务经营者应对服务过程中造成的车辆损坏承担赔偿责任（民法典第1191条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A car-wash operator is liable for damage caused during the wash.
notes: Both CN and HK hold car-wash operators liable for damage caused during service.

fact_summary: 某工厂因未对储酸罐进行壁厚检测致罐体破裂酸液泄漏 / Acid leaked from a ruptured storage tank at a factory because wall-thickness testing had not been performed.
cn_claim: 危险化学品储存单位应定期对储存设施进行安全评价（危险化学品安全管理条例第22条；安全生产法第36条）。
us_claim: A factory that fails to inspect chemical-storage-tank integrity is liable under OSHA Process Safety Management standards.
hk_claim: A factory occupier who fails to maintain storage-tank safety breaches safety regulations.
notes: All three jurisdictions require periodic chemical-tank inspection.

fact_summary: 被告人因破坏公用电信设施被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for sabotaging public telecommunications infrastructure.
cn_claim: 破坏广播电视设施、公用电信设施危害公共安全的构成破坏广播电视设施、公用电信设施罪（刑法第124条第一款）。

hk_claim: Damaging telecommunications infrastructure is an offense under the Telecommunications Ordinance (Cap. 106).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the sabotage of telecommunications infrastructure.

fact_summary: 消费者在宠物店购买宠物后一周内宠物死亡 / A consumer's pet died within one week of purchase from a pet shop.
cn_claim: 经营者应保证所售宠物在出售时处于健康状态并告知饲养注意事项（动物防疫法第49条；民法典第617条）。
us_claim: Pet-lemon laws in many states provide remedies when a pet becomes ill or dies shortly after purchase.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide consumer remedies when a purchased pet dies shortly after sale.

fact_summary: 消费者在宠物店购买宠物后一周内宠物死亡 / A consumer's pet died within one week of purchase from a pet shop.
cn_claim: 经营者应保证所售宠物在出售时处于健康状态并承担瑕疵担保责任（动物防疫法第49条；民法典第617条）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A pet seller who sells an unhealthy animal is liable for breach of contract.
notes: Both CN and HK provide consumer remedies when a purchased pet dies shortly after sale.

fact_summary: 某市因路面标线磨损严重未重新施划致夜间交通事故频发 / Frequent nighttime traffic accidents occurred because severely worn road markings had not been repainted.
cn_claim: 交通管理部门应对交通标线进行维护（道路交通安全法第30条）。
us_claim: A municipality that fails to maintain adequate road markings is liable for resulting accidents.
hk_claim: A public authority that fails to maintain road markings is liable for negligence.
notes: All three jurisdictions require traffic authorities to maintain road markings.

fact_summary: 被告人因销售含有有毒有害物质的化妆品致多人面部毁容 / A defendant was prosecuted for selling cosmetics containing toxic substances that disfigured multiple consumers' faces.
cn_claim: 销售明知掺有有毒有害物质的化妆品的构成销售有毒、有害食品罪（刑法第144条）及生产、销售不符合卫生标准的化妆品罪（刑法第148条）。

hk_claim: Selling cosmetic products containing prohibited substances is an offense under the Consumer Goods Safety Ordinance (Cap. 456).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize the sale of toxic cosmetics.

fact_summary: 被告人因使用无人机侵入机场净空区被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for flying a drone into an airport's protected airspace.
cn_claim: 在民用机场净空保护区域内放飞无人机影响飞行安全的依法追究刑事责任（民用航空法第58条、第208条）。

fact_summary: 消费者在电商平台购买手机后发现为已激活的二手设备 / A consumer purchased a phone on an e-commerce platform and discovered it was a pre-activated used device.
cn_claim: 将已激活的二手设备作为全新正品销售的构成欺诈应增加赔偿三倍价款（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: Selling a used device as new constitutes fraud.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US provide remedies for used devices sold as new.

fact_summary: 消费者购买手机后发现为已激活的二手设备 / A consumer purchased a phone and discovered it was a pre-activated used device.
cn_claim: 将已激活的二手设备作为全新正品销售的构成欺诈（消费者权益保护法第55条第一款）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Selling a used device as new is fraud and an offense under the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap. 362).
notes: Both CN and HK provide remedies for used devices sold as new.

fact_summary: 某室内游乐园因海洋球池未定期消毒致多名儿童皮肤感染 / Multiple children contracted skin infections at an indoor playground because the ball pit had not been regularly sanitized.
cn_claim: 儿童游乐场所经营者应对游乐设施进行定期消毒和卫生维护（民法典第1198条第一款；公共场所卫生管理条例第3条）。
us_claim: A playground operator who fails to sanitize ball pits is liable for resulting infections.
hk_claim: An occupier who fails to maintain hygiene in children's play areas breaches the common duty of care.

fact_summary: 被告人因非法买卖警用装备被追究刑事责任 / A defendant was prosecuted for illegally trading police equipment.
cn_claim: 非法生产、买卖警用制式服装、车辆号牌等专用标志、警械的构成非法生产、买卖警用装备罪（刑法第281条）。
us_claim: Unauthorized sale of law-enforcement insignia and equipment is a crime under 18 U.S.C. § 701.
hk_claim: Unauthorized possession or sale of police equipment is an offense under the Police Force Ordinance (Cap. 232).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize illegal trade in police equipment.

fact_summary: 消费者购买预售理财产品后发现底层资产与宣传严重不符 / A consumer purchased a pre-sale financial product and discovered the underlying assets were materially different from those advertised.
cn_claim: 金融机构向客户推荐金融产品时应履行适当性义务并全面真实告知产品信息（商业银行理财业务监督管理办法第26条）；虚假宣传的构成欺诈。
us_claim: Selling a financial product with materially misrepresented underlying assets constitutes securities fraud under Rule 10b-5.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: Both CN and US require accurate disclosure of underlying assets in financial products.

fact_summary: 消费者购买预售理财产品后发现底层资产与宣传严重不符 / A consumer purchased a financial product and discovered the underlying assets were materially different.
cn_claim: 虚假宣传金融产品的构成欺诈。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: A financial institution that misrepresents a product to investors is liable.
notes: Both CN and HK require accurate disclosure of financial-product information.

fact_summary: 某餐厅因排烟管道未安装防火阀致火灾时火势沿管道蔓延 / A fire in a restaurant spread through the exhaust duct because no fire damper had been installed.
cn_claim: 餐饮经营者应在排油烟管道设置防火阀（消防法第16条；建筑设计防火规范第9.3.11条）。

fact_summary: 被告人因参加恐怖组织并接受培训 / A defendant joined a terrorist organization and received training.
cn_claim: 参加恐怖活动组织的构成参加恐怖组织罪（刑法第120条第一款）。

hk_claim: Membership in a terrorist organization is an offense under the United Nations (Anti-Terrorism Measures) Ordinance (Cap. 575).
notes: All three jurisdictions criminalize membership in terrorist organizations.

fact_summary: Buyer sent purchase order with additional warranty terms; seller acknowledged without objection but later delivered defective goods / 买方发送附加质保条款的订单，卖方无异议确认但随后交付瑕疵货物
cn_claim: 合同因双方合意和实际履行而成立（民法典§490），卖方应履行质量担保义务（民法典§617）
us_claim: UCC §2-207(2): additional terms become part of contract between merchants unless material alteration; breach gives buyer expectation damages under UCC §2-714
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 救济路径差异：US采UCC §2-207附加条款自动纳入规则，但实质性变更除外；CN无类似格式之战规则，合同成立以合意为准；HK普通法采镜像规则，变更条款构成反要约。三法域在格式合同冲突处理上呈显著差异。

fact_summary: Seller orally promised buyer not to enforce penalty clause for late payment; buyer relied and paid late / 卖方口头承诺不执行迟延付款罚息条款，买方信赖并迟延付款
cn_claim: 口头承诺构成合同变更（民法典§543），债权人放弃部分权利有效，但须举证
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §90: promissory estoppel binds promisor when promisee reasonably relies to detriment; may limit remedy as justice requires
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 禁反言差异：US通过§90允诺禁反言保护信赖利益，无需约因；CN通过诚实信用原则（民法典§7）实现类似功能，但法理路径不同；HK普通法通过Central London Property Trust v High Trees House [1947]保护。三法域均保护信赖但理论不同。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased 100 tons of steel from seller; seller delivered only 80 tons citing force majeure / 买方从卖方购买100吨钢材，卖方仅交付80吨并援引不可抗力
cn_claim: 不完全履行构成违约，买方有权要求继续履行或赔偿（民法典§577、§580）
us_claim: UCC §2-612: installment contracts; if non-conformity substantially impairs value, buyer may cancel whole contract; UCC §2-613 frustration of purpose
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 分批交付：US区分单次合同与installment contract，赋予买方取消权；CN统一规定不完全履行，以实际履行或赔偿为核心；HK适用普通法frustration doctrine。三法域在合同解除条件上标准不同。

fact_summary: Buyer signed a 5-year exclusive distribution agreement; seller terminated after 2 years without cause / 买方签署5年期独家分销协议，卖方2年后无因终止
cn_claim: 单方无因终止构成违约，应承担违约责任（民法典§563、§585）
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §250: anticipatory repudiation; non-breaching party may sue immediately or await performance; §241 factors for material breach
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 预期违约：US区分anticipatory repudiation与material breach，赋予立即起诉权；CN规定预期违约（民法典§578）但适用条件较严格；HK普通法认可anticipatory breach。三法域在预期违约救济时机上趋同但标准有差异。

fact_summary: Contractor completed building but with minor defects; owner refused to pay claiming total non-performance / 承包商完成建筑工程但存在轻微瑕疵，业主拒绝付款主张完全未履行
cn_claim: 承包人有权请求支付工程款，业主可主张减价或修复（民法典§799、§803）
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §241: substantial performance doctrine allows recovery if breach not material; owner liable for contract price minus damages for defects
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 实质履行：US substantial performance doctrine允许承包商在瑕疵不重大时获得工程款；CN司法解释（建工合同解释）采类似立场，但业主权利更强；HK普通法亦认可substantial performance。三法域在工程合同瑕疵救济上高度趋同。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased a used car 'as-is'; engine failed within one week / 买方以'as-is'条件购买二手车，一周内发动机故障
cn_claim: 卖方明知重大瑕疵未告知的，买方有权撤销合同（民法典§148、§617）
us_claim: UCC §2-316: 'as-is' disclaimer effective if conspicuous; but implied warranty of merchantability cannot be disclaimed if unconscionable under §2-302
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 免责条款：US允许conspicuous disclaimer排除默示担保，但受unconscionable限制；CN对格式免责条款采严格审查（民法典§497）；HK Sale of Goods Ordinance (Cap 26) §15允许排除但受合理性限制。三法域对格式免责条款审查强度不同。

fact_summary: Seller shipped goods but buyer rejected for late delivery; goods were already sold to sub-buyer / 卖方发货但买方因迟延交货拒收，货物已转售给下游买家
cn_claim: 买方因迟延拒收须证明目的无法实现（民法典§563），但已转售可证实际损失
us_claim: UCC §2-602: buyer must seasonably reject and state defects; §2-603 merchant buyer's duty to follow reasonable instructions; §2-710 incidental damages
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 拒收义务：US要求买方及时拒收并说明瑕疵（UCC §2-602）；CN买方拒受权较宽，但须证明合同目的落空；HK普通法采类似mirror-image rejection规则。三法域在拒收程序要求上US最严格。

fact_summary: Employer orally promised employee a year-end bonus of $10,000; bonus was not paid / 雇主口头承诺员工年终奖金1万美元，未支付
cn_claim: 口头承诺如具备合同要素有效，但奖金争议常受劳动法规限制（民法典§469）
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §90: bonus promise may be enforceable if employee reasonably relied; but employment-at-will limits claim in many states
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 雇佣合同：US就业at-will原则使雇主口头承诺脆弱；CN劳动合同采书面主义，口头承诺举证困难；HK Employment Ordinance (Cap 57) §2定义wages包括奖金，但书面记录要求较严。三法域在雇佣口头承诺上均采谨慎态度。

fact_summary: Buyer signed a software license with automatic renewal clause; forgot to cancel and was charged / 买方签署含自动续期条款的软件许可协议，忘记取消被扣费
cn_claim: 格式条款提供方应合理提示自动续期（民法典§496），否则不利解释
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §211: standardized agreements; unconscionable terms not enforceable; UCC §2-302 unconscionability doctrine applies
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 格式合同：US通过unconscionable doctrine（UCC §2-302）否定显失公平条款；CN要求显著提示免除/减轻己方责任条款；HK Control of Exemption Clauses Ordinance (Cap 71) §7限制免责条款。三法域保护机制不同但目标一致。

fact_summary: Seller breached by delivering defective goods; buyer sought lost profits from resale contracts / 卖方违约交付瑕疵货物，买方主张转售合同利润损失
cn_claim: 损害赔偿范围包括可得利益损失（民法典§584），但须可预见
us_claim: Hadley v Baxendale (1854) 9 Exch 341: consequential damages recoverable only if foreseeable at time of contract; UCC §2-715(2)(a) follows Hadley rule
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 损害赔偿可预见性：Hadley v Baxendale确立的 foreseeability rule 为US与HK共同基础；CN民法典§584亦采可预见性标准，但计算方式更自由。三法域在可预见性上高度趋同。

fact_summary: Buyer mailed acceptance on Monday; seller revoked offer by telegram on Tuesday before receiving acceptance / 买方周一寄出承诺，卖方周二在收到承诺前以电报撤销要约
cn_claim: 要约在承诺到达前可撤销，但需承诺人先收到（民法典§476），本案尚未到达
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §63: mailbox rule; acceptance effective upon dispatch, not receipt; offeror cannot revoke after dispatch under §63
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 投邮主义：US mailbox rule使承诺于寄出时生效；CN采到达主义（民法典§137），承诺到达前要约可撤销；HK普通法传统采mailbox rule，但 Contracts (Rights of Third Parties) Ordinance 未改变此点。三法域在承诺生效时间上US/HK与CN对立。

fact_summary: Seller promised to sell a rare antique vase; later refused claiming it was merely a joke / 卖方承诺出售古董花瓶，后拒绝称只是玩笑
cn_claim: 意思表示真实且对方合理信赖的，合同成立（民法典§142、§143）
us_claim: Lucy v Zehmer (1954) 196 Va 493: objective theory of contract; outward manifestation of intent controls, not secret subjective intention; Restatement (Second) §20
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 客观主义：Lucy v Zehmer确立客观意思理论；CN民法典§142要求意思表示真实，但司法实践亦采客观解释；HK普通法同样采objective theory of contract。三法域在合同解释上均采客观主义，趋同。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods for resale; seller knew buyer's resale purpose but delivered late causing lost resale profits / 买方为转售目的购买货物，卖方明知但迟延交货导致转售利润损失
cn_claim: 损害赔偿范围包括可预见损失（民法典§584），卖方明知用途应预见到利润损失
us_claim: UCC §2-715(2)(a): consequential damages include lost profits if seller had reason to know at time of contracting; Hadley v Baxendale second limb
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 间接损失：US与HK均受Hadley v Baxendale两分支规则约束；CN民法典§584亦要求可预见性，但法院对转售利润损失通常更宽松支持。三法域在转售利润可预见性上趋同。

fact_summary: Buyer leased equipment for 12 months; lessor sold equipment to buyer's competitor mid-lease / 买方租赁设备12个月，出租人在租赁期间将设备出售给买方竞争对手

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller and later assigned rights to third party without seller's consent / 买方未经卖方同意将合同权利转让给第三方
cn_claim: 债权人转让权利无需债务人同意，但应通知（民法典§546）

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller later claimed the contract was void for mistake in price term / 卖方后称合同因价格条款错误而无效

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's performance was delegated to a subcontractor who performed poorly / 卖方将合同履行转包给分包商，分包商履行不佳

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's performance was subject to a condition precedent that never occurred / 卖方履约以先决条件为条件，但该条件未发生

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller delivered non-conforming goods and buyer rejected / 买方从卖方购买货物，卖方交付不符货物，买方拒收
cn_claim: 卖方应承担违约责任，买方有权拒收并要求更换或退货（民法典§610）

fact_summary: Buyer paid a deposit of 20% to seller; seller failed to deliver and buyer sought double deposit return / 买方支付20%定金，卖方未交付，买方请求双倍返还定金
cn_claim: 定金罚则：收受定金方违约应双倍返还（民法典§587）

fact_summary: Seller promised to sell a house to buyer but later sold to third party for higher price / 卖方承诺向买方出售房屋，后高价转售第三方
cn_claim: 卖方违约应承担赔偿，买方有权请求履行或赔偿（民法典§577）

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's minor breach caused minimal loss but buyer terminated entire contract / 卖方轻微违约造成微小损失，买方解除整个合同

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller delivered late but buyer accepted and used goods / 买方购买货物，卖方迟延交货但买方接受并使用

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's agent made unauthorized oral modification / 卖方代理人未经授权口头变更合同

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's performance was excused by supervening event making it illegal / 卖方履约因嗣后事件成为非法

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller's standard terms included a clause limiting liability to contract price / 卖方标准条款将责任限制在合同价格内

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's employee made a collateral oral promise about quality / 卖方员工作出口头质量担保

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's performance was subject to a condition that the buyer obtain financing / 卖方履约以买方获得融资为条件

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller delivered goods that were dangerous and caused injury / 卖方交付危险货物导致人身伤害

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller's performance was delayed by a strike at seller's supplier / 卖方履行因供应商罢工而迟延

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller delivered goods that did not match the sample shown / 买方购买货物，卖方交付货物与展示样品不符

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller's standard terms included a forum selection clause in seller's favor / 卖方标准条款包含对卖方有利的法院选择条款
