us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §80: arbitration clauses enforceable under Federal Arbitration Act; §80(1) unless unconscionable; §208 standardized agreement unconscionability; §211 conspicuousness requirement
hk_claim: Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) §5: arbitration agreement must be in writing; §20 separability of arbitration clause; §81 recognition and enforcement; common law supports arbitration as alternative dispute resolution
notes: 仲裁条款：US FAA与HK Cap 609均支持仲裁协议；CN民法典§507要求仲裁条款独立；三法域均采separability doctrine。

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller assigned rights to a finance company without buyer's consent / 卖方未经买方同意将合同权利转让给金融公司
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §322: assignment of rights generally permitted; §322(1) unless materially increases duty, risk, or burden; §322(2) personal service contracts; UCC §2-210(2) right to assign generally preserved
hk_claim: Assignment of legal choses in action permitted under Law of Property Act 1925 §136; written notice to debtor required; Dearle v Hall (1828) 3 Russ 1; priorities determined by first in time of notice; but equitable assignments possible without notice
notes: 权利转让：US §322与HK Law of Property Act 1925 §136均允许债权转让；CN民法典§546采通知主义；三法域核心趋同。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller's employee made a collateral promise that was not in the written contract / 卖方员工作出未载入书面合同的附属承诺
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §213: parol evidence rule; §213(2) consistent additional terms not barred; §214 evidence of collateral agreement admissible; §216 condition precedent exception
hk_claim: Common law: collateral contracts may exist alongside main written contract; oral statements may create separate binding obligation; City of Westminster Properties v Mudd [1959] Ch 129; Esso Petroleum v Mardon [1976] QB 801; parol evidence rule has exceptions
notes: 附属承诺：US parol evidence rule §213及HK普通法均允许collateral contract例外；CN民法典§142解释规则更宽松；三法域均承认附属协议可独立存在。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller's performance was subject to a condition precedent that the goods pass inspection / 卖方履约以货物通过检验为先决条件
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §224: condition defined; §225 effect of failure of condition; §226 constructive conditions of exchange; UCC §2-511(1) tender of delivery as condition to buyer's duty to pay
hk_claim: Common law: condition precedent suspends duty until occurrence; breach of condition gives right to terminate; The Mihalis Angelos [1971] 1 QB 164; condition must be fulfilled before contract operative; sale subject to survey common in land transactions
notes: 条件 precedent：US §224与HK普通法condition precedent规则一致；CN民法典§158类似规定；三法域条件理论高度相似。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller's standard terms included a liquidated damages clause that was 5 times the actual loss / 卖方约定违约金为实际损失的5倍
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §356: liquidated damages must be reasonable forecast; penalty clauses unenforceable; UCC §2-718(1) liquidated damages clause must be reasonable in light of anticipated or actual harm; §2-302 unconscionability
hk_claim: Common law: penalty clauses traditionally unenforceable; Dunlop Pneumatic Tyre Co v New Garage & Motor Co [1915] AC 79; distinction between genuine pre-estimate of loss and penalty; but recent UK Supreme Court in Cavendish v Makdessi [2015] UKSC 67 has liberalized penalty rule
notes: 违约金：US传统区分liquidated damages与penalty；HK沿用Dunlop rule但Cavendish [2015]有放宽趋势；CN民法典§585允许法院调整；三法域对penalty态度趋同但仍存差异。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller's standard terms included a clause excluding liability for indirect losses / 卖方标准条款排除间接损失责任
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: UCC §2-719(3): consequential damages limitation may be unconscionable; §2-302 unconscionability; §2-719(1) limitation or alteration of remedies must be conspicuous
hk_claim: Control of Exemption Clauses Ordinance (Cap 71) §2(2): exclusion of liability for indirect loss in consumer contracts is void; in business contracts, reasonableness test applies under UCTA 1977 (as extended); indirect loss exclusion may be struck down if unreasonable
notes: 间接损失免责：US §2-719与HK Cap 71均限制间接损失免责；CN民法典§496要求格式条款显著提示；三法域均保护弱势方。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller's employee had apparent authority to make a side agreement about delivery date / 卖方员工有表见代理权就交付日期达成附属协议
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §144: apparent authority; §159 ratification; §160 effect of ratification; unauthorized acts may be binding if principal's manifestations create reasonable belief in authority; UCC §2-403 good faith purchasers
hk_claim: Common law ostensible authority: Freeman & Lockyer v Buckhurst Park Properties [1964] 2 QB 480; agent's apparent authority binds principal if third party reasonably relies; Ramsgate Victoria Hotel v Montefiore (1866) LR 1 Ex 109; ratification may cure lack of authority; British Bank of the Middle East v Sun Life [1983] 2 Lloyd's Rep 9
notes: 表见代理：US §144与HK Freeman & Lockyer [1964]规则一致；CN民法典§172同样保护善意相对人；三法域表见代理理论高度趋同。

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's performance was rendered illegal by a new law after contract formation / 合同成立后新法律使卖方履约非法
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §261: supervening impracticability; §264 destruction of subject matter; §265 death or incapacity; UCC §2-615(a) failure of presupposed conditions due to governmental regulation
hk_claim: Common law frustration by supervening illegality: supervening illegality discharges contract; Fibrosa Spolka Akcyjna v Fairbairn Lawson [1943] AC 32; partial frustration may allow restitution under Law Reform (Frustrated Contracts) Act 1943; recovery of money paid
notes: 嗣后非法：US §261与HK Fibrosa [1943]均认可supervening illegality免责；CN民法典§180不可抗力涵盖；三法域对嗣后非法处理一致。

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's standard terms included a jurisdiction clause selecting Hong Kong courts / 卖方标准条款选择香港法院管辖
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §80: forum selection clauses enforceable; §80(1) unless unfair or unreasonable; UCC §1-301(c) choice of forum; federal courts may apply state law on forum selection
hk_claim: Common law forum selection clauses are prima facie valid; The Eleftheria [1970] P 94; parties may choose exclusive jurisdiction; but courts may refuse to enforce if clause is contrary to public policy or oppressive; Bremen v Zapata Off-Shore 407 U.S. 1 (1972) US Supreme Court standard
notes: 管辖选择：US Bremen v Zapata [1972]与HK The Eleftheria [1970]均尊重forum selection；CN允许协议管辖但受专属管辖限制；三法域均采party autonomy。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller's standard terms included a 'time is of the essence' clause / 卖方标准条款包含'time is of the essence'条款
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: UCC §2-309: time for delivery or shipment; §2-309(1) absence of agreed time means reasonable time; §2-501 when identification occurs; 'time is of the essence' makes timely performance a condition
hk_claim: Common law: 'time is of the essence' clause makes timely performance a condition; breach entitles innocent party to terminate; Bunge Corp v Tradax SA [1981] 1 WLR 711; in absence of such clause, time is not of the essence unless circumstances indicate
notes: 时间条款：US §2-309与HK Bunge [1981]均认可'time is of the essence'；CN民法典§511以合理期限为核心，但可约定为条件；HK更严格。

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's employee made a promise that induced buyer to forbear from suing a third party / 卖方员工承诺诱使买方放弃起诉第三方
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §90: promissory estoppel; forbearance as reliance; §90(1) promise inducing action or forbearance; §90(2) binding without proof of inducement for charitable subscriptions; Hamer v Sidway (1891) 124 NY 538; forbearance is valid consideration
hk_claim: Common law promissory estoppel: Central London Property Trust v High Trees House [1947] KB 130; forbearance may constitute consideration; Tool Metal Manufacturing v Tungsten Electric [1955] 1 WLR 761; promissory estoppel requires clear promise and reliance; but not a standalone cause of action in England
notes: 禁反言：US §90 promissory estoppel与HK Central London Property Trust [1947]均认可；CN民法典§500缔约过失涵盖类似信赖保护；三法域均保护信赖利益。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller delivered goods that did not conform to the contract description / 买方购买货物，卖方交付不符合合同描述的货物
cn_claim: 卖方应承担违约责任，买方有权拒收、更换或要求赔偿（民法典§610、§577）
us_claim: UCC §2-601: perfect tender rule; buyer may reject if non-conforming in any respect; §2-602 seasonable rejection; §2-714 damages for breach; §2-706 seller's right to resale
hk_claim: Sale of Goods Ordinance (Cap 26) §11: goods must correspond with description; §13: sale by sample; §35: buyer's right to examine; breach of condition gives right to reject; St Albans City and District Council v International Computers Ltd [1996] 4 All ER 481
notes: 货物不符：US perfect tender rule最严格；HK Sale of Goods Ordinance §11-12区分condition/warranty；CN民法典§610允许选择救济；三法域在救济路径上呈光谱差异。

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's performance became impossible due to a pandemic lockdown / 合同因疫情封锁导致卖方履约不可能
cn_claim: 因不可抗力导致不能履行的，可部分或全部免除责任（民法典§180）
us_claim: UCC §2-615: excuse by failure of presupposed conditions; §2-615(a) contingency; §2-615(c) allocation; §2-616 procedure; but must show performance made impracticable, not merely more expensive
hk_claim: Common law frustration: supervening event must make performance radically different; Davis Contractors v Fareham UDC [1956] AC 696; National Carriers v Panalpina [1981] AC 675; mere hardship or increased expense insufficient; Krell v Henry [1903] 2 KB 740 (coronation case)
notes: 疫情免责：三法域均认可不可抗力/force majeure/frustration，但标准不同：US §2-615采impracticable；HK frustration标准极高；CN §180标准居中；PENDING_VERIFICATION: 疫情判例仍在发展中。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller's standard terms included a limitation of liability clause / 卖方标准条款包含责任限制条款
cn_claim: 责任限制条款应显著提示，免除故意或重大过失责任的无效（民法典§496、§506）
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §211: standardized agreements; §208 unconscionability; UCC §2-302 unconscionable clauses void; §2-719(3) limitation of consequential damages may be unconscionable
hk_claim: Control of Exemption Clauses Ordinance (Cap 71) §2: exclusion of negligence liability void unless reasonable; §3: exclusion of liability for breach of contract; UCTA 1977 (as extended) reasonableness test; Smith v Eric S Bush [1990] 1 AC 831; George Mitchell v Finney Lock Seeds [1983] 2 AC 803
notes: 免责条款：三法域均限制免责条款，但机制不同：US unconscionable (§2-302)；HK UCTA 1977 reasonableness test；CN格式条款提示义务+故意/重大过失绝对禁止；核心差异在审查标准。

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's employee made an oral promise that induced buyer to enter the contract / 卖方员工作出口头承诺诱使买方签约
cn_claim: 口头承诺如为合同组成部分有效，但须举证（民法典§469）
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §213: parol evidence rule; §214 exceptions; §216 condition precedent; oral evidence admissible to show fraud, mistake, or collateral agreement; §162 misrepresentation
hk_claim: Common law: parol evidence rule excludes prior oral statements inconsistent with written contract; but exceptions for fraud, misrepresentation, collateral warranties; City of Westminster Properties v Mudd [1959] Ch 129; Esso Petroleum v Mardon [1976] QB 801; Pinnel's Case (1602) 5 Co Rep 117a
notes: 口头证据：三法域均有parol evidence rule或类似限制：US §213；HK普通法；CN民法典§469书面主义倾向；但三法域均承认fraud、collateral agreement等例外。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller included a retention of title clause in the invoice / 卖方在发票中加入所有权保留条款
cn_claim: 所有权保留条款有效，但不得对抗已支付对价的善意第三人（民法典§641）
us_claim: UCC §2-401(1): title passes upon delivery unless otherwise agreed; §2-401(2) reservation of title by seller is limited to security interest; Article 9 governs security interests; simple reservation of title ineffective against buyers in ordinary course
hk_claim: Romalpa clause (retention of title) enforceable if properly drafted; Aluminium Industrie Vaassen v Romalpa [1976] 1 WLR 676; Clough Mill v Martin [1985] 1 WLR 111; but ineffective once goods mixed or sold on; Armour v Thyssen Edelstahlwerke [1991] 2 AC 339 (HL)
notes: 所有权保留：三法域均认可retention of title，但效力不同：US UCC Article 9将其转化为security interest；HK Romalpa条款有效但受mixing限制；CN民法典§641直接承认；核心差异在对抗第三人效力。

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's performance was delayed by a government regulation after contract formation / 合同成立后政府规制导致卖方迟延
cn_claim: 因政府行为导致不能履行的，可适用不可抗力或情势变更（民法典§180、§533）
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §261: supervening impracticability; UCC §2-615(a) failure of presupposed conditions due to governmental regulation; §2-615(c) allocation; §2-616 procedure; but mere delay or increased cost insufficient; must show impracticability
hk_claim: Common law frustration: supervening governmental act may frustrate if it radically alters obligations; Fibrosa Spolka Akcyjna v Fairbairn Lawson [1943] AC 32; Davis Contractors v Fareham UDC [1956]; but mere delay or increased cost usually insufficient; National Carriers v Panalpina [1981]
notes: 政府规制：三法域均认可政府行为可免责，但标准不同：US §2-615(a) impracticable；HK frustration极高标准；CN §180不可抗力/§533情势变更；差异在困难与不可能的认定标准。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller's standard terms included a clause requiring disputes to be resolved by arbitration / 卖方标准条款要求仲裁解决争议
cn_claim: 仲裁条款有效，但格式条款应显著提示（民法典§496、§507）
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §80: arbitration clauses enforceable under Federal Arbitration Act; §208 unconscionability; §211 standardized agreements; §80(1) unless unfair or unreasonable; UCC §1-302 variation by agreement
hk_claim: Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) §5: arbitration agreement must be in writing; §20 separability of arbitration clause; §81 recognition and enforcement; common law supports arbitration as alternative dispute resolution; Fiona Trust & Holding v Privalov [2007] UKHL 40 (separability doctrine)
notes: 仲裁：三法域均支持仲裁协议，separability doctrine为三法域共识：US FAA §2、HK Cap 609 §20、CN §507；差异在formality要求与unconscionable审查强度。

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's standard terms included a 'best endeavours' clause / 卖方标准条款包含'最大努力'条款
cn_claim: 应依诚信原则解释并履行（民法典§509），但标准模糊
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §228: best efforts means reasonable diligence and effort; but vague terms may render contract illusory if no enforceable standard; §33 certainty requirement; UCC §2-311(1) open terms may be filled by parties' conduct
hk_claim: Common law: 'best endeavours' or 'reasonable endeavours' clauses are enforceable if standard can be objectively determined; Rhodia International Holdings v Huntsman International LLC [2007] EWHC 292 (Comm); but 'best endeavours' alone may be too vague; CPC Group v Qatari Diar Real Estate [2010] EWHC 1535 (Ch); distinction between 'best' and 'reasonable' endeavours
notes: best endeavours：三法域均认可但解释标准不同：US §228定义为reasonable diligence；HK普通法区分best vs reasonable endeavours；CN民法典§509诚信履行；核心差异在vague term的容忍度。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller's standard terms included a clause allowing unilateral termination / 卖方标准条款允许单方终止
cn_claim: 单方终止权条款无效，除非有法律依据或双方约定（民法典§563）
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §237: discharge by performance; §241 factors for material breach; §251 duty to give adequate assurance; §250 anticipatory repudiation; unilateral termination at-will generally allowed unless contract is for definite term
hk_claim: Common law: unilateral termination clauses are generally enforceable if clearly drafted; but may be construed as penalty if termination payment disproportionate; Rice v Great Yarmouth Borough Council [2003] EWCA Civ 616; contract may be terminated for breach if breach is repudiatory; 'contractual discretion' must be exercised rationally; Braganza v BP Shipping [2015] UKSC 17
notes: 单方终止：三法域差异显著：US at-will employment/contract termination普遍；HK普通法要求repudiatory breach或明确条款；CN民法典§563限制单方解除；差异在合同稳定性与灵活性之间。

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's standard terms included a clause requiring all modifications to be in writing / 卖方标准条款要求所有变更须书面
cn_claim: 口头变更原则上有效，但约定书面变更的从其约定（民法典§469、§543）
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §149: agreements to make agreements; §150 option contracts; §217 integrated agreements; UCC §2-209(2): no oral modification clause is valid but may be waived; §2-209(4) waiver requirements
hk_claim: Common law: 'no oral modification' clauses generally enforceable under English law; Rock Advertising v MWB Business Exchange [2018] UKSC 24; clause requiring written modification is binding; but estoppel may prevent reliance on no-oral-modification clause if party has acted on oral modification; Variation by deed or under seal may be required if no consideration
notes: 变更形式：三法域对书面变更条款态度分化：US §2-209(2)认可但允许waiver；HK Rock Advertising [2018]确认书面变更条款效力；CN民法典§543允许口头变更但约定书面优先；核心差异在形式要求严格程度。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller's employee had apparent authority to agree to a price reduction / 卖方员工有表见代理权同意降价
cn_claim: 表见代理有效，被代理人应承担后果（民法典§172）
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §144: apparent authority; §159 ratification; §160 effect of ratification; unauthorized acts may be binding if principal's manifestations create reasonable belief in authority; UCC §2-403 good faith purchasers
hk_claim: Common law ostensible authority: Freeman & Lockyer v Buckhurst Park Properties [1964] 2 QB 480; agent's apparent authority binds principal if third party reasonably relies; Ramsgate Victoria Hotel v Montefiore (1866) LR 1 Ex 109; ratification may cure lack of authority; British Bank of the Middle East v Sun Life [1983] 2 Lloyd's Rep 9
notes: 表见代理：三法域表见代理规则高度一致：US §144、HK Freeman & Lockyer [1964]、CN §172；均保护善意第三人合理信赖；核心差异在举证责任与manifestation标准。

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's standard terms included a clause excluding liability for breach of a fundamental term / 卖方标准条款排除根本条款违约责任
cn_claim: 免除根本违约责任的格式条款无效（民法典§506）
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §211: standardized agreements; §208 unconscionability; UCC §2-302: unconscionable clauses void; §2-719(3) limitation of consequential damages may be unconscionable; fundamental breach doctrine largely abandoned in US
hk_claim: Common law: fundamental breach doctrine (original rule that exclusion clauses cannot exclude liability for fundamental breach) has been largely abandoned; Photo Production v Securicor [1980] AC 827; Suisse Atlantique v NV Rotterdamsche [1967] 1 AC 361; construction approach now preferred: whether exclusion clause covers the breach; but UCTA 1977 may still invalidate unreasonable exclusions
notes: 根本违约免责：三法域均限制根本违约免责，但路径不同：US §2-302 unconscionable；HK放弃fundamental breach doctrine转而采construction approach；CN §506绝对禁止；差异在审查机制。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller's standard terms included a clause requiring the buyer to waive all rights to set-off / 卖方标准条款要求买方放弃抵销权
cn_claim: 抵销权为法定权利，单方放弃条款可能无效（民法典§568）
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §349: set-off as defense; UCC §2-717: buyer has right to deduct damages from price; waiver of set-off may be enforceable unless unconscionable; §2-302 unconscionability review
hk_claim: Common law: set-off is equitable right; contractual waiver of set-off may be enforceable if clear and unambiguous; but courts may refuse to enforce if waiver is unconscionable or against public policy; Telecom Plus v Rubicam [2003] EWHC 1113; procedural and substantive unconscionability distinction
notes: 抵销权：三法域均允许合同放弃抵销权，但审查标准不同：US §2-717默认买方扣减权；HK普通法对waiver of set-off采严格解释；CN §568法定抵销权更强；差异在默认权利与合同自由之间。

fact_summary: Buyer signed a contract with seller; seller's standard terms included a clause requiring the buyer to indemnify seller for all claims / 卖方标准条款要求买方赔偿卖方所有索赔
cn_claim: 显失公平的 indemnity 条款可请求无效（民法典§496）
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §211: standardized agreements; §208 unconscionability; broad indemnity clauses may be struck down if unconscionable or against public policy; UCC §2-302; but commercial parties of equal bargaining power may enforce broad indemnity
hk_claim: Common law: indemnity clauses are generally enforceable if clearly drafted; but courts may limit or strike down indemnity clauses that are unreasonable or contrary to public policy; impact of UCTA 1977 on consumer contracts; Phillips Products v Hyland [1987] 1 WLR 659; Thompson v T Lohan [1987] 1 WLR 659; net contribution clauses preferred
notes: 赔偿条款：三法域对indemnity条款审查标准不同：US §2-302 unconscionable；HK普通法+UCTA 1977 reasonableness；CN §496格式条款审查；核心差异在审查强度与举证责任。

fact_summary: Buyer purchased goods from seller; seller's standard terms included a clause stating that the contract is the entire agreement / 卖方标准条款声明本合同为完整协议
cn_claim: 完整协议条款有效，但欺诈、隐瞒等例外仍适用（民法典第142条解释）
us_claim: Restatement (Second) of Contracts §217: integrated agreement; §210 completely integrated agreement discharges prior agreements; §213 parol evidence rule; but fraud, duress, mistake exceptions remain; UCC §2-202 final written expression
hk_claim: Common law: entire agreement clauses are generally enforceable; but cannot exclude liability for fraud or misrepresentation; Deepak Fertilisers v ICI Chemicals [1999] 1 Lloyd's Rep 387; Exxonmobil Sales and Supply v Texaco [2003] EWHC 1964 (Comm); construction of contract remains subject to implied terms and trade usage
notes: 完整协议：三法域均认可entire agreement clause，但例外一致：均不能排除fraud liability；US §217、HK Deepak Fertilisers [1999]、CN §142；三法域在核心例外上趋同。

fact_summary: 制造商销售缺陷汽车，购买者因刹车失灵受伤。/ Manufacturer sold defective car with faulty brakes causing injury to purchaser.
cn_claim: 民法典§1202产品缺陷致人损害，生产者承担严格责任
us_claim: Restatement (Third) of Torts: Products Liability §1—manufacturing defect causing physical harm; MacPherson v Buick Motor Co., 217 N.Y. 382 (1916) (duty beyond privity)
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US adopts strict products liability for manufacturing defects with no privity requirement; China adopts strict liability under Civil Code §1202 but retains different burden allocation. Hong Kong has no direct statutory strict product liability, relying on common law negligence (Donoghue v Stevenson [1932] AC 562) with no equivalent development.

fact_summary: 餐厅服务员搬运可乐瓶时爆炸受伤。/ Restaurant waitress injured by exploding Coca-Cola bottle while handling it.
cn_claim: 民法典§1202产品缺陷责任，生产者承担责任
us_claim: Escola v Coca-Cola Bottling Co., 24 Cal.2d 453 (1944) (res ipsa loquitur; Traynor J concurrence urging strict liability); Restatement (Second) of Torts §402A (strict liability for defective products)
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE

cn_claim: 《公司法》第21条禁止控股股东利用关联交易损害公司利益；第182条要求关联交易经董事会或股东会决议通过。
us_claim: Under DGCL §144, interested director transactions are not voidable if approved by disinterested directors or shareholders, or if fair to the corporation. See Weinberger v. UOP, Inc., 457 A.2d 701 (Del. 1983).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US DGCL §144采用'安全港'条款，经无利害关系董事或股东批准即可消除效力瑕疵；中国《公司法》第182条要求报告+决议，但效力后果不明确。差异源于US的safe harbor制度与中国的程序性规制传统。

fact_summary: 董事在决策中未充分调查相关事实，导致公司重大损失。Directors failed to adequately investigate material facts before making a major corporate decision.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第180条规定董事勤勉义务，要求执行职务为公司最大利益尽合理注意；违反该义务造成损失的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: Under the business judgment rule, directors are presumed to act in good faith and on an informed basis. However, gross negligence rebuts this protection. See Smith v. Van Gorkom, 488 A.2d 858 (Del. 1985).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的business judgment rule是判例法确立的强保护机制，除非gross negligence否则不予追责；中国的勤勉义务是成文法直接规定，但缺乏具体的'商业判断规则'判例。差异源于US的judge-made fiduciary law与中国的statutory duty approach。

fact_summary: 董事在自我交易中未回避表决，导致公司利益受损。Director voted on self-interested transaction without recusal.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第185条规定关联董事不得参与表决；出席董事会的无关联关系董事人数不足三人的，应提交股东会审议。
us_claim: Under DGCL §144(a)(1), a contract or transaction in which a director has a financial interest is not voidable if approved by a majority of disinterested directors. See Marciano v. Nakash, 535 A.2d 400 (Del. 1987).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US要求disinterested directors或shareholders批准即可'sanitize'利益冲突交易；中国要求关联董事回避，并明确无关联董事不足三人时转交股东会。差异在于US的substantive fairness review仅在sanitize程序缺失时触发，而中国更强调程序合规。

fact_summary: 控股股东指示董事从事损害公司利益的行为。Controlling shareholder directed directors to engage in conduct harming the corporation.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第192条规定：公司控股股东、实际控制人指示董事、高管从事损害公司或股东利益行为的，与该董事、高管承担连带责任。
us_claim: Under Delaware law, controlling shareholders owe fiduciary duties to the corporation and minority shareholders. See Kahn v. Lynch Communication Systems, 638 A.2d 1110 (Del. 1994).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US通过判例确立了控制股东的fiduciary duty，但证明标准较高；中国《公司法》第192条明确将控制股东指示行为与董事连带责任法定化。差异源于中国2023年修订引入的'影子董事'条款，直接成文化了US的common law doctrine。

fact_summary: 董事在反收购措施中采用毒丸计划，被股东质疑其合理性。Board adopted a poison pill in response to hostile takeover bid.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under Unocal Corp. v. Mesa Petroleum Co., 493 A.2d 946 (Del. 1985), defensive measures must be reasonable in relation to the threat posed and not preclusive or coercive. See also Unitrin, Inc. v. American General Corp., 651 A.2d 1361 (Del. 1995).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的Unocal test要求反收购措施与威胁'成比例'且非排他性；中国无专门的反收购法律框架，类似情形通常适用《公司法》和《证券法》中的一般规定。差异源于US并购判例法的高度发达与中国缺乏专门的takeover defense jurisprudence。

fact_summary: 董事在公司出售时未寻求最高价格，引发股东诉讼。Board failed to seek the highest price when selling the company.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: In Revlon, Inc. v. MacAndrews & Forbes Holdings, Inc., 506 A.2d 173 (Del. 1986), the board must seek the highest value reasonably available for shareholders once the sale of the company becomes inevitable (Revlon mode).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的Revlon mode是判例法确立的董事在出售公司时的最大化股东价值义务；中国无对应的专门制度，董事义务由《公司法》第180条的一般勤勉义务涵盖。差异源于US的M&A-specialized fiduciary jurisprudence与中国的一般性义务框架。

fact_summary: 公司合并中未向少数股东提供公平对价，引发诉讼。Minority shareholders challenged merger consideration as inadequate.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第89条、第161条规定有限责任公司异议股东可请求公司按合理价格回购其股权；股份有限公司异议股东回购权有限。
us_claim: Under Weinberger v. UOP, Inc., 457 A.2d 701 (Del. 1983), the entire fairness standard applies to squeeze-out mergers; the board must demonstrate fair dealing and fair price. See also Kahn v. M&F Worldwide Corp., 88 A.3d 635 (Del. 2014).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的entire fairness standard要求交易在过程和价格上均公平；中国的异议股东回购权主要适用于有限责任公司，股份有限公司回购权受限。差异源于US对minority shareholders在squeeze-out中的强保护与中国的有限回购制度。

fact_summary: 控股股东将公司私有化，未提供独立委员会评估。Controlling shareholder took company private without independent committee review.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under DGCL §144 and case law, controlling shareholder going-private transactions require both an independent special committee and a majority-of-the-minority vote to avoid entire fairness review. See Kahn v. M&F Worldwide Corp., 88 A.3d 635 (Del. 2014).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US对控股股东私有化交易要求双重程序保护（独立委员会+少数股东多数批准）；中国无专门针对privatization的程序要求，一般适用关联交易规则。差异源于US的common law development of controller duties与中国成文法的limited coverage。

fact_summary: 并购交易中目标公司董事接受收购方贿赂，损害公司利益。Target company directors accepted bribes from acquiror, harming the corporation.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第181条规定董事不得收受贿赂或其他非法收入；违反忠实义务所得收入应归公司所有。
us_claim: Under Delaware law, directors owe a duty of loyalty; accepting bribes or secret profits constitutes a breach of loyalty and the director must disgorge the profit. See Broz v. Cellular Information Systems, Inc., 673 A.2d 148 (Del. 1996).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US和中国均禁止董事受贿，但US的duty of loyalty是判例法发展的common law duty，中国则成文化于《公司法》第181条。差异在于US的corporate opportunity doctrine和disgorgement remedy更为成熟，中国则趋向于statutory remedies。

fact_summary: 公司管理层在收购防御中采用 discriminatory 自购要约。Management used discriminatory self-tender to exclude hostile bidder.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: In Unocal Corp. v. Mesa Petroleum Co., 493 A.2d 946 (Del. 1985), the Delaware Supreme Court upheld a discriminatory self-tender as a reasonable response to a perceived threat, provided the board reasonably investigated the threat and the response was proportionate.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的Unocal test允许discriminatory defensive measures，只要符合比例性原则；中国法律原则上禁止歧视性对待股东（《公司法》第143条平等原则），无专门的反收购防御法。差异在于US的takeover jurisprudence承认防御措施的合法性，中国则缺乏相应制度空间。

fact_summary: 公司合并交易未获得股东会批准，董事擅自签署合并协议。Directors signed merger agreement without shareholder approval.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第59条、第112条规定公司合并须经股东会决议；有限公司须经代表三分之二以上表决权的股东通过，股份公司须经出席会议的股东所持表决权的三分之二以上通过。
us_claim: Under DGCL §251(b), a merger agreement must be adopted by a majority of the outstanding stock entitled to vote. The board cannot unilaterally approve a merger. See Paramount Communications, Inc. v. QVC Network, Inc., 637 A.2d 34 (Del. 1994).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US和中国均要求股东会批准合并，但US的threshold通常是majority of outstanding shares，中国是two-thirds of voting shares present。差异在于法定表决门槛不同，且US的case law对board在获取股东批准前的义务有更详细的规定。

fact_summary: 公司CEO在财报中故意夸大收入，误导投资者。CEO intentionally inflated revenue in financial statements, misleading investors.
cn_claim: 《证券法》第85条规定信息披露义务人未按照规定披露信息或虚假陈述的，应承担赔偿责任；投资者可提起民事赔偿诉讼。
us_claim: Under the Sarbanes-Oxley Act of 2002, §302, CEOs and CFOs must personally certify the accuracy of financial statements; knowingly false certification carries criminal penalties under 18 U.S.C. §1350. See also SEC Rule 10b-5.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的Sarbanes-Oxley Act建立了CEO/CFO个人财务报告认证制度，中国《证券法》第85条主要依赖民事赔偿；US的criminal liability for false certification更为严厉。差异源于US的post-Enron reforms与中国以民事责任为主的监管路径。

fact_summary: 上市公司未披露重大诉讼信息，导致股价异常波动。Listed company failed to disclose material litigation, causing abnormal stock price fluctuation.
cn_claim: 《证券法》第80条规定重大诉讼属于重大事件，上市公司应立即披露；违反该义务的，投资者可要求赔偿。
us_claim: Under SEC Rule 10b-5 and Securities Exchange Act §13(a), issuers must file periodic reports (Forms 10-K, 10-Q) disclosing material legal proceedings. See Basic Inc. v. Levinson, 485 U.S. 224 (1988).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的披露义务通过SEC rules和Exchange Act规制，中国的重大事件披露由《证券法》第80条直接规定；US的materiality标准由判例法（Basic Inc. v. Levinson）确立，中国依赖行政监管标准。差异源于US的disclosure-based regulation与中国的前置式监管。

fact_summary: 公司高管利用未公开信息进行内幕交易。Corporate executive traded on material nonpublic information.
cn_claim: 《证券法》第53条禁止证券交易内幕信息的知情人和非法获取内幕信息的人利用内幕信息从事证券交易活动。
us_claim: Under SEC Rule 10b-5 and §16(b) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, insiders are subject to short-swing profit disgorgement and anti-fraud liability. See Chiarella v. United States, 445 U.S. 222 (1980).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的 insider trading prohibition主要通过Rule 10b-5和judicial interpretation发展，中国则成文化于《证券法》第53条；US的§16(b) short-swing profit rule是成文法特例，但大部分内幕交易判例由common law发展。差异源于US的common law criminalization与中国成文法路径。

fact_summary: 承销商在IPO注册文件中遗漏重大风险信息。Underwriter omitted material risk information in IPO registration statement.
cn_claim: 《证券法》第85条规定，发行人、承销的证券公司及其直接责任人员虚假陈述的，应承担连带赔偿责任。
us_claim: Under Securities Act of 1933 §11, underwriters are strictly liable for material misstatements or omissions in registration statements unless they can prove due diligence. See Escott v. BarChris Construction Corp., 283 F. Supp. 643 (S.D.N.Y. 1968).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的Securities Act §11对underwriters施加严格责任，但提供due diligence defense；中国的《证券法》第85条趋向过错推定。差异在于US的registration-based strict liability tradition与中国的过错推定/连带责任制度。

fact_summary: 公司股东在代理投票征集材料中作出虚假陈述。Shareholder made false statements in proxy solicitation materials.
cn_claim: 《证券法》第84条规定发行人及其他信息披露义务人应披露的信息应真实、准确、完整；虚假陈述应承担民事责任。
us_claim: Under SEC Rule 14a-9, it is unlawful to solicit proxies by means of any statement that is false or misleading with respect to any material fact. See Virginia Bankshares, Inc. v. Sandberg, 501 U.S. 1083 (1991).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的proxy fraud由SEC Rule 14a-9专门规制，中国的代理投票虚假陈述由《证券法》一般虚假陈述条款涵盖；US的private right of action under Rule 14a-9需证明causation，中国则主要依赖行政责任。差异源于US的detailed proxy regulation regime与中国的一般性证券法规定。

fact_summary: 股东要求查阅公司账簿和记录以调查管理层不当行为。Shareholder demanded inspection of corporate books and records to investigate management misconduct.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第57条规定股东有权查阅、复制公司章程、股东名册、财务会计报告等；查阅会计账簿、会计凭证需书面请求并说明目的。
us_claim: Under DGCL §220, any stockholder may inspect the corporation's books and records for any proper purpose reasonably related to the stockholder's interests. See Seinfeld v. Verizon, 909 A.2d 117 (Del. 2006). Amended March 2025 (SB 21).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的DGCL §220明确'proper purpose'标准，且法院对'proper purpose'的解释较为宽泛（包括调查不当行为）；中国《公司法》第57条将会计账簿/凭证的查阅限定为'书面请求+说明目的'，公司可拒绝。差异在于US的inspection right是pre-derivative litigation的关键工具，中国的查阅权 protections相对有限。

fact_summary: 股东质疑公司董事会选举中的投票程序不公正。Shareholder challenged unfair voting procedures in board election.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第65条规定股东会选举董事按出资比例行使表决权；公司章程可另行规定。
us_claim: Under DGCL §211 and §212, each stockholder is entitled to one vote per share unless the certificate of incorporation provides otherwise. See Blasius Industries, Inc. v. Atlas Corp., 564 A.2d 651 (Del. Ch. 1988).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US默认one vote per share，但允许charter修改；中国默认按出资比例行使表决权，但允许章程另行规定。差异在于US的Staggered board和proxy contest rules更为复杂，中国的股东会程序相对简单。

fact_summary: 股东在股东大会上被剥夺投票权。Shareholder was deprived of voting rights at shareholder meeting.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第65条规定股东按出资比例行使表决权；股东会决议的表决实行一人一票。剥夺股东投票权的行为无效。
us_claim: Under DGCL §212 and §225, stockholders have the right to vote their shares; any interference with voting rights may be challenged. See Schnell v. Chris-Craft Industries, Inc., 285 A.2d 437 (Del. 1971).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US和中国均保护股东投票权，但US的stockholder voting rights protection通过判例法更为细化；中国的成文法规定相对抽象。差异在于US的 equitable relief tradition (e.g., Schnell v. Chris-Craft)提供了更灵活的保护机制。

fact_summary: 优先股股东要求公司按约定支付股息，但公司以资金不足为由拒绝。Preferred shareholder demanded dividend payment; company refused due to insufficient funds.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第210条规定公司分配利润须经股东会决议；优先股股息优先于普通股分配，但公司无利润时不得分配。
us_claim: Under DGCL §151, preferred stock rights are governed by the certificate of designation; cumulative dividends may be contractually mandated. See Jedwab v. MGM Grand Hotels, Inc., 509 A.2d 584 (Del. 1986).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的优先股权利高度依赖于certificate of designation的contractual terms，中国的优先股权利由《公司法》成文法和公司章程共同规定。差异在于US的contractual flexibility更大，中国的statutory framework更统一。

fact_summary: 股东要求公司回购其股份，因对重大公司决策持异议。Shareholder demanded company repurchase shares due to disagreement with major corporate decision.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第89条、第161条规定异议股东股份回购请求权，适用于公司合并、分立、转让主要财产、修改章程等情形。
us_claim: Under DGCL §262, stockholders dissenting from a merger or consolidation may petition for appraisal of the fair value of their shares. See Weinberger v. UOP, Inc., 457 A.2d 701 (Del. 1983).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的appraisal rights（DGCL §262）适用于merger/consolidation，中国的异议股东回购权适用范围更广（包括转让主要财产、修改章程）。差异在于US的appraisal remedy focusing on fair value determination，中国的回购制度更宽泛但定价机制不完善。

fact_summary: 公司董事在公司资不抵债时仍继续进行高风险交易，债权人主张董事责任。Directors engaged in high-risk trading while company was insolvent; creditors asserted director liability.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under Delaware law, when a corporation is insolvent, directors owe fiduciary duties to creditors. See North American Catholic Educational Programming Foundation, Inc. v. Gheewalla, 930 A.2d 92 (Del. 2007).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US在Gheewalla案中确立了公司资不抵债时董事对债权人的fiduciary duty，中国无直接对应的制度；中国的董事责任主要体现在《企业破产法》第125条的违反忠实义务、勤勉义务的赔偿责任。差异在于US的common law recognition of creditor-standing，中国的成文法路径。

fact_summary: 公司破产时，董事未妥善保管公司账簿，导致无法清算。Directors failed to maintain proper corporate records during insolvency, preventing orderly liquidation.
cn_claim: 《企业破产法》第15条规定董事、监事、高管应妥善保管其占有和管理的财产、印章、账簿、文书等资料。
us_claim: Under Delaware law and federal bankruptcy law, officers and directors must maintain accurate books and records. See In re O.W. Capital Partners, L.P., 321 B.R. 258 (Bankr. S.D.N.Y. 2005).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的record-keeping obligation是common law duty和federal bankruptcy law的结合，中国则明确成文化于《企业破产法》第15条。差异在于US的state law和federal bankruptcy law的交互，中国的单一成文法框架。

fact_summary: 控股股东在公司破产前低价转移资产，损害债权人利益。Controlling shareholder transferred assets at below-market price before bankruptcy, harming creditors.
cn_claim: 《企业破产法》第31条、第33条规定破产前一年内无偿转让财产、以明显不合理价格交易等可撤销，隐匿、转移财产无效。
us_claim: Under the Bankruptcy Code §548 (11 U.S.C. §548) and state fraudulent transfer laws (e.g., UFTA), transfers for less than reasonably equivalent value may be avoided as fraudulent conveyances.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的fraudulent transfer law（§548/UFTA）和中国《企业破产法》第31条均允许撤销不当转让，但US的look-back period为2年（actual fraud）或1年（constructive fraud），中国的可撤销期间为1年。差异在于US的fraudulent transfer law更成熟，中国的期限较短。

fact_summary: 公司清算组未依法通知已知债权人，导致债权人未能申报债权。Liquidation committee failed to notify known creditors, preventing them from filing claims.
cn_claim: 《企业破产法》第14条规定法院应自裁定受理破产申请之日起25日内通知已知债权人并公告。
us_claim: Under Bankruptcy Code §547 (11 U.S.C. §547), the bankruptcy trustee must provide notice to creditors; failure to give adequate notice may affect the dischargeability of claims.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的bankruptcy notice requirements由federal rules和Bankruptcy Code规制，中国的通知义务由《企业破产法》第14条直接规定。差异在于US的federal court oversight和notice process更为formalized，中国的法院通知机制更直接。

fact_summary: 董事在公司解散后未依法履行清算义务，导致公司财产损失。Directors failed to fulfill liquidation duties after company dissolution, causing loss of corporate assets.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第232条规定公司解散后应成立清算组；董事为清算义务人；未及时清算造成损失的，应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: Under Delaware law, directors must ensure proper dissolution and winding-up procedures. See Gheewalla, 930 A.2d 92 (Del. 2007). Also see DGCL §275-§280.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的dissolution procedures由DGCL §275-§280规制，中国的清算义务由《公司法》第232条明确将董事列为清算义务人。差异在于中国2023年修订明确董事为清算义务人，而US的director duties in dissolution由判例法发展。

fact_summary: 董事未经披露与公司订立自我交易合同，损害公司利益。Director entered into self-dealing contract with company without disclosure, harming corporate interests.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第182条规定董监高与公司订立合同或交易，应报告并经董事会或股东会决议通过。
us_claim: Under DGCL §144(a), a contract between a corporation and a director is not voidable if (1) approved by disinterested directors, (2) approved by disinterested shareholders, or (3) fair to the corporation. See Marciano v. Nakash, 535 A.2d 400 (Del. 1987).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的DGCL §144提供three safe harbors，中国的《公司法》第182条要求报告+决议。差异在于US的fairness review是兜底标准，中国的statutory scheme更强调程序要件。

fact_summary: 董事将公司商业机会转移给其个人控制的企业。Director diverted corporate business opportunity to a personally controlled enterprise.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第183条规定董监高不得利用职务便利为自己或他人谋取属于公司的商业机会，除非已报告并经决议通过。
us_claim: Under Delaware law, directors may not usurp corporate opportunities. See Broz v. Cellular Information Systems, Inc., 673 A.2d 148 (Del. 1996). The opportunity must be within the corporation's line of business and financially feasible.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的corporate opportunity doctrine由判例法发展（Broz案），要求机会属于公司业务范围且公司有能力利用；中国《公司法》第183条成文化了该义务，但范围和例外情形更明确。差异在于US的judicial flexibility与中国statutory clarity。

fact_summary: 董事在与公司存在竞争业务的企业中兼职，未获得公司批准。Director served on the board of a competing company without corporate approval.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第184条规定董监高未经报告并经决议通过，不得自营或为他人经营与所任职公司同类的业务。
us_claim: Under Delaware law, directors may not engage in competing business activities that create a conflict of interest. See Benihana of Tokyo, Inc. v. Benihana, Inc., 906 A.2d 114 (Del. 2006).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US和中国均禁止董事竞业，但US的common law允许在充分披露和批准的情况下从事竞争业务；中国的《公司法》第184条要求严格的报告+决议程序。差异在于US的disclosure-based approval更灵活，中国的statutory prohibition更严格。

fact_summary: 控股股东利用公司为其个人贷款提供担保，未获得独立批准。Controlling shareholder used company assets to guarantee personal loan without independent approval.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第15条规定公司为公司股东或实际控制人提供担保的，须经股东会决议；关联股东应回避表决。
us_claim: Under Delaware law, providing corporate guarantees for the benefit of a controlling shareholder requires entire fairness review unless sanitized by an independent committee or majority-of-minority vote. See Kahn v. Lynch, 638 A.2d 1110 (Del. 1994).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的controlling shareholder transaction受entire fairness review，除非经独立程序'sanitize'；中国《公司法》第15条要求股东会决议且关联股东回避。差异在于US的substantive fairness standard更严格，中国的程序要求更明确。

fact_summary: 董事向公司出售个人资产，价格明显高于市场价值。Director sold personal assets to company at above-market price.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第182条要求关联交易经报告和决议；价格明显不公允的，可能构成损害公司利益。
us_claim: Under DGCL §144, if a self-dealing transaction is not approved by disinterested directors or shareholders, the board must demonstrate entire fairness—both fair dealing and fair price. See Weinberger v. UOP, 457 A.2d 701 (Del. 1983).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的entire fairness standard要求同时证明fair dealing和fair price，中国的关联交易审查主要关注程序合规和价格公允。差异在于US的two-pronged fairness test更为严格，中国的审查标准相对单一。

fact_summary: 股东与公司人格混同，公司资产与股东个人资产无法区分。Shareholder and corporation were alter egos, with commingled assets and indistinguishable identities.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第23条规定公司股东滥用公司法人独立地位和股东有限责任，逃避债务，严重损害公司债权人利益的，应当对公司债务承担连带责任。
us_claim: Under Delaware law, courts may pierce the corporate veil when there is fraud or when the corporation is merely the alter ego of its shareholder. See United States v. Milwaukee Refrigerator Transit Co., 142 F. 247 (C.C.E.D. Wis. 1905); Sea-Land Services, Inc. v. Pepper Source, 941 F. Supp. 519 (N.D. Cal. 1996).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的corporate veil-piercing是equitable remedy，标准由判例法确立（alter ego, instrumentality rules）；中国《公司法》第23条成文化了该制度，但实践中标准较模糊。差异在于US的fraud/alter ego test更成熟，中国的滥用标准较抽象。

fact_summary: 一人公司股东无法证明公司财产独立于其个人财产。Sole shareholder of one-person company failed to prove corporate assets were separate from personal assets.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第23条第3款规定一人有限责任公司的股东不能证明公司财产独立于股东自己财产的，应当对公司债务承担连带责任。
us_claim: Under Delaware law, even single-member corporations enjoy limited liability unless the corporate formalities are not observed or fraud is present. See §102(b)(6) DGCL (permitting single-member corporations).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国《公司法》第23条第3款对一人公司实行举证责任倒置，股东需证明财产独立；US的Delaware law对一人公司无特殊规则，适用一般的veil-piercing标准。差异在于中国的statutory presumption of liability更为严格，US的general standard更灵活。

fact_summary: 母公司过度控制子公司，导致子公司债权人利益受损。Parent company exercised excessive control over subsidiary, harming subsidiary creditors.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第23条第2款规定股东利用其控制的两个以上公司实施滥用行为的，各公司应对任一公司的债务承担连带责任（横向否认）。
us_claim: Under US federal and state law, courts may pierce the corporate veil horizontally or vertically when there is instrumentality rule violation or fraud. See Walkovszky v. Carlton, 223 A.2d 5 (N.J. 1966).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国2023年修订引入横向法人人格否认（第23条第2款），US的horizontal veil-piercing由判例法（如Walkovszky）发展。差异在于中国的horizontal piercing是2023年新增成文法，US的enterprise liability theory仍在发展中。

fact_summary: 公司资本显著不足，股东应承担公司债务。Company was significantly undercapitalized, and shareholders should bear corporate debts.
cn_claim: 中国法院在实践中可能以资本显著不足为由否认公司人格，但《公司法》无明确规定。
us_claim: Under Delaware and other state laws, undercapitalization alone is generally insufficient to pierce the corporate veil unless coupled with fraud or failure to observe corporate formalities. See Sea-Land Services, Inc. v. Pepper Source, 941 F. Supp. 519 (N.D. Cal. 1996).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US通常认为资本不足本身不足以刺破公司面纱，需结合其他因素；中国实践中资本不足可能被考虑，但成文法无明确规定。差异在于US的cautious approach to undercapitalization vs 中国的更灵活judicial practice。

fact_summary: 公司未召开股东会或董事会，所有决策由单一股东直接作出。Company never held shareholder or board meetings; all decisions made unilaterally by single shareholder.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第59条、第67条规定公司应召开股东会、董事会；未履行程序可能影响公司决议效力。
us_claim: Under Delaware law, failure to observe corporate formalities is a factor in veil-piercing analysis, but not dispositive. See United States v. Milwaukee Refrigerator Transit Co., 142 F. 247 (C.C.E.D. Wis. 1905).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的failure to observe corporate formalities是veil-piercing的考虑因素之一，中国类似情形可能影响决议效力或触发法人人格否认。差异在于US的formality failure作为veil-piercing的因子，中国的程序瑕疵更多影响决议效力。

fact_summary: 董事未履行对公司的监督义务，导致公司发生重大合规违规。Directors failed to monitor corporate compliance, resulting in major regulatory violations.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第180条规定董事勤勉义务；第188条规定违反义务给公司造成损失的应承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: Under Delaware law, directors have a duty of oversight (Caremark duty) to ensure that corporate information and reporting systems are adequate. See In re Caremark International Inc. Derivative Litigation, 698 A.2d 959 (Del. Ch. 1996).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的Caremark duty（监督义务）是判例法发展的特殊fiduciary duty，中国《公司法》第180条的一般勤勉义务涵盖范围较广但缺乏具体标准。差异在于US的Caremark duty专门针对compliance oversight，中国的general duty of diligence更抽象。

fact_summary: 董事批准的高管薪酬方案明显过高，被股东质疑为浪费公司资产。Board approved executive compensation package that was grossly excessive, challenged as corporate waste.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: In In re The Walt Disney Co. Derivative Litigation, 906 A.2d 27 (Del. 2006), the Delaware Supreme Court held that director approval of Michael Ovitz's $130 million severance package was protected by the business judgment rule despite a suboptimal process.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的Disney/Ovitz案确立了董事在高管薪酬决策中受business judgment rule保护，即使程序有瑕疵；中国无对应判例，高管薪酬由《公司法》和证券法规制。差异在于US的judicial deference to board compensation decisions，中国的regulatory oversight更强。

fact_summary: 董事在公司章程中加入免责条款，试图免除自身违反注意义务的责任。Directors included exculpatory clause in charter to eliminate liability for duty of care breaches.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under DGCL §102(b)(7), a corporation may include in its certificate of incorporation a provision eliminating or limiting personal liability of directors for breach of fiduciary duty, except for breaches of loyalty, bad faith, or knowing violations of law. See Smith v. Van Gorkom, 488 A.2d 858 (Del. 1985) (impetus for §102(b)(7)).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的DGCL §102(b)(7)允许章程排除董事注意义务的个人责任（但不包括忠实义务和恶意），中国无类似的statutory exculpation provision。差异在于US的director protection through charter amendment是中国的statutory liability framework所不具备的。

fact_summary: 董事在并购交易中收受收购方的'金色降落伞'安排，损害目标公司利益。Director received golden parachute from acquiror in merger transaction, harming target corporation.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under Delaware law, side payments to directors in merger transactions may constitute a breach of the duty of loyalty if not fully disclosed and approved by disinterested shareholders. See In re Oracle Corp. Derivative Litigation, 824 A.2d 917 (Del. Ch. 2003).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的side payments to directors in M&A transactions受duty of loyalty约束，需充分披露；中国无专门的M&A side payment规则，一般适用忠实义务和反不正当竞争法。差异在于US的transaction-specific fiduciary rules更为发达。

fact_summary: 独立董事未充分履行监督职责，导致公司财务造假。Independent directors failed to adequately supervise, resulting in financial fraud.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第136条规定上市公司设独立董事；独立董事应维护公司整体利益，尤其关注中小股东合法权益。
us_claim: Under Delaware law and Sarbanes-Oxley Act §301, independent directors must oversee audit committees and financial reporting. See In re Caremark, 698 A.2d 959 (Del. Ch. 1996). NYSE/NASDAQ listing standards also require independent audit committees.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的独立董事制度由SOX Act和交易所规则强化，Caremark duty要求监督合规；中国的独立董事制度由《公司法》第136条和证监会规则建立，但实践中效果有限。差异在于US的listing standards enforcement和Caremark liability更成熟。

fact_summary: 公司未依法召开年度股东会，股东要求法院强制召开。Company failed to hold annual shareholder meeting; shareholders sought court-ordered meeting.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第62条规定有限公司股东会定期会议按章程规定召开；第113条规定股份公司每年召开一次年会。
us_claim: Under DGCL §211, a corporation must hold an annual meeting of stockholders; failure to do so may result in a court order compelling the meeting. See Rosenfeld v. Fairchild Engine & Airplane Corp., 128 A.2d 473 (Del. Ch. 1957).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的DGCL §211和case law（Rosenfeld）要求年度股东会，法院可强制召开；中国的《公司法》有类似要求，但法院介入较少。差异在于US的court-ordered meeting机制更成熟，中国的行政和司法救济较少。

fact_summary: 公司未按章程规定向股东分配利润，股东要求强制分配。Company failed to distribute profits as required by charter; shareholders demanded mandatory distribution.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第210条规定公司分配利润须经股东会决议；股东会决议前不得分配利润。
us_claim: Under Delaware law, dividends are generally within the board's discretion; courts rarely order mandatory dividends unless the charter provides a mandatory right. See Langfelder v. Universal Laboratories, Inc., 163 F.2d 797 (3d Cir. 1948).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的股息分配通常属于董事裁量权，法院极少强制分配；中国的《公司法》第210条同样要求股东会决议，但实践中国有不同。差异在于US的strong judicial deference to board discretion，中国的股息分配更多受行政监管。

fact_summary: 公司股东会决议因未达到法定表决权比例而被质疑无效。Shareholder meeting resolution challenged as invalid due to insufficient voting quorum.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第66条规定有限公司股东会决议须经代表过半数或三分之二以上表决权的股东通过；第116条规定股份公司须经出席会议的股东所持表决权过半数或三分之二以上通过。
us_claim: Under DGCL §251 and §242, charter amendments and mergers require majority of outstanding shares; special meetings require quorum under §222. See Blasius Industries, Inc. v. Atlas Corp., 564 A.2d 651 (Del. Ch. 1988).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的quorum requirements由DGCL和charter规定，case law对quorum manipulation有严格审查；中国的法定表决比例更高（三分之二），对quorum manipulation的判例较少。差异在于US的equitable scrutiny of quorum manipulation，中国的statutory thresholds更刚性。

fact_summary: 公司回购自身股份后未依法注销，导致注册资本不实。Company repurchased shares but failed to cancel them, resulting in deficient registered capital.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第162条规定公司收购本公司股份后应在规定期限内转让或注销；未注销的应办理变更登记。
us_claim: Under DGCL §160 and §243, a corporation may repurchase its own shares; treasury stock may be held or retired. See Karme v. CVN Cos., 23 F.3d 535 (7th Cir. 1994).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的DGCL允许公司持有库存股（treasury stock），中国《公司法》第162条要求回购后限期转让或注销。差异在于US的treasury stock flexibility，中国的stricter capital maintenance rules。

fact_summary: 公司向股东提供不当财务资助以收购公司股份。Company provided improper financial assistance for the acquisition of its own shares.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under DGCL §160, a corporation may purchase its own shares unless the corporation's capital is impaired; financial assistance for share acquisition is generally permitted if not in violation of capital maintenance rules. See Klang v. Smith's Food & Drug Centers, Inc., 702 A.2d 150 (Del. 1997).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US的DGCL §160对回购限制较少（只要资本不受损），中国的财务资助规则在《公司法》第163条中有限制。差异在于US的capital impairment test更灵活，中国的capital maintenance rules更严格。

fact_summary: 香港公司的小股东因公司事务被不公平损害，寻求法院救济。Minority shareholder in Hong Kong company sought relief for unfairly prejudicial conduct.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第89条、第182条规定股东在特定情形下可请求公司回购股份或提起代表诉讼；但对'unfair prejudice'无直接对应制度。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §724, a member may petition the court for relief on the ground that the company's affairs are being conducted in a manner unfairly prejudicial to the interests of members. See Re Lung Ming International Holdings Ltd [2002] 2 HKLRD 249.
notes: 香港的unfair prejudice remedy（Cap. 622 §724）源自英国普通法，提供灵活的法院救济；中国无对应的'unfair prejudice'制度，救济主要通过异议股东回购和代表诉讼。差异源于香港继承的英国普通法传统与中国的大陆法体系。

fact_summary: 香港上市公司的董事在掌握内幕信息后进行股票交易，被监管机构调查。Director of Hong Kong listed company traded shares while in possession of inside information.
cn_claim: 《证券法》第53条禁止内幕交易；违反者须承担民事赔偿责任，并可被证监会行政处罚。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) §270, insider dealing is prohibited; §307A(1) defines 'inside information' as specific, non-public information likely to have a material effect on price. See SFC v. Du Jun [2009] HKCFI 1542.
notes: 香港和中国的内幕交易禁止均成文化，但香港的SFO §270和§307A借鉴了英国和欧盟标准，中国的《证券法》第53条独立发展；香港的Market Misconduct Tribunal提供civil administrative proceedings，中国的证监会处罚和民事赔偿并行。差异源于香港的双轨制（行政/刑事）与中国的单一行政主导模式。

fact_summary: 香港公司股东提起派生诉讼，要求董事赔偿公司损失。Shareholder of Hong Kong company brought derivative action for director's breach of duty.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第189条规定股东代表诉讼，需先书面请求监事会或董事会起诉；前置程序例外限于'情况紧急'。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §732-§735, a shareholder may bring a derivative action with leave of the court; the court considers whether the applicant is acting in good faith and whether a prima facie case is established. See Waddington Ltd v. Chan Chun Hoo [2008] HKEC 1301.
notes: 香港的派生诉讼需法院许可（leave of court），法院审查good faith和prima facie case；中国的前置程序为书面请求+紧急例外。差异在于香港的judicial gatekeeping function更严格，中国的前置程序更行政化。

fact_summary: 香港公司未依法举行年度股东大会，股东向法院申请强制召开。Hong Kong company failed to hold annual general meeting; shareholder applied for court-ordered meeting.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第62条、第113条规定公司应定期召开股东会；未召开的，股东可请求法院或监管部门介入。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §610, a company must hold an annual general meeting every calendar year; §611 allows the court to order a meeting if the company fails to do so. See Re Hong Kong Industrial & Commercial Holdings Ltd [1996] 1 HKC 583.
notes: 香港和中国的年度股东会要求类似，但香港的法院强制召开程序（Cap. 622 §611）更为明确；中国的法院介入较少，更多依赖行政监管。差异在于香港的court-driven enforcement与中国regulatory-driven approach。

fact_summary: 香港公司董事未向公司披露其在交易中的利益，导致公司受损。Hong Kong company director failed to disclose interest in a transaction, causing corporate loss.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第182条规定董监高应就关联交易向董事会或股东会报告；违反该程序的，交易可能无效。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §536, a director must disclose the nature and extent of any material interest in a transaction; failure to disclose may result in criminal liability and the transaction being voidable. See Regal (Hastings) Ltd v. Gulliver [1967] 2 AC 134 (UK).
notes: 香港的董事披露义务（Cap. 622 §536）包括criminal liability for non-disclosure，中国的《公司法》第182条主要依赖民事责任；香港继承了英国Regal (Hastings)案建立的strict accountability原则。差异源于香港的UK common law inheritance与中国statutory liability scheme。

fact_summary: 香港公司股东质疑公司削减股本的合法性。Shareholder of Hong Kong company challenged the legality of a reduction of share capital.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第224条、第225条规定公司减少注册资本须经股东会决议，并公告债权人；债权人有权要求清偿或担保。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §211-§214, a company may reduce share capital by special resolution confirmed by the court; creditors may object and the court may require security. See British & Commonwealth Holdings plc v. Barclays Bank plc [1996] 1 BCLC 1.
notes: 香港的减资需法院确认（Cap. 622 §211-214），中国的减资由股东会决议+债权人保护程序；香港的court confirmation requirement提供了额外的judicial oversight，中国的行政程序更简化。差异源于香港的历史court-supervised capital reduction tradition。

fact_summary: 香港公司债权人申请公司清盘，因公司无法偿还到期债务。Creditor of Hong Kong company petitioned for winding-up due to inability to pay debts.
cn_claim: 《企业破产法》第2条规定企业法人不能清偿到期债务，且资产不足以清偿全部债务或明显缺乏清偿能力的，应依法清理债务。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies (Winding Up and Miscellaneous Provisions) Ordinance (Cap. 32) §177, a company may be wound up by the court if it is unable to pay its debts; §178 defines inability to pay debts by failure to satisfy a statutory demand within 3 weeks. See Re LWF Productions Ltd [1992] BCLC 510.
notes: 香港和中国的破产/清盘制度均借鉴了英国普通法，但香港的statutory demand程序（3周）更为高效；中国的破产申请需证明'资不抵债'或'明显缺乏清偿能力'。差异在于香港的court-supervised winding-up更formalized，中国的administrative bankruptcy procedure更常见。

fact_summary: 香港公司董事在公司清盘中被发现不当处分资产。Director of Hong Kong company found to have improperly disposed of assets during winding-up.
cn_claim: 《企业破产法》第31条、第33条规定破产申请前一年内的不当财产处分可撤销或无效。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies (Winding Up and Miscellaneous Provisions) Ordinance (Cap. 32) §182, fraudulent dispositions of property by insolvent companies are voidable; §265 imposes personal liability on directors for misfeasance or breach of fiduciary duty. See Re City Equitable Fire Insurance Co Ltd [1925] Ch 407.
notes: 香港和中国的破产撤销权制度类似，但香港的Cap. 32 §265对misfeasance的审查更严格，且继承了英国的Re City Equitable Fire Insurance案的director duty of care standard。差异在于香港common law director liability在liquidation中的延伸。

fact_summary: 香港上市公司的股东要求查阅公司成员登记册。Shareholder of Hong Kong listed company requested inspection of register of members.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第57条规定股东有权查阅、复制股东名册；查阅会计账簿、凭证需书面请求并说明目的。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §627, a member may inspect the register of members without charge; non-members may request inspection subject to compliance requirements. See Re Burry & Knight Ltd [2014] HKEC 1771.
notes: 香港的成员登记册查阅权（Cap. 622 §627）对所有成员开放，中国的股东名册查阅权更明确但会计账簿查阅更受限。差异在于香港的信息披露文化更开放，中国的查阅权保护相对保守。

fact_summary: 香港公司未向公司注册处提交年度申报表，被公司注册处处罚。Hong Kong company failed to file annual return with Companies Registry.
cn_claim: 中国公司应向市场监督管理部门报送年度报告，通过国家企业信用信息公示系统向社会公示；未报送的列入经营异常名录。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §662, a company must deliver an annual return to the Registrar every calendar year; §664 provides penalties for non-compliance. See Re Jointwin Enterprises Ltd [2015] HKEC 1834.
notes: 香港和中国的年报提交义务均成文化，但香港的Companies Registry enforcement更严格，中国的国家企业信用信息公示系统更集中。差异在于香港的传统registry-based enforcement与中国的大数据分析监管。

fact_summary: 香港公司的董事同时在与公司竞争业务的企业中担任董事，未获得公司批准。Director of Hong Kong company also served on board of competing company without approval.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第184条规定董监高不得自营或为他人经营与所任职公司同类的业务，除非经报告和决议通过。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §536 and common law, a director owes a fiduciary duty to avoid conflicts of interest; undisclosed competing directorships may be a breach of duty. See London & Mashonaland Exploration Co Ltd v. New Mashonaland Exploration Co Ltd [1891] WN 165.
notes: 香港和中国均禁止董事竞业，但香港的common law duty of loyalty（源自UK case law）提供了更灵活的judicial interpretation，中国的《公司法》第184条的statutory prohibition更明确。差异源于普通法与成文法的不同路径。

fact_summary: 香港公司的小股东因大股东不公平稀释其股权而寻求救济。Minority shareholder of Hong Kong company sought relief for unfair dilution of shareholding by majority shareholder.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第227条规定公司增资时，股东有权优先按实缴出资比例认缴出资；章程另有规定除外。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §724, unfairly prejudicial conduct includes dilution of minority shareholdings without proper justification; the court may grant relief including share buyout. See Re OC (Hong Kong) Ltd [2017] HKEC 1753.
notes: 香港的unfair prejudice remedy（Cap. 622 §724）可直接救济不公平稀释，中国的优先认缴权（第227条）是程序性保护，但缺乏unfair prejudice的实质救济。差异在于香港common law的flexible remedy vs 中国statutory right的有限保护。

fact_summary: 香港公司发行新股时未向现有股东提供优先认购权。Hong Kong company issued new shares without offering pre-emption rights to existing shareholders.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第227条规定有限公司增资时股东享有优先认缴权；第227条允许章程排除该权利。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §140, a company has pre-emption rights on the allotment of equity securities unless the articles provide otherwise; §141-§143 set out the procedure for disapplying pre-emption rights. See Re New World Development Co Ltd [2000] HKEC 1301.
notes: 香港和中国的优先认缴权均可由章程排除，但香港的pre-emption rights procedure（Cap. 622 §140-143）更详细，中国的规定相对简洁。差异在于香港 Companies Ordinance 的detailed statutory scheme vs 中国的概括性规定。

fact_summary: 香港公司董事在公司无利润的情况下批准分配股息。Hong Kong company directors approved dividend distribution despite absence of profits.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第210条规定公司分配当年税后利润；违反该规定的，股东应退还分得的利润。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §297, a company may only make a distribution out of profits available for the purpose; directors who approve unlawful distributions are jointly and severally liable to repay the amount. See It's A Wrap (UK) Ltd v. Gula [2006] EWCA Civ 544.
notes: 香港和中国的利润分配均受利润可分配性限制，但香港的Cap. 622 §297对director liability更明确，中国的《公司法》第210条主要规定返还责任。差异在于香港的common law director liability传统与中国以公司为中心的赔偿制度。

fact_summary: 香港公司董事未适当保存公司会议记录，导致公司决策无法证明。Hong Kong company directors failed to maintain proper meeting minutes, rendering corporate decisions unprovable.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第124条规定股东会、董事会应对所议事项的决定作成会议记录；出席会议的股东、董事应在记录上签名。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §481, a company must keep minutes of all proceedings of general meetings, directors' meetings, and committee meetings; failure to do so may result in penalties and the transaction being unenforceable. See Re VB Technics Ltd [2001] HKEC 1301.
notes: 香港和中国均要求保存会议记录，但香港对未保存记录的法律后果规定更明确（包括处罚和可撤销性）。差异在于香港 Companies Ordinance 的comprehensive record-keeping provisions vs 中国的基本要求。

fact_summary: 香港公司因未遵守公司注册处要求而被强制注销。Hong Kong company was compulsorily struck off the register for non-compliance with registry requirements.
cn_claim: 中国公司未依法年报或长期停业可被市场监管部门吊销营业执照或列入经营异常名录。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §746, the Registrar may strike a company off the register if it appears that the company is not carrying on business; §752 provides for restoration by court order. See Re Dragon Seed Co Ltd [2000] HKEC 1501.
notes: 香港和中国的公司注销/吊销制度均存在，但香港的restoration by court order（Cap. 622 §752）更常见，中国的恢复程序更行政化。差异在于香港的court-centered approach vs 中国的administrative approach。

fact_summary: 香港公司股东因公司未进行独立审计而质疑财务报表的可靠性。Shareholder of Hong Kong company questioned reliability of financial statements due to lack of independent audit.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第208条规定公司应在每一会计年度终了时编制财务会计报告，并依法经会计师事务所审计。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §379, a company must appoint an auditor for each financial year; §380-§383 set out the auditor's qualifications, appointment, and removal. See Re China Solar Energy Holdings Ltd [2012] HKEC 1701.
notes: 香港和中国的审计要求均成文化，但香港的auditor appointment and removal procedure（Cap. 622 §379-383）更详细，中国的审计制度更强调行政监管。差异在于香港的公司自治传统与中国监管导向的审计制度。

fact_summary: 香港公司董事在公司交易中获得秘密佣金，未向公司披露。Hong Kong company director received secret commission in corporate transaction without disclosure.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第181条规定董事不得收受贿赂或其他非法收入；违反忠实义务所得收入归公司所有。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §536 and common law, a director must account for any secret profit or benefit derived from the position; the company may claim constructive trust or equitable compensation. See Regal (Hastings) Ltd v. Gulliver [1967] 2 AC 134.
notes: 香港和中国的secret profit/commission规则均要求董事归还，但香港的common law constructive trust remedy（源自Regal案）更灵活，中国的归入权（第181条）更直接。差异在于equitable remedy vs statutory disgorgement。

fact_summary: 香港公司股东因董事未遵守公司组织章程大纲中的规定而提起诉讼。Shareholder sued Hong Kong company directors for failure to comply with memorandum and articles of association.
cn_claim: 《公司法》第5条规定公司从事经营活动应遵守公司章程；违反章程的决议可被撤销。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §84, the memorandum and articles of association bind the company and its members; §725 allows shareholders to enforce compliance. See Re Phoenix Oil & Transport Co Ltd [1957] 1 WLR 583.
notes: 香港和中国的公司章程均具有约束力，但香港的contractual enforcement of articles（Cap. 622 §725）更直接，中国的章程效力更多通过决议效力争议体现。差异源于香港contractual theory of company constitution vs 中国的organizational law approach。

fact_summary: 香港公司因上市规则未披露关联交易而遭联交所处罚。Hong Kong listed company penalized by HKEX for failure to disclose related-party transaction under Listing Rules.
cn_claim: 中国上市公司未披露关联交易的，证券交易所可采取纪律处分，证监会可依据《证券法》第197条处罚。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under HKEX Listing Rules Chapter 14A, listed companies must disclose and obtain shareholder approval for connected transactions; the Exchange may impose sanctions for non-compliance. See HKEX Listing Committee decisions, e.g., Re China Metal Recycling Ltd [2013].
notes: 香港的Listing Rules（Chapter 14A）对关联交易的披露和批准有详细要求，且HKEX enforcement更严格；中国的交易所规则类似，但主要依赖证监会执法。差异在于香港self-regulatory organization的active enforcement vs 中国的administrative enforcement。

fact_summary: 美国公司采用的毒丸计划在香港公司中无直接对应制度。US company's poison pill has no direct counterpart in Hong Kong corporate law.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under Delaware law, shareholder rights plans (poison pills) are valid if adopted in good faith to respond to a perceived threat. See Moran v. Household International, Inc., 500 A.2d 1346 (Del. 1985).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, there is no statutory framework for poison pills; defensive measures are governed by the Takeovers Code and general fiduciary duties. See The Takeovers Code ( issued by SFC).
notes: US的Delaware law通过判例（Moran案）明确毒丸计划的合法性，香港无专门的反收购法，仅通过Takeovers Code和fiduciary duties间接规制。差异在于US的takeover defense jurisprudence高度发达，香港依赖general principles和self-regulatory codes。

fact_summary: 美国董事的注意义务标准与香港董事的skill and care标准存在差异。US director duty of care standard differs from Hong Kong director's duty of skill and care.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under Delaware law, directors must act on an informed basis with due care. Gross negligence rebutts the business judgment rule. See Smith v. Van Gorkom, 488 A.2d 858 (Del. 1985).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, directors owe a duty to exercise reasonable care, skill, and diligence. The standard is objective (reasonable director) and subjective (director's actual expertise). See Re City Equitable Fire Insurance Co Ltd [1925] Ch 407.
notes: US的duty of care通过business judgment rule提供强保护，gross negligence才构成 breach；香港的common law standard结合objective和subjective因素，但无类似business judgment rule的判例保护。差异源于US的judge-made corporate law与香港继承的UK common law。

fact_summary: 美国证券法下的Rule 10b-5与香港证券及期货条例下的内幕交易禁止存在差异。SEC Rule 10b-5 differs from Hong Kong insider dealing prohibition.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under SEC Rule 10b-5, 17 C.F.R. § 240.10b-5, it is unlawful to employ deceptive devices in securities transactions; private plaintiffs must prove scienter, materiality, and reliance. See Ernst & Ernst v. Hochfelder, 425 U.S. 185 (1976).
hk_claim: Under Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) §270, insider dealing is a criminal offense and civil market misconduct; the SFC may bring proceedings before the Market Misconduct Tribunal. See SFC v. Du Jun [2009] HKCFI 1542.
notes: US的Rule 10b-5依赖private litigation和SEC enforcement，scienter要求较高；香港的SFO §270提供criminal和civil administrative双轨制，Market Misconduct Tribunal提供summary proceedings。差异在于US的litigation-driven enforcement vs 香港的regulatory tribunal model。

fact_summary: 美国股东查阅权(DGCL §220)与香港成员登记册查阅权(Cap. 622 §627)范围不同。US stockholder inspection right differs from Hong Kong member register inspection.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under DGCL §220, stockholders may inspect books and records for any proper purpose, including investigating wrongdoing. The scope was narrowed by SB 21 (March 2025). See Seinfeld v. Verizon, 909 A.2d 117 (Del. 2006).
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §627, members may inspect the register of members; broader inspection rights are limited and require court order. See Re Burry & Knight Ltd [2014] HKEC 1771.
notes: US的DGCL §220允许广泛的books and records inspection（包括board materials），香港的查阅权更有限（主要限于成员登记册）。差异在于US的inspection right是pre-litigation discovery工具，香港的access更受限。

fact_summary: 美国股东派生诉讼(Del. Rule 23.1)与香港派生诉讼(Cap. 622 §732)前置程序不同。US derivative suit differs from Hong Kong derivative action.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under Delaware Rule 23.1, a derivative plaintiff must plead with particularity that demand on the board would be futile or that demand was made and refused. See Aronson v. Lewis, 473 A.2d 805 (Del. 1984).
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §732-§735, a shareholder must apply for court leave to bring a derivative action; the court considers good faith and prima facie case. See Waddington Ltd v. Chan Chun Hoo [2008] HKEC 1301.
notes: US的derivative suit通过demand futility analysis过滤，香港的derivative action需法院许可（leave of court）。差异在于US的pleading-based gatekeeping vs 香港的judicial permission requirement。

fact_summary: 美国公司合并中的公平交易标准(entire fairness)与香港公司合并中的公平性审查不同。US entire fairness standard differs from Hong Kong merger fairness review.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under Delaware law, entire fairness review applies to interested transactions; the board must prove fair dealing and fair price. See Weinberger v. UOP, Inc., 457 A.2d 701 (Del. 1983).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, there is no statutory 'entire fairness' standard for mergers; fairness is assessed under general fiduciary duties and the Takeovers Code. See The Takeovers Code Rule 8 and general equitable principles.
notes: US的entire fairness是Delaware-specific two-pronged test（fair dealing + fair price），香港无对应的statutory standard，依赖general equitable principles和Takeovers Code。差异在于US的judge-made M&A standards vs 香港的general regulatory framework。

fact_summary: 美国董事的免责条款(DGCL §102(b)(7))在香港公司法中无对应制度。US director exculpation clause has no direct counterpart in Hong Kong.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under DGCL §102(b)(7), a corporation may include a provision in its charter eliminating or limiting director personal liability for duty of care breaches, excluding loyalty, bad faith, and intentional violations. See Smith v. Van Gorkom, 488 A.2d 858 (Del. 1985).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, there is no statutory provision equivalent to DGCL §102(b)(7); directors remain personally liable for negligence unless the articles provide indemnification (subject to common law limits). See Re City Equitable Fire Insurance Co Ltd [1925] Ch 407.
notes: US的DGCL §102(b)(7)允许章程免除董事注意义务的个人责任，香港无类似statutory exculpation，仅允许有限 indemnification。差异在于US的director protection culture vs 香港更严格的director liability tradition。

fact_summary: 美国公司控股股东的fiduciary duty与香港控股股东义务的认定标准不同。US controlling shareholder fiduciary duty differs from Hong Kong controlling shareholder obligations.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under Delaware law, controlling shareholders owe fiduciary duties of loyalty and care; squeeze-out transactions require entire fairness or dual procedural protections. See Kahn v. Lynch Communication Systems, 638 A.2d 1110 (Del. 1994).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, controlling shareholders may be subject to the unfair prejudice remedy (Cap. 622 §724) and general fiduciary principles, but there is no specific statutory 'controlling shareholder duty' equivalent to Delaware law. See Re OC (Hong Kong) Ltd [2017] HKEC 1753.
notes: US的Delaware law通过判例确立了控制股东fiduciary duty，香港依赖unfair prejudice remedy和general principles。差异在于US的specialized controller duty jurisprudence vs 香港的general equitable remedies。

fact_summary: 美国公司反收购中的Revlon duty与香港反收购规制中的义务不同。US Revlon duty differs from Hong Kong takeover defense obligations.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under Revlon, Inc. v. MacAndrews & Forbes Holdings, Inc., 506 A.2d 173 (Del. 1986), when the sale of the company becomes inevitable, the board must seek the highest value reasonably available for shareholders.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Takeovers Code (General Principle 8) requires that all shareholders be treated equally; the board must act in the interests of the company and shareholders as a whole. See The Takeovers Code and SFC practice notes.
notes: US的Revlon duty是判例法发展的特殊fiduciary obligation，香港通过Takeovers Code的General Principle 8要求平等对待股东。差异在于US的judicially crafted sale-of-company duty vs 香港regulatory code-based approach。

fact_summary: 美国证券法下的私人诉讼权与香港市场失当行为审裁处的民事程序不同。US private right of action differs from Hong Kong Market Misconduct Tribunal.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under US federal securities law, private plaintiffs may bring civil actions under Rule 10b-5 and Securities Act §11; class actions are common. See Basic Inc. v. Levinson, 485 U.S. 224 (1988).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the SFC may bring proceedings before the Market Misconduct Tribunal (Cap. 571 Part XIII) for civil sanctions; private rights of action are limited. See SFC v. Du Jun [2009] HKCFI 1542.
notes: US的private securities litigation（class action）是主要执法机制，香港依赖SFC的Market Misconduct Tribunal和criminal prosecution，private action受限。差异在于US的litigation-driven model vs 香港regulatory-driven model。

fact_summary: 美国公司清算中的董事对债权人义务与香港清盘中的董事责任不同。US director duties to creditors in insolvency differ from Hong Kong director liability in winding-up.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under Delaware law, when a corporation is insolvent, directors owe fiduciary duties to creditors. See North American Catholic Educational Programming Foundation, Inc. v. Gheewalla, 930 A.2d 92 (Del. 2007).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, directors may be liable for fraudulent trading (Cap. 32 §275) and misfeasance (Cap. 32 §265); wrongful trading is not yet fully codified. See Re City Equitable Fire Insurance Co Ltd [1925] Ch 407.
notes: US的Gheewalla案确立了资不抵债时董事对债权人的fiduciary duty，香港的清盘法（Cap. 32）侧重于fraudulent trading和misfeasance。差异在于US的common law extension of fiduciary duties vs 香港statutory offenses in winding-up。

fact_summary: 美国公司揭开公司面纱的标准与香港揭开公司面纱的标准不同。US corporate veil-piercing standards differ from Hong Kong veil-piercing.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under US law (Delaware and federal), courts may pierce the corporate veil for fraud, alter ego, or instrumentality. See United States v. Milwaukee Refrigerator Transit Co., 142 F. 247 (C.C.E.D. Wis. 1905).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, courts may pierce the corporate veil on similar grounds (fraud, sham, alter ego) but the application is more conservative. See Re Barings plc (No. 5) [1999] 1 BCLC 433.
notes: US和香港的veil-piercing均基于fraud/alter ego标准，但US的federal cases（如Milwaukee Refrigerator）提供更广泛的instrumentality theory，香港更保守。差异在于US的federalism允许更激进的veil-piercing，香港遵循UK的conservative approach。

fact_summary: 美国公司股东压迫(majority oppression)救济与香港unfair prejudice remedy不同。US minority oppression remedy differs from Hong Kong unfair prejudice remedy.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under US law (particularly close corporation statutes in some states), minority shareholders may seek dissolution or buyout for oppression. See Meinhard v. Salmon, 164 N.E. 545 (N.Y. 1928) (general fiduciary duty).
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §724, Hong Kong provides the unfair prejudice remedy, which allows the court to grant a wide range of relief including share buyout, injunction, or regulation of future conduct. See Re OC (Hong Kong) Ltd [2017] HKEC 1753.
notes: US的minority oppression救济主要限于closely held corporations，香港的unfair prejudice remedy适用于所有公司。差异在于US的oppression doctrine局限于close corporation context，香港的remedy更universal。

fact_summary: 美国公司优先股权利由certificate of designation决定，香港优先股权利由公司章程和组织章程决定。US preferred stock rights differ from Hong Kong preference share rights.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under DGCL §151, preferred stock rights are determined by the certificate of designation, which may include cumulative dividends, liquidation preferences, and conversion rights. See Jedwab v. MGM Grand Hotels, Inc., 509 A.2d 584 (Del. 1986).
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §138 and §170, a company may issue preference shares with rights determined by the articles of association; the Companies Registry filing requirements apply. See Re South of England Natural Gas & Petroleum Co Ltd [1911] 1 Ch 573.
notes: US的优先股权利由certificate of designation高度contractualized，香港由articles of association规定。差异在于US的securities law orientation（certificate of designation类似securities disclosure）vs 香港company law orientation。

fact_summary: 美国公司appraisal rights(DGCL §262)与香港减资中的法院确认程序不同。US appraisal rights differ from Hong Kong court confirmation of capital reduction.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under DGCL §262, dissenting stockholders may petition for appraisal of the fair value of their shares in a merger or consolidation. See Weinberger v. UOP, Inc., 457 A.2d 701 (Del. 1983).
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §211-§214, a reduction of share capital requires a special resolution confirmed by the court; creditors may object. See British & Commonwealth Holdings plc v. Barclays Bank plc [1996] 1 BCLC 1.
notes: US的appraisal rights是股东在merger中的退出和valuation机制，香港的减资法院确认是creditor protection机制。差异在于US的appraisal focusing on shareholder exit rights，香港的court confirmation focusing on creditor protection。

fact_summary: 三法域均承认股东派生诉讼制度，但前置程序不同。All three jurisdictions recognize shareholder derivative suits but with different procedural requirements.
cn_claim: 中国《公司法》第189条规定股东代表诉讼，前置程序为书面请求监事会/董事会起诉，'情况紧急'可例外。
us_claim: Under Delaware Rule 23.1, a derivative plaintiff must allege demand futility or demand refusal with particularity. See Aronson v. Lewis, 473 A.2d 805 (Del. 1984).
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §732-§735, Hong Kong requires court leave (leave of court) for derivative actions, assessing good faith and prima facie case. See Waddington Ltd v. Chan Chun Hoo [2008] HKEC 1301.
notes: 三法域均提供股东派生诉讼，但US的demand futility analysis（Aronson test）最复杂，中国的前置程序+紧急例外最行政化，香港的leave of court最judicialized。差异源于三种不同的 procedural filtering philosophies：US的pleading-based, 中国的administrative-based, 香港的permission-based。

fact_summary: 三法域均要求董事承担信义义务，但义务内容和标准不同。All three jurisdictions impose fiduciary duties on directors, but the content and standards differ.
cn_claim: 中国《公司法》第180条明确董事忠实义务和勤勉义务，勤勉义务要求'为公司最大利益尽合理注意'。
us_claim: Under Delaware law, directors owe duties of loyalty and care; the business judgment rule provides strong protection. See Smith v. Van Gorkom, 488 A.2d 858 (Del. 1985); Aronson v. Lewis, 473 A.2d 805 (Del. 1984).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law and Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §465, directors owe duties of skill, care, and diligence, and a fiduciary duty to act in good faith. See Re City Equitable Fire Insurance Co Ltd [1925] Ch 407.
notes: 三法域均要求董事信义义务，但US的business judgment rule提供最强保护，中国的成文法义务最明确，香港的common law standard最灵活。差异在于US的judge-made corporate law balancing director protection and accountability, 中国的statutory duty framework, 香港的UK common law inheritance。

fact_summary: 三法域均禁止证券欺诈/虚假陈述，但执法机制不同。All three jurisdictions prohibit securities fraud, but enforcement mechanisms differ.
cn_claim: 中国《证券法》第85条、第197条规定虚假陈述的民事赔偿和行政处罚，投资者可提起民事诉讼。
us_claim: Under US federal law, SEC Rule 10b-5 and Securities Act §11 provide private rights of action; class actions are common. See Basic Inc. v. Levinson, 485 U.S. 224 (1988).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) §270-§307 provides criminal and civil market misconduct proceedings; the Market Misconduct Tribunal handles civil sanctions. See SFC v. Du Jun [2009] HKCFI 1542.
notes: 三法域均禁止证券欺诈，但US的private litigation (class action)最发达，中国依赖administrative enforcement + civil litigation, 香港依赖SFC regulatory tribunal + criminal prosecution。差异源于US的litigation-driven securities regulation, 中国的行政主导模式, 香港的双轨制regulatory model。

fact_summary: 三法域均要求关联交易披露和批准，但具体规则不同。All three jurisdictions require related-party transaction disclosure and approval, but rules differ.
cn_claim: 中国《公司法》第182条要求关联交易报告并经董事会或股东会决议；第185条要求关联董事回避表决。
us_claim: Under DGCL §144, interested director transactions are valid if approved by disinterested directors or shareholders, or if fair to the corporation. See Weinberger v. UOP, Inc., 457 A.2d 701 (Del. 1983).
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §536 and HKEX Listing Rules Chapter 14A, directors must disclose material interests; connected transactions require disclosure and shareholder approval. See Regal (Hastings) Ltd v. Gulliver [1967] 2 AC 134.
notes: 三法域均要求关联交易披露和批准，但US的DGCL §144提供three safe harbors（disinterested directors, disinterested shareholders, fairness），中国的《公司法》第182-185条强调程序（报告+回避+决议），香港结合Companies Ordinance和Listing Rules。差异在于US的substantive fairness as fallback, 中国的strict procedural requirements, 香港的regulatory overlay for listed companies。

fact_summary: 三法域均允许公司合并，但程序和保护机制不同。All three jurisdictions allow corporate mergers, but procedures and protections differ.
cn_claim: 中国《公司法》第59条、第112条规定合并须经股东会决议（三分之二表决权通过）；第89条、第161条规定异议股东回购权。
us_claim: Under DGCL §251, a merger requires board approval and majority of outstanding shares; §262 provides appraisal rights for dissenting shareholders. See Weinberger v. UOP, Inc., 457 A.2d 701 (Del. 1983).
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §678-§690, a merger or amalgamation requires special resolution; the court may order a meeting or sanction the arrangement. See Re Hong Kong Industrial & Commercial Holdings Ltd [1996] 1 HKC 583.
