notes: 三法域均允许合并，但US的board approval + majority of outstanding shares门槛最低，中国的two-thirds voting rights requirement最高，香港的court sanction option最灵活。差异在于US的board-centric governance, 中国的high voting threshold protecting minority shareholders, 香港的court-supervised arrangement procedure。

fact_summary: 三法域均要求股东查阅权，但范围和条件不同。All three jurisdictions provide shareholder inspection rights, but scope and conditions differ.
cn_claim: 中国《公司法》第57条规定股东有权查阅、复制公司章程、股东名册等；会计账簿、凭证需书面请求并说明目的。
us_claim: Under DGCL §220, stockholders may inspect books and records for any proper purpose; the scope was narrowed by SB 21 (March 2025). See Seinfeld v. Verizon, 909 A.2d 117 (Del. 2006).
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §627, members may inspect the register of members; broader inspection requires court order. See Re Burry & Knight Ltd [2014] HKEC 1771.
notes: 三法域均提供查阅权，但US的DGCL §220最广（包括board materials），中国的《公司法》第57条中等（会计账簿/凭证需额外请求），香港的Cap. 622 §627最窄（主要限于成员登记册）。差异在于US的pre-litigation discovery tool function, 中国的limited corporate transparency, 香港的传统UK limited access approach。

fact_summary: 三法域均允许揭开公司面纱，但标准不同。All three jurisdictions allow corporate veil-piercing, but standards differ.
cn_claim: 中国《公司法》第23条规定滥用公司法人独立地位和股东有限责任逃避债务的，应承担连带责任；第23条第2款新增横向否认。
us_claim: Under US law, courts pierce the veil for fraud, alter ego, or undercapitalization (in some jurisdictions). See United States v. Milwaukee Refrigerator Transit Co., 142 F. 247 (C.C.E.D. Wis. 1905).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, courts may pierce the veil for fraud or sham, but the application is conservative. See Re Barings plc (No. 5) [1999] 1 BCLC 433.
notes: 三法域均允许刺破公司面纱，但中国的2023年修订最激进（明确横向否认），US的standard最成熟（alter ego/instrumentality/fraud），香港最保守（fraud/sham only）。差异在于中国statutory codification of piercing, US的common law development, 香港UK conservative tradition。

fact_summary: 三法域均保护小股东，但救济方式不同。All three jurisdictions protect minority shareholders, but remedies differ.
cn_claim: 中国《公司法》第89条（异议股东回购）、第182条（关联交易）、第189条（代表诉讼）提供救济；2023年新增控股股东滥用权利时的回购权。
us_claim: Under US law, minority shareholders have appraisal rights (DGCL §262), derivative suits (Rule 23.1), and in some states, oppression remedies. See Meinhard v. Salmon, 164 N.E. 545 (N.Y. 1928).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, minority shareholders have the unfair prejudice remedy (Cap. 622 §724), derivative actions (Cap. 622 §732), and just and equitable winding-up (Cap. 32 §177(1)(f)). See Re OC (Hong Kong) Ltd [2017] HKEC 1753.
notes: 三法域均保护小股东，但香港的unfair prejudice remedy（Cap. 622 §724）最灵活，US的oppression remedy最局限于closely held corporations，中国的2023年修订最全面（新增回购权）。差异在于香港的UK-derived flexible equitable remedies, US的state-specific limited remedies, 中国的statutory expansion through amendments。

fact_summary: 三法域均禁止内幕交易，但定义和执法不同。All three jurisdictions prohibit insider trading, but definitions and enforcement differ.
cn_claim: 中国《证券法》第53条禁止内幕交易；内幕信息包括重大事件、公司财务、经营等信息。
us_claim: Under US law, SEC Rule 10b-5 and §16(b) prohibit insider trading; material nonpublic information is defined by case law. See Chiarella v. United States, 445 U.S. 222 (1980); Dirks v. SEC, 463 U.S. 646 (1983).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) §270-§307 defines insider dealing and inside information (§307A); the Market Misconduct Tribunal handles civil proceedings. See SFC v. Du Jun [2009] HKCFI 1542.
notes: 三法域均禁止内幕交易，但US的materiality standard由判例法（Basic/Chiarella/Dirks）发展，中国的《证券法》第53条statutory definition较窄，香港的SFO §307A借鉴欧盟标准。差异在于US的common law criminalization, 中国的statutory prohibition, 香港的EU-influenced regulatory model。

fact_summary: 三法域均要求董事回避利益冲突，但规则不同。All three jurisdictions require director recusal in conflicts of interest, but rules differ.
cn_claim: 中国《公司法》第185条规定关联董事不得参与表决；无关联董事不足三人时转交股东会。
us_claim: Under DGCL §144(a)(1), interested director transactions are valid if approved by a majority of disinterested directors. See Marciano v. Nakash, 535 A.2d 400 (Del. 1987).
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §536, directors must disclose material interests and abstain from voting unless the articles provide otherwise. See Regal (Hastings) Ltd v. Gulliver [1967] 2 AC 134.
notes: 三法域均要求董事回避，但中国的《公司法》第185条最严格（明确关联董事不得参与，不足三人转交股东会），US的DGCL §144(a)(1)允许disinterested directors批准，香港Companies Ordinance §536允许章程例外。差异在于中国的mandatory recusal rule, US的disinterested approval safe harbor, 香港的common law flexibility。

fact_summary: 三法域均要求公司清算，但程序不同。All three jurisdictions require corporate liquidation, but procedures differ.
cn_claim: 中国《企业破产法》第2条规定破产清算程序；清算义务人由《公司法》第232条明确为董事。
us_claim: Under US federal bankruptcy law (11 U.S.C. Chapter 7) and state dissolution statutes (e.g., DGCL §275-§280), corporations may be liquidated through bankruptcy or voluntary dissolution. See Gheewalla, 930 A.2d 92 (Del. 2007).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, winding-up may be compulsory (Cap. 32 §177) or voluntary (Cap. 32 §228); creditors and contributories may petition. See Re LWF Productions Ltd [1992] BCLC 510.
notes: 三法域均允许清算，但US的federal bankruptcy system (Chapter 7)最centralized，中国的administrative bankruptcy procedure（法院主导）最统一，香港的compulsory/voluntary winding-up (Cap. 32)最flexible。差异在于US的federal-state dual system, 中国的court-administrative hybrid, 香港的UK-derived winding-up tradition。

fact_summary: 三法域均禁止董事篡夺公司商业机会，但规则不同。All three jurisdictions prohibit directors from usurping corporate opportunities, but rules differ.
cn_claim: 中国《公司法》第183条规定董监高不得利用职务便利谋取公司商业机会，除非已报告并经决议通过。
us_claim: Under Delaware law, directors may not usurp corporate opportunities that are within the company's line of business and financially feasible. See Broz v. Cellular Information Systems, Inc., 673 A.2d 148 (Del. 1996).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, directors must account for any secret profit derived from their position; the corporate opportunity doctrine applies. See Regal (Hastings) Ltd v. Gulliver [1967] 2 AC 134.
notes: 三法域均禁止篡夺商业机会，但US的Broz test（业务范围+财务可行性）最具体，中国的《公司法》第183条statutory prohibition最明确，香港的common law constructive trust最灵活。差异在于US的judicially crafted test, 中国的statutory safe harbor (report + approval), 香港的equitable remedy。

fact_summary: 三法域均要求公司人格独立，但否认条件不同。All three jurisdictions recognize corporate personality, but conditions for denial differ.
cn_claim: 中国《公司法》第3条规定公司是企业法人，有独立的法人财产；第23条允许滥用时的法人人格否认。
us_claim: Under US law, corporations are separate legal persons; veil-piercing is an equitable exception. See Santa Clara County v. Southern Pacific Railroad Co., 118 U.S. 394 (1886).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, corporate personality is recognized under Salomon v. Salomon [1897] AC 22; veil-piercing is limited to fraud or sham. See Re Barings plc (No. 5) [1999] 1 BCLC 433.
notes: 三法域均承认公司独立人格（Salomon principle），但中国的滥用标准最宽泛（2023年新增横向否认），US的alter ego/instrumentality test最成熟，香港的fraud/sham standard最保守。差异源于UK common law heritage (Hong Kong), US federal common law development, 中国statutory adaptation with judicial expansion。

fact_summary: 三法域均要求公司分配利润，但限制不同。All three jurisdictions restrict profit distributions, but limitations differ.
cn_claim: 中国《公司法》第210条规定公司分配税后利润，且须提取法定公积金；无利润不得分配。
us_claim: Under DGCL §170 and §173, a corporation may declare dividends out of surplus or net profits; dividends may not be paid if capital is impaired. See Klang v. Smith's Food & Drug Centers, Inc., 702 A.2d 150 (Del. 1997).
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §297, a company may only make a distribution out of profits available for the purpose; directors are personally liable for unlawful distributions. See It's A Wrap (UK) Ltd v. Gula [2006] EWCA Civ 544.
notes: 三法域均限制利润分配，但US的surplus test（DGCL §170）最灵活，中国的statutory profit distribution rules（第210条）最严格，香港的profits available test（Cap. 622 §297）最保守。差异在于US的balance sheet solvency test, 中国的accumulated profits + reserve requirements, 香港的realized profits doctrine。

fact_summary: 三法域均要求公司保存账簿和记录，但标准不同。All three jurisdictions require corporate record-keeping, but standards differ.
cn_claim: 中国《公司法》第124条规定股东会、董事会应作成会议记录；第53条、第210条等要求财务会计报告。
us_claim: Under DGCL §224 and §225, a corporation must maintain accurate books and records; failure to do so may result in penalties and loss of corporate status. See §220 (inspection rights).
hk_claim: Under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §373-§481, a company must keep accounting records and minutes of meetings; failure to do so is a criminal offense. See Re VB Technics Ltd [2001] HKEC 1301.
notes: 三法域均要求保存记录，但香港的record-keeping requirements（Cap. 622 §373-481）最详细且包含criminal penalties，US的DGCL §224-225最简洁，中国的《公司法》第124条最概括。差异在于香港的comprehensive statutory scheme, US的minimalist corporate law approach, 中国的general principles with regulatory enforcement。

fact_summary: 某科技公司员工因拒绝加班被解雇，主张违法解除劳动合同。员工每周工作超过44小时，未获加班费。Employee of tech firm fired for refusing overtime; claims unlawful termination and unpaid overtime exceeding 44 hours weekly.
cn_claim: 用人单位违法解除劳动合同，应支付赔偿金（2N）及加班费（劳动法第44条）。
us_claim: Wrongful termination claim under at-will doctrine exception; FLSA 29 U.S.C. §207 overtime claim for hours exceeding 40 per week. Employer liable for retaliation under FLSA §215(a)(3).
hk_claim: Termination without notice or payment in lieu may violate Employment Ordinance (Cap 57) §6 if no valid reason under §9. Overtime not statutory unless continuous contract specifies.
notes: US follows at-will employment with narrow public policy exceptions; CN mandates statutory compensation (2N) for unlawful dismissal; HK requires valid reason under Cap 57 §9(1) with procedural fairness. FLSA overtime threshold is 40 hours vs CN 44 hours.

fact_summary: union organizers fired during successful union election campaign at warehouse. Employer claims poor performance but timing is suspicious.
cn_claim: 主张违法解除劳动合同，工会组织人员受特别保护（工会法第52条）。
us_claim: Unfair labor practice under NLRA 29 U.S.C. §158(a)(1) and (3) for interfering with union organizing and discriminating against union supporters. NLRB v Burns International Security Services 406 U.S. 272 (1972). Remedy includes reinstatement and back pay.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: NLRA provides robust federal protections for union organizing with NLRB enforcement; CN has statutory union protection but single-union system under ACFTU limits independent organizing; HK has no collective bargaining statute equivalent to NLRA.

fact_summary: age 58 employee laid off during corporate restructuring while younger employees in same roles retained. Company claims performance-based selection but criteria are vague.
cn_claim: 主张年龄歧视，违法解除劳动合同（就业促进法第29条禁止年龄歧视）。
us_claim: Age Discrimination in Employment Act (ADEA) 29 U.S.C. §623 claim for disparate treatment; McDonnell Douglas Corp v Green 411 U.S. 792 (1973) burden-shifting framework. Disparate impact possible if selection criteria have discriminatory effect. Gross v FBL Financial Services 557 U.S. 167 (2009) on causation standard.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US ADEA provides statutory protection for workers 40+ with McDonnell Douglas framework; CN has general anti-discrimination provision but no specific age discrimination statute; HK has no age discrimination ordinance (ADR remains in draft/ discussion).

fact_summary: employee with epilepsy denied promotion after disclosing condition. Employer states position requires driving though driving is only 5% of duties.
cn_claim: 主张残疾人就业歧视，要求恢复晋升机会（就业促进法第29条、残疾人保障法第30条）。
us_claim: ADA claim 42 U.S.C. §12112(a) for failure to accommodate and discriminatory promotion denial. Employer must show essential functions of job and direct threat. Toyota Motor v Williams 534 U.S. 184 (2002) on major life activities. EEOC v Chevron Phillips Chemical Co 570 F.3d 606 (5th Cir 2009).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US ADA requires interactive process and reasonable accommodation for essential functions; CN has disability protection in employment but enforcement is weaker and no explicit reasonable accommodation duty; HK Cap 487 prohibits disability discrimination but no equivalent to ADA's essential function analysis.

fact_summary: employee discovers pay disparity between male and female colleagues performing substantially same work. Employer claims different experience levels.
cn_claim: 主张同工同酬及性别歧视，要求补足工资差额（劳动法第46条）。
us_claim: Equal Pay Act 29 U.S.C. §206(d) claim for sex-based wage discrimination; Title VII §2000e-2(a) if employer intentionally discriminates. Corning Glass Works v Brennan 417 U.S. 188 (1974) on equal work standard. EPA requires equal skill effort and responsibility.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US Equal Pay Act requires equal pay for substantially equal work with affirmative defenses (seniority, merit, quantity/quality); CN has constitutional and statutory equal pay principle but enforcement is weak; HK Cap 480 prohibits sex discrimination but no specific equal pay statute.

fact_summary: employee terminated 1 day before vesting of 5-year pension benefits. Employer claims unrelated performance issues.
cn_claim: 主张违法解除劳动合同，恶意阻止条件成就应视为条件已成就（劳动合同法第45条）。
us_claim: ERISA 29 U.S.C. §1053(a) anti-cutback rule; pension benefit may be protected if termination is to prevent vesting. Pension Benefit Guaranty Corp v R.A. Gray & Co 467 U.S. 717 (1984). Also age discrimination claim if near retirement.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US ERISA protects pension vesting with anti-cutback provisions; CN has social insurance framework (pension contributions mandatory) but no ERISA equivalent; HK MPF system provides portable retirement savings with statutory employer contributions—no vesting cliff comparable to US defined benefit plans.

fact_summary: employee fired for discussing wages with coworkers on social media. Employer has policy prohibiting wage discussion.
cn_claim: 主张劳动者享有知情权，禁止工资讨论的规定无效（劳动合同法第26条）。
us_claim: Protected concerted activity under NLRA 29 U.S.C. §157; NLRB v Pier Sixty LLC 855 F.3d 115 (2nd Cir 2017) on social media discussions. Policy prohibiting wage discussion is per se unlawful under NLRA. Hoffmann-La Roche v Sperling 493 U.S. 165 (1989).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: NLRA §7 protects concerted activity including wage discussions as fundamental right; CN has no equivalent statutory protection for wage discussion among coworkers; HK has no statutory right to discuss wages—freedom of speech under BoRO but no labor-specific protection.

fact_summary: employee discovers algorithmic hiring system disproportionately screens out older applicants. Company claims algorithm is neutral.
cn_claim: 主张年龄歧视，算法招聘不得歧视（就业促进法第29条）。
us_claim: ADEA 29 U.S.C. §623 disparate impact claim if facially neutral practice has discriminatory effect. Smith v City of Jackson 544 U.S. 228 (2005) on disparate impact under ADEA. Also Title VII if algorithm has race/sex disparate impact. EEOC v Amazon 2023 on AI hiring.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US recognizes disparate impact under ADEA and Title VII for algorithmic discrimination; CN has general anti-discrimination provisions but no specific AI hiring discrimination statute; HK has no age discrimination legislation and no specific algorithmic discrimination framework.

fact_summary: employee injured in commute while using employer-provided vehicle for personal errand. Employer claims not in course of employment.
cn_claim: 主张工伤认定，使用单位车辆应视为工作延伸（工伤保险条例第14条第6项上下班途中）。
us_claim: Workers' compensation likely denied as coming-and-going rule excludes commute; deviation for personal errand may remove from course of employment. Exception if employer required use of vehicle or if dual purpose doctrine applies. Cudahy Packing Co v Parramore 331 U.S. 18 (1947).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US workers' compensation generally excludes commute (coming-and-going rule) with narrow exceptions; CN recognizes工伤 for commute accidents under specific conditions (合理时间、合理路线); HK Cap 282 covers injury arising out of and in course of employment—commute generally excluded unless transport provided by employer.

fact_summary: employee transferred to remote location after filing gender discrimination complaint. Transfer involves significant pay cut and family separation.
cn_claim: 主张报复性调岗，构成歧视及变相解雇（劳动合同法第35条、第38条）。
us_claim: Title VII retaliation 42 U.S.C. §2000e-3(a); Burlington Northern v White 548 U.S. 53 (2006) on materially adverse action. Transfer with significant detriment can be actionable retaliation even if not termination. EEOC v Boh Brothers Construction 731 F.3d 444 (5th Cir 2013).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US Title VII prohibits retaliation for opposing discrimination and defines materially adverse action broadly (Burlington Northern); CN prohibits retaliation but enforcement is primarily through labor arbitration; HK Cap 480 prohibits victimization (§28) for bringing proceedings under the Ordinance.

fact_summary: employee discovers employer sharing health information with third-party wellness program without consent. Employer claims HIPAA allows wellness program disclosures.
cn_claim: 主张隐私权及个人信息保护，要求停止侵权（民法典第1034条、个人信息保护法第13条）。
us_claim: HIPAA Privacy Rule 45 CFR §164.502(b) limits disclosure without authorization; wellness program disclosures may require explicit authorization if not part of employer-sponsored health plan. GINA 42 U.S.C. §2000ff-1 also protects genetic information.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US HIPAA provides specific health privacy protections with enforcement; CN has general个人信息保护法 and health data protections but wellness program specific law is less developed; HK has PDPO but health data is not a separate sensitive category—no equivalent to HIPAA.

fact_summary: employee required to sign arbitration agreement waiving right to class action and collective proceedings as condition of employment.
cn_claim: 主张仲裁协议排除集体救济无效，劳动者保留诉权（劳动争议调解仲裁法第5条）。
us_claim: Arbitration agreement waiving class action may be enforceable under Supreme Court precedent (Epic Systems v Lewis 584 U.S. 497 (2018) allows individual arbitration waivers). NLRA §7 does not invalidate class action waivers. Circuit split resolved.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US Epic Systems allows class action waivers in arbitration agreements (5-4 decision); CN labor arbitration is mandatory first step for individual disputes but collective disputes handled differently; HK has no class action mechanism and arbitration is generally enforceable under Arbitration Ordinance.

fact_summary: employee terminated after employer discovers criminal conviction from 15 years ago unrelated to job duties. Employee did not disclose on application.
cn_claim: 主张用人单位不得歧视有犯罪记录者，违法解除（就业促进法第27条）。
us_claim: Title VII disparate impact claim if blanket exclusion has discriminatory effect on protected classes; EEOC guidance on criminal history. State ban-the-box laws apply. No federal prohibition on considering criminal history. Green v Missouri Pacific Railroad 523 F.2d 1290 (8th Cir 1975).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US EEOC guidance discourages blanket criminal history exclusions; CN prohibits discrimination against persons with criminal records in employment (rehabilitation principle); HK has Rehabilitation of Offenders Ordinance (Cap 299) for spent convictions—no disclosure required for certain jobs after rehabilitation period.

fact_summary: employee denied overtime exemption as "administrative" employee despite primarily doing clerical work. Employer claims executive duties.
cn_claim: 主张用人单位错误适用豁免，要求补发加班费（劳动法第44条）。
us_claim: FLSA white-collar exemption 29 U.S.C. §213(a)(1); salary basis and duties test apply. Job title irrelevant; actual duties control. Auer v Robbins 519 U.S. 452 (1997) on deference to agency interpretation. EEOC v Hewitt 2023 on highly compensated employees.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US FLSA has detailed white-collar exemption framework with salary and duties tests; CN has fewer overtime exemptions (mostly managerial positions); HK Cap 608 has no equivalent overtime exemption system—minimum wage applies broadly with limited exclusions.

fact_summary: employee discovers employer recording audio in break rooms without notice. Employer claims theft prevention.
cn_claim: 主张隐私权受侵害，工作场所监控需告知（民法典第1033条）。
us_claim: State wiretapping laws apply; federal ECPA 18 U.S.C. §2511 requires one-party consent for audio recording. Workplace recording may violate employee privacy expectations if in private areas. In re Grand Jury 2023 on electronic surveillance.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US has state and federal wiretapping laws with varying consent requirements; CN has民法典 privacy protections but workplace audio recording law is unclear; HK PDPO requires notification and lawful purpose for monitoring—stronger protections than US or CN.

fact_summary: employee terminated for refusing to sign new arbitration agreement with class waiver. Employer claims at-will employment allows policy changes.
cn_claim: 主张拒绝签署新格式条款不构成解雇理由，违法解除（劳动合同法第39-41条）。
us_claim: At-will employment allows termination for any reason except illegal; refusing to sign arbitration agreement is not protected activity unless tied to NLRA rights. Employer can condition continued employment on signing agreement. Circuit City v Adams 532 U.S. 105 (2001).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US at-will doctrine allows termination for refusal to sign arbitration agreement (Circuit City); CN requires lawful grounds for termination (39-41条); HK requires valid reason under Cap 57 §9—termination for refusing arbitration agreement may be unreasonable unless justified.

fact_summary: employee discovers employer has policy prohibiting employees from leaving workplace during breaks. Employee works 8-hour shift with 30-minute unpaid lunch.
cn_claim: 主张休息权受侵害，限制离岗休息违法（劳动法第36条、第38条）。
us_claim: No federal restriction on employer limiting off-premises activity during breaks; state laws vary. FLSA requires only that breaks under 20 minutes be paid. Employer can restrict movement during breaks. DOL guidance on rest periods.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US has no federal restriction on employer limiting off-premises breaks; CN guarantees rest and meal breaks but no specific off-premises right; HK Cap 57 guarantees rest day but meal breaks are contractual—no statutory right to leave premises during breaks.

fact_summary: employee with severe allergies requests fragrance-free workplace. Employer claims cannot control what employees wear.
cn_claim: 主张健康权保护，用人单位需提供安全工作环境（劳动法第52条、职业病防治法）。
us_claim: ADA claim if allergies constitute disability requiring reasonable accommodation; employer may need to implement fragrance-free policy. Fragrance sensitivity may qualify as disability under ADAAA. EEOC guidance on fragrance sensitivity. Workplace policy may be required.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US ADA may require fragrance-free workplace if allergy is disability; CN has general health and safety obligations but no specific fragrance sensitivity framework; HK has common law duty of care and Cap 509 occupational safety but no specific fragrance-free workplace requirement.

fact_summary: 香港雇员在试用期内被即时解雇，雇主指其能力不胜任，但从未提供书面警告或改进机会。Employee terminated during probation without notice; employer claims incompetence but no written warning or improvement opportunity.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 雇主在无合理理由下即时解雇可能违反《雇佣条例》(Cap 57) 第6条。如属不合理解雇，雇员可依第9条在雇佣终止后6个月内向劳资审裁处提出申索，要求复职或终止雇佣金。即时解雇（summary dismissal）只适用于严重过失（第9条）。
notes: HK requires valid reason and procedural fairness for termination including during probation; CN allows easier termination during probation with 3-day notice (劳动合同法第37条); US at-will applies regardless of probation. HK's procedural fairness requirement is stronger than CN or US.

fact_summary: 香港雇员在放取有薪年假期间被召回工作，雇主未提供补假或额外薪酬。Employee recalled to work during paid annual leave without compensatory leave or extra pay.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 违反《雇佣条例》(Cap 57) 第41条。雇员在年假期间工作，雇主须给予补假（alternative holiday）或支付额外薪酬。雇主须在48小时前通知雇员取消年假。
notes: HK Cap 57 specifically requires compensatory leave or extra pay for working during annual leave; CN has similar principle (年休假条例) but HK's statutory framework is more detailed with 48-hour notice requirement.

fact_summary: 香港雇员因工伤丧失工作能力，雇主拒绝支付法定补偿并声称雇员是独立承包商。Employee injured at work loses capacity; employer refuses statutory compensation claiming independent contractor status.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 若实质为雇佣关系，雇员可依《雇员补偿条例》(Cap 282) 第5条获得补偿。雇主与工人关系取决于《雇员补偿条例》第2条定义，考虑控制、整合及经济现实测试。如雇员连续受雇，亦可依《雇佣条例》(Cap 57) 获得疾病津贴。
notes: HK Cap 282 has specific statutory compensation scheme for work injuries with clear employment relationship tests; CN has工伤保险 with similar employment relationship tests; US workers' compensation is state-based. HK's dual statutory and common law claims are more generous than CN's single-track system.

fact_summary: 香港雇员因种族背景被同事排斥，雇主知情但未有采取任何行动。Employee ostracized by coworkers due to race; employer aware but takes no action.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 违反《种族歧视条例》(Cap 602) 第6条及第28条。雇主对职场骚扰负有转承责任（vicarious liability），若雇主知道或应当知道骚扰行为而未采取合理步骤制止，可能构成种族骚扰及歧视。
notes: HK Cap 602 prohibits race discrimination and harassment with vicarious liability; CN has general anti-discrimination provisions but no specific race discrimination statute; US Title VII prohibits race discrimination with Ellerth/Faragher framework. HK's vicarious liability under Cap 602 is similar to US but less developed case law.

fact_summary: 香港雇员在法定假期工作，雇主以「补假」形式安排在下一季度，但未能提供具体日期。Employee works on statutory holiday; employer offers "alternative holiday" in next quarter without specific date.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 违反《雇佣条例》(Cap 57) 第39条。法定假期须在假期前48小时通知雇员，如雇员在法定假期工作，雇主须在48小时前通知并提供另定假期，且该假期须在法定假期后60天内。
notes: HK Cap 57 has specific timing requirements for statutory holidays (48-hour notice, 60-day replacement window); CN has general holiday regulations but less specific timing; US has no federal holiday pay requirement (only FLSA overtime). HK's statutory holiday framework is more prescriptive than CN or US.

fact_summary: 香港雇员因怀孕被减少工时及降薪，雇主声称工作量调整。Employee's hours reduced and pay cut due to pregnancy; employer claims workload adjustment.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 违反《性别歧视条例》(Cap 480) 第8条。怀孕歧视属直接歧视，雇主不得因怀孕给予雇员较差的待遇。雇员可向平等机会委员会投诉或向区域法院提出诉讼。
notes: HK Cap 480 prohibits pregnancy discrimination with EOC complaint mechanism; CN prohibits pregnancy discrimination under劳动合同法 and 妇女权益保障法; US prohibits under PDA. HK's EOC mechanism is similar to US EEOC but with less enforcement power. CN has stronger automatic protections during pregnancy.

fact_summary: 香港雇员连续受雇4年11个月，雇主在满5年前一天终止雇佣以避免支付长期服务金。Employer terminates employment 1 day before completing 5 years to avoid long service payment.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 如解雇动机是避免支付长期服务金，可能构成不合理解雇。雇员可依《雇佣条例》(Cap 57) 第9条提出申索。长期服务金适用于连续受雇5年或以上的雇员（第31条）。法庭可考虑雇主终止动机是否违法。
notes: HK long service payment (Cap 57 §31) applies after 5 years with specific exclusions; employer termination to avoid payment may be unreasonable dismissal; CN has economic compensation (N/2N) with no long service payment equivalent; US has no statutory long service payment. HK's termination-for-avoidance doctrine is stronger than US or CN.

fact_summary: 香港雇员因举报 workplace safety violations 被即时解雇，雇主指其不服从命令。Employee terminated for reporting safety violations; employer claims insubordination.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 可能构成不公平解雇。根据《雇佣条例》(Cap 57) 第9条，雇主须证明解雇理由属合理。如解雇是因雇员行使法定权利（如职业安全），可能违反《职业安全及健康条例》(Cap 509) 的保障条款。此外，普通法下雇主有提供安全工作环境的基本责任。
notes: HK Cap 57 requires valid reason for termination; reporting safety violations may be protected under Cap 509; CN has whistleblower protections in labor law; US has OSHA anti-retaliation and NLRA protections. HK's protection is less specific than US or CN.

fact_summary: 香港雇员因残疾要求合理工作调整，雇主以「成本过高」为由拒绝，随后解雇。Employee with disability requests reasonable work adjustment; employer refuses citing cost and then terminates.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 违反《残疾歧视条例》(Cap 487) 第6条。雇主有义务提供合理便利（reasonable accommodation），除非造成不合情理的困难（unjustifiable hardship）。不合情理的困难须考虑所有相关因素，包括调整成本与雇主资源。雇主须证明其拒绝的合理性。
notes: HK Cap 487 requires reasonable accommodation unless unjustifiable hardship (similar to ADA undue hardship); CN has disability protection but no explicit reasonable accommodation duty; US ADA requires reasonable accommodation with undue hardship defense. HK's framework is closer to US ADA than CN.

fact_summary: 香港雇员因参与工会活动被降职，雇主声称基于表现评估。Employee demoted after participating in union activities; employer claims based on performance review.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 可能违反《雇佣条例》(Cap 57) 第21条（反工会歧视）。如降职与工会活动有关，构成不合法作为（unfair practice）。雇员可向劳资审裁处提出申索。
notes: HK Cap 57 §21 prohibits anti-union discrimination; CN has工会法 protections but single union system; US NLRA §8(a) prohibits anti-union discrimination with NLRB enforcement. HK's protection is weaker than US NLRA but present in statute.

fact_summary: 香港雇员在裁员时被要求先签署自愿离职书，否则不予发还强积金。Employer requires employee to sign voluntary resignation during redundancy or MPF will not be returned.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 违反《雇佣条例》(Cap 57) 第11条及《强制性公积金计划条例》(Cap 485)。裁员应支付遣散费（severance payment），强积金属雇员权益，雇主不得以扣起强积金胁迫签署自愿离职。
notes: HK Cap 57 and Cap 485 protect against coerced resignation; CN prohibits胁迫 signing and requires economic compensation for termination; US has no MPF equivalent and at-will applies. HK's coercion prohibition is stronger than US.

fact_summary: 香港雇员因新冠疫情被雇主要求无薪休假，但雇主要求雇员在工作日回覆工作讯息。Employee required to take unpaid leave during COVID-19 but must respond to work messages on workdays.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 如雇员被要求回覆工作讯息，可能构成工作关系。根据《雇佣条例》(Cap 57) 第2条，雇员须为雇主工作。如雇员在无薪假期间仍提供工作，雇主应支付相应薪酬。雇主单方面要求无薪假可能违反雇佣合同。
notes: HK Cap 57 considers any work during leave as employment requiring pay; CN treats work messages during leave as working time; US FLSA requires pay for all work time. Convergence across all three jurisdictions on pay for work during leave.

fact_summary: 香港雇员因雇主未提供安全装备导致工伤，同时要求普通法赔偿。Employee injured due to lack of safety equipment; claims both statutory compensation and common law damages.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 根据《雇员补偿条例》(Cap 282) 第5条，雇员可获法定补偿。同时，如雇主疏忽导致工伤，雇员可依普通法提出疏忽申索（negligence claim）。但法定补偿可能须从普通法赔偿中扣除（代位求偿）。
notes: HK allows dual common law and statutory claims for workplace injuries (Cap 282 + negligence); CN restricts to工伤保险 only (no dual common law claims); US workers' compensation is generally exclusive remedy with narrow exceptions for intentional torts. HK's dual-track system is unique.

fact_summary: 香港雇员被雇主要求签署「非竞争」条款，禁止离职后两年内于香港从事相同行业，但职位为初级行政人员。Employer requires non-compete for junior admin staff prohibiting same industry in HK for 2 years post-employment.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 普通法下，非竞争条款须合理（Herbert Morris v Saxelby [1916] AC 688）。初级行政人员不涉商业机密，两年地域限制可能过宽，条款可能不可执行。法院会考虑雇员职位、机密信息接触程度及限制范围。
notes: HK follows common law reasonableness test for non-competes (Herbert Morris); CN restricts non-competes to senior staff (劳动合同法第24条); US FTC banned most non-competes (2024). HK's common law approach is more flexible than CN's statutory restriction but less protective than US FTC ban.

fact_summary: 香港雇员因雇主在裁员时计算遣散费不包括佣金及津贴，认为遣散费不足。Employee claims redundancy pay calculation excludes commissions and allowances.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 遣散费计算应包括《雇佣条例》(Cap 57) 第2条定义的「工资」（wages），包括佣金、津贴及额外赏赐。如雇主排除佣金，雇员可向劳资审裁处申索差额。
notes: HK Cap 57 includes commissions and allowances in severance calculation; CN economic compensation includes average monthly wage (similar); US has no statutory severance. HK's definition of wages for severance is more explicit than CN's.

fact_summary: 香港雇员因雇主未提供安全工作环境导致精神创伤，主张雇主的普通法责任。Employee suffers psychological trauma from unsafe workplace; claims employer's common law duty of care.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 雇主对雇员负有普通法谨慎责任（duty of care），须提供合理安全的工作环境。如雇主疏忽导致精神创伤，雇员可依普通法提出疏忽申索。但纯精神压力（nervous shock）赔偿需满足严格标准（Page v Smith [1996] AC 155）。
notes: HK common law duty of care allows negligence claims for workplace psychological harm; CN has limited tort claims for workplace精神损害; US has workers' compensation exclusive remedy limiting common law claims. HK's common law duty is more developed than CN's tort framework.

fact_summary: 香港雇员因雇主在终止雇佣时未提供解雇理由书，向劳资审裁处申索。Employer fails to provide written reason for termination; employee claims before Labour Tribunal.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: 根据《雇佣条例》(Cap 57) 第9A条，连续受雇不少于2年的雇员被解雇时有权要求雇主提供书面解雇理由。雇主须在雇员提出书面要求后14天内提供。如雇主拒绝，劳资审裁处可推定解雇不合理。
notes: HK Cap 57 §9A requires written reason for termination upon request (2+ years service); CN requires termination notice with reason; US at-will requires no reason. HK's written reason requirement is stronger than US but similar to CN's notice requirement.

fact_summary: Employee on US FMLA leave transferred to HK office
cn_claim: claims HK continuation of FMLA-equivalent leave rights. Employer claims HK law governs with no family leave.
us_claim: FMLA 29 U.S.C. §2612 applies to US employees of covered employers; transfer to HK office may terminate FMLA coverage if employer is no longer US-based or employee no longer works in US. FMLA does not have extraterritorial effect. Employee may have state law claims if applicable.
hk_claim: HK has no FMLA equivalent. Statutory leave is limited to maternity/paternity leave under Cap 57. No statutory family care leave for elderly parents or family members. Employee's FMLA rights do not transfer to HK employment. Contractual terms may provide additional leave.
notes: US FMLA provides 12 weeks of protected family leave with no extraterritorial effect; HK has no statutory family leave beyond maternity/paternity; CN has no FMLA equivalent. US-HK mapping is partial—FMLA does not transfer to HK employment.

fact_summary: Employee terminated by US parent company for participating in HK union activities. US company claims NLRA does not apply to HK employees.
cn_claim: NLRA 29 U.S.C. §152(3) defines employee but extraterritorial application is limited. HK employees of US parent may not be NLRA employees unless specifically covered. US parent cannot terminate HK employees for NLRA-protected activity if HK employees are not NLRA-covered. But anti-union animus may violate state law.
us_claim: HK Employment Ordinance (Cap 57) §21 prohibits anti-union discrimination. If termination is for HK union activities
hk_claim: Cap 57 §9 (unreasonable dismissal) applies. Employee can claim before Labour Tribunal. US parent's motive is irrelevant if HK employment law applies to HK contract. No NLRA equivalent in HK.
notes: US NLRA does not apply extraterritorially; HK Cap 57 §21 protects union activity but enforcement is weaker than NLRA; CN has工会法 but single-union system. US-HK partial mapping on cross-border union activity—US parent cannot use NLRA to justify HK anti-union termination.

fact_summary: Employee claims US Title VII race discrimination for adverse treatment in HK office by US supervisor. Employer claims HK law governs.
cn_claim: Title VII 42 U.S.C. §2000e-2 applies to US citizens employed by US employers overseas if employer is US-incorporated with 15+ employees. But foreign law defense may apply if compliance with Title VII would violate HK law. EEOC v Arabian American Oil Co 499 U.S. 244 (1991) on extraterritoriality; Civil Rights Act of 1991 extended Title VII to US citizens abroad.
us_claim: HK Race Discrimination Ordinance (Cap 602) §6 prohibits race discrimination. If US citizen works in HK
hk_claim: Cap 602 applies to HK workplace. But US supervisor's conduct may be governed by US law if supervisor is US employee. Dual jurisdiction possible. No foreign law defense equivalent to US Title VII.
notes: US Title VII applies to US citizens working abroad for US employers (1991 amendments); HK Cap 602 applies to all employment in HK regardless of nationality. Dual jurisdiction creates potential overlap and conflict. US-HK partial mapping due to concurrent application and choice of law.

fact_summary: Employee claims US OSHA whistleblower protection for reporting safety violations in HK office of US company. Employer claims HK law governs.
cn_claim: OSHA 29 U.S.C. §660(c) whistleblower protection applies to US employees reporting OSHA violations; extraterritorial application to HK workplace is doubtful. If HK office is not subject to OSHA jurisdiction
us_claim: US whistleblower protection does not apply. Employee may have HK common law or statutory claims.
hk_claim: HK Occupational Safety and Health Ordinance (Cap 509) §6 requires safe workplace. No specific whistleblower protection statute for workplace safety. Employee may have common law negligence claim if employer failed in duty of care. Cap 509 does not provide anti-retaliation provisions equivalent to OSHA.
notes: US OSHA whistleblower protection does not apply extraterritorially; HK Cap 509 has no anti-retaliation provision; CN has whistleblower protections in labor law. US-HK partial mapping on safety whistleblower protection—HK lacks equivalent to OSHA §11(c).

fact_summary: Employee with mental health condition (depression) requests remote work accommodation. Employer denies in all three jurisdictions citing different reasons.
cn_claim: CN: 主张合理便利及医疗期保护，要求调岗或远程工作（残疾人保障法第30条、劳动合同法第42条）。
us_claim: US: ADA claim 42 U.S.C. §12112 for reasonable accommodation; remote work may be required if proven effective during pandemic. Employer must show undue hardship. EEOC v Ford Motor Co 2015 (remote work as accommodation). ADAAA broadened disability definition.
hk_claim: HK: Disability Discrimination Ordinance (Cap 487) §6 requires reasonable accommodation if not unjustifiable hardship. Remote work may be reasonable accommodation depending on job nature and employer resources. No specific case law on remote work as accommodation. EOC may provide guidance.
notes: Mental health accommodation: US ADA has most developed framework for remote work as accommodation (post-COVID); CN has disability protection but no specific remote work accommodation framework; HK Cap 487 requires reasonable accommodation but case law on remote work is minimal. All three recognize mental health conditions but with different accommodation depth. Partial mapping.

fact_summary: Employee terminated after refusing to sign new arbitration agreement with class waiver. Employer operates in all three jurisdictions with different employment terms.
cn_claim: CN: 主张仲裁协议排除集体救济无效，劳动者保留诉权（劳动争议调解仲裁法第5条、劳动合同法第26条）。
us_claim: US: At-will employee can be terminated for refusing arbitration agreement (Epic Systems v Lewis 584 U.S. 497 (2018)). NLRA §7 does not invalidate class action waivers. Circuit City v Adams 532 U.S. 105 (2001). Arbitration agreement enforceable under FAA 9 U.S.C. §2.
hk_claim: HK: Arbitration agreement is generally enforceable under Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609). No class action mechanism in HK. Employee may be bound by arbitration clause if contract provides. No statutory protection against mandatory arbitration for employment disputes. Labour Tribunal jurisdiction may be ousted if parties agree to arbitration.
notes: Arbitration agreements: US allows class waivers in employment arbitration (Epic Systems); CN has mandatory labor arbitration before litigation but no class action; HK has Arbitration Ordinance with no employment-specific exemption. US-HK-CN partial mapping—US allows termination for refusal, HK has no statutory protection, CN requires mandatory arbitration first. Divergence on class action and termination rights.

fact_summary: Employee with severe allergies requests fragrance-free workplace. Employer in all three jurisdictions claims cannot control personal products.
cn_claim: CN: 主张健康权保护，要求安全工作环境（劳动法第52条、职业病防治法）。
us_claim: US: ADA claim 42 U.S.C. §12112 if allergy qualifies as disability; EEOC guidance on fragrance sensitivity. Employer may need to implement fragrance-free policy if reasonable accommodation. Fragrance sensitivity may be disability under ADAAA. No federal fragrance-free workplace mandate.
hk_claim: HK: Disability Discrimination Ordinance (Cap 487) §6 may apply if allergy is disability. Employer must provide reasonable accommodation if not unjustifiable hardship. No specific case law on fragrance sensitivity. Common law duty of care requires safe workplace. Occupational Safety and Health Ordinance (Cap 509) §6 requires safe workplace.
notes: Fragrance-free workplace: US ADA may require accommodation; CN has general health and safety obligations; HK Cap 487 and common law duty of care may apply. All three have potential protections but no specific fragrance-free workplace mandate. Partial mapping due to disability accommodation frameworks but no explicit fragrance policy requirements.

fact_summary: Employee discovers employer monitoring personal emails and GPS on company-issued phone across all three jurisdictions. No prior notice.
cn_claim: CN: 主张隐私权侵权，用人单位无权监控私人通信（民法典第1033条、个人信息保护法第13条）。
us_claim: US: ECPA 18 U.S.C. §2511(2)(a)(i) allows employer monitoring of business communications; state laws vary. No federal constitutional privacy expectation in workplace. California Invasion of Privacy Act §631-632.5 requires consent for recording. No federal GPS tracking statute.
hk_claim: HK: Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap 486) requires notification and lawful purpose for monitoring. Office of the Privacy Commissioner guidance on workplace monitoring (2012). Employee must be informed of monitoring policy. GPS tracking may require explicit consent if not work-related. More protective than US or CN.
notes: Workplace monitoring: US ECPA allows business-related monitoring with limited state protections; CN has民法典 privacy rights but workplace surveillance law is nascent; HK PDPO is most protective requiring notification and lawful purpose. HK > CN > US in privacy protection for workplace monitoring. Partial mapping due to different standards.

fact_summary: Employee claims workers' compensation for psychological injury from workplace bullying. Employer denies in all three jurisdictions.
cn_claim: CN: 主张工伤认定，精神伤害可能纳入职业病（工伤保险条例第14条、精神卫生法）。
us_claim: US: Workers' compensation varies by state; some states cover psychological injury from workplace stress if work-related. Most states require physical injury or unusual stress. No federal standard. State-specific occupational disease lists. Some states exclude purely psychological injuries.
hk_claim: HK: Employees' Compensation Ordinance (Cap 282) §5 covers personal injury; psychological injury may be covered if caused by accident arising out of employment. But purely psychological injury from stress is difficult to claim. Common law negligence claim possible if employer breached duty of care. Cap 282 Schedule 2 does not list psychological injuries specifically.
notes: Psychological injury compensation: US varies by state (some cover, some don't); CN has emerging recognition for workplace mental health; HK Cap 282 covers accident-related injuries but purely psychological claims are difficult. All three have significant gaps for workplace bullying psychological harm. Partial mapping due to varying recognition of psychological injuries.

fact_summary: Employee with religious requirement for Sabbath observance claims accommodation across all three jurisdictions. Employer requires Saturday work in all three.
cn_claim: CN: 主张宗教信仰自由受保护，要求调整工作时间（宪法第36条、民法典）。
us_claim: US: Title VII 42 U.S.C. §2000e(j) requires religious accommodation unless undue hardship (more than de minimis cost). Trans World Airlines v Hardison 432 U.S. 63 (1977). Groff v DeJoy 600 U.S. 447 (2023) modified to substantial increased costs. Religious accommodation is well-developed doctrine.
hk_claim: HK: Bill of Rights Ordinance (Cap 383) protects religious freedom. No specific workplace religious accommodation statute. Disability Discrimination Ordinance (Cap 487) does not cover religion. Employee may rely on contractual terms or common law. No statutory duty to accommodate religious observance. Less protective than US.
notes: Religious accommodation: US Title VII has specific accommodation requirement; CN has constitutional protection but no statutory workplace accommodation; HK has BoRO protection but no employment-specific accommodation. US > CN > HK in religious accommodation. Partial mapping due to US statutory requirement vs. CN/HK constitutional/general protections without workplace-specific duties.

fact_summary: 被告通过伪造公司财务报表，以电子邮件方式向多名投资者发送虚假投资信息，骗取资金逾50万元。Defendant sent fraudulent investment materials via email to multiple investors, falsifying financial statements to obtain over 500,000 RMB.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第266条，构成诈骗罪，数额巨大，处三年以上十年以下有期徒刑。
us_claim: Wire fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1343 and mail fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1341; elements: scheme to defraud, intent, use of interstate wires. See United States v. Pierce, 224 F.3d 158 (2d Cir. 2000).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法要求证明scheme to defraud与interstate wire/mail nexus，中国法无此跨州要件；中国法以数额作为量刑核心，US法以sentencing guidelines综合考量。

fact_summary: 被告在深夜撬开商铺门锁，盗取店内现金及电子产品，总价值约3万元。Defendant broke into a store at night, stole cash and electronics valued at approximately 30,000 RMB.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第264条，构成盗窃罪，数额较大，处三年以下有期徒刑、拘役或管制。
us_claim: Burglary under 18 U.S.C. § 2113 (if bank/federal property) or state common law burglary; larceny under state law requiring trespassory taking and carrying away with intent to permanently deprive.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国法按数额定罪量刑，US法依普通法区分burglary（breaking and entering）与larceny；US联邦管辖限于银行/州际商业，州法管辖普通盗窃。

fact_summary: 被告收受供应商贿赂共计20万元，为其在政府采购项目中提供便利。Official accepted 200,000 RMB in bribes from a supplier to facilitate government procurement.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第385条，构成受贿罪，数额巨大，处三年以上十年以下有期徒刑。
us_claim: Federal bribery under 18 U.S.C. § 201(b)(2); requires quid pro quo: corrupt receipt of anything of value in exchange for official act. See United States v. Sun-Diamond Growers, 526 U.S. 398 (1999).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国法受贿罪主体为国家工作人员，US法§201适用于federal public officials；US法要求更严格的quid pro quo证明，中国法对感情投资型受贿亦有扩大解释。

fact_summary: 被告故意持刀杀害被害人，因感情纠纷引发。Defendant intentionally stabbed and killed the victim due to a romantic dispute.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第232条，构成故意杀人罪，处死刑、无期徒刑或十年以上有期徒刑。
us_claim: Second-degree murder under MPC § 210.2 (purposely or knowingly causing death) or first-degree under state statutes requiring premeditation; see also 18 U.S.C. § 1111 (federal murder).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国法单一故意杀人罪，量刑跨度大；US法区分first-degree/premeditated murder与second-degree murder，MPC依culpability分级；US联邦谋杀仅适用于联邦管辖领域。

fact_summary: 被告在醉酒状态下驾驶汽车，撞击行人致其重伤。Defendant drove under the influence and struck a pedestrian, causing serious injury.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第133条，构成交通肇事罪，处三年以下有期徒刑或拘役。
us_claim: DUI causing injury under state criminal codes; no general federal DUI statute. Under MPC § 2.08, intoxication may negate purposeful/knowing conduct but not recklessness. See Montana v. Egelhoff, 518 U.S. 37 (1996).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国法设交通肇事罪为独立罪名，US法无统一联邦酒驾法，由州法管辖；MPC视自愿醉酒不成立特定意图抗辩，但可能减轻故意层级。

fact_summary: 被告未经同意，以暴力手段与被害人发生性关系。Defendant used physical force to engage in sexual intercourse with the victim without consent.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第236条，构成强奸罪，处三年以上十年以下有期徒刑。
us_claim: Rape under federal 18 U.S.C. § 2241 (aggravated sexual abuse) or state law; requires forcible compulsion or lack of consent. See United States v. Lanier, 520 U.S. 259 (1997).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国法以暴力/胁迫为要件，US联邦法区分aggravated sexual abuse (§2241)与sexual abuse (§2242)；US法更强调consent概念，中国法在证据标准上更侧重暴力痕迹。

fact_summary: 被告非法侵入他人计算机系统，窃取用户数据库并出售。Defendant illegally accessed a computer system, stole user databases, and sold them.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第285条第2款，构成非法获取计算机信息系统数据罪，处三年以下有期徒刑或拘役。
us_claim: Computer fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1030(a)(2)(C) (unauthorized access to obtain information) and (a)(5)(C) (damage to protected computer); see also 18 U.S.C. § 1343 (wire fraud).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国法以侵入特定计算机信息系统为要件，US法§1030区分access vs. damage，且要求interstate/federal nexus；US法对protected computer定义更广，包含州际商业关联。

fact_summary: 被告向境外走私毒品海洛因约500克。Defendant smuggled approximately 500 grams of heroin across the border.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第347条，构成走私毒品罪，处十五年有期徒刑、无期徒刑或死刑。
us_claim: Trafficking in controlled substances under 21 U.S.C. § 841(a)(1); importation under 21 U.S.C. § 952; penalties based on drug quantity and type per 21 U.S.C. § 841(b). See United States v. Booker, 543 U.S. 220 (2005).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国法对毒品数量极其敏感，50克海洛因即可判处死刑；US法虽依mandatory minimum sentencing，但Booker案后联邦guidelines advisory only，量刑裁量空间更大。

fact_summary: 被告组织多人进行电信诈骗，通过VOIP电话骗取被害人转账。Defendant organized a telecom fraud scheme using VOIP calls to induce victims to transfer money.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第266条及第26条，构成诈骗罪（集团犯罪），从重处罚。
us_claim: Wire fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1343; conspiracy under 18 U.S.C. § 1349; may also trigger RICO 18 U.S.C. § 1962 if ongoing enterprise. See United States v. Cleveland, 106 F.3d 1056 (D.C. Cir. 1997).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法对ongoing criminal organization可适用RICO，中国法对电信诈骗有专门司法解释；US法需证明interstate nexus，中国法无此限制。

fact_summary: 被告在抢劫过程中使用枪支威胁店员，抢走现金。Defendant used a firearm to threaten a store clerk during a robbery, stealing cash.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第263条，构成抢劫罪，持枪抢劫为加重情节，处十年以上有期徒刑。
us_claim: Bank robbery under 18 U.S.C. § 2113(a)-(d); armed robbery under state law; Hobbs Act 18 U.S.C. § 1951 for interference with interstate commerce by robbery. See United States v. McFarlane, 354 F.3d 91 (2d Cir. 2003).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国法持枪抢劫为法定加重情节，US法依武器使用与受害人伤害分级；Hobbs Act要求interstate commerce nexus，中国法无此要件。

fact_summary: 被告伪造货币并在市场上使用。Defendant counterfeited currency and used it in the market.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第170条，构成伪造货币罪，处三年以上十年以下有期徒刑。
us_claim: Counterfeiting under 18 U.S.C. § 471 (forging obligations/securities of the United States) and 18 U.S.C. § 472 (uttering counterfeit); exclusive federal jurisdiction. See United States v. Wacker, 72 F.3d 1453 (10th Cir. 1995).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 伪造货币在US为联邦专属管辖，基于宪法currency power；中国法依数额与伪造数量量刑，US法依sentencing guidelines。

fact_summary: 被告作为公司高管，在财务报告中故意做虚假陈述，误导投资者。Corporate executive knowingly made false statements in financial reports to mislead investors.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第161条，构成违规披露、不披露重要信息罪。
us_claim: Securities fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1348; also 15 U.S.C. § 78j(b) (SEC Rule 10b-5); requires material misrepresentation in connection with securities purchase/sale. See SEC v. United States, 463 U.S. 646 (1983).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法证券欺诈有SEC Rule 10b-5与18 U.S.C. § 1348双重路径，中国法以违规披露信息罪规制；US法有private right of action，中国法以刑事追诉为主。

fact_summary: 被告为黑社会团伙成员，参与多起敲诈勒索案件。Defendant, as a gang member, participated in multiple extortion cases.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第294条，构成参加黑社会性质组织罪，处三年以上七年以下有期徒刑。
us_claim: RICO conspiracy under 18 U.S.C. § 1962(d); requires pattern of racketeering activity and enterprise. See United States v. Turkette, 452 U.S. 576 (1981).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国法以黑社会性质组织为要件，US法RICO要求pattern of racketeering (至少两个predicate acts)与enterprise；US法enterprise可含合法组织，中国法更侧重非法组织特征。

fact_summary: 被告过失导致被害人死亡，系工地安全事故。Defendant negligently caused worker's death at a construction site.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第233条，构成过失致人死亡罪，处三年以上七年以下有期徒刑。
us_claim: Negligent homicide under MPC § 210.4 or state law; involuntary manslaughter under 18 U.S.C. § 1112 (federal); requires gross negligence or criminal negligence. See United States v. Smith, 404 F.3d 1035 (8th Cir. 2005).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国法以过失致人死亡为独立罪名，US法区分negligent homicide与involuntary manslaughter；MPC要求criminal negligence，中国法要求疏忽大意或过于自信。

fact_summary: 被告在公共场所持刀伤人，造成被害人轻伤。Defendant stabbed and injured a victim in a public place, causing minor injuries.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第234条，构成故意伤害罪，处三年以下有期徒刑、拘役或管制。
us_claim: Assault with a dangerous weapon under 18 U.S.C. § 113(a)(3) (federal assault within maritime/territorial jurisdiction) or state aggravated assault statutes. See United States v. Johnson, 324 F.3d 875 (7th Cir. 2003).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国法以轻伤/重伤/死亡分级量刑，US联邦 assault仅适用于special territorial jurisdiction，普通assault由州法管辖；US法更强调weapon使用作为aggravating factor。

fact_summary: 被告 kidnapping 被害人，向其家属勒索赎金。Defendant kidnapped the victim and demanded ransom from the family.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第239条，构成绑架罪，处十年以上有期徒刑或无期徒刑。
us_claim: Kidnapping under 18 U.S.C. § 1201(a) (federal kidnapping); requires unlawful seizure/confinement and transportation across state lines or demand for ransom. See United States v. Allen, 247 F.3d 741 (8th Cir. 2001).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US联邦绑架罪要求interstate transportation或ransdom demand，中国法绑架罪无跨州要件；中国法以勒索财物或满足不法要求为目的，US法 ransom demand为联邦管辖要件。

fact_summary: 被告作为警察，在审讯中对嫌疑人实施暴力逼供。Police officer used physical violence during interrogation to extract confession.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第247条，构成刑讯逼供罪，处三年以下有期徒刑或拘役。
us_claim: Deprivation of constitutional rights under color of law, 18 U.S.C. § 242; Fourth Amendment excessive force; Miranda v. Arizona, 384 U.S. 436 (1966) requires voluntariness of confession. See also Brown v. Mississippi, 297 U.S. 278 (1936).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法以宪法修正案（Fourth/Fifth/Sixth）为根基， confession involuntariness导致排除证据；中国法以刑讯逼供罪追诉，但证据排除规则相对较弱；US法对state action适用更严格。

fact_summary: 被告在火灾现场趁乱抢劫财物。Defendant looted property at the scene of a fire.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第263条，构成抢劫罪，处三年以上十年以下有期徒刑。
us_claim: Looting under state law; federal robbery under 18 U.S.C. § 2111 if within special maritime/territorial jurisdiction; may also trigger emergency-related penalty enhancement under 18 U.S.C. § 1341/1343. See United States v. Fergusson, 565 F.3d 236 (5th Cir. 2009).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法普通抢劫由州法管辖，联邦管辖限于特殊地域；中国法单一抢劫罪不分地域管辖；US法在灾害期间有sentencing enhancement。

fact_summary: 被告在网上散布儿童色情材料。Defendant distributed child pornography online.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第364条，构成传播淫秽物品罪，从重处罚。
us_claim: Possession/distribution of child pornography under 18 U.S.C. § 2252A; prohibits visual depiction of minors engaged in sexually explicit conduct; see also 18 U.S.C. § 1466A (obscene visual representation). See United States v. Williams, 553 U.S. 285 (2008).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法18 U.S.C. § 2252A专门针对child pornography，中国法以传播淫秽物品罪统一规制；US法对virtual child pornography有争议（Ashcroft v. Free Speech Coalition），中国法涵盖范围更广。

fact_summary: 被告作为银行职员，挪用客户存款用于个人投资。Bank employee misappropriated customer deposits for personal investment.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第272条，构成挪用资金罪，数额巨大，处三年以上七年以下有期徒刑。
us_claim: Bank fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1344; misappropriation by bank officer under 18 U.S.C. § 656; embezzlement under 18 U.S.C. § 641 (if federal funds). See United States v. Ragonese, 489 F.3d 487 (2d Cir. 2007).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法对银行职员有专门罪名（18 U.S.C. § 656），中国法以挪用资金罪或职务侵占罪处理；US法要求银行为FDIC insured，中国法以数额与用途为核心。

fact_summary: 被告在法庭上作虚假陈述，意图影响判决结果。Defendant made false statements in court to influence the verdict.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第305条，构成伪证罪，处三年以下有期徒刑或拘役。
us_claim: Perjury under 18 U.S.C. § 1621 (wilfully subscribes false statement under oath) and § 1623 (false declarations before grand jury/court); materiality required. See United States v. Gaudin, 515 U.S. 506 (1995).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法区分perjury (§1621)与false declarations (§1623)，Gaudin案要求materiality由陪审团决定；中国法以伪证罪统一规制，材料性由法官判断。

fact_summary: 被告身为国家机关工作人员，故意泄露国家秘密给外国记者。Government official intentionally disclosed state secrets to a foreign journalist.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第398条，构成故意泄露国家秘密罪，情节特别严重，处三年以上七年以下有期徒刑。
us_claim: Espionage under 18 U.S.C. § 793 (gathering, transmitting, or losing defense information) or § 798 (disclosure of classified communications intelligence); First Amendment protections for press. See New York Times v. United States, 403 U.S. 713 (1971).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法有First Amendment与prior restraint限制（Pentagon Papers案），中国法以国家秘密保护为绝对优先；US法区分classified information leaks与espionage，中国法以泄露国家秘密罪统一规制。

fact_summary: 被告制造并销售假冒伪劣药品，导致多名患者健康受损。Defendant manufactured and sold counterfeit medicine, causing health harm to multiple patients.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第141条，构成生产、销售假药罪，致人死亡或特别严重情节，处十年以上有期徒刑、无期徒刑或死刑。
us_claim: Trafficking in counterfeit drugs under 18 U.S.C. § 2320 (trafficking in counterfeit goods); adulterated/misbranded drugs under 21 U.S.C. § 331; RICO if ongoing enterprise. See United States v. Giles, 736 F.3d 106 (2d Cir. 2013).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法 counterfeit trafficking与FDA adulteration分属不同法条，中国法以生产、销售假药罪统一规制；US法更强调FDA监管合规，中国法以人体危害结果为加重要件。

fact_summary: 被告多次向未成年人贩卖毒品。Defendant repeatedly sold drugs to minors.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第347条第6款，向未成年人贩卖毒品，从重处罚。
us_claim: Distribution to persons under 21, 21 U.S.C. § 859 (enhanced penalty); drug trafficking near schools, 21 U.S.C. § 860. See United States v. Liranzo, 944 F.3d 39 (2d Cir. 2019).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法21 U.S.C. § 859对向未成年人贩毒有专门加重条款，中国法以刑法第347条第6款从重处罚；US法有school zone enhancement，中国法无此地域加重。

fact_summary: 被告通过暗网购买枪支配件，意图组装非法武器。Defendant purchased firearm parts on the dark web intending to assemble illegal weapons.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第125条，构成非法制造枪支罪，处三年以上十年以下有期徒刑。
us_claim: Firearms trafficking under 18 U.S.C. § 922(a)(2) (unlicensed dealing), § 922(o) (possession of machine gun), § 924 (use of firearm in drug trafficking/crime of violence). See United States v. Jones, 976 F.3d 1378 (D.C. Cir. 2020).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法以National Firearms Act与Gun Control Act为框架，区分machine gun与普通firearm；中国法严格禁止私人持枪，非法制造枪支罪门槛更低；US法有Second Amendment限制。

fact_summary: 被告在商场扒窃被害人钱包，内有现金及证件。Defendant pickpocketed a victim's wallet containing cash and ID cards in a shopping mall.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第264条，构成盗窃罪，数额较大，处三年以下有期徒刑。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Theft under Theft Ordinance (Cap 210) § 2 (dishonest appropriation of property belonging to another with intention of permanently depriving); also Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200) § 9. See R v. Lawrence [1972] AC 626 (HL).
notes: 香港法承继英国普通法，以dishonest appropriation为核心，中国法以秘密窃取为特征；香港法适用Ghosh test判断dishonesty，中国法以主观非法占有目的为标准。

fact_summary: 被告作为公务员，接受承包商礼品券以加快审批流程。Public servant accepted gift vouchers from a contractor to expedite approval process.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第385条，构成受贿罪，处五年以下有期徒刑或拘役。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Acceptance of advantage under Prevention of Bribery Ordinance (Cap 201) § 4 (public servant soliciting/accepting advantage without general/specific permission of Chief Executive); see also § 3 (offers to public servants). See HKSAR v. Li Wah, [2016] HKCFA 30.
notes: 香港法以 Prevention of Bribery Ordinance (Cap 201) 规管，§4要求advantage；中国法受贿罪以财物为限，香港法advantage范围更广；香港法 permission defense 为中国法所无。

fact_summary: 被告在交通意外中醉驾，撞伤两名路人。Defendant drove under influence, injuring two pedestrians in a traffic accident.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第133条，构成交通肇事罪，处三年以下有期徒刑或拘役。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Dangerous driving causing grievous bodily harm under Road Traffic Ordinance (Cap 374) § 36; drink-driving under Cap 374 § 39. See HKSAR v. Lau Chun Yiu, [2019] HKCA 123.
notes: 香港法以Road Traffic Ordinance (Cap 374)规管，区分careless/dangerous/cause death；中国法以交通肇事罪统一规制；香港法drink-driving有独立罪名，中国法作为量刑情节。

fact_summary: 被告在街头斗殴中用刀划伤对方手臂。Defendant slashed another person's arm with a knife during a street fight.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第234条，构成故意伤害罪，处三年以下有期徒刑、拘役或管制。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Wounding/inflicting grievous bodily harm under Offences Against the Person Ordinance (Cap 212) § 19 (wounding or inflicting grievous bodily harm) and § 17 (wounding with intent to cause grievous bodily harm). See R v. Ireland [1998] AC 147 (HL).
notes: 香港法以Offences Against the Person Ordinance (Cap 212) §17/§19区分意图/结果，中国法以轻伤/重伤/死亡分级；香港法承继英国普通法，§19不要求证明specific intent。

fact_summary: 被告闯入他人住宅意图盗窃，但未得手。Defendant broke into a residential flat intending to steal but was apprehended before taking anything.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第245条，构成非法侵入住宅罪；若意图盗窃，可能构成盗窃罪（未遂）。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Burglary under Theft Ordinance (Cap 210) § 11 (entering building/part of building as trespasser with intent to steal/inflict grievous bodily harm/do unlawful damage); see also R v. Collins [1973] QB 100 (entry as trespasser).
notes: 香港法 burglary 要求 entering as trespasser with intent，中国法区分非法侵入住宅与盗窃未遂；香港法 burglary 为 inchoate/result crime hybrid，中国法以未遂处理。

fact_summary: 被告作为公司董事，将公司资金转入个人账户用于赌博。Company director transferred company funds to personal account for gambling.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第271条，构成职务侵占罪，数额巨大，处五年以上有期徒刑。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Theft by director under Theft Ordinance (Cap 210) § 16 (theft by person in special position of trust) or fraud under Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200) § 16 (fraud by abuse of position); see also Companies Ordinance (Cap 622) duties. See R v. Gomez [1993] AC 442 (HL).
notes: 香港法以Theft Ordinance (Cap 210) § 16B或Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200) § 16A fraud规管，中国法以职务侵占罪处理；香港法承继英国fraud Act 2006路径，区分theft与fraud。

fact_summary: 被告在社交媒体上发布煽动暴力内容，引发公共秩序混乱。Defendant posted incitement to violence on social media, causing public disorder.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第293条，构成寻衅滋事罪，处五年以下有期徒刑、拘役或管制。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Sedition under Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200) § 10 (seditious intention); public order offenses under Public Order Ordinance (Cap 245); see also HKSAR v. Leung Tin Wai, [2021] HKDC 123. PENDING_VERIFICATION
notes: 香港法 sedition 承继英国普通法传统，但2020年后经国安法重构；中国法以寻衅滋事罪统一规制；两法域在言论自由与公共安全边界上有根本差异。

fact_summary: 被告在证人作证前威胁其改变证词。Defendant threatened a witness before testimony to change their statement.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第307条，构成妨害作证罪，处三年以下有期徒刑或拘役。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Intimidation of witness/juror under Criminal Procedure Ordinance (Cap 221) § 32 (witness/juror giving false evidence); common law offense of perverting the course of justice. See HKSAR v. Ng Chiu, [2018] HKCA 234.
notes: 香港法以perverting the course of justice普通法罪名规管，中国法以妨害作证罪处理；香港法承继英国common law传统，中国法以成文法典化为特征；香港法有更广泛的contempt概念。

fact_summary: 被告在金融机构中从事洗钱活动，转移犯罪所得。Defendant engaged in money laundering at a financial institution, transferring criminal proceeds.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第191条，构成洗钱罪，处五年以上十年以下有期徒刑。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Money laundering under Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance (Cap 455) § 25 (dealing with property known/representing proceeds of indictable offence); see also Drug Trafficking (Recovery of Proceeds) Ordinance (Cap 405). See HKSAR v. Chun Shing, [2015] HKCFA 42.
notes: 香港法以Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance (Cap 455) § 25规管，中国法以刑法第191条洗钱罪处理；香港法有suspicious transaction reporting制度，中国法近年建立类似制度；香港法承继英国POCA 2002路径。

fact_summary: 被告在公共场所持仿制枪支威胁他人。Defendant threatened others with a replica firearm in a public place.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第130条，构成非法携带枪支、弹药、管制刀具危及公共安全罪，处三年以下有期徒刑。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Possession of imitation firearm with intent under Firearms and Ammunition Ordinance (Cap 238) § 13; possession of imitation firearm in public place. See HKSAR v. Wong Kwok Wai, [2017] HKDC 89. PENDING_VERIFICATION
notes: 香港法以Firearms and Ammunition Ordinance (Cap 238)规管，区分real/imitation firearm；中国法严格禁止任何形式的枪支仿真品；香港法对imitation firearm有专门条款，中国法以仿真枪入罪门槛较低。

fact_summary: 被告通过跨国电邮诈骗骗取香港和美国两地投资者资金。Defendant defrauded investors in both Hong Kong and the U.S. via cross-border email scheme.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Wire fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1343; mail fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1341; extraterritorial jurisdiction under 18 U.S.C. § 1029/1030 for computer fraud. See United States v. Ivanov, 175 F. Supp. 2d 367 (D. Conn. 2001).
hk_claim: Fraud under Theft Ordinance (Cap 210) § 16A (fraud by false representation) and Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200) § 159G; Criminal Jurisdiction Ordinance (Cap 461) § 3 extends jurisdiction for cross-border fraud. See HKSAR v. Wong Tak Keung, [2015] HKCFA 35.
notes: US法与香港法均对wire fraud/email fraud有规制，但US法以interstate nexus为联邦管辖要件，香港法以Criminal Jurisdiction Ordinance (Cap 461) § 3扩展域外管辖；两法域对extraterritoriality处理不同。

fact_summary: 被告作为跨国银行员工，挪用两地客户资金。Employee of multinational bank misappropriated customer funds from both HK and US branches.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Bank fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1344; misappropriation by bank officer under 18 U.S.C. § 656; extraterritorial application possible if US bank involved. See United States v. Wells, 519 U.S. 482 (1997).
hk_claim: Theft by employee under Theft Ordinance (Cap 210) § 4 (dishonest appropriation); fraud by abuse of position under Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200) § 16A; Banking Ordinance (Cap 155) regulatory sanctions. See HKSAR v. Leung Kam Cheung, [2012] HKCA 345. PENDING_VERIFICATION
notes: US法有专门银行犯罪联邦法条（18 U.S.C. § 656），香港法以普通法theft/fraud规管；US法以federal charter/FDIC为管辖基础，香港法以 Banking Ordinance 监管与刑事法并行。

fact_summary: 被告在国际水域走私毒品至香港及美国。Defendant smuggled drugs in international waters to Hong Kong and the U.S.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Maritime drug law enforcement under 46 U.S.C. § 70503; drug trafficking conspiracy under 21 U.S.C. § 846; extraterritorial jurisdiction under 21 U.S.C. § 959. See United States v. Bellaizac-Hurtado, 700 F.3d 505 (11th Cir. 2012).
hk_claim: Drug trafficking under Dangerous Drugs Ordinance (Cap 134) § 4 (trafficking in dangerous drugs) and § 21 (import/export); international cooperation via mutual legal assistance treaties. See HKSAR v. Ng Yat Chi, [2010] HKCFA 28. PENDING_VERIFICATION
notes: US法对国际水域毒品走私有46 U.S.C. § 70503等专门法条，香港法以Dangerous Drugs Ordinance (Cap 134)规管；US法extraterritorial jurisdiction更广，香港法依普通法territorial原则限制。

fact_summary: 被告在跨国网络平台上传播儿童色情材料。Defendant distributed child pornography on a cross-border online platform.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: 18 U.S.C. § 2252A (possession/distribution of child pornography); 18 U.S.C. § 2251 (production); extraterritorial application to US citizens abroad. See United States v. Williams, 553 U.S. 285 (2008).
hk_claim: Prevention of Child Pornography Ordinance (Cap 579) § 3 (publishing child pornography); Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200) § 161 (access to computer with criminal/dishonest intent). See HKSAR v. Cheng Wai Lun, [2018] HKCFA 19. PENDING_VERIFICATION
notes: US法有18 U.S.C. § 2252A专门规制，香港法以 Prevention of Child Pornography Ordinance (Cap 579) 处理；US法对US citizens abroad有extraterritorial管辖，香港法依territorial原则限制。

fact_summary: 被告在跨州商业活动中使用强迫劳动。Defendant used forced labor in interstate commercial operations.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Forced labor under 18 U.S.C. § 1589 (forced labor); trafficking under 18 U.S.C. § 1591 (sex trafficking of children); TVPA framework. See United States v. Kozminski, 487 U.S. 931 (1988).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: PENDING_VERIFICATION: 香港法对forced labor无专门刑事法条，主要依普通法 assault/false imprisonment处理；US法有TVPA专门框架；香港法此领域存在明显法律空白。

fact_summary: 被告参与跨国电信诈骗集团，担任话务员。Defendant participated in a transnational telecom fraud syndicate as a phone operator.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Wire fraud conspiracy under 18 U.S.C. § 1349; RICO under 18 U.S.C. § 1962; aiding and abetting under 18 U.S.C. § 2. See United States v. Boyle, 122 F.3d 1269 (9th Cir. 1997).
hk_claim: Conspiracy to defraud under common law; theft/fraud under Theft Ordinance (Cap 210) and Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200); Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance (Cap 455) for syndicate operations. See HKSAR v. Mak Chun Wah, [2014] HKCA 456. PENDING_VERIFICATION
notes: US法以RICO/§1349规制集团犯罪，香港法以common law conspiracy与Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance (Cap 455)并行；US法对ongoing racketeering enterprise有更强规制。

fact_summary: 被告在跨境贸易中伪造原产地证书，逃避关税。Defendant falsified certificates of origin in cross-border trade to evade customs duties.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Customs fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 542 (entry by false statement); smuggling under 18 U.S.C. § 545; wire fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1343. See United States v. Magana, 118 F.3d 1173 (7th Cir. 1997).
hk_claim: Import/export fraud under Import and Export Ordinance (Cap 60) § 6; false trade description under Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap 362); common law fraud. See HKSAR v. Chan Kwong, [2016] HKDC 78. PENDING_VERIFICATION
notes: US法以18 U.S.C. § 542专门规制海关欺诈，香港法以 Import and Export Ordinance (Cap 60) 与 Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap 362) 并行；两法域对关税欺诈均有刑事规制，但法源结构不同。

fact_summary: 被告在跨国并购中向监管机构提交虚假财务文件。Defendant submitted false financial documents to regulators in a cross-border M&A transaction.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Securities fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1348; false statements under 18 U.S.C. § 1001; Sarbanes-Oxley violations. See United States v. Goyal, 732 F.3d 951 (9th Cir. 2013).
hk_claim: False representation under Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200) § 159G; fraud under Theft Ordinance (Cap 210) § 16A; Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap 571) § 277 (false/misleading information). See HKSAR v. Chu Wai Tak, [2019] HKCA 567. PENDING_VERIFICATION
notes: US法以18 U.S.C. § 1348/Sarbanes-Oxley为框架，香港法以 Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap 571) 与 Theft Ordinance 并行；US法对US-listed公司有更严格披露义务，香港法对SFO listing rules有独立监管。

fact_summary: 被告在网络平台上组织赌博活动，参与者来自中国、美国和香港。Defendant organized online gambling activities with participants from China, US, and Hong Kong.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第303条第2款，构成开设赌场罪，处五年以下有期徒刑；若情节严重，处五年以上十年以下有期徒刑。
us_claim: Illegal gambling business under 18 U.S.C. § 1955 (illegal gambling business); Wire Act 18 U.S.C. § 1084 (transmission of wagering information); UIGEA 31 U.S.C. § 5361. See United States v. Cohen, 260 F.3d 68 (2d Cir. 2001).
hk_claim: Gambling under Gambling Ordinance (Cap 148) § 5 (unauthorized gambling/betting); common law public nuisance; organized crime under Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance (Cap 455). See HKSAR v. Wong Chi Keung, [2013] HKCA 345. PENDING_VERIFICATION
notes: 三法域均禁止非法赌博，但结构差异显著：中国法以开设赌场罪规制，US法以Wire Act/§1955/UIGEA多重法条规制，香港法以Gambling Ordinance (Cap 148) 监管；US法对interstate wagering有专门限制，香港法授权社会公益博彩。

fact_summary: 被告在三国（地区）均有账户，利用加密货币转移贪污所得。Defendant transferred embezzled funds using cryptocurrency across accounts in China, US, and HK.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第191条，构成洗钱罪；若上游犯罪为贪污贿赂，从重处罚。
us_claim: Money laundering under 18 U.S.C. § 1956 (laundering of monetary instruments); § 1957 (monetary transactions in criminally derived property); crypto-assets under FinCEN regulations. See United States v. Johnson, 971 F.3d 125 (5th Cir. 2020).
hk_claim: Money laundering under Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance (Cap 455) § 25; also Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing Ordinance (Cap 615) § 5. See HKSAR v. Chun Shing, [2015] HKCFA 42. PENDING_VERIFICATION
notes: 三法域均建立AML框架，但US法以BSA/FinCEN为监管核心，对cryptocurrency有明确规制；香港法以Cap 615规管虚拟资产服务提供者；中国法禁止加密货币交易，洗钱上游犯罪范围较窄。

fact_summary: 被告在跨国商业贿赂中，向三国（地区）官员行贿以获取合同。Defendant bribed officials in China, US, and HK to obtain contracts.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第389条，构成行贿罪；对外国公职人员行贿依第164条。
us_claim: Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) 15 U.S.C. § 78dd-1 (issuers), § 78dd-2 (domestic concerns), § 78dd-3 (persons within US territory); anti-bribery provisions. See United States v. Hoskins, 902 F.3d 69 (2d Cir. 2018).
hk_claim: Prevention of Bribery Ordinance (Cap 201) § 4 (public servant bribery); common law bribery; also independent commission against corruption (ICAC) investigations. See HKSAR v. Kwan Lam, [2008] HKCFA 12. PENDING_VERIFICATION
notes: 三法域均严惩商业贿赂，但US法FCPA专门针对foreign official bribery，有extraterritorial效力；中国法以第164条专门规制对foreign official行贿；香港法以Cap 201与ICAC为独特制度；三法域在jurisdiction extraterritoriality上差异显著。

fact_summary: 被告在知识产权侵权中，跨境销售盗版软件至三地市场。Defendant sold pirated software across borders to markets in China, US, and HK.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第217条，构成侵犯著作权罪，违法所得数额较大或有其他严重情节。
us_claim: Criminal copyright infringement under 18 U.S.C. § 2319 (copyright infringement); Trafficking in counterfeit goods under 18 U.S.C. § 2320; DMCA 17 U.S.C. § 1201. See United States v. Evans, 891 F.3d 187 (5th Cir. 2018).
hk_claim: Copyright infringement under Copyright Ordinance (Cap 528) § 118 (criminal liability for copyright infringement); trade description under Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap 362). See HKSAR v. Lam Shing, [2014] HKCA 234. PENDING_VERIFICATION
notes: 三法域均保护知识产权，但US法以18 U.S.C. § 2319/§2320刑事化版权/商标侵权，中国法以侵犯著作权罪/假冒注册商标罪处理；香港法以Cap 528 § 118刑事化版权侵权，但门槛较高；三法域对criminal threshold设定不同。

fact_summary: 被告在跨国人口贩卖中，将受害者从中国经香港转运至美国。Defendant trafficked victims from China via Hong Kong to the US.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第240条，构成拐卖妇女、儿童罪；第244条之一，构成强迫劳动罪。
us_claim: Trafficking under 18 U.S.C. § 1591 (sex trafficking); § 1589 (forced labor); TVPA framework; Mann Act 18 U.S.C. § 2421 (interstate transportation). See United States v. Jungers, 702 F.3d 1066 (8th Cir. 2013).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国法以拐卖与强迫劳动分别规制，US法以TVPA为专门框架；香港法对human trafficking无专门刑事法条，主要依common law与immigration law处理；三法域在专门立法上存在显著不对称。

fact_summary: 被告在跨国恐怖融资中，向三地关联组织提供资金支持。Defendant provided financial support to affiliated organizations in a cross-border terrorism financing scheme.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第120条之一，构成帮助恐怖活动罪，处五年以下有期徒刑、拘役、管制或剥夺政治权利。
us_claim: Material support to terrorism under 18 U.S.C. § 2339A (material support to terrorists) and § 2339B (material support to designated FTOs); Patriot Act provisions. See Holder v. Humanitarian Law Project, 561 U.S. 1 (2010).
hk_claim: Terrorism financing under United Nations (Anti-Terrorism Measures) Ordinance (Cap 575) § 7; Security Bureau designated terrorist organizations. See HKSAR v. Ma Chiu, [2010] HKCA 456. PENDING_VERIFICATION
notes: 三法域均反恐融资，但US法以18 U.S.C. § 2339B与FTO designation为核心，中国法以帮助恐怖活动罪规制，香港法以Cap 575实施UN决议；Holder案对material support的宪法限制为中国法/香港法所无。

fact_summary: 被告在跨国数据泄露中，非法获取并出售三法域公民个人信息。Defendant illegally obtained and sold personal information of citizens across three jurisdictions.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第253条之一，构成侵犯公民个人信息罪，情节特别严重，处三年以上七年以下有期徒刑。
us_claim: Identity theft under 18 U.S.C. § 1028 (aggravated identity theft); computer fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1030; wire fraud under 18 U.S.C. § 1343. See United States v. Miller, 953 F.3d 1095 (9th Cir. 2020).
hk_claim: Access to computer with criminal/dishonest intent under Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200) § 161; Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap 486) § 64 (disclosure of personal data obtained without consent). See HKSAR v. Chan Ying, [2017] HKCFA 23. PENDING_VERIFICATION
notes: 三法域均保护个人信息，但US法无统一联邦隐私法，以sectoral/州法为主；中国法以刑法第253条之一统一规制；香港法以PDPO (Cap 486) 民事为主，§64有限刑事化；三法域在privacy criminalization程度上差异显著。

fact_summary: 夫妻双方因感情不和分居两年，一方起诉离婚并要求分割共同财产。Spouses separated for two years due to irreconcilable differences; one filed for divorce and property division.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1079条，感情确已破裂且调解无效，应准予离婚；第1087条，共同财产由双方协议处理，协议不成由法院判决。
us_claim: No-fault divorce under Uniform Marriage and Divorce Act (UMDA) § 302 (irretrievable breakdown); equitable distribution of marital property under state law; see also Orr v. Orr, 440 U.S. 268 (1979).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国法以感情确已破裂为法定离婚标准，US法以UMDA irretrievable breakdown为no-fault基础；US法equitable distribution依州法差异大（community property vs. equitable distribution），中国法以协议优先、判决照顾子女/女方/无过错方为原则。

fact_summary: 离婚后一方拒绝支付子女抚养费，拖欠金额超过一年。Former spouse refused to pay child support for over a year, accumulating arrears.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1085条，离婚后一方抚养子女，另一方应负担部分或全部抚养费；拒不支付可申请强制执行。
us_claim: Child support enforcement under 42 U.S.C. § 651 (Child Support Enforcement Act); state UIFSA; federal tax refund offset. See Sosna v. Iowa, 419 U.S. 393 (1975).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法有联邦Child Support Enforcement Act与州UIFSA统一框架，可跨州追讨；中国法抚养费依离婚协议或判决，执行依赖法院强制执行；US法有wage garnishment/tax offset等更强机制。

fact_summary: 非婚生子女的生父拒绝承认亲子关系并拒绝支付抚养费。Biological father of illegitimate child refused to acknowledge paternity and pay support.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1071条，非婚生子女享有与婚生子女同等权利；第1071条，不直接抚养的生父应负担抚养费。
us_claim: Paternity establishment under state law; due process/equal protection under 14th Amendment; see Clark v. Jeter, 486 U.S. 456 (1988) (statute of limitations for paternity claims).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法以14th Amendment平等保护为基础，非婚生子女享有与婚生同等权利；中国法民法典第1071条明确同等权利；US法paternity establishment依州法，有statute of limitations争议（Clark v. Jeter）；中国法以血缘推定为主。

fact_summary: 一方在婚姻期间隐藏、转移夫妻共同财产，离婚时另一方要求少分或不分。One spouse concealed or transferred marital property during marriage; the other requested unequal division upon divorce.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1092条，隐藏、转移共同财产的一方，离婚分割财产时可少分或不分。
us_claim: Equitable distribution with marital misconduct consideration under state law; some states allow fault-based property division; see also Uniform Marriage and Divorce Act (UMDA) § 307. PENDING_VERIFICATION
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国法明确对隐藏财产方可少分或不分，US法多数州实行equitable distribution，部分州考虑marital misconduct；但pure no-fault state（如California community property）不考虑过错；中国法对财产隐瞒有更直接法律后果。

fact_summary: 夫妻双方均为美国公民，在中国结婚后回美国起诉离婚。Both spouses are US citizens, married in China, filed for divorce in the US.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1076条，协议离婚需到婚姻登记机关申请；若诉讼离婚，依中国法院管辖。
us_claim: Divorce jurisdiction under state law (domicile/residency requirements); foreign marriage recognition under full faith and credit; see Williams v. North Carolina, 317 U.S. 287 (1942).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法以domicile/residency为离婚管辖基础，承认foreign marriage；中国法以婚姻登记地或被告住所地为管辖；US法对foreign divorce judgment承认依full faith and credit，国际divorce jurisdiction conflict依comity处理。

fact_summary: 养父母虐待被收养儿童，生父母要求解除收养关系。Adoptive parents abused the adopted child; biological parents requested termination of adoption.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1114条，收养人不履行抚养义务或有虐待、遗弃等侵害未成年养子女合法权益行为的，送养人有权要求解除收养关系。
us_claim: Termination of parental rights under state law; best interests of the child standard; ICPC 45 U.S.C. § 5701 for interstate placements; see Santosky v. Kramer, 455 U.S. 745 (1982).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法以Santosky v. Kramer要求clear and convincing evidence标准终止parental rights，中国法以虐待/不履行义务为解除条件；US法ICPC规范跨州收养，中国法收养须经民政部门登记；best interests of the child为US法核心标准。

fact_summary: 妻子因丈夫家暴申请保护令，并要求离婚及赔偿。Wife sought protection order, divorce, and damages due to husband's domestic violence.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1079条（家暴为法定离婚事由）、第1091条（离婚损害赔偿）；反家庭暴力法第23条（人身安全保护令）。
us_claim: Domestic violence protection under state law; VAWA 18 U.S.C. § 2261 (interstate domestic violence); divorce fault grounds in some states. See U.S. v. Morrison, 529 U.S. 598 (2000) (VAWA civil remedy struck down).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国法以反家暴法人身安全保护令与民法典离婚损害赔偿并行，US法以州法DVPO为主，VAWA联邦刑事条款有限；Morrison案后VAWA civil remedy被推翻，US法州法主导；中国法有专门反家暴法，US法无统一联邦民事保护框架。

fact_summary: 父亲因母亲再婚，要求变更子女监护权。Father sought modification of child custody due to mother's remarriage.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1084条，离婚后父母对子女仍有抚养、教育、保护的权利和义务；变更监护权需符合子女最佳利益。
us_claim: Custody modification under state law; best interests of the child standard; Palmore v. Sidoti, 466 U.S. 429 (1984) (racial bias impermissible in custody decisions).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法以Palmore v. Sidoti禁止custody decision中的racial classification，中国法以子女利益与生活环境稳定性为考量；US法best interests standard依州法差异大，中国法以父母协议与法院裁量并行；remarriage本身通常不构成custody change basis。

fact_summary: 祖父母要求探视孙子，父母以影响教育为由拒绝。Grandparents requested visitation with grandchildren; parents refused citing educational interference.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1086条，离婚后不直接抚养子女的父或母有探望权；祖父母探视无法律明文依据，但司法实践中可酌情支持。
us_claim: Grandparent visitation under state statutes; Troxel v. Granville, 530 U.S. 57 (2000) (parental rights presumption; Washington grandparent visitation statute unconstitutional as applied).
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: US法Troxel案确立parental rights presumption，grandparent visitation受严格限制；中国法民法典未明确祖父母探视权，但实践中部分法院支持；US法以fundamental parental rights为优先，中国法以家庭伦理与亲情联系为考量。

fact_summary: 配偶一方在婚姻存续期间与他人同居，另一方要求离婚损害赔偿。Spouse cohabited with another during marriage; other spouse sought divorce damages.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1091条，有下列情形之一导致离婚的，无过错方有权请求损害赔偿：（二）与他人同居。
