notes: CN法下格式条款受民法典第496-498条严格规制，侧重条款内容公平性与提示说明义务；US法下UCC §2-302及Restatement §211更强调程序性与实质不公平的双重判断，reasonable expectations理论可扩展保护范围；HK普通法传统下Cap 71与Cap 458形成分层控制，但exemption clause在商事合同中保留更多效力空间。三法域核心分歧在于：CN以法定无效为直接后果，US以unconscionability为衡平工具，HK以普通法解释规则与成文法介入并行。

fact_summary: 因政府突发环保禁令，原材料价格暴涨300%，供应商主张情势变更请求调整合同价格，买方拒绝并要求继续按原价履行/已验证:情势变更vs frustration冲突
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第533条，合同成立后发生不可预见的重大变化且不属于商业风险，继续履行显失公平的，当事人可请求法院或仲裁机构变更或解除合同；合同编通则解释第32条进一步明确排除当事人事先约定排除适用。
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 265, frustration of purpose discharges remaining duties if a party's principal purpose is substantially frustrated without fault by an event the non-occurrence of which was a basic assumption; see also UCC § 2-615 on commercial impracticability where performance becomes commercially impracticable. Under Transatlantic Financing Corp. v. United States, 363 F.2d 312 (D.C. Cir. 1966), mere cost increase is generally insufficient. Under Taylor v. Caldwell (1863) 3 B & S 826, destruction of subject matter excuses performance. In US, if frustration is only temporary, obligations are suspended rather than discharged per § 269.
hk_claim: HK adopts the English common law doctrine of frustration as restated in Davis Contractors Ltd v. Fareham UDC [1956] AC 696; the contract is automatically discharged and parties' primary obligations cease. Residual claims are handled under the Law Reform (Frustrated Contracts) Act 1943 (UK), which HK courts have adopted as persuasive. Unlike CN, there is no judicial power to merely adjust the contract terms—only discharge is available.
notes: 三法域对同一事实（环保禁令导致价格暴涨）产生截然不同的法律后果：CN法下法院可变更合同（民法典第533条），保留交易关系；US法下若仅属成本增加则通常不构成impracticability（Transatlantic Financing），但极端情况下可能触发UCC §2-615或Restatement §261的免责；HK法下合同自动解除，法院无变更权。核心差异在于：CN采变更优先模式，US采免责与风险分配模式，HK采自动解除模式。PENDING_VERIFICATION: HK是否正式适用1943 Act需进一步确认。

fact_summary: 电商平台在未经用户同意的情况下将用户协议中的仲裁条款变更为诉讼条款，用户继续使用服务，争议发生后平台主张新条款有效/已验证:单方变更与合同变更的冲突
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第543-544条，合同变更须经当事人协商一致；若单方变更且未以合理方式提示说明，该变更对对方不发生效力。电子合同条款变更须符合《电子商务法》第49条的通知与明示同意要求。
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 59, a purported acceptance that varies the terms is a counteroffer rather than an acceptance; under common law, unilateral modification without fresh consideration is generally unenforceable under the pre-existing duty rule, though modern courts increasingly apply the doctrine of promissory estoppel (Restatement § 90) to enforce modifications if the promisee has relied. See UCC § 2-209 for no-oral-modification clauses in goods contracts.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, a contract can only be varied by mutual agreement supported by fresh consideration or by a deed under seal; unilateral variation is ineffective unless the variation is executed under deed or the promisee has relied to its detriment such that promissory estoppel may apply (Central London Property Trust v. High Trees House [1947] KB 130, adopted in HK). The Contracts (Rights of Third Parties) Ordinance (Cap 623) does not alter this principle for bilateral contract modification.
notes: 三法域对单方变更的处理路径不同：CN法下要求协商一致（民法典第543条）并强调电子合同的特殊提示说明义务；US法下traditional common law要求新对价，但promissory estoppel（Restatement §90）和UCC §2-209在现代交易中提供了变通；HK普通法下原则上要求新对价或deed，但promissory estoppel（High Trees原则）已获采纳。核心差异在于：CN以法定程序正义为保护机制，US以estoppel理论填补对价缺口，HK以普通法传统与衡平法原则结合处理。

fact_summary: 买方在合同签订后发现卖方隐瞒标的房屋曾发生非正常死亡事件，主张解除合同并要求返还定金/已验证:欺诈与信息披露义务冲突
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第148条，一方以欺诈手段使对方在违背真实意思的情况下实施民事法律行为，受欺诈方有权请求法院或仲裁机构撤销。若隐瞒'凶宅'信息构成欺诈，买方可撤销合同并主张返还财产及损害赔偿。
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 164, a contract is voidable if the assent was induced by a fraudulent or material misrepresentation; the buyer may rescind and recover restitution. Under the common law duty to disclose, sellers of real property generally have no duty to disclose stigmatized property facts unless asked, but some jurisdictions recognize a duty to disclose material facts known to the seller and unknown to the buyer (Stambovsky v. Ackley, 572 N.Y.S.2d 672 (App. Div. 1991)).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, a contract induced by fraudulent misrepresentation is voidable at the party's option; the buyer may rescind and claim damages in tort for deceit (Derry v. Peek (1889) 14 App Cas 337). There is no general duty to disclose in contracts of utmost good faith; however, in certain consumer or fiduciary contexts, silence may constitute misrepresentation if there is a duty to speak. HK has not adopted the 'stigmatized property' exception to the general caveat emptor rule in real estate transactions.
notes: 三法域对'凶宅'信息披露义务立场不同：CN法下隐瞒凶宅信息通常构成欺诈（民法典第148条），买受人可撤销合同；US法下普通法采caveat emptor，但部分州如纽约在Stambovsky案中承认特定情形下的披露义务；HK普通法下仍坚持caveat emptor，未发展出stigmatized property例外。核心差异在于：CN以诚实信用原则课以卖方积极披露义务，US和HK普通法下以buyer beware为原则，仅在特定例外中突破。

fact_summary: 买方预付定金后，卖方因第三方原因（供应商破产）无法交付货物，买方要求卖方承担违约责任并赔偿可得利益损失/已验证:第三人原因与合同严守
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第593条，当事人一方因第三人的原因造成违约的，应当依法向对方承担违约责任；当事人一方和第三人之间的纠纷，依照法律规定或者按照约定处理。买方有权要求卖方继续履行或赔偿损失，包括合同履行后可以获得的利益（民法典第584条）。
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 261, a party's duty to perform is discharged if performance is made impracticable by an unforeseen event, but the risk of third-party supply failure is generally allocated to the seller unless the contract provides otherwise. Under UCC § 2-615, a seller may be excused from delivery if performance is rendered impracticable by a failure of presupposed conditions. However, the seller must allocate production fairly among customers. The buyer's expectation damages (Restatement § 347) may be recoverable unless the excuse is established.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the doctrine of frustration applies only to supervening events making performance impossible or radically different; third-party supply failure generally does not excuse performance unless the contract contains a force majeure clause or the parties expressly allocated that risk. The seller remains liable for breach, and the buyer may claim damages for loss of the bargain (the expectation measure), subject to the duty to mitigate. See British Movietonews v. London & District Cinemas [1952] AC 166.
notes: 三法域对第三人原因违约的处理存在结构性差异：CN法下（民法典第593条）严格坚持合同相对性，第三人原因不构成免责事由；US法下UCC §2-615可能免责但要求满足impracticability要件，且seller须承担risk allocation的举证责任；HK普通法下第三人破产一般不构成frustration，但若合同有force majeure条款则依约定。核心差异在于：CN以合同严守为绝对原则，US以risk allocation与impracticability为衡平工具，HK以合同约定与普通法frustration为双重框架。

fact_summary: 合同双方约定违约金为合同总价的30%，一方违约后主张违约金过高请求法院调减，另一方主张应严格按约定执行/已验证:违约金调整与合同自由冲突
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第585条，约定的违约金过分高于造成的损失的，人民法院或者仲裁机构可以根据当事人的请求予以适当减少。违约金调整以实际损失为基础，兼顾合同履行情况、当事人过错程度及预期利益等因素。
us_claim: Under common law, liquidated damages must be a reasonable forecast of anticipated harm at the time of contract formation; if the stipulated sum is a penalty (i.e., disproportionate to the actual or anticipated loss), courts will not enforce it and limit recovery to actual damages. See Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 356; Dunlop Pneumatic Tyre Co. v. New Garage & Motor Co. [1915] AC 79 (UK). In US, the modern approach looks at whether the sum is a genuine pre-estimate of loss, and the parties' burden of proof varies by jurisdiction. See also California Civil Code § 1675 et seq. for statutory penalties rules.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the Dunlop test applies: a liquidated damages clause is enforceable if it represents a genuine pre-estimate of loss; if it is a penalty (punitive or disproportionate), it is unenforceable. The courts will not reduce the amount as in CN but will simply strike down the penalty and award common law damages. See Philips Hong Kong Ltd v. A-G of Hong Kong (1993) 61 Build LR 41. The Court of Final Appeal in Cavendish Square Holding BV v. Talal El Makdessi [2015] UKSC 67 (Persuasive in HK) broadened the test to include legitimate interests beyond mere compensation.
notes: 三法域对违约金条款的司法干预逻辑不同：CN法下（民法典第585条）法院可主动调减过高违约金，采'调整模式'；US普通法下若构成penalty则条款无效，法院不调整而改判actual damages，采'无效模式'；HK普通法下传统采Dunlop test，采'无效模式'，但Cavendish案（UKSC 67）已扩展为'合法利益模式'。核心差异在于：CN法院有裁量权调整金额，US和HK法院仅判断是否可执行，不调整数额。PENDING_VERIFICATION: Cavendish原则在HK的采纳程度。

fact_summary: 网络服务提供商在格式条款中约定其可随时单方修改服务条款，用户继续使用即视为接受，用户起诉主张该条款无效/已验证:单方修改权与consumer protection
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第497条，提供格式条款一方不合理地免除或减轻其责任、加重对方责任、限制对方主要权利的条款无效。此外，《电子商务法》第34条要求平台修改服务协议须提前公示并征求意见。单方修改权条款在消费者合同中通常因显失公平而被认定无效。
us_claim: Under US law, browsewrap and clickwrap agreements are generally enforceable if users have reasonable notice of terms (Register.com v. Verio, 356 F.3d 393 (2d Cir. 2004)); however, unilateral modification clauses are subject to unconscionability review under UCC § 2-302 and common law fairness principles. Courts generally enforce modification clauses if the contract expressly permits it and the user receives notice, but some states require mutual assent to material changes (Nguyen v. Barnes & Noble, 763 F.3d 1171 (9th Cir. 2014)).
hk_claim: Under HK common law, a unilateral modification clause in a standard form contract is enforceable if it was brought to the party's attention and the contract expressly reserves the right to modify. However, the Unconscionable Contracts Ordinance (Cap 458) and the Unfair Contract Terms Ordinance (Cap 71) may render such clauses void in consumer contracts. The Control of Exemption Clauses Ordinance (Cap 71) does not apply to core terms, but the Unconscionable Contracts Ordinance provides broader protection.
notes: 三法域对格式合同中单方修改权的态度存在consumer protection梯度差异：CN法下（民法典第497条、电子商务法第34条）对平台单方修改权施加严格的公示与征求意见程序，倾向于直接否定consumer context下的单方修改权；US法下browsewrap/clickwrap协议经notice检验后通常有效，unilateral modification clause受unconscionability审查，但 enforceability 较高；HK法下Cap 458与Cap 71提供分层保护，consumer protection弱于CN但强于普通商事合同。核心差异在于：CN以法定程序控制为主，US以notice与unconscionability审查为主，HK以普通法validity与成文法consumer protection并行。

fact_summary: 融资租赁公司作为出租人在承租人未按时支付租金时，主张解除合同并收回租赁物，同时要求承租人支付全部未付租金及违约金/已验证:融资租赁合同解除与加速到期
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第746-752条，承租人未支付租金达一定期限或经催告后在合理期限内仍不支付的，出租人可以请求支付全部租金或解除合同、收回租赁物。若收回租赁物的价值不足以弥补损失的，出租人可继续追偿（民法典第758条）。
us_claim: Under US law, Article 2A of the UCC governs leases, including finance leases. Under UCC § 2A-525, the lessor may recover the goods if the lessee is in default. Under UCC § 2A-529, the lessor may recover the present value of future rent payments plus incidental damages, subject to mitigation. The lessor must give notice of default and an opportunity to cure under § 2A-523. Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 243, the aggrieved party may suspend performance and seek damages for total breach.
hk_claim: Under HK common law, the law of leasing is governed by the common law of contract and property rather than a specific statute. The lessor's remedies depend on the contract terms and the common law right of repossession under the hire-purchase agreement or conditional sale. The Consumer Credit Ordinance (Cap 623) does not apply to pure commercial leases. The lessor may sue for arrears and recover the goods if the lease provides for it; there is no statutory acceleration clause, and the lessor must mitigate damages. See The Onward Building Society v. Smithson [1893] 1 Ch 1.
notes: 三法域对融资租赁违约的救济体系差异显著：CN法下（民法典第746-752条）有专门的融资租赁合同章，明文规定出租人可在全部租金与解除合同收回租赁物之间选择，并允许继续追偿不足部分；US法下UCC Article 2A以present value计算damages，并要求notice与cure机会；HK普通法下无专门融资租赁成文法，依赖合同条款与普通法repossession，consumer protection由Cap 623补充。核心差异在于：CN有成文法专门规制，US有UCC Article 2A统一规则，HK以普通法合同解释为主。PENDING_VERIFICATION: HK是否已专门立法规制融资租赁。

fact_summary: 甲乙双方约定以'尽量完成'为履行标准，后甲方主张乙方未达预期效果构成违约，乙方主张该条款仅为尽力义务而非结果义务/已验证:best efforts vs result obligation
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第509条，当事人应当按照约定全面履行自己的义务。若合同条款明确约定的是'尽力'或'尽量'标准，通常解释为以合理努力为履行标准而非结果保证。但若根据合同目的、交易习惯等可推定为结果义务，则未达成结果即构成违约。
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 228, an express contractual term requiring 'best efforts' imposes an obligation to act with good faith and diligence in the performance of the contract but does not guarantee a particular result. See Bloor v. Falstaff Brewing Corp., 601 F.2d 609 (2d Cir. 1979). If the contract uses language that can be interpreted as a results-oriented obligation, courts may construe it as a condition or warranty rather than a best-efforts covenant.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the interpretation of 'best endeavours' or 'reasonable endeavours' depends on the context and the specific wording of the contract. The courts have held that 'best endeavours' requires the party to take all reasonable steps to achieve the objective, but does not require the party to sacrifice its own commercial interests (IBM United Kingdom v. Rockware Glass [1983] FSR 330). 'Reasonable endeavours' is a less stringent standard than 'best endeavours'.
notes: 三法域对'best efforts'类条款的解释标准不同：CN法下（民法典第509条）根据合同目的与交易习惯综合判断，可因合同目的推定为结果义务；US法下Restatement §228与Bloor案明确best efforts不保证结果，仅要求good faith diligence；HK普通法下区分best endeavours与reasonable endeavours，前者要求all reasonable steps但不牺牲自身商业利益，后者标准更低。核心差异在于：CN解释更灵活可推定为结果义务，US与HK更严格区分efforts与result guarantee，HK在best endeavours与reasonable endeavours之间还有中间层次。

fact_summary: 合同双方约定争议解决方式为'向有管辖权的法院起诉'，但未明确具体法院，一方在己方住所地法院起诉，另一方提出管辖权异议/已验证:协议管辖不明确
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第34条及《民事诉讼法》第35条，合同当事人可以书面协议选择被告住所地、合同履行地、合同签订地、原告住所地、标的物所在地等与争议有实际联系地点的人民法院管辖。若协议管辖约定不明确，法院应依据法定管辖规则确定管辖法院（民诉法第24条）。
us_claim: Under US federal and state law, a forum selection clause is enforceable if it is clear and reasonable, but a vague clause may be interpreted against the drafter or deemed unenforceable. Under the Restatement (Second) of Conflict of Laws § 80, a forum selection clause is generally valid if the chosen forum has a reasonable basis. Under Bremen v. Zapata Off-Shore Co., 407 U.S. 1 (1972), forum selection clauses are presumptively valid in federal admiralty and international cases. State law varies; some states apply a 'reasonable and convenient' standard.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Civil Procedure Rules (Cap 4A) allow parties to agree on jurisdiction by contract. If the agreement is ambiguous, the court will interpret it contra proferentem or apply the common law rule that the clause is enforceable if it clearly indicates the parties' intention. If no clear intention is discernible, the court applies the common law jurisdictional rules based on the defendant's residence or the place of the cause of action (Spiliada Maritime Corp v. Cansulex Ltd [1987] AC 460, adopted in HK).
notes: 三法域对模糊管辖条款的处理方式不同：CN法下（民诉法第35条）要求明确选择，否则依法定管辖规则；US法下（Bremen v. Zapata）forum selection clause presumptively valid but vague clauses may be struck down or interpreted against drafter；HK法下（Spiliada原则）先解释合同意图，若无法确定则依传统管辖规则。核心差异在于：CN以法定连接点为刚性约束，US以reasonableness与drafter burden为检验标准，HK以合同解释优先、传统管辖为补充。

fact_summary: 甲方向乙方作出口头承诺将续租商铺，乙方据此投入大量装修费用，后甲方拒绝续租，乙方主张甲方应赔偿装修损失/已验证:promissory estoppel不对称
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 90, a promise which the promisor should reasonably expect to induce action or forbearance and which does induce such action or forbearance is binding if injustice can be avoided only by enforcement of the promise. The doctrine of promissory estoppel allows enforcement of promises without consideration. See Ricketts v. Scothorn, 77 N.W. 365 (Neb. 1898); Hoffman v. Red Owl Stores, 26 Wis. 2d 683 (1965).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, promissory estoppel is recognised as an exception to the consideration requirement, but it is generally used as a 'shield' rather than a 'sword'—it can be used defensively to prevent a party from going back on a promise, but cannot generally be used as an independent cause of action to enforce a gratuitous promise (Combe v. Combe [1951] 2 KB 215; Central London Property Trust v. High Trees House [1947] KB 130). Recent academic debate suggests that an offensive use might be possible in limited circumstances, but this remains unsettled in HK.
notes: 核心不对称：US法下promissory estoppel（Restatement §90）可作为独立诉因（sword）要求执行无对价承诺，乙方可直接请求赔偿；HK普通法下promissory estoppel传统上仅作为防御工具（shield），乙方难以直接起诉要求执行口头承诺；CN法下无promissory estoppel的对应制度，诚实信用原则（民法典第7条）与缔约过失责任（民法典第500条）仅提供有限保护，无法直接强制执行无对价承诺。三法域差异的法理基础在于：US以reliance interest保护为核心，HK以contractual consideration原则为边界，CN以诚信原则与缔约过失为补充救济。

fact_summary: 房东在租赁期届满前向租户表示不会涨租金，租户据此续签一年，后房东要求涨租30%，租户主张房东应受先前表示约束/已验证:promissory estoppel续租场景
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 90 and the doctrine of promissory estoppel, a landlord's promise not to raise rent, if reasonably relied upon by the tenant to their detriment (e.g., forgoing alternative housing), is enforceable to prevent injustice. See also Feinman, 'Promissory Estoppel and Judicial Method,' 97 Harv. L. Rev. 678 (1984). The tenant may recover reliance damages or expectation damages depending on the jurisdiction.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the landlord's promise is unenforceable without consideration because it is a bare promise to vary the terms of a lease. The tenant cannot use promissory estoppel as a sword to enforce the promise; the tenant can only use it as a shield if the landlord sues for the increased rent. See Central London Property Trust v. High Trees House [1947] KB 130 (adopted in HK); Combe v. Combe [1951] 2 KB 215. The tenant's remedy is limited to defensive reliance.
notes: 核心不对称：US法下promissory estoppel可作为独立诉因要求执行不涨租承诺；HK法下仅能防御性地使用estoppel（shield），不能主动要求执行；CN法下无estoppel对应制度，但可能依据诚实信用原则（民法典第7条）与不当得利（民法典第985条）获得有限救济。三法域差异的法理基础在于：US以reliance-based liability扩展合同责任，HK坚持consideration doctrine为合同变更是核心，CN以诚信原则与法定救济体系为替代框架。

fact_summary: 软件公司A向客户B口头承诺将免费提供三年升级服务，B据此放弃购买竞争对手产品，后A拒绝提供升级，B主张A应履行/已验证:promissory estoppel软件服务
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 90 and § 139, a promise to perform an obligation under the Statute of Frauds (or otherwise without consideration) is enforceable if the promisee has reasonably relied on it to their detriment. The measure of damages may be limited to reliance damages rather than expectation damages. See Hoffman v. Red Owl Stores, 26 Wis. 2d 683 (1965); Walton Stores v. Maher (1988) 164 CLR 387 (Australian, but influential in US).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, a gratuitous promise of future services is not enforceable without consideration. Promissory estoppel cannot be used as a sword to compel performance of a gratuitous promise; it is a shield only. See Combe v. Combe [1951] 2 KB 215; Mobil Oil Australia v. Victoria (2002) 211 CLR 1 (Persuasive in HK). The customer would have no claim against the software company for breach of the oral promise.
notes: 核心不对称：US法下promissory estoppel（Restatement §90）可强制执行无对价的口头服务承诺，detrimental reliance即可触发；HK法下无对价承诺不可执行，estoppel仅能防御；CN法下无estoppel对应制度，但可能依据缔约过失（民法典第500条）或不当得利（民法典第985条）获得有限救济。三法域差异的法理基础在于：US以reliance interest保护为合同法的扩展功能，HK以consideration doctrine维护合同形式主义，CN以侵权责任与法定救济填补estoppel缺口。

fact_summary: 建筑承包商在投标中向业主承诺使用特定品牌钢材，中标后未经同意改用替代品，业主主张承包商违反合同/已验证:specification vs substitution
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第509条、第577条，当事人应当按照约定全面履行义务；未按约定使用指定材料构成违约，业主有权要求修理、重作、更换或减少报酬，并赔偿损失。若替代品质量不符合约定，业主还可主张瑕疵担保责任（民法典第617条）。
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 237, a party's failure to render or offer performance that is a material part of the contract gives the aggrieved party the right to suspend performance. Under UCC § 2-601 (perfect tender rule), if goods fail to conform in any respect, the buyer may reject the whole. Under Jacob & Youngs v. Kent, 230 N.Y. 239 (1921), if the deviation is trivial and not a material breach, the buyer may only deduct damages rather than reject or demand performance. Under the Spearin doctrine, an owner who specifies materials implicitly warrants their suitability.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, a contractor must perform the contract in accordance with its specifications. If the contractor substitutes materials without consent, this is a breach of contract. The owner may claim damages for the difference in value or cost of cure. However, if the substitution is minor and does not affect the overall quality or value of the work, the owner may only recover nominal damages or the cost of rectification. See Trollope & Colls Ltd v. North West Metropolitan Regional Hospital Board [1973] 1 WLR 601; Hudson's Building and Engineering Contracts (13th ed.).
notes: 三法域差异相对较小但仍有重要区别：US法下Jacob & Youngs v. Kent案确立了'substantial performance'原则，轻微偏差仅减扣损害赔偿而非根本违约；CN法下（民法典第577条）更强调'全面履行'，替代品通常构成违约；HK普通法下若substitution minor则仅赔偿rectification cost。但US的perfect tender rule（UCC §2-601）在货物合同中更严格。核心差异在于：US有substantial performance衡平，CN强调严格履行，HK普通法介于两者之间。positive_control=True: 三法域在此场景下均承认违约，但救济程度不同。

fact_summary: 买方在收到货物后30天内未提出质量异议，卖方主张买方已丧失质量异议权，买方主张货物存在隐蔽瑕疵且 seller knew about it/已验证:inspection duty vs hidden defect
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第620-623条，买受人收到标的物时应当在约定的检验期限内检验；没有约定检验期限的，应当及时检验。买受人未在合理期限内通知出卖人的，视为标的物的数量或质量符合约定。但若出卖人知道或应当知道提供的标的物不符合约定，买受人不受通知时间限制（民法典第618条）。
us_claim: Under UCC § 2-602, the buyer must reject goods within a reasonable time after delivery or after the defect is discovered; failure to do so results in acceptance. Under UCC § 2-607, the buyer must give notice of breach within a reasonable time after discovering or should have discovered the breach. However, if the seller knew of the non-conformity and failed to disclose it, the buyer is not precluded from recovery. See UCC § 2-608 on revocation of acceptance for latent defects. Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 251 also addresses the effect of acceptance on remedies.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the Sale of Goods Ordinance (Cap 26) applies. Under Cap 26, § 35 (as amended), the buyer is not deemed to have accepted the goods until they have had a reasonable opportunity to examine them. Under § 36, acceptance of goods by the buyer does not of itself impair any other remedy for breach. However, the buyer must act within a reasonable time. If the seller knew of the defect and concealed it, the buyer may have a claim for deceit or breach of the statutory implied condition of satisfactory quality under § 16.
notes: 三法域存在不对称但基础逻辑一致：US法下UCC §2-602/2-607要求合理期限内通知，但seller knowledge例外；HK法下Cap 26 §35/§36要求合理检验机会，seller knowledge可能触发deceit claim；CN法下民法典第618条明确seller knew情形下不受通知期限限制。核心差异在于：CN以法定条文明确规定seller knowledge例外，US和HK依赖普通法与UCC的case-by-case解释，但HK还保留了deceit这一额外侵权诉因。positive_control=True: 三法域在seller knew of defect时均允许买方主张权利。

fact_summary: 卖方交付的货物数量短少，买方主张减少价款并要求赔偿损失/已验证:partial delivery mapped
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第582条、第583条，履行不符合约定的，受损害方可以合理选择请求对方承担修理、重作、更换、退货、减少价款或报酬等违约责任；造成损失的，可请求赔偿。
us_claim: Under UCC § 2-601, if goods fail to conform in any respect, the buyer may reject the whole, accept the whole, or accept any commercial unit and reject the rest. Under UCC § 2-717, the buyer may deduct all or any part of the damages from the price. Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 348, the aggrieved party may recover damages for loss in value or cost of completion.
hk_claim: Under the Sale of Goods Ordinance (Cap 26), § 30, where the seller delivers a quantity less than contracted, the buyer may reject the goods, but if the buyer accepts the short delivery, they must pay at the contract rate. Under § 31, the buyer may also claim damages for non-delivery of the shortfall. See also § 52 on remedies for breach of condition.
notes: 三法域高度对应：CN法下（民法典第582-583条）买方可在减少价款与损害赔偿之间选择；US法下（UCC §2-601, §2-717）buyer可reject或deduct damages；HK法下（Cap 26 §30, §31）buyer可reject short delivery或claim damages。核心法理一致：partial delivery构成breach of condition，buyer享有补救选择权。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 买方未按约定时间支付货款，卖方主张解除合同并要求买方赔偿逾期付款损失/已验证:late payment mapped
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第563条、第585条，当事人一方迟延履行主要债务，经催告后在合理期限内仍未履行的，对方可以解除合同；可请求支付违约金或赔偿逾期付款损失。
us_claim: Under UCC § 2-610, if a party repudiates the contract, the aggrieved party may await performance, resort to a remedy for breach, or suspend performance. Under UCC § 2-709, the seller may recover the price of goods accepted or conforming goods lost or damaged. Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 243, the aggrieved party may treat the contract as broken and seek damages for total breach. Under Hadley v. Baxendale (1854) 9 Ex 341, damages are limited to foreseeable loss.
hk_claim: Under the Sale of Goods Ordinance (Cap 26), § 10, unless otherwise agreed, the price is payable on delivery. Under § 49, the seller may sue the buyer for the price if the goods have been accepted or property has passed. Under general contract law, the seller may terminate for repudiatory breach if the buyer's failure to pay is a breach of condition. See Hong Kong Fir Shipping Co v. Kawasaki Kisen Kaisha [1962] 2 QB 26 (HK courts apply this test).
notes: 三法域高度对应：CN法下（民法典第563条）late payment经催告可解除；US法下（UCC §2-610, §2-709）可追索price或treat as breach；HK法下（Cap 26 §49, Hong Kong Fir test）可sue for price或terminate for repudiatory breach。核心法理一致：payment obligation是fundamental term，breach达到一定严重程度可触发termination。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 卖方交付的货物存在质量瑕疵，买方在检验期内提出异议并要求退货/已验证:defective goods rejection mapped
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第617条、第582条，出卖人交付的标的物不符合质量要求的，买受人可依据约定或法定要求承担违约责任；买受人可请求修理、更换、退货或减少价款。
us_claim: Under UCC § 2-602, the buyer may reject goods if they fail to conform in any respect, provided the rejection is made within a reasonable time and the buyer seasonably notifies the seller. Under UCC § 2-608, the buyer may revoke acceptance if the non-conformity substantially impairs the value of the goods. Under UCC § 2-601 (perfect tender rule), the buyer may reject for any non-conformity.
hk_claim: Under the Sale of Goods Ordinance (Cap 26), § 16 implies a condition of satisfactory quality and fitness for purpose. Under § 35, the buyer may reject goods if they do not conform to the contract. Under § 36, acceptance of goods by the buyer does not impair other remedies unless the buyer has accepted the goods and the breach is of a warranty rather than a condition. See Rogers v. Parish [1987] QB 933 (Persuasive in HK).
notes: 三法域高度对应：CN法下（民法典第617条、第582条）质量瑕疵可请求退货、更换等；US法下（UCC §2-602, §2-608）buyer可reject或revoke acceptance；HK法下（Cap 26 §16, §35）implied condition of quality允许rejection。核心法理一致：quality warranty是contractual condition，non-conformity赋予buyer rejection right。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 买方在订立合同后得知卖方无货物所有权，主张合同无效并要求返还已付价款/已验证:title defect voidable mapped
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第597条，因出卖人未取得处分权致使标的物所有权不能转移的，买受人可以解除合同并请求出卖人承担违约责任。合同本身不因出卖人无处分权而无效（区分原则）。
us_claim: Under UCC § 2-312, the seller warrants good title and quiet possession. Under UCC § 2-403, a person with voidable title has power to transfer a good title to a good faith purchaser for value. Under the common law, a seller without title cannot convey what they do not have (nemo dat quod non habet), and the buyer may rescind the contract and recover the price. See the Uniform Commercial Code's balancing of nemo dat and bona fide purchaser protections.
hk_claim: Under the Sale of Goods Ordinance (Cap 26), § 12 implies a condition that the seller has the right to sell the goods. If the seller does not have title, the buyer may treat the contract as repudiated and recover the price paid. Under § 23, a person with voidable title may transfer good title to a bona fide purchaser for value without notice. The general principle is nemo dat quod non habet, subject to statutory exceptions. See Bishopsgate Motor Finance Corp v. Transport Brakes [1949] 1 KB 322 (Persuasive in HK).
notes: 三法域高度对应：CN法下（民法典第597条）区分处分权与合同效力，buyer可解除合同；US法下（UCC §2-312, §2-403）warranty of title + nemo dat例外；HK法下（Cap 26 §12, §23）implied condition of title + nemo dat例外。核心法理一致：seller must have title or right to sell，failure is fundamental breach。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 买方在合同履行期限届满前明确表示将不履行合同，卖方主张买方预期违约并要求赔偿全部损失/已验证:anticipatory repudiation mapped
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第578条，当事人一方明确表示或以自己的行为表明不履行合同义务的，对方可以在履行期限届满前请求其承担违约责任。
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 253, where a party's repudiation is a total breach, the aggrieved party may sue immediately for damages. Under UCC § 2-610, if a party repudiates, the aggrieved party may await performance for a commercially reasonable time, resort to a remedy for breach, or suspend performance. Under Hochster v. De La Tour (1853) 2 E & B 678, the aggrieved party need not wait for the date of performance.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the doctrine of anticipatory breach is well-established. Where a party repudiates the contract before the time for performance, the innocent party may either accept the repudiation and sue for damages immediately, or affirm the contract and wait for performance. See Hochster v. De La Tour (1853) 2 E & B 678 (applied in HK); The Mihalis Angelos [1971] 1 QB 164. The measure of damages is the loss of the bargain as at the date of acceptance of repudiation.
notes: 三法域高度对应：CN法下（民法典第578条）明确承认预期违约；US法下（Restatement §253, UCC §2-610）采Hochster原则；HK法下（Hochster v. De La Tour, The Mihalis Angelos）同样适用anticipatory breach。核心法理一致：repudiation使innocent party免于wait until performance date。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 合同因不可抗力无法履行，一方主张解除合同并免除全部责任，另一方主张不可抗力仅导致部分不能履行/已验证:force majeure partial impossibility mapped
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第563条、第590条，因不可抗力致使不能实现合同目的，当事人可以解除合同；因不可抗力不能履行合同的，根据不可抗力的影响，部分或全部免除责任。若仅部分不能履行，应仅免除相应部分责任。
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 261, if performance is made impracticable by an event the non-occurrence of which was a basic assumption, the duty is discharged. Under § 269, if the impracticability is only temporary, the duty is suspended rather than discharged. Under UCC § 2-615, a seller may be excused from delivery but must allocate production fairly. Under § 2-616, the buyer may terminate if the non-delivery substantially impairs the value of the whole contract.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the doctrine of frustration applies only when performance is rendered impossible or radically different; temporary impossibility or partial impossibility may not discharge the contract but may suspend obligations. The Law Reform (Frustrated Contracts) Act 1943 (UK) provides for recovery of money paid and retention of benefits. If only partial performance is frustrated, the court may apportion liability. See British Movietonews v. London & District Cinemas [1952] AC 166.
notes: 三法域高度对应：CN法下（民法典第590条）根据不可抗力影响部分或全部免责；US法下（UCC §2-615, §2-616）seller须allocate production，buyer可terminate if substantially impaired；HK法下（frustration doctrine + 1943 Act）partial frustration may lead to apportionment。核心法理一致：partial impossibility triggers partial discharge rather than total termination。hard_case=True因'部分不能履行'的认定存在争议。

fact_summary: 合同未约定履行地点，卖方在卖方所在地交付货物，买方主张应在买方所在地交付/已验证:place of delivery default mapped
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第511条第3项，履行地点不明确，给付货币的，在接受货币一方所在地履行；交付不动产的，在不动产所在地履行；其他标的，在履行义务一方所在地履行。
us_claim: Under UCC § 2-308, unless otherwise agreed, the place for delivery of goods is the seller's place of business or if they have none, their residence. Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 317, the place of performance is determined by the contract or by the circumstances. Under the CISG (if applicable), Article 31 provides the default place of delivery rules for international sales.
hk_claim: Under the Sale of Goods Ordinance (Cap 26), § 29, whether it is for the buyer to take possession of the goods or for the seller to send them to the buyer depends on the contract. In the absence of agreement, the seller's place of business is the place of delivery. Under the common law of contract, if the place of performance is not specified, the court will imply a term that performance is to be at the place where the promisor is located.
notes: 三法域高度对应：CN法下（民法典第511条）'履行义务一方所在地'为默认地点；US法下（UCC §2-308）seller's place of business；HK法下（Cap 26 §29, common law）seller's place of business。核心法理一致：delivery default rule places burden on buyer to collect。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 合同因双方重大误解而订立，一方主张撤销合同/已验证:mutual mistake mapped
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第147条，基于重大误解实施的民事法律行为，行为人有权请求人民法院或仲裁机构予以撤销。
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 152, a contract is voidable if both parties are mistaken about a basic assumption on which the contract was made, and the mistake has a material effect on the agreed exchange. Under Sherwood v. Walker, 66 N.W. 1127 (Mich. 1887), a mutual mistake about a quality of the subject matter may void the contract. Under the doctrine of rescission, the parties must be restored to their pre-contract positions.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, a contract is voidable for mutual mistake if the mistake is fundamental and relates to a matter of fact essential to the agreement. The mistake must be shared by both parties and must render the subject matter of the contract essentially different from what was believed. See Bell v. Lever Bros [1932] AC 161 (UK); Great Peace Shipping v. Tsavliris [2002] QB 679 (UK, persuasive in HK). The remedy is rescission with restitution.
notes: 三法域高度对应：CN法下（民法典第147条）重大误解可撤销；US法下（Restatement §152, Sherwood v. Walker）mutual mistake voidable；HK法下（Bell v. Lever Bros, Great Peace Shipping）common law mistake voidable。核心法理一致：mutual mistake about basic assumption renders contract voidable，remedy is rescission。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 买方在合同订立后拒绝接受货物，卖方主张买方违约并要求赔偿货物差价损失/已验证:buyer's refusal to accept mapped
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第577条、第584条，当事人一方不履行合同义务或履行不符合约定的，应承担继续履行、采取补救措施或赔偿损失等违约责任；损失赔偿额应相当于因违约所造成的损失，包括合同履行后可获得的利益。
us_claim: Under UCC § 2-708, if the buyer fails to accept conforming goods, the seller may recover as damages the difference between the market price at the time and place for tender and the unpaid contract price, plus incidental damages. Under UCC § 2-710, the seller may also recover incidental damages. Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 347, the aggrieved party is entitled to expectation damages.
hk_claim: Under the Sale of Goods Ordinance (Cap 26), § 50, if the buyer wrongfully neglects or refuses to accept and pay for the goods, the seller may maintain an action against the buyer for damages for non-acceptance. Under § 51, the measure of damages is the estimated loss directly and naturally resulting in the ordinary course of events from the buyer's breach, which is prima facie the difference between the contract price and the market price at the time of refusal. See Hadley v. Baxendale (1854) 9 Ex 341.
notes: 三法域高度对应：CN法下（民法典第584条）赔偿可得利益损失；US法下（UCC §2-708）market price minus contract price + incidental damages；HK法下（Cap 26 §50, §51）difference between contract and market price。核心法理一致：non-acceptance damages以expectation interest为标准，market price差额为基本计算方法。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 合同约定的违约金为固定金额，违约后实际损失远超违约金，守约方主张应增加违约金/已验证:liquidated damages insufficient mapped
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第585条，约定的违约金低于造成的损失的，人民法院或仲裁机构可以根据当事人的请求予以增加。违约金增加后不得超过实际损失。
us_claim: Under common law, if the liquidated damages clause is a penalty (i.e., not a genuine pre-estimate of loss), it is unenforceable and the plaintiff may recover actual damages. However, if the clause is a valid liquidated damages provision, the plaintiff is generally limited to the stipulated amount. Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 356, a liquidated damages clause is enforceable if the amount is reasonable in light of the anticipated or actual harm. Under the modern trend (e.g., California Civil Code § 1675), the plaintiff may recover actual damages if the liquidated damages are insufficient only if the clause is a penalty. Some jurisdictions allow enforcement of liquidated damages clauses even if they under-compensate.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, a liquidated damages clause is a genuine pre-estimate of loss and is enforceable as the exclusive remedy for the specified breach; the plaintiff cannot recover more than the stipulated sum. This is the traditional English rule (Dunlop Pneumatic Tyre Co v. New Garage & Motor Co [1915] AC 79). However, following the UK Supreme Court's decision in Cavendish Square Holding BV v. Talal El Makdessi [2015] UKSC 67 (Persuasive in HK), the test has been expanded to include whether the clause protects a legitimate interest, and whether the sum is proportionate to that interest.
notes: 三法域存在映射但机制不同：CN法下（民法典第585条）法院可主动增加违约金，采adjustment model；US法下若条款valid则通常limit to stipulated amount，采fixed model；HK法下传统采Dunlop test固定金额，但Cavendish后扩展。核心法理差异：CN允许judicial adjustment of liquidated damages，US和HK原则上以pre-estimate为上限，不足部分需另行主张其他损失。hard_case=True因三法域对insufficient liquidated damages的处理不同。

fact_summary: 卖方交付的货物与合同约定不符，买方已使用部分货物后主张全部退货/已验证:partial acceptance mapped
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第620-621条，买受人收到标的物后应在约定检验期限内检验；买受人已支付价款、确认数量或已使用标的物的，视为已接受。但买受人仍有权就不符合约定的部分主张退货。
us_claim: Under UCC § 2-606, the buyer accepts goods if they signify acceptance after a reasonable opportunity to inspect, or fail to make an effective rejection within a reasonable time. Under UCC § 2-607, acceptance of goods by the buyer does not of itself impair any other remedy provided by the UCC for non-conformity. Under UCC § 2-608, the buyer may revoke acceptance if the non-conformity substantially impairs the value of the goods. Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 251, partial acceptance is possible if the contract is divisible.
hk_claim: Under the Sale of Goods Ordinance (Cap 26), § 35, the buyer is deemed to have accepted the goods when they intimate acceptance or do any act inconsistent with the seller's ownership after a reasonable opportunity to examine. Under § 36, acceptance of goods does not of itself impair any remedy for breach. However, if the goods are divisible, the buyer may accept conforming parts and reject non-conforming parts. See Lee v. Butler [1893] 2 QB 318 (Persuasive in HK).
notes: 三法域高度对应：CN法下（民法典第620-621条）部分使用视为部分接受，可就non-conforming部分主张退货；US法下（UCC §2-606, §2-608）可revoke acceptance if substantially impaired，partial acceptance for divisible contracts；HK法下（Cap 26 §35, §36）similar rules for partial acceptance。核心法理一致：acceptance of conforming part does not bar rejection of non-conforming part if contract is divisible。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 合同一方死亡，其继承人主张合同终止，对方主张合同应由继承人继续履行/已验证:death of party mapped
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第561条、第590条，合同一方当事人死亡，如果合同具有人身专属性，则合同终止；如果合同不具有人身专属性，其继承人应继续履行合同义务。
us_claim: Under common law, the death of a party does not automatically terminate a contract unless the contract is personal in nature (e.g., involving personal skill or services). The executor or administrator of the deceased's estate assumes the rights and obligations under the contract. See Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 262; the Uniform Probate Code (UPC) § 3-101 et seq. governs the transfer of contractual rights to the estate. Under the UCC, the death of a party does not affect the contract unless the contract is for personal services.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the death of a party does not discharge a contract unless the contract is of a personal nature. The personal representatives of the deceased may enforce the contract and are liable to perform the deceased's obligations. The Rights of Beneficiaries and Personal Representatives Ordinance (Cap 30) provides for the transfer of causes of action to the estate. However, contracts for personal services (e.g., employment, artistic performance) terminate on death.
notes: 三法域高度对应：CN法下（民法典第561条）人身专属性合同终止，非专属性合同由继承人继续；US法下（Restatement §262, UPC）estate assumes contractual rights and obligations；HK法下（Cap 30, common law）personal representatives may enforce，personal service contracts terminate on death。核心法理一致：death does not terminate non-personal contracts，estate succeeds to rights and obligations。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 合同约定了仲裁条款，一方直接向法院起诉，另一方提出管辖权异议/已验证:arbitration clause mapped
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第5条、第26条，当事人达成仲裁协议的，一方向人民法院起诉的，人民法院不予受理，但仲裁协议无效的除外。若另一方在首次开庭前提出异议，法院应驳回起诉。
us_claim: Under the Federal Arbitration Act (FAA), 9 U.S.C. § 3, a court must stay proceedings if a party requests arbitration and the court is satisfied that the issue is referable to arbitration. Under 9 U.S.C. § 4, a party may petition the court to compel arbitration. Under the US Supreme Court in AT&T Mobility v. Concepcion, 563 U.S. 333 (2011), arbitration agreements are strongly favored. Under Prima Paint v. Flood & Conklin, 388 U.S. 395 (1967), the court must compel arbitration unless the arbitration clause itself is invalid.
hk_claim: Under the Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609), § 20, a court must stay legal proceedings brought in breach of an arbitration agreement if a party requests a stay before taking any step in the proceedings. Under § 20(5), the court may refuse a stay only if the arbitration agreement is null and void, inoperative, or incapable of being performed. The Arbitration Ordinance is based on the UNCITRAL Model Law, and HK courts have a strong pro-arbitration policy. See Pacific China Holdings v. Grand Pacific Hotel [2011] 4 HKLRD 181.
notes: 三法域高度对应：CN法下（仲裁法第5条、第26条）法院应驳回起诉；US法下（FAA §3, §4, Concepcion案）strong federal policy favoring arbitration；HK法下（Cap 609 §20, Model Law basis）mandatory stay。核心法理一致：arbitration agreement ousts court jurisdiction，court must stay or dismiss proceedings unless agreement invalid。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 买方因卖方欺诈而订立合同，买方主张撤销合同并赔偿损失/已验证:fraudulent misrepresentation mapped
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第148条、第157条，一方以欺诈手段使对方违背真实意思订立的合同，受欺诈方有权请求撤销；合同被撤销后，因该行为取得的财产应予以返还，不能返还或没必要返还的应折价补偿；有过错的一方应赔偿对方损失。
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 164, if a party's manifestation of assent is induced by a fraudulent or material misrepresentation, the contract is voidable by the recipient. Under § 375, the recipient may recover restitution. Under the common law tort of deceit, the plaintiff may also recover damages for the tort independent of the contract. Under the reliance measure (Restatement § 349), the plaintiff may recover expenses incurred in reliance on the contract.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, a contract induced by fraudulent misrepresentation is voidable at the option of the innocent party. The innocent party may rescind the contract and claim damages in tort for deceit. The measure of damages is the tort measure—restitutio in integrum—rather than the contract measure. Under Derry v. Peek (1889) 14 App Cas 337, fraudulent misrepresentation requires knowledge of falsity or reckless disregard for the truth. The Misrepresentation Ordinance (Cap 284) provides additional statutory remedies for negligent and innocent misrepresentation.
notes: 三法域高度对应：CN法下（民法典第148条、第157条）欺诈可撤销+返还财产+赔偿；US法下（Restatement §164, §375）voidable + restitution + tort damages for deceit；HK法下（Cap 284, Derry v. Peek）voidable + rescission + deceit damages。核心法理一致：fraudulent misrepresentation vitiates consent，innocent party may rescind and claim damages。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 合同未约定履行期限，一方主张应立即履行，另一方主张应在合理期限内履行/已验证:time of performance mapped
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第511条第4项，履行期限不明确的，债务人可以随时履行，债权人也可以随时请求履行，但应给对方必要的准备时间。
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 240, if the time for performance is not specified, the promisor must perform within a reasonable time after the promisee's demand. Under UCC § 1-305, the parties are bound by good faith and commercial reasonableness. Under the common law, 'reasonable time' is a question of fact depending on the circumstances. See the Restatement § 240 cmt. b for the distinction between demand and notice.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, if the contract does not specify a time for performance, the law implies a term that performance must be within a reasonable time. What is reasonable depends on the circumstances, including the nature of the goods or services and the parties' conduct. See British and Commonwealth Holdings v. Quadrex [1989] QB 842 (Persuasive in HK). The promisee must generally give notice or demand before the promisor is in breach, unless the contract is for immediate performance.
notes: 三法域高度对应：CN法下（民法典第511条第4项）可随时请求但须给必要准备时间；US法下（Restatement §240, UCC §1-305）reasonable time after demand；HK法下（British and Commonwealth Holdings v. Quadrex）reasonable time implied term。核心法理一致：absence of time term implies reasonable time standard，promisee generally must give notice before breach。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 买方在合同签订后主张卖方在缔约时存在欺诈性沉默，卖方主张其无积极披露义务/已验证:fraudulent silence partial
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第500条，当事人在订立合同过程中故意隐瞒与订立合同有关的重要事实或提供虚假情况，造成对方损失的，应承担赔偿责任。但若卖方不知晓相关事实或该事实不属于重大信息，则不构成缔约过失。
us_claim: Under common law, there is generally no duty to disclose material facts unless there is a fiduciary relationship, the parties are in a special relationship of trust, or the seller actively conceals the truth. Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 161, non-disclosure is equivalent to a misrepresentation if the seller knows that disclosure would correct a mistake. However, the general rule is caveat emptor. See Stambovsky v. Ackley, 572 N.Y.S.2d 672 (App. Div. 1991) for the limited exception for stigmatized property in some jurisdictions.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the general rule is caveat emptor; there is no duty to disclose in a simple sale of goods or real estate unless there is a special relationship (e.g., fiduciary, insurance contract). However, if the seller actively conceals a defect or makes a partial disclosure that is misleading, this may constitute fraudulent misrepresentation. The Misrepresentation Ordinance (Cap 284) applies to positive misrepresentations but does not create a general duty of disclosure. See Smith v. Hughes (1871) LR 6 QB 597 (UK, persuasive in HK).
notes: 三法域部分对应：CN法下（民法典第500条）以缔约过失责任课以积极披露义务，范围较广；US法下（Restatement §161, caveat emptor）general rule无披露义务，特殊关系例外；HK法下（Cap 284, Smith v. Hughes）同样caveat emptor，active concealment例外。核心差异：CN以诚实信用原则为积极披露义务的法理基础，US和HK以caveat emptor为默认规则，仅在特定例外中突破。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 合同一方主张对方违约导致合同目的无法实现，要求解除合同/已验证:frustration of purpose partial
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第563条，当事人一方迟延履行债务或有其他违约行为致使不能实现合同目的，当事人可以解除合同。'不能实现合同目的'需达到根本违约程度。
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 265, frustration of purpose excuses performance if the principal purpose is substantially frustrated without fault by an event the non-occurrence of which was a basic assumption. Unlike the civil law 'fundamental breach' test, frustration of purpose is a narrow doctrine; mere inconvenience or reduced profitability is insufficient. See Lloyd v. Murphy, 153 P.2d 47 (Cal. 1944). Under UCC § 2-615, commercial impracticability is a related but distinct doctrine.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the frustration doctrine applies when performance becomes impossible or radically different; the threshold is high. 'Frustration of purpose' in the English sense is rarely applied because the courts require actual impossibility or a fundamental change in the nature of the obligation. The contract is automatically discharged if frustration is established. See Davis Contractors v. Fareham UDC [1956] AC 696; The Mihalis Angelos [1971] 1 QB 164.
notes: 三法域部分对应：CN法下（民法典第563条）'不能实现合同目的'为根本违约标准；US法下（Restatement §265）frustration of purpose narrowly construed，mere reduced profitability insufficient；HK法下（Davis Contractors）frustration requires impossibility or radical difference。核心差异：CN以根本违约作为解除权基础，US以frustration/impracticability为免责事由，HK以普通法frustration为自动解除机制。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 合同一方主张对方未按约定标准提供服务，要求减少报酬/已验证:inadequate service partial
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第577条、第582条，履行不符合约定的，受损害方可以请求承担修理、重作、更换、退货、减少价款或报酬等违约责任。服务质量标准以合同约定为准。
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 348, the aggrieved party may recover damages for the loss in value of the defective performance. Under the doctrine of substantial performance, if the deviation is minor, the plaintiff may only deduct the cost of completion or the diminution in value, not withhold the entire contract price. See Jacob & Youngs v. Kent, 230 N.Y. 239 (1921). Under UCC principles, if the service is part of a goods contract, the buyer may reject or accept with damages.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, if services are defective but not fundamentally breached, the client may claim damages for the diminution in value or the cost of rectification, but cannot withhold the entire contract price unless the breach is repudiatory. The courts apply the 'cost of cure' or 'difference in value' measures depending on what is reasonable. See Ruxley Electronics v. Forsyth [1996] AC 344 (UK, persuasive in HK) for the rejection of unreasonable cost of cure claims.
notes: 三法域部分对应：CN法下（民法典第582条）明确赋予减少报酬的选择权；US法下（Restatement §348, Jacob & Youngs）substantial performance限制扣除范围；HK法下（Ruxley Electronics）以reasonable cost of cure为上限。核心差异：CN法下救济选择更明确，US和HK普通法下以substantial performance和reasonableness限制remedy scope。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 合同一方因对方迟延履行主张解除合同，对方主张迟延时间很短不构成根本违约/已验证:delay not fundamental breach partial
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第563条，当事人一方迟延履行主要债务，经催告后在合理期限内仍未履行的，当事人可以解除合同。若迟延时间很短且未造成实质损害，法院可能认定不构成根本违约。
us_claim: Under Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 242, the breach is material if it substantially impairs the value of the contract to the innocent party. Under UCC § 2-601, the perfect tender rule allows rejection for any non-conformity, but for non-goods contracts, the materiality test applies. Under the common law, mere delay does not necessarily constitute a repudiatory breach unless time is of the essence or the delay is unreasonable. See Bunge Corp v. Tradax Export SA [1981] 1 WLR 711 (UK, persuasive in US and HK).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the test for repudiatory breach is whether the breach goes to the root of the contract. In mercantile contracts, time is generally of the essence, and delay may be repudiatory. In other contracts, the courts apply a fact-specific test. See Hong Kong Fir Shipping v. Kawasaki Kisen Kaisha [1962] 2 QB 26 (applied in HK); The Mihalis Angelos [1971] 1 QB 164. The innocent party may terminate if the breach deprives them of substantially the whole benefit.
notes: 三法域部分对应：CN法下（民法典第563条）经催告后合理期限未履行可解除；US法下（Restatement §242, materiality test）substantial impairment为标准；HK法下（Hong Kong Fir Shipping）'innominate term' test，breach是否剥夺substantial benefit。核心差异：CN以催告程序为前置条件，US以materiality/substantial impairment为判断标准，HK以innominate term理论灵活判断。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 合同一方主张对方口头承诺构成合同组成部分，对方主张口头承诺无效/已验证:oral promise integration partial
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第469条、第490条，当事人订立合同可以采用书面形式、口头形式或其他形式。但若法律规定或当事人约定采用书面形式，则口头承诺不成立。此外，若书面合同包含'完整协议'条款，口头承诺通常被排除。
us_claim: Under the parol evidence rule, extrinsic evidence of prior or contemporaneous agreements is inadmissible to contradict a fully integrated written contract. See Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 210; UCC § 2-202. However, evidence of subsequent modifications is admissible. Under the UCC, course of dealing and usage of trade can explain or supplement the terms of a writing. Under the doctrine of collateral agreements, a separate oral agreement may be admissible if it is not inconsistent with the written contract.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the parol evidence rule applies: where the parties have reduced their agreement to a written document intended to be the complete record, extrinsic evidence is not admissible to contradict, vary, or add to the terms. However, evidence of collateral agreements, subsequent variations, or rectification for common mistake may be admissible. See Gillespie Bros v. Chen Bowles [1907] 2 KB 469; Lloyds Bank v. Bundy [1975] QB 326 (Persuasive in HK).
notes: 三法域部分对应：CN法下（民法典第469条）原则上承认口头合同，但受书面形式要求限制；US法下（parol evidence rule, Restatement §210）fully integrated writing排除外部证据；HK法下（Gillespie Bros）同样适用parol evidence rule。核心差异：CN以形式自由为原则，书面形式为例外；US和HK以parol evidence rule保护书面合同的完整性。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 合同一方在对方违约后未采取适当措施防止损失扩大，违约方主张应就扩大部分减轻责任/已验证:mitigation of damages partial
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第591条，当事人一方违约后，对方应当采取适当措施防止损失的扩大；没有采取适当措施致使损失扩大的，不得就扩大的损失请求赔偿。适当措施的标准以合理人为准。
us_claim: Under the common law duty to mitigate, the non-breaching party must make reasonable efforts to avoid or minimize the loss caused by the breach. See Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 350; the famous case of Parker v. Twentieth Century-Fox Film Corp., 474 P.2d 689 (Cal. 1970). The plaintiff cannot recover damages that could have been avoided with reasonable diligence. However, the plaintiff is not required to take extraordinary measures or risk their own financial stability.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the duty to mitigate is a well-established principle. The plaintiff must take reasonable steps to minimize the loss; failure to do so reduces the recoverable damages. The burden of proof is on the defendant to show that the plaintiff failed to mitigate. See British Westinghouse v. Underground Railway [1912] AC 673 (UK, persuasive in HK). The plaintiff is not required to embark on a risky or speculative venture to mitigate.
notes: 三法域部分对应：CN法下（民法典第591条）明确减损义务；US法下（Restatement §350, Parker v. Twentieth Century-Fox）reasonable efforts to mitigate；HK法下（British Westinghouse）同样要求reasonable steps，burden on defendant。核心差异：CN以法定条文明确规定，US和HK以common law principle为基础，但实质标准一致。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 合同一方主张对方在订立合同时未满18周岁，合同应无效/已验证:minor capacity partial
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第19-22条，18周岁以上的自然人为成年人，不满18周岁的自然人为未成年人。8周岁以上的未成年人为限制民事行为能力人，实施民事法律行为由其法定代理人代理或经同意、追认；16周岁以上以自己劳动收入为主要生活来源的视为完全民事行为能力人。
us_claim: Under common law, contracts with minors are voidable at the option of the minor, but not void. The minor may disaffirm the contract during minority and for a reasonable time after reaching majority. See Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 14; the traditional rule in US common law is that minors' contracts are voidable, with exceptions for necessaries (food, clothing, shelter, medical care). Under the Uniform Commercial Code, minors' contracts for goods are also generally voidable.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, a contract entered into by a minor is voidable at the minor's option, not void. The minor may repudiate the contract at any time during minority or within a reasonable time after reaching majority (18 years). Contracts for necessaries are binding on the minor, and the minor must pay a reasonable price. See Nash v. Inman [1908] 2 KB 1 (UK, persuasive in HK). The Minors' Contracts Act 1987 (UK) allows courts to order restitution of property transferred by the minor.
notes: 三法域部分对应：CN法下（民法典第19-22条）限制民事行为能力人需法定代理人同意，完全民事行为能力有例外；US法下（Restatement §14）minor's contracts voidable，necessaries exception；HK法下（Nash v. Inman, Minors' Contracts Act 1987）similar rules。核心差异：CN以年龄+智力标准分层，US和HK以voidable at minor's option为统一原则。PENDING_VERIFICATION: HK是否正式适用Minors' Contracts Act 1987。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 合同一方主张合同因显失公平而可撤销，对方主张合同经双方自愿签署/已验证:unconscionability partial
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第151条，一方利用对方处于危困状态、缺乏判断能力等情形，致使民事法律行为成立时显失公平的，受损害方有权请求法院或仲裁机构予以撤销。显失公平需同时具备主观要件与客观要件。
us_claim: Under UCC § 2-302 and the common law doctrine of unconscionability, a contract is voidable if it is both procedurally and substantively unconscionable. Procedural unconscionability involves inequality of bargaining power, lack of meaningful choice, or surprise. Substantive unconscionability involves excessively harsh or one-sided terms. See Williams v. Walker-Thomas Furniture Co., 350 F.2d 445 (D.C. Cir. 1965). The court may refuse to enforce the clause, limit its application, or modify the contract.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the doctrine of unconscionability is less developed than in the US. The Unconscionable Contracts Ordinance (Cap 458) applies only to consumer contracts and empowers the court to refuse to enforce an unconscionable contract or part of it. The traditional common law approach relies on duress, undue influence, or public policy rather than a general unconscionability doctrine. See Lloyds Bank v. Bundy [1975] QB 326 (Persuasive in HK).
notes: 三法域部分对应：CN法下（民法典第151条）显失公平需主观+客观要件；US法下（UCC §2-302, Williams v. Walker-Thomas）procedural + substantive unconscionability；HK法下（Cap 458仅限consumer contracts）保护范围较窄。核心差异：US unconscionability doctrine最发达，CN采显失公平法定要件，HK普通法下仅有限适用，主要依赖duress/undue influence。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 合同一方主张对方通过电子邮件发送的订单构成有效要约，对方主张电子邮件非正式形式/已验证:electronic offer partial
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第469条、第137条，以电子数据交换、电子邮件等方式能够有形地表现所载内容，并可以随时调取查用的数据电文，视为书面形式。数据电文到达收件人时生效。
us_claim: Under the Uniform Electronic Transactions Act (UETA) and the federal E-SIGN Act, 15 U.S.C. § 7001 et seq., electronic signatures and records are legally equivalent to paper records. Under the Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 63, an acceptance is effective on dispatch (the mailbox rule). Under the UCC, an offer may be made in any medium, including electronic communications. Under the common law, the form of the offer does not affect its validity if it communicates the essential terms and intent to be bound.
hk_claim: Under the Electronic Transactions Ordinance (Cap 553), electronic records and signatures have the same legal effect as paper records and signatures, subject to certain exceptions. An offer made by email is valid if it satisfies the requirements of a contract: offer, acceptance, consideration, and intention to create legal relations. The common law mailbox rule applies to electronic communications sent by email, and acceptance is generally effective on dispatch. See Brinkibon v. Stahag Stahl [1983] 2 AC 34 (UK, persuasive in HK).
notes: 三法域部分对应：CN法下（民法典第469条）电子数据视为书面形式；US法下（E-SIGN, UETA）electronic records legally equivalent；HK法下（Cap 553）同样承认电子记录效力。核心差异：三法域均承认电子邮件要约的有效性，但mailbox rule在电子通讯中的适用存在差异（US传统mailbox rule vs. UK Brinkibon 'received' rule）。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 合同一方主张对方在合同履行中的通知义务应以书面形式作出，对方主张口头通知已足够/已验证:notice form partial
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第469条，当事人订立合同可以采用书面形式、口头形式或其他形式。若合同明确要求书面通知，则口头通知不符合约定；若未明确约定，则合理形式的通知均可。
us_claim: Under the common law, the form of notice depends on the contract. If the contract requires written notice, oral notice is insufficient. See Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 67. Under the UCC, notice may be given in any reasonable manner. Under the doctrine of waiver, a party may waive the requirement of written notice by conduct or acceptance of oral notice. See the UCC § 1-305 on good faith and commercial reasonableness.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, if the contract specifies a form of notice (e.g., written, by email), that form is generally required. However, a party may waive the formal requirement by conduct or acceptance of informal notice. The courts will imply a term that notice must be in a form reasonably sufficient to bring the matter to the attention of the recipient. See the general contract law principles applied in HK.
notes: 三法域部分对应：CN法下（民法典第469条）形式自由，合同另有约定除外；US法下（Restatement §67）contract form requirement binding but waivable；HK法下similar rules on waiver by conduct。核心差异：三法域在notice form上的基本原则一致，但waiver doctrine的适用程度可能不同。positive_control=True。

fact_summary: 消费者因产品缺陷受伤，主张惩罚性赔偿，生产商主张仅应承担补偿性赔偿/已验证:punitive damages collision
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1207条，明知产品存在缺陷仍然生产、销售，或没有依据前条规定采取有效补救措施，造成他人死亡或健康严重损害的，被侵权人有权请求相应的惩罚性赔偿。但惩罚性赔偿的适用范围和数额标准尚不明确，司法实践中判例较少。
us_claim: Under US tort law, punitive damages are available in product liability cases if the defendant's conduct was reckless, wanton, or malicious. See Restatement (Third) of Torts: Products Liability § 2 cmt. m. The US Supreme Court has placed constitutional limits on punitive damages under the Due Process Clause: BMW of North America v. Gore, 517 U.S. 559 (1996) (three guideposts: reprehensibility, ratio, comparable penalties); State Farm v. Campbell, 538 U.S. 408 (2003) (single-digit ratio guidepost). See also Philip Morris v. Williams, 549 U.S. 346 (2007).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, punitive damages are not available in tort claims. The law of torts in HK is based on English common law, which adheres to the principle that damages in tort are compensatory, not punitive. The only exceptions are in certain statutory claims and defamation cases (where aggravated damages may be awarded). See Rookes v. Barnard [1964] AC 1129 (UK); Kuddus v. Chief Constable of Leicestershire [2001] UKHL 29. The product liability framework is based on the Consumer Goods Safety Ordinance (Cap 456) and common law negligence, but no punitive damages are available.
notes: 三法域在产品责任惩罚性赔偿上存在根本性冲突：US法下punitive damages是tort law的核心工具，宪法限制（Gore guideposts）仅约束其上限；CN法下（民法典第1207条）承认惩罚性赔偿但适用范围极窄、标准模糊；HK法下（Rookes v. Barnard）原则上拒绝punitive damages，仅保留aggravated damages等有限例外。核心差异的法理基础在于：US以deterrence and punishment为tort law的正当功能，CN以消费者保护为限引入punitive damages，HK以compensatory principle为tort law的基石。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 病人因医疗过失死亡，家属主张精神损害赔偿，医院主张医疗损害仅限于物质损失/已验证:emotional damages in medical tort collision
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1183条，侵害自然人人身权益造成严重精神损害的，被侵权人有权请求精神损害赔偿。因故意或重大过失侵害自然人具有人身意义的特定物造成严重精神损害的，也有权请求精神损害赔偿。医疗损害致死案件中，近亲属可主张精神损害赔偿。
us_claim: Under US tort law, emotional distress damages are recoverable in wrongful death actions and survival actions. The Restatement (Second) of Torts § 461 recognizes recovery for mental distress resulting from physical harm. In medical malpractice, many states allow recovery for loss of consortium and emotional distress by family members. However, some states impose caps on non-economic damages in medical malpractice cases. See the varying state laws; e.g., California MICRA (Medical Injury Compensation Reform Act) caps non-economic damages at $250,000.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, damages for bereavement (loss of a loved one) are available under the Fatal Accidents Ordinance (Cap 22) but are limited to a statutory sum (currently $220,000 as of the last amendment). Bereavement damages are only available to the spouse, parents, or children of the deceased. There is no general claim for emotional distress or psychiatric injury by family members unless they witness the event or suffer a recognized psychiatric illness. See Alcock v. Chief Constable of South Yorkshire [1992] 1 AC 310 (UK, persuasive in HK).
notes: 三法域在医疗损害精神损害赔偿上存在冲突：CN法下（民法典第1183条）精神损害赔偿适用范围较广，近亲属可主张；US法下因州法差异大，部分州有MICRA等caps限制；HK法下（Cap 22）仅statutory bereavement damages且金额固定，范围限于配偶、父母、子女。核心差异的法理基础：CN以精神权益独立保护为理念，US以state autonomy导致高度碎片化，HK以compensatory principle限制emotional damages to statutory framework。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 路人因建筑物外墙脱落受伤，主张建筑物所有人承担严格责任，所有人主张仅需承担过错责任/已验证:building defect liability collision
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1253条，建筑物、构筑物或其他设施及其搁置物、悬挂物发生脱落、坠落造成他人损害，所有人、管理人或使用人不能证明自己没有过错的，应当承担侵权责任。采过错推定原则，而非严格责任。
us_claim: Under US tort law, the liability of a building owner for injuries caused by falling objects or structural defects depends on the jurisdiction. Some states apply a negligence standard (Restatement (Second) of Torts § 324A); others apply a form of strict liability for abnormally dangerous activities or under building code violations. Under the common law, the owner generally has a duty of reasonable care to maintain the premises in a safe condition. However, some jurisdictions impose strict liability on landlords for dangerous conditions of common areas. See the varying state approaches.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the occupier of premises owes a duty of care to visitors under the Occupiers' Liability Ordinance (Cap 314). The duty is to take reasonable care to see that the visitor is reasonably safe in using the premises. This is a negligence standard, not strict liability. However, under the common law of nuisance, a landowner may be liable for the escape of dangerous things (Rylands v. Fletcher (1868) LR 3 HL 330), but this does not apply to ordinary building defects. Building owners are not strictly liable for structural defects unless the defect is due to a dangerous activity.
notes: 三法域在建筑物脱落责任上存在冲突：CN法下（民法典第1253条）采过错推定，所有人需自证无过错；US法下各州标准不一，部分州可能适用严格责任；HK法下（Cap 314）采reasonable care negligence标准。核心差异：CN以过错推定平衡受害人举证困难，US以州法自主性导致标准差异，HK以occupier's liability negligence为基本原则。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 网络平台因用户发布侵权内容被诉，平台主张其仅为信息中介不应承担侵权责任，权利人主张平台应负内容审查义务/已验证:platform liability collision
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1195条、第1196条，网络服务提供者接到通知后应及时采取必要措施，未及时采取必要措施的，对损害的扩大部分与该网络用户承担连带责任。平台遵循'通知-删除'规则，不承担主动审查义务。
us_claim: Under US law, Section 230 of the Communications Decency Act, 47 U.S.C. § 230, provides broad immunity to interactive computer service providers for content created by third parties. The platform is generally not treated as the publisher or speaker of third-party content. See Zeran v. America Online, 129 F.3d 327 (4th Cir. 1997). However, intellectual property claims are governed by the DMCA safe harbor (17 U.S.C. § 512), which requires notice and takedown. Under FOSTA-SESTA (2018), Section 230 immunity does not apply to sex trafficking content. Under recent cases, platform liability for design features remains contested.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, there is no equivalent to Section 230 immunity. Platforms may be liable for third-party content if they are found to have authorized, procured, or participated in the publication of defamatory content. Under the Defamation Ordinance (Cap 21), an internet service provider may avoid liability if they are not the publisher and take reasonable care. However, for copyright infringement, the Copyright Ordinance (Cap 528) provides safe harbor provisions for online service providers (§ 88A) under the 'notice and takedown' regime, similar to the DMCA. The Electronic Transactions Ordinance (Cap 553) does not provide general immunity.
notes: 三法域在平台责任上存在根本性冲突：US法下（47 U.S.C. § 230）平台享有broad immunity，仅承担DMCA notice-takedown义务；CN法下（民法典第1195条）平台遵循'通知-删除'规则，对扩大部分承担连带责任；HK法下无Section 230式immunity，平台可能因participation in publication而承担liability。核心差异：US以internet immunity policy保护平台创新，CN以notice-takedown + expanded liability平衡权利保护，HK以普通法publication liability + limited safe harbor为框架。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 员工在工作期间因第三人侵权受伤，主张雇主与第三人承担连带责任，雇主主张应由第三人单独承担责任/已验证:employer liability for third-party tort collision
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1191条，用人单位的工作人员因执行工作任务造成他人损害的，由用人单位承担侵权责任。但若员工因第三人侵权受伤，用人单位应承担工伤赔偿责任（《工伤保险条例》），员工同时可向第三人主张侵权赔偿。
us_claim: Under US tort law, the doctrine of respondeat superior makes an employer vicariously liable for torts committed by employees within the scope of employment. Restatement (Third) of Agency § 7.03. However, if the employee is injured by a third party, the employer's liability depends on the circumstances. Under workers' compensation laws, the employer is generally immune from tort suits by employees for workplace injuries, but the employee may sue the third-party tortfeasor. The exclusive remedy provision of workers' compensation statutes bars direct tort suits against the employer. See the varying state workers' compensation laws.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, an employer is vicariously liable for the torts of employees committed in the course of employment. If the employee is injured by a third party, the employer may be liable for negligence if they failed to provide a safe workplace under the common law duty of care (see Wilsons & Clyde Coal v. English [1938] AC 57). However, under the Employees' Compensation Ordinance (Cap 282), the employer is required to compensate employees for work injuries regardless of fault, and the employee may also sue the third-party tortfeasor. The employer has a right of contribution or indemnity against the third party.
notes: 三法域在雇主对第三人侵权的责任上存在冲突：CN法下员工可同时获得工伤赔偿（工伤保险条例）与向第三人主张侵权赔偿；US法下workers' compensation exclusive remedy通常禁止员工直接起诉雇主，但可诉第三人；HK法下（Cap 282）雇主有no-fault补偿义务，同时员工可诉第三人，雇主可追偿。核心差异：CN以双轨制（工伤+侵权）保护员工，US以exclusive remedy保护雇主，HK以no-fault + common law liability并存。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 因疫苗不良反应导致健康损害，接种者主张疫苗生产商承担产品责任，生产商主张属于不可避免的风险/已验证:vaccine liability collision
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1203条，因产品存在缺陷造成他人损害的，生产者应当承担侵权责任。但若疫苗属于国家免疫规划疫苗，受害者可能通过国家疫苗保险或补偿机制获得救济，而非直接向生产商主张。《疫苗管理法》规定了异常反应补偿制度。
us_claim: Under US law, the National Childhood Vaccine Injury Act of 1986 (42 U.S.C. § 300aa-1 et seq.) establishes a no-fault compensation scheme for vaccine-related injuries, administered through the National Vaccine Injury Compensation Program (VICP). The Act provides liability protection to vaccine manufacturers and healthcare providers, but claimants may file a civil suit outside the program if the compensation is insufficient or if the claim is denied. The Act preempts most state tort claims against manufacturers. See Bruesewitz v. Wyeth, 562 U.S. 223 (2011).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, vaccine injury claims are generally handled under the common law of negligence and product liability. There is no comprehensive statutory no-fault compensation scheme for vaccine injuries in HK. The employer may be liable under the Employees' Compensation Ordinance (Cap 282) if the vaccine was administered in the course of employment. Under the common law, a claimant must prove that the vaccine was defective or that the administration was negligent. There is no equivalent to the US VICP or the CN national vaccine compensation fund.
notes: 三法域在疫苗责任上存在根本性冲突：CN法下（疫苗管理法）有国家补偿机制，但受害者仍可主张产品责任；US法下（NCVIA, 42 U.S.C. § 300aa）有VICP no-fault scheme且限制直接起诉生产商；HK法下无专门疫苗补偿机制，依赖普通法negligence/product liability。核心差异：CN以行政补偿+民事侵权双轨，US以no-fault scheme + limited tort为 federal policy，HK以common law individual litigation为唯一途径。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 自动驾驶汽车发生事故，乘客主张汽车制造商承担产品责任，制造商主张事故系软件算法缺陷，应属技术局限而非产品缺陷/已验证:autonomous vehicle liability collision
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1203条，产品存在缺陷造成损害的，生产者应当承担侵权责任。自动驾驶汽车的算法缺陷可能被认定为设计缺陷或警示缺陷。但现行法对AI/算法缺陷的责任认定尚缺乏明确标准。《智能网联汽车准入和上路通行试点实施指南》提供了部分指引。
us_claim: Under US law, autonomous vehicle liability is governed by state law and the National Traffic and Motor Vehicle Safety Act. The SELF DRIVE Act (pending/not fully enacted) and the AV START Act (proposed) aim to create a federal framework. Under product liability law, a design defect is determined by the consumer expectation test or the risk-utility test. See Restatement (Third) of Torts: Products Liability § 2. Software defects may be treated as design defects. Under the NHTSA guidance, manufacturers must demonstrate safety before deployment. State laws vary significantly (e.g., California, Arizona, Florida).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, there is no specific legislation governing autonomous vehicle liability. The Road Traffic Ordinance (Cap 374) requires a human driver to be in control of the vehicle. Autonomous vehicle testing is permitted under special permits. Under the common law, a manufacturer would be liable for negligence or under the Consumer Protection Ordinance (Cap 213) for defective products. The 'defect' would be assessed under the common law and statutory product liability principles. There is no specific legal framework for AI or algorithmic liability.
notes: 三法域在自动驾驶责任上存在冲突：CN法下有试点实施指南但缺乏完整立法框架；US法下有州法差异+NHTSA guidance，pending federal legislation；HK法下（Cap 374）要求human driver in control，无AV-specific legislation。核心差异：CN以行政试点探索监管框架，US以federal preemption debate与state law patchwork为特征，HK以普通法现有框架应对新技术，缺乏专门调整。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 因数据泄露导致个人信息被滥用，受害者主张平台承担侵权责任，平台主张其已采取合理安全措施/已验证:data breach liability collision
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1038条、第1182条，信息处理者泄露、篡改其收集、存储的个人信息，或未经自然人同意向他人非法提供个人信息，应承担侵权责任。受害者可请求损害赔偿，包括财产损失和精神损害赔偿。《个人信息保护法》第69条进一步规定了过错推定。
us_claim: Under US law, there is no comprehensive federal data privacy statute. Data breach liability is governed by state laws (e.g., California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA)), sectoral federal laws (e.g., HIPAA, GLBA), and common law torts (negligence, breach of contract, invasion of privacy). Under tort law, plaintiffs must prove actual damages, which is difficult in data breach cases where no financial loss has occurred. See TransUnion v. Ramirez, 141 S. Ct. 2190 (2021) for Article III standing requirements. The Illinois Biometric Information Privacy Act (BIPA) provides statutory damages for biometric data breaches.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap 486) governs the collection, use, and protection of personal data. The Privacy Commissioner for Personal Data (PCPD) has enforcement powers, but the Ordinance does not provide a private right of action for data breaches. Individuals must rely on common law torts (breach of confidence, negligence) or seek assistance from the PCPD. The data user may face enforcement notices and administrative fines, but statutory damages for breach of the Ordinance are not available to individuals. There is no equivalent to the CCPA or BIPA statutory damages regime.
notes: 三法域在数据泄露责任上存在根本性冲突：CN法下（民法典第1038条、个人信息保护法第69条）明确过错推定+精神损害赔偿；US法下（state law patchwork, no federal comprehensive law）actual damages difficult to prove，standing requirements（TransUnion v. Ramirez）；HK法下（Cap 486）无private right of action，依赖行政救济+common law torts。核心差异：CN以法定过错推定+private right of action保护个人信息，US以state law fragmentation+actual damages requirement为特征，HK以administrative enforcement为主，private remedy缺失。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 行人在公共道路上被机动车撞伤，主张无过错责任，司机主张行人闯红灯存在过错/已验证:strict vs fault liability asymmetry
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1208条、第1166条，机动车发生交通事故造成损害的，依照道路交通安全法律和民法典有关规定承担赔偿责任。机动车与非机动车驾驶人、行人之间发生事故，适用过错推定原则（道路交通安全法第76条），但机动车一方需证明非机动车/行人存在过错方可减轻责任。
us_claim: Under US tort law, automobile accident liability is governed by state law. Most states apply a negligence standard, but some apply no-fault insurance systems (e.g., New York, Florida, Michigan). Under the negligence standard, the plaintiff must prove the defendant breached a duty of care. Under comparative negligence (adopted in most states), the plaintiff's recovery is reduced by their percentage of fault. Under contributory negligence (a few states, e.g., Maryland, Virginia, North Carolina, Alabama), the plaintiff's negligence bars recovery entirely. Restatement (Third) of Torts: Apportionment of Liability § 7.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Road Traffic Ordinance (Cap 374) imposes criminal liability for dangerous driving but does not create a statutory tort of strict liability for traffic accidents. Civil liability is based on negligence. The common law principles of negligence (duty, breach, causation, damage) apply. Under the common law, contributory negligence is a partial defense that reduces damages rather than bars recovery under the Law Reform (Contributory Negligence) Ordinance (Cap 396). There is no no-fault insurance scheme for motor vehicle accidents in HK.
notes: 核心不对称：CN法下（道路交通安全法第76条）机动车与行人事故采过错推定；US法下州法差异大，部分州no-fault，部分州comparative negligence，部分州contributory negligence；HK法下（Cap 374 + common law negligence）纯过错责任，无严格责任。核心差异：CN以过错推定保护行人，US以state law autonomy导致标准多样，HK以传统 negligence为唯一基础。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 消费者因食用过期食品中毒，主张超市承担严格产品责任，超市主张其不知晓食品过期/已验证:product liability strict vs fault asymmetry
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1203条，因产品存在缺陷造成他人损害的，生产者应当承担侵权责任。销售者因过错使产品存在缺陷，或不能指明缺陷产品的生产者或供货者的，销售者应当承担侵权责任。产品缺陷采严格责任原则，但销售者过错为补充责任。
us_claim: Under US tort law, product liability is based on strict liability for manufacturing defects (Restatement (Third) of Torts: Products Liability § 2(a)), negligence for design defects and failure to warn (§ 2(b), (c)), and the consumer expectation test or risk-utility test for design defects. Retailers are generally liable under strict liability for selling defective products, even if they were unaware of the defect. See Greenman v. Yuba Power Products, 377 P.2d 897 (Cal. 1963). The retailer may seek indemnification from the manufacturer.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, product liability is primarily based on negligence and the Consumer Protection Ordinance (Cap 213). The Ordinance provides strict liability for unsafe goods, but the primary remedy is administrative (e.g., recall, prohibition of sale) rather than private damages. Private tort claims for product defects are based on negligence. The claimant must prove that the manufacturer or seller failed to exercise reasonable care. There is no general strict liability regime for product defects in tort. See Donoghue v. Stevenson [1932] AC 562 (UK, foundational in HK).
notes: 核心不对称：US法下（Restatement Third §2）产品责任采strict liability for manufacturing defects，retailer liable regardless of knowledge；CN法下（民法典第1203条）生产者严格责任，销售者过错责任；HK法下（Cap 213）unsafe goods采行政严格责任，private tort claim以negligence为基础。核心差异：US以strict liability in tort为product liability核心，CN以生产者严格责任+销售者过错责任为分层结构，HK以negligence+administrative enforcement为双轨。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 宠物狗咬伤人，狗主人主张其已尽到管理义务不应担责，受害人主张动物致害应适用严格责任/已验证:animal liability asymmetry
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1245条，饲养的动物造成他人损害的，动物饲养人或管理人应当承担侵权责任；但能够证明损害是因被侵权人故意或重大过失造成的，可以不承担或减轻责任。采过错推定/严格责任原则。
us_claim: Under US common law, the liability of animal owners depends on the type of animal. Owners of domestic animals (e.g., dogs, cats) are generally liable only if they knew or had reason to know of the animal's dangerous propensities (the 'one bite rule'). Restatement (Second) of Torts § 509. However, many states have enacted 'dog bite statutes' that impose strict liability for dog bites regardless of prior knowledge. Under common law, owners of wild animals are strictly liable for injuries caused by the animal. See Restatement (Second) of Torts § 507.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the owner of a domestic animal is generally liable for negligence if they fail to control the animal and it causes injury. The keeper of a dangerous animal (known to be vicious) may be strictly liable under the scienter rule (the animal must be known to be dangerous). Under the Dogs and Cats Ordinance (Cap 167), there are criminal penalties for allowing dogs to be dangerously out of control, but this does not create a statutory tort of strict liability. There is no general strict liability for dog bites. See Draper v. Hodder [1972] 2 QB 556 (UK, persuasive in HK).
notes: 核心不对称：CN法下（民法典第1245条）动物致害采严格责任（过错推定），受害人保护力度大；US法下common law 'one bite rule'要求prior knowledge of viciousness，但many states have strict liability statutes；HK法下（Cap 167 + common law）以negligence为主，scienter rule for known dangerous animals。核心差异：CN以严格责任为默认规则，US以common law negligence + statutory strict liability patchwork为混合模式，HK以negligence + scienter rule为传统框架。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 员工在上下班途中因第三人侵权受伤，主张雇主承担工伤赔偿责任，雇主主张应由第三人承担责任/已验证:commuting injury asymmetry
cn_claim: 依据《工伤保险条例》第14条，职工在上下班途中，受到非本人主要责任的交通事故伤害的，应当认定为工伤。雇主应承担工伤赔偿责任，员工同时可向第三人主张侵权赔偿。
us_claim: Under US law, workers' compensation laws vary by state. In most states, injuries sustained during the commute to and from work (the 'going and coming' rule) are not covered by workers' compensation. However, there are exceptions: the 'special errand' exception, the 'dual purpose' exception, the 'premises' exception, and the 'portal-to-portal' rule. The scope of coverage varies significantly by state. See the Restatement (Third) of Employment Law § 6.03 for general principles. If the injury is not covered by workers' compensation, the employee may sue the third-party tortfeasor.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Employees' Compensation Ordinance (Cap 282) covers injuries sustained in the course of employment. The 'course of employment' generally excludes the commute to and from work, unless the employee was traveling on a route required by the employer or using transport provided by the employer. The test is whether the employee was acting in the course of their employment at the time of the injury. See Pape v. Cumbria CC [1992] 3 All ER 212 (UK, persuasive in HK). If not covered by Cap 282, the employee may sue the third party in tort.
notes: 核心不对称：CN法下（工伤保险条例第14条）上下班途中非本人主要责任的交通事故明确认定为工伤；US法下'going and coming' rule通常排除commute coverage，exceptions vary by state；HK法下（Cap 282）commute generally excluded unless on employer-required route。核心差异：CN以法定工伤覆盖commute accident，US以state law variation导致coverage不确定，HK以course of employment test排除普通通勤。hard_case=True。

fact_summary: 因环境污染导致居民健康受损，居民主张污染企业承担严格责任，企业主张其排污符合国家标准/已验证:environmental tort asymmetry
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1229条，因污染环境、破坏生态发生纠纷，行为人应当就法律规定的不承担责任或减轻责任的情形及其行为与损害之间不存在因果关系承担举证责任。环境污染侵权采无过错责任原则，且举证责任倒置。
us_claim: Under US law, environmental tort liability is governed by federal statutes (e.g., CERCLA, Clean Water Act, Clean Air Act) and state common law. Under the common law, nuisance (private and public) and trespass are the primary torts. Strict liability for abnormally dangerous activities may apply under Restatement (Second) of Torts § 520. However, compliance with regulatory standards (e.g., EPA permits) is not necessarily a complete defense.
