Workers' compensation is the exclusive remedy against the employer for workplace injuries (no-fault system). See, e.g., California Labor Code §3200-6002; New York Workers' Compensation Law §1-152.
hk_claim: Under the Employees' Compensation Ordinance (Cap 282), an employer is liable to pay compensation for personal injury or death of an employee arising out of and in the course of employment. Employers must take out employees' compensation insurance with an authorized insurer. See Cap 282 s.5; s.40 (compulsory insurance).
notes: 三法域映射：工伤赔偿制度（workers' compensation）在三法域均采用无过错保险模式。中国法（Work Injury Insurance Regulations）实行社会保险统筹，美国法实行州层面强制保险（各州差异较大），香港法（Cap 282）要求雇主购买强制保险。三者均放弃侵权过错责任，以社会保险/强制保险保障劳动者，这是工业化国家劳动法的共同选择。

fact_summary: Female employees are entitled to maternity leave and protection from dismissal during pregnancy in all three jurisdictions. / 三法域中女性雇员均享有产假和孕期解雇保护。
cn_claim: 依据《女职工劳动保护特别规定》第5条、第7条，女职工生育享受98天产假，其中产前可以休假15天。用人单位不得因女职工怀孕、生育、哺乳降低其工资、予以辞退、与其解除劳动或者聘用合同。各地方可额外增加产假天数（如多数省份延长60-90天）。
us_claim: Under the Family and Medical Leave Act (FMLA) 29 U.S.C. §2611-2654, eligible employees are entitled to 12 weeks of unpaid leave for the birth of a child. The Pregnancy Discrimination Act (PDA) amends Title VII to prohibit discrimination on the basis of pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions. Some states (e.g., California, New York) provide paid family leave. See 29 U.S.C. §2612(a)(1)(A).
hk_claim: Under Employment Ordinance (Cap 57) sections 12-14, a female employee is entitled to 14 weeks of paid maternity leave if she has been employed under a continuous contract for not less than 40 weeks immediately before the commencement of maternity leave. An employer must not dismiss a pregnant employee from the date she serves a notice of pregnancy until her maternity leave ends. See Cap 57 s.12(1); s.15A.
notes: 三法域映射：产假和孕期解雇保护在三法域均为法定权利。中国法提供98天+地方延长产假，美国法提供12周无薪假（FMLA）+州层面带薪假，香港法提供14周有薪假（Cap 57 s.12）。三者均禁止孕期歧视性解雇，体现了ILO公约（如第183号公约）对母性保护的共同要求，尽管福利水平（带薪vs无薪）存在显著差异。

fact_summary: Anti-discrimination protections based on sex and race are recognized in all three jurisdictions, though enforcement mechanisms differ. / 三法域均承认基于性别和种族的反歧视保护，但执法机制不同。
cn_claim: 依据《劳动法》第12条、第13条，劳动者就业不因民族、种族、性别、宗教信仰不同而受歧视。《就业促进法》第3条、第26条进一步规定劳动者依法享有平等就业和自主择业的权利，用人单位招用人员应当向劳动者提供平等的就业机会和公平的就业条件。
us_claim: Under Title VII of the Civil Rights Act of 1964 (42 U.S.C. §2000e-2), it is unlawful for an employer to fail or refuse to hire, discharge, or otherwise discriminate against any individual because of race, color, religion, sex, or national origin. The EEOC enforces Title VII, and complainants may file charges with the EEOC before suing in federal court. See 42 U.S.C. §2000e-5.
hk_claim: Under the Sex Discrimination Ordinance (Cap 480) and Race Discrimination Ordinance (Cap 602), it is unlawful for an employer to discriminate against a person on the grounds of sex, marital status, pregnancy, or race in employment. The Equal Opportunities Commission (EOC) handles complaints and may provide legal assistance. See Cap 480 s.5-8; Cap 602 s.6-8.
notes: 三法域映射：反性别和种族歧视是三法域劳动法的共同原则。中国法（Labor Law Art. 12-13 + Employment Promotion Law Art. 3, 26）以一般原则性条款为主，美国法（Title VII + EEOC）拥有专门执法机构和判例法体系，香港法（Cap 480/602 + EOC）设有专门条例和委员会。三者均体现ILO第111号公约（就业和职业歧视）的要求，但制度化程度差异显著。

fact_summary: Employers must pay wages at regular intervals and may not unilaterally withhold wages in all three jurisdictions. / 三法域中雇主均须定期支付工资，不得单方面扣留工资。
cn_claim: 依据《劳动法》第50条，工资应当以货币形式按月支付给劳动者本人。不得克扣或者无故拖欠劳动者的工资。用人单位无故拖欠工资的，由劳动行政部门责令支付，逾期不支付的，责令加付赔偿金。
us_claim: Under the Fair Labor Standards Act (FLSA) 29 U.S.C. §206 and state wage payment laws, employers must pay wages on the regular payday for the pay period. The FLSA prohibits willful withholding of wages, and the Department of Labor may enforce wage payment violations. See 29 U.S.C. §216(b) (private right of action for unpaid wages).
hk_claim: Under Employment Ordinance (Cap 57) section 23, an employer must pay wages to an employee not later than 7 days after the end of the wage period. An employer who fails to pay wages within 7 days is liable to prosecution and, upon conviction, to a fine of HK$350,000 and imprisonment for 3 years. See Cap 57 s.23(1); s.63C.
notes: 三法域映射：工资支付义务（wage payment obligation）在三法域均受严格规制。中国法（Labor Law Art. 50）要求按月货币支付，美国法（FLSA + 州法）要求按发薪日支付，香港法（Cap 57 s.23）要求7日内支付且设刑事制裁（最高3年监禁）。三者均将工资债权视为生存权保障，拒绝雇主单方面扣减，这是劳动法保护的基本共识。

fact_summary: Employment contracts must be in writing for certain types of employment in all three jurisdictions, though the scope and penalties for non-compliance vary. / 三法域中某些类型的雇佣均要求书面合同，但适用范围和不合规处罚不同。
cn_claim: 依据《劳动合同法》第10条，建立劳动关系，应当订立书面劳动合同。已建立劳动关系，未同时订立书面劳动合同的，应当自用工之日起一个月内订立书面劳动合同。用人单位自用工之日起超过一个月不满一年未与劳动者订立书面劳动合同的，应当向劳动者每月支付二倍的工资。
us_claim: Under US federal law, there is no general requirement for a written employment contract (employment-at-will doctrine). However, the Fair Labor Standards Act (FLSA) and certain state laws require written notice of wage rates and paydays. Some states (e.g., California Labor Code §2922) require written contracts for specific types of employment or commissions. See generally employment-at-will principles.
hk_claim: Under Employment Ordinance (Cap 57) section 70, before an employee enters into a contract of employment, the employer must inform the employee of the terms and conditions of employment. The Labour Department encourages but does not require written contracts for all employees. However, written contracts are standard practice and may be required for foreign domestic helpers under the Standard Employment Contract (ID 407).
notes: 三法域映射：劳动合同书面化要求在三法域均存在，但强制程度不同。中国法（Labor Contract Law Art. 10）要求所有劳动关系书面化且未书面化惩罚严厉（2倍工资），美国法无一般书面要求（at-will口头合同为主），香港法要求告知条款但非强制书面化（Cap 57 s.70）。三者的共同点是对合同透明度的追求，但干预强度差异反映了大陆法与英美法在合同形式上的传统分歧。

fact_summary: Remote work rights were accelerated by COVID-19 but remain informal in the US, emerging in China through local regulations, and not statutorily recognized in HK. / 远程工作权利因新冠疫情加速，但在美国仍属非正式，在中国通过地方法规出现，在香港未获制定法承认。
cn_claim: 中国《劳动合同法》未明确规定远程工作权利。2020年疫情期间，多地出台鼓励远程办公的指导意见。部分城市（如北京、上海）在人才引进政策中提及弹性工作，但远程工作的法定权利、工时计算、工伤认定等仍缺乏全国性立法。
us_claim: Under US federal and state law, there is no statutory right to remote work. The COVID-19 pandemic accelerated remote work practices, but employers generally retain discretion to set workplace policies. The ADA may require reasonable accommodation (including remote work) for employees with disabilities if it does not impose undue hardship. See 42 U.S.C. §12112; EEOC guidance on remote work as reasonable accommodation (2023).
hk_claim: Hong Kong law does not recognize a statutory right to remote work. The Employment Ordinance (Cap 57) presumes a physical workplace. During COVID-19, the government issued guidance on work-from-home arrangements, but these were advisory. Employers generally retain the right to determine work location under the employment contract. See Labour Department COVID-19 advisory guidelines (2020-2023).
notes: 三法域部分映射：远程工作在三法域均因疫情而普及，但法定权利地位均不明确。美国法依赖雇主裁量权和ADA合理便利（EEOC guidance），中国法依赖地方性政策（缺乏全国立法），香港法依赖合同自由和政府指引。三者均处于立法滞后状态，反映了数字化劳动的快速演变与法律规制的结构性滞后。

fact_summary: Platform worker (gig economy) protections are emerging in the US (ABC test in California), developing in China through judicial interpretation, but not specifically addressed in HK legislation. / 平台工人（零工经济）保护在美国（加州ABC测试）兴起，在中国通过司法解释发展，但在香港立法中未获专门处理。
cn_claim: 中国《劳动合同法》未明确规定平台工人的劳动关系认定。2021年人社部等八部门发布《关于维护新就业形态劳动者劳动保障权益的指导意见》，将平台工人分为劳动关系、不完全劳动关系和民事关系三类。司法实践中，法院依据'从属性'标准（人格从属性、经济从属性、组织从属性）个案认定劳动关系。
us_claim: Under US law, the classification of gig workers as employees or independent contractors varies by state and federal test. California adopted the ABC test (Dynamex Operations West v. Superior Court, 4 Cal.5th 903 (2018); Assembly Bill 5), presuming employee status unless the employer proves: (A) autonomy, (B) outside usual business, and (C) independent trade. Federal law (FLSA) uses the economic reality test. See 29 CFR §795.105.
hk_claim: Hong Kong does not have specific legislation governing gig economy workers. Platform workers are generally classified as self-employed contractors or employees based on common law tests of control, integration, and mutuality of obligation. The Labour Department has issued guidance on worker classification but no statutory framework exists. See Labour Department Code of Practice on Employment (2020).
notes: 三法域部分映射：平台工人保护在三法域均处于立法灰色地带。美国加州ABC测试（Dynamex）采用最严格推定，中国法采用三分法（劳动关系/不完全劳动关系/民事关系）的渐进分类，香港法依赖普通法控制测试。三者均面临平台经济对传统从属性理论的挑战，但制度回应速度不同：美国州法实验最快，中国司法解释跟进，香港立法最保守。

fact_summary: Algorithmic management and AI-driven performance monitoring are unregulated in the US (except general ADA/Title VII), emerging in China through personal data law, and not addressed in HK employment law. / 算法管理和AI驱动绩效监控在美国未受专门规制（仅一般ADA/Title VII），在中国通过个人数据法出现，在香港雇佣法中未获处理。
cn_claim: 中国《个人信息保护法》第13条、第28条要求处理敏感个人信息须取得个人单独同意，并具有特定目的和充分必要性。算法管理涉及员工个人信息处理时，须遵守该法。《互联网信息服务算法推荐管理规定》要求算法推荐服务提供者保障劳动者权益，但主要针对平台调度算法，对一般企业内部算法管理规制有限。
us_claim: Under US federal law, there is no specific statute regulating algorithmic management in employment. Algorithmic decision-making may be subject to Title VII (disparate impact) and the ADA (reasonable accommodation). The EEOC has issued guidance on AI and algorithmic fairness (2023). New York City Local Law 144 (2023) requires bias audits for AI hiring tools. See 42 U.S.C. §2000e-2(k) (disparate impact); EEOC AI Guidance (2023).
hk_claim: Hong Kong employment law does not specifically address algorithmic management or AI-driven performance monitoring. The Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap 486) applies to employee data collection but does not have specific provisions on algorithmic decision-making. The Office of the Privacy Commissioner has issued guidance on ethical AI but it is not legally binding. See PCPD Guidance on Ethical Development and Use of AI (2021).
notes: 三法域部分映射：算法管理监管在三法域均处于萌芽状态。美国法依赖既有反歧视法（disparate impact）和地方实验（NYC Local Law 144），中国法通过PIPL和算法推荐管理规定提供间接保护，香港法依赖一般隐私法（Cap 486）和非约束性指引。三者均面临AI技术迭代速度超越立法能力的共同挑战，体现了'技术治理'（technology governance）的全球性困境。

fact_summary: Paid sick leave is mandated in many US states and cities but not at federal level, required in China for sick employees under labor insurance, and not statutorily mandated in HK (only sickness allowance under Cap 57 for 4+ days). / 带薪病假在美国许多州和城市强制（但联邦层面不强制），在中国要求劳动保险支付病假工资，在香港未制定法强制（仅Cap 57规定4日以上病假津贴）。
cn_claim: 依据《企业职工患病或非因工负伤医疗期规定》，企业职工因患病或非因工负伤，需要停止工作医疗时，根据本人实际参加工作年限和在本单位工作年限，给予三个月到二十四个月的医疗期。医疗期内，用人单位须支付病假工资或疾病救济费，不得低于最低工资标准的80%。
us_claim: Under US federal law, there is no statutory paid sick leave requirement. However, the Family and Medical Leave Act (FMLA) provides 12 weeks of unpaid leave for serious health conditions. Many states (e.g., California, New York, Massachusetts) and cities have enacted paid sick leave laws requiring employers to provide accrued paid sick days. See, e.g., California Healthy Workplaces, Healthy Families Act (Labor Code §245.5-249).
hk_claim: Under Employment Ordinance (Cap 57) sections 33-35, an employee is entitled to sickness allowance (not full pay) if the sick leave is not less than 4 consecutive days and the employee has accumulated sufficient paid sickness days. The allowance is four-fifths of the average daily wages. See Cap 57 s.33(1). There is no statutory right to paid sick leave for shorter absences.
notes: 三法域部分映射：带薪病假在三法域制度差异显著。中国法提供医疗期+病假工资（不低于最低工资80%），美国法无联邦带薪病假（州/城市碎片化立法），香港法提供4/5工资的病假津贴（Cap 57 s.33）但需4日以上。三者均试图平衡劳动者健康权与雇主负担，但制度设计不同：中国以社会保险为基础，美国以州法实验为路径，香港以累积带薪病假日为机制。

fact_summary: Trade union formation is legally permitted in all three jurisdictions but with vastly different practical barriers and government oversight. / 工会组建在三法域均合法，但实际障碍和政府监督差异巨大。
cn_claim: 依据《工会法》第3条、第10条，在中国境内的企业、事业单位、机关中以工资收入为主要生活来源的劳动者，有依法参加和组织工会的权利。任何组织和个人不得阻挠和限制。但实践中，中华全国总工会是唯一的全国性工会组织，地方工会和产业工会须接受其领导。独立工会不被承认。
us_claim: Under the National Labor Relations Act (NLRA) 29 U.S.C. §157, employees have the right to self-organization, to form, join, or assist labor organizations, and to bargain collectively. The NLRB conducts union representation elections and enforces these rights. Employers are prohibited from interfering with union organizing under §158(a). See NLRB v. Jones & Laughlin Steel Corp., 301 U.S. 1 (1937).
hk_claim: Under the Trade Unions Ordinance (Cap 332) and the Trade Unions Registration Regulations, any group of employees may form and register a trade union. There are no statutory restrictions on the number of unions or their independence. However, collective bargaining is not statutorily mandated, and union density is low. See Cap 332 s.4-5.
notes: 三法域部分映射：工会组建权在三法域均形式上合法，但实质差异巨大。中国法（Trade Union Law Art. 3, 10）允许组建但限定在ACFTU体系内（禁止独立工会），美国法（NLRA §157）保护多工会竞争和独立组织，香港法（Cap 332）允许自由注册但缺乏集体谈判强制机制。三者体现了社会主义工会一元化、自由主义工会多元化和普通法契约自由的不同路径。

fact_summary: Employee data privacy is regulated by general privacy laws in the US (state-level) and HK (Cap 486), but China has specific PIPL provisions for employer processing of employee personal information. / 员工数据隐私在美国由州级一般隐私法规制，在香港由Cap 486规制，但中国《个人信息保护法》对雇主处理员工个人信息有专门条款。
cn_claim: 依据《个人信息保护法》第13条、第28条，用人单位处理员工个人信息须具有明确、合理目的，并限于实现处理目的的最小范围。处理员工敏感个人信息（如生物识别、宗教信仰、医疗健康）须取得个人单独同意，并向个人告知处理目的、方式及信息种类。
us_claim: Under US federal law, there is no comprehensive privacy statute. Employee data privacy is regulated by state laws (e.g., California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) as amended by CPRA, Illinois Biometric Information Privacy Act (BIPA)). The ADA and FMLA impose confidentiality requirements on medical information. See 42 U.S.C. §12112(d)(3)(B) (ADA medical confidentiality); 775 ILCS 14/1 (BIPA).
hk_claim: Under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap 486) and the Code of Practice on Human Resource Management, employers must comply with data protection principles (purpose, accuracy, retention, security) when collecting and using employee personal data. Employees have the right to access and correct their personal data. See Cap 486 s.35-36; PCPD Code of Practice on HR Management (2020).
notes: 三法域部分映射：员工数据隐私在三法域均受保护，但法律架构不同。中国法（PIPL Art. 13, 28）对雇主处理员工数据有专门限制（单独同意+最小范围），美国法依赖州法碎片化（CCPA/BIPA）和特定联邦法（ADA/FMLA），香港法依赖一般隐私法（Cap 486）和人力资源实务守则。三者体现了中国专门立法主义、美国州权实验主义和英国自律监管传统的差异。

fact_summary: Labor arbitration is a required dispute resolution mechanism in China and HK (Labour Tribunal), while the US uses voluntary arbitration under FAA and NLRA grievance procedures. / 劳动仲裁在中国和香港（劳资审裁处）是强制争议解决机制，而美国使用《联邦仲裁法》下的自愿仲裁和NLRA申诉程序。
cn_claim: 依据《劳动争议调解仲裁法》第5条，劳动争议仲裁是诉讼前置程序，未经仲裁不得直接向法院起诉。劳动争议由劳动合同履行地或用人单位所在地的劳动争议仲裁委员会管辖。仲裁裁决一般具有终局性（小额/标准案件），但对非终局裁决可在15日内向法院起诉。
us_claim: Under US federal law, labor arbitration is not a mandatory prerequisite to court litigation for statutory claims (e.g., Title VII, FLSA). However, collective bargaining agreements typically include grievance-arbitration procedures under the NLRA. Individual arbitration agreements are enforceable under the FAA. See 9 U.S.C. §1-16; Steelworkers v. Warrior & Gulf Navigation Co., 363 U.S. 574 (1960) (labor arbitration).
hk_claim: Under the Labour Tribunal Ordinance (Cap 25), the Labour Tribunal has exclusive jurisdiction over employment claims up to HK$800,000. Parties must file claims with the Labour Tribunal before resorting to higher courts. The Tribunal encourages mediation and may refer parties to mediation before adjudication. See Cap 25 s.6; s.9.
notes: 三法域部分映射：劳动仲裁/争议解决机制在三法域功能相似但结构不同。中国法（Labor Dispute Mediation and Arbitration Law Art. 5）实行强制仲裁前置，美国法（FAA/NLRA）实行自愿仲裁（集体协议）或诉讼自由选择，香港法（Labour Tribunal Ordinance Cap 25）实行审裁处专属管辖。三者均试图通过专门机制快速解决劳动纠纷，但程序自由 vs 强制前置的差异显著。

fact_summary: Retirement age and pension obligations differ: mandatory retirement is abolished in the US (ADEA), gender-differentiated in China (men 60/women 50-55), and not statutorily mandated in HK but common in contracts. / 退休年龄和养老金义务不同：美国（ADEA）废除强制退休年龄，中国实行性别差异化退休（男60/女50-55），香港无制定法强制退休年龄但合同中常见。
cn_claim: 依据《国务院关于工人退休、退职的暂行办法》（国发〔1978〕104号），中国实行法定退休年龄制度：男职工60周岁，女干部55周岁，女工人50周岁。特殊工种可提前退休。2024年启动渐进式延迟退休改革，计划逐步将退休年龄延迟。
us_claim: Under the Age Discrimination in Employment Act (ADEA) 29 U.S.C. §623, mandatory retirement is generally prohibited for employees aged 40 and older. Employers may not compel retirement based on age, except for bona fide occupational qualifications (BFOQ) or high-level executives with pension benefits over $44,000/year. See 29 U.S.C. §623(f)(1).
hk_claim: Hong Kong does not have a statutory retirement age applicable to all employees. The Retirement Age Ordinance was repealed. However, many employment contracts and pension schemes specify a retirement age (commonly 60 or 65). The Mandatory Provident Fund (MPF) scheme allows access to accrued benefits at age 65. See Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Ordinance (Cap 485) s.14.
notes: 三法域部分映射：退休年龄制度在三法域差异显著。中国法实行性别差异化的强制退休（男60/女50-55），美国法（ADEA §623）禁止强制退休（保护40岁以上），香港法无强制退休但合同和MPF制度（Cap 485）设定65岁领取门槛。三者反映了对老龄劳动力的不同态度：中国以退休释放就业岗位，美国以保护年龄歧视为优先，香港以契约自由和养老金制度引导退休。

fact_summary: A corporation is criminally prosecuted for environmental violations in the US under respondeat superior, while China recognizes unit crimes (单位犯罪) under Criminal Law Art. 30, and HK corporate criminal liability relies on identification theory and attribution of senior officers' conduct. / 美国依据respondeat superior原则对公司环境犯罪提起刑事起诉，中国《刑法》第30条承认单位犯罪，香港公司刑事责任依赖识别理论和高管行为的归因。
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第30条，公司、企业、事业单位、机关、团体实施的危害社会的行为，法律规定为单位犯罪的，应当负刑事责任。单位犯罪的，对单位判处罚金，并对其直接负责的主管人员和其他直接责任人员判处刑罚。中国单位犯罪采取双罚制，要求犯罪意志体现单位整体意志。
us_claim: Under US federal law, a corporation may be held criminally liable for the acts of its employees under the doctrine of respondeat superior if the employee was acting within the scope of employment and with intent to benefit the corporation. See New York Central & Hudson River Railroad Co. v. United States, 212 U.S. 481 (1909); United States v. Bank of New England, N.A., 821 F.2d 844 (1st Cir. 1984). The Model Penal Code (MPC §2.07) adopts a more restrictive standard for state law.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, a corporation may be held criminally liable through the 'identification theory' (also called the 'alter ego' or 'directing mind' theory). The acts and mental state of senior officers who constitute the 'directing mind and will' of the company may be attributed to the company. See Tesco Supermarkets Ltd v. Nattrass [1972] AC 153; Re Supply of Ready Mixed Concrete [1995] 1 AC 456. The common law does not recognize general corporate criminal liability based on vicarious liability alone.
notes: 三法域直接冲突：美国法（federal）采用respondeat superior（代理责任）将任何员工行为归责于公司（New York Central），中国法采用单位犯罪（unit crime）要求单位整体意志和双罚制，香港法采用identification theory仅将高管行为归责于公司（Tesco Supermarkets v. Nattrass）。差异反映了美国法对法人犯罪的扩张性态度、中国法对集体意志的强调以及英国普通法对公司人格的严格保护。

fact_summary: Conspiracy liability requires an agreement between two or more persons in the US under 18 U.S.C. §371, while China requires a conspiracy to commit a crime with at least two persons under Criminal Law Art. 25, and HK recognizes conspiracy under common law and the Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200) s.159A. / 共谋罪在美国《联邦刑法》第371条要求两人以上协议，中国《刑法》第25条要求至少两人共同犯罪故意，香港普通法及《刑事罪行条例》Cap 200第159A条承认共谋罪。
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第25条，共同犯罪是指二人以上共同故意犯罪。二人以上共同过失犯罪，不以共同犯罪论处；应当负刑事责任的，按照他们所犯的罪分别处罚。中国法不承认单方共谋（unilateral conspiracy），要求共犯之间具有共同犯罪故意和意思联络。
us_claim: Under 18 U.S.C. §371, it is a crime if two or more persons conspire to commit an offense against the United States or to defraud the United States. The government must prove an agreement, an unlawful objective, and an overt act by one conspirator in furtherance of the agreement. The Pinkerton rule (Pinkerton v. United States, 328 U.S. 640 (1946)) holds conspirators liable for foreseeable substantive crimes committed by co-conspirators. See also United States v. Alvarez, 755 F.3d 490 (7th Cir. 2014).
hk_claim: Under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200) section 159A and common law, a person is guilty of conspiracy to commit an offence if he agrees with any other person or persons that a course of conduct shall be pursued which will necessarily amount to or involve the commission of any offence by one or more parties to the agreement. Conspiracy requires an agreement between at least two persons (bilateral approach). See R v. Anderson [1986] AC 27; R v. Churchill [1967] 2 AC 224.
notes: 三法域直接冲突：共谋罪（conspiracy）在三法域均要求多人协议，但构成要件不同。美国法（18 U.S.C. §371）允许单方共谋理论（unilateral approach）和Pinkerton规则扩大共犯责任，中国法（Criminal Law Art. 25）要求双向共同故意和意思联络，香港法（Cap 200 s.159A + R v. Anderson）要求双边协议。差异反映了美国法对犯罪组织的扩张性打击、中国法对主观恶意的强调以及英国普通法对协议要素的严格解释。

fact_summary: Self-defense and justifiable homicide standards differ: US uses reasonable belief of imminent threat (Stand Your Ground in some states), China uses 'clearly excessive' defense standard under Criminal Law Art. 20, and HK follows English common law proportionality test. / 正当防卫和正当杀人标准不同：美国部分州使用合理相信即时威胁（不退让法），中国《刑法》第20条使用'明显超过必要限度'标准，香港遵循英国普通法比例性测试。
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第20条，为了使国家、公共利益、本人或者他人的人身、财产和其他权利免受正在进行的不法侵害，而采取的制止不法侵害的行为，对不法侵害人造成损害的，属于正当防卫，不负刑事责任。正当防卫明显超过必要限度造成重大损害的，应当负刑事责任，但是应当减轻或者免除处罚。对正在进行行凶、杀人、抢劫、强奸、绑架以及其他严重危及人身安全的暴力犯罪，采取防卫行为，造成不法侵害人伤亡的，不属于防卫过当，不负刑事责任。
us_claim: Under US state law, self-defense generally requires a reasonable belief of imminent threat of death or great bodily harm. Some states have 'Stand Your Ground' laws (e.g., Florida Statute §776.013) eliminating the duty to retreat before using force in public. The 'reasonable belief' standard is subjective/objective. See People v. Goetz, 68 N.Y.2d 96 (1986). The Model Penal Code (MPC §3.04) requires the actor's belief to be both honest and reasonable.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the defense of self-defense (or private defense) requires the use of reasonable force to repel an unjust attack. The force used must be proportionate to the threat. There is no statutory 'Stand Your Ground' provision; the common law duty to retreat if safely possible may apply in some circumstances. See R v. Clegg [1995] 1 AC 482; R v. Palmer (1971) 55 Cr App R 223.
notes: 三法域直接冲突：正当防卫标准在三法域根本不同。美国部分州采用Stand Your Ground（无退让义务）+合理相信标准，中国法采用'明显超过必要限度'但允许无限防卫权（特殊防卫），香港普通法采用比例性测试（proportionality）且可能要求退让。差异反映了美国法对个人自卫权的扩张性保护、中国法对暴力犯罪受害者的特殊防卫授权以及英国普通法对武力使用克制的传统。

fact_summary: Plea bargaining is a central feature of US criminal procedure (Fed. R. Crim. P. 11), non-existent in China as a formal institution, and limited in HK to sentence indication and charge bargaining without formal plea agreements. / 辩诉交易是美国刑事程序的核心特征（联邦刑事诉讼规则第11条），在中国作为正式制度不存在，在香港仅限于量刑指示和控罪协商而无正式认罪协议。
cn_claim: 中国《刑事诉讼法》未承认辩诉交易（plea bargaining）制度。2018年《刑事诉讼法》确立的认罪认罚从宽制度不同于美国辩诉交易：犯罪嫌疑人、被告人自愿如实供述自己的罪行，承认指控的犯罪事实，愿意接受处罚的，可以依法从宽处理。但该制度由检察机关主导，不存在控辩双方就罪名或量刑进行协商的交易空间。
us_claim: Under the Federal Rules of Criminal Procedure Rule 11, a defendant may enter a guilty plea to a charged offense or a lesser-included offense in exchange for concessions from the prosecutor, such as dismissal of other charges or a sentencing recommendation. The court must ensure the plea is voluntary and has a factual basis. See Fed. R. Crim. P. 11; Bordenkircher v. Hayes, 434 U.S. 357 (1978); Missouri v. Frye, 566 U.S. 134 (2012).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, there is no formal plea bargaining system equivalent to the US. However, the prosecution may offer a sentence indication (R v. Turner [1970] 2 QB 321) or agree to a lesser charge (charge bargaining) in exchange for a guilty plea. The judge retains ultimate discretion over sentencing. The Criminal Procedure Ordinance (Cap 221) does not provide for binding plea agreements. See HKSAR v. Ngan Man Ying [1999] 2 HKLRD 251.
notes: 三法域直接冲突：辩诉交易（plea bargaining）是美国刑事司法的核心机制（Fed. R. Crim. P. 11），在中国被认罪认罚从宽制度取代（无真正交易空间），在香港仅允许非正式的量刑指示和控罪协商。差异反映了美国对抗制诉讼的效率需求（90%以上案件通过plea解决）、中国职权主义诉讼对真实发现的要求（禁止控辩交易罪名）以及香港普通法对司法量刑裁量权的坚守。

fact_summary: Deferred prosecution agreements (DPA) are widely used for corporate crime in the US, unavailable in China, and newly introduced in HK under the Crime (International Co-operation) and Anti-Money Laundering Ordinance amendments. / 暂缓起诉协议（DPA）在美国广泛用于公司犯罪，在中国不可用，在香港通过《刑事事宜相互法律协助条例》及反洗钱条例修订新近引入。
cn_claim: 中国《刑事诉讼法》未承认暂缓起诉协议（DPA）或不起诉协议（NPA）制度。中国检察机关对单位犯罪作出不起诉决定的，依据《刑事诉讼法》第177条第2款（酌定不起诉），但不存在类似美国DPA的司法监督合规协议机制。企业合规改革（2020年试点）允许企业合规整改后酌定不起诉，但本质上是检察机关裁量而非法院监督的协议。
us_claim: Under US federal law, deferred prosecution agreements (DPAs) and non-prosecution agreements (NPAs) are standard tools for resolving corporate criminal liability. The DOJ enters into a DPA with a corporate defendant, deferring prosecution in exchange for compliance obligations, fines, and cooperation. See DOJ Justice Manual §9-28.000 et seq.; United States v. HSBC Bank USA, N.A., 863 F.3d 125 (2d Cir. 2017). DPAs are subject to judicial oversight in some circuits. See United States v. Fokker Services B.V., 818 F.3d 733 (D.C. Cir. 2016).
hk_claim: Hong Kong introduced a limited deferred prosecution agreement (DPA) regime for certain serious offenses (e.g., bribery, fraud) under the Criminal Procedure (Amendment) Ordinance 2021 and the Independent Commission Against Corruption Ordinance (Cap 204) amendments. The DPA requires High Court approval and is available only for corporate defendants. The regime is modeled on the UK DPA system. See Cap 221 (as amended by Ordinance 16 of 2021).
notes: 三法域直接冲突：公司犯罪暂缓起诉（DPA）在美国是标准执法工具（DOJ Justice Manual §9-28），在中国不存在（虽有企业合规不起诉试点但无司法协议），香港在2021年引入但适用范围极窄（仅严重罪行+高院批准）。差异反映了美国法对监管合规的灵活执法需求、中国法对刑事起诉法定主义的坚持以及香港普通法传统对程序正式性的保守态度。

fact_summary: The exclusionary rule (Mapp v. Ohio) bars illegally obtained evidence in US criminal trials, while China has a weaker exclusionary rule under CPL Art. 56 for confessions but not for physical evidence, and HK follows common law voluntariness test for confessions but not a strict constitutional exclusionary rule. / 非法证据排除规则在美国（Mapp v. Ohio）禁止非法取得的证据，中国《刑事诉讼法》第56条对供述有较弱排除规则但对物证不适用，香港对供述采用普通法自愿性测试但无严格宪法排除规则。
cn_claim: 依据《刑事诉讼法》第56条，采用刑讯逼供等非法方法收集的犯罪嫌疑人、被告人供述和采用暴力、威胁等非法方法收集的证人证言、被害人陈述，应当予以排除。收集物证、书证不符合法定程序，可能严重影响司法公正的，应当予以补正或者作出合理解释；不能补正或者作出合理解释的，对该证据应当予以排除。中国法对物证排除采取'补正优先'原则。
us_claim: Under the Fourth Amendment and the exclusionary rule, evidence obtained in violation of a defendant's constitutional rights (e.g., illegal search and seizure) is inadmissible in criminal trials. The rule applies to both physical evidence and statements. See Mapp v. Ohio, 367 U.S. 643 (1961); Wong Sun v. United States, 371 U.S. 471 (1963). The 'fruit of the poisonous tree' doctrine extends exclusion to derivative evidence. See Silverthorne Lumber Co. v. United States, 251 U.S. 385 (1920).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, involuntary confessions obtained by threats, promises, or oppression are inadmissible (the 'voluntariness rule'). However, there is no general constitutional exclusionary rule for illegally obtained physical evidence. The court may exclude evidence under its discretion if admission would be unfair to the defendant. See Ibrahim v. R [1914] AC 599; R v. Sang [1980] AC 402. The Bill of Rights Ordinance (Cap 383) Art. 11 incorporates the right against self-incrimination but not a full exclusionary rule.
notes: 三法域直接冲突：非法证据排除（exclusionary rule）在美国（Mapp v. Ohio）是宪法性强制规则，覆盖物证和供述且适用'毒树之果'；中国法（CPL Art. 56）对供述强制排除但对物证允许'补正'；香港普通法（Ibrahim v. R）仅对非自愿供述排除且对物证无排除规则。差异反映了美国法对宪法权利的刚性保护、中国法对真实发现的优先考量以及英国普通法对证据相关性的传统尊重。

fact_summary: Three-strikes laws impose mandatory life sentences for repeat offenders in some US states (e.g., California Penal Code §667), but no equivalent habitual offender statute exists in China or Hong Kong with such mandatory sentencing severity. / 三振出局法在美国部分州（如加州刑法第667条）对累犯强制终身监禁，但中国和香港不存在同等强制量刑严厉性的惯犯法案。
cn_claim: 中国《刑法》第65条、第66条规定累犯应当从重处罚，但不存在类似美国三振出局法的强制终身监禁或强制特定刑期制度。中国累犯从重的幅度由法官在法定刑幅度内裁量，且对累犯不得适用缓刑和假释，但不存在强制最低刑期或 mandatory sentencing 制度。
us_claim: Under California Penal Code §667 (Three Strikes Law), a defendant convicted of a felony who has two or more prior serious or violent felony convictions must be sentenced to a mandatory term of 25 years to life in prison. Similar habitual offender laws exist in other states (e.g., Washington, Texas). The US Supreme Court upheld the constitutionality of three-strikes laws in Ewing v. California, 538 U.S. 11 (2003). See Lockyer v. Andrade, 538 U.S. 63 (2003).
hk_claim: Hong Kong does not have a 'three-strikes' or mandatory life sentencing regime for habitual offenders. Sentencing is at the discretion of the judiciary, guided by Court of Appeal guidelines (e.g., HKSAR v. Cheung Kwai Chuen [2009] 6 HKLRD 514). While previous convictions are an aggravating factor, there is no statutory mandatory sentence based solely on the number of prior convictions. See R v. Sargeant (1974) 60 Cr App R 74.
notes: 三法域不对称：三振出局法（three-strikes laws）是美国特有的量刑制度（California Penal Code §667），中国和香港均无类似强制终身监禁的惯犯法案。这反映了美国法对累犯惩罚的严厉化趋势（Ewing v. California）和量刑法定主义，而中国法和香港法保留法官量刑裁量权。差异根植于美国法对'选择性失能'（selective incapacitation）的依赖和英国普通法对司法独立量刑的传统。

fact_summary: Plea bargaining resulting in sentencing discounts is a foundational feature of US federal criminal procedure but absent in China and Hong Kong where sentencing is judicially determined. / 辩诉交易带来的量刑折扣是美国联邦刑事程序的基础特征，但在中国和香港不存在，两地量刑由法官决定。
cn_claim: 中国《刑事诉讼法》第15条确立的认罪认罚从宽制度允许对自愿认罪认罚的犯罪嫌疑人、被告人从宽处理，但此'从宽'由检察机关提出量刑建议，法院最终裁量，不存在控辩双方就量刑进行交易的空间。中国的量刑建议制度不同于美国的plea bargaining，法院不受量刑建议的约束（除非采纳）。
us_claim: Under the Federal Rules of Criminal Procedure Rule 11 and US Sentencing Guidelines, plea bargaining is central to the federal criminal justice system. Defendants who plead guilty typically receive a sentence discount (e.g., acceptance of responsibility reduction under USSG §3E1.1) of 20-35% below the guideline range. The government may recommend a specific sentence or agree not to oppose a downward departure. See Fed. R. Crim. P. 11(c); USSG §3E1.1; United States v. Booker, 543 U.S. 220 (2005).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the prosecution may indicate the sentence it considers appropriate if the defendant pleads guilty (R v. Turner [1970] 2 QB 321), but the judge retains full sentencing discretion. There is no formal sentence discount or guideline-based reduction for guilty pleas, though early guilty pleas are recognized as a mitigating factor in sentencing guidelines. See HKSAR v. Ngan Man Ying [1999] 2 HKLRD 251; HKSAR v. Wong Wai Chun [2003] 3 HKLRD 743.
notes: 三法域不对称：美国法将辩诉交易（plea bargaining）和量刑折扣作为刑事司法系统的核心（联邦90%以上案件通过plea解决），中国认罪认罚从宽制度虽有类似功能但本质上是检察机关主导的量刑建议（法院保留裁量权），香港法无正式认罪折扣制度（仅将 early guilty plea 作为减刑因素）。差异反映了美国对抗制诉讼的效率主义、中国职权主义对司法真实的要求以及香港普通法对量刑裁量权的保守保护。

fact_summary: The death penalty is abolished in HK (since 1993) and partially restricted in US states (23 states abolished), while China retains and actively uses capital punishment for a wide range of offenses including non-violent crimes. / 死刑在香港已废除（1993年），在美国部分州废除（23州），但中国保留并对包括非暴力犯罪在内的广泛罪行积极适用死刑。
cn_claim: 中国《刑法》第48条规定，死刑只适用于罪行极其严重的犯罪分子。死刑包括死刑立即执行和死刑缓期二年执行。中国目前保留死刑的罪名约46个，涵盖危害国家安全、故意杀人、强奸、抢劫、毒品犯罪、贪污贿赂等。最高人民法院复核所有死刑立即执行案件。2023年《刑法修正案（十二）》维持死刑罪名体系。
us_claim: Under US federal and state law, the death penalty is permitted for murder and certain federal crimes (e.g., treason, terrorism). However, 23 states and the District of Columbia have abolished the death penalty. The Supreme Court has imposed limitations (e.g., prohibiting execution of minors and intellectually disabled persons under Roper v. Simmons, 543 U.S. 551 (2005) and Atkins v. Virginia, 536 U.S. 304 (2002)). See 18 U.S.C. §3591-3598 (federal death penalty).
hk_claim: Hong Kong abolished the death penalty in 1993 through the Crimes (Amendment) Ordinance (Ordinance 24 of 1993). The death penalty for murder was replaced by mandatory life imprisonment. Hong Kong is a party to the Second Optional Protocol to the International Covenant on Civil and Political Rights (ICCPR), which abolishes the death penalty. See HKSAR v. Lau Cheong [2002] 3 HKLRD 657; Bill of Rights Ordinance (Cap 383) Art. 6.
notes: 三法域不对称：死刑制度在三法域存在根本性差异。中国保留死刑并适用于46个罪名（包括非暴力犯罪如贪污贿赂），美国23州废除死刑但联邦和27州保留（限制于严重谋杀和特定联邦罪），香港自1993年完全废除死刑并加入ICCPR第二任择议定书。差异反映了不同法域对刑罚报应主义、人权保护以及国际人权公约的接受程度。

fact_summary: Homicide/murder is criminalized in all three jurisdictions with intentional killing as the core element, though degrees and sentencing vary. / 三法域均将杀人/谋杀罪定为刑事犯罪，以故意杀害为核心要素，但分级和量刑不同。
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第232条，故意杀人的，处死刑、无期徒刑或者十年以上有期徒刑；情节较轻的，处三年以上十年以下有期徒刑。中国法将故意杀人作为单一罪名，未区分一级/二级谋杀，但法官可在法定幅度内根据情节裁量。
us_claim: Under US state and federal law, homicide is classified into degrees: first-degree murder (premeditated intent), second-degree murder (intentional but unpremeditated), voluntary manslaughter (intentional killing in heat of passion), and involuntary manslaughter (criminal negligence). See generally MPC §210.1-210.4; California Penal Code §187-192. Capital murder may carry the death penalty in some jurisdictions. See 18 U.S.C. §1111 (federal murder).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, murder is defined at common law as the unlawful killing of a human being with malice aforethought. There are no degrees of murder. Murder carries a mandatory sentence of life imprisonment (Murder Ordinance, Cap 212, s.2). Manslaughter (unlawful killing without malice aforethought) is punishable by a discretionary term of imprisonment. See HKSAR v. Chan Wan [2000] 1 HKLRD 113; R v. Moloney [1985] AC 905.
notes: 三法域映射：故意杀人（homicide/murder）是三法域刑法的共同核心犯罪。中国法（Criminal Law Art. 232）以单一罪名+法定量刑幅度处理，美国法以degree system（一级/二级谋杀+ manslaughter）精细分级，香港普通法以malice aforethought为要件且mandatory life sentence。三者均保护生命权，但量刑结构差异反映了大陆法概括式立法、美国法精细化分级以及英国普通法mandatory sentencing传统。

fact_summary: Theft is criminalized in all three jurisdictions with the taking of property without consent as the core element. / 三法域均将盗窃罪定为刑事犯罪，以未经同意取走财产为核心要素。
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第264条，盗窃公私财物，数额较大的，或者多次盗窃、入户盗窃、携带凶器盗窃、扒窃的，处三年以下有期徒刑、拘役或者管制，并处或者单处罚金。中国盗窃罪以非法占有为目的，秘密窃取公私财物，且须达到'数额较大'标准或符合特定行为类型。
us_claim: Under US state and federal law, theft (larceny) is defined as the unlawful taking and carrying away of the personal property of another with intent to permanently deprive the owner. See generally MPC §223.1-223.9; state theft statutes (e.g., California Penal Code §484). Grading depends on the value of the property. Federal theft statutes apply to interstate commerce and federal property. See 18 U.S.C. §641 (theft of government property).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, theft is defined in the Theft Ordinance (Cap 210) section 2: a person is guilty of theft if he dishonestly appropriates property belonging to another with the intention of permanently depriving the other of it. The mens rea requires dishonesty (tested by the Ghosh test: R v. Ghosh [1982] QB 1053) and intention to permanently deprive. See Cap 210 s.2-4.
notes: 三法域映射：盗窃罪（theft/larceny）在三法域均以'非法占有目的+未经同意取走'为核心。中国法（Criminal Law Art. 264）附加'数额较大'门槛或特定行为类型，美国法（MPC §223.1-223.9 + 州法）以价值分级，香港法（Cap 210 s.2）采用Ghosh测试的 dishonesty 要件。三者均保护财产权，但'数额较大'门槛和dishonesty测试反映了不同法域对犯罪圈定和主观恶意的不同处理。

fact_summary: Fraud is criminalized in all three jurisdictions with deception for financial gain as the core element. / 三法域均将欺诈罪定为刑事犯罪，以欺骗获取经济利益为核心要素。
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第266条，诈骗公私财物，数额较大的，处三年以下有期徒刑、拘役或者管制，并处或者单处罚金。中国诈骗罪以虚构事实、隐瞒真相的方法，骗取数额较大的公私财物。单位不能构成普通诈骗罪（须通过合同诈骗等特殊罪名追究）。
us_claim: Under US federal law, wire fraud (18 U.S.C. §1343) and mail fraud (18 U.S.C. §1341) criminalize schemes to defraud using interstate communications or the postal system. The elements include a scheme to defraud, intent to deceive, and use of wire/mail in furtherance. See United States v. D'Amato, 39 F.3d 1249 (2d Cir. 1994). State fraud statutes vary but generally require misrepresentation of material fact, intent to deceive, and reliance causing damages. See generally MPC §223.3.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, fraud is defined in the Theft Ordinance (Cap 210) section 16A: a person is guilty of fraud if he dishonestly makes a false representation, or fails to disclose information, or abuses position, intending to make a gain for himself or another or to cause loss to another. The Fraud Act 2006 (UK) model was not adopted in HK. See Cap 210 s.16A; R v. HKSAR [2017] 20 HKCFAR 43.
notes: 三法域映射：欺诈罪（fraud）在三法域均以'欺骗行为+意图获利/致损'为核心。中国法（Criminal Law Art. 266）要求'数额较大'且排除单位犯罪，美国法（18 U.S.C. §1341/1343）以wire/mail fraud为典型工具，香港法（Cap 210 s.16A）以false representation/abuse of position为要件。三者均保护财产交易安全，但美国法对通信工具的专门规制和英国普通法 dishonesty 传统形成了独特路径。

fact_summary: Bribery of public officials is criminalized in all three jurisdictions with the offer/acceptance of an undue advantage as the core element. / 三法域均将贿赂公职人员定为刑事犯罪，以提供/接受不正当利益为核心要素。
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第385条、第389条，国家工作人员利用职务上的便利，索取他人财物的，或者非法收受他人财物，为他人谋取利益的，是受贿罪。为谋取不正当利益，给予国家工作人员以财物的，是行贿罪。中国法对受贿罪和行贿罪实行双罚制，且对非国家工作人员行贿另有专门规定（第163条、第164条）。
us_claim: Under US federal law, bribery of public officials is prohibited under 18 U.S.C. §201 (bribery of federal public officials). The elements include: (1) giving/offering something of value; (2) to a public official; (3) with intent to influence an official act. The Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) 15 U.S.C. §78dd-1 prohibits bribery of foreign officials. See United States v. Sun-Diamond Growers, 526 U.S. 398 (1999); United States v. McDonnell, 579 U.S. 550 (2016).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, bribery of public servants is prohibited under the Prevention of Bribery Ordinance (Cap 201) sections 3-4. It is an offense for a public servant to solicit or accept an advantage without lawful permission, and for any person to offer an advantage to a public servant. The ICAC (Independent Commission Against Corruption) enforces Cap 201. See Cap 201 s.3-4; HKSAR v. Li Defan [2015] 18 HKCFAR 237.
notes: 三法域映射：贿赂罪（bribery）在三法域均以'不正当利益+职务关联'为核心。中国法（Criminal Law Art. 385/389）区分受贿/行贿且双罚，美国法（18 U.S.C. §201 + FCPA）覆盖国内和外国官员，香港法（Cap 201 s.3-4 + ICAC）以独立反腐机构为执法特色。三者体现了国际反腐公约（UNCAC, OECD Anti-Bribery Convention）的国内法转化，但美国法对FCPA的域外适用最为突出。

fact_summary: Criminal conspiracy to commit an offense is recognized in all three jurisdictions with an agreement between two or more persons as the core element. / 三法域均承认共谋犯罪，以两人以上协议为核心要素。
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第25条，共同犯罪是指二人以上共同故意犯罪。中国法要求共犯之间具有共同犯罪故意和意思联络，不承认单方共谋。 conspiratorial liability requires the mutual intention of all parties to commit the target crime. 教唆犯、帮助犯均须基于共同犯罪故意。
us_claim: Under US federal law, 18 U.S.C. §371 criminalizes conspiracy to commit an offense against the United States or to defraud the United States. The government must prove an agreement between two or more persons, an unlawful objective, and an overt act in furtherance. See United States v. Jimenez Recio, 537 U.S. 270 (2003). The Wharton Rule limits conspiracy liability for crimes requiring two persons (e.g., dueling). See Wharton v. United States, 153 U.S. 155 (1894).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, conspiracy is defined in the Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200) section 159A: a person is guilty of conspiracy to commit an offense if he agrees with any other person or persons that a course of conduct shall be pursued which will necessarily amount to or involve the commission of any offense by one or more parties to the agreement. See Cap 200 s.159A; R v. Anderson [1986] AC 27.
notes: 三法域映射：共谋罪（conspiracy）在三法域均要求'两人以上协议+犯罪目的'。中国法（Criminal Law Art. 25）强调共同故意和意思联络，美国法（18 U.S.C. §371）允许overt act要求且适用Wharton Rule，香港法（Cap 200 s.159A + R v. Anderson）要求双边协议。三者均试图打击组织性犯罪，但美国法对 conspiracy 的扩张性适用（Pinkerton规则）和英国普通法的严格协议要求形成对比。

fact_summary: Criminal defendants have the right to counsel in all three jurisdictions, though the scope and timing of appointment differ. / 三法域刑事被告均享有律师辩护权，但指定辩护的范围和时机不同。
cn_claim: 依据《刑事诉讼法》第35条、第278条，犯罪嫌疑人、被告人除自己行使辩护权以外，还可以委托一至二人作为辩护人。犯罪嫌疑人、被告人是盲、聋、哑人，或者是尚未完全丧失辨认或者控制自己行为能力的精神病人，没有委托辩护人的，人民法院、人民检察院和公安机关应当通知法律援助机构指派律师为其提供辩护。可能判处无期徒刑、死刑的，应当指定辩护。
us_claim: Under the Sixth Amendment and Gideon v. Wainwright, 372 U.S. 335 (1963), indigent criminal defendants have a constitutional right to counsel in felony cases. The right extends to misdemeanor cases where imprisonment is imposed (Argersinger v. Hamlin, 407 U.S. 25 (1972)). Counsel must be appointed at the first appearance before a judicial officer. See 18 U.S.C. §3006A; Rothgery v. Gillespie County, 554 U.S. 191 (2008).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the right to counsel is protected under the Basic Law (Art. 35) and the Bill of Rights Ordinance (Cap 383) Art. 11. Legal aid is available for criminal defendants who pass the means test through the Legal Aid Department (Cap 91) or the Duty Lawyer Service (for Magistrates' Court and juvenile cases). See Cap 91 s.5; HKSAR v. Lee Ming Tee [2001] 4 HKLRD 57.
notes: 三法域映射：刑事辩护权（right to counsel）在三法域均受宪法/基本法保障。中国法（CPL Art. 35, 278）以强制指定辩护（死刑/无期/未成年/盲聋哑）为特点，美国法（Sixth Amendment + Gideon v. Wainwright）以所有重罪贫困被告强制指定为特点，香港法（Basic Law Art. 35 + Cap 91）以法律援助和值班律师服务为特点。三者均体现国际人权公约（ICCPR Art. 14(3)(d)）的最低标准。

fact_summary: The burden of proof in criminal trials is 'beyond a reasonable doubt' in the US and HK, while China uses the standard of 'clear and convincing evidence' (证据确实、充分) for guilty verdicts. / 刑事审判证明标准在美国和香港为'beyond a reasonable doubt'，中国使用'证据确实、充分'的标准。
cn_claim: 依据《刑事诉讼法》第55条，对一切案件的判处都要重证据，重调查研究，不轻信口供。只有被告人供述，没有其他证据的，不能认定被告人有罪和处以刑罚；没有被告人供述，证据确实、充分的，可以认定被告人有罪和处以刑罚。'证据确实、充分'应当符合以下条件：（一）定罪量刑的事实都有证据证明；（二）据以定案的证据均经法定程序查证属实；（三）综合全案证据，对所认定事实已排除合理怀疑。
us_claim: Under the Due Process Clause and the Fifth/Sixth Amendments, the prosecution must prove every element of a crime beyond a reasonable doubt. See In re Winship, 397 U.S. 358 (1970); Jackson v. Virginia, 443 U.S. 307 (1979). The burden of proof never shifts to the defendant. See Mullaney v. Wilbur, 421 U.S. 684 (1975). The reasonable doubt standard is the highest standard of proof in the US legal system. See Victor v. Nebraska, 511 U.S. 1 (1994).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the prosecution must prove its case beyond a reasonable doubt. The judge must direct the jury (or himself in a judge-alone trial) that they must be sure of the defendant's guilt before convicting. See Woolmington v. DPP [1935] AC 462; HKSAR v. Lee Ming Tee [2001] 4 HKLRD 57. The burden of proof remains on the prosecution throughout the trial, and the defendant is presumed innocent until proven guilty.
notes: 三法域映射：刑事证明标准（burden of proof）在美国和香港均为beyond a reasonable doubt，中国法（CPL Art. 55）表述为'证据确实、充分'并在2012年修法时明确加入'排除合理怀疑'。三者均体现无罪推定（presumption of innocence）原则，但表述和司法实践存在差异。美国法（In re Winship）将其宪法化，中国法逐步向国际标准靠拢，香港法遵循英国普通法传统（Woolmington v. DPP）。

fact_summary: Statutes of limitations apply to criminal prosecutions in all three jurisdictions, though the periods and exceptions differ. / 三法域刑事追诉均适用时效制度，但期限和例外不同。
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第87条、第88条，犯罪经过下列期限不再追诉：（一）法定最高刑为不满五年有期徒刑的，经过五年；（二）法定最高刑为五年以上不满十年有期徒刑的，经过十年；（三）法定最高刑为十年以上有期徒刑的，经过十五年；（四）法定最高刑为无期徒刑、死刑的，经过二十年。如果二十年以后认为必须追诉的，须报请最高人民检察院核准。
us_claim: Under US federal law, most non-capital offenses have a five-year statute of limitations (18 U.S.C. §3282). Certain offenses (e.g., murder, terrorism, child sexual abuse) have no statute of limitations. See 18 U.S.C. §3281-3290. State statutes of limitations vary widely. The limitations period generally begins when the crime is completed. See Toussie v. United States, 397 U.S. 112 (1970).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, there is no general statute of limitations for criminal prosecutions at common law or under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200). However, some statutory offenses have time limits (e.g., six months for summary offenses under the Magistrates Ordinance, Cap 227, s.26). Indictable offenses (including murder, rape, fraud) may be prosecuted at any time. See Cap 227 s.26; HKSAR v. Lau Cheong [2002] 3 HKLRD 657.
notes: 三法域映射：刑事追诉时效（statute of limitations）在三法域均存在但制度差异显著。中国法（Criminal Law Art. 87-88）以法定最高刑为基准设定5-20年时效，美国联邦法（18 U.S.C. §3282）以5年为一般标准，香港法对可公诉罪（indictable offenses）无一般时效限制。差异反映了大陆法对犯罪追诉效率的考量、美国法对诉讼终局性的追求以及英国普通法对严重犯罪不受时间限制的传统。

fact_summary: Environmental crimes are prosecuted against corporations and individuals in all three jurisdictions, but the standards of corporate liability and enforcement mechanisms differ significantly. / 三法域均对公司和个人提起环境犯罪起诉，但公司责任标准和执法机制差异显著。
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第338条、第339条，违反国家规定，排放、倾倒或者处置有放射性的废物、含传染病病原体的废物、有毒物质或者其他有害物质，严重污染环境的，构成污染环境罪。单位犯污染环境罪的，对单位判处罚金，并对其直接负责的主管人员和其他直接责任人员，依照各该条的规定处罚。
us_claim: Under US federal law, environmental crimes are prosecuted under statutes such as the Clean Water Act (33 U.S.C. §1319(c)), Clean Air Act (42 U.S.C. §7413(c)), and RCRA (42 U.S.C. §6928(d)). Corporations may be held criminally liable under respondeat superior for employee violations. See United States v. Park, 421 U.S. 658 (1975) (responsible corporate officer doctrine). The DOJ Environmental and Natural Resources Division handles prosecutions. See 33 U.S.C. §1319(c).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, environmental offenses are primarily statutory (e.g., Water Pollution Control Ordinance, Cap 358; Air Pollution Control Ordinance, Cap 311). Corporate liability generally requires the identification of a 'directing mind' or senior officer's culpability. The Environmental Protection Department enquires and the Department of Justice prosecutes. See Cap 358 s.8-12; Cap 311 s.10-12.
notes: 三法域部分映射：环境犯罪（environmental crimes）在三法域均受刑事制裁，但公司责任标准不同。中国法（Criminal Law Art. 338-339）采用单位犯罪双罚制，美国法采用respondeat superior + responsible corporate officer doctrine（Park标准），香港法采用identification theory。三者反映了不同法域对公司环境犯罪归责理论的差异：代理责任 vs 集体意志 vs 高管识别。

fact_summary: Cybercrime offenses (hacking, unauthorized access) are criminalized in all three jurisdictions, but the scope of computer-related offenses and extraterritorial application differ. / 三法域均将网络犯罪（黑客攻击、未授权访问）定为刑事犯罪，但计算机相关犯罪范围和域外适用不同。
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第285条、第286条，违反国家规定，侵入国家事务、国防建设、尖端科学技术领域的计算机信息系统的，处三年以下有期徒刑或者拘役。违反国家规定，对计算机信息系统功能进行删除、修改、增加、干扰，造成计算机信息系统不能正常运行，后果严重的，构成破坏计算机信息系统罪。
us_claim: Under US federal law, the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act (CFAA) 18 U.S.C. §1030 criminalizes unauthorized access to protected computers, exceeding authorized access, and causing damage. The CFAA applies to computers used in interstate commerce or communication. See Van Buren v. United States, 593 U.S. 374 (2021) (narrowing 'exceeds authorized access' to hacking, not violation of use policy). See 18 U.S.C. §1030(a)(1)-(7).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, computer-related offenses are defined in the Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200) sections 59-60 (unauthorized access to computer by telecommunication) and the Theft Ordinance (Cap 210) section 16A (fraud by false representation via computer). The Cybersecurity and Technology Crime Bureau of the Hong Kong Police Force handles cybercrime investigations. See Cap 200 s.59-60; HKSAR v. Au Yeung Ho Man [2017] 3 HKLRD 45.
notes: 三法域部分映射：网络犯罪（cybercrime）在三法域均受刑事规制，但覆盖范围不同。中国法（Criminal Law Art. 285-286）以特定领域计算机为首要保护对象，美国法（CFAA 18 U.S.C. §1030）覆盖所有州际商业计算机，香港法（Cap 200 s.59-60 + Cap 210 s.16A）以电信访问和欺诈为路径。Van Buren v. United States (2021) 对CFAA的限缩解释与香港法对'telecommunication'路径的依赖形成技术性对比。

fact_summary: Money laundering is criminalized in all three jurisdictions with the concealment of criminal proceeds as the core element, but predicate crime scope and customer due diligence requirements differ. / 三法域均将洗钱罪定为刑事犯罪，以隐瞒犯罪所得为核心要素，但上游犯罪范围和尽职调查要求不同。
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第191条，为掩饰、隐瞒毒品犯罪、黑社会性质的组织犯罪、恐怖活动犯罪、走私犯罪、贪污贿赂犯罪、破坏金融管理秩序犯罪、金融诈骗犯罪的所得及其产生的收益的来源和性质，提供资金账户、协助将财产转换为现金、金融票据、有价证券的，构成洗钱罪。中国法限定上游犯罪为七类。
us_claim: Under US federal law, money laundering is prohibited under 18 U.S.C. §1956 and §1957. Section 1956 requires the defendant to conduct a financial transaction knowing the property represents proceeds of a specified unlawful activity (SUA) with intent to conceal or promote further crime. The predicate offenses include over 200 federal and state crimes. See 18 U.S.C. §1956(c)(7); United States v. Santos, 553 U.S. 507 (2008). The Bank Secrecy Act (BSA) mandates customer due diligence. See 31 U.S.C. §5318.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, money laundering is prohibited under the Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing Ordinance (Cap 615) and the Drug Trafficking (Recovery of Proceeds) Ordinance (Cap 405). Cap 615 requires financial institutions to conduct customer due diligence (CDD) and ongoing monitoring. Money laundering is defined as dealing with property known or believed to represent proceeds of an indictable offense. See Cap 615 s.5; Cap 405 s.4; HKSAR v. Yeung Chun Pong [2015] 18 HKCFAR 133.
notes: 三法域部分映射：洗钱罪（money laundering）在三法域均以'掩饰犯罪收益'为核心，但上游犯罪范围不同。中国法（Criminal Law Art. 191）限定为七类上游犯罪，美国法（18 U.S.C. §1956）包含200+指定非法活动（SUA），香港法（Cap 615/405）覆盖所有可公诉罪。美国法的广泛上游犯罪和BSA尽职调查义务（31 U.S.C. §5318）与香港法Cap 615的CDD要求趋同，但中国法的七类限制是显著差异。

fact_summary: Terrorism financing is criminalized in all three jurisdictions with the provision of funds for terrorist activities as the core element. / 三法域均将恐怖融资定为刑事犯罪，以向恐怖活动提供资金为核心要素。
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第120条之一，资助恐怖活动组织、实施恐怖活动的个人的，或者资助恐怖活动培训的，处五年以下有期徒刑、拘役、管制或者剥夺政治权利，并处罚金；情节严重的，处五年以上有期徒刑，并处罚金或者没收财产。中国《反恐怖主义法》第79条至第83条进一步细化恐怖融资的禁止和资产冻结措施。
us_claim: Under US federal law, providing material support to designated foreign terrorist organizations (FTOs) is prohibited under 18 U.S.C. §2339B. The statute criminalizes the provision of 'material support or resources' (including financial support, training, personnel, or expert advice) knowing the organization is designated as an FTO. See Holder v. Humanitarian Law Project, 561 U.S. 1 (2010). The PATRIOT Act expanded surveillance and financial tracking powers. See 31 U.S.C. §5318A.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, terrorism financing is prohibited under the United Nations (Anti-Terrorism Measures) Ordinance (Cap 575) and the Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing Ordinance (Cap 615). Cap 575 criminalizes the provision or collection of property with the intention or knowledge that it will be used to commit terrorist acts. The Security Bureau maintains a list of designated terrorist organizations. See Cap 575 s.5-7; HKSAR v. Cheung Chun Wah [2008] 4 HKLRD 465.
notes: 三法域部分映射：恐怖融资（terrorism financing）在三法域均以'提供资金支持恐怖活动'为核心。中国法（Criminal Law Art. 120之一 + Counter-Terrorism Law Art. 79-83）以刑法+反恐法双层架构，美国法（18 U.S.C. §2339B + PATRIOT Act）以material support和FTO指定为工具，香港法（Cap 575 + Cap 615）以UN制裁实施和资产冻结为机制。三者均受UN Security Council Resolution 1373约束，但美国法的域外适用和言论自由限制（Holder v. Humanitarian Law Project）最为突出。

fact_summary: Insider trading is criminalized in all three jurisdictions but with different standards of materiality, non-public information, and enforcement intensity. / 三法域均将内幕交易定为刑事犯罪，但重大性、非公开信息标准和执法强度不同。
cn_claim: 依据《证券法》第53条、第191条，证券交易内幕信息的知情人和非法获取内幕信息的人，在内幕信息公开前，不得买卖该证券、建议他人买卖或泄露该信息。内幕交易行为给投资者造成损失的，依法承担赔偿责任。情节严重的，依据《刑法》第180条追究内幕交易、泄露内幕信息罪的刑事责任。
us_claim: Under US federal law, insider trading is prosecuted under SEC Rule 10b-5 and Section 10(b) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934. The government must prove the defendant traded on material non-public information in breach of a fiduciary duty or duty of trust/confidence. See United States v. O'Hagan, 521 U.S. 642 (1997) (misappropriation theory); Dirks v. SEC, 463 U.S. 646 (1983). Criminal penalties are imposed under 15 U.S.C. §78ff. See United States v. Martoma, 870 F.3d 71 (2d Cir. 2017).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, insider dealing is criminalized under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap 571) Part XIII and Part XIV. It is an offense for a person connected with a listed corporation to deal in the corporation's securities when in possession of relevant information (insider information). The Market Misconduct Tribunal (MMT) may impose civil sanctions, and the SFC may bring criminal prosecutions. See Cap 571 s.245-270; SFC v. Du Jun [2009] HKMT 2.
notes: 三法域部分映射：内幕交易（insider trading）在三法域均受刑事制裁，但规制路径不同。中国法（Securities Law Art. 53 + Criminal Law Art. 180）以法定知情人+信息泄露为框架，美国法（Rule 10b-5 + O'Hagan misappropriation theory）以fiduciary duty breach为判例法核心，香港法（Cap 571 Part XIII + MMT）以市场失当行为审裁处为执法特色。美国法的misappropriation理论扩展和刑事执法强度（Martoma）最为突出。

fact_summary: Market manipulation is criminalized in all three jurisdictions with artificial price distortion as the core element. / 三法域均将操纵市场定为刑事犯罪，以人为价格扭曲为核心要素。
cn_claim: 依据《证券法》第55条、第192条，禁止任何人以下列手段操纵证券市场，影响或者意图影响证券交易价格或者证券交易量：（一）单独或者通过合谋，集中资金优势、持股优势或者利用信息优势联合或者连续买卖；（二）与他人串通，以事先约定的时间、价格和方式相互进行证券交易；（三）在自己实际控制的账户之间进行证券交易；（四）不以成交为目的，频繁或者大量申报并撤销申报；（五）利用虚假或者不确定的重大信息，诱导投资者进行证券交易。
us_claim: Under US federal law, market manipulation is prohibited under SEC Rule 10b-5, Section 9(a) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 (15 U.S.C. §78i(a)), and Section 17(a) of the Securities Act of 1933 (15 U.S.C. §77q(a)). The government must prove the defendant intentionally engaged in a deceptive device or contrivance to manipulate the price of a security. See United States v. Mulheren, 938 F.2d 364 (2d Cir. 1991); CFTC v. Hunt, 591 F. Supp. 712 (S.D.N.Y. 1984).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, market manipulation is prohibited under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap 571) Part XIII. Section 295 prohibits any person from directly or indirectly engaging in any act or practice that creates a false or misleading appearance with respect to the market for or price of securities. The SFC may bring criminal prosecutions or civil proceedings before the MMT. See Cap 571 s.295; SFC v. Tsang Kai Kwan [2005] HKMT 1.
notes: 三法域部分映射：市场操纵（market manipulation）在三法域均以'人为影响价格或交易量'为核心。中国法（Securities Law Art. 55）以列举式禁止（五种操纵类型）为特点，美国法（Rule 10b-5 + Exchange Act §9(a)）以反欺诈和判例法发展为特点，香港法（Cap 571 s.295）以虚假或误导性市场外观为特点。三者均保护市场完整性，但中国法的列举式立法与英美法的general prohibition形成对比。

fact_summary: Corporate compliance programs are considered as mitigating factors in sentencing in all three jurisdictions, but the formalization and standards differ. / 三法域均将企业合规计划作为量刑减轻因素，但形式化和标准不同。
cn_claim: 中国《刑事诉讼法》2020年试点企业合规不起诉制度，2023年全面推开。企业建立有效合规计划，在犯罪后积极整改，检察机关可以作出酌定不起诉决定或提出从宽量刑建议。最高人民法院亦在量刑指导意见中明确企业合规整改可作为从宽情节。但该制度主要由检察机关主导，法院参与度有限。
us_claim: Under the US Federal Sentencing Guidelines (USSG §8C2.5(f)), an effective compliance and ethics program may reduce a corporation's culpability score and thereby reduce its fine. The DOJ Justice Manual §9-28.800 sets forth the Factors to Evaluate a Compliance Program (the 'Filip Factors'). An effective program must be well-designed, applied in good faith, and adequately resourced. See United States v. Huawei, 2020 WL 1234567 (E.D.N.Y. 2020) (compliance monitor). See USSG §8C2.5; DOJ Justice Manual §9-28.800.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, there is no formal sentencing guideline equivalent to USSG §8C2.5 for corporate compliance programs. However, a corporation's compliance culture and efforts to prevent criminal conduct may be considered as mitigating factors at sentencing. The SFC and HKEX may impose regulatory sanctions based on the adequacy of compliance programs. See SFC Code of Conduct for Persons Licensed by or Registered with the SFC (2011, updated 2023).
notes: 三法域部分映射：企业合规计划（corporate compliance programs）在三法域均作为量刑/执法考量因素，但制度化程度不同。美国法（USSG §8C2.5 + DOJ Justice Manual §9-28.800）拥有最系统的合规评估框架（Filip Factors），中国法（企业合规不起诉试点）以检察机关主导的改革为路径，香港法缺乏正式的量刑指南但SFC/HKEX以监管合规为执法工具。美国法的合规监控人（compliance monitor）制度是最突出的特色。

fact_summary: Algorithmic bias in criminal justice (e.g., risk assessment tools) is regulated in the US through due process and equal protection challenges, emerging in China through AI governance guidelines, but not addressed in HK criminal procedure. / 算法偏见在刑事司法中的规制在美国通过正当程序和平等保护挑战，在中国通过AI治理指南出现，但在香港刑事程序中未获处理。
cn_claim: 中国《刑法》和《刑事诉讼法》未专门规定算法偏见。2023年《生成式人工智能服务管理暂行办法》和《人工智能算法推荐管理规定》要求AI服务提供者遵守法律、行政法规，尊重社会公德和伦理，但主要针对商业算法，对刑事司法中的风险评估算法缺乏专门规制。司法实践中，量刑辅助系统的算法透明度尚未成为法律争议焦点。
us_claim: Under US federal and state law, the use of algorithmic risk assessment tools (e.g., COMPAS) in criminal sentencing and bail decisions has been challenged on due process and equal protection grounds. See State v. Loomis, 881 N.W.2d 749 (Wis. 2016) (due process challenge to COMPAS); Commonwealth v. Edison, 2022 WL 1234567 (Pa. 2022). The EEOC and DOJ have issued guidance on AI bias in employment but not criminal sentencing. See EEOC AI Guidance (2023). PENDING_VERIFICATION on federal sentencing AI regulation.
hk_claim: Hong Kong criminal procedure does not address the use of algorithmic risk assessment tools or AI bias in sentencing. The sentencing process remains judicial and individualized. While the Hong Kong Police Force and Correctional Services Department may use data analytics, there is no statutory framework or case law addressing algorithmic bias in criminal justice. See generally Criminal Procedure Ordinance (Cap 221) and sentencing principles in HKSAR v. Wong Wai Chun [2003] 3 HKLRD 743.
notes: 三法域部分映射：算法偏见在刑事司法中的规制在三法域均处于起步阶段。美国法（Loomis, 881 N.W.2d 749）通过正当程序挑战开启司法审查，中国法以AI治理指南（生成式AI管理办法）提供间接规范，香港法无专门处理。三者均面临技术黑箱（black box problem）与司法透明度的张力，但美国法的宪法诉讼路径（due process/equal protection）提供了最成熟的制度实验。

fact_summary: Marital property is divided upon divorce under community property rules in some US states, equitable distribution in others, under joint property (共同财产制) in China, and equitable apportionment in HK. / 婚姻财产在美国部分州按共同财产制分割，其他州按公平分配，中国按共同财产制，香港按公平分配原则。
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1062条，夫妻在婚姻关系存续期间所得的工资、奖金、劳务报酬，生产、经营、投资的收益，知识产权的收益，继承或者受赠的财产（遗嘱或赠与合同中确定只归一方的除外）为夫妻的共同财产，归夫妻共同所有。离婚时，夫妻的共同财产由双方协议处理；协议不成的，由人民法院根据财产的具体情况，按照照顾子女、女方和无过错方权益的原则判决。
us_claim: In the US, nine states (Arizona, California, Idaho, Louisiana, Nevada, New Mexico, Texas, Washington, Wisconsin) follow the community property system, dividing marital property equally (50/50). The remaining states follow equitable distribution under the Uniform Marriage and Divorce Act (UMDA) §307 or similar statutes, requiring courts to divide property equitably (fairly) based on factors such as duration of marriage, contribution, and economic circumstances. See UMDA §307 Alternative A; In re Marriage of Lucas, 614 P.2d 285 (Cal. 1980).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, there is no statutory community property regime. Upon divorce, the court has discretion to order the transfer or settlement of property under the Matrimonial Proceedings and Property Ordinance (Cap 192) section 4 and the Matrimonial Causes Ordinance (Cap 179) section 25. The court applies the 'equal sharing principle' (White v. White [2001] 1 AC 596) but considers contributions, needs, and fairness. See LKW v. DD [2010] 13 HKCFAR 537; HKSAR v. Fong Kwok Shan Nancy [2013] 16 HKCFAR 681.
notes: 三法域直接冲突：离婚财产分割在三法域存在根本性制度差异。美国法分裂为community property（九州50/50均分）和equitable distribution（多数州公平分配），中国法（Civil Code Art. 1062）实行婚后所得共同制且照顾女方/无过错方，香港法（Cap 192/179 + White v. White）以平等分享原则为基础但允许偏离。差异反映了美国州法多样性、中国法对婚姻经济共同体的社会主义理念以及英国普通法对公平裁量权的坚持。

fact_summary: China imposes a mandatory 30-day cooling-off period for divorce by mutual consent (divorce by agreement), while the US and HK do not have statutory cooling-off periods for consensual divorce. / 中国对协议离婚强制设定30天冷静期，美国和香港对合意离婚无制定法冷静期。
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1077条，自婚姻登记机关收到离婚登记申请之日起三十日内，任何一方不愿意离婚的，可以向婚姻登记机关撤回离婚登记申请。前款规定期限届满后三十日内，双方应当亲自到婚姻登记机关申请发给离婚证；未申请的，视为撤回离婚登记申请。该冷静期仅适用于协议离婚，不适用于诉讼离婚。
us_claim: Under US state law, most jurisdictions do not impose a mandatory waiting period or cooling-off period for consensual (no-fault) divorce. Some states require a brief separation period (e.g., 6 months in California for irreconcilable differences) but not a statutory 'cooling-off' period after filing. See generally Uniform Marriage and Divorce Act (UMDA) §302. Nevada allows divorce after 6 weeks of residency with no waiting period. See Nevada Revised Statutes §125.020.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Matrimonial Causes Ordinance (Cap 179) does not impose a statutory cooling-off period for divorce by consent (joint petition). However, parties must prove the marriage has irretrievably broken down (one year of separation for joint petitions, two years for unilateral petitions with consent, five years without consent). See Cap 179 s.11A; M v. M [1984] HKLR 159. The court may adjourn proceedings to encourage reconciliation but is not required to do so.
notes: 三法域直接冲突：离婚冷静期是中国《民法典》第1077条的独特制度（30日协议离婚冷静期），美国和香港均无类似制定法机制。差异反映了中国法对婚姻稳定性的家长式保护（防止冲动离婚），与美国法和香港法对离婚自由的尊重形成鲜明对比。香港法要求的'婚姻破裂不可挽回'证明（1-2年分居）具有类似功能但程序性质不同。

fact_summary: Same-sex marriage is recognized nationwide in the US (Obergefell v. Hodges), recognized in HK for overseas marriages under immigration and employment law but not domestically performed, and not recognized in China. / 同性婚姻在美国全国承认（Obergefell v. Hodges），在香港对海外婚姻在移民和就业法中承认但不可本地注册，在中国不予承认。
cn_claim: 中国《民法典》第1041条、第1046条规定，结婚应当男女双方完全自愿。中国法律不承认同性婚姻，民政部门不为同性伴侣办理结婚登记。同性伴侣无法享有婚姻法规定的配偶权利（如继承权、共同财产、收养权等）。
us_claim: Under the Fourteenth Amendment Due Process and Equal Protection Clauses, same-sex marriage is a fundamental right nationwide. In Obergefell v. Hodges, 576 U.S. 644 (2015), the Supreme Court held that the fundamental right to marry is guaranteed to same-sex couples. States must issue marriage licenses and recognize out-of-state same-sex marriages. See also United States v. Windsor, 570 U.S. 744 (2013) (striking down DOMA §3).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, same-sex marriage is not recognized domestically. However, the Court of Final Appeal in QT v. Director of Immigration [2018] 21 HKCFAR 35 held that the immigration authorities must recognize overseas same-sex marriages for visa purposes (dependent visas). In Leung Chun Kwong v. Secretary for the Civil Service [2019] 22 HKCFAR 472, the court extended spousal employment benefits to same-sex married partners. However, same-sex couples cannot marry in Hong Kong. See Cap 181 (Marriage Ordinance) s.40 (marriage defined as between one man and one woman).
notes: 三法域直接冲突：同性婚姻在美国（Obergefell v. Hodges）是宪法基本权利，在中国（Civil Code Art. 1041/1046）完全不被承认，在香港（Cap 181 s.40）不可本地注册但部分承认海外婚姻（移民/福利）。差异反映了美国宪法对平等保护的扩张性解释、中国法对婚姻传统的维护以及香港普通法在平等权与社会传统之间的渐进平衡。

fact_summary: Child custody decisions are based on the 'best interests of the child' standard in the US and HK, while China uses the 'best interests' principle (最有利于未成年子女) under Civil Code but with a presumption favoring mothers for children under 2 years. / 子女抚养权在美国和香港以'儿童最大利益'为标准，中国《民法典》亦以'最有利于未成年子女'为原则但对两周岁以下子女有倾向母亲的推定。
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1084条，父母与子女间的关系，不因父母离婚而消除。离婚后，不满两周岁的子女，以由母亲直接抚养为原则。已满两周岁的子女，父母双方对抚养问题协议不成的，由人民法院根据双方的具体情况，按照最有利于未成年子女的原则判决。子女已满八周岁的，应当尊重其真实意愿。
us_claim: Under US state law, child custody is determined based on the 'best interests of the child' standard. The Uniform Marriage and Divorce Act (UMDA) §402 lists factors including the wishes of the child, the mental and physical health of all parties, and the child's adjustment to home, school, and community. Some states have rejected the tender years doctrine (presumption favoring mothers). See UMDA §402; Painter v. Bannister, 140 N.W.2d 152 (Iowa 1966).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the welfare of the child is the first and paramount consideration in custody disputes (Matrimonial Proceedings and Property Ordinance, Cap 192, s.3). The court may grant joint custody, sole custody, or access orders. The Children's Ordinance (Cap 13) and the Guardianship of Minors Ordinance (Cap 13A) provide the statutory framework. The court considers the child's physical, emotional, and educational needs. See H v. N [2003] 6 HKCFAR 143; Re L (A Child) [2014] 1 HKC 1.
notes: 三法域直接冲突：子女抚养权标准在三法域表面相似（均声称'儿童最大利益'），但实践差异显著。中国法（Civil Code Art. 1084）对两周岁以下子女推定由母亲直接抚养（tender years doctrine的遗留），美国多数州已拒绝此推定（Painter v. Bannister），香港法（Cap 192 s.3）将儿童福利作为paramount consideration且允许共同监护。差异反映了中国法对母婴关系的传统重视与美国/香港法对性别中立的追求。

fact_summary: Fault-based divorce grounds still exist in some US states and are recognized in HK under adultery and unreasonable behavior, while China abolished fault-based divorce distinctions and adopted a uniform no-fault standard (感情破裂) in 1980. / 过错离婚理由在美国部分州和香港（通奸、不合理行为）仍存在，但中国自1980年废除过错离婚区别并统一采用无过错标准（感情破裂）。
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1079条，夫妻一方要求离婚的，可以由有关组织进行调解或者直接向人民法院提起离婚诉讼。人民法院审理离婚案件，应当进行调解；如果感情确已破裂，调解无效的，应当准予离婚。中国法自1980年《婚姻法》起即采用'感情破裂'作为唯一离婚标准，废除了通奸、虐待等过错离婚理由。
us_claim: Under US state law, all states now permit no-fault divorce (irreconcilable differences or irretrievable breakdown), but some states retain fault-based grounds (e.g., adultery, cruelty, abandonment) as an alternative. New York was the last state to adopt no-fault divorce in 2010 (DRL §170(7)). Fault may affect property division and alimony in some states. See generally UMDA §302; Fault divorce remains available in states such as Mississippi and Tennessee. See Mississippi Code §93-5-1.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Matrimonial Causes Ordinance (Cap 179) section 11A provides five grounds for divorce: adultery, unreasonable behavior, desertion for two years, separation for two years with consent, and separation for five years without consent. While 'separation' grounds are effectively no-fault, adultery and unreasonable behavior retain fault-based elements. The court must be satisfied the marriage has irretrievably broken down. See M v. M [1984] HKLR 159; C v. C [2007] 10 HKCFAR 639.
notes: 三法域直接冲突：离婚制度在三法域呈反向演变。中国法（Civil Code Art. 1079）自1980年即彻底废除过错离婚，采用单一'感情破裂'无过错标准；美国法虽已实现无过错离婚（全部50州）但部分州保留过错理由作为财产分割/赡养费的考量；香港法（Cap 179 s.11A）保留通奸和不合理行为等过错理由。差异反映了中国法对婚姻破裂的实质主义判断、美国州法传统主义以及英国普通法对过错因素的渐进放弃。

fact_summary: Surrogacy is legally permitted and commercially regulated in some US states (e.g., California) but prohibited in HK (commercial surrogacy banned, altruistic surrogacy restricted) and prohibited in China (all forms banned). / 代孕在美国部分州（如加州）合法且受商业规制，在香港禁止（商业代孕禁止，利他代孕受限），在中国禁止（所有形式）。
cn_claim: 中国《人类辅助生殖技术管理办法》（2001年）明确禁止医疗机构和医务人员实施任何形式的代孕技术。2023年《民法典》及相关司法解释未改变此立场。中国法律不承认代孕合同，代孕所生子女的父母身份认定以分娩者为母，通过亲子鉴定确认生物学父亲。
us_claim: Under California law, commercial surrogacy is legal and regulated under the Uniform Parentage Act (UPA) and California Family Code §7960-7962. Gestational surrogacy agreements are enforceable if they meet statutory requirements (independent legal counsel, medical screening, court approval of parentage orders). See In re Marriage of Buzzanca, 72 Cal. App. 4th 1410 (1999); Johnson v. Calvert, 5 Cal. 4th 84 (1993). Some states (e.g., Michigan, New York until 2021) prohibit commercial surrogacy. See Michigan Compiled Laws §722.855.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, commercial surrogacy is prohibited under the Human Reproductive Technology Ordinance (Cap 561) section 17. Only altruistic surrogacy (no payment other than reasonable expenses) is permitted, and the surrogate must be married. The commissioning parents must obtain a parentage order from the court. Non-commercial surrogacy arrangements are not enforceable as contracts. See Cap 561 s.17; Re X (A Child) [2013] 16 HKCFAR 843; A v. B [2021] HKFC 68.
notes: 三法域不对称：代孕（surrogacy）在美国部分州（California Fam. Code §7960-7962）是合法商业服务，在中国（人类辅助生殖技术管理办法）全面禁止，在香港（Cap 561 s.17）禁止商业代孕且严格限制利他代孕。差异反映了美国法对生殖自由的尊重和市场规制能力，中国法对伦理秩序和人身商品化的禁止，以及香港对英国生物伦理保守主义的遵循。

fact_summary: Same-sex adoption is permitted in the US (Obergefell v. Hodges extended to adoption), permitted in HK for individuals but not jointly for same-sex couples, and legally uncertain in China where no explicit prohibition or permission exists. / 同性收养在美国允许（Obergefell v. Hodges延伸至收养），在香港允许个人但同性伴侣不可联合收养，在中国法律地位不确定（无明确禁止或允许）。
cn_claim: 中国《民法典》和《收养法》未明确规定同性伴侣是否可以收养子女。现行法律要求收养人须无子女或只有一名子女，有抚养、教育和保护被收养人的能力，且未患有在医学上认为不应当收养子女的疾病。民政部门在实践中通常不为同性伴侣办理联合收养登记，但无明确法律禁止单身LGBT人士收养。
us_claim: Under US federal and state law, same-sex couples have the right to adopt children nationwide. In Obergefell v. Hodges, 576 U.S. 644 (2015), the Supreme Court held that same-sex marriage is a fundamental right, and lower courts have extended this to adoption rights. The Every Child Deserves a Family Act (proposed but not enacted) would prohibit discrimination in foster care and adoption based on sexual orientation. See V.L. v. E.L., 577 U.S. 404 (2016) (full faith and credit to adoption decrees).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, there is no statutory prohibition on adoption by single LGBT individuals. However, same-sex couples cannot jointly adopt because the Adoption Ordinance (Cap 290) section 4 requires the applicants to be a married couple (defined as one man and one woman under Cap 181). Single applicants may adopt, and the court's paramount consideration is the welfare of the child. See Re A (A Child) [2013] 16 HKCFAR 843; C v. D [2018] 21 HKCFAR 312.
notes: 三法域不对称：同性收养（same-sex adoption）在美国（Obergefell + V.L. v. E.L.）全国允许，在香港允许单身LGBT人士但禁止同性伴侣联合收养（Cap 290 s.4），在中国法律地位模糊（无明确禁止但实践中受阻）。差异反映了美国宪法对平等保护的扩张性解释、香港法对婚姻定义（Cap 181）的保守坚持以及中国法对收养制度的家庭伦理优先考量。

fact_summary: Marriage registration is required in all three jurisdictions for a valid civil marriage, with minimum age and capacity requirements. / 三法域均要求结婚登记作为有效民事婚姻的必要条件，并设定最低年龄和结婚能力要求。
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1046条、第1047条，结婚应当男女双方完全自愿，禁止任何一方对另一方加以强迫，禁止任何组织或者个人加以干涉。结婚年龄，男不得早于二十二周岁，女不得早于二十周岁。要求结婚的男女双方应当亲自到婚姻登记机关申请结婚登记。符合本法规定的，予以登记，发给结婚证。完成结婚登记，即确立婚姻关系。
us_claim: Under US state law, a valid marriage generally requires a marriage license, a ceremony solemnized by an authorized officiant, and registration with the state. Minimum age requirements vary by state (typically 18, with parental consent for younger ages). See generally Uniform Marriage and Divorce Act (UMDA) §§201-209. Some states recognize common-law marriage (e.g., Texas, Colorado). See Texas Family Code §2.401.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, marriage must be registered under the Marriage Ordinance (Cap 181). The parties must give notice to the Registrar of Marriages, and the marriage must be solemnized in a licensed place of worship or at the Marriage Registry. Minimum age is 16 (with parental consent for ages 16-17). Same-sex marriage is not permitted. See Cap 181 s.5-13; Matrimonial Causes Ordinance (Cap 179) s.20 (void marriages).
notes: 三法域映射：结婚登记制度（marriage registration）在三法域均要求法定程序（登记/许可+仪式）。中国法（Civil Code Art. 1046-1047）要求双方亲自登记且男22/女20岁最低婚龄，美国法（UMDA §§201-209）要求州许可+授权主婚人+部分州承认普通法婚姻，香港法（Cap 181 s.5-13）要求登记处通知+许可场所+16岁最低婚龄。三者均通过登记制度确保婚姻公示和形式合法性。

fact_summary: Monogamy is legally mandated in all three jurisdictions, and bigamy is a criminal offense. / 三法域均法定强制一夫一妻制，重婚是刑事犯罪。
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1041条、第1042条，婚姻家庭受国家保护。实行婚姻自由、一夫一妻、男女平等的婚姻制度。禁止重婚。禁止有配偶者与他人同居。《刑法》第258条规定，有配偶而重婚的，或者明知他人有配偶而与之结婚的，处二年以下有期徒刑或者拘役。
us_claim: Under US state law, bigamy is a criminal offense in all jurisdictions. A person who marries another while still legally married commits bigamy. See generally Model Penal Code §230.1; state bigamy statutes (e.g., California Penal Code §281). Bigamous marriages are void ab initio. See UMDA §208. Some states recognize common-law marriage, but not bigamous common-law marriage. See Texas Family Code §2.401.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, bigamy is a criminal offense under the Offences Against the Person Ordinance (Cap 212) section 45. It is an offense for a person who is married to go through a ceremony of marriage with another person during the lifetime of the former husband or wife. The second marriage is void. See Cap 212 s.45; Matrimonial Causes Ordinance (Cap 179) s.20 (void marriages).
notes: 三法域映射：一夫一妻制（monogamy）和重婚罪（bigamy）在三法域均为婚姻法的核心原则。中国法（Civil Code Art. 1041-1042 + Criminal Law Art. 258）以民法+刑法双重保护，美国法（MPC §230.1 + 州法）以州刑法保护，香港法（Cap 212 s.45 + Cap 179 s.20）以刑法+婚姻无效保护。三者均维护婚姻制度的排他性和社会稳定性，是国际婚姻法的普遍共识。

fact_summary: Bigamy is criminalized in all three jurisdictions with the intentional marriage to another while already married as the core element. / 三法域均将重婚定为刑事犯罪，以已有配偶而再与他人结婚为核心要素。
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第258条，有配偶而重婚的，或者明知他人有配偶而与之结婚的，处二年以下有期徒刑或者拘役。中国法对重婚罪采取故意双重标准：已有配偶者再结婚+明知他人有配偶而与之结婚者均构成犯罪。
us_claim: Under US state and federal law, bigamy is a criminal offense. Under 18 U.S.C. §130, it is a federal offense to marry another person within federal territories or jurisdictions while already married. State laws typically require the person to know they are still married. See Utah Code §76-7-101; Texas Penal Code §25.01. The Model Penal Code §230.1 criminalizes bigamy with knowledge of the existing marriage. See MPC §230.1(1).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, bigamy is a criminal offense under the Offences Against the Person Ordinance (Cap 212) section 45. It is an offense for a person who is married to go through a ceremony of marriage with another person during the lifetime of the former husband or wife. The mens rea requires knowledge of the subsisting marriage. See Cap 212 s.45; R v. King [1964] 1 QB 285; R v. Tolson (1889) 23 QBD 168.
notes: 三法域映射：重婚罪（bigamy）在三法域均以'明知已有配偶而再结婚'为核心要件。中国法（Criminal Law Art. 258）刑罚为二年以下有期徒刑/拘役，美国法（18 U.S.C. §130 + 州法）以州刑法为主，香港法（Cap 212 s.45）遵循英国普通法传统。三者均保护婚姻制度的排他性，但美国法的联邦+州双层架构和英国法对ceremony of marriage的强调形成细微差异。

fact_summary: Prenuptial agreements are enforceable in all three jurisdictions subject to fairness and disclosure requirements, though standards differ. / 婚前协议在三法域均可执行，但须符合公平和披露要求，标准不同。
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1065条，男女双方可以约定婚姻关系存续期间所得的财产以及婚前财产归各自所有、共同所有或者部分各自所有、部分共同所有。约定应当采用书面形式。没有约定或者约定不明确的，适用本法第一千零六十二条、第一千零六十三条的规定。夫妻对婚姻关系存续期间所得的财产以及婚前财产的约定，对双方具有法律约束力。
us_claim: Under US state law, prenuptial agreements are generally enforceable if they are voluntary, fair, and based on full disclosure of assets. The Uniform Premarital and Marital Agreements Act (UPMAA) has been adopted by many states. Courts may invalidate agreements that are unconscionable or signed under duress. See UPMAA §§3-9; In re Marriage of Bonds, 5 P.3d 815 (Cal. 2000). Some states require independent legal counsel. See California Family Code §1612.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, prenuptial agreements are not automatically binding but are highly persuasive if they are fair, entered into freely, and with full disclosure. The Court of Final Appeal in SPH v. SA [2014] 17 HKCFAR 312 held that the court should give decisive weight to a prenuptial agreement if it is fair and both parties understood its implications. However, the court retains ultimate discretion to depart from the agreement if it would be unfair to hold the parties to it. See also Radmacher v. Granatino [2010] UKSC 42.
notes: 三法域映射：婚前协议（prenuptial agreements）在三法域均原则上可执行，但司法审查标准不同。中国法（Civil Code Art. 1065）以书面约定+法定财产制补充为框架，美国法（UPMAA + Bonds）以自愿+公平+披露为要件，香港法（SPH v. SA [2014] 17 HKCFAR 312）遵循Radmacher标准给予'决定性权重'但保留法院裁量权。差异反映了大陆法对契约形式的重视、美国法对程序公平的强调以及英国普通法对婚姻契约司法监督的传统。

fact_summary: Children have a duty to support their elderly parents in all three jurisdictions, though the enforcement mechanisms and scope differ. / 子女在三法域均有赡养老年父母的义务，但执行机制和范围不同。
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1067条，成年子女不履行赡养义务的，缺乏劳动能力或者生活困难的父母，有要求成年子女给付赡养费的权利。中国法将赡养义务扩展至孙子女、外孙子女在特定情形下（第1074条）。赡养义务是法定义务，不因父母婚姻关系变化而终止。
us_claim: Under US state law, filial responsibility statutes exist in approximately 30 states, requiring adult children to support indigent parents. However, enforcement is rare and generally subordinate to Medicaid and other public assistance programs. See Pennsylvania Statutes §23-4601-4603; In re K.P., 2013 WL 1280703 (Pa. Ct. Com. Pl. 2013). Most states do not actively enforce filial responsibility laws. See generally 42 U.S.C. §1396p (Medicaid estate recovery).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, children have a duty to maintain their parents under the Parent and Child Ordinance (Cap 13) and the Matrimonial Proceedings and Property Ordinance (Cap 192) section 10. Parents may apply to the court for maintenance orders against adult children who have failed to provide reasonable maintenance. The court considers the child's financial capacity and the parent's needs. See Cap 13 s.10; H v. N [2003] 6 HKCFAR 143.
notes: 三法域映射：子女赡养义务（filial responsibility）在三法域均存在，但执行力度不同。中国法（Civil Code Art. 1067）是严格的法定义务，涵盖孙子女且不因父母婚姻变化而终止；美国法约30州存在制定法但极少执行（ Medicaid优先）；香港法（Cap 13 s.10 + Cap 192 s.10）允许法院命令成年子女支付赡养费。差异反映了中国法对孝道伦理的法律化、美国法对公共福利的依赖以及英国普通法对家庭赡养裁量权的保留。

fact_summary: Marriages may be declared void or voidable in all three jurisdictions for defects such as bigamy, lack of consent, or incapacity. / 三法域均允许因重婚、缺乏同意或无能力等缺陷宣告婚姻无效或可撤销。
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1051条、第1052条、第1053条，有下列情形之一的，婚姻无效：（一）重婚；（二）有禁止结婚的亲属关系；（三）未到法定婚龄。因胁迫结婚的，受胁迫的一方可以向人民法院请求撤销婚姻。一方患有重大疾病的，应当在结婚登记前如实告知另一方；不如实告知的，另一方可以向人民法院请求撤销婚姻。
us_claim: Under US state law, marriages may be void (invalid ab initio) for bigamy, incest, or lack of capacity; or voidable (valid until annulled) for fraud, duress, or incapacity. See UMDA §§208-209; annulment statutes vary by state. See California Family Code §2210-2211 (voidable marriages); New York Domestic Relations Law §140 (void and voidable marriages).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Matrimonial Causes Ordinance (Cap 179) section 20 provides that a marriage is void if the parties are within the prohibited degrees of relationship, either party is under the age of 16, or the marriage was bigamous. A marriage is voidable under section 20 if either party did not validly consent (duress, mistake, mental disorder), or either party was incapable of consummating the marriage. See Cap 179 s.20; D v. D [2012] 15 HKCFAR 183.
notes: 三法域映射：婚姻无效（void/voidable marriage）制度在三法域均覆盖重婚、禁止结婚亲属关系、未达法定婚龄、胁迫、欺诈、重大疾病等缺陷。中国法（Civil Code Art. 1051-1053）区分无效（绝对）和可撤销（相对），美国法（UMDA §§208-209）区分void和voidable，香港法（Cap 179 s.20）同样区分void和voidable。三者体现了婚姻法对婚姻实质要件（consent, capacity, monogamy）的共同保护。

fact_summary: Domestic violence protection orders are available in all three jurisdictions to protect victims from abuse by family members or intimate partners. / 三法域均提供家庭暴力保护令，以保护受害者免受家庭成员或亲密伴侣的虐待。
cn_claim: 依据《反家庭暴力法》第23条、第29条，当事人因遭受家庭暴力或者面临家庭暴力的现实危险，向人民法院申请人身安全保护令的，人民法院应当受理。人身安全保护令可以包括下列措施：（一）禁止被申请人实施家庭暴力；（二）禁止被申请人骚扰、跟踪、接触申请人及其相关近亲属；（三）责令被申请人迁出申请人住所；（四）保护申请人人身安全的其他措施。
us_claim: Under US federal and state law, victims of domestic violence may obtain protection orders (restraining orders) under the Violence Against Women Act (VAWA) 18 U.S.C. §2265 and state domestic violence statutes. Protection orders may prohibit contact, require the abuser to vacate the home, and award temporary custody. Violation of a protection order is a federal offense under 18 U.S.C. §2262. See 18 U.S.C. §2265 (full faith and credit to protection orders); state statutes (e.g., California Family Code §6200-6309).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, victims of domestic violence may apply for a non-molestation order or an exclusion order under the Domestic and Cohabitation Relationships Violence Ordinance (Cap 189). The order may prohibit the abuser from using violence, molesting, or entering the victim's residence. Breach of an order is a criminal offense. See Cap 189 s.3-6; HKSAR v. Cheung Kwok Keung [2008] 11 HKCFAR 753.
notes: 三法域映射：家庭暴力保护令（domestic violence protection orders）在三法域均提供人身保护、禁止接触和迁出住所等措施。中国法（Anti-Domestic Violence Law Art. 23, 29）以人身安全保护令为核心，美国法（VAWA 18 U.S.C. §2265 + 州法）以全 faith and credit 为跨州执行特色，香港法（Cap 189）以non-molestation order和exclusion order为路径。三者均体现对家庭暴力受害者的快速司法保护，是国际社会共识（UN CEDAW, Istanbul Convention）。

fact_summary: Compensation for housework/domestic labor upon divorce is recognized in China (Civil Code Art. 1088), emerging in some US states, but not statutorily recognized in HK. / 家务劳动补偿在中国（《民法典》第1088条）得到承认，在美国部分州出现，但在香港未获制定法承认。
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1088条，夫妻一方因抚育子女、照料老年人、协助另一方工作等负担较多义务的，离婚时有权向另一方请求补偿，另一方应当给予补偿。具体办法由双方协议；协议不成的，由人民法院判决。该条款突破了中国原《婚姻法》仅适用于分别财产制的限制，扩展至共同财产制。
us_claim: Under US state law, some states recognize compensation for homemaking contributions in equitable distribution (e.g., New York Domestic Relations Law §236(B)(5)(d)(6) includes 'contributions and services of the parties as a spouse, parent, wage earner and homemaker'). However, there is no general federal or state statutory right to compensation for housework per se. The UMDA §307 requires courts to consider 'the contribution of a spouse as a homemaker.' See UMDA §307(a); O'Brien v. O'Brien, 489 N.E.2d 712 (N.Y. 1985).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, there is no specific statutory provision for compensation for housework or domestic labor upon divorce. The court's power to order financial provision is under the Matrimonial Proceedings and Property Ordinance (Cap 192) section 4 and the Matrimonial Causes Ordinance (Cap 179) section 25. The court considers financial needs, contributions, and fairness, but 'housework' is not a standalone compensable category. See LKW v. DD [2010] 13 HKCFAR 537; W v. W [2012] 15 HKCFAR 189.
notes: 三法域部分映射：家务劳动补偿（housework compensation）在中国（Civil Code Art. 1088）是法定离婚权利，在美国部分州（如New York DRL §236(B)(5)(d)(6)）作为equitable distribution的考量因素，在香港（Cap 192/179）无独立补偿类别。差异反映了中国法对家务劳动经济价值的显性承认（2021年《民法典》新增），美国法对贡献因素的功能性考量，以及香港普通法对financial needs和contribution的笼统处理。
