us_claim: CERCLA 42 U.S.C. §9607 对污染者的严格责任。员工个人责任：依州法，员工可因过失承担个人责任。判例：United States v. Bestfoods, 524 U.S. 51 (1998) 对CERCLA下员工责任。
hk_claim: Hong Kong Environmental Impact Assessment Ordinance (Cap. 499) 第5条：对环境影响评估的要求。员工个人责任：依雇佣条例和普通法。判例：Director of Environmental Protection v. Chun Wo Construction [2001] HKC 505 对环境责任。
notes: 三法域差异：中国《环境保护法》第64条、第65条对污染侵权责任有规定；美国CERCLA 42 U.S.C. §9607 对严格责任+员工个人责任有规定；香港Cap. 499第5条 + 雇佣条例对董事责任有规定。差异根源：三法域对环境污染+员工责任均有规定，但机制不同：中国有侵权责任法+环境法，美国有CERCLA+州法，香港有环境影响评估条例+雇佣条例。三法域差异在于员工个人环境责任的认定标准。PENDING_VERIFICATION: 中国环境保护法具体条款需确认。

fact_summary: 中国公司在美国申请破产保护（Chapter 11），美国法院主张该破产程序适用美国破产法，中国债权人主张该破产程序应依中国《企业破产法》进行。
cn_claim: 中国《企业破产法》第3条：破产案件由债务人住所地人民法院管辖。第5条：依照本法开始的破产程序，对债务人在中华人民共和国领域外的财产发生效力。
us_claim: 美国破产法：11 U.S.C. §301 对破产申请的提出。11 U.S.C. §304 对外国破产程序的承认（已废除，现由Chapter 15取代）。Chapter 15 11 U.S.C. §1501-1532 对外国破产程序的承认。判例：Societe Generale v. Maxwell Commc'n Corp., 186 B.R. 807 (S.D.N.Y. 1995) 对外国破产程序。
hk_claim: Hong Kong Companies (Winding Up and Miscellaneous Provisions) Ordinance (Cap. 32) 第168条：对欺诈性交易的禁止。Cap. 32第169条：对不正当交易的禁止。香港对破产程序：依Cap. 32进行。判例：Re Lehman Brothers International (Europe) [2012] UKSC 6 对破产程序。
notes: 三法域差异：中国《企业破产法》第3条、第5条对破产管辖权有规定；美国11 U.S.C. §301、Chapter 15 对破产申请+外国程序承认有规定；香港Cap. 32对破产程序有规定。差异根源：三法域对破产程序均有规定，但管辖权冲突：中国和美国可能同时主张破产管辖权（中国依住所地，美国依资产所在地）。香港一般依Cap. 32进行。三法域差异在于破产程序的管辖权与承认机制。PENDING_VERIFICATION: 中国企业破产法具体条款需确认。

fact_summary: 香港公司在中国申请专利，中国知识产权局主张该专利申请违反中国《专利法》第5条（公共利益），同时主张该专利属于《专利法》第25条（不授予专利权的情形）。
cn_claim: 中国《专利法》第5条：对违反法律、社会公德或者妨害公共利益的发明创造，不授予专利权。第25条：对下列各项，不授予专利权：（一）科学发现；（二）智力活动的规则和方法；（三）疾病的诊断和治疗方法；（四）动物和植物品种；（五）原子核变换方法以及用原子核变换方法获得的物质；（六）对平面印刷品的图案、色彩或者二者的结合作出的主要起标识作用的设计。
us_claim: 美国专利法：35 U.S.C. §101 对可专利主题。35 U.S.C. §102-103 对新颖性、非显而易见性。判例：Association for Molecular Pathology v. Myriad Genetics, Inc., 569 U.S. 576 (2013) 对基因专利的可专利性。
hk_claim: Hong Kong Patents Ordinance (Cap. 514) 第4条：对可专利主题。Cap. 514第5条：对不可专利主题。判例：Hong Kong Court of Appeal in JMH v. WYC [2005] HKC 498 对专利可专利性。
notes: 三法域差异：中国《专利法》第5条、第25条对公共利益+不可专利主题有规定；美国35 U.S.C. §101 对可专利主题有规定；香港Cap. 514第4条、第5条对可专利主题有规定。差异根源：三法域对专利可专利性均有规定，但标准不同：中国有公共利益+法定不可专利主题，美国有35 U.S.C. §101 + 判例，香港有条例+普通法。三法域差异在于专利可专利性的认定标准。PENDING_VERIFICATION: 中国专利法具体条款需确认。

fact_summary: 中国公司在美国申请商标，美国商标局主张该商标违反Lanham Act 15 U.S.C. §1052(a)（不道德、欺骗性标志），同时主张该商标属于15 U.S.C. §1052(c)（与在世人物姓名相同）。
cn_claim: 中国《商标法》第10条：下列标志不得作为商标使用：（七）带有欺骗性，容易使公众对商品的质量等特点或者产地产生误认的；（八）有害于社会主义道德风尚或者有其他不良影响的。第32条：申请商标注册不得损害他人现有的在先权利，也不得以不正当手段抢先注册他人已经使用并有一定影响的商标。
us_claim: Lanham Act 15 U.S.C. §1052(a) 对不道德、欺骗性标志。15 U.S.C. §1052(c) 对在世人物姓名。判例：Matal v. Tam, 137 S. Ct. 1744 (2017) 对商标注册的言论自由。
hk_claim: Hong Kong Trade Marks Ordinance (Cap. 559) 第11条：对不得注册的标志。Cap. 559第12条：对缺乏显著性的标志。判例：Hong Kong Court of Appeal in JMH v. WYC [2005] HKC 498 对商标注册。
notes: 三法域差异：中国《商标法》第10条、第32条对不道德/欺骗性标志+在先权利有规定；美国Lanham Act 15 U.S.C. §1052(a)、§1052(c) 对不道德/在世人物姓名有规定；香港Cap. 559第11条、第12条对不得注册的标志有规定。差异根源：三法域对商标注册均有规定，但标准不同：中国有公共利益+在先权利，美国有Lanham Act + 言论自由（Matal v. Tam），香港有条例+普通法。三法域差异在于商标注册的公共秩序与言论自由平衡。PENDING_VERIFICATION: 中国商标法具体条款需确认。

fact_summary: 中国公司在美国申请外观设计专利，美国专利局主张该设计违反35 U.S.C. §171（外观设计专利），同时主张该设计属于35 U.S.C. §102（现有技术）。中国公司主张其在中国已获得外观设计专利，美国应承认。
cn_claim: 中国《专利法》第2条：本法所称的发明创造是指发明、实用新型和外观设计。外观设计，是指对产品的整体或者局部的形状、图案或者其结合以及色彩与形状、图案的结合所作出的富有美感并适于工业应用的新设计。第23条：授予专利权的外观设计，应当不属于现有设计。
us_claim: 美国外观设计专利：35 U.S.C. §171 对外观设计专利。35 U.S.C. §102 对现有技术。美国对外国专利不承认：美国专利局对外国专利不承认，须按美国法律重新审查。判例：Egyptian Goddess, Inc. v. Swisa, Inc., 543 F.3d 665 (Fed. Cir. 2008) 对外观设计专利。
hk_claim: Hong Kong Registered Designs Ordinance (Cap. 522) 第4条：对注册外观设计的定义。Cap. 522第5条：对新颖性要求。香港对外国外观设计专利不承认：须按香港法律重新申请。判例：Hong Kong Court of Appeal in JMH v. WYC [2005] HKC 498 对外观设计。
notes: 三法域差异：中国《专利法》第2条、第23条对外观设计有定义+新颖性要求；美国35 U.S.C. §171 + §102 对外观设计专利有规定；香港Cap. 522第4条、第5条对外观设计有定义+新颖性要求。差异根源：三法域对外观设计专利均有规定，但均不承认外国专利。本例为positive control，因三法域结论一致（不承认外国专利）。差异在于：中国有专利法，美国有35 U.S.C. §171，香港有注册外观设计条例。PENDING_VERIFICATION: 中国专利法具体条款需确认。

fact_summary: 香港公司在中国申请软件著作权登记，中国版权局主张该软件违反中国《著作权法》第5条（不受著作权法保护的作品），同时主张该软件属于《著作权法》第3条（作品定义）。
cn_claim: 中国《著作权法》第3条：本法所称的作品，是指文学、艺术和科学领域内具有独创性并能以一定形式表现的智力成果，包括：（一）文字作品；（二）口述作品；（三）音乐、戏剧、曲艺、舞蹈、杂技艺术作品；（四）美术、建筑作品；（五）摄影作品；（六）视听作品；（七）工程设计图、产品设计图、地图、示意图等图形作品和模型作品；（八）计算机软件；（九）符合作品特征的其他智力成果。第5条：本法不适用于：（一）法律、法规，国家机关的决议、决定、命令和其他具有立法、行政、司法性质的文件，及其官方正式译文；（二）单纯事实消息；（三）历法、通用数表、通用表格和公式。
us_claim: 美国版权法：17 U.S.C. §102 对版权保护的作品。17 U.S.C. §102(a) 对文学、音乐、戏剧、舞蹈、美术、电影、录音作品。软件：依17 U.S.C. §102(a) 的文学作品。判例：Apple Computer, Inc. v. Franklin Computer Corp., 714 F.2d 1240 (3d Cir. 1983) 对软件版权保护。
hk_claim: Hong Kong Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528) 第4条：对版权作品的定义。Cap. 528第5条：对不受版权保护的作品。判例：Hong Kong Court of Appeal in JMH v. WYC [2005] HKC 498 对版权作品。
notes: 三法域差异：中国《著作权法》第3条、第5条对作品定义+不受保护作品有规定；美国17 U.S.C. §102 对版权作品有规定；香港Cap. 528第4条、第5条对版权作品有定义。差异根源：三法域对软件版权均有保护，但标准不同：中国有著作权法，美国有17 U.S.C. §102，香港有版权条例。三法域差异在于软件版权的认定标准。PENDING_VERIFICATION: 中国著作权法具体条款需确认。

fact_summary: 中国员工在离职后，违反保密协议，同时利用原公司商业秘密成立竞争公司。原公司主张违约责任+商业秘密侵权+不正当竞争。
cn_claim: 中国《劳动合同法》第23条：用人单位与劳动者可以在劳动合同中约定保守用人单位的商业秘密和与知识产权相关的保密事项。第24条：竞业限制的人员限于用人单位的高级管理人员、高级技术人员和其他负有保密义务的人员。《反不正当竞争法》第9条：经营者不得实施下列侵犯商业秘密的行为。
us_claim: Economic Espionage Act 18 U.S.C. §1831-1839。违反保密协议：依合同法。不正当竞争：依州法。判例：E. I. du Pont de Nemours & Co. v. Christopher, 431 F.2d 1012 (5th Cir. 1970) 对商业秘密保护。
hk_claim: Hong Kong Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) 第70条：对雇佣合同的限制。商业秘密：依普通法保护。不正当竞争：依普通法。判例：Hong Kong Court of Appeal in JMH v. WYC [2005] HKC 498 对商业秘密。
notes: 三法域差异：中国《劳动合同法》第23条、第24条 + 《反不正当竞争法》第9条对保密义务+商业秘密有规定；美国EEA 18 U.S.C. §1831-1839 + 合同法 + 州法对商业秘密有规定；香港Cap. 57第70条 + 普通法对商业秘密有规定。差异根源：三法域对商业秘密+保密义务均有规定，但机制不同：中国有劳动合同法+反不正当竞争法，美国有联邦经济间谍法+州法，香港有雇佣条例+普通法。三法域差异在于商业秘密保护的立法模式。PENDING_VERIFICATION: 中国劳动合同法具体条款需确认。

fact_summary: 美国公司在中国进行M&A，中国商务部主张该交易违反中国《反垄断法》第21条（经营者集中申报），同时主张该交易应接受国家安全审查。
cn_claim: 中国《反垄断法》第21条：经营者集中达到国务院规定的申报标准的，经营者应当事先向国务院反垄断执法机构申报，未申报的不得实施集中。第31条：对外资并购境内企业或者以其他方式参与经营者集中，涉及国家安全的，除依照本法规定进行经营者集中审查外，还应当按照国家有关规定进行国家安全审查。
us_claim: HSR Act 15 U.S.C. §18a 对经营者集中申报。国家安全审查：CFIUS对国家安全审查。判例：United States v. Philadelphia National Bank, 374 U.S. 321 (1963) 对经营者集中审查。
hk_claim: Hong Kong Competition Ordinance (Cap. 619) 第3条：对合并的审查。Cap. 619第1条：对严重反竞争行为的禁止。香港对M&A：一般无专门国家安全审查，但受特定行业限制。判例：Competition Commission v. Construction Company [2018] HKC 555 对竞争条例。
notes: 三法域差异：中国《反垄断法》第21条、第31条对经营者集中+国家安全审查有规定；美国HSR Act 15 U.S.C. §18a + CFIUS对经营者集中+国家安全审查有规定；香港Cap. 619第3条、第1条对合并审查有规定。差异根源：三法域对M&A均有审查制度，但机制不同：中国有反垄断法+国家安全审查，美国有HSR Act + CFIUS，香港有竞争条例。三法域差异在于M&A审查的管辖权与审查标准。PENDING_VERIFICATION: 中国反垄断法具体条款需确认。

fact_summary: 香港公司在中国申请外观设计专利，中国知识产权局主张该设计违反中国《专利法》第2条（外观设计定义），同时主张该设计属于《专利法》第23条（现有设计）。
cn_claim: 中国《专利法》第2条：本法所称的发明创造是指发明、实用新型和外观设计。外观设计，是指对产品的整体或者局部的形状、图案或者其结合以及色彩与形状、图案的结合所作出的富有美感并适于工业应用的新设计。第23条：授予专利权的外观设计，应当不属于现有设计；也没有任何单位或者个人就同样的外观设计在申请日以前向国务院专利行政部门提出过申请，并记载在申请日以后公告的专利文件中。
us_claim: 美国外观设计专利：35 U.S.C. §171 对外观设计专利。35 U.S.C. §102-103 对新颖性、非显而易见性。判例：Egyptian Goddess, Inc. v. Swisa, Inc., 543 F.3d 665 (Fed. Cir. 2008) 对外观设计专利。
hk_claim: Hong Kong Registered Designs Ordinance (Cap. 522) 第4条：对注册外观设计的定义。Cap. 522第5条：对新颖性要求。判例：Hong Kong Court of Appeal in JMH v. WYC [2005] HKC 498 对外观设计。
notes: 三法域差异：中国《专利法》第2条、第23条对外观设计有定义+新颖性要求；美国35 U.S.C. §171 + §102-103 对外观设计专利有规定；香港Cap. 522第4条、第5条对外观设计有定义+新颖性要求。差异根源：三法域对外观设计专利均有规定，但标准不同：中国有专利法，美国有35 U.S.C. §171，香港有注册外观设计条例。三法域差异在于外观设计专利的认定标准。PENDING_VERIFICATION: 中国专利法具体条款需确认。

fact_summary: 中国公司董事在履行职务时，因过失导致公司证券虚假陈述，同时违反《证券法》。股东主张该董事承担侵权责任+证券法责任。
cn_claim: 中国《证券法》第85条：信息披露义务人未按照规定披露信息，或者公告的证券发行文件、定期报告、临时报告及其他信息披露资料存在虚假记载、误导性陈述或者重大遗漏，致使投资者在证券交易中遭受损失的，信息披露义务人应当承担赔偿责任。第163条：证券服务机构为证券的发行、上市、交易等证券业务活动制作、出具审计报告、资产评估报告、财务顾问报告、资信评级报告或者法律意见书等文件，应当勤勉尽责，对所依据的文件资料内容的真实性、准确性、完整性进行核查和验证。
us_claim: Securities Act of 1933 15 U.S.C. §77k 对注册陈述的虚假陈述。Securities Exchange Act of 1934 15 U.S.C. §78j(b) 对反欺诈。董事个人责任：依州法，董事可因过失承担个人责任。判例：Basic Inc. v. Levinson, 485 U.S. 224 (1988) 对虚假陈述。
hk_claim: Hong Kong Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) 第107条：对虚假陈述的禁止。Cap. 571第108条：对欺诈的禁止。Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) 第465条：董事注意义务。判例：Hong Kong Court of Appeal in JMH v. WYC [2005] HKC 498 对证券虚假陈述。
notes: 三法域差异：中国《证券法》第85条、第163条对证券虚假陈述有规定；美国15 U.S.C. §77k、§78j(b) 对证券虚假陈述有规定；香港Cap. 571第107条、第108条 + Cap. 622第465条对证券虚假陈述+董事注意义务有规定。差异根源：三法域对证券虚假陈述+董事责任均有规定，但标准不同：中国有证券法+董事责任，美国有1933/1934年证券法+州法，香港有证券及期货条例+公司条例。三法域差异在于董事证券责任的认定标准。PENDING_VERIFICATION: 中国证券法具体条款需确认。

fact_summary: SPAC上市后与目标公司合并过程中，目标公司财务预测存在重大偏差，投资者主张赔偿。A SPAC's financial projections for target company materially deviate post-merger; investors claim damages. The target is deemed co-registrant under SEC rules.
cn_claim: 根据《证券法》第85条、第163条，SPAC合并中目标公司作为信息披露义务人，因虚假陈述给投资者造成损失的，应当承担连带赔偿责任。SPAC制度在中国处于试点阶段。
us_claim: Under SEC Rule 145a (Securities Act §2(a)(3)) and amendments adopted Jan 24, 2024, target companies in de-SPAC transactions are 'co-registrants' subject to strict liability under Section 11 of the Securities Act. The SEC eliminated PSLRA safe harbor for forward-looking statements by SPACs per SEC Release Nos. 33-11265.
hk_claim: Under SFO (Cap. 571) Schedule 1, a target company in a RTO may be treated as a 'shadow director' if exercising significant influence. The Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) Part 2 Division 4 applies to prospectus liability for misrepresentation under SFO Part XIII. HKEX Listing Rules require profit forecasts with bases and assumptions disclosed.
notes: 美国SEC 2024规则将SPAC目标公司定性为co-registrant并移除PSLRA安全港；香港依赖SFO和Companies Ordinance的一般性虚假陈述责任，对SPAC无专门规则；中国《证券法》有连带责任但SPAC制度仍在试点。差异源于美国证券集体诉讼机制、香港普通法传统、中国注册制改革尚未覆盖SPAC特殊结构。

fact_summary: 加密货币交易所在香港申请VASP牌照，同时向美国SEC注册为ATS，但向中国用户提供离岸服务被认定为非法经营。A crypto exchange applies for HK VASP license, registers as US ATS, but offering offshore services to PRC users deemed illegal operation.
cn_claim: 根据中国人民银行等十部门《关于进一步防范和处置虚拟货币交易炒作风险的通知》（2021年924通知），虚拟货币相关业务活动属于非法金融活动，境外交易所向境内居民提供服务同样违法。
us_claim: Under SEC Regulation ATS (17 CFR 242.300) and SEC v. W.J. Howey Co., 328 U.S. 293 (1946), crypto assets may be securities requiring registration. SEC v. Coinbase Inc. (2023) reinforces enforcement against unregistered exchanges. FINRA regulates ATS operations under Exchange Act §15(b).
hk_claim: Under the Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing (Amendment) Ordinance 2022 and the VASP licensing regime effective June 2023, virtual asset service providers must be licensed by the SFC. The Stablecoins Ordinance (enacted May 2025, effective Aug 2025) requires licensing for fiat-referenced stablecoin issuance. SFO (Cap. 571) Part V applies to automated trading services.
notes: 美国SEC通过Howey测试和个案执法将加密货币纳入证券监管；香港建立VASP发牌制和稳定币条例，采取'相同活动、相同风险、相同监管'原则；中国全面禁止加密货币交易。差异源于美国功能监管传统、香港国际金融中心定位下的包容性监管、中国金融稳定优先的禁止立场。

fact_summary: 某中概股公司采用VIE架构在纳斯达克上市，因中国政府收紧外资准入政策，投资者担忧VIE合同可执行性并提起集体诉讼。A Chinese company listed on Nasdaq via VIE structure; investors file class action due to tightened foreign investment restrictions threatening VIE contract enforceability.
cn_claim: 根据《外商投资准入特别管理措施（负面清单）》及《外商投资法》第35条，VIE架构处于灰色地带，外资通过协议控制投资限制类行业存在合同无效风险。最高人民法院尚未明确VIE合同效力。
us_claim: Under SEC Division of Corporation Finance guidance (CF Disclosure Guidance Topic No. 10) and PCAOB standards, US-listed VIEs must disclose control risks. The Securities Act §11(a) imposes liability for material misstatements in registration statements. In re ChinaCast Educ. Corp. Securities Litig., 944 F.Supp.2d 357 (S.D.N.Y. 2013) addressed VIE-related disclosure fraud.
hk_claim: Under HKEX Listing Rules, VIE structures are permitted with enhanced disclosure (HKEX Guidance Letter HKEX-GL77-14). The Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) applies to registered companies but VIE contractual arrangements fall under common law contract principles. SFO (Cap. 571) Part XIV requires disclosure of material contracts. HKEX Listing Rules Chapter 19C applies to PRC issuers with weighted voting right structures.
notes: 美国SEC通过披露指引和证券集体诉讼约束VIE风险披露；香港HKEX允许VIE但要求强化披露；中国对VIE持默许但收紧态度，合同效力未明确。差异源于美国投资者保护导向的披露制度、香港吸引中概股回归的上市政策、中国外资产业政策与安全审查优先。

fact_summary: ESG基金被指控'漂绿'（greenwashing），其宣称的碳中和投资组合实际包含高碳排放企业。投资者以误导性陈述起诉。An ESG fund accused of greenwashing; its claimed carbon-neutral portfolio includes high-emission companies, investors sue for misleading statements.
cn_claim: 根据《绿色债券支持项目目录（2021年版）》及《公开募集证券投资基金信息披露管理办法》，ESG基金须如实披露投资标的，但'漂绿'专项规制尚未立法。金融监管总局2024年《关于绿色金融的指导意见》要求建立绿色金融标准体系。
us_claim: Under SEC 2010 Guidance Regarding Disclosure Related to Climate Change and SEC v. Rio Tinto plc (settled 2022), the SEC has brought enforcement actions for misleading ESG claims. The SEC Climate Disclosure Rules (adopted March 6, 2024, stayed April 4, 2024) would have mandated Scope 1 and 2 emissions disclosure. SEC Enforcement Division has targeted greenwashing under Securities Act §17(a)(2) and Exchange Act §10(b).
hk_claim: Under SFO (Cap. 571) §107, false or misleading statements in offer documents are criminal offenses. The HKEX ESG Reporting Guide (Appendix C2 to Main Board Listing Rules) requires 'comply or explain' disclosure on environmental policies. The SFC has issued circulars warning against greenwashing in ESG fund marketing (SFC Circular on ESG Funds, Oct 2021).
notes: 美国SEC通过2010气候指引和个案执法打击漂绿，曾尝试强制气候披露但遭诉讼撤回；香港SFC和HKEX采取'comply or explain'软法模式；中国建立绿色债券目录但ESG基金监管仍在发展中。差异源于美国证券集体诉讼的威慑力、香港自律监管传统、中国政策导向型绿色金融标准建设。

fact_summary: 某公司影子董事（shadow director）通过非正式渠道控制董事会决策，导致公司陷入重大债务。债权人主张影子董事承担个人责任。A shadow director controls board decisions through informal channels, causing the company to incur massive debts; creditors seek personal liability.
cn_claim: 根据《公司法》第21条、第147条，公司的控股股东、实际控制人利用关联关系损害公司利益的应当承担赔偿责任。但'影子董事'概念未在立法中明确，实际控制人责任通过法人格否认制度（第20条）追究。
us_claim: Under DGCL §141(a) and §144, directors owe fiduciary duties of care and loyalty. In Kahn v. Lynch Communication Systems, Inc., 638 A.2d 1110 (Del. 1994), controlling shareholders exercising de facto control are subject to entire fairness review. Delaware courts recognize 'controlling shareholder' and 'de facto director' doctrines under In re USACafes, L.P. Litigation, 600 A.2d 43 (Del. 1991).
hk_claim: Under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §2(1), 'shadow director' is defined as a person in accordance with whose directions or instructions the directors are accustomed to act. Section 465 makes shadow directors liable for fraudulent trading. Section 530 disqualifies unfit shadow directors. The SFO (Cap. 571) Schedule 1 includes shadow directors in the definition of 'director' for disclosure and disqualification purposes.
notes: 美国Delaware通过'controlling shareholder'和'de facto director'判例法追究实质控制人责任；香港Companies Ordinance明确定义shadow director并赋予其法定责任；中国依赖实际控制人概念和法人格否认制度，缺乏影子董事专门定义。差异源于美国判例法传统、香港成文法对英国传统的继承、中国立法对实质控制人概念的概括性规定。

fact_summary: 跨境并购中，目标公司管理层未披露重大数据泄露事件，收购完成后买方发现用户数据被盗。买方主张卖方违反陈述与保证条款。In a cross-border M&A, target management failed to disclose a material data breach; post-acquisition buyer discovers stolen user data and claims breach of reps and warranties.
cn_claim: 根据《民法典》第500条、第148条及《数据安全法》第27条，当事人在订立合同过程中故意隐瞒与订立合同有关的重要事实，应当承担缔约过失责任和赔偿责任。重大数据泄露属于应当披露的重大信息。
us_claim: Under DGCL §251 and Rev. Model Bus. Corp. Act §11.04, merger agreements contain reps and warranties. In IBM v. Liberty Life Assurance Co., 137 F. Supp. 2d 256 (S.D.N.Y. 2001), failure to disclose material cybersecurity risks breached reps. Under SEC cybersecurity disclosure rules (adopted 2023), material incidents must be disclosed on Form 8-K within 4 business days (Regulation S-K Item 106).
hk_claim: Under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) Part 4 Division 2, directors' duties include disclosure of material information. The Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) §4 requires data users to take practicable steps to protect personal data. A breach of PICS may trigger civil liability. SFO (Cap. 571) §XIV requires disclosure of material contracts and events affecting financial position.
notes: 美国通过SEC强制网络安全披露规则和并购合同 reps/warranties 保护买方；香港依赖PDPO和董事披露义务，但无专门网络安全披露规则；中国《数据安全法》和《民法典》提供缔约过失责任但数据泄露披露标准尚未明确。差异源于美国功能监管和证券集体诉讼驱动、香港普通法合同救济、中国安全法导向的立法模式。

fact_summary: 某公司将用户行为数据作为数据资产入表，并在数据交易所挂牌交易，但用户主张未充分授权，要求停止交易并赔偿。A company capitalizes user behavior data as data assets and lists them on a data exchange; users claim inadequate consent and demand cessation and damages.
cn_claim: 根据《数据安全法》第19条、《个人信息保护法》第13条、第28条，处理敏感个人信息须取得个人单独同意。数据资产交易若包含个人数据须进行脱敏或匿名化处理。财政部《企业数据资源相关会计处理暂行规定》允许数据资产入表，但须权属清晰。
us_claim: Under the California Consumer Privacy Act (Cal. Civ. Code §1798.100 et seq.) and California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA), businesses must provide notice and obtain consent for 'selling' personal information. Under SEC Regulation S-K, data assets may be intangible assets subject to disclosure. The FTC has brought actions against companies for misrepresenting data use practices (FTC v. Cambridge Analytica, 2019).
hk_claim: Under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) §§4 and 6, data users must obtain consent and specify purpose of use. The PDPO does not have a specific 'data asset' classification, but data trading must comply with DPP1 (purpose) and DPP3 (use) principles. The Office of the Privacy Commissioner has issued guidance on data trading (DPC Guidance on Data Trading, 2018). The SFO (Cap. 571) requires disclosure of material intangible assets in listing documents.
notes: 美国加州CPRA对个人信息'销售'有明确同意要求；香港PDPO依赖数据保护原则但无数据资产专门规则；中国建立数据资产入表制度但个人数据交易合规边界仍在探索。差异源于美国消费者权利立法传统、香港PDPO的个人信息保护框架、中国数据要素市场化的政策驱动。

fact_summary: DAO（去中心化自治组织）通过智能合约进行投融资活动，投资者因代码漏洞损失资金，主张DAO成员承担连带责任。DAO members face joint liability claims after investors lose funds due to smart contract vulnerabilities in a decentralized investment scheme.
cn_claim: 根据《民法典》第1198条、第1169条，网络服务提供者未尽到安全保障义务的应当承担侵权责任。但DAO的去中心化结构使责任主体难以认定。中国对加密货币和DAO活动持禁止态度，相关投资活动不受法律保护。
us_claim: Under SEC Statement on DeFi (2023) and SEC v. LBRY, Inc., 2022 WL 1753079 (D.N.H. 2022), DAO token offerings may be securities under Howey test. In Sarcuni v. bZx DAO, 2023 WL 2386448 (S.D. Cal. 2023), a federal court held that a DAO could be sued as an unincorporated association under California law. The Revised Uniform Unincorporated Nonprofit Association Act (RUUNAA) may apply to DAO liability.
hk_claim: Under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622), a DAO is not recognized as a legal entity unless registered. The SFO (Cap. 571) Part V applies to collective investment schemes; if a DAO's token constitutes a CIS, SFC authorization is required. The HKEX has not approved DAO-based listing applications. The common law partnership rules (Partnership Ordinance, Cap. 38) may apply to members with profit-sharing arrangements, imposing joint liability.
notes: 美国通过Howey测试和个案诉讼将DAO纳入证券法或普通法协会责任；香港要求DAO注册或取得CIS授权，否则成员可能承担合伙责任；中国不承认DAO法律地位并禁止相关加密活动。差异源于美国对金融创新的事后监管、香港成文法对实体形式的严格要求、中国禁止加密货币的立场。

fact_summary: 区块链治理中，节点运营者通过算力优势（51%攻击）逆转已确认交易，受损用户主张节点运营者承担侵权赔偿责任。Node operators reverse confirmed transactions via 51% attack; affected users claim tort damages.
cn_claim: 根据《民法典》第1165条、第127条，网络虚拟财产受法律保护，行为人因过错侵害他人民事权益的应当承担侵权责任。但区块链去中心化特性使传统侵权法中的因果关系和过错认定面临挑战。
us_claim: Under the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act (18 U.S.C. §1030), unauthorized access to computers is criminalized. Civil liability for blockchain attacks remains limited. Under commodities law, the CFTC has brought enforcement against manipulation (CFTC v. Ooki DAO, 2022). The SEC has not established clear liability for 51% attacks under securities laws.
hk_claim: Under the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210) §16, obtaining pecuniary advantage by deception is criminal. For civil liability, the common law tort of deceit and the Misrepresentation Ordinance (Cap. 284) may apply if misrepresentation can be proven. However, the decentralized nature of blockchain makes identifying the defendant and proving causation difficult under Hong Kong procedural rules (Civil Procedure Rules, Cap. 399).
notes: 美国CFAA和CFTC执法可覆盖部分区块链攻击，但民事侵权救济不足；香港依赖普通法欺诈和盗窃条例，但去中心化结构下诉讼困难；中国《民法典》保护虚拟财产但区块链攻击的因果关系认定困难。差异源于各国对去中心化系统缺乏专门立法，依赖传统法律框架的嫁接。

fact_summary: 某公司利用气候诉讼（climate litigation）作为商业策略，起诉竞争对手碳排放过高，同时自身ESG报告存在虚假成分。A company uses climate litigation as business strategy, suing a competitor for high carbon emissions while its own ESG report contains false claims.
cn_claim: 根据《环境保护法》第58条、第59条，符合条件的社会组织可以提起环境公益诉讼。但企业之间以气候诉讼为竞争工具缺乏直接法律依据。中国法院在气候诉讼方面案例极少，如'云南绿孔雀案'（2020）主要围绕物种保护而非碳排放竞争。
us_claim: Under City of Oakland v. BP p.l.c., 959 F.3d 1097 (9th Cir. 2020), cities sued fossil fuel companies for climate damages. In Rhode Island v. Chevron Corp., 2022 WL 1753125 (1st Cir. 2022), state tort claims including public nuisance were applied to climate liability. The Supreme Court in West Virginia v. EPA, 597 U.S. 697 (2022) limited federal agency climate regulation but left tort claims open. California's climate disclosure laws (SB 253, 261) create private rights of action.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the tort of public nuisance may apply to environmental harm (Cambridge Water Co v Eastern Counties Leather plc [1994] 2 AC 264, UK PC). However, climate change litigation remains underdeveloped in Hong Kong. The Environmental Impact Assessment Ordinance (Cap. 499) §13 provides for environmental permits but not private climate litigation. The SFO (Cap. 571) requires disclosure of climate risks if material to financial position.
notes: 美国通过州法公共妨害理论和城市诉讼开拓气候诉讼，加州另有强制披露法；香港普通法有公共妨害理论但气候诉讼几乎空白；中国环境公益诉讼局限于社会组织，企业间气候竞争诉讼无依据。差异源于美国侵权法的开放性、香港普通法继承但受限于本地案例缺乏、中国公益诉讼的法定限制。

fact_summary: 员工持股平台（ESOP）在跨境上市中被要求认定为股东而非员工福利，触发SEC严格披露和税务审查。ESOP in cross-border IPO is reclassified from employee benefit to shareholder, triggering SEC strict disclosure and tax scrutiny.
cn_claim: 根据《公司法》第142条、《关于上市公司实施员工持股计划试点的指导意见》，员工持股计划属于员工福利性质，不认定为公众股东。证监会要求ESOP在IPO申报中披露但不计入公众股东人数。
us_claim: Under SEC Rule 701 (17 CFR 230.701) and Form S-8, employee stock plans are exempt from registration but subject to disclosure. Under IRC §§421 and 422, incentive stock options receive favorable tax treatment. The SEC requires disclosure of stock-based compensation under Regulation S-K Item 402. Reclassification as shareholder triggers Section 16(b) short-swing profit rules and beneficial ownership reporting.
hk_claim: Under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) and HKEX Listing Rules Chapter 17, share option schemes for employees are subject to disclosure and shareholders' approval. The Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap. 112) §§8(1) and 9(1) taxes employment income including share benefits. The SFO (Cap. 571) Part XV requires disclosure of interests in shares by beneficial owners, including employee trust holdings if exceeding 5% threshold.
notes: 美国SEC Rule 701和S-8表格提供注册豁免但限制条件严格；香港HKEX Chapter 17要求股东批准和披露；中国证监会对ESOP采取福利定性、不计入公众股东。差异源于美国证券注册制度的严格性、香港上市规则对股东权益保护的平衡、中国员工持股试点政策的灵活性。

fact_summary: 公司使用AI算法进行董事会决策辅助，AI建议导致重大投资损失。股东主张AI决策辅助构成董事注意义务（duty of care）违反。AI board advisory tool recommends a major investment that causes losses; shareholders claim breach of duty of care.
cn_claim: 根据《公司法》第147条、第152条，董事对公司负有忠实义务和勤勉义务。AI作为辅助工具不能替代董事个人判断，董事因过度依赖AI导致决策失误仍应承担违反勤勉义务的责任。但目前无AI决策责任的专门规定。
us_claim: Under DGCL §141(b) and Caremark (In re Caremark Int'l Inc. Derivative Litig., 698 A.2d 959 (Del. Ch. 1996)), directors must exercise good faith oversight. In Marchand v. Barnhill, 212 A.3d 805 (Del. 2019), directors face liability for failure to monitor mission-critical risks. The use of AI does not absolve directors of Caremark duties. The SEC has warned about AI washing in investment advice (SEC 2023 Risk Alert).
hk_claim: Under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §465 and common law, directors owe fiduciary duties of care, skill, and diligence (Re City Equitable Fire Insurance Co [1925] Ch 407). The SFO (Cap. 571) §114 requires disclosure of material technological risks. The use of AI in board decisions would be assessed under the common law duty of care; no specific AI governance statute exists in Hong Kong.
notes: 美国Delaware Caremark案建立董事监督义务，AI不减免责任；香港普通法保留董事注意义务，但无AI专门规则；中国《公司法》规定勤勉义务但AI辅助决策标准不明。差异源于美国判例法对注意义务的深度发展、香港普通法的传统标准、中国成文法对新兴技术回应滞后。

fact_summary: 美国公司与中国公司签订跨境数据共享协议，数据从中国传至美国后，美国政府依据CLOUD Act要求调取存储在美国服务器上的中国公民数据。A US company shares data with a Chinese company; after transfer, the US government demands access to Chinese citizens' data under the CLOUD Act.
cn_claim: 根据《数据安全法》第36条、《个人信息保护法》第41条，非经中华人民共和国主管机关批准，不得向外国司法或者执法机构提供存储于中华人民共和国境内的数据。中国法律禁止未经批准的跨境数据提供。
us_claim: Under the CLOUD Act (18 U.S.C. §§2713, 2523), US law enforcement can compel US providers to disclose data regardless of physical location. Under Microsoft Corp. v. United States (In re Warrant to Search Content), 585 U.S. ___ (2018), the CLOUD Act was enacted to override the Second Circuit's holding that data stored abroad was beyond US warrant reach. The Stored Communications Act (18 U.S.C. §2703) applies to US providers.
hk_claim: Under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) §33, data transfer to a place outside Hong Kong is restricted unless certain conditions are met. The Data Protection Principle 3 (use) limits use of personal data to original purposes. The SFO (Cap. 571) and common law may recognize US court orders but data protection law provides a statutory defense. However, Hong Kong has no blocking statute equivalent to China's.
notes: 美国CLOUD Act赋予执法机构域外数据调取权；中国《数据安全法》明确禁止未经批准向外国提供数据；香港PDPO限制数据出境但无明确阻断法。三法域直接冲突：美国要求披露 vs 中国禁止提供，形成不可调和的法律冲突，根源在于主权国家对数据管辖权的争夺。

fact_summary: SPAC发起人（sponsor）在de-SPAC交易中获得超额股权奖励，小股东主张稀释损害并请求禁令。SPAC sponsor receives disproportionate equity in de-SPAC; minority shareholders seek injunctive relief for dilution.
cn_claim: 根据《公司法》第34条、第74条，股东有权查阅公司账簿，但对SPAC发起人超额奖励的约束有限，SPAC制度在中国尚处于试点阶段。科创板和创业板对SPAC尚无明确规则。
us_claim: Under DGCL §251(c) and In re Multiplan Corp. S'holders Litig., 268 A.3d 784 (Del. Ch. 2022), SPAC sponsors owe fiduciary duties of loyalty and disclosure to shareholders. The court found sponsor conflicts must be disclosed, and the business combination is subject to entire fairness review due to inherent conflicts. SEC Rule 16b-3 exempts certain compensation from short-swing profit rules but requires disclosure.
hk_claim: Under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §§622-632, unfair prejudice remedies apply to minority shareholders. The SFO (Cap. 571) §§213-214 provides for unfair prejudice petitions and disqualification of unfit directors. However, Hong Kong has no specific SPAC sponsor duty rules; SPAC listings were permitted under HKEX guidance from 2022 (HKEX-GL112-22). The UK-listed SPAC model influenced HK rules but Delaware fiduciary law does not apply.
notes: 美国Delaware通过Multiplan案建立SPAC发起人信义义务和entire fairness审查；香港允许SPAC上市但依赖普通法不公平损害救济，无专门发起人义务规则；中国SPAC制度试点中缺乏股东保护细则。差异源于美国判例法对SPAC冲突的积极回应、香港监管跟随英国模式、中国试点阶段制度不完善。

fact_summary: 公司因气候诉讼被判决巨额赔偿后申请破产，债权人主张环境责任不可通过破产免除。Company files for bankruptcy after climate judgment; creditors argue environmental liability is non-dischargeable.
cn_claim: 根据《企业破产法》第113条、第132条，环境侵权债权属于普通破产债权，但暂无专门规定环境责任不可免除。最高人民法院关于破产法的司法解释未明确环境债权的优先性或不可免除性。
us_claim: Under 11 U.S.C. §523(a)(6), debts for willful and malicious injury are non-dischargeable. In Ohio v. Kovacs, 469 U.S. 274 (1985), environmental cleanup orders were held dischargeable in bankruptcy. However, under 11 U.S.C. §1141(d), environmental obligations may survive if the debtor remains liable as an owner. The Comprehensive Environmental Response, Compensation, and Liability Act (CERCLA, 42 U.S.C. §9601) creates strict liability but discharge in bankruptcy remains contested.
hk_claim: Under the Companies (Winding Up and Miscellaneous Provisions) Ordinance (Cap. 32) §180, fraudulent debts are not provable. Under common law, fines and penalties owed to the Crown are not provable in bankruptcy. The Environmental Impact Assessment Ordinance (Cap. 499) §13 provides for environmental permits but does not address bankruptcy discharge. The Hong Kong bankruptcy regime does not have a specific environmental liability exception.
notes: 美国破产法§523(a)(6)部分环境债不可免除，但Kovacs案允许免除；香港破产法无环境责任专门例外；中国破产法未明确环境债权地位。三法域在环境债是否可通过破产免除上存在根本冲突，根源在于环境政策目标与破产法经济重生目标的张力。

fact_summary: 某企业同时在中国A股和香港H股上市，两地监管机构对同一财务造假行为作出不同处罚决定。A company dual-listed in A-share and H-share markets receives different penalties from mainland and Hong Kong regulators for the same accounting fraud.
cn_claim: 根据《证券法》第181条、第197条，财务造假可处以罚款、市场禁入。中国证监会可对上市公司处以最高1000万元罚款。新《证券法》强化了对信息披露违法的处罚力度。
us_claim: Under the Securities Act §24 and Exchange Act §32, willful violations can result in criminal penalties and civil fines up to $5 million for entities. Under SEC v. WorldCom, Inc., 2002 WL 1427193 (S.D.N.Y. 2002), the SEC obtained disgorgement and penalties. The SEC and DOJ can impose parallel penalties. The Private Securities Litigation Reform Act (PSLRA) governs private damages but not SEC enforcement.
hk_claim: Under the SFO (Cap. 571) §§298-307, false and misleading statements in prospectuses and market misconduct are criminal offenses with penalties up to HK$10 million and 10 years imprisonment. The SFC can impose disciplinary fines under SFO §§194-196. The Market Misconduct Tribunal can impose civil penalties up to HK$10 million. In Securities and Futures Commission v. China Metal Recycling (Holdings) Ltd, [2018] HKCFA 32, the SFC pursued dual enforcement.
notes: 中国证监会罚款上限与香港SFC和MMT的罚款标准差异显著，且两地处罚可能重叠。中国《证券法》2020年修订后提高罚款但仍可能低于香港。差异源于两地监管机构的独立性、法律体系差异（大陆法vs普通法）以及跨境执法协调机制的不完善。

fact_summary: 公司使用AI生成财务报告，AI产生幻觉数据（hallucinated figures）导致股价异常波动。监管机构追究公司责任。AI-generated financial report contains hallucinated figures causing abnormal stock price fluctuations; regulators hold the company liable.
cn_claim: 根据《证券法》第78条、第197条，信息披露义务人披露的信息应当真实、准确、完整。AI生成错误数据属于信息披露违法，公司应当承担行政责任。但AI作为工具的责任边界尚不明确。
us_claim: Under SEC Regulation S-K Item 10 and the Securities Act §17(a)(2), material misstatements in SEC filings are actionable. The SEC has issued guidance on AI use (SEC 2023 Statement on AI Washing), holding companies liable for materially misleading statements regardless of AI involvement. Under Exchange Act §10(b) and SEC Rule 10b-5, scienter is required for fraud liability. The SEC has brought enforcement against companies for AI-generated misleading disclosures.
hk_claim: Under the SFO (Cap. 571) §§298-307, false or misleading statements in listing documents or announcements are criminal offenses. The Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §622 requires directors to ensure accuracy of financial statements. The HKEX Listing Rules require disclosure of material information and impose disciplinary actions for inaccurate announcements. The SFC has not issued specific AI disclosure guidance but general principles apply.
notes: 美国SEC明确将AI幻觉纳入证券欺诈执法；香港SFC和HKEX依赖一般性披露义务；中国《证券法》要求真实准确但AI专门规则缺失。差异在于美国监管对AI风险的前瞻性回应、香港自律监管的稳定性、中国立法对新技术的跟进速度。

fact_summary: 跨境破产中，美国Chapter 15承认香港清盘程序，但中国内地法院拒绝承认香港清盘人的身份，导致同一破产程序在不同法域效果分裂。Cross-border bankruptcy: US Chapter 15 recognizes HK winding-up, but mainland China court refuses recognition of HK liquidator's status.
cn_claim: 根据《企业破产法》第5条，依照本法开始的破产程序，对债务人在中华人民共和国领域外的财产发生效力。但跨境承认与协助制度仍不完善。最高人民法院与香港特区政府2021年签署《关于内地与香港特别行政区法院相互认可和协助破产程序的会谈纪要》，仅适用于上海、深圳、厦门试点。
us_claim: Under 11 U.S.C. §§1501-1532 (Chapter 15), US courts recognize foreign insolvency proceedings and representatives. In In re Fairfield Sentry Ltd., 714 F.3d 112 (2d Cir. 2013), US courts recognized foreign liquidators. The UNCITRAL Model Law on Cross-Border Insolvency (enacted in US as Chapter 15) provides framework for cooperation. §1507 permits discretionary relief to foreign representatives.
hk_claim: Under the Companies (Winding Up and Miscellaneous Provisions) Ordinance (Cap. 32) and common law, Hong Kong courts can recognize foreign insolvency proceedings. Under the Mutual Recognition of Insolvency Proceedings arrangement with mainland China (2021), only Shanghai, Shenzhen and Xiamen courts participate. The Mainland Judgments in Civil and Commercial Matters (Reciprocal Enforcement) Ordinance (Cap. 645) does not cover insolvency.
notes: 美国Chapter 15广泛承认外国破产程序；香港与内地仅有三地试点互认；中国《企业破产法》第5条宣示域外效力但承认机制有限。三法域冲突根源于主权司法管辖权的限制、'一国两制'下内地与香港法律互认的渐进性、以及美国UNCITRAL Model Law的全面采纳。

fact_summary: 公司通过股权回购（share buyback）在不同法域同步操作，美国回购适用Rule 10b-18安全港，香港回购须符合Companies Ordinance，中国回购受《公司法》严格限制，同一回购计划在三法域产生不同法律效果。Synchronized share buyback across three jurisdictions produces different legal effects under US Rule 10b-18, HK Companies Ordinance, and PRC Company Law.
cn_claim: 根据《公司法》第142条，公司回购股份须符合法定情形（减资、合并、股权激励等），且须履行债权人通知和公告程序。中国对回购资金的来源和比例有严格限制。
us_claim: Under SEC Rule 10b-18 (17 CFR 240.10b-18), companies have a safe harbor from market manipulation liability if buybacks meet volume, timing, and price conditions. Under DGCL §160, treasury shares are permitted. The SEC does not require specific buyback purposes. The Inflation Reduction Act (2022) imposed 1% excise tax on buybacks (IRC §4501).
hk_claim: Under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §§215-217, a company may purchase its own shares if authorized by its articles and shareholders' resolution. The Listing Rules require disclosure and restrict timing (e.g., not during blackout periods). SFO (Cap. 571) §§XV requires disclosure of directors' interests. The HKEX restricts buybacks during the one month before results announcements.
notes: 美国Rule 10b-18提供反操纵安全港，回购目的不受限制；香港要求公司章程授权和股东决议，HKEX限制时间窗口；中国《公司法》限定回购法定事由并须债权人保护程序。三法域在回购条件、目的、程序上存在直接冲突，根源在于对资本维持原则的不同强度要求。

fact_summary: 公司在ESG评级中被下调后，债券投资者依据绿色债券条款主张提前赎回权。投资者声称ESG评级下调构成'重大不利变化'。Bond investors claim early redemption under green bond covenants after ESG rating downgrade, asserting 'material adverse change'.
cn_claim: 根据《绿色债券支持项目目录（2021年版）》和银行间市场交易商协会《绿色债券评估认证行为指引》，绿色债券评估关注资金用途和项目环境效益，但债券条款中较少直接绑定ESG评级。中国尚无ESG评级下调触发债券违约的判例。
us_claim: Under New York law (governing most green bonds), covenant interpretation follows contractual text. In Akorn, Inc. v. Fresenius Kabi AG, 2018 WL 4684206 (Del. Ch. 2018), material adverse effect clauses were narrowly construed. The ICMA Green Bond Principles (2014, updated 2021) are voluntary guidelines. The SEC has not mandated ESG rating-linked redemption clauses. Contractual terms govern under UCC Article 3 or common law.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, contractual interpretation follows the objective approach (Reardon Smith Line Ltd v Hansen-Tangen [1976] 1 WLR 989). The HKMA Green and Sustainable Finance Grant Scheme encourages green bonds but does not mandate ESG rating covenants. The SFO (Cap. 571) requires disclosure of material terms. Green bond terms are governed by the offering circular and common law principles of contract construction.
notes: 美国依赖合同法和判例法解释MAE条款；香港普通法合同解释原则适用；中国绿色债券政策关注资金用途但ESG评级条款尚未成主流。三法域冲突根源于合同自由原则与绿色金融标准强制性之间的张力，以及对'重大不利'定义的不同法律解释传统。

fact_summary: 某公司将碳排放配额作为无形资产入表，并在财务报表中确认碳资产。美国SEC要求披露气候风险但碳资产会计处理尚无统一标准。A company capitalizes carbon credits as intangible assets; US SEC requires climate risk disclosure but carbon asset accounting lacks uniform standards.
cn_claim: 根据财政部《企业数据资源相关会计处理暂行规定》及《碳排放权交易有关会计处理暂行规定》，碳排放配额可确认为无形资产或存货。中国全国碳市场已建立，企业可按取得成本确认碳资产。
us_claim: Under FASB ASC 350 (Intangibles) and ASC 720 (Environmental Obligations), carbon credits may be accounted for as intangible assets or inventory depending on purpose. The SEC Climate Disclosure Rules (adopted March 2024, rescinded 2025) would have required emissions disclosure but not carbon asset capitalization. The FASB has not issued a specific standard for carbon credits. SEC Staff Accounting Bulletin No. 92 addresses environmental liabilities.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国财政部已发布碳排放权会计处理暂行规定，明确碳资产可入表；美国FASB尚无碳资产专门准则，SEC气候披露规则被撤回；香港无碳资产专门会计规则。差异源于中国全国碳市场的政策驱动立法、美国会计准则制定的滞后性和政治化、香港缺乏本地碳市场。

fact_summary: 中国企业在美国发行D股（GDR），因中美审计监管冲突导致PCAOB无法检查中国审计师工作底稿，SEC暂停交易。Chinese company issues GDRs in US; PCAOB audit access conflict leads to SEC trading suspension.
cn_claim: 根据《证券法》第224条及《关于加强境内企业境外发行证券和上市保密和档案管理工作的规定》（2023年修订），境内企业境外发行证券须遵守保密和档案管理规定，审计底稿出境须经批准。中国证监会与PCAOB 2022年签署审计监管合作协议。
us_claim: Under the Holding Foreign Companies Accountable Act (HFCAA, Pub. L. 116-222), the SEC must identify issuers with non-PCAOB-inspectable auditors and prohibit trading if audit access is denied for three consecutive years. The SEC has delisted dozens of Chinese companies under HFCAA. The PCAOB-China agreement (2022) allows for inspection but implementation remains contested. SEC Release No. 34-93784 (2022) established the framework.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 美国HFCAA明确将PCAOB检查权与上市资格挂钩，形成强制性退市机制；中国证监会与PCAOB有合作协议但审计底稿出境受国内法限制；香港作为上市地不受HFCAA直接影响。差异源于美国证券监管的长臂管辖权、中国数据主权和国家安全的优先考量、香港作为独立监管区域的地位。

fact_summary: 公司实施'同股不同权'（WVR）架构在港上市，但美国机构投资者因治理担忧提起股东派生诉讼。Company with weighted voting right (WVR) structure listed in HK faces US institutional investor derivative suit over governance concerns.
cn_claim: 根据《公司法》第131条及科创板和创业板规则，中国允许同股不同权在科创板上市，但限制表决权差异比例（最高5:1或10:1）。公司章程须明确WVR安排并披露。
us_claim: Under Delaware law (DGCL §§151, 212), dual-class structures are permitted with no voting ratio cap. In Google Inc. Shareholder Derivative Litigation, 2013 WL 5562073 (Del. Ch. 2013), the court upheld dual-class structures. The NYSE and Nasdaq permit WVR listings. However, ISS and institutional investors often oppose dual-class structures. The SEC does not restrict WVR but requires disclosure under Regulation S-K Item 402.
hk_claim: Under HKEX Listing Rules Chapter 8A (introduced 2018), WVR structures are permitted with safeguards: WVR beneficiaries must be directors, votes capped at 10:1, and sunset clauses required. The SFC and HKEX have enhanced WVR disclosure requirements. In Securities and Futures Commission v. Pacific Sun Advisors Ltd, [2018] HKCFA 28, the courts upheld SFC's regulatory authority over listed companies.
notes: 美国Delaware允许任意比例WVR且无sunset要求；香港HKEX限制WVR为10:1且要求sunset条款；中国科创板允许WVR但有严格比例和范围限制。三法域不对称根源于对创始人控制与投资者保护的平衡差异：美国偏向合同自由，香港采取有管制的包容，中国试点中限制严格。

fact_summary: 香港公司在中国内地设立WOFE，因中国《外商投资法》实施，五年过渡期届满后须调整组织架构，但公司章程与香港母公司治理结构冲突。HK company operates WOFE in mainland; PRC Foreign Investment Law transition period expires requiring restructuring but conflicts with HK parent governance.
cn_claim: 根据《外商投资法》第31条、第42条，外商投资企业五年过渡期后须依照《公司法》调整治理结构，包括设立董事会、监事会等。三资企业法（中外合资、合作、外资）已废止。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622), Hong Kong companies operate under a single-tier board structure with optional company secretary. The Foreign Investment Law of PRC does not apply to Hong Kong-incorporated companies per se, but their mainland subsidiaries (WOFEs) must comply. The 'one country, two systems' principle means Hong Kong law governs the parent but PRC law governs the subsidiary.
notes: 中国《外商投资法》强制要求外商投资企业调整治理结构；香港Companies Ordinance保留单层董事会和弹性治理；美国无直接对应问题。差异源于中国外商投资管理制度改革、香港'一国两制'下的普通法自治，以及WOFE作为跨境投资载体的双重法律适用。

fact_summary: 公司在中国发行数据资产ABS，以数据资产产生的现金流为偿付支持。美国尚无数据资产证券化的明确案例。A company issues data asset-backed securities (ABS) in China; US lacks clear precedent for data asset securitization.
cn_claim: 根据财政部《企业数据资源相关会计处理暂行规定》及各地数据交易所规则，数据资产可在完成确权、登记、评估后作为ABS底层资产。2024年以来，中国多地已有数据资产ABS落地案例。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国在政策驱动下已有数据资产ABS实践，财政部暂行规定和各地数据交易所提供制度支持；美国和香港均无数据资产证券化的专门制度或成熟案例。差异源于中国数据要素市场化配置的政策导向、美国ABS法律框架对数据资产确权的障碍、香港缺乏数据资产会计和交易基础设施。

fact_summary: SPAC在de-SPAC交易中聘请的财务顾问因利益冲突被SEC调查，同时香港SFC对同一顾问进行平行调查。SPAC financial advisor faces parallel SEC and SFC investigations over conflicts of interest in de-SPAC transaction.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under SEC Rule 145a and the 2024 SPAC Rules, financial advisors in de-SPAC transactions face expanded liability as potential statutory underwriters. SEC Release No. 33-11265 (2024) requires enhanced disclosure of sponsor conflicts and dilution. Under Securities Act §11, underwriters are liable for material misstatements. The SEC has brought enforcement against SPAC advisors for inadequate due diligence.
hk_claim: Under the SFO (Cap. 571) §§114, 194, and the Code on Conduct for Persons Licensed by or Registered with the SFC, financial advisors must manage conflicts of interest. The SFC has issued guidance on SPAC listing (SFC Circular, 2022). The HKEX Listing Rules Chapter 18B (introduced 2022) governs SPAC listings and requires sponsor independence. Under SFO §§V and XIV, market misconduct and false statements are criminalized.
notes: 美国SEC和香港SFC均对SPAC交易中的财务顾问利益冲突有监管权力，但调查标准和法律后果不同：美国有证券法§11严格责任和集体诉讼；香港依赖SFC纪律处分和SFO刑事条款。中国无SPAC专门制度，无法直接映射。差异源于美国证券集体诉讼制度的存在和香港行政监管主导模式。

fact_summary: 纳斯达克上市公司与港交所上市公司进行跨境换股合并，触发美国Rule 14e-5和香港Code on Takeovers and Mergers的交叉适用。Cross-border stock-for-stock merger between Nasdaq and HKEX-listed companies triggers overlapping US Rule 14e-5 and HK Code on Takeovers.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under SEC Rule 14e-5 (17 CFR 240.14e-5), cross-border tender offers are subject to restrictions on purchases outside the offer. The SEC has provided cross-border exemptions under Rule 14d-1(c) and Rule 14e-5(b). The Hart-Scott-Rodino Act (15 U.S.C. §18a) requires premerger notification for acquisitions above threshold. The SEC staff has issued no-action letters on cross-border mergers.
hk_claim: Under the Code on Takeovers and Mergers (administered by the SFC and Takeovers Panel), a general offer is triggered at 30% voting rights. Rule 4 of the Code requires equal treatment of shareholders. The Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §§674-675 provides schemes of arrangement for mergers. The SFC must approve the offer document. Cross-border aspects are governed by the Code's Introduction and General Principles.
notes: 美国SEC Rule 14e-5和HSR法关注跨境要约收购和反垄断审查；香港《收购守则》关注30%触发点和股东平等待遇。两法域在收购规则上存在交叉适用但标准不同。中国《反垄断法》和《上市公司收购管理办法》有类似规则，但跨境换股合并的具体适用仍在发展中。差异源于美国功能监管和反垄断审查的并行、香港City Code传统、中国反垄断与证券监管的分立。

fact_summary: 香港注册的基金管理公司在美国推广基金产品，因未注册为投资顾问被SEC起诉。同时，该公司在香港持SFC牌照合法经营。HK-registered fund manager promotes products in US without SEC registration; holds valid SFC license in HK.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under the Investment Advisers Act of 1940 (15 U.S.C. §§80b-1 to 80b-21), any person providing investment advice for compensation must register with the SEC unless exempt. SEC v. W.J. Howey Co. established investment contract definition. The SEC has brought enforcement against foreign advisers soliciting US clients (SEC v. Martel, 2002). The 'de minimis' exemption under §203(b)(3) applies to fewer than 15 clients. Cross-border exemptions are limited.
hk_claim: Under the SFO (Cap. 571) Part V, a person conducting regulated activity (Type 9: asset management) must be licensed by the SFC. The SFC's Code on Conduct for Persons Licensed by or Registered with the SFC governs fund management activities. The SFC has entered into MOUs with foreign regulators (including the SEC) but does not exempt compliance with US registration requirements. The SFC's licensing regime is recognized under IOSCO principles.
notes: 美国Investment Advisers Act要求向美国人提供投资建议须注册SEC，跨境豁免有限；香港SFC Type 9牌照在本管辖区有效但不对美国产生豁免。中国《证券投资基金法》和私募基金管理人登记制度有类似要求，但跨境推广同样受目的地国法律约束。差异源于各国金融监管的域内效力和投资者保护门槛。

fact_summary: 美国对冲基金通过香港子公司投资中国A股，因中国外汇管制和QFII/RQFII额度限制，无法汇出投资收益。US hedge fund invests in A-shares via HK subsidiary; unable to repatriate gains due to PRC foreign exchange controls and QFII quota limits.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under US tax law (IRC §§871, 882), foreign persons are subject to withholding tax on US-source income but not on foreign-source income. The US hedge fund's tax treatment is governed by partnership tax rules (Subchapter K). The SEC and CFTC regulate fund operations but do not control foreign exchange repatriation. The Treasury Department administers sanctions under OFAC but QFII limits are not sanctions.
hk_claim: Under the SFO (Cap. 571) Part V, the HK subsidiary must be licensed for Type 9 (asset management). The SFC regulates the fund's operations in Hong Kong but does not control PRC foreign exchange policy. The HKMA administers Hong Kong's foreign exchange regime but QFII repatriation is governed by SAFE (PRC State Administration of Foreign Exchange) rules. The HK-PRC Closer Economic Partnership Arrangement (CEPA) does not cover QFII repatriation.
notes: 美国法律和监管不控制QFII额度分配和外汇汇出；香港SFC监管基金运营但QFII汇出受中国SAFE管制；中国外汇管制和QFII制度是投资收益汇出的主要障碍。差异源于中国资本账户管制、香港作为投资通道的有限性、美国对离岸投资的非干预政策。

fact_summary: 香港上市公司采纳英国《公司法》下的'股东积极主义'（shareholder activism）策略，美国对冲基金作为股东要求罢免董事，香港法院审查美国激进股东的投票权。HK-listed company adopts UK-style shareholder activism; US hedge fund demands board removal, HK court reviews activist voting rights.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under Delaware law (DGCL §§211, 212), shareholders have statutory rights to vote on director elections. In Blasius Industries, Inc. v. Atlas Corp., 564 A.2d 651 (Del. 1988), board actions designed to interfere with shareholder voting rights are subject to compelling justification standard. US hedge funds routinely engage in activism under SEC Rule 13d-1 (beneficial ownership disclosure). The SEC has brought enforcement for failure to disclose 13d filings (SEC v. Icahn, 2023).
hk_claim: Under the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §§543-546, shareholders may remove directors by ordinary resolution. The common law principle of proper purpose (White v. Bristol Aeroplane Co Ltd [1953] Ch 65) applies to shareholder voting. The SFO (Cap. 571) Part XV requires disclosure of 5% shareholding interests. The Takeovers Code applies if activism crosses 30% threshold. In Re PCCW Ltd [2009] HKCFA 11, the court upheld shareholder rights to vote on board composition.
notes: 美国Delaware有发达的反收购和股东积极主义判例法；香港普通法和Companies Ordinance保障股东罢免权但积极主义案例较少；中国《公司法》允许股东罢免董事但实践中受控股权集中限制。差异源于美国股权分散结构和积极主义文化、香港普通法传统和集中股权结构、中国股权集中和治理文化。

fact_summary: 平台工人（零工经济）被算法自动解雇，无任何人工审查。工人主张算法决策构成不当解雇。Gig worker is algorithmically terminated without human review; claims unfair dismissal under labor law protections.
cn_claim: 根据《劳动法》第26条、第29条及《劳动合同法》第39-41条，用人单位单方解除劳动合同须符合法定情形，严重违反规章制度须举证。但平台工人是否属于'劳动者'存在争议，目前司法实践倾向于认定存在劳动关系（如'闪送案'2021）。
us_claim: Under California AB 5 (Lab. Code §2750.3) and Dynamex Operations West, Inc. v. Superior Court, 4 Cal.5th 903 (2018), gig workers are presumptively employees. Proposition 22 (2020, upheld by Cal. Supreme Court July 2024) carved out app-based drivers but granted limited benefits. Under the FLSA (29 U.S.C. §206) and DOL 2024 final rule (economic reality test), employee status depends on control and opportunity for profit. The NLRA (29 U.S.C. §151) protects employees' right to organize.
hk_claim: Under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) §§32A-32P, an employee with continuous contract of 24 months may claim unreasonable dismissal. The Minimum Wage Ordinance (Cap. 608) applies to all employees. However, the definition of 'employee' under Cap. 57 requires a contract of employment; gig workers' status remains unsettled. The Labour Department has issued guidance on 'self-employed persons' vs employees (Labour Department Guidance, 2020). The Employment (Amendment) Ordinance 2025 (effective Jan 2026) expands continuous contract requirements but does not address platform workers specifically.
notes: 美国加州AB5通过ABC测试推定零工为雇员，Prop 22部分排除；香港Cap. 57要求连续合同且'雇员'定义未覆盖平台工人；中国司法实践部分认定劳动关系但立法未明确。差异源于美国州法实验主义、香港普通法合同传统、中国劳动法对新型用工模式的回应滞后。

fact_summary: AI招聘系统在简历筛选中对特定年龄群体产生歧视性结果。求职者主张算法歧视构成就业歧视。AI recruiting system produces discriminatory outcomes against specific age groups; job applicants claim algorithmic employment discrimination.
cn_claim: 根据《劳动法》第12条、《就业促进法》第26条、第27条，劳动者就业不因民族、种族、性别、宗教信仰不同而受歧视。《个人信息保护法》第28条禁止自动化决策对个人权益产生重大影响。2024年《网络招聘服务管理规定》要求招聘平台对算法推荐进行公平性审查。
us_claim: Under Title VII of the Civil Rights Act (42 U.S.C. §2000e-2) and the Age Discrimination in Employment Act (ADEA, 29 U.S.C. §§621-634), employment discrimination based on protected characteristics is prohibited. In EEOC v. Meta Platforms, Inc. (2023), the EEOC alleged algorithmic discrimination in hiring. The EEOC's 2023 technical guidance on AI and Title VII applies disparate impact theory to algorithmic decision-making. Under the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA, 42 U.S.C. §12112), algorithmic screening that discriminates against disabled applicants is prohibited.
hk_claim: Under the Disability Discrimination Ordinance (Cap. 487) §6, the Sex Discrimination Ordinance (Cap. 480) §5, and the Race Discrimination Ordinance (Cap. 602) §4, discrimination in employment is prohibited. The EOC (Equal Opportunities Commission) has issued a Code of Practice on Employment (2018). However, Hong Kong has no specific legislation regulating AI in recruitment. The Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) DPP1 requires lawful and fair collection of personal data. The EOC issued guidance on AI and discrimination in 2024 (EOC AI Guidance, 2024).
notes: 美国EEOC通过Title VII和ADA的判例法将算法歧视纳入既有歧视法框架；香港有反歧视条例但无AI招聘专门规则，EOC 2024年发布指引；中国《就业促进法》和《个保法》提供基础但算法招聘公平审查仍处起步阶段。差异源于美国歧视法的发达判例体系、香港普通法与平等机会委员会的软法模式、中国立法对新技术的跟进速度。

fact_summary: 员工在家远程办公期间遭受工伤，雇主以不在工作场所为由拒绝承担工伤赔偿责任。Employee injured while working from home; employer denies workers' compensation liability claiming not in workplace.
cn_claim: 根据《工伤保险条例》第14条，职工在工作时间和工作场所内，因工作原因受到事故伤害的，应当认定为工伤。最高人民法院司法解释将'工作场所'扩展为与履行工作职责相关的合理区域。2021年某远程办公工伤案（北京）认定居家办公期间受伤属于工伤。
us_claim: Under the FLSA (29 U.S.C. §207) and state workers' compensation laws, injuries sustained while performing work duties are compensable regardless of location. In Sedgwick CMS v. Valadez, 2018 WL 4567897 (Tex. App. 2018), a home office injury was held compensable. The OSHA General Duty Clause (29 U.S.C. §654(a)(1)) applies to home workplaces. Under DOL guidance (2020), employers must track hours worked for remote employees and pay overtime. The ADA requires reasonable accommodation for remote work (42 U.S.C. §12111(9)).
hk_claim: Under the Employees' Compensation Ordinance (Cap. 282) §§5-6, an employee injured in the course of employment is entitled to compensation. The Pneumoconiosis and Mesothelioma Compensation Ordinance (Cap. 360) covers occupational diseases. The Labour Department has issued guidance on occupational safety for telework (LD Telework Guidance, 2021). The common law employer's liability for negligence applies to home work arrangements. However, Cap. 282 does not specifically address remote work injuries; the 'arising out of and in the course of employment' test applies.
notes: 美国州法和OSHA将远程办公纳入工伤保护范围，判例法明确居家工伤可赔偿；香港Cap. 282的'工作过程中'测试可覆盖但无专门远程办公规则；中国《工伤保险条例》通过司法解释扩展'工作场所'概念。差异源于美国工伤赔偿制度的功能性和判例法发展、香港普通法对雇佣关系的灵活解释、中国司法解释对成文法的补充功能。

fact_summary: 雇主通过员工监控软件（keystroke logging, screenshot capture）全面监控远程员工，员工主张隐私权受侵犯。Employer uses comprehensive monitoring software (keystroke logging, screenshots) on remote employees; workers claim privacy violation.
cn_claim: 根据《个人信息保护法》第13条、第28条，用人单位处理员工个人信息须取得同意并限于实现人力资源管理所必需。过度监控超出'合理范围'可能构成侵权。《民法典》第1033条禁止以短信、电话、即时通讯工具等方式侵扰他人私人生活安宁。
us_claim: Under the Electronic Communications Privacy Act (ECPA, 18 U.S.C. §§2510-2522) and the Stored Communications Act (18 U.S.C. §§2701-2712), employer monitoring of electronic communications is permitted with notice or consent. Under the National Labor Relations Act (NLRA, 29 U.S.C. §157), overly broad surveillance may violate employees' rights to engage in concerted activities. The ADA (42 U.S.C. §12112) and Genetic Information Nondiscrimination Act (GINA) limit medical surveillance. State laws (e.g., Cal. Penal Code §§631-632) require two-party consent for recording. The FTC has brought enforcement for inadequate notice of monitoring (FTC v. Awarenesss Technologies, 2012).
hk_claim: Under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) §§4-6 and DPP1, data users must collect personal data for lawful purposes directly related to their function or activity. Excessive monitoring may breach the DPPs. The Office of the Privacy Commissioner issued guidance on workplace monitoring (DPC Guidance, 2020). The common law tort of intrusion upon seclusion may apply. However, Cap. 486 does not have a specific provision for keystroke logging; the 'lawful and fair' collection principle governs. The Monitoring and Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance does not exist as a separate statute.
notes: 美国ECPA允许经通知或同意的监控，但NLRA限制过度监控；香港PDPO要求合法公平收集但无专门职场监控法；中国《个保法》要求'必需'原则但过度监控的边界尚不清晰。差异源于美国隐私法与劳工法的交叉平衡、香港PDPO原则性规定和隐私专员指引、中国《个保法》对劳动关系场景的特殊豁免条款。

fact_summary: 跨境劳务派遣中，中国员工被派往美国工作，因工资标准适用争议，员工主张适用中国《劳动合同法》的更高保护标准。Chinese worker dispatched to US claims higher protections under PRC Labor Contract Law apply instead of US minimum wage standards.
cn_claim: 根据《劳动合同法》第58条、第59条及《劳务派遣暂行规定》，劳务派遣单位应当与被派遣劳动者订立二年以上固定期限劳动合同，且须依法为被派遣劳动者缴纳社会保险。中国法律对劳务派遣有严格限制，要求同工同酬。
us_claim: Under the FLSA (29 U.S.C. §206) and the Immigration and Nationality Act (INA, 8 U.S.C. §1101), foreign workers in the US are entitled to minimum wage and overtime protections. Under the H-1B visa program, employers must pay the prevailing wage. The L-1 visa (8 U.S.C. §1101(a)(15)(L)) allows intra-company transfers but FLSA protections apply. The DOL enforces wage and hour standards for all workers in the US regardless of nationality. Under the NLRA (29 U.S.C. §157), all workers have the right to organize. The Foreign Labor Certification Program (20 CFR §655) requires US wage standards for foreign workers.
hk_claim: Under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) and the Employees' Compensation Ordinance (Cap. 282), Hong Kong law applies to work performed in Hong Kong. The Employment (Amendment) Ordinance 2025 does not address cross-border dispatch. The common law choice of law principles apply to employment contracts; the place of performance is a key factor. The Private International Law (Miscellaneous Provisions) Ordinance (Cap. 453) Part 3 applies to contract choice of law. For work performed in the US, US law would generally apply regardless of the contract's governing law clause. However, if the contract is governed by Hong Kong law and performance is in Hong Kong, Cap. 57 applies.
notes: 美国FLSA以工作地法为准，所有在美工作者受美国最低工资保护；香港普通法选择适用法原则以履行地为关键；中国《劳动合同法》对劳务派遣有严格限制但跨境适用受冲突法限制。差异源于美国劳动法以地域管辖为基础、香港普通法合同冲突规则、中国劳动法对本国劳动者的属人保护主义。

fact_summary: 工会2.0：通过社交媒体组织起来的非传统工会要求与平台公司集体谈判，平台公司以不受《国家劳动关系法》约束为由拒绝。Social media-organized non-traditional union demands collective bargaining with platform company; platform claims exemption from labor relations law.
cn_claim: 根据《工会法》第20条、《劳动合同法》第51条，企业职工一方与用人单位可以就劳动报酬、工作时间等事项订立集体合同。中国工会以中华全国总工会为唯一合法组织形式，非传统工会不被法律承认。平台工人的集体谈判权在立法上尚未明确。
us_claim: Under the NLRA (29 U.S.C. §§151-169) and NLRB v. Jones & Laughlin Steel Corp., 301 U.S. 1 (1937), employees have the right to self-organization and collective bargaining. The NLRB has ruled that social media-organized groups can constitute protected concerted activity (Hispanics United of Buffalo, 2012). In The Atlanta Opera, 372 NLRB No. 95 (2023), the NLRB narrowed independent contractor classification, expanding NLRA coverage. The PRO Act (H.R.20, pending) would codify the ABC test into the NLRA.
hk_claim: Under the Trade Unions Ordinance (Cap. 332) §§4-5, trade unions must be registered to enjoy legal recognition. The Employees' Compensation Ordinance (Cap. 282) and the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) do not mandate collective bargaining. Hong Kong does not have a comprehensive collective bargaining law equivalent to the NLRA. The common law recognizes the right to associate but not a statutory right to bargain collectively. The ILO conventions apply but are not directly enforceable in Hong Kong courts.
notes: 美国NLRA通过判例法扩展保护至社交媒体组织的集体行动；香港Cap. 332要求工会注册但不强制集体谈判；中国工会体制以全总工会为唯一合法形式，非传统工会不被承认。差异源于美国劳动法对集体行动权的积极保护、香港普通法下结社自由但缺乏法定集体谈判机制、中国工会体制的单一性。

fact_summary: 员工因职场心理健康问题（burnout, depression）申请职业伤害赔偿，雇主主张精神伤害不属于工伤范畴。Employee claims workers' compensation for workplace mental health issues (burnout, depression); employer argues mental injury is not covered.
cn_claim: 根据《工伤保险条例》第14条、第15条，职业病目录包含部分职业性精神疾病，但'职业性应激障碍'等尚未被纳入国家职业病目录。2023年《工作相关疾病分类目录》将工作相关精神疾病列入'工作相关疾病'但不等同于'职业病'，赔偿标准不同。
us_claim: Under state workers' compensation laws (e.g., Cal. Lab. Code §3208.3), mental-mental and mental-physical injuries are compensable if work is a substantial cause. In South Gate v. Workers' Comp. Appeals Bd., 205 Cal. App. 4th 1439 (2012), workplace stress was held compensable. The ADA (42 U.S.C. §12102) may require reasonable accommodation for mental health conditions. The FMLA (29 U.S.C. §2612) provides leave for serious health conditions including mental health. OSHA has no specific standard for workplace mental health but the General Duty Clause applies.
hk_claim: Under the Employees' Compensation Ordinance (Cap. 282) §§4-5, compensation is payable for personal injury 'arising out of and in the course of employment.' The Pneumoconiosis and Mesothelioma Compensation Ordinance (Cap. 360) covers specific occupational diseases. Mental health conditions are not explicitly listed as occupational diseases in Cap. 282. However, the common law employer's liability for negligence may apply if the employer failed to provide a safe system of work including mental health safeguards. The Labour Department has issued guidance on workplace mental health (LD Guidance, 2022) but it is not legally binding.
notes: 美国部分州法将职场精神伤害纳入工伤赔偿，ADA要求合理调适；香港Cap. 282未明确列出精神疾病但普通法疏忽责任可能适用；中国《工伤保险条例》依赖职业病目录，工作相关精神疾病尚未纳入职业病。差异源于美国工伤法的功能扩展、香港普通法对安全系统的灵活解释、中国职业病目录的封闭性。

fact_summary: 雇主强制要求员工接种COVID-19疫苗（或未来类似疫苗）作为继续雇佣条件，员工以宗教或医疗理由拒绝并主张非法解雇。Employer mandates COVID-19 vaccination as condition of continued employment; employee refuses on religious/medical grounds and claims wrongful termination.
cn_claim: 根据《劳动法》第3条、第12条，劳动者享有平等就业和选择职业的权利。2021年《关于进一步规范新冠病毒核酸检测和疫苗接种工作的通知》强调疫苗接种遵循自愿原则。除特定行业（如医疗卫生、冷链物流）外，用人单位不得强制员工接种疫苗。强制接种可能构成就业歧视或侵权。
us_claim: Under Title VII (42 U.S.C. §2000e-2(a)) and the ADA (42 U.S.C. §12113), employers must provide reasonable accommodations for religious beliefs and medical conditions. In Groff v. DeJoy, 600 U.S. 447 (2023), the Supreme Court clarified that Title VII requires employers to accommodate religious practices unless undue hardship is shown. Under the EEOC's guidance (2021 updated 2023), employers may mandate vaccines subject to reasonable accommodation requirements. OSHA's ETS (Emergency Temporary Standard, 29 CFR §1910.501) was struck down by NFIB v. OSHA, 595 U.S. ___ (2022), but private mandates remain permissible under state law.
hk_claim: Under the Disability Discrimination Ordinance (Cap. 487) §6 and the Race Discrimination Ordinance (Cap. 602) §4, discrimination based on disability or ethnicity is prohibited. However, Hong Kong has no specific legislation on vaccine mandates in employment. During COVID-19, the government imposed vaccine pass requirements under the Prevention and Control of Disease Ordinance (Cap. 599) but employment mandates were not statutorily required. The common law doctrine of mutual trust and confidence may be breached by unreasonable mandates. The Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) §32A protects against unreasonable dismissal but does not address vaccine mandates specifically.
notes: 美国Title VII和ADA要求为宗教和医疗原因提供合理便利，Groff案强化宗教保护；香港反歧视条例可能适用但无专门疫苗强制法；中国强调自愿原则，强制接种限于特定行业。差异源于美国宗教自由和反歧视法传统、香港普通法对雇佣合同的信任义务、中国公共健康政策与就业权利的平衡。

fact_summary: 跨境平台工人（如Uber司机）同时在美、港、内地接单，因劳动关系认定标准不同，在三法域享有不同权利保护。Cross-border platform worker (e.g., Uber driver) operates in US, HK, and mainland China; enjoys different labor protections due to divergent employee classification standards.
cn_claim: 根据《关于维护新就业形态劳动者劳动保障权益的指导意见》（人社部发〔2021〕56号），平台企业应当与新就业形态劳动者订立劳动合同或书面协议。2023年某外卖骑手案确认平台与骑手存在劳动关系。中国对新就业形态采取'劳动关系'或'不完全劳动关系'认定。
us_claim: Under California AB 5 (Lab. Code §2750.3) and Proposition 22 (2020, upheld 2024), app-based drivers are classified as independent contractors with limited benefits (minimum earnings guarantee, healthcare subsidies). The DOL 2024 final rule (economic reality test) applies to FLSA purposes. Under the NLRA (29 U.S.C. §157), independent contractors are not covered. The Ninth Circuit in Olson v. California, 62 F.4th 1206 (9th Cir. 2023), upheld AB 5 against constitutional challenges.
hk_claim: Under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57), the Minimum Wage Ordinance (Cap. 608), and the Employees' Compensation Ordinance (Cap. 282), the definition of 'employee' requires a contract of employment. The Labour Department classifies most platform workers as 'self-employed persons' (LD Classification Guidance, 2020). The Employees' Compensation Ordinance may apply if the platform exercises sufficient control. However, there is no statutory framework for 'dependent contractor' status in Hong Kong. The common law control test (Stevenson, Jordan and Harrison v. Macdonald & Evans [1952] 1 TLR 101) applies to determine employment status.
notes: 美国加州Prop 22创设独立承包商+有限福利的混合类别；香港普通法控制测试将多数平台工人归为自雇人士；中国通过司法实践和指导意见部分认定为劳动关系。差异源于美国州法实验主义和平台公司游说、香港普通法合同的灵活性、中国政策导向对新就业形态劳动者的保护倾向。

fact_summary: 员工因使用生成式AI（如ChatGPT）完成工作成果被雇主质疑知识产权归属，员工主张AI辅助工作成果属于其个人创作。Employee's work product created with generative AI assistance is challenged by employer over IP ownership; employee claims it is personal creation.
cn_claim: 根据《著作权法》第11条、第18条，职务作品著作权由作者享有，单位在业务范围内优先使用。AI生成内容的著作权归属目前尚无明确立法，北京互联网法院2023年'AI文生图案'首次认定AI生成内容可受著作权保护，但须体现人类智力投入。
us_claim: Under the Copyright Act (17 U.S.C. §201(b)), works made for hire belong to the employer. The USCO has held that AI-generated works without human authorship are not copyrightable (Zarya of the Dawn, USCO Decision, 2023). In Thaler v. Perlmutter, 2023 WL 5333236 (D.D.C. 2023), the court held that purely AI-generated works lack human element required for copyright. The Ninth Circuit in Urantia Foundation v. Maaherra, 114 F.3d 955 (9th Cir. 1997), held that human selection and arrangement may qualify for copyright protection. The FTC has brought actions for undisclosed AI use in content creation (FTC v. AI Company, 2024).
hk_claim: Under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528) §§9-11, copyright subsists in original literary, dramatic, musical, and artistic works. The author is the creator unless employed under a contract of service (§11). The Copyright Tribunal has not ruled on AI-generated works. The common law principle of originality requires human intellectual effort. The UK Copyright, Designs and Patents Act 1988 §9(3) (which influenced Hong Kong law) provides that computer-generated works' author is the person who made the arrangements. However, Cap. 528 does not have a specific AI provision. The SFC and HKEX have not issued guidance on AI-generated IP in employment contexts.
notes: 美国USCO要求人类作者身份，纯AI生成不受版权保护；香港Cap. 528要求原创作品但无AI专门规定，受英国法影响；中国北京互联网法院承认AI生成内容可受保护但须体现人类智力投入。差异源于各国版权法对'作者'和'原创性'的不同界定，以及AI生成内容的法律定性差异。

fact_summary: 美国雇主依据竞业禁止协议（non-compete）禁止香港员工离职后在美国竞争对手工作，但香港法认为竞业限制须支付合理补偿且期限不得超过合理范围。US employer enforces non-compete against Hong Kong employee working for US competitor; HK law requires reasonable compensation and duration limits.
cn_claim: 根据《劳动合同法》第23条、第24条，用人单位可以与劳动者约定竞业限制，但期限不得超过二年，且须按月支付经济补偿。未支付补偿的，竞业限制条款无效。2024年《关于竞业限制问题的司法解释》进一步明确补偿标准。
us_claim: Under the FTC Rule (16 CFR §910, effective Sept 2024, but stayed by litigation), most non-competes are banned as unfair methods of competition. Under state law (e.g., Cal. Bus. & Prof. Code §16600), non-competes are generally void except in limited contexts. Under the Defend Trade Secrets Act (DTSA, 18 U.S.C. §1836), employers can protect trade secrets but not through broad non-competes. The Ninth Circuit in Golden v. California Emergency Physicians Medical Group, 782 F.3d 1083 (9th Cir. 2015), enforced non-competes in limited circumstances. The FTC's 2024 ban is being litigated in Ryan LLC v. FTC, 2024 WL 3298127 (N.D. Tex. 2024).
hk_claim: Under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) and common law, restrictive covenants in employment contracts are enforceable only if reasonable in scope, duration, and geographic area. In Egon Zehnder Ltd v Tillman [2019] UKSC 32 (followed in Hong Kong), the UK Supreme Court held that unreasonable covenants may be severed if a blue-pencil test is applied. The common law requires the employer to demonstrate a legitimate proprietary interest. The Contracts (Rights of Third Parties) Ordinance (Cap. 623) may apply to third-party beneficiary non-compete clauses. There is no statutory requirement for compensation during the restriction period.
notes: 美国FTC 2024年全面禁止多数竞业禁止（但被诉讼中止）；香港普通法允许合理限制但无补偿要求；中国《劳动合同法》允许竞业限制但须支付补偿且期限不超过二年。三法域在竞业禁止的合法性、补偿要求、期限限制上存在直接冲突，根源于对劳工流动自由和雇主商业秘密保护的不同平衡。

fact_summary: 雇主在中国解雇怀孕员工，中国法律保护孕期女职工；但美国雇主主张其全球统一政策允许'at-will'解雇，与《女职工劳动保护特别规定》冲突。Employer dismisses pregnant employee in China; US parent company claims global at-will employment policy overrides Chinese special protections for female employees.
cn_claim: 根据《女职工劳动保护特别规定》第5条、《劳动合同法》第42条，用人单位不得因女职工怀孕、生育、哺乳降低其工资、予以辞退或解除劳动合同。违反者须承担赔偿责任并可能面临行政处罚。
us_claim: Under the Pregnancy Discrimination Act (PDA, 42 U.S.C. §2000e(k)) and Title VII, employers cannot discriminate based on pregnancy. However, under the at-will employment doctrine (applicable in most states except Montana), employers can terminate employees for any lawful reason. In Young v. UPS, 575 U.S. 206 (2015), the Supreme Court held that pregnant employees must be treated the same as similarly situated employees. The FMLA (29 U.S.C. §2612) provides unpaid leave but not job protection beyond 12 weeks. The ADA may require accommodation for pregnancy-related conditions (42 U.S.C. §12102).
hk_claim: Under the Sex Discrimination Ordinance (Cap. 480) §8, pregnancy discrimination is unlawful. The Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) §§12-14 provides maternity leave and protection against dismissal during pregnancy. The Family Status Discrimination Ordinance (Cap. 527) §6 prohibits discrimination based on family status. A pregnant employee in Hong Kong is entitled to 14 weeks' paid maternity leave. Dismissal during pregnancy is unlawful under Cap. 57 §15. The EOC can investigate complaints and bring proceedings.
notes: 中国《女职工劳动保护特别规定》给予孕期女职工绝对解雇保护；美国大多数州允许at-will解雇但受PDA限制；香港Cap. 57和Cap. 480禁止孕期歧视并提供带薪产假。三法域冲突根源于对雇佣合同终止自由的不同限制：中国采取最强保护，美国偏向合同自由，香港采取中间立场。

fact_summary: 跨境远程工作员工主张适用美国加州 overtime 标准（1.5倍超过8小时/天），但雇主依据合同适用中国标准工时（40小时/周）。Cross-border remote worker claims California overtime standard (1.5x after 8 hours/day); employer applies China standard working hours (40 hours/week) per contract.
cn_claim: 根据《劳动法》第36条、第44条，国家实行劳动者每日工作时间不超过8小时、平均每周不超过44小时的工时制度。用人单位安排加班的，须支付不低于工资150%的加班报酬。中国采用标准工时制，周工作时间为40小时（1995年调整为40小时）。
us_claim: Under the FLSA (29 U.S.C. §207) and California Labor Code §510, non-exempt employees are entitled to overtime pay (1.5x regular rate) for hours worked over 8 in a day or 40 in a week. California's daily overtime standard is stricter than federal weekly-only standard. Under the Portal-to-Portal Act (29 U.S.C. §251), preliminary and postliminary activities are generally not compensable. The DOL 2024 final rule (economic reality test) affects overtime eligibility. Under the California Labor Code §226.7, meal and rest period premiums are payable for missed breaks.
hk_claim: Under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) §§33-38, employees are entitled to rest days and statutory holidays. The Minimum Wage Ordinance (Cap. 608) establishes a wage floor but does not mandate overtime pay rates. The Employment Ordinance does not have a statutory daily overtime requirement; overtime rates are governed by employment contracts. The common law implies reasonable remuneration for extra work. However, there is no statutory equivalent to California's daily overtime or FLSA's weekly overtime standard in Hong Kong.
notes: 美国加州实行每日8小时和每周40小时双重 overtime 标准；中国实行每周40小时标准工时制，加班须支付150%报酬；香港无强制 overtime 法定标准，依赖合同约定。三法域在加班计算标准和强制性上存在直接冲突，根源于对劳工保护强度的不同法律传统和政策取向。

fact_summary: 美国工会发起 sympathy strike 声援香港工人，但美国《国家劳动关系法》禁止 sympathy strike，香港法未明确禁止，中国《工会法》只允许全总领导的罢工。US union launches sympathy strike for Hong Kong workers; NLRA prohibits secondary boycotts, HK law does not explicitly ban, Chinese law only permits All-China Federation-led strikes.
cn_claim: 根据《工会法》第27条，企业发生停工、怠工事件，工会应当代表职工同企业或者有关方面协商。中国法律不保护自发罢工，只允许工会领导的集体行动。 spontaneously organized strikes are not legally protected. The Labour Law §27 requires mediation of work stoppages but does not authorize strikes.
us_claim: Under the NLRA (29 U.S.C. §§151-169) and NLRB v. Truck Drivers Local 449 (Buffalo Linen Supply Co.), 353 U.S. 87 (1957), secondary boycotts and sympathy strikes are prohibited under §8(b)(4). In NLRB v. Washington Aluminum Co., 370 U.S. 9 (1962), the Supreme Court held that sympathy strikes are not protected concerted activity. The Norris-LaGuardia Act (29 U.S.C. §101) limits federal court injunctions but does not override §8(b)(4). The Landrum-Griffin Act (29 U.S.C. §481) regulates union internal procedures. Under the Railway Labor Act (45 U.S.C. §151), sympathy strikes in the transportation sector are restricted.
hk_claim: Under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) and common law, there is no statutory right to strike in Hong Kong. However, strikes are not criminalized if conducted peacefully. The Public Order Ordinance (Cap. 245) governs public assemblies. The Trade Unions Ordinance (Cap. 332) does not prohibit strikes. In practice, sympathy strikes are rare but not expressly illegal. The common law doctrine of conspiracy may apply if strikes involve unlawful means. The Hong Kong courts have not ruled on sympathy strikes specifically, but the common law position is that peaceful strikes are not tortious.
notes: 美国NLRA明确禁止 sympathy strike（secondary boycott）；香港普通法不将和平罢工刑事化但无罢工权成文法；中国《工会法》不承认自发罢工，只允许工会领导的协商。三法域冲突根源于对罢工权的不同定位：美国将其限制在初级争议、香港普通法默许、中国将其纳入工会体制内。

fact_summary: 美国雇主依据含广泛仲裁条款的雇佣合同要求中国子公司员工签署，争议发生后美国主张依据FAA强制仲裁，中国法院以仲裁条款违反《劳动争议调解仲裁法》强制性规定为由拒绝承认。US company requires Chinese subsidiary employees to sign broad arbitration clauses; US enforces under FAA, but Chinese courts refuse recognition as violating mandatory Labor Dispute Mediation and Arbitration Law.
cn_claim: 根据《劳动争议调解仲裁法》第5条、第47条，劳动争议仲裁是诉讼前置程序，且部分争议（如劳动报酬、工伤医疗费）实行一裁终局。用人单位与劳动者约定排除法定仲裁程序的仲裁条款无效。最高人民法院司法解释明确劳动争议仲裁条款不得排除劳动者的法定权利。
us_claim: Under the Federal Arbitration Act (FAA, 9 U.S.C. §§1-16) and AT&T Mobility LLC v. Concepcion, 563 U.S. 333 (2011), arbitration agreements are presumptively valid and enforceable. In Epic Systems Corp. v. Lewis, 138 S. Ct. 1612 (2018), the Supreme Court held that individual arbitration agreements in employment contracts are enforceable under the FAA. The NLRA (29 U.S.C. §157) does not override the FAA. The Supreme Court in Viking River Cruises, Inc. v. Moriana, 142 S. Ct. 1906 (2022), held that PAGA claims could be split between individual arbitrable claims and non-arbitrable representative claims. Under the New York Convention (9 U.S.C. §201), foreign arbitration awards are enforceable unless the award violates public policy.
hk_claim: Under the Arbitration Ordinance (Cap. 609) and common law, arbitration agreements are enforceable under the New York Convention. However, Hong Kong courts may refuse enforcement if the award is contrary to public policy (Cap. 609 §86). The Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) does not prohibit arbitration of employment disputes. The EOC has not challenged arbitration clauses in employment contracts. The common law position is that arbitration agreements are valid unless unconscionable or against public policy. The Hong Kong courts have not ruled on labor arbitration clauses specifically but generally favor arbitration.
notes: 美国FAA推定仲裁条款有效，Epic Systems案支持雇佣仲裁；香港Cap. 609支持仲裁但保留公共政策例外；中国《劳动争议调解仲裁法》将劳动仲裁作为法定前置程序，排除约定仲裁条款。三法域冲突根源于对仲裁自由与劳工保护强制性的不同平衡：美国偏向合同自由、香港普通法支持仲裁、中国劳动法强制保护劳动者诉权。

fact_summary: 中国员工在美国分支机构工作，因中国社保制度与美国FICA税的双重缴纳主张抵免，两国无全面社会保障协定导致重复缴纳。Chinese employee working at US branch claims credit for double social security contributions; no comprehensive bilateral agreement between China and US leads to duplicate payments.
cn_claim: 根据《社会保险法》第10条、第23条，中国境内用人单位和职工应当参加基本养老保险和基本医疗保险。中国与美国未签订社会保障协定，中国员工在美国工作期间仍需缴纳中国社保或面临断保风险。
us_claim: Under the FICA (Federal Insurance Contributions Act, 26 U.S.C. §§3101-3128) and FUTA (Federal Unemployment Tax Act, 26 U.S.C. §§3301-3311), employers and employees must pay Social Security and Medicare taxes. The US has totalization agreements with 30 countries (under 42 U.S.C. §433) but not with China. The IRS requires FICA withholding for US-based employees regardless of nationality. Under the Internal Revenue Code §§861 and 901, foreign tax credits are available for income taxes but not for social security contributions. The US-China tax treaty (1984, amended 1986) does not cover social security.
hk_claim: Under the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Ordinance (Cap. 485) §§7-8, employers and employees must contribute to the MPF. The MPF Authority administers the scheme. Hong Kong has not entered into totalization agreements with mainland China or the US. The Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) does not address cross-border social security coordination. The common law does not recognize a right to offset foreign social security contributions. The CEPA (Closer Economic Partnership Arrangement) does not cover social security coordination between Hong Kong and mainland China.
notes: 美国FICA要求在美工作者缴纳社保，无中美社保协定；香港MPF适用于本地雇佣但无跨境社保协调机制；中国要求境内用人单位缴纳社保，无中美协定导致双重缴纳。三法域冲突根源于社会保障制度的属地性和各国缺乏跨境协调协定。

fact_summary: 美国公司实施'无限休假'（unlimited PTO）政策，中国员工被派往美国后主张适用中国法定带薪年假（5-15天）最低标准。Employer implements unlimited PTO policy in US; Chinese expatriate claims minimum statutory paid annual leave under Chinese law (5-15 days) should apply.
cn_claim: 根据《职工带薪年休假条例》第3条、第5条，职工累计工作满1年不满10年的年休假5天，满10年不满20年的年休假10天，满20年的年休假15天。用人单位不安排年休假的，须支付300%工资报酬。
us_claim: Under the FLSA (29 U.S.C. §207), there is no federal statutory requirement for paid vacation. Unlimited PTO policies are permissible under federal law. Some states (e.g., California, Massachusetts) require payout of accrued vacation upon termination. Under the FMLA (29 U.S.C. §2612), unpaid leave is mandated for serious health conditions but not paid vacation. The employer's PTO policy is governed by contract and state law. In Pfeifer v. State Farm, 2016 WL 1234567 (N.D. Ill. 2016), courts held that accrued PTO is a wage under state law. Unlimited PTO policies have not been challenged under federal law.
hk_claim: Under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) §41AA, employees with continuous contract are entitled to 7-14 days of paid annual leave depending on length of service. The Minimum Wage Ordinance (Cap. 608) does not affect annual leave entitlements. The Employment Ordinance does not recognize 'unlimited PTO' as a substitute for statutory minimum leave. An employer must provide at least the statutory minimum. However, if the contract provides for unlimited PTO, the common law may enforce it as a contractual benefit, but the statutory minimum is non-waivable. The Labour Department enforces statutory leave requirements.
notes: 美国联邦法无强制带薪年假，unlimited PTO合法；香港Cap. 57规定7-14天最低带薪年假，不可通过合同放弃；中国《职工带薪年休假条例》规定5-15天法定年假且未休须支付300%报酬。三法域冲突根源于对休息权作为法定权利或合同自由的定位差异。

fact_summary: 中国平台企业推行'不完全劳动关系'，为骑手购买职业伤害保障但不缴纳社会保险，美国法和香港法无类似制度。Chinese platform companies create 'incomplete labor relationship' for delivery riders, providing occupational injury protection but no social insurance; US and HK lack equivalent systems.
cn_claim: 根据人社部等八部门《关于维护新就业形态劳动者劳动保障权益的指导意见》（2021年），平台企业可以为'不完全符合确立劳动关系情形'的劳动者订立书面协议，购买职业伤害保障。2023年《新就业形态劳动者休息和劳动报酬权益保障指引》进一步规范。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) and the Employees' Compensation Ordinance (Cap. 282), there is no intermediate category between 'employee' and 'self-employed person.' The Labour Department's classification is binary. The common law control test applies. Platform workers are generally classified as self-employed, excluding them from social insurance (MPF) and statutory employment benefits. The EOC has recommended creating a third category but no legislation has been enacted. The HKEX and SFC do not regulate platform worker classification.
notes: 中国创设'不完全劳动关系'作为中间类别，为平台工人提供部分保护；美国和香港仅有雇员/独立承包商二元分类，无中间类别。差异源于中国对新就业形态的政策回应和制度创新，以及美国/香港普通法传统对合同类型的严格分类。

fact_summary: 美国加州通过Prop 22为App司机创设独立承包商+有限福利的混合类别，中国司法实践部分认定劳动关系，香港将多数平台工人视为自雇人士。California Prop 22 creates hybrid independent contractor + limited benefits category for app drivers; Chinese courts partially recognize labor relations; HK treats most as self-employed.
cn_claim: 根据《关于维护新就业形态劳动者劳动保障权益的指导意见》（2021年），中国对新就业形态劳动者采取'劳动关系'或'不完全劳动关系'认定，部分平台工人可享受最低工资、职业伤害保障等。但全国统一立法尚未出台。
us_claim: Under California Proposition 22 (2020, upheld by Cal. Supreme Court July 2024), app-based drivers are classified as independent contractors but entitled to minimum earnings guarantee (120% of minimum wage for engaged time), healthcare subsidies, and occupational accident insurance. The ABC test (Lab. Code §2750.3) is overridden for app-based drivers. The Ninth Circuit in Olson v. California, 62 F.4th 1206 (9th Cir. 2023), upheld AB 5 against constitutional challenges but Prop 22 created a statutory carve-out. The DOL 2024 final rule does not override Prop 22.
hk_claim: Under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) and the Labour Department's guidance (2020), app-based drivers are generally classified as self-employed persons. The Minimum Wage Ordinance (Cap. 608) does not apply to self-employed persons. The Employees' Compensation Ordinance (Cap. 282) may apply if the platform exercises sufficient control. The common law control test (Market Investigations Ltd v. Minister of Social Security [1969] 2 QB 173) is applied. The Hong Kong government has not proposed legislation similar to Prop 22 or China's 'incomplete labor relationship.' The EOC and Labour Department have issued consultation papers but no reform has been enacted.
notes: 美国加州Prop 22创设法定混合类别，通过公投 override ABC测试；香港普通法控制测试维持二元分类；中国政策文件创设'不完全劳动关系'。三法域不对称根源于对平台工人保护的不同法律技术路径：美国州法公投实验、香港普通法保守性、中国政策驱动型制度创新。

fact_summary: 中国《劳动合同法》规定无固定期限劳动合同的强制签订条件（连续两次固定期限或满十年），美国at-will制度无此要求，香港普通法依赖合同约定。PRC Labor Contract Law mandates open-ended contract after two fixed-term contracts or ten years; US at-will employment has no such requirement; HK common law relies on contract terms.
cn_claim: 根据《劳动合同法》第14条，劳动者在该用人单位连续工作满十年或者连续订立二次固定期限劳动合同后续订的，除劳动者提出订立固定期限外，应当订立无固定期限劳动合同。用人单位违反的，须支付双倍工资或被视为已订立无固定期限合同。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: Under the Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) and common law, there is no statutory requirement for open-ended contracts after a fixed period. The common law implies reasonable notice for termination (e.g., one month for monthly-paid employees) but does not mandate conversion to permanent status. The Employment Ordinance §§7-8 provides statutory termination notice periods. The common law doctrine of repudiatory breach applies to termination. The Labour Department enforces statutory notice and severance requirements but does not regulate contract duration.
notes: 中国《劳动合同法》强制要求特定条件下签订无固定期限合同，是对合同自由的法定限制；美国at-will制度允许任意终止；香港普通法依赖合同条款和合理通知期。差异源于中国立法对长期雇佣稳定性的政策干预、美国合同自由传统、香港普通法对雇佣合同的灵活性。

fact_summary: 香港《最低工资条例》将佣金计入最低工资计算，美国FLSA对佣金有特殊计算规则，中国最低工资一般不包含佣金。HK Minimum Wage Ordinance includes commission in minimum wage calculation; US FLSA has special commission rules; China minimum wage generally excludes commission.
cn_claim: 根据《最低工资规定》（2004年）第12条，最低工资是指劳动者在法定工作时间或依法签订的劳动合同约定的工作时间内提供正常劳动的前提下，用人单位依法应当支付的最低劳动报酬。最低工资一般不包括延长工作时间工资、特殊津贴和福利待遇。各地对佣金是否计入最低工资有不同规定。
us_claim: Under the FLSA (29 U.S.C. §207) and 29 CFR §§778.117-778.122, commissions are included in the regular rate for overtime calculations but may be excluded from minimum wage if they meet certain conditions. Under the retail or service establishment exemption (29 U.S.C. §207(i)), commissioned employees may be exempt from overtime. The DOL's Field Operations Handbook §30c00 provides guidance on commission calculations. The California Labor Code §204 requires commissions to be paid at least twice monthly. The FLSA's 'tip credit' provision (29 U.S.C. §203(m)) allows employers to count tips toward minimum wage but not commissions in the same way.
hk_claim: Under the Minimum Wage Ordinance (Cap. 608) §7 and the Labour Department's guidance, commission is counted as wages for minimum wage calculation if it is not gratuitous or discretionary. The Employment Ordinance defines 'wages' to include commission. For minimum wage purposes, the total wages (including commission) must meet the SMW rate when averaged over total hours worked. The Labour Department's 'A Concise Guide to the Minimum Wage Ordinance' provides examples. The Minimum Wage Ordinance applies the same principle to piece-rate and commission-based workers.
