fact_summary: 技术委托开发合同履行中，委托方未按约定提供数据，开发方交付的软件无法满足需求，双方互诉违约。A healthcare provider commissioned an AI diagnostic tool but failed to provide de-identified patient imaging data as contracted; the developer delivered a model with 60% accuracy instead of the promised 95%, claiming insufficient training data.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第859条，委托开发完成的发明创造，申请专利的权利属于研究开发人。委托方违约不提供数据，开发方可主张顺延履行期限（民法典第803条）或解除合同（民法典第563条）。开发方交付不合格成果的，委托方也可主张违约（民法典第577条）。双方违约适用民法典第592条。
us_claim: Breach of contract by both parties under state contract law; potential mutual rescission or damages; software development contracts governed by UCC Art. 2 (in some jurisdictions) or common law. Key case: Data General Corp. v. Grumman Systems Support Corp., 825 A.2d 677 (Del. 2003) (software development contract interpretation).
hk_claim: Breach of contract by both parties under common law; contra proferentem rule may apply to ambiguous terms. Software development contracts governed by common law. No specific statutory regime for AI development contracts in Hong Kong. Contributory negligence principles may apply to damages.
notes: 三法域对双方违约的技术开发合同处理路径一致。中国民法典第592条明确双方违约规则；美国法以州合同法与共同过错处理；香港法以普通法合同解释与共同过失处理。差异在于中国法有专门的技术开发合同章节（民法典第851-858条），而美国与香港主要依赖一般合同法。AI合同在三法域均缺乏专门规则。

fact_summary: 专利许可合同中的最惠国待遇条款争议。被许可方发现许可方给予第三方更优惠的许可费率，要求适用MFN条款。A licensee discovered that the licensor had granted a competitor a 40% lower royalty rate for the same patent portfolio under a later agreement, triggering a most-favored-licensee clause in the original license.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第872条，许可人未按约定许可技术的应承担违约责任。MFN条款在中国技术合同中被承认为有效条款，但司法实践中对'更优惠条件'的解释存在争议。可主张适用合同解释原则（民法典第142条）填补漏洞。
us_claim: MFN clauses enforceable under state contract law; patent license MFN cases: Texas Instruments Inc. v. Hyundai Electronics Industries Co., 2010 WL 2813600 (N.D. Cal. 2010); Sanofi-Synthelabo v. Apotex, Inc., 470 F.3d 1368 (Fed. Cir. 2006). MFN terms interpreted under contract law with reference to trade usage (UCC §1-303).
hk_claim: MFN clauses enforceable under common law contract principles; no specific Hong Kong patent MFN case law. Contract interpretation governed by common law rules (Investors Compensation Scheme Ltd v. West Bromwich Building Society [1998] 1 WLR 896).
notes: 三法域均承认MFN条款的可执行性，但判例丰富度差异大。美国有大量专利许可MFN判例（Texas Instruments案、Sanofi案）；中国法有一般合同解释规则但缺乏专门专利MFN案例；香港法依赖普通法合同解释。美国法在MFN条款的解释上最成熟。

fact_summary: 技术进出口合同中的限制性条款效力：限制技术受让方改进技术。A foreign technology supplier included a clause in the technology import contract prohibiting the Chinese licensee from making any improvements to the licensed technology during the contract term.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第850条，非法垄断技术或者侵害他人技术成果的技术合同无效。限制技术改进条款属于非法垄断技术条款，应认定为无效。同时《技术进出口管理条例》第29条明确禁止含有'限制受让方改进技术'等限制性条款。
us_claim: Anti-competitive restraints in technology licenses evaluated under Sherman Act §1 and DOJ/FTC Antitrust Guidelines for the Licensing of Intellectual Property (2017). No-per-compete clauses in patent licenses reviewed under rule of reason. Key case: United States v. Line Material Co., 333 U.S. 287 (1948) (price-fixing in patent licenses).
hk_claim: Competition Ordinance (Cap. 619) First Conduct Rule; technology license restrictions reviewed under competition principles. No specific statutory prohibition on improvement restrictions in patent licenses, but may be struck down as restraints of trade under common law (Nordenfelt v. Maxim Nordenfelt Guns & Ammunition Co. [1894] AC 535).
notes: 三法域对技术改进限制条款的规制强度差异显著。中国法明确禁止（民法典第850条+技术进出口管理条例第29条），属于无效条款；美国法以反垄断法规则-of-reason审查，并非当然无效；香港法以竞争条例和普通法限制贸易原则审查，更接近美国法。中国法最严格，美国与香港更灵活。

fact_summary: 云服务协议中，云服务商因知识产权侵权指控暂停客户账户，但指控后被证明不成立。客户主张损失。A cloud provider suspended a video streaming startup's account based on a DMCA takedown notice; the underlying copyright claim was later found to be meritless, but the startup lost $2M in revenue during the suspension.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第577条，云服务商未审慎审查投诉即暂停服务，可能构成违约。中国《电子商务法》第42-45条确立了'通知-删除'规则，但错误通知需承担赔偿责任（第42条第3款）。云服务合同同时适用《民法典》合同编与网络服务提供者责任规则。
us_claim: Cloud service agreement governed by contract terms and UCC; DMCA §512 safe harbor provisions (17 U.S.C. §512) provide immunity for service providers but require notice-and-takedown procedure; misrepresentation in DMCA notice subject to 17 U.S.C. §512(f) liability. Key case: Lenz v. Universal Music Corp., 815 F.3d 1145 (9th Cir. 2016) (fair use consideration before takedown).
hk_claim: Cloud service agreement governed by contract and common law; no specific statutory safe harbor equivalent to DMCA in Hong Kong. Copyright infringement under Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528). Service provider liability governed by common law principles; notice-and-takedown under common law not statutorily mandated. PENDING_VERIFICATION: HK specific safe harbor regime.
notes: 三法域对网络服务提供商的中止义务规制差异大。美国法以DMCA §512建立法定安全港与通知删除程序；中国法以电子商务法第42-45条+民法典建立类似规则；香港法无专门安全港法规，主要依赖普通法和版权条例。美国法最成熟（Lenz案确立合理使用审查），中国法有明确赔偿规则，香港法最薄弱。

fact_summary: 技术转让合同中，技术被政府认定为禁止出口技术，合同无法继续履行。A joint venture agreement for aerospace technology transfer was rendered impossible when the Chinese government listed the technology as prohibited export under the Export Control Law of the PRC (2020).
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第580条，因不可抗力或法律禁止导致合同无法履行的，可以解除合同。技术出口管制属于法律上的履行不能，适用民法典第563条和第590条。但政府管制是否属于不可抗力存在争议，更宜认定为'情势变更'（民法典第533条）。
us_claim: Impossibility of performance and frustration of purpose under common law contract doctrine; export controls under Export Administration Regulations and Arms Export Control Act (22 U.S.C. §2751). Force majeure clauses interpreted under contract terms. Key case: Transatlantic Financing Corp. v. United States, 363 F.2d 312 (D.C. Cir. 1966) (impossibility doctrine).
hk_claim: Frustration of contract and common law impossibility; export controls under Import and Export (Strategic Commodities) Regulations (Cap. 60G). No specific statutory force majeure doctrine in Hong Kong, but common law recognizes frustration (Davis Contractors Ltd v. Fareham UDC [1956] AC 696). Contract governed by common law principles.
notes: 三法域对出口管制导致合同不能履行的处理均承认合同解除或履行不能。中国法以民法典第580条（履行不能）和第533条（情势变更）处理；美国法以普通法履行不能与合同受挫原则处理；香港法以普通法合同受挫（Davis Contractors案）处理。差异在于中国法区分不可抗力与情势变更，美国与香港主要依赖普通法合同受挫。

fact_summary: 数字音乐版权许可合同中的版税计算争议：流媒体播放与下载的版权费率差异。A record label licensed its catalog to a streaming platform under a per-stream royalty model, but the platform argued that premium downloads should be treated as digital sales at a lower effective rate, contrary to the label's interpretation of 'each transmission.'
cn_claim: 依据《著作权法》第46条（音乐作品录音制品获酬权）和《民法典》第510条（合同漏洞填补），'每次传输'的解释应结合合同目的和交易习惯。中国《著作权集体管理条例》对法定许可费率有规定，但商业许可费率由当事人约定。
us_claim: Copyright license interpretation under state contract law and federal copyright law (17 U.S.C. §115 for mechanical compulsory license). Streaming vs. download royalty disputes: Phonorecords II and III proceedings before CRB (Copyright Royalty Board). Key cases: Webcasting cases under 17 U.S.C. §114 and §112. Spotify settlement with NMPA (2016).
hk_claim: Copyright license under Copyright Ordinance (Cap. 528); common law contract interpretation for royalty terms. No specific statutory rate-setting body comparable to US CRB in Hong Kong. Commercial royalty rates governed by contract. Copyright Tribunal under Cap. 528 §145 has limited jurisdiction.
notes: 三法域对数字音乐版权费率的规制结构不同。美国法有版权费率委员会（CRB）法定强制许可程序（17 U.S.C. §115、§114）；中国法以著作权集体管理条例和当事人约定为主；香港法以版权条例和普通法合同解释为主，版权审裁处（第145条）权限有限。美国法最精细，有专门行政费率设定程序。

fact_summary: 董事在执行职务中因重大过失导致公司环境污染，第三方受害人同时起诉公司和董事。A chemical company's director approved a cost-cutting measure that eliminated waste treatment, resulting in toxic discharge into a river. Fishermen and residents sued both the company and the director personally.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1168条（共同侵权）和第1191条（用人单位责任），受害人可请求公司承担侵权责任。董事是否承担个人责任？中国法下《公司法》第191条（2023修订）明确董事、高管执行职务致人损害的，应承担赔偿责任。公司承担责任后可向有过错的董事追偿（公司法第191条）。
us_claim: Corporate liability under CERCLA (42 U.S.C. §9607) for hazardous substance releases; director personal liability under 'alter ego' or 'piercing the corporate veil' doctrines (United States v. Bestfoods, 524 U.S. 51 (1998)); derivative liability under state tort law. Restatement (Third) of Agency §7.01 (scope of employment).
hk_claim: Corporate liability under common law nuisance and negligence; director personal liability for torts committed in personal capacity or where corporate veil pierced (Prest v. Petrodel Resources Ltd [2013] UKSC 34); environmental liability under common law and statutory nuisance (Cap. 228). No specific statutory director tort liability comparable to PRC Company Law 2023 §191.
notes: 三法域对董事侵权个人责任的规制存在重大差异。中国2023年《公司法》第191条首次明确董事直接对第三人承担赔偿责任（重大进步）；美国法依赖刺破公司面纱和 alter ego 原则（Bestfoods案），董事个人责任门槛高；香港法以普通法 veil-piercing（Prest案）和侵权法处理，无专门董事直接 liability 条款。中国法保护受害人最强。

fact_summary: 控股股东滥用公司人格，将公司资产转移至个人名下，导致公司无法清偿侵权债务。A majority shareholder drained a manufacturing subsidiary's assets through fictitious management fees, leaving the subsidiary unable to pay product liability judgments to injured consumers.
cn_claim: 依据《公司法》第21条（控股股东不得利用关联关系损害公司利益）和第23条（法人人格否认），债权人可主张刺破公司面纱，要求控股股东承担连带责任。侵权责任优先于普通债权（民法典第187条）。
us_claim: Piercing the corporate veil under state corporate law; 'enterprise theory' and 'alter ego' doctrine. Key cases: United States v. Milwaukee Refrigerator Transit Co., 142 F. 247 (C.C.E.D. Wis. 1905) (instrumentality rule); Walkovszky v. Carlton, 223 A.2d 343 (N.J. 1966) (undercapitalization); Sea-Land Services, Inc. v. Pepper Source, 941 F.2d 519 (7th Cir. 1991).
hk_claim: Piercing the corporate veil under common law (Prest v. Petrodel Resources Ltd [2013] UKSC 34); 'fraud or sham' exception to separate legal personality; fraudulent trading under Companies (Winding Up and Miscellaneous Provisions) Ordinance (Cap. 32) §275. Personal liability of shareholder for torts of company generally not recognized without veil-piercing.
notes: 三法域均承认刺破公司面纱原则，但标准与路径不同。中国《公司法》第23条确立法人人格否认（2019年九民纪要细化标准）；美国法以instrumentality rule（Milwaukee Refrigerator案）和undercapitalization（Walkovszky案）为典型标准；香港法以Prest案确立的'欺诈或伪装'例外为主。中国法和美国法标准更多元，香港法更严格。

fact_summary: 股东派生诉讼中，小股东主张董事因侵权损害公司利益，要求追究董事责任。A minority shareholder filed a derivative action alleging that the board's approval of a defective product launch caused $50M in tort liability and reputational damage to the corporation.
cn_claim: 依据《公司法》第189条（2023修订），股东可提起派生诉讼。但公司法第190条同时要求股东需满足持股期限和比例条件（有限责任公司股东、股份有限公司连续180日以上单独或合计持有1%以上股份）。
us_claim: Derivative suit under state corporate law (Del. Ch. Ct. Rule 23.1; Fed. R. Civ. P. 23.1); demand requirement and demand futility doctrine (Aronson v. Lewis, 473 A.2d 805 (Del. 1984); Rales v. Blasband, 634 A.2d 927 (Del. 1993)). Business judgment rule shields directors from liability unless breach of duty of care or loyalty. Key case: Brehm v. Eisner, 746 A.2d 244 (Del. 2000).
hk_claim: Derivative action under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) Part 14 (§732-733); common law rule in Foss v. Harbottle (1843) 2 Hare 461; statutory exceptions in Cap. 622. Court may grant leave for derivative action if prima facie case of fraud, ultra vires, or wrongdoer control. Business judgment rule applies but less formalized than Delaware.
notes: 三法域均允许股东派生诉讼，但前置条件和标准差异大。中国《公司法》第189-190条有明确的持股时间和比例要求；美国法（尤其是特拉华州）有发达的 demand requirement 和 demand futility 判例法（Aronson/Rales案）；香港法以Companies Ordinance Part 14和Foss v. Harbottle例外为基础。美国法最发达，中国法最具体，香港法最保守。

fact_summary: 公司因产品缺陷承担严格责任，但公司章程规定股东仅以出资额为限承担责任。受害人主张股东承担无限责任。An electric vehicle battery manufacturer was held liable for defects causing vehicle fires; the injured parties sought to pierce the corporate veil to hold the parent company's shareholders personally liable for punitive damages.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1203条（产品责任）和第1204条（生产者责任），产品缺陷致害的，生产者承担无过错责任。股东有限责任为《公司法》第4条基本原则，仅在法人人格否认（第23条）情形下例外。产品责任侵权之债一般不触发股东个人责任。
us_claim: Strict product liability under Restatement (Third) of Torts: Products Liability §1-2; corporate limited liability under state corporation statutes (e.g., DGCL §102(b)(6)). Veil-piercing for tort claims: Sea-Land Services v. Pepper Source, 941 F.2d 519 (7th Cir. 1991); Walkovszky v. Carlton, 223 A.2d 343 (N.J. 1966). Punitive damages against parent company possible in product liability but personal shareholder liability rare.
hk_claim: Strict liability under common law (Donoghue v. Stevenson [1932] AC 562); product liability statute not fully implemented in Hong Kong (Consumer Goods Safety Ordinance (Cap. 456) limited scope). Corporate limited liability under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §1(2). Veil-piercing for tort claims under Prest principles.
notes: 三法域对产品责任中股东有限责任的穿透难度均高。中国法以民法典第1203条+公司法第23条处理；美国法以Restatement (Third) of Torts: Products Liability和州公司法处理，有判例支持侵权案件中更易刺破面纱（Sea-Land案）；香港法以普通法Donoghue原则和Prest案处理。美国法在侵权案件中刺破面纱的门槛相对较低，中国法和香港法较严格。

fact_summary: 母公司在子公司环境侵权后，将被污染的资产转移至新设空壳公司，以逃避责任。A parent company transferred polluted real estate assets from its subsidiary to a newly-created shell company with no assets or operations, after the subsidiary was sued for groundwater contamination.
cn_claim: 依据《公司法》第23条（法人人格否认）和《民法典》第1168条，债权人可主张母公司与空壳公司承担连带责任。环境侵权中，'同一控制下'的资产转移可能被认定为恶意串通（民法典第154条）。
us_claim: Fraudulent conveyance under Uniform Fraudulent Transfer Act (UFTA) §4-5; corporate veil-piercing; environmental liability under CERCLA §107 (42 U.S.C. §9607) for current owners and operators; key case: United States v. Bestfoods, 524 U.S. 51 (1998) (parent-subsidiary CERCLA liability); In re Mahoney & Hawkins, Ltd., 893 F.2d 15 (1st Cir. 1990) (fraudulent transfer).
hk_claim: Fraudulent disposition of property under common law and Companies (Winding Up) Ordinance (Cap. 32) §275 (fraudulent trading); no specific statutory fraudulent transfer act comparable to UFTA. Environmental liability under common law nuisance and statutory control. Asset transfer after litigation commencement may be set aside as fraudulent preference.
notes: 三法域对欺诈性资产转移的规制路径不同。中国法以民法典第154条（恶意串通）和公司法第23条处理；美国法以UFTA和CERCLA第107条处理（Bestfoods案）；香港法以普通法欺诈交易和Cap. 32第275条处理。美国法最全面（UFTA+CERCLA），香港法最薄弱（无专门欺诈转移法）。

fact_summary: 董事在并购谈判中故意隐瞒公司重大侵权诉讼，导致收购方在收购后发现巨额赔偿责任。A target company's board concealed a pending product liability class action with $100M potential exposure during merger negotiations with an acquirer.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第500条（缔约过失，故意隐瞒重要事实），收购方可主张损害赔偿。同时，若董事违反忠实义务（公司法第180条），公司可追究董事责任。并购中的信息披露义务在公司法框架下逐步发展。
us_claim: Securities fraud under SEC Rule 10b-5 (17 C.F.R. §240.10b-5); breach of fiduciary duty in M&A under Revlon duties (Revlon, Inc. v. MacAndrews & Forbes Holdings, Inc., 506 A.2d 173 (Del. 1986)); fraudulent inducement under common law; due diligence defense and Sandbagging provisions in acquisition agreements. Key case: Smith v. Van Gorkom, 488 A.2d 858 (Del. 1985) (director duty of care in sale).
hk_claim: Breach of fiduciary duty under common law and Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §465 (directors' duty of care, skill and diligence); fraudulent misrepresentation under common law (Derry v. Peek (1889) 14 App Cas 337); acquisition agreements governed by common law. No specific statutory securities fraud rule comparable to SEC Rule 10b-5 in Hong Kong.
notes: 三法域对并购中董事隐瞒侵权责任的规制均涉及缔约过失/欺诈与董事信义义务。中国法以民法典第500条+公司法第180条处理；美国法以SEC Rule 10b-5和Revlon义务（Revlon案）处理；香港法以普通法Derry v. Peek和Cap. 622第465条处理。美国法最精细，有专门证券欺诈规则；中国法在2023年公司法修订后董事义务更明确；香港法最接近英国普通法。

fact_summary: 公司清算期间，侵权债权人主张优先于普通债权受偿，但清算组按普通债权比例分配。A company in liquidation had insufficient assets to pay all creditors; tort claimants (injured by the company's defective products) argued they should have priority over trade creditors and bondholders.
cn_claim: 依据《企业破产法》第113条，破产财产清偿顺序为：职工债权→税款→普通破产债权。侵权债权在现行法下属于普通债权，无优先受偿地位。但学理上主张侵权债权应优先于合同债权，现行法未采纳。
us_claim: Bankruptcy priority under 11 U.S.C. §507 (priority claims) and §726 (distribution); tort claims generally unsecured unless secured by lien or priority statute. Asbestos claims and product liability in bankruptcy: Johns-Manville bankruptcy (1982); Section 524(g) asbestos trusts. No general priority for tort claims over contract claims in bankruptcy.
hk_claim: Liquidation priority under Companies (Winding Up and Miscellaneous Provisions) Ordinance (Cap. 32) §265: preferential payments (employees, taxes) then ordinary creditors. Tort claims rank as ordinary unsecured debts. No special priority for tort claims over commercial debts in Hong Kong liquidation.
notes: 三法域对侵权债权在清算中的优先地位均不给予特别优先。中国《企业破产法》第113条未区分侵权债权与合同债权；美国法第11 U.S.C. §507-726同样未给予侵权债权优先；香港法Cap. 32 §265同样处理。但美国法有特别规则（如第524(g)条石棉信托），中国法和香港法无此类特别规则。

fact_summary: 关联公司之间的人格混同：共用财务、人员、业务，导致一家公司的侵权债务无法区分责任主体。Two sister companies under common control shared the same office, accounting staff, and brand identity. One company manufactured a defective product, but customers could not distinguish which entity they contracted with.
cn_claim: 依据《公司法》第23条（法人人格否认）和《九民纪要》第10-12条，人格混同情形下可否认公司独立人格，由关联公司承担连带责任。人格混同的认定标准包括：人员混同、业务混同、财务混同。
us_claim: Piercing the corporate veil and 'enterprise liability' theory; alter ego and instrumentality doctrines; key cases: United States v. Milwaukee Refrigerator Transit Co., 142 F. 247 (C.C.E.D. Wis. 1905); Sea-Land Services v. Pepper Source, 941 F.2d 519 (7th Cir. 1991). Some jurisdictions recognize 'enterprise theory' for tort claims (Fletcher, 'Corporate Personality and Limited Liability').
hk_claim: Piercing the corporate veil under common law (Prest v. Petrodel [2013] UKSC 34); 'single economic unit' theory rejected in Adams v. Cape Industries plc [1990] Ch 433; lifting the veil only for fraud or sham. Group liability in tort limited by separate legal personality principle.
notes: 三法域对关联公司人格混同的处理差异显著。中国法《九民纪要》明确承认人格混同可否认公司独立人格（人员、业务、财务混同标准）；美国法部分司法管辖区承认'enterprise theory'（企业责任理论）；香港法在Adams v. Cape案中明确拒绝'single economic unit'理论，仅在欺诈或伪装情形下刺破面纱（Prest案）。中国法最灵活，香港法最严格。

fact_summary: 公司董事在决策中未考虑环境社会影响，被环保组织以'注意义务'起诉。An environmental NGO sued a mining company's directors for approving a tailings dam design without considering climate change risks, arguing that directors owe a duty of care to affected communities.
cn_claim: 依据《公司法》第180条，董事对公司负有忠实义务和勤勉义务。但董事对第三人（如社区）是否负有直接注意义务？中国法下目前不承认董事对第三人的直接侵权义务，除非构成第三人侵权（公司法第191条，2023修订）。
us_claim: Director duty of care under DGCL §141(a) and state corporate law; Business Judgment Rule (Aronson v. Lewis, 473 A.2d 805 (Del. 1984)); derivative suits for breach of duty of care. No direct duty to third parties absent special relationship. ESG litigation: In re Caremark International Inc. Derivative Litigation, 698 A.2d 959 (Del. Ch. 1996) (director oversight duty).
hk_claim: Directors' duties under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §465 (duty of care, skill and diligence); common law duty of care in negligence; no direct duty to affected communities unless assumption of responsibility or special relationship (Hedley Byrne v. Heller [1964] AC 465). ESG considerations not yet recognized as independent director duty in Hong Kong.
notes: 三法域对董事是否对第三人社区承担直接注意义务均持否定或谨慎态度。中国法2023年公司法第191条首次有限承认董事对第三人责任；美国法以商业判断规则（Aronson案）和Caremark监督义务保护董事；香港法以Hedley Byrne原则要求'special relationship'或'assumption of responsibility'。三法域均不承认宽泛的董事对社区直接责任。

fact_summary: 公司因产品召回支出巨额费用，董事被股东起诉要求赔偿损失。A pharmaceutical company spent $800M recalling a drug with undisclosed side effects; shareholders sued the board for approving the launch without adequate clinical testing, seeking to recover the recall costs through a derivative action.
cn_claim: 依据《公司法》第189条，股东可提起派生诉讼。但董事是否承担责任取决于是否违反勤勉义务（公司法第180条）。若董事已履行合理注意义务，即使决策事后被证明错误，也可免责（商业判断规则的中国法对应）。
us_claim: Derivative suit for breach of duty of care; Business Judgment Rule (Smith v. Van Gorkom, 488 A.2d 858 (Del. 1985)); Caremark standard for oversight liability (In re Caremark, 698 A.2d 959 (Del. Ch. 1996)). D&O insurance and corporate indemnification under DGCL §145. Key case: In re Disney Litigation, 906 A.2d 27 (Del. 2006).
hk_claim: Derivative action under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §732; directors' duty of care under §465; business judgment rule recognized but not as formalized as Delaware. D&O insurance available. No specific Caremark-style oversight duty precedent in Hong Kong, but common law duty of care applies.
notes: 三法域对董事产品召回责任的追究路径相似。中国法以公司法第180条+第189条处理；美国法以Caremark标准（In re Caremark案）和迪士尼案（Disney Litigation）处理；香港法以Cap. 622第465条和普通法处理。美国法最发达，有专门的Caremark oversight duty和D&O保险制度；中国法2023年修订后更明确；香港法最接近英国普通法。

fact_summary: 公司被吊销营业执照后仍以公司名义签订合同并侵权，行为人责任如何认定。After its business license was revoked, a construction company continued operating under the same name and entered into a subcontract that caused a worksite accident injuring three workers.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第72条（清算期间法人存续但不得从事与清算无关活动），吊销执照后公司进入清算程序，不得从事新经营活动。行为人以公司名义签订合同，可能构成表见代理（民法典第172条）或无权代理（民法典第171条）。受害人可主张行为人个人责任（民法典第1165条侵权）。
us_claim: Corporate existence after revocation of charter: ultra vires acts by dissolved corporation may bind individuals personally; Restatement (Second) of Agency §329 (apparent authority after termination). Key case: Walkovszky v. Carlton, 223 A.2d 343 (N.J. 1966). Individual liability for torts committed under corporate name after dissolution.
hk_claim: Company struck off register under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §746; restoration possible under §765. Acts after dissolution generally ultra vires. Personal liability of individuals acting for dissolved company under common law. No specific statutory provision for post-dissolution apparent authority in Hong Kong.
notes: 三法域对吊销执照后公司行为的处理均倾向于认定行为人个人责任。中国法以民法典第72条+表见代理/无权代理处理；美国法以Restatement (Second) of Agency §329和判例处理；香港法以Cap. 622第746条和公司恢复程序处理。差异在于中国法有表见代理制度，美国法有 apparent authority 制度，香港法更依赖恢复注册程序。

fact_summary: 公司被并购后，历史侵权债务的承继问题。收购方主张不承担目标公司交割前的侵权赔偿。A technology acquirer refused to pay a $30M patent infringement judgment against the target company that arose from pre-closing activities, arguing the acquisition agreement allocated pre-closing liabilities to the sellers.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第67条（法人合并、分立的，其权利和义务由变更后的法人享有和承担），公司并购后历史债务由并购后公司承继。但当事人可通过合同约定债务分配（民法典第555条债务承担），该约定对债权人不具对抗效力（民法典第552条）。
us_claim: Successor liability in tort: general rule that asset purchaser does not assume seller's liabilities, but exceptions for (1) express assumption, (2) de facto merger, (3) mere continuation, (4) fraudulent conveyance. Key cases: Knapp v. North American Rockwell Corp., 506 F.2d 361 (3d Cir. 1974); Turner v. Alpha Therapeutic Corp., 849 F.2d 333 (8th Cir. 1988). Acquisition agreement indemnification terms govern seller-buyer allocation.
hk_claim: Company amalgamation under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) Part 17: amalgamated company assumes all rights and liabilities of amalgamating companies. Business transfer: general common law rule that asset purchaser does not assume seller's liabilities unless express assumption or fraud. Statutory successor liability less developed than US.
notes: 三法域对公司并购后历史侵权债务承继的处理差异显著。中国法以民法典第67条确立法定承继原则，合同约定不得对抗债权人；美国法以successor liability理论处理，有四个例外（Knapp案）；香港法以Cap. 622第17部合并程序处理，普通法下资产购买不当然承继债务。中国法最严格保护债权人，美国法最灵活，香港法居中。

fact_summary: 一人公司股东不能证明公司财产独立于个人财产，债权人主张刺破面纱。A sole shareholder of a one-person LLC commingled personal and corporate funds, used corporate credit cards for personal expenses, and failed to maintain corporate records. Creditors sought personal liability for a judgment arising from a corporate contract breach.
cn_claim: 依据《公司法》第23条第3款（一人有限责任公司的股东不能证明公司财产独立于股东自己的财产的，应当对公司债务承担连带责任），一人公司实行举证责任倒置。但侵权之债与合同之债的适用是否一致？目前司法实践均适用。
us_claim: Piercing the corporate veil for single-member LLCs: alter ego doctrine; failure to observe corporate formalities; undercapitalization. Key cases: Sea-Land Services v. Pepper Source, 941 F.2d 519 (7th Cir. 1991); United States v. Milwaukee Refrigerator Transit Co., 142 F. 247 (C.C.E.D. Wis. 1905). Limited liability company statutes (e.g., Del. LLC Act §304) provide limited liability shield.
hk_claim: Piercing the corporate veil for single-member companies: Prest v. Petrodel [2013] UKSC 34 principles; limited liability under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §1(2). One-person company is recognized under Cap. 622. Commingling of funds and failure to observe corporate formalities are veil-piercing factors, but Hong Kong courts are cautious.
notes: 三法域对一人公司刺破面纱的处理均较严格。中国法《公司法》第23条第3款实行举证责任倒置，保护债权人最强；美国法以alter ego原则处理，但LLC法规（如Del. LLC Act §304）提供强保护；香港法以Prest案原则处理，同样严格。中国法因举证责任倒置而最为债权人友好。

fact_summary: 董事在关联交易中，将公司侵权赔偿机会转移至个人控制的其他公司。A director caused the company to settle a product liability claim for $5M instead of litigating, then transferred the company's insurance recovery rights to a personal-controlled entity for $1M, effectively diverting value from shareholders.
cn_claim: 依据《公司法》第182条（关联交易报告与回避表决）和第185条（董事利用关联关系损害公司利益应承担赔偿责任），董事在关联交易中损害公司利益的，应承担赔偿责任。该行为同时可能构成忠实义务违反（公司法第180条）和侵权（民法典第1165条）。
us_claim: Breach of duty of loyalty and self-dealing under DGCL §144 and state corporate law; usurpation of corporate opportunity doctrine (Broz v. Cellular Information Systems, Inc., 673 A.2d 148 (Del. 1996)); derivative suit for breach of fiduciary duty. Key case: Sinclair Oil Corp. v. Levien, 280 A.2d 717 (Del. 1971) (parent-subsidiary self-dealing).
hk_claim: Breach of directors' fiduciary duty under Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622) §465 and common law; no specific statutory corporate opportunity doctrine in Hong Kong, but recognized under common law (Regal (Hastings) Ltd v. Gulliver [1942] UKHL 1); derivative action under Cap. 622 §732. Connected transactions under SEHK Listing Rules for listed companies.
notes: 三法域对董事关联交易侵权赔偿机会转移的处理均涉及忠实义务违反。中国法以公司法第182条+第185条处理；美国法以DGCL §144和Broz案（公司机会原则）处理；香港法以普通法Regal (Hastings)案和Cap. 622 §465处理。美国法最发达，有公司机会原则；中国法2023年修订后有专门关联交易条款；香港法依赖普通法。

fact_summary: 公司环境侵权后，实际控制人隐匿财产，受害人申请财产保全时发现公司为空壳。After an industrial explosion caused toxic air pollution, the actual controller hid company assets, leaving only $50,000 in the corporate account against $20M in verified tort claims.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1168条和《公司法》第23条，受害人可主张刺破公司面纱，要求实际控制人承担连带责任。同时可依据《民事诉讼法》第103条申请财产保全。若实际控制人存在恶意转移财产行为，可依据民法典第538-542条行使债权人撤销权。
us_claim: Fraudulent conveyance under UFTA §4-5; veil-piercing; injunction and prejudgment remedies under Fed. R. Civ. P. 65; environmental liability under CERCLA §107 (42 U.S.C. §9607). Key case: In re Mahoney & Hawkins, Ltd., 893 F.2d 15 (1st Cir. 1990). Criminal liability for concealment of assets under 18 U.S.C. §152 (bankruptcy fraud).
hk_claim: Fraudulent trading under Companies (Winding Up) Ordinance (Cap. 32) §275; misfeasance proceedings under Cap. 32 §276; no specific statutory fraudulent conveyance regime comparable to UFTA. Common law tracing and equitable remedies available. Asset freezing orders (Mareva injunctions) under common law.
notes: 三法域对空壳公司环境侵权后财产隐匿的处理路径不同。中国法以公司法第23条+民法典债权人撤销权（第538-542条）处理；美国法以UFTA+CERCLA+破产欺诈（18 U.S.C. §152）处理；香港法以Cap. 32第275条欺诈交易和Mareva禁令处理。美国法最全面（刑事+民事），香港法以Mareva禁令为有力工具，中国法在2023年公司法修订后更强。

fact_summary: 政府雇员因工作歧视被解雇，主张行政救济与劳动仲裁并存。A civil servant at a municipal environmental agency was dismissed after reporting senior officials' misconduct; she sought reinstatement through both administrative review and labor arbitration.
cn_claim: 依据《公务员法》第95条，公务员对涉及本人的人事处理不服的，可申请复核或申诉，但不得提起劳动仲裁。依据《劳动法》第2条，公务员不适用劳动法。救济途径为内部申诉（《公务员法》第95-100条），无外部司法救济途径。
us_claim: Federal employees: Civil Service Reform Act (5 U.S.C. §2302) prohibits retaliation for whistleblowing; Merit Systems Protection Board (MSPB) adjudicates appeals (5 U.S.C. §7701); Title VII (42 U.S.C. §2000e) applies to federal employment through 42 U.S.C. §2000e-16. Key case: Bush v. Lucas, 462 U.S. 367 (1983) (constitutional tort remedies). State employees: mixed protections under state whistleblower statutes.
hk_claim: Public servants under common law employment contract and statutory protections; whistleblowing protections under Public Interest Disclosure Ordinance (Cap. 635) for public bodies; employment grievances handled by administrative channels and civil service regulations. No general labor arbitration for civil servants in Hong Kong. Common law wrongful dismissal claims may be available for non-statutory public employees.
notes: 三法域对政府雇员解雇救济路径差异显著。中国法严格区分公务员与劳动者，公务员适用《公务员法》内部申诉程序，不适用劳动仲裁；美国法以CSRA（5 U.S.C. §2302）和MSPB提供联邦雇员保护，同时Title VII适用于联邦雇员；香港法以公共利益披露条例（Cap. 635）保护举报公务员，但无一般劳动仲裁制度。中国法救济路径最封闭，美国法最开放。

fact_summary: 事业单位编制人员与单位签订劳动合同，解雇时适用《劳动法》还是《事业单位人事管理条例》发生争议。A public hospital dismissed a tenured physician with a signed five-year employment contract after she refused to perform unauthorized procedures; the hospital claimed the contract was governed by public personnel rules, not labor law.
cn_claim: 依据《事业单位人事管理条例》第15条，事业单位工作人员连续旷工超过15个工作日可解除聘用合同。依据《劳动合同法》第96条，事业单位与实行聘用制的工作人员订立、履行、变更、解除或终止劳动合同，法律、行政法规或国务院另有规定的，依照其规定。事业单位人员解雇优先适用人事管理条例，但涉及劳动报酬等可适用劳动合同法。
us_claim: Public employees: constitutional due process protections (Cleveland Board of Education v. Loudermill, 470 U.S. 532 (1985)) for tenure/ property interest in employment; collective bargaining under NLRA (29 U.S.C. §151) for public-sector employees in some states; state public employment relations acts. Mixed federal/state jurisdiction. Key case: Garcetti v. Ceballos, 547 U.S. 410 (2006) (public employee speech).
hk_claim: Public sector employment in Hong Kong governed by employment contract and civil service regulations; no specific statutory collective bargaining for public employees. Administrative law remedies through judicial review (Cap. 484) for unfair dismissal. Public sector trade unions operate under Trade Unions Ordinance (Cap. 332) but collective bargaining rights limited. Common law wrongful dismissal applies.
notes: 三法域对事业单位/公共雇员解雇的法律适用存在差异。中国法以《事业单位人事管理条例》和《劳动合同法》第96条形成特别法与一般法关系；美国法以宪法正当程序（Loudermill案）和州公法体系处理；香港法以雇佣合同+行政审查（Cap. 484）处理。中国法体制分割最复杂，美国法宪法保护最强，香港法最依赖合同。

fact_summary: 工会注册申请被行政拒绝，申请人提起行政诉讼与劳动仲裁。A group of ride-hailing drivers applied to register a trade union under the local regulations; the civil affairs bureau refused registration citing lack of 'employer-employee relationship' under the statutory definition. The applicants sought administrative review and labor arbitration simultaneously.
cn_claim: 依据《工会法》第11条，用人单位有会员25人以上的，应建立基层工会委员会。工会登记由地方总工会审查。依据《行政诉讼法》第12条，对行政机关作出的行政许可决定不服的，可提起行政诉讼。但工会注册是否属于行政许可存在争议，实践中多通过行政复议或行政诉讼解决。
us_claim: Union organizing under NLRA (29 U.S.C. §151): National Labor Relations Board (NLRB) determines appropriate bargaining units and certifies unions (29 U.S.C. §159); administrative review under APA (5 U.S.C. §701) for NLRB decisions. Key case: NLRB v. Jones & Laughlin Steel Corp., 301 U.S. 1 (1937). Union certification is administrative action, not judicial; judicial review under 29 U.S.C. §160.
hk_claim: Trade union registration under Trade Unions Ordinance (Cap. 332) §5: Registrar of Trade Unions has discretion to refuse registration. Decision subject to judicial review under Cap. 484. No labor arbitration for union registration. Common law principles of natural justice and procedural fairness apply. Key case: Lee Kun v. Registrar of Trade Unions [1993] HKLR 198.
notes: 三法域对工会注册拒绝的救济路径不同。中国法以行政诉讼法+工会法处理，注册审查由总工会进行；美国法以NLRA（29 U.S.C. §151）和NLRB行政程序处理，司法审查在联邦法院；香港法以工会条例（Cap. 332）和司法审查（Cap. 484）处理。中国法行政色彩最浓，美国法有专门劳工行政机构，香港法最接近普通法司法审查。

fact_summary: 劳动争议中，劳动者同时向劳动仲裁委和信访部门申诉，信访处理结果与仲裁裁决冲突。A factory worker filed a labor arbitration claim for unpaid overtime wages while simultaneously petitioning the municipal petition bureau (xinfang) for intervention; the xinfang office issued a mediation letter recommending payment, but the arbitration tribunal ruled the claim time-barred.
cn_claim: 依据《劳动争议调解仲裁法》第5条，劳动争议应先向劳动争议仲裁委员会申请仲裁。依据《信访工作条例》第14条，信访事项应依法通过诉讼、仲裁、行政复议等法定途径解决。信访调解不具有法律强制力，不能替代仲裁裁决。但实践中信访压力可能影响仲裁结果，存在执行冲突。
us_claim: Exclusive jurisdiction under FAA (9 U.S.C. §1) for arbitration agreements; administrative agency proceedings (e.g., DOL Wage and Hour Division) independent from arbitration; judicial review of arbitration awards under 9 U.S.C. §10. No direct equivalent to xinfang administrative petition in US labor law. Key case: Mitsubishi Motors Corp. v. Soler Chrysler-Plymouth, Inc., 473 U.S. 614 (1985).
hk_claim: Arbitration under Arbitration Ordinance (Cap. 609) for private labor disputes; administrative proceedings under Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) through the Labour Department. No equivalent to xinfang petition system. Judicial review of administrative decisions under Cap. 484. Common law exclusivity of arbitral jurisdiction (Compagnie Tunisienne de Navigation SA v. Cie d'Armement Maritime SA [1971] AC 572).
notes: 三法域对劳动争议中行政申诉与仲裁并行冲突的处理差异大。中国法存在独特的信访制度（《信访工作条例》），其调解与仲裁裁决可能冲突；美国法以FAA仲裁专属管辖和DOL行政程序并行处理；香港法以仲裁条例（Cap. 609）和雇佣条例（Cap. 57）行政程序处理，无信访制度。中国法的信访-仲裁冲突最具本土特色。

fact_summary: 劳务派遣中的行政监管与劳动争议：用工单位退回派遣员工，派遣单位解除劳动合同，员工同时主张行政违法和违法解除。A dispatched worker was returned by the user employer after a safety incident and then terminated by the dispatch agency for 'failure to meet job requirements.' The worker claimed both illegal dispatch under administrative regulations and unlawful termination.
cn_claim: 依据《劳动合同法》第58-67条和第92条，劳务派遣单位与用工单位对派遣员工承担连带责任。用工单位违法退回的，劳动行政部门可责令改正并罚款（第92条）。员工可同时主张违法解除（第87条赔偿金）和行政违法投诉。
us_claim: Temporary/ contingent worker protections under FLSA (29 U.S.C. §201) and state temp worker statutes; joint employer doctrine under NLRB and FLSA (Browning-Ferris Industries of California, Inc. d/b/a BFI Newby Island Recyclery, 362 NLRB No. 186 (2015)); OSHA whistleblower protections (29 U.S.C. §660(c)). State temp agency licensing and administrative enforcement. Key case: Vizcaino v. Microsoft Corp., 97 F.3d 1187 (9th Cir. 1996).
hk_claim: Employment agency licensing under Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) and Employment Agency Regulations; joint employer concept under common law agency principles. Unfair dismissal claims under Cap. 57 for employees with continuous contract. Administrative complaints to Labour Department for agency violations. No specific statutory dispatched worker regime in Hong Kong.
notes: 三法域对劳务派遣的监管模式差异显著。中国法以《劳动合同法》第58-67条专门规制劳务派遣，行政监管与劳动仲裁并行；美国法以FLSA和州法+NLRB共同雇主理论（Browning-Ferris案）处理，无专门劳务派遣法；香港法以雇佣条例（Cap. 57）和雇佣代理规例处理，无专门派遣制度。中国法最成体系，美国法最灵活，香港法最薄弱。

fact_summary: 公务员因工伤申请行政补偿与民事赔偿双重救济。A police officer sustained spinal injuries during a training exercise; she sought workers' compensation through the public service channel and simultaneously filed a tort claim against the equipment manufacturer for defective gear.
cn_claim: 依据《公务员法》第83条和《工伤保险条例》第65条，公务员因工作遭受事故伤害的，享受工伤保险待遇。但公务员的工伤认定程序由人事部门处理，而非劳动行政部门。同时，因第三方侵权造成的工伤，公务员可依据《民法典》第1192条向侵权人主张民事赔偿。
us_claim: Federal employees: Federal Employees' Compensation Act (FECA, 5 U.S.C. §8101) provides exclusive remedy against federal employer; third-party tort claims permitted under 5 U.S.C. §8131. Key case: Johanns v. Livestock Marketing Association, 544 U.S. 550 (2005). State workers' comp systems generally provide exclusive remedy against employer but permit third-party claims.
hk_claim: Civil servants' compensation under common law employer's liability and civil service regulations; statutory workers' compensation under Employees' Compensation Ordinance (Cap. 282) generally covers private sector. Third-party tort claims permitted under common law negligence. Administrative claims for public service injuries through government internal procedures. No statutory equivalent to FECA for Hong Kong civil servants.
notes: 三法域对公务员工伤双重救济的处理路径有对应性。中国法以《工伤保险条例》+民法典第1192条处理第三方侵权；美国法以FECA（5 U.S.C. §8101）+第8131条处理第三方侵权；香港法以普通法雇主责任+雇员补偿条例（Cap. 282）处理。差异在于中国法和香港法对公务员工伤的专门规制不如美国法（FECA）精细。

fact_summary: 外国人在中国就业未办理就业许可，劳动合同效力争议与行政处罚并存。A US citizen was hired as a marketing director by a Shanghai tech company without obtaining a work permit; after six months, the company refused to pay his salary, citing the invalidity of the employment contract under Chinese administrative law.
cn_claim: 依据《外国人在中国就业管理规定》第5条，外国人就业须取得就业许可。未取得就业许可签订的劳动合同，依据《最高人民法院关于审理劳动争议案件适用法律问题的解释（一）》第33条，一般认定为无效。但已提供劳动的，可参照合同约定主张劳动报酬。同时，用人单位可能被劳动行政部门处以罚款（《出境入境管理法》第80条）。
us_claim: Unauthorized employment under INA (8 U.S.C. §1324a) and I-9 requirements; employment contract generally enforceable despite immigration status under state contract law (some states restrict recovery). Key case: Hoffman Plastic Compounds, Inc. v. NLRB, 535 U.S. 137 (2002) (undocumented workers' NLRA protections limited). Administrative enforcement by ICE and DOL. State wage claims generally permitted regardless of immigration status.
hk_claim: Employment of non-residents governed by Immigration Ordinance (Cap. 115) and employment visa requirements. Unauthorized employment is a criminal offense under Cap. 115 §41. Employment contract may be unenforceable as illegal contract under common law if performance requires illegal conduct (Holiwell Securities Ltd v. Hughes [1974] 1 WLR 155). However, common law quantum meruit claims for work performed may be permitted.
notes: 三法域对非法外国人就业合同效力的处理存在碰撞。中国法以司法解释（法释一第33条）倾向于认定合同无效但可参照主张报酬；美国法以Hoffman Plastic案限制非法移民的NLRA保护但允许州工资索赔；香港法以移民条例（Cap. 115）认定非法合同，但允许quantum meruit索赔。中国法最宽松，香港法最严格，美国法联邦与州法冲突最大。

fact_summary: 劳动行政监察中，劳动行政部门对欠薪企业作出行政处理决定，劳动者同时提起劳动仲裁，两者结果不一致。A labor bureau issued an administrative order requiring a construction firm to pay $200,000 in back wages to 50 workers; meanwhile, an arbitration tribunal awarded only $120,000, finding that some workers lacked sufficient evidence of overtime hours.
cn_claim: 依据《劳动保障监察条例》第18条，劳动保障行政部门对违反劳动保障法律的行为有权作出行政处理决定。行政处理决定具有强制执行力，可申请法院强制执行（《行政强制法》第53条）。劳动仲裁裁决与行政处理决定不一致时，行政处理决定对用人单位有约束力，但劳动者可依据更有利的结果主张权利。
us_claim: DOL Wage and Hour Division administrative determinations under FLSA (29 U.S.C. §216) and judicial enforcement; deference to agency findings under Chevron U.S.A. Inc. v. Natural Resources Defense Council, Inc., 467 U.S. 837 (1984). Private arbitration awards generally do not bind the government. Judicial review of administrative orders under APA. Key case: Secretary of Labor v. Lauritzen, 835 F.2d 1529 (7th Cir. 1987).
hk_claim: Labour Department enforcement under Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) and Minimum Wage Ordinance (Cap. 608); administrative orders enforceable through magistrates' courts. No statutory labor arbitration tribunal in Hong Kong comparable to mainland China; private arbitration under Cap. 609. Administrative decisions subject to judicial review under Cap. 484. Deference to administrative findings under common law principles.
notes: 三法域对劳动行政处理与仲裁裁决冲突的处理差异大。中国法以行政处理决定的强制执行力优先；美国法以DOL行政决定+Chevron尊重原则处理，但私仲裁不约束政府；香港法以劳工处执法和最低工资条例（Cap. 608）处理，无成文劳动仲裁庭。中国法行政决定效力最强，香港法最依赖普通法司法审查。

fact_summary: 职业病患者在获得工伤保险待遇后，主张用人单位存在重大过错，要求额外民事赔偿。A former asbestos worker diagnosed with mesothelioma received workers' compensation benefits but sued his former employer for gross negligence, claiming the employer knew of the exposure risks and concealed safety reports.
cn_claim: 依据《职业病防治法》第58条，职业病病人除依法享有工伤保险外，依照有关民事法律，尚有获得赔偿的权利的，有权向用人单位提出赔偿要求。依据《民法典》第1165条，用人单位存在重大过错的，应承担侵权赔偿责任。但《工伤保险条例》第14条确立了工伤保险的优先适用，民事赔偿为补充。
us_claim: Workers' compensation exclusive remedy doctrine generally bars tort suits against employer; intentional tort and gross negligence exceptions vary by state. Dual capacity doctrine in some jurisdictions. Key cases: Workers' comp exclusivity: Bougher v. Raven Coal Corp., 755 F.2d 334 (3d Cir. 1985); intentional tort exception: Jones v. VIP Development Corp., 472 A.2d 390 (Conn. 1984). Asbestos: Manville bankruptcy trust (Johns-Manville Corp. v. Asbestos Litigation, 517 U.S. 537 (1996)).
hk_claim: Employees' Compensation Ordinance (Cap. 282) generally provides exclusive remedy against employer; common law negligence claims against third parties permitted. No specific statutory exception for employer gross negligence under Cap. 282. However, common law claims for breach of statutory duty or negligence may be available if not covered by Cap. 282. PENDING_VERIFICATION: employer gross negligence exception in Hong Kong.
notes: 三法域对职业病工伤与民事赔偿双轨救济的处理差异显著。中国法以《职业病防治法》第58条明确保留民事赔偿请求权；美国法以州工人赔偿法为主，一般排除雇主侵权诉讼，但故意侵权例外各州不一；香港法以雇员补偿条例（Cap. 282）为雇主提供基本排他救济，但第三方侵权可索赔。中国法对劳动者保护最强，美国法最依赖州法差异，香港法排他性最强。

fact_summary: 行政机关作为用工主体，与编外人员签订劳动合同，该合同适用行政法还是劳动法。A district government office hired 30 temporary staff on fixed-term contracts for census work; when the contracts expired, the workers claimed they were entitled to open-ended contracts under the Labor Contract Law, while the government claimed the contracts were governed by public service procurement rules.
cn_claim: 依据《劳动合同法》第2条，国家机关、事业单位、社会团体和与其建立劳动关系的劳动者，订立、履行、变更、解除或终止劳动合同，依照本法执行。编外人员与行政机关签订劳动合同的，应适用劳动合同法。但《劳动合同法》第12条允许订立固定期限劳动合同，完成一定工作任务为期限的合同可依法终止。
us_claim: Public-sector employment: state and federal constitutional limitations on public employment contracts; collective bargaining for public employees varies by state. Federal employees governed by Title 5 U.S.C. and CSRA. Contractual claims against government subject to sovereign immunity and APA (5 U.S.C. §704). Key case: Perry v. Sindermann, 408 U.S. 593 (1972) (property interest in public employment).
hk_claim: Government employment in Hong Kong governed by civil service regulations and employment contracts; non-civil service staff generally covered by Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57). Fixed-term contracts permitted under common law. Judicial review of employment decisions for public officers under Cap. 484. No specific statutory restriction on contract terms for temporary government workers.
notes: 三法域对行政机关编外人员劳动合同的法律适用有对应性。中国法以《劳动合同法》第2条明确适用；美国法以宪法正当程序（Perry案）和CSRA处理公共雇员；香港法以雇佣条例（Cap. 57）处理非公务员政府雇员。差异在于中国法直接适用劳动法，美国法以宪法限制为主，香港法最依赖合同解释。

fact_summary: 集体劳动合同中，工会与用人单位约定最低工资标准高于法定标准，但劳动行政部门检查认为违反地方最低工资规定。A factory-level union negotiated a collective contract setting a minimum monthly wage of $500, exceeding the local statutory minimum of $450 but below the provincial guideline of $520. The local labor bureau deemed the factory in compliance, but the provincial bureau issued a correction notice.
cn_claim: 依据《集体合同规定》第6条，集体合同中劳动报酬和劳动条件等标准不得低于当地人民政府规定的最低标准。高于法定标准的约定有效，低于则无效。劳动行政部门的监督检查依据《劳动保障监察条例》第11条，但不同层级行政部门的认定冲突需通过行政复议或行政诉讼解决。
us_claim: Collective bargaining agreements under NLRA (29 U.S.C. §158) and state labor relations acts; administrative enforcement by NLRB and state labor boards. No federal minimum wage in collective agreement context preempts state law under FLSA (29 U.S.C. §218). Key case: San Diego Building Trades Council v. Garmon, 359 U.S. 236 (1959) (federal preemption of state labor regulation). Wage and Hour Division (DOL) enforces minimum wage.
hk_claim: Collective contracts under Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) and Trade Unions Ordinance (Cap. 332); minimum wage under Minimum Wage Ordinance (Cap. 608). No statutory collective bargaining mechanism comparable to NLRA. Administrative enforcement by Labour Department. Judicial review of administrative decisions under Cap. 484. Common law freedom of contract applies to collective agreements.
notes: 三法域对集体合同最低工资高于法定标准时的行政认定差异大。中国法以《集体合同规定》和劳动保障监察条例处理，存在层级冲突；美国法以NLRA联邦优先（Garmon案）和FLSA处理，州法被排除；香港法以雇佣条例（Cap. 57）和最低工资条例（Cap. 608）处理，无NLRA式集体谈判机制。美国法最统一，中国法层级冲突最突出，香港法集体谈判最薄弱。

fact_summary: 劳动者因工伤认定行政决定不服，提起行政诉讼与民事诉讼并行。A warehouse worker injured his back lifting heavy boxes; the HR social security bureau denied the workers' compensation claim, ruling the injury was pre-existing. The worker filed an administrative lawsuit against the bureau and simultaneously sued the employer for negligence in tort.
cn_claim: 依据《工伤保险条例》第55条，职工对工伤认定结论不服的，可以依法申请行政复议或提起行政诉讼。同时，依据《民法典》第1191条，用人单位的工作人员因执行工作任务造成他人损害的，由用人单位承担侵权责任。但工伤认定与民事侵权诉讼的举证责任和赔偿标准不同，可能产生冲突结果。
us_claim: Workers' comp administrative appeals under state statutes; exclusive remedy generally bars tort suits against employer; collateral estoppel may apply to factual findings. Some states allow dual proceedings with different standards. Key case: L. B. Foster Co. v. Industrial Accident Commission, 197 P.2d 705 (Cal. 1948). Federal employees: FECA appeals to Employees' Compensation Appeals Board (20 C.F.R. §10).
hk_claim: Employees' Compensation Ordinance (Cap. 282) §22 provides for review by Employees' Compensation Assessment Board; common law negligence claims against employer generally barred by Cap. 282 exclusivity. Administrative decisions subject to judicial review under Cap. 484. No specific statutory right to parallel tort proceedings against employer in Hong Kong.
notes: 三法域对工伤认定与民事侵权并行的处理差异大。中国法允许并行程序（行政诉讼+民事诉讼），但结果可能冲突；美国法以工人赔偿排他性为主，一般禁止雇主侵权诉讼；香港法以雇员补偿条例（Cap. 282）排他性为主，仅允许第三方侵权索赔。中国法并行程序最灵活，美国法和香港法排他性更强。

fact_summary: 行政事业单位改制为企业，原事业编制人员身份转换与劳动合同衔接争议。A state-owned research institute was converted to a limited liability company; former staff with 'public institution status' (shiye bianzhi) were required to sign new labor contracts, but some refused, claiming their original tenure status should be preserved under administrative law.
cn_claim: 依据《劳动合同法》第34条，用人单位发生合并或分立等情况，原劳动合同继续有效，由承继其权利和义务的用人单位继续履行。但事业单位改制为企业时，涉及编制人员身份转换，需依据《事业单位人事管理条例》第37条和地方政府改制方案处理。身份转换后的经济补偿和社保衔接适用《劳动合同法》第46条和第47条。
us_claim: Public-sector privatization: constitutional protections for public employment (Perry v. Sindermann, 408 U.S. 593 (1972)); collective bargaining obligations under NLRA for newly private employer (NLRB v. Yeshiva University, 444 U.S. 672 (1980)); pension and benefits protections under ERISA (29 U.S.C. §1001). No direct federal statute governing public-to-private conversion. State law governs transition.
hk_claim: Government restructuring: civil service protections under common law and statutory regulations; employment contracts govern transition to private sector. No specific statutory framework for public-to-private conversion in Hong Kong. Pension and provident fund protections under Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Ordinance (Cap. 485). Judicial review of administrative decisions affecting employment rights under Cap. 484.
notes: 三法域对事业单位改制人员身份转换的处理均有制度安排。中国法以《劳动合同法》第34条+《事业单位人事管理条例》第37条处理；美国法以宪法正当程序（Perry案）+NLRA+ERISA处理；香港法以雇佣合同+强积金条例（Cap. 485）+司法审查（Cap. 484）处理。差异在于中国法有专门改制法规，美国法依赖宪法和联邦劳工法，香港法最依赖合同和行政审查。

fact_summary: 用人单位因违反劳动行政规定被处以行政处罚，劳动者以同一事实主张解除劳动合同并要求经济补偿。A food delivery platform was fined $100,000 by the labor bureau for misclassifying delivery riders as independent contractors. The riders claimed they were employees and sought termination of their service agreements with severance pay under the Labor Contract Law.
cn_claim: 依据《劳动合同法》第38条和第46条，用人单位未依法为劳动者缴纳社会保险费的，劳动者可以解除劳动合同，用人单位应支付经济补偿。行政处罚（如未缴社保罚款）与劳动者解除劳动合同并主张经济补偿可并行，但行政处罚本身不自动触发经济补偿，需证明用人单位存在《劳动合同法》第38条所列情形。
us_claim: Misclassification enforcement under FLSA (29 U.S.C. §206) and state wage laws; independent contractor vs. employee determined by economic reality test (United States v. Silk, 331 U.S. 704 (1947)) and ABC test (Dynamex Operations West, Inc. v. Superior Court, 4 Cal.5th 903 (2018)). Administrative penalties by DOL and state agencies; private class actions for misclassification under state law. NLRA protections for employees only. Key case: NLRB v. Hearst Publications, Inc., 322 U.S. 111 (1944).
hk_claim: Employment status under common law control test (Stevenson, Jordan and Harrison Ltd v. Macdonald and Evans [1952] 1 TLR 101) and integration test. Misclassification claims under Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) and Minimum Wage Ordinance (Cap. 608). Administrative enforcement by Labour Department. No statutory severance pay entitlement for independent contractors; employees entitled to statutory severance under Cap. 57. Common law claims for breach of contract may be available.
notes: 三法域对劳动者 misclassification 后行政罚款与民事救济的衔接处理不同。中国法以《劳动合同法》第38条+第46条处理，行政处罚与经济补偿可并行但需证明解除事由；美国法以FLSA经济现实测试（Silk案）和ABC测试（Dynamex案）处理，行政罚款与私诉并行；香港法以普通法控制测试（Stevenson案）和雇佣条例（Cap. 57）处理。美国法测试标准最复杂，中国法最明确，香港法最传统。

fact_summary: 劳动争议调解委员会调解失败后，当事人能否直接提起行政诉讼而非劳动仲裁。A factory worker requested mediation by the enterprise labor dispute mediation committee for unlawful dismissal; after the committee failed to reach an agreement within 30 days, the worker filed an administrative lawsuit against the labor bureau for failing to compel the employer to reinstate him.
cn_claim: 依据《劳动争议调解仲裁法》第5条，劳动争议调解不成的，当事人可以向劳动争议仲裁委员会申请仲裁。劳动争议不属于行政诉讼受案范围（《行政诉讼法》第12条），劳动行政部门的调解职能属于非强制性行政指导，不具有强制执行力。当事人不能直接提起行政诉讼，必须先经仲裁程序。
us_claim: Mediation under NLRA (29 U.S.C. §158) is voluntary; Federal Mediation and Conciliation Service (FMCS) facilitates but cannot compel. No administrative lawsuit against FMCS for failure to compel settlement. Judicial review of NLRB decisions under 29 U.S.C. §160. Private arbitration under FAA (9 U.S.C. §1). No direct equivalent to administrative lawsuit for mediation failure in US labor law. Key case: H.K. Porter Co. v. NLRB, 397 U.S. 99 (1970).
hk_claim: Mediation under Labour Relations Ordinance (Cap. 55) is voluntary; Labour Department provides conciliation services but cannot compel settlement. No statutory administrative enforcement of mediation outcomes. Judicial review of administrative decisions under Cap. 484. Arbitration under Cap. 609 for private disputes. No administrative lawsuit against Labour Department for failure to compel reinstatement in Hong Kong.
notes: 三法域对劳动争议调解失败后行政救济路径的差异显著。中国法明确规定调解不成后应申请仲裁，不可直接行政诉讼；美国法以FMCS自愿调解和NLRA处理，无成文行政诉讼途径；香港法以劳工处调解（Cap. 55）和仲裁（Cap. 609）处理，同样无行政强制。但中国法存在实践中对行政部门不作为的行政诉讼尝试，三法域在调解-仲裁衔接上较为一致。

fact_summary: 离婚财产分割中，一方婚前持有的公司股权在婚后增值，增值部分是否应作为夫妻共同财产分割并缴纳个人所得税。A husband's pre-marital shares in a tech startup appreciated 50x during the marriage due to his continued management; the wife claimed half the appreciated value in divorce, and the tax authority assessed capital gains tax on the transfer.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1062条，夫妻在婚姻关系存续期间所得的生产、经营、投资的收益为夫妻共同财产。婚前财产婚后增值部分，若增值源于夫妻共同劳动或管理，应认定为共同财产（《民法典婚姻家庭编解释（一）》第26条）。离婚财产分割不属于应税交易，不征收个人所得税。依据《个人所得税法》第4条，离婚财产分割不属于应税所得。
us_claim: Marital property division under state equitable distribution or community property regimes (e.g., California Family Code §760); appreciation of separate property may be divided if attributable to community efforts (Pereira v. Pereira, 156 P. 2 (Cal. 1915); Van Camp v. Van Camp, 199 P. 885 (Cal. 1921)). Property transfers incident to divorce under 26 U.S.C. §1041: non-recognition treatment, no gain or loss. Key case: Davis v. United States, 370 U.S. 65 (1962) (overruled by §1041).
hk_claim: Marital property division under common law principles and Matrimonial Proceedings and Property Ordinance (Cap. 192); equal sharing presumption for matrimonial property. No capital gains tax on property transfers between spouses under Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap. 112) §10(1) exclusion for transfers between spouses. Pre-marital property generally excluded from matrimonial property subject to needs and fairness (LKW v. DD [2010] HKCFA 70).
notes: 三法域对离婚财产分割中婚前财产增值的处理有对应规则。中国法以《民法典》第1062条+婚姻家庭编解释（一）第26条处理增值归属，且离婚分割不征税；美国法以Pereira/Van Camp法则处理增值归属，26 U.S.C. §1041免税；香港法以Cap. 192和LKW v. DD处理，Cap. 112 §10(1)配偶间转让免税。差异在于美国法有专门免税条款（§1041），中国法以司法解释处理增值，香港法以普通法公平原则处理。

fact_summary: 离婚后子女抚养费支付方主张税前扣除，税务机关不予认可。A divorced parent paying $2,000 monthly child support claimed the payments as deductible alimony under tax law; the tax authority rejected the deduction, ruling that post-2018 tax reform eliminated alimony deductions for new divorce decrees.
cn_claim: 依据《个人所得税法》第6条，专项附加扣除包括子女教育、继续教育、大病医疗、住房贷款利息或住房租金、赡养老人等支出，但抚养费支出不属于专项附加扣除范围。离婚后支付的子女抚养费不能在税前扣除，由支付方税后收入承担。
us_claim: Child support is not deductible by the payor or taxable to the payee under 26 U.S.C. §71(c) (pre-2019 law) and §215 (repealed by TCJA 2017 for divorce decrees after Dec 31, 2018). Alimony under pre-2019 decrees: deductible by payor, taxable to payee (26 U.S.C. §71). Key case: Gould v. Gould, 245 U.S. 151 (1917) (alimony not deductible). Post-2018: no deduction for alimony. Child support never deductible.
hk_claim: Child maintenance payments under common law and Matrimonial Proceedings and Property Ordinance (Cap. 192); no tax deduction for child maintenance payments in Hong Kong. Alimony/maintenance payments between former spouses are not deductible under Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap. 112). Tax treatment of maintenance governed by common law principles and statutory exemptions. No specific child support tax deduction regime.
notes: 三法域对子女抚养费税前扣除的处理均不予扣除。中国法以《个人所得税法》第6条专项附加扣除范围排除抚养费；美国法以26 U.S.C. §71(c)和TCJA改革后第215条废除赡养费扣除，但抚养费一直不可扣除；香港法以Cap. 112排除抚养费扣除。三法域一致，但美国法对2019年前离婚判决中的赡养费有特殊处理。

fact_summary: 婚姻存续期间一方接受父母赠与房产，离婚时该房产是否属于夫妻共同财产并涉及赠与税。A wife's parents transferred a residential property to her during the marriage; the husband claimed it was marital property subject to division upon divorce, while the tax authority assessed the transfer as a gift subject to potential gift tax obligations.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1063条，遗嘱或赠与合同中确定只归一方的财产为夫妻一方的个人财产。若父母明确赠与合同中指定房产仅归女儿所有，则属于个人财产，离婚时不分割。中国目前未开征赠与税，房产赠与仅涉及契税、个人所得税（财税〔2009〕78号）。
us_claim: Marital property: gifts from third parties to one spouse generally remain separate property under state equitable distribution regimes (e.g., Uniform Marriage and Divorce Act §307). Gift tax: 26 U.S.C. §2501 imposes gift tax on donor; annual exclusion under §2503(b) ($18,000 for 2024); marital deduction under §2523. Gift splitting under §2513. Divorce division of gifted property: generally separate unless commingled. Key case: Commissioner v. Duberstein, 363 U.S. 278 (1960).
hk_claim: Gifted property to one spouse generally remains separate property under common law and Cap. 192 principles, but may be considered in needs-based adjustment. Hong Kong does not impose gift tax or estate tax (abolished in 2006). Property transfers between family members subject to stamp duty under Stamp Duty Ordinance (Cap. 117). Divorce property adjustment governed by LKW v. DD principles and needs of children.
notes: 三法域对婚内父母赠与房产的处理存在差异。中国法以《民法典》第1063条明确指定赠与为个人财产，且无赠与税；美国法以州婚姻法（UMDA §307）和联邦赠与税（26 U.S.C. §2501）处理，有年度豁免和配偶扣除；香港法以普通法和Cap. 192处理，无赠与税（2006年废除）。美国法最复杂（联邦+州双层），中国法最清晰，香港法无赠与税。

fact_summary: 跨境离婚中，境外信托持有的家族财产在中国离婚诉讼中的分割与税务处理。A wealthy family established a BVI discretionary trust holding shares in a Hong Kong-listed company; the wife in a Shanghai divorce proceeding claimed the trust assets were matrimonial property, while the husband argued the trust was irrevocable and the assets were beyond the court's reach.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1062条，夫妻在婚姻关系存续期间所得的财产为共同财产。境外信托财产若实质为夫妻共同所有，中国法院可依据《民法典》第1066条和《涉外民事关系法律适用法》第24条进行分割。信托资产穿透需证明信托为虚假信托或丈夫保留实质控制权。税务处理上，中国无信托所得税专门制度，但受益人取得的信托分配可能被视为所得（财税〔2000〕91号）。
us_claim: Marital property and trusts: state courts may consider trust assets in equitable distribution if the settlor retains control or benefits (Reno v. Reno, 2013 WL 1334904 (N.Y. Sup. Ct. 2013)); irrevocable trusts generally protected unless fraudulent conveyance. Tax: grantor trust rules under 26 U.S.C. §§671-679; trust income taxation under 26 U.S.C. §641. Key case: United States v. Irving, 142 F.3d 144 (2d Cir. 1998) (trust asset taxation). Offshore trusts: FBAR reporting (31 U.S.C. §5314) and FATCA.
hk_claim: Trust assets in divorce: courts may look through trusts if they are a 'nuptial settlement' or if the settlor retains control under Matrimonial Proceedings and Property Ordinance (Cap. 192) §17(1). Discretionary trusts generally protected unless sham (Rahman v. Chase Bank (CI) Trust Co. Ltd [2014] JRC 194A). No specific trust income tax in Hong Kong; offshore trusts generally tax-neutral. Stamp duty on share transfers.
notes: 三法域对跨境离婚中境外信托财产的分割与税务处理差异显著。中国法以《民法典》第1062条+《涉外民事关系法律适用法》第24条处理，但信托穿透标准不明确，无专门信托所得税；美国法以州公平分配和联邦税法（26 U.S.C. §671-679）处理，有FBAR/FATCA强制申报；香港法以Cap. 192第17条和'nuptial settlement'理论处理，离岸信托通常免税。美国法最严格，香港法最信托友好，中国法最不确定。

fact_summary: 离婚时养老金分割涉及个人所得税缴纳时点的争议。In divorce proceedings, a wife was awarded 50% of the husband's accumulated pension benefits; the pension administrator required immediate tax withholding on the division, while the wife argued tax should be deferred until actual distribution at retirement.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1062条，养老金属于夫妻共同财产。依据《最高人民法院关于适用〈中华人民共和国民法典〉婚姻家庭编的解释（一）》第80条，离婚时夫妻一方尚未退休、不符合领取养老保险金条件，另一方请求按照夫妻共同财产分割养老保险金的，人民法院不予支持。但婚后以夫妻共同财产缴纳的养老保险费，离婚时可分割账户中个人实际缴纳部分及利息。税务处理：养老金分割本身不触发个税，但退休领取时按'工资、薪金所得'纳税。
us_claim: Pension division in divorce: QDRO (Qualified Domestic Relations Order) under ERISA (29 U.S.C. §1056(d)(3)) and 26 U.S.C. §414(p); tax-deferred transfer to IRA or similar plan; no immediate tax on division if properly rolled over. Taxable upon distribution under 26 U.S.C. §72. Key case: Boggs v. Boggs, 520 U.S. 833 (1997) (ERISA preemption of state community property law). 10% early withdrawal penalty under §72(t) if under age 59½.
hk_claim: Pension/provident fund division in divorce: MPF assets may be considered matrimonial property under Cap. 192 and subject to adjustment orders. Transfer of MPF benefits on divorce under Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Ordinance (Cap. 485) §33B (since 2022). Tax treatment: MPF withdrawals generally tax-free in Hong Kong. No QDRO equivalent; court orders direct adjustment of assets rather than splitting pension rights.
notes: 三法域对离婚养老金分割的税务处理有对应性。中国法以民法典婚姻家庭编解释（一）第80条限制未退休养老金分割，退休领取时纳税；美国法以ERISA+QDRO制度（26 U.S.C. §414(p)）处理分割，递延纳税至领取时；香港法以Cap. 485第33B条（2022年引入）处理MPF分割，香港MPF提取免税。美国法最精细（QDRO制度），中国法限制最多，香港法最税务友好（免税）。

fact_summary: 夫妻一方在婚姻关系存续期间继承的遗产，离婚时另一方主张分割，同时涉及遗产税。A husband inherited a $5M estate from his father during the marriage; the wife claimed a share in divorce proceedings, while the estate was subject to inheritance tax in the father's jurisdiction (UK) but not in the couple's residence jurisdiction (China).
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1062条和第1063条，继承或受赠的财产原则上属于夫妻共同财产，但遗嘱或赠与合同中确定只归一方的除外。婚后继承的财产，若无遗嘱明确排除配偶，应认定为夫妻共同财产。中国目前未开征遗产税。
us_claim: Marital property: inherited property generally separate under state law unless commingled or transmuted (e.g., California Family Code §852). Inheritance tax: federal estate tax under 26 U.S.C. §2001 (exemption $13.61M for 2024); state estate/inheritance taxes vary. Key case: United States v. Perkins, 163 U.S. 625 (1896) (estate tax on property of nonresident alien). Spousal elective share statutes (e.g., Uniform Probate Code §2-201).
hk_claim: Inheritance in divorce: generally separate property under common law, but may be considered in needs-based adjustment under Cap. 192. Hong Kong abolished estate duty in 2006; no inheritance tax. Property division in divorce governed by LKW v. DD principles and reasonable needs of parties. No forced heirship or spousal elective share in Hong Kong. Common law testamentary freedom applies.
notes: 三法域对婚内继承财产离婚分割与遗产税的处理差异显著。中国法以《民法典》第1062/1063条处理继承财产归属，无遗产税；美国法以州婚姻法处理（继承财产通常为个人财产），但有联邦遗产税（26 U.S.C. §2001）和州遗产税；香港法以普通法处理离婚财产调整，无遗产税（2006年废除）。美国法最复杂（联邦+州双层），中国法和香港法均无遗产税。

fact_summary: 离婚协议中约定房产归子女所有，但一方反悔主张撤销赠与，税务机关主张房产过户视同销售征税。In a divorce settlement, the couple agreed to transfer the marital home to their minor child; the husband later sought to revoke the 'gift' to the child, while the tax authority treated the transfer as a deemed sale at fair market value, assessing deed tax and potential income tax.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1087条，离婚时夫妻共同财产由双方协议处理。离婚协议中约定房产归子女所有的，具有法律约束力，一方反悔的，法院一般不予支持（《婚姻家庭编解释（一）》第69条）。房产过户至子女名下，依据《契税法》第6条，婚姻关系存续期间夫妻之间变更土地、房屋权属免征契税，但离婚时赠与子女是否免税存在争议，实践中通常需缴纳契税。个人所得税：因离婚财产分割过户免征（财税〔2009〕78号）。
us_claim: Property transfer to third-party children in divorce: generally enforceable as contract under state law; may be modified by court if not in child's best interests. Transfer tax: gift tax on donor under 26 U.S.C. §2501 if transfer exceeds annual exclusion; no gift tax between spouses. Transfer to child not incident to divorce: gift tax applies. Key case: Davis v. United States, 370 U.S. 65 (1962) (overruled by §1041). Real estate transfer taxes: state and local.
hk_claim: Property transfer to children in divorce: enforceable as contractual settlement under common law; court retains jurisdiction to vary orders affecting children's welfare. Stamp duty on property transfers under Stamp Duty Ordinance (Cap. 117); exemptions for intra-spousal transfers on divorce. Transfer to children not exempt; ad valorem stamp duty applies. No gift tax in Hong Kong. Court orders may direct sale and division rather than direct transfer to children.
notes: 三法域对离婚协议中房产赠与子女的税务处理差异大。中国法以《民法典》第1087条+婚姻家庭编解释（一）第69条支持协议效力，契税通常不免，但离婚分割过户免个税；美国法以合同法+联邦赠与税（26 U.S.C. §2501）处理，离婚配偶间转让免税（§1041），但赠与子女需缴赠与税；香港法以普通法合同+印花条例（Cap. 117）处理，配偶间离婚转让免印花税，但赠与子女不免税，无赠与税。差异在于美国有联邦赠与税，香港无赠与税但印花税适用于子女受让。

fact_summary: 一方在婚姻期间以个人名义借款用于家庭共同生活，离婚后主张该债务为共同债务，另一方主张仅为个人债务。A wife took out a personal loan of $100,000 in her sole name during the marriage to renovate the family home; after divorce, the lender sued both spouses, claiming the debt was marital under community property principles, while the husband argued he never signed the loan agreement.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1064条，夫妻双方共同签名或夫妻一方事后追认等共同意思表示所负的债务，以及夫妻一方在婚姻关系存续期间以个人名义为家庭日常生活需要所负的债务，属于夫妻共同债务。超出家庭日常生活需要的个人名义债务，不属于共同债务，但债权人能证明用于夫妻共同生活、共同生产经营或基于双方共同意思表示的除外。
us_claim: Marital debt: community property states (e.g., California Family Code §910) treat debts incurred during marriage for community benefit as community debts; separate property states follow contract law and require both spouses' signatures for joint liability (e.g., equitable distribution states). Key case: United States v. Mitchell, 403 U.S. 190 (1971) (federal tax liability and state marital property law). Bankruptcy: 11 U.S.C. §523(a)(5) domestic support obligations; §523(a)(15) property settlement debts.
hk_claim: Marital debt under common law: contract liability generally binds only the signing party; Cap. 192 courts may allocate debts in financial relief orders based on fairness and contribution. No automatic community debt concept in Hong Kong. Joint debts and joint accounts treated according to contract law. Bankruptcy Ordinance (Cap. 6) applies to individual debts; no specific marital debt discharge exemption comparable to US §523(a)(15).
notes: 三法域对婚内个人名义债务是否为共同债务的处理差异显著。中国法以《民法典》第1064条确立'共债共签'原则和日常生活需要推定，举证责任倒置；美国法以社区财产州（如California Family Code §910）和独立财产州双轨制处理；香港法以普通法合同相对性为主，Cap. 192法院仅能在经济救济命令中分配债务，无自动共同债务概念。中国法最成体系，美国法州际差异最大，香港法最保守。

fact_summary: 离婚后一方发现另一方在婚姻存续期间隐匿转移财产至境外，要求重新分割并追缴税款。After divorce, a wife discovered that her ex-husband had secretly transferred $2M in marital assets to a Singapore bank account during the marriage and failed to report the income or assets in divorce disclosures.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1092条，夫妻一方隐藏、转移、变卖、毁损、挥霍夫妻共同财产，或伪造夫妻共同债务企图侵占另一方财产的，在离婚分割夫妻共同财产时，对该方可以少分或不分。离婚后发现的，另一方可以向人民法院提起诉讼，请求再次分割夫妻共同财产。隐匿转移财产可能涉及逃税，税务机关可依据《税收征收管理法》第63条追缴税款和滞纳金。
us_claim: Post-divorce asset concealment: courts may set aside property settlements for fraud (e.g., Uniform Marriage and Divorce Act §306); contempt sanctions for nondisclosure. Tax: IRS may assess additional tax, penalties (26 U.S.C. §6651) and interest for unreported income; FBAR violations (31 U.S.C. §5314) carry civil and criminal penalties. Key case: Rosen v. Rosen, 2000 WL 346320 (Fla. App. 2000) (fraudulent concealment in divorce).
hk_claim: Post-divorce asset concealment: courts may vary financial relief orders if non-disclosure is established (Ladd v. Ladd [2008] HKCFA 39). Penal notice and committal for contempt may apply. Tax: Inland Revenue Department may assess tax on undisclosed income under Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap. 112); penalties for tax evasion under §80. No FBAR equivalent in Hong Kong, but cross-border exchange of information under CRS and tax treaties. Common law fraud remedies available.
notes: 三法域对离婚隐匿财产重新分割和税务追缴的处理路径一致。中国法以《民法典》第1092条+《税收征收管理法》第63条处理；美国法以州离婚法和联邦税法（26 U.S.C. §6651）+FBAR（31 U.S.C. §5314）处理；香港法以Ladd v. Ladd案和Cap. 112第80条处理。差异在于美国法有FBAR海外资产强制申报制度，中国法和香港法以CRS和税收协定为主要跨境信息工具。美国法处罚最严厉。

fact_summary: 夫妻一方在婚姻期间获得的股票期权，离婚时另一方主张分割行权收益，涉及行权时点与税务问题。A husband was granted 100,000 stock options by his employer during the marriage, vesting over four years; at divorce, only 50,000 had vested. The wife claimed half the value of all options, while the husband argued only vested options were divisible and taxation should be considered.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1062条，工资、奖金、劳务报酬和生产、经营、投资收益属于夫妻共同财产。婚后获得的股票期权，其收益性质为劳动报酬或投资收益，应认定为夫妻共同财产。司法实践中，以婚姻存续期间已行权或已归属部分为可分割财产，未归属部分通常不分割。行权时按'工资、薪金所得'缴纳个人所得税（《个人所得税法》第2条）。
us_claim: Stock options in divorce: vested options generally divisible marital property; unvested options may be divided based on time-rule or intrinsic value (e.g., Hug v. Hug, 154 Cal. App. 3d 780 (1984); Nelson v. Nelson, 936 P.2d 54 (Wash. App. 1997)). Tax: exercise of options triggers compensation income under 26 U.S.C. §83 and §421 (ISOs) or §83(b) election. Division by QDRO or constructive trust may defer tax. Key case: Baccanti v. Morton, 434 Mass. 441 (2001).
hk_claim: Stock options in divorce: may be considered matrimonial property under Cap. 192 if granted during marriage and related to employment during marriage. Vested and unvested options may be considered depending on fairness and contribution (LKW v. DD principles). Tax: share options and benefits are employment income under Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap. 112) §9(1)(a) and subject to salaries tax. Division by court order or agreement; no QDRO equivalent in Hong Kong.
notes: 三法域对离婚股票期权分割的处理有对应性。中国法以《民法典》第1062条处理，通常仅分割已归属部分，行权时按工资薪金纳税；美国法以州判例（Hug案、Nelson案）处理，有QDRO递延税制度；香港法以Cap. 192和LKW v. DD处理，无QDRO等价物，雇员股票期权按薪俸税（Cap. 112 §9）处理。美国法最精细（QDRO+§83(b)），中国法以司法实践为主，香港法最接近普通法。

fact_summary: 刑事证据排除规则中，通过非法电子监控获取的证据在三法域的可采性。A suspect's smartphone location data was obtained by police without a warrant through a cell-site simulator (Stingray); the data was used to place the suspect at the murder scene. The defense moved to suppress the evidence.
cn_claim: 依据《刑事诉讼法》第56条，采用刑讯逼供等非法方法收集的犯罪嫌疑人、被告人供述和采用暴力、威胁等非法方法收集的证人证言、被害人陈述，应当予以排除。收集物证、书证不符合法定程序，可能严重影响司法公正的，应当予以补正或者作出合理解释；不能补正或者作出合理解释的，对该证据应当予以排除。电子监控数据是否属于'物证'存在争议，若未经法定程序获取，可能被排除。
us_claim: Fourth Amendment exclusionary rule under Mapp v. Ohio, 367 U.S. 643 (1961) (incorporated to states); warrantless cell-site location information requires warrant under Carpenter v. United States, 585 U.S. __ (2018) (138 S.Ct. 2206). Stingray devices: generally require warrant under Fourth Amendment and FCC regulations. Fruit of the poisonous tree doctrine: Wong Sun v. United States, 371 U.S. 471 (1963). Good faith exception: United States v. Leon, 468 U.S. 897 (1984).
hk_claim: Common law exclusionary rule: evidence obtained in violation of constitutional rights or by unlawful means may be excluded (R v. Sang [1980] AC 402; R v. Khan [1997] AC 558). Interception of communications regulated by Interception of Communications and Surveillance Ordinance (Cap. 589); unauthorized interception generally inadmissible. Evidence obtained by illegal means may still be admitted under common law discretion if court determines fairness permits admission (R v. Sang). PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong precedent on Stingray/cell-site data admissibility.
notes: 三法域对非法电子监控获取证据的排除规则存在显著碰撞。美国法以第四修正案+Mapp案（排除规则）+Carpenter案（位置数据需令状）构建严格排除规则，且有'毒树之果'（Wong Sun案）和'善意例外'（Leon案）；中国法以《刑事诉讼法》第56条排除非法言词证据，物证排除有'补正/解释'例外；香港法以普通法（R v. Sang）和Cap. 589处理，法官有更大裁量权决定公平性是否允许采纳。美国法排除最严格，中国法对物证最宽松，香港法最依赖法官裁量。

fact_summary: 跨境引渡中，被请求国以死刑不引渡原则拒绝引渡，请求国承诺不执行死刑的效力。A Chinese national committed murder in China and fled to the US; China requested extradition under the China-US extradition treaty. The US sought assurances against the death penalty under the treaty and domestic law (18 U.S.C. §3196).
cn_claim: 依据《引渡法》第50条，被请求国就准予引渡附加条件的，对于不损害中华人民共和国主权、国家利益、公共利益的，可以由外交部代表中华人民共和国政府向被请求国作出承诺。对于限制追诉的承诺，由最高人民检察院决定；对于量刑的承诺，由最高人民法院决定。依据《刑法》第48条，死刑只适用于罪行极其严重的犯罪分子。引渡承诺具有法律约束力，违反承诺可能影响未来引渡合作。
us_claim: Extradition treaties: 18 U.S.C. §3181-3196 governs extradition from US; death penalty assurance may be required by treaty or Secretary of State discretion. Supreme Court: extradition does not violate due process if assurance is given (Chevron v. Naranjo, 493 U.S. 1005 (1990) (mem.)). Assurances are executive commitments; domestic courts may enforce or defer to political branches. Key case: Demjanjuk v. Petrovsky, 776 F.2d 571 (6th Cir. 1985) (denaturalization and extradition).
hk_claim: Fugitive Offenders Ordinance (Cap. 503) §3 and §23: extradition governed by agreements and ordinances. Death penalty is abolished in Hong Kong (since 1993). Extradition to jurisdictions with death penalty generally requires assurance against imposition. Common law principles of specialty and non-refoulement. Key case: Re C (A Minor) [1989] HKLR 186. Fugitive surrender to mainland China: controversy under 2019 extradition bill amendments (subsequently withdrawn).
notes: 三法域对死刑不引渡原则的处理有对应性但差异显著。中国法以《引渡法》第50条和《刑法》第48条处理，外交部/最高检/最高法分别作出承诺；美国法以18 U.S.C. §3181-3196和条约处理，行政承诺由国务卿作出；香港法以Cap. 503和普通法处理，香港已废除死刑（1993年），引渡需不判处死刑保证。差异在于香港已废除死刑，引渡标准更严格；美国法允许死刑州但引渡承诺由联邦行政作出；中国法有层级化的承诺决定机制。

fact_summary: 认罪协商中被告的供述在后续审判中的可采性，以及辩诉撤回后的程序保障。A defendant pled guilty to drug trafficking in a plea agreement with the prosecution; after sentencing, he sought to withdraw the plea, claiming his attorney coerced him into the plea and failed to investigate exculpatory evidence. The prosecution sought to use his plea statements at trial after withdrawal.
cn_claim: 依据《刑事诉讼法》第15条，犯罪嫌疑人、被告人自愿如实供述自己的罪行，承认指控的犯罪事实，愿意接受处罚的，可以依法从宽处理。认罪认罚从宽制度中，犯罪嫌疑人签署认罪认罚具结书后，若无正当理由反悔，检察机关可撤回从宽量刑建议，但已作出的供述仍可作为证据使用（《刑事诉讼法》第201条）。被告人撤回认罪认罚的，法院应依法审理。
us_claim: Plea bargaining under Fed. R. Crim. P. 11; withdrawal of guilty plea permitted before sentencing if 'fair and just reason' (Fed. R. Crim. P. 11(d)(2)(B)); after sentencing, withdrawal extremely difficult. Plea statements inadmissible if plea withdrawn under Fed. R. Evid. 410 (plea negotiations inadmissible). Ineffective assistance claim: Strickland v. Washington, 466 U.S. 668 (1984). Key case: Brady v. United States, 397 U.S. 742 (1970) (voluntary and intelligent plea standard).
hk_claim: Plea bargaining in Hong Kong: common law and statutory (Criminal Procedure Ordinance, Cap. 221) recognize plea negotiation. No formal plea bargaining statute comparable to US Fed. R. Crim. P. 11. Plea withdrawal before sentencing may be permitted if plea not voluntary. After sentencing, leave to appeal required. Statements made during plea negotiations generally inadmissible as unfair to use if plea rejected (R v. Turner [1970] 2 QB 321). Ineffective assistance: common law principles of fair trial under Basic Law Art. 35 and Cap. 221.
notes: 三法域对认罪协商/认罚撤回后供述可采性的处理有对应性。中国法以《刑事诉讼法》第15条和第201条处理认罪认罚从宽，撤回后供述仍可用；美国法以Fed. R. Crim. P. 11和Fed. R. Evid. 410处理，撤回后 plea negotiation 供述不可采（保护自愿性）；香港法以普通法（R v. Turner）处理，谈判中供述若认罪被撤回通常不可采。差异在于美国法最严格保护被告（Fed. R. Evid. 410），中国法允许使用已作出的供述，香港法接近普通法。

fact_summary: 死刑复核程序中，被告在复核期间新提出证据，复核法院的处理方式。A defendant sentenced to death for intentional homicide submitted new evidence during the Supreme People's Court death penalty review: a video recording allegedly proving his alibi at the time of the crime, which was not discovered until after the second-instance trial.
cn_claim: 依据《刑事诉讼法》第247条和第251条，死刑复核案件由最高人民法院审理。最高人民法院复核死刑案件，应当讯问被告人，辩护律师提出要求的，应当听取辩护律师的意见。在复核期间，最高人民检察院可以向最高人民法院提出意见。最高人民法院对证据有疑问的，可以对证据进行调查核实。但法律未明确规定复核阶段是否可开庭审理或传唤新证人。
us_claim: Capital punishment: no federal death penalty review comparable to China's Supreme People's Court mandatory review. State post-conviction relief (habeas corpus) under 28 U.S.C. §2254; newly discovered evidence under Fed. R. Crim. P. 33 (new trial motion) and Brady v. Maryland, 373 U.S. 83 (1963) (exculpatory evidence). Ineffective assistance of counsel claims under Strickland v. Washington, 466 U.S. 668 (1984). Clemency/executive pardon as final remedy. No mandatory federal appellate review of state death sentences beyond direct appeal and certiorari.
hk_claim: Death penalty abolished in Hong Kong (since 1993); no death penalty review procedure. For life imprisonment and other serious sentences: Court of Appeal (Cap. 221) hears appeals; Criminal Appeal Rules (Cap. 221A) govern procedure. New evidence on appeal: leave to adduce fresh evidence granted if 'interests of justice' (R v. Parks [1961] 1 WLR 1484). No specific mandatory review for capital cases since abolition. Court of Final Appeal for final appeals.
notes: 三法域对死刑复核程序存在根本不对称。中国法有独特的最高人民法院死刑复核程序（《刑事诉讼法》第247-251条），专门性最强；美国法无联邦死刑复核，各州以直接上诉+ habeas corpus（28 U.S.C. §2254）+ executive clemency处理；香港法已废除死刑（1993年），无对应程序。三法域在死刑问题上存在法域根本差异：中国保留死刑+专门复核；美国保留死刑但联邦化程度低；香港废除死刑。

fact_summary: 电子取证中，服务器位于境外但由国内公司运营，执法机关远程取证的管辖权与程序合法性。A Chinese gaming company operated a platform with servers in Singapore; Chinese law enforcement remotely accessed the Singapore servers to obtain user chat logs as evidence in a criminal fraud investigation without seeking Singaporean judicial assistance.
cn_claim: 依据《刑事诉讼法》第54条和第134条，公安机关有权向有关单位和个人收集、调取证据。但对于境外服务器数据，远程取证是否属于'搜查'或'勘验'存在争议。依据《国际刑事司法协助法》第25条，请求国向被请求国提出调取电子数据请求，被请求国认为请求符合其国内法规定的，可以协助执行。未经司法协助程序直接远程访问境外服务器，可能违反服务器所在地法律，证据合法性存疑。
us_claim: Fourth Amendment and international law: extraterritorial application of US law enforcement is limited by sovereignty principles. Mutual Legal Assistance Treaties (MLATs) govern cross-border evidence collection. Unilateral remote access to foreign servers may violate foreign law and international comity. CLOUD Act (18 U.S.C. §2713) permits US providers to disclose data regardless of location, but foreign providers not covered. Key case: Microsoft Corp. v. United States, 584 U.S. __ (2018) (138 S.Ct. 1186) (warrant cannot compel production of foreign-stored data from US provider without MLAT).
hk_claim: Cross-border evidence: mutual legal assistance governed by Fugitive Offenders and Mutual Legal Assistance in Criminal Matters Ordinance (Cap. 525). Remote access to foreign servers without local consent may violate foreign law and Hong Kong common law principles. Court may admit evidence obtained abroad if fair and not contrary to public policy (R v. Sang [1980] AC 402). Electronic evidence admissibility under common law and statutory provisions (Cap. 221, Evidence Ordinance Cap. 8). No specific statute on remote server access without MLAT in Hong Kong.
notes: 三法域对境外服务器远程取证的处理差异显著。中国法以《刑事诉讼法》第54条和《国际刑事司法协助法》第25条处理，实践中远程取证程序合法性不明确；美国法以CLOUD Act（18 U.S.C. §2713）+Microsoft v. US案（2018）处理，美国提供商可被强制披露，但外国提供商不适用；香港法以Cap. 525和普通法处理，依赖MLAT。差异在于美国CLOUD Act对本国提供商有特殊权力，中国和香港更依赖MLAT。三法域均面临跨境数据主权冲突。

fact_summary: 刑事诉讼中证人保护程序，跨境证人作证的身份隐匿与对质权冲突。A key witness in an organized crime trial was granted anonymity and testified via video link from a safe house in a third country. The defense argued that the defendant's Sixth Amendment confrontation right (or common law equivalent) required face-to-face cross-examination.
cn_claim: 依据《刑事诉讼法》第64条，对于危害国家安全犯罪、恐怖活动犯罪、黑社会性质的组织犯罪、毒品犯罪等案件，证人、鉴定人、被害人因在诉讼中作证，本人或者其近亲属的人身安全面临危险的，人民法院、人民检察院和公安机关应当采取保护措施。证人保护包括不公开真实姓名、住址和工作单位等个人信息（《刑事诉讼法》第64条第2款）。但匿名作证与被告人对质权的平衡依赖法院裁量。
us_claim: Confrontation Clause: Sixth Amendment guarantees right to confront witnesses; Crawford v. Washington, 541 U.S. 36 (2004) (testimonial hearsay inadmissible unless witness unavailable and defendant had prior opportunity for cross-examination). Anonymous witnesses: generally violates Confrontation Clause (Smith v. Illinois, 390 U.S. 129 (1968)), but may be permitted with protective measures if necessity is demonstrated (United States v. Owens, 484 U.S. 554 (1988)). Video testimony: may satisfy Confrontation Clause if defense can cross-examine effectively (Maryland v. Craig, 497 U.S. 836 (1990)).
hk_claim: Witness anonymity: common law right to fair trial and confrontation (R v. Lord Saville of Newdigate ex p. A [1999] 1 WLR 1855; R v. Davis [2008] UKHL 36). Anonymous witnesses generally permitted only if necessary and proportionate under Human Rights Act 1998 (UK) and common law fairness principles. Video testimony: Criminal Procedure Ordinance (Cap. 221) §65B permits live television links for vulnerable witnesses; overseas witnesses may testify by video link. Court must balance witness protection against defendant's right to fair trial (R v. Davis).
notes: 三法域对匿名证人作证与对质权冲突的处理有对应性。中国法以《刑事诉讼法》第64条保护证人，但匿名作证与对质权平衡依赖法院裁量；美国法以第六修正案对抗条款（Crawford v. Washington案）严格限制匿名证人，但允许视频作证（Maryland v. Craig案）；香港法以普通法（R v. Davis案）和Cap. 221第65B条处理，平衡证人保护和公平审判。美国法对被告对质权保护最强，中国法最依赖法院裁量，香港法接近英国法。

fact_summary: 刑事附带民事诉讼中，被害人同时提起民事赔偿和刑事追偿，判决执行中的优先顺位。A victim of a violent robbery filed both a criminal prosecution and a civil claim for damages in the same proceeding; the criminal court ordered the defendant to pay $100,000 in restitution, while the civil court ordered $150,000 in compensatory damages. The defendant had only $120,000 in assets.
cn_claim: 依据《刑事诉讼法》第101条，被害人由于被告人的犯罪行为而遭受物质损失的，在刑事诉讼过程中，有权提起附带民事诉讼。依据《最高人民法院关于适用〈中华人民共和国刑事诉讼法〉的解释》第192条，附带民事诉讼赔偿范围包括医疗费、护理费、交通费等实际损失。刑事追偿（追缴违法所得）与民事赔偿的优先顺位：依据《刑法》第64条，犯罪分子违法所得的一切财物，应当予以追缴或者责令退赔。刑事追偿优先于民事赔偿，但被害人的物质损失赔偿在退赔后优先于罚金。
us_claim: Criminal restitution under Mandatory Victims Restitution Act (MVRA, 18 U.S.C. §3663A) and Victim and Witness Protection Act (VWPA, 18 U.S.C. §3663); civil damages separate proceeding. Priority: restitution generally takes priority over civil judgment in federal system (18 U.S.C. §3664(m)). State law varies; some states give restitution priority, others give civil judgments priority. Double recovery prohibited. Key case: United States v. Baggett, 890 F.3d 1094 (9th Cir. 2018).
hk_claim: Criminal compensation: courts may order compensation under Criminal Procedure Ordinance (Cap. 221) §84; victim may also pursue civil claim. Compensation order takes priority over fine but not necessarily over civil judgment. Civil claims governed by common law and civil procedure. No specific statutory priority scheme for criminal restitution over civil damages in Hong Kong. Bankruptcy/insolvency: criminal fines and compensation orders may be provable debts in insolvency. Common law rules on priority of judgment creditors apply.
notes: 三法域对刑事追偿与民事赔偿优先顺位的处理存在差异。中国法以《刑法》第64条确立刑事追偿优先，但被害人物质损失赔偿在退赔后优先于罚金；美国法以MVRA（18 U.S.C. §3663A）和州法处理，联邦系统刑事追偿优先但各州不一；香港法以Cap. 221第84条和普通法处理，无明确刑事追偿优先于民事赔偿的规定。中国法最明确，美国法联邦/州双层最复杂，香港法最依赖普通法。

fact_summary: 刑事速裁程序中，被告自愿认罪但量刑建议明显畸轻，法院是否可突破量刑建议加重处罚。A defendant in a summary procedure case pled guilty to theft and accepted the prosecutor's recommendation of six months' imprisonment; the trial court found the recommendation manifestly too lenient given the defendant's prior record and sentenced him to two years.
cn_claim: 依据《刑事诉讼法》第222条和第201条，适用速裁程序审理案件，人民法院应当在受理后十日以内审结。被告人认罪认罚的，人民法院一般应当采纳人民检察院指控的罪名和量刑建议。但有下列情形的除外：（一）被告人的行为不构成犯罪或者不应当追究其刑事责任的；（二）被告人违背意愿认罪认罚的；（三）被告人否认指控的犯罪事实的；（四）起诉指控的罪名与审理认定的罪名不一致的；（五）其他可能影响公正审判的情形。量刑建议明显不当的，法院可以建议检察院调整，检察院不调整的，法院依法判决。
us_claim: Plea bargaining: judge not bound by plea agreement under Fed. R. Crim. P. 11(c)(1); judge must independently determine sentence under 18 U.S.C. §3553(a). Prosecutor's recommendation is advisory (United States v. Booker, 543 U.S. 220 (2005)). Judge may reject plea agreement if sentence would not serve interests of justice (Fed. R. Crim. P. 11(c)(3)(B)). Key case: Bordenkircher v. Hayes, 434 U.S. 357 (1978) (plea bargaining constitutionality).
hk_claim: Plea negotiation in Hong Kong: common law practice; judge not bound by Crown's sentencing recommendation. Judge must independently assess sentence based on facts and guidelines (R v. Wong Tsz-hei [2012] 5 HKLRD 450). Sentencing guidelines and tariffs apply. Court may reject negotiated plea if it does not reflect gravity of offense (R v. Turner [1970] 2 QB 321). Judge ensures sentence is fair and proportionate; prosecutorial recommendation is not binding.
notes: 三法域对认罪认罚/协商中法院突破量刑建议的处理高度一致。中国法以《刑事诉讼法》第201条允许法院在量刑建议明显不当或法定例外情形下调整；美国法以Fed. R. Crim. P. 11(c)和United States v. Booker案确立法官独立量刑权，量刑建议仅为参考；香港法以普通法（R v. Wong Tsz-hei）和R v. Turner确立法官独立量刑，检控建议不具约束力。三法域均承认法官独立量刑权，但美国法有Booker案后量刑指南变化，中国法有速裁程序专门规定，香港法最依赖普通法。

fact_summary: 刑事审判中陪审团/参审员制度差异对事实认定程序的影响。A defendant charged with securities fraud in a multinational investigation faced trial in China (with people's assessors), the US (with a jury), and hypothetical extradition to Hong Kong (with jury). The evidentiary standards and composition of the fact-finding body differed significantly.
cn_claim: 依据《刑事诉讼法》第183条，基层人民法院、中级人民法院审判第一审案件，由审判员三人或者由审判员和人民陪审员共三人或者七人组成合议庭。人民陪审员与审判员有同等权利，但通常限于认定事实。人民陪审员制度适用'三人合议庭'或'七人合议庭'（《人民陪审员法》第14-16条）。
us_claim: Sixth Amendment right to jury trial in criminal cases (Duncan v. Louisiana, 391 U.S. 145 (1968)); jury must be impartial and representative (Batson v. Kentucky, 476 U.S. 79 (1986)).
