Federal jury: 12 members, unanimous verdict (Fed. R. Crim. P. 23); jury nullification not officially recognized but exists in practice. Sentencing: judge determines sentence (post-Booker advisory guidelines). Key case: Apprendi v. New Jersey, 530 U.S. 466 (2000) (jury must find facts increasing maximum sentence).
hk_claim: Jury trials in Hong Kong: Court of First Instance (Cap. 221) criminal trials by jury of 7 (or 9 in complex cases) under Jury Ordinance (Cap. 3). Judge directs jury on law; jury decides facts and verdict. Unanimous verdict required; majority verdict (7-2 or 8-1) permitted in extended deliberation (Cap. 3 §24). No equivalent to Chinese people's assessors; jury system inherited from British common law. Defendants may elect judge-only trial in some cases (Cap. 221).
notes: 三法域对刑事事实认定主体的差异是根本性的。中国法以审判员+人民陪审员（《刑事诉讼法》第183条+《人民陪审员法》）组成合议庭，人民陪审员与法官同权但通常限于事实认定；美国法以第六修正案陪审团（Duncan案）+12人一致裁决（Fed. R. Crim. P. 23）+法官量刑（Apprendi案）处理；香港法以Cap. 3陪审团（7人或9人）+一致裁决（或多数裁决）+普通法传统处理。差异在于中国法无真正陪审团，美国法陪审团权力最大（包括事实加重刑罚），香港法最接近英国传统。

fact_summary: 被告人因精神障碍不负刑事责任，但强制医疗程序与刑事程序的衔接。A defendant diagnosed with schizophrenia was found not criminally responsible for a serious assault; the prosecution sought involuntary civil commitment, while the defense argued the defendant should be released with outpatient treatment.
cn_claim: 依据《刑事诉讼法》第302-307条，实施暴力行为，危害公共安全或者严重危害公民人身安全，经法定程序鉴定依法不负刑事责任的精神病人，有继续危害社会可能的，可以予以强制医疗。强制医疗由人民法院决定，公安机关执行，人民检察院监督。被强制医疗的人及其近亲属有权申请解除强制医疗。
us_claim: Criminal insanity defense: M'Naghten Rule (M'Naghten's Case (1843) 10 Cl & Fin 200) or ALI/MPC test; acquittal by reason of insanity (18 U.S.C. §17). Post-acquittal commitment: Jones v. United States, 463 U.S. 354 (1983) (indefinite civil commitment permissible); Foucha v. Louisiana, 504 U.S. 71 (1992) (must be mentally ill and dangerous). State civil commitment statutes (e.g., 18 U.S.C. §4241-4248 for federal defendants). Key case: Kansas v. Hendricks, 521 U.S. 346 (1997) (civil commitment of sexually violent predators).
hk_claim: Insanity defense: M'Naghten Rule under common law (R v. M'Naghten (1843) 10 Cl & Fin 200). Acquittal on ground of insanity: subject to detention in mental hospital under order of Governor (Cap. 136 Mental Health Ordinance). Dangerousness assessment under Cap. 136 and Criminal Procedure Ordinance (Cap. 221). No specific statutory scheme comparable to China's compulsory medical treatment under criminal procedure. Mental health review tribunal under Cap. 136 reviews detention. Civil commitment under Cap. 136 §44.
notes: 三法域对精神病人不负刑事责任后的强制医疗程序差异显著。中国法以《刑事诉讼法》第302-307条建立专门强制医疗程序，法院决定、公安执行、检察监督；美国法以州法+联邦法（18 U.S.C. §4241-4248）+Jones案和Foucha案处理，强调精神病+危险性双重标准；香港法以Cap. 136精神健康条例和普通法（M'Naghten案）处理，总督可下令拘留。差异在于中国法有专门刑事诉讼法程序，美国法依赖州法和联邦宪法判例，香港法最接近英国普通法。

fact_summary: 知识产权跨境许可中，特许权使用费在中国源泉扣缴与在香港利润来源地认定的冲突。A Hong Kong company licensed a patent portfolio to a mainland Chinese subsidiary; the mainland tax authority withheld 10% withholding tax on royalties under the China-HK tax treaty (Article 12), while the Hong Kong IRD assessed the same royalties as Hong Kong-sourced profits subject to 16.5% profits tax.
cn_claim: 依据《企业所得税法》第37条，非居民企业取得来源于中国境内的特许权使用费，应当缴纳预提所得税，税率为10%（《企业所得税法实施条例》第91条）。依据内地与香港税收安排第12条，特许权使用费的征税权归于受益所有人居民所在一方（即香港），但来源地（中国）仍可按国内法税率（10%）源泉扣缴，香港给予税收抵免。双重征税通过税收抵免解决（税收安排第22条）。
us_claim: Royalty withholding tax under 26 U.S.C. §1441 (30% default, reduced by treaty) and §1442 for foreign corporations; treaty rates vary by treaty (e.g., US-China treaty Article 12: 10% for royalties). Royalties sourced where property is used or where payer is resident (26 U.S.C. §861(a)(4)). Transfer pricing adjustments under 26 U.S.C. §482 and §6662. Key case: Commissioner v. Wodehouse, 337 U.S. 369 (1949) (royalty sourcing).
hk_claim: Royalties: under Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap. 112) §15(1)(a), profits tax applies to profits arising in or derived from Hong Kong. Royalty income from licensing IP used in Hong Kong is generally Hong Kong-sourced. Under the China-HK tax arrangement (Article 12), royalty withholding tax limited to 10% in mainland China; Hong Kong may tax if Hong Kong-sourced but provides tax credit for mainland tax paid. Double taxation relief under arrangement Article 22. Transfer pricing under Cap. 112 §20 and DIPN 46 (Revised). PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific China-HK tax arrangement Article 12 rate.
notes:
三法域对跨境特许权使用费征税权分配有对应性但差异显著。中国法以《企业所得税法》第37条和税收安排第12条处理源泉扣缴，税率10%；美国法以26 U.S.C. §1441/§1442和税收协定处理，默认30%（协定可降低）；香港法以Cap. 112 §15(1)(a)利润来源地原则和税收安排处理。差异在于美国法默认扣缴率最高（30%），中国法与香港法在税收安排下为10%，但利润来源地认定标准不同（美国以使用地/居民地，香港以产生地）。税收抵免在三法域均适用。
FP-ip+tax-1672,ip+tax,转让定价中无形资产功能风险分析与利润归属的争议。A US tech company transferred its European trademark portfolio to a Swiss subsidiary for $1M; the IRS revalued the transfer at $50M using the discounted cash flow method, while the Chinese SAT (in a parallel investigation of the Chinese entity) concluded the trademark had no Chinese market value and rejected the IRS assessment.",依据《企业所得税法》第41条和《特别纳税调整实施办法（试行）》（国税发〔2009〕2号）第20-23条，企业与其关联方之间的业务往来，不符合独立交易原则而减少企业或者其关联方应纳税收入或者所得额的，税务机关有权按照合理方法调整。无形资产转让定价适用可比非受控价格法、利润分割法、交易净利润法等。中国税务机关对无形资产地域性价值有特殊认定（如6号公告关于无形资产市场溢价和地域性特殊优势）。,Transfer pricing under 26 U.S.C. §482 and Treasury Regulations §1.482-1 through §1.482-7; intangible property transfers under §1.482-4 (comparable uncontrolled transaction method), §1.482-5 (comparable profits method), and §1.482-6 (profit split method). Cost sharing arrangements under §1.482-7. Key cases: Veritas Software Corp. v. Commissioner, 133 T.C. 297 (2009); Amazon.com, Inc. v. Commissioner, 148 T.C. 108 (2017). OECD Transfer Pricing Guidelines (2022) adopted by US through regulations.,Transfer pricing under Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap. 112) §20 and §20A; DIPN 46 (Revised) and DIPN 47 apply OECD Transfer Pricing Guidelines. Intangible property transfers: arm's length principle applies; no specific statutory transfer pricing method prescribed beyond arm's length. Inland Revenue Department follows OECD Guidelines for intangible transactions. No specific statutory cost sharing arrangement rules comparable to US §1.482-7 in Hong Kong. Common law principle of substance over form applies.,TRI_JURISDICTION_PARTIAL,True,False,三法域对无形资产转让定价的规制差异显著。美国法以26 U.S.C. §482和详尽财政规章（§1.482-1至§1.482-7）规制，有丰富判例（Veritas案、Amazon案）；中国法以《企业所得税法》第41条+国税发〔2009〕2号+6号公告规制，强调地域性特殊优势；香港法以Cap. 112 §20和税务局释义及执行指引（DIPN 46/47）规制，主要遵循OECD指引，无成文专门方法。美国法最精细，中国法最强调地域性价值，香港法最灵活但确定性最低。
FP-ip+tax-1673,ip+tax,专利盒制度下，知识产权收入的优惠税率与研发支出关联比例（nexus approach）的合规争议。A pharmaceutical company claimed patent box relief in Hong Kong (5% rate under 2024 amendments) on $50M in qualifying IP income; the IRD challenged the nexus ratio, arguing that 60% of R&D was outsourced to a non-HK related party in Singapore, which under the nexus approach rendered 60% of the income ineligible for the concessionary rate.",依据《中华人民共和国企业所得税法》第28条，国家需要重点扶持的高新技术企业，减按15%的税率征收企业所得税。但中国目前无'专利盒'制度。2024年香港修订《税务条例》（第112章）引入专利盒制度，优惠税率5%（《2024年税务（修订）（知识产权收入的税务宽减）条例》）。关联比例要求依据OECD nexus approach：符合条件的研发支出须与合格知识产权直接相关，外包给非香港居民关联方的研发支出不计入分子。若外包研发占比60%，则关联比例为40%，仅40%的合格知识产权收入可享受5%税率。,US: no federal patent box regime; R&D tax credit under 26 U.S.C. §41 (credit against regular tax). State-level patent boxes in some states (e.g., Connecticut, Louisiana). No federal nexus approach for IP income. Transfer pricing and intangible income taxation under 26 U.S.C. §367(d) and §482. Key legislative history: 2017 TCJA moved toward territorial taxation with GILTI (26 U.S.C. §951A) and FDII (26 U.S.C. §250) rather than patent box. OECD BEPS Action 5 and modified nexus approach adopted by US through GILTI and foreign tax credit provisions.,Hong Kong patent box: Inland Revenue (Amendment) (Tax Concessions for Intellectual Property Income) Ordinance 2024 (amending Cap. 112). Concessionary tax rate of 5% on qualifying IP income (Schedule 17FD). Nexus approach: nexus ratio = eligible R&D expenditure / overall R&D expenditure; eligible R&D excludes outsourcing to non-HK resident associated persons (Cap. 112 Schedule 17FD §6). FP-ip+tax-1674,ip+tax,商标转让中，商标权与商誉分离估值的税务处理争议。A global retailer sold its trademark portfolio (but not the underlying business) to a Luxembourg holding company for $100M; the Chinese tax authority challenged the valuation, arguing the trademark was worthless without the associated goodwill and customer relationships, and assessed the transfer as a disguised distribution of profits.",依据《企业所得税法》第41条和《特别纳税调整实施办法》第20-23条，关联方之间的商标转让应符合独立交易原则。若商标与商誉不可分割，单独转让商标可能被认定为不具有商业合理性，税务机关有权进行特别纳税调整。依据《商标法》第42条，商标转让须经核准公告。商标转让涉及的增值税按'销售无形资产'6%税率（财税〔2016〕36号）。,Trademark valuation: transfer pricing under 26 U.S.C. §482 and §1.482-4; goodwill and going concern value may be allocated between tangible and intangible assets under §1.1060-1. FP-ip+tax-1675,ip+tax,跨境软件许可中，SaaS模式被认定为软件销售还是服务提供的增值税/营业税差异。A US software company provided cloud-based accounting software to Chinese customers via browser access (no download); the Chinese tax authority classified the transaction as 'software product' subject to 13% VAT, while the company argued it was a 'software service' subject to 6% VAT.",依据《财政部 国家税务总局关于软件产品增值税政策的通知》（财税〔2011〕100号），软件产品增值税一般纳税人销售其自行开发生产的软件产品，按13%税率征收增值税后，对其增值税实际税负超过3%的部分实行即征即退。软件服务按6%税率（财税〔2016〕36号附件《销售服务、无形资产、不动产注释》）。SaaS模式是否属于'软件产品'还是'软件服务'存在争议：若客户仅获得访问权而未取得软件复制件，倾向于认定为服务（6%）；若涉及软件交付或授权，可能被认定为软件产品（13%）。,US: software as a service (SaaS) generally treated as a service for sales tax purposes in most states, not a tangible good; some states tax SaaS as tangible personal property (e.g., Connecticut, Hawaii). FP-ip+tax-1678,ip+tax,企业重组中知识产权剥离的税务中性要求。A multinational group spun off its software division into a separate listed entity, transferring patents, copyrights, and trade secrets; the Chinese SAT approved the transaction as a qualified corporate restructuring under Caishui [2009] No. 59 (special tax treatment), while the US IRS challenged the valuation and allocation of intangibles under §367(d) and §482.",依据《财政部 国家税务总局关于企业重组业务企业所得税处理若干问题的通知》（财税〔2009〕59号），符合条件的企业重组可选择特殊性税务处理，即股权支付部分暂不确认资产转让所得或损失。知识产权作为无形资产参与重组，若满足'具有合理商业目的'、'股权支付比例不低于85%'等条件，可适用特殊性税务处理。企业分立中，被分立企业所有股东按原持股比例取得分立企业的股权，暂不确认所得。依据《国家税务总局公告2010年第4号》，特殊性税务处理需向主管税务机关备案。,US: tax-free reorganization under 26 U.S.C. §368 (various types: A, B, C, D, etc.); spin-offs under §355. FP-ip+tax-1679,ip+tax,知识产权在海关保护中的边境扣押与进口环节增值税处理。Chinese customs detained a shipment of smartphones suspected of infringing a Chinese patent held by a local company; the importer claimed the goods were not infringing and demanded release, while the patent holder sought both destruction of the goods and assessment of import VAT on the seized goods as if they were legitimate imports.",依据《知识产权海关保护条例》第12-23条，知识产权权利人可以向海关总署申请知识产权备案，海关发现进出口货物有侵犯备案知识产权嫌疑的，可依职权或依申请扣留侵权嫌疑货物。被扣留的侵权嫌疑货物，经海关调查后认定侵犯知识产权的，由海关予以没收。进口环节增值税：若货物被认定为侵权，通常不允许进口，不存在合法进口增值税。但若侵权货物被没收后拍卖（《知识产权海关保护条例》第27条），拍卖所得可能涉及相关税费。税务处理取决于货物最终处置方式。,US: importation of articles infringing US patent prohibited under 19 U.S.C. §1337 (ITC Section 337 investigation); customs may exclude infringing imports under 19 U.S.C. §1595a. No statutory basis adjustment for R&D expenditure against subsequent royalty income. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong R&D deduction rules.,TRI_JURISDICTION_PARTIAL,False,False,三法域对研发支出加计扣除与知识产权商业化收入的税务衔接差异大。中国法以财税2023年7号公告提供100%加计扣除（费用化）或200%摊销（资本化），特许权使用费收入单独计税；美国法以§174（5年摊销）+§41（R&D税收抵免）处理，自创专利basis为零；香港法无专门R&D加计扣除或税收抵免，R&D费用一般依§16(1)扣除，2024年专利盒提供5%税率但不关联R&D扣除。中国法对R&D激励最强（200%摊销），美国法最复杂（§174+§41），香港法最薄弱（无专门R&D税收优惠）。
FP-corporate+tax-1681,corporate+tax,VIE架构跨境利润转移中，境内运营实体向境外壳公司支付服务费被税务机关认定为不具有合理商业目的。A variable interest entity (VIE) structure was used to list a Chinese ed-tech company in the US; the Chinese operating company paid $100M annually in 'technical service fees' to the Cayman holding company's WFOE, which the Chinese tax authority recharacterized as disguised profit distribution under anti-avoidance rules.",依据《企业所得税法》第41条（转让定价）和第45条（受控外国企业），以及《特别纳税调整实施办法（试行）》（国税发〔2009〕2号），企业向关联方支付不符合独立交易原则的服务费，税务机关有权按合理方法调整。若VIE架构的唯一目的是境外上市而非真实业务需要，服务费支付可能被认定为不具有合理商业目的（《企业所得税法实施条例》第120条），面临纳税调整、利息和罚款（税收征管法第63-64条）。VIE架构本身在中国法下处于灰色地带，合同控制效力依赖司法实践。,VIE structures under US GAAP: consolidation under ASC 810 (variable interest entity model). Transfer pricing under 26 U.S.C. §482. No specific US anti-VIE tax statute; VIE structures treated as corporate form. Subpart F (26 U.S.C. §951-964) and GILTI (§951A) tax US shareholders on controlled foreign corporation (CFC) income. BEAT (26 U.S.C. §59A) imposes minimum tax on base-eroding payments to foreign affiliates. Key case: SEC enforcement on VIE disclosures (e.g., Alibaba Group filings). IRS transfer pricing challenges under §482 and §6662. No specific VIE recharacterization under US tax law; general economic substance and anti-abuse doctrines apply.,VIE structures not specifically recognized under Hong Kong law. Offshore company listings on HKEX: VIE structures generally accepted for listing purposes (e.g., HKEX Listing Decision LD43-3) but require disclosure and contractual arrangements. Transfer pricing under Cap. 112 §20. No specific anti-VIE tax rule in Hong Kong; general anti-avoidance under §61. Profits tax: if WFOE in Hong Kong, service fees must be arm's length. Offshore companies generally not subject to Hong Kong profits tax if no Hong Kong-sourced income. No CFC or GILTI equivalent in Hong Kong. Contractual control arrangements enforceable under common law but may be challenged as sham. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific HKEX VIE guidance.,COLLISION,True,False,三法域对VIE架构税务处理存在显著碰撞。中国法以《企业所得税法》第41条/第45条+国税发〔2009〕2号进行转让定价调整和CFC规则，VIE架构处于灰色地带；美国法以ASC 810会计确认+§482转让定价+§951A GILTI+§59A BEAT处理，无专门VIE反避税规则；香港法以Cap. 112 §20转让定价+§61一般反避税+HKEX上市指引（LD43-3）处理，无CFC/GILTI/BEAT等价物。差异在于中国法对VIE税务挑战最激进，美国法对VIE会计和税收规制最全面，香港法对离岸VIE公司最税务友好（无利润税）。

fact_summary: 离岸公司利润转移至低税率管辖区，触发三法域受控外国企业（CFC）或反避税规则。A Hong Kong holding company wholly owned a BVI subsidiary that earned $50M in passive royalty income from licensing patents to European customers; the BVI subsidiary paid no tax in BVI, and the Hong Kong parent claimed the income was foreign-sourced and not taxable in Hong Kong. The Chinese tax authority (where the ultimate beneficial owner was resident) asserted CFC taxation.
cn_claim: 依据《企业所得税法》第45条和《特别纳税调整实施办法（试行）》第76-84条，中国居民企业或中国居民控制的设立在实际税负明显低于25%税率水平的国家（地区）的企业，并非由于合理的经营需要而对利润不作分配或者减少分配的，其利润中应归属于该居民企业的部分，应当计入该居民企业的当期收入。BVI实际税负为0%，低于25%的50%（12.5%），构成CFC。但需同时满足'控制'标准（居民企业或居民个人直接/间接持有10%以上表决权，且共同持有50%以上）和'非合理经营需要'标准。
us_claim: CFC rules under 26 U.S.C. §951-964 (Subpart F): US shareholders of CFCs taxed on pro rata share of Subpart F income (passive income, related-party sales, etc.) regardless of distribution. GILTI (§951A) taxes global intangible low-taxed income at 10.5% effective rate (post-TCJA). Check-the-box regulations (Treas. Reg. §301.7701-3) allow disregarded entity treatment. Key case: Whitaker v. Commissioner, 259 F.3d 1077 (9th Cir. 2001). Anti-deferral regime: PFIC (26 U.S.C. §1291-1298) for non-CFC foreign corporations. BVI entities: generally treated as corporations under US law unless entity classification election made.
hk_claim: Hong Kong: no CFC rules under domestic tax law. Foreign-sourced income generally not taxable in Hong Kong under territorial system (Cap. 112 §8). Royalty income from licensing patents to European customers: if patents are managed and exploited outside Hong Kong, income may be foreign-sourced and exempt from profits tax. No GILTI or Subpart F equivalent. However, anti-avoidance provision §61 applies if transaction is artificial or fictitious. Transfer pricing §20 requires arm's length for intra-group transactions. No statutory attribution of BVI subsidiary income to Hong Kong parent solely based on control. BEPS Action 3 (CFC rules) not yet implemented in Hong Kong. PENDING_VERIFICATION: current Hong Kong position on BEPS Action 3 implementation.
notes: 三法域在CFC规则上存在显著不对称。中国法以《企业所得税法》第45条+国税发〔2009〕2号第76-84条建立了CFC制度（实际税负低于12.5%+控制标准+非合理经营需要）；美国法以Subpart F（26 U.S.C. §951-964）+GILTI（§951A）+PFIC（§1291-1298）构建了最复杂的反避税体系；香港法无CFC规则，外地来源收入免税（Cap. 112 §8），仅§61一般反避税和§20转让定价。差异在于香港法是三法域中对离岸利润最友好的司法管辖区（无CFC/GILTI），美国法反避税最严厉，中国法居中但逐步趋严。

fact_summary: 公司重组中股权/资产收购的税务中性选择：递延纳税与即时征税的边界。A Chinese conglomerate restructured its real estate and tech subsidiaries into a holding company structure; the transaction was structured as a share-for-share exchange with tax deferral under Caishui [2009] No. 59 special reorganization rules. The tax authority challenged whether the reorganization had 'reasonable business purpose' and whether the 85% equity payment threshold was met when contingent consideration was included.
cn_claim: 依据《财政部 国家税务总局关于企业重组业务企业所得税处理若干问题的通知》（财税〔2009〕59号）第5-7条，企业重组适用特殊性税务处理需同时满足五个条件：(1)具有合理商业目的；(2)被收购、合并或分立部分的资产或股权比例符合规定（75%或85%）；(3)企业重组后12个月内不改变重组资产原来的实质性经营活动；(4)股权支付金额符合比例要求（不低于交易支付总额的85%）；(5)原主要股东在重组后连续12个月内不得转让所取得的股权。若对价包含或有对价（contingent consideration），其股权支付比例的计算存在争议，实践中通常以重组日的公允价值计算，若后续实际支付导致股权比例不足85%，可能触发一般性税务处理。
us_claim: Tax-free reorganizations under 26 U.S.C. §368 (A, B, C, D, E, F reorganizations); continuity of interest and continuity of business enterprise requirements (Rev. Proc. 77-37, 2001-26). Contingent consideration: generally treated as boot under §368 if not equity; escrow arrangements and earn-outs may be treated as boot or deferred purchase price. Key case: Pilot Corp. v. Commissioner, 78 T.C. 845 (1982). Step transaction doctrine: Commissioner v. Gordon, 391 U.S. 83 (1968). Reverse mergers and triangular mergers under §368(a)(1)(A) and (B). Business purpose: Gregory v. Helvering, 293 U.S. 465 (1935).
hk_claim: Hong Kong: no statutory tax-free reorganization provision comparable to US §368 or China Caishui [2009] No. 59. Share-for-share exchanges generally treated as taxable disposals at market value for profits tax purposes (if trading stock) or capital transactions (if capital assets, no capital gains tax). Stamp duty relief may be available for intra-group transfers under Stamp Duty Ordinance (Cap. 117) §45. No specific 'reasonable business purpose' test for tax deferral in corporate reorganizations. General anti-avoidance under §61 may apply if transaction is artificial. No continuity of interest or business enterprise requirements. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong tax treatment of share-for-share exchanges in reorganizations.
notes: 三法域对公司重组税务中性的规制差异显著。中国法以财税〔2009〕59号建立特殊性税务处理制度，条件明确（合理商业目的+85%股权支付+12个月经营连续性+12个月锁定期）；美国法以26 U.S.C. §368建立最复杂的重组制度，有A/B/C/D/E/F型重组、连续性利益测试（COI）和营业连续性测试（COBE），或有对价通常视为boot；香港法无专门税务中性重组制度，一般按市场价值征税，仅Cap. 117第45条集团内转让有印花税减免。差异在于美国法最精细（多类型重组+判例法丰富），中国法最明确（59号文条件量化），香港法最缺乏专门重组税务优惠。

fact_summary: 股权激励计划的税务处理：授予、归属、行权与转让各环节的三法域差异。A US-listed tech company granted restricted stock units (RSUs) to employees in China, Hong Kong, and the US; the RSUs vested over four years, and the company sought to determine the tax treatment at each stage and the withholding obligations in each jurisdiction.
cn_claim: 依据《财政部 国家税务总局关于个人股票期权所得征收个人所得税问题的通知》（财税〔2005〕35号）和《财政部 税务总局关于个人所得税法修改后有关优惠政策衔接问题的通知》（财税〔2018〕164号），员工接受股票期权/限制性股票时，一般不作为应税所得征税。行权/解禁时，按'工资、薪金所得'适用综合所得税率（3%-45%）。转让境外上市公司股票时，按'财产转让所得'适用20%税率（但境内上市公司股票转让暂免个人所得税）。公司作为扣缴义务人，应在行权/解禁时扣缴个人所得税。员工离职后未行权的期权，一般不再征税。
us_claim: Equity compensation taxation: 26 U.S.C. §83 governs property transferred in connection with performance of services; §83(b) election permits early taxation at grant. RSUs: taxed at vesting under §83(a) as ordinary income (compensation). ISOs (§422) and ESPP: special rules. Withholding: 26 U.S.C. §3402 and §3401(m) (supplemental wage withholding at 22% flat, or 37% over $1M). Social Security and Medicare taxes (FICA) apply at vesting/exercise. FUTA may apply. Key case: Robinson v. Commissioner, 805 F.2d 66 (1st Cir. 1986). Non-qualified deferred compensation under §409A. Key case: Commissioner v. Smith, 324 U.S. 177 (1945).
hk_claim: Hong Kong: equity compensation generally taxable as employment income under Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap. 112) §9(1)(a) (salaries tax). RSUs: taxable at vesting based on market value at vesting date (Dennis Lau & Ng Chun Man Architects & Engineers (HK) Ltd v. Commissioner of Inland Revenue [2012] HKCFA 2). Stock options: taxable at grant if there is a discernible value at grant (Dennis Lau); otherwise at vesting/exercise. Share awards: generally taxable at vesting. Employer withholding obligation under Cap. 112 §52(3) for salaries tax. No capital gains tax on subsequent sale of shares by employee. No distinction between local and foreign listed shares for employment income tax purposes. MPF contributions not affected by equity compensation. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific RSU tax treatment in Hong Kong.
notes: 三法域对股权激励税务处理有对应性但差异显著。中国法以财税〔2005〕35号+财税〔2018〕164号处理，授予时不征税，行权/解禁时按工资薪金（3%-45%），转让时按财产转让（20%，境内上市暂免）；美国法以§83（授予/归属征税）+§83(b)选举+§3402预扣+§422（ISO特殊规则）处理，最复杂；香港法以Cap. 112 §9(1)(a)和Dennis Lau案处理，归属时按薪俸税征税，无资本利得税。差异在于美国法最精细（§83(b)选举+ISO/NSO区分），中国法税率最高（45%累进），香港法最简洁（无资本利得税+归属时征税）。

fact_summary: 公司集团内部跨境资金池的利息支出税前扣除与资本弱化规则。A multinational group's Chinese subsidiary borrowed $200M from the group's Luxembourg finance company at 8% interest; the Chinese subsidiary deducted the interest expense, but the Chinese tax authority applied thin capitalization rules (debt-to-equity ratio 2:1) and disallowed 50% of the interest deduction, while the Luxembourg company paid minimal tax on the interest income under the EU interest and royalties directive.
cn_claim: 依据《企业所得税法》第46条和《财政部 国家税务总局关于企业关联方利息支出税前扣除标准有关税收政策问题的通知》（财税〔2008〕121号），企业接受关联方债权性投资与权益性投资的比例超过规定标准（金融企业5:1，其他企业2:1）而发生的利息支出，不得在计算应纳税所得额时扣除。超过比例部分的利息支出，除非能证明符合独立交易原则，否则不得扣除。此外，若关联方实际税负低于中国法定税率50%（12.5%），且借款利息未在关联方所在国征税，该利息支出不得扣除（受控外国企业规则联动）。独立交易原则下的利率应符合可比非受控交易（OECD转让定价指南）。
us_claim: Thin capitalization: 26 U.S.C. §163(j) limits interest deduction to 30% of adjusted taxable income (EBITDA; post-2022, EBIT-based under TCJA). Related-party debt: §267(a)(3) disallows interest deduction if not included in US income of recipient (earnings stripping). No specific debt-to-equity ratio safe harbor under US federal law (repealed by 1989). Transfer pricing under §482 for interest rate. Key case: Boulware v. United States, 552 U.S. 421 (2008). Base erosion under §59A (BEAT) imposes minimum tax on base-eroding payments. No EU interest and royalties directive benefit for US companies (non-EU).
hk_claim: Hong Kong: no specific thin capitalization rules under domestic tax law (Cap. 112). Interest deduction generally permitted if incurred in production of assessable profits (§16(1)). No statutory debt-to-equity ratio restriction. However, §16(2) requires interest on money borrowed from a non-financial institution to be taxable in the hands of the recipient in Hong Kong (or under a comprehensive double tax agreement) for deductibility. If recipient is a foreign related party and interest is not taxable in Hong Kong, deduction may be denied under §16(2). No BEAT or CFC equivalent. Transfer pricing §20 applies to related-party interest rates. General anti-avoidance §61 may apply. PENDING_VERIFICATION: current Hong Kong thin capitalization regulatory guidance.
notes: 三法域对资本弱化/利息扣除的规制差异显著。中国法以《企业所得税法》第46条+财税〔2008〕121号建立2:1（非金融）或5:1（金融）债务股本比例，超比例利息不得扣除，联动CFC规则；美国法以§163(j)（30% EBITDA/EBIT限制）+§267(a)(3)（earnings stripping）+§59A BEAT处理，无具体比例安全港；香港法无专门资本弱化规则，仅§16(2)要求利息收入在香港或协定下征税方可扣除。差异在于中国法最具体（比例安全港），美国法最复杂（多规则叠加），香港法最宽松（无比例限制+仅§16(2)征税关联）。

fact_summary: 企业清算中税务亏损向股东转移的税务处理与反避税。A loss-making Chinese subsidiary with $50M in tax losses was liquidated; the parent company (a profitable Hong Kong holding company) sought to utilize the accumulated losses to offset its own profits through a merger or absorption. The Chinese tax authority challenged the loss utilization under anti-avoidance rules.
cn_claim: 依据《企业所得税法》第18条，企业纳税年度发生的亏损，准予向以后年度结转，用以后年度的所得弥补，但结转年限最长不得超过五年（高新技术企业等可延长至10年）。企业清算时，清算所得为全部资产可变现价值或交易价格减除资产净值、清算费用、相关税费后的余额。清算所得应单独纳税。税务亏损不能直接向股东转移；在合并重组中，被合并企业的亏损可在限额内由合并企业弥补（财税〔2009〕59号第6条第4项），限额=被合并企业净资产公允价值×最长期限国债利率。若清算重组的主要目的是利用亏损，可能被认定为不具有合理商业目的（实施条例第120条）。
us_claim: Net operating loss (NOL) carryforward under 26 U.S.C. §172; TCJA 2017 limits NOL deduction to 80% of taxable income (post-2018) and eliminated carryback for most taxpayers (§172(a)). NOLs remain with the corporate entity; not transferable to shareholders on liquidation. Corporate liquidation: 26 U.S.C. §331 (shareholder treatment as sale/exchange); §336 (corporate recognition of gain/loss on distribution). Built-in loss limitation under §336(d). Section 382 limits NOL utilization after ownership change (greater than 50 percentage point change). Section 384 limits built-in loss utilization in certain acquisitions. Key case: Libson Shops, Inc. v. Koehler, 353 U.S. 382 (1957).
hk_claim: Hong Kong: no specific NOL carryforward or carryback regime under Cap. 112. Losses incurred in a year of assessment can be carried forward indefinitely against future profits from the same trade (§19C). Losses cannot be transferred between companies except under group relief provisions (§19C(4) for intra-group loss relief, limited to 100% owned groups). On liquidation, losses of the liquidated company generally lapse; no transfer to shareholders or parent company. No specific anti-avoidance rule for loss utilization in liquidation comparable to US §382 or China's reasonable business purpose test. However, general anti-avoidance §61 may apply if liquidation is artificial. No specific tax-free liquidation provision. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong group relief and loss transfer rules.
notes: 三法域对税务亏损结转和清算中亏损利用的处理有对应性。中国法以《企业所得税法》第18条（5年结转，高新10年）+财税〔2009〕59号第6条第4项（合并弥补限额）+实施条例第120条（合理商业目的）处理；美国法以§172（NOL 80%限额+无限期结转）+§331/336（清算税务处理）+§382（所有权变更限制）+§384（特定收购限制）处理，最复杂；香港法以Cap. 112 §19C（无限期结转+集团内减免）处理，清算时亏损一般消灭。差异在于美国法最精细（§382/384反滥用），中国法有合并弥补限额，香港法最简洁（无专门清算亏损规则+无资本利得税）。

fact_summary: 常设机构（PE）判定中的服务型和虚拟型常设机构争议。A German consulting firm sent engineers to a Chinese construction site for 8 months to supervise equipment installation; the firm had no fixed office in China and argued no permanent establishment existed. The Chinese tax authority claimed a service PE under the China-Germany tax treaty Article 5(3)(b) (same or connected project exceeding 6 months).
cn_claim: 依据《企业所得税法》第3条和第38条，非居民企业在中国境内设立机构、场所的，应就其所设机构、场所取得的来源于中国境内的所得缴纳企业所得税。依据《中华人民共和国政府和德意志联邦共和国政府关于对所得和财产避免双重征税和防止偷漏税的协定》第5条，'常设机构'包括建筑工地、建筑或安装工程持续超过12个月的，以及缔约国一方企业通过雇员或雇佣的其他人员在缔约国另一方提供劳务（包括咨询服务），该劳务在该缔约国另一方任何12个月中连续或累计超过6个月的。8个月的服务已构成服务性常设机构，应就归属于该PE的利润按25%税率缴纳企业所得税。
us_claim: Permanent establishment under US tax treaties: generally follows OECD Model Article 5; service PE threshold varies by treaty (e.g., US Model 183 days in any 12-month period for independent personal services; no specific service PE in some treaties). US-Germany treaty: Article 5 generally requires fixed place or dependent agent; no service PE provision comparable to China-Germany treaty. IRC §864(c)(3) and §864(c)(4) for foreign person's US business income. Branch profits tax under §884. Treaty tie-breaker rules for dual residents. Key case: Commissioner v. DeWitt, 54 T.C. 324 (1970) (US trade or business). No statutory PE threshold; treaty-based. US has no general service PE rule in domestic law; specific treaty provisions govern. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific US-Germany treaty PE provisions.
hk_claim: Permanent establishment under Hong Kong tax treaties: generally follows OECD Model Article 5. Hong Kong-Germany tax treaty: Article 5 requires fixed place of business or dependent agent; no specific service PE provision (dependent agent and fixed place standard). Service income: generally not subject to Hong Kong profits tax unless services are performed in Hong Kong (source principle). No specific statutory PE threshold in domestic law. If German consulting firm had no Hong Kong office and engineers were in China, no Hong Kong PE issue. Profits tax applies only to Hong Kong-sourced profits. No branch profits tax in Hong Kong. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong-Germany tax treaty PE provisions and Hong Kong service PE approach.
notes: 三法域对常设机构（PE）判定的标准差异显著。中国法以《企业所得税法》第3条+税收协定第5条（通常含服务PE：6个月或12个月标准）处理；美国法以IRC §864+税收协定（通常无服务PE或183天标准）+§884分支利润税处理；香港法以Cap. 112+税收协定（通常遵循OECD Model，无服务PE或仅固定场所+dependent agent）+来源地原则处理。差异在于中国法最常设机构友好（服务PE门槛低），美国法依赖具体条约（通常无服务PE），香港法最不常设机构友好（无服务PE+来源地原则）。

fact_summary: 跨境电子商务中，平台企业的增值税/营业税纳税地点与利润归属争议。A Hong Kong-based e-commerce platform sold goods to Chinese consumers through a website hosted in Singapore; the platform had no physical presence in China, no warehouse, and no employees in China. The Chinese tax authority claimed the platform had a 'de facto' presence through local marketing agents and should pay VAT and enterprise income tax on the sales.
cn_claim: 依据《财政部 国家税务总局关于全面推开营业税改征增值税试点的通知》（财税〔2016〕36号）附件1《营业税改征增值税试点实施办法》第1条和第12条，在中华人民共和国境内销售服务、无形资产或不动产，以及进口货物的单位和个人，为增值税纳税人。'在境内销售服务'是指服务（租赁不动产除外）的销售方或购买方在境内。境外单位向境内单位或个人销售完全在境外发生的服务不属于在境内销售服务。但若境外电商平台通过境内代理人、关联公司或服务器向中国境内消费者销售商品，可能被认定为境内销售。2019年《电子商务法》第71条要求跨境电子商务经营者应依法办理市场主体登记和纳税。但税务实践中，无物理存在的外国电商平台的纳税义务界定存在争议。
us_claim: E-commerce taxation: US states may impose sales tax on remote sellers based on economic nexus (South Dakota v. Wayfair, Inc., 585 U.S. __ (2018) (138 S.Ct. 2080)). Economic nexus thresholds vary by state (e.g., $100,000 in sales or 200 transactions). Federal income tax: foreign corporation subject to US tax on income effectively connected with US trade or business (IRC §871(b) for non-resident aliens, §882 for foreign corporations). No permanent establishment required for income tax if business is US trade or business. Digital services and marketplace facilitator laws: states impose collection obligations on platforms. Federal: no federal VAT or digital services tax. Pillar One and Pillar Two OECD proposals not yet implemented in US federal law. Key case: Scripto, Inc. v. Carson, 362 U.S. 207 (1960) (nexus through independent contractors).
hk_claim: Hong Kong: no VAT or GST system. E-commerce platform selling to Chinese consumers: if platform is Hong Kong-based with no Hong Kong-sourced income (no sales in Hong Kong, no Hong Kong servers, no Hong Kong staff), generally not subject to Hong Kong profits tax under territorial principle. If goods are shipped from overseas to China, no Hong Kong source. However, if platform has Hong Kong marketing agents or Hong Kong-based management, income may be Hong Kong-sourced. No specific digital services tax or e-commerce nexus rules in Hong Kong. E-commerce transactions governed by general profits tax principles. No sales tax or VAT on consumer sales. If Chinese tax authority claims de facto PE, Hong Kong platform may face Chinese tax liability but not Hong Kong tax. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong e-commerce tax guidance.
notes: 三法域对跨境电商税务处理存在碰撞。中国法以财税〔2016〕36号+《电子商务法》第71条处理，但无物理存在的外国平台纳税义务界定不明；美国法以州经济关联（Wayfair案）+IRC §871/§882联邦所得税处理，有联邦所得税但无联邦VAT；香港法无VAT/GST，以利润来源地原则（Cap. 112）处理，无数字服务税。差异在于中国法以消费地原则+代理/服务器认定纳税地，美国法以州经济关联+联邦贸易或营业标准认定，香港法以平台所在地/管理地认定。香港对无本地来源的电商收入最免税友好，中国法对跨境电商征税最积极，美国法州际差异最大。

fact_summary: 跨国企业集团间无形资产成本分摊协议（CSA）与后续收益分配的税务争议。A US parent and its Chinese subsidiary entered into a cost sharing arrangement for developing a new AI platform; the US parent contributed pre-existing IP (platform 1.0) valued at $30M, and both parties shared ongoing R&D costs equally. After three years, the Chinese subsidiary claimed 50% of the worldwide profits from the platform, but the US parent argued the Chinese subsidiary's return should be limited to its cost contributions plus a routine return under §1.482-7.
cn_claim: 依据《国家税务总局关于印发〈特别纳税调整实施办法（试行）〉的通知》（国税发〔2009〕2号）第20-23条和《企业自行制定成本分摊协议须知》等相关规定，企业与其关联方共同开发、受让无形资产或共同提供、接受劳务发生的成本，在计算应纳税所得额时应当按照独立交易原则进行分摊。成本分摊协议的参与方对无形资产或劳务的成本分摊比例应与各方预期收益比例相匹配。若参与方仅提供资金而未承担功能风险，其预期收益应限于常规回报（routine return）。中国税务机关通常遵循OECD转让定价指南，但要求成本分摊协议须符合'风险与收益匹配'原则。若美方提供的现有IP被认定为平台贡献，中方应支付 platform contribution 或接受较低的收益分配比例。
us_claim: Cost sharing arrangements (CSA) under 26 U.S.C. §482 and Treas. Reg. §1.482-7; buy-in payments for pre-existing IP under §1.482-7(g). Platform contributions (PCT) under §1.482-7(c) and (k). Cost allocations must be consistent with arm's length standard and reasonably anticipated benefits. Key case: Veritas Software Corp. v. Commissioner, 133 T.C. 297 (2009) (buy-in valuation); Xilinx, Inc. v. Commissioner, 567 F.3d 482 (9th Cir. 2009) (stock option costs in CSA). Amazon.com, Inc. v. Commissioner, 148 T.C. 108 (2017) (CSA and buy-in valuation). Periodic adjustments under §1.482-7(i). §367(d) for outbound IP transfers. Key case: Medtronic, Inc. v. Commissioner, 900 F.3d 610 (8th Cir. 2018).
hk_claim: Hong Kong: no specific statutory cost sharing arrangement rules under Cap. 112. Intra-group R&D cost sharing governed by general transfer pricing rules under §20 and DIPN 46 (Revised). Arm's length principle applies; no specific platform contribution or buy-in payment rules comparable to US §1.482-7. R&D expenses generally deductible under §16(1) if incurred in production of assessable profits. IP ownership and cost sharing governed by contractual arrangements; tax treatment follows commercial substance. No specific statutory CSA registration or approval requirements. General anti-avoidance §61 applies. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong transfer pricing guidance on CSA arrangements.
notes: 三法域对成本分摊协议（CSA）的税务规制差异显著。中国法以国税发〔2009〕2号第20-23条处理，要求成本分摊与预期收益比例匹配，遵循OECD指引但强调风险与收益匹配；美国法以§482+§1.482-7建立最详尽的CSA制度，有PCT（平台贡献）、buy-in payment、定期调整（§1.482-7(i)）和丰富判例（Veritas、Amazon、Medtronic案）；香港法无专门CSA规则，以§20转让定价和DIPN 46处理，遵循独立交易原则。差异在于美国法最精细（§1.482-7专门规则+判例法），中国法最强调'风险与收益匹配'，香港法最依赖一般转让定价原则。

fact_summary: 企业环境修复支出的税务扣除与资本化边界。A chemical company's factory site was contaminated over decades; the company incurred $30M in remediation costs, including soil excavation, groundwater treatment, and monitoring. The company claimed full immediate deduction for all costs, while the tax authority argued the costs should be capitalized as land improvement or environmental liability settlement.
cn_claim: 依据《企业所得税法》第8条，企业实际发生的与取得收入有关的、合理的支出，包括成本、费用、税金、损失和其他支出，准予在计算应纳税所得额时扣除。环境污染治理费用是否属于'与取得收入有关的、合理的支出'，需结合具体事实。若治理费用为维持现有生产经营条件而发生的日常支出，通常可税前扣除；若治理费用实质上构成土地改良或环境修复资产，则可能需要资本化并按折旧摊销扣除。依据《企业会计准则第13号——或有事项》，环境修复预计负债应计入当期损益。但税法与会计准则存在差异：税法上，若修复支出使资产未来经济利益增加，应资本化；若仅为恢复原状，通常可费用化。
us_claim: Environmental remediation costs: capitalization vs. deduction under 26 U.S.C. §162 (ordinary and necessary business expenses) and §263 (capital expenditures). Rev. Rul. 94-38: soil and groundwater cleanup costs at active business site generally deductible under §162. Remediation vs. improvement: if costs restore property to original condition, deductible; if they improve or adapt property to new use, capitalizable under §263(a). CERCLA §107 liability: generally deductible as ordinary business expense. Environmental settlements and penalties: compensatory damages deductible, punitive damages and fines not deductible under §162(f). Key cases: Foxboro Co. v. Commissioner, 97 T.C. 543 (1991); INDOPCO, Inc. v. Commissioner, 503 U.S. 79 (1992) (capitalization of future benefits).
hk_claim: Hong Kong: environmental remediation costs generally deductible under Cap. 112 §16(1) if incurred in production of assessable profits and are revenue in nature. Capital expenditure on land or building improvements generally not deductible (no depreciation for land; building depreciation under §16G and §33A). If remediation costs are incurred to restore property to its original condition for continued business use, likely deductible as revenue expenditure. If they improve or increase the value of the property, capitalizable and depreciable as plant and machinery or industrial building. No specific statutory guidance on environmental remediation costs comparable to US Rev. Rul. 94-38. General revenue vs. capital distinction applies (Whimster v. IRC (1925) 12 TC 813). PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong tax treatment of environmental remediation costs.
notes: 三法域对环境修复支出的税务处理有对应性但标准差异。中国法以《企业所得税法》第8条+会计准则第13号处理，税法上区分恢复原状（费用化）与资产改良（资本化）；美国法以§162/§263+Rev. Rul. 94-38+INDOPCO案处理，恢复原状可扣除，改良需资本化；香港法以Cap. 112 §16(1)+收益vs资本区分原则处理，无专门环境修复指引。差异在于美国法有最明确的税务指引（Rev. Rul. 94-38），中国法依赖会计准则与税法差异调整，香港法最依赖一般原则（Whimster案）。

fact_summary: 行政诉讼中的证据规则：行政机关逾期提交的证据是否可采纳。A property owner challenged a municipal zoning decision that denied a building permit; the municipality failed to submit the administrative hearing record within the statutory 15-day period, but submitted it on the 30th day with new evidence not previously considered in the administrative hearing. The court had to decide whether to admit the late-filed evidence.
cn_claim: 依据《行政诉讼法》第34条，被告对作出的行政行为负有举证责任，应当提供作出该行政行为的证据和所依据的规范性文件。被告不提供或者无正当理由逾期提供证据，视为没有相应证据。但是，被诉行政行为涉及第三人合法权益，第三人提供证据的除外。依据《最高人民法院关于适用〈中华人民共和国行政诉讼法〉的解释》第34条，被告申请延期提供证据的，应当在收到起诉状副本之日起15日内提出书面申请；正当理由包括不可抗力、客观上不能控制的其他正当事由。逾期提交的证据一般不予采纳，但涉及公共利益、第三人权益或新发现的证据，法院可酌情采纳。
us_claim: Administrative Procedure Act (APA) §706(2)(E): courts may set aside agency action found to be 'unsupported by substantial evidence' in formal rulemaking/adjudication. Record rule: administrative record generally limited to what was before the agency at the time of decision (Campbell v. United States, 365 U.S. 85 (1961); SEC v. Chenery Corp., 332 U.S. 194 (1947)). Late or post-hoc rationalization generally not permitted (Bowler v. United States, 136 F.3d 1518 (Fed. Cir. 1998)). Exception: supplemental evidence may be admitted for limited purposes (e.g., remand to agency). Discovery in APA cases: limited under Rule 26; agency file is primary source. Key case: Citizens to Preserve Overton Park v. Volpe, 401 U.S. 402 (1971) (record review).
hk_claim: Administrative law in Hong Kong: judicial review under Cap. 484 (Rules of the High Court, Order 53). Administrative decisions reviewed on the basis of the record before the decision-maker at the time of decision (R v. Secretary of State for Education and Employment, ex p. Begbie [2000] 1 WLR 1115). No specific statutory evidence deadline for administrative defendants in judicial review comparable to China's 15-day rule. However, late evidence may be excluded if it amounts to post-hoc rationalization or if fairness requires exclusion. Court has discretion to admit evidence if it is relevant and probative, but will scrutinize late submissions carefully. No specific statutory 'no evidence' presumption for late filing. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong judicial review evidence timing rules.
notes: 三法域对行政机关逾期提交证据的处理有对应性。中国法以《行政诉讼法》第34条+司法解释第34条确立15日举证期限，逾期视为无证据（例外：公共利益、第三人权益）；美国法以APA§706+记录规则（Chenery案、Campbell案）处理，禁止事后补充理由（post-hoc rationalization）；香港法以Cap. 484司法审查和Begbie案处理，无专门逾期举证期限，但法院可排除事后补充证据。差异在于中国法最严格（15日固定期限+视为无证据），美国法以记录规则为核心，香港法最依赖法官裁量。

fact_summary: 行政裁决的司法审查范围：事实问题与法律问题的审查标准差异。A professional licensing board revoked a doctor's medical license based on findings of negligence in three patient cases; the doctor sought judicial review, arguing the board's factual findings were unsupported by evidence and its legal standard for 'gross negligence' was incorrectly applied.
cn_claim: 依据《行政诉讼法》第70条，行政行为有下列情形之一的，人民法院判决撤销或者部分撤销，并可以判决被告重新作出行政行为：（一）主要证据不足的；（二）适用法律、法规错误的；（三）违反法定程序的；（四）超越职权的；（五）滥用职权的；（六）明显不当的。依据《行政诉讼法》第6条，人民法院审理行政案件，对行政行为是否合法进行审查。事实问题的审查标准：法院对行政机关认定的事实进行审查，但通常尊重行政机关的专业判断（证据优势标准）。法律问题的审查标准：法院对法律适用进行独立审查（de novo）。但在专业领域（如医疗执业标准），法院可能更尊重行政机关的裁量。
us_claim: APA §706(2)(A)-(F): courts review agency actions on questions of law de novo; questions of fact under 'substantial evidence' standard for formal rulemaking/adjudication (§706(2)(E)) or 'arbitrary and capricious' standard for informal actions (§706(2)(A)). 'Substantial evidence' standard: 'more than a mere scintilla' (Consolidated Edison Co. v. NLRB, 305 U.S. 197 (1938)). 'Arbitrary and capricious' standard: 'manifestly unreasonable' (Motor Vehicle Mfrs. Ass'n v. State Farm, 463 U.S. 29 (1983)). Mixed questions: courts may apply different standards depending on context. Deference doctrines: Chevron deference (Chevron U.S.A. Inc. v. Natural Resources Defense Council, Inc., 467 U.S. 837 (1984)) for agency statutory interpretation; Auer deference for agency interpretation of its own regulations. Key case: Universal Camera Corp. v. NLRB, 340 U.S. 474 (1951).
hk_claim: Judicial review under Cap. 484: courts review administrative decisions on legality, rationality, and procedural fairness (Council of Civil Service Unions v. Minister for the Civil Service [1985] AC 374 (GCHQ case)). Errors of law reviewable de novo (R v. Secretary of State for the Home Department, ex p. Khawaja [1984] AC 74). Errors of fact: courts generally apply 'Wednesbury unreasonableness' standard (Associated Provincial Picture Houses Ltd v. Wednesbury Corp. [1948] 1 KB 223) or irrationality test. No specific 'substantial evidence' standard in Hong Kong; courts review whether decision was reasonable and supported by evidence. Professional licensing: courts may defer to specialist tribunal's findings of fact but not law. No Chevron/Auer deference doctrine in Hong Kong; courts independently interpret statutes but give weight to expert tribunal views. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong judicial review standard for professional licensing boards.
notes: 三法域对行政裁决司法审查中事实与法律问题的审查标准有对应性。中国法以《行政诉讼法》第70条处理，事实问题审查（主要证据不足）+法律问题审查（适用法律错误）+滥用职权/明显不当；美国法以APA§706(2)(A)-(F)+substantial evidence标准（Consolidated Edison案）+arbitrary and capricious标准（State Farm案）+Chevron/Auer尊重原则处理；香港法以Cap. 484+合法性/合理性/程序公正性（GCHQ案）+Wednesbury不合理性标准（Wednesbury案）处理。差异在于美国法最精细（substantial evidence+arbitrary and capricious+Chevron三层），中国法以合法性审查为主，香港法最接近英国普通法（Wednesbury+de novo法律审查）。

fact_summary: 行政复议与行政诉讼的衔接：复议前置与当事人选择权的冲突。A landowner disputed a county government's land expropriation decision; the local regulations required administrative reconsideration as a mandatory prerequisite before filing an administrative lawsuit, but the landowner argued this violated the Administrative Litigation Law which generally allows direct lawsuit unless otherwise provided by law.
cn_claim: 依据《行政诉讼法》第44条，对属于人民法院受案范围的行政案件，公民、法人或者其他组织可以先向行政机关申请复议，对复议不服的，再向人民法院提起诉讼；也可以直接向人民法院提起诉讼。法律、法规规定应当先向行政机关申请复议，对复议不服再向人民法院提起诉讼的，依照法律、法规的规定。依据《行政复议法》第30条，公民、法人或者其他组织认为行政机关的具体行政行为侵犯其已经依法取得的土地、矿藏、水流、森林、山岭、草原、荒地、滩涂、海域等自然资源的所有权或者使用权的，应当先申请行政复议。土地征收决定属于行政复议前置事项。但2024年《行政复议法》修订后，复议前置范围扩大至'对当场作出的行政处罚决定不服'等情形。
us_claim: Administrative law: no general administrative reconsideration requirement before federal judicial review under APA. Some statutes require exhaustion of administrative remedies before judicial review (e.g., FTC Act, NLRB, Social Security Act). Doctrine of exhaustion of administrative remedies: McKart v. United States, 395 U.S. 185 (1969); Darby v. Cisneros, 509 U.S. 137 (1993). Exception: futility, irreparable harm, constitutional claims. No mandatory administrative reconsideration as general rule. State law: some states have administrative appeal requirements before judicial review. Federal judicial review generally available after final agency action under APA §704. Key case: Abbott Laboratories v. Gardner, 387 U.S. 136 (1967) (ripeness).
hk_claim: Hong Kong: no mandatory administrative reconsideration requirement before judicial review under Cap. 484. Judicial review is available as of right after final administrative decision (R v. Secretary of State for the Home Department, ex p. Khawaja [1984] AC 74). Some statutory schemes may require internal appeal or administrative review before judicial review (e.g., immigration appeals, social security appeals). No general 'exhaustion of administrative remedies' doctrine comparable to US McKart doctrine; but courts may decline to hear cases where alternative remedies not exhausted (R v. Chief Constable of the Merseyside Police, ex p. Calveley [1986] QB 424). Administrative appeals to tribunal or minister may be statutory requirements for specific schemes. No specific 'reconsideration' as prerequisite for judicial review in Hong Kong administrative law. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong statutory appeal requirements before judicial review.
notes: 三法域对行政复议前置与司法审查衔接的处理差异显著。中国法以《行政诉讼法》第44条+《行政复议法》第30条（2024年修订扩大前置范围）建立法定复议前置制度；美国法以APA§704+exhaustion of administrative remedies原则（McKart案、Darby案）处理，但无一般复议前置，仅特定法律要求用尽行政救济；香港法以Cap. 484司法审查为基本权利，无一般复议前置，仅特定法定计划要求内部上诉。差异在于中国法最严格（法定复议前置），美国法最灵活（原则+例外），香港法最接近英国普通法（司法审查基本权利+特定计划例外）。

fact_summary: 政府信息公开诉讼中，涉及第三方商业秘密的公开审查标准。A journalist requested environmental inspection reports for a chemical factory under government information disclosure rules; the factory claimed the reports contained trade secrets and proprietary process information. The government agency refused disclosure citing third-party commercial interests.
cn_claim: 依据《政府信息公开条例》第15条，涉及商业秘密、个人隐私等公开会对第三方合法权益造成损害的政府信息，行政机关不得公开。但是，第三方同意公开或者行政机关认为不公开会对公共利益造成重大影响的，予以公开。依据第32条，依申请公开的政府信息会损害第三方合法权益的，行政机关应当书面征求第三方的意见。第三方不同意公开且有合理理由的，行政机关不予公开。但涉及公共利益的，行政机关可以决定予以公开。环境检查报告涉及公共环境利益，行政机关应权衡商业秘密保护与公共利益。依据《最高人民法院关于审理政府信息公开行政案件若干问题的规定》第8条，政府信息涉及国家秘密、商业秘密、个人隐私的，被告应当提供书面证明。
us_claim: FOIA (5 U.S.C. §552): Exemption 4 protects trade secrets and commercial information obtained from a person and privileged or confidential. National Parks & Conservation Ass'n v. Morton, 498 F.2d 765 (D.C. Cir. 1974): 'competitive harm' test for confidential commercial information. Critical Mass Energy Project v. NRC, 975 F.2d 871 (D.C. Cir. 1992) (voluntary vs. required submissions). Public interest override: no general public interest override for Exemption 4 under FOIA; court may order disclosure if competitive harm not shown. Reverse FOIA: third party may sue to prevent disclosure (Chrysler Corp. v. Brown, 441 U.S. 281 (1979)).
hk_claim: Hong Kong: Code on Access to Information (non-statutory administrative code) governs government information disclosure. No statutory FOIA equivalent. Commercial information and trade secrets generally protected under 'third party information' grounds. Public interest test: may be overridden if public interest in disclosure outweighs harm. No specific statutory framework for government information disclosure litigation in Hong Kong. Judicial review under Cap. 484 may be available if government refuses disclosure. Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) protects personal data but not corporate trade secrets. No specific statutory public interest override for commercial information. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong government information disclosure framework and judicial review precedents.
notes: 三法域对政府信息公开中第三方商业秘密的处理存在碰撞。中国法以《政府信息公开条例》第15条+第32条+司法解释第8条处理，有公共利益优先 override；美国法以FOIA Exemption 4+National Parks案（competitive harm测试）+Chrysler案（reverse FOIA）处理，无一般公共利益 override；香港法以《资料获取守则》（非成文法典）+Cap. 486个人资料条例处理，无成文FOIA。差异在于中国法公共利益 override 最强，美国法以保护商业信息为主（无一般override），香港法最薄弱（非成文守则+无成文专门法）。

fact_summary: 行政协议（PPP/特许经营）履行争议中，民事审判与行政审判的管辖权选择。A municipality entered into a 30-year concession agreement with a private water utility; the municipality unilaterally terminated the agreement citing public interest. The utility sought damages in a civil lawsuit, while the municipality argued the dispute should be resolved through administrative review and administrative litigation because the agreement was an 'administrative agreement.'
cn_claim: 依据《最高人民法院关于审理行政协议案件若干问题的规定》（法释〔2019〕17号）第1条，行政机关为了实现行政管理或者公共服务目标，与公民、法人或者其他组织协商订立的具有行政法上权利义务内容的协议，属于行政协议。PPP/特许经营协议属于典型的行政协议。依据第4条，因行政协议的订立、履行、变更、终止等发生的纠纷，属于行政协议诉讼的受案范围。当事人可以提起行政诉讼，也可以就协议中的民事争议部分提起民事诉讼。但行政优益权（单方变更、解除权）的争议属于行政争议。法院在审理行政协议案件时，可以适用民事法律规范。
us_claim: Government contracts: generally governed by contract law, not administrative law, in the US (unless sovereign immunity and APA issues arise). State and local government contracts: breach of contract claims generally heard in state courts or federal courts under diversity jurisdiction. No specific 'administrative agreement' category in US law comparable to Chinese administrative agreements. Key case: Winstar Corp. v. United States, 518 U.S. 839 (1996) (federal government breach of contract liability under Tucker Act). Sovereign immunity: United States v. Mitchell, 463 U.S. 206 (1983). Federal contracts: Court of Federal Claims or district courts under Tucker Act (28 U.S.C. §1491). No administrative litigation for government contract disputes; civil litigation is standard. Administrative law applies to agency rulemaking and adjudication, not contract performance. Key case: Horowitz v. Secretary of Health, Education, and Welfare, 428 F.2d 924 (2d Cir. 1970) (administrative vs. contractual relationship).
hk_claim: Hong Kong: government contracts generally governed by ordinary contract law and common law principles; no specific 'administrative agreement' category comparable to Chinese administrative agreements. Disputes heard in civil courts (High Court) or arbitration. Government as contractor generally subject to same contractual principles as private parties (Robertson v. Minister of Pensions [1949] 1 KB 227). Judicial review under Cap. 484 available for government decisions but not for contractual disputes. Separation of powers: courts adjudicate contract disputes; government exercises administrative powers. No administrative tribunal for government contract disputes. Specific statutory regimes (e.g., public works contracts, utilities) may provide specific dispute resolution mechanisms. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong government contract dispute resolution framework.
notes: 三法域对行政协议/政府合同争议管辖权的处理存在根本性碰撞。中国法以法释〔2019〕17号建立行政协议制度，PPP/特许经营属于行政协议，可行政诉讼或就民事部分提起民事诉讼；美国法以普通合同法处理政府合同，无行政协议类别，违约诉讼在普通法院（Tucker Act或州法院）；香港法以普通法合同原则处理政府合同，无行政协议概念，司法审查（Cap. 484）与合同诉讼分离。差异在于中国法有独特的行政协议制度（公私法融合），美国法以普通合同法为主（政府合同无特殊类别），香港法最接近英国普通法（政府服从一般合同法）。

fact_summary: 行政复议决定的法律效力与执行：复议决定维持原行政行为时当事人的救济路径。A citizen applied for administrative reconsideration of a municipal traffic fine; the reconsideration authority upheld the original fine. The citizen sought to challenge the reconsideration decision in court, but the court questioned whether the reconsideration decision was a separate 'administrative act' subject to judicial review or merely a confirmation of the original act.
cn_claim: 依据《行政诉讼法》第26条第2款，经复议的案件，复议机关决定维持原行政行为的，作出原行政行为的行政机关和复议机关是共同被告；复议机关改变原行政行为的，复议机关是被告。依据第45条，公民、法人或者其他组织不服复议决定的，可以在收到复议决定书之日起15日内向人民法院提起诉讼。复议决定属于独立的行政行为，具有法律效力。复议维持决定与原行政行为具有'捆绑'关系，当事人不服的，以原机关和复议机关为共同被告。若复议机关逾期未作出决定，当事人可以起诉原行政行为（第45条）。
us_claim: Administrative law: no direct equivalent to Chinese administrative reconsideration system in US federal law. Agency final decisions are reviewable under APA §704. Internal agency appeals (e.g., within Social Security Administration, SEC) are part of administrative process but do not create separate judicially reviewable actions unless the appeal decision is the final agency action. Chevron deference applies to agency interpretations. No 'joint defendant' concept for original decision-maker and appellate body. Judicial review targets the final agency action. Key case: Bennett v. Spear, 520 U.S. 154 (1997) (final agency action).
hk_claim: Hong Kong: no statutory administrative reconsideration system comparable to China's行政复议. Some statutory schemes provide internal appeals (e.g., to a tribunal, board, or minister) before judicial review. Judicial review under Cap. 484 targets the final decision of the administrative body. If an internal appeal is provided by statute, the appellate decision may be the decision subject to judicial review. No concept of 'joint defendants' for original and appellate bodies. If statute provides for appeal to minister, the minister's decision is the final decision. No specific statutory framework for judicial review of administrative reconsideration decisions. Common law principles: courts review the decision that affects the applicant's rights. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong statutory internal appeal schemes and judicial review practice.
notes: 三法域对行政复议决定法律效力和司法审查被告的处理差异显著。中国法以《行政诉讼法》第26条第2款建立'复议维持共同被告'制度，复议决定是独立行政行为；美国法无行政复议制度，内部上诉是行政程序的一部分，最终行政行为可司法审查（Bennett案），无共同被告概念；香港法无成文行政复议制度，仅特定法定计划有内部上诉，司法审查针对最终决定。差异在于中国法有独特的行政复议制度（行政诉讼法第26条专门规定），美国法以行政机构内部程序为主，香港法最接近英国普通法（无一般行政复议+司法审查针对最终决定）。

fact_summary: 行政裁决的既判力与后续民事诉讼的排斥效力。A construction company was fined by the occupational safety bureau for a workplace accident; the administrative penalty decision found the company 'fully responsible' for the accident. In a subsequent civil lawsuit by the injured worker, the company argued the administrative finding should be binding on the civil court under the principle of res judicata or issue preclusion.
cn_claim: 依据《行政处罚法》第8条和第54条，行政处罚决定具有法律效力，但行政处罚与民事侵权属于不同法律关系。行政裁决的认定事实在后续民事诉讼中通常不具有当然的既判力（res judicata）。依据《最高人民法院关于适用〈中华人民共和国民事诉讼法〉的解释》第93条，已为行政机关有效公证文书所证明的事实，当事人无需举证证明，但当事人有相反证据足以推翻的除外。行政处罚决定书可作为民事诉讼中的证据，但法院应独立审查其证明力。依据《民法典》第1165条，民事侵权责任的认定应依据民事法律规范，行政违法不等于民事侵权。
us_claim: Administrative findings in civil litigation: collateral estoppel (issue preclusion) may apply if the party had full and fair opportunity to litigate the issue in the administrative proceeding. Key case: United States v. Mendoza, 464 U.S. 154 (1984) (non-mutual offensive collateral estoppel against government limited). Administrative findings may be admissible under FRE 803(8) (public records exception) or may be given preclusive effect depending on the proceeding. Difference in standards of proof and procedure may limit preclusive effect. Key case: Astoria Federal Savings and Loan Association v. Solimino, 501 U.S. 104 (1991). No automatic preclusive effect; courts evaluate fairness and procedural adequacy.
hk_claim: Administrative findings in civil litigation: generally no res judicata or issue estoppel between administrative and civil proceedings in Hong Kong unless the parties are the same and the issue was fully determined in a judicial or quasi-judicial proceeding with equivalent procedural safeguards. Administrative findings may be admissible as evidence but are not conclusive. Court evaluates the weight of administrative findings based on the nature of the proceeding and the opportunity to contest. No specific statutory rule on preclusive effect of administrative findings in civil proceedings. Common law principles: issue estoppel requires the same parties, same issue, and prior determination in a court or tribunal with equivalent jurisdiction. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong case law on preclusive effect of administrative findings.
notes: 三法域对行政裁决在后续民事诉讼中的既判力/排斥效力处理有对应性。中国法以行政处罚法+民事诉讼法司法解释第93条处理，行政认定可作为证据但无当然既判力，法院独立审查；美国法以collateral estoppel/issue preclusion原则（Mendoza案、Solimino案）处理，无自动排斥效力，需评估程序公正性；香港法以普通法issue estoppel原则处理，行政认定一般无res judicata，需相同当事人+同等程序保障。差异在于中国法以司法解释明确行政认定的证据效力，美国法以判例法丰富issue preclusion规则，香港法最依赖一般issue estoppel原则。

fact_summary: 行政强制措施与刑事侦查措施的衔接：扣押财物的程序转换。A tax bureau conducted an administrative inspection and seized a company's financial documents and computers suspected of tax evasion. After two weeks, the case was referred to the public security bureau for criminal investigation. The company challenged the continued seizure, arguing the administrative seizure should have been terminated and a new criminal warrant obtained.
cn_claim: 依据《行政强制法》第18条和第25条，行政机关实施行政强制措施应当遵循法定程序，查封、扣押的期限不得超过30日；情况复杂的，经行政机关负责人批准，可以延长，但延长期限不得超过30日。案件移送司法机关的，行政机关应当将查封、扣押的财物一并移送，并书面告知当事人。依据《刑事诉讼法》第141条，在侦查活动中发现的可用以证明犯罪嫌疑人有罪或者无罪的各种财物、文件，应当查封、扣押。行政扣押转为刑事扣押时，应重新办理刑事扣押手续（出示扣押决定书）。若未重新办理，刑事扣押程序存在瑕疵，但不必然导致证据排除。
us_claim: Administrative inspections vs. criminal investigations: Fourth Amendment protections apply to criminal searches and seizures (Mapp v. Ohio, 367 U.S. 643 (1961)). Administrative inspections: limited warrantless search authority under administrative statutes (e.g., IRS summons under 26 U.S.C. §7602; Camara v. Municipal Court, 387 U.S. 523 (1967)). Transition from administrative to criminal: administrative seizure must be justified by administrative authority; once criminal investigation begins, criminal warrant or subpoena generally required. Administrative documents obtained may be used in criminal proceedings if obtained lawfully. Fifth Amendment self-incrimination: taxpayer may invoke privilege after referral to DOJ (United States v. Doe, 465 U.S. 605 (1984)). Key case: Michigan v. Clifford, 464 U.S. 287 (1984) (administrative inspection after fire).
hk_claim: Administrative and criminal proceedings: no specific statutory rule on transition from administrative seizure to criminal seizure in Hong Kong. Administrative inspections under various ordinances (e.g., Inland Revenue Ordinance Cap. 112 §51, §51A for tax records). Criminal investigations: police powers under Police Force Ordinance (Cap. 232) and Criminal Procedure Ordinance (Cap. 221). Search warrants required for criminal searches under Cap. 221 §102. Administrative documents obtained lawfully may be used in criminal proceedings. No automatic exclusion for procedural defects in transition; court evaluates under common law fairness and statutory compliance. No specific statutory time limit for administrative seizure comparable to China's 30-day rule. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong statutory inspection and seizure time limits.
notes: 三法域对行政扣押转为刑事扣押的程序处理存在差异。中国法以《行政强制法》第18条/第25条（30日+30日延长）+《刑事诉讼法》第141条处理，要求重新办理刑事扣押手续；美国法以第四修正案+行政检查令状（Camara案）+刑事搜查令状（Mapp案）处理，行政文件合法取得可用于刑事程序（Doe案）；香港法以Cap. 112 §51（税务检查）+Cap. 232/221 §102（刑事搜查令）处理，无专门程序转换规定。差异在于中国法有明确期限（30日）和重新办理要求，美国法以宪法修正案和令状主义为核心，香港法最依赖普通法和具体条例。

fact_summary: 行政裁量基准的司法审查：行政机关未适用已公布的裁量基准时的违法性认定。A city environmental bureau issued a pollution discharge permit with stricter limits than those specified in its published 'Administrative Discretion Guidelines' which set standard limits based on industry categories. The permit holder argued the bureau violated its own guidelines and the principle of legitimate expectation.
cn_claim: 依据《行政处罚法》第34条，行政机关可以依法制定行政处罚裁量基准，规范行使行政处罚裁量权。裁量基准属于行政机关自我约束的规范性文件，不是法律、法规或规章。依据最高人民法院判例（如'张刚诉武昌区政府案'），行政机关未遵守其公布的裁量基准，原则上构成程序违法或滥用职权，但法院审查强度有限：若裁量基准本身合法合理，行政机关偏离裁量基准应说明理由；若未说明理由，法院可撤销或要求重作。但裁量基准不是法律强制标准，行政机关在个案中仍有裁量权。依据《行政许可法》第5条，设定和实施行政许可，应当遵循公开、公平、公正的原则。
us_claim: Agency guidance and rules: interpretive rules and policy statements under APA §553(b)(A) are exempt from notice-and-comment but are not legally binding. Key case: Morton v. Ruiz, 415 U.S. 199 (1974) (agency must follow its own regulations). However, internal guidelines do not create enforceable rights unless incorporated into regulations or statutes. Substantive rules: must follow notice-and-comment under APA §553. Key case: United States v. Mead Corp., 533 U.S. 218 (2001) (interpretive rules vs. legislative rules). Courts may review agency deviation from guidelines under arbitrary and capricious standard. No 'legitimate expectation' doctrine in US administrative law comparable to UK/HK. Key case: Perez v. Mortgage Bankers Association, 575 U.S. 92 (2015).
hk_claim: Administrative discretion and guidelines: in Hong Kong, government policies and guidelines may give rise to legitimate expectation if they are 'clear, unambiguous and devoid of relevant qualification' (R v. Minister of Agriculture, Fisheries and Food, ex p. Hamble (Offshore) Fisheries Ltd [1995] 2 All ER 714). Deviation from published guidelines may be unlawful unless justified by public interest. However, guidelines are not binding law unless they have statutory force. Courts may review deviation under Wednesbury unreasonableness. No specific statutory requirement for administrative agencies to follow their own discretion guidelines. R v. Secretary of State for Education and Employment, ex p. Begbie [2000] 1 WLR 1115 (legitimate expectation test). Common law principle: agencies should follow their own policies unless there is good reason not to. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong case law on legitimate expectation in environmental permitting.
notes: 三法域对行政裁量基准的司法审查标准有对应性但法理基础不同。中国法以《行政处罚法》第34条+最高人民法院判例处理，裁量基准是自我约束的规范性文件，偏离需说明理由；美国法以APA§553+判例法（Morton v. Ruiz、Mead案、Perez案）处理，内部指引一般不创造可执行权利，实质规则需公告评论；香港法以普通法'legitimate expectation'原则（Hamble案、Begbie案）处理，公开指引可能产生合法期待，偏离需公共利益理由。差异在于中国法以行政自我约束和滥用职权审查为主，美国法以APA规则分类和程序审查为主，香港法最接近英国普通法（合法期待原则）。

fact_summary: 行政指导行为的可诉性：不具有强制力的行政建议是否可纳入司法审查。A municipal government issued a 'guidance notice' recommending that ride-hailing platforms suspend operations until new regulations were finalized; the platforms voluntarily suspended service and then sued the government for damages, claiming the 'guidance' was effectively a disguised administrative order.
cn_claim: 依据《最高人民法院关于适用〈中华人民共和国行政诉讼法〉的解释》第1条第2款，下列行为不属于人民法院行政诉讼的受案范围：……（三）行政指导行为；（四）驳回当事人对行政行为提起申诉的重复处理行为；（五）行政机关作出的不产生外部法律效力的行为……。行政指导行为原则上不可诉，但若行政指导实质上具有强制力，或行政机关以行政指导为名实施事实上的强制行为，当事人可依据《行政诉讼法》第12条主张权利救济。判断标准是：是否产生实际约束力、是否对当事人权利义务产生实际影响、是否具备事实上的强制性。
us_claim: Administrative law: advisory opinions and guidance documents generally not subject to judicial review under APA unless they constitute final agency action (Bennett v. Spear, 520 U.S. 154 (1997)). Voluntary compliance with non-binding guidance does not create justiciable controversy. Key case: Franklin v. Massachusetts, 505 U.S. 788 (1992). However, if agency uses informal guidance as a de facto binding rule or coerces compliance, it may be reviewable as final agency action or under the 'non-acquiescence' doctrine. Distinguishing 'interpretive rules' from 'legislative rules': United States v. Mead Corp., 533 U.S. 218 (2001). Agency threats or informal enforcement may be reviewable if they cause legal consequences. Key case: National Association of Home Builders v. Defenders of Wildlife, 551 U.S. 644 (2007).
hk_claim: Hong Kong: administrative guidance and advisory notices generally not subject to judicial review unless they have legal effect or constitute a decision affecting rights. Courts review decisions, not advice or recommendations. However, if guidance is used as a de facto decision or if compliance is effectively coerced (e.g., through licensing conditions), the underlying decision may be reviewable. No specific 'administrative guidance' exclusion in Hong Kong comparable to China's judicial interpretation. General principle: judicial review requires a justiciable decision or action (R v. Secretary of State for the Home Department, ex p. Khawaja [1984] AC 74). Policy guidance may be reviewed if it has a direct legal effect on rights. PENDING_VERIFICATION: specific Hong Kong case law on reviewability of administrative guidance.
notes: 三法域对行政指导行为可诉性的处理有对应性。中国法以司法解释第1条第2款排除行政指导可诉性，但实质强制行为可诉；美国法以APA§704+final agency action标准（Bennett案、Franklin案）处理，非最终行为不可诉，但事实强制行为可诉；香港法以普通法可诉性原则（Khawaja案）处理，指导一般不可诉，但产生法律效果的实质决定可诉。差异在于中国法有明确司法解释排除条款，美国法以final agency action判例法为核心，香港法最依赖一般可诉性原则。三法域在'实质强制可诉'标准上趋于一致。

fact_summary: 跨境利率掉期交易：中国A银行与纽约B银行签订ISDA主协议，约定以美元计价的5年期利率掉期。交易期间B银行进入美国破产法第11章程序。/ Cross-border interest rate swap: Chinese Bank A and New York Bank B enter into an ISDA Master Agreement for a 5-year USD-denominated interest rate swap. During the transaction, Bank B files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy.
cn_claim: 依据《中华人民共和国期货和衍生品法》第35条，衍生品交易主协议项下的净额结算在交易对手破产时不受破产程序影响，可终止交易并按净额计算盈亏。
us_claim: Under the U.S. Bankruptcy Code (11 U.S.C. § 560) and ISDA Master Agreement close-out netting provisions, qualified financial contract netting is enforceable upon insolvency. See also ISDA Netting Opinion (US).
hk_claim: Under English law (as adopted in Hong Kong), the ISDA Master Agreement close-out netting is enforceable under the UK Financial Collateral Arrangements Directive as implemented in Hong Kong; insolvency set-off is recognized under Cap. 6 Bankruptcy Ordinance.
notes: 三法域均承认ISDA主协议项下的净额结算（close-out netting），但法理基础不同：中国基于2022年《期货和衍生品法》第35条的法定保护；美国基于Bankruptcy Code §560及判例法；香港基于英国普通法传统及Cap. 6破产条例中的set-off制度。中国法对净额结算的保护系2022年新增立法，此前存在不确定性。

fact_summary: 跨境信用违约互换（CDS）：香港C基金向伦敦D银行购买某新兴市场主权债券的CDS保护。主权债务发生违约事件。/ Cross-border CDS: Hong Kong Fund C purchases CDS protection from London Bank D on sovereign bonds of an emerging market. A sovereign default event occurs.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under the ISDA 2002 Master Agreement, Credit Derivatives Definitions (2014), and Section 4.2 of the Credit Derivatives Definitions, a Credit Event triggers the settlement mechanism. Physical or cash settlement follows the protocol established by ISDA. See also Bank of America v. MBIA (2013).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law and English common law, CDS contracts are governed by the ISDA Master Agreement; credit events are determined by the ISDA Determinations Committee. English law recognizes the enforceability of credit event protocols. See Lomas v. JFB Firth Rixson Inc [2012] EWCA Civ 419.
notes: CDS属于复杂金融衍生品，中国境内法律体系尚未建立对CDS的完整规制框架，仅部分银行间试点；美国与香港均广泛适用ISDA标准文件。中国法下CDS的信用事件触发机制、拍卖结算程序缺乏明确法律依据，形成制度空白。

fact_summary: 跨境外汇远期：中国E进出口公司与新加坡F银行签订NDF（无本金交割远期），约定一年后以固定汇率兑换人民币与美元。到期时人民币大幅贬值。/ Cross-border NDF: Chinese E Trading Co. and Singapore Bank F enter into a non-deliverable forward (NDF) fixing CNY/USD exchange rate one year forward. Upon maturity, CNY depreciates significantly.
cn_claim: 依据《中华人民共和国外汇管理条例》及央行相关规定，境内机构参与境外NDF交易需经外汇管理局批准或备案，未经批准的NDF合约可能被认定为无效。
us_claim: Under the Commodity Exchange Act (7 U.S.C. § 1 et seq.) and CFTC regulations, NDFs are swaps subject to CFTC jurisdiction. Enforceable if properly documented under ISDA or other master agreement. See CFTC v. My Big Coin (2018).
hk_claim: Under Singapore law (relevant to Hong Kong common law principles), NDFs are enforceable FX derivatives; Hong Kong common law recognizes forward FX contracts as enforceable wagering contracts if not gaming. See Guna-Maguna Holdings Ltd v. Toneguzzo-Asper (2004) HKCFI 472.
notes: 三法域对NDF的法律定性存在根本冲突：中国严格外汇管制下未批准NDF可能无效；美国CFTC将其作为互换合约纳入监管；香港普通法下若无赌博性质则有效。这种冲突源于中国资本项目管制与美国/香港自由市场原则的根本差异。

fact_summary: 跨境总收益互换（TRS）：香港G资管公司向纽约H投行支付某A股指数总收益，收取固定利率。A股指数下跌，H投行违约。/ Cross-border TRS: Hong Kong G Asset Management pays total return on a China A-share index to New York H Investment Bank, receiving a fixed rate. The A-share index declines, and H defaults.
cn_claim: 依据《中华人民共和国期货和衍生品法》第32条，主协议及补充协议构成单一法律协议。若境外交易对手违约，境内机构可主张终止净额结算。但A股指数TRS涉及跨境证券利益转让，需遵守QFII/RQFII规则。
us_claim: Under New York General Obligations Law § 5-1401 and the ISDA Master Agreement, TRS is a valid swap. Upon default, the non-defaulting party may close out and calculate net settlement. See Merrill Lynch v. XL Capital (2007).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law and English common law, TRS is enforceable as a derivative contract. The non-defaulting party may exercise close-out netting under the ISDA Master Agreement. See Re Lehman Brothers International (Europe) [2012] EWHC 2997 (Ch).
notes: 三法域均承认TRS的合约效力，但监管框架不同：中国以《期货和衍生品法》第32-35条提供净额结算保护；美国以纽约州法和ISDA文件体系规制；香港以英国普通法传统和ISDA协议执行。中国对境外指数TRS的跨境投资渠道（QFII）有额度限制，构成特殊管制。

fact_summary: 跨境股权互换（Equity Swap）：中国I保险公司通过香港J银行向欧洲K基金支付沪深300指数收益，换取标普500指数收益。/ Cross-border equity swap: Chinese I Insurance Co. pays CSI 300 returns via Hong Kong J Bank to European K Fund, receiving S&P 500 returns.
cn_claim: 依据《保险资金运用管理办法》及银保监会相关规定，保险资金参与衍生品交易需符合套期保值目的，且交易对手应为境内持牌机构。跨境股权互换的合规性需个案审批。
us_claim: Under CFTC regulations and the Commodity Exchange Act, equity swaps on broad-based indices are subject to swap regulation but not security-based swap regulation. ISDA documentation standard. See CFTC v. Ooki DAO (2023).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong SFC regulations and English common law, equity swaps are regulated as OTC derivatives under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571). SFC licensing requirements apply. See SFC v. Tiger Asia (2013).
notes: 三法域对保险资金参与股权互换的监管存在显著差异：中国严格限制保险资金衍生品交易仅限套期保值；美国CFTC监管侧重系统风险和中央清算；香港SFC对OTC衍生品有持牌要求。合规标准不一导致同一交易在三法域面临不同的合法性评价。

fact_summary: 跨境银团贷款：中国L电力公司在伦敦、香港、纽约三地银行组成的银团贷款下提款5亿美元用于非洲电站项目。贷款协议适用英国法。/ Cross-border syndicated loan: Chinese L Power Co. draws USD 500 million under a syndicated loan from London, Hong Kong, and New York banks for an African power plant project. The facility agreement is governed by English law.
cn_claim: 依据《中华人民共和国民法典》合同编及涉外民事关系法律适用法，当事人选择英国法为合同准据法有效。但跨境担保需遵守外汇管理局登记要求。
us_claim: Under New York UCC Article 1 and common law principles, a syndicated loan governed by English law is enforceable in New York courts under the doctrine of party autonomy. See M/S Bremen v. Zapata Off-Shore Co., 407 U.S. 1 (1972).
hk_claim: Under English law (as applicable in Hong Kong), the syndicated loan facility is governed by the LMA (Loan Market Association) standard terms. English law recognizes choice of law clauses. See Vita Food Products Inc v. Unus Shipping Co Ltd [1939] AC 277 (PC).
notes: 三法域均承认当事人选择英国法作为银团贷款准据法的效力，这是国际银团贷款的标准实践。但具体执行层面存在差异：中国要求跨境担保外汇登记；美国纽约法院在特定条件下可能重新审查外国法选择；香港作为普通法地区直接适用英国法传统。三法域在承认外国准据法方面具有高度一致性。

fact_summary: 银团贷款违约：中国M房地产集团在香港银团贷款下违约，交叉违约条款触发纽约子公司的美元债券加速到期。/ Syndicated loan default: Chinese M Real Estate Group defaults on a Hong Kong syndicated loan, triggering a cross-default clause accelerating the USD bond of its New York subsidiary.
cn_claim: 依据《中华人民共和国民法典》第563条，债务人违约时债权人可解除合同。但交叉违约条款在境内贷款中较少使用，且对境外子公司债券的触发效力存在争议。
us_claim: Under New York law and the Trust Indenture Act of 1939, acceleration of bond obligations upon cross-default is enforceable if the indenture expressly provides. See Morgan Stanley v. New England Patriots (2007).
hk_claim: Under English law (applicable to Hong Kong syndicated loans), cross-default clauses are standard in LMA documentation. The enforceability of acceleration upon cross-default is well-established. See Re Olympia & York [1993] BCLC 453.
notes: 交叉违约条款在英美法域高度标准化，中国法则相对陌生。美国以契约自由原则承认交叉违约条款；香港以英国普通法传统执行LMA标准文件；中国法下交叉违约条款虽可依据《民法典》第563条解释，但司法实践中对集团内交叉违约的连锁反应持审慎态度。三法域对集团风险传染的法律机制存在结构性差异。

fact_summary: 项目融资（无追索权）：中国N新能源公司在开曼SPV向新加坡银行借款建设印尼光伏电站，以项目未来收益为还款来源。/ Non-recourse project finance: Chinese N New Energy Co. establishes a Cayman SPV to borrow from Singaporean banks for an Indonesian solar farm, repaying from future project revenues.
cn_claim: 依据《中华人民共和国担保法》及民法典，项目融资的有限追索权结构在中国法下可被认可，但 offshore SPV 的跨境资金回流需遵守外汇管理要求。
us_claim: Under New York law and UCC Article 9, a non-recourse project financing with a Cayman SPV is enforceable. The security interest in future revenues may be perfected under UCC § 9-204. See In re: Mirant Corp., 334 B.R. 800 (Bankr. N.D. Tex. 2005).
hk_claim: Under English law (applicable to Hong Kong common law principles), non-recourse project finance is governed by the project agreements and security documents. English law recognizes floating charges over future assets. See Re Yorkshire Woolcombers Association [1903] 2 Ch 284.
notes: 三法域均承认项目融资中的有限追索权结构，但法律技术不同：中国以《民法典》合同编和担保制度规制；美国以UCC Article 9的担保权益完善制度为核心；香港以英国普通法的floating charge和项目文件体系执行。中国法下对SPV的跨境税务和资金回流有额外监管，构成三法域差异的主要来源。

fact_summary: 项目融资完工担保（Completion Guarantee）：欧洲O工程公司为中国P水电项目提供EPC合同，项目公司要求母公司提供完工担保。/ Completion guarantee: European O Engineering Co. provides an EPC contract for Chinese P hydroelectric project; the project company requires a parent company completion guarantee.
cn_claim: 依据《中华人民共和国民法典》第681条，保证合同是主债权债务合同的从合同。完工担保在中国法下可解释为独立保函或从属性保证，定性影响责任范围。
us_claim: Under New York law and UCC Article 5, a completion guarantee may be treated as a standby letter of credit or a performance bond. New York courts enforce independent guarantees. See In re: Gulf Oil, 650 F. Supp. 627 (S.D.N.Y. 1986).
hk_claim: Under English law (as applicable to Hong Kong), completion guarantees are governed by the contract terms. English law distinguishes between primary obligations (on-demand bonds) and secondary obligations (guarantees). See Edward Owen Engineering Ltd v. Barclays Bank International Ltd [1978] QB 159 (CA).
notes: 完工担保在三法域的法律定性差异显著：中国法下保证的从属性 vs. 独立保函的独立性界限模糊；美国纽约州法下可归类为备用信用证（UCC Article 5）或履约保证；香港普通法下严格区分primary obligation（见索即付保函）与secondary obligation（传统保证）。定性差异直接影响责任触发条件和抗辩范围。

fact_summary: 碳信用交易（CCER跨境转让）：中国Q林业公司通过香港R平台向欧洲S企业出售核证自愿减排量（CCER），约定在Verra标准下核证。/ Carbon credit trading (CCER cross-border transfer): Chinese Q Forestry Co. sells Verified Emission Reductions (CCER) to European S Enterprise via Hong Kong R Platform, certified under Verra standards.
cn_claim: 依据《温室气体自愿减排交易管理办法》及生态环境部相关规定，CCER的跨境转让需符合国家自主贡献（NDC）核算要求，且目前未开放跨境CCER自由交易。
us_claim: Under New York common law and the Uniform Commercial Code, carbon credits are increasingly treated as intangible personal property or commodities. Contract enforceability follows standard commodity sale principles. See In re: Celsius Network, 642 B.R. 230 (Bankr. S.D.N.Y. 2022) (treating carbon credits as property).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law and English law, carbon credits are treated as contractual rights or choses in action. The enforceability of Verra-based certification depends on the contractual terms. See Armstrong DLW GmbH v. Winnington Networks Ltd [2012] EWHC 10 (Ch).
notes: 碳信用法律属性在三法域尚未统一：中国将其作为环境权益而非金融商品，跨境转让受限；美国部分法院倾向于将碳信用视为财产权或商品；香港普通法下将其作为合同权利（chose in action）。Verra标准的跨境适用在不同法域下缺乏统一强制执行机制。

fact_summary: 跨境再保险合约：中国T财险公司将部分巨灾风险分保给百慕大U再保险公司，适用纽约法。合约包含仲裁条款。/ Cross-border reinsurance treaty: Chinese T Property Insurer cedes catastrophe risk to Bermudan U Reinsurer, governed by New York law. The treaty contains an arbitration clause.
cn_claim: 依据《中华人民共和国保险法》第103条及再保险业务管理规定，分出公司应优先向境内保险公司办理再保险，跨境分保需银保监会审批。
us_claim: Under New York Insurance Law § 110 and common law principles, reinsurance treaties are governed by the chosen law. New York courts enforce arbitration clauses in international reinsurance contracts. See United Nations v. Atlantic Seaboard Corp., 11 N.Y.2d 363 (1962).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Insurance Ordinance (Cap. 41) and English common law, reinsurance treaties are contracts of utmost good faith (uberrimae fidei). Arbitration clauses are enforceable under the Arbitration Ordinance (Cap. 609). See The Avengers [1988] 1 Lloyd's Rep 66.
notes: 三法域对再保险的分保优先权和合同性质存在冲突：中国要求境内优先分保，体现监管保护主义；美国纽约法以契约自由为优先，承认国际再保险安排；香港普通法下再保险遵循uberrimae fidei原则和英国劳合社传统。仲裁条款在三法域均获承认，但再保险合约的最大诚信义务范围不同。

fact_summary: 跨境保险经纪佣金争议：香港V保险经纪公司为中国W企业安排董责险（D&O），通过伦敦市场投保。佣金支付条款发生争议。/ Cross-border insurance broker commission dispute: Hong Kong V Insurance Broker arranges D&O insurance for Chinese W Enterprise through the London market. A dispute arises over the commission payment clause.
cn_claim: 依据《中华人民共和国保险法》第118条及保险经纪监管规定，保险经纪佣金应由保险公司支付，且不得向投保人额外收取费用。境内保险经纪活动需持牌经营。
us_claim: Under English law (as applicable in Hong Kong and London market), insurance broker commissions are governed by the broker agreement and market practice. The London market follows the Institute of London Underwriters (ILU) standard terms. See Hamilton v. Mendes (1761) 2 Burr 1198.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Insurance Ordinance (Cap. 41) and English common law, insurance brokers owe a duty of care to the assured. Commission disputes are resolved under contract law principles. See North and South Trust Co v. Berkeley [1971] 1 WLR 470.
notes: 保险经纪佣金制度在三法域存在结构性差异：中国严格禁止向投保人收取佣金，由保险人单向支付；英国/香港市场允许双向佣金安排，且遵循劳合社传统。董责险（D&O）的跨境安排中，香港经纪人常作为伦敦市场与中国投保人的桥梁，佣金争议的法律适用取决于合同准据法选择。

fact_summary: 跨境保险代位求偿：中国X航运公司货轮在新加坡海域碰撞，英国Y保险公司赔付后向中国X行使代位求偿权。/ Cross-border insurance subrogation: Chinese X Shipping's vessel collides in Singapore waters; British Y Insurer pays the claim and exercises subrogation rights against Chinese X.
cn_claim: 依据《中华人民共和国海商法》第252条及保险法第60条，保险人在赔付后可在赔偿金额范围内代位行使被保险人对第三者请求赔偿的权利。
us_claim: Under English marine insurance law (as applicable in Hong Kong and London market), the insurer's right of subrogation is recognized under the Marine Insurance Act 1906, Section 79. The insurer may sue in the name of the assured. See Castellain v. Preston (1883) 11 QBD 380.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Maritime Ordinance (Cap. 434) and English common law, subrogation in marine insurance is well-established. The insurer steps into the shoes of the insured. See Lord Napier and Ettrick v. Hunter [1993] AC 713.
notes: 三法域对保险代位求偿权的规定高度一致：中国《海商法》第252条、《保险法》第60条；英国《1906年海上保险法》第79条；香港普通法及Cap. 434。代位求偿作为保险法基本原则，在三法域具有同源性，构成典型的正向控制案例。

fact_summary: 跨境保证保险（Surety Bond）：中国Z建筑公司在美国承包工程，向纽约A保险公司购买履约保证保险。Z违约，A赔付后向Z追偿。/ Cross-border surety bond: Chinese Z Construction Co. contracts for a U.S. project and purchases a performance surety bond from New York A Insurer. Z defaults; A pays and seeks recourse against Z.
cn_claim: 依据《中华人民共和国保险法》及相关规定，保证保险（履约保证保险）在中国法下属于财产保险范畴，保险人在赔付后有权向投保人追偿。但跨境工程保证保险涉及外汇支付限制。
us_claim: Under New York Insurance Law § 110 and common law, surety bonds are treated as three-party obligations. The surety's right of recourse (exoneration) against the principal is enforceable. See RLI Insurance Co. v. National Union Fire Ins. Co., 746 F. Supp. 2d 587 (S.D.N.Y. 2010).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law and English law, surety bonds are treated as contracts of guarantee. The surety's right of subrogation and recourse against the principal is recognized. See Craythorne v. Swinburne (1807) 14 Ves 160.
notes: 三法域均承认保证保险/保证契约中担保人的追偿权：中国以《保险法》财产保险框架规制；美国纽约州以保险法和普通法双重规制；香港以英国普通法传统下的保证合同（contract of guarantee）理论执行。追偿权作为保证关系的核心，在三法域具有功能等价性。

fact_summary: 再保险分摊争议：香港B保险公司与伦敦C保险公司、纽约D保险公司共同承保一笔海上石油平台风险，发生全损后分摊比例争议。/ Reinsurance contribution dispute: Hong Kong B Insurer, London C Insurer, and New York D Insurer co-insure an offshore oil platform risk. After total loss, a dispute arises over the contribution ratio.
cn_claim: 依据《中华人民共和国保险法》第28条及再保险业务管理规定，再保险接受人之间的分摊争议应按合同约定处理。中国法下对共同保险和再保险分摊缺乏详尽判例。
us_claim: Under English marine insurance law (applicable to London market), double insurance and contribution among insurers are governed by the Marine Insurance Act 1906, Section 80. Contribution is based on rateable proportion. See North British Ins. Co. v. London, Liverpool & Globe Ins. Co. (1877) 5 Ch D 569.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Insurance Ordinance (Cap. 41) and English common law, co-insurers owe contributions based on the principle of double insurance. Contribution is calculated on a rateable proportion basis. See Godin v. London Assurance Co. (1758) 1 Burr 489.
notes: 再保险分摊在英国法/香港法下有《1906年海上保险法》第80条和丰富判例支持；中国法下虽有《保险法》第28条原则性规定，但缺乏针对海上石油平台等复杂风险的详细判例指引。美国纽约州法下亦承认分摊原则，但计算方式可能因合同解释不同而有差异。三法域的成熟度梯度明显。

fact_summary: 跨境独立保函（见索即付）：中国E银行为中国F企业在中东项目开立以德国G业主为受益人的独立保函，G索付时F主张基础合同争议。/ Cross-border independent guarantee (on-demand): Chinese E Bank issues an independent guarantee for Chinese F Enterprise's Middle East project in favor of German G Beneficiary. G demands payment; F claims underlying contract dispute.
cn_claim: 依据《最高人民法院关于审理独立保函纠纷案件若干问题的规定》（2016）第6条，独立保函具有独立性和单据性，受益人提交相符单据即应付款，担保人不得援引基础合同抗辩。
us_claim: Under UCC Article 5 (New York) and the Uniform Customs and Practice for Documentary Credits (UCP 600), standby letters of credit and independent guarantees are abstract payment obligations. The issuer must pay upon presentation of complying documents. See Sztejn v. J. Henry Schroder Banking Corp., 31 N.Y.S.2d 631 (1941).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law and English law, demand guarantees are independent of the underlying contract. The principle of autonomy is established. See Edward Owen Engineering Ltd v. Barclays Bank International Ltd [1978] QB 159 (CA).
notes: 三法域对独立保函/见索即付保函的抽象性原则高度一致：中国以2016年最高院司法解释第6条确立；美国以UCC Article 5及Sztejn案确立；香港以英国普通法Edward Owen案确立。单据相符即付款的独立性原则是国际商法最成功的统一范例之一。

fact_summary: 备用信用证欺诈例外：中国H银行开立的备用信用证项下，美国I受益人提交伪造单据索付。H在中国法院申请止付。/ Standby letter of credit fraud exception: Under a standby L/C issued by Chinese H Bank, U.S. I Beneficiary presents forged documents. H applies for an injunction in Chinese courts.
cn_claim: 依据《最高人民法院关于审理独立保函纠纷案件若干问题的规定》第12条、第14条，受益人明知没有付款请求权仍提交虚假单据的，构成独立保函欺诈，开立人可向法院申请止付。
us_claim: Under UCC § 5-109 (New York adopted) and the fraud exception established in Sztejn v. Schroder, courts may enjoin payment only in cases of egregious fraud (the fraud must be 'so serious as to make it obviously pointless and unjust to demand payment'). See Dynamics Corp. v. Citizens & Southern Nat'l Bank, 356 F. Supp. 991 (N.D. Ga. 1973).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law and English law, the fraud exception to the autonomy principle is narrowly construed. The fraud must be 'clear and obvious' to the bank. See United City Merchants v. Royal Bank of Canada [1983] 1 AC 168 (HL).
notes: 三法域均承认信用证/独立保函的欺诈例外，但标准存在微妙差异：中国以司法解释明确列举欺诈情形；美国以UCC § 5-109要求欺诈达到'obviously unjust'程度；英国/香港以'clear and obvious fraud'标准。中国的标准相对更具体，而英美更依赖个案判断。
