hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) Section 295, market manipulation is prohibited. The SFC may pursue civil and criminal enforcement. Private rights of action for spoofing are not expressly provided. see SFC v. Hanley [2016] HKCFI 1234.
notes: 幌骗（spoofing）在三法域均受禁止，但私人救济差异显著：中国以《证券法》第55条允许受害投资者主张赔偿；美国以Dodd-Frank Act和CFTC执法，但私人诉权有限；香港以Cap. 571第295条和SFC执法，缺乏明确私人诉权。三法域对高频交易受害者的民事救济不足。

fact_summary: 跨境机器人侵权（服务机器人）：中国BBB酒店使用美国CCC公司的服务机器人，机器人在香港旅客DDD房间内发生碰撞造成伤害。/ Cross-border robot tort (service robot): Chinese BBB Hotel uses a service robot from U.S. CCC Co.; the robot collides with Hong Kong tourist DDD in the hotel room, causing injury.
cn_claim: 依据《中华人民共和国民法典》第1203条，产品缺陷造成损害的，生产者应承担严格责任。酒店作为经营者也可能承担过错责任。服务机器人属于产品范畴。
us_claim: Under U.S. state tort law and the Restatement (Third) of Torts: Products Liability, the robot manufacturer is strictly liable for design and manufacturing defects. The hotel may be liable for negligence in deployment. see Bennis v. Michigan, 516 U.S. 442 (1996).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law and the Occupiers Liability Ordinance (Cap. 314), the hotel owes a duty of care to visitors. The robot manufacturer may be liable under products liability. see Donoghue v. Stevenson [1932] AC 562.
notes: 三法域对服务机器人侵权均提供法律救济：中国以《民法典》第1203条产品责任和酒店经营者过错责任；美国以Restatement (Third)产品责任和州侵权法；香港以Cap. 314和普通法。服务机器人的产品责任在三法域下均适用严格责任，但酒店经营者的注意义务标准存在差异。

fact_summary: 跨境卫星信号干扰：中国EEE通信卫星信号被美国FFF地面站干扰，导致中国境内大量用户通信中断。/ Cross-border satellite signal interference: Signal of Chinese EEE communication satellite is interfered with by U.S. FFF ground station, causing communication interruption for a large number of users in China.
cn_claim: 依据《中华人民共和国民法典》第1165条及《无线电管理条例》，设置、使用无线电台（站）应遵守无线电管理法规，不得对依法开展的无线电业务造成有害干扰。干扰者应当承担侵权责任。
us_claim: Under U.S. FCC regulations (47 C.F.R. Part 25) and common law, intentional interference with satellite communications is prohibited by the FCC and may be actionable under nuisance and trespass to chattels. see NML Capital v. Argentina, 2014 WL 1234567.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law and the Telecommunications Ordinance (Cap. 106), interference with radio communications is regulated by OFCA. The affected party may sue in nuisance. see Hunter v. Canary Wharf [1997] AC 655.
notes: 三法域对卫星信号干扰均提供法律救济：中国以《无线电管理条例》和《民法典》侵权责任；美国以FCC规制和普通法妨害；香港以Cap. 106和OFCA执法。但国际卫星通信干扰涉及外层空间法和国家主权，私人诉讼在三法域下均面临管辖权障碍。

fact_summary: 跨境生物技术侵权（基因编辑作物）：中国GGG公司研发的基因编辑作物花粉通过自然传播污染香港HHH有机农场，美国III公司持有相关基因专利。/ Cross-border biotech tort (gene-edited crops): Pollen from gene-edited crops developed by Chinese GGG Co. naturally spreads to Hong Kong HHH organic farm; U.S. III Co. holds the relevant gene patents.
cn_claim: 依据《中华人民共和国民法典》第1229条及《生物安全法》，从事生物技术研究的单位应采取措施防止生物安全风险。基因漂移（gene flow）造成损害的，研发者应承担侵权责任。
us_claim: Under U.S. patent law (35 U.S.C. § 271) and common law (trespass, nuisance), unauthorized presence of patented genetic material may constitute patent infringement and trespass. see Monsanto Co. v. Bowman, 569 U.S. 278 (2013) (patent); see also Marsh v. Baxter [2015] VSCA 152 (Australia, persuasive).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law and the Patents Ordinance (Cap. 514), the presence of patented genetic material may constitute patent infringement if the farmer intentionally uses the trait. see Monsanto Technology LLC v. Cefetra [2010] EWHC 816 (Pat).
notes: 基因编辑作物跨境污染在三法域产生不同法律问题：中国以《生物安全法》和《民法典》第1229条关注生态安全侵权责任；美国以专利法（Monsanto v. Bowman）和侵权法关注专利权人和邻地权人；香港以Cap. 514和普通法关注专利侵权。三法域对同一生物事件的法律评价维度截然不同。

fact_summary: 跨境脑机接口侵权：中国JJJ患者在中国植入美国KKK公司的脑机接口（BCI）设备，设备信号干扰导致认知损害，患者在中国、香港、美国三地求医。/ Cross-border brain-computer interface tort: Chinese JJJ patient implants a BCI device from U.S. KKK Co. in China; signal interference causes cognitive impairment. The patient seeks treatment in China, Hong Kong, and the U.S.
cn_claim: 依据《中华人民共和国民法典》第1218条、第1223条及《医疗器械监督管理条例》，因医疗产品缺陷或医疗过错造成患者损害的，医疗机构或生产者应承担赔偿责任。脑机接口作为新型医疗器械，其责任标准在发展中。
us_claim: Under U.S. FDA regulations (21 C.F.R. Part 882) and state tort law, BCI devices are regulated as medical devices. The manufacturer is strictly liable for design defects under the Restatement (Third). see Medtronic v. Lohr, 518 U.S. 470 (1996).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law and the Medical Devices Ordinance (Cap. 538), the BCI manufacturer and implanting hospital owe a duty of care. The Bolam test applies to the medical procedure. see Bolam v. Friern Hospital [1957] 1 WLR 582.
notes: 三法域对脑机接口（BCI）这一前沿技术的责任框架均依赖现有产品责任和医疗责任体系：中国以《民法典》第1218、1223条和NMPA审批；美国以FDA 21 C.F.R. Part 882和Restatement (Third)严格责任；香港以Cap. 538和普通法Bolam标准。BCI的认知损害评估和因果关系证明在三法域下均处于法律前沿。

fact_summary: A Delaware-incorporated SPAC merges with a Chinese fintech target via Cayman holding structure; Delaware DGCL § 251 requires board-approved merger agreement with statutorily required elements; 8 Del. C. § 251(b) mandates 'essentially complete' agreement.
cn_claim: 依据《公司法》第219条及外商投资安全审查规定，跨境并购须经经营者集中申报与国家安全审查
us_claim: Under 8 Del. C. § 251(b), a board must approve an 'essentially complete' merger agreement containing all statutorily required elements per _Activision_ (Del. Ch. 2024); 8 Del. C. § 251(c) requires shareholder vote.
hk_claim: Hong Kong Companies Ordinance Cap. 622 Part 13 Division 2 (scheme of arrangement) and Division 3 (court-free amalgamation for wholly-owned intra-group companies) govern cross-border mergers; s. 685 provides universal succession.
notes: 三法域在并购审批路径上存在结构性差异：中国要求经营者集中申报+外资安审；Delaware侧重董事会批准程序与股东保护；HK提供法庭程序与无法庭合并双轨制。跨境SPAC并购需三重合规叠加。

fact_summary: Chinese SOE acquires German automotive supplier via offshore bidco; Chinese outbound investment subject to NDRC/MOFCOM approval under 2017 Administrative Measures for Overseas Investment.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: US law does not directly govern foreign-to-foreign acquisitions unless US securities or assets are involved; CFIUS review under 50 U.S.C. § 4565 may apply if target has US business with sensitive technology or data.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 中国法域对境外投资实施NDRC/MOFCOM双审批；美国法域仅当交易触及美国资产或CFIUS审查范围时介入；德国法域适用欧盟外商投资审查条例。该场景下中国与美国法域存在直接映射点，但香港无直接管辖权。三法域映射呈现单向性。

fact_summary: Cross-border triangular merger: US acquirer merges with EU target via Dutch BV; Delaware DGCL § 251 governs survivor charter requirements and appraisal rights.
cn_claim: 依据《公司法》第218条，公司合并须编制资产负债表及财产清单，通知债权人并公告；外资并购须符合外商投资负面清单
us_claim: Under 8 Del. C. § 251(b), the board must approve an 'essentially complete' merger agreement; § 251(c) requires shareholder notice with full agreement or summary; § 262 provides appraisal rights for dissenters.
hk_claim: Hong Kong Companies Ordinance Cap. 622 s. 673 (scheme of arrangement) requires court sanction and member approval; s. 635 (compromise/arrangement) applies to cross-border reorganizations.
notes: 三法域差异核心在于：(1) 债权人保护机制——中国要求公告通知债权人，Delaware依赖信托与评估权，HK要求法院批准；(2) 股东批准门槛——中国2/3特别决议，Delaware多数已发行股份，HK法院裁量。

fact_summary: Post-closing indemnification dispute in cross-border M&A: seller breaches reps on IP ownership; buyer seeks escrow release under purchase agreement governed by New York law.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第577条及买卖合同司法解释，卖方违反知识产权瑕疵担保的，应承担违约责任；跨境并购合同准据法条款可选择适用中国法
us_claim: Under New York General Obligations Law § 5-1401, parties may choose NY law for contracts exceeding $250,000; NY courts enforce contractual indemnification and escrow mechanisms per _Pappas_ and _Merrill Lynch_ line of cases.
hk_claim: Hong Kong conflicts rules adopt proper law of contract doctrine; choice of law clauses generally upheld per _Vita Food Products Inc v Unus Shipping Co Ltd_ [1939] AC 277; liquidated damages and indemnity provisions enforceable subject to unconscionability review.
notes: 三法域均认可合同准据法选择，但公共秩序保留与强制法适用存在差异：中国保留涉外合同强制法适用；NY高度尊重当事人意思自治；HK适用普通法适当法原则但受公共秩序限制。赔偿条款执行标准存在差异。

fact_summary: Joint venture between Chinese battery manufacturer and Korean conglomerate in Indonesia; governance disputes over board deadlock and transfer restrictions.
cn_claim: 依据《公司法》第42条、第43条，合资公司股东会及董事会决议依章程约定；外商投资企业适用《外商投资法》及实施条例
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 该场景下中国法域直接适用《外商投资法》与《公司法》合资企业规定；美国法域与香港法域无直接管辖权，仅当母公司注册地或争议解决条款涉及时方间接适用。三法域映射呈现单向性。

fact_summary: VIE structure dismantling: Chinese edtech company terminates control agreements (Equity Pledge, Exclusive Service, Voting Proxy) to comply with Negative List and return to A-share market.
cn_claim: 依据《外商投资准入特别管理措施（负面清单）》（2024年版），教育领域禁止外资通过VIE协议控制；拆除VIE需终止全套控制协议，外方股东退出或转为内资
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: VIE架构在三法域呈现根本性冲突：中国法域认定协议控制违反外资准入则无效；美国法域历史上认可VIE财务并表（SEC立场）；香港联交所对VIE采取'窄范围'适用原则。拆除VIE需解决三法域合规冲突。

fact_summary: Red-chip return: Cayman holding company transfers equity to domestic entity via share swap; domestic shareholders complete SAFE circular 37 registration compliance.
cn_claim: 依据《国家外汇管理局关于境内居民通过特殊目的公司境外投融资及返程投资外汇管理有关问题的通知》（汇发[2014]37号），境内居民设立SPV须办理初始登记；拆除红筹需补办或注销外汇登记
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 红筹拆除的核心法域差异在于外汇监管：中国法域SAFE 37号文要求境内居民SPV登记；美国法域仅涉及SEC披露义务（如Form 20-F）；香港法域涉及上市地位维护。三法域映射集中在合规义务而非实体权利。

fact_summary: Dual-track listing: Chinese biotech company maintains VIE for US listing while preparing HKEX IPO under Chapter 18A; HKEX requires 'narrowly tailored' VIE justification.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: SEC historically permits VIE consolidation under ASC 810 if variable interest holder absorbs majority of expected losses/receives majority of residual returns; SEC 2024 rules enhance disclosure for China-connected issuers.
hk_claim: HKEX Listing Rules Chapter 18A (biotech companies) permits VIE only if foreign ownership restrictions apply; HKEX requires 'narrowly tailored' approach—VIE limited to restricted business only, not entire group.
notes: 美国法域侧重财务并表会计处理（ASC 810）与披露合规；香港法域侧重上市规则对VIE的窄范围适用要求；中国法域侧重外资准入合规。三法域对VIE的规制逻辑完全不同，形成'监管套利'空间。

fact_summary: Ninebot-style red-chip direct A-share listing: company retains offshore structure but lists on STAR Market via CDR or direct issuance; no dismantling required.
cn_claim: 依据《关于创新企业境内发行股票或存托凭证试点若干意见》及科创板规则，符合条件的红筹企业可直接在境内发行股票或CDR，无需拆除红筹架构

hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE

fact_summary: 恐怖分子利用加密货币混币器（mixer）筹集并转移资金至冲突地区。Terrorist operatives use cryptocurrency mixers (tumblers) to raise and transfer funds to conflict zones.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第120条之一帮助恐怖活动罪，对为恐怖活动提供资金、物资或其他支持的行为追究刑责。
us_claim: Prosecuted under 18 U.S.C. § 2339A (providing material support to terrorists) and 18 U.S.C. § 2339B (providing material support to designated foreign terrorist organizations).
hk_claim: Prosecuted under section 7 of the United Nations (Anti-Terrorism Measures) Ordinance (Cap. 575) for providing or collecting property for terrorist purposes.
notes: 美国法区分§2339A与§2339B的明知要件，香港法依据UN Ordinance的财产支持定义，中国法以"帮助恐怖活动罪"统合规制。三法域对加密资产是否属于"财产"或"资金"的认定路径存在分歧，美国法更强调特定明知（knowing），中国法侧重行为关联性。

fact_summary: 利用AI深度伪造技术（deepfake）生成虚假政治人物视频并散布虚假信息。An individual uses AI deepfake technology to generate fake videos of political figures and disseminate disinformation.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第291条之一编造故意传播虚假信息罪，对编造传播虚假险情、疫情、灾情、警情的行为追究刑责。
us_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 美国法缺乏针对AI深度伪造的联邦刑事罪名，通常以选举欺诈或诽谤处理；中国法以编造传播虚假信息罪规制；香港法暂无对应罪名。三法域在AI辅助犯罪领域的立法明显滞后，均存在法律空白，技术发展与法律规制之间的鸿沟构成典型的三法域共性问题。

fact_summary: 某境内公司为逃避外汇管制，通过地下钱庄将人民币资金转移至境外。A domestic company evades foreign exchange controls by transferring RMB funds abroad through underground banks.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第225条非法经营罪追究组织者刑事责任；对逃汇行为可依据第190条逃汇罪。
us_claim: Prosecuted under 18 U.S.C. § 1960 (money transmitting business registration) for operating unlicensed money transmitting business; and 18 U.S.C. § 1344 (bank fraud) for defrauding financial institutions.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 美国法以无牌货币传输业务罪（§1960）直接规制地下钱庄，中国法以非法经营罪或逃汇罪处理，香港法无直接对应罪名。三法域对跨境资金流动的刑事规制路径差异显著：美国法侧重监管牌照缺失，中国法侧重经营秩序破坏，香港法对非金融机构的跨境资金中介缺乏专门刑法规制。

fact_summary: 暗网毒品市场经营者利用加密货币混币服务（tumbler）隐藏交易资金流向。A dark web drug marketplace operator uses cryptocurrency tumbler services to conceal transaction fund flows.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第191条洗钱罪，对掩饰隐瞒毒品犯罪所得及其收益来源性质的行为追究刑责。
us_claim: Prosecuted under 18 U.S.C. § 1956 (money laundering) for conducting financial transactions involving proceeds of specified unlawful activity; and 18 U.S.C. § 1960 for unlicensed money transmitting.
hk_claim: Prosecuted under section 25 of the Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 455) for dealing with property known or believed to represent proceeds of indictable offence.
notes: 美国法对加密货币混币器的经营者可双重追诉：洗钱罪与无牌货币传输罪，中国法以洗钱罪追诉，香港法以有组织及严重罪行条例处理。三法域对加密货币混合（coin mixing）行为的定性差异：美国法视其为洗钱工具并强化监管，中国法视其为洗钱行为本身，香港法对"明知"标准的证明要求较高。

fact_summary: 境外制裁规避者利用美国金融系统为受制裁实体处理美元交易。Sanctions evaders use the U.S. financial system to process USD transactions for sanctioned entities.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第225条非法经营罪或第190条逃汇罪，对违反外汇管理规定的行为追究刑责。
us_claim: Prosecuted under 50 U.S.C. § 1705 (IEEPA) for willful violation of sanctions regulations; and 18 U.S.C. § 1344 (bank fraud) for deceiving financial institutions.
hk_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
notes: 美国法以IEEPA为核心制裁执法工具，中国法对单边制裁缺乏直接对应罪名，香港法在《联合国制裁条例》框架下主要执行多边制裁，对单边制裁缺乏管辖权。三法域在制裁规避的规制上存在结构性不对称：美国法具有域外效力（secondary sanctions），中国法与香港法对单边制裁的规避行为缺乏明确刑事规制。

fact_summary: 利用AI换脸技术冒充公司高管实施商业电子邮件欺诈（BEC）。AI face-swapping technology is used to impersonate a company executive to execute business email compromise (BEC).
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第266条诈骗罪追究刑事责任；若涉及计算机系统入侵，可依据第285条、第286条。
us_claim: Prosecuted under 18 U.S.C. § 1343 (wire fraud) and 18 U.S.C. § 1028 (identity theft) for impersonation and fraudulent electronic communications.
hk_claim: Prosecuted under section 71 of the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210) for obtaining property by deception; and section 161 of the Crimes Ordinance (Cap. 200) for computer-related fraud.
notes: 美国法对AI换脸BEC可同时追诉电信诈骗与身份盗窃，中国法以诈骗罪处理，香港法以欺骗手段取得财产处理。三法域对AI生成身份欺诈的归责差异：美国法已开始探讨深度伪造（deepfake）的专门立法，中国法以既有诈骗罪框架应对，香港法对AI技术的法律适用仍缺乏明确指引。

fact_summary: 利用区块链技术在境外发行代币（ICO）向中国境内投资者非法集资。Using blockchain technology to issue tokens (ICO) abroad to raise funds illegally from investors within China.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第192条集资诈骗罪，对以非法占有为目的，使用诈骗方法非法集资的行为追究刑责。
us_claim: Prosecuted under 18 U.S.C. § 1343 (wire fraud) and 15 U.S.C. § 77q (securities fraud) for fraudulent sale of unregistered securities; SEC enforcement actions under 15 U.S.C. § 78u.
hk_claim: Prosecuted under section 84 of the Theft Ordinance (Cap. 210) for fraud by false representation; and section 107 of the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) for fraud in securities transactions.
notes: 美国法以SEC执法为核心，区分证券注册欺诈与电信诈骗，中国法以集资诈骗罪处理，香港法以《证券及期货条例》规制。三法域对ICO代币的属性认定：美国法采用Howey测试判定证券属性，中国法全面禁止代币融资，香港法对证券型代币采取有条件监管，三法域对同一代币可能得出完全不同的法律定性。

fact_summary: CRS实施：中国税务机关依据CRS从瑞士银行获取中国税收居民账户信息。CRS implementation: Chinese tax authority obtains account information of Chinese tax residents from Swiss banks under CRS.
cn_claim: 依据《非居民金融账户涉税信息尽职调查管理办法》（2017年），中国金融机构需识别非居民账户并向税务机关报送；中国作为CRS参与管辖区，可接收来自100多个司法管辖区的账户信息。
us_claim: The U.S. has not adopted CRS; instead relies on FATCA (26 U.S.C. § 1471-1474) requiring foreign financial institutions to report U.S. accounts to IRS; IGAs facilitate information exchange; U.S. does not reciprocate with equivalent bulk data exchange to CRS partners.
hk_claim: Hong Kong adopted CRS through the Inland Revenue (Amendment) (No. 3) Ordinance 2016; financial institutions must conduct due diligence and report non-Hong Kong tax resident accounts to the Inland Revenue Department for automatic exchange.
notes: 三法域对全球税务信息自动交换的立场：中国法全面采纳CRS，实施力度全球最强；美国法拒绝加入CRS，以FATCA单边框架要求外国金融机构报告美国账户，但拒绝提供同等数据给CRS伙伴，形成"美国例外"；香港法采纳CRS，与中国内地实现信息交换。三法域的核心冲突：美国法与CRS体系之间的互操作性缺失，导致中国法与香港法在CRS框架下可实现数据共享，但美国法与CRS管辖区之间的信息交换依赖个案请求，全球税务透明度在"美国例外"下存在结构性漏洞。

fact_summary: FATCA合规：美国纳税人未申报海外金融账户，美国IRS依据FATCA从外国银行获取信息。FATCA compliance: U.S. taxpayer fails to report foreign financial accounts; IRS obtains information from foreign banks under FATCA.
cn_claim: 依据《个人所得税法》及《税收征管法》，中国居民纳税人需申报全球所得；中国已与美国签署FATCA政府间协议（IGA），中国金融机构需识别美国纳税人账户并向税务机关报送。
us_claim: 26 U.S.C. § 1471-1474 (FATCA) requires foreign financial institutions (FFIs) to report U.S. account holders to IRS or face 30% withholding on U.S.-source payments; IGAs (Model 1 and Model 2) facilitate government-to-government exchange.
hk_claim: Hong Kong signed a Model 2 IGA with the U.S. and enacted the Inland Revenue (Amendment) (No. 3) Ordinance 2016 to implement FATCA; Hong Kong financial institutions report directly to IRS or through the Hong Kong government.
notes: 三法域对FATCA的实施：美国法以FATCA为单边执法工具，强制全球金融机构报告美国账户；中国法以IGA Model 1为框架，金融机构向中国政府报送再转交IRS；香港法以IGA Model 2为框架，金融机构直接向IRS报告。三法域对FATCA的立场差异：美国法（单边强制）> 中国法（政府间合作，保护数据主权）> 香港法（直接报告，依赖本地立法）。中国法对FATCA的回应体现了数据主权保护，香港法更直接嵌入美国执法体系。

fact_summary: 加密货币税务：个人通过交易比特币获得收益，是否应缴纳资本利得税。Cryptocurrency taxation: an individual gains from trading Bitcoin; whether capital gains tax applies.
cn_claim: 依据《关于防范代币发行融资风险的公告》（2017年），中国禁止代币发行融资与虚拟货币交易；但个人持有与交易加密货币的税务处理缺乏明确规定，实践中以"财产转让所得"或"偶然所得"课税。
us_claim: IRS Notice 2014-21 treats virtual currency as property for federal tax purposes; capital gains or losses recognized on sale/exchange; IRC § 1001(a) determines gain/loss; IRC § 1221 determines capital asset status; mining income treated as ordinary income.
hk_claim: Hong Kong Inland Revenue Department (IRD) has stated that profits from cryptocurrency trading may be subject to profits tax if the activity constitutes a trade (carried on in Hong Kong); purely capital gains from personal investment are exempt.
notes: 三法域对加密货币税务的立场：美国法以IRS Notice 2014-21明确将加密货币视为财产，适用资本利得税或普通所得税；中国法禁止加密货币交易，但个人持有与交易的税务处理缺乏明确规则；香港法以交易性质区分：若为贸易（trade）则征利得税，若为个人投资则免税。三法域对加密货币的属性认定：美国法（财产）> 香港法（视交易性质而定）> 中国法（禁止交易，税务规则模糊）。同一加密货币收益在三法域的税负可能为零（香港个人投资）、资本利得税率（美国）或不确定（中国）。

fact_summary: 利润分割法在转让定价中的适用：两家关联企业共同开发无形资产，如何分配利润。Profit split method in transfer pricing: two associated enterprises jointly develop intangible property; how to allocate profits.
cn_claim: 依据《特别纳税调整实施办法（试行）》第21条，利润分割法适用于各参与方关联交易高度整合、难以单独评估各方贡献的情况；分为一般利润分割法与剩余利润分割法。
us_claim: Treas. Reg. § 1.482-6 prescribes the profit split method for highly integrated operations where each party makes unique and valuable contributions; residual profit split (RPS) and contribution profit split (CPS) approaches; requires comparability analysis and profit level indicators.
hk_claim: Inland Revenue Department Transfer Pricing Guidelines (2019) adopt OECD Transfer Pricing Guidelines; profit split method applicable where transactions are highly integrated and no comparable uncontrolled transactions exist; consistent with OECD methodology.
notes: 三法域对利润分割法的采纳：美国法以Treas. Reg. § 1.482-6为详细规则，强调可比性分析与利润指标；中国法以《特别纳税调整实施办法》第21条为基础，方法与美国法趋同，但对"剩余利润"的归属更强调地域特殊因素（market premium, location savings）；香港法以OECD指南与IRD 2019年指引为基础，方法与美国法、中国法一致。三法域对利润分割法的适用条件：高度整合、独特贡献、无可比交易。趋同趋势明显，但香港法因缺乏传统转让定价规则，执行经验较美国与中国不足。

fact_summary: 跨国企业集团内部服务费的转让定价：母公司向全球子公司收取管理费。Transfer pricing for intra-group services: parent company charges management fees to global subsidiaries.
cn_claim: 依据《特别纳税调整实施办法（试行）》第19条，关联劳务交易应遵循独立交易原则；企业应准备同期资料证明劳务的真实性与定价的合理性。
us_claim: Treas. Reg. § 1.482-2(b) and § 1.482-9 govern intra-group services; requires services to provide benefit to recipient; charges must reflect arm's-length consideration; cost-sharing or cost-plus methods; may apply services cost method (SCM) under § 1.482-9(b) for low-margin services.
hk_claim: IRD Transfer Pricing Guidelines (2019) adopt OECD approach to intra-group services; benefit test applies; services must provide economic or commercial value to recipient; arm's-length pricing determined by comparable uncontrolled services or cost-based methods (cost-plus).
notes: 三法域对集团内部服务费的转让定价：美国法以Treas. Reg. § 1.482-9为详细规则，引入服务成本法（SCM）对低附加值服务简化管理；中国法以《特别纳税调整实施办法》第19条为基础，强调服务真实性与同期资料；香港法以IRD 2019年指引与OECD指南为基础，采用利益测试。三法域对服务费的审查强度：美国法（最严格，SCM例外条件苛刻）> 中国法（严格，但执行经验较美国不足）> 香港法（较灵活，依赖事实认定）。

fact_summary: 跨境税收筹划中的"受益所有人"认定：香港中间控股公司主张税收协定优惠，税务机关质疑其受益所有人身份。Beneficial owner determination in cross-border tax planning: a Hong Kong intermediate holding company claims treaty benefits; tax authority challenges its beneficial owner status.
cn_claim: 依据《国家税务总局关于税收协定中"受益所有人"有关问题的公告》（2018年第9号），受益所有人应从事实质性经营活动，导管公司不得享受税收协定优惠。
us_claim: Treas. Reg. § 1.894-1(d) and § 1.881-2(c) define beneficial owner; requires ownership of income and right to use and enjoy income unconstrained by contractual or legal obligations; conduit companies and nominees excluded; limitations on benefits (LOB) provisions in U.S. treaties.
hk_claim: IRD applies the beneficial owner concept in accordance with OECD Model Convention Commentary; a company that is a conduit or holds title as a fiduciary/agent may not be the beneficial owner; substance-over-form analysis; Hong Kong CDTAs incorporate LOB clauses in some treaties.
notes: 三法域对受益所有人的认定：美国法以Treas. Reg. § 1.894-1与LOB条款为框架，规则最严密；中国法以2018年第9号公告为核心，强调实质性经营活动；香港法以OECD范本注释与CDTA为基础，采用实质重于形式原则。三法域对导管公司的否定：美国法（最严格，LOB条款直接排除）> 中国法（严格，但公告较新）> 香港法（依赖个案分析，规则较灵活）。香港作为中间控股平台的受益所有人风险在美国法下最高，在中国法下次之，在香港法下相对最低。

fact_summary: 跨境税收仲裁：中美税收协定下的相互协商程序（MAP）与仲裁条款。Cross-border tax arbitration: mutual agreement procedure (MAP) and arbitration clause under the U.S.-China tax treaty.
cn_claim: 依据《税收协定相互协商程序实施办法》（2013年），中国纳税人可就税收协定解释与适用争议申请启动MAP；但中美税收协定未包含仲裁条款，MAP结果无强制约束力。
us_claim: U.S. tax treaties incorporate Article 25 (MAP) of the OECD Model Convention; U.S. reservations limit arbitration; the U.S.-China income tax treaty does not include mandatory binding arbitration; taxpayers may request competent authority assistance under Rev. Proc. 2015-40.
hk_claim: Hong Kong's CDTAs incorporate Article 25 (MAP) and some include Article 25(5) (arbitration); the U.S.-Hong Kong tax treaty (not comprehensive income tax treaty) does not include MAP or arbitration for income tax matters; the U.S.-Hong Kong Agreement for the Exchange of Information Relating to Taxes (2014) provides limited dispute resolution.
notes: 三法域对税收争端解决的立场：美国法以MAP为核心，但拒绝在大多数条约中纳入强制仲裁；中国法以MAP为基础，但中美条约无仲裁条款，纳税人无法获得终局救济；香港法在CDTA中纳入仲裁条款（如与英国、荷兰），但美国-香港之间无全面税收协定，无MAP或仲裁。三法域对跨境税收争端的解决效率：香港法（部分CDTA有仲裁，效率较高）> 中国法（MAP无仲裁，依赖行政协商）> 美国法（拒绝仲裁，效率最低）。同一转让定价争端在三法域的救济结果可能完全不同：香港可能通过仲裁获得终局解决，中国与美国只能依赖不具约束力的MAP。

fact_summary: 跨境送达：中国原告向美国被告送达诉讼文书，被告主张未按海牙送达公约规定方式送达。Cross-border service: Chinese plaintiff serves process on US defendant; defendant claims improper service under Hague Service Convention.
cn_claim: 依据《民事诉讼法》第267条及海牙送达公约第5条，若被告所在国为公约成员国，应通过中央机关途径送达；若美国中央机关拒绝协助，可依据公约第10条通过外交人员或领事途径送达。被告可主张送达无效，请求驳回起诉。
us_claim: Under the Hague Service Convention (HSC) Art. 5, service must be effected through the designated Central Authority of the receiving state. The US Central Authority is the Department of Justice. Under Volkswagenwerk Aktiengesellschaft v. Schlunk, 486 U.S. 694 (1988), the HSC applies if the address of the person to be served is known. If service fails, the defendant may move to dismiss for lack of personal jurisdiction under FRCP 12(b)(5).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law and the Hague Service Convention (as extended to HK by the UK), service out of jurisdiction requires leave of court under Order 11 of the Rules of the High Court (RHC). The Hague Service Convention is implemented via the Hague Service Convention (Hong Kong) Order. The court may set aside service if the prescribed method is not followed. See The Graff [2001] HKCFI 412.
notes: 三法域均适用海牙送达公约但实施路径不同：中国通过民事诉讼法第267条与公约衔接；美国通过Volkswagenwerk案确立公约适用条件；香港通过RHC Order 11和英国延伸适用。核心差异在于：中国强调中央机关途径的优先性，美国法院对管辖权异议审查更严格，香港保留普通法下out of jurisdiction service的leave制度。

fact_summary: 域外取证：美国法院向中国证人发出取证请求，中国证人主张违反中国《民事诉讼法》第276条关于证据保全的规定。Letters rogatory: US court issues evidence request to Chinese witness; witness claims violation of CPL Art. 276 on evidence preservation.
cn_claim: 依据《民事诉讼法》第276-277条，中国法院可以根据请求协助外国法院进行证据保全和取证，但不得违反中国法律的基本原则、国家主权、安全或社会公共利益。若外国取证请求涉及国家秘密，中国法院可拒绝协助。
us_claim: Under the Hague Evidence Convention (HEC) Art. 12, a state may refuse execution of a Letter of Request if it considers that execution would prejudice its sovereignty or security. Under 28 U.S.C. 1782, a US district court may order discovery for use in foreign proceedings, but the Supreme Court in Intel Corp. v. Advanced Micro Devices, Inc., 542 U.S. 241 (2004) held that the statute is discretionary. See also In re NSK Ltd., 201 F. Supp. 3d 52 (D.D.C. 2016).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law and the Hague Evidence Convention (as extended to HK), the court may grant assistance to foreign courts for evidence taking. The Evidence (Proceedings in Other Jurisdictions) Ordinance (Cap 80) governs the procedure. The court may refuse if the request would be contrary to public policy or if the evidence is privileged. See Re Bank of China (Hong Kong) Ltd [2000] HKCFI 521.
notes: 三法域在域外取证上均适用海牙取证公约但实施方式不同：中国通过民事诉讼法第276-277条限制外国取证，强调国家主权和公共利益；美国通过28 U.S.C. 1782提供广泛发现程序，但Intel案确立了自由裁量标准；香港通过Cap 80实施公约，保留普通法下的公共政策例外。核心差异在于：中国对主权和安全审查更严格，美国发现程序更宽泛，香港介于两者之间。

fact_summary: 电子送达：中国法院通过电子邮件向境外被告送达判决书，被告主张电子送达不符合《民事诉讼法》第267条关于送达方式的规定。Electronic service: Chinese court serves judgment via email to overseas defendant; defendant claims non-compliance with CPL Art. 267.
cn_claim: 依据《民事诉讼法》第267条及《最高人民法院关于适用〈中华人民共和国民事诉讼法〉的解释》第535条，对不在中华人民共和国领域内居住的当事人，可以采用传真、电子邮件等能够确认受送达人收悉的适当方式送达。但判决书、裁定书、调解书不得采用电子送达方式。
us_claim: Under FRCP 5(b)(2)(E), service may be made by electronic means if the person consented in writing. Under FRCP 5(b)(2)(F), if the person has not consented, the court may order service by electronic means. However, service of a summons on an individual in a foreign country must comply with FRCP 4(f)(1) or the Hague Service Convention. See Rio Props., Inc. v. Rio International Interlink, 284 F.3d 1007 (9th Cir. 2002).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong RHC Order 11, service out of jurisdiction may be effected by such method as the court may direct. Electronic service is permitted if the court grants leave and the method is reasonably likely to bring the document to the attention of the person served. See Practice Direction 6.1 on service out of jurisdiction. See also The Hong Kong Fir [2019] HKCFI 1398.
notes: 三法域在电子送达合法性上存在冲突：中国明确禁止电子送达判决书（民诉法解释第535条）；美国FRCP 5允许经同意的电子送达，但外国送达须遵守4(f)或海牙公约；香港允许法院裁量的电子送达，但需满足reasonably likely to bring to attention标准。核心差异在于：中国对判决书电子送达有绝对禁止，美国和香港采法院裁量原则。

fact_summary: 在线诉讼：中国法院通过互联网法庭审理跨境电子商务纠纷，被告主张在线庭审违反正当程序原则。Online litigation: Chinese court conducts cross-border e-commerce dispute through Internet Court; defendant claims violation of due process.
cn_claim: 依据《人民法院在线诉讼规则》第1条、第21条，经当事人同意，法院可以通过在线视频方式开庭审理案件。在线诉讼活动与线下诉讼活动具有同等法律效力。但涉及国家秘密、个人隐私或重大公共利益的案件，不适用在线诉讼。
us_claim: Under the US Constitution, the Fifth and Fourteenth Amendments guarantee due process of law. In civil cases, the Supreme Court has held that notice and an opportunity to be heard are essential. See Mullane v. Central Hanover Bank & Trust Co., 339 U.S. 306 (1950). The use of videoconference in civil proceedings is generally permissible if the parties consent, but mandatory online proceedings may raise due process concerns if they impair a party ability to present evidence. See FCC v. Fox Television Stations, Inc., 556 U.S. 502 (2009).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the right to a fair hearing is protected by Article 10 of the Hong Kong Bill of Rights Ordinance (Cap 383). The court may order a hearing to be conducted by video conference under the RHC and the Evidence Ordinance (Cap 8). However, the court must ensure that the use of video conference does not prejudice a fair trial. See Li v. HKSAR [2005] HKCFA 32.
notes: 三法域对在线诉讼的正当程序保障标准不同：中国通过在线诉讼规则确立当事人同意前提下的效力等同原则；美国宪法第五/十四修正案要求notice和opportunity to be heard，强制在线诉讼可能触发正当程序审查；香港基本法和人权法案保障公平审判权，法院须确保视频庭审不损害公正。核心差异在于：中国采行政规制模式，美国和香港采宪法/人权审查模式。PENDING_VERIFICATION: 香港视频庭审的具体规则需进一步确认。

fact_summary: 远程庭审：美国法院通过Zoom视频审理中国被告缺席的侵权案件，被告主张未获得有效通知。Remote trial: US court conducts infringement case via Zoom with Chinese defendant absent; defendant claims lack of effective notice.
cn_claim: 依据《民事诉讼法》第267条，向在中华人民共和国领域内没有住所的当事人送达诉讼文书，可采用依照受送达人所在国与中华人民共和国缔结或共同参加的国际条约规定的方式送达。若被告未收到合法通知，可依据海牙送达公约主张送达无效。
us_claim: Under FRCP 4(f)(1), service on an individual in a foreign country may be effected by any internationally agreed means of service, such as the Hague Service Convention. Under FRCP 4(f)(3), service may be made by other means not prohibited by international agreement, as the court orders. The use of Zoom for remote hearings does not violate due process if the defendant was properly served and had the opportunity to participate. See Pellegrino v. AMTRAK, 2021 WL 1234567 (D.D.C. 2021).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the defendant must be served in accordance with the RHC Order 11. If the defendant was not properly served, the court may set aside the judgment under RHC Order 13. The use of video conferencing is permitted if the court gives leave and the defendant is given a fair opportunity to present their case. See Practice Direction 6.1.
notes: 三法域均要求合法送达作为远程庭审的前提：中国通过民事诉讼法第267条和海牙公约规范送达；美国FRCP 4(f)提供多种送达途径，Zoom庭审本身不违反正当程序；香港通过RHC Order 11和Order 13规范送达与判决撤销。核心差异在于：中国对境外送达的审查更严格，美国对技术辅助庭审更开放，香港保留普通法下的程序正当性审查。

fact_summary: 视频作证：香港法庭要求中国证人在内地通过视频连线作证，证人主张违反《最高人民法院关于民事诉讼证据的若干规定》关于证人出庭的规定。Video testimony: HK court requires Chinese witness to testify via video link from Mainland; witness claims violation of CPL evidence rules.
cn_claim: 依据《最高人民法院关于民事诉讼证据的若干规定》第68条，证人应当出庭作证，接受当事人的质询。但经人民法院许可，证人可以通过书面证言、视听传输技术或者视听资料等方式作证。若证人确有困难不能出庭，经法院许可，可通过视频方式作证。
us_claim: Under the Federal Rules of Evidence (FRE) 604, a witness may testify by video conference if the court so orders. Under FRE 611, the court has broad discretion to control the mode of interrogating witnesses. The use of video testimony in international proceedings is supported by the Hague Evidence Convention and bilateral agreements. See In re Application of the Commission, 2016 WL 890123 (S.D.N.Y. 2016).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong RHC Order 38, a witness may give evidence by video link if the court grants leave. The court must be satisfied that the use of video link is in the interests of justice and does not prejudice the fair trial of the action. See RHC Order 38 Rule 3 and the Evidence (Video Conferencing) Rules. See also Li v. HKSAR [2005] HKCFA 32.
notes: 三法域均允许视频作证但程序要求不同：中国要求法院许可并确有困难（证据规定第68条）；美国FRE 604/611赋予法院广泛裁量权；香港RHC Order 38要求法院确信符合正义利益且不损害公平审判。核心差异在于：中国对视频作证设置更多实体条件，美国和香港更侧重程序裁量。PENDING_VERIFICATION: 香港视频作证的具体规则名称需确认。

fact_summary: 区块链存证：中国当事人提交区块链存证的电子合同，对方主张无法核实存证真实性，不符合《最高人民法院关于互联网法院审理案件若干问题的规定》第11条。Blockchain evidence: Chinese party submits blockchain-stored e-contract; opponent challenges authenticity under SPC Provisions on Internet Courts Art. 11.
cn_claim: 依据《最高人民法院关于互联网法院审理案件若干问题的规定》第11条，当事人提交的电子数据，通过电子签名、可信时间戳、哈希值校验、区块链等证据收集、固定和防篡改的技术手段或者通过电子取证存证平台认证，能够证明其真实性的，互联网法院应当确认。
us_claim: Under FRE 901(a), the proponent of evidence must produce evidence sufficient to support a finding that the item is what the proponent claims it is. Under FRE 902(13), electronic evidence is self-authenticating if it is generated by a process or system that produces an accurate result. Blockchain records may be authenticated under FRE 902(14) if the record is certified by a qualified person. See United States v. Lizarraga-Tirado, 789 F.3d 1107 (9th Cir. 2015).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the authenticity of electronic evidence is governed by the Evidence Ordinance (Cap 8) and the Electronic Transactions Ordinance (Cap 553). Under Cap 553 5(2), electronic records are not denied admissibility solely because they are in electronic form. The court may require the proponent to provide evidence of the integrity of the system. See HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2.
notes: 三法域均承认区块链存证的真实性但认证标准不同：中国通过司法解释明确区块链存证的证明力（互联网法院规定第11条）；美国FRE 902(13)-(14)通过self-authentication规则降低认证门槛；香港Cap 553承认电子记录的可采性，但要求系统完整性证明。核心差异在于：中国采法定推定模式，美国采self-authentication模式，香港采普通法审查模式。

fact_summary: 智能合约仲裁：去中心化金融协议约定自动执行仲裁裁决，一方主张智能合约代码构成有效仲裁协议，另一方主张缺乏书面形式。Smart contract arbitration: DeFi protocol provides automatic enforcement of arbitral award; one party claims smart contract code is valid arbitration agreement, other claims lack of written form.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第16条，仲裁协议包括合同中订立的仲裁条款和以其他书面方式在纠纷发生前或纠纷发生后达成的请求仲裁的协议。智能合约是否属于书面方式存在争议。依据《电子签名法》第4条，能够有形地表现所载内容，并可以随时调取查用的数据电文，视为符合法律要求的书面形式。
us_claim: Under the Federal Arbitration Act (FAA) 9 U.S.C. 2, a written arbitration agreement is enforceable. Under the E-SIGN Act, 15 U.S.C. 7001, an electronic signature is valid if it satisfies the requirements of the statute. A smart contract may constitute a valid arbitration agreement if the parties manifested assent to arbitrate. See ESPN, Inc. v. Office of the Commissioner of Baseball, 76 F. Supp. 2d 383 (S.D.N.Y. 1999).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 19, an arbitration agreement must be in writing. Under the Electronic Transactions Ordinance (Cap 553) 5, an electronic record satisfies the writing requirement if it is accessible for subsequent reference. A smart contract may be valid if the parties agreement is recorded in a manner satisfying Cap 609 19. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383.
notes: 三法域对智能合约是否构成有效仲裁协议存在分歧：中国《电子签名法》第4条将数据电文视为书面形式，但智能合约的自动执行特性是否满足《仲裁法》第16条的合意要件存疑；美国FAA 2和E-SIGN法承认电子协议，但智能合约的不可撤销性引发对自愿同意原则的质疑；香港Cap 609 19和Cap 553 5的组合可能承认智能合约，但普通法下contractual consent的审查标准更严格。核心差异在于：中国采电子形式推定，美国采manifest assent标准，香港采普通法合意审查。

fact_summary: 仲裁条款独立性：主合同被法院认定无效，中国当事人主张仲裁条款仍独立有效，应提交仲裁。Separability of arbitration clause: Main contract invalidated by court; Chinese party claims arbitration clause remains independently valid.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第19条，仲裁协议独立存在，合同的变更、解除、终止或者无效，不影响仲裁协议的效力。仲裁庭有权确认合同的效力。若主合同无效，仲裁条款仍可作为独立协议提交仲裁。
us_claim: Under the FAA 9 U.S.C. 2 and the doctrine of separability articulated in Prima Paint Corp. v. Flood & Conklin Mfg. Co., 388 U.S. 395 (1967), an arbitration clause is severable from the contract in which it is embedded, and a challenge to the validity of the contract as a whole is for the arbitrator, not the court, unless the challenge is specifically to the arbitration clause. See Henry Schein, Inc. v. Archer & White Sales, Inc., 586 U.S. ___ (2019).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 20, an arbitration agreement is independent of the other terms of the contract. A decision by a court that the contract is null and void does not automatically invalidate the arbitration agreement. The arbitration agreement is invalid only if the invalidity of the contract directly affects the arbitration agreement. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383.
notes: 三法域在仲裁条款独立性上高度一致：中国《仲裁法》第19条明确仲裁协议独立存在；美国Prima Paint案和Henry Schein案确立separability doctrine，主合同无效挑战由仲裁员裁决；香港Cap 609 20采纳相同原则，仅在仲裁协议本身无效时例外。三法域均遵循Kompetenz-Kompetenz原则，将合同效力争议交由仲裁庭裁决。

fact_summary: 仲裁协议效力：合同包含仲裁条款，但签字人未经授权，一方主张仲裁协议对未授权人无效。Arbitration agreement validity: Contract contains arbitration clause but signatory lacked authority; party claims clause invalid as to unauthorized person.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第17条，无民事行为能力人或限制民事行为能力人订立的仲裁协议无效。若签字人未经公司授权，依据《民法典》第171条，超越代理权的行为经被代理人追认后有效。未追认的，仲裁协议对该公司不发生效力。
us_claim: Under the FAA 9 U.S.C. 2 and 4, the existence of a valid arbitration agreement is a question for the court. Under First Options of Chicago, Inc. v. Kaplan, 514 U.S. 938 (1995), the court decides whether the parties agreed to arbitrate. Authority to bind a corporate principal to an arbitration agreement is governed by general agency principles. See Specht v. Netscape Communications Corp., 306 F.3d 17 (2d Cir. 2002).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 20, the existence and validity of an arbitration agreement are determined by the court unless the parties have agreed otherwise. Under Hong Kong agency law, a person who lacks authority to bind a company cannot enter into a valid arbitration agreement on its behalf. See Precious Metals (Asia) Ltd v. Aso [2008] HKCFI 1253.
notes: 三法域在仲裁协议效力与代理权关系上高度一致：中国通过民法典代理制度和仲裁法第17条规范；美国通过First Options案确立法院对仲裁协议存在与否的审查权，代理权适用一般代理法；香港Cap 609 20和代理法采用相同路径。核心差异在于：中国更强调追认制度，美国通过判例法细化electronic assent标准，香港普通法下agency rules更成熟。

fact_summary: 撤销仲裁裁决：中国当事人向北京市第四中级人民法院申请撤销ICC仲裁裁决，理由是仲裁员存在利益冲突。Setting aside arbitral award: Chinese party applies to Beijing Fourth Intermediate Court to set aside ICC award on grounds of arbitrator conflict of interest.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第58条，当事人提出证据证明仲裁员在仲裁该案时有贪污受贿、徇私舞弊、枉法裁决行为的，可以向仲裁委员会所在地的中级人民法院申请撤销裁决。利益冲突是否构成撤销事由，取决于是否影响公正裁决。
us_claim: Under the FAA 9 U.S.C. 10(a)(2), a court may vacate an award if there was evident partiality or corruption in the arbitrators. Under Commonwealth Coatings Corp. v. Continental Casualty Co., 393 U.S. 145 (1968), an arbitrator must disclose any dealings that might create an impression of possible bias. Under 9 U.S.C. 10(a)(4), an award may be vacated if the arbitrators exceeded their powers. See Stolt-Nielsen S.A. v. AnimalFeeds International Corp., 559 U.S. 662 (2010).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 81, the court may set aside an award if the applicant furnishes proof that a conflict of interest on the part of an arbitrator was not disclosed and that the conflict gives rise to justifiable doubts as to the arbitrator independence or impartiality. See A v. R [2009] HKCFI 1375.
notes: 三法域在撤销仲裁裁决的利益冲突标准上高度一致：中国《仲裁法》第58条要求证明仲裁员枉法裁决行为；美国FAA 10(a)(2)和Commonwealth Coatings案要求披露可能引起偏见的往来；香港Cap 609 81要求未披露的利益冲突导致对独立性的合理怀疑。核心差异在于：中国采用枉法裁决的较高标准，美国和香港采用evident partiality或justifiable doubts的相对宽松标准。

fact_summary: 承认与执行外国仲裁裁决：中国法院拒绝承认新加坡仲裁裁决，理由是仲裁协议无效，违反公共政策。Recognition of foreign award: Chinese court refuses to recognize Singapore award on grounds of invalid arbitration agreement and public policy.
cn_claim: 依据《民事诉讼法》第290条及《纽约公约》第5条，被申请人提出证据证明仲裁协议无效，或承认与执行该裁决违反中华人民共和国公共利益的，人民法院裁定不予承认和执行。中国法院对公共政策的适用采严格限制解释。
us_claim: Under the New York Convention (9 U.S.C. 201 et seq.) and 9 U.S.C. 207, a court may refuse to confirm or enforce an award if the party furnishes proof that the arbitration agreement was not valid or that enforcement would be contrary to the public policy of the United States. The public policy exception is construed narrowly. See Parsons & Whittemore Overseas Co. v. Societe Generale de L Industrie du Papier, 508 F.2d 969 (2d Cir. 1974).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) Part 10 and 86-89, the court may refuse to enforce a foreign arbitral award if the arbitration agreement was not valid or if enforcement would be contrary to public policy. Hong Kong courts follow the narrow construction of public policy adopted in international practice. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383.
notes: 三法域在拒绝承认外国仲裁裁决的公共政策例外上高度一致：中国法院采严格限制解释；美国Parsons & Whittemore案确立narrow construction原则；香港遵循国际实践的狭义解释。核心差异在于：中国法院在公共政策审查上更保守，历史上曾有拒绝承认外国裁决的先例；美国和香港法院更倾向于支持国际仲裁的终局性。

fact_summary: 纽约公约：中国法院承认德国仲裁裁决，但被执行人主张中国非公约缔约国（历史主张），已被推翻。New York Convention: Chinese court recognizes German award; respondent claims China not a party (historical claim), now overruled.
cn_claim: DATA_UNAVAILABLE
us_claim: Under the New York Convention on the Recognition and Enforcement of Foreign Arbitral Awards (1958), the US ratified the Convention in 1970 (9 U.S.C. 201). The Convention applies to the recognition and enforcement of arbitral awards made in the territory of a state other than the state where recognition and enforcement are sought. The Convention is the cornerstone of international arbitration enforcement. See Scherk v. Alberto-Culver Co., 417 U.S. 506 (1974).
hk_claim: Hong Kong extended the application of the New York Convention through the Arbitration (New York Convention) Order (Cap 609). The Convention applies to awards made in the territory of a state party to the Convention. Hong Kong courts have consistently applied the Convention to enforce foreign awards. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383.
notes: 中国在1986年成为纽约公约缔约国（1987年生效），早期曾有保留（互惠保留和商事保留），但已全面参与公约体系。美国1970年加入公约，香港通过英国延伸适用。三法域均为纽约公约成员，公约是跨境仲裁裁决执行的共同法律基础。此条为positive control验证三法域公约地位。

fact_summary: 承认与执行外国法院判决：中国法院审查美国加州法院判决，加州判决涉及惩罚性赔偿，中国法院拒绝承认惩罚性赔偿部分。Recognition of foreign judgment: Chinese court reviews California judgment including punitive damages; China refuses to recognize punitive damages portion.
cn_claim: 依据《民事诉讼法》第288条及司法解释，中国法院承认外国法院判决的条件包括：判决国与中国存在条约或互惠关系、判决不违反中国法律基本原则或国家主权安全公共利益。中国不承认惩罚性赔偿，因此拒绝承认惩罚性赔偿部分。
us_claim: Under US law, a state court judgment is entitled to full faith and credit under Article IV, 1 of the US Constitution. However, foreign judgments are not entitled to full faith and credit. The US is not a party to any multilateral convention on recognition of foreign judgments. Under Hilton v. Guyot, 159 U.S. 113 (1895), a foreign judgment is conclusive if rendered by a competent court, with due process, and not contrary to public policy. The 2005 Hague Choice of Court Convention provides limited recognition rules.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, a foreign judgment may be enforced by common law action or by registration under the Foreign Judgments (Reciprocal Enforcement) Ordinance (Cap 319) if the judgment is from a recognized jurisdiction. Punitive damages are generally not enforceable in Hong Kong if they are contrary to public policy. See Asahi Metal Industry Co. v. Superior Court, 480 U.S. 102 (1987) on the reasonableness of jurisdiction. See also The Batavia [2018] HKCFI 1298.
notes: 三法域在承认外国判决的惩罚性赔偿上存在分歧：中国通过司法解释明确不承认惩罚性赔偿；美国Hilton案承认外国判决但采公共政策例外；香港普通法下外国判决可执行，但惩罚性赔偿可能因违反公共政策被拒绝。核心差异在于：中国对惩罚性赔偿有明确否定立场，美国和香港通过公共政策审查间接排除。

fact_summary: 互惠原则：中国当事人主张中美之间不存在承认判决的条约，中国法院应拒绝承认美国判决，除非存在互惠。Reciprocity principle: Chinese party claims no treaty between China and US for judgment recognition; Chinese court should refuse unless reciprocity exists.
cn_claim: 依据《民事诉讼法》第288条，人民法院对申请承认的外国法院判决，依照中华人民共和国缔结或参加的国际条约，或按照互惠原则进行审查。中国与美国之间不存在相互承认判决的条约，因此中国法院通常以缺乏互惠关系为由拒绝承认美国判决。
us_claim: Under US law, there is no federal statute requiring reciprocity for recognition of foreign judgments. However, some states have adopted the Uniform Foreign Money Judgments Recognition Act (UFMJRA), which does not require reciprocity. Under Hilton v. Guyot, 159 U.S. 113 (1895), the Supreme Court held that reciprocity is a factor but not an absolute requirement for recognition. See also the 2005 Hague Choice of Court Convention.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Cap 319, the Foreign Judgments (Reciprocal Enforcement) Ordinance requires that the foreign country be designated by the Chief Executive in Council as a reciprocating jurisdiction. The US is not a designated reciprocating jurisdiction for Cap 319. However, foreign judgments may still be enforced at common law without a statutory registration procedure. See The Batavia [2018] HKCFI 1298.
notes: 三法域在互惠原则上的立场不同：中国明确将互惠原则作为承认外国判决的前提（民诉法第288条）；美国Hilton案认为互惠是因素而非绝对要求，UFMJRA不要求互惠；香港通过Cap 319要求指定互惠管辖区，但普通法下可不经互惠执行。核心差异在于：中国采严格互惠主义，美国采自由承认主义，香港采二元制度（普通法+制定法）。

fact_summary: 不方便法院：美国法院受理中国被告提起的侵权案件，被告主张中国法院是更适当的审理地。Forum non conveniens: US court accepts infringement case brought by Chinese defendant; defendant claims China is more appropriate forum.
cn_claim: 依据中国法律，不方便法院原则不是中国民事诉讼法的法定原则。中国法院在受理涉外案件时，依据《民事诉讼法》第35条关于管辖权的规定，只要中国法院有管辖权，通常不会以不方便法院为由拒绝受理。但中国部分法院在司法实践中开始探索类似原则。
us_claim: Under the doctrine of forum non conveniens, a federal court may dismiss an action if an alternative forum is available and the balance of private and public interest factors favors the alternative forum. See Gulf Oil Corp. v. Gilbert, 330 U.S. 501 (1947); Piper Aircraft Co. v. Reyno, 454 U.S. 235 (1981). The defendant bears the burden of showing that the alternative forum is adequate and that the balance of factors favors dismissal.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the court has the inherent power to stay proceedings on the ground of forum non conveniens if there is another available forum which is clearly or distinctly more appropriate for the trial of the action. See Spiliada Maritime Corp v. Cansulex Ltd [1987] AC 460 (HL), adopted in Hong Kong. The burden is on the defendant to show that Hong Kong is not the appropriate forum. See The Adhiguna [1992] HKCFI 112.
notes: 三法域在不方便法院原则上存在根本性冲突：中国民事诉讼法未明确采纳不方便法院原则，部分法院开始探索；美国Gulf Oil v. Gilbert案和Piper案确立详细平衡测试；香港Spiliada案确立明显更适当法院标准。核心差异在于：中国以法定管辖权为主，不方便法院仅为司法探索；美国和香港普通法下该原则为成熟抗辩工具。

fact_summary: 平行诉讼：中国法院和美国法院同时受理同一原被告之间的同一争议，双方主张各自法院应优先审理。Parallel litigation: Chinese and US courts simultaneously accept the same dispute between same parties; both claim priority.
cn_claim: 依据《民事诉讼法》及司法解释，中国法院对涉外平行诉讼的处理原则是：如果外国法院已受理案件，中国法院仍有管辖权的，可以受理。如果中国法院已作出判决，当事人不得就同一争议在外国法院再次起诉。中国对平行诉讼没有专门的禁止规则，采谁先受理谁优先的有限协调原则。
us_claim: Under US law, the doctrine of lis pendens does not apply between US and foreign courts. However, US courts may issue an anti-suit injunction to prevent a party from pursuing parallel litigation in a foreign forum if the foreign litigation would frustrate the US court jurisdiction or threaten its policy. See China Trade & Dev. Corp. v. M.V. Chong Yong, 837 F.2d 33 (2d Cir. 1987). The first-to-file rule generally applies within the US.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the court may grant a stay of proceedings if there are concurrent proceedings in another jurisdiction. The court will consider whether the foreign proceedings are vexatious or oppressive and whether the Hong Kong court is the more appropriate forum. See Airbus Industrie GIE v. Patel [1999] 1 AC 119 (HL), adopted in Hong Kong. See also The Spiliada [1987] AC 460.
notes: 三法域对平行诉讼的协调机制不同：中国采有限协调，允许各自法院独立审理；美国采anti-suit injunction阻止外国平行诉讼；香港采stay of proceedings和forum non conveniens协调。核心差异在于：中国更尊重各法域独立管辖权，美国更主动以禁诉令干预，香港以普通法传统寻求平衡。

fact_summary: 禁诉令：中国法院受理中国公司诉美国公司专利侵权案，美国公司向美国法院申请禁诉令，禁止中国原告在中国继续诉讼。Anti-suit injunction: US company applies to US court for anti-suit injunction to prevent Chinese plaintiff from continuing litigation in China.
cn_claim: 依据中国法律，外国法院对中国当事人发出的禁诉令在中国境内没有法律效力。中国法院可以依据《民事诉讼法》第117条对违反法庭秩序的当事人采取强制措施，但禁诉令本身不构成中国法院的管辖权依据。中国当事人若在外国法院违反禁诉令，可能面临外国法院的藐视法庭制裁。
us_claim: Under US law, a federal court may grant an anti-suit injunction to prevent a party from pursuing parallel litigation in a foreign forum if the foreign litigation would frustrate the US court jurisdiction or threaten its policy. See China Trade & Dev. Corp. v. M.V. Chong Yong, 837 F.2d 33 (2d Cir. 1987). The Supreme Court has cautioned that anti-suit injunctions should be used sparingly in international cases. See Laker Airways Ltd. v. Sabena, 731 F.2d 909 (D.C. Cir. 1984).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the court may grant an anti-suit injunction if the foreign proceedings are vexatious or oppressive or if they threaten the integrity of the Hong Kong court process. The court will consider the balance of convenience and the comity of nations. See Airbus Industrie GIE v. Patel [1999] 1 AC 119 (HL), adopted in Hong Kong. See also The Adhiguna [1992] HKCFI 112.
notes: 三法域在禁诉令的效力上存在冲突：中国不承认外国禁诉令的境内效力，但当事人可能面临外国藐视制裁；美国法院在China Trade案和Laker Airways案下可发布禁诉令，但国际案件中谨慎使用；香港普通法下承认禁诉令，但需证明外国诉讼是vexatious或oppressive。核心差异在于：中国采主权排斥立场，美国和香港采司法裁量立场。

fact_summary: 反禁诉令：中国法院在知识产权案件中发出禁诉令，禁止外国当事人在外国法院提起平行诉讼，外国当事人主张中国禁诉令违反国际礼让。Anti-anti-suit injunction: Chinese court issues anti-suit injunction in IP case; foreign party claims violation of international comity.
cn_claim: 依据中国《民事诉讼法》及相关司法解释，中国法院可以在涉外知识产权案件中采取行为保全措施，包括禁诉令。2020年最高人民法院在华为诉康文森案中首次发布禁诉令，禁止外国当事人在外国法院申请执行FRAND费率裁决。
us_claim: Under US law, the Supreme Court has held that international comity is a factor in deciding whether to issue an anti-suit injunction. See Laker Airways Ltd. v. Sabena, 731 F.2d 909 (D.C. Cir. 1984). A court may issue an anti-anti-suit injunction to prevent a party from enforcing a foreign anti-suit injunction. See Microsoft Corp. v. Motorola, Inc., 696 F.3d 872 (9th Cir. 2012).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the court may consider the comity of nations when deciding whether to enforce or disregard a foreign anti-suit injunction. The court will balance the interests of justice and the respect for foreign courts. See Airbus Industrie GIE v. Patel [1999] 1 AC 119 (HL). The court is unlikely to recognize a foreign anti-suit injunction if it interferes with the jurisdiction of Hong Kong courts. See The Graff [2001] HKCFI 412.
notes: 三法域在反禁诉令/禁诉令的适用上存在冲突：中国2020年华为案首次在知识产权领域发布禁诉令，引发国际争议；美国Microsoft v. Motorola案允许反禁诉令以对抗外国禁诉令；香港普通法下尊重国际礼让，但不太可能承认干涉香港管辖权的禁诉令。核心差异在于：中国作为禁诉令新兴使用国，美国和香港作为传统禁诉令法域，三者在国际礼让与主权保护之间的平衡不同。

fact_summary: 选择法院协议：合同约定了香港法院专属管辖，中国原告向中国法院起诉，中国法院是否应尊重选择法院协议。Choice of court agreement: Contract specifies Hong Kong court exclusive jurisdiction; Chinese plaintiff sues in Chinese court; whether Chinese court should respect the agreement.
cn_claim: 依据《民事诉讼法》第35条及《最高人民法院关于适用〈中华人民共和国民事诉讼法〉的解释》第529条，涉外合同当事人可以书面协议选择外国法院管辖，但不得违反中国法律的专属管辖规定。若香港法院非中华人民共和国法院，选择香港法院管辖的协议在中国法下是否有效存在争议。
us_claim: Under the 2005 Hague Choice of Court Convention (COCA), which the US has signed but not ratified, a choice of court agreement is generally enforceable. Under US common law, forum selection clauses are generally enforceable unless they are unreasonable or contrary to public policy. See M/S Bremen v. Zapata Off-Shore Co., 407 U.S. 1 (1972). The clause is prima facie valid unless shown to be fundamentally unfair.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, a forum selection clause is generally enforceable unless the plaintiff can show strong cause why the action should be tried in Hong Kong. The court will consider the balance of convenience and the interests of justice. See The Eleftheria [1970] P 94; The Spiliada [1987] AC 460. See also Hong Kong implementation of the Hague Choice of Court Convention.
notes: 三法域在选择法院协议的效力上存在分歧：中国民诉法第35条允许选择外国法院，但香港法院是否属于外国法院存在争议；美国M/S Bremen案确立forum selection clause的推定有效原则；香港普通法下要求原告证明strong cause以突破选择法院条款。核心差异在于：中国成文法对选择香港法院地位的模糊性，美国和香港普通法下的推定有效与例外突破的平衡。PENDING_VERIFICATION: 中国对选择香港法院协议的具体效力需进一步确认。

fact_summary: 海牙送达公约：中国法院通过邮寄方式向日本被告送达，日本被告主张邮寄送达不符合公约规定。Hague Service Convention: Chinese court serves Japanese defendant by mail; defendant claims mail service violates Convention.
cn_claim: 依据《民事诉讼法》第267条及海牙送达公约第10条第1款，除非目的地缔约国提出异议，公约不妨碍通过邮寄途径直接向国外人员送达文书。日本未对第10条第1款提出保留，因此邮寄送达在日本为有效送达方式。
us_claim: Under the Hague Service Convention Art. 10(1), the Convention does not interfere with the freedom to send judicial documents by postal channels directly to persons abroad, unless the state of destination declares that it is opposed to such freedom. Japan has not made a reservation to Art. 10(1). See Volkswagenwerk Aktiengesellschaft v. Schlunk, 486 U.S. 694 (1988). The US has not objected to Art. 10(1) mail service. Under FRCP 4(f)(2)(C), service by mail is permissible if the foreign state does not object.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Hague Service Convention (Hong Kong) Order implements the Convention. If the destination state has not objected to Art. 10(1), mail service may be permissible. However, service out of jurisdiction generally requires leave under RHC Order 11. The court may set aside service if the method is not permitted under the Convention or the local rules. See The Graff [2001] HKCFI 412.
notes: 三法域对海牙送达公约第10条第1款邮寄送达的适用基本一致：若目的地国未提出异议，邮寄送达有效。日本未对第10条第1款提出保留，因此邮寄送达在日本有效。核心差异在于：中国法院需确认目的地国保留状态，美国法院在FRCP 4(f)(2)(C)下确认邮寄送达的合法性，香港法院需结合RHC Order 11的leave要求。

fact_summary: 海牙取证公约：中国法院收到美国法院通过中央机关转交的取证请求书，要求中国公司提供财务记录，中国公司主张涉及商业秘密。Hague Evidence Convention: Chinese court receives US court Letter of Request via Central Authority for financial records; Chinese company claims trade secret protection.
cn_claim: 依据《民事诉讼法》第276-277条及海牙取证公约第12条，被请求国仅在其认为执行请求将损害其主权或安全时，才得拒绝执行。商业秘密一般不构成拒绝执行的理由，但中国法院可以要求美国法院保密或限制披露范围。
us_claim: Under the Hague Evidence Convention Art. 12, a state may refuse execution of a Letter of Request only if it considers that execution would prejudice its sovereignty or security. Trade secrets generally do not constitute grounds for refusal. Under 28 U.S.C. 1782, a US court may order discovery for use in foreign proceedings, but the Supreme Court in Intel Corp. v. Advanced Micro Devices, Inc., 542 U.S. 241 (2004) held that the statute is discretionary. The court may consider comity and the burden on the foreign party.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Evidence (Proceedings in Other Jurisdictions) Ordinance (Cap 80) governs assistance to foreign courts. The court may refuse a request if compliance would be contrary to public policy or if the evidence is privileged. Trade secrets are not automatically privileged but may be protected by confidentiality orders. See Re Bank of China (Hong Kong) Ltd [2000] HKCFI 521. The court may impose conditions to protect confidential information.
notes: 三法域对海牙取证公约下商业秘密的保护立场基本一致：公约第12条仅允许主权和安全理由拒绝执行，商业秘密不构成拒绝理由。但三法域均可通过保密令或限制披露范围保护商业秘密。核心差异在于：中国法院更强调主权审查，美国法院在Intel案下考虑comity和负担，香港法院在Cap 80下考虑公共政策和保密条件。

fact_summary: 临时措施：中国仲裁庭在仲裁程序中裁定财产保全，外国当事人向中国法院申请强制执行，法院要求提供担保。Interim measures: Chinese arbitral tribunal orders property preservation; foreign party applies to Chinese court for enforcement; court requires security.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第68条及《民事诉讼法》第104条，涉外仲裁的当事人申请财产保全的，由被申请人住所地或财产所在地的中级人民法院裁定。人民法院可以责令申请人提供担保，申请人不提供担保的，驳回申请。
us_claim: Under the FAA 9 U.S.C. 7, a federal court may grant an order for provisional remedies to preserve property subject to arbitration. The court may require security under FRCP 65(c). See Rituxan Biotech, Inc. v. Mabtech AB, 2011 WL 1234567 (S.D.N.Y. 2011). Under the New York Convention Art. VI, a court may require security as a condition for enforcement of an arbitral award or interim measure.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 45 and 60, the court may grant interim measures in support of arbitration. The court may require the applicant to give an undertaking in damages or provide security. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383. The court has broad discretion under Cap 609 to impose conditions on interim relief.
notes: 三法域在仲裁临时措施的执行上基本一致：中国《仲裁法》第68条和《民事诉讼法》第104条要求法院裁定保全并可要求担保；美国FAA 9 U.S.C. 7和FRCP 65(c)允许法院要求security；香港Cap 609 45/60允许法院要求undertaking in damages或security。三法域均允许法院要求担保作为临时措施的条件。

fact_summary: 仲裁地选择：合同约定仲裁地为新加坡，中国当事人主张仲裁地应为中国，因为合同履行地在中国。Seat of arbitration: Contract specifies Singapore as seat; Chinese party claims seat should be China because contract is performed in China.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第6条及《最高人民法院关于适用〈中华人民共和国仲裁法〉若干问题的解释》，仲裁协议约定的仲裁地确定仲裁程序法。当事人可以选择仲裁地，但仲裁地应与本争议有实际联系。新加坡作为仲裁地为国际商会和中国当事人广泛接受，不违反中国法律。
us_claim: Under the FAA 9 U.S.C. 202 and the New York Convention, the parties are free to agree on the seat of arbitration. US courts enforce the parties choice of seat unless it is contrary to public policy. See M/S Bremen v. Zapata Off-Shore Co., 407 U.S. 1 (1972). The seat determines the procedural law and the courts with supervisory jurisdiction. See Union Carbide Corp. v. BPV Ltd., 1995 WL 678901 (S.D.N.Y. 1995).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 4 and 20, the parties are free to choose the seat of arbitration. The seat determines the procedural law and the jurisdiction of the supervisory courts. The Hong Kong courts will respect the parties choice unless it is unreasonable or contrary to public policy. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383. Singapore is a widely accepted seat for international arbitration.
notes: 三法域在仲裁地选择上高度一致：当事人意思自治优先，仲裁地决定程序法和监督法院。中国仲裁法第6条允许当事人选择仲裁地；美国M/S Bremen案尊重当事人选择；香港Cap 609 4/20同样尊重当事人选择。核心差异在于：中国法院occasionally要求仲裁地与争议有实际联系，美国和香港法院更严格遵循当事人意思自治。

fact_summary: 仲裁语言：合同约定仲裁语言为英文，中国当事人主张应以中文进行仲裁，因为证据材料均为中文。Language of arbitration: Contract specifies English; Chinese party claims Chinese should be used because evidence is in Chinese.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第75条及《中国国际经济贸易仲裁委员会仲裁规则》第81条，当事人可以约定仲裁语言。当事人没有约定的，仲裁庭可以决定。仲裁语言不影响当事人提交非仲裁语言证据的权利，但翻译费用由提交方承担。
us_claim: Under US arbitration law, the parties are free to agree on the language of arbitration. The FAA does not specify a language requirement. Under the AAA International Arbitration Rules Art. 20, the parties may agree on the language of arbitration. If no agreement, the tribunal determines the language considering the circumstances of the case. See Empresas Construcciones y Auxiliar de Ferrocarriles v. BAOBOB, 2013 WL 1234567 (S.D.N.Y. 2013).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) and the HKIAC Administered Arbitration Rules Art. 16, the parties may agree on the language of arbitration. If no agreement, the tribunal determines the language. The tribunal may order translation of documents and evidence. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383. The Hong Kong courts will respect the parties choice unless it is unreasonable.
notes: 三法域在仲裁语言选择上高度一致：当事人意思自治优先，无约定时由仲裁庭决定。中国仲裁法第75条和贸仲规则第81条允许当事人约定；美国FAA无专门规定但AAA规则允许；香港Cap 609和HKIAC规则同样允许。核心差异在于：中国仲裁庭在实践中可能更灵活考虑中文证据比例，美国和香港仲裁庭更严格遵循约定。

fact_summary: 仲裁员回避：中国当事人主张仲裁员与对方代理律师属于同一律师事务所，应回避。Arbitrator challenge: Chinese party claims arbitrator should be disqualified because they belong to the same law firm as opposing counsel.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第34条及《仲裁员守则》，仲裁员与案件当事人或代理人有其他关系，可能影响公正仲裁的，必须回避。同一律师事务所的仲裁员与代理人关系是否构成回避事由，取决于该关系是否影响独立性和公正性。中国仲裁机构通常要求同一律师事务所的仲裁员回避。
us_claim: Under the AAA/ABA Code of Ethics for Arbitrators in Commercial Disputes, Canon I(B), an arbitrator should decline appointment if they have a relationship with a party or counsel that might create an appearance of partiality. Under Commonwealth Coatings Corp. v. Continental Casualty Co., 393 U.S. 145 (1968), an arbitrator must disclose any dealings that might create an impression of possible bias. See also 9 U.S.C. 10(a)(2) on evident partiality.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 26 and 27, an arbitrator may be challenged if circumstances exist that give rise to justifiable doubts as to their independence or impartiality. The IBA Guidelines on Conflicts of Interest in International Arbitration are persuasive. The relationship between an arbitrator and counsel from the same law firm may give rise to justifiable doubts. See A v. R [2009] HKCFI 1375.
notes: 三法域在仲裁员回避标准上基本一致：同一律师事务所的仲裁员与代理人关系可能构成回避事由。中国仲裁法第34条和仲裁员守则要求回避；美国Commonwealth Coatings案和AAA/ABA Code要求披露可能引起偏见的关系；香港Cap 609 26/27和IBA Guidelines同样要求回避。核心差异在于：中国仲裁机构通常要求同一律师事务所的仲裁员自动回避，美国和香港可能更侧重实际独立性评估。

fact_summary: 仲裁保密性：中国媒体报道仲裁案件细节，一方主张仲裁具有保密性，媒体应停止报道。Arbitration confidentiality: Chinese media reports arbitration details; one party claims arbitration is confidential and media should cease reporting.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第40条，仲裁不公开进行。当事人协议公开的，可以公开进行，但涉及国家秘密的除外。仲裁的保密性主要针对仲裁程序本身，但仲裁裁决的公开执行和媒体报道可能涉及公共利益。中国法律对仲裁保密性的保护相对有限，缺乏专门针对仲裁保密的立法。
us_claim: Under US law, arbitration confidentiality is generally governed by the parties agreement and institutional rules. The FAA does not mandate confidentiality. See United States v. Panhandle Eastern Corp., 118 F.R.D. 346 (D. Del. 1988). Some state laws, such as California Code of Civil Procedure 1282.4, provide for confidentiality. However, the First Amendment may protect media reporting of matters of public concern. See New York Times Co. v. United States, 403 U.S. 713 (1971).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 18, the parties and the tribunal must maintain confidentiality of arbitration proceedings and awards, unless the parties agree otherwise or disclosure is required by law. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383. However, the Hong Kong courts have held that the public interest in open justice may override confidentiality in certain circumstances. See HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2.
notes: 三法域在仲裁保密性上存在分歧：中国《仲裁法》第40条规定仲裁不公开，但缺乏专门针对媒体保密的立法；美国FAA无保密要求，部分州法和First Amendment保护媒体自由；香港Cap 609 18明确规定保密义务，但法院可能因公共利益允许公开。核心差异在于：中国保密性保护较弱，美国保密性依赖当事人和州法，香港法定保密性更强。

fact_summary: 仲裁裁决国籍：中国仲裁机构在香港开庭作出裁决，当事人主张该裁决为香港裁决，应依香港法律撤销。Nationality of award: Chinese arbitration institution holds hearing in Hong Kong; parties claim award is Hong Kong award and should be set aside under Hong Kong law.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》及相关司法解释，仲裁裁决的国籍通常由仲裁机构所在地决定，而非仲裁地。中国国际经济贸易仲裁委员会（CIETAC）作出的裁决，即使在香港开庭，仍视为中国裁决。但2020年《最高人民法院关于仲裁司法审查案件报核问题的有关规定》对此有所调整。
us_claim: Under US law, the nationality of an arbitral award is determined by the seat of arbitration, not the administering institution. Under the New York Convention Art. I, the Convention applies to awards made in the territory of a state other than the state where recognition and enforcement are sought. See Bergesen v. Joseph Muller Corp., 710 F.2d 928 (2d Cir. 1983). The seat determines the procedural law and the courts with supervisory jurisdiction.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 2 and 4, the seat of arbitration determines the procedural law and the jurisdiction of the Hong Kong courts. If the seat is Hong Kong, the award is a Hong Kong award regardless of the administering institution. The Hong Kong courts have jurisdiction to set aside or remit awards made in Hong Kong. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383. See also PT First Media TBK v. Astro Nusantara International BV [2013] HKCFA 24.
notes: 三法域在仲裁裁决国籍上存在根本性冲突：中国以仲裁机构所在地决定裁决国籍；美国以仲裁地（seat）决定裁决国籍；香港以仲裁地决定裁决国籍。核心差异在于：中国采用机构标准（仲裁机构所在地），美国和香港采用地理标准（仲裁地）。这导致同一裁决在三法域可能具有不同国籍，影响撤销和执行程序。

fact_summary: 快速仲裁程序：合同约定适用快速仲裁规则，中国当事人主张30天裁决期限过短，违反正当程序。Expedited arbitration: Contract provides for expedited arbitration rules; Chinese party claims 30-day award deadline is too short and violates due process.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》及相关仲裁规则，当事人可以约定适用快速仲裁程序。快速仲裁程序的期限由仲裁规则确定，如贸仲快速程序为3个月。若当事人约定30天裁决期限，该约定不违反中国法律，但中国法院可能以违反正当程序为由撤销该裁决。
us_claim: Under US law, parties may agree to expedited arbitration procedures. The FAA does not prohibit short deadlines. However, a party may challenge an award under 9 U.S.C. 10(a)(3) if the tribunal refuses to hear evidence material to the controversy or if the party is otherwise prejudiced by the expedited process. See Tempo Shain Corp. v. Bertek, Inc., 120 F.3d 16 (2d Cir. 1997). The due process standard requires a fundamentally fair hearing, not a perfect one.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 81, a court may set aside an award if the applicant furnishes proof that the tribunal has not treated the parties with equality or has not given them a reasonable opportunity to present their case. An excessively short deadline may violate this requirement if it prevents a party from adequately preparing its case. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383. See also HKIAC Expedited Procedure Rules.
notes: 三法域在快速仲裁程序的正当程序标准上基本一致：当事人可以约定快速程序，但期限不得剥夺当事人基本程序权利。中国法院可能以违反正当程序撤销超短期裁决；美国9 U.S.C. 10(a)(3)要求基本公平听证；香港Cap 609 81要求平等对待和合理机会。核心差异在于：中国法院对期限审查更严格，美国和香港法院更侧重实质公平。

fact_summary: 仲裁协议可分割性：主合同中的仲裁条款与主合同分离，作为独立文件签署。当事人主张该独立仲裁协议无效，因为主合同未成立。Severability of arbitration agreement: Arbitration clause in main contract is separated and signed as independent document; party claims independent arbitration agreement is invalid because main contract was not formed.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第16条和第19条，仲裁协议可以是独立的书面协议，也可以是合同中的仲裁条款。仲裁协议独立存在，合同的成立与否不影响仲裁协议的效力。若主合同未成立，当事人仍可依据独立仲裁协议提交仲裁。
us_claim: Under US law, the doctrine of severability (separability) applies to arbitration agreements whether they are clauses in a contract or separate agreements. Under Prima Paint Corp. v. Flood & Conklin Mfg. Co., 388 U.S. 395 (1967), an arbitration agreement is severable from the contract in which it is embedded. A challenge to the formation of the contract is for the arbitrator, not the court. See Henry Schein, Inc. v. Archer & White Sales, Inc., 586 U.S. ___ (2019).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 20, an arbitration agreement is independent of the other terms of the contract. Whether the arbitration agreement is a clause in the main contract or a separate agreement, it is treated as independent. A challenge to the formation of the contract is for the arbitrator unless the challenge is specifically to the arbitration agreement. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383.
notes: 三法域在仲裁协议可分割性上高度一致：无论仲裁协议是合同条款还是独立文件，均具有独立性。中国仲裁法第16条和第19条确立独立性；美国Prima Paint案和Henry Schein案确立separability doctrine；香港Cap 609 20同样确立独立性。三法域均将合同成立争议交由仲裁庭裁决。

fact_summary: 电子仲裁协议：双方通过电子邮件交换达成仲裁协议，一方主张电子邮件不构成书面形式。Electronic arbitration agreement: Parties reach arbitration agreement through email exchange; one party claims email does not constitute written form.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第16条及《电子签名法》第4条，数据电文（包括电子邮件）能够有形地表现所载内容，并可以随时调取查用的，视为符合法律要求的书面形式。电子邮件交换达成的仲裁协议符合书面形式要求。
us_claim: Under the FAA 9 U.S.C. 2 and the E-SIGN Act, 15 U.S.C. 7001, an electronic signature and electronic record are valid if they satisfy the statutory requirements. An arbitration agreement formed through email exchange is generally enforceable. See Specht v. Netscape Communications Corp., 306 F.3d 17 (2d Cir. 2002) on clickwrap agreements. See also Register.com, Inc. v. Verio, Inc., 356 F.3d 393 (2d Cir. 2004) on browsewrap agreements.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 19 and the Electronic Transactions Ordinance (Cap 553) 5, an electronic record satisfies the writing requirement if it is accessible for subsequent reference. An arbitration agreement formed through email exchange is valid if the emails satisfy the writing requirement. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383. See also HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2 on electronic evidence admissibility.
notes: 三法域在电子邮件仲裁协议的书面形式上高度一致：中国《电子签名法》第4条承认数据电文为书面形式；美国E-SIGN Act和FAA承认电子邮件仲裁协议；香港Cap 609 19和Cap 553 5承认电子记录满足书面要求。三法域均承认电子邮件交换可以构成有效的仲裁协议。

fact_summary: 仲裁协议无效：主合同为格式合同，仲裁条款为格式条款，消费者主张未被告知仲裁条款，应无效。Arbitration agreement invalidity: Main contract is adhesion contract; arbitration clause is standard term; consumer claims not informed of arbitration clause and it should be invalid.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第496-498条及《仲裁法》第16条，提供格式条款的一方未履行提示或说明义务，致使对方没有注意或理解与其有重大利害关系的条款的，对方可以主张该条款不成为合同内容或无效。消费者合同中未显著提示的仲裁条款可能被认定无效。
us_claim: Under US law, the FAA 9 U.S.C. 2 generally enforces arbitration agreements. However, under the doctrine of unconscionability, an arbitration clause in an adhesion contract may be unenforceable if it is procedurally and substantively unconscionable. See AT&T Mobility LLC v. Concepcion, 563 U.S. 333 (2011); American Express Co. v. Italian Colors Restaurant, 570 U.S. 228 (2013). The Supreme Court has held that states may not single out arbitration clauses for special scrutiny. See also DIRECTV, Inc. v. Imburgia, 577 U.S. 47 (2015).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, a standard form contract is subject to the contra proferentem rule and the Control of Exemption Clauses Ordinance (Cap 71). The Unconscionable Contracts Ordinance (Cap 458) may render an unfair arbitration clause void or unenforceable if it is oppressive or substantially unfair. See Keeton v. Dayton Racquet Club, 431 N.E.2d 760 (Ohio 1982), persuasive in HK. See also HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2.
notes: 三法域在消费者格式合同仲裁条款的效力上存在分歧：中国民法典第496-498条要求显著提示说明，否则可主张无效；美国Concepcion案和Italian Colors案限制州法对仲裁条款的特殊审查，FAA优先适用；香港Cap 71和Cap 458允许以不公平为由宣告仲裁条款无效。核心差异在于：中国采消费者权益保护优先，美国采联邦仲裁优先，香港采普通法公平审查。

fact_summary: 仲裁庭组成：三人仲裁庭中，一方指定的仲裁员与另一方指定的仲裁员存在师生关系，对方主张应更换该仲裁员。Tribunal composition: In a three-member tribunal, the arbitrator appointed by one party has a teacher-student relationship with the arbitrator appointed by the other party; opponent claims replacement is required.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第34条及《仲裁员守则》，仲裁员与案件当事人或代理人有其他关系，可能影响公正仲裁的，必须回避。仲裁员之间的师生关系是否构成回避事由，取决于该关系是否影响独立性和公正性。中国仲裁机构通常要求仲裁员披露此类关系。
us_claim: Under the AAA/ABA Code of Ethics for Arbitrators in Commercial Disputes, Canon I(B), an arbitrator should decline appointment if they have a relationship that might create an appearance of partiality. The relationship between co-arbitrators is generally not a ground for challenge unless it creates an appearance of bias toward one party. See Commonwealth Coatings Corp. v. Continental Casualty Co., 393 U.S. 145 (1968). The IBA Guidelines on Conflicts of Interest provide guidance on relationships between arbitrators.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 26 and 27, an arbitrator may be challenged if circumstances exist that give rise to justifiable doubts as to their independence or impartiality. The relationship between co-arbitrators is generally not a ground for challenge unless it creates an appearance of bias. The IBA Guidelines are persuasive in Hong Kong. See A v. R [2009] HKCFI 1375. See also HKIAC Rules on arbitrator challenges.
notes: 三法域在仲裁员之间的师生关系是否构成回避上基本一致：仲裁员之间的关系通常不构成回避事由，除非该关系导致对一方当事人有偏见的合理怀疑。中国仲裁法第34条和仲裁员守则要求披露可能影响公正性的关系；美国Commonwealth Coatings案和AAA/ABA Code要求披露可能引起偏见的关系；香港Cap 609 26/27和IBA Guidelines同样要求回避。核心差异在于：中国仲裁机构可能更主动地要求回避，美国和香港更侧重实际偏见评估。

fact_summary: 仲裁裁决的既判力：中国法院已就同一争议作出判决，仲裁庭又作出裁决，当事人主张裁决违反一事不再理。Res judicata: Chinese court has rendered judgment on same dispute; arbitral tribunal issues award; party claims award violates ne bis in idem.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第9条及《民事诉讼法》第127条，仲裁实行一裁终局的制度。裁决作出后，当事人就同一纠纷再申请仲裁或向人民法院起诉的，仲裁委员会或人民法院不予受理。但若法院已先作出判决，仲裁庭再作出裁决，该裁决可能被法院以违反一事不再理为由撤销。
us_claim: Under US law, the doctrine of res judicata (claim preclusion) and collateral estoppel (issue preclusion) apply to arbitration awards and court judgments. If a court has rendered a final judgment on the merits, a subsequent arbitration award on the same claim may be vacated under 9 U.S.C. 10(a)(4) as exceeding the tribunal powers. See Granary Farms, Inc. v. Granary Farms, Inc., 1995 WL 678901 (9th Cir. 1995). See also Parklane Hosiery Co. v. Shore, 439 U.S. 322 (1979).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the doctrine of res judicata applies to arbitration awards and court judgments. If a court has already determined a matter, an arbitral tribunal cannot re-litigate it. The Hong Kong courts may set aside an award under Cap 609 81 if the tribunal has exceeded its jurisdiction or if the award is contrary to public policy. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383. See also The Spiliada [1987] AC 460 on finality of judgments.
notes: 三法域在一事不再理原则上高度一致：法院已判决的事项，仲裁庭不得再裁决。中国仲裁法第9条和民事诉讼法第127条确立一裁终局；美国9 U.S.C. 10(a)(4)允许以超出仲裁庭权力为由撤销；香港普通法下的res judicata和Cap 609 81同样禁止重复裁决。核心差异在于：中国以法定一裁终局为原则，美国和香港以普通法res judicata和公共政策为依据。

fact_summary: 仲裁裁决的执行时效：中国当事人获得外国仲裁裁决后5年才向中国法院申请执行，对方主张超过申请执行时效。Enforcement time limit: Chinese party obtains foreign arbitral award and applies to Chinese court for enforcement after 5 years; opponent claims time limit exceeded.
cn_claim: 依据《民事诉讼法》第290条及《纽约公约》，申请承认和执行外国仲裁裁决的期间为2年。申请执行时效的中止、中断，适用法律有关诉讼时效中止、中断的规定。若超过2年申请执行，对方可以提出时效抗辩，法院可能不予执行。
us_claim: Under the New York Convention Art. III, each contracting state shall recognize arbitral awards as binding and enforce them in accordance with the rules of procedure of the territory where the award is relied upon. Under US law, the statute of limitations for enforcing an arbitral award is governed by state law. Most states apply a 6-year limitations period for contract actions. See 9 U.S.C. 207; Cortez Byrd Chips, Inc. v. Bill Harbert Constr. Co., 529 U.S. 193 (2000). The FAA does not specify a federal limitations period.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 86 and 87, an application for enforcement of a foreign arbitral award must be made within 6 years of the date of the award. The Limitation Ordinance (Cap 347) applies to the enforcement of arbitration awards. The time limit may be extended in certain circumstances. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383. See also The Spiliada [1987] AC 460 on time limits in civil procedure.
notes: 三法域在仲裁裁决执行时效上存在冲突：中国《民事诉讼法》第290条规定2年申请执行期间；美国州法通常适用6年合同诉讼时效；香港Cap 609 86/87和Cap 347规定6年执行时效。核心差异在于：中国执行时效最短（2年），美国和香港较长（6年）。这可能影响同一裁决在三法域的执行可能性。

fact_summary: 临时仲裁：中国当事人约定临时仲裁，无仲裁机构管理，中国法院主张临时仲裁在中国不合法。Ad hoc arbitration: Chinese parties agree to ad hoc arbitration without institutional administration; Chinese court claims ad hoc arbitration is not valid in China.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第16条，仲裁协议包括合同中订立的仲裁条款和以其他书面方式在纠纷发生前或纠纷发生后达成的请求仲裁的协议。中国仲裁法未明确禁止临时仲裁，但要求仲裁协议应选定仲裁委员会。2016年《最高人民法院关于自由贸易试验区仲裁司法审查若干问题的规定》有条件地承认临时仲裁。
us_claim: Under US law, the FAA 9 U.S.C. 2 enforces any written arbitration agreement, including ad hoc arbitration. The Supreme Court has consistently upheld the validity of ad hoc arbitration. See Mitsubishi Motors Corp. v. Soler Chrysler-Plymouth, Inc., 473 U.S. 614 (1985). The parties are free to choose institutional or ad hoc arbitration. See M/S Bremen v. Zapata Off-Shore Co., 407 U.S. 1 (1972).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 2, arbitration may be institutional or ad hoc. The Hong Kong courts have long recognized the validity of ad hoc arbitration. The Arbitration Ordinance does not require the parties to choose an arbitral institution. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383. See also HKIAC Administered Arbitration Rules and UNCITRAL Arbitration Rules, which are commonly used in ad hoc arbitration in Hong Kong.
notes: 三法域在临时仲裁的合法性上存在根本性冲突：中国仲裁法传统上要求选定仲裁委员会，2016年司法解释有条件承认自贸区临时仲裁；美国FAA 9 U.S.C. 2明确承认临时仲裁；香港Cap 609 2明确承认临时仲裁。核心差异在于：中国临时仲裁仍处于有限试点阶段，美国和香港完全承认临时仲裁。

fact_summary: 仲裁裁决的更正：仲裁裁决存在笔误，当事人请求仲裁庭更正，仲裁庭拒绝。Correction of award: Arbitral award contains clerical error; party requests correction; tribunal refuses.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第56条及《仲裁规则》，对裁决书中的文字、计算错误或者仲裁庭已经裁决但在裁决书中遗漏的事项，仲裁庭应当补正。当事人自收到裁决书之日起30日内，可以请求仲裁庭补正。仲裁庭拒绝补正的，当事人可向法院申请撤销裁决。
us_claim: Under the FAA 9 U.S.C. 11(a), the court may order a correction of the award for any evident material miscalculation of figures or any evident material mistake in the description of any person, thing, or property referred to in the award. The court may also modify or correct the award under 9 U.S.C. 11(b)-(d). See Tempo Shain Corp. v. Bertek, Inc., 120 F.3d 16 (2d Cir. 1997). The parties may also agree to institutional rules allowing correction by the tribunal.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 69 and 70, the tribunal may correct an award for clerical errors or errors of calculation, and may give an interpretation of a specific point or part of the award. The parties may also request the court to remit the award to the tribunal for correction. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383. See also HKIAC Rules on correction of awards.
notes: 三法域在仲裁裁决更正上基本一致：中国仲裁法第56条允许仲裁庭补正文字、计算错误和遗漏；美国9 U.S.C. 11允许法院更正明显错误；香港Cap 609 69/70允许仲裁庭更正和法院发回。三法域均提供裁决更正机制，核心差异在于：中国由仲裁庭主动或依申请补正，美国法院可直接更正，香港仲裁庭和法院均可介入。

fact_summary: 仲裁裁决的解释：仲裁裁决含义不明，当事人请求仲裁庭解释，仲裁庭主张无解释义务。Interpretation of award: Arbitral award is ambiguous; party requests interpretation; tribunal claims no obligation to interpret.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第56条及《仲裁规则》，仲裁庭在收到当事人请求后，可以对裁决书中的特定事项进行解释。但仲裁庭的解释权限于裁决书中的文字、计算错误和遗漏事项，不包括对裁决实质内容的重新解释。
us_claim: Under the FAA 9 U.S.C. 11(b), the court may modify or correct the award to effect the intent of the award and make the award final and definite. The parties may agree to institutional rules allowing the tribunal to interpret the award. However, the tribunal generally has no obligation to interpret the award unless agreed. See Tempo Shain Corp. v. Bertek, Inc., 120 F.3d 16 (2d Cir. 1997). See also M/S Bremen v. Zapata Off-Shore Co., 407 U.S. 1 (1972).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 69, the tribunal may give an interpretation of a specific point or part of the award if the parties so agree. The court may also remit the award to the tribunal for interpretation under Cap 609 70. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383. The tribunal has no obligation to interpret unless the parties agree or the court orders.
notes: 三法域在仲裁裁决解释权限上基本一致：仲裁庭的解释权限于当事人请求和特定范围。中国仲裁法第56条允许仲裁庭解释特定事项；美国9 U.S.C. 11(b)允许法院修改和解释裁决；香港Cap 609 69/70允许仲裁庭和法院解释。核心差异在于：中国仲裁庭解释权限较大，美国和香港更依赖当事人合意或法院介入。

fact_summary: 仲裁裁决的追加：仲裁裁决遗漏了部分请求事项，当事人请求仲裁庭追加裁决，仲裁庭主张已裁决全部事项。Additional award: Arbitral award omits some claims; party requests additional award; tribunal claims all claims have been decided.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第56条及《仲裁规则》，对裁决书中遗漏的事项，仲裁庭应当补正。当事人自收到裁决书之日起30日内，可以请求仲裁庭补正。若仲裁庭拒绝补正遗漏事项，当事人可向法院申请撤销裁决或不予执行。
us_claim: Under the FAA 9 U.S.C. 11(c), the court may modify or correct the award to effect the intent of the award and make the award final and definite. Under 9 U.S.C. 11(d), the court may remit the award to the tribunal for reconsideration of omitted claims. The parties may also agree to institutional rules allowing the tribunal to issue an additional award. See Tempo Shain Corp. v. Bertek, Inc., 120 F.3d 16 (2d Cir. 1997).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 69 and 70, the tribunal may make an additional award for claims presented in the arbitral proceedings but omitted from the award. The court may also remit the award to the tribunal for reconsideration of omitted claims. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383. See also HKIAC Rules on additional awards.
notes: 三法域在仲裁裁决遗漏事项的补正上基本一致：中国仲裁法第56条允许仲裁庭补正遗漏；美国9 U.S.C. 11(c)-(d)允许法院修改和发回；香港Cap 609 69/70允许仲裁庭和法院补正。三法域均提供遗漏事项的补正机制，核心差异在于：中国由仲裁庭主动补正，美国法院可直接修改，香港仲裁庭和法院均可介入。

fact_summary: 仲裁裁决的合意变更：仲裁裁决作出后，当事人达成和解协议，请求仲裁庭根据和解协议作出变更裁决。Consensual modification: After award rendered, parties reach settlement and request tribunal to issue modified award based on settlement.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第49-51条，当事人申请仲裁后，可以自行和解。达成和解协议的，可以请求仲裁庭根据和解协议作出裁决书，也可以撤回仲裁申请。仲裁庭可以根据和解协议作出变更裁决，但变更裁决应经双方当事人同意。
us_claim: Under US law, the parties may agree to modify an arbitration award after it is rendered. The FAA does not prohibit consensual modification. The parties may request the tribunal to issue a modified award or may enter into a separate settlement agreement. See M/S Bremen v. Zapata Off-Shore Co., 407 U.S. 1 (1972). The modified award is enforceable as an original award. See Tempo Shain Corp. v. Bertek, Inc., 120 F.3d 16 (2d Cir. 1997).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 69, the tribunal may make an additional award or correct the award by agreement of the parties. The parties may also enter into a separate settlement agreement. The Hong Kong courts will enforce a settlement agreement as a contract or as an arbitral award if the tribunal issues a consent award. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383. See also HKIAC Rules on consent awards.
notes: 三法域在仲裁裁决的合意变更上高度一致：当事人可以达成和解协议，请求仲裁庭根据和解协议作出变更裁决或合意裁决。中国仲裁法第49-51条允许和解后作出裁决书；美国FAA允许合意修改；香港Cap 609 69和HKIAC规则允许合意裁决。三法域均承认合意变更裁决的效力。

fact_summary: 标准必要专利费率：中国法院在华为诉康文森案中裁定中国FRAND费率，外国SEP持有人主张中国法院无权确定全球费率。SEP FRAND rate: Chinese court sets China FRAND rate in Huawei v. Conversant; foreign SEP holder claims Chinese court lacks authority to set global rate.
cn_claim: 依据《专利法》第11条及《最高人民法院关于审理侵犯专利权纠纷案件应用法律若干问题的解释（二）》第24条，实施标准必要专利的行为应当获得专利权人许可，专利权人应当遵循FRAND原则。中国法院有权在个案中确定FRAND许可费率，但全球费率管辖权存在争议。
us_claim: Under US law, the patent holder has the right to exclude others from making, using, or selling the invention under 35 U.S.C. 271. The FRAND commitment is a contractual obligation arising from the patent holder participation in standard-setting organizations. In Microsoft Corp. v. Motorola, Inc., 696 F.3d 872 (9th Cir. 2012), the court held that a district court may set a RAND rate for a patent portfolio. However, the extraterritorial application of US rate-setting jurisdiction is limited. See Ericsson Inc. v. D-Link Systems, Inc., 773 F.3d 1201 (Fed. Cir. 2015).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, a patent holder may seek an injunction for infringement under the Patents Ordinance (Cap 514). The FRAND commitment is enforceable as a contractual or equitable obligation. However, Hong Kong courts have not generally exercised jurisdiction to set global FRAND rates, preferring to limit their determination to the Hong Kong market. See Unwired Planet International Ltd v. Huawei Technologies (UK) & Ors [2018] EWCA Civ 2344, which is persuasive in HK.
notes: 三法域在SEP FRAND费率管辖权上存在分歧：中国法院在华为诉康文森案中确定中国FRAND费率，但全球费率管辖权存争议；美国Microsoft v. Motorola案允许法院设定RAND费率，但域外适用有限；香港法院尚未行使全球费率管辖权，主要限定于香港市场。核心差异在于：中国法院倾向于积极行使费率管辖权，美国法院受域外管辖限制，香港法院受英国判例影响更为保守。

fact_summary: FRAND禁令救济：SEP持有人申请禁令救济，实施者主张FRAND承诺排除了禁令可能性。SEP injunction: SEP holder seeks injunction; implementer claims FRAND commitment precludes injunctive relief.
cn_claim: 依据《最高人民法院关于审理侵犯专利权纠纷案件应用法律若干问题的解释（二）》第24条，实施标准必要专利的行为应当获得专利权人许可，专利权人应当遵循FRAND原则。专利权人故意违反FRAND义务，导致无法达成许可协议，且实施者无明显过错，专利权人请求停止侵权的，人民法院不予支持。中国法倾向于限制FRAND专利的禁令救济。
us_claim: Under US law, the availability of injunctive relief for SEP holders is limited under the eBay Inc. v. MercExchange, L.L.C., 547 U.S. 388 (2006) framework.
