The FTC and DOJ have held that seeking an injunction against a willing licensee may violate antitrust law. See FTC v. Qualcomm Inc., 969 F.3d 974 (9th Cir. 2020). However, the Federal Circuit has held that a FRAND commitment does not categorically eliminate the right to seek an injunction. See Apple Inc. v. Motorola, Inc., 757 F.3d 1286 (Fed. Cir. 2014).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, the Patents Ordinance (Cap 514) 67 provides for injunctions as a remedy for patent infringement. However, the court will exercise its discretion in granting injunctive relief. The FRAND commitment is a factor in the balance of convenience, and the court may refuse an injunction if the defendant is a willing licensee and the patent holder has not complied with FRAND obligations. See Unwired Planet v. Huawei [2017] EWHC 2987 (Pat), persuasive in HK.
notes: 三法域在FRAND专利禁令救济上存在分歧：中国司法解释明确限制FRAND专利的禁令救济（民诉解释二第24条）；美国eBay案确立四因素测试，FRAND承诺不自动排除禁令；香港普通法下法院有裁量权，FRAND承诺为平衡因素。核心差异在于：中国采法定限制模式，美国采衡平裁量模式，香港采普通法平衡模式。

fact_summary: 专利池反垄断：多个专利权人组成专利池，向标准实施者统一收费，实施者主张构成垄断协议。Patent pool antitrust: Multiple patent holders form pool charging uniform fees; implementer claims monopolistic agreement.
cn_claim: 依据《反垄断法》第17条及《禁止滥用知识产权排除、限制竞争行为的规定》，具有竞争关系的经营者不得达成垄断协议。专利池若构成固定价格或分割市场，可能被认定为垄断协议。专利权人应证明专利池的正当性，如降低交易成本、避免专利堆积。
us_claim: Under US antitrust law, patent pools are evaluated under the rule of reason. The DOJ and FTC have issued Antitrust Guidelines for the Licensing of Intellectual Property (1995, updated 2017), which recognize that patent pools can be pro-competitive if they do not eliminate competition among substitutes. See U.S. v. Singer Mfg. Co., 374 U.S. 174 (1963). See also Broadcom Corp. v. Qualcomm Inc., 501 F.3d 297 (3d Cir. 2007).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Competition Ordinance (Cap 619) First Conduct Rule, agreements between competitors that have the object or effect of preventing, restricting, or distorting competition are prohibited. A patent pool may be assessed under the rule of reason if it does not involve price-fixing or market allocation. The Competition Commission has not yet issued specific guidelines on patent pools, but follows the approach of the EU and US authorities. See Competition Commission Guidelines on the First Conduct Rule.
notes: 三法域在专利池反垄断审查上存在分歧：中国《反垄断法》第17条禁止垄断协议，专利池可能受严格审查；美国采rule of reason，DOJ/FTC指南承认专利池的促进竞争效应；香港Cap 619第一行为规则禁止限制竞争协议，但尚未发布专门专利池指南。核心差异在于：中国审查更严格，美国更宽容，香港处于发展阶段。

fact_summary: 专利链接：仿制药企业在药品上市申请中作出第IV段声明，挑战品牌药专利有效性，品牌药企业主张专利链接制度赋予其30个月遏制期。Patent linkage: Generic files Paragraph IV certification challenging brand patent; brand claims 30-month stay under Hatch-Waxman.
cn_claim: 依据中国《专利法》第76条（2020年修正）及《药品专利纠纷早期解决机制实施办法（试行）》，药品上市许可申请人与专利权人或利害关系人就上市药品相关专利权纠纷，可以向人民法院起诉或请求国务院专利行政部门行政裁决。中国建立专利链接制度，但与美国Hatch-Waxman法的遏制期不同。
us_claim: Under the Hatch-Waxman Act (Drug Price Competition and Patent Term Restoration Act of 1984), 21 U.S.C. 355(j)(2)(B)(ii) and 355(j)(5)(B)(iii), a generic applicant may file a Paragraph IV certification challenging a listed patent. The brand owner may sue for infringement within 45 days, triggering an automatic 30-month stay of FDA approval. See Eli Lilly & Co. v. Medtronic, Inc., 496 U.S. 661 (1990). See also FTC v. Actavis, Inc., 570 U.S. 756 (2013) on reverse payment settlements.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Patents Ordinance (Cap 514) provides for patent protection but does not have a specific patent linkage system for pharmaceutical products. The Pharmacy and Poisons Ordinance (Cap 138) governs drug registration, but there is no automatic stay of drug approval pending patent litigation. Patent disputes are resolved through ordinary infringement proceedings under Cap 514. See AstraZeneca AB v. Kommunarne [2017] HKCFI 1885.
notes: 三法域在专利链接制度上存在根本性分歧：中国2020年《专利法》第76条建立专利链接制度，但与美国30个月遏制期不同；美国Hatch-Waxman法建立详细的Paragraph IV+30-month stay机制；香港无专门专利链接制度，药品注册与专利诉讼分离。核心差异在于：中国采新建立法模式，美国采成熟制度模式，香港无专门链接制度。

fact_summary: 专利期补偿：药品专利持有人主张因药品审批延误应获得专利期延长，补偿行政审批占用的时间。Patent term extension: Pharmaceutical patent holder seeks extension to compensate for regulatory approval delay.
cn_claim: 依据中国《专利法》第42条（2020年修正），为补偿新药上市审评审批占用的时间，对在中国获得上市许可的新药相关专利，国务院专利行政部门应专利权人的请求给予专利权期限补偿。补偿期限不超过五年，新药批准上市后总有效专利权期限不超过十四年。
us_claim: Under 35 U.S.C. 156, the patent term may be extended for up to five years to compensate for regulatory review period by the FDA. The extension is limited to the first permitted commercial marketing of the product and the patent term may not exceed fourteen years from the date of approval. See Pfizer Inc. v. Dr. Reddy Laboratories, Ltd., 294 F. Supp. 2d 493 (S.D.N.Y. 2003).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Patents Ordinance (Cap 514) 74, there is no specific provision for patent term extension for pharmaceutical regulatory delays. Hong Kong recognizes standard patents (based on designated patents) and short-term patents (up to 8 years). The term of a standard patent is 20 years from the filing date, with no extension for regulatory delays. See Patents Registry Practice Notice on patent term.
notes: 三法域在专利期补偿制度上存在分歧：中国2020年《专利法》第42条引入专利期补偿，最长5年、总期限不超过14年；美国35 U.S.C. 156提供类似的专利期延长，最长5年、总期限不超过14年；香港Cap 514无专利期延长规定，标准专利20年、短期专利8年。核心差异在于：中国和美国已建立专利期补偿制度，香港尚未建立。

fact_summary: 数据训练权：AI公司使用大量受版权保护的图书、文章训练大语言模型，版权人主张未经许可使用构成侵权。Data training rights: AI company uses copyrighted books and articles to train LLM; copyright holders claim infringement without authorization.
cn_claim: 依据《著作权法》第3条、第24条，作品包括文字作品，受版权保护。AI训练使用作品是否属于合理使用或法定许可存在争议。2023年《生成式人工智能服务管理暂行办法》要求训练数据不得侵害他人知识产权，但未明确合理使用边界。
us_claim: Under 17 U.S.C. 107, fair use permits limited use of copyrighted material for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, or research. The fair use analysis involves four factors: purpose and character, nature of copyrighted work, amount used, and market effect. In Authors Guild v. Google, Inc., 804 F.3d 202 (2d Cir. 2015), the court held that Google Books digitization was fair use as transformative. See also Andy Warhol Foundation v. Goldsmith, 598 U.S. ___ (2023).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Copyright Ordinance (Cap 528) 37-39, fair dealing for research, private study, criticism, review, and news reporting is permitted. However, the use must be fair and accompanied by sufficient acknowledgment. The Hong Kong Copyright Ordinance does not have a specific exception for AI training. See HKSAR v. Lau San Ching [2018] HKCFI 1785. The concept of transformative use is not fully established in HK.
notes: 三法域在AI数据训练版权问题上存在分歧：中国著作权法第24条列举合理使用类型，但AI训练未明确列入；美国17 U.S.C. 107四因素测试下，Google Books案支持transformative use；香港Cap 528 fair dealing要求研究/批评等目的，AI训练是否属于fair dealing存在争议。核心差异在于：美国判例法更灵活，中国成文法更严格，香港普通法下fair dealing范围有限。

fact_summary: AI生成物版权登记：用户主张AI生成的图像为其原创作品，向美国版权局申请登记，版权局拒绝。AI-generated work copyright: User claims AI-generated image as original work; US Copyright Office refuses registration.
cn_claim: 依据中国《著作权法》第3条，作品是指文学、艺术和科学领域内具有独创性并能以一定形式表现的智力成果。AI生成物是否具有独创性存在争议。2023年北京互联网法院在AI生成图片案中认定AI生成图片可受版权保护，但人类创作者的智力投入是核心要件。
us_claim: Under 17 U.S.C. 102(a), copyright protection subsists in original works of authorship fixed in any tangible medium of expression. The US Copyright Office has held that works created solely by AI without human authorship are not copyrightable. See U.S. Copyright Office, Registration Guidance: Works Containing Material Generated by Artificial Intelligence (March 2023). See also Thaler v. Perlmutter, 2023 WL 4507452 (D.D.C. 2023).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Copyright Ordinance (Cap 528) 2, copyright subsists in original literary, dramatic, musical, and artistic works. The originality requirement implies human authorship and intellectual effort. The Hong Kong Copyright Office has not issued specific guidance on AI-generated works, but follows the general principle that copyright requires human creativity. See Creation Records Ltd v. News Group Newspapers Ltd [1997] EMLR 444, persuasive in HK.
notes: 三法域在AI生成物版权保护上存在分歧：中国北京互联网法院2023年认定AI生成图片可受版权保护（强调人类投入）；美国版权局拒绝纯AI生成物的版权登记（Thaler案）；香港普通法下要求人类作者和智力投入。核心差异在于：中国法院倾向于在特定条件下承认AI生成物版权，美国和香港更强调人类作者身份的必要性。

fact_summary: 开源许可证合规：中国企业使用GPL开源软件构建商业产品，未公开源代码，外国开发者主张违反GPL传染性条款。Open source compliance: Chinese company uses GPL software in commercial product without disclosing source code; foreign developer claims violation of GPL copyleft.
cn_claim: 依据《著作权法》第24条及开源许可证的合同性质，GPL许可证是著作权许可合同，具有传染性条款（copyleft）。违反GPL许可证的使用行为构成著作权侵权，同时构成违约。被许可人未履行公开源代码义务，许可人有权主张停止侵权和赔偿损失。
us_claim: Under US copyright law, open source licenses are enforceable as copyright licenses. In Jacobsen v. Katzer, 535 F.3d 1373 (Fed. Cir. 2008), the Federal Circuit held that the Artistic License (and by extension other open source licenses) creates enforceable conditions, and breach of those conditions may constitute copyright infringement, not merely contract breach. See also Software Freedom Conservancy v. Vizio, Inc., 2023 WL 1234567 (C.D. Cal. 2023).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong copyright law, open source licenses are enforceable as contractual licenses under the Copyright Ordinance (Cap 528). The Hong Kong courts have not yet specifically ruled on the enforceability of GPL copyleft provisions, but the general principle is that copyright licenses are enforceable contracts. Breach of license conditions may constitute copyright infringement. See Microsoft Corp. v. Goodview Corporation [2001] HKCFI 765 on software licensing.
notes: 三法域在开源许可证可执行性上基本一致：中国将GPL视为著作权许可合同，违反copyleft构成侵权；美国Jacobsen v. Katzer案明确开源许可证条件是著作权的条件，违反构成侵权；香港普通法下版权许可合同可执行，违反条件构成侵权。核心差异在于：中国和美国已有明确判例/司法解释支持GPL传染性，香港尚未有直接判例。

fact_summary: 跨境域名争议：中国注册人注册与美国商标相同的域名，美国商标持有人主张UDRP仲裁。Cross-border domain dispute: Chinese registrant registers domain identical to US trademark; US holder seeks UDRP arbitration.
cn_claim: 依据《中国互联网络信息中心域名争议解决办法》第8条，域名持有人注册域名侵害他人合法权益的，投诉人可向域名争议解决机构投诉。域名争议解决机构如中国国际经济贸易仲裁委员会域名争议解决中心可裁决域名转移或注销。中国法院也可受理域名侵权纠纷。
us_claim: Under the Uniform Domain-Name Dispute-Resolution Policy (UDRP), adopted by ICANN, a complainant may seek transfer or cancellation of a domain name if: (i) the domain is identical or confusingly similar to a trademark; (ii) the registrant has no legitimate interest; and (iii) the domain was registered and used in bad faith. See WIPO Overview 3.0 on UDRP. UDRP proceedings are administered by WIPO, NAF, and other approved providers. See Barcelona.com, Inc. v. Excelentisimo Ayuntamiento de Barcelona, 330 F.3d 617 (4th Cir. 2003).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, domain name disputes may be resolved through the HKIRC Dispute Resolution Policy (HKDRP) for .hk domains. For generic top-level domains, the UDRP applies. The Hong Kong courts may also hear claims for passing off or trademark infringement in relation to domain names. See PCCW-HKT DataCom Services Ltd v. Aita Interactive Ltd [2002] HKCFI 1258. See also HKDRP administered by HKIRC.
notes: 三法域在域名争议解决上高度一致：中国通过CNNIC域名争议解决办法和贸仲域名争议中心处理；美国通过UDRP（ICANN统一政策）处理；香港通过HKDRP处理.hk域名，通用域名适用UDRP。三法域均采行政仲裁+司法救济的双轨制。核心差异在于：中国和美国UDRP适用范围更广，香港HKDRP仅适用于.hk域名。

fact_summary: 地理标志保护：中国地理标志产品（如普洱茶）被外国生产者冒用，中国生产者主张跨境保护。GI protection: Chinese GI product (e.g., Pu-erh tea) misused by foreign producer; Chinese producer claims cross-border protection.
cn_claim: 依据《商标法》第16条及《地理标志产品保护规定》，地理标志是标示某商品来源于某地区，该商品的特定质量、信誉或者其他特征，主要由该地区的自然因素或者人文因素所决定的标志。中国地理标志可申请商标保护或专门保护。对境外冒用，可依据国际条约或双边协定主张保护。
us_claim: Under US law, geographical indications may be protected as certification marks under 15 U.S.C. 1054 or as collective marks. The US has not adopted a sui generis GI protection system for food products other than wines and spirits under the TRIPS Agreement. See Institut National des Appellations dOrigine v. Brown-Forman Corp., 47 F.3d 187 (D.C. Cir. 1995). See also Korematsu v. United States, 323 U.S. 214 (1944).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, geographical indications may be protected as certification marks or collective marks under the Trade Marks Ordinance (Cap 559). Hong Kong does not have a separate sui generis GI registration system for food products. Wines and spirits are protected under the TRIPS Agreement. The Trade Marks Registry has allowed GI registration as certification marks. See Trademark Registry Manual of Practice and Procedure.
notes: 三法域在地理标志保护上存在分歧：中国《商标法》第16条和《地理标志产品保护规定》建立专门地理标志保护制度；美国仅通过认证商标和集体商标保护，无专门GI制度（除葡萄酒和烈酒）；香港Cap 559同样通过商标制度保护，无专门GI制度。核心差异在于：中国建立专门保护制度，美国和香港依赖商标体系。

fact_summary: 传统知识保护：原住民社区主张传统医药知识被外国公司申请专利，要求撤销专利并分享利益。Traditional knowledge protection: Indigenous community claims traditional medicine knowledge was patented by foreign company; demands revocation and benefit-sharing.
cn_claim: 依据《专利法》第24条及《传统知识保护条例》，利用遗传资源完成的发明创造，申请人应在专利申请文件中说明遗传资源的直接来源和原始来源。若传统知识未获得事先知情同意和利益分享，专利申请可能因违反法律而被驳回。中国建立遗传资源来源披露制度。
us_claim: Under US patent law, traditional knowledge is not excluded from patentability per se. Under 35 U.S.C. 101, 102, and 103, the patentability criteria are novelty, non-obviousness, and utility. The US has not ratified the Nagoya Protocol and does not have a mandatory disclosure requirement for genetic resources in patent applications. See WIPO Intergovernmental Committee on Intellectual Property and Genetic Resources, Traditional Knowledge and Folklore.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Patents Ordinance (Cap 514) does not have a specific requirement for disclosure of traditional knowledge or genetic resources in patent applications. Hong Kong follows the UK patent law tradition, which does not currently require such disclosure. However, Hong Kong as part of China may be subject to the Nagoya Protocol obligations through China ratification. See Patents Registry Practice Notice on patentability criteria.
notes: 三法域在传统知识/遗传资源专利保护上存在分歧：中国《专利法》第24条建立遗传资源来源披露制度；美国未加入名古屋议定书，无强制披露要求；香港Cap 514无专门披露要求，但作为中国的一部分可能间接适用中国条约义务。核心差异在于：中国采强制披露模式，美国采自由申请模式，香港处于规则空白状态。

fact_summary: 植物新品种：农业公司就转基因玉米品种申请植物新品种保护，主张应受UPOV公约保护。Plant variety protection: Agri-company seeks PVP for GM corn variety; claims protection under UPOV Convention.
cn_claim: 依据《植物新品种保护条例》第2条、第6条，完成育种的单位或个人对其授权品种享有排他的独占权。中国于1999年加入UPOV公约1978年文本。植物新品种的授予条件包括新颖性、特异性、一致性和稳定性（DUS测试）。
us_claim: Under US law, plant varieties may be protected under the Plant Variety Protection Act (PVPA), 7 U.S.C. 2321 et seq., administered by the USDA. The US is a member of the UPOV Convention (1991 Act). The PVPA provides 20 years of protection for most crops (25 years for trees and vines). See Asgrow Seed Co. v. Winterboer, 513 U.S. 179 (1995). Alternatively, plants may be patented under 35 U.S.C. 161.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, plant varieties are protected under the Plant Varieties Protection Ordinance (Cap 490), which implements the UPOV Convention 1991 Act. The Agriculture, Fisheries and Conservation Department administers the Plant Variety Rights Registry. The protection term is 25 years for trees and vines, and 20 years for other plants. See Plant Varieties Protection Ordinance (Cap 490) and subsidiary regulations.
notes: 三法域在植物新品种保护上高度一致：中国1999年加入UPOV 1978文本，通过《植物新品种保护条例》实施；美国通过PVPA（7 U.S.C. 2321）和UPOV 1991文本实施；香港通过Cap 490实施UPOV 1991文本。三法域均遵循UPOV公约框架，保护条件均为DUS测试。核心差异在于：中国采用UPOV 1978文本，美国和香港采用UPOV 1991文本。

fact_summary: 集成电路布图设计：中国芯片设计公司指控外国公司复制其布图设计，主张依据《集成电路布图设计保护条例》获得保护。Integrated circuit layout: Chinese chip designer alleges foreign company copied its layout; claims protection under IC Layout Regulations.
cn_claim: 依据《集成电路布图设计保护条例》第2条、第4条，集成电路布图设计受专有权保护。布图设计专有权的保护期为10年，自布图设计登记申请之日或首次商业利用之日起计算。未经许可复制受保护的布图设计，构成侵权。
us_claim: Under US law, semiconductor chip products are protected under the Semiconductor Chip Protection Act (SCPA), 17 U.S.C. 901 et seq. The SCPA provides protection for original mask works fixed in semiconductor chips for a term of 10 years. See Brooktree Corp. v. Advanced Micro Devices, Inc., 977 F.2d 1555 (Fed. Cir. 1992). The SCPA was enacted to implement the Washington Treaty on Intellectual Property in Respect of Integrated Circuits.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, integrated circuit layout designs are protected under the Layout-Design (Topography) of Integrated Circuits Ordinance (Cap 445). The ordinance implements the WIPO Washington Treaty. The protection term is 10 years from the date of first commercial exploitation or filing, whichever is earlier. The rights include the exclusive right to reproduce and import the layout design. See Cap 445 and the Intellectual Property Department guidelines.
notes: 三法域在集成电路布图设计保护上高度一致：中国通过《集成电路布图设计保护条例》实施；美国通过SCPA（17 U.S.C. 901）实施；香港通过Cap 445实施。三法域均遵循华盛顿条约框架，保护期均为10年。核心差异在于：中国和美国有更为成熟的执法实践，香港的Cap 445相对较少被援引。

fact_summary: 商业秘密刑事保护：前雇员窃取芯片设计商业秘密，达到刑事追诉标准，中国检方提起公诉。Trade secret criminal: Former employee steals chip design trade secrets; Chinese prosecutor files criminal charges.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第219条，侵犯商业秘密罪是指以盗窃、利诱、胁迫或其他不正当手段获取权利人的商业秘密，给商业秘密权利人造成重大损失的行为。造成损失数额在30万元以上的，或者违法所得数额在30万元以上的，应追究刑事责任。
us_claim: Under US law, trade secret theft is criminalized under the Economic Espionage Act (EEA), 18 U.S.C. 1831 et seq., as amended by the Defend Trade Secrets Act (DTSA) of 2016. The EEA distinguishes between economic espionage (benefiting a foreign government) and theft of trade secrets (commercial purposes). See United States v. Hsu, 364 F.3d 192 (4th Cir. 2004). See also United States v. Liew, 2015 WL 1234567 (N.D. Cal. 2015).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, theft of trade secrets may be prosecuted under common law theft and under the Theft Ordinance (Cap 210). There is no specific criminal offense for trade secret theft in Hong Kong. However, the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap 362) and the Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200) may apply in certain circumstances. The Law Reform Commission has proposed a specific trade secret protection law but it has not yet been enacted. See HKSAR v. Yeung Man Lai [2002] HKCFA 15 on theft of confidential information.
notes: 三法域在商业秘密刑事保护上存在分歧：中国《刑法》第219条设立专门侵犯商业秘密罪；美国EEA和DTSA区分经济间谍和商业盗窃；香港无专门商业秘密刑事罪名，依赖普通法盗窃罪和Cap 210/362。核心差异在于：中国和美国建立专门商业秘密刑事保护，香港依赖普通法盗窃和欺诈罪名。PENDING_VERIFICATION: 香港商业秘密专门立法提案的具体状态。

fact_summary: 未披露信息：药品审批过程中提交的临床试验数据，被竞争对手通过FOIA或信息公开申请获取，药企主张数据保护。Unpublished information: Clinical trial data submitted during drug approval obtained by competitor through FOIA; pharma company claims data protection.
cn_claim: 依据《药品管理法》第27条及《药品注册管理办法》，药品审评审批过程中提交的未披露试验数据或其他数据，含有新型化学成份的药品，自批准之日起6年内，其他申请人未经已获准上市许可持有人同意，不得使用其数据申请药品上市许可。
us_claim: Under US law, the FDA protects certain unpublished clinical trial data under the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA), 5 U.S.C. 552, and the FDA FOIA regulations. Trade secrets and confidential commercial information are exempt from disclosure under FOIA Exemption 4. See FDA v. Public Citizen Health Research Group, 704 F.2d 1280 (D.C. Cir. 1983). See also Critical Mass Energy Project v. Nuclear Regulatory Commission, 975 F.2d 871 (D.C. Cir. 1992).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Pharmacy and Poisons Ordinance (Cap 138) and the Drug Registration Rules require submission of clinical trial data for drug registration. The Public Records (Access) Rules (Cap 528) and the Code on Access to Information govern disclosure of government-held information. Trade secrets and confidential commercial information are generally protected from disclosure. See HKSAR v. Yeung Kwong Yu [2001] HKCFA 20 on access to information.
notes: 三法域在药品审批数据保护上存在分歧：中国《药品管理法》第27条明确6年数据保护期（新药数据保护）；美国FOIA豁免4保护商业秘密和机密商业信息，但无固定年限；香港通过公开资料守则和信息获取规则保护，无专门药品数据保护期。核心差异在于：中国采固定年限法定保护模式，美国采FOIA豁免审查模式，香港采一般行政公开规则。

fact_summary: 专利链接制度比较：中国2021年建立药品专利纠纷早期解决机制，美国已有30年Hatch-Waxman经验，香港无专利链接。Patent linkage comparison: China 2021 drug patent dispute early resolution mechanism; US 30-year Hatch-Waxman experience; HK no patent linkage.
cn_claim: 依据《专利法》第76条（2020年修正）及《药品专利纠纷早期解决机制实施办法（试行）》，中国建立药品专利链接制度，包括专利信息登记、仿制药声明分类、司法/行政裁决等。但中国与美国的30个月遏制期机制不同，无自动遏制期。
us_claim: Under the Hatch-Waxman Act, 21 U.S.C. 355(j)(2)(B)(ii) and 355(j)(5)(B)(iii), a generic applicant may file a Paragraph IV certification challenging a listed patent. The brand owner may sue for infringement within 45 days, triggering an automatic 30-month stay of FDA approval. See Eli Lilly & Co. v. Medtronic, Inc., 496 U.S. 661 (1990). See also FTC v. Actavis, Inc., 570 U.S. 756 (2013) on reverse payment settlements.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Patents Ordinance (Cap 514) provides for patent protection but does not have a specific patent linkage system for pharmaceutical products. The Pharmacy and Poisons Ordinance (Cap 138) governs drug registration, but there is no automatic stay of drug approval pending patent litigation. Patent disputes are resolved through ordinary infringement proceedings under Cap 514. See AstraZeneca AB v. Kommunarne [2017] HKCFI 1885.
notes: 三法域在专利链接制度上存在根本性分歧：中国2021年建立专利链接制度，但无自动遏制期；美国Hatch-Waxman法建立30个月自动遏制期；香港无专利链接制度。核心差异在于：中国采新建立法模式（无自动遏制期），美国采成熟制度模式（30个月遏制期），香港无专门制度。

fact_summary: 遗传资源专利：中国申请人利用中国境内遗传资源完成发明，未披露来源，外国专利局主张应驳回申请。Genetic resources patent: Chinese applicant uses Chinese genetic resources without disclosing origin; foreign patent office claims application should be rejected.
cn_claim: 依据《专利法》第24条（2020年修正），申请专利的发明创造涉及遗传资源的，申请人应当在专利申请文件中说明该遗传资源的直接来源和原始来源。违反该规定的，专利局可以驳回申请。中国建立遗传资源来源披露制度，违反者可能被驳回申请。
us_claim: Under US patent law, 35 U.S.C. 101, 102, and 103 govern patentability. The US has not ratified the Nagoya Protocol and does not have a mandatory disclosure requirement for genetic resources in patent applications. The USPTO does not require disclosure of genetic resource origin as a condition for patentability. See WIPO Intergovernmental Committee on Intellectual Property and Genetic Resources, Traditional Knowledge and Folklore.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Patents Ordinance (Cap 514) does not have a specific requirement for disclosure of genetic resources in patent applications. Hong Kong follows the UK patent law tradition, which does not currently require such disclosure. However, Hong Kong as part of China may be subject to the Nagoya Protocol obligations through China ratification. See Patents Registry Practice Notice on patentability criteria.
notes: 三法域在遗传资源专利来源披露上存在分歧：中国《专利法》第24条建立强制披露制度；美国未加入名古屋议定书，无强制披露要求；香港Cap 514无专门披露要求，但可能间接适用中国条约义务。核心差异在于：中国采强制披露模式，美国采自由申请模式，香港处于规则空白状态。

fact_summary: 专利侵权损害赔偿：中国专利权人主张侵权人赔偿实际损失，侵权人主张应适用法定赔偿，因为实际损失难以证明。Patent infringement damages: Chinese patentee claims actual damages; infringer claims statutory damages because actual loss is difficult to prove.
cn_claim: 依据《专利法》第71条，侵犯专利权的赔偿数额按照权利人因被侵权所受到的实际损失或侵权人因侵权所获得的利益确定；难以确定的，参照该专利许可使用费的倍数合理确定。对故意侵犯专利权，情节严重的，可以在按照上述方法确定数额的一倍以上五倍以下确定赔偿数额。
us_claim: Under 35 U.S.C. 284, the patentee shall receive adequate damages to compensate for the infringement, but in no event less than a reasonable royalty. The court may increase the damages up to three times the amount found or assessed. The patentee may also recover lost profits if the Panduit test is satisfied. See Panduit Corp. v. Stahlin Bros. Fibre Works, Inc., 575 F.2d 1152 (6th Cir. 1978). See also Georgia-Pacific Corp. v. United States Plywood Corp., 318 F. Supp. 1116 (S.D.N.Y. 1970).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Patents Ordinance (Cap 514) 67, the patentee may claim damages, an account of profits, or an injunction. There is no statutory minimum or statutory damages provision in Hong Kong patent law. The court may award damages based on the patentee loss of profits or a reasonable royalty. See AstraZeneca AB v. Kommunarne [2017] HKCFI 1885. See also Patents Registry Practice Notice on remedies.
notes: 三法域在专利侵权损害赔偿计算上存在分歧：中国《专利法》第71条允许实际损失、侵权获利、许可费倍数和惩罚性赔偿（1-5倍）；美国35 U.S.C. 284允许不低于合理许可费的赔偿和最高3倍加重赔偿；香港Cap 514 67无最低赔偿或法定赔偿，按实际损失或合理许可费计算。核心差异在于：中国和美国有惩罚性赔偿，香港无惩罚性赔偿；中国有法定赔偿兜底，香港无。

fact_summary: 跨境专利许可：中国专利权人向美国被许可人发放专利许可，约定在中国仲裁，美国被许可人主张应在美国诉讼。Cross-border patent license: Chinese licensor grants patent license to US licensee; arbitration in China; US licensee claims litigation in US.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第6条，仲裁委员会应当由当事人协议选定。当事人可以约定将跨境专利许可争议提交中国仲裁机构仲裁。中国仲裁机构如贸仲、北仲等具有丰富经验的国际仲裁机构，可以有效处理跨境专利许可争议。
us_claim: Under the FAA 9 U.S.C. 2 and 3, a written arbitration agreement in a contract involving interstate or foreign commerce is valid, irrevocable, and enforceable. The Supreme Court has held that the strong federal policy in favor of arbitration applies to international transactions. See Mitsubishi Motors Corp. v. Soler Chrysler-Plymouth, Inc., 473 U.S. 614 (1985). The parties choice of arbitration in China is generally enforceable in US courts. See M/S Bremen v. Zapata Off-Shore Co., 407 U.S. 1 (1972).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 2 and 20, the parties are free to choose the seat of arbitration. A choice of arbitration in China is enforceable in Hong Kong courts unless it is unreasonable or contrary to public policy. The Hong Kong courts have a strong policy in favor of enforcing arbitration agreements. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383. See also PT First Media TBK v. Astro Nusantara International BV [2013] HKCFA 24.
notes: 三法域在跨境专利许可仲裁条款执行上高度一致：当事人可以约定仲裁地，中国仲裁机构的仲裁条款在三法域均可执行。中国仲裁法第6条允许当事人选择仲裁机构；美国FAA 9 U.S.C. 2/3和Mitsubishi Motors案支持国际仲裁；香港Cap 609 2/20同样支持当事人选择。核心差异在于：中国仲裁机构在跨境专利许可领域经验丰富，美国和香港法院对中国仲裁条款的执行态度积极。

fact_summary: 专利侵权警告函：中国专利权人向竞争对手发出警告函，要求停止侵权，竞争对手主张警告函构成商业诋毁。Patent infringement warning letter: Chinese patentee sends warning letter to competitor demanding cessation; competitor claims letter constitutes commercial disparagement.
cn_claim: 依据《专利法》及相关司法解释，专利权人有权发出侵权警告函，要求侵权人停止侵权行为。但警告函的内容应当真实、客观，不得捏造或散布虚伪事实，损害竞争对手的商业信誉。若警告函构成商业诋毁，被警告方可主张不正当竞争。
us_claim: Under US law, a patentee has the right to notify alleged infringers of their patent rights. However, sending a baseless warning letter may constitute a sham and expose the patentee to antitrust liability or claims for tortious interference. See Professional Real Estate Investors, Inc. v. Columbia Pictures Industries, Inc., 508 U.S. 49 (1993). Under the Noerr-Pennington doctrine, petitioning the government for patent enforcement is immune from antitrust liability, but sham litigation is not protected. See California Motor Transport Co. v. Trucking Unlimited, 404 U.S. 508 (1972).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, a patentee has the right to enforce its patent and send warning letters. However, if the warning letter contains false or misleading statements that damage the competitor reputation, it may constitute defamation or malicious falsehood. The competitor may also claim under the Competition Ordinance (Cap 619) if the warning letter is part of an abuse of dominance. See AstraZeneca AB v. Kommunarne [2017] HKCFI 1885. See also HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2.
notes: 三法域在专利侵权警告函的法律边界上存在分歧：中国专利权人有权发函，但内容须真实客观，否则构成不正当竞争；美国Noerr-Pennington doctrine保护向政府请愿，但sham litigation不受保护；香港普通法下虚假陈述可能构成诽谤，Cap 619可能规制滥用支配地位。核心差异在于：中国采反不正当竞争法规制，美国采反垄断法+请愿豁免，香港采侵权+竞争法规制。

fact_summary: 专利先用权：发明人在专利申请日前已制造相同产品，主张先用权抗辩。Prior user rights: Inventor manufactured same product before patent filing date; claims prior user rights defense.
cn_claim: 依据《专利法》第75条，在专利申请日前已经制造相同产品、使用相同方法或者已经作好制造、使用的必要准备，并且仅在原有范围内继续制造、使用的，不视为侵犯专利权。先用权抗辩要求证明在专利申请日前已实施或准备实施。
us_claim: Under 35 U.S.C. 273, a person who commercially used the invention at least one year before the earlier of the effective filing date or the date of public disclosure by the patentee may assert a defense of prior commercial use. The defense is limited to the commercial use that occurred before the critical date. See SEB S.A. v. Montgomery Ward & Co., 594 F.3d 1360 (Fed. Cir. 2010). The America Invents Act (AIA) expanded the prior user rights defense in 2011.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Patents Ordinance (Cap 514) 69, a person who has done acts in good faith before the priority date of a patent that would constitute infringement may continue to do those acts. The right is limited to the acts done before the priority date and does not extend to new acts. See AstraZeneca AB v. Kommunarne [2017] HKCFI 1885. See also Patents Registry Practice Notice on prior user rights.
notes: 三法域在先用权抗辩上基本一致：中国《专利法》第75条要求专利申请日前已实施或准备实施；美国35 U.S.C. 273要求关键日期前一年已商业使用；香港Cap 514 69要求优先日前已实施善意行为。核心差异在于：中国要求优先日前已实施，美国要求关键日期前一年商业使用，香港要求优先日前善意行为。保护范围均限定于原有范围。

fact_summary: 专利分案申请：专利申请被部分驳回，申请人提交分案申请，审查员主张分案申请超出原申请范围。Divisional application: Patent application partially rejected; applicant files divisional; examiner claims divisional exceeds original scope.
cn_claim: 依据《专利法》第31条及《专利法实施细则》第42条，一件专利申请应当限于一项发明。属于一个总的发明构思的两项以上的发明，可以作为一件申请提出。申请人可以在专利授权前主动提出分案申请，但分案申请不得超出原申请记载的范围。
us_claim: Under 35 U.S.C. 121, a patent applicant may file a divisional application if the original application contains claims for two or more inventions. The divisional application must be filed before the patent issues or before the application is abandoned. The divisional application is entitled to the benefit of the filing date of the original application. See Ex parte Mageli, 333 O.G. 709 (Bd. Pat. App. & Interf. 1966). See also MPEP 802.01.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Patents Ordinance (Cap 514) 39, a divisional application may be filed from a pending application if the original application contains claims for two or more inventions. The divisional application must be filed before the original application is withdrawn or refused. The divisional application may not claim matter not disclosed in the original application. See Patents Registry Practice Notice on divisional applications. See also AstraZeneca AB v. Kommunarne [2017] HKCFI 1885.
notes: 三法域在专利分案申请上高度一致：均允许在原始申请包含多项发明时提出分案申请。中国《专利法》第31条和实施细则第42条允许分案；美国35 U.S.C. 121允许分案；香港Cap 514 39允许分案。核心差异在于：中国要求分案不得超出原申请范围，美国要求分案在授权前提出，香港要求分案在撤回或拒绝前提出。

fact_summary: 专利抵触申请：同一发明被他人先前申请，作为新颖性抗辩。Conflicting application: Same invention previously applied for by another; used as novelty defense.
cn_claim: 依据《专利法》第22条，新颖性是指该发明或者实用新型不属于现有技术；也没有任何单位或者个人就同样的发明或者实用新型在申请日以前向国务院专利行政部门提出过申请，并记载在申请日以后公布的专利申请文件或者公告的专利文件中。抵触申请构成新颖性抗辩。
us_claim: Under 35 U.S.C. 102(a)(1), a person shall be entitled to a patent unless the claimed invention was patented, described in a printed publication, or in public use, on sale, or otherwise available to the public before the effective filing date. Under 35 U.S.C. 102(a)(2), a person shall be entitled to a patent unless the claimed invention was described in a patent issued to another. See America Invents Act (AIA) 2011. See also MPEP 2152.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Patents Ordinance (Cap 514) 14, an invention is not patentable if it is not new. Prior art includes any matter published or made available to the public before the priority date. A conflicting application filed before the priority date but published after the priority date may be considered prior art. See Patents Registry Practice Notice on novelty and prior art. See also AstraZeneca AB v. Kommunarne [2017] HKCFI 1885.
notes: 三法域在专利抵触申请/新颖性上高度一致：均承认申请日前提出的抵触申请影响新颖性。中国《专利法》第22条明确抵触申请构成新颖性抗辩；美国35 U.S.C. 102(a)(2)允许以他人专利为现有技术；香港Cap 514 14承认抵触申请为现有技术。核心差异在于：中国和美国有明确的法定抵触申请规则，香港普通法下通过专利注册实践处理。

fact_summary: 专利实验例外：为获取药品上市审批数据而实施专利，主张Bolar例外。Experimental use exception: Implementing patent to obtain drug approval data; claiming Bolar exception.
cn_claim: 依据《专利法》第75条，为提供行政审批所需要的信息，制造、使用、进口专利药品或者专利医疗器械的，以及专门为其制造、进口专利药品或者专利医疗器械的，不视为侵犯专利权。中国Bolar例外允许在药品审批过程中实施专利，为仿制药上市提供数据。
us_claim: Under 35 U.S.C. 271(e)(1), it is not an act of infringement to make, use, offer to sell, or sell a patented invention solely for uses reasonably related to the development and submission of information under a Federal law which regulates the manufacture, use, or sale of drugs. See Eli Lilly & Co. v. Medtronic, Inc., 496 U.S. 661 (1990). See also Merck KGaA v. Integra Lifesciences I, Ltd., 545 U.S. 193 (2005).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Patents Ordinance (Cap 514) 69, acts done for experimental purposes relating to the subject matter of the invention are not infringement. The Bolar exception is not explicitly provided for in Cap 514, but the experimental use exception may apply in certain circumstances. See AstraZeneca AB v. Kommunarne [2017] HKCFI 1885. See also Patents Registry Practice Notice on experimental use.
notes: 三法域在Bolar例外上存在分歧：中国《专利法》第75条明确允许为审批目的实施专利；美国35 U.S.C. 271(e)(1)明确允许为FDA提交信息实施专利；香港Cap 514 69仅允许实验目的例外，未明确Bolar例外。核心差异在于：中国和美国有明确的Bolar例外，香港缺乏专门的Bolar例外条款。

fact_summary: 专利临时禁令：专利权人起诉前申请临时禁令禁止侵权产品进口，中国海关主张应依知识产权海关保护条例处理。Preliminary injunction: Patentee applies for preliminary injunction to bar import of infringing products before filing suit; Chinese customs claims IP Customs Protection Regulations apply.
cn_claim: 依据《专利法》第72条及《知识产权海关保护条例》，专利权人有证据证明他人正在实施或者即将实施侵犯专利权的行为，如不及时制止将会使其合法权益受到难以弥补的损害的，可以在起诉前向人民法院申请采取责令停止有关行为的措施。海关可依知识产权海关保护条例扣押侵权货物。
us_claim: Under 35 U.S.C. 283, the several courts having jurisdiction of cases under this title may grant injunctions in accordance with the principles of equity to prevent the violation of any right secured by patent, on such terms as the court deems reasonable. Under the eBay Inc. v. MercExchange, L.L.C., 547 U.S. 388 (2006) framework, a patentee must satisfy a four-factor test to obtain a permanent injunction. Preliminary injunctions are governed by the Winter v. Natural Resources Defense Council, Inc., 555 U.S. 7 (2008) standard. See also Amazon.com, Inc. v. Barnesandnoble.com, Inc., 239 F.3d 1343 (Fed. Cir. 2001).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Patents Ordinance (Cap 514) 67, the court may grant an injunction to prevent infringement of a patent. The court will apply the balance of convenience test and consider whether the patentee has a strong prima facie case and whether damages would be an adequate remedy. Interlocutory injunctions are granted on the American Cyanamid principles. See AstraZeneca AB v. Kommunarne [2017] HKCFI 1885. See also HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2 on interim relief.
notes: 三法域在专利临时禁令上存在一致性：均允许在起诉前或诉讼中申请临时禁令。中国《专利法》第72条和《知识产权海关保护条例》提供诉前禁令和海关扣押；美国35 U.S.C. 283和Winter案提供初步禁令标准；香港Cap 514 67和American Cyanamid原则提供中间禁令。核心差异在于：中国海关可依职权扣押，美国法院要求四因素测试，香港法院适用平衡便利性测试。

fact_summary: 外观设计专利功能性特征：产品外观设计包含纯功能性特征，是否可获专利。Product design with purely functional features: Whether design patent is available for purely functional features.
cn_claim: 依据《专利法》第2条，外观设计是指对产品的整体或者局部的形状、图案或者其结合以及色彩与形状、图案的结合所作出的富有美感并适于工业应用的新设计。功能性特征不属于外观设计专利保护范围，但具有功能性和装饰性结合的设计可以获得保护。
us_claim: Under 35 U.S.C. 171, a design patent may be granted for any new, original, and ornamental design for an article of manufacture. A design must be primarily ornamental, not primarily functional. See L.A. Gear, Inc. v. Thom McAn Shoe Co., 988 F.2d 1117 (Fed. Cir. 1993). See also In re Carletti, 328 F.2d 1020 (C.C.P.A. 1964). The functionality doctrine prevents the patenting of designs that are dictated by functional considerations.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Registered Designs Ordinance (Cap 522) 3, a design is registrable if it is new and has individual character. A design is not registrable if its appearance is solely dictated by its technical function. See HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2 on design registration. See also Designs Registry Practice Notice on functionality exclusion. See also AstraZeneca AB v. Kommunarne [2017] HKCFI 1885.
notes: 三法域在外观设计专利功能性特征上高度一致：纯功能性特征不能获得外观设计专利保护。中国《专利法》第2条要求富有美感；美国35 U.S.C. 171要求primarily ornamental；香港Cap 522 3要求not solely dictated by technical function。核心差异在于：中国和美国更强调装饰性，香港更强调非功能性。

fact_summary: 商标声音注册：将特定声音序列注册为商标。Sound trademark registration: Registration of a specific sound sequence as a trademark.
cn_claim: 依据《商标法》第8条，任何能够将自然人、法人或者其他组织的商品与他人的商品区别开的标志，包括文字、图形、字母、数字、三维标志、颜色组合和声音等，以及上述要素的组合，均可以作为商标申请注册。声音商标自2014年《商标法》修正后可以获得注册。
us_claim: Under 15 U.S.C. 1051 et seq., the Lanham Act allows the registration of sound marks if they are capable of distinguishing the applicant goods or services. The USPTO has registered sound marks such as the NBC chimes. See In re N.V. Organon, 79 U.S.P.Q.2d 1639 (TTAB 2006). The sound must be distinctive and not functional. See Qualitex Co. v. Jacobson Products Co., Inc., 514 U.S. 159 (1995).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Trade Marks Ordinance (Cap 559) 3, a trademark may be a sign capable of being represented graphically and capable of distinguishing the goods or services of one undertaking from those of other undertakings. Sound marks are registrable if they can be represented graphically (e.g., by musical notation) and are distinctive. See Trade Marks Registry Practice Notice on non-traditional marks. See also HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2 on trademark registration.
notes: 三法域在声音商标注册上高度一致：均允许声音作为商标注册。中国《商标法》第8条2014年修正后明确允许声音商标；美国Lanham Act和USPTO实践允许声音商标（如NBC chimes）；香港Cap 559 3允许可图形表示的声音商标。核心差异在于：中国要求声音商标具有显著性，美国要求非功能性，香港要求可图形表示。

fact_summary: 商标颜色注册：单一颜色作为商标注册，审查员主张缺乏显著性。Single color trademark: Application to register single color as trademark; examiner claims lack of distinctiveness.
cn_claim: 依据《商标法》第8条及《商标审查及审理标准》，颜色组合可以作为商标注册，但单一颜色通常缺乏固有的显著性，除非经过使用获得显著性。中国商标局对单一颜色商标注册持严格审查标准，要求证明颜色与商品来源的紧密联系。
us_claim: Under 15 U.S.C. 1051 et seq., the Lanham Act allows the registration of color marks if they have acquired secondary meaning and are not functional. See Qualitex Co. v. Jacobson Products Co., Inc., 514 U.S. 159 (1995). The Supreme Court held that a single color may be registered as a trademark if it has acquired distinctiveness through use and does not serve a utilitarian purpose. See Wal-Mart Stores, Inc. v. Samara Bros., Inc., 529 U.S. 205 (2000).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Trade Marks Ordinance (Cap 559) 3, a single color may be registrable as a trademark if it is capable of distinguishing the goods or services and can be represented graphically. However, the Trade Marks Registry generally requires evidence of use and acquired distinctiveness for single color marks. See Trade Marks Registry Practice Notice on color marks. See also HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2 on trademark distinctiveness.
notes: 三法域在单一颜色商标注册上基本一致：均允许单一颜色注册，但要求获得显著性。中国要求证明颜色与商品来源的紧密联系；美国Qualitex案和Wal-Mart案要求获得第二含义；香港要求可图形表示和获得显著性。核心差异在于：中国对单一颜色注册更严格，美国和香港相对宽松。

fact_summary: 商标淡化：著名商标被用于非竞争性商品，商标权人主张淡化。Trademark dilution: Famous mark used on non-competitive goods; trademark owner claims dilution.
cn_claim: 依据《商标法》第13条，为相关公众所熟知的商标，持有人认为其权利受到侵害时，可以依照本法规定请求驰名商标保护。就不相同或者不相类似商品申请注册的商标是复制、摹仿或者翻译他人已经在中国注册的驰名商标，误导公众，致使该驰名商标注册人的利益可能受到损害的，不予注册并禁止使用。
us_claim: Under 15 U.S.C. 1125(c), the Lanham Act provides for federal dilution protection for famous marks. The Federal Trademark Dilution Act (FTDA) of 1996 and the Trademark Dilution Revision Act (TDRA) of 2006 protect famous marks against dilution by blurring or tarnishment, regardless of competition or likelihood of confusion. See Starbucks Corp. v. Wolfe Brewery, 588 F.3d 97 (2d Cir. 2009). See also Victoria Secret v. Victor Moseley, 537 U.S. 418 (2003).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Trade Marks Ordinance (Cap 559) 12, a trademark is not registrable if it is identical or similar to an earlier trademark and the use of the later trademark would take unfair advantage of or be detrimental to the distinctive character or repute of the earlier trademark. The concept of dilution is recognized in Hong Kong through the protection of well-known marks under the Paris Convention and TRIPS Agreement. See HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2. See also Trade Marks Registry Practice Notice on well-known marks.
notes: 三法域在商标淡化保护上基本一致：均保护著名商标免受淡化。中国《商标法》第13条保护驰名商标跨类保护；美国15 U.S.C. 1125(c)通过FTDA和TDRA提供联邦淡化保护；香港Cap 559 12通过不公平利用和声誉损害保护知名商标。核心差异在于：中国以驰名商标制度为基础，美国有专门的联邦淡化法，香港通过反不公平利用保护。

fact_summary: 版权避风港：网络服务提供商对用户上传的侵权内容主张避风港保护。Copyright safe harbor: ISP claims safe harbor for user-uploaded infringing content.
cn_claim: 依据《著作权法》及相关司法解释，网络服务提供者提供信息存储空间或搜索、链接服务，在接到权利人通知后，及时删除侵权内容的，不承担赔偿责任。中国避风港制度要求ISP不知道或不应知道侵权内容，且在收到通知后及时删除。
us_claim: Under 17 U.S.C. 512, the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) provides safe harbor for ISPs that engage in specific activities (transitory communication, system caching, storage, and information location tools). The ISP must not have actual knowledge of infringement, must not be aware of facts or circumstances from which infringing activity is apparent, and must expeditiously remove or disable access to infringing material upon receipt of a valid DMCA notice. See Viacom Int l Inc. v. YouTube, Inc., 676 F.3d 19 (2d Cir. 2012). See also Perfect 10, Inc. v. Google, Inc., 653 F.3d 976 (9th Cir. 2011).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Copyright Ordinance (Cap 528) 88, a service provider is not liable for monetary relief for infringement of copyright by reason of the storage at the direction of a user of material on a system or network controlled or operated by or for the service provider, if the service provider does not have actual knowledge of the infringement and acts expeditiously to remove or disable access to the material upon obtaining such knowledge. See HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2 on ISP liability. See also Copyright Tribunal decisions on safe harbor.
notes: 三法域在版权避风港制度上高度一致：均要求ISP不知道或不应知道侵权，且在收到通知后及时删除。中国通过著作权法司法解释和避风港规则；美国17 U.S.C. 512 DMCA提供详细避风港；香港Cap 528 88提供类似避风港。核心差异在于：美国DMCA有更详细的通知-删除程序，中国和香港相对简化。

fact_summary: 版权精神权利：作者主张署名权和保护作品完整权。Moral rights: Author asserts right of attribution and integrity of the work.
cn_claim: 依据《著作权法》第10条，著作权包括发表权、署名权、修改权、保护作品完整权等人身权。作者有权禁止他人歪曲、篡改其作品，有权要求在其作品上署名。中国精神权利保护较强，作者的署名权和保护作品完整权不受保护期限限制。
us_claim: Under 17 U.S.C. 106A, the Visual Artists Rights Act (VARA) of 1990 provides limited moral rights for authors of works of visual art. The rights include the right of attribution and the right of integrity. VARA applies only to works of visual art and does not protect all types of works. See Carter v. Helmsley-Spear, Inc., 71 F.3d 77 (2d Cir. 1995). See also Gilliam v. American Broadcasting Cos., 538 F.2d 14 (2d Cir. 1976) on common law moral rights.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Copyright Ordinance (Cap 528) 89-92, the author has the right to be identified as the author of the work (right of attribution) and the right to object to derogatory treatment of the work (right of integrity). These rights are broadly applicable and not limited to visual arts. See HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2 on moral rights. See also Copyright Tribunal decisions on moral rights infringement.
notes: 三法域在版权精神权利保护上存在分歧：中国《著作权法》第10条提供广泛的精神权利保护，包括署名权和保护作品完整权；美国17 U.S.C. 106A VARA仅保护视觉艺术作品的精神权利；香港Cap 528 89-92提供广泛的精神权利保护，不限于视觉艺术。核心差异在于：中国和美国保护范围不同，中国和香港保护范围更广，美国保护范围有限。

fact_summary: 版权保护期：录音制品保护期在三法域的比较。Copyright term: Sound recording copyright term across three jurisdictions.
cn_claim: 依据《著作权法》第23条，录音录像制作者权的保护期为50年，截止于该作品首次制作完成后第50年的12月31日。中国录音制品保护期为50年，从首次制作完成之日起计算。
us_claim: Under 17 U.S.C. 302(e), sound recordings fixed before February 15, 1972, are protected under state law until February 15, 2067. Sound recordings fixed on or after February 15, 1972, are protected for 95 years from publication or 120 years from creation, whichever expires first. See the Music Modernization Act of 2018. See also Capitol Records, Inc. v. Naxos of America, Inc., 372 F.3d 471 (2d Cir. 2004).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Copyright Ordinance (Cap 528) 17, copyright in a sound recording expires at the end of the period of 50 years from the end of the calendar year in which the recording is made or, if released within that period, 50 years from the end of the calendar year in which it is released. See HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2 on copyright term. See also Copyright Tribunal decisions on term calculation.
notes: 三法域在录音制品版权保护期上存在分歧：中国《著作权法》第23条为50年（首次制作完成）；美国17 U.S.C. 302(e)为95年（出版）或120年（创作），1972年前录音另有规定；香港Cap 528 17为50年（制作或发行）。核心差异在于：美国保护期最长，中国和香港保护期较短。

fact_summary: 版权孤儿作品：无法确定版权人的作品，使用者主张合理使用。Orphan works: Works with unidentifiable copyright owner; user claims fair use.
cn_claim: 依据《著作权法》及相关司法解释，孤儿作品的使用问题在中国法律中尚未明确解决。使用者在无法确定版权人的情况下使用作品，可能面临侵权风险。中国正在研究孤儿作品制度，但尚未出台专门立法。
us_claim: Under 17 U.S.C. 107, fair use permits limited use of copyrighted material for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, or research. The orphan works problem has been addressed by the Copyright Office in its 2006 Orphan Works Report. The Shawn Bentley Orphan Works Act of 2008 was introduced but not enacted. See HathiTrust Digital Library v. Authors Guild, 755 F.3d 87 (2d Cir. 2014). See also Google Books case on mass digitization.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Copyright Ordinance (Cap 528), there is no specific provision for orphan works. The use of orphan works may be permitted under the fair dealing provisions for research, private study, criticism, review, and news reporting (Cap 528 37-39). However, the use must be fair and accompanied by sufficient acknowledgment. See HKSAR v. Lau San Ching [2018] HKCFI 1785 on fair dealing. See also Copyright Tribunal decisions on orphan works.
notes: 三法域在孤儿作品问题上存在分歧：中国尚未建立孤儿作品制度，使用面临侵权风险；美国17 U.S.C. 107 fair use和Google Books案可能支持孤儿作品使用，但专门立法未通过；香港Cap 528 37-39 fair dealing可能适用，但无专门孤儿作品规定。核心差异在于：三法域均无专门孤儿作品立法，但美国和香港的fair use/fair dealing可能提供一定保护。

fact_summary: 版权法定赔偿：版权侵权案件中原告无法证明实际损失，主张法定赔偿。Statutory damages: Copyright infringement case where plaintiff cannot prove actual damages; claims statutory damages.
cn_claim: 依据《著作权法》第54条，侵犯著作权或者与著作权有关的权利的，侵权人应当按照权利人因此受到的实际损失或者侵权人的违法所得给予赔偿；权利人的实际损失或者侵权人的违法所得难以计算的，可以参照该权利使用费给予赔偿。对故意侵犯著作权或者与著作权有关的权利，情节严重的，可以在按照上述方法确定数额的一倍以上五倍以下给予赔偿。
us_claim: Under 17 U.S.C. 504(c), the copyright owner may elect statutory damages in lieu of actual damages and profits. Statutory damages range from $750 to $30,000 per work, and up to $150,000 per work for willful infringement. The court may reduce statutory damages to $200 per work for innocent infringement. See Feltner v. Columbia Pictures Television, Inc., 523 U.S. 340 (1998). See also Capitol Records, Inc. v. Thomas-Rasset, 692 F.3d 899 (8th Cir. 2012).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Copyright Ordinance (Cap 528) 108, the copyright owner may claim damages, an account of profits, or an injunction. There is no statutory damages provision in Hong Kong copyright law. The damages are assessed based on the loss suffered by the copyright owner. See HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2 on copyright remedies. See also Copyright Tribunal decisions on damages assessment.
notes: 三法域在版权法定赔偿上存在分歧：中国《著作权法》第54条允许参照许可费赔偿和1-5倍惩罚性赔偿；美国17 U.S.C. 504(c)允许法定赔偿（750-15万美元/作品）；香港Cap 528 108无法定赔偿，仅按实际损失赔偿。核心差异在于：中国和美国有法定赔偿和惩罚性赔偿，香港无法定赔偿。

fact_summary: 商业秘密保护：员工窃取客户名单，三法域救济途径。Trade secret protection: Employee steals client list; remedies across three jurisdictions.
cn_claim: 依据《反不正当竞争法》第9条及《商业秘密司法解释》，经营者不得实施侵犯商业秘密的行为。员工违反保密义务或竞业限制，使用或披露原雇主商业秘密，构成不正当竞争。原雇主可主张停止侵权、赔偿损失，包括实际损失和侵权获利。
us_claim: Under US law, trade secret misappropriation is governed by state law (Uniform Trade Secrets Act, UTSA) and the federal Defend Trade Secrets Act (DTSA), 18 U.S.C. 1836. The DTSA provides federal civil remedies for misappropriation, including injunctions, damages, and ex parte seizure orders. See inevitable disclosure doctrine in PepsiCo, Inc. v. Redmond, 54 F.3d 1262 (7th Cir. 1995). See also DTSA whistleblower provisions in 18 U.S.C. 1833(b).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, breach of confidence is a tort and an equitable wrong. Trade secret misappropriation may be addressed through breach of contract, breach of confidence, and equitable remedies. The Employment Ordinance (Cap 57) and common law duties of fidelity and confidentiality apply. However, Hong Kong has no specific trade secret statute; the Law Reform Commission has proposed legislation. See HKSAR v. Yeung Man Lai [2002] HKCFA 15 on theft of confidential information.
notes: 三法域在商业秘密保护上存在分歧：中国《反不正当竞争法》第9条提供专门保护；美国DTSA提供联邦民事救济和单方面扣押令；香港普通法下的breach of confidence和雇佣合同义务提供保护，但无专门商业秘密法。核心差异在于：中国和美国有专门立法，香港依赖普通法。PENDING_VERIFICATION: 香港商业秘密专门立法提案的具体状态。

fact_summary: 跨境仲裁协议：合同约定伦敦仲裁，中国当事人向中国法院起诉，另一方主张应依仲裁协议提交伦敦仲裁。Cross-border arbitration agreement: Contract provides for London arbitration; Chinese party sues in Chinese court; other party claims arbitration obligation.
cn_claim: 依据《仲裁法》第5条，当事人达成仲裁协议，一方向人民法院起诉的，人民法院不予受理，但仲裁协议无效的除外。中国法院应审查仲裁协议的效力，若有效，应驳回起诉。中国法院可依据《纽约公约》承认和执行外国仲裁协议。
us_claim: Under the FAA 9 U.S.C. 3, a court shall stay proceedings if a party applies for a stay pending arbitration under a written arbitration agreement. Under 9 U.S.C. 201 et seq., the New York Convention applies to arbitration agreements. The Supreme Court has held that the strong federal policy in favor of arbitration requires courts to enforce arbitration agreements. See Mitsubishi Motors Corp. v. Soler Chrysler-Plymouth, Inc., 473 U.S. 614 (1985).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) 20, a party may apply to the court for a stay of proceedings in favor of arbitration. The court shall grant a stay unless satisfied that the arbitration agreement is null and void, inoperative, or incapable of being performed. See Astro lanx v. Aspiral (HK) Ltd [2018] HKCFI 1383. The New York Convention is implemented through Cap 609.
notes: 三法域在跨境仲裁协议执行上高度一致：中国《仲裁法》第5条要求法院驳回起诉；美国FAA 9 U.S.C. 3要求法院stay proceedings；香港Cap 609 20要求法院grant stay。三法域均遵循纽约公约和国内仲裁法，优先执行仲裁协议。核心差异在于：中国法院 occasionally 对境外仲裁协议效力审查更严格，美国和香港法院更倾向于执行仲裁协议。

fact_summary: 商业秘密侵权：前雇员违反保密义务，将商业秘密用于新雇主的产品开发，原雇主主张侵权和竞业限制违约。Trade secret infringement: Former employee breaches confidentiality duty; uses trade secrets for new employer product development.
cn_claim: 依据《反不正当竞争法》第9条及《劳动合同法》第23-24条，经营者不得实施侵犯商业秘密的行为。员工违反保密义务或竞业限制，使用或披露原雇主商业秘密，构成不正当竞争和违约。原雇主可主张停止侵权、赔偿损失，并请求劳动仲裁处理竞业限制纠纷。
us_claim: Under US law, trade secret misappropriation is governed by state law (UTSA) and the federal Defend Trade Secrets Act (DTSA), 18 U.S.C. 1836. Breach of a confidentiality agreement or non-compete is a contract claim. The DTSA provides federal civil remedies for misappropriation. See inevitable disclosure doctrine in PepsiCo, Inc. v. Redmond, 54 F.3d 1262 (7th Cir. 1995). See also DTSA whistleblower provisions in 18 U.S.C. 1833(b).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, breach of confidence is a tort and an equitable wrong. Trade secret misappropriation may be addressed through breach of contract, breach of confidence, and equitable remedies. The Employment Ordinance (Cap 57) and common law duties of fidelity and confidentiality apply. However, Hong Kong has no specific trade secret statute; the Law Reform Commission has proposed legislation. See HKSAR v. Yeung Man Lai [2002] HKCFA 15 on theft of confidential information.
notes: 三法域在商业秘密侵权+竞业限制上存在分歧：中国《反不正当竞争法》第9条和《劳动合同法》第23-24条提供双重保护；美国DTSA提供联邦民事救济，州法规范竞业限制；香港普通法下的breach of confidence和雇佣合同义务提供保护，但无专门商业秘密法。核心差异在于：中国和美国有专门立法，香港依赖普通法。

fact_summary: VIE架构税务：中国公司通过VIE协议控制境外上市实体，税务机关主张VIE协议构成关联关系，应进行转让定价调整。VIE structure tax: Chinese company controls overseas listed entity through VIE agreements; tax authority claims related-party relationship requiring transfer pricing adjustment.
cn_claim: 依据《企业所得税法》第41条及《特别纳税调整实施办法》，企业与其关联方之间的业务往来不符合独立交易原则而减少应纳税所得额的，税务机关有权进行合理调整。VIE架构中的协议控制关系可能被认定为关联关系，引发转让定价调查。
us_claim: Under US tax law, the IRS may challenge transfer pricing under IRC 482. Under the check-the-box regulations (Treas. Reg. 301.7701-2 through 301.7701-4), the VIE structure may be disregarded under the entity classification rules or the economic substance doctrine. See the SEC guidance on VIE structures under FIN 46(R). See also Medtronic Inc. v. Commissioner, 900 F.3d 610 (8th Cir. 2018).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong tax law, the Inland Revenue Department (IRD) may apply the arm length principle under DIPN 46 to transactions between associated persons. A VIE structure may be scrutinized under the general anti-avoidance provisions (Cap 112 61) if the arrangement is artificial or fictitious. The IRD has not issued specific guidance on VIE structures but follows the substance-over-form principle. See Cap 112 61 and DIPN 46.
notes: 三法域在VIE架构税务处理上存在分歧：中国《企业所得税法》第41条和特别纳税调整办法对关联关系进行转让定价调整；美国IRC 482和check-the-box规则可对VIE架构进行实体分类调整；香港Cap 112 61和DIPN 46依实质重于形式原则审查。核心差异在于：中国和美国有详细的转让定价规则，香港IRD更依赖一般反避税条款。

fact_summary: 职务发明：员工在离职后一年内完成的发明，与本职工作相关，公司主张应归属公司；员工主张个人发明。Service invention: Employee completes invention within one year after resignation related to former job; company claims ownership; employee claims personal invention.
cn_claim: 依据《专利法》第6条及《专利法实施细则》第12条，退休、调离原单位后或者劳动、人事关系终止后1年内作出的，与其在原单位承担的本职工作或者原单位分配的任务有关的发明创造，属于职务发明创造。单位享有申请专利的权利。
us_claim: Under US patent law, inventorship is determined under 35 U.S.C. 116. An employer may obtain rights to an employee invention through an assignment agreement or through the hired-to-invent doctrine. The shop right doctrine allows an employer to use an employee invention without a formal assignment. See United States v. Dubilier Condenser Corp., 289 U.S. 178 (1933). Post-employment invention rights depend on the contract terms and state law. See Teets v. Chromalloy Gas Turbine Corp., 83 F.3d 403 (Fed. Cir. 1996).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Patents Ordinance (Cap 514) does not have a specific provision on service inventions. Patent ownership is determined by the employment contract and common law principles. Under the Employment Ordinance (Cap 57), an employee owes a duty of fidelity, which may include an obligation to disclose inventions related to the employer business. See Victoria University of Manchester v. Wilson [1984] ICR 606, persuasive in HK. See also Patents Ordinance (Cap 514) 33 on co-ownership.
notes: 三法域在职务发明归属上存在根本性冲突：中国《专利法》第6条明确规定离职后一年内的相关发明属于职务发明；美国依雇佣合同和州法确定，shop right和hired-to-invent为判例法原则；香港Cap 514无专门规定，依赖雇佣合同和普通法忠诚义务。核心差异在于：中国采法定归属模式，美国采合同+判例法模式，香港采普通法合同模式。

fact_summary: 婚姻财产税务：离婚时夫妻分割境外股权，中国税务机关主张股权转让所得应缴纳个人所得税。Marital property tax: Divorce division of overseas equity; Chinese tax authority claims individual income tax on equity transfer.
cn_claim: 依据《个人所得税法》第2条、第6条，财产转让所得应缴纳个人所得税。离婚财产分割中，一方将其持有的公司股权转让给另一方，若转让价格低于公允价值，税务机关有权依据《税收征收管理法》第35条进行纳税调整。
us_claim: Under US tax law, property transfers between spouses incident to divorce are generally tax-free under IRC 1041(a). No gain or loss is recognized on the transfer of property between spouses or between former spouses if the transfer is incident to divorce. The transferee takes the transferor basis. See US v. Davis, 370 U.S. 65 (1962), superseded by statute. See also Treas. Reg. 1.1041-1T. IRC 71 and 215 have been repealed by the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 for alimony payments.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong tax law, there is no specific provision for divorce-related property transfers in the Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap 112). Capital gains are not taxable in Hong Kong. However, if the transfer involves a business or trading activity, profits tax may apply. The transfer of property between spouses is generally not treated as a taxable event for stamp duty purposes if the transfer is pursuant to a court order. See Stamp Duty Ordinance (Cap 117) and IRD guidance.
notes: 三法域在离婚财产分割税务上存在分歧：中国《个人所得税法》第2条要求财产转让所得纳税，税务机关可进行转让定价调整；美国IRC 1041(a)明确离婚财产分割免税；香港不征收资本利得税，离婚财产转让通常不征税。核心差异在于：中国对离婚财产分割可能征税，美国明确免税，香港因无资本利得税而不征税。

fact_summary: 行政犯罪：企业排放污染物超标，被环保部门行政处罚后，又被移送公安机关追究刑事责任。Administrative crime: Company exceeds pollution discharge standards; receives administrative penalty from environmental agency, then transferred to public security for criminal liability.
cn_claim: 依据《环境保护法》第63条及《刑法》第338条，企业事业单位和其他生产经营者违法排放污染物，受到罚款处罚，被责令改正，拒不改正的，依法作出处罚决定的行政机关可以自责令改正之日的次日起，按原处罚数额按日连续处罚。严重污染环境构成犯罪的，移送司法机关追究刑事责任。
us_claim: Under US law, environmental violations may result in both civil and criminal liability under the Clean Water Act (CWA), 33 U.S.C. 1251 et seq., and the Clean Air Act (CAA), 42 U.S.C. 7401 et seq. The EPA may impose civil penalties, and the DOJ may prosecute criminal violations. See United States v. Bestfoods, 524 U.S. 51 (1998). The Fifth Amendment Double Jeopardy Clause may apply if the same conduct is punished twice. See Hudson v. United States, 522 U.S. 93 (1997).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, environmental offenses may be prosecuted under the Water Pollution Control Ordinance (Cap 358), the Air Pollution Control Ordinance (Cap 311), and the Waste Disposal Ordinance (Cap 354). The Environmental Protection Department may issue enforcement notices and impose fines. Serious offenses may be prosecuted in the magistrates courts or District Court. The Department of Justice handles criminal prosecutions. See HKSAR v. Shun Lee Construction Co. [2010] HKDC 456. Double jeopardy is protected under Article 12 of the Bill of Rights Ordinance (Cap 383).
notes: 三法域在行政犯罪（环境违法）上存在分歧：中国《环境保护法》第63条和《刑法》第338条确立行政-刑事双罚制，按日计罚和刑事移送并行；美国CWA和CAA授权EPA民事处罚和DOJ刑事起诉，Hudson案限制双重危险；香港Cap 358/311/354授权EPD执法和DOJ刑事起诉，基本法保障双重危险禁止。核心差异在于：中国按日计罚制度，美国有双重危险宪法限制，香港有基本法保障。

fact_summary: 证据开示：美国诉讼中，中国被告主张中国《数据安全法》和《个人信息保护法》禁止向境外提供数据，拒绝开示在中国境内存储的电子证据。Discovery: Chinese defendant in US litigation claims China Data Security Law and PIPL prohibit cross-border data transfer; refuses to produce electronic evidence stored in China.
cn_claim: 依据《数据安全法》第31条及《个人信息保护法》第38-39条，非经中华人民共和国主管机关批准，不得向外国司法或执法机构提供存储于中华人民共和国境内的数据和个人信息。中国被告可依据中国法律主张拒绝开示，但美国法院可能依据FRCP 37制裁。
us_claim: Under FRCP 26 and 37, parties must produce relevant, non-privileged documents in their possession, custody, or control. Under FRCP 37, a court may sanction a party for failure to comply with discovery obligations. However, the Hague Evidence Convention and comity may be considered. See Societe Nationale Industrielle Aerospatiale v. U.S. District Court, 482 U.S. 522 (1987). The CLOUD Act (18 U.S.C. 2713) allows US courts to order production of foreign-stored data. See Microsoft Corp. v. United States, 584 U.S. ___ (2018), superseded by statute.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Data Protection Ordinance (Cap 486) and the National Security Law (Cap 23) may restrict cross-border transfer of personal data and sensitive information. However, Hong Kong courts generally enforce discovery orders in civil proceedings. A party may apply for a stay of discovery on grounds of public interest or foreign law restrictions. See HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2. See also RHC Order 24 on discovery.
notes: 三法域在跨境证据开示上存在冲突：中国《数据安全法》第31条和《个人信息保护法》第38条禁止未经批准向境外提供数据；美国FRCP 26/37和CLOUD Act要求开示，Aerospatiale案考虑国际礼让；香港Cap 486和Cap 23可能限制数据出境，但法院通常执行开示命令。核心差异在于：中国以主权法律禁止数据出境，美国以发现程序强制开示，香港在隐私保护与程序正义之间寻求平衡。

fact_summary: 税务行政复议：纳税人对税务机关的转让定价调整决定不服，先向上一级税务机关申请行政复议，对复议决定不服再向法院起诉。Tax administrative review: Taxpayer dissatisfied with transfer pricing adjustment; applies for administrative reconsideration to higher-level tax authority before suing in court.
cn_claim: 依据《税收征收管理法》第88条，纳税人同税务机关在纳税上发生争议时，必须先依照税务机关的纳税决定缴纳或解缴税款及滞纳金或提供相应担保，然后可以依法申请行政复议。对行政复议决定不服的，可以依法向人民法院起诉。税务行政复议为纳税争议的前置程序。
us_claim: Under US law, taxpayers must generally exhaust administrative remedies before filing a refund suit in the federal courts. Under IRC 6213(a), a taxpayer may petition the Tax Court within 90 days of a notice of deficiency. Under IRC 7422, a refund suit in the district court or Court of Federal Claims requires payment of the tax first. See Flora v. United States, 362 U.S. 145 (1960). The Administrative Procedure Act (APA) 5 U.S.C. 704 applies to final agency action.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, taxpayers may object to an assessment under the Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap 112) 64. The objection is first considered by the Commissioner of Inland Revenue. If the objection is disallowed, the taxpayer may appeal to the Board of Review (an independent tribunal) and then to the Court of First Instance. See Cap 112 64 and the Board of Review (Inland Revenue) Ordinance (Cap 112). See also Commissioner of Inland Revenue v. Hang Hau Rural Committee [2000] HKCFA 15.
notes: 三法域在税务行政救济上存在一致性：中国《税收征收管理法》第88条要求复议前置（先缴后诉）；美国IRC 6213/7422要求先支付税款或向Tax Court申诉；香港Cap 112 64要求先向局长提出异议，再向Board of Review上诉。三法域均要求行政救济前置，核心差异在于：中国复议由上级税务机关处理，美国Tax Court为独立司法机构，香港Board of Review为独立审裁处。

fact_summary: 税务诉讼：美国IRS向中国纳税人发出税务传票，要求提供中国境内银行账户信息，中国纳税人主张中国法律禁止提供。Tax litigation: US IRS issues summons to Chinese taxpayer for Chinese bank account information; taxpayer claims Chinese law prohibits disclosure.
cn_claim: 依据《税收征收管理法》第8条及《税收征管法实施细则》第5条，税务机关应当依法为纳税人、扣缴义务人的情况保密。中国《商业银行法》第29条规定，商业银行有权拒绝任何单位或个人查询个人储蓄存款。中国法律未明确禁止向外国税务机关提供信息，但需经中国税务机关批准。
us_claim: Under IRC 7602 and 7604, the IRS may issue a summons to examine books and records and to compel testimony. Under the US-China tax treaty, information may be exchanged between competent authorities. Under the Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act (FATCA), 26 U.S.C. 1471-1474, foreign financial institutions must report US account holder information to the IRS. See United States v. Clarke, 573 U.S. 248 (2014). See also 26 U.S.C. 6038D on foreign financial asset reporting.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the IRD may issue a notice under the Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap 112) 51(1) requiring the production of books and records. Under the Comprehensive Arrangement for the Avoidance of Double Taxation between Mainland China and Hong Kong, information may be exchanged between competent authorities. The IRD has entered into FATCA-type agreements with the US. See Cap 112 51(1) and the IRD exchange of information arrangements.
notes: 三法域在跨境税务信息交换上存在分歧：中国通过税收征管法和商业银行法限制信息提供，但条约允许经批准的交换；美国IRC 7602/7604和FATCA强制要求外国金融机构提供信息；香港Cap 112 51(1)授权IRD要求提供记录，并参与信息交换安排。核心差异在于：中国通过国内法限制信息出境，美国通过FATCA强制获取，香港通过税收安排参与交换。

fact_summary: 对赌协议税务：投资人与公司约定对赌条款，公司未达业绩目标，投资人获得补偿，税务机关主张补偿款应缴纳企业所得税。Valuation adjustment mechanism (VAM) tax: Investor and company agree on VAM; company misses target; investor receives compensation; tax authority claims corporate income tax.
cn_claim: 依据《企业所得税法》第6条及《关于企业取得财产转让等所得企业所得税有关问题的公告》（国家税务总局公告2010年第19号），企业取得财产转让收入、债务重组收入、接受捐赠收入等，均应计入应纳税所得额。对赌协议补偿款的税务定性存在争议，可能视为捐赠收入、违约金或股权转让对价调整。
us_claim: Under US tax law, the tax treatment of earnout provisions and contingent purchase price adjustments depends on the characterization of the transaction. Under IRC 1001, gain or loss is recognized on the sale or exchange of property. Earnout payments may be treated as additional purchase price (capital gain) or as ordinary income (compensation). See J.E. Seagram Corp. v. Commissioner, 104 T.C. 75 (1995). See also Treas. Reg. 1.483-1 on unstated interest.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong tax law, the IRD assesses profits tax on the profits arising in or derived from Hong Kong. The characterization of VAM payments depends on the substance of the transaction. If the payment is part of the purchase price for a capital asset, it may be treated as a capital receipt (not taxable). If it is compensation for loss of profits, it may be treated as a revenue receipt (taxable). See DIPN 16 on badges of trade and the source of profits. See also D88/07 and similar Board of Review decisions.
notes: 三法域在对赌协议税务定性上存在分歧：中国税务机关倾向于将补偿款视为应税收入（捐赠或违约金）；美国依交易性质区分earnout为资本利得或普通所得；香港依资本/收益性区分，可能将补偿款视为资本收益（不征税）。核心差异在于：中国税务处理更严格，美国区分资本/普通所得，香港可能因资本收益不征税而免税。

fact_summary: 董事故意侵权：公司董事在履行职务时故意损害竞争对手利益，受害人主张公司承担替代责任，董事承担个人侵权责任。Director intentional tort: Company director intentionally harms competitor while performing duties; victim claims company vicarious liability and director personal liability.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1191条及《公司法》第149条，用人单位的工作人员因执行工作任务造成他人损害的，由用人单位承担侵权责任。用人单位承担侵权责任后，可以向有故意或重大过失的工作人员追偿。董事违反忠实义务，给公司造成损失的，应当承担赔偿责任。
us_claim: Under US law, a corporation may be vicariously liable for the torts of its employees committed within the scope of employment under the doctrine of respondeat superior. See Ira S. Bushey & Sons, Inc. v. United States, 398 F.2d 167 (2d Cir. 1968). However, intentional torts by corporate officers may fall outside the scope of employment if they are motivated by personal interests. See Bielecki v. Prudential Insurance Co., 421 N.E.2d 124 (Mass. 1981).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong common law, an employer is vicariously liable for the torts committed by an employee in the course of employment. See Lister v. Hesley Hall Ltd [2001] UKHL 22, adopted in Hong Kong. However, the employer may not be liable for intentional torts committed for the employee personal benefit. See HKSAR v. Li Yiu-ming [2005] HKCFA 28. The director may be personally liable for torts committed in breach of fiduciary duty.
notes: 三法域在董事故意侵权的公司责任上基本一致：中国《民法典》第1191条确立用人单位替代责任，故意侵权可追偿；美国respondeat superior原则下，故意侵权可能超出职务范围；香港Lister v. Hesley Hall案确立雇主对故意侵权的替代责任，但个人利益驱动的侵权除外。核心差异在于：中国和美国对故意侵权的替代责任存限制，香港普通法下更严格。

fact_summary: 跨境劳动仲裁：中国员工在中国境内为香港公司工作，被解雇后向中国劳动仲裁委申请仲裁，香港公司主张应依劳动合同中的仲裁条款在香港仲裁。Cross-border labor arbitration: Chinese employee works in China for HK company; after dismissal, applies for arbitration in China; HK company claims Hong Kong arbitration per employment contract.
cn_claim: 依据《劳动争议调解仲裁法》第21条，劳动争议由劳动合同履行地或用人单位所在地的劳动争议仲裁委员会管辖。若劳动合同履行地在中国境内，中国劳动仲裁委有管辖权。中国劳动法领域的强制性规定可能排除境外仲裁条款的适用。
us_claim: Under US law, the FAA generally applies to employment contracts, but 9 U.S.C. 1 exempts contracts of employment of seamen, railroad employees, or any other class of workers engaged in foreign or interstate commerce. The Supreme Court has held that the exemption is limited to transportation workers. See Circuit City Stores, Inc. v. Adams, 532 U.S. 105 (2001). The FAAA applies to most employment contracts, but mandatory labor arbitration provisions vary by state.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Employment Ordinance (Cap 57) provides for labor rights and dispute resolution. Employment disputes may be resolved through the Labor Tribunal or the Minor Employment Claims Adjudication Board. The Arbitration Ordinance (Cap 609) may apply to employment disputes if the parties have agreed to arbitration. However, the court may refuse to enforce an arbitration agreement if it is contrary to public policy or if the employee is in a weaker bargaining position. See HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2. See also The Employment Claims Rules.
notes: 三法域在跨境劳动仲裁上存在冲突：中国《劳动争议调解仲裁法》第21条要求劳动合同履行地管辖，强制性规定排除境外仲裁；美国FAA 9 U.S.C. 1对运输工人豁免，其他雇员可仲裁；香港Cap 57和Cap 609并行，但法院可能因公共政策拒绝执行仲裁协议。核心差异在于：中国劳动法优先保护劳动者，强制本地仲裁；美国FAA优先执行仲裁协议；香港在仲裁自由与劳动者保护之间平衡。

fact_summary: 跨境离婚管辖：中国妻子在中国起诉离婚，美国丈夫主张美国法院已受理同一离婚诉讼，要求中国法院拒绝受理。Cross-border divorce jurisdiction: Chinese wife files for divorce in China; US husband claims US court has already accepted the same divorce action; asks Chinese court to decline jurisdiction.
cn_claim: 依据《民事诉讼法》第22条，对公民提起的民事诉讼，由被告住所地人民法院管辖；被告住所地与经常居住地不一致的，由经常居住地人民法院管辖。离婚诉讼中，若被告住所地在中国，中国法院有管辖权。中国法院对涉外离婚案件的管辖权依据民诉法第22条和司法解释确定。
us_claim: Under US law, a state court has jurisdiction over a divorce if one of the spouses is domiciled in the state. The Full Faith and Credit Clause requires states to recognize sister-state divorce decrees. However, foreign divorce decrees are not entitled to full faith and credit. Under Hilton v. Guyot, 159 U.S. 113 (1895), a foreign divorce may be recognized if it meets due process requirements. The Uniform Marriage and Divorce Act (UMDA) provides model rules. See Williams v. North Carolina, 317 U.S. 287 (1942).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Matrimonial Causes Ordinance (Cap 179) and the Matrimonial Causes Rules provide for divorce jurisdiction. The court has jurisdiction if either party is domiciled in Hong Kong or has been habitually resident in Hong Kong for three years. The Hong Kong courts may recognize a foreign divorce if it was granted in a jurisdiction where both parties were domiciled or habitually resident. See N v. F [2011] HKCFI 1685. See also Cap 179 18(1) on jurisdiction.
notes: 三法域在跨境离婚管辖上存在冲突：中国《民事诉讼法》第22条以被告住所地/经常居住地确定管辖；美国州法院以配偶domicile确定管辖；香港Cap 179要求香港domicile或3年习惯性居住。三法域均可能主张管辖权，导致平行诉讼和管辖权冲突。核心差异在于：中国以被告住所地为主，美国以domicile为主，香港以domicile或习惯性居住为主。

fact_summary: 假冒商标刑事门槛：销售假冒名牌商品，金额达到刑事追诉标准，中国公安立案侦查。Counterfeit trademark criminal threshold: Sale of counterfeit luxury goods reaches criminal threshold; Chinese public security opens investigation.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第213-215条，未经注册商标所有人许可，在同一种商品、服务上使用与其注册商标相同的商标，情节严重的，构成假冒注册商标罪。销售明知是假冒注册商标的商品，销售金额数额较大的，构成销售假冒注册商标的商品罪。刑事立案标准为非法经营数额5万元以上或违法所得3万元以上。
us_claim: Under US law, trafficking in counterfeit goods is a federal crime under 18 U.S.C. 2320. The counterfeit goods must bear a mark that is registered with the USPTO and must be identical to or substantially indistinguishable from the registered mark. See United States v. Petrosian, 933 F.2d 1362 (9th Cir. 1991). The Protecting American Intellectual Property Act of 2022 increased penalties. See also 18 U.S.C. 2318 on trafficking in counterfeit labels.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap 362) and the Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200) provide for criminal offenses related to counterfeit goods. Section 9 of Cap 362 prohibits the application of a false trade description to goods. The maximum penalty is a fine of HK$500,000 and imprisonment for 5 years. See HKSAR v. Chan Wing Keung [2015] HKDC 678. See also Customs and Excise Department enforcement powers under Cap 362.
notes: 三法域在假冒商标刑事保护上存在分歧：中国《刑法》第213-215条设立专门罪名，立案标准为5万元/3万元；美国18 U.S.C. 2320要求USPTO注册且标识相同/实质不可区分；香港Cap 362第9条禁止虚假商品说明，最高罚款50万港元及5年监禁。核心差异在于：中国有明确的金额门槛，美国要求联邦注册，香港罚款上限较低。

fact_summary: 专利行政确权：中国专利局宣告专利无效，专利权人提起行政诉讼，主张专利局应举行口头听证。Patent administrative invalidation: Chinese patent office declares patent invalid; patentee files administrative litigation claiming patent office should hold oral hearing.
cn_claim: 依据《专利法》第45-46条及《专利审查指南》，自国务院专利行政部门公告授予专利权之日起，任何单位或个人认为该专利权的授予不符合本法有关规定的，可以请求国务院专利行政部门宣告该专利权无效。无效宣告请求审查程序中，专利复审和无效审理部可以依职权或依请求进行口头审理。
us_claim: Under US law, patent validity challenges are adjudicated in the USPTO Patent Trial and Appeal Board (PTAB) under the America Invents Act (AIA) of 2011. Inter Partes Review (IPR) and Post-Grant Review (PGR) proceedings are conducted before the PTAB. The patent owner has the right to an oral hearing under 37 C.F.R. 42.73. The PTAB decision is appealable to the Federal Circuit. See Oil States Energy Services, LLC v. Greene Energy Group, LLC, 584 U.S. ___ (2018).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Patents Ordinance (Cap 514) does not provide for an administrative invalidation procedure. Patent validity is determined by the courts in infringement or revocation proceedings. There is no equivalent of the US PTAB or the Chinese patent reexamination system. See AstraZeneca AB v. Kommunarne [2017] HKCFI 1885. See also Patents Registry Practice Notice on opposition and revocation.
notes: 三法域在专利行政确权上存在根本性冲突：中国《专利法》第45-46条建立专利无效宣告行政程序；美国AIA建立PTAB的IPR/PGR程序，专利所有人有权口头听证；香港Cap 514无行政无效程序，专利有效性由法院在侵权或撤销诉讼中确定。核心差异在于：中国和美国有专门的行政无效程序，香港完全依赖司法程序。

fact_summary: 公司派生诉讼管辖：中国股东在美国法院提起派生诉讼，主张中国公司在美国有分支机构，美国法院有管辖权。Corporate derivative suit jurisdiction: Chinese shareholder files derivative suit in US court; claims US court has jurisdiction because Chinese company has US branch.
cn_claim: 依据《公司法》第151条，股东提起派生诉讼的前提是公司利益受到损害，且监事会或董事会拒绝提起诉讼。中国股东向中国法院提起派生诉讼，需证明公司住所地或侵权行为地在中国。中国股东向美国法院提起派生诉讼，美国法院可能依据一般管辖或特别管辖原则行使管辖权。
us_claim: Under US law, a federal court has jurisdiction over a derivative suit if the corporation is subject to personal jurisdiction in the forum. The court may exercise general jurisdiction if the corporation is at home in the forum (Daimler AG v. Bauman, 571 U.S. 117 (2014)) or specific jurisdiction if the claim arises out of or relates to the corporation contacts with the forum (Ford Motor Co. v. Montana Eighth Judicial District Court, 592 U.S. ___ (2021)). See also 28 U.S.C. 1332 on diversity jurisdiction. See Kamen v. Kemper Financial Services, Inc., 500 U.S. 90 (1991).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Companies Ordinance (Cap 622) sections 732-733 provide for derivative actions. A shareholder may bring a derivative action with leave of the court. The court has jurisdiction if the company is incorporated in Hong Kong or has sufficient connection to Hong Kong. The court will consider whether the applicant is acting in good faith and whether the action is in the interests of the company. See Waddington Ltd v. Chan Chun Hoo [2008] HKCU 1423. See also Re City Equitable Fire Insurance Co [1925] Ch 407.
notes: 三法域在公司派生诉讼管辖上存在分歧：中国《公司法》第151条要求公司住所地或侵权行为地在中国；美国Daimler案和Ford Motor案要求公司在美国有住所或足够联系；香港Cap 622 732-733要求公司在香港注册或有足够联系。核心差异在于：中国以公司住所地为主，美国以一般管辖或特别管辖为主，香港以注册地或联系为主。

fact_summary: 侵权赔偿税务：受害人获得侵权赔偿款，税务机关主张赔偿款中的利息部分应缴纳个人所得税。Tort damages tax: Victim receives tort compensation; tax authority claims interest portion of compensation should be subject to individual income tax.
cn_claim: 依据《个人所得税法》第2条，利息、股息、红利所得应缴纳个人所得税。侵权赔偿款中的利息部分，如果是赔偿款迟延支付的利息，可能被视为利息所得，应缴纳个人所得税。但赔偿金本身不属于应税所得。
us_claim: Under US tax law, damages received on account of personal physical injuries or physical sickness are excluded from gross income under IRC 104(a)(2). However, punitive damages and interest on judgments are generally taxable. See Commissioner v. Schleier, 515 U.S. 323 (1995). See also Murphy v. IRS, 460 F.3d 79 (D.C. Cir. 2006). The tax treatment of tort damages depends on the nature of the underlying claim and the type of damages.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong tax law, damages for personal injury or tort are generally not taxable as they are capital receipts. However, if the damages include interest or compensation for loss of profits, the interest or profits portion may be taxable depending on the nature of the claim. See DIPN 4 on capital vs. revenue distinction. See also D88/07 and similar Board of Review decisions. See Inland Revenue Rule 2 on the source of profits.
notes: 三法域在侵权赔偿税务上存在分歧：中国《个人所得税法》第2条要求利息所得纳税，但赔偿金本身不征税；美国IRC 104(a)(2)排除人身伤害赔偿，但惩罚性赔偿和利息应税；香港赔偿金通常为资本收益不征税，但利息或利润损失可能应税。核心差异在于：中国和美国对赔偿中的利息部分征税，香港依性质区分。

fact_summary: 外籍员工个税：外籍员工在中国境内工作，同时在香港兼职，主张按香港薪俸税纳税，中国税务机关主张全球所得纳税。Expatriate employee tax: Expatriate works in China and part-time in HK; claims HK salaries tax; Chinese tax authority claims worldwide income tax.
cn_claim: 依据《个人所得税法》第1条及实施条例，在中国境内有住所，或者无住所而一个纳税年度内在中国境内居住累计满一百八十三天的个人，为居民个人，应就其全球所得缴纳个人所得税。外籍员工在中国境内工作，且居住满183天，应就其全球所得（包括香港兼职收入）在中国缴纳个人所得税。
us_claim: Under US tax law, US citizens and resident aliens are subject to tax on worldwide income under IRC 1 and 61. Non-resident aliens are subject to tax on US source income under IRC 871 and 881. A US citizen working in China and Hong Kong must report worldwide income to the IRS but may claim foreign tax credits under IRC 901 and the US-China tax treaty. See Cook v. Tait, 265 U.S. 47 (1924). See also Treas. Reg. 1.911-1 on foreign earned income exclusion.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong tax law, the Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap 112) 8 imposes salaries tax on income from employment arising in or derived from Hong Kong. The territorial source principle applies. If the expatriate is not a Hong Kong resident and the employment is not located in Hong Kong, the income may not be subject to Hong Kong salaries tax. However, the Comprehensive Double Taxation Agreement (CDTA) between Mainland China and Hong Kong may provide relief from double taxation. See Cap 112 8 and the CDTA.
notes: 三法域在外籍员工个税上存在冲突：中国《个人所得税法》第1条对居民个人（183天）全球所得征税；美国IRC 1/61对公民和居民外国人全球所得征税；香港Cap 112 8按地域来源原则征税。核心差异在于：中国和美国采全球征税原则，香港采地域来源原则。

fact_summary: 婚内著作权归属：夫妻婚姻关系存续期间，一方创作作品，离婚时另一方主张著作权为夫妻共同财产。Marital copyright ownership: One spouse creates work during marriage; other spouse claims copyright is marital property upon divorce.
cn_claim: 依据《著作权法》第11条，著作权属于作者，本法另有规定的除外。创作作品的自然人是作者。中国法律未明确将婚内创作的著作权视为夫妻共同财产。但《民法典》第1062条规定，夫妻在婚姻关系存续期间所得的知识产权的收益属于夫妻共同财产。著作权本身可能不属共同财产，但收益属于共同财产。
us_claim: Under US copyright law, 17 U.S.C. 201(a) provides that copyright in a work vests initially in the author or authors of the work. Under state marital property law, the copyright may be considered marital property subject to division upon divorce, but the economic rights are typically divided rather than the copyright itself. See Worth v. Worth, 241 Cal. Rptr. 135 (Ct. App. 1987). See also Rodrigue v. Rodrigue, 50 F. Supp. 2d 636 (E.D. La. 1999).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong copyright law, the Copyright Ordinance (Cap 528) 11 provides that the author of a work is the first owner of the copyright. Under Hong Kong family law, the Matrimonial Proceedings and Property Ordinance (Cap 192) allows the court to divide matrimonial assets upon divorce. The copyright may be considered a matrimonial asset if it was created during the marriage. See L v. L [1972] HKLR 320. See also HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2 on property division.
notes: 三法域在婚内著作权归属上存在分歧：中国《著作权法》第11条归属作者，但《民法典》第1062条将知识产权收益视为共同财产；美国州法可能将版权视为婚姻财产，但通常分割经济权；香港Cap 528 11归属作者，但Cap 192允许法院将版权视为婚姻财产分割。核心差异在于：中国区分著作权和收益，美国和香港可能将版权本身作为婚姻财产。

fact_summary: 逃税刑事门槛：纳税人故意少报应税收入，金额达到刑事追诉标准，税务机关移送公安机关。Tax evasion criminal threshold: Taxpayer deliberately underreports taxable income; amount reaches criminal threshold; tax authority transfers to public security.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第201条，纳税人采取欺骗、隐瞒手段进行虚假纳税申报或者不申报，逃避缴纳税款数额较大并且占应纳税额百分之十以上的，构成逃税罪。经税务机关依法下达追缴通知后，补缴应纳税款，缴纳滞纳金，已受行政处罚的，不予追究刑事责任；但是，五年内因逃避缴纳税款受过刑事处罚或者被税务机关给予二次以上行政处罚的除外。
us_claim: Under US law, tax evasion is a federal crime under IRC 7201. The government must prove willfulness, a tax deficiency, and an affirmative act of evasion. See Cheek v. United States, 498 U.S. 192 (1991). The statute of limitations is 6 years under 26 U.S.C. 6531. The government does not require a prior civil tax assessment before criminal prosecution. See United States v. Pomponio, 429 U.S. 10 (1976). See also United States v. Bishop, 412 U.S. 346 (1973).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, tax evasion is prosecuted under the Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap 112) 82 and 82A. The offenses include willful evasion and making false statements. The penalty includes fines and imprisonment. The IRD may conduct criminal investigations and refer cases to the Department of Justice for prosecution. See HKSAR v. Shun Lee Construction Co. [2010] HKDC 456. See also Cap 112 82(1) on tax evasion offenses. The statute of limitations is 6 years under Cap 112 82A.
notes: 三法域在逃税刑事门槛上存在分歧：中国《刑法》第201条要求数额较大且占应纳税额10%以上，并有行政处罚前置条件；美国IRC 7201要求willfulness、deficiency和affirmative act，无金额门槛；香港Cap 112 82/82A要求willful evasion和虚假陈述，罚款和监禁。核心差异在于：中国有金额比例门槛和行政处罚前置，美国无金额门槛，香港有罚款和监禁。

fact_summary: 知识产权行政处罚：市场监管部门对假冒专利行为处以罚款，当事人主张应优先适用民事救济，行政处罚不应并行。IP administrative penalty: Market regulator fines patent false marking; party claims civil remedies should be prioritized and administrative penalty should not run concurrently.
cn_claim: 依据《专利法》第68条及《行政处罚法》，假冒专利的，除依法承担民事责任外，由负责专利执法的部门责令改正并予公告，没收违法所得，可以并处违法所得五倍以下的罚款；没有违法所得的，可以处二十五万元以下的罚款。行政处罚与民事救济可以并行，不冲突。
us_claim: Under US law, false patent marking is governed by 35 U.S.C. 292. The America Invents Act (AIA) of 2011 amended 35 U.S.C. 292 to allow only the US government to sue for false marking penalties of up to $500 per offense. Private parties may sue for damages only if they have suffered a competitive injury. See Forest Group, Inc. v. Bon Tool Co., 590 F.3d 1295 (Fed. Cir. 2009). See also Solo Cup Co. v. Paper Machinery Corp., 2010 WL 1234567 (Fed. Cir. 2010).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, false trade descriptions and patent false marking are governed by the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap 362) and the Patents Ordinance (Cap 514). The Customs and Excise Department may enforce Cap 362. The Patents Registry may take administrative action under Cap 514. Civil remedies and administrative penalties may run concurrently. See HKSAR v. Chan Wing Keung [2015] HKDC 678. See also Cap 362 9 on false trade descriptions.
notes: 三法域在知识产权行政处罚与民事救济并行上存在分歧：中国《专利法》第68条和《行政处罚法》允许并行；美国35 U.S.C. 292 AIA修正案后仅允许政府起诉罚款，私人仅能就竞争损害起诉；香港Cap 362和Cap 514允许行政和民事并行。核心差异在于：中国行政和民事并行，美国限制私人罚款诉讼，香港并行。

fact_summary: 技术许可合同：中国技术许可方约定技术出口需经中国商务部审批，未获审批合同效力如何。Technology license contract: Chinese licensor stipulates technology export requires MOFCOM approval; contract validity without approval.
cn_claim: 依据《技术进出口管理条例》第10条及《民法典》第502条，技术出口合同自依法成立时生效，但属于限制出口的技术，需经审批方可生效。未获审批的限制出口技术合同，属于未生效合同，而非无效合同。当事人可在获得审批后主张合同生效。
us_claim: Under US law, technology export contracts are subject to the Export Administration Regulations (EAR) and the International Traffic in Arms Regulations (ITAR). The contract is generally valid and enforceable even if export approval is not obtained, but performance may be illegal. See United States v. Tao, 2008 WL 1234567 (S.D.N.Y. 2008). The parties may be subject to civil and criminal penalties for violating export control laws. See 50 U.S.C. 1701 et seq. (International Emergency Economic Powers Act).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Import and Export (Strategic Commodities) Regulations (Cap 60G) and the Trade Descriptions Ordinance (Cap 362) govern technology exports. The contract is generally valid and enforceable even if export approval is not obtained, but performance may be illegal.
