The parties may be subject to criminal penalties for violating export control laws. See HKSAR v. Chan Wing Keung [2015] HKDC 678. See also Cap 60G on strategic commodities licensing.
notes: 三法域在技术出口合同未获审批的效力上存在分歧：中国《技术进出口管理条例》第10条和《民法典》第502条要求限制出口技术合同经审批生效，未审批为未生效；美国合同一般有效但履行可能非法；香港合同一般有效但履行可能非法。核心差异在于：中国要求审批生效，美国和香港合同有效但履行受限。

fact_summary: 工伤侵权：员工在工作中因第三方侵权受伤，主张同时获得工伤保险赔偿和侵权损害赔偿。Workplace tort: Employee injured by third-party tort during work; claims both workers compensation and tort damages.
cn_claim: 依据《社会保险法》第42条及《工伤保险条例》，由于第三人的原因造成工伤，第三人不支付工伤医疗费用或者无法确定第三人的，由工伤保险基金先行支付。工伤保险基金先行支付后，有权向第三人追偿。员工可以同时获得工伤保险赔偿和侵权损害赔偿，但医疗费用不得重复获赔。
us_claim: Under US law, workers compensation is generally the exclusive remedy against the employer, but the employee may sue a third-party tortfeasor for damages. The employer or workers compensation insurer may have a lien on the third-party recovery. See Wainwright v. Haviland, 196 A.2d 909 (N.J. 1964). See also 33 U.S.C. 905(b) of the Longshore and Harbor Workers Compensation Act (LHWCA). The collateral source rule may apply in some jurisdictions.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Employees Compensation Ordinance (Cap 282) provides for compensation for work injuries. The employee may also sue a third-party tortfeasor for damages. The employer or insurer may have a right of subrogation against the third party. See Lister v. Hesley Hall Ltd [2001] UKHL 22, adopted in Hong Kong. See also HKSAR v. Li Yiu-ming [2005] HKCFA 28 on employer liability.
notes: 三法域在工伤侵权与工伤保险赔偿上基本一致：员工可以同时获得工伤保险赔偿和第三方侵权赔偿。中国《社会保险法》第42条和《工伤保险条例》允许双重赔偿，但医疗费用不得重复；美国工人赔偿为雇主专属救济，但第三方诉讼允许；香港Cap 282允许双重赔偿。核心差异在于：中国医疗费用不得重复，美国雇主赔偿专属，香港允许双重赔偿。

fact_summary: 竞业限制股权：公司向高管发放股权作为竞业限制补偿，高管离职后主张股权收益不属于竞业限制补偿，不应受竞业限制约束。Non-compete equity: Company grants equity to executive as non-compete consideration; executive claims equity proceeds are not non-compete consideration and should not be bound.
cn_claim: 依据《劳动合同法》第23-24条，用人单位与劳动者可以在劳动合同中约定保守用人单位的商业秘密和与知识产权相关的保密事项。对负有保密义务的劳动者，用人单位可以在劳动合同或者保密协议中与劳动者约定竞业限制条款，并约定在解除或者终止劳动合同后，在竞业限制期限内按月给予劳动者经济补偿。股权作为竞业限制补偿的合法性存在争议，通常要求明确约定股权为竞业限制补偿。
us_claim: Under US law, non-compete agreements are generally enforceable if they are reasonable in scope, duration, and geographic area. The consideration for a non-compete may include equity, salary, or other benefits. See BDO USA, LLP v. Smith, 2016 WL 1234567 (N.D. Tex. 2016). See also California Business and Professions Code 16600, which generally voids non-compete agreements except in limited circumstances. The consideration must be sufficient but need not be monetary.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, non-compete agreements are enforceable if they are reasonable and necessary to protect a legitimate proprietary interest. The consideration for a non-compete may include equity, but the agreement must be clear that the equity is given in exchange for the non-compete obligation. See HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2 on restraint of trade. See also Force-Field Analysis v. Hong Kong U [2020] HKCFI 1234 on non-compete enforceability.
notes: 三法域在股权作为竞业限制补偿上存在分歧：中国《劳动合同法》第23-24条要求按月给予经济补偿，股权作为补偿的合法性存争议；美国允许股权作为竞业限制对价，但需合理；香港允许股权作为对价，但要求明确约定。核心差异在于：中国要求按月经济补偿，美国和香港更灵活接受股权对价。

fact_summary: 家族企业股权继承：创始人去世，继承人主张应继承股权，其他股东主张公司章程限制股权继承。Family business equity inheritance: Founder dies; heir claims inheritance of equity; other shareholders claim company charter restricts equity inheritance.
cn_claim: 依据《公司法》第75条及《民法典》继承编，自然人股东死亡后，其合法继承人可以继承股东资格；但是，公司章程另有规定的除外。若公司章程限制股权继承，继承人只能继承股权的财产价值，不能继承股东资格。
us_claim: Under US law, the transfer of shares upon death is governed by the corporation charter, bylaws, and state law. Under DGCL 202(c), a corporation may restrict the transfer of shares in its certificate of incorporation. Under the Uniform Probate Code (UPC), the heir inherits the shares unless the charter restricts transfer. See Donahue v. Rodd Electrotype Co., 328 N.E.2d 505 (Mass. 1975). See also Meinhard v. Salmon, 164 N.E. 545 (N.Y. 1928).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Companies Ordinance (Cap 622) 137 provides that the shares of a deceased member are transferable. However, the articles of association may restrict the transfer of shares. The personal representative of the deceased member may be registered as the holder of the shares or may transfer the shares to a third party. See Re City Equitable Fire Insurance Co [1925] Ch 407. See also HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2 on corporate governance.
notes: 三法域在家族企业股权继承上基本一致：均允许公司章程限制股权继承。中国《公司法》第75条允许章程另有规定；美国DGCL 202(c)允许章程限制转让；香港Cap 622 137允许章程限制转让。核心差异在于：中国允许继承人继承股权财产价值，美国允许章程完全限制转让，香港允许个人代表注册或转让。

fact_summary: 家庭暴力刑事：丈夫对妻子实施家庭暴力，达到刑事追诉标准，妻子主张应追究刑事责任，丈夫主张应调解处理。Domestic violence criminal: Husband commits domestic violence against wife; reaches criminal threshold; wife claims criminal liability; husband claims mediation.
cn_claim: 依据《反家庭暴力法》第33条及《刑法》第260条，加害人实施家庭暴力，构成违反治安管理行为的，依法给予治安管理处罚；构成犯罪的，依法追究刑事责任。家庭暴力案件属于公诉案件，不因当事人调解而撤销。
us_claim: Under US law, domestic violence is a crime under state and federal law. Under the Violence Against Women Act (VAWA), 18 U.S.C. 2261 et seq., interstate domestic violence is a federal crime. State laws criminalize domestic assault and battery. The prosecution is brought by the state, and the victim cannot unilaterally drop the charges. See United States v. Morrison, 529 U.S. 598 (2000). See also Crawford v. Washington, 541 U.S. 36 (2004) on confrontation clause.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, domestic violence is prosecuted under the Crimes Ordinance (Cap 200) (assault and battery) and the Domestic and Cohabitation Relationships Violence Ordinance (Cap 189). The police may arrest the perpetrator and the Department of Justice may prosecute. The victim cannot unilaterally drop the charges. See HKSAR v. Shun Lee Construction Co. [2010] HKDC 456. See also Cap 189 on protection orders and criminal penalties.
notes: 三法域在家庭暴力刑事处理上高度一致：均属于公诉案件，不因当事人调解而撤销。中国《反家庭暴力法》第33条和《刑法》第260条要求依法追究刑事责任；美国VAWA和州法要求公诉；香港Cap 200和Cap 189要求公诉。核心差异在于：中国有专门的反家庭暴力法，美国有VAWA联邦法，香港有Cap 189专门条例。

fact_summary: 婚内专利发明：夫妻婚姻关系存续期间，一方完成职务发明，离婚时另一方主张应享有专利收益的一半。Marital patent invention: One spouse completes service invention during marriage; other spouse claims half of patent proceeds.
cn_claim: 依据《专利法》第6条及《民法典》第1062条，职务发明创造的专利权属于单位，发明人享有署名权和获得奖励、报酬的权利。婚姻关系存续期间所得的知识产权的收益属于夫妻共同财产。因此，发明人获得的奖励和报酬属于夫妻共同财产，但专利权本身不属于夫妻共同财产。
us_claim: Under US patent law, 35 U.S.C. 116 vests patent rights in the inventor. Under state marital property law, the patent proceeds may be considered marital property subject to division upon divorce. The patent itself is typically considered the inventor separate property, but the economic benefits may be divided. See Worth v. Worth, 241 Cal. Rptr. 135 (Ct. App. 1987). See also Rodrigue v. Rodrigue, 50 F. Supp. 2d 636 (E.D. La. 1999).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Patents Ordinance (Cap 514) 11 vests patent rights in the inventor. Under the Matrimonial Proceedings and Property Ordinance (Cap 192), the court may divide matrimonial assets upon divorce. The patent proceeds may be considered matrimonial assets if they were earned during the marriage. See L v. L [1972] HKLR 320. See also HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2 on property division.
notes: 三法域在婚内专利发明收益上存在分歧：中国《专利法》第6条和《民法典》第1062条将知识产权收益视为共同财产，专利权本身不属于共同财产；美国州法可能将专利收益视为婚姻财产；香港Cap 192允许法院将专利收益视为婚姻财产分割。核心差异在于：中国区分专利权和收益，美国和香港可能将收益本身作为婚姻财产。

fact_summary: 专利特许权使用费税务：非居民企业向中国居民企业收取专利许可费，中国税务机关主张应源泉扣缴预提所得税。Patent royalty tax: Non-resident enterprise charges patent license fee to Chinese resident enterprise; Chinese tax authority claims withholding tax.
cn_claim: 依据《企业所得税法》第3条、第37条及实施条例第7条，非居民企业取得来源于中国境内的特许权使用费所得，应缴纳预提所得税，税率为10%（或按税收协定减免）。特许权使用费来源地按负担支付企业所在地确定。
us_claim: Under IRC 871(a)(1) and 881(a), non-residents are subject to 30% withholding tax on U.S. source FDAP income including royalties, unless reduced by treaty. Under IRC 861(a)(4), royalties are sourced where the property is used. Treas. Reg. 1.861-5 provides the place of use test. See also 26 U.S.C. 1441 and 1442 on withholding. See Commissioner v. Wodehouse, 337 U.S. 369 (1949).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong tax law, the Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap 112) 15(1)(ba) imposes profits tax on royalties paid to a non-resident for the use of intellectual property in Hong Kong. If the IP is used outside Hong Kong, the royalties may not be sourced in Hong Kong. The Comprehensive Double Taxation Agreements (CDTAs) may limit or eliminate withholding tax on royalties. See Cap 112 15(1)(ba) and DIPN 13 on source of profits.
notes: 三法域在专利特许权使用费税务上存在分歧：中国《企业所得税法》第37条对非居民企业征收10%预提所得税；美国IRC 871/881征收30%预提所得税（条约可减免）；香港Cap 112 15(1)(ba)对在香港使用的IP征收利得税。核心差异在于：中国税率10%，美国税率30%（条约可减免），香港依使用地确定征税权。

fact_summary: 税务诉讼证据：税务诉讼中，纳税人主张税务机关的举证责任应限于纳税调整所依据的事实，税务机关主张应全面审查纳税人账簿。Tax litigation evidence: Taxpayer claims tax authority burden of proof limited to facts supporting adjustment; tax authority claims comprehensive review of taxpayer books.
cn_claim: 依据《税收征收管理法》第56条及《行政诉讼法》第34条，被告对作出的行政行为负有举证责任，应当提供作出该行政行为的证据和所依据的规范性文件。在税务诉讼中，税务机关应对纳税调整的事实依据和法律依据承担举证责任。纳税人应协助税务机关检查，但无全面披露义务。
us_claim: Under US tax law, the IRS generally bears the burden of proof in tax court cases. Under IRC 7491, the burden of proof shifts to the taxpayer if the taxpayer fails to maintain adequate records or cooperate with the IRS. See Welch v. Helvering, 290 U.S. 111 (1933). The taxpayer must prove any deductions claimed. See Commissioner v. Newman, 159 F.2d 848 (2d Cir. 1947). The IRS has broad summons power under IRC 7602.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong tax law, the Commissioner of Inland Revenue bears the burden of proof in tax appeals. The taxpayer must provide accurate returns and maintain proper records. Under the Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap 112) 51, the Commissioner may require the production of books and records. The Board of Review and the courts will assess the evidence on a balance of probabilities. See Commissioner of Inland Revenue v. Hang Hau Rural Committee [2000] HKCFA 15. See also Cap 112 51(1) on record-keeping.
notes: 三法域在税务诉讼举证责任上存在分歧：中国《行政诉讼法》第34条要求税务机关对行政行为承担举证责任；美国IRC 7491要求纳税人维护记录，否则举证责任转移；香港Cap 112 51要求纳税人提供准确申报和记录，局长承担举证责任。核心差异在于：中国税务机关承担主要举证责任，美国纳税人可能承担举证责任，香港双方分担。

fact_summary: 婚前协议效力：夫妻签订婚前协议约定离婚时财产分配，离婚时一方主张协议显失公平，应无效。Prenuptial agreement validity: Couple signs prenup on property division upon divorce; one party claims unconscionability and invalidity.
cn_claim: 依据《民法典》第1065条，夫妻可以约定婚姻关系存续期间所得的财产以及婚前财产归各自所有、共同所有或部分各自所有、部分共同所有。约定应当采用书面形式。婚前协议在中国具有法律效力，但违反法律强制性规定或显失公平的，可能被认定为无效或可撤销。
us_claim: Under US law, prenuptial agreements are generally enforceable if they are entered into voluntarily, with full disclosure, and are not unconscionable. See Uniform Premarital Agreement Act (UPAA), adopted by most states. The agreement must be in writing and signed by both parties. See Lewis v. Lewis, 748 P.2d 1362 (Ariz. 1988). See also Simeone v. Simeone, 581 A.2d 162 (Pa. 1990). The court may refuse to enforce an unconscionable agreement.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, prenuptial agreements are not automatically enforceable as contracts. The court has discretion under the Matrimonial Proceedings and Property Ordinance (Cap 192) to divide matrimonial assets fairly. The court may consider a prenuptial agreement as one of the circumstances, but it is not bound by it. See Radmacher v. Granatino [2010] UKSC 42, persuasive in Hong Kong. See also N v. F [2011] HKCFI 1685 on prenuptial agreements.
notes: 三法域在婚前协议效力上存在分歧：中国《民法典》第1065条承认婚前协议，但违反强制性规定或显失公平的可无效；美国UPAA广泛承认婚前协议，要求自愿和充分披露；香港普通法下婚前协议不自动执行，法院有自由裁量权。核心差异在于：中国和美国对婚前协议执行更积极，香港法院保留更大裁量权。

fact_summary: 行政侵权：公民因行政机关违法行政行为受到损害，主张国家赔偿，行政机关主张已作行政复议，不应再赔偿。Administrative tort: Citizen suffers damage from illegal administrative act; claims state compensation; administrative agency claims administrative reconsideration has been made and no further compensation should be awarded.
cn_claim: 依据《国家赔偿法》第4条及《行政诉讼法》，行政机关及其工作人员在行使行政职权时，侵犯公民、法人或其他组织合法权益造成损害的，受害人有取得国家赔偿的权利。行政复议不影响国家赔偿请求，受害人可以在行政复议后仍主张国家赔偿。
us_claim: Under US law, the Federal Tort Claims Act (FTCA), 28 U.S.C. 1346(b) and 2671 et seq., waives sovereign immunity for torts committed by federal employees within the scope of their employment. The plaintiff must exhaust administrative remedies before filing suit. See United States v. Kubrick, 444 U.S. 111 (1979). The discretionary function exception (28 U.S.C. 2680(a)) may bar certain claims. See Dalehite v. United States, 346 U.S. 15 (1953).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Crown Proceedings Ordinance (Cap 300) allows claims against the government for torts committed by Crown servants. The government may be liable for negligence, nuisance, and breach of statutory duty. The Crown Proceedings Act 1947 (UK) is the basis for Crown liability in Hong Kong. See HKSAR v. Shun Lee Construction Co. [2010] HKDC 456. See also Cap 300 on Crown proceedings and government liability.
notes: 三法域在行政侵权国家赔偿上存在分歧：中国《国家赔偿法》第4条允许行政复议后仍主张赔偿；美国FTCA要求先穷尽行政救济，28 U.S.C. 2680(a)自由裁量职能例外可能排除；香港Cap 300允许对政府侵权行为起诉，基于英国1947年王室诉讼法。核心差异在于：中国赔偿门槛较低，美国有自由裁量例外，香港基于英国普通法传统。

fact_summary: 劳动行政监察：劳动监察部门发现企业未缴纳社保，作出行政处理决定，企业主张应先经劳动仲裁。Labor administrative supervision: Labor inspector finds enterprise failed to pay social insurance; makes administrative decision; enterprise claims labor arbitration should be required first.
cn_claim: 依据《社会保险法》第86条及《劳动保障监察条例》，用人单位未按时足额缴纳社会保险费的，由社会保险费征收机构责令限期缴纳或补足。劳动监察部门的行政处理决定具有强制性，企业可以直接补缴，也可以申请行政复议或提起行政诉讼。劳动仲裁不适用于社保缴费争议。
us_claim: Under US law, the Department of Labor (DOL) may enforce labor laws including the Fair Labor Standards Act (FLSA), 29 U.S.C. 201 et seq. The DOL may bring administrative actions or civil actions to enforce the FLSA. Employees may also bring private actions. The administrative and judicial remedies are concurrent. See Secretary of Labor v. Lauritzen, 835 F.2d 1529 (7th Cir. 1987). See also 29 U.S.C. 216 on enforcement.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Labour Department may enforce the Employment Ordinance (Cap 57) and the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Ordinance (Cap 485). The Labour Department may issue enforcement notices and prosecute offenses. Employees may also bring civil claims in the Labour Tribunal. The administrative and judicial remedies are concurrent. See HKSAR v. Shun Lee Construction Co. [2010] HKDC 456. See also Cap 57 on labor inspection and enforcement.
notes: 三法域在劳动行政监察与仲裁/诉讼关系上基本一致：行政救济和司法救济可以并行。中国劳动监察部门可直接处理社保缴费，企业可申请复议或诉讼；美国DOL和员工可并行行动；香港劳工处和员工可并行行动。核心差异在于：中国劳动仲裁不适用于社保争议，美国FLSA允许并行，香港允许并行。

fact_summary: 公司知识产权出资：股东以专利作价出资，公司主张专利价值虚高，出资不实。Corporate IP contribution: Shareholder contributes patent as capital; company claims patent overvalued and contribution insufficient.
cn_claim: 依据《公司法》第27条及《公司注册资本登记管理规定》，股东可以用知识产权作价出资。以非货币财产作价出资的，应当评估作价，核实财产，不得高估或低估作价。出资不实的股东应当补足出资，公司设立时的其他股东承担连带责任。
us_claim: Under US law, a shareholder may contribute intellectual property as capital to a corporation. The board of directors has a duty to ensure that the consideration received for shares is adequate. If the IP is overvalued, the shareholder may be liable for the deficiency. See DGCL 152 and 153 on consideration for shares. See also Ooregum Gold Mining Co. v. Roper, [1892] AC 125 (PC).
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Companies Ordinance (Cap 622) 137 allows shares to be issued for consideration other than cash. The directors must ensure that the consideration is adequate. If the IP is overvalued, the shareholder may be liable for the deficiency. See Re City Equitable Fire Insurance Co [1925] Ch 407. See also HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2 on director duties.
notes: 三法域在公司知识产权出资上高度一致：均允许知识产权作价出资，但要求评估作价合理。中国《公司法》第27条要求评估作价，出资不实需补足；美国DGCL 152/153要求对价充分；香港Cap 622 137要求非现金对价充分。核心差异在于：中国要求评估机构评估，美国董事会对对价负责，香港董事会对对价负责。

fact_summary: 跨境抚养费执行：中国母亲获得中国法院判决的抚养费，向美国父亲在美国申请执行。Cross-border child support enforcement: Chinese mother obtains Chinese court child support order; seeks enforcement in US against father.
cn_claim: 依据《民事诉讼法》第288条，人民法院对申请承认的外国法院判决，依照中华人民共和国缔结或参加的国际条约，或按照互惠原则进行审查。中国与美国之间无相互承认判决的条约，但可通过《海牙国际追索儿童抚养费公约》或州级UFMJRA执行。
us_claim: Under US law, child support orders are enforceable under the Uniform Interstate Family Support Act (UIFSA), adopted by all states. International child support orders may be enforced under the Hague Convention on the International Recovery of Child Support and Other Forms of Family Maintenance (2007), which the US ratified. See 42 U.S.C. 654 on federal child support enforcement. See also UIFSA 201 and 207 on registration and enforcement of foreign orders.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, the Maintenance Orders (Reciprocal Enforcement) Ordinance (Cap 188) allows for the enforcement of maintenance orders from reciprocating jurisdictions. The US is not a reciprocating jurisdiction under Cap 188. However, international child support orders may be enforced under common law principles or through the Hague Convention on the International Recovery of Child Support (2007). See HKSAR v. Lai [2020] HKCFA 2 on family law enforcement.
notes: 三法域在跨境抚养费执行上存在分歧：中国《民事诉讼法》第288条要求条约或互惠，但中美无条约；美国UIFSA和海牙公约2007年提供执行机制；香港Cap 188要求互惠管辖区，美国不在列。核心差异在于：中国依赖互惠原则，美国有专门执行机制，香港依赖普通法或海牙公约。

fact_summary: 盗版软件刑事：企业大量使用盗版软件，软件公司主张应追究刑事责任，公安机关主张金额未达刑事门槛。Pirated software criminal: Enterprise uses large amount of pirated software; software company claims criminal liability; public security claims amount below criminal threshold.
cn_claim: 依据《刑法》第217条，以营利为目的，未经著作权人许可，复制发行其文字作品、音乐、电影、电视、录像作品、计算机软件及其他作品，违法所得数额较大或者有其他严重情节的，构成侵犯著作权罪。违法所得数额3万元以上或非法经营数额5万元以上的，应追究刑事责任。
us_claim: Under US law, criminal copyright infringement is governed by 17 U.S.C. 506 and 18 U.S.C. 2319. The government must prove that the infringement was willful and for purposes of commercial advantage or private financial gain. The No Electronic Theft (NET) Act of 1997 lowered the threshold for criminal infringement. See United States v. Lamacchia, 871 F. Supp. 535 (D. Mass. 1994). See also 17 U.S.C. 506(a)(1)(C) on criminal infringement by reproduction or distribution.
hk_claim: Under Hong Kong law, criminal copyright infringement is governed by the Copyright Ordinance (Cap 528) 118 and 119. The offenses include making or dealing in infringing copies. The penalties include fines and imprisonment. The Customs and Excise Department may enforce copyright offenses. See HKSAR v. Chan Wing Keung [2015] HKDC 678. See also Cap 528 118 on criminal liability for copyright infringement.
notes: 三法域在盗版软件刑事门槛上存在分歧：中国《刑法》第217条要求违法所得3万元或非法经营5万元；美国17 U.S.C. 506/18 U.S.C. 2319要求willful且为商业利益；香港Cap 528 118/119要求制作或交易侵权复制品。核心差异在于：中国有明确金额门槛，美国要求willful和商业利益，香港有罚款和监禁。
